Genesis1:1 Pakutanga Mwari akasika denga nenyika. 
Genesis1:2 Nyika yakanga isina ku­gadzirwa, isina chinhu; rima rakanga riripo pamusoro pemvura yakadzika; Mweya waMwari wakanga uchigarira pamusoro pemvura." 
Genesis1:3 Mwari akati: Chie­dza ngachivepo, chiedza chikavapo." 
Genesis1:4 Mwari akaona chiedza, kuti chaka­naka; Mwari akaparadzanisa chiedza nerima." 
Genesis1:5 Mwari akatumidza chiedza, akati Masikati, nerima akaritumidza akati Usiku. Madeko akavapo, nama­ngwanani akavapo, zuva rimwe." 
Genesis1:6 Mwari akati: Nzvimbo ngaivepo pakati pemvura, kuti iparadzanise mvura nemvura." 
Genesis1:7 Mwari akaita nzvimbo, akapa­radzanisa mvura yakanga iri pasi penzvi­mbo, nemvura yakanga iri pamusoro penzvimbo; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:8 Mwari akatumidza nzvimbo, akati Denga. Ma­deko akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva repiri." 
Genesis1:9 Mwari akati: Mvura iri pasi pede­nga ngaiungane pamwechete, kuti pasi pakaoma paonekwe; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:10 Mwari akatumidza pasi pakaoma, akati Nyika; nemvura yakaungana akaitumi­dza, akati Makungwa; Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:11 Mwari akati: Nyika ngai­merese uswa nemiriwo inobereka mbeu, nemiti inobereka michero inamarudzi ayo, mbeu dzayo dziri mukati mayo, panyika; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:12 Nyika ika­meresa uswa, nemiriwo inobereka mbeu dzina marudzi adzo, nemiti inobereka michero, mbeu dzayo dziri mukati mayo, inamarudzi ayo; Mwari akaona kuti zva­kanaka." 
Genesis1:13 Madeko akavapo namangwa­nani akavapo zuva retatu. 
Genesis1:14 Mwari akati: Zviedza ngazvivepo panzvimbo yedenga, kuti zviparadzanise masikati nousiku; kuti zvive zviratidzo, nenguva, namazuva, namakore;" 
Genesis1:15 nga­zvive zviedza panzvimbo yedenga, kuti zvivhenekere panyika; zvikaita saizvo­zvo." 
Genesis1:16 Mwari akaita zviedza zvikuru zviviri; chiedza chikuru kuti chibate ushe masikati, nechiedza chiduku, kuti chibate ushe usiku, nenyeredziwo." 
Genesis1:17 Mwari aka­zviisa pasi penzvimbo yedenga, kuti zvivhenekere panyika," 
Genesis1:18 zvibate ushe masikati nousiku, nokuparadzanisa chie­dza nerima; Mwari akaona kuti zvaka­naka." 
Genesis1:19 Madeko akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva rechina." 
Genesis1:20 Mwari akati: Mvura ngaizare ne­zvipenyu zvizhinji, neshiri dzibhuru­ruke pamusoro penyika munzvimbo ye­denga." 
Genesis1:21 Mwari akasika mhuka huru dzegungwa, nezvipenyu zvose zvinoka­mbaira, izvo mvura yakanga izere na­zvo, zvina marudzi azvo, neshiri dzose dzina mapapiro, dzina marudzi adzo; Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:22 Mwari akazviropafadza, akati: Berekai, muwa­nde, muzadze mvura iri mumakungwa; neshiri ngadziwande panyika." 
Genesis1:23 Ma­deko akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva reshanu." 
Genesis1:24 Mwari akati: Nyika ngaibereke zvipenyu zvina marudzi azvo, nezvi­pfuwo, nezvinokambaira, nemhuka dze­nyika, zvina marudzi azvo; zvikaita sai­zvozvo." 
Genesis1:25 Mwari akaita mhuka dzenyika dzina marudzi adzo, nezvipfuwo zvina marudzi azvo, nezvinhu zvose zvinoka­mbaira panyika zvina marudzi azvo; Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:26 Mwari akati: Ngatiite munhu no­mufananidzo wedu, akafanana nesu; ngaave nesimba pamusoro pehove dzegu­ngwa, napamusoro peshiri dzedenga, na­pamusoro pezvipfuwo, napamusoro pe­nyika yose, napamusoro pezvipenyu zvose zvinokambaira panyika." 
Genesis1:27 Mwari akasika munhu nomufananidzo waMwari; akavasika murume nomukadzi. 
Genesis1:28 Mwari akavaropafadza, Mwari akati kwavari: Berekai, muwande, muzadze nyika, mubate ushe pairi; muve nesimba pamusoro pehove dzegungwa, napamu­soro peshiri dzedenga, napamusoro pe­zvipenyu zvose zvinokambaira panyika." 
Genesis1:29 Mwari akati: Tarirai, ndakakupai mi­riwo yose inobereka mbeu, iri panyika yose, nemiti yose ine michero yemiti inobereka mbeu, kuti zvive zvokudya zvenyu." 
Genesis1:30 Mhuka dzose dzenyika, neshiri dzose dzedenga, nezvipenyu zvose zvino­kambaira panyika, zvinemweya woupe­nyu, ndakazvipa miriwo yose minyoro, kuti zvive zvokudya zvazvo; zvikaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:31 Mwari akaona zvose zvaa­kaita, onei zvakanaka kwazvo. Madeko akavapo, namangwanani akavapo, zuva retanhatu." 
Genesis2:1 Denga nenyika zvikapera saizvo­zvo, nouzhinji hwazvo." 
Genesis2:2 Mwari aka­pedza basa rake raakaita nomusi wechi­nomwe; akazorora nomusi wechinomwe pabasa rake rose raakaita. 
Genesis2:3 Mwari akaro­pafadza musi wechinomwe, akauita mu­tsvene; nokuti akazorora nawo pabasa rake rose, raakanga asika nokuita iye Mwari." 
Genesis2:4 Ndiko kuvamba kwedenga nenyika, musi wazvakasikwa: Nezuva iroro Jeho­vha Mwari raakasika naro nyika nedenga," 
Genesis2:5 makwenzi esango akanga achigere ku­vapo panyika, nemiriwo yesango yaka­nga ichigere kumera; nokuti Jehovha Mwari akanga asati anaisa mvura pa­nyika, uye kwakanga kusina munhu ku­zorima pasi;" 
Genesis2:6 asi mhute yaisikwira ichi­bva panyika ichinyorevesa nyika yose. 
Genesis2:7 Jehovha Mwari akaumba munhu neguruva revhu, akafuridzira mweya woupenyu mumhino dzake; munhu akava mweya mupenyu." 
Genesis2:8 Jehovha Mwari akasima munda muEdheni, kumabvazuva, akaisapo mu­nhu waakanga aumba." 
Genesis2:9 Jehovha Mwari akameresa pasi miti yose inofadza meso, neyakanaka kudya; uye muti woupenyu pakati pomunda, nomuti wokuziva zva­kanaka nezvakaipa." 
Genesis2:10 MuEdheni muka­buda rwizi kuzodiridza munda uyo, ruka­paradzana ipapo, dzikaita hova ina." 
Genesis2:11 Zita rorwokutanga ndiPishoni; ndirwo runo­poteredza nyika yose yeHavhira, pane ndarama ipapo;" 
Genesis2:12 ndarama yenyika iyoyo yakanaka; uyewo pane dheriumu nebwe reonikisi. 
Genesis2:13 Zita rorwizi rwechipiri ndiGihoni; ndirwo runopoteredza nyika yose yeKushi. 
Genesis2:14 Zita rorwizi rwechitatu ndiHedhekeri, ndirwo runoyerera kumabva­zuva kweAsiria. Rwizi rwechina ndiYu­furatesi." 
Genesis2:15 Jehovha Mwari akatora munhu, akamuisa mumunda weEdheni, kuti au­rime nokuuchengeta." 
Genesis2:16 Jehovha Mwari akaraira munhu achiti, ""Ungadya hako miti yose yomunda," 
Genesis2:17 asi muti wokuziva zvakanaka nezvakaipa usaudya; nokuti nomusi waunoudya, uchafa zvirokwa­zvo.""" 
Genesis2:18 Jehovha Mwari akatizve, ""Ha­zvina kunaka kuti munhu agare ari woga; ndichamuitira mubatsiri akamukwanira.""" 
Genesis2:19 Jehovha Mwari akaumba nevhu mhuka dzose dzesango, neshiri dzose dzedenga, akadziisa kumunhu kuti aone kuti acha­dzitumidza mazita api; zvipenyu zvose sezvazvakatumidzwa nomunhu, ndiwo akava mazita azvo." 
Genesis2:20 Munhu akatumidza zvipfuwo zvose mazita, neshiri dzedenga, nemhuka dzose dzesango; asi kwakashai­kwa mubatsiri akamukwanira iye munhu." 
Genesis2:21 Ipapo Jehovha Mwari akavatisa munhu hope huru, akavata; akatora ru­mbabvu rwake rumwe, akadzivira nyama panzvimbo yarwo." 
Genesis2:22 Norumbabvu urwo Jehovha Mwari rwaakatora pamunhu, akaita mukadzi narwo, akamuisa kumu­nhu." 
Genesis2:23 Munhu akati, ""Zvino uyu ipfupa ramapfupa angu, nenyama yenyama ya­ngu, uchatumidzwa Mukadzi, nokuti wa­kabviswa paMurume.""" 
Genesis2:24 Naizvozvo munhu anofanira ku­siya baba vake namai vake, anamatire mukadzi wake, vave nyama imwe." 
Genesis2:25 Vose vari vaviri vakanga vasina kusi­mira, munhu nomukadzi wake, asi ha­vana kunyara." 
Genesis3:1 Zvino nyoka yakanga ina mano kupfuura mhuka dzose dzesango dzakanga dzaitwa naJehovha Mwari. Ikati kumukadzi, ""Nhai, ndizvo here kuti Mwari akati, `Regai kudya miti yose yomunda?' """ 
Genesis3:2 Mukadzi akati kunyoka, ""Tingadya hedu michero yemiti pamunda," 
Genesis3:3 asi kana iri michero yomuti uri pakati pomunda, Mwari akati, `Regai kuudya, kana kuu­bata, kuti murege kufa.' """ 
Genesis3:4 Nyoka ikati kumukadzi, ""Hamu­ngafi zviro kwazvo," 
Genesis3:5 nokuti Mwari ano­ziva kuti nomusi wamunoudya nawo, meso enyu achasvinudzwa, mukava saMwari, muchiziva zvakanaka nezva­kaipa.""" 
Genesis3:6 Zvino mukadzi akati achiona kuti muti wakanaka kudyiwa, uye kuti unofa­dza meso, uye kuti muti unodikamwa kungwadza munhu, akatora muchero yawo, akadya, akapawo murume wake, akadya naiyewo." 
Genesis3:7 Ipapo meso avo, ivo vaviri, akasvinudzwa, vakaziva kuti ha­vana kusimira; vakasonanidza mashizha omuonde, vakazviitira nguvo." 
Genesis3:8 Vakanzwa inzwi raJehovha Mwari achifamba mumu­nda kotonhorera madekwana, munhu nomukadzi wake ndokundohwanda pa­mberi paJehovha Mwari pakati pemiti yomunda." 
Genesis3:9 Jehovha Mwari akadana mu­nhu, akati kwaari, ""Uripiko?""" 
Genesis3:10 Iye akati, ""Ndakanzwa inzwi renyu mumunda, ndikatya, nokuti ndakanga ndisina kusimira, ndikahwanda.""" 
Genesis3:11 Iye akati, ""Ndianiko akakuudza kuti hauna kusimira? Wakadya kanhi muti wandakakuraira kuti urege kuu­dya?""" 
Genesis3:12 Munhu akati, ""Mukadzi wamaka­ndipa kuti ave neni, ndiye wakandipa zvomuti ndikadya.""" 
Genesis3:13 Jehovha Mwari akati kumukadzi, ""Chiiko icho chawakaita?"" Mukadzi akati, ""Nyoka yakandinyengera, ndika­dya.""" 
Genesis3:14 Jehovha Mwari akati kunyoka, ""Zvawaita izvozvo, watukwa kupfuura mhuka dzose dzesango; uchafamba nedu­mbu rako, uchadya guruva mazuva ose oupenyu hwako." 
Genesis3:15 Ndichaisa ruvengo pa­kati pako nomukadzi, napakati porudzi rwako norudzi rwake, irwo rwuchapwa­nya musoro wako, newe uchapwanya chitsitsinho charwo.""" 
Genesis3:16 Kumukadzi akati, ""Ndichawanza zvikuru kurwadziwa kwako nokutora mi­mba kwako, uchabereka vana uchirwa­dziwa; kuda kwako kuchava kumurume wako, iye achava ishe wako.""" 
Genesis3:17 Kumunhu akati, ""Zvawakateerera inzwi romukadzi wako, ukadya muti wa­ndakakuraira ndichiti, `Usaudya, zvino nyika yatukwa nemhosva yako, uchadya zvibereko zvayo nokutambudzika ma­zuva ose oupenyu hwako;" 
Genesis3:18 ichakubere­kera mhinzwa norukato, iwe uchadya mi­riwo yomusango;" 
Genesis3:19 uchadya zvokudya zvako neziya rechiso chako kusvikira wadzokera kuvhu; nokuti wakatorwa kwariri. Zvauri guruva, uchadzokerazve kuguruva.' """ 
Genesis3:20 Munhu akatumidza mukadzi wake zita rinonzi Evha; nokuti ndiye mai vavapenyu vose. 
Genesis3:21 Jehovha Mwari akai­tira munhu nomukadzi wake nguvo dza­matehwe, akavafukidza nadzo." 
Genesis3:22 Zvino Jehovha Mwari akati, ""Ta­rirai, munhu ava somumwe wedu zvaanoziva zvakanaka nezvakaipa; zvino zvi­mwe angatambanudza ruoko rwake aka­torawo zvomuti woupenyu, akadya, aka­rarama nokusingaperi.""" 
Genesis3:23 Naizvozvo Jehovha Mwari akamubudisa mumunda weEdheni, kuti arime ivhu raakatorwa kwariri." 
Genesis3:24 Naizvozvo akadzinga munhu, akaisa makerubhi kurutivi rwamabva­zuva rwomunda weEdheni, nomurazvo womunondo waimonereka kumativi ose, kurindira nzira yomuti woupenyu." 
Genesis4:1 Zvino Adhamu wakaziva mukadzi wake Evha; iye ndokutora mimba, akapona Kaini, akati, ""Ndawana munhu, ndichibatsirwa naJehovha.""" 
Genesis4:2 Akazopo­nazve munun'una wake Abhero. Abhero wakanga ari mufudzi wamakwai, Kaini wakanga ari murimi wevhu." 
Genesis4:3 Zvino nguva yakati yapfuura, Kaini akauya nezvibereko zvevhu, chive chipo kuna Jehovha." 
Genesis4:4 NaAbherowo akauya nama­kwayana ake ematangwe akakorawo. Je­hovha ndokugamuchira Abhero nechipi­riso chake; 
Genesis4:5 asi Kaini nechipiriso chake haana kumugamuchira. Ipapo Kaini aka­tsamwa kwazvo, chiso chake chikau­nyana." 
Genesis4:6 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Kaini, ""Watsamwireiko? Chiso chako chakau­nyana nei?" 
Genesis4:7 Kana ukaita zvakanaka, haungafari here pachiso chako? Kana usingaiti zvakanaka, zvivi zvinokuhwa­ndira pamusuo; zvichakutsvaka, asi iwe unofanira kuzvikunda.""" 
Genesis4:8 Zvino Kaini wakataurirana nomunu­n'una wake Abhero; vakati vari kusango, Kaini ndokumukira Abhero munun'una wake, akamuuraya." 
Genesis4:9 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Kaini, ""Arikupiko Abhero, munun'una wako?"" Iye akati, ""Handizivi, ndini mufudzi womunun'una wangu here?""" 
Genesis4:10 Akati, ""Waiteiko? Inzwi reropa ro­munun'una wako rinodaidzira kwandiri pa­nyika." 
Genesis4:11 Zvino watukwa, wadzingwa pa­nyika, iyo yakashamisa muromo wayo kugamuchira ropa romunun'una wako pa­ruoko rwako;" 
Genesis4:12 kana uchirima ivhu, ha­ringakupi simba raro; uchava mutizi nomudzungairi panyika.""" 
Genesis4:13 Ipapo Kaini akati kuna Jehovha, ""Kurohwa kwangu kukuru, handingaku­takuri." 
Genesis4:14 Tarirai, mandidzinga nhasi pa­nyika ino, ndichavanda pamberi penyu; ndichava mutizi nomudzungairi panyika; ani naani anondiwana achandiuraya.""" 
Genesis4:15 Jehovha akati kwaari, ""Naizvozvo ani naani anouraya Kaini achatsiviwa kanomwe."" Jehovha ndokuisira Kaini chiratidzo, kuti munhu anozomuwana arege kumuuraya." 
Genesis4:16 Ipapo Kaini wakabva pamberi paJehovha, akandogara panyika yeNodhi, kumabvazuva kweEdheni." 
Genesis4:17 Kaini akaziva mukadzi wake, akatora mimba, akapona Enoki; akavaka guta, akatumidza guta zita romwanako­mana wake Enoki." 
Genesis4:18 Enoki akabereke­rwa Iradhi; Iradhi akabereka Mehujaeri; Mehujaeri akabereka Metushaeri; Metu­shaeri akabereka Rameki; 
Genesis4:19 Rameki akawana vakadzi vaviri, zita romumwe rainzi Adha, zita romumwe rainzi Zira." 
Genesis4:20 Adha akapona Jabhari; iye waiva baba vavanhu vanogara mumatende vane zvi­pfuwo. 
Genesis4:21 Zita romunun'una wake raiva Jubhari; iye waiva baba vavose vanori­dza mbira nenyere. 
Genesis4:22 Zira wakapona Tubharikaini, mupfuri wenhumbi dzose dzendarira nedare; hanzvadzi yaTubha­rikaini waiva Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Rameki akati kuvakadzi vake; Adha naZira, inzwai inzwi rangu, imwi vakadzi vaRameki, teererai zvandinotaura; Nokuti ndinouraya munhu unondikuvadza, Nejaya rinondipwanya;" 
Genesis4:24 Kana Kaini achitsiviwa kanomwe; Zvirokwazvo Rameki kana makumi manomwe nenomwe. 
Genesis4:25 Adhamu akazivazve mukadzi wake, akabereka mwanakomana, akamu­tumidza zita rinonzi Seti; nokuti wakati, ""Mwari wandipa mumwe mwana pachi­garo chaAbhero, zvaakaurawa naKaini.""" 
Genesis4:26 NaSeti wakaberekerwa mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Enoshi. Ne­nguva iyo vanhu vakatanga kudana zita raJehovha." 
Genesis5:1 Ndirori bhuku ramarudzi aAdhamu. Musi waakasika munhu, Mwari wakamuita nomufananidzo waMwari;" 
Genesis5:2 wakavasika murume nomuka­dzi; akavaropafadza, akavatumidza zita rinonzi Munhu, musi wavakasikwa." 
Genesis5:3 Adhamu wakagara makore ane zana namakumi matatu, akabereka mwanako­mana wakafanana naye, wakamutodza; akamutumidza zita rinonzi Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Mazuva aAdhamu shure kokuberekwa kwaSeti akanga ari makore ana mazana masere; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana. 
Genesis5:5 Mazuva ose oupenyu hwaAdhamu aka­nga ari makore ana mazana mapfumba­mwe namakumi matatu, akafa." 
Genesis5:6 Seti wakagara makore ane zana namashanu, akabereka Enoshi;" 
Genesis5:7 Seti aka­gara makore ana mazana masere nama­nomwe shure kokuberekwa kwaEnoshi, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana;" 
Genesis5:8 mazuva ose aSeti akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfumbamwe negumi nama­viri, akafa." 
Genesis5:9 Enoshi wakagara makore makumi mapfumbamwe, akabereka Kenani;" 
Genesis5:10 shure kokuberekwa kwaKenani Eno­shi akagara makore ana mazana masere negumi namashanu; akabereka vanako­mana navanasikana; 
Genesis5:11 mazuva ose aEno­shi akanga ari makore ana mazana ma­pfumbamwe namashanu, akafa." 
Genesis5:12 Kenani wakagara makore makumi manomwe, akabereka Maharareri;" 
Genesis5:13 shure kokuberekwa kwaMaharareri Kenani wakagara makore ana mazana masere namakumi mana; akabereka va­nakomana navanasikana. 
Genesis5:14 Mazuva ose aKenani akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfumbamwe negumi, akafa." 
Genesis5:15 Maharareri wakagara makore ma­kumi matanhatu namashanu, akabereka Jaredhi;" 
Genesis5:16 shure kokuberekwa kwaJare­dhi, Maharareri akagara makore ana mazana masere namakumi matatu, akabe­reka vanakomana navanasikana;" 
Genesis5:17 ma­zuva ose aMaharareri akanga ari makore ana mazana masere namakumi mapfu­mbamwe namashanu, akafa." 
Genesis5:18 Jaredhi wakagara makore ane zana namakumi matanhatu namaviri, akabe­reka Enoki;" 
Genesis5:19 shure kokuberekwa kwaEnoki Jaredhi akagara makore ana mazana masere; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana; 
Genesis5:20 mazuva ose aJaredhi akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfu­mbamwe namakumi matanhatu namaviri, akafa." 
Genesis5:21 Enoki wakagara makore makumi matanhatu namashanu, akabereka Metu­sera;" 
Genesis5:22 shure kokuberekwa kwaMetusera, Enoki wakafamba naMwari makore ana mazana matatu; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis5:23 Mazuva ose aEnoki aka­nga ari makore ana mazana matatu nama­kumi matanhatu namashanu. 
Genesis5:24 Enoki aka­famba naMwari, akasazovapo, nokuti Mwari wakamutora." 
Genesis5:25 Metusera wakagara makore ane zana namakumi masere namanomwe, akabereka Rameki;" 
Genesis5:26 shure kokubere­kwa kwaRameki, Metusera akagara ma­kore ana mazana manomwe namakumi masere namaviri; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis5:27 Mazuva ose aMetusera akanga ari makore ana mazana mapfu­mbamwe namakumi matanhatu namapfu­mbamwe, akafa." 
Genesis5:28 Rameki wakagara makore ane zana namakumi masere namaviri; akabe­reka mwanakomana; 
Genesis5:29 akamutumidza zita rinonzi Nowa, achiti, ""Uyu achativa­raidza pabasa redu napakutambudzika kwamaoko edu, zvinobva panyika yaka­tukwa naJehovha.""" 
Genesis5:30 Shure kokubere­kwa kwaNowa, Rameki akagara makore ana mazana mashanu namakumi mapfu­mbamwe namashanu; akabereka vanako­mana navanasikana." 
Genesis5:31 Mazuva ose aRa­meki akanga ari makore ana mazana manomwe namakumi manomwe nama­nomwe, akafa." 
Genesis5:32 Nowa wakanga ana makore ana mazana mashanu; Nowa akabereka Shemu, naHamu, naJafeti." 
Genesis6:1 Zvino vanhu vakati votanga kuwa­nda panyika, vachiberekerwa vanasi­kana," 
Genesis6:2 vanakomana vaMwari vakaona vakunda vavanhu kuti vakanaka, vaka­zvisarudzira pakati pavose vavakada kuva vakadzi vavo." 
Genesis6:3 Ipapo Jehovha akati, ""Mweya wangu haungarambi uchigara mumunhu nokusingaperi, zvaari wenya­mawo hake; naizvozvo mazuva ake achava makore ane zana namakumi ma­viri.""" 
Genesis6:4 Panguva iyo kwakanga kuna va­nhu varefu kwazvo panyika, napashu­rewo, kana vanakomana vaMwari vakapinda kuvanasikana vavanhu, ivo vakavaberekera vana. Ndivo vaiva vanhu vane simba vakare, vakanga vakakuru­mbira." 
Genesis6:5 Zvino Jehovha wakaona kuti kuipa kwavanhu kwakanga kuri kukuru panyika, nendangariro dzokufunga kwe­moyo yavo dzakanga dzakaipachetenguva dzose." 
Genesis6:6 Jehovha akazvidemba pa­musoro pokuita kwake vanhu panyika, akava neshungu pamoyo pake." 
Genesis6:7 Jeho­vha akati, ""Ndichaparadza vanhu vanda­kasika ndivabvise panyika vanhu, ne­mhuka, nezvinokambaira, neshiri dzedenga; nokuti ndinozvidemba kuti ndakazviita.""" 
Genesis6:8 Asi Nowa wakawana tsitsi pamberi paJehovha. 
Genesis6:9 Marudzi aNowa ndiwo: Nowa waka­nga ari munhu wakarurama, asina mho­sva mumarudzi ake; Nowa wakafamba naMwari." 
Genesis6:10 Nowa akabereka vanakomana vatatu, vaiti: Shemu, naHamu, naJafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Nyika yakanga yakaora pamberi paMwari, nyika yakanga izere nokumani­kidzana." 
Genesis6:12 Mwari akaona nyika kuti yakaora; nokuti vanhu vose vakanga vaodza mufambiro wavo panyika. 
Genesis6:13 Ipapo Mwari wakati kuna Nowa, ""Kupera kwavanhu vose kwasvika pa­mberi pangu; nokuti vakazadza nyika nokumanikidzana; tarira, ndichavauraya pamwechete nenyika." 
Genesis6:14 Uzviitire areka nomuti wemugoferi; uite makamuri mua­reka, uinamire nechomukati nechoku­nze nenamo." 
Genesis6:15 Unofanira kuiita kudai: Kureba kweareka ngakuve makubhiti ana mazana matatu, nokufara kwayo makubhiti makumi mashanu, nokukwi­rira kwayo makubhiti makumi matatu." 
Genesis6:16 Usiye buri paareka; uripedze kana kwasara kubhiti rimwe kubva kumusoro; nomusuo weareka uuise parutivi rwayo; uiite ine dzimba nhatu, mupanda woku­tanga, nowechipiri, nowechitatu." 
Genesis6:17 Ta­rira, ini ndinouyisa panyika mvura zhi­nji, kuti iparadze zvipenyu zvose, zvinomweya woupenyu, pasi pedenga; zvose zviri panyika zvichafa." 
Genesis6:18 Asi ndichaita sungano yangu newe; unofa­nira kupinda muareka, iwe navanako­mana vako, nomukadzi wako, navaka­dzi vavanakomana vako pamwechete newe." 
Genesis6:19 Napazvipenyu zvose zvenyama uise muareka zviviri zviviri zvamarudzi ose, kuti zvirarame pamwechete newe; ngazvive mukono nehadzi." 
Genesis6:20 Shiri na­marudzi adzo, nezvipfuwo namarudzi azvo, nezvinokambaira pasi zvose na­marudzi azvo, zvichauya kwauri zviviri zviviri zvamarudzi ose, kuti zvirarami­swe." 
Genesis6:21 Iwe utore marudzi ose ezvoku­dya zvose zvinodyiwa, uzviunganidzire kwauri; kuti zvive zvokudya zvako nezvazvo.""" 
Genesis6:22 Nowa akaita saizvozvo; se­zvaakarairwa naMwari, wakaita zvose saizvozvo." 
Genesis7:1 Zvino Jehovha wakati kuna Nowa, ""Pindai muareka, iwe nemhuri yako yose; nokuti ndakuona iwe kuti wakaru­rama pamberi pangu parudzi urwu." 
Genesis7:2 Pa­mhuka dzose dzakanaka utore nomwe nomwe, mukono nehadzi yayo; napa­mhuka dzose dzisina kunaka utore mbiri mbiri, mukono nehadzi yayo;" 
Genesis7:3 napashiri dzedenga utore nomwe nomwe, jongwe nemhambo, kuti uraramise marudzi ose ari panyika." 
Genesis7:4 Nokuti kwasara mazuva manomwe, ipapo ndichanaisa mvura pa­nyika mazuva ana makumi mana nou­siku hunamakumi mana; zvipenyu zvose zvandakaita ndichazviparadza panyika. """ 
Genesis7:5 Nowa akaita zvose sezvaakarairwa naJe­hovha. 
Genesis7:6 Nowa wakanga ava namakore ana mazana matanhatu panguva yokuuya kwemvura zhinji panyika. 
Genesis7:7 Ipapo Nowa wakapinda muareka, navanakomana vake, nomukadzi wake, navakadzi vava­nakomana vake, nokuda kwemvura zhi­nji." 
Genesis7:8 Pamhuka dzakanaka, napamhuka dzisina kunaka, neshiri, nezvose zvinoka­mbaira panyika," 
Genesis7:9 zvakapinda kuna Nowa muareka zviviri zviviri, mukono nehadzi, Mwari sezvaakaraira Nowa." 
Genesis7:10 Mazuva ma­nomwe akati apfuura, mvura zhinji ika­vapo panyika." 
Genesis7:11 Pagore ramazana matanhatu rou­penyu hwaNowa, nomwedzi wechipiri, nezuva regumi namanomwe romwedzi, nezuva iroro matsime ose apakadzika­dzika akadziurwa, namahwindo edenga akazarurwa;" 
Genesis7:12 mvura zhinji ikanaya pa­nyika mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku hunamakumi mana. 
Genesis7:13 Nomusi iwoyo Nowa wakapinda muareka, naShemu, naHamu, naJafeti, vanakomana vaNowa, no­mukadzi waNowa, navakadzi vatatu vava­nakomana vake pamwechete naye;" 
Genesis7:14 ivo, nemhuka dzose namarudzi adzo, nezvi­pfuwo zvose namarudzi azvo, nezvino­kambaira zvose zvinokambaira panyika namarudzi azvo, nezvinobhururuka zvose namarudzi azvo, neshiri dzose dzamarudzi ose." 
Genesis7:15 Zvakapinda kuna Nowa muareka, zviviri zviviri zvezvipenyu zvose zvinomweya woupenyu." 
Genesis7:16 Zvose, zvakapinda, zvakapinda zvichiita mu­kono nehadzi, zvose zvipenyu, sezvaaka­rairwa naMwari, Jehovha akamuzaririra mukati." 
Genesis7:17 Mvura zhinji ikavapo panyika ma­zuva ana makumi mana; mvura ikawa­nda, ikasimudza areka, ikakwiridzirwa pamusoro penyika." 
Genesis7:18 Mvura ikakwirira, ikawanda kwazvo panyika, areka ikafa­mba pamusoro pemvura." 
Genesis7:19 Mvura ika­kwirira kwazvo kwazvo panyika, ma­komo marefu ose pasi pedenga rose akafukidzwa." 
Genesis7:20 Mvura ikakwirira kusvi­kira pamakubhiti ane gumi namashanu pamusoro pawo; makomo akafukidzwa. 
Genesis7:21 Zvipenyu zvose zvaifamba panyika zvikafa, zvaiti, shiri, nezvipfuwo, ne­mhuka, nezvinokambaira, zvose zvaika­mbaira panyika, navanhu vose;" 
Genesis7:22 zvinhu zvose zvakanga zviine kufema ko­mweya woupenyu mumhino dzazvo, zvose zvakanga zviri pakaoma pasi, zvi­kafa." 
Genesis7:23 Zvipenyu zvose, zvakanga zviri pasi pose, zvikaparadzwa, zvaiti, vanhu, nezvipfuwo, nezvinokambaira, neshiri dzedenga; zvikaparadzwa panyika; Nowa oga akasara, nezvakanga zviri muareka naye." 
Genesis7:24 Mvura ikaramba yakakwirira pa­nyika mazuva ane zana namakumi ma­shanu. 
Genesis8:1 Zvino Mwari wakarangarira Nowa nezvipenyu zvose, nezvipfuwo zvose zvakanga zviri muareka naye; Mwari akafambisa mhepo panyika, mvura ikaserera," 
Genesis8:2 namatsime apakadzika namahwindo edenga akazarirwa, nemvura yakabva kudenga ikadziviswa," 
Genesis8:3 mvura ikaramba ichidzoka panyika; mazuva ane zana namakumi mashanu akati apfuura, mvura ikaderera." 
Genesis8:4 Nomwedzi wechino­mwe, nezuva regumi namanomwe ro­mwedzi, areka ikamira pamusoro pama­komo eArarati." 
Genesis8:5 Mvura ikaramba ichiderera kusvikira pamwedzi wegumi; nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi misoro yamakomo ikaonekwa." 
Genesis8:6 Mazuva ana makumi mana akati apfuura, Nowa akazarura hwindo reareka raakanga aita;" 
Genesis8:7 akabudisa gunguvo, iro rikaramba richibhururuka-bhururuka ku­svikira mvura yapwa panyika." 
Genesis8:8 Ipapo akabhururutsa njiva paakanga ari, kuti aone kana mvura yaserera panyika;" 
Genesis8:9 asi njiva haina kuwana pokuzorodza rutsoka rwayo, ikadzokera kwaari kuareka, no­kuti mvura yakanga iri pamusoro penyika yose; akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akai­tora, akaipinza kwaari muareka." 
Genesis8:10 Ipapo akagara mamwe mazuva manomwezve, akabudisazve njiva paa­reka;" 
Genesis8:11 njiva ikapinda kwaari made­kwana; onei mumuromo mayo makanga muine rushizha rwomuorivhi rwakata­nhwa; naizvozvo Nowa wakaziva kuti mvura yakanga yaserera panyika. 
Genesis8:12 Aka­garazve mazuva manomwe, akabudisa­zve njiva; iyo haina kudzokerazve kwaari." 
Genesis8:13 Pagore ramazana matanhatu neri­mwe, pamwedzi wokutanga, nomusi wo­kutanga womwedzi, mvura yakanga ya­pwa panyika; ipapo Nowa akabvisa denga reareka, akatarira, onei pasi pose paoma." 
Genesis8:14 Nomwedzi wechipiri, nezuva rama­kumi maviri namanomwe romwedzi, nyika yakanga yaoma." 
Genesis8:15 Zvino Mwari wakataura naNowa akati," 
Genesis8:16 Budai muareka, iwe, nomukadzi wako, navanakomana vako, navakadzi vavanakomana vako, pamwechete newe." 
Genesis8:17 Budisawo pamwechete newe zvipenyu zvose zvenyama zvinewe, zvinoti, shiri, nezvipfuwo, nezvinokambaira zvose, ne­zvinokambaira panyika, kuti zviwande panyika, zvibereke, zvive zvizhinji pa­nyika.""" 
Genesis8:18 Ipapo Nowa akabuda, iye nava­nakomana vake, nomukadzi wake, nava­kadzi vavanakomana vake pamwechete naye;" 
Genesis8:19 nemhuka dzose, nezvinoka­mbaira zvose, neshiri dzose, nezvose zvinofamba panyika, namarudzi azvo, zvakabuda paareka." 
Genesis8:20 Nowa akavakira Je­hovha aritari, akatora dzimwe pamhuka dzose dzakanaka neshiri dzose dzaka­naka, akapisira zvipiriso zvinopiswa paa­tari." 
Genesis8:21 Jehovha akanzwa kunhuhwira kwa­kanaka, Jehovha akati mumoyo make, ""Handichazotukizve nyika nokuda ko­munhu; nokuti kufunga komoyo wo­munhu kwakaipa kubva pauduku hwake; handichazorovizve zvipenyu zvose, se­zvandakaita." 
Genesis8:22 Nguva yose yenyika ku­dzvara nokukohwa, kutonhora nokudziya, munakamwe nechando, masikati nousiku hazvi­ngagumi.""" 
Genesis9:1 Zvino Mwari akaropafadza Nowa navanakomana vake, akati kwavari, ""Berekai, muwande, muzadze nyika." 
Genesis9:2 Mhuka dzose dzenyika, neshiri dzose dzedenga, dzichakutyai nokukuvhundu­kai; zvose zvinokambaira pasi, nehove dzose dzegungwa, zvinoiswa pamaoko enyu." 
Genesis9:3 Zvose zvinofamba zvipenyu zvi­chava zvokudya zvenyu; ndinokupai zvose, sezvandakakupai miriwo mitema." 
Genesis9:4 Asi nyama, kana inoupenyu hwayo, iro ropa rayo, musaidya iyo." 
Genesis9:5 Zvirokwazvo ropa renyu, roupenyu hwenyu, ndichari­tsiva; ndicharitsiva pazvipenyu zvose, ndichatsiva upenyu hwomunhu paruoko rwomunhu naparuoko rwehama yomu­nhu." 
Genesis9:6 Ani naani anoteura ropa romunhu, ropa rake richateurwawo nomunhu; no­kuti Mwari akaita munhu nomufananidzo wake." 
Genesis9:7 As imwi berekai, muwande, berekai zvikuru panyika, muwande mukati mayo.""" 
Genesis9:8 Zvino Mwari akataura naNowa nava­nakomana vake vakanga vanaye, akati," 
Genesis9:9 Tarirai, ini ndinoita sungano yangu nemwi navana venyu vanokuteverai;" 
Genesis9:10 ne­zvipenyu zvose zvinemi, zvinoti, shiri, nezvipfuwo, nemhuka dzose dzenyika dzinemi; zvose zvinobuda paareka, idzo mhuka dzose dzapanyika." 
Genesis9:11 Ndichaita sungano yangu nemi; zvose zvenyama hazvingazopedzwizve nemvura zhinji: mvura zhinji haingazovepozve kuti ipara­dze nyika. 
Genesis9:12 Ipapo Mwari akati, ""Ndi­cho chiratidzo chesungano yandinoita pakati pangu nemwi nezvipenyu zvose zvinemi kusvikira kumarudzi asingaperi." 
Genesis9:13 Ndinoisa muraraungu wangu mugore, kuti chive chiratidzo chesungano pakati pangu nenyika." 
Genesis9:14 Zvino ndichati kana ndikauyisa gore pamusoro penyika, mu­raraungu uyu ukaonekwa mugore," 
Genesis9:15 ndi­charangarira sungano yangu iri pakati pangu nemi, napakati pezvipenyu zvose zvenyama, mvura haichazovi zhinjizve kuti iparadze zvose zvenyama." 
Genesis9:16 Mura­raungu uchavapo mugore; ndichautarira, kuti ndirangarire sungano isingaperi pa­kati paMwari nezvipenyu zvose zve­nyama zviri panyika.""" 
Genesis9:17 Mwari akati kuna Nowa, ""Ndicho chiratidzo chesu­ngano yandakaita pakati pangu nezvose zvenyama zviri panyika.""" 
Genesis9:18 Vanakomana vaNowa vakabuda muareka ndivava: Shemu, naHamu, naJafeti; Hamu ndiye baba vaKenani." 
Genesis9:19 Ndivava vakanga vari vanakomana vaNowa; nyika yose yakazadzwa navo. 
Genesis9:20 Nowa akatanga kuva murimi, aka­rima munda womuzambiringa;" 
Genesis9:21 akamwa waini, akabatwa, akazvifukura mutende rake." 
Genesis9:22 Zvino Hamu, baba vaKenani, akaona kusasimira kwababa vake, akazi­visa vakuru vake vaviri." 
Genesis9:23 Ipapo Shemu naJafeti vakatora nguvo, vakaiisa pamafu­dzi avo, vakaenda manhenda shure, va­kafukidzira kusasimira kwababa vavo; zviso zvavo zvakanga zvakatarira shure, vakasaona kusasimira kwababa vavo." 
Genesis9:24 Zvino Nowa akapengenuka pawaini yake, akaziva zvaakaitirwa nomwanako­mana wake muduku," 
Genesis9:25 akati, ""Kenani ngaatukwe; achava muranda wavaranda kuvakuru vake.""" 
Genesis9:26 Akati, ""Jehovha Mwari waShemu ngaakudzwe, Kenani ngaave muranda wake." 
Genesis9:27 Mwari ngaakurise Jafeti, ngaagare mumatende aShemu, Kenani ngaave muranda wake.""" 
Genesis9:28 Nowa akagara shure kwemvura zhi­nji makore ana mazana matatu namakumi mashanu. 
Genesis9:29 Mazuva ose Nloa akanga ari mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi ma­shanu, akafa." 
Genesis10:1 Ndiwo marudzi avanakomana vaNowa, naShemu, naHamu, naJa­feti; ivo vakaberekerwa vana shure kwe­mvura zhinji." 
Genesis10:2 Vanakomana vaJafeti ndivo: Go­meru, naMagogi, naMadhai, naJavhani, naTubhari, naMisheki, naTirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Vana­komana vaGomeru ndivo: Ashikenazi, naRifati, naTogarima." 
Genesis10:4 Vanakomana vaJavhani ndivo: Erisha, naTashisi, naKi­timi, naDhodhanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Kwavari kwaka­bva vanhu vezvivi zvakapararira. Ndivo vanakomana vaJafeti munyika dzavo, mumwe nomumwe norurimi rwake, ne­mhuri dzavo, nendudzi dzavo." 
Genesis10:6 Vanakomana vaHamu ndivo: Kushi, naMiziraimu, naPuti, naKenani." 
Genesis10:7 Vana­komana vaKushi ndivo: Sebha, naHa­vhira, naSabhata, naRama, naSabhuteka; navanakomana vaRama ndivo: Shebha naDhedhani." 
Genesis10:8 Kushi akabereka Nimuro­dhi, ndiye akatanga kuva nesimba pa­nyika." 
Genesis10:9 Akanga ari mudzimba mukuru pamberi paJehovha; naizvozvo vanoti, ""SaNimurodhi, mudzimba mukuru pa­mberi paJehovha.""" 
Genesis10:10 Ushe hwake hwaka­tanga paBhabheri, neEreki, neAkadhi, neKarine, panyika yeShinari." 
Genesis10:11 Akabuda kunyika iyo, akaenda Asiria, akavaka Ninivhe neRohobhoti-iri, neKara," 
Genesis10:12 neRe­seni, pakati peNinivhe neKara (iri iguta guru)." 
Genesis10:13 Miziraimu akabereka vaRudhi, navaAnami, navaRehabhi, navaNafitu­himu," 
Genesis10:14 navaPaturusi navaKasiruhi, (vaFirisitia vakabva kwavari), navaKafutori." 
Genesis10:15 Kenani akabereka Sidhoni, da­ngwe rake, naHeti;" 
Genesis10:16 navaJebhusi, na­vaAmori, navaGirigashi;" 
Genesis10:17 navaHivhi, navaAriki, navaSini," 
Genesis10:18 navaArivhadhi, navaZemari, navaHamati. Shure kwai­vava mhuri dzavaKenani dzakapararira." 
Genesis10:19 Muganhu wavaKenani wakatanga paSidhoni, ukaenda Gerari, ukasvika Gaza, ukaenda Sodhomu, neGomora, neAdhamu, neZibhoimu, ukasvika paRasha." 
Genesis10:20 Ndivo vanakomana vaHamu, mhuri dzavo, nendimi dzavo, munyika dzavo, nendudzi dzavo." 
Genesis10:21 Naiye Shemu, baba vavana vose vaEbheru, mukuru waJafeti, akabereke­rwa vana." 
Genesis10:22 Vanakomana vaShemu ndivo: Eramu, naAsheri, naAripakisha­dhi, naRudhi, naAramu." 
Genesis10:23 Vanakomana vaAramu ndivo: Uzi, naHuri, naGeteri, naMashi." 
Genesis10:24 Aripakishadhi akabereka Shera, Shera akabereka Ebheru." 
Genesis10:25 Ebheru akaberekerwa vanakomana vaviri, zita romumwe rakanga riri Peregi, nokuti pamazuva ake nyika yakakamurwa; zita romunun'una wake rakanga riri Jokitani." 
Genesis10:26 Jokitani akabereka Arimodhadhi, naSherefi, naHazarimavheti, naJera;" 
Genesis10:27 naHadhoramu, naUsari, naDhikira;" 
Genesis10:28 naObhari, naAbhimaeri, naShebha;" 
Genesis10:29 naOfiri, naHavhira, naJobhabhu; ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaJokitani." 
Genesis10:29 naOfiri, naHavhira, naJobhabhu; ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaJokitani." 
Genesis10:30 Kwavakagara ndiko: kubva paMesha, kuenda Sefari, kugomo rokumabvazuva." 
Genesis10:31 Ndivo vana­komana vaShemu, mhuri dzavo, nendimi dzavo, munyika dzavo, nendudzi dzavo." 
Genesis10:32 Ndidzo mhuri dzavanakomana vaNowa, nedzimba dzavo, nendudzi dzavo; kwavari kwakabva ndudzi dzose dzaka­pararira, shure kwemvura zhinji." 
Genesis11:1 Nyika yose yakanga ino rurimi rumwe nokutaura kumwe. 
Genesis11:2 Zvino vakati vachitamira mabvazuva, vakawana bani munyika yeShinari, vakagarako." 
Genesis11:3 Vakataurirana, vachiti, ""Uyai, ngatiite zvidhina, tizvipise kwazvo."" Zvidhina zvakava mabwe avo, nebitumini rakava dope ravo." 
Genesis11:4 Vakati, ""Uyai, ngatizviva­kire guta, norusvingo, runomusoro uno­svikira kudenga; tizvimutsire mukuru­mbira, kuti tirege kupararira panyika yose.""" 
Genesis11:5 Ipapo Jehovha wakaburuka kuzota­rira guta norusvingo, rwakanga ruchiva­kwa navanakomana vavanhu." 
Genesis11:6 Jehovha akati, ""Tarirai, vanhu ava ndivamwe, vanorurimi rumwe vose; zvino ndizvo zvavanotanga kuita; zvino hakuchina chi­nhu chavangada kuita chavangadziviswa." 
Genesis11:7 Hendei, tiburuke, tinopesanisa rurimi rwavo ipapo, kuti varege kunzwana kana votaurirana.""" 
Genesis11:8 Jehovha akavaparadzira ipapo, vakapararira panyika yose, vaka­rega kuvaka guta ravo." 
Genesis11:9 Naizvozvo va­karitumidza Bhabheri, nokuti ipapo Jeho­vha wakapesanisa rurimi rwenyika yose; Jehovha akavaparadzira ipapo, vakaenda kunyika dzose." 
Genesis11:10 Ndiwo marudzi aShemu. Shemu wakanga ana makore ane zana, akabereka Aripakishadhi, mvura zhinji yapfuura makore maviri;" 
Genesis11:11 wakati abereka Aripa­kishadhi, Shemu akagara makore ana mazana mashanu; akabereka vanako­mana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:12 Aripakishadhi wakagara makore ana makumi matatu namashanu, akabe­reka Shera;" 
Genesis11:13 wakati abereka Shera, Ari­pakishadhi akagara makore ana mazana mana namatatu, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:14 Shera wakagara makore ana ma­kumi matatu, akabereka Ebheru." 
Genesis11:15 Wa­kati abereka Ebheru, Shera akagara ma­kore ana mazana mana namatatu; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:16 Ebheru wakagara makore ana ma­kumi matatu namana, akabereka Peregi," 
Genesis11:17 wakati abereka Peregi, Ebheru akagara makore ana mazana mana namakumi matatu, akabereka vanakomana navanasi­kana." 
Genesis11:18 Peregi wakagara makore ana ma­kumi matatu, akabereka Rehu;" 
Genesis11:19 wakati abereka Rehu, Peregi akagara makore ana mazana maviri namapfumbamwe, akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:20 Rehu wakagara makore ana ma­kumi matatu namaviri, akabereka Serugu;" 
Genesis11:21 wakati abereka Serugu, Rehu akagara makore ana mazana maviri namanomwe; akabereka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:22 Serugu wakagara makore ana ma­kumi matatu, akabereka Nahori;" 
Genesis11:23 wakati abereka Nahori, Serugu akagara makore ana mazana maviri, akabereka vanako­mana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori wakagara makore ana ma­kumi maviri namapfumbamwe, akabe­reka Tera;" 
Genesis11:25 Nahori akagara makore ane zana negumi namapfumbamwe, akabe­reka vanakomana navanasikana." 
Genesis11:26 Tera wakagara makore ana ma­kumi manomwe, akabereka Abhuramu naNahori, naHarani." 
Genesis11:27 Ndiwo marudzi aTera; Tera waka­bereka Abhuramu, naNahori, naHarani; Harani akabereka Roti;" 
Genesis11:28 Harani akafa, baba vake Tera vachiri vapenyu, panyika yokuberekwa kwake, paUri yavaKara­dhea." 
Genesis11:29 Abhuramu naNahori vakazviwa­nira vakadzi; zita romukadzi waAbhu­ramu rainzi Sarai; zita romukadzi waNahori rainzi Mirika, mukunda waHa­rani, baba vaMirika, nababa vaIsika." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai wakanga asingabereki, wakanga asina mwana." 
Genesis11:31 Zvino Tera wakatora mwanakomana wake Abhuramu, naRoti, mwanakomana waHarani, mwanako­mana womwanakomana wake, naSarai, mukadzi womwanakomana wake Abhu­ramu; vakatama navo vakabva Uri yavaKaradhea, kuti vaende kunyika yeKenani, vakasvika Harani, vakagarapo." 
Genesis11:32 Mazuva aTera akanga ari makore ana mazana maviri namashanu; Tera akafira Harani. 
Genesis12:1 Zvino Jehovha wakati kunaAbhuramu, ""Ibva panyika yako, nokuhama dzako, nokuimba yababa vako, uende kunyika yandichakuratidza iyo;" 
Genesis12:2 ndichakuita rudzi rukuru, ndichaku­ropafadza, ndichakudza zita rako, iwe uropafadze vamwe." 
Genesis12:3 Ndicharopafadza ivo vanokuropafadza; unokutuka, ndichamutukawo; marudzi ose enyika acharopafadzwa mauri.""" 
Genesis12:4 Naizvozvo Abhuramu wakaenda se­zvaakaudzwa naJehovha; naRoti wakae­nda naye. Abhuramu wakanga ana ma­kore ana makumi manomwe namashanu pakubva kwake Harani. 
Genesis12:5 Abhuramu aka­tora Sarai, mukadzi wake, naRoti, mwa­nakomana womunun'una wake, nefuma yavo yose yavakanga vaunganidza, na­vana vavakanga vabereka paHarani, va­kabuda kuenda kunyika yeKenani; vaka­ndosvika kunyika yeKenani." 
Genesis12:6 Abhuramu akagura nenyika iyo akasvika panzvimbo inonzi Shekemu, pamuti womuouki weMore; nguva iyo vaKenani vakanga vari munyika iyo." 
Genesis12:7 Zvino Jehovha wakazvira­tidza kuna Abhuramu, akati, ""Ndichapa vana vako nyika iyi;"" akavakira Jehovha aritari ipapo, iye wakanga azviratidza kwaari." 
Genesis12:8 Akabva ipapo, akaenda kugomo riri kumabvazuva aBheteri, akadzikapo tende rake; Bheteri rakanga riri kumavi­razuva neAi kumabvazuva; akavakirapo Jehovha aritari, akanamata Zita raJehovha ipapo." 
Genesis12:9 Kubva ipapo Abhuramu wakara­mba achitamira kumavirazuva. 
Genesis12:10 Zvino nzara yakanga iripo panyika iyo; Abhuramu ndokuburukira Ijipiti ku­ndogarako; nokuti nzara yakanga iri huru panyika iyo. 
Genesis12:11 Zvino wakati oda kupinda Ijipiti, akati kuna Sarai, mukadzi wake, ""Tarira, ndinoziva kuti uri mukadzi wa­kanaka pachiso chako;" 
Genesis12:12 kana vaIjipiti vachikuona, vachati, `Ndiye mukadzi wa­ke', vachandiuraya, asi iwe vachakurega uri mupenyu." 
Genesis12:13 Uti hako uri hanzvadzi yangu, kuti ndiitirwe zvakanaka nokuda kwako, kuti mweya wangu urarame no­kuda kwako. """ 
Genesis12:14 Zvino Abhuramu achi­svika Ijipiti, valjipiti vakaona mukadzi kuti wakanaka kwazvo." 
Genesis12:15 Namachinda aFarao akamuonawo, vakandomurumbi­dza kuna Farao; mukadzi akatorwa, akai­swa mumba maFarao." 
Genesis12:16 Akaitira Abhu­ramu zvakanaka nokuda kwake; waiva namakwai, nemombe, namakono ema­dhongi, navaranda, navarandakadzi, na­madhongi echikadzi, namakamera." 
Genesis12:17 Asi Jehovha wakatambudza Farao neveimba yake namatambudziko makuru nokuda kwaSarai, mukadzi waAbhu­ramu." 
Genesis12:18 Zvino Farao wakadana Abhu­ramu akati, ""Chiiko ichi chawakandiitira? Wakaregereiko kundizivisa kuti mu­kadzi wako." 
Genesis12:19 Wakarevereiko uchiti: Ihanzvadzi yangu? Naizvozvo ndaka­mutora kuti ave mukadzi wangu; naizvo­zvo zvino hoyu mukadzi wako, mutore, uende hako.""" 
Genesis12:20 Zvino Farao akaraira vamwe varume pamusoro pake, vakamu­perekedza iye nomukadzi wake nezvose zvaakanga anazvo." 
Genesis13:1 Zvino Abhuramu wakakwira, akabva Ijipiti, iye nomukadzi wake, nezvose zvaakanga anazvo, naRo­tiwo anaye; vakaenda kurutivi rwenyasi." 
Genesis13:2 Abhuramu wakanga akafuma kwazvo mombe, nesirivha, nendarama." 
Genesis13:3 Akafa­mba nzendo dzake achibva nyasi kusvi­kira paBheteri, kunzvimbo iya kwaiva netende rake pakutanga, pakati peBheteri neAi;" 
Genesis13:4 kunzvimbo yearitari, yaakanga ai­tapo pakutanga; Abhuramu akanamata zita raJehovha ipapo." 
Genesis13:5 NaRoti, iye wakaenda naAbhu­ramu, wakanga aine makwai, nemombe, namatende." 
Genesis13:6 Nyika ikasavaringana, kuti vagare panzvimbo imwe; nokuti fuma yavo yakanga iri zhinji; vakasagona ku­gara panzvimbo imwe." 
Genesis13:7 Vafudzi vezvi­pfuwo zvaAbhuramu navafudzi vezvi­pfuwo zvaRoti vakaita nharo; vaKenani navaPerezi vakanga vagere panyika iyo. 
Genesis13:8 Ipapo Abhuramu akati kuna Roti, ""Nharo ngadzirege kuvapo pakati pangu newe, napakati pavafudzi vangu navafu­dzi vako, nokuti tiri hama." 
Genesis13:9 Ko nyika yose haizi pamberi pako here? Para­dzana hako neni; kana iwe ukaenda kuruboshwe, ini ndichaenda kurudyi; kana iwe ukaenda kurudyi ini ndichae­nda kuruboshwe.""" 
Genesis13:10 Roti akasimudzira meso ake, akaona bani rose reJorodhani, kuti raka­nga riine mvura pose, Jehovha achigere kuparadza Sodhomu neGomora; rakanga rakaita somunda waJehovha, senyika yeIjipiti, kana munhu achienda Zoari." 
Genesis13:11 Roti akazvitsaurira bani rose reJorodhani; Roti akaenda kurutivi rwamabvazuva; vakapa­radzana havo. 
Genesis13:12 Abhuramu akagara pa­nyika yeKenani, Roti akagara pamaguta aiva kubani, akaswededzera tende rake kusvikira paSodhomu." 
Genesis13:13 Zvino varume veSodhomu vakanga vakaipa, vaitadzira Jehovha kwazvo-kwazvo." 
Genesis13:14 Zvino Roti wakati aparadzana naye, Jehovha akati kuna Abhuramu, ""Simudza hako meso ako ipapo paugere, utarire kurutivi rwokumusoro, norwe­nyasi, norwokumabvazuva, norwokuma­virira;" 
Genesis13:15 nokuti nyika yose yaunoona, ndichaipa iwe navana vako nokusinga­peri." 
Genesis13:16 Ndichaita vana vako seguruva renyika; kuti kana kuine munhu anogona kuverenga guruva renyika, navana vako vangaverengwawo." 
Genesis13:17 Simuka, ufambe nenyika pakureba kwayo, napaupamhi hwayo, nokuti ndichakupa iyo.""" 
Genesis13:18 Ipapo Abhuramu wakabvisa tende rake, aka­ndogara pamiti yemiouki yeMamure, iri paHebhuroni, akavakirapo Jehovha aritari." 
Genesis14:1 Zvino nenguva yaAmuraferi, mambo weShinari, naArioki ma­mbo weErasari, naKedhoriraomeri, ma­mbo weEramu, naTidhari, mambo weGoyimi," 
Genesis14:2 vakarwa naBhera, mambo weSodhomu, naBherisha, mambo weGomora, naShinabhi, mambo weAdhamu, naShemebheri, mambo weZe­bhoimi, namambo weBhera (rinonziwo Zoari)." 
Genesis14:3 Ava vose vakasangana mumu­pata weSidhimu (ndiro Gungwa roMu­nyu). 
Genesis14:4 Vakanga vava varanda veKedhoriraomeri makore ane gumi namaviri, vakamumukira negore regumi namatatu." 
Genesis14:5 Ipapo Kedhoriraomeri wakauya negore regumi namana, namadzimambo aaka­nga anawo, akakunda vaRefaimi paAshitoreti karinaimi, navaZuzimi paHamu, navaEmimi paShave-kiriataimi," 
Genesis14:6 navaHori pagomo ravo reSeiri, kusvi­kira paEriparani, pedo nesango." 
Genesis14:7 Va­kadzoka, vakasvika Enimishipati (rino­nziwo Kadheshi), vakakunda nyika yose yavaAmareki, navaAmori, vakanga va­gere paHazazoni-tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Zvino mambo weSodhomu, nama­mbo weGomora, namambo weAdhamu, namambo weZebhoimi, namambo weBhera (rinonziwo Zoari), vakabuda vaka­gadzira hondo kuzorwa navo pamupata weSidhimu;" 
Genesis14:9 kuti varwe naKedhorirao­meri, mambo weEramu, naTidhari, ma­mbo weGoyimi, naAmuraferi, mambo weShinari, naArioki, mambo weErasari; madzimambo mana kuti arwe namadzi­mambo mashanu." 
Genesis14:10 Zvino mupata weSi­dhimu wakanga uzere namakomba ane tara, madzimambo eSodhomu neGomora vakatiza vakawiramo; vakasara vakatizira kugomo." 
Genesis14:11 Vakatora fuma yose yeSo­dhomu neGomora, nezvokudya zvavo zvose, vakaenda." 
Genesis14:12 Vakatorawo Roti, mwanakomana womunun'una waAbhu­ramu wakanga agere paSodhomu, ne­fuma yake, vakaenda." 
Genesis14:13 Zvino mumwe wakanga apuku­nyuka wakasvika, akaudza Abhuramu, muHebheru; iye wakanga agere pamiti yemiouki yaMamure, muAmori, mu­nun'una waEshikori, munun'una waAneri; ava vakanga vaita sungano naAbhuramu." 
Genesis14:14 Zvino Abhuramu wakati achinzwa kuti hama yake yatapwa, akaraira varume vake vakanga vadzidziswa kurwa, vaka­zvarwa paimba yake, vana mazana ma­tatu negumi navasere, akavateverera ku­svikira paDhani;" 
Genesis14:15 akakamura varwi vake usiku, iye navaranda vake, akavaku­nda, akavateverera kusvikira paHobha, riri kurudyi rweDhamasiko." 
Genesis14:16 Akadzosa fuma yose, akadzosawo Roti, hama yake, nefuma yake, navakadziwo nava­nhu." 
Genesis14:17 Ipapo mambo weSodhomu waka­buda kundosangana naye pakudzoka kwake pakuuraya Kedhorir-omeri nama­dzimambo akanga anavo pamupata weShave (ndiwo mupata wamambo). 
Genesis14:18 Me­rikizedheki, mambo weSaremi, akauya nechingwa newaini; iye wakanga ari muprista waMwari woKudenga-denga." 
Genesis14:19 Akamuropafadza, akati, ""Abhuramu ngaaropafadzwe naMwari woKudenga­denga, muridzi wokudenga napasi." 
Genesis14:20 Mwari woKudenga-denga ngaaku­dzwe, wakapa vavengi venyu mumaoko enyu."" Akamupa chegumi chezvose." 
Genesis14:21 Zvino mambo weSodhomu akati kuna Abhuramu, ""Ndipe vanhu, iwe utore hako fuma. """ 
Genesis14:22 Abhuramu akati kuna mambo weSodhomu, ""Ndakasimudzira ruoko rwa­ngu kuna Jehovha, Mwari woKudenga­denga, muridzi wokudenga napasi," 
Genesis14:23 kuti handingatori rushinda kana rukanda rwe­shangu, kana chinhu chimwe chezvinhu zvenyu, kuti murege kuzoti, `Ndini nda­kafumisa Abhuramu'," 
Genesis14:24 ini handidi ha­ngu, asi zvakadyiwa namajaya chete, nomugove wavanhu vakaenda neni, va­naAneri, naEshikori, naMamure, ngava­tore migove yavo.""" 
Genesis15:1 Shure kwaizvozvo shoko raJe­hovha rakasvika kuna Abhuramu pane zvaakaratidzwa, richiti, ""Usatya Abhuramu; ini ndiri nhovo yako nomu­bayiro wako mukuru-kuru.""" 
Genesis15:2 Abhuramu akati, ""Ishe Jehovha, muchandipeiko, zvondofa hangu ndisina mwana; uchava mudyi wenhaka yeimba yangu ndiEriezeri weDhamasiko kanhi?""" 
Genesis15:3 Abhuramu akati, ""Tarirai, hamuna ku­ndipa mwana; zvino uyo wakaponerwa mumba mangu ndiye achava mudyi we­nhaka yangu.""" 
Genesis15:4 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwaari rikati, ""Uyu haangavi mudyi we­nhaka yako; asi uyo, achabuda paura hwako, ndiye achava mudyi wenhaka yako.""" 
Genesis15:5 Akamubudisa panze akati, ""Zvino tarira kudenga, uverenge nyere­dzi, kana uchigona kudziverenga."" Akati kwaari, ""Ndizvo zvichaita vana vako.""" 
Genesis15:6 Iye akatenda Jehovha, akamuti ndiko kururama kwake." 
Genesis15:7 Akati kwaari, ""Ndini Jehovha wa­kakubudisa panyika yeUri yavaKaradhea, kuti ndikupe nyika iyi, ive nhaka yako.""" 
Genesis15:8 Iye akati, ""Ishe Jehovha, ndichaziva seiko kuti ichava nhaka yangu?""" 
Genesis15:9 Akati kwaari, ""Nditorere tsiru rina makore matatu, nesheche yembudzi ina makore matatu, nehondohwe rina makore matatu, nenjiva, nemwana wenjiva.""" 
Genesis15:10 Akandomutorera izvozvo zvose, aka­zvipamura napakati, akagadzika rumwe rutivi rwakatarisana norumwe; asi shiri haana kudzipamura." 
Genesis15:11 Ipapo magora aka­burukira kunyama, asi Abhuramu wakaa­dzinga." 
Genesis15:12 Zvino zuva rakati rovira, Abhu­ramu ndokubatwa nehope huru; akawi­rwa nokutya kwakabva parima guru." 
Genesis15:13 Akati kuna Abhuramu, ""Uzive kwazvo kuti vana vako vachava vatorwa munyika isati iri yavo, vachava varanda vavo, vachatambudzwa makore ana mazana mana;" 
Genesis15:14 asi ini ndichatonga rudzi urwo rwavachashumira, pashure vachabudapo nefuma zhinji." 
Genesis15:15 Asi iwe uchaenda kuna madzibaba ako norugare; uchavigwa wa­kwegura kwazvo. 
Genesis15:16 Rudzi rwechina ru­chadzokera pano, nokuti kusarurama kwavaAmori kuchigere kuzara.""" 
Genesis15:17 Zvino zuva rakati ravira, kwa­sviba, choto chinopfungaira nezhenje romoto zvakaonekwa zvichipfuura napakati penhindi idzodzo dzenyama." 
Genesis15:18 Nomusi iwoyo Jehovha akaita sungano naAbhu­ramu, akati, ""Vana vako ndavapa nyika iyi, kubva parwizi rweIjipiti kusvikira kurwizi rukuru, runonzi Yufuratesi." 
Genesis15:19 VaKeni, navaKenizi, navaKadhimoni," 
Genesis15:20 navaHeti, navaPerezi, navaRefaimi," 
Genesis15:21 navaAmori, navaKenani, navaGiriga­shi, navaJebhusi.""" 
Genesis16:1 Zvino Sarai, mukadzi waAbhuramu, wakanga asingamuberekeri vana; iye wakanga aine murandakadzi, muIjipiti, wainzi Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai akati kuna Abhuramu, ""Tarira Jehovha waka­ndikonesa kubereka, pinda hako kumura­ndakadzi wangu, zvimwe ndingawana vana naye."" Abhuramu akateerera shoko raSarai." 
Genesis16:3 Zvino Sarai mukadzi waAbhu­ramu, wakatora Hagari muljipiti, mura­ndakadzi wake; Abhuramu zvino waka­nga agara makore ane gumi panyika yeKenani akamupa Abhuramu, murume wake, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis16:4 Akapinda kuna Hagari, iye akatora mimba; zvino wakati aona kuti wava nemimba, aka­shora vatenzi vake." 
Genesis16:5 Ipapo Sarai akati kuna Abhuramu, ""Kukanganiswa kwangu ngakuve pamu­soro pako; ndini ndakapa murandakadzi wangu pachipfuva chako, zvino iye wakati aona kuti wava nemimba, akandishora; Jehovha ngaatonge pakati pangu newe.""" 
Genesis16:6 Abhuramu akati kuna Sarai, ""Ta­rira, murandakadzi wako uri paruoko rwako, umuitire sezvaunoda."" Zvino Sa­rai wakamunetsa, akatiza." 
Genesis16:7 Mutumwa waJehovha akamuwana patsime remvura musango, patsime riri panzira inoenda Shuri." 
Genesis16:8 Akati, ""Nhai Hagari, murandakadzi waSarai, wabve­piko? Unoendepiko?"" Iye akati, ""Ndino­tiza vatenzi vangu Sarai.""" 
Genesis16:9 Mutumwa waJehovha akati kwaari, ""Dzokera kuna vatenzi vako, uzviduku­pise pasi pake.""" 
Genesis16:10 Mutumwa waJehovha akati kwaari, ""Ndichawandisa vana vako, varege kuverengwa nokuwanda kwavo.""" 
Genesis16:11 Mutumwa waJehovha akatiwo kwaari, ""Tarira wava nemimba, uchabereka mwanakomana; umutumidze zita rinonzi Ishimaeri, nokuti Jehovha wakanzwa ku­tambudzika kwako." 
Genesis16:12 Iye uchava sembizi pakati pavanhu; ucharwa navanhu vose, navanhu vose vacharwa naye; uchagara akatarisana nehama dzake dzose.""" 
Genesis16:13 Hagari akatumidza Jehovha wa­kataurirana naye, zita rinonzi: Ndimi Mwari anoona; nokuti wakati, ""Zviro kwazvo ndamuona pano oenda, iye unondiona!""" 
Genesis16:14 Naizvozvo tsime iro ra­katumidzwa Bheeriahiroi (tsime raiye mupenyu unondiona); riri pakati peKa­dheshi neBheredhi. 
Genesis16:15 Hagari akaberekera Abhuramu mwanakomana; Abhuramu akatumidza mwanakomana wake, wakaberekwa naHagari, zita rinonzi Ishimaeri." 
Genesis16:16 Abhu­ramu wakanga ana makore makumi ma­sere namatanhatu, Hagari achimuberekera Ishimaeri." 
Genesis17:1 Abhuramu wakati asvika ma­kore ana makumi mapfumbamwe namapfumbamwe, Jehovha akazviratidza kuna Abhuramu, akati kwaari, ""Ndini Mwari waMasimbaose, famba pamberi pangu, uve wakarurama." 
Genesis17:2 Ndichaita su­ngano yangu pakati pangu newe, ndicha­kuwanza kwazvo.""" 
Genesis17:3 Ipapo Abhuramu akawira pasi nechiso chake, Mwari aka­taura naye, akati," 
Genesis17:4 Kana ndirini, tarira, sungano yangu inewe, uchava baba ve­ndudzi zhinji-zhinji." 
Genesis17:5 Zita rako haricha­zonzi Abhuramu, asi zita rako richanzi Abhurahamu; nokuti ndakakuita baba vendudzi zhinji-zhinji." 
Genesis17:6 Ndichakubere­kesa vana vazhinji-zhinji; ndichakuita ndudzi, namadzimambo achabva kwauri." 
Genesis17:7 Ndichasimbisa sungano yangu pa­kati pangu newe, navana vako vanokute­vera pamarudzi avo ose, kuti ive sungano isingaperi; ndichava Mwari wako nowa­vana vako vanokutevera." 
Genesis17:8 Ndichakupa iwe navana vako vanokutevera, nyika mauri mutorwa iwe, nyika yeKenani yose, kuti ive yako nokusingaperi; ini ndichava Mwari wako. """ 
Genesis17:9 Mwari akatiwo kuna Abhurahamu, ""Kana uriwe, chengeta sungano yangu, iwe navana vako vanokutevera pamarudzi avo ose." 
Genesis17:10 Ndiyo sungano yangu, yamunofanira kuchengeta pakati pangu nemwi navana vako vanokutevera, vanako­mana vose pakati penyu ngavadzingiswe." 
Genesis17:11 Mudzingiswe panyama yechikanda chenyu chapamberi, kuti chive chiratidzo chesungano iri pakati pangu nemi." 
Genesis17:12 Mwanakomana ane mazuva masere pakati penyu ngaadzingiswe, mukomana mumwe nomumwe pamarudzi enyu, kana akazvarwa mumba, kana akatengwa ne­mari kuvatorwa vapi navapi, vasati vari vavana vako." 
Genesis17:13 Wakazvarwa mumba mako, Nowakatengwa nemari, vanofanira kudzingiswa; sungano yangu ive pa­nyama penyu, ive sungano isingaperi." 
Genesis17:14 Munhurume asina kudzingiswa, asina kudzingiswa panyama yechikanda chake chapamberi, munhu akadai anofanira ku­bviswa pakati porudzi rwake, akaputsa sungano yangu.""" 
Genesis17:15 Mwari akatiwo kuna Abhurahamu, ""Kana ari Sarai, mukadzi wako haufaniri kuzomutumidza zita rinonzi Sarai, asi zita rake richanzi Sara;" 
Genesis17:16 ndichamuropa­fadza iye, ndikupe mwanakomana kwaari; ndichamuropafadza iye, kuti ave mai vendudzi; madzimambo avanhu achabva maari.""" 
Genesis17:17 Ipapo Abhurahamu wakawira pasi nechiso chake, akaseka, akati mumoyo make, ""Ko munhu ana makore ane zana ungaberekerwa mwana here? NaSara, wava namakore ana makumi mapfumba­mwe, angabereka here?""" 
Genesis17:18 Abhurahamu akati kuna Mwari, ""Dai Ishimaeri achira­rama hake pamberi penyu! """ 
Genesis17:19 Mwari akati kwaari, ""Kwete, asi Sara, mukadzi wako, ndiye achakubere­kera mwanakomana, unofanira kumutu­midza zita rinonzi Isaka; ndichaita su­ngano yangu naye, ive sungano isingaperi pakati pavana vake vanomutevera." 
Genesis17:20 Kana ari Ishimaeri, ndakunzwawo; ta­rira, ndamuropafadza, ndichamuberekesa vana vazhinji, nokumuwanzisa kwazvo; achabereka madzishe ane gumi namaviri, ndichamuita rudzi rukuru." 
Genesis17:21 Asi sungano yangu ndichaisimbisa naIsaka, uyo wau­chaberekerwa naSara nenguva iyi ma­kei.""" 
Genesis17:22 Akapedza kutaura naye, Mwari akakwira achibva kuna Abhurahamu." 
Genesis17:23 Ipapo Abhurahamu wakatora Ishi­maeri, mwanakomana wake, navose vaka­zvarwa mumba make, navose vakatengwa nemari yake, munhurume mumwe nomu­mwe kuvanhu vakanga vari paimba yaAbhurahamu, akavadzingisa zvikanda zvavo zvapamberi nomusi iwoyo, sezvaakau­dzwa naMwari." 
Genesis17:24 Abhurahamu wakanga ana makore ana makumi mapfumbamwe namapfumbamwe musi wokudzingiswa kwake. 
Genesis17:25 lshimaeri, mwanakomana wake, wakanga ana makore ane gumi namatatu musi wokudzingiswa kwake." 
Genesis17:26 Nomusi uyo Abhurahamu wakadzingiswa pamwe­chete naIshimaeri mwanakomana wake. 
Genesis17:27 Navarume vose veimba yake, vakanga vazvarirwa mumba make, navakanga va­tengwa nemari kuvatorwa, vakadzingiswa pamwechete naye." 
Genesis18:1 Zvino Jehovha wakazviratidza kwaari pamiti yemiouki yeMa­mure, agere pamusuo wetende masikati zuva richipisa;" 
Genesis18:2 akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, akaona varume vatatu vamire vakatarisana naye; akati achivaona, aka­bva pamusuo wetende, akamhanya ku­ndosangana navo, akakotamira pasi," 
Genesis18:3 akati, ""Ishe wangu, kana ndawana nya­sha kwamuri, musapfuura henyu pamura­nda wenyu." 
Genesis18:4 Ngavauye nemvura shoma­nana, mushambidze tsoka dzenyu, muzorore pasi pomuti;" 
Genesis18:5 ini nditore chi­medu chechingwa, musimbise moyo yenyu; mugozopfuura henyu, nokuti ndi­zvo zvamauyira kumuranda wenyu. Ivo vakati; 'ita hako sezvawataura'" 
Genesis18:6 Abhurahamu akakurumidza kupi­nda mutende kuna Sara, akati, ""Kurumi­dza ugadzire zviyero zvitatu zvoupfu hwakatsetseka, ukanye, ubike zvingwa zviduku. """ 
Genesis18:7 Naiye Abhurahamu akamhanyira kumombe, akatora mhuru ine nyama yakapfava, yakanaka, akapa muranda wake, iye akakurumidza kuigadzira." 
Genesis18:8 Akatora mukaka wakafa, nomukaka, nemhuru yaakanga agadzira, akazviisa pamberi pavo; akamira navo munyasi momuti, vakadya." 
Genesis18:9 Ivo vakati kwaari, ""Sara, mukadzi wako, ari kupiko?"" Iye akati, ""Tarirai, ari mutende.""" 
Genesis18:10 Iye akati, ""Zvirokwazvo, kana gore rapfuura, ndichauyazve kwa­muri, nenguva iyo Sara, mukadzi wako, achava nomwanakomana."" Zvino Sara akanga achiteerera ari pamusuo wetende shure kwake." 
Genesis18:11 Zvino Abhurahamu naSara vakanga vakwegura, vava namakore mazhinji; nomutoo wavakadzi wakanga watoguma kuna Sara." 
Genesis18:12 Sara akaseka mumoyo make akati, ""Ini ndingazvifa­rira here zvandachembera, naiye tenzi wangu akwegurawo?""" 
Genesis18:13 Jehovha akati kuna Abhurahamu, ""Sara wasekereiko, achiti, `Ko ini muchembere ndichabereka mwana zvirokwazvo here?'" 
Genesis18:14 Kune chi­nhu chingakunda Jehovha here? Nguva ino, gore rapfuura, ndichadzokera kwauri; Sara achava nomwanakomana.""" 
Genesis18:15 Asi Sara akaramba achiti, ""Ha­ndina kuseka,"" nokuti akanga achitya. Iye akati, ""Kwete waseka hako.""" 
Genesis18:16 Zvino vaya varume vakasimuka, vakabva ipapo, vakatarira Sodhomu; Abhurahamu akaenda navo achivapere­kedza." 
Genesis18:17 Zvino Jehovha akati, ""Ndicha­vanzira Abhurahamu zvandinoita here?" 
Genesis18:18 Abhurahamu zvaachava rudzi rukuru rune simba, nendudzi dzose dzenyika dzicharopafadzwa maari?" 
Genesis18:19 Nokuti nda­kamutsaura, kuti araire vana vake navei­mba yake vanomutevera, kuti vache­ngete nzira yaJehovha, vaite zvakarurama nezvakanaka; kuti Jehovha auyise pamusoro paAbhurahamu izvo zvaakataura pamusoro pake.""" 
Genesis18:20 Ipapo Jehovha akati, ""Kudanidzira kweSodhomu neGomora kukuru kwazvo; zvirokwazvo zvivi zvavo zvakaipa kwa­zvo;" 
Genesis18:21 ndichaburuka zvino kuti ndione izvo zvavaita, kana zvakafanana nokuda­nidzira kwavo kwakasvika kwandiri; kana zvisina kudaro, ndichazviziva.""" 
Genesis18:22 Zvino vaya varume vakabva, va­kaenda Sodhomu; asi Abhurahamu aka­ramba amire pamberi paJehovha." 
Genesis18:23 Zvino Abhurahamu wakaswedera, akati, ""Mu­chaparadza vakarurama pamwechete na­vakaipa here?" 
Genesis18:24 Zvimwe vangavapo va­karurama vana makumi mashanu muguta; muchaparadza nzvimbo iyo, mu­kasainzwira tsitsi nokuda kwavakaru­rama vana makumi mashanu varimo here?" 
Genesis18:25 Ngazvive kure nemwi kuita kudaro kuuraya vakarurama pamwechete nava­kaipa, kuti vakarurama vave savakaipa, ngazvive kure nemi. Mutongi wenyika yose haangaiti zvakarurama here?""" 
Genesis18:26 Ipapo Jehovha akati, ""Kana ndika­wana muSodhomu vakarurama vana ma­kumi mashanu mukati meguta, ndicha­nzwira nzvimbo yose tsitsi nokuda kwavo. """ 
Genesis18:27 Abhurahamu akapindura akati, ""Tarirai zvino, ndatsunga kutaura naJeho­vha, ini guruva nedota hangu;" 
Genesis18:28 zvimwe kuchashaikwa vashanu kuvakarurama vana makumi mashanu; mungaparadza guta rose kana vashanu vashaikwa here? Akati, ""Handingariparadzi, kana ndikawa­namo makumi mana navashanu.""" 
Genesis18:29 Akataurazve naye akati, ""Zvimwe kuchawanikwamo makumi mana."" Akati, ""Handingazviiti nokuda kwamakumi mana.""" 
Genesis18:30 Akati, ""Jehovha ngaarege hake kunditsamwira, kana ndikataurazve. Zvi­mwe vana makumi matatu vachawani­kwamo."" Akati, ""Handingazviiti, kana ndikawana makumi matatu.""" 
Genesis18:31 Akati, ""Tarirai, ndatsunga kutaura naJehovha, zvimwe vana makumi maviri vachawanikwamo."" Akati, ""Handingari­paradzi nokuda kwamakumi maviri.""" 
Genesis18:32 Akati, ""Jehovha ndikataurazve ka­mwe chete; zvimwe vane gumi rimwe chete vangawanikwamo."" Akati, ""Handingariparadzi nokuda kwaivavo vane gumi.""" 
Genesis18:33 Ipapo Jehovha akabva, apedza kutaura naAbhurahamu; naAbhurahamu akadzokera kumba kwake." 
Genesis19:1 Vatumwa vaviri vakasvika So­dhomu madekwana; Roti akanga agere pasuo reSodhomu; Roti akavaona, akasimuka, akaenda kundosangana navo, akakotamira pasi nechiso chake;" 
Genesis19:2 akati, ""Tarirai, madzishe angu, chidotsaukirai henyu kumba komuranda wenyu, mu­vate usiku hwose, mushambidze tsoka dzenyu, mugofumira parwendo rwenyu."" Ivo vakati, ""Kwete tichavata hedu padare usiku hwose.""" 
Genesis19:3 Akavanyengetera zvikuru; vaka­dzimara votsaukira kwaari, vakapinda mumba make; akavagadzirira chirayiro, akabika chingwa chisina mbiriso, vaka­dya;" 
Genesis19:4 zvino vasati vavata, varume ve­guta, ivo varume veSodhomu, vakako­mba imba, vaduku navakuru, vanhu vose vokumativi ose;" 
Genesis19:5 vakadanidzira kuna Roti, vakati kwaari, ""Vari kupiko varume vakapinda kumba kwako usiku huno? Vaburitsirei kwatiri, kuti tiva­zive.""" 
Genesis19:6 Roti akabuda akaenda kwavari ku­musuo, akazarira musuo shure kwake." 
Genesis19:7 Akati, ""Regai henyu kuita zvakaipa zvakadai, hama dzangu." 
Genesis19:8 Tarirai, ndine vakunda vaviri vasina kumboziva mu­rume, regai ndivabudisire kwamuri, mu­vaitire ivo sezvamunoda; asi varume ava, musavaitira chinhu, nokuti ndizvo zvava­kapindira mumumvuri wedenga rangu.""" 
Genesis19:9 Ivo vakati, ""Suduruka! "" Vakati, ""Munhu uyu wakauya kuzogara pano ari mutorwa, iye zvino anoda kuva mutongi. Zvino tichakuitira zvakaipa iwe kupfuura ivo."" Vakamanikidza murume uyo Roti, vakaswedera kuputsa gonhi." 
Genesis19:10 Asi va­rume vakatambanudza maoko avo, vaka­kwevera Roti mumba mavakanga vari, vakapfiga gonhi." 
Genesis19:11 Vakapofomadza va­kanga vari pamusuo, vaduku navakuru; vakazvinetsa vachitsvaka musuo." 
Genesis19:12 Va­rume vakati kuna Roti, ""Une vamwe pano here? Kana mukuwasha, kana vana­komana vako, kana vanasikana vako, navose vaunavo muguta; uvabudise muno." 
Genesis19:13 Nokuti tava kuda kuparadza nzvimbo ino; nokuti kudanidzira kwavo kwava kukuru kuna Jehovha; Jehovha wakatituma kuiparadza. 
Genesis19:14 Ipapo Roti akabuda, akandotaura navakuwasha vake, vakanga vachazo­wana vakunda vake, vakati, ""Simukai, ibvai muno; nokuti Jehovha achaparadza guta rino."" Asi vakuwasha vake vakati, ""Anoita hake musare.""" 
Genesis19:15 Utonga huchitsvuka vatumwa va­kakurumidzisa Roti vachiti, ""Simuka, uende nomukadzi wako, navakunda vako vaviri vari pano, kuti urege kuparadzwa kana guta rorohwa.""" 
Genesis19:16 Asi vakanonoka; varume vakabata ruoko rwake, noruoko rwomukadzi wake, namaoko avakunda vake vaviri; nokuti Jehovha wakanga ane tsitsi naye; vakamubudisa, vakamuisa kunze kweguta." 
Genesis19:17 Zvino vakati vavabu­disa kunze, mumwe akati, ""Tiza nokuda koupenyu hwako, usacheuka shure kwako, kana kumira pabani rose, tizira kugomo, kuti urege kuparadzwa.""" 
Genesis19:18 Roti akati kwavari, ""Kwete, ishe wangu, regai kudaro." 
Genesis19:19 Tarirai, muranda wenyu wakawana nyasha kwamuri, ma­kurisa tsitsi dzenyu dzamakandiitira, zva­mandiraramisa; asi handigoni kutizira kugomo, zvimwe zvakaipa zvingandiwira ndikafa." 
Genesis19:20 Tarirai, guta iri riri pedo, nditizire hangu ikoko; iduku haro, ndite­nderei kuti nditizire ikoko, (harizi duku here?) Mweya wangu urarame.""" 
Genesis19:21 Iye akati kwaari, ""Tarira, ndaku­nzwira tsitsi pachinhu ichiwo, kuti handi­ngaparadzi guta iri rawareva." 
Genesis19:22 Kurumi­dza, utizireko, nokuti handigoni kuita chinhu usati wasvikapo."" Naizvozvo zita reguta rakanzi Zoari." 
Genesis19:23 Zuva rakanga rabuda panyika, Roti achisvika paZoari." 
Genesis19:24 Ipapo Jehovha akanaisa pamusoro peSodhomu neGomora sarufa nomoto, zvi­chibva kudenga kuna Jehovha," 
Genesis19:25 akapa­radza maguta iwayo, nebani rose, navose vakanga vagere mumaguta, nezvose zva­kanga zvamera pavhu." 
Genesis19:26 Asi mukadzi wake wakacheuka ari shure kwake, akai­twa shongwe yomunyu." 
Genesis19:27 Zvino Abhurahamu wakamuka mangwanani, akaenda ikoko kwaakanga amire pamberi paJehovha;" 
Genesis19:28 akatarira kurutivi rweSodhomu neGomora noku­nyika yose yebani, akaona utsi hwenyika iyo huchikwira soutsi hwechoto." 
Genesis19:29 Zvino Mwari wakati achiparadza maguta ebani, Mwari akarangarira Abhurahamu, akabudisa Roti pakati po­kuparadzwa ikoko, nguva yaakaparadza maguta makanga muchigara Roti." 
Genesis19:30 Zvino Roti wakakwira, achibva muZoari, akandogara mugomo, navaku­nda vake vaviri pamwechete naye; nokuti wakatya kugara muZoari; akagara, mu­bako, iye navakunda vake vaviri." 
Genesis19:31 Zvino dangwe rakati kumuduku, ""Baba vedu vakwegura; hakuna murume panyika ino angapinda kwatiri nomutoo wenyika yose;" 
Genesis19:32 uya, timwise baba vedu waini, tivate navo, kuti tichengete rudzi nababa vedu.""" 
Genesis19:33 Usiku ihwohwo vakamwisa baba vavo waini, wedangwe akapinda, akando­vata nababa vake; ivo havana kuziva kuvata kwake pasi kana kumuka kwake." 
Genesis19:34 Fume mangwana wedangwe akati kumuduku, ""Tarira, ndavata nababa va­ngu usiku hwanezuro; ngativamwise waini usiku hwunowo, iwe ugopinda, undovata navo, kuti tichengete rudzi nababa vedu.""" 
Genesis19:35 Vakamwisa baba vavo waini usiku ihwohwowo, muduku akasi­muka, akandovata navo; ivo havana ku­ziva kuvata kwake pasi kana kumuka kwake." 
Genesis19:36 Naizvozvo vakunda vaRoti va­viri vakava nemimba kuna baba vavo. 
Genesis19:37 Wedangwe akabereka mwanakomana,akamutumidza zita rinonzi Moabhu, ku­svikira zuva ranhasi." 
Genesis19:38 Nomudukuwo wakabereka mwanakomana, akamutumi­dza zita rinonzi Bheniami; ndivo baba vavana vaAmoni kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Genesis20:1 Zvino Abhurahamu wakabvapo, akaenda kunyika yenyasi, aka­ndogara pakati peKadheshi neShuri; akava mutorwa muGerari." 
Genesis20:2 Abhurahamu akati pamusoro paSara, mukadzi wake, ""Ihanzvadzi yangu."" Abhimereki, ma­mbo weGerari, akatuma vanhu kundotora Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Asi Mwari wakauya kuna Abhi­mereki usiku pakurota, akati kwaari, ""Tarira, uchafa nokuda komukadzi wa­watora; nokuti mukadzi uyu ane mu­rume. """ 
Genesis20:4 Zvino Abhimereki wakanga asina kuswedera kwaari; akati, ""Ishe, muchau­raya norudzi rwakaruramawo here?" 
Genesis20:5 Ko iye haana kundiudza here, achiti, iha­nzvadzi yangu; naiye mukadzi haana kuti, ihanzvadzi yangu, here? Ndakaita izvozvo nomoyo wakarurama, na­maoko akachena.""" 
Genesis20:6 Mwari akati kwaari pakurota, ""Hongu, ndinoziva kuti wa­kaita chinhu ichi nomoyo wakarurama, ndikakudzivisawo kuti urege kundita­dzira; naizvozvo handina kukutendera kumubata." 
Genesis20:7 Saka zvino dzosa mukadzi womurume uyu, nokuti muporofita; iye achakunyengeterera, kuti urarame; kana ukasamudzosa, uzive kuti uchafa zviro­kwazvo, iwe navose vari vako.""" 
Genesis20:8 Abhimereki akamuka mangwanani, akadana varanda vake vose, akavaudza izvozvo zvose munzeve dzavo; varume vakavhunduka kwazvo." 
Genesis20:9 Ipapo Abhime­reki akadana Abhurahamu akati kwaari, ""Chiiko chinhu ichi chawatiitira? Ini ndakutadzireiko, zvawauyisa mhosva huru pamusoro pangu napamusoro pou­she hwangu?""" 
Genesis20:10 Abhimereki akati kuna Abhurahamu, ""Wanga uchiti kudiniko, zvawaita chinhu ichi?""" 
Genesis20:11 Abhurahamu akati, ""Nokuti nda­kati, `Zvirokwazvo havatyi Mwari pa­nzvimbo ino; zvimwe vachandiuraya pa­musoro pomukadzi wangu.'" 
Genesis20:12 Uye, zvirokwazvo ihanzvadzi yangu, mukunda wababa vangu, asi haazi mwana wamai vangu; akazowanikwa neni." 
Genesis20:13 Zvino Mwari wakati achindibudisa paimba ya­baba vangu, kuti ndidzungaire, ndikati kwaari, `Hechi chinhu chakanaka chau­nofanira kundiitira. Pose patinosvika, uti pamusoro pangu, ihanzvadzi yangu.' """ 
Genesis20:14 Abhimereki akatora makwai, ne­mombe, navaranda, navarandakadzi, akapa Abhurahamu izvozvo, akamudzo­serawo Sara, mukadzi wake." 
Genesis20:15 Abhime­reki akati, ""Tarira, nyika yangu iri pa­mberi pako; gara hako paunoda.""" 
Genesis20:16 Akati kuna Sara, ""Tarira, ndapa hanzvadzi yako mashekeri esirivha ane chiuru che­zana; chichava chifukidziro chameso ako kuna vose vaunavo; waruramiswa pa­mberi pavose.""" 
Genesis20:17 Abhurahamu akanyengetera kuna Mwari, Mwari akaporesa Abhimereki, no­mukadzi wake, navarandakadzi vake, va­kabereka vana." 
Genesis20:18 Nokuti Jehovha wakanga azarira zvizvaro zvose zveveimba yaAbhi­mereki nokuda kwaSara, mukadzi waAbhurahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Zvino Jehovha wakashanyira Sara, sezvaakataura; Jehovha akaitira Sara sezvaakavaudza." 
Genesis21:2 Sara akava nemimba, akaberekera Abhura­hamu mwanakomana pakukwegura kwake nenguva iyeyo yakanga yarehwa naMwari." 
Genesis21:3 Abhurahamu akatumidza mwanakomana wake, waakaberekerwa naSara, zita rinonzi Isaka." 
Genesis21:4 Abhurahamu akadzingisa mwanakomana wake Isaka aita mazuva masere, sezvaakarairwa naMwari." 
Genesis21:5 Abhurahamu wakanga asvika makore ane zana, nguva yaakaberekerwa mwanakomana wake Isaka." 
Genesis21:6 Ipapo Sara akati, ""Mwari wandisekesa; vose, vano­nzwa izvozvi, vachaseka neni.""" 
Genesis21:7 Akati, ""Ndianiko waitongoti kuna Abhurahamu, `Sara achayamwisa vana?' Nokuti ndaka­muberekera mwanakomana pakukwegura kwake. """ 
Genesis21:8 Mwanakomana wakazokura, akaru­murwa; Abhurahamu akaita mutambo mukuru nomusi wokurumurwa kwalsaka." 
Genesis21:9 Zvino Sara akaona mwanakomana waHagari, muljipiti, waakaberekera Abhu­rahamu, achiseka." 
Genesis21:10 Saka wakati kuna Abhurahamu, ""Dzinga mubatiri uyu no­mwanakomana wake, nokuti mwanako­mana womubatiri uyu haangadyi nhaka pamwechete nomwanakomana wangu Isaka.""" 
Genesis21:11 Shoko iro rakanga rakaipa kwazvo kuna Abhurahamu, nokuda ko­mwanakomana wake." 
Genesis21:12 Ipapo Mwari akati kuna Abhurahamu, ""Ngazvirege hazvo kuva zvakaipa kwauri nokuda komukomana noko mubatiri wako; uteerere Sara pazvinhu zvose zvaano­taura kwauri, nokuti rudzi rwako ruchatumidzwa nezita ralsaka." 
Genesis21:13 Naiye mwa­nakomana womubatiri ndichamuita rudzi rukuruwo, nokuti mwanakomana wako.""" 
Genesis21:14 Abhurahamu akamuka mangwa­nani, akatora chingwa neguchu remvura, akapa Hagari, akazviisa pafudzi rake, nomwanawo, akamuendesa; iye akaenda akandodzungaira murenje reBheerishe­bha." 
Genesis21:15 Mvura yeguchu yakati yapera, akakanda mwana pasi munyasi megwe­nzi;" 
Genesis21:16 iye akandogara pasi pakatarisana naye nhambwe inenge ingasvika museve kana wapotserwa, nokuti wakati, ""Ndi­rege kuona hangu mwana achifa."" Aka­gara pakatarisana naye, akachema kwa­zvo." 
Genesis21:17 Mwari akanzwa inzwi romuko­mana; mutumwa waMwari akadanidzira kuna Hagari, ari kudenga, akati kwaari, ""Zvaita seiko Hagari? Usatya, nokuti Mwari wanzwa inzwi romukomana apo paari." 
Genesis21:18 Simuka usimudze mukomana, umubate noruoko rwako, nokuti ndicha­muita rudzi rukuru.""" 
Genesis21:19 Ipapo Mwari akasvinudza meso ake, akaona tsime remvura; akaenda, akazadza guchu ne­mvura, akamwisa mukomana." 
Genesis21:20 Mwari akava nomukomana, akakura, akagara murenje, akava munhu anopfura nouta." 
Genesis21:21 Akagara murenje reParani, mai vake vakamutorera mukadzi kunyika yeIjipiti." 
Genesis21:22 Zvino nenguva iyo Abhimereki naPikori, mukuru wehondo yake, vaka­taura naAbhurahamu, vakati, ""Mwari anewe pazvinhu zvose zvaunoita;" 
Genesis21:23 nai­zvozvo zvino ndipikire pano naMwari kuti haungandinyengeri ini, kana vana vangu, kana vana vavana vangu; asi sezvandakakuitira tsitsi, uitewo saizvo­zvo kwandiri, nokunyika mawakagara uri mutorwa.""" 
Genesis21:24 Abhurahamu akati, ""Ndi­chapika.""" 
Genesis21:25 Asi Abhurahamu akatuka Abhime­reki nokuda kwetsime remvura rakanga ratorwa nesimba navaranda vaAbhime­reki. 
Genesis21:26 Abhimereki akati, ""Handizivi akaita izvozvo, newe hauna kundiudza, ini handina kumbozvinzwa, asi nhasi.""" 
Genesis21:27 Abhurahamu akatora makwai nenzo­mbe, akapa Abhimereki, ivo vaviri va­kaita sungano." 
Genesis21:28 Abhurahamu akaraura zvisheche zvinomwe zvamakwai; 
Genesis21:29 Abhimereki akati kuna Abhurahamu, ""Ko zvisheche izvi zvinomwe zvawa­raura ndezveiko?""" 
Genesis21:30 Iye akati, ""Zvisheche izvi zvino­mwe uzvigamuchire paruoko rwangu, chive chapupu changu, kuti ndini ndaka­chera tsime iri.""" 
Genesis21:31 Naizvozvo akatumidza nzvimbo iyo zita rinonzi Bheerishebha, nokuti ndipo pavakapika ivo vaviri." 
Genesis21:32 Saizvozvo vakaita sungano paBheeri­shebha; Abhimereki akasimuka, naPikori, mukuru wehondo yake, vakadzokera ku­nyika yavaFirisitia." 
Genesis21:33 Abhurahamu aka­sima muti womutamarisiki paBheerishe­bha, akanamatapo zita raJehovha Mwari wokusingaperi." 
Genesis21:34 Abhurahamu akagara ari mutorwa panyika yavaFirisitia mazuva mazhinji. 
Genesis22:1 Shure kwaizvozvo Mwari wa­kaedza Abhurahamu, akati kwaari, ""Abhurahamu! "" Iye akati, ""Ndiri pano hangu.""" 
Genesis22:2 Akati, ""Zvino tora mwanakomana wako, mwanakomana wako mumwe chete, waunoda, Isaka, uende kunyika yeMoria umuite chibayiro chinopiswa pane rimwe gomo randichakuudza.""" 
Genesis22:3 Abhurahamu akamuka mangwa­nani, akasunga mbongoro yake, akatora majaya ake maviri naIsaka, mwanako­mana wake, akatsemura huni dzechiba­yiro chinopiswa, ndokusimuka, akaenda kunzvimbo yaakaudzwa naMwari." 
Genesis22:4 Zvino nomusi wetatu Abhurahamu aka­simudza meso ake, akaona nzvimbo iyo ari kure." 
Genesis22:5 Abhurahamu akati kumajaya ake, ""imwi chigarai henyu pano nembo­ngoro, ini nomwana tichaenda ikoko; tichambondonamata, tigodzokera kwa­muri. """ 
Genesis22:6 Abhurahamu akatora huni dzechi­bayiro chinopiswa, akadzitakudza Isaka, mwanakomana wake; akatora moto neba­nga muruoko rwake, vakaenda vari va­viri." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka akataura naAbhurahamu, baba vake, akati, ""Baba vangu! "" Iye akati, ""Ndiri pano hangu, mwana wangu."" Akati: ""Hoyu moto nehuni, asi hwayana rechibayiro chinopiswa riripiko?""" 
Genesis22:8 Abhurahamu akati, ""Mwari ucha­tipa gwayana rechibayiro chinopiswa, mwana wangu;"" saizvozvo vakafamba vari vaviri." 
Genesis22:9 Vakandosvika panzvimbo yaakau­dzwa naMwari; Abhurahamu akavakapo aritari, akagadzira huni, ndokusunga mwa­nakomana wake, akamuisa paaritari pamu­soro pehuni." 
Genesis22:10 Zvino Abhurahamu akata­mbanudza ruoko rwake, akatora banga, kuti abaye mwanakomana wake." 
Genesis22:11 Ipapo mutumwa waJehovha wakadanidzira kwaari, ari kudenga akati, ""Abhurahamu! Abhurahamu!"" Iye akati, ""Ndiri pano hangu.""" 
Genesis22:12 Akati, ""Usaisa ruoko rwako ku­mwana, usamuitira chinhu, nokuti zvino ndinoziva kuti unotya Mwari, zvausina kundinyima mwanakomana wako, iye mwanakomana wako mumwe chete.""" 
Genesis22:13 Abhurahamu akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, ndokuona shure kwake hondohwe yakanga yakabatwa nyanga dzayo mugwenzi. Abhurahamu akatora hondohwe iya, akaipisa chikava chiba­yiro panzvimbo yomwanakomana wake." 
Genesis22:14 Abhurahamu akatumidza nzvimbo iyo zita rinonzi Jehovha jire; saka nanhasi vanositi, ""Pagomo raJehovha ndipo paa­chaonekwa.""" 
Genesis22:15 Ipapo mutumwa waJehovha waka­dana Abhurahamu rwechipiri, ari kude­nga," 
Genesis22:16 akati, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, `Ndaka­pika neni ndimene,' ndichiti, `Zvawaita izvozvo, ukasandinyima mwanakomana wako mumwe chete;" 
Genesis22:17 ndichakuropafa­dza kwazvo, ndichawanza vana vako kwazvo senyeredzi dzokudenga, uye se­jecha riri pamahombekombe egungwa; vana vako vachava varidzi vamasuo ava­vengi vavo;" 
Genesis22:18 ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzicharopafadzwa muvana vako, zvawa­kateerera inzwi rangu.' """ 
Genesis22:19 Ipapo Abhura­hamu wakadzokera kumajaya ake, vaka­simuka vakaenda vose Bheerishebha; Abhurahamu akagara paBheerishebha." 
Genesis22:20 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo Abhura­hamu wakaudzwa, zvichinzi, ""Tarira, Mirika wakaberekerawo munun'una wako Nahori vanakomana ava:" 
Genesis22:21 Uzi, dangwe rake, naBuzi, munun'una wake, naKemueri, baba vaAramu," 
Genesis22:22 naKesedhi, naHazo, naPiradhashi, naJidhirafi, naBhetueri." 
Genesis22:23 Bhetueri akabereka Rabheka, ava va­sere ndivo vakaberekerwa Nahori, munu­n'una waAbhurahamu, naMirika.""" 
Genesis22:24 No­murongo wake wainzi Ruma, wakaberekawo Tebha, naGahami, naTa­hashi, naMaaka." 
Genesis23:1 Zvino Sara wakagara makore ane zana namakumi maviri nama­nomwe; ndiwo makore oupenyu hwaSara. 
Genesis23:2 Sara akafa paKiriyatiabha (rimwe zita ndiHebhuroni) panyika yeKenani; Abhurahamu akauya kuzochema Sara nokumuririra. 
Genesis23:3 Zvino Abhurahamu akasimuka pa­nowakafa wake, akataurirana navana vaHeti, akati," 
Genesis23:4 Ndiri mweni nomutorwa pakati penyu, ndipei nzvimbo yokuviga pakati penyu, ive nzvimbo yangu, kuti ndivige wakafa wangu, ndirege ku­muona.""" 
Genesis23:5 Vana vaHeti vakapindura Abhura­hamu, vakati kwaari," 
Genesis23:6 Chitinzwai, ishe wedu, imwi muri muchinda waMwari pa­kati pedu; vigai wakafa wenyu pahwiro hwakanaka pakati pamahwiro edu ose; hakuna munhu pakati pedu angakunyimai hwiro hwake, kuti muvige wakafa we­nyu." 
Genesis23:7 Ipapo Abhurahamu wakasimuka akakotamira pasi pamberi pavanhu ve­nyika iyo, ivo vana vaHeti," 
Genesis23:8 akataurirana navo, akati, ""Kana muchitenda kuti ndi­vige wakafa wangu, ndirege kumuona, chindinzwai, mundikumbirire kuna Efu­roni, mwanakomana waZohari," 
Genesis23:9 kuti andipe bako reMakapera, raanaro, riri pamagumo emunda wake, andipe iroro, ndiripe mutengo wose, ive nzvimbo ya­ngu yokuviga pakati penyu.""" 
Genesis23:10 Efuroni zvino wakanga agere pa­kati pavana vaHeti; Efuroni, muHeti, akapindura Abhurahamu, vana vaHeti, vachizvinzwa, ivo vose vaipinda pasuo reguta rake, akati," 
Genesis23:11 Kwete, ishe wangu, chindinzwai; teererai, ndinokupai munda, nairo bako ririmo, ndinokupai iro; ndino­kupai izvozvo pamberi pavana vavanhu vangu; vigai henyu wakafa wenyu.""" 
Genesis23:12 Abhurahamu akakotama pamberi pava­nhu venyika iyo," 
Genesis23:13 akataura naEfuroni, vanhu venyika iyo vachizvinzwa, achiti, ""Kana uchida, chinditeerera hako, ndi­chakupa mutengo womunda, uugamu­chire kwandiri, kuti ndivige wakafa wa­ngupo.""" 
Genesis23:14 Efuroni akapindura Abhurahamu, akati kwaari," 
Genesis23:15 Ishe wangu, chinditeererai; mu­nda unotengwa namashekeri esirivha ana mazana mana, chingava chinyiko pakati pangu newe? Vigai henyu wakafa we­nyu.""" 
Genesis23:16 Abhurahamu akateerera Efuroni. Abhurahamu akayerera Efuroni mashe­keri esirivha aakareva, vana vaHeti va­chizvinzwa, mashekeri esirivha ana ma­zana mana, avanotenga nawo kuvatengesi." 
Genesis23:17 Naizvo munda waEfuroni, wa­kanga uri paMakapera pakatarisana neMamure, munda nebako rakanga ririmo, nemiti yose yakanga iri mumunda neya­kanga iri panyika yose yakapoteredza," 
Genesis23:18 zvikava zvaAbhurahamu pamberi pa­vana vaHeti, pamberi pavose vaipinda pasuo reguta rake." 
Genesis23:19 Shure kwaizvozvo Abhurahamu akaviga Sara, mukadzi wake, mubako romunda weMakapera, pakatarisana neMamure (rimwe zita ndiHebhuroni), pa­nyika yeKenani." 
Genesis23:20 Zvino munda nebako rakanga ririmo zvakasimbisiwa kuna Abhurahamu navana vaHeti, kuti zvive zvake, ikava nzvimbo yake yokuviga." 
Genesis24:1 Abhurahamu zvino wakanga akwegura, ava mutana kwazvo; Jehovha wakanga aropafadza Abhura­hamu pazvinhu zvose." 
Genesis24:2 Abhurahamu akataura nomuranda wake, waiva mukuru weimba yake, waichengeta zvose zvaaka­nga anazvo, achiti, ""Chimboisa chanza chako pasi pechidya changu," 
Genesis24:3 ndikupi­kise naJehovha, Mwari wokudenga, naMwari wenyika, kuti haungatoreri mwa­nakomana wangu mukadzi kuvanasikana veKenani, vandinogara pakati pavo;" 
Genesis24:4 asi uende kunyika yangu, nokuhama dzangu, undotorera ikoko mwanakomana wangu Isaka mukadzi.""" 
Genesis24:5 Muranda akati kwaari, ""Zvimwe mukadzi haangatendi kunditevera ku­nyika ino, zvino ndingafanira kudzosera mwanakomana wenyu kunyika kwama­kabva here?""" 
Genesis24:6 Abhurahamu akati kwaari, ""Che­njera kuti urege kudzosera mwanako­mana wangu ikoko." 
Genesis24:7 Jehovha, Mwari wokudenga, wakandibvisa paimba ya­baba vangu nomunyika yokuzvarwa kwa­ngu, wakataura neni, akandipikira, achiti, `Nyika ino ndichapa vana vako,' ndiye achatuma mutumwa wake pamberi pako, kuti utorere mwanakomana wangu muka­dzi ikoko." 
Genesis24:8 Kana mukadzi asingatendi kukutevera, iwe uchasunungurwa paku­pika kwako uku kwandiri; asi usadzosera mwanakomana wangu ikoko.""" 
Genesis24:9 Ipapo muranda akaisa chanza chake pasi pechi­dya chatenzi wake, akamupikira pamu­soro pechinhu ichocho." 
Genesis24:10 Muranda akatora makamera ane gumi pamakamera atenzi wake, akaenda, aine nhumbi dzose dzakanaka dzatenzi wake; akasimuka, akaenda Mesopotamia kuguta raNahori." 
Genesis24:11 Akapfugamisa maka­mera kunze kweguta patsime remvura nenguva yamadekwana, iri nguva yai­buda vakadzi kundochera mvura;" 
Genesis24:12 akati, ""Jehovha, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhu­rahamu, ndifambisei henyu zvakanaka nhasi; muitire tenzi wangu Abhurahamu ngoni." 
Genesis24:13 Tarirai ndimire patsime re­mvura, vakunda vavanhu veguta vobuda kuzochera mvura." 
Genesis24:14 Zvino ngakuitwe kuti musikana wandichati kwaari, `Nditu­rirewo chirongo chako, ndimwe'; kana akati, `Imwai henyu, namakamera enyu ndichaamwisawo;' ngaave iye wamaka­tsaurira muranda wenyu Isaka; naizvozvo ndichaziva kuti makaitira tenzi wangu ngoni. """ 
Genesis24:15 Zvino wakanga asati apedza ku­taura, Rabheka, wakaberekerwa Bhetueri, mwanakomana waMirika, mukadzi waNahori, munun'una waAbhurahamu, waka­svika ane chirongo pafudzi rake." 
Genesis24:16 Zvino musikana uyu wakanga akanaka kwazvo pameso ake, mhandara isina kumbozi­viwa nomurume; akaburukira kutsime, akazadza chirongo chake, akakwirazve." 
Genesis24:17 Ipapo muranda wakamhanyira kundo­sangana naye, akati, ""Dondipawo mvura pachirongo chako, ndimwe.""" 
Genesis24:18 Iye akati, ""Imwai henyu, ishe wa­ngu;"" akakurumidza kutura chirongo chake paruoko rwake, akamumwisa." 
Genesis24:19 Wakati apedza kumumwisa, akati, ""Ndichacherera makamera enyuwo ku­svikira aguta."""
