Genesis24:20 Akakurumidza, akadu­rura mvura yakanga iri muchirongo chake muchimwiro; akamhanyira kutsime kundocherazve, akacherera makamera ake ose." 
Genesis24:21 Murume akamutarisisa, anye­rere, kuti azive kana Jehovha amufambisa zvakanaka parwendo rwake, kana kwete." 
Genesis24:22 Makamera akati apedza kumwa murume akatora chindori chendarama chakaita hafu yeshekeri rimwe rendarama pakurema kwacho, nezvishongo zviviri zvamaoko zvakaita mashekeri ane gumi pakurema kwazvo;" 
Genesis24:23 akati, ""Uri mukunda waaniko? Ndiudze hako. Kumba kwababa vako kune pokuvata here?""" 
Genesis24:24 Iye akati, ""Ndiri mukunda waBhe­tueri, mwanakomana waMirika, waaka­berekera Nahori.""" 
Genesis24:25 Akati kwaariwo, ""Tinahwo uswa hwakaoma nezvokudya zvizhinji, nopokuvatawo.""" 
Genesis24:26 Murume akakotamisa musoro wake, akanamata Jehovha." 
Genesis24:27 Akati, ""Je­hovha, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhura­hamu ngaakudzwe, asina kurega nyasha dzake nokutendeka kwake kuna tenzi wangu; kana ndirini, Jehovha wakandi­fambisa, akandisvitsa kuimba yehama dzatenzi wangu.""" 
Genesis24:28 Ipapo musikana wa­kamhanya, akandoudza veimba yamai vake mashoko iwaya." 
Genesis24:29 Zvino Rabheka wakanga ane hanzvadzi yainzi Rabhani; Rabhani akabuda, akamhanyira kumu­rume kutsime." 
Genesis24:30 Nokuti wakati achiona chindori nezvishongo pamaoko eha­nzvadzi yake, achiti, ""Ndizvo zvaka­taura murume kwandiri,"" akaenda ku­murume akamuwana amire pamakamera patsime." 
Genesis24:31 Akati, ""Pinda, iwe, wakaro­pafadzwa naJehovha; unomirireiko ku­nze? Nokuti ndagadzira imba nenzvi­mbo yamakamera. """ 
Genesis24:32 Murume akapinda mumba; akasunungura makamera akapa makamera uswa hwakaoma nezvoku­dya; nemvura kuti ashambidze tsoka dzake netsoka dzavarume vaakanga anavo. 
Genesis24:33 Ipapo zvokudya zvakaiswa pa­mberi pake kuti adye; asi iye akati, ""Handingadyi ndisati ndambotaura ma­shoko angu."" Akati, ""Taura hako.""" 
Genesis24:34 Iye akati, ""Ndiri muranda waAbhurahamu." 
Genesis24:35 Jehovha wakaropafadza te­nzi wangu kwazvo; wava mukuru; waka­mupa makwai, nemombe, nesirivha, nendarama, navaranda, navarandakadzi, namakamera, nembongoro." 
Genesis24:36 NaSara, mukadzi watenzi wangu, wakaberekera tenzi wangu mwanakomana pakukwegura kwake; ndiye waakapa zvose zvaanazvo." 
Genesis24:37 Tenzi wangu akandipikisa, akati, `Usa­torera mwanakomana wangu mukadzi kuvanasikana veKenani, pandigere mu­nyika yavo;" 
Genesis24:38 asi uende kune veimba yababa vangu nokuhama dzangu unoto­rera mwanakomana wangu mukadzi ikoko.' 
Genesis24:39 Ndikati kuna tenzi wangu, `Zvi­mwe mukadzi haangatendi kunditevera.'" 
Genesis24:40 Iye akati, `Jehovha wandinosifamba pamberi pake, achatuma mutumwa wake newe, akufambise zvakanaka parwendo rwako; unotorera mwanakomana wangu mukadzi kuhama dzangu nokune veimba yababa vangu;" 
Genesis24:41 uchasunungurwa paku­pika kwako kwandiri kana wasvika ku­hama dzangu; kana vakaramba kukupa iye, uchasunungurwa pakupika kwako kwandiri.'" 
Genesis24:42 Zvino ndakasvika nhasi ku­tsime, ndikati, `Jehovha, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhurahamu, kana muchida ku­ndifambisa zvakanaka parwendo rwangu rwandinofamba," 
Genesis24:43 tarirai, ndimire patsime remvura; zvino ngazviitwe, kuti musikana anobuda kuzochera mvura,' wandichati kwaari, `Dondipawo zvimvura pachiro­ngo chako, ndimwe,'" 
Genesis24:44 iye akati kwandiri, `Imwai henyu, imwi, uye ndichacherera makamera enyuwo,' iye ave mukadzi wakatsaurirwa mwanakomana watenzi wangu naJehovha." 
Genesis24:45 Zvino ndisati ndape­dza kutaura mumoyo mangu, ndikaona Rabheka achiuya aine chirongo chake pafudzi rake; akaburukira kutsime, aka­chera; ndikati kwaari, `Dondipawo, ndi­mwe.'" 
Genesis24:46 Iye akakurumidza, akatura chiro­ngo chake pafudzi rake, akati, `Imwai henyu, uye ndichamwisa makamera enyu­wo'; ini ndikamwa, akamwisa makame­rawo." 
Genesis24:47 Zvino ndakamubvunza, ndikati, `Uri mukunda waaniko?' Iye akati, `Ndiri mukunda waBhetueri, mwanakomana waNahori, waakaberekerwa naMirika;' ipapo ndakaisa chindori mumhino dzake, nezvishongo pamaoko ake." 
Genesis24:48 Ndikakota­misa musoro wangu, ndikanamata Jeho­vha, ndikatenda Jehovha, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhurahamu, iye wakandifambisa panzira yakarurama, kuti nditorere mwa­nakomana watenzi wangu mukunda wo­munun'una watenzi wangu, kuti ave muka­dzi wake." 
Genesis24:49 Zvino kana muchida kuitira tenzi wangu moyochena nokutendeka, mundiudze; kana musingadi, mundiudze, kuti ndiende kurudyi kana kuruboshwe.""" 
Genesis24:50 Ipapo Rabhani naBhetueri vakapi­ndura vakati, ""Chinhu ichi chinobva kuna Mwari. Isu hatigoni kutaura kwauri zva­kaipa kana zvakanaka." 
Genesis24:51 Tarira, Rabheka ari pamberi pako, umutore uende, kuti ave mukadzi wake, sezvakarehwa naJe­hovha.""" 
Genesis24:52 Zvino muranda waAbhura­hamu wakati anzwa mashoko avo, aka­kotamira pasi pamberi paJehovha;" 
Genesis24:53 muranda akabudisa zvishongo zvesiri­vha, nezvendarama, nenguvo; akazvipa Rabheka; akapawo hanzvadzi yake namai vake nhumbi dzinokosha." 
Genesis24:54 Vakadya, vakamwa, iye navarume vaakanga anavo; vakagarapo usiku hwose, vakamuka mangwanani; iye akati, ""Regai, ndiende kuna tenzi wangu.""" 
Genesis24:55 Asi hanzvadzi yake namai vake vakati, ""Musikana achimbogara nesu ma­zuva zvimwe ane gumi, agozoenda hake.""" 
Genesis24:56 Asi iye wakati kwavari, ""Musandi­dzora henyu, Jehovha zvaakandifambisa zvakanaka parwendo rwangu; regai ndie­nde kuna tenzi wangu.""" 
Genesis24:57 Ivo vakati, ""Ngatidane musikana, tinzwe muromo wake.""" 
Genesis24:58 Vakadana Ra­bheka, vakati kwaari, ""Uchaenda nomu­rume uyu here?"" Akati, ""Ndichaenda.""" 
Genesis24:59 Ipapo vakatendera Rabheka, hanzvadzi yavo, nomureri wake, kuti vaende nomu­randa waAbhurahamu, navanhu vake." 
Genesis24:60 Vakaropafadza Rabheka, vakati kwaari, ""Iwe, hanzvadzi yedu, uve mai vezviuru zvamazana; vana vako ngavave varidzi vamasuo avavengi vavo.""" 
Genesis24:61 Rabheka akasimuka, navasikana vake, vakatasva makamera, vakatevera murume uyo; muranda akatora Rabheka, akaenda parwendo rwake." 
Genesis24:62 Zvino Isaka wakanga achibva ne­nzira yeBheeri-rakai-roi; nokuti waka­nga agere kunyika yenyasi. 
Genesis24:63 Isaka aka­buda kundorangarira kusango nenguva yamadekwana; akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, akaona makamera achiuya." 
Genesis24:64 Rabheka akasimudzawo meso ake; akati achiona Isaka, akaburuka paka­mera rake." 
Genesis24:65 Akati kumuranda, ""Mu­rume uyu, anofamba musango kuzosa­ngana nesu ndianiko?"" Muranda akati, ""Nditenzi wangu;"" iye akatora chokufukidzira chiso chake, akazvifukidza." 
Genesis24:66 Zvino muranda akaudza Isaka zvose zvaakanga aita. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka aka­muisa mutende ramai vake Sara, akawana Rabheka, akava mukadzi wake; akamuda. Isaka akanyaradzwa shure kokufa kwa­mai vake." 
Genesis25:1 Zvino Abhurahamu akawana­zve mumwe mukadzi, wainzi Ke­tura." 
Genesis25:2 Iye akamuberekera Zimurami, naJokishani, naMedhani, naMidhiani, naIshibhaki, naShua." 
Genesis25:3 Jokishani akabe­reka Shebha naDhedhani. Vanakomana vaDhedhani vakanga vari vaAshuri, na­vaRetushi, navaReumi." 
Genesis25:4 Vanakomana vaMidhiani vakanga vari Efa, naEferi, naHanoki, naAbhidha, naEridha. Ava vose vakanga vari vana vaKetura." 
Genesis25:5 Abhurahamu akapa Isaka zvose zvaakanga anazvo. 
Genesis25:6 Asi vanakomana va­varongo vaAbhurahamu vaakanga anavo, Abhurahamu wakavapa zvipo; akava­tuma, iye achiri mupenyu, vabve kuna Isaka mwanakomana wake, vaende ku­mabvazuva, kunyika yokumabvazuva." 
Genesis25:7 Ndiwo mazuva amakore oupenyu hwaAbhurahamu. Makore ane zana na­makumi manomwe namashanu. 
Genesis25:8 Abhu­rahamu akabudisa mweya wake, akafa akwegura kwazvo, ava mutana, makore ake ave mazhinji, akasanganiswa nava­nhu vake." 
Genesis25:9 Isaka naIshimaeri, vanako­mana vake, vakamuviga mubako reMa­kapera, mumunda waEfuroni, mwanakomana waZohari, wavaHeti, wa­katarisana neMamure;" 
Genesis25:10 ndiwo munda wakanga watengwa naAbhurahamu ku­vana vaHeti; ndipo pakavigwa Abhura­hamu naSara, mukadzi wake." 
Genesis25:11 Zvino Abhurahamu wakati afa, Mwari akaropa­fadza Isaka, mwanakomana wake; Isaka akagara paBheeri-rakai-roi." 
Genesis25:12 Ndiwo marudzi alshimaeri, mwa­nakomana waAbhurahamu, wakabereke­rwa Abhurahamu naHagari, muljipiti, mu­randakadzi waSara." 
Genesis25:13 Ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaIshimaeri, ndiwo mazita avo pakuzvarwa kwavo. Wedangwe waIshimaeri wakanga ari Nebhayoti, naKe­dhari, naAdhibheri, naMibhisami," 
Genesis25:14 naMi­shima, naDhurina, naMasa," 
Genesis25:15 naHadhadhi, naTema, naJeturi, naNafishi, naKedhema;" 
Genesis25:16 ndivo vanakomana vaIshimaeri, ndiwo mazita avo, pamisha yavo napamatende avo; machinda ane gumi namaviri nendu­dzi dzavo." 
Genesis25:17 Ndiwo makore oupenyu hwaIshimaeri, makore ane zana namakumi matatu namanomwe; akabudisa mweya wake, akafa, akasanganiswa navanhu vake." 
Genesis25:18 Vakagara kubva paHavhira kusvi­kira paShuri, mberi kweIjipiti, kana mu­nhu achienda Asiria; akandogara akatari­sana nehama dzake dzose." 
Genesis25:19 Ndiwo marudzi alsaka, mwanako­mana waAbhurahamu. Abhurahamu aka­bereka Isaka;" 
Genesis25:20 Isaka akanga ana makore ana makumi mana pakuwana kwake Rabheka, mukunda waBhetueri, muAramu, wePadhanaramu, hanzvadzi yaRa­bhani, muAramu, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis25:21 Zvino Isaka wakanyengeterera muka­dzi wake kuna Jehovha, nokuti wakanga asingabereki; Jehovha akanzwa kunye­ngetera kwake, Rabheka, mukadzi wake, akave nemimba." 
Genesis25:22 Zvino vana vakasu­ndana mukati make, akati, ""Kana zvaka­daro, ndakaitirweiko izvozvi?"" Akando­bvunza Jehovha." 
Genesis25:23 Jehovha akati kwaari, ""Mune ndudzi mbiri muchizvaro chako, ndudzi mbiri dzichaparadzana, dzichibva mudumbu rako; rumwe rudzi ruchakunda rumwe rudzi nesimba; mukuru achashumira muduku. """ 
Genesis25:24 Zvino mazuva ake okubereka akati asvika, onei vana vaviri vari muchizvaro chake." 
Genesis25:25 Wokutanga akabuda ari mu­tsvuku, muviri wose wakaita senguvo ine mvere; vakatumidza zita rake Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Pa­shure munun'una wake akabuda, ruoko rwake rwakabata chitsitsinho chaEsau, vakatumidza zita rake Jakobho. Isaka akanga ana makore makumi matanhatu pakuberekwa kwavo." 
Genesis25:27 Vakomana vaka­kura; Esau akava mudzimba wakache­njera, murume wesango; Jakobho waka­nga ari murume wakarurama, waigara mumatende." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka akada Esau, nokuti waida nyama yemhuka, asi Rabheka wakanga achida Jakobho." 
Genesis25:29 Zvino Jakobho wakanga abika zvokudya, Esau akasvika achibva kusa­ngo aziya;" 
Genesis25:30 Esau akati kuna Jakobho, ""Dondipawo izvo zvakatsvuka ndidye, nokuti ndaziya;"" saka wakatumidzwa zita rinonzi Edhomu." 
Genesis25:31 Jakobho akati, ""Chimbonditenge­sera udangwe hwako.""" 
Genesis25:32 Esau akati, ""Tarira, ndofa hangu, udangwe uchandibatsireiko?""" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobho akati, ""Chimbondipi­kira;"" akamupikira, akatengesera Jako­bho udangwe hwake." 
Genesis25:34 Jakobho akapa Esau chingwa nezvokudya zvenyemba; akadya, akamwa, akasimuka, ndokuenda hake; Esau akazvidza udangwe hwake saizvozvo." 
Genesis26:1 Zvino nzara yakanga iripo pa­nyika; isati iri nzara yakanga iripo pamazuva aAbhurahamu. Isaka akenda Gerari kuna Abhimereki, mambo wavaFirisitia." 
Genesis26:2 Jehovha akazviratidzazve kwaari akati, ""Usaburukira Ijipiti, gara munyika yandakakuudza;" 
Genesis26:3 gara hako munyika ino uri mutorwa; ini ndichava newe, ndichakuropafadza; nokuti ndicha­kupa iwe, navana vako, nyika idzi dzose; ndichasimbisa mhiko yandakapikira Abhurahamu, baba vako;" 
Genesis26:4 ndichawanza vana vako senyeredzi dzedenga; ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzicharopafadzwa mu­vana vako; 
Genesis26:5 nokuti Abhurahamu waka­teerera inzwi rangu, akachengeta zvanda­kamuraira, nemirairo yangu, nemitemo yangu, nemirau yangu.""" 
Genesis26:6 Isaka akagara Gerari; 
Genesis26:7 vanhu venyika iyoyo vakamu­bvunza pamusoro pomukadzi wake, akati, ""Ihanzvadzi yangu;"" nokuti waka­nga achitya kuti, mukadzi wangu, achiti, ""Zvimwe vanhu venyika ino vangandiu­raya nokuda kwaRabheka;"" nokuti aka­nga akanaka kumeso." 
Genesis26:8 Zvino wakati avapo nguva refu, Abhimereki, mambo wavaFirisitia, wakatarira napahwindo, akaona Isaka achitamba naRabheka, mu­kadzi wake." 
Genesis26:9 Ipapo Abhimereki akadana Isaka akati, ""Tarira, zvirokwazvo muka­dzi wako; wakataura seiko uchiti, `Iha­nzvadzi yangu?' "" Isaka akati kwaari, ""Nokuti ndakati, `Zvimwe ndingafa no­kuda kwake.' """ 
Genesis26:10 Abhimereki akati kwaari, ""Ndoku­diniko kuti watiitira chinhu ichi? Dai mumwe wavanhu aivata nomukadzi wako, ungadai watiisa pamhosva.""" 
Genesis26:11 Abhimereki akaraira vanhu vose, akati, ""Anobata munhu uyu kana mukadzi wake, achauraiwa zvirokwazvo.""" 
Genesis26:12 Zvino Isaka akadzvara zviyo mu­nyika iyoyo, akawana gore iro rune zana; Jehovha akamuropafadza." 
Genesis26:13 Munhu uyu akava mukuru, akaramba achiwedzerwa, kusvikira ava mukuru kwazvo;" 
Genesis26:14 akanga aine fuma yamakwai, neyemombe, ne­mhuri huru; vaFirisitia vakamugodora." 
Genesis26:15 VaFirisitia vakadzivira matsime ose akanga acherwa navaranda vababa vake pamazuva ababa vake Abhurahamu, va­kaafutsira nevhu." 
Genesis26:16 Abhimereki akati kuna Isaka, ""Ibva hako kwatiri, nokuti watipfuura kwazvo nesimba.""" 
Genesis26:17 Isaka akabvapo, akandodzika matende ake mumupata weGerari, akagarapo." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka akacherazve matsime emvura, akanga acherwa pamazuva ababa vake, Abhurahamu; nokuti vaFirisitia vakanga vaadzivira Abhura­hamu afa; akaatumidza mazita aakanga atumidzwa nababa vake." 
Genesis26:19 Varanda vaIsaka vakachera mu­mupata, vakawanapo tsime remvura ino­tubuka." 
Genesis26:20 Vafudzi veGerari vakaitirana nharo navafudzi vaIsaka, vachiti, ""Imvura yedu;"" akatumidza tsime iroro zita rinonzi Eseki; nokuti vakapesana naye." 
Genesis26:21 Zvino akandocherazve rimwe tsime; vakaitirana nharo pamusoro pairo­rozve; akaritumidza zita rinonzi Sitina. 
Genesis26:22 Akabvapo, akandocherazve rimwe tsime; iroro havana kuzoitirana nharo pamusoro paro; akaritumidza zita rinonzi Rehobhoti; akati, ""Nokuti zvino Jehovha wakandiitira nzvimbo huru, kuti tiwande munyika ino. """ 
Genesis26:23 Akabvapo, akakwira Bheerishebha;" 
Genesis26:24 Jehovha akazviratidza kwaari usiku ihwohwo, akati, ""Ndini Mwari waAbhu­rahamu, baba vako; usatya, nokuti ndi­newe, ndichakuropafadza, nokuwanza ru­dzi rwako nokuda kwaAbhurahamu, muranda wangu.""" 
Genesis26:25 Akavakapo aritari, aka­namata zita raJehovha, akadzika tende rake ipapo; varanda vaIsaka vakacherapo tsime." 
Genesis26:26 Ipapo Abhimereki akaenda kwaari, achibva Gerari, aine shamwari yake Ahuzati, naPikori, mukuru wehondo yake." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka akati kwavari, ""Mauyireiko kwandiri, zvamunondivenga, mukandidzi­nga kwamuri?""" 
Genesis26:28 Ivo vakati, ""Takaona kwazvo kuti Jehovha anewe, tikati, `Zvino mhiko ngaivepo pakati pedu, pakati pedu newe, tiite sungano newe;" 
Genesis26:29 kuti urege kutiitira zvakaipa, sezvatisina kukubata iwe, se­zvatakakuitira zvakanaka bedzi, tikakue­ndesa norugare;' zvino iwe ndiwe hako muropafadzwa waJehovha.""" 
Genesis26:30 Iye akava­gadzirira zvokudya, vakadya, vakamwa," 
Genesis26:31 vakamuka mangwanani, vakapikirana; ipapo Isaka akavatendera kuenda, vaka­bva kwaari norugare." 
Genesis26:32 Nomusi iwoyo varanda vaIsaka va­kauya, vakamuudza kuti vakanga vachera tsime, vakati kwaari, ""Mvura taiwana.""" 
Genesis26:33 Akaritumidza zita rinonzi Shebha; nai­zvozvo zita reguta ndiBheerishebha kusvi­kira zuva ranhasi. 
Genesis26:34 Zvino Esau wakati asvika makore makumi mana, akawana Judhisi, muku­nda waBheeri, muHeti, naBhasimati, mukunda waEroni, muHeti;" 
Genesis26:35 ivavo va­karwadza moyo walsaka naRabheka. 
Genesis27:1 Zvino Isaka wakati ava mutana, meso ake owonera madzedzerere, asisaoni zvakanaka, akadana Esau, mwa­nakomana wake mukuru, akati kwaari, ""Mwana wangu;"" iye akati kwaari, ""Ndiri pano hangu.""" 
Genesis27:2 Akati, ""Tarira zvino ndakwegura; handizivi zuva rokufa kwangu." 
Genesis27:3 Zvino tora hako nhumbi dzako dzokuvhima nadzo, dzinoti goba rako, nouta hwako, uende kusango undivhimire mhuka;" 
Genesis27:4 undigadzirire nyama yakanaka, sezvandinoda, uuye nayo kwandiri, ndi­dye, mweya wangu ukuropafadze, ndisati ndafa.""" 
Genesis27:5 Zvino Rabheka akanzwa Isaka achitaura naEsau, mwanakomana wake. Esau akaenda kusango kundovhima mhuka, kuti auye nayo." 
Genesis27:6 Rabheka aka­taura naJakobho, mwanakomana wake, akati, ""Tarira, ndanzwa baba vako va­chitaura naEsau, mukoma wako, vachiti," 
Genesis27:7 `Nditorere mhuka, undigadzirire nyama yakanaka, kuti ndiidye, ndikuro­pafadze pamberi paJehovha ndisati ndafa.'" 
Genesis27:8 Zvino mwana wangu, teerera inzwi rangu sezvandinokuraira." 
Genesis27:9 Enda zvino kuzvipfuwo, unditorerepo mbu­dzana mbiri dzakanaka, ndigadzirire baba vako nadzo nyama yakanaka, se­zvavanoda;" 
Genesis27:10 ugoenda nayo kuna baba vako, vadye, kuti vakuropafadze vasati vafa.""" 
Genesis27:11 Jakobho akati kuna Rabheka mai vake, ""Tarirai, Esau, mukoma wa­ngu, munhu ane mvere, asi ini ndiri munhu asina mvere." 
Genesis27:12 Zvimwe baba vangu vachandibata-bata, ndikava so­munyengedzeri pamberi pavo, ndika­zviuyisira kutukwa pachigaro chokuro­pafadzwa.""" 
Genesis27:13 Mai vake vakati kwaari, ""Kutukwa kwako ngakuve pamusoro pangu, mwana wangu; teerera hako inzwi rangu, uende unditorere idzo.""" 
Genesis27:14 Iye akaenda, akadzi­tora, akadziisa kuna mai vake; mai vake vakagadzira nyama yakanaka, yaidika­mwa nababa vake." 
Genesis27:15 Zvino Rabheka akatora nguvo dzakaisvonaka dzaEsau, mwa­nakomana wake mukuru, dzaaiva nadzo mumba, akadzifukidza Jakobho, mwana­komana wake muduku;" 
Genesis27:16 akaisa nguvo dzembudzana pamaoko ake, napamutsipa wake pakanga pasina mvere;" 
Genesis27:17 akaisa nyama yakanaka nechingwa, zvaakanga agadzira, muruoko rwaJakobho, mwana­komana wake." 
Genesis27:18 Iye akaenda kuna baba vake, akati, ""Baba vangu;"" ivo vakati, ""Ndiri pano hangu; ndiwe aniko mwana wangu?""" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobho akati kuna baba vake, ""Ndini Esau, dangwe renyu; ndaita sezvamandi­raira; simukai henyu, mugare, mudye nyama yangu yemhuka, mweya wenyu undiropafadze.""" 
Genesis27:20 Isaka akati kumwanakomana wake, ""Wakurumidza seiko kuiwana, mwana wangu?"" Iye akati, ""Nokuti Jeho­vha, Mwari wenyu, waituma pamberi pangu. """ 
Genesis27:21 Isaka akati kuna Jakobho, ""Chi­mboswedera hako, ndikubate-bate, mwana wangu, kuti ndizive kuti uri mwanakomana wangu Esau chaiye, kana kuti hausi iwe.""" 
Genesis27:22 Jakobho akaswedera kuna Isaka, baba vake; ivo vakamubata­bata, vakati, ""Inzwi, inzwi raJakobho, asi maoko maoko aEsau.""" 
Genesis27:23 Asi haana kumu­ziva, nokuti maoko ake akanga aine mvere, samaoko omukuru wake Esau; akamuropafadza." 
Genesis27:24 Akati, ""Ndiwe mwa­nakomana wangu Esau chaiye here?"" Iye akati, ""Ndini iye.""" 
Genesis27:25 Akati, ""Uiswededze pedo neni, kuti ndidye nyama yemhuka yomwana­komana wangu, mweya wangu ukuropa­fadze."" Iye akaiswededza pedo naye, akadya; akamupawo waini, akamwa." 
Genesis27:26 Ipapo baba vake Isaka vakati kwaari, ""Swedera zvino unditsvode, mwana wa­ngu.""" 
Genesis27:27 Akaswedera, akamutsvoda; aka­nzwa munhuwi wenguvo dzake, akamuro­pafadzwa, akati, ""Tarira munhuwi womwanakomana wangu wakaita somunhuwi wesango rakaropafadzwa naJehovha;" 
Genesis27:28 Mwari ngaakupe dova rokudenga, mafuta enyika, nezviyo newaini zvakawanda." 
Genesis27:29 Vanhu ngavakushumire, marudzi ose ngaakupfugamire; uve ishe wehama dzako, vanakomana vamai vako ngavakupfugamire; vose vanokutuka ngavatukwe, vose vanokuropafadza ngavaropafadzwe.""" 
Genesis27:30 Zvino Isaka wakati apedza kuropa­fadza Jakobho, Jakobho achangobuda pamberi palsaka baba vake, Esau mu­koma wake, akapinda, achibva paku­vhima kwake." 
Genesis27:31 Naiye akagadzira nyama yakanaka, akaenda nayo kuna baba vake; akati kuna baba vake, ""Baba vangu ngavasimuke, ngavadye nyama yemhuka yomwanakomana wavo, kuti mweya we­nyu undiropafadze.""" 
Genesis27:32 Ipapo Isaka baba vake vakati, ""Ndiwe aniko?"" Iye akati, ""Ndini mwa­nakomana wenyu, dangwe renyu Esau.""" 
Genesis27:33 Isaka akabvunda kwazvo-kwazvo, akati, ""Ndianiko wakanga avhima mhuka, akauya nayo kwandiri ndikadya zvose, iwe usati wasvika, ndikamuropa­fadza? Hongu, zvirokwazvo iye acharo­pafadzwa hake.""" 
Genesis27:34 Esau akati achinzwa mashoko ababa vake, akachema nokuchema ku­kuru kunorwadza moyo, akati kuna baba vake, ""Ndiropafadzei neniwo, baba vangu! """ 
Genesis27:35 Akati, ""Munun'una wako wakauya nokunyengedzera, akatora kuropafadzwa kwako.""" 
Genesis27:36 Iye akati, ""Haana kutumidzwa zita rakamufanira here, rokuti Jakobho? No­kuti zvino wandinyengedzera kaviri; wa­mbonditorera udangwe hwangu, zvino tarira, wanditorera kuropafadzwa kwa­ngu."" Akati, ""Hamuna kundichengete­rawo kuropafadzwa here?""" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka akapindura, akati kuna Esau, ""Tarira, ndamuita ishe wako, nehama dzake dzose ndakamupa iye, kuti vave varanda vake; ndamusimbisa nezviyo ne­waini; zvino chinyiko chandingakuitira iwe, mwana wangu?""" 
Genesis27:38 Esau akati kuna baba vake, ""Mu­nongova nokuropafadza kumwe koga here, baba vangu? Ndiropafadzei, ne­niwo, baba vangu!"" Esau akachema no­kuchema. kukuru." 
Genesis27:39 Ipapo Isaka baba vake, akapindura akati kwaari, ""Tarira, ugaro hwako uchava kure namafuta enyika, kure nedova rokudenga rinobva kumusoro;" 
Genesis27:40 uchararama nomunondo wako, uchashumira munun'una wako; uchati kana wozvimutsa iwe, uchavhuna joko rake ribve pamutsipa wako.""" 
Genesis27:41 Esau akavenga Jakobho nokuda kokuropafadzwa kwaakaropafadzwa nako nababa vake; Esau akati mumoyo make, ""Mazuva okuchema baba vangu ava kuda kusvika; ipapo ndichauraya munun'una wangu Jakobho.""" 
Genesis27:42 Zvino Rabheka akaudzwa ma­shoko aEsau, mwanakomana wake mu­kuru; akatuma munhu kundodana Jako­bho, mwanakomana wake muduku, akati kwaari, ""Tarira, mukoma wako Esau anozvivaraidza pamusoro pako, achiti achakuuraya." 
Genesis27:43 Saka zvino, mwana wa­ngu, teerera inzwi rangu; simuka utizire Harani kuna Rabhani hanzvadzi yangu;" 
Genesis27:44 undogara kwaari mazuva mashoma­nana, kusvikira shungu dzomukoma wako dzanyarara;" 
Genesis27:45 kusvikira kutsamwa komukoma wako kwanyarara kwauri, kana akangamwa izvo zvawamuitira. Ipapo ndichatuma munhu kuzokutora ikoko; ndichatorerwa seiko nomusi mu­mwe imwi mose muri vaviri?""" 
Genesis27:46 Rabheka akati kuna Isaka, ""Ndanetswa noupenyu hwangu nokuda kwavakunda vaHeti; kana Jakobho akawanawo mukadzi ku­vakunda vaHeti, wakaita saivava, kuva­kunda venyika ino, upenyu hwangu ungandibatsirei?""" 
Genesis28:1 Zvino Isaka wakadana Jakobho, akamuropafadza, akamuraira, akati kwaari, ""Usawana mukadzi kuva­kunda veKenani." 
Genesis28:2 Simuka uende Padha­naramu, kuimba yaBhetueri, baba vamai vako, uzviwanire ikoko mukadzi kuvaku­nda vaRabhani, hanzvadzi yamai vako." 
Genesis28:3 Mwari Wamasimbaose ngaakuropafa­dze, akuberekese vana, akuwanze, kuti uve ndudzi zhinji dzavanhu;" 
Genesis28:4 akupe ku­ropafadzwa kwaAbhurahamu, iwe, na­vana vako pamwechete newe; kuti ugare nhaka yenyika maugere uri mutorwa, iyo yakapiwa Abhurahamu naMwari.""" 
Genesis28:5 Isaka akati Jakobho aende, akaenda Padhanaramu, kuna Rabhani, mwanako­mana waBhetueri, muAramu, hanzvadzi yaRabheka, mai vaJakobho naEsau." 
Genesis28:6 Zvino Esau wakaona kuti Isaka wakanga aropafadza Jakobho, akati ae­nde Padhanaramu, kuti azviwanire ikoko mukadzi; uyewo kuti pakumuropafadza kwake akamuraira, achiti, ""Usawana mu­kadzi kuvakunda veKenani"";" 
Genesis28:7 uyezve, kuti Jakobho akateerera baba vake namai vake, akaenda Padhanaramu." 
Genesis28:8 Esau akaona kuti vakunda veKenani havana kufadza Isaka baba vake; 
Genesis28:9 Esau akaenda kuna Ishimaeri, akawedzera kuvakadzi vake, vaakanga anavo, Maharati muku­nda walshimaeri, mwanakomana waAbhurahamu, hanzvadzi yaNebhayoti, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis28:10 Zvino Jakobho akabuda paBheeri­shebha, akaenda Harani," 
Genesis28:11 akasvika pane imwe nzvimbo, akavatapo usiku, nokuti zuva rakanga ravira; akatora rimwe ibwe ipapo, akaritsamira, akavata pasi ipapo." 
Genesis28:12 Akarota, akaona danhu rakanga rami­swa panyika, musoro waro wakasvika kudenga; akaona vatumwa vaMwari va­chikwira nokuburuka naro." 
Genesis28:13 Akaona Je­hovha amire naye, akati, ""Ndini Jehovha, Mwari waAbhurahamu baba vako, naMwari waIsaka; nyika yauvete pamusoro payo ndichakupa iyoyo, iwe navana vako;" 
Genesis28:14 vana vako vachaita seguruva renyika; uchapararira kumavirazuva, no­kumabvazuva, nokumusoro, nenyasi; ndudzi dzose dzenyika dzicharopafadzwa mauri nomuvana vako." 
Genesis28:15 Tarira, ndi­newe, ndichakuchengeta kose kwau­noenda, nokukudzosera kunyika ino; no­kuti handingakusiyi kusvikira ndaita izvozvo zvandakakuudza.""" 
Genesis28:16 Ipapo Jako­bho akapepuka pahope dzake, akati, ""Zvirokwazvo Jehovha ari panzvimbo ino, asi ini handina kuzviziva.""" 
Genesis28:17 Akatya akati, ""Nzvimbo ino inotyisa seiko! Iyi imba chaiyo yaMwari, isuo rokudenga.""" 
Genesis28:18 Jakobho akamuka mangwanani, akatora ibwe raakanga akatsamira, akari­misa kuti rive shongwe, akadira mafuta pamusoro paro;" 
Genesis28:19 akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rinonzi Bheteri, asi zita reguta pakutanga rainzi Ruzi." 
Genesis28:20 Ipapo Jakobho akapika mhiko achiti, ""Kana Mwari akava neni, akandichengeta panzira ya­ndinoenda, akandipa zvokudya, ndidye, nezvokufuka, ndifuke;" 
Genesis28:21 ndikadzokera­zve norugare kuimba yababa vangu, Jehovha achava Mwari wangu;" 
Genesis28:22 neiri ibwe, randakamisa rikava shongwe, ri­chava imba yaMwari; nezvinhu zvose zvamuchandipa, zvirokwazvo ndichaku­pai chegumi chazvo.""" 
Genesis29:1 Jakobho akasimukapo, akaenda kunyika yavanhu vamabvazuva." 
Genesis29:2 Akatarira, akaona tsime kusango, namapoka matatu amakwai avete pasi pariri; nokuti vaimwisa mapoka avo patsime iroro; pamuromo wetsime iroro pakanga paine ibwe guru." 
Genesis29:3 Ndipapo paiungana mapoka ose; zvino vaikungurutsa ibwe pamuromo wetsime, vakamwisa makwai avo, vachidzoserazve ibwe pamuromo wetsime paugaro hwaro." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobho akati kwavari, ""Hama dza­ngu, mabvepiko?"" Ivo vakati, ""Tabva Harani. """ 
Genesis29:5 Iye akati kwavari, ""Munoziva Ra­bhani, mwanakomana waNahori, here?"" Vakati, ""Tinomuziva.""" 
Genesis29:6 Akati kwavari, ""Wakafara here?"" Ivo vakati, ""Wakafara hake; hoyo Rakeri mukunda wake, wouya namakwai.""" 
Genesis29:7 Akati, ""Tarirai, achiri masikati ma­kuru, nguva yokuunganidza zvipfuwo ichigere kusvika; mwisai makwai, mugo­ndoafudza.""" 
Genesis29:8 Ivo vakati, ""Hatingagoni kusvikira mapoka ose aunganidzwa pamwechete, ibwe rikakungurutswa pamuromo we­tsime; ipapo tinomwisa makwai.""" 
Genesis29:9 Akati achiri kutaura navo, Rakeri akasvika namakwai ababa vake, nokuti ndiye aiva mufudzi wawo." 
Genesis29:10 Zvino Jako­bho akati achiona Rakeri, mukunda waRabhani, hanzvadzi yamai vake, Jakobho akaswedera, akakungurutsa ibwe pamu­romo wetsime, akamwisa makwai aRa­bhani, hanzvadzi yamai vake." 
Genesis29:11 Jakobho akatsvoda Rakeri, akachema kwazvo." 
Genesis29:12 Jakobho akaudza Rakeri kuti iye ihama yababa vake, mwanakomana waRabheka. Ipapo iye akamhanya, akandoudza baba vake." 
Genesis29:13 Rabhani akati anzwa ma­shoko aJakobho, mwanakomana weha­nzvadzi yake, akamhanya kundosa­ngana naye, akamumbundikira, akamutsvoda, akamuisa kumba kwake. Iye akaudza Rabhani zvinhu izvo zvose." 
Genesis29:14 Rabhani akati kwaari, ""Zvirokwazvo uri pfupa rangu renyama yangu."" Aka­gara naye mwedzi wose." 
Genesis29:15 Zvino Ra­bhani akati kuna Jakobho, ""Ko unga­ndibatira usingapiwi mubayiro, nokuti uri hama yangu here? Ndiudze kuti mubayiro wako uve weiko.""" 
Genesis29:16 Zvino Rabhani akanga ana vakunda vaviri; zita romukuru rakanga riri Rea, nezita romuduku Rakeri." 
Genesis29:17 Rea akanga ana meso akaneta, asi Rakeri akanga aka­naka kwazvo pamuviri napachiso." 
Genesis29:18 Zvino Jakobho akanga achida Rakeri, akati, ""Ndichakubatirai makore manomwe pamusoro paRakeri, mukunda wenyu muduku.""" 
Genesis29:19 Rabhani akati kwaari, ""Zviri nani kuti ndimupe iwe, ndirege kumupa mumwe murume; gara hako neni.""" 
Genesis29:20 Jakobho akamubatira makore manomwe pamusoro paRakeri; asi akava samazuva mashoma kwaari, nokuti akanga achimuda." 
Genesis29:21 Zvino Jakobho akati kuna Rabhani, ""Ndipei mukadzi wangu, nokuti mazuva angu asvika, kuti ndipinde kwaari.""" 
Genesis29:22 Rabhani akakoka vanhu vose voko, akaita mutambo." 
Genesis29:23 Zvino kuzoti ava madeko, akatora Rea, mukunda wake, akamuisa kwaari; iye akapinda kwaari." 
Genesis29:24 Rabhani akapa Rea, mukunda wake Ziripa, murandakadzi wake, kuti ave mushandiri wake." 
Genesis29:25 Zvino mangwana akaona kuti ndiRea; akati kuna Rabhani, ""Chiiko ichi chawandiitira? Handina kukubatira pamusoro paRakeri here? Wandinyengedzera seiko?""" 
Genesis29:26 Rabhani akati, ""Hakunzarwo kuno kwedu, kuti munun'una atange kuwaniswa, mukuru achigere." 
Genesis29:27 Pedzisa vhiki yewaniso naiyeyu, tigokupa mumwewo pamusoro pebasa rauchandibatira mamwe makore manomwezve.""" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobho akaita saizvozvo, akape­dza vhiki yewaniso naye; akamupa Ra­keri, mukunda wake, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis29:29 Rabhani akapa Rakeri, mukunda wake, Bhiriha murandakadzi wake, kuti ave mushandiri wake." 
Genesis29:30 Akapindawo kuna Rakeri, akada Rakeriwo kupfuura Rea, akamubatira mamwe makore mano­mwezve." 
Genesis29:31 Zvino Jehovha akaona kuti Rea akanga asingadikamwi, akamuberekesa; asi Rakeri akanga asingabereki." 
Genesis29:32 Rea akava nemimba, akabereka mwanako­mana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Ru­bheni; nokuti wakati, ""Jehovha akaona dambudziko rangu; nokuti zvino murume wangu achandida.""" 
Genesis29:33 Akava nemimba­zve, akabereka mwanakomana, akati, ""Jehovha akanzwa kuti handidikamwi, naizvozvo akandipawo uyu;"" akamutu­midza zita rinonzi Simiyoni." 
Genesis29:34 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwanakomana, akati, ""Zvino nguva ino murume wangu achandinamatira, nokuti ndamuberekera vanakomana vatatu;"" naizvozvo zita rake rakanzi Revhi." 
Genesis29:35 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwanakomana, akati, ""Nguva ino ndicharumbidza Jehovha;"" naizvozvo akamutumidza zita rinonzi Judha; aka­guma kubereka." 
Genesis30:1 Zvino Rakeri akati achiona kuti haaberekeri Jakobho vana, Rakeri akagodora mukoma wake, akati kuna Jakobho, ""ndipe vana; kana usingandipi, ndichafa.""" 
Genesis30:2 Ipapo Jakobho akatsamwira Rakeri akati, ""Ndiri panzvimbo yaMwari kanhi, wakakushaisa chibereko?""" 
Genesis30:3 Iye akati, ""Hoyo murandakadzi wangu Bhiriha; pinda kwaari kuti abereke pamabvi angu, neni ndiwane vana kwaari.'" 
Genesis30:4 Akamupa Bhiriha, murandakadzi wake, kuti ave mukadzi wake; Jakobho akapinda kwaari." 
Genesis30:5 Zvino Bhiriha akava nemimba, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana." 
Genesis30:6 Rakeri akati, ""Mwari akandiruramisa, akandipa mwanakomana"", naizvozvo akamutumidza zita rinonzi Dhani." 
Genesis30:7 Bhiriha, murandakadzi waRakeri akava nemimbazve, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana wechipiri." 
Genesis30:8 Zvino Rakeri akati, ""Ndakarwa nokurwa kukuru nomukoma wangu, ndikakunda;"" akamutumidza zita rinonzi Nafutari." 
Genesis30:9 Zvino Rea akati achiona kuti waguma kubereka vana akatora Ziripa, murandakadzi wake, akamupa Jakobho, kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis30:10 Ziripa, murandaka­dzi waRea, akaberekera Jakobho mwana­komana." 
Genesis30:11 Rea akati, ""Makorokoto!"" Akamutumidza zita rinonzi Gadhi." 
Genesis30:12 Zi­ripa, murandakadzi waRea, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana wechipiri." 
Genesis30:13 Rea akati, ""Ndinomufaro mukuru, nokuti va­nasikana vachati, ndinomufaro mukuru,"" akamutumidza zita rinonzi Asheri." 
Genesis30:14 Zvino Rubheni akaenda pamazuva okukohwa zviyo, akandowana michero kusango, akauya nayo kuna mai vake Rea. Rakeri akati kuna Rea, ""Dondipawo michero yomwanakomana wako.""" 
Genesis30:15 Iye akati kwaari, ""Chinhu chiduku here kuti wakatora murume wangu?"" Rakeri akati, ""Naizvozvo ngaavate newe usiku huno nokuda kwemichero yomwa­nakomana wako.""" 
Genesis30:16 Zvino Jakobho akati obva kusango madeko, Rea akabuda kundosangana naye, akati, ""Unofanira kupinda kwa­ndiri, nokuti ndakakutenga nemichero yomwanakomana wangu."" Akavata naye usiku ihwohwo." 
Genesis30:17 Zvino Mwari akanzwa Rea, akava nemimba, akaberekera Jakobho mwanakomana wechishanu." 
Genesis30:18 Rea akati, ""Mwari akandipa mubayiro wangu, nokuti ndakapa murandakadzi wangu murume wangu;"" akamutumidza zita rinonzi Isakari." 
Genesis30:19 Rea akava nemimbazve, akaberekera jakobho mwanakomana wechitanhatu." 
Genesis30:20 Rea akati, ""Mwari akandipa chipo chakanaka; zvino murume wangu achagara neni, nokuti ndamuberekera vanakomana vatanhatu""; akamutumidza zita rinonzi Zebhuroni." 
Genesis30:21 pashure akazobereka mwanasikana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Dhina." 
Genesis30:22 Zvino Mwari akarangarirawo Rakeri, Mwari akamunzwa, akazarura chizvaro chake." 
Genesis30:23 Iye akava nemimba, akabereka mwanakomana; akati, ""mwari akabvisa kuzvidzwa kwangu;""" 
Genesis30:24 akamutumidza zita rinonzi Josefa, achiti, ""Jehovha ngaandiwedzere mumwe mwanakomana.""" 
Genesis30:25 Zvino Rakeri akati abereka Josefa, Jakobho akati kuna Rabhani, ""Ndiregei, ndiende kumusha kwangu, nokunyika yangu." 
Genesis30:26 Ndipei vakadzi vangu navana vangu, vandakakubatirai, ndiende hangu, nokuti imwi munoziva kubata basa kwangu kwandakakubatirai nako.""" 
Genesis30:27 Rabhani akati,,""Zvino kana ndawana nyasha pamberi pako, gara hako, nokuti ndakaona kuti Jehovha akandiropafadza nokuda kwako.""" 
Genesis30:28 Akati, ""Ndiudze mubayiro wako, ndigokupa iwo.""" 
Genesis30:29 Iye akati, ""imwi munoziva mumene sezvandakakubatirai, uye kugara kwezvipfuwo zvenyu kwandiri." 
Genesis30:30 Nokuti zvamaiva nazvo, ndisati ndasvika, zvanga zviri zvishoma, zvikazowanda. zvikava zvizhinji; Jehovha akakuropafadzai pose pandakatsika; zvino ndichabatira imba yangu rinhiko?""" 
Genesis30:31 Iye akati, ""Ndokupeiko?"" Jakobho akati, ""Musandipa chinhu; kana mukandiitira chinhu ichi, ndichafudzazve zvipfuwo zvenyu nokuzvichengeta." 
Genesis30:32 Ndichafamba pakati pezvipfuwo zvenyu zvose nhasi, ndichiraura pakati pazvo zvose zvinamavara nezvinamakwapa, namatema pakati pamakwai, nedzinamavara nedzinamakwapa pakati pembudzi; ndizvozvo zvichava mubayiro wangu." 
Genesis30:33 Nenzira iyi kururama kwangu kuchandipupurira pashure, kana muchizouya kuona mubayiro wangu uri pamberi penyu; dzose dzisina mavara nedzisina makwapa pakati pembudzi, namatema pakati pamakwai, izvozvo kana zvikawanikwa kwandiri mungati zvabiwa neni.""" 
Genesis30:34 Rabhani akati, ""Ndizvo hazvo, ngazvive sezvawataura.""" 
Genesis30:35 Nomusi iwoyo akaraura nhongo dzembudzi dzakanga dzine mitsetse, nedzina makwapa, nenhunzvi dzose dzembudzi dzakanga dzina mavara nedzina makwapa, dzose dzakanga dzinoruvana ruchena, napakati pamakwai ose akanga anoruvara rutema, akazvipa vana vake;" 
Genesis30:36 akaisa runhambo rwamazuva matatu pakati pake naJakobho; Jakobho akafudza zvipfuwo zvaRabhani zvakanga zvasara. 
Genesis30:37 Zvino Jakobho akatora matanda omusitorakisi, noomuamanda, noomupurani, akasvuura mitaro michena paari, kuti kuchena kuonekwe kwakanga kuri maari;" 
Genesis30:38 akaisa matanda aakanga asvuura pamberi pezvipfuwo muzvimwiro, paiuya zvipfuwo zvichimwa; zvikatora zamu kana zvouya kumwa." 
Genesis30:39 Zvipfuwo zvikatora zamu pamberi pamatanda, zvipfuwo zvikabereka vana vane mitsetse, navanamavara, navanamakwapa." 
Genesis30:40 Zvino Jakobho akaraura makwayana, akataridza zvipfuwo kune zvaiva nemitsetse, nezvitema pakati pezvipfuwo zvaRabhani; akaisa mapoka ake ari oga; haana kuzviisa kuzvipfuwo zvaRabhani." 
Genesis30:41 Zvino nguva imwe neimwe kana zvaiva nesimba pazvipfuwo zvichitora zamu, Jakobho akaisa matanda pamberi pezvipfuwo muzvimwiro, kuti zvitore zamu pakati pamatanda;" 
Genesis30:42 asi kana zvipfuwo zvichishaiwa simba haana kuaisa; naizvozvo zvakanga zvisina simba zvakanga zviri zvaRabhani 
Genesis30:43 Murume uyu akava mukuru kwazvo, akava nezvipfuwo zvizhinji, navaranda, navarandakadzi, namakamera, namadhongi." 
Genesis31:1 Zvino Jakobho akanzwa mashoko avanakomana vaRabhani, vachiti, ""Jakobho atora zvose zvaiva zvababa vedu; azviwanira fuma yose iyi kune zvaiva zvababa vedu.""" 
Genesis31:2 Jakobho akaonawo kuti chiso chaRabhani chakanga chisakaita kwaari sapakutanga. 
Genesis31:3 Jehovha akati kuna Jakobho, ""Dzokera kunyika yamadzibaba ako, nokuhama dzako; ini ndichava newe.""" 
Genesis31:4 lpapo Jakobho akatuma munhu ku­ndodana Rakeri naRea vauye kusango kuzvipfuwo zvake; 
Genesis31:5 akati kwavari, ""Ndi­noona kuti chiso chababa venyu hachiza­kaita kwandiri sapakutanga; asi Mwari wababa vangu akanga aneni." 
Genesis31:6 Munoziva kuti ndakabatira baba venyu nesimba rangu rose. 
Genesis31:7 Baba venyu vakandinyenge­dzera, vakashandura mubayiro wangu kagumi; asi Mwari haana kutendera kuti vandiitire zvakaipa." 
Genesis31:8 Kana vakati, `Zvina mavara ngazvive mubayiro wako, zvi­pfuwo zvose ndokubereka zvina mavara;' kana vakati, `Zvine mitsetse ngazvive mubayiro wako,' zvipfuwo zvose ndoku­bereka zvine mitsetse." 
Genesis31:9 Naizvozvo Mwari akatorera baba venyu zvipfuwo zvavo, akandipa ini izvozvo." 
Genesis31:10 Zvino zvipfuwo zvakati zvichi­tora mazamu, ndakatarira ndikaona paku­rota kwangu nhongo, dzakanga dzichi­kwira zvipfuwo, dzakanga dzine mitsetse, namavara, nedzakaita pfumbu." 
Genesis31:11 Ipapo mutumwa waMwari akati kwandiri paku­rota kwangu, `Jakobho!' Ini ndikati, `Ndiri pano hangu.'" 
Genesis31:12 Akati, `Zvino ta­rira, uone, kuti nhongo dzose, dzinokwira zvipfuwo, dzinemitsetse, namavara, dza­kaita pfumbu; nokuti ndazviona zvose Rabhani zvaanoita kwauri." 
Genesis31:13 Ndini Mwari weBheteri, paya pawakazodza shongwe, paya pawakandipikira mhiko; zvino simuka, ubve munyika ino, udzo­kere kunyika kwawakaberekerwa.' """ 
Genesis31:14 Ipapo Rakeri naRea vakapindura vakati kwaari, ""Ko tichine mugove ne­nhaka kuimba yababa vedu here?" 
Genesis31:15 Ha­tizi tatova vatorwa kwavari here? Nokuti vakatitengesa, vakapedzawo chose mute­ngo wedu." 
Genesis31:16 Nokuti fuma yose, yakato­rerwa baba vedu naMwari, ndeyedu ne­yavana vedu; naizvozvo zvino chiita hako sezvawaudzwa naMwari.""" 
Genesis31:17 Ipapo Jakobho akasimuka, akata­svisa vana vake navakadzi vake pama­kamera;" 
Genesis31:18 akatora zvipfuwo zvake zvose, nefuma yake yose, yaakanga aunganidza, zvipfuwo zvaakanga apfuwa, zvaakanga aunganidza paPa­dhanaramu, kuti aende kuna Isaka baba vake, kunyika yeKenani." 
Genesis31:19 Zvino Ra­bhani akanga aenda kundoveura maku­she amakwai ake; Rakeri akaba chifana­nidzo chainamatwa chababa vake. 
Genesis31:20 Jakobho akanyengedzera Rabhani, muAramu, nokuti haana kumuudza kuti ndotiza." 
Genesis31:21 Naizvozvo akatiza nezvose zvaakanga anazvo; akasimuka, akaya­mbuka Rwizi, akaringira kugomo reGi­riadhi." 
Genesis31:22 Zvino nomusi wetatu Rabhani akaudzwa kuti Jakobho watiza. 
Genesis31:23 Iye akaenda nehama dzake, akamuteverera rwendo rwamazuva manomwe; akando­mubata kugomo reGiriadhi." 
Genesis31:24 Mwari akauya kuna Rabhani, muAramu, paku­rota usiku, akati kwaari, ""Chenjera, kuti urege kutaura kuna Jakobho chinhu, kana chakanaka kana chakaipa.""" 
Genesis31:25 Rabhani akasvika kuna Jakobho. Zvino Jakobho akanga adzika tende rake mugomo; Ra­bhani nehama dzake vakadzika matende avowo mugomo reGiriadhi. 
Genesis31:26 Zvino Rabhani akati kuna Jako­bho, ""Waita seiko iwe, nokuti wandinye­ngedzera, ukaenda navakunda vangu va­kaita savakatapwa nomunondo?" 
Genesis31:27 Watizireiko pakavanda, ukandinyenge­dzera; wakaregerei kundiudza, ndikaku­tendera kuti uende nomufaro, nenziyo, nengoma, norudimhwa?" 
Genesis31:28 Hauna kundi­tendera kuti nditsvode vanakomana va­ngu navakunda vangu. Zvino waita sebe­nzi. 
Genesis31:29 Ndine simba paruoko rwangu rokukuitira zvakaipa; asi Mwari wababa vako akataura neni usiku hwazuro, akati, `Chenjera, kuti urege kutaura kuna Jako­bho kana chakanaka kana chakaipa.'" 
Genesis31:30 Zvino, kana wakada kuenda hako, zva­wakanga uchishuva zvikuru imba yababa vako, wagobireiko vamwari vangu?""" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobho akapindura, akati kuna Rabhani, ""Nokuti ndakanga ndichitya, nokuti ndakati, `Zvimwe munganditorera vakunda venyu nesimba.'" 
Genesis31:32 Iye wamu­ngawana ana vamwari venyu, ngaarege kurarama. Zvino hama dzedu dzichiriko, natsai kutsvaka zvinhu zvenyu zviri kwa­ndiri, mugozvitora;"" nokuti Jakobho aka­nga asingazivi kuti Rakeri akanga azviba." 
Genesis31:33 Zvino Rabhani akapinda mutende raJakobho, nomutende raRea, nomutende ravarandakadzi vaviri, asi haana kuzvi­wana. Ipapo akabuda patende raRea, akapinda patende raRakeri." 
Genesis31:34 Zvino Ra­keri akanga atora vamwari, akavaisa muchigaro chekamera, akagara pamusoro pazvo. Rabhani akabata-bata pose mute­nde, asi haana kuzviwana." 
Genesis31:35 Iye akati kuna baba vake, ""Ishe wangu ngaarege kutsamwa, nokuti handigoni kusimuka pamberi penyu; nokuti mutoo wavakadzi uri kwandiri."" Iye akatsvakisisa, asi haana kuwana vamwari." 
Genesis31:36 Zvino Jakobho akatsamwa, akapo­potera Rabhani; Jakobho akapindura akati kuna Rabhani, ""Kudarika kwangu ndokweiko? Ko kutadza kwangu ndo­kwei, zvamanditevera neshungu dzaka­dai?" 
Genesis31:37 Zvino zvamabata-bata nhumbi dzangu dzose, magowaneiko panhumbi dzose zvokumba kwenyu? Zviisei pano pamberi pehama dzangu nedzenyu, vato­nge pakati pedu isu vaviri." 
Genesis31:38 Ndakagara nemwi makore aya makumi maviri; matu­nzvi enyu amakwai nenhunzvi dzenyu dzembudzi hazvina kusvodza, makondo­hwe enyu amakwai handina kuadya." 
Genesis31:39 Zvakarumwa nezvikara handina kuuya nazvo kwamuri; asi ndakazviripa ini; makazvireva pamaoko angu, kana zvaka­biwa masikati, kana zvakabiwa usiku." 
Genesis31:40 Masikati ndakafa nezuva, usiku necha­ndo; hope dzangu dzikabva kumeso angu." 
Genesis31:41 Makore aya makumi maviri ndakagara mumba menyu; ndakakubatirai makore ane gumi namana pamusoro pavakunda venyu vaviri, namakore matanhatu pamu­soro pezvipfuwo zvenyu; mukashandura mubayiro wangu kagumi." 
Genesis31:42 Dai Mwari wababa vangu, Mwari waAbhurahamu, iye wakatyiwa naIsaka, asaiva neni, zvi­rokwazvo mungadai maindiendesa ndi­sina chinhu. Mwari akaona kutambudzika kwangu namabasa amaoko angu, akaku­rairai usiku hwazuro.""" 
Genesis31:43 Rabhani akapi­ndura, akati kuna Jakobho, ""Vakunda ava vakunda vangu; vana ava vana vangu; zvipfuwo izvi zvipfuwo zvangu, nezvose zvaunoona ndezvangu; nhasi ndingaitei kuvakunda vangu ava, kana vana vavo vavakazvara?" 
Genesis31:44 Uya zvino ngatiite su­ngano, ini newe; chive chapupu pakati pangu newe.""" 
Genesis31:45 Jakobho akatora ibwe, akarimisa, rikava shongwe." 
Genesis31:46 Jakobho akati kuhama dzake, ""Unganidzai mabwe;"" ivo vaka­tora mabwe, vakaita murwi; vakadya ipapo pamurwi." 
Genesis31:47 Rabhani akautumidza Jegarisahadhuta; asi Jakobho akautumi­dza Garidhi. 
Genesis31:48 Rabhani akati, ""Murwi uyu ngachive chapupu pakati pangu newe zuva ranhasi."" Naizvozvo akatumidzwa zita rinonzi Garidhi," 
Genesis31:49 uyewo Mizipa, nokuti akati, ""Jehovha ngaarinde pakati pangu newe, kana tisingaonani." 
Genesis31:50 Kana ukazotambudza vakunda vangu, kana ku­wana vamwe vakadzi kunze kwavakunda vangu, hakuna munhu achava nesu; asi tarira, Mwari ndicho chapupu pakati pangu newe.""" 
Genesis31:51 Zvino Rabhani akati kuna Jakobho, ""Tarira murwi uyu, tarira shongwe iyi, yandakamisa pakati pangu newe." 
Genesis31:52 Murwi uyu chichava chapupu, neshongwe iyi chichava chapupu, kuti ini handingapfuuri murwi uyu, neshongwe iyi, ndichienda kwauri, kuti tiitirane zva­kaipa." 
Genesis31:53 Mwari waAbhurahamu, Mwari waNahori, Mwari wababa vavo, ngaato­nge pakati pedu."" Jakobho akapika naiye waityiwa naIsaka, baba vake." 
Genesis31:54 Ipapo Jakobho akabayira chibayiro mugomo; akakoka hama dzake kuti vadye zvoku­dya; vakadya zvokudya, vakavata usiku mugomo." 
Genesis31:55 Rabhani akamuka mangwa­nani, akatsvoda vanakomana vake nava­kunda vake, akavaropafadza; Rabhani akabva, akadzokera kumusha kwake." 
Genesis32:1 Zvino Jakobho akaenda nenzira yake, vatumwa vaMwari ndoku­sangana naye." 
Genesis32:2 Akati achivaona, Jakobho akati, ""Ihondo yaMwari;"" akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rinonzi Mahanaimi." 
Genesis32:3 Zvino Jakobho akatuma nhume pa­mberi pake kuna Esau, mukuru wake, kunyika yeSeiri, munyika yeEdhomu." 
Genesis32:4 Akavaraira, akati, ""Taurai nashe wangu, Esau, muti, `Zvanzi nomuranda wenyu Jakobho, ndakanga ndiri mutorwa kuna Rabhani, ndikagarako kusvikira zvino;" 
Genesis32:5 ndine mombe, nembongoro, namakwai, navaranda, navarandakadzi; ndatuma va­nhu kuzoudza ishe wangu izvozvi, kuti ndiwane nyasha pamberi penyu.' """ 
Genesis32:6 Nhume dzikadzokera kuna Jako­bho, dzikati, ""Takandosvika kumukuru wenyu Esau; naiye anouya kuzosangana nemwi ana varume vana mazana mana.""" 
Genesis32:7 Jakobho akatya kwazvo, akatambu­dzika; akaparadzanisa vanhu vaakanga anavo, namakwai nemombe namaka­mera, akaita mapoka maviri;" 
Genesis32:8 akati, ""Kana Esau akasvika kune rimwe boka, akariparadza, boka rakasara ringatiza.""" 
Genesis32:9 Zvino Jakobho akati, ""imwi, Mwari wababa vangu Abhurahamu, naMwari wababa vangu Isaka; imwi Jehovha, ndimwi makati kwandiri, `Dzokera kunyika yako, nokuhama dzako, ndigokuitira zvakanaka';" 
Genesis32:10 handina kufanirwa ne­nyasha dzenyu dzose nokutendeka kwe­nyu kose kwamakaitira muranda we­nyu; nokuti ndakayambuka Jorodhani urwu netsvimbo yangu yoga; zvino ndava mapoka maviri. 
Genesis32:11 Dondirwirai paruoko rwomukuru wangu, paruoko rwaEsau; nokuti ndinomutya, kuti achauya akandiparadza ini, namai, pa­mwechete navana." 
Genesis32:12 Ndimwi makati, `Zvirokwazvo ndichakuitira zvakanaka, ndichaitawo rudzi rwako sejecha regu­ngwa, risingagoni kuverengwa nokuwa­nda kwaro.' """ 
Genesis32:13 Akavatapo usiku ihwohwo; aka­tora zvimwe kune zvaakanga anazvo, kuti chive chipo kuna Esau, mukuru wake;" 
Genesis32:14 zvaiti: Nhunzvi dzembudzi dzina ma­zana maviri, nenhongo dzina makumi maviri, namatunzvi amakwai ana mazana maviri, namakondohwe ana makumi ma­viri," 
Genesis32:15 namakamera anokamwa ana ma­kumi matatu nemhuru dzawo, nemhou dzemombe dzina makumi mana, nehando dzemombe dzine gumi, namakadzi embo­ngoro ana makumi maviri, nemhuru dzine gumi." 
Genesis32:16 Akazvipa mumaoko avara­nda vake, boka rimwe nerimwe riri roga; akati kuvaranda vake, ""Yambukai pa­mberi pangu, musiye runhambo pakati peboka rimwe nerimwe.""" 
Genesis32:17 Akaraira wo­kutanga, akati, ""Kana Esau, mukuru wangu, akasangana newe, akabvunza, achiti, `Uri munhu waaniko? Unoende­piko? Izvi zviri pamberi pako nde­zvaani?'" 
Genesis32:18 Uti, `Ndezvomuranda wenyu Jakobho; chipo chakatumirwa ishe wa­ngu Esau; tarirai, naiye ari kumashure kweduwo;' """ 
Genesis32:19 akarairawo wechipiri ne­wechitatu, navose vakanga vachitevera mapoka, akati, ""Kana mukamuwana Esau, mutaure kwaari muchidaro;" 
Genesis32:20 muti, `Tarirai, naiye muranda wenyu Jakobho ari mumashure medu.' "" Nokuti akati, ""Ndichambomunyaradza nechipo chino­nditungamirira, ndigoti ndoona chiso chake; zvimwe achandigamuchira.""" 
Genesis32:21 Naizvozvo chipo chakayambutswa mberi kwake; asi iye pachake akavata usiku ihwohwo pakati peungano. 
Genesis32:22 Zvino akamuka usiku ihwohwo, akatora vakadzi vake vaviri navarandaka­dzi vake vaviri, navana vake vane gumi nomumwe, akayambuka pazambuko raJakobho." 
Genesis32:23 Akavatora, akavayambutsa parukova, akayambutsawo zvaakanga anazvo." 
Genesis32:24 Asi Jakobho akasara ari oga; mumwe murume akaita mutsimba naye kusvikira utonga huchitsvuka. 
Genesis32:25 Zvino akati achiona kuti haagoni kumukunda, akamubata pahudyu, hudyu ikatyoka ne­mitsimba naye." 
Genesis32:26 Iye akati, ""Chindirega ndiende, nokuti utonga hwotsvuka."" Iye akati, ""Handingakuregei kuti muende, musati mandiropafadza.""" 
Genesis32:27 Akati kwaari, ""Zita rako ndianiko?"" Iye akati, ""Jako­bho.""" 
Genesis32:28 Akati, ""Zita rako harichazonzi Jakobho, asi Isiraeri; nokuti wakarwa naMwari navanhu, ukakunda.""" 
Genesis32:29 Jako­bho akamubvunza, akati, ""Ndiudzeiwo zita renyu."" Iye akati, ""Unondibvunzi­reiko zita rangu?"" Akamuropafadza ipapo." 
Genesis32:30 Zvino Jakobho akatumidza nzvi­mbo iyoyo zita rinonzi Penieri; nokuti akati, ""Ndakaonana naMwari, upenyu hwangu hukachengetwa.""" 
Genesis32:31 Zuva rika­mubudira achipfuura napaPenieri; akaka­mhina pahudyu yake. 
Genesis32:32 Naizvozvo vana vaIsiraeri havadyi nanhasi runda rehudyu riri papfupa rehudyu; nokuti akabata hudyu yaJakobho parunda rehudyu. 
Genesis33:1 Zvino Jakobho akasimudza meso ake, akatarira, akaona Esau achiuya ana varume vana mazana mana. Akagovera vana kuna Rakeri naRea na­varandakadzi vaviri." 
Genesis33:2 Akaisa varandaka­dzi navana vavo mberi, Rea navana vake shure kwavo, naRakeri naJosefa pakupe­dzisira." 
Genesis33:3 Iye pachake akapfuura achiva­tungamirira, akakotamira pasi kanomwe, kusvikira aswedera pedo nomukuru wake." 
Genesis33:4 Ipapo Esau akamhanyira kundo­sangana naye, akamumbundikira, aka­wira pamutsipa wake, ndokumutsvoda; vakachema vose." 
Genesis33:5 Akasimudza meso ake, akaona vakadzi navana, akati, ""Ava vaunavo ndivanani?"" Iye akati, ""Ndivo vana vakapiwa muranda wenyu naMwari nenyasha dzake.""" 
Genesis33:6 Varandakadzi vakaswedera, ivo navana vavo, vakakotama." 
Genesis33:7 NaRea navana vake vakaswederawo, vakakotama; pashure Josefa naRakeri vakaswedera, vakakotama." 
Genesis33:8 Akati, ""Ko boka iri rose randasangana naro ndereiko?"" Iye akati, ""Kuti ndiwane nyasha kuna ishe wangu.""" 
Genesis33:9 Esau akati, ""Ini ndine zvizhinji, munun'una wangu; izvo zvaunazvo, ngazvive zvako.""" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobho akati, ""Kwete,kana ndawana nyasha kwamuri zvino, ndinokumbira kuti mugamuchire chipo changu paruoko rwangu; nokuti ndaona chiso chenyu, chikaita sechiso chaMwari, mukafara neni." 
Genesis33:11 Gamuchirai henyu chipo changu chamunopiwa; nokuti Mwari akandiitira nyasha, ndine zvizhi­nji."" Akamugwaririra, akazochitora." 
Genesis33:12 Akati, ""Ngatipfuure hedu parwe­ndo rwedu, tiende, ini ndichakutungami­rira.""" 
Genesis33:13 Iye akati kwaari, ""Ishe wangu anoziva kuti vana vachiri vaduku, uye kuti makwai nemombe zvandinazvo zvi­noyamwisa; kana vakazvitinhisa zuva rimwe, zvipfuwo zvose zvichafa." 
Genesis33:14 Ishe wangu ngaapinde hake mberi komura­nda wake; ini ndichanyatsozvisesedza sezvazvinogona kufamba, izvo zvipfuwo zviri pamberi pangu, navana sezvavano­gona kufamba, kudzimara ndasvika kuna ishe wangu paSeiri.""" 
Genesis33:15 Esau akati, ""Zvino ngandisiye kwauri vamwe vanhu vandinavo."" Iye akati, ""Muchaitireiko kudaro? Ndiwane hangu nyasha kuna ishe wangu.""" 
Genesis33:16 Nai­zvozvo Esau akadzoka zuva iroro, akae­nda Seiri." 
Genesis33:17 Asi Jakobho akaenda Sukoti, akazvivakira imba, akaitira zvipfuwo zvake matanga; naizvozvo zita renzvi­mbo iyoyo rakanzi Sukoti." 
Genesis33:18 Jakobho akasvika zvakanaka ku­guta reShekemu, riri panyika yeKenani, pakubva kwake paPadhanaramu; aka­dzika matende ake pakatarisana neguta." 
Genesis33:19 Akatenga rutivi rwenyika, paakanga apetenura tende rake, kuvana vaHamori, baba vaShekemu, nezana remari." 
Genesis33:20 Aka­vakapo aritari, akaritumidza zita rinonzi ErieroheIsiraeri." 
Genesis34:1 Zvino Dhina, mwanasikana waRea, waakaberekera Jakobho, aka­buda kundoona vakunda venyika iyoyo." 
Genesis34:2 Ipapo Shekemu, mwanakomana waHa­mori, muHivhi, muchinda wenyika, aka­muona; akamutora, akavata naye, akamu­nyadza." 
Genesis34:3 Mweya wake ukanamatira Dhina, mukunda waJakobho, akamuda musikana uyo, akataura zvakafadza moyo womusikana." 
Genesis34:4 Zvino Shekemu akataura nababa vake, Hamori akati, ""Ndi­torerei musikana uyo, ave mukadzi wa­ngu.""" 
Genesis34:5 Zvino Jakobho akanzwa kuti aka­chinyira Dhina, mukunda wake; vanakomana vake vakanga vari kuzvipfuwo zvake kusango, Jakobho akanyarara hake kusvikira vauya." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori, baba vaShe­kemu, vakaenda kuna Jakobho kundotau­rirana naye." 
Genesis34:7 Vakati vachinzwa izvozvo vanakomana vaJakobho vakauya vachi­bva kusango; zvino varume ava vakanga vane shungu kwazvo, vakatsamwa zvi­kuru, nokuti akanga aita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo pakati pavaIsiraeri kuti avate nomukunda waJakobho; chinhu icho cha­kanga chisingafaniri kuitwa." 
Genesis34:8 Zvino Ha­mori akataurirana navo, akati, ""Mweya womwanakomana wangu, Shekemu, unoshuva mukunda wenyu; domupai he­nyu iye, ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis34:9 Wananai henyu nesu, tipei vakunda venyu, mugo­tora vakunda vedu." 
Genesis34:10 Garai henyu nesu, nyika ichava pamberi penyu; garaimo, mushambadzire, muzviunganidziremo fuma.""" 
Genesis34:11 Ipapo Shekemu akati kuna baba vake nokuhanzvadzi dzake, ""Ndiwane hangu nyasha kwamuri; zvamunoreva kwandiri, ndichakupai." 
Genesis34:12 Kumbirai he­nyu kwandiri roora guru nechipo chi­kuru; zvamunoreva kwandiri ndichaku­pai; asi ndipei musikana ave mukadzi wangu. 
Genesis34:13 Ipapo vana vaJakobho vakapi­ndura Shekemu naHamori, baba vake, nokunyengera, vakataura nokuti akanga achinyira hanzvadzi yavo Dhina," 
Genesis34:14 vakati kwavari, ""Hatingagoni kuita chinhu ichi, kuti tipe munhu asina kudzingiswa hanzvadzi yedu, nokuti izvozvi zvinga­tinyadza;" 
Genesis34:15 tingatenderana nemwi koga kana mukaita chinhu ichi, kuti muve sesu, murume mumwe nomumwe ari kwamuri adzingiswe;" 
Genesis34:16 ipapo isu ticha­kupai vakunda vedu, nesuo tichatora vakunda venyu; tigare nemi, tive sava­nhu vamwe." 
Genesis34:17 Kana musingatitereri, kuti mudzingiswe, tichatora mukunda wedu, tikabva.""" 
Genesis34:18 Mashoko avo akafadza Hamori naShekemu, mwanakomana waHamori." 
Genesis34:19 Jaya harina kunonoka kuita chinhu ichocho, nokuti akanga achifarira muku­nda waJakobho; naiye akanga achiku­dzwa kupfuura vose veimba yose yababa vake." 
Genesis34:20 Zvino Hamori naShekemu, mwa­nakomana wake, vakauya kusuo reguta ravo, vakataurirana navanhu veguta ravo vakati," 
Genesis34:21 Vanhu ava vane rugare nesu; naizvozvo ngavagare havo munyika ino, vashambadziremo; nokuti tarirai nyika inovaringana; ngatitore vakunda vavo vave vakadzi vedu, nesu tivape vakunda vedu." 
Genesis34:22 Asi vanhu ava vachatenderana nesu kugara nesu, nokuita savanhu va­mwe nesu, koga kana tichiita chinhu ichi, kuti varume vose kwatiri vadzingi­swe, sezvavakadzingiswa ivo." 
Genesis34:23 Ko mo­mbe dzavo, nefuma yavo, nezvipfuwo zvavo zvose hazvichavi zvedu here? Ngatitenderane navo koga, vagogara nesu.""" 
Genesis34:24 Zvino vose vaibuda pasuo re­guta rake vakateerera Hamori, naShe­kemu, mwanakomana wake; ipapo va­rume vose vakadzingiswa, vose vaibuda pasuo reguta rake." 
Genesis34:25 Zvino pazuva retatu, vachiri paku­rwadziwa, vanakomana vaviri vaJako­bho, Simiyoni naRevhi, hanzvadzi dzaDhina, vakatora mumwe nomumwe munondo wake, vakapinda muguta vanhu vasingarindiri, vakauraya varume vose." 
Genesis34:26 Vakauraya Hamori naShekemu, mwa­nakomana wake, neminondo inopinza, vakatora Dhina mumba maShekemu, va­kaenda." 
Genesis34:27 Vanakomana vaJakobho va­kaenda kune vakauraiwa, vakapamba guta, nemhaka yokuti vakanga vachinyira hanzvadzi yavo." 
Genesis34:28 Vakatora makwai avo, nemombe dzavo, nembongoro dzavo, nezvakanga zviri muguta, nezvakanga zviri kusango;" 
Genesis34:29 vakatapa fuma yavo yose, navana vavo vaduku, navakadzi vavo, vakazviita mhambara, nezvinhu zvose zvakanga zviri mudzimba." 
Genesis34:30 Ipapo Jakobho akati kuna Si­meoni naRevhi, ""Manditorera mufaro, zvamandinhuwisa pakati pavanhu vano­gara munyika ino, pakati pavaKenani navaPerezi; ini zvandiine vanhu va­shoma, vachandiunganira, vakandiu­raya; ndichaparadzwa ini neveimba ya­ngu.""" 
Genesis34:31 Ivo vakati, ""Iye agoitireiko neha­nzvadzi yedu sezvinoitwa nechifeve?""" 
Genesis35:1 Zvino Mwari akati kuna Jakobho, ""Simuka, ukwire Bheteri, undogara ikoko; uitire Mwari aritari ipapo, iye akazviratidza kwauri panguva yoku­tiza kwako pamberi paEsau, mukuru wako.""" 
Genesis35:2 Ipapo Jakobho akati kumhuri yake, navose vakanga vanaye, ""Bvisai vamwari vedzimwe ndudzi vari pakati penyu, zvinatsei, mufuke dzimwe nguvo;" 
Genesis35:3 tisi­muke, tikwire Bheteri; ipapo ndichaitira Mwari aritari, iye akanga aneni panzira yandakanga ndichifamba nayo.""" 
Genesis35:4 Ivo vakapa Jakobho vamwari vose vedzimwe ndudzi vakanga vari pamaoko avo, nezvi­ndori zvakanga zviri panzeve dzavo; Jakobho akazvicherera pasi pomuti wo­muouki wakanga uri paShekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Vakapfuura norwendo rwavo, ma­guta akanga akavakomba akatya Mwari kwazvo, vakasateverera vanakomana vaJakobho." 
Genesis35:6 Jakobho akasvika Ruzi, guta riri panyika yeKenani (rimwe zita ndiBheteri), iye navanhu vose vaakanga anavo." 
Genesis35:7 Akavakapo aritari, akatumidza zita renzvimbo iyoyo kuti Eribheteri; nokuti Mwari akanga azviratidza kwaari ipapo, panguva yokutiza kwake pamberi pomu­kuru wake." 
Genesis35:8 Debhora, mureri waRa­bheka, akafa, akavigwa zasi kweBheteri munyasi momuouki; zita rapo rikanzi Aronibhakuti." 
Genesis35:9 Ipapo Mwari akazviratidzazve kuna Jakobho pakubva kwake Padhanaramu, akamuropafadza." 
Genesis35:10 Mwari akati kwaari, ""Zita rako ndiJakobho, zita rako haricha­zonzi Jakobho, asi zita rako richanzi Isiraeri;"" akamutumidza zita rinonzi Isi­raeri." 
Genesis35:11 Zvino Mwari akati kwaari, ""Ndini Mwari Wamasimbaose; bereka vana, uwa­nde; rudzi neboka rendudzi zvichabuda kwauri, namadzishe achabuda pachiuno chako;" 
Genesis35:12 nyika yandakapa Abhurahamu naIsaka, ndichakupa iyoyo; vana vako vanokutevera ndichavapa nyika iyoyo.""" 
Genesis35:13 Mwari akakwira, akabva kwaari, ipapo paakanga achitaura naye." 
Genesis35:14 Jakobho aka­misa shongwe ipapo paakanga ataura naye, shongwe yehwe; akadurura pamu­soro payo chipiriso chinodururwa, akadi­rawo mafuta pamusoro payo." 
Genesis35:15 Jakobho akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo, pakanga pa­taura Mwari naye, zita rinonzi Bheteri." 
Genesis35:16 Zvino vakafamba vachibva Bheteri; chi­nhambo chakanga chichipo chokusvika Efurata; Rakeri akazvara, akatambudzika pakupona kwake." 
Genesis35:17 Akati achitambudzika pakupona kwake, mbuya vakati kwaari, ""Usatya hako, nokuti zvino uchava nomu­mwe mwanakomanazve.""" 
Genesis35:18 Zvino mweya wake wakati uchibuda (nokuti wakafa), akamutumidza Bhenoni; asi baba vake vakamutumidza Bhenjamini." 
Genesis35:19 Rakeri akafa, akavigwa panzira inoenda Efurata (rimwe zita ndiBhetere­hemu)." 
Genesis35:20 Jakobho akamisa shongwe pa­musoro perinda rake, ndiyo shongwe yerinda raRakeri kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Genesis35:21 Isiraeri akafamba, akapfuurira mberi, akadzika tende rake neseri kweshongwe yeEdheri." 
Genesis35:22 Zvino Isiraeri agere munyika iyoyo, Rubheni akandovata naBhiriha, murongo wababa vake, Isiraeri akazvinzwa. Zvino vanakomana vaJakobho vaiva gumi navaviri;" 
Genesis35:23 vanakomana vaRea: Rubheni, dangwe raJakobho, naSimiyoni, naRevhi, naJudha, nalsakari, naZebhu­roni;" 
Genesis35:24 vanakomana vaRakeri: Josefa naBhenjamini; 
Genesis35:25 vanakomana vaBhiriha, murandakadzi waRakeri: Dhani naNafu­tari;" 
Genesis35:26 vanakomana vaZiripa, muranda­kadzi waRea: Gadhi naAsheri. Ndivo vanakomana vaJakobho, vaakazvarirwa paPadhanaramu." 
Genesis35:27 Jakobho akasvika kuna Isaka, baba vake paMamure, paKi­riyatiabha (rimwe zita ndiHebhuroni), paigara Abhurahamu naIsaka vari vato­rwa." 
Genesis35:28 Mazuva aIsaka akanga ari makore ane zana namakumi masere. 
Genesis35:29 Mweya waIsaka ukabuda, akafa, akasanganiswa navanhu vake, akwegura, ava namazuva mazhinji; Esau naJakobho, vanakomana vake, vakamuviga." 
Genesis36:1 Ndiwo marudzi aEsau (rimwe zita ndiEdhomu): 
Genesis36:2 Esau akawana vakadzi vake kuvakunda veKenani, vaiti: Adha, mukunda waEroni, muHeti, naHoribhama, mukunda waAna, mukunda waZibhioni, muHivhi;" 
Genesis36:3 naBhasimati, mukunda waIshimaeri, hanzvadzi yaNe­bhayoti." 
Genesis36:4 Adha akabereka Esau Erifazi; Bhasimati akabereka Rueri; 
Genesis36:5 Ohori­bhama akabereka Jeushi, naJarami, naKora; ndivo vanakomana vaEsau, vaaka­berekerwa panyika yeKenani." 
Genesis36:6 Zvino Esau akatora vakadzi vake, navanakomana vake, navakunda vake, navanhu vose veimba yake, nezvipfuwo zvake, nemombe dzake dzose, nefuma yake yose yaakanga aunganidza munyika yeKenani, akaenda kunyika iri kure no­munun'una wake Jakobho." 
Genesis36:7 Nokuti fuma yavo yakanga yawanda, naizvozvo vaka­nga vasingagoni kugara panzvimbo imwe; nyika youtorwa hwavo yakanga isingavaringani nokuda kwezvipfuwo zvavo." 
Genesis36:8 Esau akandogara kugomo reSeiri; Esau ndiye Edhomu. 
Genesis36:9 Marudzi aEsau, baba vavaEdhomu, kugomo reSeiri, ndiwo:" 
Genesis36:10 Mazita avana­komana vaEsau ndiwo: Erifazi, mwana­komana waAdha, mukadzi waEsau, naRueri, mwanakomana waBhasimati, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:11 Vanakomana vaEri­fazi vaiva Temani, naOmari, naZefo, naGatamu, naKenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Timuna akanga ari murongo waErifazi, mwanakomana waEsau; iye akaberekera Erifazi Ama­reki; ndivo vanakomana vaAdha, muka­dzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:13 Vanakomana vaRueri ndivo: Nahati, naZera, naShama naMiza; ndivo vanakomana vaBhasimati, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:14 Vanakomana vaOhoribhama, mu­kunda waAna, mukunda waZibhioni, mu­kadzi waEsau, ndivo: iye akaberekera Esau Jeushi, naJarami, naKora." 
Genesis36:15 Ava ndivo madzishe pakati pavana vaEsau: Vanakomana vaErifazi, dangwe raEsau: Ishe Temani, nashe Omari, nashe Zefo, nashe Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 nashe Kora, nashe Gatamu, nashe Amareki; ndiwo madzishe okwaErifazi munyika yeEdhomu; ndivo vanakomana vaAdha." 
Genesis36:17 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaRueri, mwanakomana waEsau: Ishe Nahati, na­she Zera, nashe Shama, nashe Miza; ndiwo madzishe okwaRueri munyika yeEdhomu; ndivo vanakomana vaBhasi­mati, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:18 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaOhori­bhama, mukadzi waEsau: Ishe Jeushi, nashe Jarami, nashe Kora; ndiwo madzi­she okwaOhoribhama, mukunda waAna, mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:19 Ndivo vanakomana vaEsau, ndiwo madzishe avo. Ndiye Edhomu." 
Genesis36:20 Ndivo vanakomana vaSeiri, muHori, vaigara panyika iyo: Rotani, naSho­bharu, naZibhioni, naAna," 
Genesis36:21 naDhishoni, naEzeri, naDhishani; ndiwo madzishe okuvaHori, vanakomana vaSeiri munyika yeEdhomu." 
Genesis36:22 Vanakomana vaRotani, vaiva Hori, naHemani; hanzvadzi yaRotani aiva Timuna." 
Genesis36:23 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaSho­bharu: Avhani, naManahati, naEbhari, naShefo, naOnamu." 
Genesis36:24 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaZi­bhioni: Aja, naAna; ndiye Ana akawana matsime emvura inopisa kusango, achifu­dza mbongoro dzaZibhioni, baba vake." 
Genesis36:25 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaAna: Dhi­shoni, naOhoribhama, mukunda waAna." 
Genesis36:26 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaDhishoni: Hemudhani, naEshibhani, naIturani, naKerani." 
Genesis36:27 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaEzeri: Bhirihani, naZaavhani, naAkani." 
Genesis36:28 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaDhishani: Uzi naArani. 
Genesis36:29 Ava ndiwo madzishe okuvaHori: Ishe Rotani, nashe Shobharu, nashe Zi­bhioni, nashe Ana," 
Genesis36:30 nashe Dhishoni, nashe Ezeri, nashe Dhishani; ndiwo ma­dzishe okuvaHori, namarudzi avo mu­nyika yeSeiri." 
Genesis36:31 Ava ndivo madzimambo akabata ushe munyika yeEdhomu, vana vaIsiraeri vachigere kuva namadzimambo:" 
Genesis36:32 Bhera, mwanakomana waBheori, akabata ushe paEdhomu; zita reguta rake rainzi Dhinihabha." 
Genesis36:33 Akafa, Jobhabhu, mwanakomana waZera weBhozara akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:33 Akafa, Jobhabhu, mwanakomana waZera weBhozara akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:34 Jobhabhu akafa, Hushamu wenyika yavaTemani akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:34 Jobhabhu akafa, Hushamu wenyika yavaTemani akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:35 Hushamu akafa, Hadhadhi, mwanakomana waBhedhadhi, uya akauraya Midhiani kusango reMoabhu, akabata ushe pachigaro chake; zita reguta rake rainzi Avhiti." 
Genesis36:36 Hadhadhi akafa, Samura weMasereka akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:37 Samura akafa, Shauri weRehobhoti paRwizi akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:38 Shauri akafa, Bhaarihanani, mwanakomana waAkibhori akabata ushe pachigaro chake." 
Genesis36:39 Bhaarihanani, mwanakomana waAkibhori, akafa, Hadhari akabata ushe pachigaro chake; zita reguta rake rainzi Pau; zita romukadzi wake rainzi Mehetabheri, mukunda waMatiredhi, mukunda waMehazahadhi." 
Genesis36:40 Aya ndiwo mazita amadzishe okwaEsau, nedzimba dzavo, namaguta avo, namazita avo; Ishe Timuna, nashe Arivha, nashe Jeteti;" 
Genesis36:41 nashe Ohori­bhama, nashe Era, nashe Pinoni;" 
Genesis36:42 na­she Kenazi, nashe Temani, nashe Mi­bhizari;" 
Genesis36:43 nashe Magidhieri, nashe Iramu; ndiwo madzishe aEdhomu, pa­vakagara munyika yakanga iri yavo. Ndiye Esau, baba vaEdhomu." 
Genesis37:1 Zvino Jakobho akagara munyika youtorwa hwababa vake, munyika yeKenani." 
Genesis37:2 Marudzi aJakobho ndiwo: Josefa akanga ana makore ane gumi namano­mwe, akafudza makwai pamwechete navakoma vake; akanga achiri muko­mana pamwechete navanakomana vaBhiriha, navanakomana vaZiripa, vaka­dzi vababa vake; Josefa akasivaudzira kuna baba vavo." 
Genesis37:3 Zvino Isiraeri akanga achida Josefa kupfuura vana vake vose, nokuti akanga ari mwanakomana woutana hwake; aka­muitira nguvo yakanga yakareba ina maoko." 
Genesis37:4 Vakoma vake vakaona kuti baba vavo vanomuda kupfuura vakoma vake vose; vakamuvenga, vakasagona kutaura naye nomufaro." 
Genesis37:5 Zvino Josefa akarota hope, akau­dza vakoma vake, ipapo vakanyanya kumuvenga." 
Genesis37:6 Akati kwavari, ""Inzwaiwo hope dzangu dzandarota." 
Genesis37:7 Tarirai, taka­nga tichisunga zvisote mumunda, onei chisote changu chikasimuka, chikara­mba chimire; ndikaona zvisote zvenyu zvichikomba changu, zvikakotama pa­mberi pechisote changu.""" 
Genesis37:8 Vakoma vake vakati kwaari, ""Ko iwe uchabata ushe pamusoro pedu kanhi? Ko iwe uchava nesimba pamusoro pedu kanhi?"" Vakanyanya kumuvenga nokuda kokurota kwake nokwamashoko ake." 
Genesis37:9 Akapamha kurotazve, akaudza va­koma vake, akati, ""Tarirai, ndarotazve dzimwe hope; ndakaona zuva, nomwedzi, nenyeredzi dzine gumi neimwe, dzichi­kotamira pamberi pangu.""" 
Genesis37:10 Akaudza baba vake navakoma vake izvozvo; baba vake vakamutuka, vakati kwaari, ""Kurota kwako uku kwa­warota kurota kunyi? Ini namai vako navakoma vako tichauya tikakotama pasi pamberi pako kanhi?""" 
Genesis37:11 Vakoma vake vakamugodora; asi baba vake vakache­ngeta shoko iro. 
Genesis37:12 Zvino vakoma vake vakandofudza makwai ababa vavo paShekemu. 
Genesis37:13 Isiraeri akati kuna Josefa, ""Vakoma vako havafudzi makwai paShe­kemu here? Uya ndikutumire kwavari."" Iye akati, ""Ndiri pano hangu.""" 
Genesis37:14 Akati kwaari, ""Zvino chienda undo­tarira kana vakoma vako vakafara, nama­kwai kana akafarawo; ugodzoka kuzondiu­dza."" Naizvozvo akamutuma, ari pamupata weHebhuroni, akandosvika Shekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Zvino mumwe murume akamuwana achidzungaira musango; murume akamu­bvunza, akati, ""Unotsvakeiko?""" 
Genesis37:16 Iye akati, ""Ndinotsvaka vakoma vangu; dondiudza hako kwavanofudza makwai. """ 
Genesis37:17 Murume akati, ""Vabva pano, no­kuti ndakavanzwa vachiti, `Ngatiende Dhotani.' "" Josefa akatevera vakoma vake, akandovawana paDhotani." 
Genesis37:18 Ivo vakamuona achiri kure; zvino asati asvika kwavari, vakarangana kuti vamuuraye." 
Genesis37:19 Vakataurirana, vachiti, ""Hoyo muroti uya wauya." 
Genesis37:20 Uyai zvino timuuraye, timukandire mune rimwe ra­makomba aya, tigoti, `Wadyiwa nechi­kara;' tigoona kuti kurota kwake kucha­zoitwa seiko.""" 
Genesis37:21 Rubheni akazvinzwa, akamurwira mumaoko avo, akati, ""Ngatirege kumuu­raya.""" 
Genesis37:22 Rubheni akati kwavari, ""Musa­durura ropa; mukandirei mugomba iri riri musango, asi regai kutambanudza maoko enyu kwaari;"" kuti amurwire pamaoko avo, agomudzosera kuna baba vake." 
Genesis37:23 Zvino Josefa akati asvika kuvakoma vake, vakabvisira Josefa nguvo yake, nguvo iya yakanga yakareba ina maoko, yaaka­nga akafuka;" 
Genesis37:24 vakamutora, vakamuka­ndira mugomba; gomba rakanga risina chinhu, makanga musina mvura." 
Genesis37:25 Vakagara pasi, vakadya zvokudya; zvino vakasimudza meso avo, vakatarira, vakaona boka ravaIshimaeri vachifamba, vachibva Giriyadhi, makamera avo akata­kura zvinhu zvinonhuhwira, nebarisami, nemura, vachindozviisa Ijipiti." 
Genesis37:26 Zvino Judha akati kuvana vababa vake, ""Tinga­waneiko kana tikauraya munun'una wedu tichivanza ropa rake?" 
Genesis37:27 Uyai timutengese kuvaIshimaeri; maoko edu arege kuva kwaari; nokuti munun' una wedu, nyama imwe nesu."" Vana vababa vake vakamuteerera." 
Genesis37:28 Zvino vatengesi vavaMidhiani vakapfuurapo, vakakwidza Josefa vachi­mubudisa mugomba, vakatengesa Josefa kuvaIshimaeri namashekeri ana makumi maviri; ivo vakaisa Josefa Ijipiti." 
Genesis37:29 Zvino Rubheni akadzokera kugo­mba, akawana Josefa asisimo mugomba; akabvarura nguvo dzake." 
Genesis37:30 Akadzokera kuvanun'una vake, akati, ""Mwana haa­chipo; ini zvino ndichaendepiko?""" 
Genesis37:31 Zvino vakatora nguvo yaJosefa, va­kauraya nhongo yembudzi, vakanyika nguvo muropa;" 
Genesis37:32 vakatumira nguvo iyo yakareba ina mavoko kuna baba vavo, vakati, ""Tanonga chinhu ichi; fananidzai zvakanaka kana iri nguvo yomwanako­mana wenyu, kana isati iri iyo.""" 
Genesis37:33 Ivo vakafananidza vakati, ""Inguvo yomwanakomana wangu; wadyiwa ne­chikara; Josefa zvirokwazvo wapara­dzwa.""" 
Genesis37:34 Jakobho akabvarura nguvo dzake, akasimira madhumbu pachiuno chake, akachema mwanakomana wake mazuva mazhinji." 
Genesis37:35 Vanakomana vake vose navakunda vake vose vakasimuka vakamunyaradza; asi akaramba kunyara­dzwa, akati, ""Ndichaburukira kuhwiro kumwanakomana wangu, ndichichema."" Baba vake vakamuwungudzira." 
Genesis37:36 Zvino vaMidhiani vakandomute­ngesa Ijipiti kuna Potifari, muranda waFarao, mukuru wavarindi." 
Genesis38:1 Nenguva iyoyo Judha akabva kuvana vababa vake, akaburuka, akatsaukira kuno mumwe murume muAdhuramu, ainzi Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Judha akaonapo mukunda womumwe munhu muKenani, ainzi Shua, akamutora, akapinda kwaari." 
Genesis38:3 Iye akava nemimba, akabereka mwana­komana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwana­komana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Akava nemimbazve, akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rino­nzi Shera; iye akanga ari paKezibhi mukadzi wake achimubereka." 
Genesis38:6 Zvino Judha akatorera dangwe rake Eri mukadzi ainzi Tamari. 
Genesis38:7 Asi dangwe raJudha, akanga ari munhu akaipa pamberi paJehovha; Jehovha akamuuraya." 
Genesis38:8 Zvino Judha akati kuna Onani, ""Pinda kumukadzi womukoma wako, umuwane, umuitire zvakafanira munun'una womurume, umutsire mukoma wako vana.""" 
Genesis38:9 Zvino Onani akaziva kuti vana avo havangavi vake; naizvozvo wakati kana opinda kumukadzi womu­koma wake, orasira mbeu pasi, kuti arege kupa mukoma wake vana." 
Genesis38:10 Chi­nhu ichi chaakaita chakanga chakaipa pamberi paJehovha; akamuuraya nai­yewo. 
Genesis38:11 Ipapo Judha akati kuna Tamari, mukadzi womwana wake, ""Chigara hako uri chirikadzi paimba yababa vako, kusvikira Shera, mwanakomana wangu, akura;"" nokuti akati, ""Zvimwe angafa savakoma vake."" Tamari aka­ndogara kumba kwababa vake." 
Genesis38:12 Mazuva mazhinji akati apfuura, mukunda waShua, mukadzi waJudha, akafa; zvino Judha akati anyaradzwa, akakwira kuvaveuri vamakwai ake paTi­muna, iye naHira, shamwari yake muAdhuramu." 
Genesis38:13 Tamari akaudzwa, zvichinzi, ""Tarira baba vomurume wako vanokwira Timuna kundoveura makwai avo"";" 
Genesis38:14 ipapo iye akabvisa nguvo dzouchirikadzi hwake, akazvifukidza nechokufukidzira chake, akazviputira, akagara pasuo reEnaimu, guta riri panzira inoenda Timuna; nokuti akanga aona kuti Shera akura, akasamupiwa iye kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis38:15 Zvino Judha akati achimuona, akati chifeve, nokuti akanga afukidza chiso chake." 
Genesis38:16 Akatsaukira kwaari panzira, akati, ""Douya, ndipinde kwauri;"" nokuti akanga asingazivi, kuti mukadzi womwa­nakomana wake. Iye akati, ""Unogondi­peiko, kuti upinde kwandiri?""" 
Genesis38:17 Akati, ""Ndichakutumira mbu­dzana inobva kuzvipfuwo zvangu."" Akati, ""Uchandipa rubatso kusvikira wai­tuma here?""" 
Genesis38:18 Akati, ""Ndichagokupa rubatso rweiko?"" Iye akati, ""Chimhete chako, norwonzi rwako, netsvimbo yako iri paruoko rwako."" Akamupa izvozvo, aka­pinda kwaari, akava nemimba naye." 
Genesis38:19 Akasimuka, akaenda, akabvisa choku­fukidzira chake, akafuka nguvo dzouchiri­kadzi hwake." 
Genesis38:20 Zvino Judha akatuma mbudzana noruoko rweshamwari yake, muAdhuramu, kuti atore rubatso paruoko rwomukadzi, asi haana kumuwana." 
Genesis38:21 Akabvunza vanhu vokwake, achiti, ""Chiripiko chifeve chiya, chakanga chiri paEnaimu panzira?"" Vakati, ""Kwakanga kusina chifeve pano.""" 
Genesis38:22 Akadzokera kuna Judha, akati, ""Handina kumuwana; navanhu voko va­kati, `Kwakanga kusina chifeve pano.' """ 
Genesis38:23 Ipapo Judha akati, ""Ngaazvitore hake, kuti tirege kunyadziswa; tarira ndatuma mbudzana iyi, iwe ukasamu­wana. """ 
Genesis38:24 Zvino mwedzi inenge mitatu ya­kati yapfuura, Judha akaudzwa, zvichi­nzi, ""Tamari, mukadzi womwanakomana wako, akaita upombwe; wava nemimba noupombwe hwake."" Judha akati, ""Uyai naye, apiswe.""" 
Genesis38:25 Zvino vakati vachiuya naye, aka­tuma shoko kuna baba vomurume wake, achiti, ""Ndine mimba nomurume ane nhumbi idzi, akati, `Docherekedzai kuti izvi ndezvani, zvinoti, chimhete norwo­nzi, netsvimbo.' """ 
Genesis38:26 Judha akazviziva, akati, ""Iye wakarurama kukunda ini, nokuti handina kumupa Shera, mwanako­mana wangu."" Haana kuzomuzivazve." 
Genesis38:27 Zvino nenguva yokubereka kwake vana vaviri vakanga vari mudumbu rake. 
Genesis38:28 Zvino akati achibereka, mumwe akabu­disa ruoko; ipapo mbuya vakatora rwodzi rutsvuku, vakarusungira paruoko rwake, vachiti, ""Uyu atanga kubuda.""" 
Genesis38:29 Zvino uyu akati adzosera ruoko rwake, munu­n'una wake akabuda; ivo vakati, ""Wazvi­pasanurira seiko?"" Naizvozvo akamutu­midza zita rinonzi Perezi." 
Genesis38:30 Pashure mukoma wake akabuda, akanga aine rwodzi rutsvuku paruoko rwake; zita rake rikatumidzwa Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Josefa akanga aburutsirwa Ijipiti; Potifari, gota raFarao, mu­kuru wavarindi, muIjipiti, akamutenga pamaoko avaIshimaeri, vakanga vamu­burutsira Ijipiti." 
Genesis39:2 Jehovha zvino akanga ana Josefa, akaramba achikwirira; aka­gara mumba matenzi wake muljipiti." 
Genesis39:3 Tenzi wake akaona kuti Jehovha anaye, uye kuti Jehovha akafambisa zvakanaka zvose zvaaiita namaoko ake." 
Genesis39:4 Josefa akawana nyasha kwaari, akamubatira; iye akamuita mutariri weimba yake; zvose zvaakanga anazvo akazviisa pa­maoko ake." 
Genesis39:5 Zvino kubva pakuitwa kwake mutariri weimba yake nowazvose zvaakanga anazvo, Jehovha akaropafa­dza imba yomuIjipiti nokuda kwaJosefa; kuropafadza kwaJehovha kwakanga kuri pamusoro pezvose zvaakanga anazvo mumba nokumunda." 
Genesis39:6 Waisiya zvose zvaakanga anazvo pamaoko aJosefa; iye anaye, haazairangarira chinhu, asi zvo­kudya zvake zvoga zvaaidya. Zvino Josefa akanga anomuviri waka­naka, akanakawo pachiso." 
Genesis39:7 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo mukadzi watenzi wake aka­tarira Josefa, akati, ""Vata neni.""" 
Genesis39:8 Asi iye akaramba, akati kumukadzi watenzi wake, ""Tarirai, nokuda kwangu tenzi wangu haarangariri zviri mumba, asi akaisa zvose zvaanazvo pamaoko angu;" 
Genesis39:9 hakuna mukuru kwandiri paimba ino; haana kundidzivisa chinhu, asi imwi moga; nokuti muri mukadzi wake; zvino ndi­ngaita seiko chinhu ichi chakaipa zvikuru nditadzire Mwari?""" 
Genesis39:10 Zvino akati ataura naJosefa mazuva ose, iye asingamuteereri kuti avate naye, kana kuva naye," 
Genesis39:11 ne­nguva iyoyo akapinda mumba kuti abate basa rake; makanga musina vamwe va­rume veimba imomo. 
Genesis39:12 Ipapo akamubata nguvo yake, akati, ""Vata neni;"" iye aka­siya nguvo yake muruoko rwake, akabuda panze." 
Genesis39:13 Zvino akati achiona kuti asiya nguvo yake muruoko rwake, atiza, aenda," 
Genesis39:14 akadana varume veimba yake, akataura navo akati, ""Tarirai, iye akauyisa muHe­bheru pakati pedu kuti atidadire; akapi­nda kwandiri, kuti avate neni, ndikaridza mhere neinzwi guru." 
Genesis39:15 Zvino akati achi­nzwa kuti ndinodanidzirisa ndichiridza mhere, akasiya nguvo yake neni, akatiza, akabuda panze.""" 
Genesis39:16 Akachengeta nguvo yake kusvikira tenzi wake achipinda mumba. 
Genesis39:17 Akataura kwaari mashoko iwayo akati, ""Muranda muHebheru wawakaisa pakati pedu, akauya kwandiri kuti andidadire." 
Genesis39:18 Ndi­kadanidzirisa, ndikaridza mhere, akasiya nguvo yake neni, akatizira panze.""" 
Genesis39:19 Tenzi wake akati achinzwa ma­shoko aakaudzwa nomukadzi wake, achiti, ""Ndizvo zvandaitirwa nomuranda wako,"" hasha dzake dzikamuka." 
Genesis39:20 Tenzi waJosefa akamutora, akamupinza muto­rongo, paisungwa vasungwa vamambo; akava mutirongo." 
Genesis39:21 Asi Jehovha akava naJosefa, akamuitira tsitsi, kuti anzwirwe ngoni nomutariri wetirongo." 
Genesis39:22 Mutariri wetirongo akapa mumaoko aJosefa vasu­ngwa vose vakanga vari mutirongo; iye akanga ari muiti wezvose zvaiitwamo. 
Genesis39:23 Mutariri wetirongo akanga asina hanya nechinhu chakanga chiri pamaoko ake, nokuti Jehovha akanga anaye; zvose zvaaiita, Jehovha akazviruramisa." 
Genesis40:1 Shure kwaizvozvo mudiri wama­mbo weIjipiti nomubiki wake va­katadzira tenzi wavo, mambo weljipiti." 
Genesis40:2 Farao akatsamwira kwazvo varanda vake vaviri, ivo mukuru wavadiri nomukuru wavabiki." 
Genesis40:3 Akavasunga kuti vachengetwe mumba momukuru wavarindi, mutirongo, pakanga pakasungwa Josefa." 
Genesis40:4 Mukuru wavarindi akaraira Josefa kuvachengeta; iye akavabatira, vakaita nguva vachiche­ngetwa." 
Genesis40:5 Zvino vose vaviri vakarota hope usiku humwe, mumwe nomumwe ku­rota kwake, kurota kumwe nokumwe kune dudziro yako, ivo mudiri nomu­biki vamambo weIjipiti, vakanga vaka­sungwa mutirongo." 
Genesis40:6 Zvino fume ma­ngwana Josefa akapinda kwavari, akavatarira, akaona kuti havafari." 
Genesis40:7 Aka­bvunza varanda vaFarao vakanga va­chengetwa pamwechete naye mumba matenzi wake, akati, ""Nhasi makasuwa neiko?""" 
Genesis40:8 Vakati kwaari, ""Tarota hope, asi hakuna munhu anogona kudzidudzira."" Josefa akati kwavari, ""Kududzira hakuzi kwaMwari here? Dondirondedzerai he­nyu.""" 
Genesis40:9 Zvino mukuru wavadiri akaronde­dzera kurota kwake kuna Josefa, akati, kwaari, ""Pakurota kwangu ndakaona muzambiringa pamberi pangu; pamuza­mbiringa pakanga pana matavi matatu;" 
Genesis40:10 ukaita sokutumbuka, ukabudisa ma­ruva; masumbu awo akabereka maza­mbiringa akaibva;" 
Genesis40:11 mukombe waFarao wakanga uri muruoko rwangu; zvino ndikatora mazambiringa, ndikaasvinira mumukombe waFarao, ndikaisa muko­mbe muruoko rwaFarao.""" 
Genesis40:12 Josefa akati kwaari, ""Kududzirwa kwadzo ndiko: Matavi matatu mazuva matatu;" 
Genesis40:13 mazuva matatu agere kupera Farao achasimudza musoro wako, noku­kudzosera kubasa rako; ipapo uchaisa mukombe waFarao muruoko rwakezve, sezvawaiita kare uchiri mudiri wake." 
Genesis40:14 Asi undirangarire hako kana woitirwa zvakanaka; undiitire ngoni, undireverere kuna Farao, kuti ndibudiswe paimba ino;" 
Genesis40:15 nokuti zvirokwazvo, ndakabiwa ku­nyika yavaHebheru; napano handina kuita chinhu chakafanira kuti vandiise mugomba iri.""" 
Genesis40:16 Zvino mukuru wavabiki akati aona kuti dudziro yakanaka, akati kuna Josefa, ""Neniwo ndakanga ndiri pakurota kwa­ngu, ndikaona tswanda nhatu dzechingwa chichena dzakanga dziri pamusoro wa­ngu;" 
Genesis40:17 mutswanda yapamusoro makanga mune zvokudya zvamarudzi ose zvakabi­kwa zvaFarao; shiri dzikazvidya mutswa­nda yaiva pamusoro wangu. 
Genesis40:18 Ipapo Josefa akapindura, akati, ""Kududzirwa kwadzo ndiko: Tswanda nhatu mazuva matatu;" 
Genesis40:19 mazuva matatu agere kupera, Farao achasimudza musoro wako akaubvisa pamusoro pako, akusu­ngirire pamuti; shiri dzichadya nyama yako dzichiibvisa kwauri.""" 
Genesis40:20 Zvino nomusi wetatu, musi woku­zvarwa kwaFarao, iye akaitira varanda vake vose mutambo. Akasimudza musoro womukuru wavadiri, nomusoro womu­kuru wavabiki pakati pavaranda vake," 
Genesis40:21 akadzosera mukuru wavadiri kubasa rake rokudira kwake, akapa mukombe waFarao muruoko rwaFarao;" 
Genesis40:22 asi akasu­ngirira mukuru wavabiki sezvavakanga vadudzirwa naJosefa. 
Genesis40:23 Asi mukuru wa­vadiri haana kurangarira Josefa, asi aka­mukangamwa." 
Genesis41:1 Makore maviri akati apera, Farao akarota hope; akazviona amire parwizi." 
Genesis41:2 Akaona mhou nomwe dzichikwira dzichibuda murwizi, dzakanga dzakanaka, dzakakora; dzichifura pakati penhokwe."
