Genesis41:3 Zvino akaona dzimwe mhou nomwe dzichikwira mashure madzo, dzichibva murwizi, dzakanga dzakaipa, dzakaonda; dzikamira nedzimwe mhou pamhenderekedzo yorwizi." 
Genesis41:4 Zvino mhou dzakaipa, dzakaonda, dzikadya mhou dziya nomwe dzakanaka, dzakakora. Farao akapepuka." 
Genesis41:5 Akavatazve, akarota rwechipiri; akaona hura nomwe dzezviyo dzakanga dzatumbuka padzinde rimwe, dzakanga dzakakora, dzakanaka," 
Genesis41:6 akaona hura nomwe, dzakanga dzakatetepa, dzakanga dzapiswa nemhepo yokumabvazuva, dzichibuda shure kwadzo." 
Genesis41:7 Zvino hura dzakatetepa dzikamedza hura nomwe dzakakora, dzakanga dzizere. Farao akapepuka, akaona kuti arota." 
Genesis41:8 Zvino fume mangwana mweya wake ukatambudzika, akatuma vanhu kundodana n'anga dzose dzeIjipiti navakachenjera vose voko; Fa­rao akavaudza kurota kwake; asi kwaka­nga kusina munhu waigona kuzvidudzira kuna Farao." 
Genesis41:9 Ipapo mukuru wavadiri akaudza Farao, akati, ""Nhasi ndinorangarira kuta­dza kwangu;" 
Genesis41:10 Farao akanga akatsa­mwira varanda vake, mukandisunga, ndi­kachengetwa mumba momukuru wavarindi, ini nomukuru wavabiki;" 
Genesis41:11 ti­karota hope nousiku humwe, ini naiye; tikarota mumwe nomumwe hope dzine dudziro yadzo." 
Genesis41:12 Zvino ipapo pakanga panesu jaya romuHebheru, muranda wo­mukuru wavarindi; tikamuudza, iye aka­tidudzira kurota kwedu; akadudzira mumwe nomumwe sezvaakarota." 
Genesis41:13 Zvikazoitika sezvaakatidudzira; ini ndakadzoserwa kubasa rangu, asi iye akasungirirwa.""" 
Genesis41:14 Ipapo Farao akatuma munhu ku­ndodana Josefa, akakurumidza kumubu­disa mugomba; vakaveura ndebvu dzake nokumufukidza dzimwe nguvo; akapinda kuna Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao akati kuna Josefa, ""Ndarota hope, asi hakuna munhu ano­gona kundidudzira idzo; zvino ndanzwa kuti iwe, kana wanzwa kurota, unogona kuzvidudzira. """ 
Genesis41:16 Josefa akapindura Farao, akati, ""Kwete, handizini; Mwari ndiye angapa Farao dudziro yorugare.""" 
Genesis41:17 Farao akarondedzera kuna Josefa akati, ""Pakurota kwangu ndakazviona ndimire pamhenderekedzo yorwizi;" 
Genesis41:18 ndikaona murwizi muchibuda mhou nomwe, dzakanga dzakakora, dzaka­naka; dzikafura pakati penhokwe;" 
Genesis41:19 ndi­kaonazve dzimwe mhou nomwe dzichi­kwira shure kwadzo dzine nzara, dzakaipa kwazvo, dzakaonda, handina kumboona dzakaipa dzakadai panyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:20 Zvino mhou idzodzo dzakaonda, dzakaipa, dzikadya, mhou dziya dzakakora dzokutanga;" 
Genesis41:21 dzakati dzadzidya, hadzina kutongozikamwa kuti dzadzidya; asi dzakanga dzakangoipa sapakutanga. Zvino ndikapepuka." 
Genesis41:22 Ndi­kaonazve pakurota kwangu hura nomwe dzakanga dzatumbuka padzinde rimwe, dzizere, dzakanaka;" 
Genesis41:23 ndikaonazve dzi­mwe hura nomwe, dzakaoma, dzakate­tepa, dzakapiswa nemhepo yokumabva­zuva, dzichibuda shure kwadzo." 
Genesis41:24 Hura idzodzo dzakatetepa dzikamedza hura nomwe dzakanaka; ndikaudza n'anga, asi kwakanga kusina munhu akagona kundidudzira izvozvo.""" 
Genesis41:25 Ipapo Josefa akati kuna Farao, ""Kurota kwaFarao ndokumwe; izvo Mwari zvaanoda kuita, ndizvo zvaakazi­visa Farao." 
Genesis41:26 Mhou nomwe dzakanaka makore manomwe, nehura nomwe dza­kanaka makore manomwewo; kurota ndokumwe." 
Genesis41:27 Mhou nomwe dzakaonda, dzakaipa, dzakakwira shure kwaidzodzo, makore manomwe, nehura nomwe dza­kaputa, dzakapiswa nemhepo yokuma­bvazuva, achava makore manomwe enzara." 
Genesis41:28 Ndiro shoko randataura kuna Farao; izvo Mwari zvaanoda kuita, ndi­zvo zvaakaratidza Farao." 
Genesis41:29 Tarirai, ku­nouya makore manomwe amaguta kwa­zvo panyika yose yeIjipiti;" 
Genesis41:30 shure kwaiwayo kuchatevera makore mano­mwe enzara; ipapo maguta ose achaka­nganikwa panyika yeIjipiti; nzara ichape­dza nyika; 
Genesis41:31 maguta haangazozikamwi munyika nokuda kwenzara iyoyo inozo­tevera, nokuti ichanyanya kwazvo." 
Genesis41:32 Ku­rota uku kwakapamhidzwa kuna Farao kaviri, nokuti izvozvo zvakatarwa naMwari, uye Mwari achakurumidza ku­zviita." 
Genesis41:33 Naizvozvo Farao ngaatsvake munhu akangwara, akachenjera, amuite mubati wenyika yeljipiti." 
Genesis41:34 Farao ngaaite izvozvo, ngaaise vatariri panyika yose, atore cheshanu chezviyo zvenyika yeIji­piti pamakore manomwe emaguta." 
Genesis41:35 Ngaaunganidze zvokudya zvose zva­makore iwayo akanaka anouya, avige zviyo nomurayiro waFarao, zvive zvoku­dya mumaguta; vazvichengete." 
Genesis41:36 Zvoku­dya izvozvo zvichachengeterwa nyika makore manomwe enzara, ichazovapo panyika yeIjipiti, kuti nyika irege kupa­radzwa nenzara.""" 
Genesis41:37 Chinhu ichi chaka­nga chakanaka kuna Farao navaranda vake vose. 
Genesis41:38 Farao akati kuvaranda vake, ""Ko tingawana mumwe munhu akafanana nouyu, anomweya waMwari maari here?""" 
Genesis41:39 Farao akati kuna Josefa, ""Mwari zvaakakuratidza izvozvo zvose, hapana munhu akangwara, akachenjera sewe;" 
Genesis41:40 ndiwe uchava mubati weimba yangu; vanhu vangu vose vacharairwa neshoko rako; asi pachigarao changu choushe ndipo pandichava mukuru kwauri. 
Genesis41:41 Zvino Farao akati kuna Josefa, ""Tarira, ndakuita mubati panyika yeIjipiti yose.""" 
Genesis41:42 Farao akabvisa chimhete chake pa­ruoko rwake, akachiisa paruoko rwaJo­sefa, akamufukidza nguvo dzomucheka wakanakisa, akamushongedza chiketani chendarama pamutsipa wake;" 
Genesis41:43 akamufa­mbisa nengoro yechipiri yaakanga anayo; vakadanidzira pamberi pake, vachiti, ""Pfugamai!"" Akamuita mubati wenyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:44 Farao akati kuna Josefa, ""Ndini Farao, asi kunze kwako hapana munhu achasimudza ruoko rwake kana rutsoka rwake panyika yose yeIjipiti.""" 
Genesis41:45 Farao akatumidza Josefa zita rinonzi Zafanatipanea; akamupa Asenati, muku­nda waPotifari, muprista weOni, kuti ave mukadzi wake. Josefa akabuda, akafamba nenyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:46 Zvino Josefa akanga ana makore makumi matatu, nguva yaakamira pamberi paFarao, ma­mbo weIjipiti. Josefa akabuda pamberi paFarao, aka­famba, akapota nenyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:47 Nyika ikabereka zvizhinji-zhinji, nama­kore manomwe amaguta." 
Genesis41:48 Akaungani­dza zvokudya zvose zvamakore mano­mwe, akanga aripo panyika yeljipiti, akaviga zvokudya mumaguta; zvokudya zveminda yakanga yakapoteredza guta rimwe nerimwe, akazvivigamo." 
Genesis41:49 Josefa akaviga zviyo, zvikaita sejecha regu­ngwa, zvizhinji-zhinji, kusvikira akarega kuzviverenga; nokuti zvakanga zvisinga­goni kuverengwa." 
Genesis41:50 Zvino gore renzara risati rasvika, Josefa akaberekerwa vanakomana vaviri, vaakaberekerwa naAsenati, mukunda waPotifari, muprista weOni." 
Genesis41:51 Josefa akatu­midza wedangwe zita rinonzi Manase, achiti, ""Nokuti Mwari akandikangamwisa kutambudzika kwangu kose neimba ya­baba vangu yose.""" 
Genesis41:52 Zita rowechipiri akaritumidza Efuremu, achiti, ""Nokuti Mwari akandiberekesa vana panyika yo­kutambudzika kwangu.""" 
Genesis41:53 Zvino makore manomwe amaguta, akanga avapo panyika yeIjipiti, akapera." 
Genesis41:54 Makore manomwe enzara akatanga ku­svika, sezvakataura Josefa; nzara ikavapo panyika dzose; asi panyika yose yeIjipiti pakanga pane zvokudya." 
Genesis41:55 Zvino vanhu vose veljipiti vofa nenzara, vakachemera zvokudya kuna Farao; Farao akati kuna vose veIjipiti, ""Endai kuna Josefa; itai zvaanotaura kwamuri.""" 
Genesis41:56 Nzara ikavapo panyika dzose; Josefa akazarura matura ose, akatengesera vaIjipiti; nokuti nzara yakanga yakanyanya panyika yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:57 Vanhu venyika dzose vakaenda Ijipiti kuna Josefa kuzotenga zviyo; nokuti nzara yakanga yakanyanya panyika dzose. 
Genesis42:1 Zvino Jakobho akaona kuti zviyo zvaiveko kuIjipiti, Jakobho akati kuvanakomana vake, ""Munotari­rana neiko?""" 
Genesis42:2 Akati, ""Ndanzwa kuti zviyo zviriko kuIjipiti; burukiraiko, mu­ndotitengerako, tipone, tirege kufa.""" 
Genesis42:3 Ipapo vakoma vaJosefa vane gumi va­kaburuka kundotenga zviyo Ijipiti. 
Genesis42:4 Asi Bhenjamini, munun'una waJosefa, Jakobho haana kumutuma navakoma vake; nokuti akati, ""Zvimwe angawirwa nenjodzi.""" 
Genesis42:5 Zvino vanakomana vaIsiraeri vakauya kuzotenga pakati pavamwe vaiuya, no­kuti nzara yakanga iripo panyika yeKe­nani." 
Genesis42:6 Zvino Josefa akanga ari mubati wenyika; ndiye aitengesera vanhu vose venyika; vakoma vaJosefa vakauya, va­kamupfugamira, zviso zvavo zvakatarira pasi." 
Genesis42:7 Josefa akaona vakoma vake, aka­vaziva, asi akaita saasingavazivi, aka­taura nehasha navo, akati kwavari, ""Ma­bvepiko?"" Ivo vakati, ""Tabva kunyika yeKenani kuzotenga zvokudya.""" 
Genesis42:8 Josefa akaziva vakoma vake, asi ivo havana kumuziva." 
Genesis42:9 Ipapo Josefa akara­ngarira kurota kwake kwaakadeya kurota pamusoro pavo, akati kwavari, ""Muri vashori, mauya kuzoona kuti nyika yaka­shama papi.""" 
Genesis42:10 Ivo vakati kwaari, ""Kwete, ishe wedu, asi varanda venyu vauya kuzote­nga zvokudya." 
Genesis42:11 Tiri vanakomana vomu­nhu mumwe chete tose; tiri vanhu vaka­tendeka, varanda venyu havazi vashori"";" 
Genesis42:12 iye akati kwavari, ""Kwete, mauya ku­zoona nyika kuti yakashama papi.""" 
Genesis42:13 Ivo vakati, ""Isu varanda venyu, tiri vanakomana vane gumi navaviri vomu­nhu mumwe chete panyika yeKenani; zvino worugotwe ari kuna baba vedu nhasi; mumwe haachisipo.""" 
Genesis42:14 Josefa akati kwavari, ""Ndizvo zva­ndanga ndichitaura kwamuri, ndichiti muri vashori;" 
Genesis42:15 hechi chinhu chamuchae­dzwa nacho. Noupenyu hwaFarao, hamu­ngabudi pano kana munun'una wenyu wo­rugotwe asina kuuya pano." 
Genesis42:16 Tumai mumwe wenyu kuti andotora munun'una wenyu, asi imwi muchafanira kugara ma­kasungwa, kuti mashoko enyu aedzwe, kana makatendeka; kana zvisina kudaro, zvirokwazvo, noupenyu hwaFarao muri vashori.""" 
Genesis42:17 Ipapo akavaisa pamwechete vose mutirongo, kuti vachengetwe ma­zuva matatu." 
Genesis42:18 Josefa akati kwavari nezuva retatu, ""Itai chinhu ichi, mupone; ini ndinotya Mwari;" 
Genesis42:19 kana muri vanhu vakatendeka, mumwe wavanun'una venyu ngaagare akasungwa mutirongo yenyu; asi imwi endai makatakura zviyo kundopa mhuri dzenyu dzine nzara." 
Genesis42:20 Mugouya nomunu­n'una wenyu worugotwe kwandiri; nai­zvozvo mashoko enyu achasimbiswa, murege kufa."" Vakaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis42:21 Va­kataurirana vachiti, ""Zvirokwazvo tine mhosva nokuda komunun'una wedu, no­kuti takaona kutambudzika komweya wake musi uya waakatinyengetera, tika­ramba kumuteerera; naizvozvo tawirwa nokutainbudzika.""" 
Genesis42:22 Ipapo Rubheni akapindura, akati, ""Handina kukuudzai here, ndichiti, `Re­gai kutadzira mwana,' mukaramba kundi­teerera? Naizvozvo tarirai, ropa rake rotsvakwa.""" 
Genesis42:23 Zvino vakanga vasingazivi kuti Josefa anonzwisisa, nokuti kwanga kuine mupinduri pakati pavo." 
Genesis42:24 Ipapo Josefa akabva kwavari, akachema; aka­dzokerazve kwavari, akataura navo, aka­tora Simioni pakati pavo, akamusunga vachizviona." 
Genesis42:25 Josefa akaraira kuti mi­dziyo yavo izadzwe nezviyo, uye kuti mumwe nomumwe adzoserwe mari yake muhomwe yake, uye kuti vapiwewo mbuva yokufamba nayo; vakaitirwa sai­zvozvo." 
Genesis42:26 Ipapo vakatakudza mbongoro dzavo zviyo zvavo, vakaenda." 
Genesis42:27 Zvino mumwe wavo akati achisunungura ho­mwe yake, kuti ape mbongoro yake zvokudya pavakavata usiku, akawana mari yake; heyo yakanga iri mumuromo wehomwe yake." 
Genesis42:28 Akati kuhama dzake, ""Mari yangu yadzoswa; heyi iri muho­mwe yangu; ipapo vakaora moyo, va­katarirana, vachibvunda, vakati, `Chi­nyiko ichi chataitirwa naMwari?' """ 
Genesis42:29 Vakasvika kuna baba vavo pa­nyika yeKenani, vakavaudza zvose zva­kanga zvavawira;" 
Genesis42:30 vakati, ""Murume uya, ishe wenyika iyoyo, akataura nesu nehasha, akati, tiri vashori venyika." 
Genesis42:31 Tikati kwaari, `Tiri vanhu vakate­ndeka, hatizi vashori;" 
Genesis42:32 tiri vanakomana vane gumi navaviri vomunhu mumwe chete, vanakomana vababa vedu; mu­mwe haachipo, worugotwe ari kuna baba vedu nhasi panyika yeKenani.' """ 
Genesis42:33 Zvino murume uya, ishe wenyika, akati kwatiri, ""Hechi chinhu chandicha­ziva nacho kuti muri vakatendeka, `Si­yai mumwe wenyu kwandiri, mutore zviyo, mundopa mhuri dzenyu dzine nzara, muende.'" 
Genesis42:34 Mugouyazve kwa­ndiri nomunun'una wenyu worugotwe; ipapo ndichaziva kuti hamuzi vashori, asi kuti muri vanhu vakatendeka; ipapo ndichakupai munun'una wenyu, mugote­nga panyika ino.""" 
Genesis42:35 Zvino vakati vachidurura homwe dzavo, tarira chiputu chemari yomumwe nomumwe chakanga chiri muhomwe yake; vakati vachiona zviputu zvemari yavo, vakatya ivo nababa vavo." 
Genesis42:36 Zvino Jakobho akati kwavari, ""Manditorera vana; Josefa haachipo, naSimioni haa­chipo, zvino moda kutora naBhenjami­niwo; zvinhu zvose izvi zvandiwira.""" 
Genesis42:37 Ipapo Rubheni akataura nababa vake, akati, ""Mungauraya henyu vanako­mana vangu vaviri, kana ndisingadzoki naye kwamuri; chimuisai henyu mu­maoko angu, ini ndichauya nayezve kwa­muri.""" 
Genesis42:38 Vakati, ""Mwanakomana wangu haangaburuki nemi, nokuti mukoma wake wakafa, iye asiyiwa ari oga; kana akawirwa nenjodzi parwendo rwamuno­famba, muchaburutsira vhudzi rangu jena kuhwiro nokuchema.""" 
Genesis43:1 Zvino nzara yakanga iri huru munyika iyoyo. 
Genesis43:2 Zvino vakati vapedza zviyo, zvavakanga vabva nazvo Ijipiti, baba vavo vakati kwavari, ""Dzo­kai, endaizve mutitengere zvokudya zvi­shoma.""" 
Genesis43:3 Judha akataura navo, akati, ""Mu­rume uya akatinyevera kwazvo, akati, `Hamungatongooni chiso changu, kana munun'una wenyu asati anemi.'" 
Genesis43:4 Kana mukatuma munun'una wedu nesu, tichabu­ruka, kundotenga zvokudya;" 
Genesis43:5 asi kana musingamutumi, hatingaburuki; nokuti murume uya akati kwatiri, `Hamungaoni chiso changu, kana munun'una wenyu asati anemi.' """ 
Genesis43:6 Isiraeri akati, ""Makandiitireiko zvakaipa zvakadai, zvamakaudza mu­rume uya kuti munomunun'una?""" 
Genesis43:7 Ivo vakati, ""Murume uya akatibvunzisisa pamusoro pedu, napamusoro pehama dzedu, akati, `Baba venyu vapenyu here? Mune munun'una here?' "" Tikamu­pindura namashoko aya; taigoziva here kuti achati, ""Burukai nomunun'una we­nyu?""" 
Genesis43:8 Zvino Judha akati kuna Isiraeri, baba vake, ""Tumai henyu mukomana neni, tisimuke, tiende, tirarame, tirege kufa, isu nemi, navana vedu." 
Genesis43:9 Ini ndi­chava rubatso rwake; mungamureva pa­ruoko rwangu; kana ndikasauya naye, ndikamuisa pamberi penyu, ini ndichava nemhosva kwamuri nokusingaperi." 
Genesis43:10 No­kuti dai tisina kunonoka, zvirokwazvo, tingadai tadzoka zvino rwechipiri.""" 
Genesis43:11 Ipapo Isiraeri, baba vavo, akati kwavari, ""Kana zvakadaro, itai chinhu ichi; torai michero yakanaka yenyika mu­midziyo yenyu, muburuke nechipo kumu­nhu uyo, chebhasami shomanana, nouchi ushomanana, nezvinonhuhwira, nemura, nemichero yomuti wepisitakio, namaama­nda;" 
Genesis43:12 mutore mari yakapamhidzwa kaviri mumaoko enyu, neiya mari yakanga ya­dzoserwa mumiromo yehomwe dzenyu, muende makaibata mumaoko enyu; zvi­mwe vakakanganisa." 
Genesis43:13 Nomunun'una wenyu mumutorei, musimuke, mudzokere kumu­rume uyo;" 
Genesis43:14 Mwari waMasimbaose ngaa­kupei nyasha pamberi pomurume uyo, akusunungurirei mumwe munun'una wenyu naBhenjaminiwo. Kana ndatorerwa vana vangu, ndatorerwa hangu.""" 
Genesis43:15 Zvino varume vakatora chipo ichocho, vakabata mumaoko avo mari yakapamhidzwa kaviri, naBhenjamini, vakasimuka, vakaburukira Ijipiti, vaka­ndomira pamberi paJosefa." 
Genesis43:16 Zvino Jo­sefa akati achiona Bhenjamini anavo, akati kumutariri weimba yake, ""Uya navarume mumba, ubaye, ugadzire; no­kuti varume ava vachadya neni masi­kati.""" 
Genesis43:17 Murume uyo akaita sezvaakau­dzwa naJosefa; murume uyo akaisa varume avo mumba maJosefa. 
Genesis43:18 Varume vakatya, zvavakaiswa mu­mba maJosefa, vakati, ""Tinoiswamo no­kuda kwemari yakadzoserwa muhomwe dzedu panguva yokutanga, kuti atsvake mhosva kwatiri, atibate, nokutiita va­randa vake, achitorawo mbongoro dzedu.""" 
Genesis43:19 Ipapo vakaswedera kumutariri weimba yaJosefa, vakataura naye pamu­suo weimba;" 
Genesis43:20 vakati, ""Haiwa, ishe wedu, zvirokwazvo panguva yokutanga takaburuka kuzotenga zvokudya;" 
Genesis43:21 tikati tichisvika patakavata usiku, tikasunu­ngura homwe dzedu, onei mari yomu­mwe nomumwe iri mumuromo weho­mwe yake, mari yedu yose sezvayakayerwa; zvino tadzoka nayo pa­maoko edu." 
Genesis43:22 Zvino taburuka tiine imwe marizve mumaoko edu kuti titenge zvo­kudya nayo; hatizivi kuti mari yedu yakaiswa muhomwe dzedu nani? 
Genesis43:23 Iye akati, ""Farai henyu, musatya; Mwari wenyu, Mwari wababa venyu, akakupai fuma muhomwe dzenyu; mari yenyu yakasvika kwandiri."" Akavabudi­sira Simioni." 
Genesis43:24 Murume uyo akaisa varume avo muimba yaJosefa, akavapa mvura, vaka­shambidza tsoka dzavo, akapawo mbo­ngoro dzavo zvokudya." 
Genesis43:25 Vakagadzira chipo kusvikira kuuya kwaJosefa masi­kati, nokuti vakanga vanzwa kuti vacha­dya zvokudya ipapo." 
Genesis43:26 Josefa akati asvika kumba, vakapinda mumba ne­chipo chakanga chiri mumaoko avo, vakakotamira pasi pamberi pake." 
Genesis43:27 Iye akavabvunza mufaro wavo, akati, ""Baba venyu vakafara here, uya mutana wamai­reva? Vachiri vapenyu here?""" 
Genesis43:28 Ivo vakati, ""Muranda wenyu, baba vedu, vakafara havo, vachiri vapenyu."" Vakakotama, vakanamata." 
Genesis43:29 Iye akasimudza meso ake, akaona Bhenjamini, munun'una wake, mwanako­mana wamai vake, akati, ""Ndiye here munun'una wenyu muduku worugotwe, wamakandiudza?"" Akati, ""Mwari ngaave nenyasha newe, mwana wangu.""" 
Genesis43:30 Zvino Josefa akakurumidza, nokuti moyo wake wakachema munun'una wake, akatsvaka paangachema; akapinda muimba yake yomukati, akachemapo." 
Genesis43:31 Akazoshambidza chiso chake, akabu­dazve, akazvidzora akati, ""Pakurai zvo­kudya.""" 
Genesis43:32 Vakamupakurira iye oga, naivo voga, navaIjipiti havana kutende­rwa kudya navaHebheru, nokuti zvino­nyangadza kuna vaIjipiti." 
Genesis43:33 Vakagara pamberi pake, wedangwe paudangwe hwake, nomuduku kuna vose pauduku hwake; varume vakatarirana, vakashami­swa." 
Genesis43:34 Akavagovera zvokudya zvakanga zviri pamberi pake, asi mugove waBhe­njamini wakaenzana nowavashanu vavo. Vakamwa, vakafara naye." 
Genesis44:1 Zvino akaraira mutariri weimba yake, achiti, ""Zadza homwe dzavarume nezvokudya, sezvavanogona ku­takura, uisewo mari yomumwe nomu­mwe pamuromo wehomwe yake." 
Genesis44:2 No­mukombe wangu, mukombe wesirivha, uuise pamuromo wehomwe yomuduku, pamwechete nemari yezviyo zvake."" Iye akaita sezvaakaudzwa naJosefa." 
Genesis44:3 Zvino fume mangwana koedza varume vaka­tenderwa kuenda, ivo nembongoro dzavo." 
Genesis44:4 Vakati vabuda muguta, vasati vaenda kure, Josefa akaudza mutariri wake, akati, ""Simuka, tevera varume; kana wavabata, uti kwavari, `Matsindiki­reiko zvamaitirwa zvakanaka?'" 
Genesis44:5 Ko ha­chizi chinhu chinomwira ishe wangu, chaanoshopera nacho here? Chinhu ichi chamaita chakaipa. """ 
Genesis44:6 Akandovabata, akataura mashoko iwayo kwavari." 
Genesis44:7 Vakati kwaari, ""Ko ishe wedu anotaurirei mashoko akadai? Haisva, varanda venyu havangaiti chinhu chakadai." 
Genesis44:8 Tarirai, mari yatakawana pa­miromo yehomwe dzedu takadzoka nayo kwamuri tichibva kunyika yeKe­nani; taigoba seiko sirivha kana ndarama mumba mashe wenyu?" 
Genesis44:9 Ani naani wa­varanda venyu anowanikwa anawo, ngaafe; nesu tichava vasungwa vashe wedu. """ 
Genesis44:10 Iye akati, ""Ndizvo hazvo, nga­zvive sezvamataura; iye anowanikwa aine mukombe, ndiye achava musungwa wangu; imwi vamwe hamungavi nemho­sva.""" 
Genesis44:11 Ipapo vakakurumidza mumwe nomumwe kuburutsira homwe yake pasi, mumwe nomumwe akasunungura homwe yake." 
Genesis44:12 Iye akatsvaka, akatanga kumu­kuru, akaguma kumuduku; mukombe ukawanikwa muhomwe yaBhenjamini." 
Genesis44:13 Ipapo vakabvarura nguvo dzavo, mu­mwe nomumwe akatakudza mbongoro yake, akadzokera kuguta." 
Genesis44:14 Judha navana vababa vake vaka­dzokera kuimba yaJosefa, iye achirimo, vakawira pasi pamberi pake." 
Genesis44:15 Zvino Josefa akati kwavari, ""Chinyiko ichi chamaita? Hamuzivi kuti munhu akaita seni anogona kushopera here?""" 
Genesis44:16 Judha akati, ""Ko tingadiniko kuna ishe wangu? Tingataureiko? Tingazvipe­mbedza sei? Mwari akawana kutadza kwavaranda venyu; tarirai tiri vasungwa vashe wedu, isu naiye akawanikwa aine mukombe.""" 
Genesis44:17 Iye akati, ""Haisva, handingaiti sai­zvozvo; munhu uyo akawanikwa ano mukombe muruoko, ndiye achava musu­ngwa wangu; kana muri imwi, endai henyu norugare kuna baba venyu.""" 
Genesis44:18 Ipapo Judha akaswedera kwaari, akati, ""Haiwa, ishe wangu, dotenderai henyu muranda wenyu kutaura shoko munzeve dzashe wangu, kutsamwa kwe­nyu kurege kumukira muranda wenyu, nokuti imwi makaenzana naFarao." 
Genesis44:19 Ishe wangu akabvunza varanda vake, achiti, `Muna baba here, kana munun'una?'" 
Genesis44:20 Isu tikati kuna ishe wedu, `Tina baba vava­mutana, vanomwana woutana hwavo, achiri muduku hake; mukoma wake akafa, iye akasara ari oga, mwana wamai vake, baba vake vanomuda.'" 
Genesis44:21 imwi mu­kati kuvaranda venyu, `Burukai naye kwandiri, ndimuone nameso angu.'" 
Genesis44:22 Isu tikati kuna ishe wedu, `Mukomana haa­ngasiyi baba vake, nokuti kana akasiya baba vake, baba vake vangafa.'" 
Genesis44:23 Zvino makati kuvaranda venyu, `Kana munu­n'una wenyu worugotwe asingaburuki nemi, hamungaonizve chiso changu.'" 
Genesis44:24 Zvino takati takwira kumuranda we­nyu, baba vedu, tikavaudza mashoko ashe wedu." 
Genesis44:25 Baba vedu vakati, `Endai­zve, mutitengere zvokudya zvishoma­nana.'" 
Genesis44:26 Isu tikati, `Hatingaburuki, kana munun'una wedu asingaburuki nesu; nokuti hatingaoni chiso chomurume uya, kana munun'una wedu asinesu.'" 
Genesis44:27 Muranda wenyu, baba vedu, vakati kwatiri, `Mu­noziva kuti mukadzi wangu akandibere­kera vanakomana vaviri;" 
Genesis44:28 mumwe aka­bva kwandiri,' ndikati, `Zvirokwazvo akabvamburwa; kubva musi iwoyo ha­ndina kuzomuonazve;" 
Genesis44:29 kana mukandi­torera nouyuwo, akawirwa nenjodzi, mu­chaburutsira vhudzi rangu jena kuhwiro nokuchema.'" 
Genesis44:30 Naizvozvo, kana zvino ndikandosvika kumuranda wenyu, baba vangu, tisinaiye mukomana, mweya wavo zvawakabatanidzwa nomweya wo­mukomana," 
Genesis44:31 vachati kana vachiona kuti mukomana asinesu, vachafa; naizvozvo varanda venyu vachaburutsira vhudzi jena romuranda wenyu, baba vedu, ku­hwiro nokuchema." 
Genesis44:32 Nokuti muranda wenyu akazviita rubatso rwomukomana kuna baba vangu, ndikati, `Kana ndikasauya naye kwamuri,ini ndichava ne­mhosva kuna baba vangu nokusinga­peri.'" 
Genesis44:33 Naizvozvo zvino ndinokumbira kuti muranda wenyu agare hake ari musungwa washe wangu pachigaro chomukomana, asi mukomana akwire hake navana vababa vake." 
Genesis44:34 Nokuti ndinga­kwira seiko kuna baba vangu, ndisina mukomana? Ndirege hangu kuona njodzi ichawira baba vangu.""" 
Genesis45:1 Zvino Josefa haana kugona ku­zvidzora pamberi pavose vakanga vamire naye, akadana, achiti, ""Budisai vanhu vose vari pano neni."" Zvino kwa­kanga kusina munhu akamira naye Josefa achizvizivisa kuvana vababa vake." 
Genesis45:2 Aka­chema kwazvo, valjipiti naveimba yaFa­rao vakazvinzwawo." 
Genesis45:3 Ipapo Josefa akati kuvana vababa vake, ""Ndini Josefa! Baba vangu vachiri vapenyu Here?"" Vana va­baba vake vakasagona kumupindura, no­kuti vakanga vachitya pamberi pake." 
Genesis45:4 Josefa akati kuvana vababa vake, ""Do­swederai henyu kwandiri."" Zvino vaka­swedera. lye akati, ""Ndini Josefa, mwana wababa venyu wamakatengesa ndikaiswa Ijipiti." 
Genesis45:5 Zvino musazvidya moyo, kana kuzvitsamwira, zvamakanditengesera kuno; nokuti Mwari akandituma pamberi penyu, kuti ndichengete upenyu." 
Genesis45:6 Nokuti zvino ava makore maviri enzara panyika ino; mamwe makore mashanu achiko, avasingazorimi nokukohwa nawo." 
Genesis45:7 Mwari akandituma pamberi penyu kuti ndikuchengetei, muve navamwe vacha­sara panyika, ndikuraramisei kuti musu­nungurwe nokusunungurwa kukuru." 
Genesis45:8 Zvino hamuzimi makandituma pano, asi Mwari; iye akandiita baba kuna Farao nashe weimba yake yose, nomubati we­nyika yose yeljipiti." 
Genesis45:9 Kurumidzai, mu­kwire kuna baba vangu, mundoti kwavari, `Zvanzi naJosefa, mwanakomana wenyu, Mwari akandiita ishe weljipiti rose; buru­kirai kwandiri musanonoka;" 
Genesis45:10 mugare panyika yeGosheni, mugova pedo neni, imwi, navanakomana venyu, navana vavana venyu, namakwai enyu, nemombe dze­nyu, nezvose zvamunazvo;" 
Genesis45:11 ndichaku­chengetaipo, nokuti mamwe makore ma­shanu enzara achiripo, kuti murege kuzova varombo, imwi, naveimba yenyu, nezvose zvamunazvo.'" 
Genesis45:12 Tarirai meso enyu anoona, nameso omunun'una wangu Bhenjamini kuti muromo wangu unotaura kwamuri." 
Genesis45:13 Mundoudza baba vangu ku­kudzwa kwangu kose paljipiti, nezvose zvamaona; mukurumidze kuburutsira baba vangu kuno.""" 
Genesis45:14 Akawira pamutsipa waBhenja­mini, munun'una wake, akachema, naiye Bhenjamini akachema pamutsipa wake." 
Genesis45:15 Akatsvoda vakoma vake vose, aka­chema pamusoro pavo; shure kwaizvo­zvo vakoma vake vakataura naye." 
Genesis45:16 Zvino mukurumbira wazvo waka­nzwika mumba maFarao, zvichinzi, ""Vana vababa vaJosefa vasvika!"" Farao navaranda vake vakafara naizvozvo." 
Genesis45:17 Farao akati kuna Josefa, ""Iti kuvana vababa vako, `Itai chinhu ichi: Takudzai zvipfuwo zvenyu, mufambe, muende ku­nyika yeKenani;" 
Genesis45:18 mundotora baba ve­nyu navedzimba dzenyu muuye kwa­ndiri; ndichakupai zvinhu zvakaisvonaka zvenyika yeIjipiti, mudye zvakakora zve­nyika.'" 
Genesis45:19 Zvino chiitai sezvamarairwa; torerai vana venyu vaduku navakadzi venyu ngoro panyika yeIjipiti, mundotora baba venyu, muuye." 
Genesis45:20 Musafunga nhu­mbi dzenyu, nokuti zvakaisvonaka zve­nyika yose yeIjipiti ndezvenyu.""" 
Genesis45:21 Vanakomana vaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo. Josefa akavapa ngoro, sezvaa­karairwa naFarao, akavapa mbuva yoku­famba nayo." 
Genesis45:22 Akapa vose, mumwe no­mumwe nguvo dzakanaka; asi Bhenjamini akamupa mashekeri ana mazana matatu esirivha nenguvo dzakanaka shanu." 
Genesis45:23 Nababa vake akavatumira mbo­ngoro dzine gumi, dzakanga dzakatakura zvinhu zvakaisvonaka zveIjipiti, namaka­dzi embongoro ane gumi akanga akata­kura zviyo, nechingwa, nezvokudya zva­baba vake zvorwendo." 
Genesis45:24 Zvino akatendera vana vababa vake kuenda, vakabva; akati kwavari, ""Chenjerai, mu­satukana munzira.""" 
Genesis45:25 Ipapo vakabva Ijipiti, vakakwira, vakandosvika kunyika yeKenani kuna Jakobho, baba vavo." 
Genesis45:26 Vakavaudza, va­kati, ""Josefa achiri mupenyu; ndiye mu­bati wenyika yose yeIjipiti."" Ipapo moyo wavo wakati rukutu, nokuti ha­vana kutenda." 
Genesis45:27 Vakavaudza mashoko ose aJosefa; zvino vakati vaona ngoro dzakanga dza­tumwa naJosefa kuzovatakura, mweya waJakobho, baba vavo, ukaponazve;" 
Genesis45:28 Isiraeri akati, ""Zvaringana! Josefa, mwanakomana wangu achiri mupenyu; ndichaenda ndimuone ndisati ndafa. """ 
Genesis46:1 Zvino Isiraeri akabva nezvose zvaakanga anazvo, akasvika Bheerishebha, akabayira Mwari wababa vake Isaka zvibayiro." 
Genesis46:2 Mwari akataura naIsiraeri nezviratidzo usiku, akati, ""Jakobho! Jakobho! "" Iye akati, ""Ndiri pano hangu.""" 
Genesis46:3 Akati, ""Ndini Mwari, iye Mwari wababa vako; usatya hako kuburukira Ijipiti; nokuti ndichakuita rudzi rukuru ikoko;" 
Genesis46:4 ndichaburukira Ijipiti newe, ndigokudzosazve zvirokwazvo; Josefa uchaisa ruoko rwake pachiso chako.""" 
Genesis46:5 Jakobho akasimuka, akabva Bheeri­shebha; vanakomana vaIsiraeri vakata­kura Jakobho baba vavo, navana vavo vaduku, navakadzi vavo, nengoro dzaka­nga dzatumwa naFarao kuti dzivatakure." 
Genesis46:6 Vakatora mombe dzavo nenhumbi dzavo dzavakanga vawana munyika yeKenani, vakasvika Ijipiti, Jakobho nava­nakomana vake vose pamwechete naye;" 
Genesis46:7 vanakomana vake, navana vavanako­mana vake pamwechete naye, navakunda vake, navakunda vavanakomana vake, navose vorudzi rwake, vakaenda navo Ijipiti." 
Genesis46:8 Ndiwo mazita avana vaIsiraeri va­kasvika Ijipiti: Jakobho, navanakomana vake, vachiti: Rubheni, dangwe raJako­bho." 
Genesis46:9 Navanakomana vaRubheni: Ha­noki, naParu, naHezironi, Karami." 
Genesis46:10 Na­vanakomana vaSimioni: Jemueri, naJamini, naOhadhi, naJakini, naZohari, naShauri, waiva mwanakomana womu­kadzi weKenani." 
Genesis46:11 Navanakomana vaRe­vhi: Gerishoni, naKohati, naMerari." 
Genesis46:12 Navanakomana vaJudha: Eri, naOnani, naShera, naPerezi, naZera; asi Zera naOnani vakafira panyika yeKenani. Vanako­mana vaPerezi vaiva Hezironi, naHa­mori." 
Genesis46:13 Navanakomana vaIsakari: Tora, naPuwa, naJobho, naShimuroni." 
Genesis46:13 Navanakomana vaIsakari: Tora, naPuwa, naJobho, naShimuroni." 
Genesis46:14 Nava­nakomana vaZebhuroni: Seredhi, naEroni, naJareeri." 
Genesis46:15 Ndivo vanakomana vaRea, vaakaberekera Jakobho paPadhanaramu, nomukunda wake Dhina; vanakomana vake navakunda vake vose vaiva vanhu vana makumi matatu navatatu." 
Genesis46:16 Navanakomana vaGadhi: Zifioni, naHagi, naShumi, naEzibhoni, naEri, naArodhi, naAreri." 
Genesis46:17 Navanakomana vaAsheri: Imuna, naIshivha, naIshivhi, naBheria, naSera, hanzvadzi yavo; nava­nakomana vaBhiriha vaiva Hebheri, naMakieri." 
Genesis46:18 Ndivo vanakomana vaZiripa, Rabhani waakapa Rea, mukunda wake; akaberekera Jakobho vanhu ava vane gumi navatanhatu." 
Genesis46:19 Vanakomana vaRakeri, mukadzi waJakobho, vaiva Josefa naBhenjamini." 
Genesis46:20 Josefa akaberekerwa Manase naEfu­remu panyika yeljipiti, ndivo vaakabere­kerwa naAsenati, mukunda waPotifari, muprista weOni." 
Genesis46:21 Navanakomana vaBhenjamini: Bhera, naBhekeri, naAshi­bheri naGera, naNaamani, naEhi, naRo­shi, naMupimi, naHupimi, naAdhi." 
Genesis46:22 Ndivo vanakomana vaRakeri, vakaberekerwa Jakobho; vose vaiva vane gumi navana." 
Genesis46:23 Navanakomana vaDhani: Hu­shimi. 
Genesis46:24 Navanakomana vaNafutari: Ja­zeeri, naGuni, naJezeri, naShiremi." 
Genesis46:25 Ndivo vanakomana vaBhiriha, Rabhani waakapa Rakeri, mukunda wake; ndivo vaakaberekera Jakobho; vose vaiva vano­mwe." 
Genesis46:26 Zvino vanhu vose vakauya naJa­kobho Ijipiti, vakanga vabuda pachiuno chake, vakadzi vavanakomana vaJakobho vasingaverengwi, vose vaiva vanhu vana makumi matanhatu navatanhatu." 
Genesis46:27 Vana­komana vaJosefa vaakanga aberekerwa Ijipiti vaiva vanhu vaviri; vose veimba yaJakobho vakauya Ijipiti, vaiva vanhu vana makumi manomwe." 
Genesis46:28 Akatuma Judha pamberi pake kuna Josefa kuti amuratidze nzira inoe­nda Gosheni. 
Genesis46:29 Ipapo Josefa akagadzira ngoro yake, akakwira Gosheni, kundosa­ngana naIsiraeri, baba vake; akazvizivisa kwavari, akawira pamutsipa wavo, aka­chema pamutsipa wavo nguva huru." 
Genesis46:30 Isiraeri akati kuna Josefa, ""Zvino nga­ndichifa hangu, nokuti ndaona chiso chako, kuti uchiri mupenyu.""" 
Genesis46:31 Zvino Josefa akati kuvana vababa vake naveimba yababa vake, ""Ini ndicha­kwira kundoudza Farao, ndichiti kwaari, `Vana vababa vangu, naveimba yababa vangu, vaigara kunyika yeKenani, va­svika kwandiri';" 
Genesis46:32 varume ava vafudzi, nokuti vaipfuwa zvipfuwo; vauya nama­kwai avo, nemombe dzavo, nezvose zva­vanazvo." 
Genesis46:33 Zvino kana modamwa naFa­rao, akati, `Basa renyu nderei?'" 
Genesis46:34 Muti, `Varanda venyu vaiva vapfuwi vezvipfuwo kubva paucheche hwedu kusvikira zvino, isu namadzibaba edu;' kuti mugare munyika yeGosheni, nokuti vafudzi vose vanonyangadza vaIjipiti.""" 
Genesis47:1 Zvino Josefa akaenda, akandoudza Farao, akati, ""Baba vangu navana vababa vangu vasvika, vachibva kunyika yeKenani, vane makwai avo, nemombe dzavo, nezvose zvavanazvo; zvino, tarirai vari munyika yeGosheni.""" 
Genesis47:2 Akatora varume vashanu kuvana vababa vake, akavaisa pamberi paFarao." 
Genesis47:3 Farao akati kuvakoma vake, ""Basa renyu nde­reiko?"" Vakati kuna Farao, ""Varanda venyu vafudzi, isu namadzibaba edu tose.""" 
Genesis47:4 Vakati kuna Farao, ""Tauya kuzogara tiri vatorwa munyika ino; nokuti hakuna mafuro amakwai avaranda venyu, nokuti kune nzara kunyika yeKenani; zvino tinokumbira kuti varanda venyu vagare munyika yeGosheni.""" 
Genesis47:5 Ipapo Farao aka­taura naJosefa, akati, ""Baba vako navana vababa vako vauya kwauri;" 
Genesis47:6 nyika yeIji­piti iri pamberi pako; baba vako navana vababa vako ngavagare panzvimbo ya­kaisvonaka panyika ino, ngavagare pa­nyika yeGosheni; kana uchiziva kuti pakati pavo pana varume vakangwara, uvaite vatariri vemombe dzangu.""" 
Genesis47:7 Josefa akapinda naJakobho, baba vake, akavaisa pamberi paFarao; Jakobho akaropafadza Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Farao akati kuna Jakobho, ""Manganiko mazuva amakore oupenyu hwenyu?""" 
Genesis47:9 Jakobho akati kuna Farao, ""Mazuva amakore outorwa hwangu makore ane zana namakumi matatu; mazuva amakore oupenyu hwangu akanga ari mashoma hawo, akaipa, haana kusvikira pamazuva amakore oupenyu hwamadzibaba angu pamazuva outorwa hwavo.""" 
Genesis47:10 Jakobho akaropafadza Farao, akabuda pamberi paFarao." 
Genesis47:11 Zvino Josefa akapa baba vake navana vababa vake pokugara, akavapa nzvimbo panyika yeIjipiti, kuti ive yavo, pakaisvonaka panyika iyo, panyika yeRa­mesesi, sezvaakarairwa naFarao." 
Genesis47:12 Josefa akachengeta baba vake, navana vababa vake, navose veimba yababa vake, aka­vapa zvokudya achiverenga navana va­vowo." 
Genesis47:13 Zvino pakanga pasina zvokudya panyika yose, nokuti nzara yakanga iri huru, nyika yeIjipiti nenyika yeKenani dzikaziya nenzara." 
Genesis47:14 Josefa akaunganidza mari yose yakanga iri panyika yeIjipiti, napanyika yeKenani, yavakatenga zviyo nayo, Josefa akaisa mari iyo mumba maFarao." 
Genesis47:15 Mari yose yakati yapera mu­nyika yeljipiti, napanyika yeKenani, vaIjipiti vose vakauya kuna Josefa, vakati, ""Tipei zvokudya, nokuti tingafa seiko pamberi penyu? Nokuti mari yapera.""" 
Genesis47:16 Josefa akati, ""Uyai nemombe dze­nyu, ndikupei zvokudya pamusoro pezvi­pfuwo zvenyu, kana mari yapera.""" 
Genesis47:17 Zvino vakauya kuna Josefa nezvipfuwo zvavo; Josefa akavapa zvokudya, vachi­tsinhanha namabhiza, namakwai, nemo­mbe, nembongoro; akavararamisa nezvo­kudya, vachitsinhanha nezvipfuwo zvavo zvose gore iroro." 
Genesis47:18 Gore iroro rakati rapera, vakauya kwaari negore rechipiri, vakati kwaari, ""Hatingavanziri ishe wedu kuti mari yedu yose yapera, mapoka ezvipfuwo ava ashe wedu; hakuchina chakasara pamberi pashe wedu, asi miviri yedu neminda yedu;" 
Genesis47:19 zvino tingafa seiko pamberi pe­nyu, isu nenyika yedu? Titengei henyu, isu nenyika yedu, tive varanda vaFarao; tipeiwo mbeu tirarame tirege kufa, nenyika irege kushanduka iite sango.'" 
Genesis47:20 Zvino Josefa akatengera Farao nyika yose yeIjipiti, nokuti vaIjipiti vaka­tengesa mumwe nomumwe munda wake, nokuti nzara yakanga iri huru pamusoro pavo, nyika ikava yaFarao." 
Genesis47:21 Kana vari vanhu akavatamisa kumaguta, kubva ku­muganhu mumwe weIjipiti kusvikira kuno mumwe muganhu wayo." 
Genesis47:22 Asi nyika yavaprista yoga haana kuitenga, nokuti vaprista vakanga vaganhurirwa mugove wavo naFarao; vaidya mugove wavo wavaipiwa naFarao. Naizvozvo havana kutengesa nyika yavo:" 
Genesis47:23 Zvino Josefa akati kuvanhu, ""Tarirai, ndakate­ngera Farao imwi nenyika yenyu nhasi, hedzi mbeu, mudzvare panyika." 
Genesis47:24 Ne­nguva yokukohwa munofanira kupa Fa­rao cheshanu, zvina zvichava zvenyu, zvive mbeu dzeminda, nezvokudya zve­nyu, nezvavari mudzimba dzenyu, nezvo­kudya zvepwere dzenyu.""" 
Genesis47:25 Ivo vakati, ""Ndimwi makatiche­ngeta; ngatiwane hedu nyasha panashe wedu, tive varanda vaFarao.""" 
Genesis47:26 Josefa akatema mutemo panyika yeIjipiti, uripo nanhasi, kuti Farao apiwe cheshanu; asi nyika yavaprista yoga haina kuva yaFa­rao." 
Genesis47:27 Zvino vaIsiraeri vakagara panyika yeIjipiti, panyika yeGosheni, vakazviwa­nira fuma imomo, vakabereka vana, vakawanda kwazvo." 
Genesis47:28 Jakobho akagara panyika yeljipiti makore ane gumi namanomwe; naizvo­zvo mazuva aJakobho makore oupenyu hwake, akanga ari makore ane zana namakumi mana namanomwe." 
Genesis47:29 Zvino nguva yokufa kwaIsiraeri yakanga ya­swedera, iye akadana mwanakomana wake Josefa, akati kwaari, ""Kana nda­wana nyasha kwauri, chiisa hako ruoko rwako pasi pechidya changu, undiitire ngoni nechokwadi; rega hako kundiviga paIjipiti;" 
Genesis47:30 asi kana ndavata namadzibaba angu, undibvise paIjipiti, unondiviga mu­hwiro hwavo."" Iye akati, ""Ndichaita sezvamataura. """ 
Genesis47:31 Vakati, ""Ndipikire;"" iye akavapi­kira. Ipapo Isiraeri akakotamira pamu­soro wouvato hwake." 
Genesis48:1 Shure kwaizvozvo Josefa akaudzwa, zvichinzi, ""Tarira, baba vako vanorwara;"" iye akatora vanako­mana vake vaviri, Manase naEfuremu." 
Genesis48:2 Jakobho akaudzwa, zvichinzi, ""Tarirai, mwanakomana wenyu, Josefa, wauya kwamuri."" Isiraeri akazvisimbaradza, akagara pauvato." 
Genesis48:3 Zvino Jakobho akati kuna Josefa, ""Mwari Wamasimbaose akazviratidza paRuzi, panyika yeKenani, akandiropafadza," 
Genesis48:4 akati kwandiri, `Ta­rira, ndichakuberekesa, ndichakuwanza, ndichakuita ndudzi zhinji; ndichapa vana vako vanokutevera nyika ino, ive yavo nokusingaperi.'" 
Genesis48:5 Zvino vanakomana vako vaviri, vawakaberekerwa panyika yeIjipiti, ndi­sati ndasvika kwauri paljipiti, ndavangu; Efuremu naManase vachava vangu sa­vana Rubheni naSimiyoni." 
Genesis48:6 Asi vana vako, vawakabereka shure kwavo, va­chava vana vako, vachatumidzwa nezita ravakuru vavo panhaka yavo." 
Genesis48:7 Kana ndirini, pakubva kwangu paPadhani, nda­kafirwa naRakeri panyika yeKenani mu­nzira ndasvika pedo neEfurata, ndika­muvigapo panzira inoenda Efurata (rimwe zita ndiBheterehemu).""" 
Genesis48:8 Isiraeri akaona vanakomana vaJo­sefa, akati, ""Ndivananiko?""" 
Genesis48:9 Josefa akati kuna baba vake, ""Ndivo vanakomana vangu vandakapiwa pano naMwari."" Vakati, ""Douya navo kwandiri ndivaropafadze.""" 
Genesis48:10 Zvino meso aIsiraeri akanga oona madzerere noku­kwegura, akanga asisagoni kuona. Aka­vaswededza kwavari, Isiraeri akavatsvoda, akavambundikira." 
Genesis48:11 Isiraeri akati kuna Josefa, ""Handina kufunga kuti ndichaona chiso chakozve, zvino tarira, Mwari aka­ndionesa navana vakowo.""" 
Genesis48:12 Josefa aka­vabvisa pakati pamabvi avo akakotamira pasi nechiso chake. 
Genesis48:13 Josefa akavabata vari vaviri, Efu­remu norudyi rwake kuruboshwe rwaIsi­raeri, naManase noruboshwe rwake kuru­dyi rwaIsiraeri, akavaswededza pedo naye." 
Genesis48:14 lsiraeri akatambanudza ruoko rwake rworudyi, akaruisa pamusoro paEfuremu, aiva muduku, noruoko rwake rworuboshwe pamusoro waManase, aka­pesanisa maoko ake achizviziva, nokuti Manase akanga ari wedangwe." 
Genesis48:15 Akaropafadza Josefa, akati, ""Mwari uya, akafamba madzibaba angu pamberi pake, vana Abhurahamu naIsaka, Mwari akandifudza paupenyu hwangu hwose kusvikira zuva ranhasi;" 
Genesis48:16 mutumwa wakandidzikunura pane zvakaipa zvose, ngaaropafadze vanakomana ava; zita rangu ngaritumidzwe kwavari, namazita amadzibaba angu, Abhurahamu naIsaka, vawande kwazvo panyika.""" 
Genesis48:17 Zvino Josefa akati achiona kuti baba vake vaisa ruoko rwavo rworudyi pamusoro waEfuremu, hazvina kumufa­dza, akabata ruoko rwababa vake, kuti arubvise pamusoro waEfuremu, aruise pamusoro waManase." 
Genesis48:18 Josefa akati kuna baba vake, ""Regai kudaro, baba vangu, nokuti ndiye wedangwe, isai ruoko rwe­nyu pamusoro wake.""" 
Genesis48:19 Baba vake vakaramba, vakati, ""Ndinoziva, mwana wangu, ndinoziva; naiyewo achava rudzi, naiye achava mu­kuruwo, asi munun'una wake achava mu­kuru kwaari, vana vake vachava ndudzi zhinji.""" 
Genesis48:20 Akavaropafadza nomusi iwoyo, akati, ""Newe vaIsiraeri vacharopafadza, vachiti, `Mwari ngaakuite saEfuremu naManase.' "" Akaisa Efuremu pamberi paManase." 
Genesis48:21 Zvino Isiraeri akati kuna Josefa, ""Tarira, ndofa, asi Mwari achava nemi, achakudzoserai kunyika yamadzibaba enyu." 
Genesis48:22 Newe ndinokupa mugove mu­mwe kupfuura vamwe vana vababa vako, uya wandakatorera vaAmori nomunondo wangu nouta hwangu.""" 
Genesis49:1 Zvino Jakobho akadana vanakomana vake, akati, ""Unganai, ndi­kuudzei zvamuchaitirwa namazuva ano­tevera." 
Genesis49:2 Unganai, munzwe imwi vanakomana vaJakobho, Teererai Isiraeri, baba venyu." 
Genesis49:3 Rubheni, iwe uri dangwe rangu, simba rangu, nokutanga kwesimba rangu; Ukuru hwokukudzwa, noukuru hwesimba;" 
Genesis49:4 Unotutuma semvura, haungavi noukuru; Nokuti wakakwira kuuvato hwababa vako, Ukahusvibisa; wakakwira kumubhedha wangu." 
Genesis49:5 Simiyoni naRevhi vana vamai vamwe; Minondo yavo inhumbi dzokurwa nesimba. 
Genesis49:6 Mweya wangu, rega kupinda pakurangana kwavo. Kukudzwa kwangu, rega kusanganiswa neungano dzavo; Nokuti pakutsamwa kwavo vakauraya vanhu, Nokuda kwavo vakagura marunda emombe." 
Genesis49:7 Kutsamwa kwavo ngakutukwe, nokuti kwakanga kuri kukuru; Nehasha dzavo, nokuti dzakanga dzakaipa; Ndichavaparadzanisa pakati paJakobho, nokuvaparadzira pakati paIsiraeri." 
Genesis49:8 Iwe Judha, ucharumbidzwa nehama dzako; Ruoko rwako ruchava pamitsipa yavavengi vako, Vana vababa vako vachakotamira pamberi pako." 
Genesis49:9 Judha mwana weshumba; Iwe mwanakomana wangu, wakwira uchibva pane zvakaurawa; Wakakotama, wakanyanga seshumba, Seshumbakadzi; ndianiko achamumutsa?" 
Genesis49:10 Tsvimbo youshe haingabvi kuna Judha, Kana mudonzvo, womubati pakati petsoka dzake, Kusvikira Shiro auya; Ndudzi dzose dzavanhu dzichamuerera iye." 
Genesis49:11 Unosungira mbongoro yake pamuzambiringa, Nomwana wembongoro yake pamuzambiringa wakaisvonaka; Wakasuka nguvo dzake newaini, Nezvokufuka zvake muropa ramazambiringa." 
Genesis49:12 Meso ake achatsvuka newaini, Meno ake achachena nomukaka." 
Genesis49:13 Zebhuroni uchagara pamhenderekedzo dzegungwa; iye achava mhenderekedzo panopinda zvikepe; Muganhu wake uchasvika paSidhoni. 
Genesis49:14 Isakari imbongoro ine simba, Inovata pasi, pakati pamatanga amakwai;" 
Genesis49:15 Akaona zororo kuti rakanaka, Nenyika kuti inofadza, Akarerekera fudzi rake kuti atakure, akava mubatiri wechibharo." 
Genesis49:16 Dhani achatonga mhaka dzavanhu vake, Sorumwe rwamarudzi alsiraeri." 
Genesis49:17 Dhani achava senyoka munzira, Semvumbi mugwara, Inoruma zvitsitsinho zvebhiza; Kuti mutasvi waro awire pasi neshure." 
Genesis49:18 Ndakamirira ruponeso rwenyu imwi Jehovha. 
Genesis49:19 Gadhi achavambwa nehondo, Asi iye achavavamba pazvitsitsinho zvavo." 
Genesis49:20 Asheri achava nezvokudya zvakakora; Iye achauya nezvinonaka zvinofanira madzishe. 
Genesis49:21 Nafutari isheche yemhembwe yakasununguka, Anotaura mashoko akanaka." 
Genesis49:22 Josefa idavi rinobereka, Idavi rinobereka patsime; matavi ake anodarika madziro." 
Genesis49:23 Vapfuri nouta vakamutambudza kwazvo, Vakamupfura, vakamuvenga;" 
Genesis49:24 asi uta hwake hwakaramba hune simba, Maoko ezvanza zvake akasimbiswa Namaoko oWamasimbaose waJakobho, (Ndipo panobva Mufudzi, neBwe raIsiraeri)," 
Genesis49:25 Mwari wababa vako achakubatsira; Wamasimbaose, achakuropafadza, Neropafadzo dzinobva kudenga kumusoro, Ropafadzo dzinobva pamvura yakadzika iri pasi, Ropafadzo dzamazamu nedzechizvaro." 
Genesis49:26 Ropafadzo dzababa vako Dzinopfuura ropafadzo dzamateteguru angu, kusvikira kumugumo wamakomo asingaperi; dzichagara pamusoro waJosefa, Pamusoro waiye akanga ari muchinda pakati pehama dzake." 
Genesis49:27 Bhenjamini ibere rinoparadza; Mangwanani achadya chakaurawa, Madeko achagovera zvaakapamba.""" 
Genesis49:28 Ava vose ndiwo marudzi ane gumi namaviri alsiraeri; ndizvo zvakataura baba vavo kwavari, akavaropafadza; va­karopafadza mumwe nomumwe nokuro­pafadzwa kwake." 
Genesis49:29 Akavaraira, akati kwavari, ""Ini ndobva ndosanganiswa na­vanhu vangu; mundondiviga kuna madzi­baba angu, mubako riri mumunda waEfuroni, muHeti," 
Genesis49:30 bako riri mumunda weMakapera, pakatarisana neMamure, panyika yeKenani, riya rakatengwa naAbhurahamu pamwechete nomunda kuna Efuroni, muHeti, kuti zvive zvake, ive nzvimbo yake yokuviga;" 
Genesis49:31 ndipo pavaka­viga Abhurahamu naSara, mukadzi wake; ndipo pavakaviga Isaka naRabheka, mu­kadzi wake; ndipo pandakaviga Rea;" 
Genesis49:32 munda uya nebako riri mukati mawo, zvakatengwa kuvana vaHeti.""" 
Genesis49:33 Zvino Jakobho akati apedza kuraira vanako­mana vake, akadzosera tsoka dzake pau­vato, mweya wake ukabuda, akasangani­swa navanhu vake" 
Genesis50:1 Zvino Josefa akawira pamusoro pechiso chababa vake, akachema pamusoro pake, akamutsvoda." 
Genesis50:2 Josefa akaraira varanda vake dzakanga dziri n'anga, kuti vasasike baba vake, n'anga dzikasasika Isiraeri." 
Genesis50:3 Vakapedza mazuva makumi mana naye, nokuti ndiwo aiva mazuva okusasika; navaljipiti vakamu­chema mazuva makumi manomwe." 
Genesis50:4 Zvino mazuva okuchema akati apera, Josefa akataura naveimba yaFarao, akati, ""Zvino kana ndawana nyasha kwa­muri, dorevai munzeve dzaFarao, muti," 
Genesis50:5 `Baba vangu vakandipikisa, vachiti tari­rai, ndofa, muhwiro hwandakazvicherera munyika yeKenani, ndimo maunofanira kundivigamo.' Naizvozvo zvino dondite­nderai henyu kuti ndikwire, ndindoviga baba vangu, ndogodzoka.""" 
Genesis50:6 Farao akati, ""Kwira, undoviga baba vako, sezvavakakupikisa.""" 
Genesis50:7 Ipapo Josefa akakwira kundoviga baba vake, navaranda vose vaFarao va­kakwira naye, vakuru veimba yake, na­vakuru venyika yeIjipiti," 
Genesis50:8 naveimba yose yaJosefa, navana vababa vake, naveimba yababa vake; asi pwere dzavo dzoga, namakwai avo, nemombe dzavo, vaka­zvisiya panyika yeGosheni," 
Genesis50:9 ngoro nava­tasvi vamabhiza vakakwirawo naye, ri­kava boka guru-guru." 
Genesis50:10 Vakasvika paburiro raAtadhi, riri mhiri kwaJorodhani, vakamuchemapo nokuchema kukuru kwazvo; akachema baba vake mazuva manomwe." 
Genesis50:11 Zvino vanhu vaigara panyika yeKenani vakati vachiona kuchema ikoko paburiro raAtadhi, vakati, ""Kuchema uku kukuru ndokwavaIjipiti;"" naizvozvo nzvimbo iyoyo ikatumidzwa Abherimiziraimu, iri mhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Genesis50:12 Vanakomana vake vakamuitira sezvaakanga avaraira; 
Genesis50:13 nokuti vanakomana vake vakando­muisa kunyika yeKenani, vakamuviga mubako romunda weMakapera, riya ra­katengwa naAbhurahamu, pamwechete nomunda kuna Efuroni muHeti, pakata­risana neMamure, kuti zvive zvake, ive nzvimbo yake yokuviga." 
Genesis50:14 Zvino Josefa akati aviga baba vake, akadzokera Ijipiti, iye navakoma vake, navose vakanga vakwira naye ku­ndoviga baba vake." 
Genesis50:15 Zvino vakoma vaJosefa vakati vachiona kuti baba vavo vafa, vakati, ""Zvimwe Josefa achative­nga, nokutitsiva kwazvo zvakaipa zvose zvatakamuitira.""" 
Genesis50:16 Naizvozvo vakatuma shoko kuna Josefa, vachiti, ""Baba venyu vakaraira, vasati vafa, vachiti," 
Genesis50:17 `Taurai naJosefa,' muti, `Zvino dokangamwirai henyu kutadza kwavakoma venyu; ne­zvivi zvavo, nokuti vakakuitirai zva­kaipa; zvino dokangamwirai kutadza kwa­varanda vaMwari wababa venyu.' "" Josefa akachema pakutaura kwavo naye." 
Genesis50:18 Vakuru vake vakaendawo, vaka­wira pasi pamberi pake, vakati, ""Tarirai, tiri varanda venyu.""" 
Genesis50:19 Josefa akati kwavari, ""Musatya, nokuti ini ndiri pachigaro chaMwari here?" 
Genesis50:20 Kana murimwi, makandifungira zvakaipa, asi Mwari akafunga kuti zvive zvakanaka, kuti zviitwe sezvinoitwa nhasi, kuti vanhu vazhinji vararamiswe." 
Genesis50:21 Naizvozvo zvino musatya, ndichaku­chengetai, nepwere dzenyu."" Akavanya­radza, akataura navo nomoyo waka­naka." 
Genesis50:22 Josefa akagara Ijipiti, iye navei­mba yababa vake; Josefa akagara makore ane zana negumi." 
Genesis50:23 Josefa akaona vana vaEfuremu vorudzi rwechitatu, navana vaMakiri, mwanakomana waManase, va­kaberekerwa pamabvi aJosefa." 
Genesis50:24 Josefa akati kuhama dzake, ""Ndofa, asi Mwari achakumutsai zvirokwazvo, nokukubudi­sai panyika ino, muende kunyika yaaka­pikira Abhurahamu naIsaka, naJakobho.""" 
Genesis50:25 Josefa akapikisa vana vaIsiraeri, akati, ""Mwari achakumutsai zvirokwazvo, nemwi mutakure mapfupa angu abve pano.""" 
Genesis50:26 Ipapo Josefa akafa, ava namakore ane zana negumi; vakamusasika, akaiswa mubhokisi paIjipiti." 
Exodus1:1 Ndiwo mazita avana valsiraeri vakanga vaenda Ijipiti: mumwe nomumwe akaenda naJakobho ana veimba yake: 
Exodus1:2 Rubheni, naSimioni, naRevhi, naJudha," 
Exodus1:3 naIsakari, naZebhuruni, naBhenjamini," 
Exodus1:4 naDhani, naNafutari, naGadhi, naAsheri." 
Exodus1:5 Zvino vanhu vose vakanga vabva muchiuno chaJakobho vakanga vari vanhu vana makumi manomwe; asi Josefa akanga atova Ijipiti. 
Exodus1:6 Zvino Josefa akafa, navana vababa vake vose, navose vakanga vane zero navo." 
Exodus1:7 Vana vaIsiraeri vakaberekana, vakawanda kwazvo, vakava nesimba guru-guru; nyika yakanga izere navo." 
Exodus1:8 Zvino paIjipititi pakamuka mumwe mambo mutsva, akanga asina kuziva Josefa." 
Exodus1:9 Iye akati kuvanhu vake, ""Tarirai, vanhu ava, vana vaIsiraeri, vanotipfuura isu pakuwanda nesimba;" 
Exodus1:10 uyai, ngativafungire zano, varege kuwandisa, kuti kana kurwa kukamuka, ivo vangabatsirana navavengi vedu, vakarwa nesu, vakabva panyika ino.""" 
Exodus1:11 Naizvozvo vakagadza pamusoro pavo vatariri vebasa, kuti vavanetse nemirimo yavo. Vakavakira Farao maguta ana matura, Pitomi naRamesesi." 
Exodus1:12 Asi vachiramba vachivanetsa, ivo vakaramba vachiwanda kwazvo, vachingopararira. Vakaora moyo nokuda kwavana vaIsiraeri." 
Exodus1:13 VaIjipiti vakavabatisa zvinorema; 
Exodus1:14 vakanetsa upenyu hwavo nebasa rinorema pamatope nezvitina, vachivabatisa zvinorema." 
Exodus1:15 Zvino mambo weIjipiti akaudza madzimbuya avaHebheru, vainzi mumwe Shifura, mumwe Pua;" 
Exodus1:16 akati, ""Kana muchibatsira vakadzi vavaHebheru pabasa ramadzimbuya, muchivaona pakupona, kana ari mwanakomana mumuuraye kana ari mwanasikana, ngaararame hake.""" 
Exodus1:17 Asi madzimbuya akanga achitya Mwari, akasaita sezvaakarairwa namambo asi vakarega vanakomana vari vapenyu havo." 
Exodus1:18 Mambo weIjipiti akadana madzimbuya, akati kwavari, ""Makaitireiko izvozvo, mukarega vanakomana vari vapenyu?""" 
Exodus1:19 Madzimbuya akati kuna Farao, ""Nokuti vakadzi vavaHebheru havana kufanana navakadzi vavaIjipiti, nokuti vane simba; mbuya vasati vasvika kwavari, vatopona havo.""" 
Exodus1:20 Naizvozvo Mwari akaitira madzimbuya zvakanaka, vanhu vakawanda kwazvo, vakava nesimba kwazvo." 
Exodus1:21 Zvino madzimbuya zvaakanga achitya Mwari, iye akavapa mhuri." 
Exodus1:22 Farao akaraira vanhu vake vose, akati, ""Vanakomana vose vanozoberekwa, muvakandire murwizi, asi vasikana vose muvarege vari vapenyu havo.""" 
Exodus2:1 Zvino mumwe murume weimba yavaRevhi akawana mukunda wavaRevhi. 
Exodus2:2 Mukadzi akava nemimba, akabereka mwanakomana; zvino akati achiona kuti mwana akanaka, akamuvanza mwedzi mitatu." 
Exodus2:3 Akati asisagoni kumuvanza, akamutorera tswanda yenhokwe, akainamira nebhitumini nenamo, akaisa mwana mukati mayo, akaigadzika pakati petsanga pamhenderekedzo dzorwizi." 
Exodus2:4 Hanzvadzi yake ikandomira kure zvishoma, kuti azive zvichaitwa naye." 
Exodus2:5 Zvino mukunda waFarao akaburuka kundoshamba murwizi, vasikana vake vakafamba-famba pamhenderekedzo dzorwizi; iye akaona tswanda pakati petsanga, ndokutuma musikana wake kundoitora." 
Exodus2:6 Akaizarura, akona mwana, mwana wechikomana, onei anochema. Akamunzwira ngoni, akati, ""Ndomumwe wavana vavaHebheru.""" 
Exodus2:7 Ipapo hanzvadzi yake yakati kumukunda waFarao, ""Ko handingaendi ndikakudanirai mumwisi kuvakadzi vavaHebheru, kuti akumwisirei mwana here?""" 
Exodus2:8 Mukunda waFarao akati kwaari, ""Enda."" Musikana akaenda, akandodana mai vomwana." 
Exodus2:9 Mukunda waFarao akati kwavari, ""Tora mwana uyu, undimwisire ndigokupa mubairo wako."" Mukadzi akatora mwana, akandomuyamwisa." 
Exodus2:10 Mwana akakura, akandomuisa kumukunda waFarao, akava mwanakomana wake, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Mozisi, akati, ""Nokuti,' ndamunyukura mumvura.""" 
Exodus2:11 Zvino namazuva iwayo Mozisi akura, akaenda kundoona hama dzake, akandotarira mirimo yavo; akaona muIjipiti achirova muHebheru, mumwe wehama dzake." 
Exodus2:12 Akaringa-ringa, zvino achiona kuti hapana munhu aripo, akauraya muIjipiti, akamuviga mujecha." 
Exodus2:13 Akabudazve nezuva rechipiri, akaona varume vaviri vaHebheru vachirwa; akati kuna iye waiva nemhosva, ""Unorovereiko munhu wokwako?""" 
Exodus2:14 Iye akati, ""Ndianiko akakuita ishe nomutongi wedu? Unoda kundiuraya ini sezvawakauraya uya muIjipiti kanhi?"" Mozisi akatya, akati, ""Zvirokwazvo, chinhu ichi chazikamwa.""" 
Exodus2:15 Zvino Farao akati anzwa chinhu icho, akatsvaka kuuraya Mozisi. Asi Mozisi akatiza pamberi paFarao, akandogara kunyika yeMidhiani, akagara pasi patsime." 
Exodus2:16 Zvino muprista weMidhiani akanga ana vakunda vanomwe; ivo vakauya kuzochera mvura, vakazadza zvimwiro, kuti vamwise makwai ababa vavo." 
Exodus2:17 Vafudzi vakauya, vakavadzingapo, asi Mozisi akasimuka, akavabatsira, akamwisa makwai avo." 
Exodus2:18 Zvino vakati vachisvika kuna Rueri, baba vavo, ivo vakati, ""Makurumidza kudzoka seiko nhasi?""" 
Exodus2:19 Vakati, ""MuIjipiti akatirwira pamaoko avafudzi, akaticherera mvura, akamwisa makwai.""" 
Exodus2:20 Akati kuvakunda vake, ""Zvino aripiko? Munhu uyu mamusiyirei? Mudanei, adye zvokudya.""" 
Exodus2:21 Mozisi akatenda kugara nomunhu uyo; akapa Mozisi mukunda wake Zipora. 
Exodus2:22 Akabereka mwanakomana, akamutumidza zita rinonzi Geshomi, nokuti akati, ""Ndakanga ndiri mutorwa munyika yavamwe.""" 
Exodus2:23 Zvino mazuva mazhinji akati apfuura, mambo weIjipiti akafa, vana vaIsiraeri vakagomera nokuda kouranda hwavo, vakadanidzira, kudanidzira kwavo kukasvika kuna Mwari nokuda kouranda." 
Exodus2:24 Mwari akanzwa kugomba kwavo, Mwari akarangarira sungano yake naAbhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho." 
Exodus2:25 Mwari akaona vana vaIsiraeri, Mwari akavarangarira." 
Exodus3:1 Zvino Mozisi akanga achifudza makwai aJeturo, mukarahwa wake, muprista weMidhiani; akaisa makwai mberi murenje, akasvika kugomo raMwari rinonzi Horebhi." 
Exodus3:2 Ipapo mutumwa waJehovha akazviratidza kwaari mumurazvo womoto pakati pegwenzi; akatarira, akaona gwenzi richipfuta nomoto, asi rakanga risingatsvi." 
Exodus3:3 Mozisi akati, ""Regai, nditsaukire ndione chishamiso icho chikuru, kuti gwenzi haritsvi neiko.""" 
Exodus3:4 Zvino Jehovha akati achiona kuti wotsaukira kuti aone, Mwari akadana ari mukati megwenzi, akati, ""Mozisi, Mozisi!"" Iye akati, ""Ndiri pano hangu.""" 
Exodus3:5 Akati, ""Usaswedera pano; bvisa shangu dzako patsoka dzako, nokuti paumire patsvene.""" 
Exodus3:6 Akatiwo, ""Ndini Mwari wababa vako, naMwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaka, naMwari waJakobho."" Mozisi akavanza chiso chake, nokuti akatya kutarira Mwari." 
Exodus3:7 Zvino Mwari akati, ""Zvirokwazvo, ndakaona kunetswa kwavanhu vangu vari muIjipiti ndikanzwa kudanidzira kwavo nokuda kwavatariri vavo vamabasa; nokuti ndinoziva kuchema kwavo;" 
Exodus3:8 ndaburuka kuti ndivarwire mumaoko avaljipiti nokuvabudisa munyika iyoyo, ndindovaisa kunyika yakanaka huru, kunyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi; uko kunogara vaKenani, navaHeti, navaAmori, navaPerezi, navaHivhi, navaJebhusi." 
Exodus3:9 Zvino tarira, kuchema kwavana vaIsiraeri kwasvika kwandiri, ndaona kutambudzwa kwavanotambudzwa nako navaIjipiti." 
Exodus3:10 Naizvozvo zvino uya ndikutume kuna Farao, kuti undobudisa vanhu vangu, vana vaIsiraeri muIjipiti.""" 
Exodus3:11 Zvino Mozisi akati kuna Mwari, ""Ini ndini aniko, kuti ndiende kuna Farao, ndibudise vana vaIsiraeri muIjipiti here?""" 
Exodus3:12 Akati, ""Zvirokwazvo ndichava newe; hechi chiratidzo chokuti ndakutuma: Kana mabudisa vanhu vangu muIjipiti, muchanamata Mwari pagomo rino.""" 
Exodus3:13 Ipapo Mozisi kuna Mwari, ""Tarirai, kana ndikasvika kuvana vaIsiraeri, ndikati kwavari, `Mwari wamadzibaba enyu akandituma kwamuri,' ivo vakati kwandiri, ‘Ko zita rake ndiani?' Ndichatiyi kwavari?""" 
Exodus3:14 Mwari akati kuna Mozisi, ""NDICHAVA IYE WANDICHAVA."" Akati, ""Unoti kuvana vaIsiraeri, `NDICHAVA ndiye akandituma kwamuri.' """ 
Exodus3:15 Mwari akatiwo kuna Mozisi, ""Unoti kuvana vaIsiraeri, Jehovha, Mwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari walsaka, naMwari waJakobho, akandituma kwamuri; ndiro zita rangu nokusingaperi, ndiro zita ravachandirangarira naro kusvikira kumarudzi ose." 
Exodus3:16 Enda, undounganidza vakuru vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu, Mwari waAbhurahamu, nowaIsaka, nowaJakobho, akazviratidza kwandiri,' akati, `Ndakakushanyirai zvirokwazvo, ndikaona izvo zvamakaitirwa Ijipiti;'" 
Exodus3:17 ndikati, `Ndichakubudisai pakunetswa kwenyu paIjipiti, ndimuise kunyika yavaKenani, neyavaHeti, neyavaAmori, neyavaPerezi, neyavaHivhi, neyavaJebhusi, kunyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi.'" 
Exodus3:18 Vachateerera inzwi rako; uende, iwe navakuru vaIsiraeri, kuna mambo weIjipiti, muti kwaari, `Jehovha, Mwari wavaHebheru, akasangana nesu; zvino titendere kuenda rwendo rwamazuva matatu murenje, tindobayira Jehovha, Mwari wedu.'" 
Exodus3:19 Ndinoziva kuti mambo weIjipiti haangakutendereyi kuenda, kwete, kunyange noruoko rune simba." 
Exodus3:20 Ndichatambanudza ruoko rwangu, ndirove Ijipiti nezvishamiso zvangu zvose, zvandichaitamo; pashure achakutenderai kuenda." 
Exodus3:21 Ndichapa vanhu ava nyasha pamberi pavaIjipiti, kuti kana muchizoenda, murege kuenda musina chinhu." 
Exodus3:22 Asi mukadzi mumwe nomumwe anofanira kukumbira kune waanogara naye, nokumutorwa anogara mumba make, zvishongo zvesirivha nozvendarama, nenguvo, kuti mufukidze vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu; munofanira kutorera vaIjipiti nhumbi dzavo.""" 
Exodus4:1 Zvino Mozisi akapindura akati, ""Asi tarirai, havanganditendi, kana kuteerera inzwi rangu, nokuti vachati, `Jehovha haana kuzviratidza kwauri.' """ 
Exodus4:2 Jehovha akati kwaari, ""Chiiko icho chiri muruoko rwako?"" Akati, ""Itsvimbo.""" 
Exodus4:3 Akati, ""Ikandire pasi."" Akaikandira pasi, ikashanduka kuva nyoka, Mozisi akaitiza." 
Exodus4:4 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tambanudza ruoko rwako, uibate parumhinda; (iye akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akaibata, ikashanduka kuva tsvimbo muruoko rwake);" 
Exodus4:5 kuti vatende kuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba avo, Mwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaka, naMwari waJakobho, akazviratidza kwauri.""" 
Exodus4:6 Jehovha akatiwo kwaari, ""Isa ruoko rwako muchipfuva chako."" Akaisa ruoko rwake muchipfuva chake; zvino akati achirubvisa, onei ruoko rwake rwava namaperembudzi rwati mbembe sechando." 
Exodus4:7 Akati, ""Isa ruoko rwako muchipfuva chakozve. (Iye akaisa ruoko rwake muchipfuva chakezve; zvino akati achirubvisa muchipfuva chake, onei rwashandukazve senyama yake.)" 
Exodus4:8 Zvino kana vachiramba kukutenda, kana kuteerera inzwi rechiratidzo chokutanga, vachatenda inzwi rechiratidzo chechipiri." 
Exodus4:9 Zvino kana vachiramba kutenda zviratidzo izvo zviviri, kana kutenda inzwi rako, uchere mvura yomurwizi, uidururire pakaoma, ipapo mvura yawachera ichashanduka ropa ipapo pakaoma.""" 
Exodus4:10 Zvino Mozisi akati kuna Jehovha, ""Haiwa, Jehovha, handizi munhu anogona kutaura zvakanaka, kunyange zuro, kana zuro riya, kana kubva panguva yamakataura nomuranda wenyu; nokuti ndiri munhu anomuromo usingagoni norurimi rusingagoni.""" 
Exodus4:11 Jehovha akati kwaari, ""Ndianiko akaita muromo womunhu, ndianiko anoita mbeveve kana matsi, kana anoona, kana bofu? Ko handizi Jehovha here?" 
Exodus4:12 Naizvozvo zvino chienda, ini ndichava muromo wako, ndikudzidzise zvaunofanira kutaura.""" 
Exodus4:13 Iye akati, ""Haiwa, Ishe, tumai henyu wamunoda kutuma naye.""" 
Exodus4:14 Zvino kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira Mozisi, akati, ""Ko Aroni, mukoma wako, muRevhi, haapo here? Ndinoziva kuti iye anogona kutaura kwazvo. Zvino tarira, wotobuda kusangana newe; kana achikuona achafara mumoyo make." 
Exodus4:15 Utaure naye, ugoisa mashoko mumuromo make; ini ndichava nomuromo wako, uye nomuromo wake, ndikudzidzisei zvamunofanira kuita." 
Exodus4:16 Iye achataura navanhu panzvimbo yako, agova muromo wako, iwe uchava saMwari kwaari." 
Exodus4:17 Zvino tora tsvimbo iyi muruoko rwako, ugoita zviratidzo nayo.""" 
Exodus4:18 Zvino Mozisi akaenda, akadzokera kuna Jeturo, mukarabwe wake, akati kwaari, ""Donditenderai henyu kuenda, ndidzokere kuhama dzangu Ijipiti, ndindoona kana vachiri vapenyu."" Jeturo akati kuna Mozisi, ""Enda hako norugare.""" 
Exodus4:19 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi paMidhiani, ""Enda, udzokere Ijipiti, nokuti vanhu vose vaitsvaka kukuuraya vakafa.""" 
Exodus4:20 Ipapo Mozisi akatora mukadzi wake navana vake vavakomana, akavatasvisa pambongoro, akadzokera kunyika yeIjipiti; Mozisi akatora tsvimbo yaMwari muruoko rwake." 
Exodus4:21 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Kana wodzokera Ijipiti, chenjera kuti uite pamberi paFarao zvishamiso zvose zvandaisa muruoko rwako; asi ndichaomesa moyo wake, kuti arege kutendera vanhu kuenda." 
Exodus4:22 Zvino undoti kuna Farao, `Zvanzi naJehovha, Isiraeri, mwanakomana wangu, idangwe rangu';" 
Exodus4:23 ndakati kwauri, `Tendera mwanakomana wangu kuenda andinamate'; iwe ukaramba kumutendera; zvino tarira ndichauraya mwanakomana wako wedangwe.""" 
Exodus4:24 Zvino vachiri panzira, pavakanga vavata, Jehovha akasangana naye, akatsvaka kumuuraya." 
Exodus4:25 Ipapo Zipora akatora ibwe rinopinza, akacheka rukanda rwapamberi rwomwanakomana wake, akarukanda patsoka dzake akati, ""Zvirokwazvo, uri chikomba cheropa kwandiri.""" 
Exodus4:26 Naizvozvo akamurega. Ipapo akati, ""Uri chikomba cheropa nokuda kokudzingiswa.""" 
Exodus4:27 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Aroni, ""Enda kurenje undosangana naMozisi."" Iye akaenda, akandosangana naye pagomo raMwari, akamutsvoda." 
Exodus4:28 Ipapo Mozisi akaudza Aroni mashoko ose aJehovha, aakanga amutuma nawo, nezviratidzo zvose zvaakanga amuraira." 
Exodus4:29 Mozisi naAroni vakaenda, vakaunganidza vakuru vose vavana valsiraeri." 
Exodus4:30 Aroni akataura mashoko ose akataurwa naJehovha kuna Mozisi, akaita zviratidzo pamberi pameso avanhu." 
Exodus4:31 Vanhu vakatenda; zvino vakati vanzwa kuti Jehovha washanyira vana vaIsiraeri, akaona kunetswa kwavo, vakakotamisa misoro yavo, vakanamata Jehovha." 
Exodus5:1 Shure kwaizvozvo Mozisi naAroni vakaenda, vakati kuna Farao, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, `Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda, kuti vandiitire mutambo murenje.' """ 
Exodus5:2 Farao akati, ""Jehovha ndiye aniko, kuti nditeerere inzwi rake, kuti nditendere vaIsiraeri kuenda? Handimuzivi iye Jehovha, neni handingatenderi vaIsiraeri kuenda.""" 
Exodus5:3 Vakati, ""Mwari wavaHebheru akasangana nesu; dotitenderai kuenda rwendo rwamazuva matatu murenje, tindobayira Jehovha Mwari wedu; kuti arege kutirova nedenda kana nomunondo.""" 
Exodus5:4 Ipapo mambo weIjipiti akati kwavari, ""imwi Mozisi naAroni, munotsausireiko vanhu pamabasa avo? Endai kumirimo yenyu.""" 
Exodus5:5 Farao akati, ""Tarirai, vanhu venyika ino vatova vazhinji, zvino imwi moda kuvazorodza pamirimo yavo.""" 
Exodus5:6 Nomusi iwoyo Farao akaraira varairi vamabasa avanhu, navatariri vavo, akati," 
Exodus5:7 Musaramba muchipa vanhu uswa hwokuita zvitina nahwo, sezvamakaita kusvikira zvino; ngavaende vandozviunganidzira uswa vega." 
Exodus5:8 Asi zvitina zvavakaita kusvikira zvino, muvatarire izvozvo; musazvitapudza, nokuti havana chavanobata, saka vanodana, vachiti, `Titenderei tindobayira Mwari wedu.'" 
Exodus5:9 Varume ngavawedzerwe basa rinorema, varemerwa naro; kuti varege kurangarira mashoko enhema.""" 
Exodus5:10 Ipapo varairi vamabasa avanhu navatariri vavo vakabuda, vakataura navanhu, vakati, ""Zvanzi naFarao, `Handichakupiyi uswa." 
Exodus5:11 Endai mega mundozvitorera uswa pamungauwana, nokuti basa renyu haritapudzwi.' """ 
Exodus5:12 Zvino vanhu vakapararira kunyika yose yeIjipiti kuzounganidza mashanga panzvimbo youswa. 
Exodus5:13 Varairi vamabasa vakavakurudzira, vachiti, ""Pedzai basa renyu, mabasa amaifanira kuita mazuva ose muchino uswa.""" 
Exodus5:14 Navatariri vavana vaIsiraeri, vakanga vaiswa pamusoro pavo navarairi vaFarao, vaisirohwa, zvichinzi makaregerei kupedza basa renyu razuro neranhasi muchiita zvitina sezvamakaita kusvikira zvino?'" 
Exodus5:15 Zvino vatariri vavana valsiraeri vakauya vachichema kuna Farao, vachiti, ""Munoitireiko kudaro navaranda venyu?" 
Exodus5:16 Varanda venyu havapiwi uswa, asi vanoti kwatiri, `Itai zvitina'; tarirai varanda venyu vanorohwa, asi mhaka iri kuvanhu venyu.""" 
Exodus5:17 Asi iye akati, ""Hamuna chamunobata, hamuna chamunobata, saka munoti, `Titenderei kundobayira Jehovha.'" 
Exodus5:18 Naizvozvo endai zvino, mubate, nokuti hamuchapiwi uswa, asi munofanira kupedza zvitina zvakatarwa.""" 
Exodus5:19 Zvino vatariri vavana valsiraeri vakaona kuti vari panjodzi, zvazvakanzi, ""Hamungatapudzi pazvitina zvenyu, zvamunofanira kuita mazuva ose.""" 
Exodus5:20 Vakasangana naMozisi naAroni, vakanga vamire panzira pakubuda kwavo pamberi paFarao;" 
Exodus5:21 vakati kwavari, ""Jehovha ngaakutarirei akutongei, nokuti matinyadzisa pamberi paFarao navaranda vake, mukaisa munondo muruoko rwavo wokutiuraya nawo.""" 
Exodus5:22 Ipapo Mozisi akadzokera kuna Jehovha, akati, ""Ishe, maitireiko vanhu ava zvakaipa? Manditumireiko?" 
Exodus5:23 Nokuti kubva panguva yandakaenda nayo kuna Farao kundotaura nezita renyu, iye akaitira vanhu ava zvakaipa; hamuna kutongorwira vanhu venyu.""" 
Exodus6:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Zvino muchaona zvandichaitira Farao, nokuti achavatendera kuenda noruoko rune simba, uchavadzinga munyika yake noruoko rune simba.""" 
Exodus6:2 Mwari akataurawo naMozisi, akati kwaari, ""Ndini JEHOVHA." 
Exodus6:3 Ndakazviratidza kuna Abhurahamu, nokunaIsaka, nokunaJakobho, ndiri Mwari Wamasimbaose, asi ndakanga ndisingazikamwi navo nezita rangu rinonzi JEHOVHA." 
Exodus6:4 Zvino ndakasimbisa sungano yangu navo kuti ndivape nyika yeKenani, nyika youtorwa hwavo, mavakanga vari vatorwa." 
Exodus6:5 Ndakanzwa kugomba kwavana vaIsiraeri vakasungwa navaIjipiti pauranda, ndikarangarira sungano yangu." 
Exodus6:6 Naizvozvo muti kuvana vaIsiraeri, `Ndini Jehovha, ini ndichakubudisai pamirimo yavaIjipiti, ndichakusunungurai pauranda hwenyu, ndichakudzikunurai noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, uye nokutonga kukuru.'" 
Exodus6:7 Ndichakutorai imwi kuti muve vanhu vangu, ini ndichava Mwari wenyu, iye anokubudisai pamirimo yaIjipiti." 
Exodus6:8 Ndichakuisai kunyika yandakasimudzira ruoko rwangu kuti ndiipe Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho, ndichakupai iyo ive nhaka yenyu; ndini Jehovha.""" 
Exodus6:9 Mozisi akataura saizvozvo kuvana vaIsiraeri, asi havana kuteerera Mozisi nokuda kweshungu dzomweya nedzouranda hwakanga huchirema." 
Exodus6:10 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati, """ 
Exodus6:11 Pinda, undotaura naFarao mambo weIjipiti, kuti atendere vana vaIsiraeri kubuda munyika yake.""" 
Exodus6:12 Mozisi akataura pamberi paJehovha, akati, ""Tarirai, vana vaIsiraeri havana kunditeerera; zvino Farao anganditeerera seiko, ini munhu ane miromo isina kudzingiswa?""" 
Exodus6:13 Ipapo Jehovha akataura naMozisi naAroni, akavatuma neshoko kuvana vaIsiraeri nokuna Farao, mambo weIjipiti, kuti vabudise vana vaIsiraeri munyika yeljipiti." 
Exodus6:14 Ndiyo misoro yedzimba dzamadzibaba avo: Vanakomana vaRubheni, dangwe raIsiraeri, vaiva Hanoki, naParu, naHezironi, naKarimi; ndivo vedzimba dzaRubheni." 
Exodus6:15 Vanakomana vaSimiyoni vaiva Jemueri, naJamini, naOhadhi, naJakini, naZohari, naShauri, mwanakomana womukadzi muKenani; ndivo vedzimba dzaSimiyoni." 
Exodus6:16 Ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaRevhi namarudzi avo: Gerishoni, naKohati, naMerari; makore oupenyu hwaRevhi aiva makore ane zana namakumi matanhatu namanomwe." 
Exodus6:17 Vanakomana vaGerishoni vaiva Ribhini, naShimei, namarudzi avo." 
Exodus6:18 Vanakomana vaKohati vaiva Amurami, nalzhari,.naHebhuroni, naUzieri; makore oupenyu hwaKohati aiva makore ane zana namakumi matatu namatatu." 
Exodus6:19 Vanakomana vaMerari vaiva Makiri, naMushi. Ndivo vedzimba dzavaRevhi pamarudzi avo." 
Exodus6:20 Amurami akawana Jokebhedhi, hanzvadzi yababa vake, iye akamuberekera Aroni naMozisi; makore oupenyu hwaAmurami aiva makore ane zana namakumi matatu namanomwe." 
Exodus6:21 Vanakomana vaIzhari vaiva Kora naNefegi, naZikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Vanakomana vaUzieri vaiva Mishaeri, naErizafani, naSitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Aroni akawana Erishebha, mukunda waAminadhabhu, hanzvadzi yaNashoni, iye akamuberekera Nadhabhi naAbhihu, naEreazari, naItamari." 
Exodus6:24 Vanakomana vaKora vaiva Asiri, naErikana, naAbhiasafi; ndivo vedzimba dzavaKora." 
Exodus6:25 Ereazari, mwanakomana waAroni, akawana mumwe wavakunda vaPutieri, iye akamuberekera Pinehasi. Ndiyo misoro yedzimba dzamadzibaba avaRevhi nemhuri dzavo." 
Exodus6:26 Ndivo vaya vanaAroni naMozisi vakanzi naJehovha, ""Budisai vana vaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti nehondo dzavo.""" 
Exodus6:27 Ndivo vakataura naFarao, mambo weIjipiti, kuti vabudise vana vaIsiraeri muIjipiti; ndivo vaya vanaMozisi naAroni." 
Exodus6:28 Nomusi iwoyo Jehovha akataura naMozisi munyika yeIjipiti," 
Exodus6:29 Jehovha akataura naMozisi, akati, ""Ndini Jehovha; udza Farao, mambo weIjipiti, zvinhuzvose zvandakakuudza.""" 
Exodus6:30 Ipapo Mozisi akati pamberi paJehovha, ""Tarirai, ndiri munhu ane miromo isina kudzingiswa, zvino Farao achanditeerera seiko?""" 
Exodus7:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tarira, ndakuita saMwari kuna Farao; Aroni, mukoma wako, achava muporofita wako." 
Exodus7:2 Taura zvose zvandinokuraira; Aroni, mukoma wako, achataura naFarao, kuti atendere vana vaIsiraeri, vabude munyika yake." 
Exodus7:3 Ini ndichaomesa moyo waFarao, ndichawanza zviratidzo zvangu nezvishamiso zvangu panyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus7:4 Asi Farao haangakuteerereyi; ipapo ndichaisa ruoko rwangu pamusoro ndikabudisa hondo dzangu, ivo vanhu vangu, vana vaIsiraeri, munyika yeIjipiti nokutonga kukuru." 
Exodus7:5 VaIjipiti vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichitambanudza ruoko rwangu pamusoro ndichibvisa vana vaIsiraeri pakati pavo.""" 
Exodus7:6 Mozisi naAroni vakaita saizvozvo; sezvavakanga varairwa naJehovha, vakaita saizvozvo." 
Exodus7:7 Mozisi akanga ana makore makumi masere, naAroni makore makumi masere namatatu, panguva yavakataura naFarao." 
Exodus7:8 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi naAroni, akati," 
Exodus7:9 Kana Farao achitaura nemi, akati, `Tiratidzei chinoshamisa,' uti kuna Aroni, `Tora tsvimbo yako, uikandire pasi pamberi paFarao, ishanduke nyoka.' """ 
Exodus7:10 Mozisi naAroni vakapinda kuna Farao, vakaita sezvavakarairwa naJehovha, Aroni akakandira tsvimbo pasi pamberi paFarao napamberi pavaranda vake, ikashanduka nyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Ipapo Farao akadanawo vakachenjera navaroyi; naivowo, idzo n'anga dzeIjipiti, vakaita saizvozvo nouroyi hwavo." 
Exodus7:12 Nokuti mumwe nomuwe akakandira pasi tsvimbo yake, dzikashanduka nyoka; asi tsvimbo yaAroni yakamedza tsvimbo dzavo." 
Exodus7:13 Zvino moyo waFarao ukawomeswa, akasavateerera; sezvakarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus7:14 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""moyo waFarao mukukutu, haadi kutendera vanhu kuenda." 
Exodus7:15 Enda kuna Farao mangwanani; tarira, achabuda achienda kumvura, iwe undomira pamhenderekedzo dzorwizi kuti usangane naye, wakabata muruoko rwako tsvimbo iya yakashanduka nyoka." 
Exodus7:16 Ugoti kwaari, `Jehovha, Mwari wavaHebheru, akandituma kwauri,' achiti, `Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate murenje; zvino tarira, kusvikira zvino hauna kunditeerera.'" 
Exodus7:17 Zvanzi naJehovha, `Uchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha nechinhu ichi: Tarira ndicharova mvura iri murwizi netsvimbo iri muruoko rwangu, ikashanduka ropa.'" 
Exodus7:18 Hove dziri murwizi dzichafa, rwizi ruchanhuwa; vaIjipiti vachanetswa nokutsvaka kumwa mvura yorwizi.""" 
Exodus7:19 Jehovha akatiwo kuna Mozisi, ""Uti kuna Aroni, `Tora tsvimbo yako, utambanudzire ruoko rwako pamusoro pemvura yavaIjipiti, pamusoro penzizi dzavo, napamusoro pehova dzavo, napamusoro pamadziva avo, napamusoro pamakungwa avo ose,' zvishanduke ropa; rivepo panyika yose yeIjipiti, mumidziyo yamatanda nemidziyo yamabwe.""" 
Exodus7:20 Mozisi naAroni vakaita sezvavakarairwa naJehovha, vakasimudza tsvimbo, vakarova mvura yakanga iri murwizi pamberi paFarao napamberi pavaranda vake, mvura yose yomurwizi ikashanduka ropa." 
Exodus7:21 Hove dzomurwizi dzikafa, rwizi rukanhuwa, vaIjipiti vakasagona kumwa mvura yorwizi ropa rikavapo panyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Exodus7:22 N'anga dzeljipiti dzikaitawo saizvozvo nouroyi hwadzo; asi moyo waFarao wakaomeswa, akasavateerera, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus7:23 Ipapo Farao akadzoka, akapinda mumba make; haana kurangarira nechinhu ichiwo." 
Exodus7:24 VaIjipiti vose vakachera nhivi dzorwizi vachitsvaka mvura yokumwa; nokuti vakanga vasingagoni kumwa mvura yorwizi. 
Exodus7:25 Mazuva manomwe akapera kubva pakurohwa korwizi naJehovha. 
Exodus8:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna. Mozisi, ""Pinda kuna Farao, uti kwaari, `Zvanzi naJehovha, tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandondinamata.'" 
Exodus8:2 Kana ukaramba kuvatendera, tarira, ndicharova nyika yako yose namatatya;" 
Exodus8:3 rwizi ruchazara kwazvo namatatya; achakwira, achipinda mumba mako, nomuimba yako yokuvata, napanhovo dzako, nomudzimba dzavaranda vako, napamusoro pavanhu vako, nomuzvoto zvako, nomumidziyo yako mamunokanyira zvokudya;" 
Exodus8:4 matatya achakwira pamusoro pako napamusoro pavanhu vako, napamusoro pavaranda vako vose.""" 
Exodus8:5 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Iti kuna Aroni, `Tambanudzira ruoko rwako rwakabata tsvimbo yako pamusoro penzizi, napamusoro pehova, napamusoro pamadziva, uraire matatya kuti akwire panyika """ 
Exodus8:6 Ipapo Aroni akatambanudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pemvura yeljipiti, matatya akakwira, akafukidza nyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus8:7 N'anga dzikaita saizvozvo nouroyi hwadzo dzikaraira matatya kuti akwire panyika yeIjipiti. 
Exodus8:8 Zvino Farao akadana Mozisi naAroni, akati, ""Nyengeterai kuna Jehovha kuti abvise matatya kwandiri nokuvanhu vangu, nditendere vanhu kuenda kundobayira Jehovha.""" 
Exodus8:9 Mozisi akati kuna Farao, ""imwi mukudzwe kupfuura ini! Ndokunyengetererai nguva ipi, imwi navaranda venyu, navanhu venyu, kuti matatya aparadzwe kwamuri, nomudzimba dzenyu, asare murwizi bedzi?""" 
Exodus8:10 Iye akati, ""Mangwana."" Akati, ""Zvichaitwa sezvamareva; kuti muzive kuti hakuna mumwe akafanana naJehovha, Mwari wedu." 
Exodus8:11 Matatya achabva kwamuri, nomudzimba dzenyu, nokuvaranda venyu, nokuvanhu venyu; achasara murwizi bedzi.""" 
Exodus8:12 Mozisi naAroni vakabuda muna Farao, Mozisi akadana kuna Jehovha nokuda kwamatatya aakanga atuma kuna Farao." 
Exodus8:13 Jehovha akaita sezvakanga zvarehwa naMozisi, matatya akafa mudzimba nomuzvivanze nokuruwa." 
Exodus8:14 Vakaaunganidza, vakaaita mirwi, nyika ikanhuwa." 
Exodus8:15 Zvino Farao akati achiona kuti zvava zviri nani, akaomesa moyo wake, akasavateerera; sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus8:16 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Iti kuna Aroni, `Tambanudza tsvimbo yako, urove guruva rapasi, rishanduke utunga panyika """ 
Exodus8:17 Vakaita saizvozvo; Aroni akatambanudza ruoko rwake rwakabata tsvimbo yake, akarova guruva rapasi, utunga ukavapo pavanhu napazvipfuwo; guruva rose rapasi rikashanduka utunga panyika yose" 
Exodus8:18 N'anga dzikaita saizvozvo nouroyi hwadzo kuti dzibudise utunga, asi hadzina kugona; utunga hwakanga huri pavanhu napazvipfuwo." 
Exodus8:19 Zvino n'anga dzakati kuna Farao, ""Mumwe waMwari""; asi moyo waFarao wakaomeswa, akasavateerera, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus8:20 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Fumira mangwanani, undomira pamberi paFarao; tarira, achabuda achienda kumvura, uti kwaari, `Zvanzi naJehovha, tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate.'" 
Exodus8:21 Nokuti kana ukaramba kutendera vanhu vangu, tarira ndichatuma bute renhunzi pamusoro pako, napamusoro pavaranda vako, napamusoro pavanhu vako, nomudzimba dzako; dzimba dzavaIjipiti dzichazara namapute enhunzi, kunyange nevhu padzimire." 
Exodus8:22 Nomusi iwoyo ndichatsaura nyika yeGosheni pagere vanhu vangu, kuti ipapo mapute enhunzi arege kuvapo; kuti uzive kuti ndini Jehovha pakati penyika dzose." 
Exodus8:23 Ndichaparadzanisa vanhu vangu navanhu vako; chiratidzo ichi chichavapo mangwana. 
Exodus8:24 Zvino Jehovha akaita saizvozvo, mapute makuru-kuru enhunzi akapinda mumba maFarao, nomudzimba dzavaranda vake, nomunyika yose yeIjipiti; nyika ikaodzwa namapute enhunzi." 
Exodus8:25 Zvino Farao akadana Mozisi naAroni, akati, ""Endai, mundobayira Mwari wenyu munyika ino.""" 
Exodus8:26 Mozisi akati, ""Hazvina kunaka kuita saizvozvo, nokuti tichabayira Jehovha, Mwari wedu, zvibayiro zvinonyangadza vaIjipiti; tarirai, kana tikabayira zvinonyangadza vaIjipiti havangatitaki namabwe here?" 
Exodus8:27 Tichaenda rwendo rwamazuva matatu murenje, tigobayira Jehovha Mwari wedu sezvaanotiraira.""" 
Exodus8:28 Farao akati, ""Ndichakutenderai kuenda mundobayira Jehovha Mwari wenyu murenje, asi musaenda kure-kure. Ndinyengetererei.""" 
Exodus8:29 Mozisi akati, ""Tarirai, ndinobuda kwamuri, ndichandonyengetera kuna Jehovha kuti mapute enhunzi abve kuna Farao, nokuvaranda vake, nokuvanhu vake mangwana; asi Farao ngaarege kuzonyengerazve, achiramba kutendera vanhu kuenda kundobayira Jehovha.""" 
Exodus8:30 Ipapo Mozisi akabuda kuna Farao, akandonyengetera kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus8:31 Jehovha akaita sezvakakumbira Mozisi, akabvisa mapute enhunzi kuna Farao, nokuvaranda vake, nokuvanhu vake; haana kusara kunyange neimwe." 
Exodus8:32 Asi Farao akaomesa moyo wake nenguva iyowo, akasatendera vanhu kuenda." 
Exodus9:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Pinda kuna Farao, undomuudza, uti, `Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waVaHebheru: Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate.'" 
Exodus9:2 Nokuti kana ukaramba kuvatendera, ukaramba uchivadzivisa," 
Exodus9:3 tarira, ruoko rwaJehovha ruchava pamusoro pezvipfuwo zvako zviri kusango, napamusoro pamabhiza, napamusoro pembongoro, napamusoro pamakamera, napamusoro pemombe, napamusoro pezvipfuwo zviduku; hosha yakaipa kwazvo ichavapo." 
Exodus9:4 Jehovha acharaura zvipfuwo zvavaIsiraeri pazvipfuwo zvavaIjipiti; hapana chimwe chingafa pazvipfuwo zvose zvavaIsiraeri. 
Exodus9:5 Zvino Jehovha akatara nguva akati, ""Mangwana Jehovha achaita chinhu ichi munyika ino.""" 
Exodus9:6 Fume mangwana Jehovha akaita chinhu ichocho, zvipfuwo zvose zveIjipiti zvikafa; asi pazvipfuwo zvavana vaIsiraeri hapana zvakafa, kunyange nechimwe chete." 
Exodus9:7 Farao akatuma vanhu, vakawana kuti pazvipfuwo zvavaIsiraeri hapana zvakafa, kunyange chimwe chete. Asi moyo waFarao wakava mukukutu, akasatendera vanhu kuenda." 
Exodus9:8 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi naAroni, ""Torai tsama dzamadota echoto, Mozisi aakushire kudenga pamberi paFarao." 
Exodus9:9 Achashanduka guruva rakatsetseka panyika yose yeIjipiti, achiita mamota anoputika semhoni pavanhu napazvipfuwo zvose zveIjjipiti.""" 
Exodus9:10 Ivo vakatora madota echoto, vakamira pamberi paFarao, Mozisi akaakushira kudenga, akaita mamota anoputika semhoni pavanhu napazvipfuwo." 
Exodus9:11 Zvino n'anga dzakanga dzisingagoni kumira pamberi paMozisi nokuda kwamamota, nokuti mamota akanga ari pan'anga napavaIjipiti vose." 
Exodus9:12 Asi Jehovha akaomesa moyo waFarao, akasavateerera, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha kuna Mozisi." 
Exodus9:13 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Fumira mangwanani, undomira pamberi paFarao, uti kwaari, `Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wavaHebheru: Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate.'" 
Exodus9:14 Nokuti nenguva ino ndichatuma matambudziko angu ose pamusoro pomoyo wako, napamusoro pavaranda vako, napamusoro pavanhu vako, uzive kuti hapana akafanana neni panyika dzose." 
Exodus9:15 Nokuti dai ndisakadaro, ndingadai ndaitambanudza ruoko rwangu, ndikakurova iwe navanhu vako nehosha yakaipa, ukaparadzwa chose panyika;" 
Exodus9:16 asi zvirokwazvo ndakakuraramisa nokuda kwaizvozvo, kuti ndikuratidze simba rangu, uye kuti zita rangu rikurumbire kunyika dzose." 
Exodus9:17 Zvino ucharamba uchingozvikudza uchirwa navanhu vangu, usingadi kuvatendera kuenda here?" 
Exodus9:18 Tarira, mangwana, nenguva yakaita seino, ndichanisa chimvuramabwe chakaipa kwazvo, chisina kumbovapo paIjipiti kubva pakuvambwa kwayo kusvikira zvino." 
Exodus9:19 Naizvozvo zvino tuma vanhu, uunganidze zvipfuwo zvako nezvose zvaunazvo kusango, nokuti vanhu vose nezvipfuwo zvose zvinowanikwa kusango, zvisina kuiswa mudzimba, zvicharohwa nechimvuramabwe zvikafa.""" 
Exodus9:20 Zvino vakatya shoko raJehovha pakati pavaranda vaFarao vakaraira kuti varanda vavo nezvipfuwo zvavo zvitizire mudzimba. 
Exodus9:21 Asi vakanga vasingateereri shoko raJehovha, vakarega varanda vavo nezvipfuwo zvavo kusango." 
Exodus9:22 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tambanudzira ruoko rwako kudenga, chimvuramabwe chivepo panyika yose yeIjipiti, pamusoro pavanhu, napamusoro pezvipfuwo, napamusoro pemiriwo yose yeminda panyika yose yeIjipiti."""
