Exodus9:23 Mozisi akatambanudzira tsvimbo yake kudenga, Jehovha akatuma kutinhira nechimvuramabwe, moto wemheni ukarova pasi. Jehovha akanaisa chimvuramabwe panyika" 
Exodus9:24 Chimvuramabwe chikavapo, nomoto wakavengana nechimvuramabwe, chikanyanya kwazvo, chisina kumbovapo panyika yose yeIjipiti, kubva pakutanga korudzi ipapo." 
Exodus9:25 Chimvuramabwe chikarova zvose zvakanga zviri kusango, vanhu nezvipfuwo, panyika yose yeIjipiti; chimvuramabwe chikarova miriwo yose yeminda, chikavhuna miti yose yesango." 
Exodus9:26 Asi munyika yeGosheni bedzi, imo makanga muna vana vaIsiraeri, ndipo pakanga pasina chimvuramabwe." 
Exodus9:27 Zvino Farao akatuma vanhu kundodana Mozisi naAroni, akati kwavari, ""Nguva ino ndatadza; Jehovha akarurama, asi ini navaranda vangu takaipa." 
Exodus9:28 Nyengeterai kuna Jehovha, nokuti kutinhira kukuru kwaMwari nechimvuramabwe zvaringana; ndichakutenderai kuenda, murege kugara.""" 
Exodus9:29 Mozisi akati kwaari, ""Kana ndangobuda paguta, ndichatambanudzira maoko angu kuna Jehovha; ipapo kutinhira kuchanyarara, nechimvuramabwe hachizovipo; muchaziva kuti nyika yose ndeyaJehovha." 
Exodus9:30 Asi kana murimwi navaranda venyu, ndinoziva kuti hamungatyi Jehovha Mwari.""" 
Exodus9:31 Miti yoruchinda nebhari zvikarohwa, nokuti bhari yakanga yatumbuka, nemiti yoruchinda yakanga yava namaruva." 
Exodus9:32 Asi zviyo zvekoroni nezvesipereti hazvina kurohwa, nokuti zvakanga zvisina kukura." 
Exodus9:33 Zvino Mozisi akabuda muguta pamberi paFarao, akatambanudzira maoko ake kuna Jehovha, kutinhira nechimvuramabwe zvikanyarara, nemvura ikasadururirwa panyika." 
Exodus9:34 Zvino Farao akati aona kuti mvura nechimvuramabwe nokutinhira zvanyarara, akawedzera kutadza, akaomesa moyo wake, iye navaranda vake." 
Exodus9:35 moyo waFarao ukaomeswa, akasatendera vana vaIsiraeri kuenda; sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha nomuromo waMozisi." 
Exodus10:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Pinda kuna Farao, nokuti ndaomesa moyo wake, nemoyo yavaranda vake, kuti ndiise zviratidzo zvangu izvo pakati pavo;" 
Exodus10:2 kuti iwe ugotaura munzeve dzomwanakomana wako, nedzomwanakomana womwanakomana wako, zvose zvandakaitira Ijipiti, nezviratidzo zvandakaita pakati pavo; muzive kuti ndini Jehovha.""" 
Exodus10:3 Zvino Mozisi naAroni vakapinda kuna Farao, vakati kwaari, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wavaHebheru, `Ucharamba kuzvininipisa pamberi pangu kusvikira rinhiko?' Tendera vanhu vangu kuenda vandinamate." 
Exodus10:4 Nokuti kana ukaramba kutendera vanhu vangu kuenda, tarira, mangwana ndichauyisa mhashu panyika yenyu;" 
Exodus10:5 dzichafukidza nyika yose, kuti munhu asagona kuona pasi; dzichadya zvakasara zvakapukunyuka, zvamakasiyirwa nechimvuramabwe, dzichadya miti yose inokumererai muminda;" 
Exodus10:6 nedzimba dzenyu dzichazara, nedzimba dzavaranda venyu vose, nedzimba dzavaIjipiti vose; zvakadaro hazvina kumboonekwa namadzibaba enyu, namadzibaba amadzibaba enyu, kubva pazuva ravakatanga panyika kusvikira zuva rino."" Ipapo akatendeuka akabuda pamberi paFarao." 
Exodus10:7 Zvino varanda vaFarao vakati kwaari, ""Munhu uyu achava musungo kwatiri kusvikira rinhiko? Tenderai henyu vanhu kuenda, vandonamata Jehovha Mwari wavo; hamuzivi here kuti Ijipiti raparadzwa?""" 
Exodus10:8 Zvino Mozisi naAroni vakadzoserwazve kuna Farao, iye akati kwavari, ""Endai mundonamata Jehovha Mwari wenyu; asi vachaenda ndivananiko?""" 
Exodus10:9 Mozisi akati, ""Tichaenda navaduku vedu, navakuru vedu, navakomana vedu navasikana vedu; tichaenda namakwai edu, nemombe dzedu; nokuti tinofanira kuitira Jehovha mutambo.""" 
Exodus10:10 akati kwavari, ""Jehovha ngaave nemwi kana ini ndikatongokutenderai kuenda, imwi nepwere dzenyu! Chenjerai, nokuti munenge munofunga zvakaipa." 
Exodus10:11 Haisva! imwi varume endai henyu, mundonamata Jehovha, nokuti ndizvo zvamakumbira."" Vakadzingwa pamberi paFarao." 
Exodus10:12 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tambanudzira ruoko rwako pamusoro penyika yeIjipiti, mhashu dziuye pamusoro penyika yeIjipiti, dzidye miti yose yenyika yose yakanga yasiyiwa nechimvuramabwe.""" 
Exodus10:13 Mozisi akatambanudzira tsvimbo yake pamusoro penyika Jehovha akauyisa pamusoro penyika mhepo yakabva kumabvazuva zuva iroro rose nousiku hwose; zvino fume mangwana mhepo yokumabvazuva ikauyisa mhashu. 
Exodus10:14 Mhashu dzikauya pamusoro penyika yose yeIjipiti, dzikandomhara munyika yose yeIjipiti, dzakanga dzakawanda kwazvo; mhashu dzakadai hadzina kumbovapo kubva pakutanga, uye dzakaita saidzodzo hadzingazovipozve." 
Exodus10:15 Nokuti dzakafukidza nyika yose-yose, nyika ikati zvi! Dzikadya miti yose yenyika, nemichero yose yemiti, yakanga yasiyiwa nechimvuramabwe; hapana kuzosara kunyange chinhu chimwe chitema pamiti, kana pamiriwo yeminda, panyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Exodus10:16 Ipapo Farao akakurumidza kudana Mozisi naAroni, akati, ""Ndatadzira Jehovha, Mwari wenyu, nemi." 
Exodus10:17 Naizvozvo zvino ndikangamwirei zvivi zvangu nguva ino bedzi, mukumbire kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu, kuti abvise kwandiri rufu urwu bedzi.""" 
Exodus10:18 Akabuda pamberi paFarao, akandokumbira kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus10:19 Zvino Jehovha akadzosera mhepo ine simba kwazvo, yakabva kumavirazuva, ikasimudza mhashu ikadzikandira muGungwa Dzvuku; hakuna kuzosara kunyange nemhashu imwe chete munyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Exodus10:20 Asi Jehovha akaomesa moyo waFarao, akasatendera vana vaIsiraeri kuenda." 
Exodus10:21 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tambanudzira ruoko rwako kudenga,rima rivepo panyika yeIjipiti, rima ringaita seringabatwa namaoko.""" 
Exodus10:22 Mozisi akatambanudzira ruoko rwake kudenga, rima guru rikavapo panyika yose yeIjipiti, rikaita mazuva matatu;" 
Exodus10:23 havana kuonana, uye hapana mumwe akasimuka paakanga agere namazuva matatu; asi vana vaIsiraeri vose vakanga vane chiedza kwavaigara." 
Exodus10:24 Zvino Farao akadana Mozisi, akati, ""Endai, mundonamata Jehovha; asi makwai enyu nemombe dzenyu ngadzisare; nepwere dzenyu dzingaenda hadzo nemi.""" 
Exodus10:25 Mozisi akati, ""Munofanira kutipawo mumaoko edu zvokubayira nezvipiriso zvokupisa zvatingandobayira Jehovha Mwari wedu." 
Exodus10:26 Zvipfuwo zvedu zvichaendawo nesu, hakungasari kunyange nehwanda rimwe, nokuti tinofanira kutora kwazviri kuti tinamate nazvo Jehovha Mwari wedu; hatizivi zvatinganamata Jehovha nazvo kudzimana tasvikapo.""" 
Exodus10:27 Asi Jehovha akaomesa moyo waFarao, akaramba kuvatendera kuenda." 
Exodus10:28 Zvino Farao akati kwaari, ""Ibva pamberi pangu, chenjera kuti urege kuonazve chiso changu, nokuti nomusi waunoona chiso changu uchafa.""" 
Exodus10:29 Mozisi akati, ""Mareva kwazvo, handichazooni chiso chenyuzve.""" 
Exodus11:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Ndichauyisa dambudziko rimwezve pamusoro paFarao napamusoro peIjipiti, ipapo achakutenderai kubva pano; musi waachakutenderai kuenda, zvirokwazvo achakudzingai chose pano." 
Exodus11:2 Zvino udza vanhu vanzwe, kuti murume mumwe nomumwe akumbire kunowokwake, nomukadzi mumwe nomumwe akumbire kunowokwake, vapiwe zvishongo zvesirivha nezvishongo zvendarama.""" 
Exodus11:3 Zvino Jehovha akapa vanhu nyasha pamberi pavaIjipiti. Naiye munhu uyu Mozisi, akanga ari mukuru kwazvo munyika yeIjipiti, pamberi pavaranda vaFarao, napamberi pavanhu." 
Exodus11:4 Zvino Mozisi akati, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, `Kana pava pakati pousiku, ndichabuda ndikafamba napakati peIjipiti;" 
Exodus11:5 madangwe ose munyika yeIjipiti achafa, kutanga padangwe raFarao anogara pachigaro choushe, kusvikira padangwe romurandakadzi ari paguyo, navana vose vemhongora dzezvipfuwo." 
Exodus11:6 Panyika yose yeIjipiti pachava nokuchema kukuru, kwakadaro hakuna kumbovapo, uye hakungazovipozve.'" 
Exodus11:7 Asi pakati pavana valsiraeri vose, pakati pavanhu kana zvipfuwo, hapangavi nembwa ichasimudza rurimi rwayo; kuti muzive kuti Jehovha akatsaura pakati pavaIjipiti navalsiraeri." 
Exodus11:8 Navaranda venyu vose ava vachaburukira kwandiri, vachandipfugamira, vachiti, Ibvai henyu, navanhu vose vanokuteverai; shure kwaizvozvo ndichabuda.' "" Akabuda pamberi, paFarao, akatsamwa kwazvo." 
Exodus11:9 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Farao haangakuteerereyi kuti zvishamiso zvangu zviwanzwe panyika yeIjipiti.""" 
Exodus11:10 Mozisi naAroni vakaita zvishamiso zviya zvose pamberi paFarao, asi Jehovha akaomesa moyo waFarao, akasatendera vana vaIsiraeri kubva munyika yake." 
Exodus12:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi naAroni munyika akati," 
Exodus12:2 Mwedzi uno unofanira kuva mwedzi wokutanga kwamuri, unofanira kuva mwedzi wokutanga wegore." 
Exodus12:3 Taurai kuungano yose yavaIsiraeri, muti, `Nomusi wegumi womwedzi uno mumwe nomumwe ngaatore gwayana, vachiverenga dzimba dzamadzibaba avo; mhuri imwe neimwe ive negwayana rayo." 
Exodus12:4 Kana mhuri iri duku vasingagoni kupedza gwayana, ivo navagere pedo neimba yavo ngavatore rimwe rinoringana vanhu. Muringanise gwayana pakudya komumwe nomumwe." 
Exodus12:5 Gwayana renyu ngarirege kuva nechinhu chisakafanira, mukono wegore rimwe; muritore pamakwai kana pambudzi;" 
Exodus12:6 zvino murichengete kusvikira pazuva regumi namana romwedzi, ipapo ungano yose yavanhu vose vaIsiraeri ngavariuraye madekwana." 
Exodus12:7 Zvino ngavatore rimwe ropa raro, variise pamagwatidziro maviri egonhi, napachivivo chokumusoro, padzimba pavacharidyira." 
Exodus12:8 Vadye nyama yaro usiku ihwohwo, yakagochwa pamoto, nechingwa chisina kuviriswa; vaidye nemiriwo inovava." 
Exodus12:9 Regai kuidya isina kuibva, kana yakabikwa nemvura, asi yakagochwa pamoto musoro waro namakumbo aro pamwechete noura hwaro." 
Exodus12:10 Musasiya chimwe charo kusvikira mangwana; zvose zvaro zvinosara kusvikira mangwana muzvipise nomoto.' 
Exodus12:11 Muridye kudai: Makasunga zviuno zvenyu, makapfeka shangu dzenyu patsoka dzenyu, makabata tsvimbo dzenyu mumaoko enyu; muridye muchikurumidza; iPasika yaJehovha." 
Exodus12:12 Nokuti nousiku ihwohwo ndichafamba napakati penyika yeIjipiti, ndichirova madangwe ose avanhu panyika yeIjipiti, navana vose vemhongora dzezvipfuwo; ndichatonga vamwari vose veIjipiti; ndini Jehovha." 
Exodus12:13 Asi ropa richava chiratidzo kwamuri padzimba mamugere, kana ndichiona ropa ndichakupfuurai, kuti dambudziko rirege kukuwirai, rikuparadzei, kana ndichirova nyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus12:14 Zuva iri richava chirangaridzo kwamuri, munofanira kutambira Jehovha mutambo naro; munofanira kutamba mutambo naro pamarudzi enyu ose uve murayiro nokusingaperi." 
Exodus12:15 Mudye chingwa chisina kuviriswa kwamazuva manomwe; nezuva rokutanga mubvise mbiriso yose padzimba dzenyu; nokuti munhu anodya chingwa chakaviriswa kubva pazuva rokutanga kusvikira pazuva rechinomwe ngaabviswe pakati pavaIsiraeri. 
Exodus12:16 Nezuva rokutanga munofanira kuita ungano tsvene, uye nezuva rechinomwe ungano tsvenezve; namazuva iwayo mabasa ose ngaarege kuitwa, asi zvinodyiwa nomunhu mumwe nomumwe zvingagadzirwa nemi, izvozvo bedzi." 
Exodus12:17 Munofanira kutamba mutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa, nokuti ndiro zuva randakabvisa naro hondo dzenyu dzose panyika yeIjipiti; naizvozvo chengetai zuva iroro kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose, uve murayiro nokusingaperi." 
Exodus12:18 Nomwedzi wokutanga nezuva regumi namana romwedzi, madekwana, munofanira kudya zvingwa zvisina kuviriswa kusvikira pazuva ramakumi maviri nerimwe romwedzi madekwana." 
Exodus12:19 Mazuva manomwe mbiriso irege kuwanikwa mudzimba dzenyu, nokuti ani naani, anodya zvakaviriswa anofanira kubviswa paungano yavaIsiraeri, kana ari mutorwa, kana ari munhu akaberekerwa munyika." 
Exodus12:20 Regai kudya chinhu chakaviriswa; padzimba dzenyu dzose mudye zvingwa zvisina kuviriswa. 
Exodus12:21 Zvino Mozisi akadana vakuru vose vavaIsiraeri, akati kwavari, ""Endai mundotora makwayana anoringana mhuri dzenyu, mubaye Pasika." 
Exodus12:22 Mutore sumbu rehisopi, murinyike muropa riri mumudziyo, muzodze chivivo chokumusoro, namagwatidziro maviri egonhi neropa riri mumudziyo; kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu anobuda pamukova weimba yake kusvikira mangwana." 
Exodus12:23 Nokuti Jehovha achapfuura napakati penyika kuti arove vaIjipiti; kana akaona ropa pachivivo chokumusoro, namagwatidziro maviri, Jehovha achadarika mukova uyo, haangatenderi muparadzi kupinda mudzimba dzenyu akurovei." 
Exodus12:24 Chengeta chinhu ichocho, uve murayiro kwauri nokuvana vako nokusingaperi." 
Exodus12:25 Zvino kana muchizosvika panyika yamuchapiwa naJehovha, sezvaakakupikirai, muchengete basa iri." 
Exodus12:26 Zvino kana vana venyu vakati kwamuri, `Basa iri rinoti kudiniko?'" 
Exodus12:27 Muti kwavari, `Ndicho chibayiro chePasika yaJehovha, akadarika dzimba dzavana vaIsiraeri paIjipiti nomusi waakarova vaIjipiti, akaponesa dzimba dzedu.' ""Ipapo vanhu vakakotamisa misoro yavo, vakanamata." 
Exodus12:28 Vana vaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo; Mozisi naAroni sezvavakanga varairwa naJehovha, ndizvo zvavakaita." 
Exodus12:29 Zvino pakati pousiku Jehovha akarova madangwe ose panyika kubva padangwe raFarao aizogara pachigaro chake choushe, kusvikira padangwe romusungwa akanga ari mutirongo, navana vose vemhongora dzezvipfuwo." 
Exodus12:30 Zvino Farao akamuka usiku, iye navaranda vake navaIjipiti vose, kukava nokuchema kukuru paIjipiti, nokuti kwakanga kusina imba musina akafa;" 
Exodus12:31 akadana Mozisi naAroni usiku, akati, ""Simukai, ibvai pakati pavanhu vangu, imwi navana vaIsiraeri, endai mundonamata Jehovha sezvamakataura." 
Exodus12:32 Torai makwai enyu nemombe dzenyu, sezvamakataura, endai, neni mundiropafadzewo.""" 
Exodus12:33 VaIjipiti vakakurudzira vanhu kwazvo, kuti vakurumidze kuvabudisa panyika, nokuti vakati, ""Isu tofa tose!""" 
Exodus12:34 Vanhu vakatora mukanyiwa wavo, usati waviriswa, nemidziyo yavo yokukanyira yakaputirwa munguvo dzavo pamafudzi avo." 
Exodus12:35 Vana vaIsiraeri vakaita sezvavakaudzwa naMozisi, vakakumbira kuna vaIjipiti zvishongo zvesirivha, nezvishongo zvendarama, nenguvo." 
Exodus12:36 Jehovha akapa vanhu nyasha pamberi pavaIjipiti, vakavapa izvozvo zvavakakumbira; vakapedzera vaIjipiti." 
Exodus12:37 Zvino vana vaIsiraeri vakabva Ramasesi, vakaenda Sukoti, vakanga vari varume vanofamba netsoka vane zviuru zvamazana zvitanhatu, vana vasingaverengwi." 
Exodus12:38 Navanhu vazhinji vakanga vakavhengana vakaenda navo, namakwai nemombe, zviri zvipfuwo zvizhinji-zhinji." 
Exodus12:39 Vakabika zvingwa zvisina kuviriswa nomukanyiwa wavakanga vabuda nawo paIjipiti, nokuti wakanga usina kuviriswa; nokuti vakadzingwa muIjipiti, vakasagona kunonoka, vakasazvigadzirira mbuva." 
Exodus12:40 Zvino nguva yakagara vana vaIsiraeri muIjipiti akanga ari makore ana mazana mana namakumi matatu. 
Exodus12:41 Pakupera kwamakore ana mazana mana namakumi matatu, nomusi iwoyo, hondo dzose dzaJehovha dzakabuda munyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus12:42 Usiku ihwohwo hunofanira kurangarirwa Jehovha, nokuti akavabudisa panyika yeIjipiti nahwo. Ndihwo usiku hwaJehovha, hunofanira kurangarirwa kwazvo navana vaIsiraeri vose namarudzi avo ose." 
Exodus12:43 Jehovha akatiwo kuna Mozisi naAroni, ""Murayiro wePasika ndiwo: Mutorwa ngaarege kuidya." 
Exodus12:44 Asi muranda womunhu mumwe nomumwe akatengwa nemari, angaidya kana mamudzingisa." 
Exodus12:45 Mutorwa kana muranda anoripirwa ngaarege kuidya. 
Exodus12:46 Inofanira kudyirwa mumba mumwe; haufaniri kutora imwe nyama ukaenda nayo kunze kweimba; uye musavhuna pfupa rayo. 
Exodus12:47 Ungano yose yavaIsiraeri inofanira kuiita. 
Exodus12:48 Kana mutorwa agere newe achida kuitira Jehovha Pasika, vanhurume vose vari kwaari ngavadzingiswe, ipapo ngaaswedere hake kuiita; zvino afanana nomunhu akaberekerwa panyika; asi asina kudzingiswa ngaarege kuidya." 
Exodus12:49 Murayiro ngauve mumwe kunowakaberekerwa mumusha nokumutorwa agere pakati penyu. 
Exodus12:50 Zvino vana vaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo; Mozisi naAroni sezvavakanga varairwa naJehovha, ndizvo zvavakaita." 
Exodus12:51 Nezuva iroro Jehovha akabudisa vana vaIsiraeri panyika yeIjipiti nehondo dzavo. 
Exodus13:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi, akati," 
Exodus13:2 Nditsaurirei madangwe ose; zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, kana kuvanhu kana kuzvipfuwo, ndezvangu.""" 
Exodus13:3 Zvino Mozisi akati kuvanhu, ""Rangarirai zuva iri ramakabudiswa naro paIjipiti, paimba youranda, nokuti Jehovha akakubudisai pano noruoko rune simba; chingwa chakaviriswa ngachirege kudyiwa nemi." 
Exodus13:4 Nhasi munobuda nomwedzi weAbhibhi. 
Exodus13:5 Zvino kana Jehovha akusvitsa kunyika yavaKenani, neyavaHeti, neyavaAmori, neyavaHivhi, neyavaJebhusi, yaakambopikira madzibaba ako, kuti achakupa iyo, nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, unofanira kundoita basa iri nomwedzi uno." 
Exodus13:6 Unofanira kudya chingwa chisina kuviriswa mazuva manomwe; pazuva rechinomwe Jehovha ngaaitirwe mutambo. 
Exodus13:7 Chingwa chisina kuviriswa ngachidyiwe mazuva manomwe; chingwa chakaviriswa ngachirege kuonekwa kwauri, kunyange mbiriso ngairege kuonekwa kwauri panyika yako yose." 
Exodus13:8 Udza mwanakomana wako nomusi iwoyo, uti, `Ndizvo zvinoratidza zvandakaitirwa naJehovha musi wandakabuda Ijipiti.'" 
Exodus13:9 Chinofanira kuva chiratidzo kwauri paruoko rwako, nechirangaridzo pakati pameso ako, kuti murayiro waJehovha uve mumuromo mako; nokuti Jehovha akakubudisa paIjipiti noruoko rune simba." 
Exodus13:10 Naizvozvo unofanira kuchengeta murayiro uyu nenguva yawo gore rimwe nerimwe. 
Exodus13:11 Zvino kana Jehovha akusvitsa kunyika yavaKenani, sezvaakakupikira iwe namadzibaba ako, akakupa iyoyo," 
Exodus13:12 unofanira kusanangurira Jehovha zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro, nezvokutanga zvose pazvipfuwo zvaunazvo, zvirume ndezvaJehovha." 
Exodus13:13 Mwana wokutanga wembongoro unofanira kuudzikunura negwayana, kana usingadi kuudzikunura, unofanira kuvhuna mutsipa wawo; madangwe ose avanhu pakati pavanakomana vako unofanira kuadzikunura." 
Exodus13:14 Zvino kana mwanakomana wako achizokubvunza panguva inouya, akati, `Chinyiko ichi?' Uti kwaari, `Jehovha akatibudisa noruoko rune simba paIjipiti paimba youranda;" 
Exodus13:15 nokuti panguva iyoyo Farao yaakaramba kutitendera kuenda, Jehovha akauraya matangwe ose enyika yeIjipiti, matangwe ose avanhu navana vemhongora dzezvipfuwo;' naizvozvo ndinobayira Jehovha zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro, kana zviri zvirume; asi matangwe ose avanakomana vangu ndiNowadzikunura." 
Exodus13:16 Ichi chichava chiratidzo paruoko rwako, norundanyara pameso pako; nokuti Jehovha akatibudisa noruoko rune simba.""" 
Exodus13:17 Zvino Farao akati aregedza vanhu kuti vaende, Mwari haana kuvafambisa nenzira yapanyika yavaFirisitia, kunyange yaiva pedo, nokuti Mwari akati, ""Zvimwe vanhu vangazvidemba, kana vachiona kurwa, vakadzokera Ijipiti,""" 
Exodus13:18 asi Mwari akapotesa vanhu nokure, nenzira yokurenje rapaGungwa Dzvuku; vana valsiraeri vakabuda panyika yeIjipiti vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa." 
Exodus13:19 Mozisi akatora mapfupa aJosefa, akaenda nawo; nokuti akanga apikisa vana vaIsiraeri, achiti, ""Zvirokwazvo Mwari achakushanyirai, muchabva pano, mugoendawo namapfupa angu.""" 
Exodus13:20 Zvino vakatanga rwendo rwavo vakabva Sukoti, vakandovaka misasa yavo paEtamu, pamucheto werenje." 
Exodus13:21 Jehovha akavatungamirira masikati neshongwe yegore rokuvaperekedza panzira, usiku neshongwe yomoto yokuvavhenekera, kuti vafambe masikati nousiku." 
Exodus13:22 Shongwe yegore yakanga isingabvi pamberi pavanhu masikati, kana shongwe yomoto usiku." 
Exodus14:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi, akati," 
Exodus14:2 Udza vana vaIsiraeri, kuti vadzoke, vavake misasa yavo pamberi paPihahiroti, pakati peMigodhori negungwa, pamberi peBhaarizefoni; muvake misasa yenyu pagungwa pakatarisana napo." 
Exodus14:3 Zvino Farao achati pamusoro pavana vaIsiraeri, `Varasa nzira panyika, renje ravadzivirira.'" 
Exodus14:4 Ndichaomesa moyo waFarao kuti avateverere; ini ndichakudzwa pamusoro paFarao napahondo yake yose; vaIjipiti vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. Vakaita saizvozvo. 
Exodus14:5 Zvino mambo weIjipiti akaudzwa kuti vanhu vatiza; moyo waFarao nowavaranda vake ukashandukira vanhu, vakati, ""Taita seiko zvatatendera vaIsiraeri vakanga vachitibatira kuti vaende?""" 
Exodus14:6 Zvino akagadzira ngoro yake, akaenda navanhu vake;" 
Exodus14:7 akatora ngoro dzakatsaurwa dzina mazana matanhatu, nengoro dzose dzeIjipiti, dzina vatariri vadzo dzose." 
Exodus14:8 Jehovha akaomesa moyo waFarao, mambo weljipiti, akateverera vana vaIsiraeri, nokuti vana vaIsiraeri vakanga vabuda noruoko rune simba." 
Exodus14:9 VaIjipiti vakavateverera namabhiza ose nengoro dzaFarao, navatasvi vake vamabhiza, nehondo yake, vakavabata vachiri pamisasa pagungwa, paPihahiroti pamberi peBhaarizefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Zvino Farao akati asvika pedo, vana valsiraeri vakasimudza meso avo, vakaona vaIjipiti vachivateverera, vakatya kwazvo; vana vaIsiraeri vakachema kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus14:11 Vakati kuna Mozisi, ""Makanga muchiti hamuna mahwiro paIjipiti, mukatibvisako kuti tifire murenje here? Makatiitireiko zvamatibudisa paIjipiti?" 
Exodus14:12 Ko harizi shoko iro ratakakuudzai paIjipiti here, tichiti, `Tiregei, tibatire hedu vaIjipiti? Nokuti zviri nani kuti tibatire vaIjipiti, pakuti tifire murenje.' """ 
Exodus14:13 Zvino Mozisi akati kuvanhu, ""Musatya henyu, mirai, mugoona sununguro yaJehovha, yaachakuitirai nhasi, nokuti vaIjipiti vamaona nhasi, hamungazovaonizve nokusingaperi." 
Exodus14:14 Jehovha achakurwirai, imwi munofanira kunyarara henyu.""" 
Exodus14:15 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Unodanidzireiko kwandiri? Udza vana valsiraeri kuti vapfuurire mberi." 
Exodus14:16 Iwe simudza tsvimbo yako, utambanudzire ruoko rwako pamusoro pegungwa, uritsemure napakati, kuti vana vaIsiraeri vafambe pakaoma mukati megungwa." 
Exodus14:17 Tarira, ndichaomesa moyo yavaIjipiti, kuti vapindewo vachivateverera, ini ndizokudzwa pamusoro paFarao napamusoro pehondo yake yose, napamusoro pengoro dzake, napamusoro pavatasvi vake vamabhiza." 
Exodus14:18 Ipapo vaIjipiti vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndakudzwa pamusoro paFarao, napamusoro pengoro dzake, napamusoro pavatasvi vake vamabhiza.""" 
Exodus14:19 Zvino mutumwa waMwari, akanga akatungamirira hondo yavaIsiraeri, akabvapo, akaenda shure kwavo; shongwe yegore ikabva mberi kwavo, ikandomira shure kwavo." 
Exodus14:20 Ikapinda pakati pemisasa yavaIjipiti nemisasa yavaIsiraeri; gore nerima, zvikavapo asi rakavhenekera usiku; havana kuswederana usiku hwose." 
Exodus14:21 Zvino Mozisi akatambanudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, Jehovha akadzinga gungwa nemhepo ine simba, yakabva mabvazuva usiku hwose, akashandura gungwa, rikaita ivhu rakaoma, mvura ikatsemuka." 
Exodus14:22 Zvino vana valsiraeri vakapinda nomukati megungwa pakaoma, mvura ikavaitira madziro kurudyi rwavo nokuruboshwe rwavo." 
Exodus14:23 vakavateverera, vakapinda shure kwavo mukati megungwa namabhiza aFarao ose, nengoro dzake navatasvi vake vamabhiza." 
Exodus14:24 Mangwanani Jehovha akatarira hondo yavaIjipiti, ari mushongwe yomoto neyegore, akavhundusa hondo yavaIjipiti." 
Exodus14:25 Akanyudza makumbo engoro dzavo, dzikatambudzika pakufamba; vaIjipiti vakazoti, ""Ngatitize pamberi pavaIsiraeri, nokuti Jehovha anovarwira ivo, asi anorwa navaIjipiti.""" 
Exodus14:26 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tambanudzira ruoko rwako pamusoro pegungwa, kuti mvura idzokere pamusoro pavaIjipiti, napamusoro pengoro dzavo, napamusoro pavatasvi vavo vamabhiza.""" 
Exodus14:27 Mozisi akatambanudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, gungwa rikadzokera kwakare koedza; vaIjipiti vakatizira mukati maro; Jehovha akaparadza vaIjipiti mukati megungwa;" 
Exodus14:28 mvura ikadzoka, ikafukidza ngoro, navatasvi vamabhiza, nehondo yose yaFarao yakanga yapinda mugungwa ichivateverera; hakuna kusara kunyange nomumwe wavo." 
Exodus14:29 Asi vana vaIsiraeri vakafamba pakaoma mukati megungwa; mvura ikavaitira madziro kurudyi rwavo nokuruboshwe rwavo. 
Exodus14:30 Jehovha akarwira vaIsiraeri saizvozvo nomusi iwoyo pamaoko avaIjipiti; vaIsiraeri vakaona vaIjipiti vakanga vafa pamhenderekedzo dzegungwa. 
Exodus14:31 Ipapo vana vaIsiraeri vakaona basa guru rakanga raitirwa vaIjipiti naJehovha, vanhu vakatya Jehovha, vakatenda Jehovha naMozisi muranda wake." 
Exodus15:1 Zvino Mozisi navana vaIsiraeri vakaimbira Jehovha rwiyo urwu, vakataura vachiti, ""Ndichaimbira Jehovha, nokuti akasimuka nesimba rake; akakandira bhiza nomutasvi waro mugungwa." 
Exodus15:2 Jehovha ndiro simba rangu norwiyo rwangu; iye akava ruponeso rwangu; uyu ndiye Mwari wangu, ndichamurumbidza; Mwari wababa vangu, ndichamukudza." 
Exodus15:3 Jehovha munhu wokurwa; Jehovha ndiro zita rake. 
Exodus15:4 Akakandira ngoro dzaFarao nehondo yake mugungwa; varwi vake vakasanangurwa vakanyudzwa muGungwa Dzvuku. 
Exodus15:5 Mvura yakadzika yakavafukidza; vakanyura makadzika sebwe. 
Exodus15:6 Rudyi rwenyu, Jehovha, rwakakudzwa nesimba rarwo; rudyi rwenyu, Jehovha, runoputsanya vavengi." 
Exodus15:7 Noumambo bwenyu ukuru munowisira pasi vanokumukirai simba; munotuma kutsamwa kwenyu, kunovapisa sehundi." 
Exodus15:8 Nokufema kwemhino dzenyu, mvura yakaunganidzwa pamwechete; nzizi dzikamira dzikaita murwi, mvura yakadzika yakagwamba mukati megungwa." 
Exodus15:9 Muvengi akati, `Ndichateverera, ndichavabata, ndichagovera zvandapamba; kuchiva kwangu kuchagutswa navo; ndichavhomora munondo wangu, ruoko rwangu ruchavaparadza.'" 
Exodus15:10 Makafema mweya wenyu, gungwa rikavafukidza, vakanyura somutobvu mumvura ine simba." 
Exodus15:11 Ndianiko akafanana nemi, Jehovha, pakati pavamwari? Ndianiko akafanana nemwi paukuru hwoutsvene, munorumbidzwa muchityisa, munoita zvishamiso?" 
Exodus15:12 Makatambanudza ruoko rwenyu rworudyi, nyika ikavamedza." 
Exodus15:13 Makafambisa nenyasha dzenyu vanhu vamakadzikunura; makavaperekedza nesimba renyu kuugaro bwenyu utsvene. 
Exodus15:14 Vanhu vakanzwa vakadedera, mabayo akawira vanhu vagere Firisitia." 
Exodus15:15 Ipapo machinda eEdhomu akashamiswa, kudedera kwakawira vanhu vane simba veMoabhu; vanhu vose vanogara Kenani vakanyauka." 
Exodus15:16 Kutya nokuvhunduka kwakavawira; vakanyarara sebwe noukuru hworuoko rwenyu; kusvikira vanhu venyu vayambuka, Jehovha, kusvikira vanhu venyu vamakazvitsvakira vayambuka." 
Exodus15:17 Muchavapinza, nokuvasima pagomo renhaka yenyu, paugaro hwamakazviitira, kuti mugarepo, Jehovha; patsvene pakaitwa namaoko enyu." 
Exodus15:18 Jehovha achabata ushe nokusingaperi. 
Exodus15:19 Nokuti mabhiza aFarao akapinda mugungwa pamwechete nengoro dzake, navatasvi vake vamabhiza, Jehovha akadzosera mvura yegungwa pamusoro pavo; asi vana vaIsiraeri vakafamba pakaoma mukati megungwa." 
Exodus15:20 Zvino Miriami, muporofitakadzi, hanzvadzi yaAroni, akatora gandira muruoko rwake, vakadzi vose vakabuda vakamutevera vanamakandira, vachitamba." 
Exodus15:21 Miriami akavapindura akati, ""Imbirai Jehovha, nokuti akasimuka nesimba rake; akakandira bhiza nomutasvi waro mugungwa.""" 
Exodus15:22 Zvino Mozisi akatungamirira vaIsiraeri, vakabva paGungwa Dzvuku, vakaenda kurenje reShuri, vakaita mazuva matatu vachifamba murenje vasingawani mvura." 
Exodus15:23 Vakasvika Mara, asi vakanga vasingagoni kumwa mvura yapaMara, nokuti yakanga ichivava; naizvozvo zita rapo rakanzi Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Zvino vanhu vakapopotera Mozisi, vakati, ""Tichamweiko?""" 
Exodus15:25 Iye akachema kuna Jehovha, Jehovha akamuratidza muti, akaukandira mumvura, mvura ikanaka. Akavaitirapo murayiro nomutemo, akavaedzapo;" 
Exodus15:26 akati, ""Kana uchiteerera nomoyo wose inzwi raJehovha Mwari wako, ukaita zvakarurama pamberi pake, ukarerekera nzeve dzako kumirairo yake, ukachengeta zvaakatema zvose, handingaisi pamusoro pako marwadzo andakaisa pamusoro pavaIjipiti, nokuti ndini Jehovha murapi wako.""" 
Exodus15:27 Zvino vakasvika Erimu, pakanga pana matsime emvura ane gumi namaviri, nemichindwe ina makumi manomwe, vakavakapo misasa pamvura." 
Exodus16:1 Zvino vakabva Erimu parwendo rwavo, ungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri ikasvika parenje reSini, riri pakati peErimu neSinai, nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechipiri pakubva kwavo panyika yeljipiti." 
Exodus16:2 Zvino ungano yose yavaIsiraeri ikapopotera Mozisi naAroni murenje; 
Exodus16:3 vana vaIsiraeri vakati kwavari, ""Tingadai takafira hedu munyika yeIjipiti noruoko rwaJehovha, tigere hedu pahari dzenyama, tichidya zvingwa tichiguta; nokuti matibudisira kurenje iri, kuti muuraye ungano iyi yose nenzara.""" 
Exodus16:4 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tarira, ndichakunisirai chingwa chinobva kudenga; vanhu vachafanira kubuda kundozviunganidzira chiyero chinoringana nezuva rimwe nerimwe, ndivaidze ndione kana vachida kuteerera murayiro wangu, kana kwete." 
Exodus16:5 Zvino nomusi wetanhatu kana vogadzira izvo zvavauya nazvo, zvichaita zviyero zviviri kana vachienzanisa nechiyero chavanosiunganidza zuva rimwe nerimwe.""" 
Exodus16:6 Zvino Mozisi naAroni vakati kuvana vaIsiraeri vose, ""Madekwana muchaziva kuti Jehovha ndiye akakubudisai panyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus16:7 Fume mangwana muchaona kubwinya kwaJehovha, nokuti iye akanzwa kupopota kwamakapopotera Jehovha nako; isu tisu vanaaniko, zvamunotipopotera isu?""" 
Exodus16:8 Mozisi akati, ""Muchaona izvozvo kana Jehovha achikupai nyama madekwana, mukaidya, namangwana kana achikupai zvingwa, mukaguta; nokuti Jehovha akanzwa kupopota kwenyu kwamakamupopotera nako; isu tisu vanaaniko zvamunotipopotera isu? Hamutipopoteri isu, asi Jehovha.""" 
Exodus16:9 Mozisi akati kuna Aroni, ""Udza ungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Swederai pamberi paJehovha, nokuti akanzwa kupopota kwenyu.' """ 
Exodus16:10 Zvino Aroni akati achataura neungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri, ivo vakaona kubwinya kwaJehovha kuchiratidzwa mugore." 
Exodus16:11 Jehovha akataura naMozisi, akati," 
Exodus16:12 Ndanzwa kupopota kwavana vaIsiraeri; taura navo uti, `Madekwana muchadya nyama, fume mangwana muchaguta zvingwa;' zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu.""" 
Exodus16:13 Zvino madekwana zvihuta zvikakwira, zvikafukidza misasa; fume mangwana dova rakanga rakapoteredza misasa." 
Exodus16:14 Zvino dova rakanga riri pasi rikati radzimuka, vakaona zvinhu zviduku zvakaurungana zvakanga zviri pasi murenje, zviduku sechando pavhu." 
Exodus16:15 Vana vaIsiraeri vakati vachizviona vakabvunzana, vachiti, ""Chinyiko?"" Nokuti vakanga vasingazvizivi. Mozisi akati kwavari, ""Ndicho chingwa chamapiwa naJehovha kuti mudye." 
Exodus16:16 Zvino heri shoko rakarairwa naJehovha, `Muzviunganidzire chinhu icho, mumwe nomumwe sezvaanosidya; munhu mumwe nomumwe omeri imwe, muchiverenga vanhu venyu, mumwe nomumwe atorere vari mutende rake.' """ 
Exodus16:17 Vana vaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo, vamwe vakaunganidza zvizhinji, vamwe zvishoma." 
Exodus16:18 Zvino vakati vozviidza neomeri, uyo akanga aunganidza zvizhinji haana kusarirwa nechinhu, naiye akanga aunganidza zvishoma haana kushaiwa; mumwe nomumwe akanga aunganidza sezvaaisidya." 
Exodus16:19 Mozisi akati kwavari, ""Kurege kuva nomunhu anosiya zvimwe kusvikira mangwana.""" 
Exodus16:20 Asi havana kuteerera Mozisi, asi vamwe vakasiya zvimwe kusvikira mangwana; zvikazara honye, zvikanhuwa; Mozisi akavatsamwira." 
Exodus16:21 Vakazviunganidza mangwanani ose, mumwe nomumwe sezvaaidya; kana zuva ropisa zvakanyakatika." 
Exodus16:22 Nezuva retanhatu vaiunganidza chingwa vachiita zviyero zviviri, mumwe nomumwe omeri zvino vakuru vose veungano vakauya kuzoudza Mozisi." 
Exodus16:23 Mozisi akati kwavari, ""Ndizvo zvakataurwa naJehovha, `Mangwana izuva rezororo, iSabata rakatsaurirwa Jehovha;' gochai zvamunoda kugocha, bikai zvamunoda kubika; zvose zvasara muzvivige, muzvichengetere mangwana.""" 
Exodus16:24 Vakazviviga kusvikira mangwana, sezvavakanga varairwa naMozisi; zvino izvo hazvina kunhuwa, nehonye hadzina kuzovamo." 
Exodus16:25 Mozisi akati, ""Chidyai henyu izvozvo nhasi, nokuti nhasi iSabata raJehovha. Nhasi hamungazviwani kusango." 
Exodus16:26 Munofanira kuzviunganidza mazuva matanhatu; asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata; nezuva iroro hakungavi nechinhu. 
Exodus16:27 Zvino nezuva rechinomwe vamwe vakabuda kunozviunganidza, asi havana kuwana chinhu." 
Exodus16:28 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Munoramba kuchengeta mirairo yangu nemirau yangu kusvikira rinhiko?" 
Exodus16:29 Tarirai, Jehovha zvaakakupai Sabata, naizvozvo anokupai zvokudya zvamazuva maviri nezuva retanhatu; mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaagare kwaagere, kurega kuvapo nomunhu anobuda kwaagere nezuva rechinomwe.""" 
Exodus16:30 Vanhu vakazorora nezuva rechinomwe. 
Exodus16:31 Zvino veimba yaIsiraeri vakatumidza izvozvo zita rinonzi Mana; chakanga chiri chichena setsanga yekorianderi; kunaka kwazvo kwakanga kwakafanana nezvingwa zvakabikwa nouchi. 
Exodus16:32 Zvino Mozisi akati, ""Ndiro shoko rakarairwa naJehovha, `Omeri izere ngaichengeterwe marudzi enyu, vaone chingwa chandakakugutsai nacho murenje, nguva yandakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti.' """ 
Exodus16:33 Zvino Mozisi akati kuna Aroni, ""Tora hari uisemo omeri izere nemana, uigadzike pamberi paJehovha, kuti ichengeterwe marudzi enyu.""" 
Exodus16:34 Sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha, saizvozvo Aroni akazvigadzika pamberi peChipupuriro, kuti zvichengetwepo." 
Exodus16:35 Vana vaIsiraeri vakadya mana*makore makumi mana, kudzimara vachisvika panyika yakagarwa navanhu; vakadya mana*kudzimara vachisvika pamiganhu yenyika yeKenani." 
Exodus16:36 Zvino omeri chegumi cheefa. 
Exodus17:1 Zvino ungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri yakabva murenje reSini, vakafamba vachiita nzendo nzendo, sezvavakanga varairwa naJehovha, vakavaka misasa yavo paRefidhimu; zvino ipapo pakanga pasina mvura ingamwiwa navanhu." 
Exodus17:2 Vanhu vakarwa naMozisi, vakati, ""Tipe mvura timwe."" Mozisi akati kwavari, ""Munorwireiko neni? Munoedzereiko Jehovha?""" 
Exodus17:3 Vanhu zvino vakanga vanenyota yemvura ipapo, vanhu vakapopotera Mozisi, vakati, ""Wakatibudisireiko Ijipiti, kuti utiuraye nenyota, isu navana vedu, nezvipfuwo zvedu?""" 
Exodus17:4 Mozisi akachema kuna Jehovha, akati, ""Ndichaiteiko navanhu ava? Voda kunditaka namabwe.""" 
Exodus17:5 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tungamira pamberi pavanhu, uende navakuru vaIsiraeri, utore tsvimbo yako yawakamborova rwizi nayo muruoko rwako uende." 
Exodus17:6 Tarira ndichamira pamberi pako padombo riri paHorebhu, urove dombo iro, mvura ichabuda pariri, vanhu vagomwa."" Mozisi akaita saizvozvo pamberi pavakuru vaIsiraeri." 
Exodus17:7 Akatumidza nzvimbo iyo zita rinonzi Masa neMeribha nokuda kokurwa kwavana vaIsiraeri, uye nokuti vakaedza Jehovha, vachiti, ""Jehovha ari pakati pedu here, kana kwete?""" 
Exodus17:8 Zvino Amareki akauya kuzorwa navaIsiraeri paRefidhimu. 
Exodus17:9 Mozisi akati kuna Joshua, ""Utitsaurire varume, ugondorwa naAmareki; mangwana ini ndichamira pamusoro pechikomo, ndakabata tsvimbo yaMwari muruoko rwangu.""" 
Exodus17:9 Mozisi akati kuna Joshua, ""Utitsaurire varume, ugondorwa naAmareki; mangwana ini ndichamira pamusoro pechikomo, ndakabata tsvimbo yaMwari muruoko rwangu.""" 
Exodus17:10 Joshua akaita sezvaakanga audzwa naMozisi, akandorwa naAmareki; Mozisi naAroni naHuri vakakwira pamusoro pechikomo." 
Exodus17:10 Joshua akaita sezvaakanga audzwa naMozisi, akandorwa naAmareki; Mozisi naAroni naHuri vakakwira pamusoro pechikomo." 
Exodus17:11 Zvino zvakati kana Mozisi osimudza ruoko rwake, vaIsiraeri vokunda, kana oregera ruoko rwake pasi, Amareki okunda." 
Exodus17:12 Asi maoko aMozisi akazoneta, zvino vakatora ibwe, vakariisa pasi pake, akagara pamusoro paro, Aroni naHuri vakatsigira maoko ake, mumwe kuno rumwe rutivi, mumwe kuno rumwe rutivi; maoko ake akava nesimba kusvikira pakuvira kwezuva." 
Exodus17:13 Joshua akakunda Amareki navanhu vake neminondo inopinza. 
Exodus17:13 Joshua akakunda Amareki navanhu vake neminondo inopinza. 
Exodus17:14 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Nyora izvi mubhuku, vazvirangarire, uzvirondedzerewo munzeve dzaJoshua, kuti ini ndichabvisa chose pasi pokudenga zvose zvinorangaridza Amareki.""" 
Exodus17:14 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Nyora izvi mubhuku, vazvirangarire, uzvirondedzerewo munzeve dzaJoshua, kuti ini ndichabvisa chose pasi pokudenga zvose zvinorangaridza Amareki.""" 
Exodus17:15 Ipapo Mozisi akavaka atari, akaitumidza zita rinonzi Jehovha-nisi;" 
Exodus17:16 akati, ""Noruoko pachigaro choushe chaJehovha, ndinopika ndichiti, `Jehovha acharwa naAmareki kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi.' """ 
Exodus18:1 Zvino Jeturo, muprista weMidhiani, mukarahwa waMozisi, akanzwa zvose zvakaitira Jehovha Mozisi navaIsiraeri, vanhu vake, kuti Jehovha akabudisa vaIsiraeri muIjipiti." 
Exodus18:2 Jeturo, mukarahwa waMozisi, akatora Zipora, mukadzi waMozisi, nokuti akanga amudzosera kuna baba vake," 
Exodus18:3 navanakomana vake vaviri zita romumwe rainzi Geshomi, nokuti akati, ""Ndakanga ndiri mweni panyika yavamwe"";" 
Exodus18:4 nezita romumwe rainzi Ereazari, nokuti akati, ""Mwari wababa vangu akanga ari mubatsiri wangu, akandirwira pamunondo waFarao.""" 
Exodus18:5 Jeturo mukarahwa waMozisi akauya navanakomana vaMozisi nomukadzi wake kuna Mozisi murenje, pagomo raMwari, paakanga avaka misasa;" 
Exodus18:6 akati kuna Mozisi, ""Ini mukarahwa wako, Jeturo, ndauya kwauri nomukadzi wako navanakomana vake vaviri vanaye.""" 
Exodus18:7 Mozisi akandosangana nomukarahwa wake, akakotamira pasi pamberi pake, akamutsvoda; vakabvunzana mufaro, vakapinda mutende." 
Exodus18:8 Zvino Mozisi akaudza mukarahwa wake zvose zvakanga zvaitira Jehovha Farao navaIjipiti nokuda kwavaIsiraeri, nokutambudzika kose kwakavawira panzira nokurwirwa kwavo naJehovha." 
Exodus18:9 Jeturo akafara pamusoro pezvose zvakanaka zvakanga zvaitirwa vaIsiraeri naJehovha, kuti akavarwira pamaoko avaIjipiti." 
Exodus18:10 Jeturo akati, ""Jehovha ngaakudzwe akakurwirai pamaoko avaIjipiti, napamaoko aFarao, iye akarwira vanhu pamaoko avaIjipiti." 
Exodus18:11 Zvino ndinoziva kuti Jehovha mukuru kuvamwari vose pachinhu icho chavakazvikudza nacho kwavari. 
Exodus18:12 Ipapo Jeturo, mukarahwa waMozisi, akauya kuna Mwari nechipiriso chokupisa nezvimwe zvibayiro; Aroni navakuru vose vaIsiraeri vakauya vakadya zvokudya nomukarahwa waMozisi pamberi paMwari." 
Exodus18:13 Zvino fume mangwana Mozisi akagara achitambira vanhu mhaka dzavo, vanhu vakamira pamberi paMozisi kubva mangwanani kusvikira madekwana." 
Exodus18:14 Zvino mukarahwa waMozisi akati achiona zvose zvaakanga achiitira vanhu akati, ""Unoitireiko vanhu zvinhu izvi? Unogarireiko uri woga, vanhu vachimira pamberi pako kubva mangwanani kusvikira madekwana?""" 
Exodus18:15 Mozisi akati kumukarahwa wake, ""Nokuti vanhu vanouya kwandiri kuzobvunza Mwari;" 
Exodus18:16 kana vane shoko vanosiuya kwandiri; ndinositamba mhaka dziri pakati pomunhu nowokwake, ndichivazivisa zvakatemwa naMwari nemirairo yake.""" 
Exodus18:17 Zvino mukarahwa waMozisi akati kwaari, ""Chinhu ichi chaunoita hachina kunaka." 
Exodus18:18 Zvirokwazvo uchaneta kwazvo, iwe navanhu vaunavo; nokuti chinhu ichi chinokuremera; haungagoni kuchiita uri woga." 
Exodus18:19 Teerera zvino inzwi rangu, ndikurairire, Mwari agova newe. Iwe umirire vanhu pamberi paMwari, uise mashoko avo kuna Mwari;" 
Exodus18:20 uvadzidzise zvakatemwa nemirairo, uvaratidze nzira yavanofanira kufamba nayo, nebasa ravanofanira kuita." 
Exodus18:21 Asi utsvake pakati pavanhu vose varume vechokwadi vanovenga kufufurwa; uvaite vabati vavo vezvuru, navabati vamazana, navabati vamakumi mashanu, navabati vamakumi;" 
Exodus18:22 ivo ngavatambire vanhu mhaka dzavo nguva dzose; zvino kana pane shoko guru, ngavariise kwauri, asi kana ari mashoko maduku ngavaatambe vamene; naizvozvo iwe ucharerusirwa, naivo vachatakura mutoro pamwechete newe." 
Exodus18:23 Kana ukaita chinhu ichi, Mwari akakuraira saizvozvo, iwe uchagona kutsunga, navanhu ava vose vachaenda kudzimba dzavo norugare.""" 
Exodus18:24 Mozisi akateerera inzwi romukarahwa wake, akaita zvose zvaakanga audzwa naye." 
Exodus18:25 Mozisi akatsaura varume vakachenjera pakati pavaIsiraeri vose, akavaita vakuru vavanhu, vabati vezviuru, navabati vamazana, navabati vamakumi mashanu, navabati vamakumi." 
Exodus18:26 Ivo vakatamba mhaka dzavanhu nguva dzose; mashoko makuru vaisiuya nawo kuna Mozisi, asi mashoko ose maduku vaiatamba vamene." 
Exodus18:27 Zvino Mozisi akatendera mukarahwa wake kuenda hake; iye akaenda kunyika yake. 
Exodus19:1 Nomwedzi wechitatu wokubuda kwavana valsiraeri panyika nezuva iro vakasvika murenje reSinai. 
Exodus19:2 Vakati vabva paRefidhimu, vakasvika murenje reSinai, vakadzika matende avo murenje; valsiraeri vakavakapo misasa pamberi pegomo." 
Exodus19:3 Zvino Mozisi akakwira kuna Mwari, Jehovha ari mugomo akamudana, akati, ""Unofanira kutaura kudai kuna veimba yaJakobho, uudze vana vaIsiraeri, uti," 
Exodus19:4 ‘Makaona zvandakaitira vaIjipiti, uye kuti ndakakutakurai imwi pamapapiro egondo, ndikakusvitsai kwandiri." 
Exodus19:5 Naizvozvo zvino kana mukateerera inzwi rangu nomoyo wose, mukachengeta sungano yangu, muchava fuma yangu chaiyo pakati pendudzi dzose, nokuti nyika ndeyangu;" 
Exodus19:6 muchava kwandiri ushe hwavaprista, norudzi rutsvene.' Ndiwo mashoko aunofanira kundoudza vana vaIsiraeri.""" 
Exodus19:7 Zvino Mozisi akadzoka, akadana vakuru vavanhu, akaisa pamberi pavo mashoko iwayo ose, aakanga arairwa naJehovha." 
Exodus19:8 Ipapo vanhu vose vakapindura pamwechete, vachiti, ""Zvose zvataurwa naJehovha tichazviita."" Mozisi akandoudza Jehovha mashoko avanhu." 
Exodus19:9 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tarira ndinouya kwauri mugore gobvu, kuti vanhu vanzwe kana ndichitaura newe, vagotenda misi yose."" Mozisi akaudza Jehovha mashoko avanhu." 
Exodus19:10 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Enda kuvanhu, uvatsaure nhasi namangwana, vasuke nguvo dzavo," 
Exodus19:11 vagare vakazvigadzira nezuva retatu, nokuti nezuva retatu Jehovha achaburuka pamberi pavanhu vose pamusoro pegomo reSinai." 
Exodus19:12 Iwe utarire vanhu miganhu yakavapoteredza, uti kwavari, `Chenjerai kuti murege kukwira mugomo, kana kubata jinga raro; ani naani anobata gomo achaurawa zvirokwazvo';" 
Exodus19:13 ngaarege kubatwa noruoko, asi atakwe zvirokwazvo namabwe, kana apfurwe; kana chiri chipfuwo, kana munhu, haafaniri kurarama; asi kana hwamanda ichiramba ichirira, ngavakwire mugomo.""" 
Exodus19:14 Zvino Mozisi akaburuka mugomo, akaenda kuvanhu, akatsaura vanhu; ivo vakasuka nguvo dzavo." 
Exodus19:15 Akati kuvanhu, ""Garai makazvigadzira nezuva retatu; musaswedera kumukadzi.""" 
Exodus19:16 Zvino nezuva retatu koedza kutinhira kukavapo pamusoro pegomo, nemheni, negore dema, nenzwi rehwamanda rine simba guru; vanhu vose vakanga vari pamisasa vakadedera." 
Exodus19:17 Zvino Mozisi akaudza vanhu kuti vabude pamisasa vasangane naMwari, vamire pajinga regomo." 
Exodus19:18 Gomo rose reSinai rakanga richipfungaira, nokuti Jehovha akanga aburukira pamusoro paro mumoto; utsi hwaro ukakwira soutsi bwevira; gomo rose rikazununguka kwazvo." 
Exodus19:19 Zvino inzwi rehwamanda rakati richirira nokurira kwazvo, Mozisi akataura, Mwari akamupindura nenzwi." 
Exodus19:20 Ipapo Jehovha akaburukira pamusoro pegomo reSinai, Jehovha akadana Mozisi kuti akwire kumusoro wegomo, Mozisi akakwira." 
Exodus19:21 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Buruka, undoraira vanhu kuti varege kupaza kuna Jehovha kundotarira, kuti vazhinji vavo varege kufa." 
Exodus19:22 Navaprista vanoswedera kuna Jehovha, ngavazvitsaure, kuti Jehovha arege kuvaparadza.""" 
Exodus19:23 Mozisi akati kuna Jehovha, ""Vanhu havangagoni kukwira kugomo reSinai, nokuti makatiraira, muchiti, `Tarirai miganhu pagomo muritsaure.' """ 
Exodus19:24 Jehovha akati kwaari, ""Enda uburuke, mukwirezve, iwe naAroni, anewe; asi vapiristi navanhu ngavarege kupaza kuna Jehovha, kuti arege kuvaparadza.""" 
Exodus19:25 Ipapo Mozisi akaburukira kuvanhu, akandovaudza." 
Exodus20:1 Zvino Mwari akataura mashoko awa ose, akati," 
Exodus20:2 Ndini Jehovha, Mwari wako, akakubvisa munyika yeIjipiti, muimba youranda." 
Exodus20:3 Usava navamwe vamwari kunze kwangu. 
Exodus20:4 Usazviitira mufananidzo wakavezwa, kana uri mufananidzo wechinhu chiri kudenga kumusoro, kana wechiri panyika pasi, kana wechiri mumvura pasi penyika." 
Exodus20:5 Usapfugamira izvozvo, kana kuzvishumira; nokuti ini Jehovha, Mwari wako, ndiri Mwari ane godo; ndinorova vana nokuda kwezvivi zvamadzibaba avo, kusvikira kurudzi rwechitatu norwechina rwavanondivenga;" 
Exodus20:6 ndichaitira nyasha vane zviuru zvamazana vanondida, vanochengeta mirairo yangu." 
Exodus20:7 Usareva zita raJehovha Mwari wako pasina; nokuti Jehovha haangaregi kupa mhosva anoreva zita rake pasina. 
Exodus20:8 Rangarira zuva reSabata, kuti urichengete rive dzvene." 
Exodus20:9 Ubate mazuva matanhatu, uite mabasa ako ose;" 
Exodus20:10 asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata raJehovha Mwari wako; usatongobata mabasa naro, iwe, kana mwanakomana wako, kana mwanasikana wako, kana muranda wako, kana murandakadzi wako, kana zvipfuwo zvako, kana mweni wako ari mukati mamasuo ako," 
Exodus20:11 nokuti namazuva matanhatu Jehovha akaita denga napasi, negungwa, nezvose zviri mukati mazvo, akazorora nezuva rechinomwe; naizvozvo Jehovha akaropafadza zuva reSabata akariita dzvene." 
Exodus20:12 Kudza baba vako namai vako, kuti mazuva ako ave mazhinji panyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Exodus20:13 Usauraya. 
Exodus20:14 Usaita upombwe. 
Exodus20:15 Usaba. 
Exodus20:16 Usapupurira wokwako nhema. 
Exodus20:17 Usachiva imba yowokwako, usachiva mukadzi wowokwako, kana muranda wake, kana murandakadzi wake, kana nzombe yake, kana mbongoro yake, kana chimwe chowokwako.""" 
Exodus20:18 Vanhu vose vakaona kutinhira, nemheni, nenzwi rehwamanda, negomo rinopfungaira, zvino vanhu vakati vachiona izvozvo, vakadedera vakamira kure." 
Exodus20:19 Vakati kuna Mozisi, ""imwi chitaurai henyu nesu, tinzwe; asi Mwari ngaarege kutaura nesu, tirege kufa.""" 
Exodus20:20 Mozisi akati kuvanhu, ""Musatya henyu, nokuti Mwari akauya kuzokuidzai, kuti mugare muchimutya, murege kutadza.""" 
Exodus20:21 Vanhu vakamira kure, Mozisi akaswedera kurima guru kwakanga kuna Mwari." 
Exodus20:22 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Iti kuvana vaIsiraeri, 'imwi makaona mumene kuti ndakataura nemwi ndiri kudenga." 
Exodus20:23 Musaita vamwe vamwari pamwechete neni; musazviitira vamwari vesirivha kana vamwari vendarama.' 
Exodus20:24 Undiitire aritari yevhu, ubayire pamusoro payo zvipiriso zvako zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvako zvokuyananisa, namakwai ako nenzombe dzako; panzvimbo imwe neimwe pandicharangaridza zita rangu, ndichauyapo kwauri, ndichikuropafadza." 
Exodus20:25 Zvino kana uchindivakira aritari yamabwe, urege kuivaka namabwe akavezwa, nokuti kana ukasimudzira mbezo yako pamusoro pebwe, warisvibisa." 
Exodus20:26 Rega kukwirawo kuaritari yangu nezvikwiriso, kuti kunyasi kwako kurege kufukurwa kwairi.""" 
Exodus21:1 Zvino ndiyo mirairo yaunofamra kuisa pamberi pavo: 
Exodus21:2 Kana ukatenga muranda muHebheru, ngaakubatire makore matanhatu; asi nerechinomwe anofanira kubuda hake asina chaanoripa." 
Exodus21:3 Kana achipinda ari oga, anofanira kubuda ari oga; kana ano mukadzi, mukadzi wake anofanira kubuda naye." 
Exodus21:4 Kana tenzi wake akamupa mukadzi, iye akamuberekera vanakomana navanasikana, mukadzi navana vake vanofanira kuva vatenzi wake, asi iye anofanira kubuda ari oga." 
Exodus21:5 Asi kana iye muranda akati, ""Ndinoda tenzi wangu nomukadzi wangu navana vangu, handidi kubuda hangu"";" 
Exodus21:6 zvino tenzi wake anofanira kumuisa kuna Mwari, nokumuisa kumukova, kana kugwatidziro romukova; ipapo tenzi wake anofanira kumuurura nzeve yake norunji; zvino anofanira kumubatira nokusingaperi." 
Exodus21:7 Kana munhu akatengesa mukunda wake kuti ave murandakadzi, iye haafaniri kubuda savaranda varume." 
Exodus21:8 Kana asingafadzi tenzi wake, akafunga kumuwana amene, anofanira kutendera kuti adzikunurwe, haangavi nesimba rokumutengesa kuvatorwa, nokuti amunyengedzera." 
Exodus21:9 Kana akamuwanisa nomwanakomana wake; anofanira kumuitira nenzira yavakunda. 
Exodus21:10 Kana akazowana mumwe mukadzi, haafaniri kutapudza zvokudya zvake, kana nguvo dzake, kana zvaanofanirwa nazvo pakuwanikwa." 
Exodus21:11 Kana akasamuitira zvinhu izvi zvitatu, anofanira kubuda hake asingaripi chinhu, asingaripi mari." 
Exodus21:12 Anorova munhu, akafa, zvirokwazvo iye anofanira kuurawa." 
Exodus21:13 Asi kana munhu asina kumuvandira, asi Mwari achinge atendera kuti awire muruoko rwake, ndichakutarira nzvimbo kwaangatizira." 
Exodus21:14 Kana munhu akaita nobwoni kuno wokwake, akamuuraya nokunyengedzera, iwe unofanira kumubvisa paaritari yangu afe." 
Exodus21:15 Anorova baba vake kana mai vake, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa." 
Exodus21:16 Anoba munhu, akamutengesa, kana zvimwe akawanikwa ari muruoko rwake, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa." 
Exodus21:17 Anotuka baba vake kana mai vake, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa." 
Exodus21:18 Kana vanhu vakaita nharo, mumwe akarova mumwe nebwe, kana netsiva, akasafa, asi akavata panhovo;" 
Exodus21:19 kana akazomukazve, akafamba panze achidonzva, akamurova haangavi nemhosva, asi anofanira kuripira nguva yaakarasikirwa nayo, uye anofanira kumurapisa kusvikira apora kwazvo." 
Exodus21:20 Kana munhu akarova muranda wake kana murandakadzi wake neshamhu, akafira paruoko rwake, zvirokwazvo anofanira kutsiviwa." 
Exodus21:21 Asi kana akararama zuva rimwe kana maviri, haafaniri kutsiviwa; nokuti iye imari yake." 
Exodus21:22 Kana varume vakarwa, vakakuvadza mukadzi ane mimba, akashaya, asi asina kukuvadzwa hake zvikuru, iye anofanira kuripiswa sezvaanotarirwa nomurume womukadzi uyo; anofanira kuripa sezvinotarwa navatongi." 
Exodus21:23 Asi kana achinge akuvadzwa kwazvo, iye anofanira kutsiva upenyu noupenyuwo," 
Exodus21:24 ziso neziso, zino nezino, ruoko noruoko, rutsoka norutsoka," 
Exodus21:25 kutsva nokutsva, vanga nevanga, kukuvadzwa nokukuvadzwa." 
Exodus21:26 Kana munhu akarova ziso romuranda wake, kana ziso romurandakadzi wake, akariuraya, anofanira kumurega kuti aende hake nokuda kweziso rake." 
Exodus21:27 Kana akarova muranda wake kana murandakadzi wake, zino rake rikabva, anofanira kumurega kuti aende hake nokuda kwezino rake." 
Exodus21:28 Kana nzombe ikatunga murume kana mukadzi, akafa, nzombe iyoyo inofanira kutakwa namabwe, nenyama yayo haifaniri kudyiwa; asi muridzi wenzombe haangavi nemhosva." 
Exodus21:29 Asi kana nzombe yaisitunga kare, muridzi wayo akaudzwa izvozvo, akasaichengeta, ikauraya murume kana mukadzi, nzombe inofanira kutakwa namabwe, naiye muridzi wayo anofanira kuurawa." 
Exodus21:30 Kana achinge atarirwa rudzikunuro, anofanira kuripa zvose zvaatarirwa, kuti adzikunure upenyu hwake." 
Exodus21:31 Kunyange ikatunga mwanakomana kana mwanasikana vanofanira kumuitira nomurayiro uyu. 
Exodus21:32 Kana nzombe ikatunga muranda kana murandakadzi, muridzi wayo anofanira kuripira tenzi wake mashekeri esirivha ana makumi matatu, uye nzombe iyoyo inofanira kutakwa namabwe." 
Exodus21:33 Kana munhu akadziura gomba, uye kana munhu akachera gomba, akasaridzivira, nzombe kana mbongoro ikawiramo," 
Exodus21:34 muridzi wegomba anofanira kuripa, anofanira kubudisira muridzi wayo mari, asi chipfuwo chakafa chichava chake." 
Exodus21:35 Kana nzombe yomumwe munhu ikatunga yomumwe, ikafa, vanofanira kutengesa nzombe mhenyu, vagovane mutengo wayo, naiyo yakafa vanofanira kuigovana." 
Exodus21:36 Kana vaiziva kare kuti nzombe iyo inotunga, muridzi wayo akasaichengeta, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuripa, nzombe nenzombe, asi yakafa ichava yake." 
Exodus22:1 Kana munhu akaba nzombe kana gwai, akazviuraya, kana akazvitengesa, anofanira kuripa nzombe shanu panzombe imwe, namakwai mana pagwai rimwe." 
Exodus22:2 Kana mbavha ikabatwa ichipaza, ikarohwa, ikafa, wamuuraya haangavi nemhosva paropa rake." 
Exodus22:3 Asi kana zuva rakanga ramubudira, achava nemhosva paropa rake, anofanira kuripa; kana asina chinhu anofanira kutengeswa nokuda kokuba kwake." 
Exodus22:4 Kana chaakanga aba chikawanikwa muruoko rwake chichiri chipenyu, kana iri nzombe, kana mbongoro, kana gwai, anofanira kuripa kaviri." 
Exodus22:5 Kana munhu akadyisa munda, kana munda wemizambiringa, akasundira chipfuwo chake, chikandodya munda womumwe, anofanira kuripa sezvakaisvonaka zvomunda wake, nezvakaisvonaka zvomunda wake wemizambiringa." 
Exodus22:6 Kana moto ukadarika, ukabata mhinzwa, ukapisa murwi wezviyo, kana zviyo zvichiri mumunda, kana munda umene, iye akatungidza moto anofanira kuripa." 
Exodus22:7 Kana munhu achinge apa wokwake mari kana nhumbi kuti azvichengete, zvikabiwa mumba momunhu uyo, mbavha, kana ikawanikwa, inofanira kuripa kaviri." 
Exodus22:8 Kana mbavha ikasawanikwa, muridzi weimba anofanira kuswedera kuna Mwari, kuti zvionekwe kana iye asina kuisa ruoko rwake panhumbi dzowokwake," 
Exodus22:9 pamhaka dzose dzokudarika, kana iri yenzombe, kana yembongoro, kana yegwai, kana yechokufuka, kana yechinhu chipi nechipi chakarasika, kana zvikanzi, ""Ndicho!"" mhaka yavose vaviri inofanira kuuya pamberi paMwari; uyo anopiwa mhosva naMwari anofanira kuripira wokwake kaviri." 
Exodus22:10 Kana munhu akapa wokwake mbongoro, kana nzombe, kana gwai, kana chimwe chipfuwo, kuti achichengete, chikafa, kana kukuvara, kana kutinhwa asina kuzviona;" 
Exodus22:11 ivo vaviri ngavapikirane pamberi paJehovha, kuti zvionekwe kana akaisa ruoko rwake panhumbi dzowokwake; muridzi wazvo ngaatende nazvo, iye arege kuripa." 
Exodus22:12 Asi kana zvikabiwa zviri kwaari, anofanira kuripira muridzi wazvo." 
Exodus22:13 Kana zvikabvamburwa nechikara, ngaauye nazvo chive chapupu; haafaniri kuripa zvabvamburwa." 
Exodus22:14 Kana munhu achinge akumbira chinhu kunowokwake, chakuvara, kana kufa, muridzi wacho asisipo, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuchiripa." 
Exodus22:15 Kana muridzi wacho aripo, haafaniri kuripa; kana chiri chinhu chairipirwa, muripo wacho wauya panzvimbo yacho." 
Exodus22:16 Kana munhu achinge anyengedzera musikana asina kunyengwa, akavata naye, zvirokwazvo anofanira kumuroora, ave mukadzi wake." 
Exodus22:17 Kana baba vake vakaramba chose kumupa iye, anofanira kuripa mari yakaenzana neroora yavasikana." 
Exodus22:18 Usarega muroyi ari mupenyu. 
Exodus22:19 Ani naani anovata nechipfuwo, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa." 
Exodus22:20 Anobayira mumwe mwari, asi Jehovha chete, anofanira kuparadzwa chose." 
Exodus22:21 Usaitira mutorwa zvakaipa, kana kumumanikidza, nokuti nemiwo maiva vatorwa munyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus22:22 Usatambudza chirikadzi kana nherera. 
Exodus22:23 Kana ukatongovatambudza, vakadana kwandiri, ndichateerera kudana kwavo;" 
Exodus22:24 kutsamwa kwangu kuchamuka, ndikakuurayai nomunondo; vakadzi venyu vachava chirikadzi, navana venyu nherera." 
Exodus22:25 Kana ukapa mumwe wavanhu vangu vaunavo chikwereti chemari, ari murombo, usaita kwaari somupi wechikwereti; usareva mhindu kwaari." 
Exodus22:26 Kana ukatongotora nguvo yowokwako ruve rubatso, unofanira kuidzosera kwaari zuva rovira;" 
Exodus22:27 nokuti ndicho chokufuka chake choga, inguvo yake yaanofukidza nayo ganda rake; achavata neiko? Kana iye akadana kwandiri, ndichamunzwa, nokuti ndine tsitsi." 
Exodus22:28 Usatuka Mwari, kana kushuridzira mubati pakati pavanhu vako." 
Exodus22:29 Usanonoka kupa Mwari zvimwe kune zvizhinji zvezviyo zvako nezvinomwiwa. Undipe dangwe ravana vako vavakomana. 
Exodus22:30 Uitewo saizvozvo nenzombe dzako namakwai ako; rigare mazuva manomwe namai varo, ugondipa iro nezuva rorusere." 
Exodus22:31 imwi munofanira kuva vanhu vatsvene kwandiri; naizvozvo hamufaniri kudya nyama yakabvamburwa nezvikara kusango, muikandire imbwa." 
Exodus23:1 Usapupurira mumwe nhema; usabatsirana nowakaipa pakuita chapupu chisakarurama. 
Exodus23:2 Usatevera vazhinji pakuita zvakaipa; usapupura pamhosva pamwechete navazhinji kuti irege kururamiswa; 
Exodus23:3 usatsaura murombo uchimuitira tsitsi pamhaka yake. 
Exodus23:4 Kana ukasangana nenzombe kana mbongoro yakarasika yomuvengi wako, zvirokwazvo unofanira kuidzosera kwaari." 
Exodus23:5 Kana ukaona mbongoro yomuvengi wako yawira pasi nomutoro wayo, usaramba kumubatsira, zvirokwazvo umubatsire kuisunungura." 
Exodus23:6 Usatsautsa zvakarurama zvomurombo pamhaka yake. 
Exodus23:7 Unzvenge shoko renhema; usauraya munhu asina mhosva uye akarurama, nokuti handingaruramisiri akaipa." 
Exodus23:8 Usagamuchira fufuro, nokuti fufuro inopofumadza vanoona, nokukanganisa mashoko avakarurama." 
Exodus23:9 Usatambudza mutorwa, nokuti munoziva moyo womutorwa, zvamakanga muri vatorwa munyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus23:10 Dzvara munda wako makore matanhatu, uchikohwa zvibereko zvawo." 
Exodus23:11 Asi negore rechinomwe unofanira kuuzorodza nokurega kuurima, kuti varombo vavanhu vako vadye, nemhuka dzesango dzidye zvavasiya. Saizvozvo uitewo nomunda wako wemizambiringa nomunda wako wemiorivhi." 
Exodus23:12 Ubate mabasa ako namazuva matanhatu, ugozorora nezuva rechinomwe; kuti nzombe yako nembongoro yako zvizorore, nomwanakomana womurandakadzi wako nomutorwa vambofema havo." 
Exodus23:13 Zvinhu zvose zvandakakuudzai muzviteerere; musareva zita ravamwe vamwari, ngarirege kunzwika pamiromo yenyu." 
Exodus23:14 Undiitire mutambo katatu pagore. 
Exodus23:15 Uite mutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa; udye zvingwa zvisina kuviriswa mazuva manomwe, sezvandakakuraira, panguva yakatarwa pamwedzi weAbhibhi (nokuti wakabuda nawo Ijipiti); kurege kuva nomunhu anouya pamberi pangu asina chinhu;" 
Exodus23:16 uye mutambo wokukohwa, wezvitsva zvamabasa ako, zvawakadzvara mumunda mako; uye mutambo wokuunganidza pakupera kwegore, kana wounganidza zvamabasa ako pamunda." 
Exodus23:17 Varume venyu vose ngavauye pamberi paShe Mwari katatu pagore. 
Exodus23:18 Usandivigira ropa rechibayiro changu pamwechete nechingwa chakaviriswa; namafuta omutambo wangu arege kuvata usiku hwose kusvikira mangwana. 
Exodus23:19 Zvokutanga zvezvitsva zvomunda wako unofanira kuuya nazvo kumba kwaJehovha Mwari wako. Usabika mbudzana mumukaka wamai vayo. 
Exodus23:20 Tarira, ndinotuma mutumwa pamberi pako, akuchengete panzira, akuise panzvimbo yandakakugadzirira." 
Exodus23:21 Munzwei, muteerere inzwi rake, musamutsamwisa, nokuti haangakukangamwiriyi kudarika kwenyu, nokuti zita rangu riri maari." 
Exodus23:22 Asi kana ukateerera inzwi rake nomoyo wako wose, ukaita izvozvo zvose zvandinotaura, ndichava muvengi wavavengi vako, nomudzivisi wavadzivisi vako." 
Exodus23:23 Nokuti mutumwa wangu achakutungamirira, akusvitse kuvaAmori, navaHeti, navaPerezi, navaKenani, navaHivhi, navaJebhusi; ini ndichavaparadza." 
Exodus23:24 Usapfugamira vamwari vavo, kana kuvashumira, kana kutevera mabasa avo; asi unofanira kuvaparadza chose, nokuputsanya shongwe dzavo." 
Exodus23:25 Shumira Jehovha Mwari wako, kuti aropafadze chingwa chako nemvura yako; neni ndichabvisa urwere pakati penyu." 
Exodus23:26 Hakungavi nechinhu chinosvodza, kana chisingabereki panyika yako; ndichazadzisa mazuva ako." 
Exodus23:27 Ndichatuma chityiso changu pamberi pako, nokukanganisa ndudzi dzose dzauchasvika kwadziri, ndichafuratidza vavengi vako vose." 
Exodus23:28 Ndichatuma mago pamberi pako, adzinge vaHivhi, navaKenani, navaHeti pamberi pako." 
Exodus23:29 Handingavadzingi pamberi pako negore rimwe, kuti nyika irege kuita renje, zvikara zvesango zvirege kukuwandira." 
Exodus23:30 Ndichanyatsovadzinga pamberi pako, kusvikira mava vazhinji, upiwe nyika ive nhaka yako." 
Exodus23:31 Ndichaisa miganhu yako kubva paGungwa Dzvuku kusvikira kuGungwa ravaFirisitia, nokubva kurenje kusvikira kuRwizi, nokuti ndichapa vagere munyika mumaoko enyu, uvadzinge pamberi pako." 
Exodus23:32 Rega kuita sungano navo, kana navamwari vavo." 
Exodus23:33 Havafaniri kugara munyika yako, kuti varege kukutadzisa pamberi pangu, nokuti kana ukashumira vamwari vavo, zvirokwazvo izvo zvichava musungo kwauri." 
Exodus24:1 Zvino iye akati kuna Mozisi, ""Kwira kuna Jehovha, iwe naAroni, naNadhabhi naAbhihu, navakuru vana makumi manomwe vavaIsiraeri, mupfugame muri kure;" 
Exodus24:2 Mozisi ngaaswedere pedo naJehovha, asi ivo ngavarege kuswedera pedo, navanhu ngavarege kukwira naye.""" 
Exodus24:3 Zvino Mozisi akauya akaudza vanhu mashoko ose aJehovha, nezvaakanga atema zvose, vanhu vakapindura nenzwi rimwe vakati, ""Mashoko ose akarehwa naJehovha tichaaita.""" 
Exodus24:4 Mozisi akanyora mashoko ose aJehovha, akamuka mangwanani, akandovaka aritari pasi pegomo, akamisa shongwe dzine gumi nembiri, zvakafanana namarudzi ane gumi namaviri avaIsiraeri." 
Exodus24:5 Zvino akatuma majaya avana valsiraeri vakapisira Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa, nokumubayira zvipiriso zvenzombe zvokuyananisa." 
Exodus24:6 Mozisi akatora hafu yeropa, akariisa mumidziyo, imwe hafu akasasa paaritari." 
Exodus24:7 Akatora bhuku yesungano, akarava vanhu vachizvinzwa; ivo vakati, ""Zvose zvarehwa naJehovha tichazviita, tichateerera.""" 
Exodus24:8 Ipapo Mozisi akatora ropa akarisasa pamusoro pavanhu, akati, ""Tarirai ropa resungano yakaitwa naJehovha nemwi pamusoro pamashoko iwaya ose.""" 
Exodus24:9 Zvino Mozisi, naAroni, naNadhabhi, naAbhihu, navakuru vana makumi manomwe'vavaIsiraeri vakakwira." 
Exodus24:10 Vakaona Mwari wavaIsiraeri; pasi petsoka dzake pakanga pakaita samabwe esafiri, zvaionekera sokudenga chaiko." 
Exodus24:11 Asi haana kutambanudzira ruoko rwake kuvakuru ivavo vavana vaIsiraeri; vakaona Mwari, vakadya, vakamwa." 
Exodus24:12 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Kwira kwandiri muno mugomo, ugarepo; ndichakupa mabwendefa amabwe anomurayiro nomurau wandanyora, kuti uvadzidzise.""" 
Exodus24:13 Mozisi akasimuka naJoshua, muranda wake, Mozisi akakwira mugomo raMwari," 
Exodus24:13 Mozisi akasimuka naJoshua, muranda wake, Mozisi akakwira mugomo raMwari," 
Exodus24:14 akati kuvakuru, ""Timirirei pano, kusvikira tichadzokerazve kwamuri; tarirai Aroni naHuri vanemi; ani naani ane mhaka ngaaende kwavari.""" 
Exodus24:15 Zvino Mozisi akakwira mugomo, gore rikafukidza gomo." 
Exodus24:16 Kubwinya kwaJehovha kukagara pagomo reSinai, gore rikarifukidza mazuva matanhatu; nezuva rechinomwe akadana Mozisi ari mukati megore." 
Exodus24:17 Kubwinya kwaJehovha kukaonekwa navana valsiraeri kwakaita somoto unopisa kwazvo, uri pamusoro wegomo." 
Exodus24:18 Mozisi akapinda mukati megore, akakwira mugomo; Mozisi akagara mugomo mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku una makumi mana." 
Exodus25:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Exodus25:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri kuti vandipe chipo; munditorere chipo kune mumwe nomumwe anoda kundiitira izvozvo nomoyo wake. 
Exodus25:3 Ndicho chipo chamunofanira kutora kwavari: Ndarama, nesirivha, nendarira," 
Exodus25:4 nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, nemvere dzembudzi," 
Exodus25:5 namatebwe amakondobwe akazodzwa zvitsvuku, namatebwe amatenhe, namatanda omuakasia," 
Exodus25:6 namafuta emwenje, nezvinonhuhwira zvamafuta okuzodza, noupfu unonhuhwira," 
Exodus25:7 nezvibwe zveonikisi, nezvibwe zvokuisa paefodhi napahombodo yechipfuva." 
Exodus25:8 Ngavandiitire nzvimbo tsvene, kuti ndigare pakati pavo;" 
Exodus25:9 sezvandichakuratidza zvose, iwo mufananidzo wetabhenakeri, nomufananidzo wenhumbi dzayo dzose, munofanira kuita saizvozvo." 
Exodus25:10 Ngavaite areka yamatanda omuakasia, kureba kwayo kunofanira kuva makubhiti maviri nehafu, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu, nokukwira kwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu." 
Exodus25:11 Unofanira kuifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka, uifukidze nechomukati nechokunze, uite pamusoro payo hata yendarama inoipoteredza." 
Exodus25:12 Uiumbire zvindori zvina zvendarama, uzviise pamakumbo ayo mana, zvindori zviviri zvive parutivi rumwe, nezvindori zviviri panorumwe rutivi." 
Exodus25:13 Uveze matanda omuakasia, ndokuafukidza nendarama." 
Exodus25:14 Ugopinza matanda iwayo muzvindori zviri panhivi dzeareka, kuti areka itakurwe nawo." 
Exodus25:15 Matanda anofanira kugara muzvindori zveareka, ngaarege kubviswa kwazviri." 
Exodus25:16 Zvino unofanira kuisa mukati meareka chipupuriro chandichakupa. 
Exodus25:17 Uitewo chifunhiro chokuyananisa nendarama yakaisvonaka; kureba kwacho makubhiti maviri nehafu; noupamhi hwacho kubhiti rimwe nehafu. 
Exodus25:18 Uitewo makerubhi maviri endarama uaite nendarama yakapambadzirwa pamiromo miviri yechifunhiro chokuyananisa. 
Exodus25:19 Ita kerubhi rimwe pamuromo mumwe nerimwe kerubhi pano mumwe muromo; uite makerubhi pamiromo yacho miviri zvive chinhu chimwe nechifunhiro chokuyananisa. 
Exodus25:20 Makerubhi atambanudzire mapapiro avo kumusoro, akafukidza chifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Exodus25:21 Uise chifunhiro chokuyananisa pamusoro peareka, ugoisa mukati meareka chipupuriro chandichakupa." 
Exodus25:22 Ndipo pandichasangana newe, nditaure newe, ndiri pamusoro pechifunhiro chokuyananisa, pamusoro peareka yechipupuriro, ndikuudze zvose zvandichakupa, kuti uraire vanhu valsiraeri." 
Exodus25:23 Itawo tafura yamatanda omuakasia, kureba kwayo makubhiti maviri, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwe nokukwirira kwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu." 
Exodus25:24 Uifukidze nendarama yakaisvonaka, ugoiitirawo hata yendarama inoipoteredza." 
Exodus25:25 Uiitire ukomba unoipoteredza, unoupamhi sobwechanza, ugoiitirawo hata yendarama inopoteredza ukomba hwayo." 
Exodus25:26 Uiitire zvindori zvina zvendarama, ugoisa zvindori pamakona mana ari pamakumbo ayo mana." 
Exodus25:27 Zvindori zvive pedo noukomba, pave pokutakura tafura napo namatanda." 
Exodus25:28 Matanda uaite nomuakasia, uafukidze nendarama, tafura igotakurwa nawo." 
Exodus25:29 Uitewo midziyo yayo, nembiya dzayo, nezvirongo zvayo, nemikombe yayo yokudira nayo; uzviite nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus25:30 Misi yose unofanira kuisa pamberi pangu patafura chingwa chokuratidza. 
Exodus25:31 Unofanira kuitawo chigadziko chemwenje chendarama yakaisvonaka; chigadziko chiitwe nendarama yakapambadzirwa, chigadziko chacho, nehunde yacho, nezvimbiya zvacho, namapfundo acho, namaruva acho; zvose ngazviitwe chive chinhu chimwe nacho;" 
Exodus25:32 kumativi acho ngakubude matavi matanhatu; matavi matatu echigadziko kuno rumwe rutivi rwacho, namatavi matatu echigadziko kuno rumwe rutivi rwacho." 
Exodus25:33 Ngapave nezvimbiya zvitatu zvakaumbwa samaruva omuamanda padavi rimwe, nepfundo, neruva, nezvimbiya zvitatu zvakaumbwa samaruva omuamanda pane rimwe davi, nepfundo, neruva: saizvozvo matavi matanhatu anobuda pachigadziko;" 
Exodus25:34 uye pachigadziko pave nezvimbiya zvina zvakaumbwa samaruva azvo; 
Exodus25:35 nepfundo panyasi pamatavi maviri akaumbwa pamwechete nacho, nepfundo panyasi pamamwe matavi akaumbwa pamwechete nacho, nepfundo panyasi pamatavi maviri akaumbwa pamwechete nacho, akafanana namatavi matanhatu anobuda pachigadziko." 
Exodus25:36 Mapfundo azvo namatavi azvo ngazvive pamwechete nazvo; zvose zvive chinhu chimwe chakaumbwa nendarama yakaisvonaka yakapambadzirwa. 
Exodus25:37 Uitewo mwenje yacho minomwe; vagotungidza mwenje yacho, kuti ivhenekere pamberi pacho." 
Exodus25:38 Nembato dzacho, nendiro dzacho, nemwenje yacho, zviumbwe nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus25:39 Ngazviumbwe netarenda rendarama yakaisvonaka, pamwechete nemidziyo iyoyo yose." 
Exodus25:40 Uchenjerere kuti uzviite nomufananidzo wazvo wawakaratidzwa pagomo. 
Exodus26:1 “Uite tabhenakeri namachira ane gumi, uaite nomucheka wakaisvonaka, wakarukwa, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, zvina makerubhi, rive basa romunhu anogona kuruka." 
Exodus26:2 Kureba kwejira rimwe nerimwe ngakuve makubhiti makumi maviri namasere, noupamhi bwejira rimwe nerimwe makubhiti mana; machira ose aenzane." 
Exodus26:3 Machira mashanu ngaabatanidzwe pamwechete, namamwe machira mashanu ngaabatanidzwe pamwechetezve." 
Exodus26:4 Uite zvishwe zvitema pamupendero wejira rimwe rokupedzisira panaakabatanidzwa pamwechete; ugoitawo saizvozvo pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira panaakabatanidzwazve pamwechete. 
Exodus26:5 Uite zvishwe zvina makumi mashanu pajira rimwe, nokuitawo zvishwe zvina makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira ramamwe akabatanidzwa pamwechete, zvishwe zvitarisane." 
Exodus26:6 Uitewo zvikorekedzo zvendarama zvina makumi mashanu, ugobatanidza machira nezvikorekedzo izvozvo, tabhenakeri chive chinhu chimwe chete." 
Exodus26:7 Uite machira emvere dzembudzi rive tende pamusoro petabhenakeri; uiite namachira ane gumi nerimwe. 
Exodus26:8 Kureba kwejira rimwe ngakuve makubhiti ana makumi matatu, noupamhi bwejira rimwe makubhiti mana; machira ane gumi nerimwe aenzane." 
Exodus26:9 Ubatanidze machira mashanu pamwechete, namachira matanhatu pamwechete, ugopeta jira rechitanhatu, riite mheto mbiri kumuromo kwetende." 
Exodus26:10 Uitewo zvishwe zvina makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rimwe rokupedzisira panaakabatanidzwa pamwechete, nezvishwe zvina makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira panamamwe akabatanidzwa pamwechete." 
Exodus26:11 Uitewo zvikorekedzo zvina makumi mashanu zvendarira, ugoisa zvikorekedzo muzvishwe, ubatanidze tende pamwechete chive chinhu chimwe chete." 
Exodus26:12 Rutivi rwakasara runorembera pamachira etende, hafu yejira rimwe rakasara, ngariremberere necheshure kwetabhenakeri." 
Exodus26:13 Uye kubhiti rimwe panorumwe rutivi, nekubhiti rimwe panorumwe rutivizve, zvakasara pakureba kwamachira etende, ngazvirembere panhivi dzetabhenakeri nechouno nechokoko, kuifukidza." 
Exodus26:14 Uitirewo tende chifukidzo chamatebwe amakondobwe akazodzwa muti mutsvuku, nechifukidzo chamatebwe amatenhe pamusoro paizvozvo." 
Exodus26:15 Uitirewo tabhenakeri mapuranga anomiswa omuakasia. 
Exodus26:16 Kureba kwepuranga rimwe nerimwe ngakuve makubhiti ane gumi, noupamhi bwepuranga rimwe nerimwe kubhiti rimwe nehafu." 
Exodus26:17 Puranga rimwe nerimwe ngariitirwe zvibato zviviri, zvakabatanidzwa; ndizvo zvaunofanira kuitira mapuranga ose etabhenakeri." 
Exodus26:18 Unofanira kuita mapuranga etabhenakeri, mapuranga ana makumi maviri kurutivi rwezasi, anotarira zasi." 
Exodus26:19 Itawo zvigadziko zvesirivha zvina makumi maviri, zvigadziko zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe pazvibato zvaro zviviri, nezvigadziko zviviri pasi perimwe puranga pazvibato zvaro zviviri;" 
Exodus26:20 uye mapuranga makumi maviri kurutivi rwechipiri rwetabhenakeri kurutivi rwokumusoro; 
Exodus26:21 nezvigadziko zvawo zvesirivha zvina makumi mana, zvigadziko zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe, nezvigadziko zviviri pasi perimwe puranga." 
Exodus26:22 Itawo mapuranga matanhatu kurutivi rwemberi rwetabhenakeri kumavirazuva. 
Exodus26:23 Uitewo mapuranga maviri kumakona etabhenakeri kurutivi rwemberi. 
Exodus26:24 Ngaaite maviri nechenyasi; saizvozvo ngaave maviri akabatanidzwa kusvikira kumusoro kuchindori chokutanga; ngaaitwe saizvozvo ari maviri, avepo pamakona maviri." 
Exodus26:25 Ave mapuranga masere ane zvigadziko zvawo zvesirivha, zvive zvigadziko zvine gumi nezvitanhatu; zvigadziko zviviri zvive pasi pepuranga rimwe nezvigadziko zviri pasi perimwe puranga." 
Exodus26:26 Uitewo mbariro dzomuakasia, shanu dzamapuranga orumwe rutivi rwetabhenakeri;" 
Exodus26:27 nembariro shanu dzamapuranga orutivi rwechipiri rwetabhenakeri, nembariro shanu dzamapuranga orutivi rwetabhenakeri kurutivi rwemberi kumavirazuva." 
Exodus26:28 Rumbariro rwapakati ngaruve pakati pamapuranga, rubve kuno rumwe rutivi ruchindosvikira kuno rumwe rutivi." 
Exodus26:29 Ufukidze mapuranga nendarama; uitewo zvindori zvawo nendarama, pangagara mbariro: nembariro udzifukidze nendarama." 
Exodus26:30 Uvake tabhenakeri nomufananidzo wayo wawakaratidzwa mugomo. 
Exodus26:31 Uitewo chidzitiro nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa; ngachiitwe chinamakerubhi, rive basa romunhu anogona kuruka." 
Exodus26:32 Uchirembedze pambiru ina, dzomuakasia dzakafukidzwa nendarama, uye dzinofanira kumira pazvigadziko zvadzo zvina zvesirivha." 
Exodus26:33 Urembedze chidzitiro pasi pezvikorekedzo, ugoisamo areka yechipupuriro mukati mechidzitiro; chidzitiro chigova kwamuri chinhu chinoparadzanisa pakati penzvimbo tsvene nenzvimbo tsvenetsvene." 
Exodus26:34 Uisewo chifunhiro chokuyananisa pamusoro peareka yechipupuriro panzvimbo tsvene-tsvene. 
Exodus26:35 Tafura uiise kunze kwechidzitiro nechigadziko chemwenje chakatarisana netafura parutivi rwetabhenakeri kurutivi rwenyasi; tafura uiise kurutivi rwokumusoro. 
Exodus26:36 Unofanira kuitirawo mukova wetende chidzitiro chezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa, rive basa romusoni anogona." 
Exodus26:37 Uitire chidzitiro mbiru shanu dzomuakasia, uchidzifukidza nendarama; zvikorekedzo zvadzo zvive zvendarama, uye uzviumbire zvigadziko zvishanu zvendarira." 
Exodus27:1 “Unofanira kuita aritari nomuakasia; kureba kwayo makubhiti mashanu, noupamhi hwayo makubhiti mashanu; aritari ngaive nenhivi ina dzakaenzana; kukwirira kwayo ngakuve makubhiti matatu." 
Exodus27:2 Uitewo nyanga dzayo pamakona ayo mana; nyanga dzayo dzive chinhu chimwe nayo; uifukidze nendarira. 
Exodus27:3 Uiitire hari dzokubvisa madota ayo, nefoshoro dzayo, nemidziyo yayo, nezvikokovonho zvenyama, nezvaenga zvomoto; midziyo yayo yose unofanira kuiita nendarira." 
Exodus27:4 Unofanira kuiitirawo chakarukwa chendarira chakarukwa samambure; pamambure uite zvindori zvina zvendarira pamakona awo mana. 
Exodus27:5 Uzviise pasi pechitsiko chearitari chakaipotedza nechenyasi, kuti mambure asvikire pakati pearitari." 
Exodus27:6 Uitire aritari matanda omuakasia, ugoafukidza nendarira." 
Exodus27:7 Matanda iwayo aiswe muzvindori, matanda agova panhivi mbiri dzearitari kana voitakura." 
Exodus27:8 Uiite namapuranga, isava nechinhu mukati, sezvawakaratidzwa mugomo, uiite saizvozvo." 
Exodus27:9 Unofanira kuitawo ruvazhe rwetabhenakeri; kurutivi rwezasi, rwakatarira zasi, ngakuve nemicheka yakarembedzwa yakaisvonaka, yakarukwa; kureba kwayo makubhiti ane zana kurutivi rumwe;" 
Exodus27:10 ngapave nembiru dzina makumi maviri, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina makumi maviri, zvendarira, nezvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvive zvesirivha." 
Exodus27:11 Saizvozvowo kurutivi rwokumusoro rwakareba ngapavewo nemicheka yakarembedzwa, kureba kwayo makubhiti ane zana; nembiru dzayo dzina makumi maviri, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina makumi maviri, zvendarira; zvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo ngazvive zvesirivha." 
Exodus27:12 Paupamhi hworuvazhe kurutivi rwamavirazuva panofanira kuva nemicheka yakarembedzwa ina makubhiti makumi mashanu, nembiru dzinegumi nezvigadziko zvadzo zvine gumi." 
Exodus27:13 Napaupamhi hworuvazhe kurutivi rwamabvazuva, kunotarira kurutivi rwamabvazuva, kunotarira kumabvazuva, ngakuve namakubhiti ana makumi mashanu." 
Exodus27:14 Micheka yakarembedzwa kurutivi rumwe rwesuo inofanira kuva namakubhiti ane gumi namashanu, nembiru dzayo nhatu nezvigadziko zvadzo zvitatu." 
Exodus27:15 Nokuno rumwe rutivi ngapave nemicheka yakarembedzwa ina makubhiti ane gumi namashanu, nembiru dzayo nhatu, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvitatu." 
Exodus27:16 Napasuo roruvanze ngapave nechidzitiro china makubhiti ana makumi maviri chezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa, rive basa romusoni anogona, nembiru dzacho ina nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina." 
Exodus27:17 Mbiru dzose dzoruvazhe dzakapoteredza ngadzive nezvindori zvesirivha, nezvikorekedzo zvadzo zvesirivha, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvendarira." 
Exodus27:18 Kureba koruvazhe kunofanira kuva makubhiti ane zana, noupamhi makubhiti makumi mashanu kose, nokukwirira makubhiti mashanu; zviitwe nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvendarira." 
Exodus27:19 Nhumbi dzose dzetabhenakeri dzamabasa ayo ose, nembambo dzayo dzose, nembambo dzose dzoruvazhe ngadzive dzendarira." 
Exodus27:20 Unofanira kuraira vana vaIsiraeri kuti vauye kwauri namafuta omuorivhi akaisvonaka akasviniwa omwenje, kuti avhenekese mwenje nguva dzose." 
Exodus27:21 Mutende rokusangana, kunze kwechidzitiro chiri pamberi pechipupuriro, Aroni navanakomana vake ngavaugadziremo pamberi paJehovha, kubva pamadekwana kusvikira mangwanani; ngauve mutemo nokusingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi ose avana vaIsiraeri." 
Exodus28:1 Zvino uswededze kwauri Aroni, mukuru wako, navanakomana vake pamwechete naye, vabude pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, kuti andishumire pabasa rouprista, vanoti; Aroni, naNadhabhi, naAbhihu, naEreazari, naItamari, ivo vanakomana vaAroni." 
Exodus28:2 Uitire Aroni, mukuru wako, nguvo tsvene, akudzwe nadzo, uye huve ukomba." 
Exodus28:3 Utaure navose vane moyo yakachenjera, vandakazadza nomweya wouchenjeri, kuti vaitire Aroni nguvo dzokumuita mutsvene nadzo, kuti andishumire pabasa rouprista." 
Exodus28:4 nguvo dzaunofanira kuita ndidzo: Hombodo yechipfuva, neefodhi, nejasi, nenguvo yakarukwa, nenguwani, nebhanhire, ngavaitire Aroni, mukoma wako, navanakomana vake nguvo tsvene, kuti andishumire pabasa rouprista." 
Exodus28:5 Ngavatore ndarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka." 
Exodus28:6 Efodhi ngavaiite nendarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa, rive basa romubati wakachenjera." 
Exodus28:7 Ngaive namabandi maviri pamafudzi akabatanidzwa pamiromo yayo miviri; kuti ibatanidzwe saizvozvo. 
Exodus28:8 Nebhanhire rakarukwa nomubati wakachenjera, riri pamusoro payo, rokuisunga naro, ngariitwe saiyo, uye chive chinhu chimwe chete nayo, iitwe nendarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa." 
Exodus28:9 Utorewo mabwe maviri eonikisi, ugonyora pamusoro pawo mazita avana vaIsiraeri," 
Exodus28:10 mazita matanhatu pabwe rimwe, namazita matanhatu akasara pane rimwe ibwezve, pakuzvarwa kwavo." 
Exodus28:11 Unyore pamabwe iwayo maviri, sebasa romuvezi wamabwe, sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa, mazita avana vaIsiraeri; uanyudze muzviruva zvendarama." 
Exodus28:12 Zvino uise mabwe iwayo maviri pamabandi apamafudzi eefodhi, kuti ave mabwe okurangaridza vana vaIsiraeri; Aroni ngaatakure mazita awo pamberi paJehovha pamafudzi ake maviri, chive chokurangaridza." 
Exodus28:13 Unofanira kuitawo zviruva zvendarama," 
Exodus28:14 nezviketani zviviri zvendarama yakaisvonaka; uzviite sorwonzi rwakakoshwa, ugoisa zviketani izvo zvakamoniwa pazviruva izvozvo." 
Exodus28:15 Unofanira kuitawo hombodo yechipfuva yokutonga, rive basa romubati wakachenjera; uiite ifanane neefodhi, uiite nendarama, nezvakarukwa, zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa." 
Exodus28:16 Ngaive nenhivi ina dzakaenzana, dzakaita mheto mbiri; kureba kwayo kuite sapanosvika mimwe, noupamhi hwayo sapanosvika mimwewo." 
Exodus28:17 Uise mukati mayo zviruva zvinamabwe, misara mina yamabwe; mumwe musara uve nesadhio, netopasi, nekabhunakeri. Ndiwo musara wokutanga." 
Exodus28:18 Pamusara wechipiri samaragidhino, nesafiri, nedhaimani," 
Exodus28:19 pamusara wechitatu hiakindi, neagati, neametisi;" 
Exodus28:20 pamusara wechina beriri neonikisi, nejasipiri; ngaapotedzwe nendarama muzviruva zvawo." 
Exodus28:21 Mabwe iwayo ngaave namazita avana vaIsiraeri ane gumi namaviri, sezvinoita mazita avo; ngaave namarudzÌ ane gumi namaviri, rimwe nerimwe rive nezita raro, sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa." 
Exodus28:22 Napahombodo yechipfuva unofanira kuita zviketani zvakafanana norwonzi, zvendarama yakamoniwa yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus28:23 Uitewo pahombodo yechipfuva zvindori zviviri zvendarama, ugoisa zvindori izvo zviviri pamicheto miviri yehombodo yechipfuva." 
Exodus28:24 Zvino uise zviketani zviviri zvendarama yakamoniwa pazvindori zviviri zviri pamicheto yehombodo yechipfuva. 
Exodus28:25 Nemimwe miromo miviri yezviketani zviviri zvakamoniwa uzviise pazviruva zviviri, uzviise pamabandi apamafudzi eefodhi nechemberi kwayo." 
Exodus28:26 Uitewo zvindori zviviri zvendarama, ugozviisa pamicheto miviri yehombodo yechipfuva pamupendero wayo uri kurutivi rweefodhi nechomukati." 
Exodus28:27 Unofanira kuitawo zvindori zviviri zvendarama, ugozviisa pamabandi maviri apamafudzi eefodhi zasi nechemberi kwayo, pedo payakabatanidzwa napo, pamusoro pebhanhire reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri." 
Exodus28:28 Zvino ngavasunganidze hombodo yechipfuva nezvindori zvayo pazvindori zveefodhi norwonzi rutema, kuti ruve pamusoro pebhanhire reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri, kuti hombodo yechipfuva irege kusununguka paefodhi." 
Exodus28:29 Naizvozvo Aroni anofanira kutakura mazita avana vaIsiraeri pahombodo yechipfuva yokutonga pamoyo wake, kana achipinda panzvimbo tsvene, kuti chive chirangaridzo pamberi paJehovha nguva dzose." 
Exodus28:30 Unofanira kuisawo muhombodo yechipfuva yokutonga Urimi neTumimi, kuti zvive pamoyo waAroni kana achipinda pamberi paJehovha; Aroni agotakura kutongwa kwavana vaIsiraeri pamoyo wake pamberi paJehovha nguva dzose." 
Exodus28:31 Unofanira kuita jasi reefodhi rose romucheka mutema. 
Exodus28:32 Ngarive neburi rokupinza musoro pakati paro, rive nomupendero wakarukwa unopoteredza buri raro, sapaburi renguvo yokurwa, kuti irege kubvaruka."
