Exodus28:33 Pamipendero yaro unofanira kuita matamba ezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, anopoteredza mupendero, nezvitare zvinorira zvendarama pakati pawo kunhivi dzose." 
Exodus28:34 Ngapave nechitare chimwe nedamba rimwe, chitare chimwe nedamba rimwe pamipendero yejasi kunhivi dzose." 
Exodus28:35 Aroni ngaarifuke kana achishumira, kuti kurira kwazvo kunzwike, kana achipinda panzvimbo tsvene pamberi paJehovha, uye kana achibuda, kuti arege kufa." 
Exodus28:36 Unofanira kuitawo bwendefa rendarama yakaisvonaka, ugonyora pamusoro paro sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa, uchiti: MUTSVENE KUNA JEHOVHA." 
Exodus28:37 Uriise parwonzi rutema, rigoiswa panguwani, rive nechemberi kwenguwani." 
Exodus28:38 Ngarive pahuma yaAroni, Aroni atakure zvakaipa zvingavapo pazvinhu zvitsvene, zvichaitwa zvitsvene navana vaIsiraeri pazvipo zvavo zvitsvene zvose; rinofanira kugara pahuma yake nguva dzose, kuti ivo vagamuchirwe pamberi paJehovha." 
Exodus28:39 Unofanira kuitawo nguvo yakarukwa yomucheka wakaisvonaka, uye uite nguwani yomucheka wakaisvonaka, uye uitewo bhanhire, rive basa romusoni anogona." 
Exodus28:40 Navanakomana vaAroni unofanira kuvaitira nguvo, uvaitirewo mabhanhire, uvaitirewo nguwani dzomusoro, vakudzwe nadzo, uye huve ukomba." 
Exodus28:41 Udzifukidze Aroni, mukoma wako, pamwechete navanakomana vake; uye uvazodze, nokuvagadza, nokuvatsaura, kuti vandishumire pabasa rouprista." 
Exodus28:42 Unofanira kuvaitira mabhuruku omucheka kuti vafukidze nyama yavo yakashama; ngaatange pazviuno, asvikire pachidya;" 
Exodus28:43 ngaafukwe naAroni navanakomana vake kana vachipinda mutende rokusangana, uye kana vachiswedera paaritari kushumira panzvimbo tsvene; kuti varege kuzvitorera mhosva, vakafa; ngauve mutemo usingaperi kwaari nokuvana vake vanomutevera." 
Exodus29:1 Zvino ndicho chinhu chaunofanira kuvaitira kuti uvaite vatsvene, vandishumire pabasa rouprista: Utore nzombe imwe duku; namakondobwe maviri asina mhosva," 
Exodus29:2 nechingwa chisina kuviriswa, nezvingwa zviduku zvisina kuviriswa zvakakanyiwa namafuta, nezvingwa zvitete zvisina kuviriswa zvakazodzwa mafuta; unofanira kuzviita noupfu hwakatsetseka bwekoroni." 
Exodus29:3 Uzviise mudengu rimwe, ugouya nazvo zviri mudengu, pamwechete nenzombe duku namakondobwe maviri." 
Exodus29:4 Zvino uuye naAroni navanakomana vake kumukova wetende rokusangana, ugovashambidza nemvura;" 
Exodus29:5 utorewo hanzu, ugofukidza Aroni nguvo nejasi reefodhi, neefodhi, nehombodo yechipfuva; uye umusunge chiuno chake nebhanhire reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri;" 
Exodus29:6 uisewo nguwani pamusoro wake, nokuisawo korona tsvene panguwani." 
Exodus29:7 Zvino unofanira kutora mafuta echizoro, uadire pamusoro wake, umuzodze." 
Exodus29:8 Zvino uuyisewo vanakomana vake, uvafukidze majasi." 
Exodus29:9 Uvasunge zviuno zvavo nebhanhire, iye Aroni navanakomana vake, ugovaisa nguwani; vave vaprista nomutemo usingaperi; ugadze Aroni navanakomana vake." 
Exodus29:10 Zvino unofanira kuuyisa nzombe pamberi petende rokusangana, Aroni navanakomana vake vagoisa maoko avo pamusoro wenzombe." 
Exodus29:11 Ugobaya nzombe pamberi paJehovha pamukova wetende rokusangana. 
Exodus29:12 Zvino utore ropa renzombe, ugoriisa panyanga dzearitari nomumwe wako, ndokudururira ropa rose mujinga mearitari:" 
Exodus29:13 Zvino utorewo mafuta ose anofukidza ura, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari padziri, uzvipise pamusoro pearitari." 
Exodus29:14 Asi nyama yenzombe, nedebwe rayo, namazvizvi ayo, unofanira kuzvipisa nomoto kunze kwemisasa; chipiriso chezvivi." 
Exodus29:15 Unofanira kutorawo gondobwe rimwe, Aroni navanakomana vake vagoisa maoko avo pamusoro wegondobwe," 
Exodus29:16 zvino ubaye gondobwe, utore ropa raro, urisase panhivi dzose dzearitari." 
Exodus29:17 Ipapo uchekanye gondobwe, nokusuka ura hwaro, namakumbo aro, uise izvozvo pamwechete nenhindi dzaro nomusoro waro." 
Exodus29:18 Zvino unofanira kupisa gondobwe rose paaritari; chipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha, chipo chinonhuhwira, chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha, pamoto." 
Exodus29:19 Zvino utorewo gondobwe rimwe, Aroni navanakomana vake vaise maoko avo pamusoro wegondobwe." 
Exodus29:20 Ipapo unofanira kubaya gondobwe, ndokutora rimwe ropa raro, ugoriisa pamucheto wezasi wenzeve yorudyi yaAroni, napamicheto yenzeve dzorudyi dzavanakomana vake napamagumwe amaoko orudyi, napamagumwe etsoka dzavo dzorudyi, nokusasawo ropa panhivi dzose dzearitari." 
Exodus29:21 Zvino unofanira kutora rimwe ropa, riri paaritari, namamwe mafuta okuzodza, uzvisase pamusoro paAroni napanguvo dzake, napamusoro pavanakomana vake, napanguvo dzavanakomana vake, pamwechete naye, kuti ave mutsvene iye, nenguvo dzake, navanakomana vake, nenguvo dzavanakomana vake, pamwechete naye." 
Exodus29:22 Zvino utorewo mamwe mafuta egondobwe, nebemhe raro, namafuta anofukidza ura, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari padziri, nebandauko rorudyi, (nokuti igondobwe rokugadza naro)," 
Exodus29:23 nebundu rimwe rechingwa, nechingwa chimwe chiduku chinamafuta, nechingwa chimwe chitete chinobva mudengu rezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa, zviri pamberi paJehovha." 
Exodus29:24 Zvino uzviise zvose pamaoko aAroni napamaoko avanakomana vake, vagozvizunguzira, chive chipo chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha." 
Exodus29:25 Zvino uzvibvise pamaoko avo, uzvipise paaritari pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa, kuti chive chipo chinonhuhwira pamberi paJehovha; chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha pamoto." 
Exodus29:26 Utorewo chityu chegondobwe rokugadza naro raAroni, urizunguzire pamberi paJehovha, kuti chive chipo chinozunguzirwa; ndiwo mugove wako." 
Exodus29:27 Zvino chityu chinozunguzirwa uchitsaure, nebandauko rechipiriso chinosimudzwa, chinozunguzirwa nokusimudzwa, zvegondobwe rokugadza naro, kuti zvive zvaAroni nezvavanakomana vake." 
Exodus29:28 Izvozvo zvinofanira kupiwa Aroni navanakomana vake navana vaIsiraeri nokusingaperi nokuti chipiriso chinosimudzwa, chinobva kuvana vaIsiraeri pazvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvavo zvokuyananisa, chive chipiriso chavo chinosimudzirwa Jehovha." 
Exodus29:29 nguvo dzaAroni dzichava dzavanakomana vake vanomutevera, kuti vazodzwe vakadzifuka, vagadzwe vakadzifuka." 
Exodus29:30 Mwanakomana wake anopinda pauprista panzvimbo yake, unofanira kudzifuka mazuva manomwe, kana achipinda mutende rokusangana kushumira panzvimbo tsvene." 
Exodus29:31 Zvino unofanira kutora gondobwe rokugadza naro, ubike nyama yaro panzvimbo tsvene." 
Exodus29:32 Aroni navanakomana vake ngavadye nyama yegondobwe, nechingwa chiri mudengu pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Exodus29:33 Vanofanira kudya izvozvo zvaiyananiswa nazvo, pakugadzwa nokutsaurwa kwavo; asi mweni ngaarege kuzvidya, nokuti zvitsvene." 
Exodus29:34 Kana imwe nyama yokugadza nayo ikasara, kana chimwe chingwa, kusvikira mangwana, unofanira kupisa zvasara nomoto; hazvifaniri kudyiwa, nokuti zvitsvene." 
Exodus29:35 Unofanira kuitira Aroni navanakomana vake saizvozvo, zvose sezvandakuraira; uite mazuva manomwe uchivagadza." 
Exodus29:36 Zuva rimwe nerimwe unofanira kubayira nzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, chokuyananisa nacho; unofanira kunatsa aritari, kana uchiiyananisira; uizodze kuti uitsaure." 
Exodus29:37 Unofanira kuita mazuva manomwe pakuyananisira aritari, nokuitsaura; kuti aritari ive tsvene kwazvo, uye zvose zvinobata paaritari zvinofanira kuva zvitsvene." 
Exodus29:38 Zvino ndizvo zvaunofanira kubayira paaritari: Zuva rimwe nerimwe nguva dzose makwayana maviri. 
Exodus29:39 Rimwe gwayana unofanira kuribayira mangwanani, rimwe gwayana unofanira kuribayira madekwana." 
Exodus29:40 Pamwechete negwayana rimwe unofanira kuisa chipiriso choupfu hwakatsetseka hwakasvika pachegumi cheefa hwakakanyiwa nechechina chehini yamafuta akasviniwa nechechina chehini yewaini, chive chipiriso chinodururwa." 
Exodus29:41 Rimwe gwayana uribayire madekwana, uriitire sezvawakaitira chipiriso choupfu chamangwanani, nezvawakaitira chipiriso charo chinomwiwa, kuti chive chipiriso chinonhuhwira, chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha pamoto." 
Exodus29:42 Chinofanira kuva chipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose pamarudzi enyu ose, pamukova wetende rokusangana pamberi paJehovha, pandichasangana nemi, nditaurepo newe." 
Exodus29:43 Ndipo pandichasangana navana vaIsiraeri, uye tende richatsaurwa nokubwinya kwangu." 
Exodus29:44 Tende rokusangana nearitari ndichazvitsaura; uye Aroni navanakomana vake ndichavatsaura, kuti vandishumire pabasa rouprista." 
Exodus29:45 Ndichagara pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, kuti ndive Mwari wavo." 
Exodus29:46 Vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha wavo, wakavabudisa panyika kuti ndigare pakati pavo; ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo." 
Exodus30:1 Unofanira kuitawo aritari yokupisirapo zvinonhuhwira; uiite nomuti womuakasia. 
Exodus30:2 Kureba kwayo ngakuve kubhiti rimwe, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwe, nhivi dzose dzienzane; kukwirira kwayo ngakuve makubhiti maviri, uye nyanga dzayo ngadzive chinhu chimwe chete nayo." 
Exodus30:3 Unofanira kuifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka, kumusoro kwayo, nokunhivi dzayo dzose, nenyanga dzayo; uiitirewo hata yendarama inoikomberedza." 
Exodus30:4 Uiitirewo zvindori zviviri zvendarama pasi pehata yayo, pakona dzayo mbiri, panhivi dzayo mbiri, pave paingatakurwa namatanda." 
Exodus30:5 Uitewo matanda omuakasia, nokuafukidza nendarama." 
Exodus30:6 Zvino unofanira kuiisa pamberi pechidzitiro chiri paareka yechipupuriro, pamberi pechifunhiro chokuyananisa chiri pamusoro pechipupuriro, pandichasangana newe." 
Exodus30:7 Aroni anofanira kupisa pamusoro payo zvinonhuhwira zvemiti yakanaka; ngaazvipise mangwanani ose, kana achigadzira mwenje." 
Exodus30:8 Kana Aroni achitungidza mwenje madekwana, ngaazvipise, zvive zvinonhuhwira pamberi paJehovha nokusingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose." 
Exodus30:9 Musapisira pamusoro payo zvinonhuhwira zvisina kufanira, kana chipiriso chinopiswa, kana chipiriso choupfu; musadururira pamusoro payo chipiriso chinodururwa." 
Exodus30:10 Aroni anofanira kuyananisa panyanga dzayo kamwe chete pagore; anofanira kuyananisa pamusoro payo kamwe chete pagore, neropa rechipiriso chezvivi chinoyananisa, kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose; chinhu chitsvene kwazvo kuna Jehovha.""" 
Exodus30:11 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi, akati," 
Exodus30:12 Kana uchiverenga vana vaIsiraeri, kuti uwone kuwanda kwavo, mumwe nomumwe anofanira kupa Jehovha rudzikunuro rwomweya wake, kana uchivaverenga; kuti varege kubatwa nehosha kana uchivaverenga." 
Exodus30:13 Vanofanira kupa kudai: Mumwe nomumwe unodarika kuna vakaverengwa hafu yeshekeri vachienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene; (shekeri rinamagera ana makumi maviri,) hafu yeshekeri chive chipo kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus30:14 Mumwe nomumwe unodarika kuna vakaverengwa, wava namakore makumi maviri kana wapfuura makore iwayo, anofanira kupa Jehovha chipo ichocho." 
Exodus30:15 Mufumi ngaarege kuwedzera, nomurombo ngaarege kutapudza pahafu yeshekeri, kana vopa chipo icho, kuti muyananisire mweya yenyu." 
Exodus30:16 Zvino unofanira kutora mari yokuyananisira kuvana vaIsiraeri, ugoripira basa retende rokusangana; kuti chive chirangaridzo kuvana vaIsiraeri pamberi paJehovha, kuti mweya yenyu iyananisirwe.""" 
Exodus30:17 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Exodus30:18 Unofanira kuitawo mudziyo wendarira wokushambidzira, nechigadziko chawo chendarira, ugouisa pakati petende rokusangana nearitari, ndokuisamo mvura." 
Exodus30:19 Kuti Aroni navanakomana vake vashambemo maoko avo netsoka dzavo. 
Exodus30:20 Kana vopinda mutende rokusangana, vanofanira kuzvishambidza nemvura, kuti varege kufa, kana voswedera paaritari kuzoshumira, kana kupisira Jehovha chipiriso chinopiswa nomoto." 
Exodus30:21 Vanofanira kushamba maoko avo namakumbo avo, kuti varege kufa; unofanira kuva mutemo usingaperi kwavari, kwaari nokuvanakomana vake kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose.""" 
Exodus30:22 Jehovha wakataurawo naMozisi akati," 
Exodus30:23 Torawo miti inonhuhwira inokunda imwe, anoti mashekeri ana mazana mashanu emura inoyerera, nehafu yakadaro yekinamuni inonaka, ndiwo mashekeri ana mazana maviri namakumi mashanu, namashekeri ana mazana maviri namakumi mashanu ekaramusi yakanaka;" 
Exodus30:24 namazana mashanu ekasia, vachienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene, nehini imwe yamafuta amaorivhi;" 
Exodus30:25 uite nazvo mafuta matsvene okuzodza nawo, zvive zvinonhuhwira zvakavhenganiswa nouchenjeri hwomuvhenganisi wezvinonhuhwira; ave mafuta matsvene okuzodza nawo." 
Exodus30:26 Zvino unofanira kuzodza nawo tende rokusangana neareka yechipupuriro," 
Exodus30:27 netafura nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nechigadziko chemwenje nenhumbi dzacho, nearitari yezvinonhuhwira," 
Exodus30:28 nearitari yezvibayiro zvinopiswa nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira nechigadziko chawo." 
Exodus30:29 Uzvitsaure, zvive zvinhu zvitsvene kwazvo; zvose zvinozvigunzva zvichava zvitsvenewo.." 
Exodus30:30 Unofanira kuzodzawo Aroni navanakomana vake, nokuvaita vatsvene, kuti vandishumire pabasa rouprista." 
Exodus30:31 Uudzewo vana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Iwaya anofanira kuva pamberi pangu mafuta matsvene okuzodza nawo kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose.'" 
Exodus30:32 Ngaarege kudirwa panyama yomunhu; uye musaita mamwe akafanana nawo, akaitwa saiwo; matsvene, anofanira kuva chinhu chitsvene kwamuri." 
Exodus30:33 Ani naani unovhenganisa mafuta akafanana nawo, uye ani naani unoisa mamwe awo pamutorwa, ngaabviswe pakati porudzi rwake.""" 
Exodus30:34 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tora miti inonhuhwira, inoti: Sitake, neonika, negabhano, miti yakanaka nezvinonhuhwira zvakaisvonaka; zvose zvienzane pakurema kwazvo." 
Exodus30:35 Ugoita nazvo zvinonhuhwira, zvinonhuhwira zvinonaka, zvakavhenganiswa nouchenjeri hwomuvhenganisi wezvinonhuhwira, zvakarungwa nomunyu, zvakaisvonaka, zvitsvene." 
Exodus30:36 Unofanira kutswa zvimwe zvazvo kwazvo, ugozviisa pamberi pechipupuriro mutende rokusangana, mandichasangana newe, kuti zvive zvitsvene kwazvo kwamuri." 
Exodus30:37 Zvinonhuhwira zvamunozviitira imwi, musazviita sezvamunoita izvozvi; zvinofanira kuva kwamuri zvitsvene kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus30:38 Ani naani unoita zvakafanana nazvo, kuti azvinhuwidze, ngaabviswe pakati porudzi rwake.""" 
Exodus31:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Exodus31:2 Tarira, ndadana Bhezareri, mwanakomana, waUri, mwanakomana waHuri, worudzi rwaJudha, nezita rake," 
Exodus31:3 ndikamuzadza noMweya waMwari, nouchenjeri, nokunzwisisa, nokuziva kose, nokugona marudzi ose amabasa," 
Exodus31:4 kuti afunge mano oumhizha, nokubata nendarama, nesirivha, nendarira," 
Exodus31:5 nokuveza mabwe anoiswa mukati, nokuveza matanda, nokugona marudzi ose amabasa." 
Exodus31:6 Uye ini, tarira ndakagadza pamwechete naye Ohoriabhu, mwanakomana waAhisamaki, worudzi rwaDhani; nomumoyo yavose vane moyo yakangwara ndakaisa uchenjeri, kuti, vaite, zvose zvandakakuraira," 
Exodus31:7 zvinoti: Tende rokusangana, neareka yechipupuriro, nechifunhiro chokuyananisa chiri pamusoro payo, nenhumbi dzose dzetabhenakeri," 
Exodus31:8 netafura nenhumbi dzayo, nechigadziko chemwenje chakaisvonaka nenhumbi dzacho dzose, nearitari yezvinonhuhwira," 
Exodus31:9 nearitari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira nechigadziko chawo," 
Exodus31:10 nenguvo dzakarukwa zvakanaka, nenguvo tsvene dzaAroni muprista, nenguvo dzavanakomana vake dzokubata basa rouprista nadzo," 
Exodus31:11 namafuta okuzodza nawo, nezvinonhuhwira zvemiti inonaka zvapanzvimbo tsvene; vanofanira kuita zvose sezvandakakuraira.""" 
Exodus31:12 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Exodus31:13 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Zvirokwazvo munofanira kuchengeta maSabata angu; nokuti chiratidzo pakati pangu nemwi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose, muzive kuti ndini Jehovha unokutsaurai." 
Exodus31:14 Naizvozvo chengetai Sabata, nokuti idzvene kwamuri; ani naani unorizvidza ngaaurawe zvirokwazvo; nokuti ani naani unobata basa ripi neripi naro, munhu uyo ngaabviswe pakati porudzi rwake." 
Exodus31:15 Mabasa ose ngaabatwe namazuva matanhatu, asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata rokuzorora kwazvo, idzvene kuna Jehovha; ani naani unobata basa ripi neripi nezuva reSabata, ngaaurawe zvirokwazvo. '" 
Exodus31:16 Naizvozvo vana vaIsiraeri vanofanira kuchengeta Sabata, varangarire Sabata kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose; ive sungano isingaperi." 
Exodus31:17 Chiratidzo pakati pangu navana vaIsiraeri nokusingaperi; nokuti Jehovha wakaita denga nenyika namazuva matanhatu, akazorora nezuva rechinomwe, akasimbiswa.""" 
Exodus31:18 Zvino wakati apedza kutaura naMozisi pagomo reSinai, akamupa mabwendefa maviri echipupuriro, mabwendefa amabwe akanga akanyorwa nomumwe waMwari." 
Exodus32:1 Zvino vanhu vakati vachiona kuti Mozisi wononoka kuburuka mugomo, vakaungana kuna Aroni, vakati kwaari, ""Simuka, utiitire vamwari vangatitungamirira, nokuti kana ari Mozisi uyu, uya munhu wakatibudisa munyika hatizivi chakaitika naye.""" 
Exodus32:2 Zvino Aroni akati kwavari, ""Gurai zvindori zvendarama zviri panzeve dzavakadzi venyu nedzavanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu, muuye nazvo kwandiri.""" 
Exodus32:3 Zvino vanhu vose vakagura zvindori zvendarama zvakanga zviri panzeve dzavo, vakauya nazvo kuna Aroni." 
Exodus32:4 Iye akazvigamuchira pamaoko avo, akazviveza nenhumbi yokuveza nayo, akaita nazvo mhuru yakaumbwa. Ivo vakati, ""Ndivo vamwari venyu, imwi vaIsiraeri, vakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti.""" 
Exodus32:5 Zvino Aroni wakati achizviona, akavaka aritari pamberi payo, Aroni akadanidzira, akati, ""Mangwana mutambo uchavapo kuna Jehovha.""" 
Exodus32:6 Vakafumira mangwanani, vakapisira zvipiriso zvinopiswa, vakauyawo nezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, vanhu vakagara pasi, vakadya nokumwa, vakasimuka, vakatamba." 
Exodus32:7 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati, ""Enda, buruka, nokuti vanhu vako, vawakabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, vazvitadzira." 
Exodus32:8 Vakurumidza kutsauka panzira yandakavaraira, vakazviitira mhuru yakaumbwa, vakainamata, vakaibayira zvibayiro, vachiti, `Ndivo vamwari venyu, imwi vaIsiraeri, vakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti. """ 
Exodus32:9 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Ndatarira vanhu ava, ndaona kuti vanhu vane mitsipa mikukutu;" 
Exodus32:10 naizvozvo zvino ndirege hako, kuti shungu dzangu dzivamukire, ndivapedze, ndikuite iwe rudzi rukuru.""" 
Exodus32:11 Ipapo Mozisi akakumbira kuna Jehovha Mwari wake akati, ""Haiwa, Jehovha, shungu dzenyu dzingagomukireiko vanhu venyu, vamakabudisa munyika yeIjipiti nesimba guru uye noruoko rune simba." 
Exodus32:12 VaIjipiti vangazoreva seiko vachiti, `Wakavabudisira kune zvakaipa, kuti avauraye mumakomo, nokuvaparadza panyika?' Dzorai shungu dzenyu huru, muzvidembe pamusoro pokuitira vanhu venyu zvakaipa zvakadai." 
Exodus32:13 Rangarirai henyu Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naIsiraeri, varanda venyu, vamakazvipikira mumene, mukati kwavari, `Ndichawanza vana venyu senyeredzi dzokudenga, nenyika yose iyi, yandakareva, ndichaipa vana venyu, vaigare nhaka nokusingaperi.' """ 
Exodus32:14 Zvino Jehovha akazvidemba pamusoro pezvakaipa zvaakanga achifunga kuitira vanhu vake. 
Exodus32:15 Zvino Mozisi akatendeuka akaburuka pagomo, ana mabwendefa maviri echipupuriro muruoko rwake; mabwendefa akanga akanyorwa nhivi dzawo dzose, akanga akanyorwa seri neseri." 
Exodus32:16 Mabwendefa iwayo rakanga riri basa raMwari, norunyoro rwakanga ruri runyoro rwaMwari, rwakanga rwakatemwa pamabwendefa." 
Exodus32:17 Zvino Joshua wakati achinzwa mhere-mhere yavanhu vanopururudza, akati kuna Mozisi, ""Kune mhere-mhere yokurwa kumisasa.""" 
Exodus32:17 Zvino Joshua wakati achinzwa mhere-mhere yavanhu vanopururudza, akati kuna Mozisi, ""Kune mhere-mhere yokurwa kumisasa.""" 
Exodus32:18 Iye akati, ""Haazi manzwi avanhu vanodanidzira pakukunda kwavo, kana manzwi avanhu vanodanidzira pakukundwa kwavo; asi ndinonzwa mheremhere yavanhu vanoimba.""" 
Exodus32:19 Zvino wakati aswedera kumisasa, akaona mhuru nokutamba. Ipapo shungu dzaMozisi dzikamuka, akakanda mabwendefa aiva mumaoko pasi, akaaputsa mujinga megomo." 
Exodus32:20 Akatora mhuru yavakanga vaita, akaipisa nomoto, akaikuya ikaita upfu, akaikanda mumvura, ndokumwisa vaIsiraeri izvozvo." 
Exodus32:21 Mozisi akati kuna Aroni, ""Vanhu ava vakakuitireiko, zvawauyisa chivi ichi chikuru pamusoro pavo?""" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni akati, ""Shungu dzashe wangu ngadzirege kumuka hadzo; munoziva vanhu ava, kuti vanongoda kutadza." 
Exodus32:23 Nokuti vakati kwandiri, `Tiitirei vamwari vangatitungamirira, nokuti kana ari Mozisi uyu, munhu uya wakatibudisa munyika yeIjipiti, hatizivi chakaitika naye.'" 
Exodus32:24 Ndikati kwavari, `Ani naani une ndarama, ngaaigure;' zvino vakandipa, ndikaikandira mumoto, mhuru iyi ikabudamo.""" 
Exodus32:25 Zvino Mozisi wakati aona kuti vanhu varasa Jehovha, nokuti Aroni wakanga avarasisa, kuti vasekwe navavengi vavo," 
Exodus32:26 Mozisi akandomira musuo remisasa, akati, ""Ani naani ari kurutivi rwaJehovha, ngaauye kwandiri."" Vana vaRevhi vose vakaungana kwaari." 
Exodus32:27 Akati kwavari, ""Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari wavaIsiraeri, `Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaasungire munondo wake pachidya chake, mufambe-fambe muchibva pane rimwe suo muchienda kune rimwe suo pakati pemisasa, mumwe nomumwe auraye hama yake, nomumwe nomumwe shamwari yake, nomumwe nomumwe munhu wokwake.' """ 
Exodus32:28 Vana vaRevhi vakaita sezvakanga zvarehwa naMozisi; nomusi iwoyo vakafa pakati pavanhu vanenge vane zviuru zvitatu. 
Exodus32:29 Zvino Mozisi akati, ""Zviparadzanisei nhasi kuna Jehovha, kuti munhu mumwe nomumwe arwe nomwanakomana wake uye nehama yake, kuti akuropafadzei nhasi.""" 
Exodus32:30 Zvino fume mangwana Mozisi akati kuvanhu, ""imwi makatadza nokutadza kukuru, asi zvino ini ndichakwira kuna Jehovha, zvimwe ndingayananisira zvivi zvenyu.""" 
Exodus32:31 Mozisi akadzokera kuna Jehovha, akati, ""Haiwa, vanhu ava vakatadza nokutadza kukuru, vakazviitira vamwari vendarama;" 
Exodus32:32 zvino dai muchivakangamwira henyu zvivi zvavo; asi kana musingadi henyu, ndidzimei pabhuku renyu ramakanyora.""" 
Exodus32:33 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Uyo wakanditadzira, ndiye wandichadzima pabhuku rangu." 
Exodus32:34 Zvino chienda, uperekedze vanhu vaende kwandakavaudza; tarira, mutumwa wangu achakutungamirira, asi nomusi wandicharova nawo, ndichavarova nokuda kwezvivi zvavo.""" 
Exodus32:35 Jehovha akarova vanhu, nokuti vakanga vaita mhuru yakaitwa naAroni." 
Exodus33:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati, ""Ibva pano, kwira, iwe navanhu vawakabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, muende kunyika yandakapikira Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho, ndichiti, ndichaipa vana vako;" 
Exodus33:2 ndichatuma mutumwa pamberi penyu, kuti ndidzinge vaKenani, navaAmori, navaHeti, navaPerezi, navaHivhi, naJebhusi," 
Exodus33:3 muende kunyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, nokuti ini handingakwiri pakati penyu, nokuti muri vanhu vane mitsipa mikukutu, kuti ndirege kukuparadzai panzira.""" 
Exodus33:4 Zvino vanhu vakati vachinzwa mashoko iwayo akaipa, vakachema; kwakanga kusina munhu wakashonga zvishongo zvake." 
Exodus33:5 lpapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Uti kuvana valsiraeri, `Muri vanhu vane mitsipa mikukutu; kana ndikapinda pakati penyu chinguva chimwe chiduku-duku, ndingakuparadzai; naizvozvo bvisai zvishongo zvenyu zvino, ndizive chandingakuitirai.' """ 
Exodus33:6 Ipapo vana valsiraeri vakabvisa zvishongo zvavo kubva pagomo reHorebhu. 
Exodus33:7 Zvino Mozisi waisitora tende, achindoridzika kunze kwemisasa, kure nemisasa, akaritumidza zita rinonzi, Tende rokusangana. Zvino mumwe nomumwe waitsvaka Jehovha, waibudira kutende rokusangana, rakanga riri kunze kwemisasa." 
Exodus33:8 Zvino kwaiti kana Mozisi obudira kutende, vanhu vose vaisimuka, vakamira mumwe nomumwe pamukova wetende rake, vakaramba vakatarira Mozisi kusvikira apinda mutende." 
Exodus33:9 Zvino kana Mozisi apinda mutende, shongwe yegore yaJehovha yaiburuka ikamira pamukova wetende, Jehovha akataura naMozisi." 
Exodus33:10 Vanhu vose vakaona shongwe yegore imire pamukova wetende, vanhu vose vakasimuka, vakanamata pasi mumwe nomumwe pamukova wetende rake." 
Exodus33:11 Ipapo Jehovha waitaura naMozisi zviso zvakatarisana, somunhu anotaurirana neshamwari yake. Zvino wodzokerazve kumisasa; asi muranda wake Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, mujaya, haazaibva patende." 
Exodus33:11 Ipapo Jehovha waitaura naMozisi zviso zvakatarisana, somunhu anotaurirana neshamwari yake. Zvino wodzokerazve kumisasa; asi muranda wake Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, mujaya, haazaibva patende." 
Exodus33:12 Zvino Mozisi akati kuna Jehovha, ""Tarirai, makati kwandiri, `Kwira navanhu ava, asi hamuna kundizivisa kuti muchatuma ani neni,' kunyange makati, `Ndinokuziva nezita rako, wakawana nyasha pamberi pangu.'" 
Exodus33:13 Zvino kana ndakawana nyasha pamberi penyu, chindiratidzai nzira dzenyu, kuti ndikuzivei, ndiwane nyasha pamberi penyu; rangariraiwo kuti rudzi urwu ndivanhu venyu.""" 
Exodus33:14 Jehovha akati, ""Ini ndimene ndichaenda newe, ndikupe zororo.""" 
Exodus33:15 Akati kwaari, ""Kana imwi mumene musingaendi neni, regai henyu kutibvisa pano." 
Exodus33:16 Nokuti zvichazikamwa seiko kuti ndakawana nyasha pamberi penyu, ini navanhu venyu? Hakuzi kuti muende nesu, tigova vakatsaurwa, ini navanhu venyu pakati pavamwe vanhu vose vapanyika dzose here?""" 
Exodus33:17 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Ndichaitawo chinhu ichi chawareva, nokuti wawana nyasha pamberi pangu, ndinokuziva nezita rako.""" 
Exodus33:18 Iye akati, ""Dondiratidzai henyu kubwinya kwenyu.""" 
Exodus33:19 Jehovha akati, ""Ndichapfuudza kunaka kwangu kose pamberi pako, nokudana zita raJehovha pamberi pako, asi ndichanzwira nyasha wandinoda kunzwira nyasha, ndichanzwira tsitsi wandinoda kunzwira tsitsi.""" 
Exodus33:20 Akatiwo, ""Haungaoni chiso changu, nokuti hakuna munhu angandiona, akazorarama.""" 
Exodus33:21 Jehovha akatiwo, ""Tarira pane nzvimbo kuno kwandiri, ungamira pabwe." 
Exodus33:22 Zvino kana kubwinya kwangu kopfuura, ndichakupinza mumukana webwe, ndigokufukidza noruoko rwangu kusvikira ndapfuura;" 
Exodus33:23 ipapo ndichabvisa ruoko rwangu, ugondiona necheshure; asi chiso changu hachionekwi.""" 
Exodus34:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Zvivezere mabwendefa maviri amabwe akafanana nookutanga, kuti ndinyore pamabwendefa mashoko aya akanga ari pamabwendefa okutanga awaputsa." 
Exodus34:2 Gara wazvigadzira mangwanani, ukwire mugomo reSinai mangwanani, umire pamberi pangu pamusoro pegomo." 
Exodus34:3 Asi mumwe munhu ngaarege kukwira newe, uye ngakurege kuonekwa munhu pagomo rose, namakwai nemombe ngazvirege kufura pamberi pegomo iri.""" 
Exodus34:4 Ipapo Mozisi akaveza mabwendefa maviri akafanana nookutanga, akamuka mangwanani, akakwira mugomo reSinai, sezvaakanga arairwa naJehovha, akabata mabwendefa maviri muruoko rwake." 
Exodus34:5 Jehovha akaburuka ari mugomo, akamirapo naye, akadana zita raJehovha." 
Exodus34:6 Jehovha akapfuura pamberi pake, akadanidzira, achiti, ""Jehovha, Jehovha, Mwari azere nyasha nengoni, anononoka kutsamwa, ane tsitsi huru nechokwadi," 
Exodus34:7 anochengetera vane zviuru zvamazana nyasha dzake, anovakangamwira zvakaipa zvavo nokudarika kwavo nezvivi zvavo, asi asingapembedzi munhu ane mhosva, anorova vana nokuda kwezvakaipa zvamadzibaba avo, navana vavana vavo kusvikira kurudzi rwechitatu norwechina.""" 
Exodus34:8 Ipapo Mozisi akakurumidza kukotamisa musoro wake pasi, akapfugama." 
Exodus34:9 Akati, ""Ishe, kana ndakawana nyasha kwamuri, Ishe ngaafambe pakati pedu, nokuti vanhu ava vane mitsipa mikukutu; tikangamwirei henyu zvakaipa zvedu nezvivi zvedu, mutigamuchirei, tive nhaka yenyu.""" 
Exodus34:10 Jehovha akati, ""Tarira, ndinoita sungano newe; ndichaita pamberi pavanhu vako zvinoshamisa, zvisina kumboitwa panyika yose, kana kundudzi dzose; kuti vanhu vose vauri pakati pavo vaone basa raJehovha, nokuti ndinoita chinhu chinotyisa newe." 
Exodus34:11 Rangarira zvandinokuraira nhasi: Tarira, ndodzinga pamberi pako vaAmori, navaKenani, navaHeti, navaPerezi, navaHivhi, navaJebhusi." 
Exodus34:12 Chenjera kuti urege kuita sungano navanhu vagere munyika iyo kwaunoenda, kuti zvirege kuva musungo kwauri;" 
Exodus34:13 asi munofanira kuputsa aritari dzavo, nokuputsanya mabwe emifananidzo yavo, nokutema matanda avo avanonamata nawo;" 
Exodus34:14 nokuti usapfugamira vamwe vamwari, nokuti Jehovha, ane zita rinonzi Anegodo, ndiMwari anegodo;" 
Exodus34:15 kuti urege kuita sungano navanhu vagere munyika iyo, zvino kana ivo vopata vachitevera vamwari vavo, vachibayira vamwari vavo, mumwe akudane kuti udye nyama yezvibayiro zvake;" 
Exodus34:16 iwe ukatorera vanakomana vako vakunda vavo, zvino kana vakunda vavo vopata vachitevera vamwari vavo, vapatise vanakomana vakowo vatevere vamwari vavo." 
Exodus34:17 Usazviitira vamwari vakaumbwa. 
Exodus34:18 Uite mutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa. Unofanira kudya zvingwa zvisina kuviriswa mazuva manomwe, sezvandakakuraira nenguva yakatarwa pamwedzi weAbhibhi, nokuti wakabuda paIjipiti pamwedzi weAbhibhi." 
Exodus34:19 Zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro ndezvangu, napazvipfuwo zvako zvikono zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro, kana pamombe kana pamakwai;" 
Exodus34:20 mwana wokutanga wembongoro unofanira kuudzikunura negwayana; kana usingadi kuudzikunura, unofanira kuvhuna mutsipa wawo. Matangwe ose pavanakomana vako unofanira kuvadzikunura. Kurege kuva nomunhu anouya pamberi pangu asina chinhu." 
Exodus34:21 Unofanira kubata mazuva matanhatu, asi nezuva rechinomwe uzorore, nenguva yokurima neyokukohwa uzorore." 
Exodus34:22 Unofanira kurangarira mutambo wamavhiki, wezvitsva zvekoroni inokohwiwa, nomutambo wokuunganidza pakupera kwegore." 
Exodus34:23 Varume vako vose ngavauye pamberi paShe Mwari, iye Mwari waIsiraeri, katatu negore." 
Exodus34:24 Nokuti ndichadzinga ndudzi pamberi pako, ndikurise miganhu yako; hakungavi nomunhu achachiva nyika yako, kana achikwira katatu pagore kuti azviratidze pamberi paJehovha, Mwari wako." 
Exodus34:25 Usauya neropa rechibayiro changu pamwechete nechingwa chakaviriswa, uye chibayiro chomutambo wePasika ngachirege kuvata usiku kusvikira mangwana." 
Exodus34:26 Zvokutanga zvezvitsva zvomunda wako unofanira kuuya nazvo kumba kwaJehovha Mwari wako. Usabika mbudzana mumukaka wamai vayo. 
Exodus34:27 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Nyora mashoko iwaya, nokuti ndaita sungano newe navaIsiraeri sezvinoreva mashoko iwaya.""" 
Exodus34:28 Akavako kuna Jehovha mazuva ana makumi mana nousiku unamakumi mana; wakanga asingadyi zvokudya kana kumwa mvura. Akanyora pamabwendefa mashoko esungano, iyo mirairo ine gumi." 
Exodus34:29 Zvino Mozisi wakati achiburuka pagomo reSinai, Mozisi akabata mabwendefa maviri echipupuriro mumaoko ake, Mozisi wakanga asingazivi, achiburuka pagomo, kuti ganda rechiso chake rakanga richibwinya zvaakanga ataura naye." 
Exodus34:30 Zvino Aroni navana vaIsiraeri vose vakati vachiona Mozisi, vakaona ganda rechiso chake richibwinya, vakatya kuswedera kwaari;" 
Exodus34:31 ipapo Mozisi akavadana, Aroni navakuru vose veungano vakadzokera kwaari, Mozisi akataura navo." 
Exodus34:32 Pashure vana vaIsiraeri vose vakaswedera, iye akavaraira zvose zvaakanga audzwa naJehovha pagomo reSinai." 
Exodus34:33 Zvino Mozisi wakati apedza kutaura navo akaisa chifukidzo pachiso chake. 
Exodus34:34 Asi kana Mozisi opinda pamberi paJehovha kundotaura naye, waibvisa chifukidzo kusvikira achibuda; zvino wobuda, ndokuudza vana vaIsiraeri zvarairwa." 
Exodus34:35 Vana vaIsiraeri vakaona chiso chaMozisi, kuti ganda rechiso chaMozisi raibwinya; zvino Mozisi wodzoserazve chifukidzo pachiso chake, kusvikira opinda kundotaura naye." 
Exodus35:1 Zvino Mozisi wakaunganidza ungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri, akati kwavari, ""Ndiwo mashoko akarairwa naJehovha kuti muaite." 
Exodus35:2 Mabasa ose ngaabatwe namazuva matanhatu, asi zuva rechinomwe rinofanira kuva kwamuri zuva dzvene, Sabata rokuzorora kwazvo pamberi paJehovha; ani naani anobata basa ripi neripi naro, ngaaurawe." 
Exodus35:3 Regai kuvesa moto padzimba dzenyu dzose nezuva reSabata. 
Exodus35:4 Mozisi akataura neungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri, akati, ""Ndicho chinhu chakarairwa naJehovha, achiti," 
Exodus35:5 ‘Ripirai Jehovha chipo pazvinhu zvenyu; ani naani ane moyo unoda, ngaauye nacho, chive chipo chaJehovha, zvinoti: Ndarama, nesirivha, nendarira," 
Exodus35:6 nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, nemvere dzembudzi," 
Exodus35:7 namatebwe amakondobwe akazodzwa zvitsvuku, namatebwe amatenhe, namatanda omuakasia," 
Exodus35:8 namafuta omwenje, nezvinonhuhwira zvamafuta okuzodza, noupfu hunonhuhwira," 
Exodus35:9 nezvibwe zveonikisi, nezvibwe zvokuisa paefodhi napahombodo yechipfuva." 
Exodus35:10  `Varume vose pakati penyu vane moyo yakachenjera ngavauye, vaite zvose zvakarairwa naJehovha;" 
Exodus35:11 zvinoti: Tabhenakeri netende rayo, nechifukidzo chayo, nezvikorekedzo zvayo, namapuranga ayo, nembariro dzayo, nembiru dzayo, nezvigadziko zvayo;" 
Exodus35:12 neareka, namatanda ayo, nechifunhiro chokuyananisa, nechidzitiro chinodzitira," 
Exodus35:13 netafura, namatanda ayo, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nechingwa chokuratidza," 
Exodus35:14 nechigadziko chemwenje yokuvheneka nayo, nenhumbi dzacho, nemwenje yacho, namafuta okuvhenekesa nawo," 
Exodus35:15 nearitari yezvinonhuhwira, namatanda ayo, namafuta okuzodza nawo, noupfu hunonhuhwira, nechidzitiro chomukova pamukova wetabhenakeri," 
Exodus35:16 nearitari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, nechakarukwa chayo chendarira, namatanda ayo, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira, nechigadziko chawo," 
Exodus35:17 nezvidzitiro zvoruvanze, nembiru dzazvo, nezvigadziko zvadzo, nechidzitiro chesuo roruvanze," 
Exodus35:18 nembambo dzetabhenakeri, nembambo dzoruvanze, netambo dzadzo," 
Exodus35:19 nenguvo dzakarukwa zvakanaka dzokushumira nadzo panzvimbo tsvene, nenguvo tsvene dzaAroni muprista, nenguvo dzavanakomana vake dzokushumira nadzo pabasa rouprista.' """ 
Exodus35:20 Zvino ungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri yakabva kuna Mozisi," 
Exodus35:21 vakauya, mumwe nomumwe wakamutswa nomoyo wake, nomumwe nomumwe wakatendiswa nomweya wake, vakauya nechipo chaJehovha, chokubata basa retende rokusangana namabasa aro ose, nenguvo tsvene." 
Exodus35:22 Vakauya varume navakadzi, vose vaiva nemoyo yakanga ichida, vakauya nezvikorekedzo, nezvindori zvenzeve, nezvindori zvokusimbisa, nezvishongo zvamaoko, nezvishongo zvose zvendarama; mumwe nomumwe wakavigira Jehovha chipo chendarama." 
Exodus35:23 Murume mumwe nomumwe waiva nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, nemvere dzembudzi, namatebwe amakondobwe akazodzwa zvitsvuku, namatebwe amatenhe, wakauya nazvo." 
Exodus35:24 Mumwe nomumwe waigona kuripa chipo chesirivha nechendarira wakauya nechipo chaJehovha; mumwe nomumwe waiva namatanda omuakasia, avaigona kubata nawo, wakauya nawo." 
Exodus35:25 Vakadzi vose vaiva nemoyo yakangwara vakaruka namaoko avo, vakauya nezvavakaruka, zvaiti: Zvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus35:26 Vakadzi vose vakanga vamutswa nemoyo yavo kuva vakachenjera vakaruka mvere dzembudzi. 
Exodus35:27 Navakuru vakauya nezvibwe zveonikisi, nezvibwe zvokuisa paefodhi, napahombodo yechipfuva," 
Exodus35:28 nemiti inonhuhwira, namafuta okuvhenekesa nawo, nezvokuzodza nazvo, noupfu hunonhuhwira." 
Exodus35:29 Vana vaIsiraeri vakauya nemoyo yavo nezvipo zvokupa Jehovha; murume mumwe nomumwe nomukadzi mumwe nomumwe waitendiswa nomoyo wake kuti avigire zvokubata nazvo basa rose rakanga rarairwa naJehovha, kuti riitwe naMozisi." 
Exodus35:30 Zvino Mozisi akati kuvana vaIsiraeri, ""Tarirai, Jehovha wakadana nezita rake Bhezareri, mwanakomana waUri, mwanakomana waHuri, worudzi rwaJudha," 
Exodus35:31 akamuzadza noMweya waMwari ave nokuchenjera, nokunzwisisa, nokuziva kose, nokugona marudzi ose amabasa," 
Exodus35:32 kuti afunge mano oumhizha, nokubata nendarama, nesirivha, nendarira," 
Exodus35:33 nokuveza mabwe anoiswa mukati, nokuveza matanda, nokugona kubata mabasa ose oumhizha." 
Exodus35:34 Akaisa mumoyo make uchenjeri hwokudzidzisa vamwe, iye naOhoriabhu, mwanakomana waAhisamaki, worudzi rwaDhani." 
Exodus35:35 Akavazadza nokuchenjera komoyo, kuti vagone kubata mabasa ose omuvezi wamabwe, neemhizha, naavasoni vezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, naavaruki vanobata mabasa ose, naavose vanofunga mano amabasa oumhizha.""" 
Exodus36:1 Zvino Bhezareri naOhoriabhu vanofanira kubata basa pamwechete navarume vose vane moyo yakangwara, vakapiwa naJehovha kuchenjera nokunzwisisa kuti vazive kubata mabasa ose okushuma panzvimbo tsvene, zvose zvakarairwa naJehovha""" 
Exodus36:2 Zvino Mozisi akadana Bhezareri naOhoriabhu, navarume vose vaiva nemoyo yakangwara, vakapiwa kuchenjera mumoyo yavo naJehovha, vose vakanga vamutswa nemoyo yavo, kuti vauye kuzobata basa;" 
Exodus36:3 vakapiwa naMozisi zvipo zvose zvakanga zvauyiswa navana vaIsiraeri, zvokubatisa nazvo basa rokushuma panzvimbo tsvene. Asi ivo vakaramba vachiuya nemoyo yavo kwaari mangwanani ose nezvipo zvavo." 
Exodus36:4 Zvino varume vose vakachenjera, vakanga vachibata mabasa ose enzvimbo tsvene, vakabva mumwe nomumwe pabasa rake raakanga achiita," 
Exodus36:5 vakataura naMozisi, vachiti, ""Vanhu vanouya nezvakawandisa kupfuura zvinokwana kuita basa rakarairwa naJehovha kuti riitwe.""" 
Exodus36:6 Mozisi akaraira kuti shoko riparidzwe kumisasa, rokuti, ""Kunyange murume kana mukadzi ngaarege kuzoitazve basa rimwe nezvipo zvokupa nzvimbo tsvene."" Naizvozvo vanhu vakadziviswa kuzouya nezvimwe." 
Exodus36:7 Nokuti zvavakanga vanazvo, zvakakwanira mabasa ose avaifanira kuita, zvimwe zvikasara." 
Exodus36:8 Zvino varume vose vaiva nemoyo yakangwara pakati pavabati vakaita tabhenakeri namachira ane gumi; vakazviita nemicheka yakarukwa yakaisvonaka, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, zvinamakerubhi; raiva basa romubati waigona kubata." 
Exodus36:9 Kureba kwejira rimwe kwaiva makubhiti makumi maviri namasere, noupamhi bwejira rimwe makubhiti mana; machira ose akanga akaenzana." 
Exodus36:10 Akabatanidza machira mashanu pamwechete, namamwe machira akaabatanidza pamwechetezve." 
Exodus36:11 Akaita zvishwe zvitema pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira panaakabatanidzwa pamwechete; akaitawo saizvozvo pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira pana mamwe akabatanidzwa pamwechete. 
Exodus36:12 Akaitawo zvishwe zvina makumi mashanu pajira rimwe, nezvishwe zvina makumi mashanuzve pamupendero wejira ramamwe akabatanidzwa pamwechete; zvishwe zvakanga zvakatarisana." 
Exodus36:13 Akaitawo zvikorekedzo zvendarama zvina makumi mashanu, akabatanidza machira nezvikorekedzo izvozvo, naizvozvo tabhenakeri ikava chinhu chimwe chete." 
Exodus36:14 Akaitawo machira emvere dzembudzi, rikava tende pamusoro petabhenakeri; akaita machira ane gumi nerimwe." 
Exodus36:15 Kureba kwejira rimwe nerimwe kwaiva makubhiti ana makumi matatu, noupamhi bwejira rimwe nerimwe makubhiti mana; machira ane gumi nerimwe akanga akaenzana." 
Exodus36:16 Akabatanidza machira mashanu pamwechete, namachira matanhatu pamwechetezve;" 
Exodus36:17 akaita zvishwe zvina makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rimwe rokupedzisira panaakabatanidzwa pamwechete, nezvimwe zvishwe zvina makumi mashanuzve pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira pana mamwe akabatanidzwa pamwechetezve." 
Exodus36:18 Akaitawo zvikorekedzo zvina makumi mashanu zvendarira zvokubatanidza tende, kuti chive chinhu chimwe chete." 
Exodus36:19 Akaitirawo tende chifukidzo chamatebwe amakondobwe akazodzwa muti mutsvuku, nechifukidzo chamatebwe amatenhe pamusoro paizvozvo." 
Exodus36:20 Akaitirawo tabhenakeri mapuranga omuakasia akamiswa. 
Exodus36:21 Kureba kwepuranga rimwe kwaiva makubhiti ane gumi, noupamhi bwepuranga rimwe nerimwe hwaiva kubhiti rimwe nehafu." 
Exodus36:22 Puranga rimwe nerimwe rakaitirwa zvibato zviviri zvakabatanidzwa; akaita mapuranga ose etabhenakeri saizvozvo. 
Exodus36:23 Akaita mapuranga etabhenakeri ana makumi maviri okurutivi rwezasi, akatarira zasi." 
Exodus36:24 Akaitawo zvigadziko zvesirivha zvina makumi mana pasi pamapuranga ana makumi maviri, zvigadziko zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe pazvibato zvaro zviviri." 
Exodus36:25 Akaita mapuranga ana makumi maviri kurutivi rwechipiri rwetabhenakeri kurutivi rwokumusoro," 
Exodus36:26 nezvigadziko zvawo zvesirivha zvina makumi mana, zvigadziko zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe, nezvigadziko zviviri pasi perimwe purangazve." 
Exodus36:27 Akaitawo mapuranga matanhatu kurutivi rwemberi rwetabhenakeri kumavirazuva. 
Exodus36:28 Akaitawo mapuranga maviri kumakona etabhenakeri kurutivi rwemberi. 
Exodus36:29 Akanga akaita maviri nechenyasi; saizvozvozve akanga akaita maviri akabatanidzwa kusvikira kumusoro kuchindori chokutanga; saizvozvo akaaitira ose maviri pamakona maviri. 
Exodus36:30 Akava mapuranga masere ane zvigadziko zvawo zvesirivha, zvikava zvigadziko zvine gumi nezvitanhatu, zvigadziko zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe nerimwe." 
Exodus36:31 Akaitawo mbariro dzomuakasia, shanu dzamapuranga orumwe rutivi rwetabhenakeri," 
Exodus36:32 nembariro shanuzve dzamapuranga etabhenakeri kurutivi rwemberi kumavirazuva. 
Exodus36:33 Akaitawo rumbariro rwapakati rwaiva pakati pamapuranga rwaibva kuno rumwe rutivi rukandosvikira kuno rumwe rutivi. 
Exodus36:34 Akafukidza mapuranga nendarama, akaita zvindori zvawo zvendarama, kuti mbariro dzigarepo, akafukidzawo mbariro nendarama." 
Exodus36:35 Akaitawo chidzitiro nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa; akachiita namakerubhi, rikava basa romunhu anogona." 
Exodus36:36 Akachiitira mbiru ina dzomuakasia, akadzifukidza nendarama; zvikorekedzo zvadzo zvakanga zviri zvendarama, akadziumbirawo zvigadziko zvina zvesirivha." 
Exodus36:37 Akaitirawo mukova wetende chidzitiro chezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa; rakanga riri basa romusoni anogona." 
Exodus36:38 Uye mbiru dzacho shanu nezvikorekedzo zvadzo; akafukidza misoro yadzo nezvindori zvadzo nendarama; nezvigadziko zvadzo zvakanga zviri zvendarira. 
Exodus37:1 Zvino Bhezareri akaita areka yamatanda omuakasia; kureba kwayo kwaiva makubhiti maviri nehafu, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu, nokukwirira kwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu," 
Exodus37:2 akaifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka nechomukati nechokunze, akaita pamusoro payo hata yendarama yakaipoteredza." 
Exodus37:3 Akaiumbira zvindori zvina zvendarama, akazviisa pamakumbo ayo mana; zvindori zviviri zvaiva parutivi rumwe, nezvindori zviviri panorumwe rutivizve." 
Exodus37:4 Akaveza matanda omuakasia, akaafukidza nendarama," 
Exodus37:5 akapinza matanda iwayo muzvindori zvaiva panhivi dzeareka, kuti areka itakurwe nawo." 
Exodus37:6 Akaitawo chifunhiro chokuyananisa nendarama yakaisvonaka; kureba kwacho kwaiva makubhiti maviri nehafu, noupamhi hwacho kubhiti rimwe nehafu;" 
Exodus37:7 akaita makerubhi maviri endarama, akaaita nendarama yakapambadzirwa pamiromo miviri yechifunhiro chokuyananisa," 
Exodus37:8 kerubhi rimwe pamuromo mumwe, nerimwe kerubhi panomumwe muromo; akaita makerubhi pamiromo yacho miviri, zvikava chinhu chimwe chete nechifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Exodus37:9 Makerubhi akanga akatambanudzira mapapiro awo kumusoro, akafukidza chifunhiro chokuyananisa namapapiro awo, zviso zvawo zvakatarisana; zviso zvamakerubhi zvakanga zvakatarira chifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Exodus37:10 Akaitawo tafura yamatanda omuakasia; kureba kwayo kwaiva makubhiti maviri, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwe, nokukwirira kwayo kubhiti rimwe nehafu." 
Exodus37:11 Akaifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka, akaiitirawo hata yendarama yakanga ichiipoteredza;" 
Exodus37:12 akaiitirawo ukomba hwakanga huchiipoteredza, upamhi hwahwo sechanza; akaiitirawo hata yendarama yaipoteredza ukomba hwayo." 
Exodus37:13 Akaiitira zvindori zvina zvendarama, akaisa zvindori pamakona mana aiva pamakumbo ayo mana." 
Exodus37:14 Zvindori zvaiva pedo noukomba, paiva pokutakura tafura napo namatanda." 
Exodus37:15 Akaita matanda omuakasia, akaafukidza nendarama, kuti tafura itakurwe nawo." 
Exodus37:16 Akaitawo midziyo yaigara pamusoro petafura, ndiro dzayo, nembiya dzayo, nemikombe yayo, nezvirongo zvayo zvokudira nazvo, zvose zvendarama yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus37:17 Akaitawo chigadziko chemwenje chendarama yakaisvonaka; akaita chigadziko nendarama yakapambadzirwa, chigadziko chacho, nehunde yacho, notumbiya twacho, namafundo acho, namaruva acho; zvose zvikava chinhu chimwe chete nacho;" 
Exodus37:18 kumativi acho kukabuda matavi matanhatu, matavi matatu echigadziko kuno rumwe rutivi rwacho, namatavi matatu echigadziko kuno rumwe rutivi rwacho." 
Exodus37:19 Tumbiya tutatu twakaumbwa samaruva omuamanda padavi rimwe, nefundo neruva, notumbiya tutatuzve twakaumbwa samaruva omuamanda pane rimwe davi, nefundo neruva; saizvozvo matavi matanhatu akabuda pachigadziko." 
Exodus37:20 Uye pachigadziko pakanga panotumbiya tuna twakanga twakaumbwa samaruva omuamanda, namafundo atwo, namaruva atwo;" 
Exodus37:21 nefundo panyasi pamatavi maviri akanga akaumbwa pamwechete nacho; nefundozve panyasi pamatavi maviri akaumbwa pamwechete nacho, akafanana namatavi matanhatu akabuda pachigadziko." 
Exodus37:22 Mafundo azvo namatavi akanga akaumbwa pamwechete nazvo, zvose zvikava chinhu chimwe chakanga chakumbwa nendarama yakaisvonaka, yakapambadzirwa." 
Exodus37:23 Akaita mwenje yacho minomwe, nembato dzacho, nendiro dzacho, zvose nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus37:24 Akachiumba netarenda rendarama yakaisvonaka, pamwechete nemidziyo yayo yose." 
Exodus37:25 Akaitawo aritari yezvinonhuhwira nomuakasia; kureba kwayo kwakanga kuri kubhiti rimwe, noupamhi hwayo kubhiti rimwezve; nhivi dzose ina dzakanga dzakaenzana; kukwirira kwayo kwaiva makubhiti maviri, nenyanga dzayo dzakanga dziri chinhu chimwe chete nayo." 
Exodus37:26 Akaifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka, kumusoro kwayo, nenhivi dzayo dzose, nenyanga dzayo; akaiitirawo hata yendarama yakanga yakaipoteredza." 
Exodus37:27 Akaiitirawo zvindori zviviri zvendarama pasi pehata yayo, pakona dzayo mbiri panhivi dzayo mbiri, pakava pokuitakura napo namatanda." 
Exodus37:28 Akaitawo matanda omuakasia, akaafukidza nendarama." 
Exodus37:29 Akaitawo mafuta matsvene okuzodza nawo, nezvinonhuhwira zvakaisvonaka zvemiti inonaka, zvikava zvakavhenganiswa nouchenjeri hwomuvhenganisi wezvinonhuhwira." 
Exodus38:1 Akaita aritari yezvibayiro zvinopiswa nomuakasia; kureba kwayo kwaiva makubhiti mashanu, noupamhi hwayo makubhiti mashanu; yakanga ine nhivi ina dzakanga dzakaenzana, nokukwirira kwayo kwaiva makubhiti matatu." 
Exodus38:2 Akaitawo nyanga dzayo pamakona ayo mana, nyanga dzayo dzikava chinhu chimwe chete nayo; akaifukidza nendarira." 
Exodus38:3 Akaita nhumbi dzose dzearitari, hari, nefoshoro, nemidziyo, nezvikokovonho zvenyama, nezvaenga zvomoto, nhumbi dzose akadziita nendarira." 
Exodus38:4 Akaitirawo aritari chakarukwa chendarira, chakarukwa samambure, pasi pechitsiko chakaipoteredza nechenyasi, chakasvikira pakati payo." 
Exodus38:5 Akaitira makona mana echakarukwa chendarira zvindori zvina paiva pokutakura napo namatanda. 
Exodus38:6 Akaita matanda omuakasia, akaafukidza nendarira." 
Exodus38:7 Akaisa matanda mukati mezvindori zvaiva panhivi dzearitari, kuti itakurwe nawo; akaiita namapuranga, ikasava nechinhu mukati." 
Exodus38:8 Akaitawo mudziyo wokushambidzira wendarira, nechigadziko chawo chendarira, nezvionioni zvavakadzi vaishandira pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Exodus38:9 Akaitawo ruvanze; kurutivi rwezasi, rwakatarira zasi, kwakanga kunezvirembedzwa zvemicheka yakaisvonaka yakarukwa, makubhiti ane zana;" 
Exodus38:10 mbiru dzayo dzakanga dzina makumi maviri, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina makumi maviri zvendarira, nezvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:11 Kurutivi rwokumusoro kwaiva namakubhiti ane zana, nembiru dzayo dzina makumi maviri, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina makumi maviri zvendarira, nezvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:12 Kurutivi rwamavirazuva kwakanga kune zvirembedzwa zvemicheka zvinamakubhiti ana makumi mashanu, nembiru dzazvo dzine gumi, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvine gumi; zvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:13 Kurutivi rwamabvazuva kunotarira kumabvazuva kwaiva namakubhiti makumi mashanu. 
Exodus38:14 Zvirembedzwa zvemicheka kurutivi rumwe rwesuo zvakanga zvinamakubhiti ane gumi namashanu, nembiru dzazvo nhatu, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvitatu." 
Exodus38:15 Nokuno rumwe rutiviwo; kurutivi rumwe norumwe rwesuo roruvanze kwakanga kune zvirembedzwa zvemicheka zvinamakubhiti ane gumi namashanu, nembiru dzazvo nhatu, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvitatu." 
Exodus38:16 Zvirembedzwa zvose zvemicheka paruvanze zvaipotedza nhivi dzose, zvaiva zvomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa." 
Exodus38:17 Nezvigadziko zvembiru zvaiva zvendarira, nezvikorekedzo zvembiru nezvindori zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha; nemisoro yadzo yakanga yakafukidzwa nesirivha; mbiru dzose dzoruvanze dzakanga dzakabatanidzwa nezvindori zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:18 Chidzitiro chesuo roruvanze chakanga chakaitwa nomusoni, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa; kureba kwacho kwaiva namakubhiti ana makumi maviri, nokukwirira paupamhi hwacho makubhiti mashanu, zvakafanana nezvirembedzwa zvemicheka paruvanze." 
Exodus38:19 Mbiru dzayo dzaiva ina, nezvigadziko zvadzo zvina zvendarira; zvikorekedzo zvadzo zvaiva zvesirivha, misoro yadzo nezvindori zvadzo zvakanga zvakafukidzwa nesirivha." 
Exodus38:20 Mbambo dzose dzetabhenakeri nedzoruvanze, rwakanga ruchiipoteredza kunhivi dzose, dzaiva dzendarira." 
Exodus38:21 Ndiko kuwanda kwezvinhu zvetabhenakeri, zvetabhenakeri yechipupuriro, pakuverengwa kwazvo nokuraira kwaMozisi; vaRevhi vakaita basa iro vachirairwa naItamari, mwanakomana waAroni muprista." 
Exodus38:22 Bhezareri, mwanakomana waUri, mwanakomana waHuri, worudzi rwaJudha, wakaita zvose zvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha," 
Exodus38:23 anaOhoriabhu, mwanakomana waAhisamaki, worudzi rwaDhani, muvezi nomubati wakachenjera, nomusoni wezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, zvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka." 
Exodus38:24 Ndarama yose yavaibatisa nayo mabasa ose apaimba tsvene, iyo ndarama yezvipo, aiva matarenda ana makumi maviri namapfumbamwe, namashekeri ana mazana manomwe namakumi matatu, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri rapaimba tsvene." 
Exodus38:25 Nesirivha yaivo vakanga vachiverengwa paungano aiva matarenda ane zana, namashekeri ane chiuru chimwe namazana manomwe namakumi manomwe namashanu, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri rapaimba tsvene." 
Exodus38:26 Munhu mumwe nomumwe wakaripa bheka rimwe, iri hafu yeshekeri rimwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri rapaimba tsvene; mumwe nomumwe wakadarika kuna vakaverengwa, wakanga ana makore makumi maviri, kana wakapfuura makore iwayo, vakanga vari varume vane zviuru zvina mazana matanhatu nezvitatu namazana mashanu namakumi mashanu." 
Exodus38:27 Namatarenda esirivha ane zana aiva okuumbisa nawo zvigadziko zvapaimba tsvene nezvigadziko zvechidzitiro; zvigadziko zvine zana zvakaitwa namatarenda ane zana, chigadziko chimwe nechimwe netarenda rimwe." 
Exodus38:28 Namashekeri ane chiuru chimwe namazana manomwe namakumi manomwe namashanu wakaita zvikorekedzo zvembiru, akafukidza misoro yadzo, nokuzviitirawo zvindori." 
Exodus38:29 Ndarira yezvipo yakanga ina matarenda ana makumi manomwe namashekeri ane zviuru zviviri namazana mana. 
Exodus38:30 Nayo wakaita zvigadziko zvomukova wetende rokusangana, nearitari yendarira, nechakarukwa chayo chendarira, nenhumbi dzose dzapaaritari," 
Exodus38:31 nezvigadziko zvose zvoruvanze rwakanga rwakapotedza, nezvigadziko zvesuo roruvanze, nembambo dzose dzetabhenakeri, nembambo dzose dzoruvanze rwakanga rwakapoteredza." 
Exodus39:1 Vakaitawo nguvo dzakarukwa zvakanaka nezvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, dzokushumira nadzo panzvimbo tsvene; vakaita nguvo tsvene dzaAroni, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:2 Akaita efodhi nendarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa." 
Exodus39:3 Vakapambadzira ndarama, vakaita mabape matete, vakaicheka, vakaita nhare dzokusonisa nadzo zvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka yakarukwa, riri basa romunhu anogona." 
Exodus39:4 Vakaiitira mabandi pamafudzi akabatanidzwa; akanga akabatanidzwa pamiromo yayo miviri. 
Exodus39:5 Nebhanhire rakarukwa nomubati wakachenjera, rakanga riri pamusoro payo, rokuisunga naro; chakanga chiri chinhu chimwe chete nayo, rakaitwa saiyo; rendarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka yakarukwa, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:6 Vakagadzira mabwe eonikisi, akanyudzwa mukati mezviruva zvendarama, mazita avana vaIsiraeri akanyorwapo, sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa." 
Exodus39:7 Akaaisa pamabandi apamafudzi eefodhi, kuti ave mabwe okurangaridza vana vaIsiraeri, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:8 Akaitawo hombodo yechipfuva, raiva basa romubati wakachenjera, sezvakaitwawo efodhi; akaiita nendarama, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nemicheka yakaisvonaka yakarukwa." 
Exodus39:9 Yakanga ine nhivi ina dzakaenzana; vakaita hombodo yechipfuva ine mheto mbiri; kureba kwayo kwakanga kwakaita sapanosvika mimwe, noupamhi hwayo sapanosvika mimwewo, ine mheto mbiri." 
Exodus39:10 Vakaisa mukati mayo misara mina yamabwe, mumwe musara waiva nesadhio, netopasi, nekabhunakeri. Ndiwo musara wokutanga." 
Exodus39:11 Napamusara wechipiri simaradhino, nesafiri, nedhaimani." 
Exodus39:12 Napamusara wechitatu haikindi, neagati, neametisi." 
Exodus39:13 Napamusara wechina bheriri, neonikisi, nejasipiri; akanga akanyudzwa muzviruva zvendarama." 
Exodus39:14 Mabwe akanga akaita samazita avana vaIsiraeri, ane gumi namaviri, samazita avo; akanga akanyorwa sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa, rimwe nerimwe rine zita raro, mazita amarudzi ane gumi namaviri." 
Exodus39:15 Napahombodo akaita zviketani zvakafanana norwonzi rwendarama yakamoniwa yakaisvonaka. 
Exodus39:16 Vakaitawo zviruva zviviri zvendarama, nezvindori zviviri zvendarama, akaisa zvindori zviviri pamicheto miviri yehombodo yechipfuva." 
Exodus39:17 Vakaisawo zviketani zviviri zvendarama yakamoniwa pazvindori zviviri zvaiva pamicheto yehombodo yechipfuva. 
Exodus39:18 Nemimwe miromo miviri yezviketani zviviri, vakaiisa pamabandi apachipfuva cheefodhi nechemberi kwayo." 
Exodus39:19 Vakaitawo zvindori zviviri zvendarama, vakazviisa pamicheto miviri yehombodo yechipfuva pamupendero wayo, uri kurutivi rweefodhi nechomukati." 
Exodus39:20 Vakaitawo zvindiro zviviri zvendarama vakazviisa pamabhande maviri apamafudzi eefodhi zasi nechemberi kwayo, pedo napayakabatanidzwa napo, pamusoro pebhanhire reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri." 
Exodus39:21 Vakasunganidza hombodo yechipfuva nezvindori zvayo pazvindori zveefodhi norwonzi rutema, kuti ruve pamusoro pebhanhire reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri, kuti hombodo yechipfuva irege kusununguka paefodhi, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:22 Akaitawo jasi reefodhi rakarukwa; rose rakanga riri romucheka mutema. 
Exodus39:23 Akaita buri rejasi pakati paro, seburi renguvo yokurwa, rakanga rinomupendero wakapoteredza buri raro, kuti rirege kubvaruka." 
Exodus39:24 Pamipendero yejasi vakaita matamba ezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakarukwa." 
Exodus39:25 Vakaitawo zvitare zvinorira zvendarama yakaisvonaka; vakaisa zvitare pakati pamatamba pamipendero yejasi, kunhivi dzose, pakati pamatamba;" 
Exodus39:26 pakava nechitare chimwe nedamba rimwezve, pamipendero yejasi kunhivi dzose, rikava jasi rokushumira naro, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:27 Vakaitira Aroni navanakomana vake nguvo dzakarukwa nomucheka wakaisvonaka," 
Exodus39:28 nenguwani yomucheka wakaisvonaka, nedzimwe nguwani dzakanaka dzomucheka wakaisvonaka, namabhuruku omucheka wakarukwa wakaisvonaka," 
Exodus39:29 nebhanhire romucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa, nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, rikava basa romusoni anogona, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:30 Vakaitawo bwendefa rekorona tsvene nendarama yakaisvonaka, vakanyora pamusoro paro sezvinonyorwa ibwe rokusimbisa, vachiti: MUTSVENE KUNA JEHOVHA." 
Exodus39:31 Vakasungira pariri rwonzi rutema, kuti varibatanidze naro panguwani kumusoro, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus39:32 Naizvozvo basa rose retabhenakeri yetende rokusangana rakapera; vana vaIsiraeri vakaita zvose zvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha, vakaita saizvozvo." 
Exodus39:33 Zvino vakauya netabhenakeri kuna Mozisi, zvaiti: tende nenhumbi dzaro dzose, nezvikorekedzo zvaro, namatanda aro, nembariro dzaro, nembiru dzaro, nezvigadziko zvaro;" 
Exodus39:34 nechifukidzo chamatebwe amakondobwe akazodzwa muti mutsvuku, nechifukidzo chamatebwe amatenhe, nechidzitiro chokudzitira nacho;" 
Exodus39:35 neareka yechipupuriro, namatanda okutakura nawo, nechifunhiro chokuyananisa;" 
Exodus39:36 netafura, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nechingwa chokuratidza;" 
Exodus39:37 nechigadziko chakaisvonaka, nemwenje yacho, mwenje yokugadzirirapo, nenhumbi dzacho dzose, namafuta okuvhenekesa nawo;" 
Exodus39:38 nearitari yendarama, namafuta okuzodza nawo, nezvinonhuhwira zvakanaka, nechidzitiro chomukova wetende;" 
Exodus39:39 nearitari yendarira, nechakarukwa chayo chendarira, namatanda, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira, nechigadziko chawo;" 
Exodus39:40 nezvirembedzwa zvaparuvanze, nembiru dzazvo, nezvigadziko zvadzo, nechidzitiro chesuo roruvanze, norwonzi rwacho, nembambo dzacho, nenhumbi dzose dzokubata nadzo patabhenakeri, patende rokusangana;" 
Exodus39:41 nenguvo dzakarukwa zvakanaka nouchenjeri dzokushumira nadzo panzvimbo tsvene, nenguvo tsvene dzaAroni muprista, nenguvo dzavanakomana vake, dzokushumira nadzo pabasa rouprista." 
Exodus39:42 Zvose sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha, saizvozvo vana vaIsiraeri vakaita mabasa ose." 
Exodus39:43 Mozisi akatarira mabasa ose, akaona kuti vakanga vaaita sezvakanga zvarairwa naJehovha, ndizvo zvavakaita; Mozisi akavaropafadza." 
Exodus40:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Exodus40:2 Nomusi wokutanga womwedzi unofanira kumisa tabhenakeri netende rokusangana. 
Exodus40:3 Unofanira kuisa mukati mayo areka yechipupuriro, nokudzitira areka nechidzitiro." 
Exodus40:4 Upinzewo tafura, nokugadzira zvinhu zvinofanira kuva pamusoro payo; upinzewo chigadziko chemwenje, ugotungidza mwenje yacho." 
Exodus40:5 Uisewo aritari yendarama yezvinonhuhwira pamberi peareka yechipupuriro, ugoisa chidzitiro chomukova wetabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:6 Zvino uisewo aritari yezvibayiro zvinopiswa pamberi pomukova wetabhenakeri yetende rokusangana. 
Exodus40:7 Uisewo mudziyo wokushambidzira pakati petende rokusangana nearitari, ugodira mvura mukati mawo." 
Exodus40:8 Zvino ugadzirewo ruvanze nokurembedza chidzitiro chesuo roruvanze. 
Exodus40:9 Utorewo mafuta okuzodza nawo, uzodze tabhenakeri nawo, nezvose zviri mukati mayo; ugoitsaura, iyo nezvose zvirimo, kuti chive chinhu chitsvene." 
Exodus40:10 Uzodzewo aritari nezvibayiro zvinopiswa, nemidziyo yayo yose, kuti utsaure aritari, aritari chive chinhu chitsvene-tsvene." 
Exodus40:11 Uzodzewo mudziyo wokushambidzira nechigadziko chawo, uutsaure." 
Exodus40:12 Zvino uswededze Aroni navanakomana vake kumukova wetende rokusangana, ugovashambidza nemvura." 
Exodus40:13 Ipapo ufukidze Aroni nguvo tsvene, ugomuzodza nokumutsaura, kuti andishumire pabasa rouprista." 
Exodus40:14 Uswededzewo vanakomana vake, ugovafukidza nguvo." 
Exodus40:15 Uvazodze, sezvawazodza baba vavo, kuti vandishumire pabasa rouprista; kuzodzwa kwavo kunofanira kuva kwavari uprista nokusingaperi, kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose.""" 
Exodus40:16 Mozisi akaita saizvozvo; zvose zvaakanga arairwa naJehovha, wakazviita saizvozvo." 
Exodus40:17 Tabhenakeri ikamiswa nomwedzi wokutanga wegore rechipiri nomusi wokutanga womwedzi. 
Exodus40:18 Mozisi akamisa tabhenakeri, akaisa zvigadziko zvayo, akamisa mapuranga ayo, akaisa mbariro dzayo, nokumisa mbiru dzayo." 
Exodus40:19 Akawarira tende pamusoro petabhenakeri, akaisa chifukidzo chetende pamusoro payo, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:20 Akatora chipupuriro, akachiisa muareka, akapinza matanda paareka, akaisa chifunhiro chokuyananisa pamusoro peareka;" 
Exodus40:21 akapi nza areka mutabhenakeri, akarembedza chidzitiro chokudzitira nacho, akadzitira areka yechipupuriro; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:22 Akaisa tafura mutende rokusangana, kurutivi rwetabhenakeri nechokumusoro, kunze kwechidzitiro." 
Exodus40:23 Akagadzirawo chingwa pamusoro payo pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:24 Akaisa chigadziko chemwenje mutende rokusangana, chakatarisana netafura, kurutivi rwetabhenakeri nechenyasi." 
Exodus40:25 Akatungidza mwenje pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:26 Akaisa aritari yendarama mutende rokusangana pamberi pechidzitiro; 
Exodus40:27 akapisirapo zvinonhuhwira zvemiti yakanaka, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:28 Akagadzira zvirembedzwa zvomukova wetabhenakeri. 
Exodus40:29 Akaisa aritari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa pamukova wetabhenakeri yetende rokusangana, akapisira pamusoro payo chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:30 Akaisa mudziyo wokushambidzira pakati petende rokusangana nearitari, akaisa mukati mayo mvura yokushambidza nayo." 
Exodus40:31 Ipapo Mozisi naAroni navanakomana vake vakashamba maoko avo netsoka dzavopo; 
Exodus40:32 pakupinda kwavo mutende rokusangana, napakuswedera kwavo kuaritari, vaishamba, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Exodus40:33 Akagadzirawo ruvanze rwaipoteredza tabhenakeri nearitari, akarembedza chidzitiro chesuo roruvanze. Naizvozvo Mozisi akapedza basa rose." 
Exodus40:34 Ipapo gore rakafukidza tende rokusangana, kubwinya kwaJehovha kukazadza tabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:35 Mozisi akasagona kupinda mutende rokusangana, nokuti gore rakaramba rigere pamusoro paro uye kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakanga kwazadza tabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:36 Zvino kana gore rokwidzwa richibva pamusoro petabhenakeri, vana vaIsiraeri vakapfuura vachifamba nzendo dzavo dzose." 
Exodus40:37 Asi kana gore risina kukwidzwa, havana kufamba, kusvikira musi warinozokwidzwa." 
Exodus40:38 Nokuti gore raJehovha rakanga riri pamusoro petabhenakeri masikati, nomoto waiva mariri usiku, pamberi pavose veimba yaIsiraeri panzendo dzavo dzose." 
Leviticus1:1 Zvino Jehovha wakadana Mozisi, akataura naye ari mutende rokusangana, akati," 
Leviticus1:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti, kwavari, `Kana mumwe wenyu achida kuvigira Jehovha chipo chake, munofanira kumuvigira zvipo zvenyu zvezvipfuwo, kana zvemombe kana zvamakwai.'" 
Leviticus1:3 Kana chipo chake chiri chipiriso chinopiswa chemombe, anofanira kuvigira mukono usina mhosva; ngaachibayire pamukova wetende rokusangana, kuti agamuchirwe pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus1:4 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechipiriso chinopiswa, kuti chigamuchirwe panzvimbo yake, chimuyananisire." 
Leviticus1:5 Ngaabaye nzombe pamberi paJehovha, vanakomana vaAroni, vaprista, vagouya neropa, vasase ropa kunhivi dzose dzearitari, iri pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus1:6 Zvino ngaavhiye chipiriso chinopiswa, nokuchigura-gura." 
Leviticus1:7 Zvino vanakomana vaAroni, muprista, ngavaise moto paaritari, nokugadzirawo huni pamusoro pomoto." 
Leviticus1:8 Ipapo vanakomana vaAroni, vaprista, vanofanira kugadzira nhindi, nomusoro, namafuta pamusoro pehuni dziri pamoto uri pamusoro pearitari." 
Leviticus1:9 Asi ngaasuke ura hwacho namakumbo acho nemvura, muprista agopisa zvose paaritari, chive chipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus1:10 Kana chipo chake chiri chipiriso chinopiswa chezvipfuwo zviduku zvamakwai kana mbudzi, anofanira kuvigira mukono usina mhosva." 
Leviticus1:11 Ngaachibaye parutivi rwearitari nechokumusoro pamberi paJehovha; zvino vanakomana vaAroni, vaprista, vanofanira kusasa ropa racho kunhivi dzose dzearitari." 
Leviticus1:12 Ipapo anofanira kugura-gura nhindi pamwechete nomusoro wacho namafuta acho, muprista agozvigadzira pamusoro pehuni dziri pamoto pamusoro pearitari." 
Leviticus1:13 Asi ura namakumbo ngaazvisuke nemvura, muprista agozvibayira zvose, nokuzvipisira paaritari, kuti chive chipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chakaitwa nomoto, chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus1:14 Kana chipo chake kuna Jehovha chiri chipiriso chinopiswa cheshiri, ngaavigire chibayiro chake chenjiva, kana twana twenjiva." 
Leviticus1:15 Zvino muprista anofanira kuchiisa paaritari, agodonhedzera ropa racho parutivi rwearitari;" 
Leviticus1:16 zvino anofanira kutora chihururu chayo neminhenga yayo, ndokuzvirasa kurutivi rwearitari kumabudazuva kunoraswa madota." 
Leviticus1:17 Ipapo anofanira kuibvambura namapapiro ayo asingaiparadzanisi, muprista agoipisa paaritari pamusoro pehuni dziri pamoto; icho chipiriso chinopiswa, chipiriso chakaitwa nomoto, chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus2:1 Kana munhu achiuya kuna Jehovha nechipo choupfu, chipo chake ngachive choupfu hwakatsetseka; zvino ngaadire mafuta pamusoro pacho, agoisawo zvinonhuhwira pamusoro pacho." 
Leviticus2:2 Ipapo ngaachiise kuvanakomana vaAroni, vaprista; iye atsamure tsama yake imwe youpfu hwakatsetseka namafuta nezvinonhuhwira zviripo, muprista agozvipisa paaritari, chive chokurangaridza chipo icho, chipiriso chakaitwa nomoto, chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus2:3 Zvakasara pachipiriso choupfu zvichava zvaAroni navanakomana vake; icho chinhu chitsvene-tsvene pakati pezvipiriso zvaJehovha zvakaitwa nomoto. 
Leviticus2:4 Kana achiuya nechipo choupfu chakabikwa muchoto, ngachive chezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa zvoupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nezvingwa zvitete zvisina kuviriswa zvakazodzwa mafuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Kana chipo chako chiri chipiriso choupfu chakabikwa mugango, ngachive choupfu hwakatsetseka, husina kuviriswa., hwakakanyiwa namafuta." 
Leviticus2:6 Unofanira kuchimedura, nokudira mafuta pamusoro pacho; ndicho chipiriso choupfu." 
Leviticus2:7 Kana chipo chako chiri chipiriso choupfu chakabikwa muhari, ngachiitwe noupfu hwakatsetseka namafuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Unofanira kuuya kuna Jehovha nechipiriso choupfu chakaitwa nezvinhu izvi; ngachipiwe muprista, iye agochiisa paaritari." 
Leviticus2:9 Zvino muprista ngaatsamure pachipiriso choupfu chokurangaridza chacho, achipisire pamusoro pearitari, icho chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus2:10 Zvakasara pachipiriso choupfu ngazvive zvaAroni navanakomana vake; icho chinhu chitsvene-tsvene pakati pezvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto. 
Leviticus2:11 Chipiriso chipi nechipi choupfu chamunouya nacho kuna Jehovha ngachirege kuitwa nembiriso, nokuti hamufaniri kupisira Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto chine mbiriso kana uchi." 
Leviticus2:12 Mungazvivigira Jehovha zviri zvipiriso zvezvitsva zvenyu, asi ngazvirege kuiswa paaritari kuti zvive zvinonhuhwira zvakanaka." 
Leviticus2:13 Zvipiriso zvako zvose zvoupfu unofanira kuzvirunga nomunyu; usarega kuisa munyu wesungano yaMwari wako pachipiriso chako choupfu, asi uise munyu pazvipiriso zvako zvose." 
Leviticus2:14 Kana uchivigira Jehovha chipiriso choupfu chezvitsva, uuye nehura dzezviyo dzakakangiwa pamoto, zviyo zvakatswiwa zvehura itsva, chive chipiriso choupfu chezvitsva." 
Leviticus2:15 Unofanira kuisa mafuta pamusoro pacho, nokuisawo mafuta pamusoro pacho, kuti chive chipiriso choupfu." 
Leviticus2:16 Zvino muprista ngaapise chokurangaridza chacho, zvimwe zvezviyo zvacho zvakatswiwa, nezvimwe zvamafuta acho, pamwechete nezvinonhuhwira zvacho; chipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto." 
Leviticus3:1 Kana chipo chake chiri chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, kana achiuya nemombe, kana iri nzombe kana hadzi, ngaauye nechisina mhosva pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus3:2 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechipiriso chake, achiuraye pamukova wetende rokusangana, vanakomana vaAroni, vaprista, vagosasa ropa pamusoro pearitari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus3:3 Zvino ngaape Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto pachibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, chokuti mafuta anofukidza ura, namafuta ose ari paura," 
Leviticus3:4 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, ngaazvibvise pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus3:5 Ipapo vanakomana vaAroni vanofanira kuzvipisa paaritari pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa, chiri pamusoro pehuni dziri pamoto; kuti chive chipiriso chinopiswa chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus3:6 Kana chipo chake chechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa chiri chezvipfuwo zviduku, kana uri mukono kana hadzi, ngaauye nechisina mhosva." 
Leviticus3:7 Kana achiuya negwayana rechipiriso chake, ngaauye naro pamberi paJehovha," 
Leviticus3:8 zvino aise ruoko rwake pamusoro pechipo chake, ndokuchiuraya pamberi petende rokusangana, vanakomana vaAroni vagosasa ropa racho pamusoro pearitari panhivi dzose." 
Leviticus3:9 Zvino ngaape Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa pamoto pachibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, chokuti mafuta aro nebhemhe rose, azvibvise pedo nomusana, namafuta anofukidza ura, namafuta ose ari pamusoro peura," 
Leviticus3:10 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, ngaazvibvise pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus3:11 Ipapo muprista ngaazvipise pamusoro pearitari; ndizvo zvokudya zvechipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto. 
Leviticus3:12 Kana chipo chake chiri chembudzi, ngaauye nayo pamberi paJehovha;" 
Leviticus3:13 zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wayo, aiuraye pamberi petende rokusongana; vanakomana vaAroni vagosasa ropa rayo pamusoro pearitari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus3:14 Zvino ngaape zvimwe zvazvo chive chipo chake, chipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto; zvinoti mafuta anofukidza ura, namafuta ose ari pamusoro peura," 
Leviticus3:15 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, azvibvise pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus3:16 Zvino muprista ngaazvipise pamusoro pearitari; ndizvo zvokudya zvechipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, zvive zvinonhuhwira zvakanaka; mafuta ose ndeaJehovha." 
Leviticus3:17 Ngauve murayiro usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose padzimba dzenyu dzose, kuti murege kudya mafuta neropa.""" 
Leviticus4:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus4:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Kana munhu akatadza nokusaziva pachinhu chimwe chezvakarairwa naJehovha kuti zvirege kuitwa, akaita chimwe chazvo;" 
Leviticus4:3 kana muprista wakazodzwa akatadza, akapinza vanhu pamhosva, anofanira kuvigira Jehovha nzombe duku isina mhosva, nokuda kwezvivi zvake zvaakatadza, kuti chive chipiriso chezvivi.'" 
Leviticus4:4 Ngaauye nenzombe duku pamukova wetende rokusangana pamberi paJehovha, aise ruoko rwake pamusoro wenzombe, ndokuuraya nzombe pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus4:5 Zvino muprista wakazodzwa ngaatore rimwe ropa renzombe, ariise patende rokusangana," 
Leviticus4:6 muprista agonyika mumwe wake muropa, ndokusasa rimwe ropa kanomwe pamberi paJehovha, pamberi pechidzitiro chenzvimbo tsvene." 
Leviticus4:7 Zvino muprista aise rimwe ropa pamberi paJehovha panyanga dzearitari yezvinonhuhwira zvakanaka, iri mutende rokusangana, agodurura rimwe ropa rose renzombe mujinga mearitari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, iri pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus4:8 Zvino ngaabvise mafuta ose enzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, mafuta anofukidza ura, namafuta ose ari pamusoro peura," 
Leviticus4:9 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiwuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, ngaazvibvise pamwechete netsvo," 
Leviticus4:10 sezvaanobviswa panzombe yechipiriso chokuyananisa nacho; zvino muprista ngaazvipise pamusoro pearitari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa. 
Leviticus4:11 Debwe renzombe, nenyama yayo yose, pamwechete nomusoro wayo namakumbo ayo, neura hwayo, namazvizvi ayo;" 
Leviticus4:12 nzombe yose iyo unofanira kuitakurira kunze kwemisasa, pakanaka, panorasirwa madota, ndokuipisira pamusoro pehuni nomoto; ngaipisirwe panorasirwa madota." 
Leviticus4:13 Kana ungano yose yaIsiraeri ikatadza, chinhu icho chikasazikamwa neungano, kana vakaita chimwe chezvinhu zvakarairwa naJehovha kuti zvirege kuitwa, vakapara mhaka;" 
Leviticus4:14 kana chivi chavakatadza chikazozikamwa, zvino ungano ngaiuye nenzombe duku, chive chipiriso chezvivi, iwuyiswe pamberi petende rokusangana." 
Leviticus4:15 Zvino vakuru veungano ngavaise maoko avo pamusoro wenzombe pamberi paJehovha, nzombe igourawa pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus4:16 Zvino muprista wakazodzwa ngaauye nerimwe ropa renzombe patende rokusangana," 
Leviticus4:17 muprista anyike mumwe wake muropa, arisase kanomwe pamberi paJehovha, pamberi pechidzitiro." 
Leviticus4:18 Zvino ngaaise rimwe ropa panyanga dzearitari iri pamberi paJehovha, iri mutende rokusangana; rimwe ropa rose agoridururira mujinga mearitari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, iri pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus4:19 Zvino ngaabvise mafuta ose aripo, aapise pamusoro pearitari." 
Leviticus4:20 Ndizvo zvaanofanira kuitira nzombe; sezvaakaitira nzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, ndizvo zvaanofanira kuitira iyi; muprista anofanira kuvayananisira, vakangamwirwe." 
Leviticus4:21 Zvino unofanira kutakurira nzombe kunze kwemisasa, andoipisa, sezvaakapisa nzombe yokutanga; ndicho chipiriso chezvivi cheungano." 
Leviticus4:22 Kana mukuru akatadza, akaita nokusaziva chimwe chezvinhu zvose zvakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wake kuti zvirege kuitwa, akapara mhaka;" 
Leviticus4:23 kana chivi chake chaakatadza akachiziviswa, ngaauye nenhongo yembudzi isina mhosva, chive chipiriso chake." 
Leviticus4:24 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wembudzi, aiuraye panourayirwa chipiriso chinopiswa pamberi paJehovha, chive chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus4:25 Zvino muprista ngaatore rimwe ropa rechipiriso chezvivi nomumwe wake, ariise panyanga dzearitari yechipiriso chinopiswa, nerimwe ropa rayo aridururire muzasi mearitari yechipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus4:26 Mafuta ayo ose ngaapiswe pamusoro pearitari, sezvavakaita namafuta echipiriso chokuyananisa; muprista amuyananisire pamusoro pezvivi zvake, akangamwirwe." 
Leviticus4:27 Kana mumwe wavanhu zvavo akatadza akaita nokusaziva chimwe chezvinhu zvakarairwa naJehovha kuti zvirege kuitwa, akapara mhaka;" 
Leviticus4:28 kana chivi chake chaakatadza akachiziviswa, ngaauye nesheshe yembudzi isina mhosva, chive chipiriso chake pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza." 
Leviticus4:29 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechipiriso chezvivi, auraye chipiriso chezvivi panourayirwa chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus4:30 Zvino muprista ngaatore rimwe ropa rayo nomumwe wake, ariise panyanga dzearitari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, asi rimwe ropa rayo rose ngaaridururire mujinga mearitari." 
Leviticus4:31 Zvino ngaabvise mafuta ayo ose, sezvinobviswa mafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa nazvo, muprista agoapisa pamusoro pearitari, chive chinhu chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha; muprista anofanira kumuyananisira, akangamwirwe." 
Leviticus4:32 Kana akauya negwayana rokuita naro chipiriso chake chezvivi, ngaauye nesheshe isina mhosva." 
Leviticus4:33 Zvino ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechipiriso chezvivi, agoriuraya panourayirwa chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus4:34 Zvino muprista ngaatore rimwe ropa rechipiriso chezvivi nomumwe wake, ariise panyanga dzearitari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, asi rimwe ropa raro rose ngaaridururire mujinga mearitari;" 
Leviticus4:35 zvino ngaabvise mafuta aro ose, sezvinobviswa mafuta egwayana pachibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa nazvo; muprista aapise pamusoro pearitari sezvinoitwa nezvipiriso zvose zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto; muprista anofanira kumuyananisira pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza, akangamwirwe." 
Leviticus5:1 Kana munhu akatadza, ari chapupu akapikirwa kupupura chinhu chaakaona, kana chaanoziva, akasadudza, achava nemhosva yake." 
Leviticus5:2 Kunyange kana munhu akanga abata chinhu chisakanaka, kana chiri chitunha chemhuka isakanaka, kana chitunha chemombe isakanaka, kana chitunha chezvinokambaira zvisakanaka, zvikasazikamwa naye, akasvibiswa, achava nemhosva." 
Leviticus5:3 Kana akanga abata zvisakanaka zvomunhu, kana zviri zvisakanaka zvipi nezvipi akasvibiswa nazvo, zvikasazikamwa naye; kana akazozviziva, achava nemhosva." 
Leviticus5:4 Kana munhu akapika nomuromo wake, asingafungi kwazvo, kundoita zvakaipa kana kundoita zvakanaka, chinhu chipi nechipi chaakapika, asingafungi kwazvo, chikasazikamwa naye; kana akazochiziva, achava nemhosva kune chimwe chaizvozvo;" 
Leviticus5:5 zvino kana akava nemhosva kune chimwe chaizvozvo, anofanira kuzvireurura zvaakatadza." 
Leviticus5:6 Zvino ngaauye nechipiriso chake chemhosva pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza, ngaive hadzi yezvipfuwo zviduku, kana gwayana kana mbudzana, chive chipiriso chezvivi; muprista ngaamuyananisire pamusoro pezvivi zvake." 
Leviticus5:7 Kana asingagoni kuuya negwayana, ngaavigire Jehovha njiva mbiri, kana twana tuviri twenjiva, chive chipiriso chemhosva yake yaakatadza; imwe ive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus5:8 Zvino ngaauye nadzo kumuprista, iye atange kubaya imwe yechipiriso chezvivi, agure musoro wayo pamutsipa, asi arege kuiparadzanisa;" 
Leviticus5:9 zvino ngaasase ropa rechipiriso chezvivi kurutivi rwearitari, asi ropa rakasara risvinirwe mujinga mearitari; chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus5:10 Yechipiri ngaaite nayo chipiriso chinopiswa, sezvamakarairwa; muprista amuyananisire pamusoro pezvivi zvaakatadza, akangamwirwe." 
Leviticus5:11 Asi kana akasagona kuuya nenjiva mbiri, kana notwana tuviri twenjiva, ngaauye nechipiriso chake pamusoro pokutadza kwake, chive chegumi cheefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso chezvivi; ngaarege kudira mafuta pamusoro pahwo, kana kuisa zvinonhuhwira pamusoro pahwo, nokuti chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus5:12 Zvino ngaauye nahwo kumuprista, muprista atsamure tsama imwe yahwo, chive chokurangaridza chacho; zvino ngaahwuise pamusoro pearitari, sezvinoitwa nezvimwe zvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto; chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus5:13 muprista anofanira kumuyananisira pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza pachinhu chimwe chaizvozvo, akangamwirwe. Zvakasara ngazvive zvomuprista, sezvinoitwa nechipiriso choupfu.""" 
Leviticus5:14 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus5:15 Kana munhu akadarika, akatadza nokusaziva pazvinhu zvitsvene zvaJehovha, ngaauye kuna Jehovha nechipiriso chemhosva yake, chegondobwe risina mhosva ramakwai ake, uchimutarira mashekeri esirivha uchienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene; chive chipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus5:16 Ngaatsive chinhu chaakatadza pachinhu chitsvene, awedzere pachiri chimwe cheshanu chacho, achipe muprista, muprista agomuyananisira negondobwe rechipiriso chemhosva, akangamwirwe." 
Leviticus5:17 Kana munhu akatadza, akaita chinhu chimwe chezvinhu zvakanga zvarairwa naJehovha kuti zvirege kuitwa; kunyange asina kuziva, une mhosva, mhaka unayo." 
Leviticus5:18 Ngaauye kumuprista negondobwe ramakwai ake risina mhosva, sezvaunofunga iwe, chive chipiriso chemhosva, muprista agomuyananisira pamusoro pechinhu chaakanga atadza nokusaziva, asingazivi, akangamwirwe." 
Leviticus5:19 Chipiriso chemhosva; zvirokwazvo une mhosva pamberi paJehovha. 
Leviticus6:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus6:2 Kana munhu akatadza, akadarika murayiro waJehovha, akanyengera wokwake pachinhu chaakanga apiwa kuchengeta, kana chakanga chaiswa paruoko rwake, kana pakumubira, kana pakumanikidza wokwake;" 
Leviticus6:3 kana akanonga chakanga charashika, akanyengera pachiri, akapika nhema; pachinhu chipi nechipi chazvose izvo, kana munhu achinge aita akatadza pachiri;" 
Leviticus6:4 zvino kana akatadza, ane mhosva, anofanira kudzosa chaakanga atora nokuba, kana chaakanga awana nokumanikidza, kana chaakanga apiwa kuchengeta, kana chakanga charashika akachinonga;" 
Leviticus6:5 kana chinhu chipi nechipi chaakanga apika nhema pamusoro pacho; ngaachidzose chose, awedzere kwachiri cheshanu chacho, achipe muridzi wacho nomusi waanowanikwa kuti ane mhosva." 
Leviticus6:6 Anofanira kuuya kumuprista nechipiriso chemhosva yake kuna Jehovha, chegondobwe ramakwai ake risina mhosva, sezvaunotara iwe, chive chipiriso chemhosva;" 
Leviticus6:7 zvino muprista amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha, akangamwirwe pamusoro pemhosva ipi neipi yaakaita.""" 
Leviticus6:8 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati,"
