Leviticus6:9 Raira Aroni navanakomana vake, uti, `Murayiro wechipiriso chinopiswa ndiwo: Chipiriso chinopiswa chinofanira kuvata pachoto pamusoro pearitari usiku hwose kusvikira mangwanani, moto urambe uchipfuta pamusoro pacho.'" 
Leviticus6:10 Zvino muprista ngaafuke nguvo yake yomucheka, nokufukawo bhurukwa rake romucheka pamuviri wake, abvise madota echipiriso chinopiswa, chapiswa nomoto paaritari, aaise parutivi rwearitari." 
Leviticus6:11 Zvino ngaabvise nguvo dzake, afuke dzimwe nguvo, agotakurira madota kunze kwemisasa panzvimbo yakanaka." 
Leviticus6:12 Moto paaritari unofanira kuramba uchipfuta pamusoro payo, haufaniri kudzima; muprista anofanira kubatidza huni pamusoro payo mangwanani ose. zvino ngaagadzire chipiriso chinopiswa pamusoro payo, apise mafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa pamusoro payo." 
Leviticus6:13 Moto ngaurambe uchipfuta pamusoro pearitari nguva dzose, urege kudzima." 
Leviticus6:14 Murayiro wechipiriso choupfu ndiwo: Vanakomana vaAroni vanofanira kuuya nacho pamberi paJehovha paaritari. 
Leviticus6:15 Zvino ngaatsamure tsama imwe yake youpfu, namamwe mafuta acho, nezvinonhuhwira zvose zviri pamusoro pechipiriso choupfu, azvipise pamusoro pearitari, chive chinonhuhwira zvakanaka, chokurangaridza chacho, kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus6:16 Zvakasara zvacho ngazvidyiwe naAroni navanakomana vake; zvidyiwe zvisina mbiriso panzvimbo tsvene; ngavazvidye paruvanze rwetende rokusangana. 
Leviticus6:17 Ngazvirege kubikwa nembiriso; ndakavapa icho, uve mugove wavo wezvipiriso zvangu zvinoitwa nomoto; chinhu chitsvene kwazvo, sechipiriso chezvivi, nechipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus6:18 Varume vose kuvana vaAroni ngavazvidye, uve murayiro usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose pazvipiriso zvose zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto; munhu upi noupi unozvibata, uchava mutsvene.""" 
Leviticus6:19 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus6:20 Ndicho chipo chaAroni nechavanakomana vake chavanofanira kupa Jehovha nomusi waanozodzwa nawo: Chegumi cheefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso choupfu nguva dzose, hafu yacho mangwanani, hafu yacho madekwana." 
Leviticus6:21 Ngachibikwe namafuta mugango; kana chaibva, uuye nacho; unofanira kuuya nechipiriso choupfu zvimedu-zvimedu zvakakangwa, chive chinhu chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus6:22 muprista unozodzwa panzvimbo yake pakati pavanakomana vake, ndiye anofanira kuuya nacho; uve mutemo usingaperi kuti chipisirwe Jehovha chose." 
Leviticus6:23 Chipiriso chimwe nechimwe choupfu chomuprista chinofanira kupiswa chose; hachifaniri kudyiwa. 
Leviticus6:24 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus6:25 Taura naAroni navanakomana vake uti, `Murayiro wechipiriso chezvivi ndiwo: Panourayirwa chipiriso chinopiswa ndipo panofanira kuurayirwawo chipiriso chezvivi pamberi paJehovha, chitsvene kwazvo.'" 
Leviticus6:26 muprista unochibayira pamusoro pezvivi, ndiye anofanira kuchidya chinofanira kudyiwa panzvimbo tsvene, paruvanze rwetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus6:27 Chinhu chipi nechipi chinogunzva nyama yacho chichava chitsvene; kana rimwe ropa racho rikadonhera panguvo ipi neipi, unofanira kusuka icho chakadonherwa naro panzvimbo tsvene." 
Leviticus6:28 Asi hari yevhu mayakabikirwa, inofanira kuputswa; kana yakabikwa muhari yendarira inofanira kukwizwa nokusukurudzwa nemvura." 
Leviticus6:29 Zvino varume vose kuvaprista vanofanira kuchidya; chitsvene kwazvo. 
Leviticus6:30 Zvipiriso zvose zvezvivi, kana rimwe ropa razvo rakaiswa mutende rokusangana kuzoyananisira panzvimbo tsvene, ngazvirege kudyiwa; zvinofanira kupiswa nomoto." 
Leviticus7:1 Murayiro wechipiriso chemhosva ndiwo: Chitsvene kwazvo. 
Leviticus7:2 Pavanourayirwa chipiriso chinopiswa, ndipo pavanofanira kuurayirwa chipiriso chemhosva; ropa racho unofanira kurisasa pamusoro pearitari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus7:3 Zvino ngaapisire mafuta acho ose, mafuta ebemhe, namafuta anofukidza ura," 
Leviticus7:4 netsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pamusoro padzo, ari pachiuno, namafuta ari pamusoro pechiropa, ngaazvibvise pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus7:5 Zvino muprista ngaazvipise paaritari, chive chipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto; chipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus7:6 Varume vose kuvaprista ngavachidye; chidyiwe panzvimbo tsvene; chitsvene kwazvo. 
Leviticus7:7 Sezvinoitwa nechipiriso chezvivi, ndizvo zvinoitwawo nechipiriso chemhosva; murayiro wazvo ndomumwe; chichava chomuprista unoyananisira nacho." 
Leviticus7:8 Uye muprista, unopisira chipiriso chinopiswa chomunhu, uyo muprista anofanira kupiwa debwe rechipiriso chinopiswa chaakauya nacho." 
Leviticus7:9 Chipiriso chimwe nechimwe choupfu, chakabikwa muchoto, nezvose zvakagadzirwa mugango kana muhari, zvichava zvomuprista unouya nazvo." 
Leviticus7:10 Chipiriso chimwe nechimwe choupfu, chakakanyiwa namafuta, kana chakaoma, chinofanira kupiwa vanakomana vaAroni, mumwe nomumwe, vachienzaniswa." 
Leviticus7:11 Ndiwo murayiro wezvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, zvinofanira kupiwa Jehovha:" 
Leviticus7:12 Kana munhu akazvipa, kuti avonge nazvo, pamwechete nechibayiro chokuvonga nacho, anofanira kupa zvingwa zviduku zvisina kuviriswa zvakakanyiwa namafuta, nezvingwa zvitete zvisina kuviriswa zvakazodzwa mafuta, nezvingwa zvakakanyiwa namafuta zvoupfu hwakatsetseka zvakakangwa." 
Leviticus7:13 Anofanira kupawo chipo chake chezvingwa zvakaviriswa pamwechete nechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa zvokuvonga nazvo. 
Leviticus7:14 Zvino pachipiriso chimwe nechimwe chive chipiriso chinosimudzirwa Jehovha; chichava chomuprista unosasa ropa rezvipiriso zvokuyananisa. 
Leviticus7:15 Nyama yechibayiro chezvipiriso zvake zvokuyananisa zvokuvonga nazvo inofanira kudyiwa nomusi waanopa chipo chake; haafaniri kusiya chimwe chacho kusvikira mangwanani. 
Leviticus7:16 Asi kana chibayiro chechipo chake chiri chinhu chaakapika, kana chipo chokuda kwake, chinofanira kudyiwa nomusi waanobayira chibayiro chake; zvakasara pazviri zvinofanira kudyiwa mangwanani;" 
Leviticus7:17 asi zvakasara zvenyama yechibayiro zvinofanira kupiswa nomoto nezuva retatu. 
Leviticus7:18 Kana imwe nyama yechibayiro chezvipiriso zvake zvokuyananisa ikadyiwa nezuva retatu, hazvingagamuchirwi nomufaro kana kunzi zvakanaka kuna iye wakazvipa; chichava chinhu chinonyangadza, nomunhu unozvidya uchava nemhosva." 
Leviticus7:19 Nyama yakabatana nechinhu chisakanaka, haifaniri kudyiwa, inofanira kupiswa nomoto. ""Asi imwe nyama mumwe nomumwe wakanatswa ungaidya." 
Leviticus7:20 Asi munhu unodya nyama yechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, zviri zvaJehovha, achiri netsvina yake, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus7:21 Kana ani naani akabata chinhu chisakanaka, kana zviri zvisakanaka zvomunhu kana zvemhuka isakanaka, kana chimwe chinhu chisakanaka chinonyangadza, akadya nyama yechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa zviri zvaJehovha, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake.""" 
Leviticus7:22 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus7:23 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Musadya mafuta, kana emombe, kana egwai, kana embudzi." 
Leviticus7:24 Mafuta echinhu chakangofa choga, namafuta echinhu chakaurawa nezvikara, angabatwa nawo pamabasa ose, asi hamufaniri kutongoadya.'" 
Leviticus7:25 Nokuti ani naani unodya mafuta ezvipfuwo zvavanoitira Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, munhu uNowadya anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus7:26 Regai kudya ropa ripi neripi, kana riri reshiri, kana rezvipfuwo, padzimba dzenyu dzose." 
Leviticus7:27 Ani naani unodya ropa ripi neripi, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake.""" 
Leviticus7:28 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus7:29 Taura navana vaIsiraeri uti, `Munhu unobayira Jehovha chibayiro chake chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, anofanira kuuya nechipo chake kuna Jehovha chinobva pachibayiro chezvipiriso zvake zvokuyananisa;" 
Leviticus7:30 maoko ake amene anofanira kuuya nezvipiriso zvinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto; ngaauye namafuta pamwechete nechityu, kuti chityu chizunguzirwe, chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha.'" 
Leviticus7:31 Zvino muprista ngaapise mafuta paaritari, asi chityu ndechaAroni navanakomana vake." 
Leviticus7:32 Munofanira kupa muprista bandauko rorudyi, chive chipiriso chinosimudzwa pazvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvenyu zvokuyananisa." 
Leviticus7:33 Uyo pakati pavanakomana vaAroni unopisira ropa rezvipiriso zvokuyananisa namafuta, ndiye uchapiwa bandauko rorudyi uve mugove wake." 
Leviticus7:34 Nokuti chityu chinozunguzirwa nebandauko rinosimudzwa, ndizvo zvandakatora kuvana vaIsiraeri pakati pezvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvavo zvokuyananisa, ndikazvipa Aroni muprista, navanakomana vake, chive chavo nokusingaperi, chinobva kuvana vaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus7:35 Ndiwo mugove waAroni, nomugove wavanakomana vake pazvipiriso zvinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto, nomusi waakavagadza nawo kuti vabatire Jehovha pabasa rouprista;" 
Leviticus7:36 wakarairwa naJehovha kuti vapiwe navana vaIsiraeri nomusi wokuzodzwa kwavo. Ndiwo mugove wavo nokusingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose. 
Leviticus7:37 Ndiwo murayiro wechipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu, nechipiriso chezvivi, nechipiriso chemhosva, nowokugadza, nowezvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa;" 
Leviticus7:38 wakarairwa Mozisi naJehovha pagomo reSinai, nomusi waakaraira vana vaIsiraeri, kuti vape Jehovha zvipo zvavo murenje reSinai. """ 
Leviticus8:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus8:2 Tora Aroni, navanakomana vake, namafuta okuzodza nawo, nenzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, namakondobwe maviri nedengu rezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa;" 
Leviticus8:3 uunganidze ungano yose pamukova wetende rokusangana. 
Leviticus8:4 Mozisi akaita sezvaakarairwa naJehovha, ungano ikaunganidzwa pamukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus8:5 Zvino Mozisi akati kuungano, ""Ndizvo zvakarairwa naJehovha kuti zviitwe.""" 
Leviticus8:6 Mozisi akauya naAroni navanakomana vake, akavashambidza nemvura," 
Leviticus8:7 akamufukidza jasi, ndokumusunga chiuno nebhanhire, akamufukidza nguvo, akamuisa efodhi, nokumusunga chiuno nebhande reefodhi rakarukwa nouchenjeri, ndokurisungira kwaari naro." 
Leviticus8:8 Akamuisa hombodo yechipfuva, ndokuisa Urimi neTumimi muhombodo yechipfuva." 
Leviticus8:9 Akaisawo ngowani pamusoro wake; pangowani nechemberi akaisa bwendefa rendarama, ndiyo korona tsvene; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:10 Zvino Mozisi akatora mafuta okuzodza nawo, akazodza tabhenakeri, nezvose zvakanga zvirimo, akazvitsaura." 
Leviticus8:11 Akasasa mamwe kanomwe paaritari, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nomudziyo wokushambidzira, nechigadziko chawo, kuti azvitsaure." 
Leviticus8:12 Akadirawo mamwe mafuta okuzodza nawo pamusoro waAroni, akamuzodza kuti amutsaure." 
Leviticus8:13 Ipapo Mozisi akauya navanakomana vaAroni, akavafukidza majasi, akavasunga zviuno namabhanhire, akavaisa ngowani, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:14 Akauya nenzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro wenzombe yechipiriso chezvivi;" 
Leviticus8:15 akaibaya; Mozisi ndokutora ropa, ndokuriisa panyanga dzearitari kunhivi dzose nomumwe wake, akanatsa aritari, ndokudururira ropa mujinga mearitari, akaitsaura, kuti aiyananisire." 
Leviticus8:16 Akatora mafuta ose akanga ari pamusoro poura, namafuta akanga ari pamusoro pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, namafuta adzo, Mozisi akazvipisa paaritari." 
Leviticus8:17 Asi nzombe nedebwe rayo, nenyama yayo, namazvizvi ayo, wakazvipisa nomoto kunze kwemisasa, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:18 Akauya negondobwe rechipiriso chinopiswa; Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro wegondobwe. 
Leviticus8:19 Akariuraya; Mozisi akasasa ropa pamusoro pearitari kunhivi dzose. 
Leviticus8:20 Akagura-gura gondobwe, Mozisi akapisa musoro nenhindi namafuta." 
Leviticus8:21 Akasuka ura namakumbo nemvura, Mozisi akapisa gondobwe rose paaritari, chikava chipiriso chinopiswa chainhuhwira zvakanaka; chikava chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha nomoto; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:22 Zvino akauyawo nerimwe gondobwe, gondobwe rokugadza naro, Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro wegondobwe." 
Leviticus8:23 Akaribaya, Mozisi akatora rimwe ropa raro, akariisa pamucheto wezasi wenzeve yaAroni yorudyi, napagumwe roruoko rwake rworudyi, napagumwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi." 
Leviticus8:24 Akauyisa vanakomana vaAroni, Mozisi akaisa rimwe ropa pamicheto yezasi yenzeve dzavo dzorudyi, napamagumwe amaoko avo orudyi, napamagumwe etsoka dzavo dzorudyi; Mozisi akasasa ropa pamusoro pearitari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus8:25 Akatora mafuta nebemhe, namafuta ose akanga ari pamusoro poura, namafuta akanga ari pamusoro pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, namafuta adzo, nebandauko rorudyi;" 
Leviticus8:26 akatora mudengu rezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa, zvaiva pamberi paJehovha, chingwa chimwe chiduku chisina kuviriswa, nechingwa chimwe chiduku chezvingwa zvakazodzwa mafuta, nechingwa chitete chimwe, akazviisa pamusoro pamafuta, napamusoro pebandauko rorudyi;" 
Leviticus8:27 akaisa zvose pamaoko aAroni, napamaoko avanakomana vake, akazvizunguzira pamberi paJehovha, kuti chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa." 
Leviticus8:28 Ipapo Mozisi akazvitora zvose pamaoko ake, akazvipisa paaritari pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa; zvikava zvokugadza nazvo, zvikanhuhwira zvakanaka; chikava chipiriso chakaitirwa Jehovha nomoto." 
Leviticus8:29 Zvino Mozisi akatora chityu akachizunguzira pamberi paJehovha, kuti chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa; ndiwo waiva mugove waMozisi pagondobwe rokugadza naro; sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Leviticus8:30 Ipapo Mozisi akatora mamwe mafuta okuzodza nawo, nerimwe ropa rakanga riri paaritari, akarisasa pamusoro paAroni napamusoro penguvo dzake, napamusoro pavanakomana vake, napamusoro penguwo dzavanakomana vake pamwechete naye; akatsaura Aroni nenguvo dzake, navanakomana vake, nenguvo dzavanakomana vake pamwechete naye." 
Leviticus8:31 Mozisi akati kuna Aroni navanakomana vake, ""Bikai nyama pamukova wetende rokusangana, muidyirepo nechingwa chiri mudengu rokugadza naro, sezvandakaraira ndichiti, `Aroni navanakomana vake vanofanira kuzvidya.'" 
Leviticus8:32 Asi zvakasara zvenyama nechingwa munofanira kuzvipisa nomoto. 
Leviticus8:33 Musabuda pamukova wetende rokusangana mazuva manomwe, kusvikira mazuva okugadza kwenyu apera; nokuti iye uchakugadzai mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus8:34 Sezvakaitwa zuva ranhasi, Jehovha wakaraira kuti zviitwe saizvozvo, kuti muyananisirwe." 
Leviticus8:35 Garai pamukova wetende rokusangana masikati nousiku mazuva manomwe, muchengete zvamakarairwa naJehovha, kuti urege kufa; nokuti ndizvo zvandakarairwa.""" 
Leviticus8:36 Zvino Aroni navanakomana vake vakaita zvose zvakanga zvarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMozisi. 
Leviticus9:1 Zvino nomusi werusere Mozisi wakadana Aroni navanakomana vake, navakuru vaIsiraeri," 
Leviticus9:2 akati kuna Aroni, ""Tora mukomo wemhuru chive chipiriso chezvivi, negondobwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa, zvisina mhosva, uuye nazvo pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus9:3 Utaure navana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Torai nhongo yembudzi chive chipiriso chezvivi, nemhuru, negwayana, zvose zvegore rimwe, zvisina mhosva, chive chipiriso chinopiswa," 
Leviticus9:4 nenzombe, negondobwe zvive zvipiriso zvokuyananisa, muzvibayire pamberi paJehovha; nechipiriso choupfu hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nokuti nhasi Jehovha unozviratidza kwamuri.' """ 
Leviticus9:5 Zvino ivo vakauya nezvakanga zvarairwa naMozisi pamberi pomukova wetende rokusangana, ungano yose ikaswedera, vakamira pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus9:6 Ipapo Mozisi akati, ""Ndicho chinhu chakarairwa naJehovha kuti muchiite, kuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kuzviratidze kwamuri.""" 
Leviticus9:7 Mozisi akati kuna Aroni, ""Swedera kuaritari ubayire chipiriso chako chezvivi, nechipiriso chako chinopiswa, uzviyananisire iwe navanhu; uuyewo nechipo chavanhu, kuti uvayananisire, sezvakarairwa naJehovha.""" 
Leviticus9:8 Ipapo Aroni wakaswedera kuaritari, akabaya mhuru yechipiriso chezvivi, chakanga chiri chake." 
Leviticus9:9 Vanakomana vaAroni vakauya neropa, akariisa panyanga dzearitari, akadurura ropa mujinga mearitari;" 
Leviticus9:10 asi mafuta, netsvo, namafuta akanga ari pamusoro pechiropa chechipiriso chezvivi, wakazvipisa pamusoro pearitari, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Leviticus9:11 Nyama nedebwe akazvipisa nomoto kunze kwemisasa. 
Leviticus9:12 Akabaya chipiriso chinopiswa; vanakomana vaAroni vakamugamuchidza ropa, iye akarisasa pamusoro pearitari kunhivi dzose." 
Leviticus9:13 Ipapo vakamugamuchidzawo chipiriso chinopiswa, nhindi imwe neimwe, nomusoro, akazvipisa pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa pamusoro pearitari." 
Leviticus9:14 Akasuka ura namakumbo, akazvipisa pamusoro pearitari." 
Leviticus9:15 Ipapo akauya nechipo chavanhu, akatora mbudzi yechipiriso chezvivi, chaiva chavanhu, akaibaya, akaibayira zvivi, seyokutanga." 
Leviticus9:16 Ipapo akauya nechipiriso chinopiswa, akachibayira sezvakanga zvarairwa." 
Leviticus9:17 Akauyawo nechipiriso choupfu, akatsamurapo tsama yake, ndokuchipisira pamusoro pearitari, achiwedzera pachipiriso chinopiswa chamangwanani." 
Leviticus9:18 Akabayawo nzombe negondobwe, kuti chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisira vanhu; vanakomana vaAroni vakamugamuchidza ropa, akarisasa pamusoro pearitari kunhivi dzose;" 
Leviticus9:19 namafuta enzombe, neegondobwe, nebemhe, namafuta anofukidza ura, netsvo, namafuta anofukidza chiropa;" 
Leviticus9:20 akaisa mafuta pamusoro pechityu, akapisa mafuta pamusoro pearitari;" 
Leviticus9:21 Aroni akazunguzira zvityu nebandauko rorudyi, kuti chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvarairwa naMozisi." 
Leviticus9:22 Zvino Aroni wakasimudzira maoko ake kuvanhu, akavaropafadza; akaburuka, apedza kubayira chipiriso chezvivi, nechipiriso chinopiswa, nezvibayiro zvokuyananisa nazvo." 
Leviticus9:23 Mozisi naAroni vakapinda mutende rokusangana, vakabudazve, vakaropafadza vanhu; kubwinya kwaJehovha kukaonekwa navanhu vose." 
Leviticus9:24 Ipapo moto wakabuda pamberi paJehovha, ukapisa chipiriso chinopiswa namafuta pamusoro pearitari; vanhu vose vakati vachizviona vakadanidzira, vakawira pasi nezviso zvavo." 
Leviticus10:1 Zvino Nadhabi naAbhihu, vanakomana vaAroni, vakatora mumwe nomumwe harana yake yezvinonhuhwira, vakaisamo moto, ndokuisa zvinonhuhwira pamusoro pawo, vakauya pamberi paJehovha nomoto usina kutenderwa waasina kuraira." 
Leviticus10:2 Ipapo moto wakabuda pamberi paJehovha, ukavauraya, vakafa pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus10:3 Zvino Mozisi akati kuna Aroni, ""Jehovha wakataura chinhu ichi, akati, `Ndichazviratidza kuti ndiri mutsvene muna vose vanoswedera kwandiri, ndichazvirumbidza pamberi pavanhu vose.' "" Aroni akanyarara." 
Leviticus10:4 Ipapo Mozisi akadana Mishaeri naErizafani, vanakomana vaUzieri, babamunini vaAroni, akati kwavari, ""Swederai, mubvise hama dzenyu pamberi penzvimbo tsvene, muvatakurire kunze kwemisasa.""" 
Leviticus10:5 Ipapo vakaswedera, vakavatakurira kunze kwemisasa vanamajasi avo, sezvakanga zvataurwa naMozisi." 
Leviticus10:6 Zvino Mozisi akati kuna Aroni nokuna Ereazari nokuna Itamari, vanakomana vake, ""Musasunungura vudzi remisoro yenyu, kana kubvarura nguvo dzenyu, kuti murege kufa, naiye arege kutsamwira ungano yose; asi hama dzenyu, veimba yose yaIsiraeri, ivo ngavacheme kupisa kwakatungidzwa naJehovha." 
Leviticus10:7 Musabuda pamukova wetende rokusangana, kuti murege kufa, nokuti mafuta okuzodza aJehovha ari pamusoro penyu."" Vakaita sezvavakaudzwa naMozisi." 
Leviticus10:8 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naAroni akati," 
Leviticus10:9 Usamwa waini kana chinhu chinobata, iwe navanakomana vako pamwechete newe, kana muchipinda mutende rokusangana, kuti murege kufa; uve murayiro usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose." 
Leviticus10:10 Munofanira kutsaura pakati pezvitsvene nezvisati zviri zvitsvene, pakati pezvisina kunaka nezvakanaka;" 
Leviticus10:11 munofanira kudzidzisa vana vaIsiraeri mirairo yose yakarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMozisi. 
Leviticus10:12 Zvino Mozisi wakataura naAroni naEreazari naItamari, vanakomana vake vakanga vasara, akati, ""Torai chipiriso choupfu chakasara pazvipiriso zvakapisirwa Jehovha nomoto, muzvidyire kurutivi rwearitari zvisina mbiriso, nokuti zvitsvene kwazvo;" 
Leviticus10:13 munofanira kuzvidyira panzvimbo tsvene, nokuti ndiwo mugove wako nomugove wavanakomana vako pazvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinoitwa nomoto, nokuti ndizvo zvandakarairwa." 
Leviticus10:14 Munofanira kudyira panzvimbo tsvene chityu chinozunguzirwa nebandauko rinosimudzwa, iwe navanakomana vako navanasikana vako pamwechete newe, nokuti makazvipiwa, kuti uve mugove wako, nomugove wavanakomana vako pazvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa zvavana vaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus10:15 Vanofanira kuuya nebandauko rinosimudzwa; nechityu chinozunguzirwa, pamwechete nezvipiriso zvamafuta zvinopiswa nomoto, kuti vazvizunguzire, chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha; chinofanira kuva chako nechavanakomana vako, pamwechete newe; unofanira kuva murayiro usingaperi, sezvakarairwa naJehovha.""" 
Leviticus10:16 Zvino Mozisi wakanyatsotsvaka mbudzi yechipiriso chezvivi, akawana kuti yapiswa, akatsamwira Ereazari naItamari, vanakomana vaAroni vakanga vasara, akati," 
Leviticus10:17 Makaregerei kudyira chipiriso chezvivi panzvimbo tsvene, zvachiri chitsvene kwazvo, uye nokuti wakakupai icho, kuti mubvise kutadza kweungano, muvayananisire pamberi paJehovha?" 
Leviticus10:18 Tarirai, ropa rayo harina kuuyiswa mukati menzvimbo tsvene, sezvandakaraira.""" 
Leviticus10:19 Ipapo Aroni akati kuna Mozisi, ""Tarira, vakapisa nhasi chipiriso chavo chezvivi, nechipiriso chavo chinopiswa pamberi paJehovha, ini ndikawirwa nezvinhu izvi zvakadai; zvino dai ndakadya chipiriso chezvivi nhasi, zvingadai zvaifadza Jehovha here?""" 
Leviticus10:20 Mozisi wakati achinzwa izvozvo, akatenda nazvo." 
Leviticus11:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi naAroni, akati kwavari," 
Leviticus11:2 Taura navana valsiraeri, muti, `Ndizvo zvipenyu zvamungadya pakati pemhuka dzose dziri panyika:" 
Leviticus11:3 Zvose pakati pemhuka zvinamahwanda akaparadzana, kana zvinetsoka dzakaparadzana, zvinodzeya, mungazvidya." 
Leviticus11:4 Asi pakati pezvinodzeya, kana pakati pezvinamahwanda akaparadzana, regai kudya kamera, nokuti inodzeya, asi haina mahwanda akaparadzana; inofanira kuva chinhu chisina kunaka kwamuri;" 
Leviticus11:5 nembira, nokuti inodzeya, asi haina mahwanda akaparadzana; inofanira kuva chinhu chisina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:6  `Netsuro, nokuti inodzeya, asi haina mahwanda akaparadzana; inofanira kuva chinhu chisina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:7 Nenguruve, nokuti ine tsoka dzakaparadzana, asi haidzeyi; inofanira kuva chinhu chisina kunaka kwamuri.'" 
Leviticus11:8 Regai kudya nyama yazvo, kana zvitunha zvazvo; zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:9 Ndizvo zvamungadya kune zvose zviri mumvura: Zvose zviri mumvura, mumakungwa nomunzizi, zvine zvimbi namakwande, ndizvo zvamungadya." 
Leviticus11:10 Asi zvose zvisina zvimbi namakwande zviri mumakungwa nomunzizi, pazvose zvinopfakanyika mumvura, pazvose zvipenyu zviri mumvura, zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:11 Ngazvive zvinonyangadza kwamuri; musadya nyama yazvo, nezvitunha zvazvo zvinofanira kuva chinhu chinonyangadza kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:12 Zvose zviri mumvura zvisina zvimbi namakwande zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza kwamuri. 
Leviticus11:13 Izvi pakati peshiri zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza kwamuri, ngazvirege kudyiwa, ngazvive zvinonyangadza: Gora guru, negondo guru, nenyamudzura;" 
Leviticus11:14 noruvangu, nenjerere, namarudzi adzo;" 
Leviticus11:15 namarudzi ose amakunguvo; 
Leviticus11:16 nemhou, nezizi, neshiri yegungwa, namarudzi ose oruvangu;" 
Leviticus11:17 nezizi duku, nekanyurura-hove, nezizi guru;" 
Leviticus11:18 nejichidza, nekondo, negora;" 
Leviticus11:19 nezimudo, namarudzi ose ekondo, nemhupupu, nechiremwaremwa." 
Leviticus11:20 Zvose zvinamapapiro zvichikambaira, zvichifamba namakumbo mana, zvinofanira kuva zvinhu zvinonyangadza kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:21 Asi izvi mungadya pakati pezvose zvinamapapiro zvichikambaira, zvichifamba namakumbo mana, zvinamakumbo pamusoro petsoka dzazvo azvinokwakuka nawo panyika." 
Leviticus11:22 Ndizvo zvamungadya pakati pazvo: Marudzi ose emhashu, namarudzi ose echinjiki, namarudzi ebambamukota, namarudzi egwatakwata." 
Leviticus11:23 Asi zvose zvinamapapiro zvinokambaira zvinamakumbo mana, zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:24 Muchasvibiswa nezvizvi: Ani naani unobata zvitunha zvazvo uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko. 
Leviticus11:25 Ani naani wakatakura chitunha chazvo, anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus11:26 Mhuka dzose dzinamahwanda akaparadzana, asi dzisina tsoka dzakaparadzana, dzisingadzeyi, zvinofanira kuva zvisakanaka kwamuri; mumwe nomumwe unozvibata uchava usina kunaka." 
Leviticus11:27 Zvose zvinofamba netsoka dzakapfava pakati pemhuka dzose dzinofamba namakumbo mana, zvinofanira kuva zvisakanaka kwamuri; ani naani unobata zvitunha zvazvo uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus11:28 Munhu unotakura zvitunha zvazvo ngaasuke nguvo dzake, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko; zvinofanira kuva zvisakanaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:29 Zvisakanaka kwamuri pakati pezvinokambaira, zvinokambaira panyika ndizvo: Chidembo, negonzo, namarudzi egwavava," 
Leviticus11:30 nechipfira, nedzvinyu, negoroodyo, nedhambakura, norwaivhi." 
Leviticus11:31 Izvozvo zvinofanira kuva zvisakanaka kwamuri pakati pezvose zvinokambaira; ani naani unozvibata kana zvakafa uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko. 
Leviticus11:32 Chinhu chipi nechipi chinowirwa nechimwe chazvo kana chakafa, chichava chisina kunaka; kana iri nhumbi yamatanda, kana nguvo, kana debwe, kana hombodo, kana iri nhumbi ipi neipi inobatwa basa nayo, inofanira kunyikwa mumvura, ive isina kunaka kusvikira madeko; ipapo ichava yakanaka." 
Leviticus11:33 Hari imwe neimwe yevhu yawirwa mukati mayo nechimwe chazvo, zvose zviri mukati mayo zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka, naiyo munofanira kuiputsa." 
Leviticus11:34 Zvokudya zvose zvirimo zvingadyiwa, kana zvadirwa mvura, zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka; nezvinomwiwa zvose zviri muhari iyo zvinofanira kuva zvisina kunaka." 
Leviticus11:35 Zvose zvinowirwa nechitunha chazvo, zvichava zvisina kunaka, kana choto, kana chikuva chehari, zvinofanira kuputswa chose; hazvina kunaka, ngazvive zvisina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:36 Asi tsime kana dziva makachengetwa mvura, zvichava zvakanaka; asi chinogunzva chitunha chazvo chichava chisina kunaka, kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:37 Kana chitunha chechimwe chazvo chikawira pamusoro pembeu yakanga yakushwa, ichava yakanaka." 
Leviticus11:38 Asi kana mbeu ikadirwa mvura, chitunha chechimwe chazvo chakwira pamusoro payo, inofanira kuva isina kunaka kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:39 Kana mhuka ipi neipi ingadyiwa, ikafa, ani naani unogunzva chitunha chayo uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus11:40 Unodya chitunha chayo ngaasuke nguvo dzake, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko; nomunhu unotakura chitunha chayo ngaasuke nguvo dzake, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus11:41 Zvose zvinokambaira, zvinokambaira panyika, zvinofanira kuva zvinonyangadza, hazvifaniri kudyiwa." 
Leviticus11:42 Zvose zvinofamba nedumbu, uye zvose zvinofamba namakumbo mana, uye zvose zvinofamba namakumbo mazhinji, zvose zvinokambaira, zvinokambaira panyika, hamufaniri kuzvidya; nokuti zvinonyangadza." 
Leviticus11:43 Musazviita vanonyangadza nechinokambaira chipi nechipi, musazviita vasina kunaka nazvo, kuti murege kusvibiswa nazvo." 
Leviticus11:44 Nokuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu; naizvozvo zvitsaurei, muve vatsvene, nokuti ini ndiri mutsvene; musazvisvibisa nechinokambaira chipi nechipi chinopfakanyika panyika." 
Leviticus11:45 Nokuti ndini Jehovha wakakubudisai panyika yeIjipiti, kuti ndive Mwari wenyu; naizvozvo muve vatsvene, nokuti ini ndiri mutsvene." 
Leviticus11:46 Ndiwo murayiro wemhuka, noweshiri, nowezvipenyu zvose zvinopfakanyika mumvura, nezvisikwa zvose zvinokambaira panyika;" 
Leviticus11:47 kuti mutsaure pakati pezvisakanaka nezvakanaka, napakati pezvipenyu zvingadyiwa nezvipenyu zvisingadyiwi.""" 
Leviticus12:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus12:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri uti, `Kana mukadzi akava nemimba, akapona mwanakomana, uchava usina kunaka mazuva manomwe, uchava usina kunaka sapanguva yaari kumwedzi." 
Leviticus12:3 Nomusi worusere mwanakomana anofanira kudzingiswa chikanda chake chapamberi.' 
Leviticus12:4 Zvino mukadzi anofanira kugara mazuva makumi matatu namatatu achizvinatsa paropa rake; ngaarege kubata chinhu chitsvene kana kupinda panzvimbo tsvene, kusvikira mazuva okuzvinatsa kwake apera." 
Leviticus12:5 Asi kana akapona mwana womusikana, uchava usina kunaka vhiki mbiri, sapamazuva okuva kwake kumwedzi; ngaagare achizvinatsa paropa rake mazuva ana makumi matanhatu namatanhatu." 
Leviticus12:6 Kana mazuva okuzvinatsa kwake apera pakupona mwanakomana kana mwanasikana, ngaauye negwayana regore rimwe, kuti chive chipiriso chinopiswa, nakana kenjiva, kana vhukutiva, kuti chive chipiriso chezvivi, kumukova wetende rokusangana kumuprista;" 
Leviticus12:7 agochibayira pamberi paJehovha, kumuyananisira; zvino wanatswa pakuyerera kweropa rake. Ndiwo murayiro kunounopona mwana womukomana kana womusikana." 
Leviticus12:8 Kana akasakwanisa kuuya negwayana, ngaatore njiva mbiri kana twana tuviri twenjiva; imwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa, neimwe chipiriso chezvivi; kuti muprista amuyananisire, anake.""" 
Leviticus13:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi naAroni akati," 
Leviticus13:2 Kana munhu anapakazvimba kana panofunuka, kana chivara paganda romuviri wake, pakaita sehosha yamaperembudzi paganda romuviri wake, anofanira kuiswa kuna Aroni muprista, kana kuno mumwe wavanakomana vake vaprista;" 
Leviticus13:3 muprista zvino anofanira kucherekedza hosha iri paganda romuviri wake; kana mvere dziri pane hosha dzakashanduka dzikava chena, hosha ikaonekwa kuti yakapinda kwazvo mukati meganda romuviri wake, ihosha yamaperembudzi; muprista ngaamucherekedze, agoreva kuti haana kunaka." 
Leviticus13:4 Kana chivara chiri chichena paganda romuviri wake, chakaonekwa kuti hachina kupinda mukati meganda kwazvo, mvere dzisina kushanduka, dzikava chena, muprista anofanira kupfigira munhu uyo une hosha mazuva manomwe;" 
Leviticus13:5 nomusi wechinomwe muprista anofanira kumucherekedza; kana akaona kuti hosha yakaita seyamira, kuti hosha haina kunyenga paganda, zvino muprista anofanira kumupfigira mamwe mazuva manomwezve;" 
Leviticus13:6 zvino muprista anofanira kumucherekedza nezuva rechinomwe; kana akaona kuti hosha yaita nani, kuti hosha haina kunyenga paganda, zvino muprista uchareva kuti munhu wakanaka hake; pakanga pakafunuka hapo; ipapo anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake agova wakanaka." 
Leviticus13:7 Asi kana pakafunuka pachiramba pachinyenga paganda, ambozviratidza kumuprista kuti anzi wakanaka, ipapo anofanira kuzviratidzazve kumuprista;" 
Leviticus13:8 zvino muprista anofanira kucherekedza; kana akaona kuti pakafunuka panyenga paganda, ipapo muprista anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka, maperembudzi." 
Leviticus13:9 Kana hosha yamaperembudzi iri pamunhu, anofanira kuiswa kumuprista;" 
Leviticus13:10 zvino muprista anofanira kucherekedza; kana akaona kuti pakazvimba pachena paganda, mvere dzikashanduka, dzikaita chena, pakazvimba pakava nenyama yakatsvuka," 
Leviticus13:11 ndiwo maperembudzi anguva avapo paganda romuviri wake, zvino muprista ngaarege kumupfigira, nokuti haana kunaka, ngaareve kuti haana kunaka." 
Leviticus13:12 Kana maperembudzi akabuda pose-pose paganda, maperembudzi akafukidza ganda rose romunhu une hosha, kubva pamusoro wake kusvikira kutsoka dzake, pose panoonekwa nomuprista;" 
Leviticus13:13 zvino muprista anofanira kutarira; kana akaona kuti maperembudzi akazadza muviri wake wose, anofanira kureva kuti munhu une hosha wakanaka, zvose zvashanduka zvachena, wakanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:14 Asi kana nyama tsvuku ikaonekwa kwaari, uchava usina kunaka." 
Leviticus13:15 Kana muprista akaona nyama yakatsvuka, anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; nyama yakatsvuka haina kunaka, maperembudzi." 
Leviticus13:16 Kana nyama yakatsvuka ikashandukazve, ikaita chena, anofanira kuuya kumuprista." 
Leviticus13:17 Ipapo muprista anofanira kumucherekedza; kana akaona kuti hosha yashanduka, ikaita chena, muprista anofanira kureva kuti une hosha yakanaka, wakanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:18 Zvino kana nyama ine mota paganda, pakapora," 
Leviticus13:19 panzvimbo yemota pakauya pakazvimba pakachena, kana chivara chakaita sechitsvuku, zvinofanira kuratidzwa muprista;" 
Leviticus13:20 zvino muprista anofanira kucherekedza; kana akaona kuti pakadzika pasi peganda, mvere dzapo dzikashanduka dzikaita chena, muprista anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; ihosha yamaperembudzi yabuda napamota." 
Leviticus13:21 Asi kana muprista akapacherekedza, akaona kuti hakuna mvere chena ipapo, pasina kudzika pasi peganda, asi pava nani; muprista anofanira kumupfigira mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:22 Kana pakanyenga pose paganda, muprista anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; ihosha." 
Leviticus13:23 Asi kana chivara chikarambira panzvimbo yacho, chikasanyenga, ivanga haro remota; muprista anofanira kuti wakanaka." 
Leviticus13:24 Kana nyama yomunhu ina pakatsva paganda rake, nyama yakatsvuka yapo ikaita chivara chichena chakaita sechitsvuku kana chichena," 
Leviticus13:25 muprista anofanira kupacherekedza; kana akaona kuti mvere dzapachivara dzashanduka, dzikaita chena, akaona kuti pakaita sapakadzika paganda, ava maperembudzi akabuda napakatsva; muprista anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; ihosha yamaperembudzi." 
Leviticus13:26 Asi kana muprista akapacherekedza, akaona kuti hapana mvere chena pachivara, uye kuti hapana kudzika pasi peganda, asi pava nani hapo, muprista anofanira kumupfigira mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:27 Zvino muprista anofanira kumucherekedza nezuva rechinomwe; kana pakaramba pachinyenga paganda, muprista anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; ihosha yamaperembudzi." 
Leviticus13:28 Kana chivara chikaramba chiri panzvimbo yacho, chikasanyenga paganda, asi chava nani, ndiko kuzvimba kokutsva hako, muprista anofanira kureva kuti wakanaka hake, nokuti chivara chokutsva." 
Leviticus13:29 Kana murume kana mukadzi ane hosha pamusoro kana pandebvu," 
Leviticus13:30 muprista anofanira kucherekedza hosha; kana akaona kuti yakapinda mukati, pasi peganda, mvere dziripo dziri tsvuku dzakaita sechena, dziri nhete, muprista anofanira kureva kuti haana kunaka; pafunuka, ndiwo maperembudzi omusoro kana endebvu." 
Leviticus13:31 Kana muprista akacherekedza hosha yakafunuka, akaona kuti haina kupinda mukati pasi peganda, pasina mvere nhema ipapo, muprista anofanira kupfigira munhu une hosha yokufunuka mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:32 Nomusi wechinomwe muprista anofanira kucherekedza hosha; kana akaona kuti haina kupinda mukati pasi peganda," 
Leviticus13:33 anofanira kuveurwa, asi ngaarege kuveura pakafunuka; zvino muprista anofanira kupfigira munhu unapakafunuka mamwe mazuva manomwezve;" 
Leviticus13:34 nomusi wechinomwe muprista anofanira kucherekedza pakafunuka; kana akaona kuti pakafunuka hapana kunyenga paganda, uye kuti hapana kupinda mukati pasi peganda, muprista anofanira kureva kuti wakanaka hake; zvino iye ngaasuke nguvo dzake, anake." 
Leviticus13:35 Asi kana pakafunuka pakanyenga pose paganda shure kokunatswa kwake; 
Leviticus13:36 muprista anofanira kumucherekedza; kana akaona kuti pakafunuka panyenga paganda, ngaarege hake kutsvaka mvere tsvuku dzakaita sechena; haana kunaka." 
Leviticus13:37 Asi kana iye akaona kuti pakafunuka paita sapamira, nemvere nhema dzabudapo, pakafunuka papora hapo, wakanaka; muprista anofanira kureva kuti wakanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:38 Kana murume kana mukadzi vane zvivara paganda renyama yavo, zviri zvivara zvichena;" 
Leviticus13:39 muprista anofanira kuzvicherekedza; kana akaona kuti zvivara paganda renyama zviri zvichena, zvisingabwinyi, imhezi dzakabuda paganda, vakanaka havo." 
Leviticus13:40 Kana vhudzi romunhu rakabva pamusoro wake, wava nemhazha; asi wakanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:41 Kana vhudzi rake rakabva pamusoro wake nechemberi, une mhazha pahuma, asi wakanaka hake." 
Leviticus13:42 Asi kana pamhazha, kana pamhazha yapahuma, pane hosha chena yakaita setsvuku, maperembudzi anobuda pamhazha, kana pamhazha yapahuma." 
Leviticus13:43 Zvino muprista anofanira kumucherekedza; kana akaona kuti pakazvimba pehosha pachena pakaita sapatsvuku pamhazha yake, kana pamhazha yake yapahuma, pakafanana namaperembudzi paganda renyama," 
Leviticus13:44 munhu uyo una maperembudzi, haana kunaka; muprista anofanira kureva kwazvo kuti haana kunaka; hosha yake iri pamusoro wake." 
Leviticus13:45 Zvino munhu una maperembudzi, une hosha iyo, nguvo dzake dzinofanira kubvarurwa, nevhudzi romusoro wake rinofanira kufukurwa, uye anofanira kufukidza muromo wake wokumusoro, agodanidzira, achiti, `Ndakaipa, ndakaipa!'" 
Leviticus13:46 Mazuva ose aane hosha iyo, uchava usina kunaka; haana kunaka; ngaagare ari oga; pokugara kwake panofanira kuva kunze kwemisasa." 
Leviticus13:47 nguvowo ine hosha yamaperembudzi, kana iri nguvo yamakushe amakwai, kana iri nguvo yomucheka;" 
Leviticus13:48 kana iri yakarukwa, kana yakakoshwa; kana yamucheka, kana yamakushe amakwai; kana yedebwe, kana chinhu chakaitwa nedebwe;" 
Leviticus13:49 kana hosha yakaita senhema, kana tsvuku panguvo, kana padebwe, kana pane zvakarukwa, kana pane zvakakoshwa, kana pachinhu chipi nechipi chedebwe; ihosha yamaperembudzi inofanira kuratidzwa muprista;" 
Leviticus13:50 zvino muprista anofanira kucherekedza hosha iyo, agopfigira chinhu chine hosha mazuva manomwe;" 
Leviticus13:51 zvino anofanira kucherekedza hosha nezuva rechinomwe; kana hosha yakanyenga panguvo, kana iri yakarukwa, kana yakakoshwa, kana yedebwe, rine basa ripi neripi; hosha iyo ndeyamaperembudzi akaipa kwazvo; haina kunaka." 
Leviticus13:52 Zvino anofanira kupisa nguvo, kana iri yakarukwa, kana yakakoshwa, kana yamakushe amakwai, kana yomucheka, kana ipi neipi yedebwe, ine hosha iyo; nokuti maperembudzi akaipa kwazvo; inofanira kupiswa nomoto." 
Leviticus13:53 Kana muprista akatarira, akaona kuti hosha haina kunyenga panguvo, kana pakarukwa, kana pakakoshwa, kana pachinhu chipi nechipi chedebwe;" 
Leviticus13:54 muprista anofanira kuraira kuti vasuke chinhu chine hosha, zvino achipfigire mamwe mazuva manomwezve;" 
Leviticus13:55 muprista agocherekedzazve kana hosha yasukwa; kana akaona kuti hosha haina kushanduka ruvara rwayo, uye kuti hosha haina kunyenga, hachina kunaka; anofanira kuchipisa nomoto; yapinda mukati kwazvo, kana nechapamusoro kana nechapanyasi." 
Leviticus13:56 Kana muprista akacherekedza, akaona kuti hosha yava nani pakusukwa kwayo, anofanira kubvarura nguvo kupabvisapo, kana padebwe, kana pakarukwa, kana pakakoshwa;" 
Leviticus13:57 asi kana ikaramba ichionekwa panguvo, kana pakarukwa, kana pakakoshwa, kana pachinhu chipi nechipi chedebwe, ihosha inobuda; anofanira kupisa chinhu icho chine hosha nomoto;" 
Leviticus13:58 asi nguvo yaunosuka, kana pakarukwa, kana pakakoshwa, kana chiri chinhu chipi nechipi chedebwe, kana hosha ikabva kwachiri, chinofanira kusukwa rwechipiri, chigova chakanaka." 
Leviticus13:59 Ndiwo murayiro wehosha yamaperembudzi panguvo yamakushe amakwai, kana yomucheka, kana chinhu chipi nechipi chedebwe, kuti chigonzi chakanaka, kana hachina kunaka.""" 
Leviticus14:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus14:2 Ndiwo murayiro womunhu una maperembudzi nomusi wokunatswa kwake: Unofanira kuiswa kumuprista; 
Leviticus14:3 zvino muprista anofanira kubuda kunze kwemisasa, muprista ugocherekedza munhu uyu; kana akaona kuti hosha yamaperembudzi yapora hayo kumunhu una maperembudzi;" 
Leviticus14:4 muprista anofanira kuraira kuti unoda kunatswa atorerwe shiri mbiri mhenyu dzakanaka, nedanda romusidhari, nomucheka mutsvuku, nehisopi." 
Leviticus14:5 Zvino muprista araire kuti shiri imwe iurawe muhari yevhu, pamusoro pemvura inoyerera." 
Leviticus14:6 Zvino anofanira kutora shiri mhenyu, nedanda romusidhari, nomucheka mutsvuku, nehisopi, ndokuzvinyika pamwechete neshiri mhenyu muropa reshiri yakaurawa pamusoro pemvura inoyerera." 
Leviticus14:7 Zvino anofanira kurisasa kanomwe pamusoro pomunhu unoda kunatswa pamaperembudzi ake, ndokureva kuti wakanaka; ipapo woregedza shiri mhenyu, iende hayo kusango." 
Leviticus14:8 Zvino munhu unoda kunatswa anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake, nokuveura vhudzi rake rose, ndokushamba mumvura, agova wakanaka; pashure anofanira kupinda mukati memisasa, asi ngaagare kunze kwetende mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus14:9 Nomusi wechinomwe anofanira kuveura vhudzi rake rose romusoro wake, nendebvu dzake, netsiye dzake, aveure vhudzi rake rose; zvino ngaasuke nguvo dzake, ndokushamba muviri wake, agova wakanaka." 
Leviticus14:10 Nomusi worusere anofanira kutora makwayana maviri amakondobwe, asina mhosva, negwayana rimwe resheche rine gore rimwe, risina mhosva, nezvegumi zvitatu zveefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, chive chipiriso choupfu, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nerogi imwe yamafuta." 
Leviticus14:11 Zvino muprista, unomunatsa, anofanira kuisa munhu unoda kunatswa pamberi paJehovha, pamwechete nezvinhu izvi, pamukova wetende rokusangana;" 
Leviticus14:12 muprista ndokutora rimwe ramakwayana amakondobwe, ndokuribayira, chive chipiriso chemhosva, nerogi yamafuta, agozvizunguzira, chive chipiriso chokuzunguzira pamberi paJehovha;" 
Leviticus14:13 zvino anofanira kuuraya gwayana regondobwe pavanourayira chipiriso chezvivi nechipiriso chinopiswa panzvimbo tsvene; nokuti chipiriso chemhosva ndechomuprista sechipiriso chezvivi; chitsvene kwazvo. 
Leviticus14:14 Ipapo muprista anofanira kutora rimwe ropa rechipiriso chemhosva, muprista agoriisa pamucheto wenzeve yorudyi yomunhu unonatswa, napagumwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi;" 
Leviticus14:15 zvino muprista anofanira kutora mamwe mafuta erogi, ndokuadira muchanza choruoko rwake rworuboshwe;" 
Leviticus14:16 zvino muprista ngaanyike mutendeka wake worudyi mumafuta ari muruoko rwake rworuboshwe, asase mamwe mafuta nomumwe wake kanomwe pamberi paJehovha;" 
Leviticus14:17 mamwe mafuta akasara muruoko rwake muprista anofanira kuaisa pamucheto wenzeve yorudyi yomunhu unonatswa, napagumwe roruoko rwake rworudyi, napagumwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi, pamusoro peropa rechipiriso chemhosva;" 
Leviticus14:18 mamwe mafuta akasara muruoko rwomuprista anofanira kuaisa pamusoro womunhu unonatswa; kuti muprista amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha. 
Leviticus14:19 muprista anofanira kupisa chipiriso chezvivi, kuti ayananisire munhu unonatswa, nokuda kokusanaka kwake; pashure anofanira kuuraya chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Leviticus14:20 muprista anofanira kupisa chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu pamusoro pearitari, kuti muprista amuyananisire, anake." 
Leviticus14:21 Kana ari murombo, asingagoni kuwana zvizhinji zvakadai, anofanira kutora gwayana rimwe regondobwe, chive chipiriso chemhosva chokuzunguzira, kumuyananisira, nechegumi cheefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu, pamwechete nerogi yamafuta;" 
Leviticus14:22 nenjiva mbiri, notwana tuviri twenjiva, sezvaanogona kuwana; imwe chive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Leviticus14:23 nomusi worusere anofanira kuuya nazvo kumuprista pamusoro pokunatswa kwake, kumukova wetende rokusangana pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus14:24 Zvino muprista anofanira kutora gwayana rechipiriso chemhosva, nerogi yamafuta, muprista agozvizunguzira, chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha;" 
Leviticus14:25 zvino ngaauraye gwayana rechipiriso chemhosva, agotora rimwe ropa rechipiriso chemhosva, ariise pamucheto wenzeve yomunhu unonatswa, napagumwe roruoko rworudyi, napagumwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi;" 
Leviticus14:26 zvino muprista ngaadire mamwe mafuta muchanza choruoko rwake rworuboshwe; 
Leviticus14:27 muprista agosasa nomutendeka wake worudyi mamwe mafuta ari muruoko rwake rworuboshwe kanomwe pamberi paJehovha. 
Leviticus14:28 Zvino muprista ngaaise mamwe mafuta ari muruoko rwake pamucheto wenzeve yorudyi yomunhu unonatswa, napagumwe roruoko rwake rworudyi, napagumwe rorutsoka rwake rworudyi, panzvimbo yeropa rechipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus14:29 Mamwe mafuta akasara muruoko rwomuprista anofanira kuaisa pamusoro womunhu unonatswa, kuti amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus14:30 Zvino anofanira kubayira njiva imwe, kana kana kenjiva, sezvaanogona kuwana;" 
Leviticus14:31 sezvaanogona kuwana, imwe chive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chipiriso chinopiswa, pamwechete nechipiriso choupfu; kuti muprista ayananisire munhu unonatswa pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus14:32 Ndiwo murayiro wehosha yamaperembudzi kumunhu usingagoni kuwana zvakakwanisira kunatswa kwake. 
Leviticus14:33 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi naAroni akati," 
Leviticus14:34 Kana masvika kunyika yeKanani, iyo yandakupai, kuti ive yenyu, kana ndikaisa hosha yamaperembudzi muimba yenyika yenyu;" 
Leviticus14:35 muridzi weimba anofanira kuuya kuzoudza muprista, achiti, `Ndinoona kuti imba yangu inenge ine hosha.'" 
Leviticus14:36 Ipapo muprista anofanira kuraira kuti vabudise zvose zviri mumba, iye muprista asina kupinda kundotarira hosha, kuti zvose zviri mumba zvirege kusvibiswa; pashure muprista apinde kundotarira imba iyo." 
Leviticus14:37 Zvino ngaacherekedze hosha; kana akaona kuti hosha iri mumadziro eimba; ina mavara akapinda, akaita samatema kana matsvuku, akaita saakapinda mukati mamadziro," 
Leviticus14:38 muprista anofanira kubuda paimba, ndokuenda kumukova weimba, ndokupfiga imba mazuva manomwe;" 
Leviticus14:39 zvino muprista anofanira kudzokazve nezuva rechinomwe, kuti acherekedze; kana akaona kuti hosha yakapararira pamadziro eimba;" 
Leviticus14:40 muprista anofanira kuraira kuti vabvise mabwe ane hosha paari, vaakandire panzvimbo isina kunaka kunze kweguta;" 
Leviticus14:41 ipapo ngaaraire kuti imba iparwe mukati mayo kunhivi dzose, mavhu avanopara agodururirwa kunze kweguta panzvimbo isina kunaka;" 
Leviticus14:42 zvino mamwe mabwe atorwe, aiswe panzvimbo yamamwe iwayo, iye atore aumbe imba naro." 
Leviticus14:43 Kana hosha ikadzokazve, ikabuda muimba iyo, mabwe ambobviswa, imba yaparwa nokuuyiwa," 
Leviticus14:44 muprista anofanira kupinda nokucherekedza; kana akaona kuti hosha yapararira mumba, ndiwo maperembudzi akaipa kwazvo, yava yakaipa." 
Leviticus14:45 Zvino anofanira kuputsa imba, namabwe ayo, namatanda ayo, nevhu rose reimba, ndokuzvitakurira kunze kweguta kunzvimbo isina kunaka." 
Leviticus14:46 Uye ani naani unopinda mumba panguva yose yokupfigwa kwayo uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko. 
Leviticus14:47 Munhu wakavata muimba iyo, anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake." 
Leviticus14:48 Kana muprista akapinda, akatarira, akaona kuti hosha haina kupararira mumba, kubva pakuuyiwa kweimba, muprista anofanira kureva kuti imba yakanaka, nokuti hosha yapora." 
Leviticus14:49 Zvino anofanira kutora shiri mbiri, nedanda romusidhari, nomucheka mutsvuku, nehisopi, kuti anatse imba;" 
Leviticus14:50 ipapo ngaauraye shiri imwe muhari yevhu pamusoro pemvura inoyerera," 
Leviticus14:51 ndokutora danda romusidhari, nehisopi, nomucheka mutsvuku, neshiri mhenyu, azvinyike muropa reshiri yakaurawa uye mumvura inoyerera, ndokusasa imba kanomwe;" 
Leviticus14:52 anofanira kunatsa imba neropa reshiri nemvura inoyerera neshiri mhenyu, nedanda romusidhari, nehisopi nomucheka mutsvuku;" 
Leviticus14:53 asi shiri mhenyu anofanira kuiregedza kuti iende hayo kunze kweguta kusango; saizvozvo anofanira kuyananisira imba iyo, kuti ive yakanaka." 
Leviticus14:54 Ndiwo murayiro wamarudzi ose wamaperembudzi napakafunuka; 
Leviticus14:55 nowamaperembudzi enguvo, neeimba," 
Leviticus14:56 nowapakazvimba, nowapakafunuka, nowechivara," 
Leviticus14:57 kuzivisa muprista kana chinhu chisina kunaka kana chakanaka. Ndiwo murayiro wamaperembudzi. 
Leviticus15:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi naAroni akati," 
Leviticus15:2 Taurai navana vaIsiraeri, muti kwavari, `Kana murume ane zvimwe zvinoyerera, zvinobuda pamuviri wake, uchava usina kunaka nokuda kokuyerera kwake.'" 
Leviticus15:3 Ndiko kusanaka kokuyerera kwake: Kana muviri wake uchibudisa zvinoyerera, kana muviri warega hawo kubudisa zvinoyerera, ndiko kusanaka kokuyerera kwake." 
Leviticus15:4 nhovo imwe neimwe yaanovata pamusoro payo ichava isina kunaka; nechinhu chimwe nechimwe chaanogara chichava chisina kunaka. 
Leviticus15:5 Ani naani unobata nhovo dzake, ngaasuke nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:6 Munhu unogara pachinhu chakagarwa naiye une zvinoyerera, ngaasuke nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:7 Munhu unobata muviri waiye une zvinoyerera, ngaasuke nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:8 Kana munhu une zvinoyerera akapfira mumwe wakanaka mate, iye ngaasuke nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:9 Chigaro chipi nechipi chinogarwa nomunhu une zvinoyerera chichava chisina kunaka. 
Leviticus15:10 Ani naani unobata chinhu chakanga chiri pasi pake, uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko; kunyange wakatakura zvinhu izvo ngaasuke nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:11 Ani naani unobatwa nomunhu une zvinoyerera, kana asina kumboshamba maoko ake nemvura, ngaasuke nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:12 Hari yevhu inobatwa nomunhu une zvinoyerera ngaiputswe; kana uri mudziyo wamatanda, mumwe nomumwe anofanira kusukurudzwa nemvura." 
Leviticus15:13 Kana munhu une zvinoyerera akanatswa pakuyerera kwake, anofanira kuzvitarira mazuva manomwe okuzvinatsa kwake, zvino asuke nguvo dzake, ndokushambidza muviri wake nemvura inoyerera, anake." 
Leviticus15:14 Nomusi worusere anofanira kutora njiva mbiri kana twana tuviri twenjiva, auye pamberi paJehovha pamukova wetende rokusangana, ape muprista idzedzo;" 
Leviticus15:15 zvino muprista anofanira kudzibayira, imwe chive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chipiriso chinopiswa; muprista amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pokuyerera kwake." 
Leviticus15:16 Kana mbeu yomurume upi noupi ikabuda kwaari, anofanira kushambidza muviri wake wose nemvura, agova usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:17 nguvo ipi neipi, nedebwe ripi neripi, zvadonherwa nembeu, zvinofanira kusukwa nemvura, zvive zvisina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:18 Mukadziwo wakavata nomurume nembeu, vose vari vaviri vanofanira kuzvishambidza nemvura, vave vasina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:19 Kana mukadzi ane zvinoyerera, zvinoyerera pamuviri wake riri ropa, uchava pakusanaka kwake mazuva manomwe; ani naani unomubata uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:20 Chinhu chipi nechipi chaanovata pamusoro pacho pakusanaka kwake chichava chisina kunaka, uye chinhu chipi nechipi chaanogara chichava chisina kunaka." 
Leviticus15:21 Ani naani unobata nhovo dzake anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:22 Ani naani unobata chinhu chipi nechipi chaanogara, anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:23 Kana akabata chinhu chiri panhovo, kana chinhu chipi nechipi chaanogara, uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:24 Uye murume upi noupi kana akavata naye achiri pakusanaka kwake, uchava usina kunaka mazuva manomwe; nhovo dzose dzaanovata pamusoro padzo dzichava dzisina kunaka." 
Leviticus15:25 Kana mukadzi anokuyerera kweropa rake mazuva mazhinji panguva isati iri yokuva kwake kumwedzi, uye kana ane zvinoyerera kudarika nguva yokuva kwake kumwedzi, mazuva ose okuyerera kokusanaka kwake anofanira kuita sezvaanoita pamazuva okuva kwake kumwedzi. Wava usina kunaka." 
Leviticus15:26 nhovo ipi neipi yaanovata pamusoro payo mazuva ose okuyerera kwake ichava kwaari senhovo yokuva kwake kumwedzi; chinhu chipi nechipi chaanogara chichava chisina kunaka, sapanguva yokusanaka kokuva kwake kumwedzi." 
Leviticus15:27 Ani naani unobata zvinhu izvo uchava usina kunaka, ngaasuke nguvo dzake, azvishambidze nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko." 
Leviticus15:28 Asi kana anatswa pakuyerera kwake, anofanira kuzvitarira mazuva manomwe; kana iwo apera uchava wakanaka." 
Leviticus15:29 Nomusi worusere anofanira kutora njiva mbiri, kana twana tuviri twenjiva, auye nadzo kumuprista, kumukova wetende rokusangana." 
Leviticus15:30 Zvino muprista anofanira kuuraya imwe, chive chipiriso chezvivi, imwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa; muprista amuyananisire pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pokuyerera kokusanaka kwake." 
Leviticus15:31 Saizvozvo munofanira kuparadzanisa vana vaIsiraeri pakusanaka kwavo, kuti varege kufa pakusanaka kwavo, kana vachisvibisa tabhenakeri yangu iri pakati pavo." 
Leviticus15:32 Ndiwo murayiro womunhu une zvinoyerera, nounobudisa mbeu yake, akazova usina kunaka nazvo;" 
Leviticus15:33 nounorwara nokuva kwake kumwedzi, nounezvinoyerera, kana ari murume, kana ari mukadzi, nowounovata naiye usina kunaka.""" 
Leviticus16:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi, shure kokufa kwavanakomana vaAroni, musi wavakaswedera pamberi paJehovha, vakafa;" 
Leviticus16:2 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Taura naAroni mukuru wako, kuti arege kupinda nguva dzose panzvimbo tsvene mukati mechidzitiro, pamberi pechifunhiro chokuyananisa, chiri pamusoro peareka, kuti urege kufa; nokuti ndichazviratidza mugore pamusoro pechifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Leviticus16:3 Zvino Aroni ngaapinde munzvimbo tsvene nezvinhu izvi: Nzombe duku, chive chipiriso chezvivi, negondobwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus16:4 Anofanira kufuka jasi dzvene romucheka, avewo namabhurukwa omucheka pamuviri wake, nokuzvisunga chiuno chake nebhanhire romucheka, nokudzikawo nguwani yomucheka; ndidzo nguvo tsvene; ngaashambidze muviri wake nemvura, agozvifuka." 
Leviticus16:5 Zvino anofanira kutora kuungano yavana vaIsiraeri nhongo mbiri dzembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi, negondobwe rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa." 
Leviticus16:6 Aroni anofanira kuuya nenzombe yake duku yechipiriso chezvivi, kuti azviyananisire, iye neveimba yake." 
Leviticus16:7 Zvino ngaatore mbudzi mbiri, adziise pamberi paJehovha pamukova wetende rokusangana;" 
Leviticus16:8 Aroni zvino anofanira kukanda mijenya pamusoro pembudzi mbiri, mumwe mujenya waJehovha, mumwe waAzazeri." 
Leviticus16:9 Zvino Aroni anofanira kuuya nembudzi yakabatwa nomujenya pamberi paJehovha, ndokuibayira chive chipiriso chezvivi." 
Leviticus16:10 Asi mbudzi yakabatwa nomujenya waAzazeri, inofanira kuiswa iri mhenyu pamberi paJehovha kuti ayananisire pamusoro payo, igoregedzwa iende kurenje, ive yaAzazeri." 
Leviticus16:11 Zvino Aroni anofanira kuuya nenzombe duku yake yechipiriso chezvivi, kuti azviyananisire nayo, iye naveimba yake, auraye nzombe yake yechipiriso chezvivi;" 
Leviticus16:12 ipapo ngaatore harana yezvinonhuhwira, izere namazimbe omoto uri paaritari pamberi paJehovha, namaoko ake azere nezvinonhuhwira zvakanaka zvakakuyiwa, auye nazvo mukati mechidzitiro;" 
Leviticus16:13 zvino ngaaise zvinonhuhwira pamusoro pomoto pamberi paJehovha, kuti gore routsi bwezvinonhuhwira rifukidze chifunhiro chokuyananisa chiri pamusoro pechipupuriro, kuti arege kufa;" 
Leviticus16:14 zvino ngaatore rimwe ropa renzombe, arisase nomumwe wake pamusoro pechifunhiro chokuyananisa, kurutivi rwamabvazuva, nerimwe ropa arisase nomumwe wake kanomwe pamberi pechifunhiro chokuyananisa." 
Leviticus16:15 Ipapo anofanira kuuraya mbudzi yechipiriso chezvivi chavanhu, ndokuuya neropa rayo mukati mechidzitiro, agoita neropa rayo sezvaakaita neropa renzombe, arisase pamusoro pechifunhiro chokuyananisa;" 
Leviticus16:16 anofanira kuyananisirawo nzvimbo tsvene nokuda kokusanaka kwavana vaIsiraeri, uye nokuda kokudarika kwavo nezvivi zvavo zvose; saizvozvo anofanira kuitirawo tende rokusangana rinogara navo pakati pokusanaka kwavo." 
Leviticus16:17 Ngakurege kuva nomunhu mutende rokusangana, kana iye achipindamo kuyananisira panzvimbo tsvene kusvikira abuda, apedza kuzviyananisira iye naveimba yake, neungano yose yavaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus16:18 Ipapo anofanira kubuda kuaritari iri pamberi paJehovha, agondoiyananisira; ngaatore rimwe ropa renzombe, nerimwe ropa rembudzi, ariise panyanga dzearitari panhivi dzose." 
Leviticus16:19 Rimwe ropa ngaarisase kanomwe pamusoro payo nomumwe wake, kuti ainatse nokuiita tsvene pakusanaka kwavana valsiraeri." 
Leviticus16:20 Kana apedza kuyananisira nzvimbo tsvene netende rokusangana, nearitari, ngaauye nembudzi mhenyu," 
Leviticus16:21 Aroni agoisa maoko ake ose pamusoro wembudzi mhenyu, ndokureurura pamusoro payo zvakaipa zvose zvavana vaIsiraeri nokudarika kwavo kose, izvo zvivi zvavo zvose; ngaazviise pamusoro wembudzi, ndokuiregedza, itumwe kurenje nomunhu wakanga arairwa." 
Leviticus16:22 Mbudzi iyo inofanira kutakurira zvakaipa zvavo zvose kunyika isina vanhu; anofanira kuregedza mbudzi iyo murenje. 
Leviticus16:23 Zvino Aroni anofanira kupinda mutende rokusangana, anofanira kubvisa nguvo dzake dzomucheka, idzo dzaakanga akafuka pakupinda kwake panzvimbo tsvene, agodzisiyapo." 
Leviticus16:24 Anofanira kushambidza muviri wake nemvura munzvimbo tsvene, ndokufuka nguvo dzake ndokubuda, agobayira chipiriso chake chinopiswa nechipiriso chinopiswa chavanhu, kuti azviyananisire iye navanhu." 
Leviticus16:25 Zvino ngaapise mafuta echipiriso chezvivi pamusoro pearitari. 
Leviticus16:26 Uya munhu unondoregedza mbudzi yaAzazeri anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake, nokushambidza muviri wake nemvura, agozopinda mumisasa pashure." 
Leviticus16:27 Asi nzombe yechipiriso chezvivi, nembudzi yechipiriso chezvivi zvakaisirwa ropa razvo panzvimbo tsvene kuti zviyananisire, zvinofanira kutakurirwa kunze kwemisasa; zvino vanofanira kupisa matebwe azvo nenyama yazvo namazvizvi azvo nomoto." 
Leviticus16:28 Nomunhu unozvipisa anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake, nokushambidza muviri wake nemvura, agozopinda mumisasa pashure." 
Leviticus16:29 Unofanira kuva murayiro usingaperi kwamuri: Nomwedzi wechinomwe, nezuva regumi romwedzi, munofanira kuchema pamweya yenyu, nokusabata mabasa ose, kana ari munhu wakaberekerwa pakati penyu, kana ari mutorwa ugere pakati penyu;" 
Leviticus16:30 nokuti munofanira kuyananisirwa nezuva iro, kuti munatswe; munofanira kunatswa pazvivi zvenyu zvose pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus16:31 Rinofanira kuva Sabata rokuzorora kwazvo kwamuri, munofanira kuchema pamweya yenyu; murayiro usingaperi." 
Leviticus16:32 muprista uchazozodzwa nokugadzwa pauprista panzvimbo yababa vake, iye anofanira kuyananisira nokufuka nguvo dzomucheka, idzo nguvo tsvene;" 
Leviticus16:33 anofanira kuyananisira nzvimbo tsvene, uye anofanira kuyananisira tende rokusangana nearitari; uye anofanira kuyananisira vaprista navanhu vose veungano." 
Leviticus16:34 Uyu unofanira kuva murayiro usingaperi kwamuri, kuyananisira vana vaIsiraeri kamwe chete pagore pamusoro pezvivi zvavo."" Akaita sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Leviticus17:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus17:2 Taura naAroni navanakomana vake navana vaIsiraeri vose, uti kwavari, `Ndiro shoko rakarairwa naJehovha:" 
Leviticus17:3 Munhu upi noupi kuna veimba yaIsiraeri unouraya nzombe, kana gwayana, kana mbudzi, mukati memisasa, kana unozviuraya kunze kwemisasa," 
Leviticus17:4 asina kuzviisa pamukova wetende rokusangana, kuzviisa pamberi petabhenakeri yaJehovha kuti chive chipo kuna Jehovha, munhu uyu anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake;" 
Leviticus17:5 kuti vana vaIsiraeri vauye nezvibayiro zvavo zvavanobayira kusango, vauye nazvo kuna Jehovha kumukova wetende rokusangana kumuprista, kuti vazvibayire Jehovha, zvive zvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisira.'" 
Leviticus17:6 Zvino muprista ngaasase ropa razvo paaritari yaJehovha, pamukova wetende rokusangana; apisewo mafuta, kuti zvinhuwire zvakanaka pamberi paJehovha." 
Leviticus17:7 Havafaniri kuzobayira nhongo zvibayiro zvavo, idzo dzavaitevera pakupata kwavo. Uyo unofanira kuva murayiro usingaperi kwavari kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose." 
Leviticus17:8 Iwe unofanira kuti kwavari, `Munhu upi noupi waveimba yaIsiraeri, kana wavatorwa vagere pakati pavo, unopisira chipiriso chinopiswa kana chimwe chibayiro," 
Leviticus17:9 asingauyi nacho kumukova wetende rokusangana, kuti achibayire Jehovha, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake.'" 
Leviticus17:10 Munhu upi noupi waveimba yaIsiraeri, kana wavatorwa vagere pakati pavo, unodya ropa ripi neripi, ndichatonga munhu uyo unodya ropa, ndimubvise pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus17:11 Nokuti upenyu bwenyama huri muropa; ndakakupai iro paaritari, kuti riyananisire mweya yenyu; nokuti iropa rinoyananisira nokuda koupenyu hurimo." 
Leviticus17:12 Naizvozvo ndakati kuvana vaIsiraeri, `Kurege kuva nomumwe wenyu uchadya ropa, kana mutorwa upi noupi ugere pakati penyu, ngaarege kudya ropa.'" 
Leviticus17:13 Munhu upi noupi kuvana vaIsiraeri, kana kuvatorwa vagere pakati pavo, wakabata pakuvhima kwake mhuka ipi neipi kana shiri inodyiwa, anofanira kudurura ropa rayo, ndokurifukidza neguruva." 
Leviticus17:14 Nokuti kana huri upenyu bwenyama yose, ropa razvo ndihwo upenyu hwazvo, naizvozvo ndakati kuvana vaIsiraeri, `Regai kudya ropa razvo; ani naani unoridya anofanira kubviswa:" 
Leviticus17:15 Munhu upi noupi unodya chinhu chakangofa choga, kana chakaurawa nezvikara, kana ari munhu wakaberekerwa pakati penyu, kana ari mutorwa, anofanira kusuka nguvo dzake, nokuzvishambidza nemvura, ave usina kunaka kusvikira madeko; ipapo uchazova wakanaka." 
Leviticus17:16 Asi kana asingadzisuki, kana kushambidza muviri wake, uchafanira' kuva nemhosva yake.""" 
Leviticus18:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus18:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus18:3 Regai kuita sezvakanga zvichiitwa panyika yeIjipiti mamakanga mugere, uye regai kuita sezvinoitwa panyika yeKanani, kwandichazokuisai; musafamba netsika dzavo." 
Leviticus18:4 Itai zvandakatonga ini, chengetai zvirevo zvangu, kuti mufambe mazviri; ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu.'" 
Leviticus18:5 Naizvozvo chengetai zvirevo zvangu, nezvandakatonga; kana munhu akazviita uchararama nazvo; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus18:6 Ngakurege kuva nomunhu unoswedera kuhama yake yomumba, kuti amufukure, ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus18:7 Usafukura baba vako, namai vako; ndimai vako, usavafukura." 
Leviticus18:8 Usafukura mukadzi wababa vako; ndiko kufukura baba vako. 
Leviticus18:9 Usafukura hanzvadzi yako, mwanasikana wababa vako, kana mwanasikana wamai vako, kana vakaberekerwa mumusha kana vakaberekerwa kumwe." 
Leviticus18:10 Usafukura mwanasikana womwanakomana wako, kana mwanasikana womwanasikana wako; nokuti kufukurwa kwavo ndiko kwako." 
Leviticus18:11 Usafukura mwanasikana womukadzi wababa vako, wakaberekwa nababa vako, ihanzvadzi yako." 
Leviticus18:12 Usafukura vatete vako; ihama yomumba mababa vako. 
Leviticus18:13 Usafukura mainini vako, nokuti ihama yomumba mamai vako." 
Leviticus18:14 Usafukura babamunini vako, usaswedera kumukadzi wake, ndimainini vako." 
Leviticus18:15 Usafukura mukadzi womwanakomana wako, ndimukadzi womwanakomana wako; usamufukura." 
Leviticus18:16 Usafukura mukadzi womunun'una wako, ndiko kufukurwa komwanakomana wako." 
Leviticus18:17 Usafukura mukadzi pamwechete nomwanasikana wake; usatora mwanasikana womwanakomana wake, kuti umufukure; ihama dzomumba; zvakashata." 
Leviticus18:18 Usatora mukadzi pamwechete nomunun'una wake, arwidzane naye, kuti umufukure pamwechete nomumwe achiri mupenyu." 
Leviticus18:19 Usaswedera kumukadzi kuti umufukure, achakaipa nokuva kumwedzi kwake." 
Leviticus18:20 Usavata nomukadzi wowokwako panyama, kuti uzvisvibise naye." 
Leviticus18:21 Usapa mumwe wavana vako kuti apinde mumoto kuna Moreki, uye usamhura zita raMwari wako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus18:22 Usavata nomurume sezvinovatwa nomukadzi; zvinonyangadza. 
Leviticus18:23 Usavata nechipfuwo chipi nechipi kuti uzvisvibise nacho; nomukadzi ngaarege kumira pamberi pechipfuwo kuti akwirwe nacho; zvinonyangadza kwazvo. 
Leviticus18:24 Regai kuzvisvibisa kune chinhu chimwe chaizvozvi; nokuti vahedheni vakasvibiswa nezvinhu izvi zvose, ivo vandakadzinga pamberi penyu;" 
Leviticus18:25 nenyika yakasvibiswa; naizvozvo ndinoirova pamusoro pezvakaipa zvayo, nyika irutse vanhu vageremo." 
Leviticus18:26 Naizvozvo imwi chengetai mitemo yangu nezvandakatonga, kuti murege kuita chinhu chimwe chaizvozvo zvinonyangadza; kana ari wakaberekerwa munyika yenyu, kana ari mutorwa ugere pakati penyu." 
Leviticus18:27 (Nokuti vanhu venyika ino, vakakutangirai, vakaita zvinhu izvi zvose zvinonyangadza, nyika ikasvibiswa;)" 
Leviticus18:28 kuti nyika irege kukurutsaiwo, kana muchiisvibisa, sezvayakarutsa vanhu vakakutangirai." 
Leviticus18:29 Nokuti ani naani unoita chinhu chimwe chaizvozvi zvinonyangadza, vanhu vanozviita vachabviswa pakati porudzi rwavo." 
Leviticus18:30 Naizvozvo chengetai zvandakakurairai, kuti murege kuita tsika idzo dzose dzinonyangadza, dzaiitwa musati mavapo, kuti murege kuzvisvibisa nazvo; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.""" 
Leviticus19:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus19:2 Taura neungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Ivai vatsvene, nokuti ini Jehovha Mwari wenyu ndiri mutsvene." 
Leviticus19:3 Mumwe nomumwe wenyu anofanira kutya mai vake nababa vake, uye munofanira kuchengeta maSabata angu; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:4  `Musava nehanya nezvifananidzo, kana kuzviitira vamwari vakaumbwa; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:5  `Kana muchipa Jehovha chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, munofanira kuchipa kuti mugamuchirwe." 
Leviticus19:6 Chinofanira kudyiwa nomusi wamunochipa nawo, uye nomusi unotevera; kana zvimwe zvikasara kusvikira pazuva retatu, zvinofanira kupiswa nomoto." 
Leviticus19:7 Kana chikatongodyiwa nezuva retatu, zvinonyangadza; hachigamuchirwi." 
Leviticus19:8 Asi mumwe nomumwe unochidya, uchava nemhosva, nokuti wamhura chinhu chitsvene chaJehovha; munhu uyu anofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwake.'" 
Leviticus19:9 Kana muchikohwa gohwo reminda yenyu, rega kukohwa micheto yomunda wako, uye usaunganidza zvawira pasi pakukohwa kwako." 
Leviticus19:10 Usakohwa zvose pamunda wako wemizambiringa, uye usaunganidza michero yawira pasi yomunda wako wemizambiringa; unofanira kuzvisiyira varombo navaeni; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:11 Musaba; kana kunyengera, musareva nhema mumwe kune mumwe." 
Leviticus19:12 Musapika nhema nezita rangu, kuti usasvibisa zita raMwari wako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:13 Usamanikidza wokwako, kana kumutorera; haufaniri kugara usiku hwose kusvikira mangwana nomubayiro womuranda unokubatira." 
Leviticus19:14 Usatuka matsi, kana kupinganidza bofu, asi unofanira kutya Mwari wako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:15 Musaita zvisakarurama pakutonga; usatsaura murombo, kana kukudza une simba; asi unofanira kutonga wokwako nokururama." 
Leviticus19:16 Usafamba-famba pakati pavanhu vokwako, uchivachera; usapupurira ropa rowokwako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:17 Usavenga hama yako mumoyo mako; unofanira kuraira wokwako kwazvo, kuti urege kuva nezvivi nokuda kwake." 
Leviticus19:18 Usatsiva, kana kugara wakatsamwira vana vavanhu vokwako, asi unofanira kuda wokwako sezvaunozvida iwe; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:19 Chengetai mitemo yangu. Usaberekesa zvipfuwo zvako norumwe rudzi; usadzvara mbeu dzamarudzi maviri mumunda mako; usafuka nguvo yakarukwa nezvinhu zvamarudzi maviri. 
Leviticus19:20 Ani naani unovata nomukadzi ari murandakadzi, wakanyengwa nomurume, asina kudzikunurwa kwazvo, kana kusunungurwa, vanofanira kurohwa; asi havafaniri kuurawa, nokuti wakanga asina kusunungurwa." 
Leviticus19:21 Ngaauye nechipiriso chemhosva kuna Jehovha pamukova wetende rokusangana, rive gondobwe rechipiriso chemhosva." 
Leviticus19:22 Zvino muprista anofanira kumuyananisira negondobwe rechipiriso chemhosva pamberi paJehovha pamusoro pezvivi zvake zvaakatadza; ipapo uchakangamwirwa zvivi zvake zvaakatadza. 
Leviticus19:23 Kana muchisvika munyika, mukasima miti yamarudzi ose anodyiwa, munofanira kutora michero yayo sechinhu chisina kudzingiswa; makore matatu ichava kwamuri seisina kudzingiswa; haifaniri kudyiwa." 
Leviticus19:24 Asi negore rechina michero yayo yose ichava mitsvene, kuti murumbidze Jehovha nazvo." 
Leviticus19:25 Negore rechishanu mungadya michero yayo; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu. 
Leviticus19:26 Musadya chinhu chine ropa racho; musaita mazango, kana kutenda mashura." 
Leviticus19:27 Musaveura misoro yenyu muchiita matendeure, uye musashatisa nhivi dzendebvu dzenyu." 
Leviticus19:28 Musazvicheka miviri yenyu nokuda kwavakafa, kana kuzvitema nyora; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:29 Usaisa mwanasikana wako, uchimuita chifeve; kuti nyika irege kupata, nyika izare nezvakaipa." 
Leviticus19:30 Chengetai maSabata angu, nokutya imba yangu tsvene; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:31 Musava nehanya namasvikiro, kana musvibiswe navo; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:32 Unofanira kusimukira wachena vhudzi, nokukudza mutana, uye utye Mwari wako; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus19:33 Kana mutorwa agere newe panyika yenyu, usamuitira zvakaipa." 
Leviticus19:34 Mutorwa ugere nemwi ngaave kwamuri somunhu wakaberekerwa pakati penyu, unofanira kumuda sezvaunozvida iwe, nokuti nemiwo makanga muri vatorwa munyika yeIjipiti; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:35 Musaita zvisina kururama pakutonga, kana pakuyera nechitanda, kana pakuyera kurema, kana pachiyero." 
Leviticus19:36 Ivai nezviyero zvakarurama, nezvokuenzanisa nazvo zvakarurama, neefa yakarurama, nehini yakarurama; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu wakakubudisai munyikayeIjipiti" 
Leviticus19:37 Chengetai mitemo yangu yose, nezvandakatonga zvose, kuti muzviite; ndini Jehovha.""" 
Leviticus20:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus20:2 Uyezve, uti kuvana vaIsiraeri, `Ani naani pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, kana pavatorwa vagere pakati pavaIsiraeri, unopa Moreki vana vake, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa; vanhu venyika vanofanira kumutaka namabwe." 
Leviticus20:3 Neniwo ndichananaidza munhu uyo, ndichamubvisa pakati porudzi rwake; nokuti wakapa Moreki vamwe pakati pavana vake, kuti asvibise imba yangu tsvene, nokumhura zita rangu dzvene." 
Leviticus20:4 Kana vanhu vakaita savasingaoni munhu uyo, kana achipa Moreki vamwe pakati pavana vake, vakasamuuraya;" 
Leviticus20:5 ipapo ini ndichananaidza munhu uyo nemhuri yake, ndimubvise pakati porudzi rwake, iye navose vanomutevera pakupata naMoreki." 
Leviticus20:6 Munhu unotsaukira kumasvikiro navavuki kuvatevera pakupata, ndichananaidza munhu uyo, ndimubvise pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus20:7 Naizvozvo zvitsaurei, muve vatsvene; nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus20:8 Munofanira kuchengeta mitemo yangu, nokuiita; ndini Jehovha unokutsaurai." 
Leviticus20:9 Nokuti mumwe nomumwe unotuka baba vake, kana mai vake, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa; munhu wakatuka baba vake kana mai vake, mhosva yeropa rake ichava pamusoro pake." 
Leviticus20:10 Munhu unoita upombwe nomukadzi womumwe, iye unoita upombwe nomukadzi wowokwake, zvirokwazvo mhombwe nechifeve vose vachaurawa." 
Leviticus20:11 Munhu unovata nomukadzi wababa vake, wafukura baba vake, zvirokwazvo vose vari vaviri vanofanira kuurawa; mhosva yeropa ravo ichava pamusoro pavo." 
Leviticus20:12 Kana munhu akavata nomukadzi womwanakomana wake, zvirokwazvo vose vari vaviri vanofanira kuurawa; vakaita zvinonyangadza kwazvo; mhosva yeropa ravo ichava pamusoro pavo." 
Leviticus20:13 Kana munhu akavata nomurume sezvinoitwa nomukadzi, zvirokwazvo vose vari vaviri vakaita zvinonyangadza, vose vanofanira kuurawa; mhosva yeropa ravo ichava pamusoro pavo." 
Leviticus20:14 Kana munhu akatora mukadzi pamwechete namai vake, zvakaipa; vanofanira kupiswa nomoto vose, iye naivo; kuti kurege kuva nezvakaipa pakati penyu." 
Leviticus20:15 Kana munhu akavata nechipfuwo, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa; nechipfuwowo munofanira kuchiuraya." 
Leviticus20:16 Kana mukadz akaswedera kuchipfuwo chipi nechipi kuti avate pamberi pacho, munofanira kuuraya mukadzi nechipfuwo; zvirokwazvo zvinofanira kuurawa; mhosva yeropa razvo ichava pamusoro pazvo." 
Leviticus20:17 Kana munhu akatora hanzvadzi yake, mwanasikana wababa vake, kana mwanasikana wamai vake, akamufukura, naiyewo akamufukura, chinhu chinyonyadza; vachabviswa pamberi pavana vorudzi rwavo; wafukura hanzvadzi yake, iye uchava nemhosva yake." 
Leviticus20:18 Kana munhu akavata nomukadzi panguva yokuva kumwedzi kwake, akamufukura, wafukura tsime rake, naiye wafukura tsime reropa rake; ivo vaviri vose vanofanira kubviswa pakati porudzi rwavo." 
Leviticus20:19 Usafukura mainini vako, kana vatete vako, nokuti wafukura hama yako yomumba; vachava nemhosva yavo." 
Leviticus20:20 Kana munhu akavata nomukadzi wababamunini vake, wafukura babamunini vake; vachava nezvivi zvavo; vachafa vasina vana." 
Leviticus20:21 Kana munhu akatora mukadzi womunun'una wake, chinhu chine tsvina; wafukura munun'una wake; vachashaiwa vana." 
Leviticus20:22 Naizvozvo chengetai mitemo yangu yose, nezvose zvandakatonga, kuti muzviite; kuti nyika yandinozokuisai kwairi, kuti mugaremo, irege kukurutsai." 
Leviticus20:23 Musafamba netsika dzorudzi rwavanhu vandichadzinga pamberi penyu; nokuti ivo vakaita izvozvo zvose, naizvozvo ndakavasema." 
Leviticus20:24 Asi ndakakuudzai imwi, ndikati, `Muchagara nhaka yenyika yavo, ndichakupai iyo ive yenyu; inyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu, wakakutsaurai pakati pedzimwe ndudzi." 
Leviticus20:25 Naizvozvo tsaurai zvipfuwo zvakanaka pane zvakaipa, neshiri dzakaipa pane dzakanaka; kuti murege kuva vanhu vanonyangadza nezvipfuwo, kana neshiri, kana nechinhu chipi nechipi chinokambaira panyika chandakatsaura kwamuri ndichiti, hazvina kunaka.'" 
Leviticus20:26 Munofanira kuva vatsvene kwandiri; nokuti ini Jehovha ndiri mutsvene, ndakakutsaurai pakati pedzimwe ndudzi, kuti muve vangu." 
Leviticus20:27 Murume kana mukadzi unosvikirwa, kana uri muuki, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa; vanofanira kutakwa namabwe; mhosva yeropa ravo ichava pamusoro pavo.""" 
Leviticus21:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Taura navaprista, vanakomana vaAroni, uti kwavari, `muprista ngaarege kuzvisvibisa kuna vakafa pakati porudzi rwake;" 
Leviticus21:2 asi kuhama yake yomumba, kana mai vake, kana baba vake, kana mwanakomana wake, kana mwanasikana wake, kana munun'una wake;" 
Leviticus21:3 kana hanzvadzi yake ichiri mhandara, hama yomumba, usina kumbova nomurume; ungazvisvibisa kwaari.'" 
Leviticus21:4 Ngaarege kuzvisvibisa, zvaari mukuru pakati pehama dzake, kuti azvishatise." 
Leviticus21:5 Havafaniri kuveura misoro yavo, vachiita mhazha, kana kuveura rutivi rumwe rwendebvu dzavo, kana kutema nyora pamiviri yavo." 
Leviticus21:6 Vanofanira kuva vatsvene kuna Mwari wavo, varege kumhura zita raMwari wavo; nokuti ndivo vanouya nezvipiriso zvaJehovha zvinopiswa, zvokudya zvaMwari wavo; naizvozvo ngavave vatsvene." 
Leviticus21:7 Havafaniri kutora mukadzi chifeve, kana wakachinyiwa; ngavarege kutora mukadzi wakarambwa nomurume wake, nokuti mutsvene kuna Mwari wake." 
Leviticus21:8 Naizvozvo unofanira iwe kumutsaura, nokuti ndiye unouya nezvokudya zvaMwari wako; anofanira kuva mutsvene kwauri, nokuti ini Jehovha ndinokutsaurai, ndiri mutsvene." 
Leviticus21:9 Kana mwanasikana womuprista upi noupi achizvishatisa nokupata, unoshatisa baba vake; anofanira kupiswa nomoto." 
Leviticus21:10 Munhu, ari muprista mukuru pakati pehama dzake, wakadirwa mafuta echizoro pamusoro wake, wakatsaurwa kuti afuke nguvo dzomuprista mukuru, ngaarege kusunungura vhudzi romusoro wake, kana kubvarura nguvo dzake." 
Leviticus21:11 Ngaarege kusvika pachitunha, kana kuzvisvibisa kuna baba vake kana mai vake;" 
Leviticus21:12 ngaarege kubuda panzvimbo tsvene, kana kushatisa nzvimbo tsvene yaMwari wake, nokuti mafuta okugadza aMwari wake ari pamusoro pake; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus21:13 Ngaazvitorere mukadzi ichiri mhandara. 
Leviticus21:14 Ngaarege kutora chirikadzi, kana wakarambwa nomurume wake, kana wakachinyiwa, kana chifeve, asi ngaatore mukadzi ichiri mhandara pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus21:15 Ngaarege kushatisa vana vake pakati porudzi rwake; nokuti ndini Jehovha ndinomutsaura. 
Leviticus21:16 zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi, akati," 
Leviticus21:17 Taura naAroni, uti, `Ani naani wakaremara pakati pavana vako pamarudzi avo ose, ngaarege kuswedera kuuya nezvokudya zvaMwari wake.'" 
Leviticus21:18 Nokuti munhu upi noupi wakaremara ngaarege kuswedera kana riri bofu, kana mhetamakumbo, kana wakaremara pachiso, kana uno mutezo wakarebesa," 
Leviticus21:19 kana munhu ano rutsoka rwakavhunika, kana ruoko rwakavhunika," 
Leviticus21:20 kana ano musana wakakombama, kana wakawonda kwazvo, kana uno ruvara paziso rake, kana ane mhizi, kana ane pakafunuka, kana wakaremara pamberi;" 
Leviticus21:21 munhu upi noupi worudzi rwomuprista Aroni wakaremara haafaniri kuswedera kuuya nezvipiriso zvinopiswa zvaJehovha; wakaremara, haafaniri kuswedera kuuya nezvokudya zvaMwari wake." 
Leviticus21:22 Ungadya hake zvokudya zvaMwari wake, zvitsvene zvikuru nezvitsvene zvose." 
Leviticus21:23 Asi haafaniri kupinda mukati mechidzitiro, kana kuswedera kuaritari nokuti wakaremara; kuti arege kushatisa nzvimbo dzangu tsvene; nokuti ndini Jehovha ndinovatsaura.""" 
Leviticus21:24 Mozisi akataura saizvozvo naAroni navanakomana vake navana vaIsiraeri vose. 
Leviticus22:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus22:2 Taura naAroni navanakomana vake, kuti vazvitsaure pazvinhu zvitsvene zvavana vaIsiraeri, zvavanonditsaurira, kuti varege kushatisa zita rangu dzvene; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:3 Uti kwavari, `Ani naani kuvana venyu kumarudzi enyu ose, unoswedera kuzvinhu zvitsvene, zvakatsaurirwa Jehovha navana vaIsiraeri, asina kunaka, munhu uyo anofanira kubviswa pamberi pangu;' ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:4 Ani naani kuvana vaAroni ane maperembudzi kana ane zvinoyerera ngaarege kudya zvinhu zvitsvene kusvikira anaka. Ani naani unobata chinhu chakasvibiswa nowakafa kana munhu unobudirwa nembeu yake; 
Leviticus22:5 kana ani naani unobata chinhu chipi nechipi chinokambaira chingamusvibisa, kana munhu waangasvibiswa naye, uno kusanaka kupi nokupi." 
Leviticus22:6 Munhu unobata chinhu chipi nechipi chakadai, uchava usina kunaka kusvikira madeko; haafaniri kudya zvinhu zvitsvene asati ashambidza muviri wake nemvura." 
Leviticus22:7 Kana zuva ravira uchava wakanaka; pashure ungadya hake zvinhu zvitsvene; nokuti ndizvo zvokudya zvake. 
Leviticus22:8 Ngaarege kudya chinhu chakafa choga, kana chakaurawa nezvikara, kuti azvisvibise nazvo; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:9 Naizvozvo vanofanira kuchengeta zvandakaraira, kuti varege kuva nezvivi nokuda kwazvo, vafe nazvo, kana vazvishatisa; ndini Jehovha, ndinovatsaura." 
Leviticus22:10 Mweni ngaarege kudya chinhu chitsvene; mutorwa ugere nomuprista, kana muranda, ngavarege kudya chinhu chitsvene." 
Leviticus22:11 Asi kana muprista akatenga munhu nomutengo wemari yake, iye ungazvidya; uye vose vanoberekerwa mumba make, vangadya zvokudya zvake." 
Leviticus22:12 Kana mwanasikana womuprista akawanikwa nomweni, ngaarege kudya chipiriso chinotsaurwa chezvinhu zvitsvene." 
Leviticus22:13 Asi kana mwanasikana womuprista iri chirikadzi, kana warambwa nomurume, asina vana, akadzokera kumba kwababa vake, sapausikana hwake, iye ungadya zvokudya zvababa vake; asi mweni ngaarege kuzvidya." 
Leviticus22:14 Kana munhu akadya chinhu chitsvene asingazivi, uchafanira kuwedzera cheshanu chacho kwachiri, kuti adzosere kumuprista chinhu chitsvene." 
Leviticus22:15 Ngavarege kushatisa zvinhu zvitsvene zvavana vaIsiraeri zvavanopa Jehovha; 
Leviticus22:16 kuti varege kuva nemhosva yezvivi, kana vachidya zvinhu zvavo zvitsvene; nokuti ndini Jehovha ndinovatsaura.""" 
Leviticus22:17 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus22:18 Taura naAroni, navanakomana vake, navana vaIsiraeri vose, uti kwavari, `Ani naani weimba yaIsiraeri, kana wavatorwa pakati pavaIsiraeri, unouya nechipo chake, kana chiri chemhiko, kana iri nhendo ipi neipi yokuda kwavo, chavanouya nacho kuna Jehovha, kuti chipiswe;"
