Leviticus22:19 munofanira kuuya nomukono usina kuremara kana wemombe, kana gondobwe ramakwai, kana nhongo yembudzi, kuti mugamuchirwe." 
Leviticus22:20 Asi musauya nechinhu chakaremara, nokuti hamungagamuchirwi nokuda kwacho." 
Leviticus22:21 Ani naani unouya nechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa kuna Jehovha, chokupika nacho, kana kuti ive nhendo yokuda kwake, kana chiri chemombe kana chamakwai, chinofanira kuva chakakwana., kuti chigamuchigwe; ngachirege kuva chakaremara." 
Leviticus22:22 Kana chiri chinhu chakaita bofu, kana chakavhunika, kana chakakuvara, kana chinamaronda, kana chine chikwekwe, kana china pakafunuka, murege kupa Jehovha izvozvo, musapisira Jehovha izvozvo paaritari." 
Leviticus22:23 Kana iri nzombe duku kana gwayana zvine mitezo yakarebesa kana yakapfupika, mungauya nazvo kuti muite nhendo yokuda kwenyu, asi hazvingagamuchirwi pakuripira mhiko." 
Leviticus22:24 Musapa Jehovha chinhu china manhu akakuvadzwa, kana akapwanyika, kana akaputswa, kana,akachekwa, musadaro panyika yenyu." 
Leviticus22:25 Musagamuchira zvakadai paruoko rwomutorwa, kuti mupe Mwari wenyu zvokudya zvakadai, nokuti zvakaipa, zvakaremara, hazvingagamuchirwi nokuda kwenyu.' """ 
Leviticus22:26 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus22:27 Kana nzombe, kana gwai, kana mbudzi zvichiberekwa, zvinofanira kugara pana mai vazvo mazuva manomwe; kubva pazuva rorusere napashure paro zvingagamuchirwa kuti zviite chipo chinopisirwa Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:28 Kana iri mhou kana nhunzvi, musazviuraya pamusi mumwe navana vazvo." 
Leviticus22:29 Kana muchibayira Jehovha chibayiro chokuvonga, munofanira kuchibayira saizvozvo kuti mugamuchirwe." 
Leviticus22:30 Chinofanira kudyiwa nomusi iwoyo; musasiya zvimwe kusvikira mangwana; ndini Jehovha. 
Leviticus22:31 Naizvozvo chengetai mirairo yangu, muiite; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus22:32 Usashatisa zita rangu dzvene; ndinoda kutsaurwa pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, ndini Jehovha, ndinokutsaurai;" 
Leviticus22:33 ndakakubudisai panyika kuti ndive Mwari wenyu; ndini Jehovha. 
Leviticus23:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus23:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Mitambo yakatarwa naJehovha, yamunofanira kuparidzira muchiti ndidzo ungano tsvene, ndiyo mitambo yangu yakatarwa.'" 
Leviticus23:3 Mabasa ngaabatwe mazuva matanhatu; asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata rokuzorora kwazvo, iungano tsvene; musabata basa ripi neripi; iSabata raJehovha mudzimba dzenyu dzose." 
Leviticus23:4 Ndiyo mitambo yaJehovha yakatarwa, ndidzo ungano tsvene, dzamunofanira kuparidzira nenguva dzakatarwa:" 
Leviticus23:5 Nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva regumi namana romwedzi, madekwana, iPasika raJehovha." 
Leviticus23:6 Nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi iwoyo ndiwo mutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa; munofanira kudya chingwa chisina kuviriswa mazuva manomwe. 
Leviticus23:7 Nomusi wokutanga munofanira kuita ungano tsvene; musabata basa ravaranda. 
Leviticus23:8 Asi munofanira kupa Jehovha chipiriso chinopiswa mazuva manomwe; pazuva rechinomwe munofanira kuita ungano tsvene; musabata basa ravaranda. 
Leviticus23:9 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus23:10 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Kana muchisvika munyika yandichakupai, mukakohwa zviyo zvayo, munofanira kuuya nechisote chezvitsva zvokukohwa kwenyu kumuprista," 
Leviticus23:11 iye anofanira kuzunguzira chisote icho pamberi paJehovha, kuti chigamuchirwe kwamuri; muprista anofanira kuchizunguzira nomusi unotevera Sabata." 
Leviticus23:12 Nomusi wamunozunguzira chisote nawo, munofanira kuuya negwayana regondobwe risina kuremara, rine gore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha." 
Leviticus23:13 Nechipiriso chacho choupfu chinofanira kuva chezvegumi zviviri zveefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha chinonhuhwira zvakanaka; nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa chinofanira kuva chewaini chechina chehini." 
Leviticus23:14 Musadya chingwa, kana zviyo zvakakangiwa, kana hura itsva, kusvikira pamusi iwoyo, kusvikira mauya nechipo chaMwari wenyu; ndiwo mutemo usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose padzimba dzenyu dzose.'" 
Leviticus23:15 Zvino munofanira kuverenga kubva pamusi unotevera Sabata, kubva pamusi wamakauya nawo nechisote chinozunguzirwa, maSabata manomwe." 
Leviticus23:16 Munofanira kuverenga mazuva makumi mashanu kusvikira pamusi unotevera Sabata rechinomwe; ipapo munofanira kupa Jehovha chipiriso chitsva choupfu. 
Leviticus23:17 Munofanira kutora kudzimba dzenyu zvingwa zviviri zvinozunguzirwa zvezvegumi zviviri zveefa; zvinofanira kuva zvoupfu hwakatsetseka, zvibikwe nembiriso, kuti zvive zvitsva kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus23:18 Pamwechete nezvingwa munofanira kuuya namakwayana manomwe asina kuremara, egore rimwe, nenzombe imwe duku, namakondobwe maviri; izvozvo zvinofanira kuva chibayiro chinopisirwa Jehovha, pamwechete nechipiriso chazvo choupfu nezvipiriso zvinodururwa, chive chipiriso chinopiswa chinonhuhwira zvakanaka kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus23:19 Uye munofanira kubayira nhongo imwe, chive chipiriso chezvivi, namakwayana maviri, mikono yegore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa." 
Leviticus23:20 muprista anofanira kuzvizunguzira pamwechete nezvingwa zvitsva, chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa pamberi paJehovha, pamwechete namakwayana maviri iwayo; zvinofanira kuva zvitsvene kuna Jehovha zviri zvomuprista." 
Leviticus23:21 Munofanira kuparidza nomusi iwoyo kuti muve neungano itsva; hamufaniri kubata mabasa avaranda; uve mutemo usingaperi padzimba dzenyu dzose kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose. 
Leviticus23:22 Kana muchikohwa gohwo reminda yenyu, rega kukohwa kwazvo micheto yomunda wako, uye usaunganidza zvawira pasi pakukohwa kwako; unofanira kuzvisiyira varombo navaeni; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.""" 
Leviticus23:23 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus23:24 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Pamwedzi wechinomwe, zuva rokutanga romwedzi rinofanira kuva kwamuri zuva rokuzorora kwazvo, rinoyeudzwa nokuridzwa kwehwamanda, ive ungano tsvene." 
Leviticus23:25 Musabata naro mabasa ose avaranda; munofanira kuvigira Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto.' 
Leviticus23:26 Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus23:27 Zuva regumi romwedzi uyu wechinomwe izuva rokuyananisira; munofanira kuita naro ungano tsvene, munofanira kuchema pamweya yenyu, nokuvigira Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto." 
Leviticus23:28 Nomusi uyo musabata basa ripi neripi, nokuti izuva rokuyananisirwa, kuti muyananisirwe pamberi paJehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus23:29 Nokuti ani naani usingachemi pamweya wake nomusi iwoyo, uchabviswa pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus23:30 Nomunhu upi noupi unobata basa ripi neripi nomusi iwoyo, munhu uyo ndichamuparadza pakati porudzi rwake." 
Leviticus23:31 Musaita basa ripi neripi; mutemo usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose padzimba dzenyu dzose. 
Leviticus23:32 Rinofanira kuva kwamuri Sabata rokuzorora kwazvo, munofanira kuchema pamweya yenyu; munofanira kuchengeta Sabata renyu, nezuva repfumbamwe romwedzi madekwana, kubva pamadekwana kusvikira pamadekwanazve.""" 
Leviticus23:33 Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus23:34 Taura navana valsiraeri uti, `Nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi uyu wechinomwe Jehovha anofanira kuitirwa mutambo womatumba mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus23:35 Nomusi wokutanga kunofanira kuva neungano tsvene; musaita basa ripi neripi ravaranda. 
Leviticus23:36 Munofanira kuvigira Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto mazuva manomwe; nomusi worusere munofanira kuva neungano tsvene; muvigire Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto; izuva romutambo mukuru, musabata basa ripi neripi ravaranda.'" 
Leviticus23:37 Ndiyo mitambo yakatarwa yaJehovha, yamunofanira kuparidzira, muchiti iungano tsvene, kuti muvigire Jehovha chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu, nechibayiro, nezvipiriso zvinodururwa, chimwe nechimwe nezuva racho;" 
Leviticus23:38 izvi ngazviitwe, kunze kwamaSabata aJehovha, nokunze kwezvipo zvenyu, nokunze kwemhiko dzenyu dzose, nokunze kwenhendo dzenyu dzose dzokuda kwenyu, dzamunopa Jehovha." 
Leviticus23:39 Zvino pazuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechinomwe, kana makohwa gohwa reminda, munofanira kuita mutambo waJehovha mazuva manomwe; zuva rokutanga rinofanira kuva rokuzorora kwazvo, nezuva rorusere rinofanira kuva rokuzorora kwazvo." 
Leviticus23:40 Pazuva rokutanga munofanira kutora michero yemiti yakanaka, namashizha emichindwe, namatavi emiti mikobvu, nemikonachando yomurukova; munofanira kufara pamberi paJehovha Mwari wenyu mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus23:41 Munofanira kuitira Jehovha mutambo mazuva manomwe gore rimwe nerimwe; uve mutemo usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose; munofanira kuuita nomwedzi wechinomwe. 
Leviticus23:42 Munofanira kugara mumatumba mazuva manomwe; vose vakaberekerwa munyika pakati pavaIsiraeri vanofanira kugara mumatumba. 
Leviticus23:43 Kuti marudzi enyu azive, kuti ndakagarisa vana valsiraeri mumatumba, nguva yandakavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.""" 
Leviticus23:44 Ipapo Mozisi wakarondedzera kuvana vaIsiraeri mitambo yakatarwa naJehovha. 
Leviticus24:1 Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus24:2 Raira vana vaIsiraeri kuti vauye kwauri namafuta akanaka amaorivhi, akaisvonaka akasviniwa omwenje, kuti avhenekese mwenje nguva dzose." 
Leviticus24:3 Kunze kwechidzitiro chechipupuriro, mutende rokusangana, Aroni anofanira kuigadzira kubva madekwana kusvikira mangwanani nguva dzose pamberi paJehovha; unofanira kuva mutemo usingaperi kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose." 
Leviticus24:4 Anofanira kugadzira mwenje pachigadziko chakaisvonaka nguva dzose pamberi paJehovha. 
Leviticus24:5 Iwe unofanira kutora upfu hwakatsetseka, ugobika nahwo zvingwa zvine gumi nezviviri; chingwa chimwe nechimwe chinofanira kuitwa nezvegumi zviviri zveefa." 
Leviticus24:6 Unofanira kuzvigadzika patafura yakaisvonaka pamberi paJehovha uchiita nhurikidzwa mbiri, zvitanhatu panhurikidzwa." 
Leviticus24:7 Unofanira kuisawo pamusoro penhurikidzwa imwe neimwe zvinonhuhwira zvakanaka, kuti chive chokurangaridza chechingwa, chive chipiriso chinopisirwa Jehovha." 
Leviticus24:8 Musi mumwe nomumwe weSabata unofanira kuzvirongedza pamberi paJehovha nguva dzose; isungano isingaperi inoitwa navana valsiraeri. 
Leviticus24:9 Zvinofanira kuva zvaAroni navanakomana vake; vazvidye panzvimbo tsvene, nokuti chitsvene kwazvo kwaari pakati pezvipiriso zvinopisirwa Jehovha nomutemo usingaperi.""" 
Leviticus24:10 Zvino mwanakomana womukadzi muIsiraeri, asi baba vake vaiva munhu weIjipiti, wakafamba pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, mwanakomana womukadzi muIsiraeri akarwa nomurume muIsiraeri pamisasa." 
Leviticus24:11 Mwanakomana womukadzi muIsiraeri akamhura zita raJehovha, akatuka, vakaenda naye kuna Mozisi. Zita ramai vake rakanga riri Sheromiti, mwanasikana waDhibhiri, worudzi rwaDhani." 
Leviticus24:12 Vakamuisa mutirongo, kuti vaziviswe zvinorehwa naJehovha." 
Leviticus24:13 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus24:14 Budisa mutuki kunze kwemisasa; zvino vose, vakamunzwa, vanofanira kuisa maoko avo pamusoro wake, ungano yose igomutaka namabwe." 
Leviticus24:15 Zvino iwe utaure navana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Ani naani anotuka Mwari wake anofanira kurohwa pamusoro pezvivi zvake.'" 
Leviticus24:16 Munhu unomhura zita raJehovha, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa; ungano yose inofanira kumutaka namabwe, kana ari mutorwa, kana ari wakaberekerwa munyika, kana achimhura zita raJehovha unofanira kuurawa." 
Leviticus24:17 Munhu anorova mumwe, akafa, zvirokwazvo anofanira kuurawa;" 
Leviticus24:18 nomunhu anorova chipfuwo, chikafa, anofanira kuchiripa; upenyu pachigaro choupenyu." 
Leviticus24:19 Kana munhu akamanikidza wokwake, sezvaakaita iye, anofanira kuitirwawo;" 
Leviticus24:20 kuvhunika kuchatsibwa nokuvhunika, ziso neziso, zino nezino, sezvaakamanikidza mumwe, naiye anofanira kuitirwa saizvozvo." 
Leviticus24:21 Munhu unouraya chipfuwo, anofanira kuripa; anouraya munhu, anofanira kuurawa." 
Leviticus24:22 Munofanira kuva nomurayiro mumwe chete kumutorwa kana kunowakaberekerwa panyika; nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu. 
Leviticus24:23 Mozisi akataura navana vaIsiraeri, ivo vakabudisa mutuki kunze kwemisasa, vakamutaka namabwe. Vana vaIsiraeri vakaita sezvakarairwa naMozisi." 
Leviticus25:1 Zvino Jehovha wakataura naMozisi pagomo reSinai, akati," 
Leviticus25:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri uti kwavari: Kana muchisvika munyika yandichakupai, nyika inofanira kuitira Jehovha Sabata." 
Leviticus25:3 Unofanira kudzvara munda wako makore matanhatu, nokugurira mizambiringa yako makore matanhatu, nokuunganidza michero yayo." 
Leviticus25:4 Asi pagore rechinomwe nyika inofanira kuzorora kwazvo, rive Sabata kuna Jehovha; usadzvara munda wako, kana kugurira mizambiringa yako." 
Leviticus25:5 Magoko ako usaakohwa, namazambiringa omuzambiringa wako usina kugurirwa usaatanha; rinofanira kuva gore rokuzorora kwazvo kwenyika.'" 
Leviticus25:6 Gohwo reSabata renyika ndizvo zvinofanira kuva zvokudya zvenyu; zvako nezvomuranda wako, nezvomurandakadzi wako, nezvomubatiri wako, nezvomutorwa wako ugere newe;" 
Leviticus25:7 nezvezvipfuwo zvako, nezvemhuka dziri munyika yako; zvibereko zvazvo zvose zvinofanira kuva zvokudya zvazvo." 
Leviticus25:8 Unofanira kuverengawo maSabata manomwe amakore, manomwe akaverengwa kanomwe; kuti mazuva amaSabata manomwe amakore aite kwauri makore makumi mana namapfumbamwe." 
Leviticus25:9 Zvino pazuva regumi romwedzi wechinomwe unofanira kuraira kuti hwamanda iridzwe kwazvo; pazuva rokuyananisira munofanira kuraira kuti hwamanda iridzwe panyika yenyu yose. 
Leviticus25:10 Munofanira kutsaura gore ramakumi mashanu, mugoparidza sununguko panyika yose kuna vose vageremo; rinofanira kuva gore rejubheri kwamuri; munofanira.kudzokera mumwe nomumwe kune zvake, munofanira kudzokera mumwe nomumwe kuhama dzake." 
Leviticus25:11 Gore irero ramakumi mashanu rinofanira kuva rejubheri kwamuri; kusadzvara, uye musakohwa naro magoko, uye musatanha naro pamizambiringa isina kugurirwa." 
Leviticus25:12 Nokuti igore rejubheri; rinofanira kuva dzvene kwamuri; munofanira kudya zvibereko zvaro paminda. 
Leviticus25:13 Negore iri rejubheri munofanira kudzokera mumwe nomumwe kune zvake. 
Leviticus25:14 Zvino kana uchitengesera wokwako chinhu, kana kutenga chinhu kwaari, musamanikidzana." 
Leviticus25:15 Utenge kuno wokwako uchienzanisa namakore kubva pagore rejubheri, naiye unofanira kukutengesera achienzanisa namakore akasara okukohwa." 
Leviticus25:16 Unofanira kuwedzera mutengo wazvo uchienzanisa nokuwanda kwamakore, uye unofanira kutapudza mutengo uchienzanisa noushoma hwamakore; nokuti iye unokutengesera nguva dzokukohwa." 
Leviticus25:17 Musamanikidzana, asi utye Mwari wako; nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus25:18 Naizvozvo munofanira kuita zvandakatema, nokuchengeta zvandakatonga, nokuzviita, kuti mugare munyika makachengeteka." 
Leviticus25:19 Nyika ichabereka zvibereko zvayo, imwi muchadya mukaguta, mukagaramo makachengeteka." 
Leviticus25:20 Zvino kana mukati, `Tichadyei negore rechinomwe? Tarirai, hatifaniri kudzvara, hatifaniri kuunganidza zvibereko zvedu';" 
Leviticus25:21 ipapo ndicharaira kuti mukomborerwe neni pagore rechitanhatu, kuti rikuberekerei zvibereko zvicharingana makore matatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Negore rorusere muchadzvara, muchidya zvibereko zvisharu, kusvikira gore repfumbamwe, kusvikira zvibereko zvaro zvichisvika, muchadya zvisharu." 
Leviticus25:23 Nyika haifaniri kutengeswa chose nokusingaperi, nokuti nyika ndeyangu; nokuti muri vaeni navatorwa kwandiri." 
Leviticus25:24 Panyika yenyu yose munofanira kutendera kuti nyika idzikunurwe. 
Leviticus25:25 Kana hama yako ikava murombo, ikatengesa zvimwe zvayo, ipapo hama yake yomumba inofanira kuuya kuzodzikunura izvo zvakatengeswa nehama yako." 
Leviticus25:26 Kana munhu akashaiwa unozvidzikunura, akazova mufumi, akawana zvinoringana kuzvidzikunura;" 
Leviticus25:27 unofanira kuverenga makore kubva pakutengeswa kwazvo, agodzosera kuna iye waakatengana naye zvakasara, iye ndokudzokera kune zvake;" 
Leviticus25:28 asi kana asingagoni kuzvidzikunura, izvo zvaakatengesa zvinofanira kugara kuna iye wakazvitenga kusvikira pagore rejubheri; zvino pagore rejubheri zvinofanira kusunungurwa, iye agodzokera kune zvake." 
Leviticus25:29 Kana munhu akatengesa imba iri muguta rakakombwa namasvingo, ungaidzikunura gore rose raakatenga naro risati rapera; unofanira kuva nesimba rokuidzikunura gore rose." 
Leviticus25:30 Kana isingadzikunurwi gore rose rikapera, zvino imba iyo iri muguta rakakombwa namasvingo inofanira kusimbiswa kuti ndeyaiye wakaitenga nokusingaperi, nokumarudzi ake; haingasunungurwi negore rejubheri." 
Leviticus25:31 Asi dzimba dzemisha isina kukombwa namasvingo dzinofanira kuverengwa pamwechete neminda yenyika; dzingadzikunurwa, dzichasunungurwa pagore rejubheri." 
Leviticus25:32 Asi pamaguta avaRevhi, idzo dzimba pamaguta avo, vaRevhi vangadzidzikunura nguva ipi neipi." 
Leviticus25:33 Kana munhu akadzikunura kuva Revhi, imba yakatengeswa neguta rake zvinofanira kusunungurwa pagore rejubheri; nokuti dzimba mumaguta avaRevhi ndedzavo pakati pavana vaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus25:34 Asi minda yokuruwa rwamaguta avo haingatengeswi, nokuti ndeyavo nokusingaperi." 
Leviticus25:35 Kana hama yako ikava murombo, akapera simba anewe, unofanira kumubatsira, agare newe somweni kana mutorwa." 
Leviticus25:36 Usatora mhindu yemari kwaari kana yezvibereko kwaari, asi unofanira kutya Mwari wako, kuti hama yako igare newe." 
Leviticus25:37 Usamupa mari yako uchireva mhindu, kana zvokudya zvako uchireva kuwedzerwa." 
Leviticus25:38 Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu, wakakubudisai munyika yeljipiti, kuti ndikupei nyika yeKanani, ndive Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus25:39 Kana hama yako ikava murombo, agere newe, akazvitengesa kwauri, usamubatisa somusungwa;" 
Leviticus25:40 ngaave somubatiri unopiwa mubayiro, kana somutorwa kwauri; ngaakubatire kusvikira pagore rejubheri." 
Leviticus25:41 Ipapo ngaabude hake kwauri, iye pamwechete navana vake, adzokere kuhama dzake, adzokere kuna madzibaba ake." 
Leviticus25:42 Nokuti ivo varanda vangu vandakabudisa munyika yeIjipiti; ngavarege kutengeswa, sezvinoitwa vasungwa." 
Leviticus25:43 Usamubata nehasha, asi utye Mwari wako." 
Leviticus25:44 Kana vari vasungwa vako, varume kana vakadzi, vauchazova navo mungazvitengera vasungwa, varume navakadzi, kumarudzi anokupoteredzai." 
Leviticus25:45 Mungatengawo kuvana vavatorwa vagere pakati penyu nokuvana vavo vari pakati penyu, vavakabereka panyika yenyu; ivo vangava venyu." 
Leviticus25:46 Muvaite nhaka yavana venyu vanokuteverai, kuti vave vavo; munofanira kutora vasungwa venyu kwavari nokuvana vaIsiraeri, mumwe ngaarege kubata mumwe nehasha." 
Leviticus25:47 Kana mweni kana mutorwa akafuma agere newe, asi hama yako igere naye ikava murombo, akazvitengesa kumweni kana mutorwa uyo ugere newe, kana kumwana worudzi rwomweni uyo," 
Leviticus25:48 kana atengeswa, ungadzikunurwa; munun'una kana mukoma wake ungamudzikunura;" 
Leviticus25:49 kana babamunini vake, kana mwanakomana wababamunini vake, ungamudzikunura, kana ani naani wehama dzake dzomumba make ungamudzikunura; kana iye akazova mufumi, ungazvidzikunura amene." 
Leviticus25:50 Zvino iye nomutengi wake vanofanira kuverenga makore kubva pagore raakazvitengesa naro kwaari kusvikira pagore rejubheri, mutengo waakazvitengesa nawo unofanira kuenzaniswa namakore; nguva yokugara kwake naye inofanira kuenzaniswa nenguva yomubatiri unopiwa mubayiro wake." 
Leviticus25:51 Kana makore mazhinji achinge asara, unofanira kudzosera mari yokudzikunurwa kwake yakaenzaniswa namakore iwayo, zvichibva pamari yaakanga atenga nayo." 
Leviticus25:52 Kana kuchinge kwasara makore mashoma kusvikira pagore rejubheri, unofanira kurangana naye; unofanira kudzosera mari yokudzikunurwa kwake zvichienzaniswa namakore ake." 
Leviticus25:53 Unofanira kugara naye gore rimwe nerimwe somubatiri unopiwa mubayiro wake; ngaarege kumubata nehasha pamberi pako. 
Leviticus25:54 Kana asingadzikunurwi nemitoo iyi, anofanira kusunungurwa negore rejubheri, iye navana vake pamwechete naye." 
Leviticus25:55 Nokuti vana vaIsiraeri varanda vangu; varanda vangu vandakabudisa panyika yeljipiti; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu. 
Leviticus26:1 Musazviitira zvifananidzo, kana kuzvimutsira mufananidzo wakavezwa kana shongwe yebwe; musaisa ibwe rinomufananidzo munyika yenyu kuti mupfugamirepo, nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus26:2 Munofanira kuchengeta maSabata angu, nokukudza imba yangu tsvene; ndini Jehovha." 
Leviticus26:3 Kana muchifamba nemitemo yangu, nokuchengeta mirairo yangu, muchiiita;" 
Leviticus26:4 ini ndichakunisirai mvura nenguva yayo, nenyika ichabereka zvibereko zvayo, nemiti yesango ichabereka zvibereko zvayo." 
Leviticus26:5 Kupura kwenyu kuchasvika pakukohwa mazambiringa, nokukohwa mazambiringa kuchasvika panguva yokudzvara; muchadya zvokudya zvenyu mukaguta, nokugara munyika yenyu makachengeteka." 
Leviticus26:6 Ndichakupai rugare panyika, kuti muvate pasi musingavhunduswi nomunhu; zvikara ndichazvipedza panyika, nomunondo haungapfuuri nomunyika yenyu," 
Leviticus26:7 muchadzinga vavengi venyu, vakaparadzwa nomunondo pamberi penyu." 
Leviticus26:8 Vashanu venyu vachadzinga vane zana, navane zana venyu vachadzinga vane zviuru zvine gumi, vavengi venyu vachaparadzwa nomunondo pamberi penyu." 
Leviticus26:9 Ini ndichakurangarirai, ndichakuberekesai nokukuwanzai; ndichasimbisa sungano yangu nemi." 
Leviticus26:10 Muchadya zviyo zvakachengetwa nguva huru, muchafanira kubudisa zvekare kudziurira zvitsva." 
Leviticus26:11 Ndichagadza tabhenakeri yangu pakati penyu; mweya wangu haungakusemiyi. 
Leviticus26:12 Ndichafamba pakati penyu, ndichava Mwari wenyu, nemwi muchava vanhu vangu." 
Leviticus26:13 Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu, wakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti, kuti murege kuva vatapwa vavo; ndakavhuna matanda ejoko renyu, ndikakufambisai makati tasa." 
Leviticus26:14 Asi kana musingadi kunditeerera, musingadi kuita mirairo iyi yose;" 
Leviticus26:15 kana muchiramba mitemo yangu, kana mweya yenyu ichisema zvandakatonga, kuti murege kuda kuita mirairo yangu yose, asi muchiputsa sungano yangu," 
Leviticus26:16 neniwo ndichakuitirai izvi: Ndichauyisa zvinotyisa pamusoro penyu, hosha yorukosoro nefivhiri zvichaparadza meso nokuwondisa mweya yenyu; muchadzvara mbeu yenyu pasina, nokuti vavengi venyu vachazvidya." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndichakutongai kuti mukundwe pamberi pavavengi venyu, vanokuvengai vachava vabati venyu; muchatiza kunyange kusina munhu unokudzingai." 
Leviticus26:18 Zvino kunyange zvakadaro kana musingadi kunditeerera, ndichawedzera kukurovai kanomwe pamusoro pezvivi zvenyu." 
Leviticus26:19 Ndichaputsa kuzvikudza kwenyu pamusoro pesimba renyu, denga renyu ndichariita sesimbi, nenyika yenyu sendarira;" 
Leviticus26:20 simba renyu richaperera pasina, nokuti nyika yenyu haingabereki zvibereko zvayo, nemiti yenyika haingabereki zvibereko zvayo." 
Leviticus26:21 Kana muchindiramba, musingadi kunditeerera, ndichawedzera kanomwe matambudziko pamusoro pezvivi zvenyu." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndichatuma zvikara zvesango pakati penyu, zvichakupedzerai vana venyu, nokuparadza zvipfuwo zvenyu, nokukutapudzai; nzira dzenyu dzichashaiwa vanhu." 
Leviticus26:23 Zvino kana musingadi kudzorwa neni nezvinhu izvi, asi muchindiramba," 
Leviticus26:24 neniwo ndichakurambai; neniwo, ini ndimene, ndichakurovai kanomwe pamusoro pezvivi zvenyu." 
Leviticus26:25 Ndichauyisa munondo pamusoro penyu, uchatsiva sungano yangu; muchaunganidzwa mumaguta enyu, ini ndichatuma matenda pakati penyu; muchaiswa mumaoko avavengi venyu." 
Leviticus26:26 Kana ndichivhuna mudonzvo wenyu wechingwa, vakadzi vane gumi vachabika chingwa muchoto chimwe, vachikudzoserai chingwa chenyu chayerwa; muchadya, asi hamungaguti." 
Leviticus26:27 Zvino kana musingadi naizvozvo zvose kunditeerera, asi muchindiramba," 
Leviticus26:28 ipapo neniwo ndichakurambai nokutsamwa kukuru; ndichakurovai kanomwe pamusoro pezvivi zvenyu. 
Leviticus26:29 Muchadya nyama yavanakomana venyu, nenyama yavanasikana venyu muchaidya." 
Leviticus26:30 Ndichaparadza nzvimbo dzenyu dzakakwirira, nokuputsa mifananidzo yenyu yezuva, nokukanda zvitunha zvenyu pamusoro pezvitunha zvezvifananidzo zvenyu; mweya wangu uchakusemai." 
Leviticus26:31 Ndichaita maguta enyu matongo, nenzvimbo dzenyu tsene ndichadziparadza handinganhuwidzi munhuwi wezvinozipa zvenyu." 
Leviticus26:32 Ndichaparadza nyika yenyu; vavengi venyu vachagaramo, vachashamiswa nazvo." 
Leviticus26:33 Ndichakurashanyai pakati pavahedheni, nokuvhomora munondo shure kwenyu; nyika yenyu ichava renje, maguta enyu achava matongo." 
Leviticus26:34 Zvino nyika ichafarira maSabata ayo, panguva yokuparadzwa kwayo, imwi muri munyika yavavengi venyu; panguva iyo nyika ichazorora, ichifarira maSabata ayo." 
Leviticus26:35 Panguva yose yokuparadzwa kwayo ichazorora nokuzorora kwayakashaiwa pamaSabata enyu, panguva yamakagaramo." 
Leviticus26:36 Kana vari vamwe venyu vakasara, ndichatuma kutya pamoyo yavo vari munyika yavavengi vavo; kana vachinzwa shizha richipepereka, vachatiza; vachatiza somunhu unotiza munondo, vachawa kunyange kusina munhu unovadzinga." 
Leviticus26:37 Vachawirana savanhu vanowa pamberi pomunondo, kusina munhu anovadzinga; hamungavi nesimba rokumira pamberi pavavengi venyu." 
Leviticus26:38 Muchandofira pakati pavahedheni, nenyika yavavengi venyu ichakudyai." 
Leviticus26:39 Vamwe venyu vakasara vachawonda muzvivi zvavo panyika yavavengi vavo; vachawonda samadzibaba avo akawonda muzvivi zvavo. 
Leviticus26:40 Zvino vachazvireurura zvivi zvavo nezvivi zvamadzibaba avo, nokudarika kwavakadarika nako kwandiri, uye zvavakandiramba," 
Leviticus26:41 neniwo ndakavaramba, ndikavaisa kunyika yavavengi vavo; zvino kana moyo yavo isina kudzingiswa ikazvininipisa, vakatenda kurohwa pamusoro pezvivi zvavo;" 
Leviticus26:42 ipapo ndicharangarira sungano yangu naJakobho; nesungano yangu naIsaka, nesungano yangu naAbhurahamu, ndichairangarira; nyika ndichairangarirawo." 
Leviticus26:43 Nyika ichafanira kusiyiwa navo, kuti ifarire maSabata ayo ichaparadzwa ivo vasipo; vacharohwa pamusoro pezvivi zvavo, nokuti vakaramba zvandakanga ndatonga, mweya yavo ikasema mitemo yangu." 
Leviticus26:44 Kunyange zvakadaro, kana vari munyika yavavengi vavo, handingavarashi, handigavasemi, ndivaparadze chose, nokuputsa sungano yangu navo; nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo;" 
Leviticus26:45 asi nokuda kwavo ndicharangarira sungano yangu namadziteteguru avo, vandakabudisa munyika yeIjipiti pamberi pavahedheni, kuti ndive Mwari wavo; ndini Jehovha.""" 
Leviticus26:46 Ndiyo mitemo nezvakatongwa nemirairo yakaitwa naJehovha pakati pake navana vaIsiraeri pagomo reSinai nomuromo waMozisi. 
Leviticus27:1 Jehovha wakataura naMozisi akati," 
Leviticus27:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Kana munhu akazvisunga nokupika kukuru, vanhu ngavave vaJehovha sezvaunotara iwe." 
Leviticus27:3 Ipapo uchitara mutengo womurume una makore ana makumi maviri kusvikira pamakumi matanhatu, kutara kwako ngakuite mashekeri makumi mashanu esirivha, uchienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene.'" 
Leviticus27:4 Kana ari mukadzi, kutara kwako ngakuite mashekeri makumi matatu esirivha." 
Leviticus27:5 Kana ana makore anobva pamashanu kusvikira pamakore makumi maviri, kutara kwako komurume ngakuite mashekeri makumi maviri, nokomukadzi mashekeri ane gumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Kana anomwedzi mumwe kusvikira pamakore mashanu, kutara kwako komurume ngakuite mashekeri mashanu esirivha, nokutara kwako komukadzi ngakuite mashekeri matatu esirivha." 
Leviticus27:7 Kana ana makore makumi matanhatu naanopfuura, kana ari murume, kutara kwako ngakuite mashekeri ane gumi namashanu, kana ari mukadzi mashekeri ane gumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Kana ari murombo, asingasviki pakutara kwako, anofanira kuiswa pamberi pomuprista, kuti muprista amutarire; muprista anofanira kumutarira iye wakapika sezvaangagona kuripa." 
Leviticus27:9 Kana chiri chipfuwo chinopiwa Jehovha, chokutenda nacho, zvose zvacho zvinopa munhu Jehovha zvinofanira kuva zvitsvene." 
Leviticus27:10 Haafaniri kuzvishandura kana kutsinhanisa chakaipa nechakanaka, kana chakanaka nechakaipa; kana atsinhanisa chipfuwo nechipfuwo, icho nechakatsinhiwa, zvose zviri zviviri zvinofanira kuva zvitsvene." 
Leviticus27:11 Kana chiri chipfuwo chisina kunaka, chisingapiwi Jehovha chekutenda nacho, chipfuwo icho chinofanira kuiswa kumuprista;" 
Leviticus27:12 zvino muprista anofanira kuchitarira mutengo, kana chakanaka kana chakaipa; sezvawakachitarira iwe muprista, ndizvo zvachichaita." 
Leviticus27:13 Zvino kana achida kuchidzikunura, anofanira kuwedzera cheshanu chacho pakutara kwako." 
Leviticus27:14 Kana munhu achiita imba yake tsvene, kuti ive tsvene kuna Jehovha, muprista anofanira kuitarira, kana yakanaka kana yakaipa; sezvainotarirwa nomuprista, zvinofanira kuramba zvakadaro." 
Leviticus27:15 Kana iye wakaita imba yake tsvene achida kuidzikunura, anofanira kuwedzera cheshanu chemari yawakatara iwe, ipapo ichava yake." 
Leviticus27:16 Kana munhu akaitira Jehovha ndima yomunda wake tsvene, iwe unofanira kuitarira mutengo uchienzanisa nezvakadzvarwamo; homeri imwe yebhari yakadzvarwa iite mashekeri makumi mashanu esirivha." 
Leviticus27:17 Kana achiita munda wake mutsvene kubva pagore rejubheri, sezvawakautarira iwe, zvinofanira kuramba zvakadaro." 
Leviticus27:18 Asi kana achitsaura munda wake shure kwegore rejubheri, muprista anofanira kumutarira mari yakaenzana namakore akasara kusvikira pagore rejubheri; zvino mari iyo inofanira kutapudzwa pakutara kwako." 
Leviticus27:19 Kana munhu wakatsaura munda wake achida kuudzikunura, anofanira kuwedzera cheshanu chemari yawakamutarira, ugova wake." 
Leviticus27:20 Kana asingadi kudzikunura munda, kana zvimwe achinge atengesa munda kuno mumwe, haungazodzikunurwi;" 
Leviticus27:21 asi munda uyu, kana uchisunungurwa negore rejubheri, unofanira kuva mutsvene kuna Jehovha, somunda wakayeriswa; uchava womuprista." 
Leviticus27:22 Kana achitsaurira Jehovha munda waakatenga, usati uri munda wenhaka yake," 
Leviticus27:23 muprista anofanira kumutarira mutengo sezvawakatara iwe kusvikira pagore rejubheri; zvino iye anofanira kuripa mari sezvawakatara iwe, chive chinhu chitsvene kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus27:24 Pagore rejubheri munda unofanira kudzokera kumunhu waakanga atenga kwaari, kuna iye wakanga ari muridzi wenyika." 
Leviticus27:25 Kutara kwako kose kunofanira kuenzaniswa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene; shekeri rimwe rinoita magera maviri. 
Leviticus27:26 Asi mwana wemhongora pakati pezvipfuwo, uri waJehovha zvauri mwana wemhongora, ngakurege kuva nomunhu unoutsaura; kana iri nzombe, kana gwai, ndezvaJehovha." 
Leviticus27:27 Kana chiri chipfuwo chisina kunaka, unofanira kuchidzikunura sezvawakachitarira iwe, achiwedzerawo cheshanu chacho; kana chisingadzikunurwi, chinofanira kutengeswa sezvawakachitarira iwe." 
Leviticus27:28 Kunyange zvakadaro, hakune chinhu chakayeriswa, chakayerisirwa Jehovha nomunhu pazvose zvaanazvo, kana chiri chavanhu, kana zvipfuwo, kana munda wenhaka yake, chingatengeswa kana kudzikunurwa; chinhu chipi nechipi chakayeriswa, chinofanira kuva chitsvene kwazvo kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus27:29 Munhu upi noupi wakayeriswa, kana ari munhu wakayeriswa kuvanhu, haangadzikunurwi; anofanira kuurawa zvirokwazvo." 
Leviticus27:30 Zvegumi zvose zvenyika, kana zviri zvembeu dzenyika, kana michero yemiti, ndezvaJehovha; zvitsvene kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus27:31 Kana munhu achida kudzikunura chimwe pazvegumi zvake, anofanira kuwedzera kwachiri cheshanu chacho." 
Leviticus27:32 Zvegumi zvose zvemombe, kana zvezvipfuwo zviduku, zvose zvinopfuura napazasi petsvimbo, chegumi chinofanira kuva chitsvene kuna Jehovha." 
Leviticus27:33 Haafaniri kucherekedza kana chiri chakanaka kana chakaipa, kana kuchitsinhanisa nechimwe; kana achinge atsinhanisa nechimwe, zvose zviri zviviri, icho nechakatsinhiwa, zvichava zvitsvene; hazvingadzikunurwi.""" 
Leviticus27:34 Ndiyo mirairo yavana vaIsiraeri yakarairwa Mozisi naJehovha pagomo reSinai. 
Numbers1:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi murenje reSinai, patende rokusangana, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechipiri negore rechipiri rokubuda kwavo Ijipiti, akati," 
Numbers1:2 Verenga ungano yose yavana vaIsiraeri, mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avarume vose, mumwe nomumwe." 
Numbers1:3 Iwe naAroni muverenge mapoka avo, vana makore ana makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose pakati pavaIsiraeri vanogona kundorwa." 
Numbers1:4 Munofanira kuenda nomurume worudzi rumwe norumwe, mukuru weimba yamadzibaba ake." 
Numbers1:5 Ndiwo mazita avarume vanofanira kukubatsirai: WokwaRubheni, Erizuri, mwanakomana waShedheuri." 
Numbers1:6 WokwaSimiyoni, Sherumieri, mwanakomana waZurishadhai." 
Numbers1:7 WokwaJudha, Nashoni, mwanakomana waAminadhabhu." 
Numbers1:8 WokwaIsakari, Netaneri, mwanakomana waZuari." 
Numbers1:9 WokwaZebhuruni, Eriabhu, mwanakomana waHeroni." 
Numbers1:10 Vokuvana vaJosefa: WokwaEfuremu, Erishama, mwanakomana waAmihudhi; wokwaManase, Gamarieri, mwanakomana waPedhazuri." 
Numbers1:11 WokwaBhenjamini, Abhidhani, mwanakomana waGidheoni." 
Numbers1:12 WokwaDhani, Ahiezeri, mwanakomana waAmishadhai." 
Numbers1:13 WokwaAsheri, Pagieri, mwanakomana waOkirani." 
Numbers1:14 WokwaGadhi, Eriasafi, mwanakomana waDheueri." 
Numbers1:15 WokwaNafutari, Ahira, mwanakomana waEnani.""" 
Numbers1:16 Ndivo vakadamwa paungano, ari machinda amarudzi amadzibaba avo, vakuru vedzimba dzavaIsiraeri." 
Numbers1:17 Zvino Mozisi naAroni vakatora varume ava varehwa mazita avo," 
Numbers1:18 vakakoka vaIsiraeri vose nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechipiri, ivo vakavarondedzera marudzi avo, mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avose vakanga vana makore ana makumi maviri navanopfuura, mumwe nomumwe." 
Numbers1:19 Akavaverenga murenje reSinai, sezvakanga zvarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Numbers1:20 Vokuvana vaRubheni, mwanakomana wedangwe waIsiraeri navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, mumwe nomumwe, varume vose vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:21 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaRubheni vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nezvitanhatu namazana mashanu." 
Numbers1:22 Vokuvana vaSimiyoni, namarudzi avo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, vose vakaverengwa kwavari namazita avo, vose vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:23 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaSimiyoni, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezvipfumbamwe namazana matatu." 
Numbers1:24 Vokuvana vaGadhi, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vose vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:25 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaGadhi, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nezvishanu namazana matanhatu namakumi mashanu." 
Numbers1:26 Vokuvana vaJudha, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:27 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaJudha, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi manomwe nezvina namazana matanhatu." 
Numbers1:28 Vokuvana vaIsakari, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:29 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaIsakari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu namazana mana." 
Numbers1:30 Vokuvana vaZebhuruni, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:31 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaZebhuruni, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezvinomwe namazana mashanu." 
Numbers1:32 Vokuvana vaJosefa, ivo vana vaEfuremu, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:33 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaEfuremu, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana namazana mashanu." 
Numbers1:34 Vokuvana vaManase, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:35 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaManase, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matatu nezviviri namazana maviri." 
Numbers1:36 Vokuvana vaBhenjamini, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:37 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaBhenjamini, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matatu nezvishanu namazana mana." 
Numbers1:38 Vokuvana vaDhani, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:39 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaDhani, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu namazana manomwe." 
Numbers1:40 Vokuvana vaAsheri, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:41 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaAsheri, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nechiuru chimwe, namazana mashanu." 
Numbers1:42 Vokuvana vaNafutari, navana vavo, vakaverengwa mhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, namazita avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa," 
Numbers1:43 vakaverengwa kwavari, vorudzi rwaNafutari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezvitatu namazana mana." 
Numbers1:44 Ndivo vakaverengwa, vakaverengwa naMozisi naAroni, namachinda avaIsiraeri, vaiva varume vane gumi navaviri, mumwe nomumwe panzvimbo yeimba yababa vake." 
Numbers1:45 Naizvozvo vose vakaverengwa vavana vaIsiraeri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, vakanga vana makore makumi maviri navanopfuura, vose vaigona kundorwa pakati pavaIsiraeri," 
Numbers1:46 vose vakaverengwa vakasvika zviuru zvina mazana matanhatu nezvitatu namazana mashanu namakumi mashanu. 
Numbers1:47 Asi vaRevhi, norudzi rwamadzibaba avo, havana kuverengwa pakati pavo." 
Numbers1:48 Nokuti Jehovha akanga ataura naMozisi akati," 
Numbers1:49 Asi vorudzi rwaRevhi voga usavaverenga, usavaverengera pakati pavana vaIsiraeri," 
Numbers1:50 asi vaRevhi uvagadze, vave varitariri vetabhenakeri yechipupuriro, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nezvose zvayo; ndivo vanofanira kutakura tabhenakeri, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nekushumirapo, nokukomba tabhenakeri nemisasa yavo." 
Numbers1:51 Zvino kana tabhenakeri ichipfuura mberi, vaRevhi ndivo vanofanira kuibvisa; uye kana tabhenakeri ichidzikwazve, vaRevhi ndivo vanofanira kuivaka; munhu asina kufanira anoswederako, anofanira kuurawa." 
Numbers1:52 Vana vaIsiraeri vanofanira kudzika matende avo, mumwe nomumwe pamisasa yovokwake, mumwe nomumwe pamureza wovokwake, vachiita mapoka avo." 
Numbers1:53 Asi vaRevhi vanofanira kudzika matende avo vachikomba tabhenakeri yechipupuriro, kuti rudzi rwavana vaIsiraeri rurege kutsamwirwa; vaRevhi vanofanira kubata mabasa etabhenakeri yechipupuriro.""" 
Numbers1:54 Vana vaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo; Mozisi sezvaakarairwa naJehovha, ndizvo zvavakaita." 
Numbers2:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi naAroni, akati," 
Numbers2:2 Vana vaIsiraeri vanofanira kudzika matende avo, mumwe nomumwe pamureza wowokwake, nezviratidzo zvedzimba dzamadzibaba avo; vanofanira kudzika matende avo vakatarisana netende rokusangana vakarikomba." 
Numbers2:3 Vanodzika kurutivi rwamabvazuva, nokunobuda zuva nako, vanofanira kuva vomureza wemisasa yaJudha, namapoka avo; Nashoni mwanakomana waAminadhabhu ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaJudha." 
Numbers2:4 Boka rake navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi manomwe nezvina namazana matanhatu." 
Numbers2:5 Vanodzika kurutivi rwavo vanofanira kuva vorudzi rwaIsakari; Netaneri, mwanakomana waZuari ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaIsakari." 
Numbers2:6 Boka rake, navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezvina, namazana mana." 
Numbers2:7 Novorudzi rwaZebhuruni; Eriabhu, mwanakomana waHeroni, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaZebhuruni." 
Numbers2:8 Boka rake, navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezvinomwe, namazana mana." 
Numbers2:9 Vose vakaverengwa vemisasa yaJudha vakanga vane zviuru zvine zana nezviuru zvina makumi masere nezvitanhatu namazana mana, namapoka avo. Ndivo vanofanira kutanga kusimuka." 
Numbers2:10 Kurutivi rwezasi ndiko kunofanira kuva nomureza wemisasa yaRubheni, namapoka avo; Erizuri, mwanakomana waShedheuri, ndiye unofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaRubheni." 
Numbers2:11 Boka rake, navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nezvitanhatu namazana mashanu." 
Numbers2:12 Rudzi rwaSimiyoni ndivo vanofanira kudzika kurutivi rwake; Sherumieri, mwanakomana waZurishadhai, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaSimiyoni." 
Numbers2:13 Boka rake, navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezvipfumbamwe namazana matatu." 
Numbers2:14 worudzi rwaGadhi Eriasafi mwanakomana waReueri, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaGadhi." 
Numbers2:15 Boka rake, navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvinamakumi mana nezvishanu namazana matanhatu namakumi mashanu." 
Numbers2:16 Vose vakaverengwa pamisasa yaRubheni vakasvika zviuru zvine zana rimwe namakumi mashanu nechiuru chimwe namazana mana namakumi mashanu, namapoka avo. Ndivo vanofanira kusimuka rwechipiri." 
Numbers2:17 Zvino tende rokusangana rinofanira kusimuka pamwechete nemisasa yavaRevhi pakati pemisasa yose; nomutoo wavanodzika matende avo, vanofanira kusimuka saizvozvo, mumwe nomumwe panzvimbo yake, pamureza wake." 
Numbers2:18 Kurutivi rwamavirazuva kunofanira kuiswa mureza wemisasa yaEfuremu, namapoka avo; Erishama, mwanakomana waAmihudhi, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaEfuremu." 
Numbers2:19 Boka rake, navakaverengwa kwaari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana namazana mashanu." 
Numbers2:20 Rudzi rwaManase vanofanira kudzika kurutivi rwavo; Gamarieri, mwanakomana waPedhazuri, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaManase." 
Numbers2:21 Boka rake, navakaverengwa"" kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matatu nezviviri namazana maviri." 
Numbers2:22 Norudzi rwaBhenjamini: Abhidhani, mwanakomana waGidheoni, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaBhenjamini." 
Numbers2:23 Boka rake, navose vakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matatu nezvishanu namazana mana." 
Numbers2:24 Vose vakaverengwa pamisasa yaEfuremu vakasvika zviuru zvine zana nezvisere nezana rimwe, namapoka avo. Ndivo vanofanira kusimuka rwechitatu." 
Numbers2:25 Kurutivi rwokumusoro kunofanira kuiswa mureza wemisasa yaDhani, namapoka avo; Ahiezeri, mwanakomana waAmishadhai, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaDhani." 
Numbers2:26 Boka rake, navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu nezviviri namazana manomwe." 
Numbers2:27 Rudzi rwaAsheri ndivo vanofanira kudzika kurutivi rwavo; Pagieri, mwanakomana waOkirani, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaAsheri." 
Numbers2:28 Boka rake navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nechimwe namazana mashanu." 
Numbers2:29 Norudzi rwaNafutari; Ahira, mwanakomana waEnani, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wavana vaNafutari." 
Numbers2:30 Boka rake, navakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mashanu nezvitatu namazana mana." 
Numbers2:31 Vose vakaverengwa pamisasa yaDhani vakasvika zviuru zvine zana namakumi mashanu nezvinomwe namazana matanhatu. Ndivo vanofanira kusimuka pakupedzisira pamireza yavo. 
Numbers2:32 Ndivo vakaverengwa vavana vaIsiraeri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo; vose vakaverengwa pamisasa yavo, namapoka avo, vakasvika zviuru zvina mazana matanhatu nezvitatu namazana mashanu namakumi mashanu." 
Numbers2:33 Asi vaRevhi havana kuverengwa pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, sezvakarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Numbers2:34 Vana vaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo; Mozisi sezvaakarairwa zvose naJehovha, saizvozvo vakadzika matende avo pamireza yavo, mumwe nomumwe pamhuri dzavo, padzimba dzamadzibaba avo." 
Numbers3:1 Zvino ndiwo marudzi aAroni naMozisi nomusi wakataura Jehovha nawo naMozisi pagomo reSinai: 
Numbers3:2 Ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaAroni: Wedangwe, Nadhabhi, tevere Abhihu naEreazari naltamari." 
Numbers3:3 Ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaAroni, vaprista vakazodzwa, vaakagadza kuti vashumire pabasa rouprista." 
Numbers3:4 Asi Nadhabhi naAbhihu vakafa pamberi paJehovha nguva yavakauyisa moto usakafanira pamberi paJehovha murenje reSinai; vakanga vasina vana; asi Ereazari naItamari vakashumira pabasa rouprista pamberi paAroni, baba vavo." 
Numbers3:5 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Numbers3:6 Swededza rudzi rwaRevhi, uvaise pamberi paAroni muprista, kuti vamushumire." 
Numbers3:7 Vanofanira kumubatira iye, nokubatira ungano yose pamberi petende rokusangana, kuti vapedzise mabasa etabhenakeri." 
Numbers3:8 Vanofanira kuchengeta nhumbi dzose dzetende rokusangana, nokubatira vana vaIsiraeri, kuti vapedzise mabasa etabhenakeri." 
Numbers3:9 Vanofanira kupa Aroni navanakomana vake vaRevhi; vakapiwa chose pakati pavana vaIsiraeri. 
Numbers3:10 Asi Aroni navanakomana vake unofanira kuvagadza, kuti vabate basa rouprista hwavo; asina kufanira, usaswederapo, anofanira kuurawa.""" 
Numbers3:11 Jehovha akataura naMozisi," 
Numbers3:12 Tarira ini ndomene ndakatora vaRevhi pakati pavana vaIsiraeri panzvimbo yamatangwe ose anotanga kuzarura chizvaro pakati pavana vaIsiraeri; vaRevhi ndavangu; 
Numbers3:13 nokuti matangwe ose ndaangu; musi wandakauraya matangwe ose panyika yeIjipiti, ndakazvitsaurira matangwe ose pavaIsiraeri, pavanhu napazvipfuwo; anofanira kuva angu; ndini Jehovha.""" 
Numbers3:14 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi murenje reSinai akati," 
Numbers3:15 Verenga vana vaRevhi nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, nemhuri dzavo; unofanira kuverenga varume vose vomwedzi mumwe navanopfuura.""" 
Numbers3:16 Ipapo Mozisi akavaverenga neshoko raJehovha sezvaakarairwa. 
Numbers3:17 Ndivo vanakomana vaRevhi namazita avo: Geshoni, naKohati, naMerari." 
Numbers3:18 Ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaGeshoni, nemhuri dzavo: Ribhini naShimei." 
Numbers3:19 Navanakomana vaKohati nemhuri dzavo: Amuramu naIzhari naHebhuroni naUzieri. 
Numbers3:20 Navanakomana vaMerari nemhuri dzavo: Mari naMushi. Ndidzo mhuri dzavaRevhi, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo." 
Numbers3:21 Geshoni ndiye teteguru wavaRibhini navaShimei, ndidzo mhuri dzavaGeshoni." 
Numbers3:22 Vakaverengwa kwavari, vari varume vose vakaverengwa vomwedzi mumwe navanopfuura, vakasvika zviuru zvinomwe namazana mashanu." 
Numbers3:23 Mhuri dzavaGeshoni dzinofanira kudzika matende adzo shure kwetabhenakeri kumavirazuva. 
Numbers3:24 Eriasafi, mwanakomana waRaeri, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda weimba yamadzibaba avaGeshoni." 
Numbers3:25 Vanakomana vaGeshoni vanofanira kuchengeta zvinhu izvi mutende rokusangana, tabhenakeri, netende, nechifukidzo chayo, nechidzitiro chomukova wetende rokusangana." 
Numbers3:26 Nezvirembedzwa zvoruvazhe, nechidzitiro chomukova woruvazhe, ruri patabhenakeri nokunhivi dzose dzeatari, namabote ayo, zvokubata mabasa ayo ose." 
Numbers3:27 Kohati ndiye tateguru wavaAmuramu, navaIzhari, navaHebhuroni, navaUzieri; ndidzo mhuri. dzavaKohati." 
Numbers3:28 Varume vose vomwedzi mumwe navanopfuura vakaverengwa vakasvika zviuru zvisere namazana matanhatu; ndivo vaibata mabasa paimba tsvene. 
Numbers3:29 Mhuri dzavanakomana vaKohati dzinofanira kudzika matende adzo kurutivi rwetebhenakeri nechenyasi 
Numbers3:30 Erizafani mwanakomana waUzieri, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda weimba yamadzibaba emhuri dzavaKohati." 
Numbers3:31 Ivo vanofanira kuchengeta areka, netafura, nechigadziko chemwenje, nearitari, nenhumbi dzeimba tsvene, dzavanobata nadzo, nechidzitiro, namabasa ose ayo." 
Numbers3:32 Ereazari, mwanakomana waAroni muprista, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda wamachinda avaRevhi, iye anofanira kuva mutariri wavanobata mabasa paimba tsvene." 
Numbers3:33 Merari ndiye teteguru wavaMari navaMushi; ndidzo mhuri dzaMerari. 
Numbers3:34 Vakaverengwa kwavari, ivo varume vose vomwedzi mumwe navanopfuura, vakasvika zviuru zvitanhatu namazana maviri." 
Numbers3:35 Zurieri, mwanakomana waAbhihairi, ndiye anofanira kuva muchinda weimba yamadzibaba emhuri dzaMerari; ivo vanofanira kudzika matende avo kurutivi rwetabhenakeri nechokumusoro." 
Numbers3:36 Basa rakatarirwa vanakomana vaMerari nderokuchengeta matanda etabhenakeri, nembariro dzayo, nembiru dzayo, nezvigadziko zvadzo, nenhumbi dzayo dzose, namabasa ayo ose;" 
Numbers3:37 nembiru dzaparuvazhe kunhivi dzose, nezvigadziko zvadzo, nembambo dzadzo, namabote adzo." 
Numbers3:38 Avo vanodzika matende avo pamberi petabhenakeri kumabvazuva pamberi petende rokusangana, kurutivi runobuda zuva, ndivo Mozisi naAroni navanakomana vake, vanobata basa renzvimbo tsvene, ndiro basa ravana vaIsiraeri; asina kufanira anoswederapo anofanira kuurawa." 
Numbers3:39 Vose vakaverengwa vavaRevhi, vakaverengwa naMozisi naAroni sezvakarairwa naJehovha, nemhuri dzavo, varume vose vomwedzi mumwe navanopfuura, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi maviri nezviviri." 
Numbers3:40 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Verenga matangwe ose avarume avana vaIsiraeri vomwedzi mumwe navanopfuura, ugonyora kuwanda kwamazita avo." 
Numbers3:41 Zvino unofanira kunditorera vaRevhi (ndini Jehovha) panzvimbo yamatangwe ose avana vaIsiraeri, nemombe dzavaRevhi panzvimbo yavana vose vemhongora dzemombe dzavana vaIsiraeri.""" 
Numbers3:42 Mozisi akaverenga matangwe ose avana vaIsiraeri, sezvaakarairwa naJehovha." 
Numbers3:43 Namatangwe ose avarume namazita avanomwedzi mumwe navanopfuura vakaverengwa kwavari, vakasvika zviuru zvina makumi maviri nezviviri namazana maviri namakumi manomwe namatatu." 
Numbers3:44 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Numbers3:45 Tora vaRevhi panzvimbo yamatangwe ose avana vaIsiraeri, nemombe dzavaRevhi panzvimbo yemombe dzavo; nokuti vaRevhi ndavangu; ndini Jehovha." 
Numbers3:46 Zvino kuti udzikunure matangwe ana mazana maviri namakumi manomwe namatatu avana vaIsiraeri, vanopfuura vaRevhi pakuwanda kwavo," 
Numbers3:47 unofanira kutora mashekeri mashanu kuno mumwe nomumwe; unofanira kuatora uchienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene (shekeri rina magera makumi maviri). 
Numbers3:48 Zvino unofanira kupa Aroni navanakomana vake mari iyo yokudzikunura avo vakapfuura pakaverengwa pakati pavo. 
Numbers3:49 Mozisi akatora mari yokudzikunura kuna ivo vakanga vakapfuura vakadzikunurwa navaRevhi; 
Numbers3:50 akatora mari iyi kumatangwe avana vaIsiraeri, mashekeri ane chiuru chimwe namazana matatu namakumi matanhatu namashanu, achienzanisa neshekeri rapanzvimbo tsvene." 
Numbers3:51 Mozisi akapa Aroni navanakomana vake mari iyo yokudzikunura, seshoko raJehovha, sezvakarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Numbers4:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi naAroni akati," 
Numbers4:2 Verenga vanakomana vose vaKohati pakati pavana vaRevhi, nemhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:3 vana makore ana makumi matatu navanopfuura, kusvikira pamakore makumi mashanu, vose vanopinda pabasa, kuti vaite basa mutende rokusangana." 
Numbers4:4 Ndiro basa ravanakomana vaKohati mutende rokusangana pazvinhu zvitsvene-tsvene: 
Numbers4:5 Kana ungano ichisimuka, Aroni anofanira kupinda navanakomana vake, vagobvisa chidzitiro, ndokufukidza areka yechipupuriro nacho." 
Numbers4:6 Zvino vanofanira kuisa pamusoro pazvo chokufukidzira chamatebwe amatenhe, ndokuwarira pamusoro pazvo mucheka mutema wose, zvino ndokupinza matanda okutakura nawo." 
Numbers4:7 Vanofanira kuwarirawo mucheka mutema patafura yechingwa chokuratidza, ndokuisa pamusoro payo midziyo, nembiya, nemikombe, nezvimbiya zvokudira nazvo; nechingwa chamazuva ose chinofanira kuva pamusoro payo." 
Numbers4:8 Zvino vanofanira kuwarira pamusoro pazvo mucheka mutsvuku, ndokuufukidza nechokufukidzira chamatebwe amatenhe, zvino ndokupinza matanda okutakura nawo." 
Numbers4:9 Vanofanira kutorawo mucheka mutema, vagofukidza nawo chigadziko chemwenje yokuvhenekesa nayo, nemwenje yacho, nembato dzacho, nendiro dzacho, nemidziyo yacho yose yamafuta, yavanobata nayo." 
Numbers4:10 Zvino vanofanira kuchiputira pamwechete nenhumbi dzacho dzose muchokufukidzira chamatebwe amatenhe, ndokuchiisa pamatanda." 
Numbers4:11 Vanofanira kuwarirawo mucheka mutema pamusoro pearitari yendarama, ndokuifukidza nechokufukidzira chamatebwe amatenhe, zvino ndokupinza matanda ayo okutakura nawo." 
Numbers4:12 Vanofanira kutorawo nhumbi dzose dzokubata nadzo paimba tsvene, vagodziputira mumucheka mutema, ndokudzifukidza nechokufukidzira chamatebwe amatenhe, ndokuzviisa pamatanda." 
Numbers4:13 Vanofanira kubvisawo madota paaritari, ndokuwarira pamusoro payo mucheka mushava," 
Numbers4:14 ndokuisa pamusoro payo nhumbi dzayo dzose, dzavanobata nadzo pairi, dzinoti: Zvaenga zvomoto, nezvikokovonho zvenyama, nefoshoro, nemidziyo, nhumbi dzose dzearitari, vagowarira pamusoro payo chokufukidzira chamatebwe amatenhe, ndokupinza matanda okutakura nawo." 
Numbers4:15 Zvino kana Aroni navanakomana vake vapedza kufukidza imba tsvene, nenhumbi dzose dzeimba tsvene, kana ungano ichida kusimuka, zvino vanakomana vaKohati vanofanira kuuya kuitakura, asi ngavarege kubata zvinhu zvitsvene, kuti varege kufa. Zvinhu izvi ndizvo zvinofanira kutakurwa navanakomana vaKohati patende rokusangana." 
Numbers4:16 Basa raEreazari, mwanakomana waAroni muprista, nderamafuta okuvhenekesa nawo, nezvinonhuhwira zvakanaka, nechipiriso choupfu chamazuva ose, namafuta okuzodza nawo, nokuchengeta tabhenakeri yose nezvose zvirimo, neimba tsvene, nenhumbi dzayo.""" 
Numbers4:17 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi naAroni akati," 
Numbers4:18 Rudzi rwemhuri dzavaKohati ngarurege kuparadzwa pakati pavaRevhi; 
Numbers4:19 asi muvaitire izvi kuti vararame, varege kufa, kana vachiswedera kuzvinhu zvitsvene-tsvene; Aroni navanakomana vake vanofanira kupinda nokuvagadza, mumwe nomumwe, pabasa rake napamutoro wake." 
Numbers4:20 Asi ngavarege kupinda kundoona imba tsvene, kunyange iri nguva duku, kuti varege kufa.""" 
Numbers4:21 Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Numbers4:22 Verenga vanakomana vose vaGeshoni, dzimba dzamadzibaba avo, nemhuri dzavo." 
Numbers4:23 Uverenge vanamakore makumi matatu navanopfuura kusvikira makore makumi mashanu; vose vanopinda kundobata basa, kubata mutende rokusangana." 
Numbers4:24 Ndiro basa remhuri dzavaGeshoni pakubata napakutakura mitoro: 
Numbers4:25 Ivo vanofanira kutakura machira etabhenakeri, netende rokusangana; nechokufukidzira chayo, nechokufukidzira chamatebwe amatenhe, chiri pamusoro payo, nechidzitiro chomukova wetende rokusangana;" 
Numbers4:26 nezvirembedzwa zvoruvazhe, nechidzitiro chomukova wesuo roruvazhe, ruri patabhenakeri nokunhivi dzose dzearitari, namabote azvo, nenhumbi dzazvo dzose dzinobata mabasa azvo, nezvose zvinobatwa nazvo, ndiro basa ravo." 
Numbers4:27 Mabasa ose avanakomana vaGeshoni, zvose zvavanofanira kutakura nezvavanofanira kubata, zvinofanira kurairwa naAroni navanakomana vake; munofanira kuvagadza pabasa ravo rose rokutakura." 
Numbers4:28 Ndiro basa remhuri dzavana vaGeshoni patende rokusangana; pabasa ravo rose vanofanira kurairwa naItamari, mwanakomana waAroni muprista." 
Numbers4:29 Kana vari vanakomana vaMerari, unofanira kuvaverenga nemhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo." 
Numbers4:30 Uverenge vana makore makumi matatu navanopfuura kusvikira makore makumi mashanu, mumwe nomumwe, vose vanopinda pabasa, kubata basa retende rokusangana." 
Numbers4:31 Ndiro basa ravo rokutakura, sezvavanofanira kubata mutende rokusangana: Matanda etabhenakeri, nembariro dzayo, nembiru dzayo, nezvigadziko zvayo;" 
Numbers4:32 nembiru dzoruvazhe rwakapotedza, nezvigadziko zvadzo, nembambo dzadzo dzose, namabote adzo, nenhumbi dzadzo dzose, nezvose zvavanobata nazvo; unofanira kuvaritarira namazita avo nhumbi dzavanofanira kuchengeta pakutakura." 
Numbers4:33 Ndiro basa remhuri dzavanakomana vaMerari, sezvavaifanira kubata basa mutende rokusangana, vachirairwa naItamari, mwanakomana waAroni muprista.""" 
Numbers4:34 Zvino Mozisi naAroni namachinda eungano vakaverenga vanakomana vaKohati nemhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo;" 
Numbers4:35 vakanga vana makore makumi matatu navanopfuura kusvikira pamakore makumi mashanu, mumwe nomumwe vose vaifanira kupinda pabasa, kubata basa mutende rokusangana;" 
Numbers4:36 vakaverengwa kwavari nemhuri dzavo vakasvika zviuru zviviri namazana manomwe namakumi mashanu. 
Numbers4:37 Ndivo vakaverengwa vemhuri dzavaKohati, vose vakanga vachibata basa mutende rokusangana, vakaverengwa naMozisi naAroni, sezvakarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMozisi." 
Numbers4:38 Vakaverengwa vavanakomana vaGeshoni nemhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:39 vakanga vana makore makumi matatu navanopfuura kusvikira pamakore makumi mashanu, mumwe nomumwe aifanira kupinda pabasa, kubata basa mutende rokusangana," 
Numbers4:40 vakaverengwa kwavari nemhuri dzavo nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, vakasvika zviuru zviviri namazana matanhatu namakumi matatu." 
Numbers4:41 Ndivo vakaverengwa vemhuri dzavana vaGeshoni, vose vakanga vachibata basa mutende rokusangana, vakaverengwa naMozisi naAroni, sezvakarairwa naJehovha." 
Numbers4:42 Vakaverengwa vemhuri dzavanakomana vaMerari, nemhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:43 vakanga vana makore makumi matatu navanopfuura kusvikira pamakore makumi mashanu, mumwe nomumwe aifanira kupinda pabasa, kubata basa mutende rokusangana;" 
Numbers4:44 vakaverengwa kwavari nemhuri dzavo, vakasvika zviuru zvitatu namazana maviri." 
Numbers4:45 Ndivo vakaverengwa vemhuri dzavanakomana vaMerari, vakaverengwa naMozisi naAroni, sezvakarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMozisi." 
Numbers4:46 Zvino vose vakaverengwa vavaRevhi, vakaverengwa naMozisi naAroni namachinda avaIsiraeri, nemhuri dzavo, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:47 vakanga vana makore makumi matatu navanopfuura, kusvikira pamakore makumi mashanu, mumwe nomumwe aifanira kupinda kuzobata basa, nebasa rokutakura mitoro mutende rokusangana," 
Numbers4:48 vakaverengwa kwavari vakasvika zviuru zvisere namazana mashanu namakumi masere. 
Numbers4:49 Vakaverengwa sezvakarairwa naJehovha nomuromo waMozisi, mumwe nomumwe pabasa rake, napamutoro wake; vakaverengwa saizvozvo naye, sezvakarairwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Numbers5:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi, akati," 
Numbers5:2 Raira vaIsiraeri kuti vabudise pakati pemisasa vose vana maperembudzi, navose vane hosha yokuyerera, navose vakasvibiswa navakafa." 
Numbers5:3 Munofanira kubudisa vose, varume navakadzi; muvabudise kunze kwemisasa, kuti varege kusvibisa misasa yavo, yandigere pakati payo.""" 
Numbers5:4 Vana vaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo; vakavabudisa kunze kwemisasa, sezvakataura Jehovha naMozisi, ndizvo zvakaita vana vaIsiraeri. Zvakabiwa zvinofanira kudzoswa" 
Numbers5:5 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Numbers5:6 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti, `Kana murume kana mukadzi achinge atadza nokutadza kwavanhu, akatadzira Jehovha, munhu uyu akava nemhosva;" 
Numbers5:7 Ipapo anofanira kureurura zvivi zvake zvaakaita, ndokuripira mhosva yake yose, achiwedzera cheshanu chayo, ndokupa iye waakatadzira." 
Numbers5:8 Kana munhu uyo asina hama, ingaripirwa pamusoro pemhosva iyo, muripo wemhosva, unoripirwa Jehovha, unofanira kuva womuprista, kunze kwegondobwe rokuyananisira, raanofanira kuyananisirwa naro.'" 
Numbers5:9 Nezvipiriso zvinotsaurwa pazvinhu zvitsvene zvose zvavana valsiraeri, zvavanouya nazvo kumuprista, zvinofanira kuva zvake." 
Numbers5:10 Zvinhu zvakatsaurwa zvomunhu mumwe nomumwe zvinofanira kuva zvake; chinhu chipi nechipi chinopiwa muprista nomunhu chinofanira kuva chake. 
Numbers5:11 Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Numbers5:12 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Kana mukadzi womurume upi noupi akachinya, akamutadzira," 
Numbers5:13 mumwe murume akavata naye, zvikavanzwa kumurume wake, zvikasazikamwa, iye akasvibiswa, asi vakashaiwa chapupu, naiye asina kubatwa achiita izvozvo;'" 
Numbers5:14 murume wake akabatwa nomweya weshungu, akava neshungu nomukadzi wake, wakasvibiswa kana zvimwe akabatwa nomweya weshungu, akava neshungu nomukadzi wake, usina kusvibiswa;" 
Numbers5:15 ipapo murume anofanira kuuya nomukadzi wake kumuprista, achiuyawo nechipo chake pamusoro pake, chinoti,chegumi choupfu bwebhari; haafaniri kudira mafuta pamusoro pahwo, kana kuisa zvinonhuhwira pamusoro pahwo; nokuti icho chipiriso choupfu cheshungu, chipiriso choupfu chokurangaridza, chinorangaridza zvakaipa." 
Numbers5:16 Zvino muprista anofanira kumuswededza, ndokumuisa pamberi paJehovha" 
Numbers5:17 Ipapo muprista anofanira kutora mvura tsvene mumudziyo wevhu, muprista agotorawo guruva riri pasi mutabhenakeri, ndokuriisa mumvura." 
Numbers5:18 Zvino muprista anofanira kuisa mukadzi pamberi paJehovha, ndokusunungura vhudzi romusoro womukadzi, ndokuisa chipiriso chokurangaridza mumaoko ake, icho chipiriso choupfu cheshungu; muprista ndokubata muruoko rwake mvura inovavisa, inouyisa kutuka." 
Numbers5:19 Ipapo muprista anofanira kumupikisa, achiti kumukadzi, `Kana kusina murume akavata newe, kana usina kutsaukira kune zvakaipa, uri pasi pomurume wako, usunungurwe hako pamvura iyi inovavisa, inouyisa kutuka;" 
Numbers5:20 asi kana wakatsauka, uri pasi pomurume wako, ukasvibiswa, mumwe murume asati ari murume wako achinge akavata newe,'" 
Numbers5:21 zvino muprista anofanira kupikisa mukadzi mhiko inouyisa kutuka, muprista ndokuti kumukadzi, `Jehovha ngaakuite chipiko chemhiko pakati porudzi rwako, kana Jehovha achiwondisa hudyu yako nokuzvimbisa dumbu rako;" 
Numbers5:22 mvura iyi inouyisa kutuka ichapinda muura hwako, ndokuzvimbisa dumbu rako, nokuwondisa hudyu yako;' zvino mukadzi anofanira kuti, `Ameni, ameni.'" 
Numbers5:23 Ipapo muprista anofanira kunyora kutuka uku parugwaro, ndokukusuka nemvura inovavisa." 
Numbers5:24 Zvino anofanira kumwisa mukadzi mvura inovavisa, inouyisa kutuka inofanira kupinda mukati make, imuvavise." 
Numbers5:25 Zvino muprista anofanira kutora chipiriso choupfu cheshungu paruoko rwomukadzi, ndokuzunguzira chipiriso choupfu pamberi paJehovha, ndokuuya nacho kuaritari;" 
Numbers5:26 muprista ndokutora tsama imwe yechipiriso choupfu, kuti chive chokurangaridza chacho, ndokuhupisa paaritari, ndokumwisa mukadzi mvura iyo pashure." 
Numbers5:27 Zvino kana amumwisa mvura iyo, kana achinge asvibiswa, atadzira murume wake, mvura iyo inouyisa kutuka ichapinda maari, ikamuvavisa, dumbu rake richazvimba, nehudyu yake ichawonda; mukadzi uyu achava chituko pakati porudzi rwake." 
Numbers5:28 Asi kana mukadzi uyo asina kusvibiswa, akanaka hake, achasunungurwa hake, akava nemimbazve." 
Numbers5:29 Ndiwo murayiro weshungu, kana mukadzi ari pasi pomurume wake, akachinya, akasvibiswa;" 
Numbers5:30 kana zvimwe murume achinge abatwa nomweya weshungu, ane shungu nomukadzi wake; ipapo anofanira kuisa mukadzi pamberi paJehovha, muprista agomuitira nomurayiro uyu wose." 
Numbers5:31 Murume haangavi nemhosva, asi mukadzi anofanira kuva nemhosva yake.""" 
Numbers6:1 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Numbers6:2 Taura navana vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Kana murume, kunyange, mukadzi, akazvisunga nokupika kukuru, kupika komuNaziri, kuti azvitsaurire Jehovha;" 
Numbers6:3 anofanira kuramba waini nezvinobata, haafaniri kumwa vhiniga yewaini, kana vhiniga yezvinobata, uye haafaniri kumwa muto wemizambiringa,kana kudya mazambiringa matsva kana akaomeswa.'" 
Numbers6:4 Mazuva ose okuzvitsaura kwake haafaniri kudya chinhu chinobva pamuti womuzambiringa kubva pasvurwe kusvika pamateko. 
Numbers6:5 Mazuva ose okupika kwake kuzvitsaura haafaniri kuveurwa musoro wake nechiso; anofanira kuva mutsvene, nevhudzi romusoro wake anofanira kurirega rirebe, kusvikira mazuva apera aakazvitsaurira Jehovha nawo." 
Numbers6:6 Ngaarege kuswedera kuchitunha mazuva ose aanozvitsaurira Jehovha nawo. 
Numbers6:7 Haafaniri kuzvisvibisa nokuda kwababa vake, kana nokuda kwamai vake, kana nokuda komunun'una wake, kana nokuda kwehanzvadzi yake, kana vafa; nokuti akazvitsaurira Mwari." 
Numbers6:8 Mutsvene kuna Jehovha mazuva ose okuzvinatsa kwake. 
Numbers6:9 Kana munhu akafa kamwe-kamwe pedo naye, akasvibisa musoro wake wakatsaurwa; ipapo anofanira kuveura musoro wake nomusi wokunatswa kwake, nomusi wechinomwe anofanira kuuveura." 
Numbers6:10 Musi worusere anofanira kuuya kumuprista nenjiva mbiri kana twana twuviri twenjiva pamukova wetende rokusangana; 
Numbers6:11 muprista agobayira imwe chive chipiriso chezvivi, neimwe chive chipiriso chinopiswa, amuyananisire zvaakatadza nokuda kowakafa, anatse musoro wake nomusi uyo." 
Numbers6:12 Anofanira kutsaurira Jehovha mazuva okuzvitsaura kwake, ndokuuya negwayana regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chemhosva; asi mazuva okutanga haangaverengwi, nokuti kuzvitsaura kwake kwakanga kwasvibiswa." 
Numbers6:13 Ndiwo murayiro womuNaziri, kana mazuva okuzvitsaura kwake achinge apera. Anofanira kuiswa kumukova wetende rokusangana;" 
Numbers6:14 kuti ape Jehovha chipo chake, chinoti gwayana rimwe, regondobwe regore rimwe, risina kuremara, chive chipiriso chinopiswa, negwayana rimwe resheche regore rimwe, risina kuremara, chive chipiriso chezvivi, negondobwe rimwe risina kuremara, chive chipiriso chokuyananisa," 
Numbers6:15 nedengu rezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa, nezvingwa zviduku zvoupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nezvingwa zvitete zvisina kuviriswa, zvakazodzwa namafuta, nechipiriso chazvo choupfu, nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa." 
Numbers6:16 muprista anofanira kuuya nazvo pamberi paJehovha, ndokugadzira chipiriso chake chezvivi nechipiriso chake chinopiswa;" 
Numbers6:17 ndokuuya negondobwe chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa kuna Jehovha, pamwechete nedengu rezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa; muprista anofanira kuuyawo nechipiriso chacho choupfu, nechipiriso chacho chinodururwa." 
Numbers6:18 Zvino muNaziri anofanira kuveura musoro wake wakatsaurwa pamukova wetende rokusangana, ndokutora vhudzi romusoro wake wakatsaurwa, ndokuriisa pamoto uri pasi pechibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa." 
Numbers6:19 Zvino muprista anofanira kutora bandauko regondobwe rakabikwa, nechingwa chimwe chiduku chisina kuviriswa padengu, nechimwe chingwa chitete chisina kuviriswa, ndokuzviisa pamaoko omuNaziri, kana iye apedza kuveura musoro wake wakatsaurwa." 
Numbers6:20 Zvino muprista anofanira kuzvizunguzira pamberi paJehovha, chive chipiriso chinozunguzirwa; chinhu chitsvene chomuprista, pamwechete nechityu chinozunguzirwa, nebandauko rinosimudzwa; zvino muNaziri angamwe" 
Numbers6:21 ndiwo murayiro womuNaziri pakupika kwake, nechipo chake chokuzvitsaurira Jehovha, zvimwe zvaangagona kuuya nazvo zvisingaverengwi; sezvaakapika, ndizvo zvaanofanira kuita nomurayiro wokuzvitsaura nawo.""" 
Numbers6:22 Jehovha akataura naMozisi, akati," 
Numbers6:23 Taura naAroni navanakomana vake, uti, `Munofanira kuropafadza vana vaIsiraeri nomutoo uyu:' Muti kwavari," 
Numbers6:24 ‘Jehovha akuropafadze, akuchengete;" 
Numbers6:25 Jehovha akuvhenekere nechiso chake, akunzwire nyasha;" 
Numbers6:26 Jehovha akusimudzire chiso chake, akupe rugare.'" 
Numbers6:27 Nokudaro vachaisa zita rangu pavana vaIsiraeri; neni ndichavaropafadza. 
Numbers7:1 Zvino nomusi Mozisi waakapedza / kumisa tabhenakeri nawo, nokuizodza, nokuitsaura nenhumbi dzayo dzose, nearitari, nemidziyo yayo yose, akati azvizodza nokuzvitsaura," 
Numbers7:2 machinda avaIsiraeri, vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, vakauya nezvipo zvavo; ndivo vaiva machinda amarudzi, ndivo vakanga vari vatariri vavanhu vakaverengwa;" 
Numbers7:3 vakauya nezvipo zvavo pamberi paJehovha, zvinoti: Ngoro nhanhatu dzaiva namatende, nenzombe dzine gumi nembiri, machinda maviri ane ngoro imwe, mumwe nomumwe ane nzombe imwe; vakauya nazvo pamberi petabhenakeri." 
Numbers7:4 Zvino Jehovha akataura naMozisi akati," 
Numbers7:5 Gamuchira izvozvo kwavari, kuti mabasa etende rokusangana aitwe nazvo; unofanira kuzvipa vaRevhi, mumwe nomumwe zvinoringana mabasa ake.""" 
Numbers7:6 Ipapo Mozisi akagamuchira ngoro idzo nenzombe, akazvipa vaRevhi." 
Numbers7:7 Akapa vanakomana vaGeshoni ngoro mbiri nenzombe ina, zvakaringana mabasa avo." 
Numbers7:8 Akapawo vanakomana vaMerari ngoro ina nenzombe sere, zvakaringana mabasa avo, vachirairwa naItamari, mwanakomana waAroni muprista." 
Numbers7:9 Asi haana kupa vanakomana vaKohati chinhu nokuti ndivo vakanga vane basa reimba tsvene; vaifanira kuzvitakura pamafudzi avo. 
Numbers7:10 Machinda akauya nezvipo zvokutsaurira aritari nomusi wayakazodzwa nawo, machinda akauya nezvipo zvawo pamberi pearitari." 
Numbers7:11 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, ""Ngavauye nezvipo zvavo zvokutsaurira aritari, muchinda mumwe nomumwe nomusi wake.""" 
Numbers7:12 Zvino akauya nechipo chake nezuva rokutanga akanga ari Nashoni, mwanakomana waAminadhabhu, worudzi rwaJudha." 
Numbers7:13 Chipo chake yakanga iri ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:14 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:15 nenzombe imwe negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa," 
Numbers7:16 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:17 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaNashoni, mwanakomana waAminadhabhu." 
Numbers7:18 Nezuva repiri Netaneri, mwanakomana waZuari, muchinda waIsakari, akauyisa chipo chake." 
Numbers7:19 Akauya nechipo chake, chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:20 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:21 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:22 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:23 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaNetaneri, mwanakomana waZuari." 
Numbers7:24 Nezuva retatu Eriabhu, mwanakomana waHeroni, muchinda wavana vaZebhuruni, akauya." 
Numbers7:25 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu,nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:26 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:27 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:28 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:29 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaEriabhu, mwanakomana waHeroni." 
Numbers7:30 Nezuva rechina Erizuri, mwanakomana waShedheuri, muchinda wavana vaRubheni, akauya." 
Numbers7:31 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:32 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:33 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:34 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:35 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaErizuri, mwanakomana waShedheuri." 
Numbers7:36 Nezuva reshanu Sherumieri, mwanakomana waZurishadhai, muchinda wavana vaSimiyoni, akauya." 
Numbers7:37 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:38 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:39 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:40 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:41 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaSherumieri, mwanakomana waZurishadhai." 
Numbers7:42 Nezuva retanhatu Eriasafi, mwanakomana waDheueri, muchinda wavana vaGadhi, akauya." 
Numbers7:43 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu, """ 
Numbers7:44 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:45 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:46 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:47 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaEriasafi, mwanakomana waDheueri." 
Numbers7:48 Nezuva rechinomwe Erishama, mwanakomana waAmihudhi, muchinda wavana vaEfuremu, akauya." 
Numbers7:49 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:50 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:51 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:52 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:53 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaErishama, mwanakomana waAmihudhi." 
Numbers7:54 Nezuva rorusere Gamarieri, mwanakomana waPedhazuri, muchinda wa vana vaManase, akauya." 
Numbers7:55 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:56 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:57 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:58 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:59 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaGamarieri, mwanakomana waPedhazuri." 
Numbers7:60 Nezuva repfumbamwe Abhidhani, mwanakomana waGidheoni, muchinda wavana vaBhenjamini, akauya." 
Numbers7:61 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:62 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:63 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:64 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:65 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaAbhidhani, mwanakomana waGidheoni." 
Numbers7:66 Nezuva regumi Ahiezeri, mwanakomana waAmishadhai, muchinda wavana vaDhani, akauya." 
Numbers7:67 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:68 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:69 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:70 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:71 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaAhiezeri, mwanakomana waAmishadhai." 
Numbers7:72 Nezuva regumi nerimwe Pagieri, mwanakomana waOkirani, muchinda wavana vaAsheri, akauya." 
Numbers7:73 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:74 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:75 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa;" 
Numbers7:76 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:77 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaPagieri, mwanakomana waOkirani." 
Numbers7:78 Nezuva regumi namaviri Ahira, mwanakomana waEnani, muchinda wavana vaNafutari, akauya." 
Numbers7:79 Chipo chake chaiti: Ndiro imwe huru yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwakanga kuri mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe wesirivha wamashekeri ana makumi manomwe, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene; zvose zviri zviviri zvakanga zvizere noupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakakanyiwa namafuta, chive chipiriso choupfu;" 
Numbers7:80 nendiro imwe yendarama yamashekeri ane gumi, izere nezvinonhuhwira," 
Numbers7:81 nenzombe imwe, negondobwe rimwe, negwayana rimwe regondobwe regore rimwe, chive chipiriso chinopiswa," 
Numbers7:82 nenhongo imwe yembudzi, chive chipiriso chezvivi;" 
Numbers7:83 nenzombe mbiri, namakondobwe mashanu, nenhongo shanu dzembudzi, namakwayana mashanu amakondobwe egore rimwe, chive chibayiro chezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; ndicho chaiva chipo chaAhira, mwanakomana waEnani." 
Numbers7:84 Ndicho chipo chokutsaurwa kwearitari nomusi wayakazodzwa nawo namachinda aIsiraeri. Ndiro huru dzesirivha dzine gumi nembiri, nemidziyo yesirivha ine gumi nembiri, nendiro dzendarama dzine gumi nembiri;" 
Numbers7:85 ndiro imwe huru yesirivha yakasvika mashekeri ane zana namakumi matatu, nomudziyo mumwe nomumwe mashekeri ana makumi manomwe; sirivha yose yemidziyo yose yakasvika mashekeri ane zviuru zviviri namazana mana, zvichienzaniswa neshekeri reimba tsvene;"
