2Samuel20:5 Naizvozvo Amasa akaenda akakokera varume vaJudha, asi wakanonoka akadarika nguva yaakanga atarirwa naye." 
2Samuel20:6 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhishai, ""Zvino Shebha mwanakomana waBhikiri uchatitadzira kupfuura Abhusaromu. Tora varanda vashe wako, umuteverere, arege kuzviwanira maguta akakombwa namasvingo, akatipukunyukira.""" 
2Samuel20:7 Ipapo varume vaJoabhu, navaKereti navaPereti, navarume vose vemhare vakamutevera. Vakabuda Jerusaremu kuzoteverera Shebha mwanakomana waBhikiri." 
2Samuel20:8 Vakati vachisvika pabwe guru raiva paGibhiyoni, Amasa akasangana navo. Zvino Joabhu wakanga akazvisunga nguvo yake yokurwa nayo yaakanga afuka; iyo yakanga yakasungwa nebhanhire rakanga rino munondo wakasungirwa pachiuono chake, uri mumuhara mawo; zvino wakati achifamba, ukawira pasi." 
2Samuel20:9 Joabhu akati kuna Amasa, ""Wakadiniko, munun'una wangu?"" Joabhu akabata ndebvu dzaAmasa noruoko rwake rworudyi, kuti amutsvode." 
2Samuel20:10 Asi Amasa haana kuchenjera munondo wakanga uri muruoko rwaJoabhu; naizvozvo akamubaya nawo nomudumbu, akatumburira ura hwake pasi, akasamubaya rwechipiri, akafirapo. Joabhu nomunun'una wake Abhishai vakateverera Shebha mwanakomana waBhikiri." 
2Samuel20:11 Zvino rimwe jaya raJoabhu rakanga rimirepo naye, rikati, ""Ani nani unoda Joabhu, nouri kurutivi rwaDhavhidhi, ngaatevere Joabhu.""" 
2Samuel20:12 Asi Amasa wakanga achiumburuka muropa rake pakati penzira. Zvino murume uyu wakati achiona kuti vanhu vose vakaramba vamire, akabvisa Amasa panzira, akamutakurira kusango, akamufukidza nenguvo, nokuti wakaona kuti vanhu vose, vakasvika kwaari, vakaramba vamire." 
2Samuel20:13 Iye wakati abviswa panzira, vanhu vose vakatevera Joabhu, kuzoteverera Shebha mwanakomana waBhikiri." 
2Samuel20:14 Akafamba namarudzi ose aIsiraeri kusvikira paAbheri, neBhetimaaka, navaBheri vose; vanhu vose vakaungana, vakamuteverawo." 
2Samuel20:15 Vakandomukomba paAbheri reBhetimaaka, vakatutira gomo revhu paguta, rikaenzana norusvingo; vanhu vose vaiva naJoabhu vakarwa norusvingo kuti varuputse." 
2Samuel20:16 lpapo mumwe mukadzi, wakanga akachenjera, akadanidzira ari muguta, akati, ""Inzwai, inzwai, doudzai Joabhu, muti, `Swedera pano, nditaure newe.' """ 
2Samuel20:17 Iye akaswedera kwaari. Mukadzi akati, ""Ndiwe Joabhu here?"" Iye akapindura akati, ""Ndini."" Ipapo akati kwaari, ""Inzwai mashoko omurandakadzi wenyu."" Iye akapindura akati, ""Ndinonzwa.""" 
2Samuel20:18 Zvino akataura akati, ""Kare vanhu vaiti, `Zvirokwazvo, vachabvunza mano paAbheri, mhosva ndokupererapo.'" 
2Samuel20:19 Ini ndiri mumwe wavanotsvaka rugare nowavakarurama pakati paIsiraeri, asi imwi munotsvaka kuparadza guta, rakaita samai pakati palsiraeri; munotsvakireiko kumedza nhaka yaJehovha?""" 
2Samuel20:20 Joabhu akapindura akati, ""Haisva, haisva, handingatongomedzi kana kuparadza;" 
2Samuel20:21 hazvizi izvo; asi munhu wenyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, unonzi Shebha mwanakomana waBhikiri, ndiye wakasimudzira mambo Dhavhidhi ruoko rwake kuti arwe naye; mumuisei pano iye oga, ipapo ini ndichabva paguta."" Mukadzi akati kuna Joabhu, ""Tarirai, musoro wake uchakandirwa kwamuri napamusoro porusvingo.""" 
2Samuel20:22 Ipapo mukadzi akaenda kuvanhu vose nokuchenjera kwake. Ivo vakagura musoro waShebha mwanakomana waBhikiri, vakaukandira kuna Joabhu. Iye akaridza hwamanda, vanhu vakapararira vakabva paguta, mumwe nomumwe akaenda kutende rake. Joabhu akadzokera Jerusaremu kuna mambo." 
2Samuel20:23 Zvino Joabhu ndiye wairaira hondo yose yaIsiraeri, naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha ndiye wairaira vaKereti navaPereti," 
2Samuel20:24 Adhoramu ndiye wairaira chibharo, naJehoshafati mwanakomana waAhirudhi waiva sahwira;" 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva waiva munyori; naZadhoki naAbhiatari vaiva vaprista; 
2Samuel20:26 Ira muJairi waiva mupristawo waDhavhidhi. 
2Samuel21:1 Zvino pamazuva aDhavhidhi kwakanga kune nzara makore matatu akatevedzana; Dhavhidhi akabvunza Jehovha. Jehovha akati, ""Imhaka yaSauro neyeimba yake yeropa, nokuti vakauraya vaGibhiyoni.""" 
2Samuel21:2 Mambo akadana vaGibhiyoni, akati kwavari; ""Zvino vaGibhiyoni vakanga vasi vavana vaIsiraeri, asi ndivo vakanga vasara kuvaAmori, ndivo vakanga vapikirwa navaIsiraeri; asi Sauro wakatsvaka kuvauraya nokushingairira kwake vana vaIsiraeri navaJudha;""" 
2Samuel21:3 Dhavhidhi akati kuva Gibhiyoni, ""Ndingakuitirai chinyi? Ndingayananisa neiko, kuti muropafadze nhaka yaJehovha?""" 
2Samuel21:4 VaGibhiyoni vakati kwaari, ""Haizi mhosva yesirivha kana yendarama pakati pedu naSauro neimba yake, nesu hatingafaniri kuuraya munhu pakati paIsiraeri."" Iye akati, ""Chamunoreva ndichakuitirai icho.""" 
2Samuel21:5 Ivo vakati kuna mambo, ""Iye munhu, wakatipedza, wakatifungira mano akaipa kuti tiparadzwe, tirege kugara panyika yose yalsiraeri," 
2Samuel21:6 varume vanomwe vavana vake ngavapiwesu, tivasungirire pamberi paJehovha paGibhiya raSauro, mutsaurwa waJehovha."" Mambo akati, ""Ndichakupai ivo.""" 
2Samuel21:7 Asi mambo wakarega Mefibhosheti mwanakomana waJonatani, mwanakomana waSauro, nokuda kokupika kwakanga kuri pakati pavo pamberi paJehovha, pakati paDhavhidhi naJonatani mwanakomana waSauro." 
2Samuel21:8 Asi mambo wakatora vana vaviri vaRizipa, mukunda waAya, vaakanga aberekera Sauro, Amoni naMefibhosheti, navana vashanu vaMikari mukunda waSauro, vaakanga aberekera Adhirieri mwanakomana waBharizirai muMehorati;" 
2Samuel21:9 akavaisa mumaoko avaGibhiyoni, ivo vakavasungirira pagomo pamberi paJehovha, vakafa vari vanomwe; vakaurawa pamazuva okukohwa, pamazuva okutanga, pakutanga kokukohwa bhari." 
2Samuel21:10 Zvino Rizipa mukunda waAya wakatora makudza, akazviwarira iwo pamusoro pedombo, kubva pakutanga kokukohwa kusvikira aniwa nemvura yakabva kudenga; haana kutendera shiri dzokudenga kumhara pamusoro pawo masikati, kana zvikara zvesango usiku." 
2Samuel21:11 Zvino Dhavhidhi akaudzwa zvakanga zvaitwa naRizipa mukunda waAya, murongo waSauro;" 
2Samuel21:12 Dhavhidhi akandotora mapfupa aSauro namapfupa aJonatani mwanakomana wake kuvarume veJabheshiGiriyadhi, vakanga vaaba panzira yeBhetishani, pavakanga vaturikwa navaFirisitia, pazuva rokuurawa kwaSauro navaFirisitia paGiribhoa." 
2Samuel21:13 Akatorapo mapfupa aSauro namapfupa aJonatani mwanakomana wake, vakaunganidza mapfupa avakanga vaturikwapo." 
2Samuel21:14 Vakaviga mapfupa aSauro naaJonatani mwanakomana wake panyika yavaBhenjamini paZera, pahwiro hwababa vake; vakaita zvose zvavakanga varairwa namambo. Shure kwaizvozvo Mwari akanzwira nyika tsitsi." 
2Samuel21:15 Zvino vaFirisitia vakarwazve navaIsiraeri; Dhavhidhi akaburuka navaranda vake kundorwa navaFirisitia; Dhavhidhi akaneta. 
2Samuel21:16 Zvino Ishibhibhenobhi, mumwe wavanakomana vaRafa, waiva nepfumo rakasvika pamashekeri ana mazana matatu endarira pakurema kwaro, iye wakanga akashonga munondo mutsva, akafunga kuuraya Dhavhidhi." 
2Samuel21:17 Asi Abhishai mwanakomana waZeruya wakamubatsira, akabaya muFirisitia, akamuuraya. Ipapo varume vaDhavhidhi vakapika kwaari, vakati, ""Hamufaniri kuzoendazve nesu kundorwa, kuti murege kuzodzima mwenje waIsiraeri.""" 
2Samuel21:18 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo kurwa kwazovapozve navaFirisitia paGobhi; Sibekai, muHushati, akauraya Safi, mumwe wavanakomana vaRafa." 
2Samuel21:19 Vakarwazve navaFirisitia paGobhi, Erihanani mwanakomana waJaarioregimi weBheterehemu akauraya Goriati muGiti, rwiriko rwepfumo rake rwakaga rwakaita sedanda romuruki." 
2Samuel21:20 Vakarwazve paGati, paiva nomunhu murefu kwazvo, waiva nemimwe mitanhatu paruoko rumwe norumwe, nezvigumwe zvitanhatu parutsoka rumwe norumwe, zvaisvika makumi maviri nezvina pakuverengwa kwazvo; naiyewo wakanga akaberekerwa Rafa." 
2Samuel21:21 Zvino wakati achishora vaIsiraeri, Jonatani mwanakomana waShimei, munun'una waDhavhidhi akamuuraya." 
2Samuel21:22 Ava vana vakanga vakaberekerwa Rafa paGati; vakaurawa naDhavhidhi, uye navaranda vake." 
2Samuel22:1 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakataura kuna Jehovha mashoko orwiyo urwu nenguva yaakarwirwa naJehovha pamaoko avavengi vake vose, napamaoko aSauro;" 
2Samuel22:2 akati, ""Jehovha idombo rangu, nenhare yangu, nomurwiri wangu, iye ndowangu." 
2Samuel22:3 Mwari idombo rangu, ndichavimba naye; nhovo yangu, norunyanga rwokuponeswa kwangu, shongwe yangu yakakwirira, noutiziro hwangu. Muponesi wangu, anondiponesa pakumanikidzwa." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndichadana kuna Jehovha, iye anofanira kurumbidzwa; Naizvozvo ndichaponeswa kuna vavengi vangu." 
2Samuel22:5 Nokuti mafungu orufu akandikomba, Uye nzizi dzezvakaipa dzakandivhundusa." 
2Samuel22:6 Mabote aSheori akandisunga, Misungo yorufu yakandiwira." 
2Samuel22:7 Pakutambudzika kwangu ndakadana kuna Jehovha, Ndakadana kuna Mwari wangu, Akanzwa inzwi rangu ari mutemberi yake; Kuchema kwangu kukasvika munzeve dzake." 
2Samuel22:8 Ipapo nyika yakazununguka, ikadedera; Nheyo dzokudenga dzakadengenyeka, Dzikazununguswa, nokuti iye wakanga atsamwa." 
2Samuel22:9 Utsi hwakakwira hwuchibva mumhino dzake, Uye moto wakabuda mumuromo make, wakaparadza; Mazimbe akabatidzwa nawo." 
2Samuel22:10 Wakakotamisawo kudenga-denga, akaburuka, Nerima guru rakanga riri pasi petsoka dzake." 
2Samuel22:11 Wakatasva kerubhu, akabhururuka; Zvirokwazvo, wakaonekwa ari pamapapiro emhepo." 
2Samuel22:12 Wakazvipoteredza nerima setende, Mvura yakaunganidzwa, nemvumi dzehore dzedenga." 
2Samuel22:13 Nokupenya, kwakanga kuri pamberi pake, Mazimbe omoto akabatidzwa." 
2Samuel22:14 Jehovha wakatinhira kudenga, Wokumusoro-soro wakataura nenzwi rake." 
2Samuel22:15 Wakatuma miseve, akavaparadza; Akatuma mheni, akavavhundusa." 
2Samuel22:16 Ipapo pasi pegungwa pakaonekwa, Uye nheyo dzenyika dzakaratidzwa pachena, Nokutuka kwaJehovha, Nokufema kwemweya wemhino dzake." 
2Samuel22:17 Wakatambanudza ruoko rwake ari kumusoro, akanditora, Akandinyukura pamvura zhinji;" 
2Samuel22:18 Akandirwira pamuvengi wangu ane simba, Nokuna vanondivenga; nokuti vakanga vondikurira." 
2Samuel22:19 Vakandivinga nezuva renjodzi yangu, Asi Jehovha wakanga ari mutsigiro wangu." 
2Samuel22:20 Akandibudisira kunzvimbo yakafarikana, Akandirwira, nokuti wakanga achindifarira." 
2Samuel22:21 Jehovha wakandiitira zvakaenzana nokururama kwangu, Akandipa mubayiro wakaenzana nokuchena kwamaoko angu." 
2Samuel22:22 Nokuti ndakachengeta nzira dzaJehovha, Handina kubva kuna Mwari wangu nokunyengera." 
2Samuel22:23 Nokuti zvose zvaakatonga zvakanga zviri pamberi pangu; Kana zviri zvaakatema, handina kutsauka kwazviri." 
2Samuel22:24 Ndakanga ndakarurama kwazvo pamberi pake, Ndakazvichengeta pazvakaipa zvangu." 
2Samuel22:25 Naizvozvo Jehovha wakandiitira zvakaenzana nokururama kwangu, Zvakaenzana nokuchena kwangu pamberi pake." 
2Samuel22:26 Ane ngoni, munomuitirawo ngoni; Munhu, wakarurama kwazvo, munomuitirawo zvakarurama;" 
2Samuel22:27 Wakanaka, munomuitirawo zvakanaka; Wakatsauka, munomuitira hasha." 
2Samuel22:28 Muchaponesa vanhu vanotambudzika, Asi meso enyu anoona vanozvikudza kuti muvaderedze." 
2Samuel22:29 Nokuti muri mwenje wangu, Jehovha; Jehovha uchavhenekera rima rangu." 
2Samuel22:30 Nokuti nemwi ndichavamba hondo, Kana ndina Mwari wangu ndichadarika rusvingo." 
2Samuel22:31 Kana ari Mwari, nzira yake yakarurama kwazvo; Shoko raJehovha rakaidzwa; Ndiye nhovo yavose vanotenda kwaari." 
2Samuel22:32 Nokuti ndianiko Mwari, asi iye Jehovha? Ndianiko dombo, asi iye Mwari wedu?" 
2Samuel22:33 Mwari ndiye nhare yangu ine simba; Iye unondifambisa nenzira yakarurama. 
2Samuel22:34 Unoita tsoka dzangu setsoka dzenondokadzi, Unondiisa pakakwirira." 
2Samuel22:35 Unodzidzisa maoko angu kurwa; Naizvozvo maoko angu anowembura uta bwendarira. 
2Samuel22:36 Makandipawo nhovo yokuponesa kwenyu, Unyoro bwenyu hwakandikurisa." 
2Samuel22:37 Makandiitira nzvimbo yakafarikana pasi pangu pandingatsika; Tsoka dzangu hadzina kutedzemuka. 
2Samuel22:38 Ndakateverera vavengi vangu, ndikavaparadza, Handina kudzokazve kusvikira vapedzwa." 
2Samuel22:39 Ndakavapedza, ndakavabaya, havagoni kumuka; Vakawira pasi petsoka dzangu." 
2Samuel22:40 Nokuti makandisunga chiwuno nesimba rokurwa naro; Makandikundisa vaindimukira. 
2Samuel22:41 Makatizisa vavengi vangu, Kuti ndiparadze vanondivenga." 
2Samuel22:42 Vakatarira, asi kwakanga kusino muponesi, Kuna Jehovha, asi haana kuvapindura." 
2Samuel22:43 Ipapo ndakavapwanya seguruva renyika; Ndikavatswa samatope enzira dzomumusha, ndikavaparadzira kure." 
2Samuel22:44 Makandirwirawo pakukakavadzana kwavanhu vangu, Makandichengeta kuti ndive mukuru wendudzi; Vanhu vandakanga ndisingazivi, vachandishumira." 
2Samuel22:45 Vatorwa vachanamata kwandiri; Vachateerera pakarepo kana vachindinzwa. 
2Samuel22:46 Vatorwa vachatorerwa simba, Vachabuda pavaivanda vachidedera." 
2Samuel22:47 Jehovha mupenyu; dombo rangu ngarikudzwe; Mwari, dombo rokuponeswa kwangu, ngaarumbidzwe." 
2Samuel22:48 Ndiye Mwari unonditsivira, Unondikundisa vanhu." 
2Samuel22:49 Unondibvisa kuvavengi vangu; Zvirokwazvo, munondisimudzira kumusoro kwavanondimukira; Munondirwira pamunhu unondimanikidza." 
2Samuel22:50 Naizvozvo ndichakuvongai Jehovha, pakati pendudzi, Ndichakudza zita renyu nenziyo;" 
2Samuel22:51 Unopa mambo wake kuponeswa kukuru; Unoitira muzodzwa wake unyoro, Kuna Dhavhidhi navana vake nokusingaperi.""" 
2Samuel23:1 Zvino ndiwo mashoko okupedzisira aDhavhidhi, Zvanzi naDhavhidhi mwanakomana waJese, Zvanzi nomunhu wakakudzwa kwazvo, Naiye muzodzwa waMwari waJakobho, Muimbi wezvakanaka waIsiraeri," 
2Samuel23:2 Mweya waJehovha wakataura mukati mangu, Shoko rake rakanga riri parurimi rwangu." 
2Samuel23:3 Mwari waIsiraeri wakataura, dombo raIsiraeri rakataura neni, rikati, `Mumwe uchavapo, uchabata vanhu zvakarurama, Uchabata ushe achitya Mwari;" 
2Samuel23:4 Uchava sechiedza chamangwanani, kana zuva robuda, Samangwanani kana kusina makore. Kana bumhudza richibuda pavhu Kana mushana wobuda mvura yapera kunaya.'" 
2Samuel23:5 Ko imba yangu haizakadaro kuna Mwari here? Nokuti wakaita neni sungano isingaperi, Yakanatswa pazvinhu zvose, yakasimba; Nokuti ndiko kuponeswa kwangu kose, nokuda kwangu kose, Ko haangazvikurisi here?" 
2Samuel23:6 Asi vose vasingadi Mwari vachafanana nemhinzwa inorashwa, Nokuti haigoni kubatwa namaoko;" 
2Samuel23:7 Asi munhu anoibata Anofanira kutora rutare norwiriko rwepfumo; Ipiswe kwazvo panzvimbo yayo nomoto. 
2Samuel23:8 Ndiwo mazita emhare dzaDhavhidhi: Joshebhibhashebheti muTakemoni, mukuru wavatariri; iye wakanga ari Adhino muEzini, wakauraya vanhu vana mazana masere nenguva imwe." 
2Samuel23:9 Wakamutevera wakanga ari Ereazari mwanakomana waDhodhai, mwanakomana womuAhohi, mumwe wemhare nhatu dzakanga dzinaDhavhidhi, musi wavakavamba vaFirisitia vakanga vaungana kuzorwa, varume vaIsiraeri vabva;" 
2Samuel23:10 iye akasimuka, akabaya vaFirisitia kusvikira ruoko rwake rwaneta, ruoko rwake rukawomerera pamunondo wake; Jehovha akavakundisa kwazvo nomusi iwoyo, vanhu vakadzoka vachimutevera, kuzopamba koga." 
2Samuel23:11 Wakamutevera wakanga ari Shama mwanakomana waAgee, muHarari. VaFirisitia vakanga vaungana paRehi, pakanga pane bindu renyemba; vanhu vakatiza vaFirisitia." 
2Samuel23:12 Asi iye wakamira pakati pebindu, akarirwira, akauraya vaFirisitia; Jehovha akavakundisa kwazvo." 
2Samuel23:13 Zvino vatatu vavakuru vana makumi matatu vakaburuka, vakasvika kuna Dhavhidhi kubako reAdhuramu, nenguva yokukohwa; boka ravaFirisitia; rakanga radzika matende pamupata weRefaimu." 
2Samuel23:14 Zvino nenguva iyo Dhavhidhi wakanga ari munhare, uye varwi vavaFirisitia vaiva paBheterehemu nenguva iyo." 
2Samuel23:15 Dhavhidhi akapanga, akati, ""Haiwa! Dai mumwe achindipa mvura yetsime reBheterehemu, riri pasuo, ndimwe!""" 
2Samuel23:16 Ipapo mhare idzo nhatu dzakapasanura napakati pehondo yavaFirisitia, vakandoteka mvura patsime reBheterehemu, riri pasuo, vakaitora vakauya nayo kuna Dhavhidhi; asi iye wakaramba kuimwa, akaidururira kuna Jehovha." 
2Samuel23:17 Akati, ""Haisva, Jehovha, handingaiti chinhu ichi! Ndingamwa ropa ravarume ava vakaenda vasingarangariri upenyu hwavo here?"" Naizvozvo akaramba kuimwa. Ndizvo zvakaitwa nemhare idzo." 
2Samuel23:18 Abhishai munun'una waJoabhu, mwanakomana waZeruya, wakanga ari mukuru wavatatu avo. Ndiye wakasimudza pfumo rake akarwa navanhu vana mazana matatu, akavauraya, akava nomukurumbira pakati pavatatu avo." 
2Samuel23:19 Iye wakarumbidzwa zvikuru pakati pavatatu avo; naizvozvo akaitwa mukuru wavo, asi haana kuenzana navatatu vokutanga." 
2Samuel23:20 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, mwanakomana wemhare yeKabhizeeri, wakanga aita mabasa makuru, iye wakauraya vanakomana vaviri vaArieri waMoabhu, akandourayawo shumba mukati mehuzha panguva yechando;" 
2Samuel23:21 akaurayawo muIjipiti, murume wakanga akanaka, muljipiti uyu wakanga akabata pfumo muruoko rwake, asi iye wakaburukira kwaari akabata tsvimbo, akabvuta pfumo muruoko rwomuIjipiti, akamuuraya nepfumo rake iro." 
2Samuel23:22 Zvinhu izvi zvakaitwa naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, wakanga akakurumbira pakati pemhare idzo nhatu." 
2Samuel23:23 Iye wakanga achirumbidzwa kupfuura vana makumi matatu, asi haana kuenzana navatatu vokutanga. Dhavhidhi akamuita mutariri wavarindi vake." 
2Samuel23:24 Ashaheri munun'una waJoabhu wakanga ari mumwe wavana makumi matatu, naErihanani mwanakomana waDhodho weBheterehemu;" 
2Samuel23:25 naShama muHarodhi, naErika muHarodhi;" 
2Samuel23:26 naHerezi muPariti, naIra mwanakomana waIkeshe muTekoi;" 
2Samuel23:27 naAbhiezeri muAnatoti, naMebhunai muHushati;" 
2Samuel23:28 naZarimoni muAhohi, naMaharai muNetofati;" 
2Samuel23:29 naHerebhu, mwanakomana waBhaana muNetofati, naItai mwanakomana waRibhai weGibhiya wavana vaBhenjamini;" 
2Samuel23:30 naBhenaya muPiratoni, naHidai wehova dzeGaashi;" 
2Samuel23:31 naAbhiaribhoni muAribhati, naAzimavheti muBharihumi;" 
2Samuel23:32 naEriabha muShaaribhoni, naJonatani kuvana vaJasheni;" 
2Samuel23:33 naShama muHarari, naAhiami mwanakomana waSharari muArari;" 
2Samuel23:34 naErifereti mwanakomana waAhashabhai, mwanakomana womuMaakati, naEriami mwanakomana waAhitoferi muGironi;" 
2Samuel23:35 naHezero muKarimeri, naParai muAribhi;" 
2Samuel23:36 naIgari mwanakomana waNatani weZobha, naBhani muGadhi;" 
2Samuel23:37 naZereki muAmoni, naNaharai muBheeroti, vaibata nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo dzaJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya;" 
2Samuel23:38 naIra muItiri, naGarebhi muItiri;" 
2Samuel23:39 naUriya muHiti, vose makumi matatu navanomwe." 
2Samuel24:1 Zvino Jehovha wakatsamwirazve vaIsiraeri, akakurudzira Dhavhidhi pamusoro pavo, akati, ""Enda uverenge vaIsiraeri navaJudha.""" 
2Samuel24:2 Ipapo mambo akati kuna Joabhu mukuru wehondo wakanga anaye, ""Enda zvino, upote namarudzi ose alsiraeri, kubva paDhani kusvikira paBheerishebha, uverenge vanhu, ndizive kuwanda kwavo.""" 
2Samuel24:3 Joabhu akati kuna mambo, ""Jehovha Mwari wenyu ngaawedzere hake kuvanhu, vapfuure ava runezana pakuwanda kwavo, nameso ashe wangu ngaazviwone; asi ishe wangu mambo unotsvakireiko chinhu ichi?""" 
2Samuel24:4 Kunyange zvakadaro shoko ramambo rakakurira Joabhu navakuru vehondo. Joabhu navakuru vakabuda pamberi pamambo kundoverenga vanhu vaIsiraeri. 
2Samuel24:5 Vakayambuka Jorodhani, vakadzika matende avo paAroeri, kurutivi rworudyi rweguta, pakati pomupata weGadhi, kusvikira paJazeri." 
2Samuel24:6 Ipapo vakasvika Giriyadhi, nokunyika yeTatimihodhisi; vakasvikawo Dhanijaani, nenyika yakapoteredza kusvikira paZidhoni," 
2Samuel24:7 vakasvikawo kunhare yeTire, nokumaguta ose avaHivhi, navaKenani; vakapedzisa kurutivi rwezasi rwaJudha paBheerishebha." 
2Samuel24:8 Zvino vakati vapota nenyika yose, vakasvika Jerusaremu, vapedza mwedzi mipfumbamwe namazuva ana makumi maviri." 
2Samuel24:9 Joabhu akarondedzera kuwanda kwavanhu kuna mambo; kuna vaIsiraeri kwakanga kune mhare dzaiva nezviuru zvina mazana masere vaigona kurwa nomunondo; uye varume vaJudha vaiva varume vane zviuru zvina mazana mashanu. 
2Samuel24:10 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakati apedza kuverenga vanhu, hana yake ikamurova. Dhavhidhi akati kuna Jehovha, ""Ndatadza kwazvo zvandaita chinhu ichi; asi zvino Jehovha, bvisai henyu kuipa komuranda wenyu; nokuti ndaita sebenzi kwazvo.""" 
2Samuel24:11 Zvino Dhavhidhi wakati achimuka mangwanani, shoko raJehovha rikasvika kumuporofita Gadhi, Muvoni waDhavhidhi, rikati," 
2Samuel24:12 Enda, undoudza Dhavhidhi, uti, `Zvanzi naJehovha, ndinokuisira zvinhu zvitatu; chizvitsaurira chimwe chazvo, ndikuitire icho.' """ 
2Samuel24:13 Naizvozvo Gadhi akaenda kuna Dhavhidhi, akamuudza akati kwaari, ""Unoda kuti makore manomwe enzara ave panyika yako here? Kana unoda kutiza pamberi pavavengi vako mwedzi mitatu vachikuteverera here? Kana unoda kuti denda rive panyika yako mazuva matatu here? Zvino chifunga hako, urangarire mhinduro yandingadzosera kuna iye wakandituma.""" 
2Samuel24:14 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati kuna Gadhi, ""Ndiri pakumanikidzwa kukuru; tiwire hedu zvino muruoko rwaJehovha, nokuti nyasha dzake ihuru, asi ndirege hangu kuwira muruoko rwomunhu.""" 
2Samuel24:15 Ipapo Jehovha akatuma denda pakati paIsiraeri kubva mangwanani kusvikira panguva yakanga yatarwa, varume vane zviuru zvina makumi manomwe vakafa pakati pavanhu, kubva paDhani kusvikira paBheerishebha." 
2Samuel24:16 Zvino mutumwa wakati achitambanudzira ruoko rwake kuJerusaremu, kuti ariparadze, Jehovha akazvidemba pamusoro pechakaipa icho, akati kumutumwa wakanga achiparadza vanhu, ""Ndizvo, chidzosa ruoko rwako."" Zvino mutumwa waJehovha wakanga amire paburiro raArauna muJebhusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Dhavhidhi wakati achiona mutumwa wakanga achiuraya vanhu, akataura naJehovha, akati, ""Tarirai, ndini ndatadza, ndini ndaita zvakaipa; asi makwai awa akaiteiko? Ruoko rwenyu ngarundirove harwo ini neimba yababa vangu.""" 
2Samuel24:18 Zvino Gadhi akaenda kuna Dhavhidhi zuva iro, akati kwaari, ""Enda undovakira Jehovha aritari paburiro raArauna muJebhusi.""" 
2Samuel24:19 Dhavhidhi akaenda sezvaakaudzwa naGadhi, sezvaakarairwa naJehovha." 
2Samuel24:20 Zvino Arauna akatarira, akaona mambo navaranda vake vachiuya kwaari, Arauna akabuda, akakotamira pasi nechiso chake pamberi pamambo." 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna akati, ""Ishe wangu mambo wauyireiko kumuranda wake?"" Dhavhidhi akati, ""Ndauya kuzotenga buriro kwauri, kuti ndivakire Jehovha aritari, kuti denda ripere pakati pavanhu.""" 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna akati kuna Dhavhidhi, ""Ishe wangu mambo ngaatore hake, abayire Jehovha sezvaanoda; tarirai, hedzo nzombe dzokubayira chipiriso chinopiswa; uye nhumbi dzokupira nadzo, namajoko enzombe, dzive huni;" 
2Samuel24:23 izvi zvose, mambo, Arauna unopa mambo."" Arauna akati kuna mambo, ""Jehovha Mwari wenyu ngaakugamuchirei hake.""" 
2Samuel24:24 Mambo akati kuna Arauna, ""Kwete, ndichazvitenga kwauri zvirokwazvo nomutengo wazvo, uye handingabayiri Jehovha Mwari wangu zvipiriso, zvandisina kutenga."" Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akatenga buriro nenzombe namashekeri esirivha ana makumi mashanu." 
2Samuel24:25 Dhavhidhi akavakirapo Jehovha aritari, akabayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvokuyananisa. Naizvozvo Jehovha akanzwira nyika tsitsi, denda rikapera pakati paIsiraeri." 
1Kings1:1 Zvino mambo Dhavhidhi wakanga akwegura, ava namakore mazhinji; vakamufukidza namachira, asi haana ku­dziyirwa." 
1Kings1:2 Naizvozvo varanda vake va­kati kwaari, ""Ishe wangu mambo ngaa­tsvakirwe mhandara, iye amire pamberi pamambo, avachengete, avate pachipfuva chenyu, kuti ishe wangu mambo vadziyi­rwe.""" 
1Kings1:3 Ipapo vakatsvaka musikana waka­naka panyika yose yaIsiraeri, vakawana Abhishagi muShunami, vakamuisa kuna mambo." 
1Kings1:4 Uyu musikana wakanga aka­naka kwazvo, akachengeta mambo, aka­mushandira, asi mambo haana kupinda kwaari." 
1Kings1:5 Zvino Adhonia mwanakomana waHagiti wakazvikudza, akati, ""Ini ndi­chava mambo;"" akazvigadzirira ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza, navarume vana ma­kumi mashanu kuzomhanya pamberi pake." 
1Kings1:6 Asi baba vake vakanga vasina kutongomuraira paupenyu hwake hwose, vachiti, ""Unoitireiko kudaro?"" Wakanga ari murume wakanaka kwazvo pamuviri wake; wakanga achitevera Abhusaromu pakuzvarwa kwake." 
1Kings1:7 Akarangana naJoa­bhu, mwanakomana waZeruya, naAbhia­tari muprista, ivo vakatevera Adhonia, vakamubatsira." 
1Kings1:8 Asi Zadhoki muprista, naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, naNatani muporofita, naShimei, naRei, nemhare dzakanga dzina Dhavhidhi, ha­vana kutevera Adhonia." 
1Kings1:9 Adhonia akabaya makwai nenzo­mbe, nemhuru dzakakora, pabwe reZohe­reti, raiva paEni-rogeri, akadana hama dzake dzose ivo vanakomana vamambo, navarume vose vaJudha, varanda vama­mbo;" 
1Kings1:10 asi haana kudana Natani muporo­fita, naBhenaya, nemhare, naSoromoni munun'una wake." 
1Kings1:11 Ipapo Natani akataura naBhati­shebha mai vaSoromoni, akati, ""Hauna kunzwa here kuti Adhonia mwanako­mana waHagiti, wobata ushe, asi Dhavhi­dhi ishe wedu haazvizivi?" 
1Kings1:12 Naizvozvo zvino uya ndikupe zano, kuti urwire upenyu bwako noupenyu bwomwana­komana wako Soromoni." 
1Kings1:13 Enda upinde kuna mambo Dhavhidhi, uti kwaari, ""Ishe wangu mambo, hamuna kupikira mura­ndakadzi wenyu here,' mukati, `Zvirokwazvo, Soromoni mwanakomana wako, ndiye uchanditevera paushe, iye uchagara pachigaro chenyu choushe? Zvino Adho­nia unobatireiko ushe?""" 
1Kings1:14 Zvino tarira, iwe uchiri pakutaura namambo, ini ndi­chapindawo shure kwako, ndichisimbisa mashoko ako.""" 
1Kings1:15 Bhati-shebha akapinda kuna ma­mbo mumba; zvino mambo wakanga akwegura kwazvo, Abhishagi muShu­nami waishandira mambo." 
1Kings1:16 Ipapo Bhati­shebha akakotama, akanamata kuna ma­mbo. Mambo akati, ""Unoreveiko?""" 
1Kings1:17 Iye akati kwaari, ""Ishe wangu, imwi makapikira murandakadzi wenyu naJeho­vha Mwari wenyu, mukati, `Zvirokwa­zvo, Soromoni mwanakomana wako ndiye uchanditevera paushe, ndiye ucha­gara pachigaro changu choushe." 
1Kings1:18 Asi zvino tarirai, Adhonia wobata ushe; asi imwi ishe wangu mambo, hamuzvizivi." 
1Kings1:19 Iye wabaya nzombe, nemhuru dzaka­kora, namakwai mazhinji, akadana vana­komana vose vamambo, naAbhiatari mu­prista, naJoabhu mukuru wehondo, asi haana kudana Soromoni muranda wenyu." 
1Kings1:20 Zvino ishe wangu mambo, meso avaI­siraeri vose anotarira kwamuri, kuti mu­vaudze kuti ndianiko unofanira kukuteve­rai pakugara pachigaro choushe chashe wangu mambo." 
1Kings1:21 Kana musingadaro, kana ishe wangu mambo avata namadzi­baba ake, ini nomwanakomana wangu Soromoni tichaidzwa vatadzi.' """ 
1Kings1:22 Zvino wakati achataura namambo, Natani muporofita akapindawo." 
1Kings1:23 Vakau­dza mambo, vakati, ""Natani muporofita wasvika."" Iye wakati apinda pamberi pamambo, akakotamira pasi nechiso chake pamberi pamambo." 
1Kings1:24 Zvino Natani akati, ""Ishe wangu, mambo, makareva here kuti Adhonia uchakuteverai paku­bata ushe, uchagara pachigaro chenyu choushe here?" 
1Kings1:25 Nokuti waburuka nhasi, akabaya nzombe nemhuru dzakakora, namakwai mazhinji, akadana vanako­mana vose vamambo, navakuru vehondo, naAbhiatari muprista; tarirai, vodya noku­mwa pamberi pake, vachiti, `Mambo Adhonia ngaararame" 
1Kings1:26 Asi ini muranda wenyu, naZadhoki muprista, naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, nomuranda wenyu Soromoni, haana kutidana." 
1Kings1:27 Chi­nhu ichi chinoitwa nashe wangu mambo here, mukasazivisa varanda venyu kuti ndianiko unofanira kukuteverai pakugara pachigaro choushe chashe wangu mambo?""" 
1Kings1:28 Ipapo mambo Dhavhidhi akapindura, akati, ""Ndidanirei Bhati-shebha."" Iye akapinda kuna mambo, akamira pamberi pamambo." 
1Kings1:29 Zvino mambo akapika, akati, ""NaJehovha mupenyu, iye wakadzikunura upenyu hwangu panjodzi dzose," 
1Kings1:30 zvirokwazvo, sezvandakakupikira naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, ndichiti, `Zvirokwazvo, Soromoni mwanakomana wako uchanditevera paushe, uchagara pachigaro changu choushe panzvimbo yangu; zvirokwazvo ndichazviita nhasi.' """ 
1Kings1:31 Ipapo Bhati-shebha akakotamira pasi nechiso chake, akapfugamira mambo, akati, ""Ishe wangu mambo Dhavhidhi ngaararame nokusingaperi.""" 
1Kings1:32 Mambo Dhavhidhi akati, ""Ndidanirei Zadhoki muprista, naNatani muporofita, naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha."" Ivo vakapinda kuna mambo." 
1Kings1:33 Mambo akati kwavari, ""Endai navaranda vashe wenyu, mutasvise Soromoni mwanakomana wangu pahesera rangu, mumuburusire Gihoni;" 
1Kings1:34 Zadhoki muprista naNatani muporofita vamuzodze ipapo, ave mambo waIsiraeri; muridze hwamanda, muchiti, `Mambo Soromoni ngaararame.'" 
1Kings1:35 Zvino mukwire muchimutevera, iye auye kuzogara pachigaro choushe, nokuti uchava mambo panzvimbo yangu; ini ndakaraira kuti ave muchinda waIsiraeri nowaJudha.""" 
1Kings1:36 Ipapo Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, akapindura mambo, akati, ""Ameni! Jehovha, Mwari washe wangu mambo, unodarowo." 
1Kings1:37 Jehovha sezvaaiva nashe wangu mambo, saizvozvowo ngaave naSoromoni, akurise chigaro chake choushe, chipfuure chigaro choushe chashe wangu mambo Dhavhidhi.""" 
1Kings1:38 Ipapo Zadhoki muprista, naNatani muporofita, naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, navaKereti navaPereti vakaburuka, vakatasvisa Soromoni pahesera ramambo Dhavhidhi, vakamuisa Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Zvino Zadhoki muprista akatora gonamombe ramafuta paTende akazodza Soromoni. Vakaridza hwamanda, vanhu vose vakati, ""Mambo Soromoni ngaararame!""" 
1Kings1:40 Zvino vanhu vose vakakwira, vakamutevera; vanhu vakaridza nyere, vakafara nomufaro mukuru; naizvozvo nyika ikaunga nenzwi radzo." 
1Kings1:41 Zvino Adhonia navose vakanga vakokwa naye, vakazvinzwa, vapedza kudya. Ipapo Joabhu wakati achinzwa inzwi rehwamanda, akati, ""Mhere-mhere iyi inoitirweiko muguta, zvaranyonganiswa?""" 
1Kings1:42 Wakati achitaura, Jonatani mwanakomana waAbhiatari muprista, akasvika; Adhonia akati kwaari, ""Pinda, nokuti uri munhu wakatendeka, unouya namashoko akanaka.""" 
1Kings1:43 Ipapo Jonatani akapindura, akati kuna Adhonia, ""Zvirokwazvo ishe wedu mambo Dhavhidhi wakagadza Soromoni paushe." 
1Kings1:44 Uye mambo wakatuma Zadhoki muprista, naNatani muporofita, naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, navaKereti navaPereti, vakamutasvisa pahesera ramambo;" 
1Kings1:45 uye Zadhoki muprista, naNatani muporofita vakamuzodza paGihoni kuti ave mambo; vakabva ipapo, vakakwira nomufaro, naizvozvo guta rinowunga. Ndiyo mhere-mhere yamanzwa." 
1Kings1:46 Zvino Soromoni wogara pachigaro choushe. 
1Kings1:47 Uyewo, varanda vamambo vakaenda kuzokudza ishe wedu mambo Dhavhidhi, vachiti, `Mwari ngaakurise zita raSoromoni, ripfuure zita renyu, akurise chigaro chake, chipfuure chigaro chenyu choushe;' mambo akakotama panhovo dzake." 
1Kings1:48 Uyezve mambo wakataura akati, `Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakudzwe, wakagadza mumwe nhasi kuti agare pachigaro changu choushe, meso angu achizviona.' """ 
1Kings1:49 Zvino vose vakanga vakakokwa naAdhonia vakatya, vakasimuka, mumwe nomumwe akaenda hake." 
1Kings1:50 Adhonia akatya nokuda kwaSoromoni, akasimuka, akandobata nyanga dzeatari." 
1Kings1:51 Zvino Soromoni akaudzwa, zvichinzi, ""Tarirai, Adhonia unotya mambo Soromoni, nokuti wandobata nyanga dzeatari, akati, `Mambo Soromoni ngaandipikire nhasi, kuti haangaurayi muranda wake nomunondo.' """ 
1Kings1:52 Ipapo Soromoni akati, ""Kana akazova munhu kwaye, ruvhudzi rwake kunyange rumwe harungawiri pasi; asi kana zvakaipa zvikawanikwa maari, uchafa.""" 
1Kings1:53 Naizvozvo mambo Soromoni akatuma vanhu, vakandomubvisa paatari. Akauya, akanamata kuna mambo Soromoni. Soromoni akati kwaari, ""Enda kumba kwako.""" 
1Kings2:1 Zvino mazuva aDhavhidhi okufa kwake akaswedera, akaraira Soromoni mwanakomana wake, akati," 
1Kings2:2 Ini ndoenda nenzira yenyika yose; naizvozvo iva nesimba, uve murume chaiye." 
1Kings2:3 Chengeta zvawakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wako, kuti ufambe nenzira dzake, uchichengeta zvaakatema, nemirairo yake, nezvaakatonga, nezvipupuriro zvake, sezvazvakanyorwa pamurayiro waMozisi, kuti ufare pazvose zvaunoita, uye kose kwaunoenda." 
1Kings2:4 Kuti Jehovha asimbise shoko rake raakataura pamusoro pangu, achiti, `Kana vana vako vakachenjera panzira dzavo, kuti vafambe pamberi pangu nechokwadi nomoyo wavo wose uye nomweya wavo wose, (ndizvo zvaakataura), hakungazoshaikwi munhu pachigaro choushe chaIsiraeri.'" 
1Kings2:5 Uye unozivawo zvandakaitirwa naJoabhu, mwanakomana waZeruya, izvo zvaakaitira vakuru vaviri vehondo dzaIsiraeri, vanaAbhineri mwanakomana waNeri, naAmasa mwanakomana waJeteri, vaakauraya, akateura panguva yorugare ropa raifanira kuteurwa panguva yokurwa, akaisa ropa rokurwa pabhanhire rakanga riri pachiuno chake, nomushangu dzake dzakanga dziri patsoka dzake." 
1Kings2:6 Naizvozvo ita nokuziva kwako, urege kutendera musoro wake wachena kuburukira muhwiro norugare." 
1Kings2:7 Asi vanakomana vaBharizirai muGiriyadhi, uvaitire unyoro, vave pakati paivo vanodya patafura yako; nokuti vakauya kwandiri saizvozvo panguva yandakatiza pamberi paAbhusaromu mukuru wako." 
1Kings2:8 Tarira, kwauri kuna Shimei mwanakomana waGera, muBhenjamini weBhahurimi, iye, wakandituka nokutuka kwakaipa pazuva randakanga ndichienda Mahanaimi; asi wakazouya akasangana neni paJorodhani, ndikamupikira naJehovha, ndikati, `Handingakuurayi nomunondo.'" 
1Kings2:9 Asi zvino usamurega ave somunhu usine mhosva, nokuti iwe uri munhu wakachenjera; uchaziva hako zvaunofanira kumuitira, unofanira kuburusira musoro wake wachena muhwiro neropa.""" 
1Kings2:10 Dhavhidi akazovata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi." 
1Kings2:11 Nguva yakabata Dhavhidhi ushe hwaIsiraeri aiva makore makumi mana; akabata paHebhuroni makore manomwe, uye akabata paJerusaremu makore makumi matatu namatatu." 
1Kings2:12 Zvino Soromoni akagara pachigaro choushe chababa vake Dhavhidhi; ushe hwake hukasimba kwazvo. 
1Kings2:13 Ipapo Adhonia mwanakomana waHagiti, akasvika kuna Bhati-shebha mai vaSoromoni. Ivo vakati, ""Unouya norugare here?"" Iye akati, ""Hongu, norugare.""" 
1Kings2:14 Akatizve, ""Ndine chimwe chandinoda kukuudzai."" Ivo vakati, ""Taura hako.""" 
1Kings2:15 Akati, ""Munoziva kuti ushe hwaiva hwangu, meso avalsiraeri vose ainditarira, kuti ndive mambo; asi ushe hwakashandurwa, hukazova hwomunun'una wangu, nokuti hwakanga huri hwake nokuda kwaJehovha." 
1Kings2:16 Zvino ndinokumbira chinhu chimwe choga kwamuri; musandirambira henyu chinhu icho. Ivo vakati kwaari, ""Taura hako.""" 
1Kings2:17 Akati, ""Dotauriranai henyu namambo Soromoni, nokuti haangakurambiriyi chinhu, kuti andipe Abhishagi muShunami, ave mukadzi wangu.""" 
1Kings2:18 Bhati-shebha akati, ""Ndizvo hazvo, ndichakurevera kuna mambo.""" 
1Kings2:19 Naizvozvo Bhati-shebha akaenda kuna mambo Soromoni kundorevera Adhonia. Mambo akasimuka kuzosangana naye, akakotama pamberi pake, akagara pachigaro choushe, akaraira kuti chigaro choushe chigadzirirwe mai vamambo; ivo vakagara kurutivi rwake rworudyi." 
1Kings2:20 Ipapo vakati, ""Ndinokumbira kwauri chinhu chiduku; usandirambira hako chinhu ichi."" Mambo akati kwavari, ""Kumbirai henyu, mai vangu, nokuti handingakurambiriyi icho.""" 
1Kings2:21 Vakati, ""Adhonia mukuru wako ngaapiwe Abhishagi muShunami, ave mukadzi wake.""" 
1Kings2:22 Ipapo mambo Soromoni akapindura, akati kuna mai vake, ""Munokumbirira Adhonia Abhishagi muShunami neiko? Mumukumbirireiwo ushe, nokuti ndiye mukuru wangu; mumukumbirirei iye, naAbhiatari muprista, naJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya.""" 
1Kings2:23 Ipapo mambo Soromoni akapika naJehovha, akati, ""Mwari ngaandirove, arambe achidaro, Adhonia ucharipira shoko iri noupenyu hwake." 
1Kings2:24 Naizvozvo zvino, naJehovha mupenyu, iye wakandisimbisa, akandigadza pachigaro choushe chababa vangu Dhavhidhi, akandimutsira imba sezvaakandipikira, zvirokwazvo Adhonia uchaurawa nhasi.""" 
1Kings2:25 Ipapo mambo Soromoni akatuma Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, iye akamuvamba akamuuraya." 
1Kings2:26 Mambo akati kuna Abhiatari muprista, ""Enda Anatoti kunyika yako, nokuti waifanira kufa; asi handingakuurayi nhasi, nokuti wakambotakura areka yaJehovha Mwari pamberi pababa vangu Dhavhidhi, uye nokuti wakatambudzika pamwechete nababa vangu pakutambudzika kwavo kose.""" 
1Kings2:27 Naizvozvo Soromoni akadzinga Abhiatari, kuti arege kuva muprista pamberi paJehovha; kuti aite shoko raJehovha, raakanga ataura pamusoro peimba yaEri paShiro." 
1Kings2:28 Zvino shoko iro rikasvika kuna Joabhu, nokuti Joabhu wakanga atevera Adhonia, kunyange asina kutevera Abhusaromu. Joabhu akatizira kuTende raJehovha, akandobata nyanga dzeatari." 
1Kings2:29 Ipapo mambo Soromoni akaudzwa, zvichinzi, ""Joabhu watizira kuTende raJehovha, tarirai, ari paatari."" Ipapo Soromoni akatuma Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, akati, ""Enda undomuvamba.""" 
1Kings2:30 Bhenaya akaenda kuTende raJehovha, akati kwaari, ""Zvanzi namambo, `Budai!' "" Iye akati, ""Kwete, ndichafira pano hangu."" Bhenaya akaudza mambozve, akati, ""Ndizvo zvataura Joabhu, ndizvo zvaandipindura.""" 
1Kings2:31 Ipapo mambo akati kwaari, ""Ita sezvaataura, umuvambe, ugomuviga; kuti ubvise kwandiri napaimba yababa vangu ropa rakateurwa naJoabhu rakanga risine mhosva." 
1Kings2:32 Jehovha uchadzosera ropa rake pamusoro wake, nokuti wakauraya vanhu vaviri vakanga vakamupfuura pakururama nokunaka, akavauraya nomunondo, baba vangu Dhavhidhi vasingazvizivi, iye Abhineri mwanakomana waNeri, mukuru wehondo yaIsiraeri, naAmasa mwanakomana waJeteri, mukuru wehondo yaJudha." 
1Kings2:33 Naizvozvo ropa ravo richadzokera pamusoro waJoabhu napamisoro yorudzi rwake nokusingaperi; asi rugare runobva kuna Jehovha ruchava naDhavhidhi, norudzi rwake, neimba yake, nechigaro chake choushe nokusingaperi.""" 
1Kings2:34 Ipapo Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, akaenda, akamuvamba, ndokuuraya; akavigwa mumba make murenje." 
1Kings2:35 Zvino mambo akagadza Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, panzvimbo yake ave mukuru wehondo; mambo akagadzawo Zadhoki ave muprista panzvimbo yaAbhiatari." 
1Kings2:36 Mambo akatuma munhu kundodana Shimei, akati kwaari, ""Uzvivakire imba paJerusaremu, ugarepo, usabvapo uchienda kumwe." 
1Kings2:37 Nokuti nomusi waunobuda nawo, ukayambuka rukova Kidhironi, uzive kwazvo kuti uchaurawa zvirokwazvo; ropa rako richava pamusoro wako.""" 
1Kings2:38 Ipapo Shimei akati kuna mambo, ""Ishoko rakanaka; muranda wenyu uchaita sezvakarehwa nashe wangu mambo."" Shimei akagara mazuva mazhinji paJerusaremu." 
1Kings2:39 Zvino makore matatu akati apfuura, varanda vaviri vaShimei vakatizira kuna Akishi mwanakomana waMaaka, mambo weGati. Vakaudza Shimei, vachiti, ""Tarira varanda vako vari Gati.""" 
1Kings2:40 Ipapo Shimei akasimuka, akasungira chigaro pambongoro yake, akaenda Gati kuna Akishi, kundotsvaka varanda vake; Shimei akatora varanda vake Gati." 
1Kings2:41 Zvino Soromoni akaudzwa kuti Shimei wakanga abuda Jerusaremu, akaenda Gati, akadzokazve." 
1Kings2:42 Mambo akatuma munhu kundodana Shimei, akati kwaari, ""Handina kukupikisa naJehovha here, ndikakunyevera, ndichiti, `Uzive kwazvo kuti nomusi waunobuda nawo, ukafamba kumwe, uchaurawa zvirokwazvo?' Iwe ukati kwandiri, `Shoko randanzwa rakanaka.'" 
1Kings2:43 Zvino wakaregereiko kuchengeta mhiko yawakapika kuna Jehovha, nomurayiro wandakakuraira?""" 
1Kings2:44 Mambo akatiwo kuna Shimei, ""Iwe unoziva kwazvo zvakaipa zvose zvawakaitira baba vangu Dhavhidhi; naizvozvo Jehovha uchadzosera zvakaipa zvako pamusoro wako." 
1Kings2:45 Asi mambo Soromoni ucharopafadzwa, nechigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi chichasimbiswa pamberi paJehovha nokusingaperi.""" 
1Kings2:46 Naizvozvo mambo akaraira Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, iye akaenda, akandomuvamba, ndokumuuraya. Naizvozvo ushe, hwakanga hwakabatwa naSoromoni, hwakasimbiswa." 
1Kings3:1 Zvino Soromoni wakaita ukama naFarao, mambo weIjipiti, akawana mukunda waFarao, akamuisa kuguta raDhavhidhi, kusvikira apedza kuvaka imba yake neimba yaJehovha, norusvingo runopoteredza Jerusaremu." 
1Kings3:2 Asi vanhu vakabayira zvibayiro pamatunhu akakwirira, nokuti kusvikira mazuva iwayo zita raJehovha rakanga richigere kuvakirwa imba." 
1Kings3:3 Soromoni akada Jehovha, akafamba nemitemo yababa vake Dhavhidhi; asi wakabayira zvibayiro nokupisa zvinonhuhwira pamatunhu akakwirira." 
1Kings3:4 Zvino mambo akaenda Gibhiyoni kundobayirapo, nokuti ndiwo wakanga uri mutunhu mukuru wakakwirira; Soromoni akabayira paaritari iyo zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvine chiuru chimwe." 
1Kings3:5 Jehovha akazviratidza kuna Soromoni paGibhiyoni nokurota usiku. Mwari akati, ""Kumbira chaunoda kuti ndikupe.""" 
1Kings3:6 Soromoni akati, ""Makaitira muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi, baba vangu, unyoro hukuru, zvaakafamba pamberi penyu nechokwadi, nokururama, nomoyo wakanaka kwamuri; mukamuchengeterawo unyoro uhu hukuru, zvamakamupa mwanakomana kugara pachigaro chake choushe, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
1Kings3:7 Zvino Jehovha Mwari wangu, makaita muranda wenyu mambo panzvimbo yababa vangu Dhavhidhi, asi ndiri mwana hangu, handizivi mutowo wokubuda nawo kana kupinda nawo." 
1Kings3:8 Muranda wenyu uri pakati pavanhu venyu vamakatsaura, vanhu vazhinji kwazvo, vasingagoni kurahwa kana kuverengwa nokuwanda kwavo." 
1Kings3:9 Naizvozvo ipai muranda wenyu moyo unonzwisisa, kuti nditambe mhaka dzavanhu venyu, ndizive kutsaura pakati pezvakanaka nezvakaipa; nokuti ndianiko anogona kutamba mhaka dzavanhu venyu ava vakawanda?""" 
1Kings3:10 Zvino kutaura uku kwakafadza Ishe, kuti Soromoni wakakumbira chinhu ichi." 
1Kings3:11 Ipapo Mwari akati kwaari, ""Zvawakumbira chinhu ichi, ukasazvikumbirira upenyu hwamazuva mazhinji, kana kuzvikumbirira fuma, kana kukumbira kuti vavengi vako vafe; asi wakazvikumbirira kungwara, kuti unzwisise kutamba mhaka;" 
1Kings3:12 tarira, ndaita sezvawataura; tarira ndakupa moyo waka ngwara, unonzwisisa; naizvozvo hakuna kumbova nomumwe wakafanana newe, kana shure kwako hakungazovi nomunhu ungafanana newe." 
1Kings3:13 Ndakupawo zvausina kukumbira, fuma nokukudzwa; naizvozvo hakungazovi nomumwe pakati pamadzimambo ungafanana newe pamazuva ako ose." 
1Kings3:14 Kana ukada kufamba nenzira dzangu, nokuchengeta mitemo yangu nemirairo yangu, sezvakafamba baba vako Dhavhidhi, ipapo ndichawanza mazuva ako.""" 
1Kings3:15 Ipapo Soromoni akamuka, akaona kuti kwakanga kuri kurota; akaenda Jerusaremu, akamira pamberi peareka yesungano yaJehovha, akabayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa, akabayirawo zvipiriso zvokuyananisa, akaitira varanda vake vose mutambo." 
1Kings3:16 Zvino vakadzi vaviri, vaiva zvifeve, vakasvika kuna mambo, vakamira pamberi pake." 
1Kings3:17 Mumwe mukadzi akati, ""Haiwa, ishe wangu, ini nomukadzi uyu tigere paimba imwe; ini ndikapona mwana ndigere naye paimba." 
1Kings3:18 Zvino ini ndakati ndapona mazuva matatu, mukadzi uyu akaponawo, tigere pamwechete; kwakanga kusino mweni nesu mumba, asi isu vaviri toga mumba." 
1Kings3:19 Zvino mwana womukadzi uyu akafa usiku, nokuti wakavata pamusoro pake." 
1Kings3:20 Akamuka pakati pausiku, akatora mwanakomana wangu parutivi rwangu, murandakadzi wenyu avete, akamuradzika pachipfuva chake, akaradzika mwana wake wakafa pachipfuva changu." 
1Kings3:21 Zvino ndakati ndichimuka mangwanani kuzomwisa mwana wangu, ndikawana akafa; asi ndakati ndichimucherekedza mangwanani, wonei haazi mwanakomana wangu, wandakabereka.""" 
1Kings3:22 Ipapo mumwe mukadzi wakati, ""Kwete, asi mupenyu ndiye mwanakomana wangu, wakafa ndiye mwanakomana wako;"" uyu akati, ""Kwete, asi wakafa ndiye mwanakomana wako, mupenyu ndiye mwanakomana wangu."" Vakataura saizvozvo pamberi pamambo." 
1Kings3:23 Ipapo mambo akati, ""Mumwe unoti, `Mwanakomana wangu ndouyu mupenyu, mwana wako ndiye wakafa,' mumwezve unoti, `Kwete, asi mwanakomana wako ndiye wakafa, mupenyu ndiye mwanakomana wangu.' """ 
1Kings3:24 Mambo akati, ""Nditorerei munondo."" Vakauya nomunondo kuna mambo." 
1Kings3:25 Mambo akati, ""Gurai mwana mupenyu napakati, mupe mumwe rutivi rumwe, nomumwe rumwe rutivi.""" 
1Kings3:26 Ipapo mukadzi waiva mai womwana mupenyu akataura kuna mambo, nokuti moyo wake wakava pamusoro pomwanakomana wake, akati, ""Haiwa, ishe wan.gu, mumupe henyu mwana mupenyu, regai kumuuraya."" Asi mumwe wakati, ""Ngaachirega kuva wangu kana wako, mugurei.""" 
1Kings3:27 Ipapo mambo akapindura, akati, ""Mumupe mwana mupenyu, regai kumuuraya, ndivo mai vake.""" 
1Kings3:28 Valsiraeri vose vakanzwa kutonga kwamambo, vakatya mambo; nokuti vakaona kuti kungwara kwaMwari kwaiva maari, kuti atambe mhaka zvakanaka." 
1Kings4:1 Zvino mambo Soromoni wakanga ari mambo wavaIsiraeri vose. 
1Kings4:2 Ndiwo machinda aaiva nawo: Azaria mwanakomana waZadhoki waiva muprista; 
1Kings4:3 Erihorefi naAhija, vanakomana vaShisha, vaiva vanyori; Jehoshafati mwanakomana waAhirudhi waiva sahwira." 
1Kings4:4 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha, waiva mukuru wehondo, Zadhoki naAbhiatari vaiva vaprista;" 
1Kings4:5 Azaria mwanakomana waNatani, waiva mukuru wavatariri; Zabhudhi mwanakomana waNatani waiva muprista, shamwari yamambo." 
1Kings4:6 Abhishari waiva mutariri weimba; Adhoniramu mwanakomana waAbhidha, waiva mutariri wechibharo." 
1Kings4:7 Soromoni waiva navatariri vane gumi navaviri vairaira vaIsiraeri vose, vaitsvakira mambo neimba yake zvokudya; mumwe nomumwe waifanira kutsvaka zvokudya zvomwedzi mumwe gore rimwe nerimwe." 
1Kings4:8 Ndiwo mazita avo: Bhehuri, munyika yamakomo yaEfuremu;" 
1Kings4:9 naBhenedhekeri paMakazi, napaSharibhimi, neBhetishemeshi, neEronibhetihananai;" 
1Kings4:10 naBhenihesedhi paArubhoti; iye wakanga ane shoko, nenyika yose yeHeferi;" 
1Kings4:11 naBheniabhinadhabhi panyika yose yeDhori; mukadzi wake wakanga ari Tafati, mukunda waSoromoni;" 
1Kings4:12 naBhaana mwanakomana waAhirudhi, paTaanaki neMegidho, nenyika yose yeBhetisheani, iri parutivi rweZaretani, pazasi peJezereeri, kubva paBhetisheani kusvikira paAbherimehora seri kweJokimeami;" 
1Kings4:13 naBhenigebheri paRamotiGiriyadhi; iye wakanga ane misha yaJairi, mwanakomana waManase, yaiva paGiriyadhi; iye wakanga ane nyika yeArigobhi, iri paBhashani, maguta makumi matanhatu aiva namasvingo namazariro endarira;" 
1Kings4:14 naAhinadhabhi mwanakomana waIdho, paMahanaimi;" 
1Kings4:15 naAhimaazi paNafitari; iye wakanga awanawo Bhasemati mukunda waSoromoni; 
1Kings4:16 naBhaana mwanakomana waHushai, paAsheri nebhiyaroti;" 
1Kings4:17 naJosafati mwanakomana waParua, paIsakari;" 
1Kings4:18 naShimei mwanakomana waEra, paBhenjamini;" 
1Kings4:19 naGebheri mwanakomana waUri, waiva panyika yeGiriyadhi, nyika yaSihoni, mambo wavana vaAmori neyaOgi, mambo weBashani; iye wakanga ari mutariri mumwe woga panyika iyo." 
1Kings4:20 VaJudha navalsiraeri vakanga vari vazhinji, vakanga vakawanda sejecha pagungwa, vakadya, vakamwa, vakafara." 
1Kings4:21 Zvino Soromoni wakabata ushe hwose, kubva paRwizi kusvikira kunyika yavaFirisitia, nokusvikira kumuganhu weIjipiti; vanhu vakauya nezvipo, vakashumira Soromoni mazuva ose oupenyu hwake." 
1Kings4:22 Zvokudya zvaSoromoni zvezuva rimwe zvaiva zviyero zvina makumi matatu zvoupfu hwakatsetseka nezviyero zvina makumi matanhatu zvoupfu; 
1Kings4:23 nenzombe dzina makumi maviri dzokumafuro, namakwai ane zana, nenondo, nemhara, nemhembwe, neshiri dzakakodzwa." 
1Kings4:24 Nokuti wakabata ushe panyika yose nechokuno koRwizi, kubva paTifisa kusvikira paGaza, namadzimambo ose aiva nechokuno koRwizi; akava norugare kunhivi dzose dzakanga dzakamupoteredza." 
1Kings4:25 VaJudha navaIsiraeri vakanga vagere zvakanaka, mumwe nomumwe pasi pomuzambiringa wake napasi pomuwonde wake, kubva paDhani kusvikira paBheerishebha, mazuva ose aSoromoni." 
1Kings4:26 Soromoni wakanga ane zvidyiro zvine zviuru zvina makumi mana zvamabhiza engoro dzake, navatasvi vane zviuru zvine gumi nezviviri." 
1Kings4:27 Vatariri ava vaitsvakira mambo Soromoni zvokudya, navose vaidya patafura yamambo Soromoni, mumwe nomumwe nomwedzi wake; havana kushaisa chinhu chimwe." 
1Kings4:28 Nebhari nouswa hwamabhiza namabhiza aimhanyisa vakauya nazvo panzvimbo yakafanira, mumwe nomumwe sezvaakanga arairwa." 
1Kings4:29 Mwari akapa Soromoni kungwara nokunzwisisa kukuru, nomoyo wakaziva zvakanaka, zvakafanana nejecha riri pamhenderekedzo yegungwa." 
1Kings4:30 Kungwara kwaSoromoni kwakapfuura kungwara kwavana vamabvazuva, nokungwara kose kwavaIjipiti." 
1Kings4:31 Nokuti wakapfuura vanhu vose nokungwara; wakakunda Etani muEzirahi, naHemani, naKarikori, naDharidha, vana vaMahori; mukurumbira wake ukasvika kundudzi dzose dzakanga dzakavapoteredza." 
1Kings4:32 Wakataurawo shumo dzine zviuru zvitatu, uye nziyo dzake dzakasvika chiuru chimwe neshanu." 
1Kings4:33 Akataura zvemiti, kubva pamisidhari iri paRebhanoni kusvikira pamuhisopi unomera parusvingo; akataurawo zvemhuka, neshiri, nezvinokambaira, nehove." 
1Kings4:34 Vanhu vamarudzi ose vakauya kuzonzwa kungwara kwaSoromoni, vakabva kumadzimambo ose enyika, vakanga vanzwa zvokungwara kwake." 
1Kings5:1 Zvino Hiramu, mambo weTire, wakatumira varanda vake kuna Soromoni, nokuti wakanga anzwa kuti vakamuzodza ave mambo panzvimbo yababa vake; nokuti Hiramu wakanga achida Dhavhidhi nguva yose." 
1Kings5:2 Soromoni akatuma nhume kuna Hiramu akati," 
1Kings5:3 Munoziva kuti Dhavhidhi baba vangu, vakanga vasingagoni kuvakira zita raJehovha Mwari wavo imba, nokuda kwehondo dzairwiwa kumativi ose, kusvikira Jehovha avaisa pasi petsoka dzake." 
1Kings5:4 Asi zvino Jehovha Mwari wangu wakandizorodza kumativi ose, hakuna muvengi kana chimwe chinhu chakaipa." 
1Kings5:5 Zvino tarirai, moyo wangu unoda kuvakira zita raJehovha Mwari wangu imba, sezvakataurwa naJehovha kuna baba vangu, achiti, `Mwanakomana wako, wandichagadza pachigaro chako choushe panzvimbo yako, ndiye uchavakira zita rangu imba.'" 
1Kings5:6 Naizvozvo zvino, chirairai kuti vanditemere miti yemisidhari paRebhanoni; varanda vangu vachabata pamwechete navaranda venyu; ini ndichakupai mubayiro wava randa venyu sezvamuchareva; nokuti munoziva kuti pakati pedu hapana munhu unoziva kutema matanda ungafanana navaZidhoni.""" 
1Kings5:7 Zvino Hiramu wakati achinzwa mashoko aSoromoni, akafara kwazvo, akati, ""Nhasi Jehovha ngaavongwe, iye wakapa Dhavhidhi mwanakomana wakangwara kuzobata vanhu ava vazhinji.""" 
1Kings5:8 Ipapo Hiramu akatuma nhume kuna Soromoni, akati, ""Ndanzwa shoko ramatuma kwandiri; ndichaita zvose zvamunoda pamusoro pamatanda emisidhari, namatanda emisipiresi." 
1Kings5:9 Varanda vangu vachaaburusa paRebhanoni vachiaisa kugungwa; ndichaabatanidza aende negungwa sezvamuchandiraira, ndicharaira kuti asunungurwe ipapo, muagamuchire; imwi mugoita sezvandinoda, muchipa vanhu veimba yangu zvokudya.""" 
1Kings5:10 Naizvozvo Hiramu akapa Soromoni matanda emisidhari namatanda emisipiresi, zvose sezvaaida." 
1Kings5:11 Soromoni akapawo Hiramu zviyero zvine zviuru zvamakumi maviri zvezviyo zvive zvokudya zvavanhu veimba yake; nezviyero zvina makumi maviri zvamafuta akasvimwa; Soromoni akapa Hiramu saizvozvo gore rimwe nerimwe. 
1Kings5:12 Jehovha akapa Soromoni kungwara, sezvaakamupikira; Hiramu naSoromoni vainzwana, ivo vaviri vakaita sungano." 
1Kings5:13 Mambo Soromoni akadana vanhu vechibharo pakati pavaIsiraeri vose; vanhu vechibharo vaiva zviuru zvina makumi matatu. 
1Kings5:14 Akavatumira Rebhanoni, mwedzi mumwe nomumwe zviuru zvine gumi, vachiravana; vaiva paRebhanoni mwedzi mumwe, nokumusha mwedzi miviri; Adhoniramu ndiye wairaira vanhu vechibharo." 
1Kings5:15 Uye Soromoni wakanga ana vatakuri vemitoro vane zviuru makumi manomwe, navatemi vamatanda pamakomo vane zviuru zvina makumi masere;" 
1Kings5:16 vatariri vakuru vaSoromoni, vairaira basa, vasingaverengwi, ivo vaiva nezviuru zvitatu namazana matatu, vairaira vanhu vaibate basa." 
1Kings5:17 Mambo akaraira, vakaputsa mabwe makuru, mabwe aikosha, kuti vateye nheyo dzeimba namabwe akavezwa." 
1Kings5:18 Vavaki vaSoromoni navavaki vaHiramu navaGhebhari vakaaveza, vakagadzira matanda namabwe kuzovaka imba." 
1Kings6:1 Zvino pagore ramazana mana namakumi masere shure kokubuda kwavana vaIsiraeri panyika yeIjipiti, pagore rechina rokubata ushe kwaSoromoni pakati paIsiraeri, nomwedzi weZifi, ndiwo mwedzi wechipiri, wakatanga kuvaka imba yaJehovha." 
1Kings6:2 Imba yakavakirwa Jehovha namambo Soromoni yakasvika makubhiti makumi matanhatu pakureba kwayo, namakubhiti maviri paupamhi hwayo, namakubhiti makumi matatu pakukwirira kwayo;" 
1Kings6:3 uye biravira pamberi petemberi yeimba yaJehovha rakasvika makubhiti makumi maviri pakureba kwaro, zvichienzana noupamhi bweimba; upamhi hwaro hwakasvika makubhiti ane gumi pamberi peimba." 
1Kings6:4 Akaitirawo imba mahwindo ezvitanda zvakachinjikwa. 
1Kings6:5 Akavaka dzimba dzakaturikidzana pachidziro cheimba kunhivi dzose, pamadziro eimba kunhivi dzose, etemberi napaitaura Jehovha; akaitawo makamuri panhivi dzose dzakapoteredza;" 
1Kings6:6 upamhi bweimba yapanyasi hwaiva namakubhiti mashanu, noupamhi bweimba yapakati makubhiti matanhatu, noupamhi bweimba yechitatu makubhiti manomwe; nokuti nechokunze wakavaka zvitukuriso pamadziro eimba kunhivi dzose, kuti matanda arege kupinda mukati mamadziro eimba." 
1Kings6:7 Zvino imba pakuvakwa kwayo, yakavakwa namabwe akanga agadzirwa ipapo pavaiputsa; pakuvakwa kwayo hakuna kunzwika mukati meimba nyundo, kana sanhu, kana nhumbi ipi neipi yedare." 
1Kings6:8 Mukova wamakamuri apanyasi enhivi wakanga uri kurutivi rworudyi rweimba; zvino vaikwira nezvikwiriso zvinomonereka kumakamuri apakati, uye kana vobva panaapakati vachienda kuneechitatu." 
1Kings6:9 Naizvozvo akavaka imba, akaipedza; ndokufukidza imba namatanda uye namapuranga emisidhari." 
1Kings6:10 Akavaka dzimba dzakaturikidzana paimba yose, imwe neimwe yakanga yakaita makubhiti mashanu pakukwirira kwayo, dzikabatanidzwa paimba namatanda emisidhari." 
1Kings6:11 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Soromoni, richiti," 
1Kings6:12 Kana iri imba iyi yaunovaka, kana ukafamba nemitemo yangu, ukaita zvandakatonga, ukachengeta mirairo yangu yose ukafamba nayo, ini ndichasimbisa shoko rangu newe, iro randakataura kuna Dhavhidhi baba vako." 
1Kings6:13 Ndichagara pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, handingarashi vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.""" 
1Kings6:14 Naizvozvo Soromoni akavaka imba, akaipedza." 
1Kings6:15 Akavaka madziro eimba mukati namapuranga omusidhari; kubva paguva reimba kusvikira padenga ramadziro, akafukidza nechomukati namapuranga, akafukidza guva reimba namapuranga omusipiresi." 
1Kings6:16 Akavakawo necheshure kweimba imwe imba yakasvika makubhiti ana makumi maviri namapuranga omusidhari kubva paguva kusvikira pamusoro pamadziro; akaivaka iyo pave pangataura Jehovha, iri nzvimbo tsvene-tsvene." 
1Kings6:17 Zvino imba, iyo temberi, yakanga iri pamberi, yakasvika makubhiti makumi mana." 
1Kings6:18 Matanda omusidhari mukati meimba akanga akavezwa namafundo namaruva akazaruka; yaiva misidhari yoga, kwanga kusinebwe rakaonekwa." 
1Kings6:19 Akagadzira pangataura Jehovha mukati meimba, kuti agadzikepo areka yesungano yaJehovha." 
1Kings6:20 Pangataura Jehovha mukati pakasvika makubhiti makumi maviri paupamhi hwapo, namakubhiti makumi maviri pakukwirira kwapo; akazvifukidza zvose nendarama yakaisvonaka; nearitari akaifukidza nomusidhari." 
1Kings6:21 Naizvozvo Soromoni wakafukidza imba yose nechomukati mayo nendarama yakaisvonaka; akachinjikisa maketani endarama pamberi pangataura Jehovha, akaifukidza nendarama." 
1Kings6:22 Akafukidza imba yose nendarama kusvikira imba yose yapera; akafukidzawo aritari yose yaiva yapangataura Jehovha nendarama. 
1Kings6:23 Akaitira pangataura Jehovha makerubhi maviri omuorivhi, rimwe nerimwe rakasvika makubhiti ane gumi pakureba." 
1Kings6:24 Bapiro rimwe rekerubhi rakasvika makubhiti mashanu pakureba kwaro, nerimwe bapirowo rekerubhi makubhiti mashanu; kubva pamuromo webapiro rimwe kusvikira pamuromo werimwezve, aiva makubhiti ane gumi." 
1Kings6:25 Rimwe kerubhi rakasvikawo makubhiti ane gumi; makerubhi ose maviri akanga akaenzana pakukura nokuumbwa. 
1Kings6:26 Rimwe kerubhi rakasvika makubhiti ane gumi, uye ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita rimwewo." 
1Kings6:27 Akagadza makerubhi mukati meimba yomukati; mapapiro amakerubhi akanga akatambanudzwa, bapiro rimwe rekerubhi rimwe rakasvika kumadziro mamwe, uye bapiro rimwe rekerubhi rimwezve rakasvika kunamamwe madziro; mapapiro awo akagunzvana pakati peimba." 
1Kings6:28 Akafukidza makerubhi nendarama. 
1Kings6:29 Akaveza pamadziro ose eimba kunhivi dzose mifananidzo yakavezwa yamakerubhi nemichindwe, namaruva akazaruka, mukati nokunze;" 
1Kings6:30 akafukidzawo guva reimba nendarama, mukati nokunze." 
1Kings6:31 Akaitira mikova yapangataura Jehovha magonhi omuorivhi; chivivo chapamusoro namagwatidziro zvakaita makona mashanu. 
1Kings6:32 Naizvozvo akaita magonhi maviri omuorivhi, akaveza pamusoro pawo mifananidzo yamakerubhi nemichindwe, namaruva akazaruka, akaafukidza nendarama; akaisa ndarama pamusoro pamakerubhi napamichindwe." 
1Kings6:33 Saizvozvowo akaitira mikova yetemberi zvivivo zvemiorivhi, zvakanga zvine nhivi ina dzakaenzana;" 
1Kings6:34 namagonhi maviri omusipiresi; mapenga maviri egonhi rimwe aipetwa, uye mapenga maviri erimwe gonhizve aipetwa." 
1Kings6:35 Akavezerapo makerubhi nemichindwe namaruva akazaruka; akazvifukidza nendarama, yakanyatsoiswa pamusoro pezvakavezwa." 
1Kings6:36 Akavaka ruvazhe rwomukati nemitsara mitatu yamabwe akavezwa, nomusara wamatanda omusidhari." 
1Kings6:37 Nheyo dzeimba yaJehovha dzakavambwa negore rechina raSoromoni, nomwedzi weZivi." 
1Kings6:38 Negore regumi nerimwe, nomwedzi weBuri, ndiwo mwedzi worusere, imba ikapera chose nezvose zvayo, sezvayaifanira kuvakwa. Naizvozvo wakapedza makore manomwe pakuivaka." 
1Kings7:1 Soromoni wakapedza makore gumi namatatu pakuvaka imba yake, akapedza imba yake yose." 
1Kings7:2 Nokuti wakavaka imba nemiti yamatondo eRebhanoni; yakanga yakasvika makubhiti ane zana pakureba kwayo, namakubhiti makumi mashanu paupamhi hwayo, namakubhiti makumi matatu pakukwirira kwayo; akaivaka pamusoro pemitsara mina yembiru dzemisidhari, namatanda emisidhari pamusoro pembiru." 
1Kings7:3 Yakanga yakafukidzwa namatanda emisidhari kumusoro, pamusoro pamakamuri aiva namakumi mana namashanu pamusoro pembiru, makamuri ane gumi namashanu pamusara mumwe." 
1Kings7:4 Kwakanga kunemisara mitatu yamahwindo, hwindo rimwe rakatarisana nerimwe hwindo, pamitsara mitatu yakaturikidzana." 
1Kings7:5 Magonhi ose namagwatidziro zvaiva namativi mana akaenzana; hwindo rimwe rakanga rakatarisana nerimwe hwindo, pamitsara mitatu yakaturikidzana." 
1Kings7:6 Akaita biravira rembiru; rakanga rakasvika makubhiti makumi mashanu pakureba kwaro, namakubhiti makumi matatu paupamhi hwaro, nebiravira pamberi padzo, nedzimwe mbiru namatanda makobvu pamberi padzo." 
1Kings7:7 Akaitawo biravira rechigaro chake choushe, paangatonga mhaka, iro biravira rokutonga; iro rakanga rakafukidzwa namapuranga omusidhari kubva paguva kusvikira padenga." 
1Kings7:8 Neimba yake yokugara, kuno rumwe ruvazhe mukati mebiravira, yakanga yakaitwa saizvozvo. Akaitirawo mukunda waFarao imba, (waakanga awana iye Soromoni,) yakanga yakafanana nebiravira iro." 
1Kings7:9 Idzi dzose dzakanga dzakavakwa namabwe anokosha, ari mabwe akavezwa, akaenzaniswa zvakanaka, akachekwa namajeko mukati nokunze, kubva panheyo kusvikira kumusoro, nokunzewo kusvikira kuruvazhe rukuru." 
1Kings7:10 Nheyo dzakanga dzakavakwa namabwe anokosha, mabwe makuru, mabwe akasvika makubhiti ane gumi, namabwe akasvika makubhiti masere." 
1Kings7:11 Kumusoro kwakanga kuna mabwe anokosha, mabwe akavezwa, akaenzaniswa zvakanaka, namapuranga omusidhari." 
1Kings7:12 Ruvazhe rukuru rwakanga rwakapoteredza, rwakanga rune misara mitatu yamabwe akavezwa, nomusara mumwe wamatanda omusidhari; rwakanga rwakafanana noruvazhe rwomukati rweimba yaJehovha, nebiravira reimba." 
1Kings7:13 Zvino mambo Soromoni akatuma vanhu kundotora Hiramu paTire. 
1Kings7:14 lye wakanga ari mwanakomana wechirikadzi yorudzi rwaNafitari; baba vake vaiva munhu weTire, mupfuri wendarira; iye wakanga akangwara kwazvo ane njere noumhizha kubata mabasa ose endarira. Akauya kuna mambo Soromoni, akabata mabasa ake ose." 
1Kings7:15 Nokuti wakaumba mbiru mbiri dzendarira, imwe neimwe yakasvika makubhiti ane gumi namasere pakureba; uye pakuyera rwonzi rwakasvika makubhiti ane gumi namaviri rwakapoteredza mbiru imwe neimwe." 
1Kings7:16 Akaumbawo misoro miviri yendarira yakanyauswa, kuti iiswe pamusoro pembiru; musoro mumwe wakasvika makubhiti mashanu pakureba, nomumwe musoro makubhiti mashanuwo pakureba." 
1Kings7:17 Misoro, yaiva pamusoro pembiru, yakanga ine mimbure yakarukwa yendarira, nezvishongo zvamaketani; minomwe yomusoro mumwe, neminomwe yomumwe musorozve." 
1Kings7:18 Akaitawo matamba, kwakanga kune misara miviri yakapoteredza pamusoro pomumbure mumwe, kufukidza misoro yakanga iri pamusoro pembiru, akaitira mumwe musoro saizvozvo." 
1Kings7:19 Misoro, yaiva pamusoro pembiru pabiravira, yakanga ina maruva amahapa akavezwa, akasvika makubhiti mana." 
1Kings7:20 Kumusoro kwakanga kune misorowo pamusoro pembiru mbiri, pedo nedumbu rakanga riri parutivi rwomumbure wakarukwa; namatamba akanga ana mazana maviri, akaita mitsara yakapoteredza pamusoro pomumwe musoro." 
1Kings7:21 Zvino akamisa mbiru pabiravira retemberi, akamisa mbiru yorudyi, akatumidza zita rayo Jakini; akamisa mbiru yoruboshwe, akatumidza zita rayo Bhowasi." 
1Kings7:22 Pamusoro pembiru pakanga pane zvishongo zvamaruva amahapa, naizvozvo basa rapambiru rakapera." 
1Kings7:23 Zvino akaita dziva rendarira yakanyauswa, rakasvika makubhiti ane gumi paupamhi pamuromo, rakatenderera; kukwirira kwaro kwakasvika makubhiti mashanu; uye pakuyera rwonzi rwakasvika makubhiti makumi matatu rwakaripoteredza." 
1Kings7:24 Pasi pomuromo waro pakanga panamafundo akaripoteredza, akanga ane gumi pakubhiti rimwe nerimwe, aipoteredza dziva; mafundo akaita misara miviri, akaumbwa pamwechete naro." 
1Kings7:25 Rakanga rimire pamusoro penzombe gumi nembiri, nhatu dzakanga dzakatarira kurutivi rwokumusoro, nhatu kurutivi rwa mavirazuva, nhatu kurutivi rwezasi, uye nhatu kurutivi rwamabvazuva, dziva rakanga rakagadzwa pamusoro padzo, idzo dzakafuratirana." 
1Kings7:26 Ukobvu hwaro hwaiva soupamhi bwechanza, uye muromo waro wakanga wakafanana nomuromo wembiya, seruva rehapa, mukati maro maipinda mabhati ane zviuru zviviri." 
1Kings7:27 Akaitawo zvingoro zvine gumi zvendarira; chingoro chimwe nechimwe chaisvika makubhiti mana pakureba, namakubhiti mana paupamhi, namakubhiti matatu pakukwirira." 
1Kings7:28 Zvingoro zvakanga zvakaitwa kudai: Zvaiva noukomba, ukomba uhwo hwakakombwa nemidengerero." 
1Kings7:29 Paukomba uhwo pakati pemidengerero paiva neshumba, nenzombe, namakerubhi; pamusoro pemidengerero pakanga pakadarowo; pasi peshumba nenzombe paiva nezvishongo zvakarembera." 
1Kings7:30 Chingoro chimwe nechimwe chaiva namakumbo mana endarira nezvokumonerekerapo zvendarira, makumbo acho mana aiva nezvitsigiro; zvitsigiro izvo zvakanga zvakaumbirwa pasi pomudziyo wokushambidzira, nezvishongo kurutivi rumwe norumwe." 
1Kings7:31 Muromo wawo pakati pomusoro nokumusoro kwawo wakasvika kubhiti rimwe; muromo wawo wakanga wakatenderera, wakafanana nechigadziko, kubhiti rimwe nehafu; pamuromo wawo paiva nezvakanyorwa, asi ukomba hwawo hwaiva namativi mana akaenzana, zvisina kutenderera." 
1Kings7:32 Makumbo mana akanga ari pasi poukomba, uye zvokubatisa makumbo zvaiva pangoro; gumbo rimwe nerimwe rakasvika kubhiti rimwe nehafu pakukwirira kwaro." 
1Kings7:33 Makumbo akanga akafanana namakumbo engoro; zvokubatisa makumbo, namafero, namasipoki, namaneivhi zvakanga zvakaumbwa zvose." 
1Kings7:34 Paiva nezvitsigiro zvina pamakona mana echingoro chimwe nechimwe; zvitsigiro zvaiva zvimwe nengoro imene. 
1Kings7:35 Pamusoro pechingoro paiva nechitenderere chakasvika hafu yekubhiti pakukwirira uye pamusoro pengoro zvitsigiro zvayo nohukomba hwayo zvaiva zvimwe. 
1Kings7:36 Panhivi dzezvitsigiro zvayo, uye paukomba hwayo akaveza makerubhi neshumba, nemiti yemichindwe pazvakaringana, nezvishongo kunhivi dzose." 
1Kings7:37 Akaita zvingoro zvine gumi saizvozvo; zvose zvakanga zvakafanana pakuumbwa nokuenzana, nomufananidzo mumwe." 
1Kings7:38 Akaita midziyo yokushambidzira ine gumi; mudziyo mumwe nomumwe waipinda mabhati makumi mana emvura; mudziyo mumwe nomumwe wakasvika makubhiti mana; pangoro dzose gumi pakanga pane mudziyo pangoro imwe neimwe. 
1Kings7:39 Akaisa zvingoro, zvishanu kurutivi rworudyi rweimba, uye zvishanu kurutivi rworuboshwe rweimba; akagadzika dziva kurutivi rworudyi rweimba kumabvazuva nechezasi." 
1Kings7:40 Hiramu akaita midziyo yokushambidzira, nefoshoro, nembiya. Naizvozvo Hiramu akapedza mabasa ose aakaitira Soromoni paimba yaJehovha;" 
1Kings7:41 zvaiti: Mbiru mbiri, nembiya mbiri dzemisoro miviri, yaiva pamisoro yembiru; uye mimbure miviri yokufukidza nayo mbiya mbiri dzemisoro miviri yaiva pamusoro pembiru;" 
1Kings7:42 namatamba ana mazana mana emimbure miviri, misara miviri yamatamba pamumbure mumwe nomumwe, kufukidza mbiya mbiri yemisoro yaiva pamusoro pembiru;" 
1Kings7:43 nezvingoro zvine gumi, nemidziyo yokushambidzira ine gumi pamusoro pezvingoro;" 
1Kings7:44 nedziva rimwe, nenzombe gumi nembiri pasi pedziva;" 
1Kings7:45 nehari, nefoshoro, nembiya; nhumbi idzi dzose dzakaitirwa mambo Soromoni naHiramu mumba maJehovha, dzakanga dzakaitwa nendarira yakabwinyiswa." 
1Kings7:46 Mambo akadziumba pabani raJorodhani, pakati peSukoti neZaretani, paiva nevhu rokuumba." 
1Kings7:47 Soromoni haana kuyera nhumbi dzose, nokuti dzaiva zhinji kwazvo; vakanga vasingagoni kuverenga kurema kwendarira." 
1Kings7:48 Soromoni akaita nhumbi dzose dzaiva mumba maJehovha, dzaiti: Aritari yendarama, netafura yendarama paiva nezvingwa zvokuratidza;" 
1Kings7:49 nemwenje yendarama yakaisvonaka, mishanu kurutivi rworudyi, nemishanu kurutivi rworuboshwe, pamberi pangataura Jehovha; namaruva, nemwenje, nembato dzendarama;" 
1Kings7:50 nemikombe, nembato dzemwenje, nembiya, nezvirongo, nezvaenga zvomoto zvendarama yakaisvonaka; nezvibato zvamagonhi zvendarama, zvamagonhi eimba yomukati, iyo nzvimbo tsvenetsvene, nezvamagonhi eimba, iyo temberi." 
1Kings7:51 Naizvozvo basa rose, rakaitwa namambo Soromoni paimba yaJehovha, rakapera. Soromoni akaisawo nhumbi dzakanga dzatsaurirwa Mwari naDhavhidhi baba vake, sirivha, nendarama, nemidziyo, akadziisa padzimba dzokuchengeta fuma dzeimba yaJehovha." 
1Kings8:1 Zvino Soromoni wakaunganidza vakuru vaIsiraeri, navakuru vose vamarudzi, iwo machinda edzimba dzamadzibaba avana vaIsiraeri, kuna mambo Soromoni paJerusaremu, akakwidza areka yesungano yaJehovha, ibve paguta raDhavhidhi, iro Ziyoni." 
1Kings8:2 Varume vose vaIsiraeri vakaungana kuna mambo Soromoni pamutambo pamwedzi weEtanimi, ndiwo mwedzi wechinomwe." 
1Kings8:3 Ipapo vakuru vose vaIsiraeri vakauya, vaprista vakasimudza areka." 
1Kings8:4 Vakakwira neareka yaJehovha netende rokusangana, nemidziyo mitsvene yose yaiva muTende, vaprista navaRevhi vakakwira nayo." 
1Kings8:5 Mambo Soromoni, neungano yose yavaIsiraeri yakanga yaunganira kwaari, vakafamba naye pamberi peareka, vakabayira makwai nenzombe, zvakanga zvisingagoni kurahwa kana kuverengwa nokuwanda kwazvo." 
1Kings8:6 Ipapo vaprista vakagadzika areka yesungano yaJehovha panzvimbo yayo, panzvimbo tsvene yeimba, panzvimbo tsvene-tsvene, ipo panyasi pamapapiro amakerubhi." 
1Kings8:7 Nokuti makerubhi akatambanudza mapapiro awo pamusoro penzvimbo yeareka, makerubhi akafukidza areka namatanda ayo nechokumusoro." 
1Kings8:8 Matanda akanga akareba; naizvozvo miromo yamatanda yakanga ichionekwa kana munhu ari panzvimbo tsvene pamberi penzvimbo pangataura Jehovha; asi akanga asingawonekwi nechokunze; achiripo kusvikira nhasi. 
1Kings8:9 Mukati meareka makanga musisine chinhu, asi mabwendefa maviri amabwe, akanga aiswamo naMozisi paHorebhu, nguva Jehovha yaakaita sungano nayo navana vaIsiraeri pakubuda kwavo panyika" 
1Kings8:10 Zvino vaprista vakati vabuda panzvimbo tsvene, gore rikazadza imba yaJehovha," 
1Kings8:11 naizvozvo vaprista vakanga vasingagoni kumira pabasa nokuda kwegore; nokuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakazadza imba yaJehovha. 
1Kings8:12 Ipapo Soromoni akati, ""Jehovha wakati, ndinoda kugara mukati merima guru." 
1Kings8:13 Zvirokwazvo, ndakakuvakirai imba pamungagara, nzvimbo mamungagara nokusingaperi.""" 
1Kings8:14 Zvino mambo akatendeudza chiso chake, akaropafadza ungano yose yaIsiraeri, ungano yose yaIsiraeri ikasimuka." 
1Kings8:15 Akati, ""Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakudzwe, iye wakataura nomuromo wake naDhavhidhi baba vangu, akazvizadzisa noruoko rwake, achiti," 
1Kings8:16 'Kubva pazuva randakabudisa vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri paIjipiti, handina kutsaura guta rimwe pamarudzi ose aIsiraeri, pavangandivakira imba, kuti zita rangu rigarepo; asi ndakatsaura Dhavhidhi abate vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.' """ 
1Kings8:17 Zvino Dhavhidhi baba vangu vakanga vachida kuvakira zita raJehovha Mwari walsiraeri imba. 
1Kings8:18 Asi Jehovha wakati kuna Dhavhidhi baba vangu, ""Wakaita zvakanaka, zvawakanga uchida kuvakira zita rangu imba." 
1Kings8:19 Kunyange zvakadaro iwe haungavaki imba iyo, asi mwanakomana wako wauchabereka, ndiye uchavakira zita rangu imba.""" 
1Kings8:20 Zvino Jehovha wasimbisa shoko rake raakataura, nokuti ini ndamuka panzvimbo yaDhavhidhi baba vangu, ndikagara pachigaro choushe chaIsiraeri, sezvakapikira Jehovha, ndikavakira zita raJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, imba." 
1Kings8:21 Imomo ndakagadzirira areka nzvimbo, imo munesungano yaJehovha, yaakaita namadzibaba edu panguva yaakavabudisa panyika yeIjipiti." 
1Kings8:22 Zvino Soromoni akamira pamberi pearitari yaJehovha, pamberi peungano yose yalsiraeri, akatambanudzira maoko ake kudenga," 
1Kings8:23 akati, ""Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, hakuna mumwe Mwari wakafanana nemwi kudenga kumusoro kana panyika pasi; munorangarira sungano nenyasha kuvaranda venyu, vanofamba pamberi penyu nomoyo wavo wose." 
1Kings8:24 Imi makaitira muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu, sezvamakamupikira; makataura nomuromo wenyu, mukazviita noruoko rwenyu, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
1Kings8:25 Naizvozvo zvino, Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, itirai muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu sezvamakamupikira, muchiti, `Haungashaiwi munhu uchagara pachigaro choushe chaIsiraeri pamberi pangu, kana vana vako vakangwarira kufamba kwavo, vakafamba pamberi pangu, sezvawakafamba iwe pamberi pangu.'" 
1Kings8:26 Naizvozvo zvino, Mwari waIsiraeri, ndinokumbira kuti shoko renyu riitike, iro ramakataura kumuranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu." 
1Kings8:27 Ko mukati Mwari ungagara panyika here? Tarira, denga nokudenga-denga hazvingamuringani; ndoda imba ino yandakavaka!" 
1Kings8:28 Kunyange zvakadaro, ivai nehanya nomunyengetero womuranda wenyu, nokukumbira kwake, Jehovha Mwari wangu, munzwe kudanidzira nokunyengetera komuranda wenyu, kwaanonyengetera pamberi penyu nhasi;" 
1Kings8:29 meso enyu arambe achirindira imba ino usiku namasikati, nzvimbo iyi yamakataura pamusoro payo, muchiti, `Zita rangu richagarapo;' inzwai munyengetero womuranda wenyu waanozonyengetera akatarira kunzvimbo ino." 
1Kings8:30 Inzwai kukumbira komuranda wenyu, nokwavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, kana vachizonyengetera vakatarira kunzvimbo ino; donzwai henyu iko kudenga, kwamunogara; zvino kana mukanzwa, muvakangamwire henyu." 
1Kings8:31 Kana munhu achinge atadzira waanogara naye, akapikiswa mhiko, akauya akapika pamberi pearitari yenyu muimba ino," 
1Kings8:32 inzwai iko kudenga, muite, mururamisire varanda venyu, mupe wakaipa mhosva, arobwe pamusoro pomufambiro wake; asi mururamisire wakarurama, apiwe zvakafanira kururama kwake." 
1Kings8:33 Kana vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri vachinge vakundwa navavengi vavo, nemhaka yokuti vakanga vakutadzirai; kana vakadzokerazve kwamuri, vakatenda zita renyu, vakanyengetera kwamuri nokukumbira muimba ino;" 
1Kings8:34 inzwai iko kudenga, mukangamwire zvivi zvavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, muvadzoserezve kunyika yamakapa madzibaba avo." 
1Kings8:35 Kana denga richinge razarirwa, mvura ikasanaya nemhaka yokuti vakanga vakutadzirai; kana vakanyengetera vakatarira kunzvimbo ino, vakatenda zita renyu, vakatendeuka pazvivi zvavo, nokuti munenge mavarova;" 
1Kings8:36 inzwai iko kudenga, mukangamwire zvivi zvavaranda venyu, nezvevanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, nokuti munovadzidzisa nzira yakanaka yavanofanira kufamba nayo; munise mvura panyika iyo yamakapa vanhu venyu kuti ive nhaka yavo." 
1Kings8:37 Kana nzara ikavapo panyika, kana denda rikavapo, kana nyunje nokuvhuvha zvikavapo, nemhashu nehonye; kana vavengi vavo vakavakomba panyika ina maguta avo; kana nyatwa kana hosha ipi neipi ikavapo;" 
1Kings8:38 kana munhu upi noupi, kana vanhu venyu vose vaIsiraeri vakanyengetera kana kukumbira, mumwe nomumwe achiziva kutambudzika kuri pamoyo pake, akatambanudzira maoko ake kuimba ino;" 
1Kings8:39 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kwamunogara, mukangamwire, muite, muripire mumwe nomumwe zvakafanira mufambiro wake wose, iye wamunoziva moyo wake; nokuti imi, imwi moga, ndimi munoziva moyo yavana vavanhu vose;" 
1Kings8:40 kuti vakutyei mazuva ose oupenyu hwavo panyika yamakapa madzibaba edu. 
1Kings8:41 Zvino kana ari mutorwa, asati ari wavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, kana akabva kunyika iri kure nokuda kwezita renyu;" 
1Kings8:42 nokuti vachazonzwa mukurumbira wezita renyu guru, noworuoko rwenyu rune simba, noruoko rwenyu rwakatambanudzwa kana akauya akanyengetera akatarira kuimba ino;" 
1Kings8:43 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kwamunogara, muitire mutorwa zvose sezvaanokumbira, kuti vanhu vose venyika vazive zita renyu, vakutyei, sezvinoita vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, vazive kuti imba ino yandakavaka yakatumidzwa zita renyu." 
1Kings8:44 Kana vanhu venyu vakandorwa navavengi vavo, vakaenda nenzira ipi neipi yamuchavatuma nayo, vakanyengetera kuna Jehovha vakatarira kuguta ramakatsaura, nokuimba yandakavakira zita renyu," 
1Kings8:45 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kunyengetera kwavo nokukumbira kwavo, muvaruramisire." 
1Kings8:46 Kana vakakutadzirai, (nokuti hakuna munhu usingatadzi), mukavatsamwira, mukavaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo, vakatapwa kunyika yavavengi vavo, kure kana pedo;" 
1Kings8:47 kana vakazozvifunga kunyika kwavakatapirwa, vakadzokazve, vakakumbira kwamuri panyika yavatapi vavo, vachiti, `Tatadza, taita zvakaipa, taita zvisakarurama;'" 
1Kings8:48 kana vakadzokerazve kwamuri nomoyo wavo wose, nomweya wavo wose, panyika yavavengi vavo vakavatapa; kana vakanyengetera kwamuri vakatarira kunyika yavo, yamakapa madzibaba avo, kuguta ramakatsaurirwa nokuimba yandakavakira zita renyu." 
1Kings8:49 Inzwai henyu kunyengetera kwavo nokukumbira kwavo iko kudenga kwamunogara, muvaruramisire;" 
1Kings8:50 mu kangamwire vanhu venyu vakakutadzirai, nokudarika kwavo kose, kwavakadarika nako kwamuri; muvawanise tsitsi kunavakavatapa, kuti vavanzwire nyasha;" 
1Kings8:51 nokuti ndivo vanhu venyu, nenhaka yenyu, yamakabudisa Ijipiti pakati pevira ramatare;" 
1Kings8:52 meso enyu ngaawone kukumbira komuranda wenyu, nokukumbira kwavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, kuti muvanzwe nguva ipi neipi yavanochema kwamuri." 
1Kings8:53 Nokuti imwi Jehovha, makavatsaura kundudzi dzose dzenyika, vave nhaka yenyu, sezvamakataura nomuromo waMozisi muranda wenyu, nguva yamakabudisa madzibaba edu paIjipiti.""" 
1Kings8:54 Zvino Soromoni wakati apedza kunyengetera kuna Jehovha munyengetero uyu wose nokukumbira uku, akasimuka pamberi pearitari yaJehovha, paakanga akapfugama namabvi ake, maoko ake akatambanudzirwa kudenga." 
1Kings8:55 Akamira akaropafadza ungano yose yaIsiraeri nenzwi guru, akati," 
1Kings8:56 Jehovha ngaakudzwe, wakapa vanhu vake kuzorora, sezvaakatipa zvose; hapana shoko rimwe pazvose zvakanaka zvaakatipikira rakakona, izvo zvaakatipikira nomuromo waMozisi muranda wake." 
1Kings8:57 Jehovha wedu ngaave nesu, sezvaaiva namadzibaba edu; ngaarege kutisiya, kana kutirasha;" 
1Kings8:58 kuti arerekese moyo yedu kwaari, tifambe panzira dzake dzose, tichengete mirairo yake, nezvaakatema, nezvaakatonga, izvo zvaakaraira madzibaba edu." 
1Kings8:59 Zvino mashoko awa andakakumbira nawo pamberi paJehovha, ngaagare pedo naJehovha Mwari wedu masikati nousiku, aruramisire muranda wake, navanhu vake vaIsiraeri, panodikamwa napo zuva rimwe nerimwe;" 
1Kings8:60 kuti vanhu vose venyika vazive kuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari, hakuna mumwe.""" 
1Kings8:61 Naizvozvo moyo yenyu ive yakarurama kwazvo kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu, mufambe pane zvaakatema, nokuchengeta mirairo yake, sezvamunoita nhasi." 
1Kings8:62 Zvino mambo navalsiraeri vose pamwechete naye vakabayira zvibayiro pamberi paJehovha. 
1Kings8:63 Soromoni akabayira zvipiriso zvokuyananisa, zvaakabayira Jehovha, nzombe dzine zviuru zvina makumi maviri nezviviri, namakwai ane zviuru zvine zana namakumi maviri. Naizvozvo mambo navana vaIsiraeri vose vakatsaurira Jehovha imba iyo." 
1Kings8:64 Nomusi uyo mambo akatsaurawo nzvimbo yapakati yoruvazhe rwakanga ruri pamberi peimba yaJehovha, nokuti ndipo paakabayira chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu, namafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; nokuti aritari yendarira, yaiva pamberi paJehovha, yakanga iri duku kwazvo, isingagoni kuringana chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu, namafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa." 
1Kings8:65 Naizvozvo Soromoni akatamba mutambo nguva iyo yose, navaIsiraeri vose pamwechete naye, vakaita ungano huru, kubva pavanopinda paHamati kusvikira parukova rweIjipiti, pamberi paJehovha Mwari wedu, mazuva manomwe namazuva manomwezve ndiwo mazuva ane gumi namana." 
1Kings8:66 Pazuva rorusere akaendisa vanhu, ivo vakatenda mambo, vakaenda kumatende avo nemoyo yakanga ichifara, ichifarira zvakanaka zvose zvakanga zvaitirwa Dhavhidhi muranda wake naIsiraeri vanhu vake naJehovha." 
1Kings9:1 Zvino Soromoni wakati apedza kuvaka imba yaJehovha, neimba yamambo, nezvose Soromoni zvaakanga achida kuita," 
1Kings9:2 Jehovha akazviratidza kuna Soromoni rwechipiri, sezvaakazviratidza kwaari paGibhiyoni." 
1Kings9:3 Jehovha akati kwaari, ""Ndakanzwa kunyengetera kwako nokukumbira kwako kwawakaita pamberi pangu; ndakatsaura imba iyi yawakavaka, kuti ndiise zita rangupo nokusingaperi; meso angu nomoyo wangu zvichavapo nguva dzose." 
1Kings9:4 Kana uriwe, kana ukafamba pamberi pangu sababa vako Dhavhidhi nomoyo usinganyengeri, nokururama, ukaita zvose zvandakakuraira ukachengeta zvandatema nezvandatonga," 
1Kings9:5 ipapo ini ndichasimbisa chigaro chako choushe pakati paIsiraeri nokusingaperi, sezvandakapikira baba vako Dhavhidhi, ndichiti, Haungashaiwi munhu uchagara pachigaro choushe chaIsiraeri," 
1Kings9:6 Asi kana mukatsauka pakunditevera, imwi kana vana venyu, mukasachengeta mirairo yangu nezvandatema zvandakaisa pamberi penyu, asi mukandoshumira vamwe vamwari, mukanamata kwavari;" 
1Kings9:7 ipapo ndichaparadza Isiraeri panyika yandakavapa; neimba iyi yandakatsaurira zita rangu, ndichairashira kure ndirege kuiona, vaIsiraeri vachava shumo nechiseko pakati pavanhu vose;" 
1Kings9:8 uye imba iyi kunyange yakakwirira ikadai, vose vanopfuura nayo vachakanuka nokuridza muridzo, vachiti, Jehovha wakaitireiko kudai nenyika ino uye neimba ino?'" 
1Kings9:9 Vachapindura, vachiti, Nokuti vakasiya Jehovha Mwari wavo, wakanga abudisa madzibaba avo munyika yeIjipiti, vakanamatira vamwe vamwari, vakanamata kwavari, nokuvashumira; saka Jehovha wakavapinza panjodzi idzi dzose.'" 
1Kings9:10 Makore ana makumi maviri akati apera, Soromoni aakavaka nawo dzimba idzi mbiri, iyo imba yaJehovha neimba yamambo;" 
1Kings9:11 (zvino Hiramu mambo weTire wakanga atsvakira Soromoni misidhari; nemisipiresi, nendarama, nezvose zvaakanga achida), mambo Soromoni akapa Hiramu maguta ana makumi maviri panyika yeGarire." 
1Kings9:12 Hiramu akabva Tire kuzoona maguta aakanga apiwa naSoromoni, asi haana kumufadza." 
1Kings9:13 Akati, ""Maguta kunyiko awa awandipa, hama yangu?"" Akatumidza nyika yeKabhuri kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
1Kings9:14 Hiramu akatumira mambo matarenda endarama ane zana namakumi maviri. 
1Kings9:15 Zvino ndiro shoko rechibharo chakarairwa namambo Soromoni, kuzovaka imba yaJehovha, neimba yake, neMiro, norusvingo rweJerusaremu, neHazori, neMegidho, neGezeri." 
1Kings9:16 Farao mambo weIjipiti wakanga andokunda Gezeri, akaripisa nomoto, akauraya vaKanani vakanga vagere muguta, akaripa mukunda wake, mukadzi waSoromoni." 
1Kings9:17 Soromoni akavaka Gezeri, neBhe- tihoroni rezasi," 
1Kings9:18 naBharati, neTamari, murenje munyika iyo," 
1Kings9:19 namaguta ose amatura aSoromoni, namaguta engoro dzake, namaguta avatasvi vamabhiza ake, nezvose Soromoni zvaaida kuzvivakira paJerusaremu, napaRebhanoni, napanyika yose yakanga yakabatwa naye." 
1Kings9:20 Kuvanhu vose vakanga vasara vavaAmori, navaHeti, navaPerezi, navaHivhi navaJebhusi, vakanga vasi vana vaIsiraeri;" 
1Kings9:21 navana vavo vakanga vasara panyika shure kwavo, ivo vana vaIsiraeri vakanga vasingagoni kuvaparadza chose kuna ivavo Soromoni wakaraira chibharo chavaranda kusvikira nhasi."
