1Chronicles29:15 Nokuti tiri vaeni pamberi penyu navatorwa, sezvakanga zvakaita madzibaba edu; mazuva edu panyika akafanana nomumvuri, hakune tariro." 
1Chronicles29:16 Jehovha Mwari wedu, izvi zvose zvakawanda zvatakagadzira kukuvakirai imba yezita renyu dzvene, zvinobva paruoko rwenyu; zvose ndezvenyu;" 
1Chronicles29:17 ndinozivawo Mwari wangu, kuti imwi munoidzawo moyo, munofanira kurarama. Kana ndirini, ndakapa izvi zvose nomoyo wakarurama nomoyo wose; zvino ndakafara ndichiona vanhu venyu vari pano vachikupai nomoyo wose." 
1Chronicles29:18 Jehovha Mwari waAbhurahamu, nalsaka, naIsiraeri, madzibaba edu, garisai izvi nokusingaperi pandangariro dzemifungo yemoyo yavanhu venyu; rereudzai moyo yavo kwamuri," 
1Chronicles29:19 ipai Soromoni mwanakomana wangu moyo wakarurama, kuti achengete mirairo yenyu, nezvipupuriro zvenyu, nezvamakatema, kuti aite zvinhu izvi zvose, avake imba huru yandakagadzirira zvose.""" 
1Chronicles29:20 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati kuungano yose, ""Zvino kudzai Jehovha Mwari wenyu."" Ipapo ungano yakakudza Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo, vakakotamisa misoro yavo, vakanamata kuna Jehovha namambo." 
1Chronicles29:21 Vakabayira Jehovha zvibayiro, vakauya nezvipiriso zvinopiswa kuna Jehovha mangwanani pazuva rakatevera, zvaiti: nzombe dzine chiuru chimwe, namakondobwe ane chiuru chimwe, namakwaiana ane chiuru chimwe, pamwechete nezvipiriso zvazvo zvinodururwa, nezvibayiro zvakawanda zvavaIsiraeri vose;" 
1Chronicles29:22 vakadya, vakamwa pamberi paJehovha nomufaro mukuru nezuva iro. Vakaita Soromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi mambo rwechipiri, vakamuzodzera Jehovha ave mutungamiriri, naZadhoki ave muprista." 
1Chronicles29:23 Ipapo Soromoni akagara pachigaro choushe chaJehovha akava mambo panzvimbo yaDhavhidhi baba vake, akafambiswa zvakanaka; vaIsiraeri vose vakamuteerera." 
1Chronicles29:24 Machinda ose, navanhu vose vane simba, navanakomana vose vamambo Dhavhidhi vakazviisa pasi pamambo Soromoni." 
1Chronicles29:25 Jehovha akakudza Soromoni kwazvo-kwazvo pamberi pavaIsiraeri vose, akamupa umambo hwakakura, husina kumbopiwa mumwe mambo waIsiraeri wakamutangira." 
1Chronicles29:26 Zvino Dhavhidhi mwanakomana waJese akabata valsiraeri vose paushe hwake. 
1Chronicles29:27 Nguva yaakabata ushe hwaIsiraeri aiva makore makumi mana; wakabata ushe paHebhuroni makore manomwe, napaJerusaremu akabata ushe makore makumi matatu namatatu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Akazofa akwegura kwazvo, ava namakore mazhinji, nefuma, nokukudzwa; Soromoni mwanakomana wake akabata ushe panzvimbo yake." 
1Chronicles29:29 Zvino mabasa amambo Dhavhidhi, okutanga nookupedzisira, tarirai, akanyorwa pamashoko omuoni Samueri, napamashoko omuprista Natani, napamashoko omuoni Gadhi;" 
1Chronicles29:30 pamwechete namashoko oushe hwake, nesimba rake, nezvaakaitirwa panguva dzose, iye navaIsiraeri, noushe hwose bwedzimwe nyika." 
2Chronicles1:1 Zvino Soromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi akasimbiswa paushe hwake, Jehovha Mwari wake akava naye, akamukurisa zvikuru kwazvo." 
2Chronicles1:2 Zvino Soromoni akataura navaIsiraeri vose, navakuru vezviuru navamazana, navatongi, namachinda ose pakati paIsiraeri vose, ivo vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba." 
2Chronicles1:3 Ipapo Soromoni neungano yose pamwechete naye vakaenda kudunhu rakakwirira raiva paGibhiyoni; nokuti ndipo pakanga pane tende rokusangana raMwari, rakanga ravakwa murenje naMozisi muranda waJehovha." 
2Chronicles1:4 Asi Dhavhidhi akanga atora areka yaMwari paKiriatijearimi, akaiisa panzvimbo, Dhavhidhi yaakanga aigadzirira; nokuti akanga aidzikira tende paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles1:5 Neareka yendarira yakanga yaumbwa naBhezareri mwanakomana waUri, mwanakomana waHuri, yakanga iripo pamberi petabhenakeri yaJehovha; Soromoni neungano yose vakairangarira." 
2Chronicles1:6 Soromoni akakwirako pamberi paJehovha kuaritari yendarira, yakanga iri patende rokusangana, akabayira pamusoro payo zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvine chiuru chezana." 
2Chronicles1:7 Zvino nousiku uhwo Mwari akazviratidza kuna Soromoni, akati kwaari, ""Kumbira chaunoda kuti ndikupe.""" 
2Chronicles1:8 Soromoni akati kuna Mwari Makaitira baba vangu Dhavhidhi tsitsi huru, mukandiita ini mambo panzvimbo yavo." 
2Chronicles1:9 Zvino Jehovha Mwari, shoko ramakapikira Dhavhidhi baba vangu ngarisimbiswe; nokuti makandiita mambo wavanhu vakafanana neguruva renyika pakuwanda kwavo." 
2Chronicles1:10 Zvino ndipei henyu njere nokuziva, kuti ndibude nokupinda pamberi pavanhu ava; nokuti ndiani angagona kutonga vanhu venyu ava vakawanda vakadai?""" 
2Chronicles1:11 Mwari akati kuna Soromoni, ""Zvawarangarira chinhu ichi mumoyo mako, ukasakumbira fuma, nezvakawanda, kana kukudzwa, kana kufa kwavavengi vako, kana kukumbira upenyu urefu, asi wakazvikumbirira njere nokuziva, kuti ugone kutonga vanhu vangu, vandakakuita mambo wavo;" 
2Chronicles1:12 zvino njere nokuziva unozvipiwa iwe; uye ndichakupa fuma, nezvakawanda, nokukudzwa, zvisina kumbopiwa mumwe wamadzibaba akakutangira; uye hapana mumwe achakutevera uchava nezvakadai.""" 
2Chronicles1:13 Zvino Soromoni akabva panzvimbo yakakwirira yakanga iri paGibhiyoni, pamberi petende rokusangana, akasvika Jerusaremu, akabata ushe hwaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles1:14 Soromoni akaunganidza ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza; akanga ane ngoro dzine chiuru chimwe namazana mana, navatasvi vamabhiza vane zviuru zvine gumi nezviviri, vaakaisa mumaguta engoro nokuna mambo paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Mambo akaunganidza sirivha nendarama paJerusaremu zvikawanda zvikaita samabwe, nemisidhari ikaita semionde yaiva pamapani." 
2Chronicles1:16 Mabhiza aSoromoni aaiva nawo, aibva Ijipiti; vatengesi vamambo vaindoatorako vachiita mapoka-mapoka, boka rimwe nerimwe rino mutengo waro." 
2Chronicles1:17 Vakandozvitora Ijipiti, vakauya nazvo, ngoro imwe neimwe ichitengwa namashekeri esirivha ana mazana matanhatu, nebhiza rimwe nerimwe namashekeri ane zana namakumi mashanu; saizvozvowo madzimambo ose avaHiti, namadzimambo avaSiria aivigirwa izvozvo navo." 
2Chronicles2:1 Zvino Soromoni akada kuvakira zita raJehovha imba, neimba youshe hwake." 
2Chronicles2:2 Soromoni akaverenga varume vane zviuru zvina makumi manomwe kuzotakura mitoro, navarume vane zviuru zvina makumi masere kuzotema matanda pamakomo, navane zviuru zvitatu namazana matanhatu kuzova vatariri vavo." 
2Chronicles2:3 Soromoni akatuma shoko kuna Hurami mambo weTire, akati, ""Sezvamakaitira baba vangu Dhavhidhi, mukavatumira misidhari yokuzvivakira nayo imba yokugaramo, mundiitirewo saizvozvo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Tarirai, ndovakira zita raJehovha Mwari wangu imba, ndimutsaurire iyo, kuti ndipisire pamberi pake zvinonhuhwira zvemiti yakanaka, nokuisapo zvingwa zvokuratidza zvenguva dzose nezvipiriso zvinopiswa mangwanani namadekwana, pamaSabata, napakugara komwedzi, napamitambo yakatarwa naJehovha Mwari wedu. Ndizvo zvakarairwa vaIsiraeri nokusingaperi." 
2Chronicles2:5 Imba yandinovaka ihuru; nokuti Mwari wedu mukuru kupfuura vamwari vose. 
2Chronicles2:6 Asi ndianiko anogona kumuvakira imba, denga nokudenga-denga zvarisingagoni kumuringana? Zvino ini ndini aniko, kuti ndimuvakire imba, asi kungopisa zvinonhuhwira pamberi pake?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Naizvozvo zvino chinditumirai murume akangwara pakubata mabasa endarama, nesirivha, nendarira, namatare, nemicheka mishava, nemitsvuku, nemitema, uye anoziva kuveza zvose, abate pamwechete navarume vakangwara vandinavo paJudha napaJerusaremu, vakaiswapo nababa vangu Dhavhidhi." 
2Chronicles2:8 Nditumireiwo misidhari, nemisipiresi, namatanda emiarigumi yapaRibhanoni; nokuti ndinoziva kuti varanda venyu, vane njere dzokutema matanda paRibhanoni; tarirai varanda vangu vachava navaranda venyu," 
2Chronicles2:9 kundigadzirira matanda akawanda; nokuti imba yandobva ndovaka ichava huru zvinoshamisa. 
2Chronicles2:10 Tarirai, ndichapa varanda venyu, ivo vanotema matanda, zviyero zvine zviuru zvamakumi maviri zvezviyo, nezviyero zvine zviuru zvamakumi maviri zvebhari, namabhati ane zviuru zvamakumi maviri ewaini, namabhati ane zviuru zvamakumi maviri amafuta.""" 
2Chronicles2:11 Ipapo Hurami mambo weTire akapindura mutsamba yaakatuma kuna Soromoni, akati, ""Jehovha akada vanhu vake, saka akakuita mambo wavo.""" 
2Chronicles2:12 Hurami akatiwo, ""Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakudzwe, iye akasika denga napasi, akapa mambo Dhavhidhi mwanakomana akangwara, akapiwa kungwara nokuziva, kuvakira Jehovha imba neimba youshe hwake." 
2Chronicles2:13 Zvino ndatuma munhu akachenjera, akapiwa zivo, iye Hurami Abhi," 
2Chronicles2:14 mwanakomana womukadzi pakati pavakunda vaDhani, baba vake aiva munhu weTire, anoziva kubata mabasa endarama, nesirivha, nendarira, namatare, namabwe, namatanda, nemicheka mishava, nemitema, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, nemicheka mitsvuku; uye kuveza kose, nokufunga mano ose; iye ngaapiwe ugaro pakati pavarume venyu vakachenjera, navarume vakachenjera vashe wangu Dhavhidhi baba venyu." 
2Chronicles2:15 Naizvozvo zvino ishe wangu ngaatumire varanda vake zviyo, nebhari, namafuta newaini, sezvaakataura;" 
2Chronicles2:16 isu tichatema matanda paRebhanoni, sezvamunoda; tichaasvitsa kwamuri akabatanidzwa, aende Jopa negungwa; imwi mugokwira nawo Jerusaremu.""" 
2Chronicles2:17 Ipapo Soromoni akaverenga vatorwa vose vaiva panyika yaIsiraeri, sezvavakanga vaverengwa naDhavhidhi baba vake, vakasvika zviuru zvine zana namakumi mashanu nezvitatu namazana matanhatu." 
2Chronicles2:18 Akaraira vane zviuru zvina makumi manomwe vave vatakuri vemitoro, navane zviuru zvina makumi masere vateme matanda pamakomo, uye vane zviuru zvitatu namazana matanhatu vave vatariri kuzoraira vanhu pakubata." 
2Chronicles3:1 Ipapo Soromoni akatanga kuvaka imba yaJehovha paJerusaremu pagomo reMoria, pakanga pazviratidza Jehovha kuna Dhavhidhi baba vake, akagadzira ipapo pakanga parairwa naDhavhidhi paburiro raOrinani muJebhusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Akatanga kuvaka pazuva repiri romwedzi wechipiri, negore rechina rokubata kwake ushe." 
2Chronicles3:3 Zvino ndidzo nheyo dzakavambwa naSoromoni pakuvaka imba yaMwari; kureba kwayo, kana vachienzanisa namakubhiti akare, makubhiti ana makumi matanhatu, noupamhi makubhiti makumi maviri." 
2Chronicles3:4 Biravira, raiva pamberi peimba, kureba kwaro kwakanga kwakafanana noupamhi bweimba, makubhiti makumi maviri, nokukwirira kwaro makubhiti ane zana namakumi maviri, akaifukidza nechomukati nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
2Chronicles3:5 Akafukidza imba huru namatanda omusipiresi, akafukidzwa nendarama yakaisvonaka, akavezera pamusoro pawo muchindwe namaketani." 
2Chronicles3:6 Akashongedza imba ukomba hwamabwe anokosha; ndarama yakanga iri ndarama yeParivhaimi. 
2Chronicles3:7 Akafukidzawo imba nendarama, namatanda ayo, nezvikumbaridzo zvayo, namadziro ayo, namagonhi ayo; akavezera makerubhi pamadziro." 
2Chronicles3:8 Akavakawo imba tsvene-tsvene; kureba kwayo kwakanga kwakafanana nohupamhi bweimba, makubhiti ana makumi maviri, noupamhi hwayo makubhiti ana makumi maviri; akaifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka yakasvika matarenda* mazana matanhatu." 
2Chronicles3:9 Kurema kwembambo kwakasvika mashekeri endarama ana makumi mashanu. Akafukidza makamuri okumusoro nendarama. 
2Chronicles3:10 Paimba tsvene-tsvene akaita makerubhi maviri zviri zvifananidzo zvakavezwa; akaafukidza nendarama. 
2Chronicles3:11 Mapapiro amakerubhi akasvika makubhiti ana makumi maviri pakureba kwawo; bapiro rerimwe rakanga rina makubhiti mashanu, richisvika kumadziro eimba; nerimwe bapirowo rakanga rina makubhiti mashanu, richisvika kubapiro rerimwe kerubhi." 
2Chronicles3:12 Nebapiro rerimwe kerubhi rakanga rina makubhiti mashanu, richisvika kumadziro eimba; nerimwe bapirowo rakanga rina makubhiti mashanu, richibatana nebapiro rerimwe kerubhi." 
2Chronicles3:13 Mapapiro amakerubhi awa akanga akatambanudzwa, akasvika makubhiti makumi maviri; akanga amire namakumbo awo, zviso zvawo zvakaringira kumba." 
2Chronicles3:14 Akaitawo chidzitiro nezvakarukwa zvitema, nezvishava, nezvitsvuku, nomucheka wakaisvonaka-naka; akasonerapo makerubhi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Akaitawo pamberi peimba mbiru mbiri; kukwirira kwadzo kwakasvika makubhiti ana makumi matatu namashanu, nomusoro wakanga uri pamusoro peimwe neimwe wakasvika makubhiti mashanu." 
2Chronicles3:16 Akaitawo maketani panzvimbo tsvene, akaaisa pamisoro yembiru; akaita matamba ane zana, akaaisa pamaketani." 
2Chronicles3:17 Akamisa mbiru mbiri pamberi petemberi, imwe kurudyi, imwe kuruboshwe; yokurudyi akaitumidza zita rinonzi Jakini, neyokuruboshwe akaitumidza Bhowasi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Akaitawo aritari yendarira, kureba kwayo kwakanga kuna makubhiti ana makumi maviri, nokukwirira kwayo ane gumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Akaitawo dziva rendarira yakanyauswa, rakasvika makubhiti ane gumi paupamhi pamuromo, rakatenderera; nokukwirira kwaro kwakasvika makubhiti mashanu; uye pakuyera rwonzi rwakasvika makubhiti ana makumi matatu rwakaripoteredza." 
2Chronicles4:3 Pasi paro pakanga pane zvifananidzo zvenzombe dzakanga dzichirikomberedza, zvichiita gumi pakubhiti rimwe nerimwe, zvichipoteredza dziva. Nzombe dzakaita misara miviri, dzakaumbwa pamwechete naro pakuumbwa kwaro." 
2Chronicles4:4 Rakanga rimire pamusoro penzombe gumi nembiri, nhatu dzakanga dzakatarira kurutivi rwokumusoro, nhatu kurutivi rwamavirazuva, nhatu kurutivi rwezasi, nenhatu kurutivi rwamabvazuva; dziva rakanga rakagadzwa pamusoro padzo, idzo dzakafuratirana." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ukobvu hwaro hwakanga hwakaita soupamhi bwechanza, nomuromo waro wakanga wakafanana nomuromo wembiya, seruva rehapa; mukati makadirwa uye makaringana mabhati ane zviuru zvitatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Akaitawo midziyo yokusukira ine gumi, akaisa mishanu kurudyi nemishanu kuruboshwe, yokusukiramo; zvinhu zvezvipiriso, zvaipiswa, zvaisukirwamo; asi dziva rakanga riri ravaprista rokushambidziramo." 
2Chronicles4:7 Akaitawo zvigadziko zvemwenje zvine gumi zvendarama, sezvaakanga arairwa pamusoro pazvo; akazviisa patemberi, zvishanu kurudyi uye zvishanu kuruboshwe." 
2Chronicles4:8 Akaitawo tafura dzine gumi, akadziisa mutemberi, shanu kurudyi uye shanu kuruboshwe. Akaita midziyo yendarama ine zana." 
2Chronicles4:9 Uye akaitawo ruvazhe rwavaprista, noruvazhe rukuru, nemikova yoruvazhe, akafukidza mikova yarwo nendarira." 
2Chronicles4:10 Akaisa dziva kurutivi rworudyi rweimba kumabvazuva, kwakatarira zasi." 
2Chronicles4:11 Hurami akaita hari, nefoshoro, nembiya. Naizvozvo Hurami akapedza mabasa ose aakaitira Soromoni paimba yaJehovha;" 
2Chronicles4:12 zvaiti: mbiru mbiri, nembiya, nemisoro miviri, yakanga iri pamisoro yembiru; nemimbure miviri yokufukidza nayo mbiya mbiri dzemisoro miviri yakanga iri pamisoro yembiru;" 
2Chronicles4:13 namatamba ana mazana mana emimbure miviri, misara miviri yamatamba pamumbure mumwe nomumwe, kufukidza mbiya mbiri yemisoro yakanga iri pamusoro pembiru;" 
2Chronicles4:14 akaitawo zvingoro zvine gumi, nemidziyo yokushambidzira pamusoro pezvingoro;" 
2Chronicles4:15 nedziva rimwe, nenzombe gumi nembiri pasi pedziva." 
2Chronicles4:16 Nehariwo, nefoshoro, nezvikokovonho zvenyama, nenhumbi dzose dzayo, Hurami Abhi wakazviitira mambo Soromoni nendarira inobwinya, zvive zveimba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles4:17 Mambo akazviumba pabani raJorodhani, pakati peSukoti neZeredha." 
2Chronicles4:18 Saizvozvo Soromoni akaita nhumbi dzose idzi dzakawanda kwazvo; nokuti kurema kwendarira kwakanga kusingayerwi. 
2Chronicles4:19 Soromoni akaita nhumbi dzose dzakanga dziri mumba maMwari, nearitari yendarirawo netafura pakanga pane zvingwa zvokuratidza;" 
2Chronicles4:20 nezvigadziko zvemwenje nemwenje yazvo, kuti ipfute pamberi penzvimbo tsvene, sezvavakanga varairwa, zviri zvendarama;" 
2Chronicles4:21 namaruva, nemwenje, nembato, zvendarama, iri pandarama yakanaka kwazvo;" 
2Chronicles4:22 nembato, nembiya, nezvirongo, nezvaenga zvomoto, zviri zvendarama yakaisvonaka; napavakapinda napo paimba, mikova yomukati yayo yenzvimbo tsvene-tsvene; nemikova yeimba, iyo temberi, yakanga iri yendarama." 
2Chronicles5:1 Saizvozvo mabasa ose akaitirwa imba yaJehovha naSoromoni akapera. Zvino Soromoni akapinza zvinhu zvakanga zvatsaurirwa Jehovha nababa vake Dhavhidhi, sirivha, nendarama, nenhumbi dzose, akadziisa muzvivigiro zveimba yaMwari." 
2Chronicles5:2 Zvino Soromoni akaunganidza vakuru valsiraeri, navakuru vose vamarudzi, iwo machinda edzimba dzamadzibaba avana vaIsiraeri, paJerusaremu, akakwidza areka yesungano yaJehovha ibve paguta raDhavhidhi, iro Ziyoni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Varume vose vaIsiraeri vakaungana kuna mambo pamutambo, wakanga uri pamwedzi wechinomwe." 
2Chronicles5:4 Vakuru vose vaIsiraeri vakasvika, vaRevhi vakasimudza areka." 
2Chronicles5:5 Vakakwira neareka, netende rokusangana, nenhumbi dzose tsvene dzakanga dziri muTende; vaprista vaRevhi vakakwira naizvozvo." 
2Chronicles5:6 Mambo Soromoni, neungano yose yavaIsiraeri yakanga yaunganira kwaari, vakafamba pamberi peareka, vakabayira makwai nenzombe, zvakanga zvisingagoni kuverengwa nokuwanda kwazvo." 
2Chronicles5:7 Ipapo vaprista vakagadzika areka yesungano yaJehovha panzvimbo yayo, panzvimbo tsvene yeimba, panzvimbo tsvene-tsvene, ipo panyasi pamapapiro amakerubhi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Nokuti makerubhi akatambanudza mapapiro awo pamusoro penzvimbo yeareka, makerubhi akafukidza areka namatanda ayo nechokumusoro." 
2Chronicles5:9 Matanda akanga akareba; naizvozvo miromo yamatanda yakanga ichionekwa kana munhu ari paareka pamberi penzvimbo tsvene; asi akanga asingaonekwi nechokunze, ichipo kusvikira nhasi." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mukati meareka makanga musisine chiro, asi mabwendefa maviri akanga aiswamo naMozisi paHorebhu, nguva Jehovha yaakaita sungano navana valsiraeri pakubuda kwavo paIjipiti." 
2Chronicles5:11 Zvino vaprista vakati vabuda panzvimbo tsvene, (nokuti vaprista vose, vakanga varipo, vakanga vazvinatsa, vasingaiti hanya namapoka avo;" 
2Chronicles5:12 navaRevhi vosewo, vaiva vaimbi, vose vavo, vaiti, Asafi, naHemani, naJedhutuni, navanakomana vavo, navananun'una vavo, vakafuka micheka yakanaka kwazvo, vanamakandira, nemitengerangwa, nembira, vakamira kurutivi rwamabvazuva rwearitari, uye pamwechete navo vaprista vane zana namakumi maviri, vachiridza hwamanda;)" 
2Chronicles5:13 zvino varidzi vehwamanda, navaimbi, vakati vachiita mawa, vachiita nenzwi rimwe vachirumbidza nokuvonga Jehovha; vakati vachiimbisa pamwechete nehwamanda, namakandira, nezvokuridzisa nazvo, vachirumbidza Jehovha, vachiti, ""Nokuti akanaka; nokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;"" ipapo imba yakazara negore, iyo imba yaJehovha;" 
2Chronicles5:14 naizvozvo vaprista vakanga vasingagoni kumira pabasa nokuda kwegore; nokuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakazadza imba yaMwari. 
2Chronicles6:1 Ipapo Soromoni akati, ""Jehovha akati, ndinoda kugara mukati merima guru." 
2Chronicles6:2 Asi ndakakuvakirai imba pamungagara, nenzvimbo yamungagara nokusingaperi.""" 
2Chronicles6:3 Zvino mambo akatendeudza chiso chake, akaropafadza ungano yose yaIsiraeri; ungano yose yaIsiraeri ikasimuka." 
2Chronicles6:4 Akati, ""Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri ngaakudzwe, iye akataura nomuromo wake naDhavhidhi baba vangu, akazvizadzisa noruoko rwake, achiti," 
2Chronicles6:5 Kubva pazuva randakabudisa vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri paljipiti, handina kutsaura guta rimwe pamarudzi ose aIsiraeri, pavangandivakira imba, kuti zita rangu rigarepo; uye handina kutsaura munhu mumwe ave mutungamiriri wavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri;" 
2Chronicles6:6 asi ndakatsaura Jerusaremu, kuti zita rangu rigarepo; uye ndakatsaura Dhavhidhi kuti abate vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.'" 
2Chronicles6:7 Zvino Dhavhidhi baba vangu vakanga vachida kuvakira zita raJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri imba. 
2Chronicles6:8 Asi Jehovha akati kuna Dhavhidhi baba vangu, `Wakaita zvakanaka, zvawakanga uchida kuvakira zita rangu imba;" 
2Chronicles6:9 kunyange zvakadaro iwe haungavaki imba iyo; asi mwanakomana wako wauchabereka, ndiye achavakira zita rangu imba.'" 
2Chronicles6:10 Zvino Jehovha akaita shoko rake raakataura, nokuti ini ndamuka panzvimbo yaDhavhidhi baba vangu, ndikagara pachigaro choushe chalsiraeri, sezvakapika Jehovha, ndikavakira zita raJehovha Mwari walsiraeri imba." 
2Chronicles6:11 Imomo ndakaisa areka, mune sungano yaJehovha, yaakaita navana vaIsiraeri.""" 
2Chronicles6:12 Akamira pamberi pearitari yaJehovha, pamberi peungano yose yalsiraeri, akatambanudza maoko ake;" 
2Chronicles6:13 (nokuti Soromoni akanga aita nendarira pokumira pakakwirira, kureba kwapo kwakasvika makubhiti mashanu, noupamhi makubhiti mashanu, nokukwirira makubhiti matatu, akazviisa pakati poruvazhe; akamira pamusoro pazvo, akapfugama pamberi peungano yose yaIsiraeri, akatambanudzira maoko ake kudenga;)" 
2Chronicles6:14 akati, ""Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, hakuna mumwe Mwari akafanana nemwi kudenga kumusoro kana panyika pasi; munorangarira sungano nenyasha kuvaranda venyu, vanofamba pamberi penyu nomoyo wavo wose." 
2Chronicles6:15 imwi makaitira muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu, sezvamakamupikira; mukataura nomuromo wenyu, mukazviita noruoko rwenyu, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
2Chronicles6:16 Naizvozvo zvino, Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, itirai muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu, sezvamakamupikira, muchiti, `Haungashaiwi munhu achagara pachigaro choushe chaIsiraeri pamberi pangu, kana vana vako vakangwarira kufamba kwavo, vakafamba pamberi pangu sezvawakafamba iwe pamberi pangu.'" 
2Chronicles6:17 Naizvozvo zvino, Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, shoko renyu ngariitike, iro ramakataura kumuranda wenyu Dhavhidhi baba vangu." 
2Chronicles6:18 Ko mukati Mwari ungagara panyika here? Tarira, denga nokudenga-denga hazvingamuringani; ndoda imba ino yandakavaka!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kunyange zvakadaro, ivai nehanya nomunyengetero womuranda wenyu, nokukumbira kwake, Jehovha Mwari wangu, munzwe kudanidzira nokunyengetera komuranda wenyu, kwaanonyengetera pamberi penyu nhasi." 
2Chronicles6:20 Meso enyu ngaarambe achirindira imba ino masikati nousiku, nzvimbo iyi yamakataura pamusoro payo, muchiti, muchagarisa zita renyupo; inzwai munyengetero womuranda wenyu waanozonyengetera akatarira kunzvimbo ino." 
2Chronicles6:21 Munzwe kukumbira komuranda wenyu, nokwavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, kana vachizonyengetera vakatarira kunzvimbo iyi; donzwai iko kudenga, kwamunogara; zvino kana mukanzwa, muvakangamwire henyu." 
2Chronicles6:22 Kana munhu achinge atadzira waanogara naye, akapikiswa mhiko, akauya akapika pamberi pearitari yenyu muimba ino;" 
2Chronicles6:23 inzwai iko kudenga, muite mururamisire varanda venyu, mupe akaipa mhosva, arobwe pamusoro pomufambiro wake; asi mururamisire akarurama, apiwe zvakafanira kururama kwake." 
2Chronicles6:24 Kana vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri vachinge vakundwa navavengi vavo, nemhaka yokuti vakakutadzirai; kana vakadzokerazve kwamuri, vakatenda zita renyu, vakanyengetera kwamuri nokukumbira muimba ino;" 
2Chronicles6:25 inzwai iko kudenga, mukangamwire zvivi zvavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, muvadzoserezve kunyika yamakavapa ivo madzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles6:26 Kana kudenga kuchinge kwazarirwa, mvura ikasanaya nemhaka yokuti vakakutadzirai; kana vakanyengetera vakatarira kunzvimbo ino, vakatenda zita renyu, vatendeuka pazvivi zvavo, nokuti munenge mavarova;" 
2Chronicles6:27 inzwai iko kudenga, mukangamwire zvivi zvavaranda venyu, nezvavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, nokuti munovadzidzisa nzira yakanaka yavanofanira kufamba nayo; munise mvura panyika iyo yamakapa vanhu venyu kuti ive nhaka yavo." 
2Chronicles6:28 Kana nzara ikavapo panyika, kana denda rikavapo, kana nyunje nokuvhuvha zvikavapo, nemhashu nehonye; kana vavengi vavo vakavakomba panyika inamaguta avo; kana nyatwa kana hosha ipi neipi ikavapo." 
2Chronicles6:29 Kana munhu upi noupi, kana vanhu venyu vose valsiraeri vakanyengetera kana kukumbira, mumwe nomumwe achiziva kutambudzika kuri pamoyo wake kana kuchema kwake, akatambanudzira maoko ake kuimba ino;" 
2Chronicles6:30 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kwamunogara, mukangamwire muripire mumwe nomumwe zvakafanira mafambiro ake ose, iye wamunoziva moyo wake; (nokuti imi, imwi moga, ndimi munoziva moyo yavana vavanhu vose;)" 
2Chronicles6:31 kuti vakutyei, vafambe munzira dzenyu, nguva yose yavanogara panyika yamakapa madzibaba edu." 
2Chronicles6:32 Zvino kana ari mutorwa, asati ari wavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, kana akabva kunyika iri kure nokuda kwezita renyu guru, noruoko rwenyu rune simba, noruoko rwenyu rwakatambanudzwa; kana akauya akanyengetera akatarira kuimba ino." 
2Chronicles6:33 Inzwai henyu iko kudenga kwamunogara, muitire mutorwa zvose zvaanokumbira, kuti vanhu vose venyika vazive zita renyu, vakutyei, sezvinoita vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, vazive kuti imba ino yandakavaka yakatumidzwa zita renyu." 
2Chronicles6:34 Kana vanhu venyu vakandorwa navavengi vavo, vakaenda nenzira ipi neipi yamuchavatuma nayo, vakanyengetera kwamuri vakatarira kuguta rino ramakatsaura, nokuimba yandakavakira zita renyu;" 
2Chronicles6:35 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kunyengetera kwavo nokukumbira kwavo, muvaruramisire." 
2Chronicles6:36 Kana vakakutadzirai, (nokuti hakuna munhu asingatadzi), mukavatsamwira, mukavaisa kuvavengi vavo, vakatapwa kunyika yavavengi vavo, kana kure kana pedo." 
2Chronicles6:37 Kana vakazozvifunga panyika kwavakatapirwa, vakadzokazve, vakakumbira kwamuri panyika yokutapwa kwavo, vakati, `Tatadza, taita zvakaipa, taita zvisakarurama;'" 
2Chronicles6:38 kana vakadzokerazve kwamuri nomoyo wavo wose, nomweya wose, panyika yokutapwa kwavo, kwavakatapirwa, vakanyengetera vakatarira kunyika yavo, yamakapa madzibaba avo, nokuguta ramakatsaura imwi, nokuimba yandakavakira zita renyu;" 
2Chronicles6:39 inzwai henyu iko kudenga kwamunogara, kunyengetera kwavo nokukumbira kwavo, muvaruramisire; mukangamwire vanhu venyu vakakutadzirai." 
2Chronicles6:40 Zvino Mwari wangu, meso enyu ngaasvinure, nenzeve dzenyu ngadziteerere zvakanaka munyengetero unonyengeterwa munzvimbo ino." 
2Chronicles6:41 Naizvozvo zvino simukai, Jehovha Mwari, mupinde munzvimbo yenyu yokuzorora, neareka yesimba renyu; vaprista venyu, Jehovha Mwari, ngavafukidzwe noruponeso, navatsvene venyu ngavafarire zvakanaka." 
2Chronicles6:42 Jehovha Mwari, musafuratira chiso chomuzodzwa wenyu; rangarirai mabasa akanaka aDhavhidhi muranda wenyu.""" 
2Chronicles7:1 Zvino Soromoni akati apedza kunyengetera, moto ndokuburuka kudenga, ukapedza chipiriso chinopiswa nezvimwe zvibayiro; kubwinya kwaJehovha kukazadza imba." 
2Chronicles7:2 Vaprista vakakoniwa kupinda muimba yaJehovha, nokuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakanga kwazadza imba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles7:3 Vana vaIsiraeri vose vakatarira moto uchiburuka kudenga nokubwinya kwaJehovha kuchigara pamusoro peimba; vakakotamira pasi nezviso zvavo pakarongwa namabwe, vakanamata nokuvonga Jehovha, vachiti, ""Nokuti akanaka, nokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi.""" 
2Chronicles7:4 Ipapo mambo navanhu vose vakabayira zvibayiro pamberi paJehovha. 
2Chronicles7:5 Mambo Soromoni akabayira chibayiro chenzombe dzine zviuru zvina makumi maviri nezviviri, namakwai ane zviuru zvine zana namakumi maviri. Saizvozvo mambo navanhu vose vakatsaurira Mwari imba iyo." 
2Chronicles7:6 Vaprista vakamirapo, sezvavakagoverwa mabasa avo; navaRevhivo vane zvokuridzira Jehovha, zvakaitwa namambo Dhavhidhi, zvokuvonga Jehovha nazvo, nokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi, panguva iya Dhavhidhi yaakakudza Jehovha nazvo; vaprista vakaridza hwamanda pamberi pavo, vaIsiraeri vose vakamira." 
2Chronicles7:7 Soromoni akatsaurawo nzvimbo yapakati yoruvazhe rwakanga ruri pamberi peimba yaJehovha; nokuti ndipo paakabayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa, namafuta ezvipiriso zvokuyananisa; nokuti aritari yendarira yakaitwa naSoromoni yakanga isingagoni kuringana chipiriso chinopiswa, nechipiriso choupfu, namafuta." 
2Chronicles7:8 Naizvozvo Soromoni akatamba mutambo panguva iyo mazuva manomwe, navaIsiraeri vose pamwechete naye, ikaita ungano huru-huru, kubva pavanopinda paHamati, kusvikira parukova rweIjipiti." 
2Chronicles7:9 Zvino pazuva rorusere vakatamba mutambo wokupedzisira; nokuti vakatsaura aritari mazuva manomwe, vakaita mutambo mazuva manomwe." 
2Chronicles7:10 Zvino pazuva ramakumi maviri namatatu romwedzi wechinomwe akaendisa vanhu kumatende avo nemoyo yakanga ichifara, ichifarira zvakanaka zvose zvakaitira Jehovha Dhavhidhi, naSoromoni, navanhu vake vaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles7:11 Saizvozvo Soromoni akapedza imba yaJehovha, neimba yamambo; zvose zvakanga zviri mumoyo waSoromoni kuita muimba yaJehovha, nomumba make, wakazviita kwazvo." 
2Chronicles7:12 Ipapo Jehovha akazviratidza kuna Soromoni usiku, akati kwaari, ""Ndanzwa kunyengetera kwako, ndazvitsaurira nzvimbo iyi, ive imba yokubayira zvibayiro." 
2Chronicles7:13 Kana ndichinge ndadzivira kudenga, kuti mvura irege kunaya, kana zvimwe ndichinge ndaraira mhashu, kuti dzipedze nyika, kana zvimwe ndichinge ndatuma denda pakati pavanhu vangu;" 
2Chronicles7:14 kana vanhu vangu, vakatumidzwa nezita rangu, vakazvininipisa, vakanyengetera nokutsvaka chiso changu, nokurega nzira dzavo dzakaipa; ipapo ndichanzwa kudenga ndichavakangamwira zvivi zvavo, nokupodza nyika yavo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Zvino meso angu achasvinura, nzeve dzangu dzichateerera ndinzwe munyengetero unoitwa panzvimbo iyi." 
2Chronicles7:16 Nokuti zvino ndatsaura imba ino nokuiita tsvene, zita rangu rivepo nokusingaperi; meso angu nomoyo wangu zvichavapo nokusingaperi." 
2Chronicles7:17 Kana uriwe, kana ukafamba pamberi pangu sababa vako, Dhavhidhi, ukaita zvose zvandakakuraira, ukachengeta zvandatema nezvandatonga," 
2Chronicles7:18 ipapo ini ndichasimbisa chigaro chako choushe, sezvandakapikira baba vako Dhavhidhi, ndichiti, `Haungashaiwi munhu achabata ushe hwaIsiraeri.'" 
2Chronicles7:19 Asi kana mukatsauka, mukasiya zvandatema nezvandaraira zvandakaisa pamberi penyu, mukandoshumira vamwe vamwari, mukavanamata;" 
2Chronicles7:20 ipapo ndichavadzura nemidzi panyika yangu yandakavapa, neimba iyi yandakatsaurira zita rangu, ndichairashira kure ndirege kuiona, ndiite shumo nechiseko pakati pavanhu vose." 
2Chronicles7:21 Neimba iyi kunyange yakakwirira ikadai, vose vanopfuura nayo vachakanuka, vachiti, `Jehovha wakaitireiko kudai nenyika ino, uye neimba iyi?'" 
2Chronicles7:22 Vachapindura, vachiti, `Nokuti vakasiya Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba avo, wakavabudisa panyika yeIjipiti, vakanamatira vamwe vamwari, vakavanamata, nokuvashumira; saka Jehovha akavapinza panjodzi idzi dzose.' """ 
2Chronicles8:1 Makore makumi maviri akati apera, Soromoni aakavaka nawo imba yaJehovha neimba yake," 
2Chronicles8:2 Soromoni akavaka maguta akanga apiwa Soromoni naHurami, akagarisa vana vaIsiraeri imomo." 
2Chronicles8:3 Soromoni akaenda Hamatizobha, akarikunda." 
2Chronicles8:4 Akavaka Tadhimori murenje, namaguta ose amatura aakavaka paHamati." 
2Chronicles8:5 Akavakawo Bhetihoroni rokumusoro neBhetihoroni rezasi, ari maguta akakombwa namasvingo, anamasuo, namazariro;" 
2Chronicles8:6 neBhaarati, namaguta ose engoro dzake, namaguta avatasvi vamabhiza ake, nezvose Soromoni zvaakanga achida kuzvivakira paJerusaremu, napaRebhanoni, napanyika yose yakabatwa naye." 
2Chronicles8:7 Kana vari vanhu vose vakanga vasara pavaHeti, navaAmori, navaPerizi, navaHivhi, navaJebhusi, vakanga vasi vavaIsiraeri;" 
2Chronicles8:8 pavana vavo vakanga vasara panyika shure kwavo, vasati vakaparadzwa navalsiraeri, pakati pavo Soromoni akaraira chibharo chavaranda kusvikira nhasi." 
2Chronicles8:9 Asi Soromoni haana kuita varanda pakati pavana vaIsiraeri, asi ivo vakanga vari varwi, navakuru vavatungamiriri vake vehondo, navarairi vengoro dzake, navatasvi vamabhiza ake." 
2Chronicles8:10 Ndivo vaiva vatariri vakuru vamambo Soromoni, vaiva namazana maviri namakumi mashanu, vairaira vanhu." 
2Chronicles8:11 Zvino Soromoni akandotora mukunda waFarao muguta raDhavhidhi, akamuisa kuimba yaakanga amuvakira; nokuti akati, ""Mukadzi wangu haafaniri kugara muimba yaDhavhidhi mambo waIsiraeri, nokuti panzvimbo pasvika areka yaJehovha patsvene.""" 
2Chronicles8:12 Zvino Soromoni akabayira Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa paaritari yaJehovha, yaakanga avaka pamberi pebiravira," 
2Chronicles8:13 sezvavaifanira kuita zuva rimwe nerimwe, vakabayira sezvavakanga varairwa naMozisi, pamaSabata, napakugara komwedzi, napamitambo yakatarwa, katatu pagore, pamutambo wezvingwa zvisine mvuviro, napamutambo wamavhiki, napamutambo wamatumba." 
2Chronicles8:14 Akagadza, sezvaakarairwa naDhavhidhi baba vake, mapoka avaprista pamabasa avo, navaRevhi pamabasa avo, kuti varumbidze nokubata pamberi pavaprista, sezvavaifanira kuita zuva rimwe nerimwe navatariri vemikova pamapoka avo pasuo rimwe nerimwe; nokuti ndizvo zvakanga zvarairwa naDhavhidhi munhu waMwari." 
2Chronicles8:15 Havana kutsauka pamurayiro wamambo kuvaprista navaRevhi pamusoro pezvinhu zvose napamusoro pefuma. 
2Chronicles8:16 Zvino mabasa ose aSoromoni akapera kugadzirwa pazuva rokuvambwa kweimba kusvikira pakupera kwayo. Imba yaJehovha ikazopera chose. 
2Chronicles8:17 Ipapo Soromoni akaenda EZiyonigebheri neEroti, pamhenderekedzo dzegungwa panyika yaEdhomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Hurami akamutumira navaranda vake zvikepe, navaranda vaiziva gungwa kwazvo vakaenda; Ofiri navaranda vaSoromoni, vakandotorapo ndarama yakasvika matarenda* mazana mana namakumi mashanu, vakauya nayo kuna mambo Soromoni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Zvino mambokadzi weShebha akati anzwa mbiri yaSoromoni, akasvika Jerusaremu kuzoidza Soromoni nemibvunzo mikukutu, ana vanhu vazhinji, makamera aitakura zvinonhuhwira, nendarama zhinji-zhinji, nezvibwe zvinokosha; zvino akati asvika kuna Soromoni, akataurirana naye pamusoro pezvose zviri mumoyo make." 
2Chronicles9:2 Soromoni, akapindura mibvunzo yake yose; hakuna chinhu chakanga chakavanzirwa Soromoni, chaakanga asingagoni kumuudza." 
2Chronicles9:3 Zvino mambokadzi weShebha akati aona kungwara kwaSoromoni, neimba yaakavaka," 
2Chronicles9:4 nezvokudya zviri patafura yake, nokugara kwavaranda vake, nokushumira kwavabatiri vake, nenguvo dzavo, navadiri vake, nenguvo dzavo, nechikwiriso chake chaaikwira nacho kuimba yaJehovha, akapera mweya." 
2Chronicles9:5 Akati kuna mambo, ""Guhu randakanzwa munyika yangu ramashoko enyu nokungwara kwenyu rakanga riri rechokwadi." 
2Chronicles9:6 Asi handina kutenda mashoko avo, kusvikira ndauya, ndikaona nameso angu; asi tarirai handina kuudzwa kunyange hafu youkuru hwokungwara kwenyu; imwi munokunda mbiri yandakanzwa." 
2Chronicles9:7 Varume venyu vano mufaro, navaranda venyu vano mufaro, vanomira pamberi penyu nguva dzose vachinzwa kungwara kwenyu." 
2Chronicles9:8 Jehovha Mwari wenyu ngaakudzwe, akafadzwa nemwi, akakugadzai pachigaro chake choushe, muve mambo waJehovha Mwari wenyu; nokuti Mwari wenyu akada Isiraeri, kuti avasimbise nokusingaperi, saka akakuitai mambo wavo, kuti mutonge nokururamisa.""" 
2Chronicles9:9 Akapa mambo matarenda* ane zana namakumi maviri endarama, nezvinonhuhwira zvizhinji kwazvo, nezvibwe zvinokosha; hakuna kumbovapo zvinonhuhwira zvakawanda zvikadai, zvakafanana nezvakapiwa mambo Soromoni namambokadzi weShebha." 
2Chronicles9:10 Navarandawo vaHurami, navaranda vaSoromoni, ivo vaiuya nendarama vachibva Ofiri, vakauyawo nemiti yemiarigumi nezvibwe zvinokosha." 
2Chronicles9:11 Mambo akaita namatanda emiarigumi zvikwiriso zveimba yaJehovha, nezveimba yamambo, nembira nemitengerangwa zvavaimbi; zvakadai hazvina kumboonekwa panyika yaJudha." 
2Chronicles9:12 Mambo Soromoni akapa mambokadzi weShebha zvose zvaaida nezvaakakumbira; zvimwe zvaakauya nazvo kuna mambo zvisingaverengwi. Naizvozvo akadzoka, akaenda kunyika yake, iye navaranda vake." 
2Chronicles9:13 Zvino ndarama yakauyiswa kuna Soromoni gore rimwe nerimwe yakasvika matarenda* ana mazana matanhatu namakumi matanhatu namatanhatu pakurema kwayo; 
2Chronicles9:14 vasingaverengi iyo yakauya navashambadziri navatengesi; namadzimambo ose eArabhia navabati venyika vakauya nendarama nesirivha kuna Soromoni. 
2Chronicles9:15 Mambo Soromoni akaita nhovo huru dzina mazana maviri nendarama yakapambadzirwa; nhovo imwe neimwe yakanga yakaitwa namashekeri ana mazana matatu endarama; 
2Chronicles9:16 akaitawo nhovo duku dzina mazana matatu dzendarama yakapambadzirwa; ndarama yakasvika mashekeri ana mazana matatu yakaiswa panhovo imwe neimwe; mambo akazviisa muimba yedondo reRebhanoni. 
2Chronicles9:17 Mambo akaitawo chigaro chikuru choushe chenyanga dzenzou, akachifukidza nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
2Chronicles9:18 Chigaro icho choushe chakanga chine zvikwiriso zvitanhatu, nechitsiko chendarama, zvakanga zvakabatanidzwa nechigaro choushe, nezvitsigiro kunhivi mbiri dzechigaro, neshumba mbiri dzakanga dzimire kunhivi dzezvitsigiro." 
2Chronicles9:19 Kwakanga kune shumba gumi nembiri dzimire pazvikwiriso zvitanhatu, mbiri-mbiri kunhivi dzechimwe nechimwe; hakuna kumboitwa chakadai kuno umwe ushe." 
2Chronicles9:20 Mikombe yose yokumwa nayo yamambo Soromoni yaiva yendarama, nemidziyo yose yeimba yedondo reRebhanoni yaiva yendarama yakaisvonaka; sirivha yakanga ichinzi haino murimo pamazuva aSoromoni." 
2Chronicles9:21 Nokuti mambo akanga ane zvikepe zvaienda Tarishishi navaranda vaHurami; zvikepe zveTarishishi zvaiuya kamwechete pamakore matatu zvine ndarama, nesirivha nenyanga dzenzou, netsoko namatendera." 
2Chronicles9:22 Naizvozvo mambo Soromoni akakunda madzimambo ose enyika pakufuma nokuchenjera. 
2Chronicles9:23 Madzimambo ose enyika aiuya kushanyira Soromoni, kuzonzwa kungwara kwake, kwakanga kwaiswa naMwari mumoyo make." 
2Chronicles9:24 Mumwe nomumwe aiuya nechipo chake chemidziyo yesirivha, nemidziyo yendarama, nehanzu, nenhumbi dzokurwa nadzo, nezvinonhuhwira, namabhiza, namahesera, gore rimwe nerimwe." 
2Chronicles9:25 Soromoni akanga ane zvidyiro zvamabhiza nengoro, zvine zviuru zvina, navatasvi vamabhiza vane zviuru zvine gumi nezviviri, zvaakaisa pamaguta engoro, nokuna mambo paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles9:26 Akabata ushe hwamadzimambo ose, kubva paRwizi kusvikira panyika yavaFirisitia, nokumuganhu weIjipiti." 
2Chronicles9:27 Mambo akaunganidza sirivha paJerusaremu ikawanda ikaita samabwe, nemisidhari ikaita semionde yaiva pamapani." 
2Chronicles9:28 Vakandotorera Soromoni mabhiza paIjipiti, nokunyika dzose." 
2Chronicles9:29 Zvino mamwe mabasa aSoromoni, okutanga nookupedzisira, haana kunyorwa here pabhuku yomuporofita Natani, napamashoko akaporofitwa naAhiya muShironi, napane zvakaonekwa nomuoni Idho pamusoro paJerobhoami mwanakomana waNebhati?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Soromoni akabata ushe hwavaIsiraeri vose paJerusaremu makore ana makumi mana. 
2Chronicles9:31 Ipapo Soromoni akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi baba vake, Rehobhoamu mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles10:1 Zvino Rehobhoamu akaenda Shekemi, nokuti vaIsiraeri vose vakanga vaungana paShekemi kuzomuita mambo." 
2Chronicles10:2 Zvino Jerobhoami mwanakomana waNebhati, akati achizvinzwa, (nokuti akanga achiri Ijipiti kwaakanga atizira nokuda kwaSoromoni,) Jerobhoami ndokudzoka achibva Ijipiti." 
2Chronicles10:3 Vakatuma nhume kundomudana; Jerobhoami navaIsiraeri vose vakasvika vakataura naRehobhoamu, vakati," 
2Chronicles10:4 Baba venyu vakatitakudza joko rinogozha; naizvozvo zvino imwi chirerusai basa rababa venyu rakanga richigozha, nejoko ravo rinorema ravakaisa pamusoro pedu, tigokushumirai." 
2Chronicles10:5 Iye akati kwavari, ""Dzokeraizve kwandiri kana mazuva matatu apera."" Vanhu vakaenda." 
2Chronicles10:6 papo mambo Rehobhoamu akarangana navakuru, vaimira pamberi paSoromoni baba vake, vachiri vapenyu, akati, ""Mungandipa zano reiko, randingapindura vanhu ava naro?""" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ivo vakataura kwaari, vakati, ""Kana mukaitira vanhu ava nomoyo wakanaka, nokuvafadza, nokutaura mashoko akanaka kwavari, ipapo vachava varanda venyu nokusingaperi.""" 
2Chronicles10:8 Asi iye wakaramba zano ravakuru, ravakamupa, akarangana namajaya ezero rake, akanga achimira pamberi pake." 
2Chronicles10:9 Akati kwavari, ""Imi mungandipa zano reiko, ratingapindura naro vanhu ava vakataura neni, vachiti, `Rerusai joko rakaiswa pamusoro pedu nababa venyu?' """ 
2Chronicles10:10 Zvino majaya ezero rake akataura kwaari, akati, ""Iti kuvanhu ava vakataura newe, vachiti, `Baba venyu vakatitakudza joko rinogozha, asi imwi chitirerusirai iro,' utaure kwavari uti, `Mumwe wangu muduku mukobvu kupfuura chiuno chababa vangu." 
2Chronicles10:11 Zvino, baba vangu zvavakakutakudzai joko rinorema, ini ndichawedzera pajoko renyu; baba vangu vaikurovai neshamhu, asi ini ndichakurovai nezvinyavada.' """ 
2Chronicles10:12 Naizvozvo Jerobhoami navanhu vose vakasvika kuna Rehobhoamu nezuva retatu, sezvavakanga varairwa namambo, achiti, ""Dzokerai kwandirizve nezuva retatu.""" 
2Chronicles10:13 Mambo akavapindura nehasha; mambo Rehobhoamu akarasha zano ravakuru," 
2Chronicles10:14 akataura kwavari sezvaakanga apiwa zano namajaya, akati, ""Baba vangu vakakutakudzai joko rinorema, asi ini ndichawedzera pajoko renyu; baba vangu vaikurovai neshamhu, asi ini ndichakurovai nezvinyavada.""" 
2Chronicles10:15 Naizvozvo mambo haana kuteerera vanhu; nokuti zvakanga zvabva kuna Mwari, kuti Jehovha asimbise shoko rake, raakataura naAhija muShiro kuna Jerobhoami mwanakomana waNebhati." 
2Chronicles10:16 Zvino vaIsiraeri vose vakati vachiona kuti mambo haana kuvateerera, vanhu vakapindura mambo, vakati, ""Tino mugove weiko kuna Dhavhidhi? Uye hatine nhaka kumwanakomana weJese; endai henyu munhu mumwe nomumwe kutende rake, imwi Isiraeri! Zvino Dhavhidhi, chitarira hako imba yako."" Naizvozvo valsiraeri vose vakaenda kumatende avo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Asi kana vari vana vaIsiraeri, vakanga vagere mumaguta aJudha, Rehobhoamu aiva mambo wavo." 
2Chronicles10:18 Zvino mambo Rehobhoamu akatuma Hadhorami mutariri wavanhu vechibharo, vana vaIsiraeri vakamutaka namabwe, akafa. Ipapo mambo Rehobhoamu akachimbidzika kukwira ngoro yake, akatizira Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Saizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakamukira imba yaDhavhidhi kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
2Chronicles11:1 Zvino Rehobhoamu akati achisvika Jerusaremu, akaunganidza veimba yaJudha naBhenjamini, varume vakatsaurwa vaiva nezviuru zvine zana namakumi masere, vaigona kurwa, kuti varwe navaIsiraeri, kuti vadzosere ushezve kuna Rehobhoamu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Asi shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Shemaya munhu waMwari, richiti," 
2Chronicles11:3  Taura naRehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, mambo waJudha, navaIsiraeri vose paJudha naBhenjamini, uti," 
2Chronicles11:4 zvanzi naJehovha, `Hamufaniri kukwira kundorwa nehama dzenyu; mumwe nomumwe ngaadzokere kumba kwake, nokuti chinhu ichi chinobva kwandiri.' "" Naizvozvo vakateerera mashoko aJehovha, vakadzoka pakundorwa naJerobhoami." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehobhoamu akagara Jerusaremu, akavaka maguta enhare paJudha." 
2Chronicles11:6 Akavaka Bheterehemu, neEtami, neTekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 neBhetizuri, neSoko, neAdhuramu," 
2Chronicles11:8 neGati, neMaresha, neZifi," 
2Chronicles11:9 neAdhoraimi, neRakishi, neAzeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 neZora, neAijaroni, neHebhuroni, akanga ari maguta akakombwa paJudha neBhenjamini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Akasimbisa nhare, akaisamo vakuru, nezvokudya zvakaunganidzwamo, namafuta, newaini." 
2Chronicles11:12 Muguta rimwe nerimwe akaisa nhovo namapfumo, akaasimbisa kwazvo kwazvo. Judha naBenjamini vakanga vari vake." 
2Chronicles11:13 Navaprista navaRevhi, vaiva pakati palsiraeri yose, vakaungana kwaari, vachibva panyika yavo yose." 
2Chronicles11:14 Nokuti vaRevhi vakabva pamafuro avo nefuma yavo, vakaenda kwaJudha neJerusaremu; nokuti Jerobhoami navanakomana vake vakavadzinga, kuti varege kubata basa rouprista pamberi paJehovha." 
2Chronicles11:15 Iye akazvitsaurira vaprista vapamatunhu akakwirira, navezvifananidzo zvenhongo dzembudzi, navemhuru dzaakaita." 
2Chronicles11:16 Zvino vose pakati pamarudzi ose avaIsiraeri, vakanga vachitsvaka Jehovha nomoyo wose, vakavatevera, vakaenda Jerusaremu kuzobayira Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Saizvozvo vakasimbisa ushe hwaJudha, vakasimbisa Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, makore matatu; nokuti vakafamba panzira yaDhavhidhi naSoromoni makore matatu." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehobhoamu akawana mukadzi, Maharati mukunda waJerimoti mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, nowaAbhihairi mukunda waEriabhi mwanakomana waJese." 
2Chronicles11:19 Iye akamuberekera vanakomana, vaiti: Jeushi, naShamaria, naZahami." 
2Chronicles11:20 Pashure akawanawo Maaka mukunda waAbhusaromu; iye akamuberekera Abhija, naAtai, naZiza, naSheromiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehobhoamu akada Maaka mukunda waAbhusaromu kupfuura vakadzi vake vose navarongo vake; (nokuti akawana vakadzi vane gumi navasere navarongo vana makumi matanhatu, akabereka vanakomana vana makumi maviri navasere navanasikana makumi matanhatu.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehobhoamu akagadza Abhija mwanakomana waMaaka ave mukuru nomuchinda pakati pavana vababa vake; nokuti akanga achida kumuita mambo. 
2Chronicles11:23 Akaita nokungwara, akaparadzira vanakomana vake vose panyika dzose dzaJudha naBhenjamini kumaguta ose enhare; akavapa zvokudya zvakawanda. Akavatsvakirawo vakadzi vazhinji." 
2Chronicles12:1 Zvino ushe hwaRehobhoamu hwakati hwasimbiswa, iye ava nesimba, akarasha murayiro waJehovha, navaIsiraeri vose pamwechete naye." 
2Chronicles12:2 Zvino pagore rechishanu ramambo Rehobhoamu, Shishaki mambo weIjipiti akasvika kuzorwa neJerusaremu, nokuti vakanga vatadzira Jehovha," 
2Chronicles12:3 ane ngoro dzine chiuru chimwe namazana maviri, navatasvi vamabhiza vane zviuru zvina makumi matanhatu, navanhu vakabva naye Ijipiti, vakanga vasingagoni kuverengwa, vaiti: vaRubhimi, navaSukimi, navaItiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 Akakunda maguta akakombwa aJudha, akasvika Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Zvino Shemaya muporofita akasvika kuna Rehobhoamu nokumachinda aJudha akanga akaungana paJerusaremu nemhaka yaShishaki, akati kwavari, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, `Mandirasha, saka ndakakuregeraiwo paruoko rwaShishaki.' """ 
2Chronicles12:6 Ipapo machinda aIsiraeri namambo vakazvininipisa, vakati, ""Jehovha akarurama.""" 
2Chronicles12:7 Zvino Jehovha akati achiona kuti vazvininipisa, shoko raJehovha rikasvika kuna Shemaya, richiti, ""Vazvininipisa, handingavaparadzi, asi ndobva ndovarwira; kutsamwa kwangu hakungadururwi pamusoro peJerusaremu noruoko rwaShishaki." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kunyange zvakadaro vachava varanda vake; kuti vazive kuti zvakadini kundishumira ini nokushumira ushe bwenyika dzimwe. 
2Chronicles12:9 Naizvozvo Shishaki mambo weIjipiti akandorwa neJerusaremu, akatora fuma yeimba yaJehovha, nefuma yeimba yamambo; akazvitora zvose; akatorawo nhovo duku dzose dzendarama dzakaitwa naSoromoni." 
2Chronicles12:10 Ipapo mambo Rehobhoamu akaita panzvimbo yazvo nhovo duku dzendarira, akadziisa pamaoko avakuru vavarindi, vairinda mukova weimba yamambo." 
2Chronicles12:11 Zvino nguva dzose kana mambo achipinda mumba maJehovha, varindi vaidzibata, ndokudzidzoserazve mumba mavarindi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Zvino akati azvininipisa, kutsamwa kwaJehovha kukabviswa kwaari, akasaparadzwa chose; uyezve, kuna Judha zvimwe zvakanaka zvakawanikwa." 
2Chronicles12:13 Nokudaro mambo Rehobhoamu akazvisimbisa paJerusaremu, akabata ushe; nokuti Rehobhomu akanga ane makore makumi mana nerimwe pakutanga kwake kubata ushe, akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore ane gumi namanomwe, iro guta rakanga ratsaurwa naJehovha pamarudzi ose alsiraeri, kuti aise zita rakemo; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Naama muAmoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Akaita zvakaipa, nokuti haana kushingaira kutsvaka Jehovha." 
2Chronicles12:15 Zvino mabasa aRehobhoamu, okutanga nookupedzisira, haana kunyorwa here mumashoko omuporofita Shemaya, noomuoni Idho, mazita amadziteteguru achiverengwawo? Zvino kurwa kwakanga kuripo pakati paRehobhoamu naJerobhoami nguva dzose." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehobhoamu akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi; Abhija mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles13:1 Pagore regumi namasere ramambo Jerobhoami, Abhija akatanga kubata ushe hwaJudha." 
2Chronicles13:2 Akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore matatu; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Mikaya, mukunda waUrieri weGibhiya. Kurwa kukavapo pakati paAbhija naJerobhoami." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abhija akarwa ane hondo yavarwi dzaiva mhare, varume vakatsaurwa vane zviuru zvina mazana mana; Jerobhoamiwo akagadzira hondo kuzorwa naye, ana varume vakatsaurwa vane zviuru zvina mazana masere, vaiva varume vane simba noumhare." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abhija akamira pamusoro pegomo rainzi Zemaraimi, raiva panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, akati, ""Ndinzwei, Jerobhoami navaIsiraeri vose!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Ko hamufaniri kuziva here kuti Jehovha Mwari walsiraeri akapa Dhavhidhi ushe hwaIsiraeri nokusingaperi, iye navanakomana vake nesungano yomunyu?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Asi Jerobhoami mwanakomana waNebhati, muranda waSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, akasimuka akamukira ishe wake." 
2Chronicles13:7 Kukaunganira kwaari vanhu vakaipa, vakaisvoipa, vakazvisimbisa kundorwa naRehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, iye Rehobhoamu achiri muduku ano moyo unotya, asingagoni kurwa navo." 
2Chronicles13:8 Zvino munoda kurwa novushe bwaJehovha bwuri mumaoko avanakomana vaDhavhidhi; zvamuri vanhu vazhinji, mune mhuru dzendarama dzakaitwa naJerobhoami kuti vave vamwari venyu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Hamuna kudzinga here vaprista vaJehovha, vanakomana vaAroni, navaRevhi, imwi mukazvitsaurira vaprista netsika dzavanhu vedzimwe nyika? Naizvozvo Ani naani anouya kuzvitsaurira Mwari ane nzombe imwe namakondobwe manomwe, iye angava muprista wavamwari vasati vari vamwari." 
2Chronicles13:10 Asi kana tirisu, Jehovha ndiMwari wedu, hatina kumurasha; isu tina vaprista vanoshumira Jehovha, ivo vanakomana vaAroni, navaRevhi pamabasa avo." 
2Chronicles13:11 Ndivo vanopisira Jehovha zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvinonhuhwira mangwanani ose namadekwana ose; nezvingwa zvokuratidza vanozvigadzira patafura yakaisvonaka; nechigadziko chendarama nemwenje yacho, kuvhenekera madekwana ose; nokuti tinochengeta zvatakarairwa naJehovha Mwari wedu; asi imwi makamurasha." 
2Chronicles13:12 Zvino tarirai, Mwari anesu achititungamirira, navaprista vake vane hwamanda dzokuridza nadzo, kuti vakuridzirei mhere imi. Nhandi vana vaIsiraeri, regai kurwa naJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu; nokuti hamungakundi.""" 
2Chronicles13:13 Asi Jerobhoami akaisa vavandiri kuti vavakombe necheshure kwavo; zvino ivo vakava pamberi paJudha, navavandiri vakanga vari shure kwavo." 
2Chronicles13:14 Zvino vaJudha vakati vachicheuka, vakaona kurwa mberi kwavo neshure kwavo; vakachema kuna Jehovha, vaprista vakaridza hwamanda." 
2Chronicles13:15 Ipapo vanhu vaJudha vakaridza mhere; vakati varidza mhere, Mwari akaparadza Jerobhoami navaIsiraeri vose pamberi paAbhija naJudha." 
2Chronicles13:16 Vana vaIsiraeri vakatiza pamberi paJudha, Mwari akavaisa mumaoko avo." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abhija navanhu vake vakavauraya nokuuraya kukuru; naizvozvo varume vakatsaurwa vane zviuru zvina mazana mashanu vakaurawa pakati paIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles13:18 Vana vaIsiraeri vakamanikidzwa saizvozvo nenguva iyo, vana vaJudha vakakunda, nokuti vakavimba naJehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abhija akateverera Jerobhoami, akamutorera maguta, aiti: Bhetieri nemisha yaro, neJeshana nemisha yaro, neEfironi nemisha yaro." 
2Chronicles13:20 Jerobhoami haana kuzova nesimbazve pamazuva aAbhija; Jehovha ndokumurova, akafa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Asi Abhija akazvisimbisa, akawana vakadzi vane gumi navana, akabereka vanakomana vana makumi maviri navaviri, navanasikana vane gumi navatanhatu." 
2Chronicles13:22 Zvino mamwe mabasa aAbhija, netsika dzake, namashoko ake, zvakanyorwa padudziro yomuporofita Idho." 
2Chronicles14:1 Zvino Abhija akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi; Asa mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe, pamazuva ake nyika yakanga ino rugare makore ane gumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa akaita zvakanaka nezvakarurama pamberi paJehovha Mwari wake. 
2Chronicles14:3 Nokuti akabvisa aritari dzavamwari vatorwa, namatunhu akakwirira, akaputsa shongwe, nokutemawo matanda okunamata nawo;" 
2Chronicles14:4 akaraira vaJudha kuti vatsvake Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo, nokuchengeta murau nomurayiro." 
2Chronicles14:5 Akabvisawo pamaguta ose avaJudha matunhu akakwirira nezvifananidzo zvezuva; ushe hukava norugare iye ari mambo. 
2Chronicles14:6 Akavaka maguta akakombwa paJudha; nokuti nyika yakanga ino rugare, akanga asina kurwa pamakore iwayo; nokuti Jehovha akanga amuzorodza." 
2Chronicles14:7 Nokuti akati kuvaJudha, ""Ngativake maguta iwayo, tiapoteredze namasvingo, neshongwe, namasuo, namazariro; nyika ichiri pamberi pedu, nokuti takatsvaka Jehovha Mwari wedu; takamutsvaka, akatizorodza pamativi ose."" Ipapo vakavaka, vakagara zvakanaka." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa akanga ane hondo yavaJudha, vane zviuru zvina mazana matatu, vakanga vakashonga nhovo huru namapfumo; neyavaBhenjamini vane zviuru zvina mazana maviri namakumi masere, vakanga vakashonga nhovo vaifura nouta; ava vose vaiva varume vane simba noumhare." 
2Chronicles14:9 Zvino Zera multiopia akauya kuzorwa navo nehondo yavanhu vane zviuru zvezviuru, nengoro dzina mazana matatu; akasvika Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Ipapo Asa akabuda kuzorwa naye, vakagadzira kuzorwa pamupata weZefata paMaresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa akachema kuna Jehovha Mwari wake, akati, ""Jehovha hakuna angabatsira asine simba kurwa nounesimba, asi imwi moga; tibatsirei Jehovha Mwari wedu; nokuti tinovimba nemi, tasvika kuzorwa navazhinji ava nezita renyu. imwi Jehovha, ndimi Mwari wedu; munhu ngaarege kukukundai imi.""" 
2Chronicles14:12 Ipapo Jehovha akaparadza vaItiopia pamberi paAsa, napamberi pavaJudha, vaItiopia vakatiza." 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa navanhu vaakanga anavo vakavateverera kusvikira paGerari; vaItiopia vakaurawa vazhinji, vakakoniwa kuzosimbazve; nokuti vakaparadzwa pamberi paJehovha napamberi pehondo yake vaJudha vakaenda nezvizhinji kwazvo zvavakapamba." 
2Chronicles14:14 Vakaparadza maguta ose akapoteredza Gerari; nokuti vakavhunduswa naJehovha; vakapamba maguta ose, nokuti kwakanga kune zvingapambwa zvizhinji maari." 
2Chronicles14:15 Vakaparadzawo matende ezvipfuwo, vakatapa makwai mazhinji nemakamera, ndokudzokera Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Zvino Mweya waMwari wakauya pamusoro paAzaria mwanakomana waOdhedhi; 
2Chronicles15:2 akabuda kundosangana naAsa, akati kwaari, ""Nditeererei imi, Asa navaJudha navaBhenjamini mose; Jehovha anemi, kana imwi munaye; kana mukamutsvaka achawanikwa nemi; asi kana mukamurasha, iye achakurashawo.""" 
2Chronicles15:3 Zvino nguva huru vaIsiraeri vakanga vasina Mwari wechokwadi, kana muprista anodzidzisa, kana murayiro;" 
2Chronicles15:4 asi vakati vachitendeukira kuna Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri pakutambudzika kwavo, nokumutsvaka, iye akawanikwa navo." 
2Chronicles15:5 Zvino nenguva iyo vaibuda novaipinda vakanga vagere panyika idzo, vaiva pakutambudzika kukuru." 
2Chronicles15:6 Vaiparadzana, rumwe rudzi ruchiparadza rumwe, rimwe guta richiparadza rimwe; nokuti Mwari aivatambudza nenhamo dzose." 
2Chronicles15:7 Asi ivai nesimba, maoko enyu ngaarege kushaiwa simba; nokuti basa renyu richapiwa mubayiro." 
2Chronicles15:8 Zvino Asa akati achinzwa mashoko awa, nezvakaporofitiwa nomuporofita Odhedhi, ndokutsunga moyo, akabvisa zvainyangadza panyika yose yaJudha naBenjamini, napamaguta aakanga akunda panyika yamakomo yaEfuremu; akavandudza aritari yaJehovha, yakanga iri pamberi pebiravira raJehovha." 
2Chronicles15:9 Ipapo akaunganidza vaJudha, navaBhenjamini vose, navatorwa vakanga vagere pakati pavo vaibva kuna Efuremu, naManase, naSimiyoni, nokuti vazhinji vaibva kuna Isiraeri vakauya kwaari, pakuona kwavo kuti Jehovha Mwari wake anaye." 
2Chronicles15:10 Naizvozvo vakaungana paJerusaremu nomwedzi wechitatu, negore regumi namashanu rokubata ushe kwaAsa." 
2Chronicles15:11 Vakabayira Jehovha zuva irero zvimwe zvavakanga vapamba vakauya nazvo, zvaiti: Nzombe dzina mazana manomwe, namakwai ane zviuru zvinomwe." 
2Chronicles15:12 Vakazvisunga kutsvaka Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo nemoyo yavo yose uye nemweya yavo yose; 
2Chronicles15:13 uye kuti ani naani asingatsvaki Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri aurawe, kana ari muduku kana ari mukuru, kana mukadzi kana murume." 
2Chronicles15:14 Vakapika kuna Jehovha nenzwi guru, nokupururudza, nehwamanda uye nemimanzi." 
2Chronicles15:15 VaJudha vose vakafara nokupika uku; nokuti vakanga vapika nemoyo yavo yose, nokumutsvaka nokuda kwavo kose; iye akawanikwa navo; Jehovha ndokuvapa zororo kumativi ose." 
2Chronicles15:16 Akabvisawo Maaka mai vamambo Asa, pauhosi hwavo; nokuti vakanga vaitira Ashera chifananidzo chinonyangadza; Asa akaparadza chifananidzo chavo, akachikuyakuya, ndokuchipisa parukova Kidhironi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Asi matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa pakati paIsiraeri; kunyange zvakadaro moyo waAsa wakanga wakarurama kwazvo mazuva ake ose. 
2Chronicles15:18 Akaisa mumba maMwari zvinhu zvakanga zvatsaurirwa Mwari nababa vake, nezvakanga zvatsaurwa naiye amene, sirivha, nendarama, nemidziyo." 
2Chronicles15:19 Kurwa hakuna kuzovapo kusvikira pagore ramakumi matatu namashanu rokubata ushe kwaAsa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Zvino negore ramakumi matatu namatanhatu rokubata ushe kwaAsa, Bhaasha mambo waIsiraeri akakwira kundorwa naJudha, akavaka Rama, kuti arege kutendera munhu kubuda kana kupinda kuna Asa mambo waJudha." 
2Chronicles16:2 Ipapo Asa akabudisa sirivha nendarama muzvivigiro zvefuma yeimba yaJehovha neimba yamambo, akatuma shoko kuna Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria, akanga agere Dhamasiko, akati," 
2Chronicles16:3  Sungano iripo pakati pangu nemi, sezvayakavapo pakati pababa vangu nababa venyu; tarirai, ndinokutumirai sirivha nendarama; endai muputse sungano yenyu naBhaasha mambo waIsiraeri, abve kwandiri.""" 
2Chronicles16:4 Bhenihadhadhi akateerera mambo Asa, akatuma vakuru vehondo dzake kundorwa namaguta aIsiraeri, akakunda Ijoni, neDhani, neAbherimaimi, namaguta ose amatura aNafutari." 
2Chronicles16:5 Zvino Bhaasha akati achizvinzwa, akarega kuvaka Rama, akarega basa rake." 
2Chronicles16:6 Ipapo mambo Asa akatora vaJudha vose; vakandobvisa mabwe eRama, namatanda aro zvaakanga avaka nazvo iye Bhaasha, akavaka nazvo Gebha neMizipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Zvino nenguva iyo muoni Hanani akasvika kuna Asa mambo waJudha, akati kwaari, ""Zvawakavimba namambo weSiria, ukasavimba naJehovha Mwari wako, zvino hondo yamambo weSiria yapukunyuka paruoko rwako." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ko vaItiopia navaRubhimi vakanga vasi hondo huru-huru, vane ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza vazhinji here? Kunyange zvakadaro, zvawakavimba naJehovha, iye akavaisa muruoko rwako." 
2Chronicles16:9 Nokuti meso aJehovha anotarira-tarira kumativi ose enyika yose, kuti aratidze simba rake kuna iye ano moyo wakarurama kwazvo kwaari. Pachinhu ichi waita sebenzi; nokuti kubva zvino uchavingwa nokurwa.""" 
2Chronicles16:10 Ipapo Asa akatsamwira muoni, akamuisa mutirongo; nokuti akanga amutsamwira kwazvo nokuda kwechinhu ichi. Nenguva iyo Asa akatambudzawo vamwe vanhu." 
2Chronicles16:11 Zvino tarirai, mabasa aAsa, okutanga nookupedzisira, akanyorwa mubhuku yamadzimambo aJudha naaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles16:12 Asi pagore ramakumi matatu namapfumbamwe rokubata kwake ushe, Asa akazonzwa makumbo; urwere hwake hukanyanya kwazvo; kunyange zvakadaro, paurwere hwake haana kutsvaka Jehovha, asi n'anga." 
2Chronicles16:13 Asa akavata namadzibaba ake, akafa negore ramakumi mana nerimwe rokubata kwake ushe." 
2Chronicles16:14 Vakamuviga pamuhwiro hwake, hwaakanga azvivezera muguta raDhavhidhi, vakamuradzika panhovo dzizere nezvinonhuhwira zvamarudzi mazhinji, zvakanga zvagadzirwa navaiti vezvinonhuhwira vakangwara; vakamupis ira zvizhinji-zhinji." 
2Chronicles17:1 Zvino Jehoshafati mwanakomana wake akabata ushe pachigaro chake, akazvisimbisa kundorwa navaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles17:2 Akaisa varwi mumaguta ose akakombwa aJudha, akaisawo mapoka avarwi panyika yaJudha, napamaguta aEfuremu, akanga akundwa naAsa baba vake." 
2Chronicles17:3 Jehovha akava naJehoshafati, nokuti akafamba munzira dzokutanga dzababa vake Dhavhidhi; haana kundobvunza vaBhaari;" 
2Chronicles17:4 asi akabvunza Mwari wababa vake, akafamba nemirairo yake asingateveri mabasa aIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles17:5 Saka Jehovha akasimbisa ushe paruoko rwake; vaJudha vose vakavigira Jehoshafati zvipo, akava nefuma nokukudzwa zvizhinji." 
2Chronicles17:6 moyo wake ukashingairira nzira dzaJehovha; uye akabvisawo matunhu akakwirira namatanda okunamata nawo pakati paJudha. 
2Chronicles17:7 Uye pagore rechitatu rokubata kwake ushe akatuma machinda ake, vanaBhenihairi, naObhadhiya, naZekariya, naNetaneri, naMikaya, kundodzidzisa mumaguta aJudha;" 
2Chronicles17:8 uye pamwechete navo vaRevhi, vana Shemaya, naNetania, naZebhadhia, naAshaheri, naShemiramoti, naJehonatani, naAdhonia, naTobhiya, naTobhiadhonia, vari vaRevhi; uye pamwechete navo Erishama naJehoramu, vaprista." 
2Chronicles17:9 Vakandodzidzisa pakati paJudha, vane bhuku yomurayiro waJehovha; vakafamba vachipota namaguta ose aJudha, vachidzidzisa pakati pavanhu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Ushe hwose bwenyika dzose dzakanga dzakapoteredza Judha, vakavhunduswa naJehovha, vakasarwa naJehoshafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Vamwe vaFirisitia vakavigira Jehoshafati zvipo, nesirivha yomutero; vaArabhiawo vakamuvigira makwai, makondobwe ane zviuru zvinomwe namazana manomwe, nenhongo dzembudzi dzine zviuru zvinomwe namazana manomwe." 
2Chronicles17:12 Jehoshafati akazova mukuru kwazvo, akavaka pakati paJudha nhare namaguta amatura." 
2Chronicles17:13 Waiva namabasa mazhinji mumaguta aJudha, navarwi, varume vane simba noumhare paJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles17:14 Zvino ndiwo mazita avo nedzimba, dzamadzibaba avo: Pakati paJudha, vakuru vezviuru: Adhina mukuru, uye pamwechete naye varume vane simba noumhare vane zviuru zvina mazana matatu;" 
2Chronicles17:15 tevere Jehohanani mukuru, uye pamwechete naye varume vane zviuru zvina mazana maviri namakumi masere;" 
2Chronicles17:16 tevere Amasia mwanakomana waZikiri, wakazvipa kuna Jehovha nomoyo wake wose; uye pamwechete naye varume vane simba noumhare vane zviuru pakati" 
2Chronicles17:17 pavaBhenjamini: Eriadha munhu ane simba noumhare, uye pamwechete naye varume vane zviuru zvina mazana maviri vakanga vakabata uta nenhovo;" 
2Chronicles17:18 tevere Jehozabhadhi, uye pamwechete naye varume vane zviuru zvine zana namakumi masere, vakanga vakazvigadzirira kurwa." 
2Chronicles17:19 Ndivo vaibatira mambo, vamwe vakanga vaiswa namambo mumaguta akakombwa panyika yose yaJudha vasingaverengwi." 
2Chronicles18:1 Zvino Jehoshafati akanga ane fuma zhinji nokukudzwa kukuru; akawaniranawo naAhabhi. 
2Chronicles18:2 Zvino mamwe makore akati apfuura, iye akaburukira Samaria kuna Ahabhi. Ahabhi akamuurayira iye navanhu vaakanga anavo makwai nenzombe zhinji, akamukurudzira kuenda naye RamotiGiriyadhi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ipapo Ahabhi mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati mambo waJudha, ""Muchaenda neni RamotiGiriyadhi here?"" Iye akapindura, akati, ""Ini ndakaita sewe, navanhu vangu savanhu vako; tichaenda newe kundorwa.""" 
2Chronicles18:4 Jehoshafati akati kuna mambo waIsiraeri, ""Dombobvunza hako shoko raJehovha nhasi.""" 
2Chronicles18:5 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akaunganidza vaporofita, varume vaiva namazana mana, akati kwavari, ""Tiende kundorwa neRamotiGiriyadhi here, kana ndirege?"" Ivo vakati, ""Endai, nokuti Mwari achariisa mumaoko amambo.""" 
2Chronicles18:6 Asi Jehoshafati akati, ""Hakuchina mumwe muporofita waJehovha pano here, timubvunze?""" 
2Chronicles18:7 Mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, ""Mumwe murume achiko, watingabvunza kuda kwaJehovha naye, asi ini ndinomuvenga, nokuti haatongoporofiti zvakanaka pamusoro pangu, asi mazuva ose zvakaipa; ndiye Mikaya mwanakomana waImira."" Jehoshafati akati, ""Mambo ngaarege kudaro.""" 
2Chronicles18:8 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akadana muranda, akati, ""Kurumidza undotora Mikaya mwanakomana waImira.""" 
2Chronicles18:9 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vakanga vagere mumwe nomumwe pachigaro chake choushe, vagere vakafuka nguvo dzavo dzoushe padare pasuo reSamaria; vaporofita vose vakaporofita pamberi pavo." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedhekia mwanakomana waKenaani akazviitira nyanga dzamatare, akati, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, `Nedzidzi muchatunga vaSiria, kusvikira vapera.' """ 
2Chronicles18:11 Navamwe vaporofita vose vakaporofita saizvozvo, vakati, ""Endai RamotiGiriyadhi, muchakunda, nokuti Jehovha achariisa paruoko rwamambo.""" 
2Chronicles18:12 Zvino nhume yakanga yandodana Mikaya yakataura kwaari, ikati, ""Tarirai, mashoko avaporofita anobvumirana achitaura zvakanaka kuna mambo; zvino ndinokumbira kuti shoko renyu rive seshoko romumwe wavo, mutaurewo zvakanaka.""" 
2Chronicles18:13 Ipapo Mikaya akati, ""NaJehovha mupenyu, izvo zvinorehwa naMwari wangu, ndizvo zvandichataura.""" 
2Chronicles18:14 Zvino akati achisvika kuna mambo, mambo akati kwaari, ""Mikaya, tiende kundorwa neRamotiGiriyadhi here, kana ndirege?"" Iye akati, ""Endai henyu, muchakunda; vachaiswa muruoko rwenyu.""" 
2Chronicles18:15 Mambo akati kwaari, ""Ndinofanira kukupikisa kangani kuti undiudze chokwadi yoga nezita raJehovha?""" 
2Chronicles18:16 Iye akati, ""Ndakaona vaIsiraeri vose vakapararira pamakomo samakwai asina mufudzi; Jehovha akati, `Ava havana tenzi, mumwe nomumwe ngaadzokere kumusha kwake norugare.' """ 
2Chronicles18:17 Mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, ""Handina kukuudza here, kuti haangaporofiti zvakanaka pamusoro pangu, asi zvakaipa?""" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya akati, ""Zvino chinzwai shoko raJehovha, Ndakaona Jehovha agere pachigaro chake choushe, nehondo dzose dzokudenga dzimire kurudyi rwake nokuruboshwe rwake." 
2Chronicles18:19 Ipapo Jehovha akati, `Ndianiko achandonyengera Ahabhi, aende, andourawa paRamotiGiriyadhi?' Zvino mumwe akataura achiti zvokuti, nomumwezve akati zvokuti." 
2Chronicles18:20 Zvino mweya ukabuda, ukamira pamberi paJehovha, ukati, `Ini ndichandomunyengera.' Jehovha akati kwauri, `Neiko?'" 
2Chronicles18:21 Iwo ukati, `Ndichaenda, ndichava mweya wenhema mumiromo yavaporofita vake vose.' Iye akati, `Iwe ndiwe uchamunyengera, uchakundawo; enda hako, unoita saizvozvo.'" 
2Chronicles18:22 Naizvozvo zvino, tarirai Jehovha akaisa mweya wenhema mumiromo yavaporofita venyu ava vose, asi Jehovha akataura zvakaipa pamusoro penyu.""" 
2Chronicles18:23 Ipapo Zedhekia mwanakomana waKenaani akaswedera, akarova Mikaya padama rake, akati, ""Mweya waJehovha wakaenda nepiko uchibva kwandiri kundotaura newe?""" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya akati, ""Uchazviona musi uyo wauchandovanda nawo mukamuri yomukati.""" 
2Chronicles18:25 Ipapo mambo waIsiraeri akati, ""Batai Mikaya, mumuise kuna Amoni mubati weguta, nokuna Joashi mwanakomana wamambo," 
2Chronicles18:26 muti, 'Zvanzi namambo, Pinzai munhu uyu mutirongo, mumupe zvokudya zvokutambudzika, nemvura yokutambudzika, kusvikira ndichidzoka norugare.' """ 
2Chronicles18:27 Ipapo Mikaya akati, ""Kana mukatongodzoka norugare, Jehovha haana kutaura neni."" Akati, ""Inzwai, imwi vanhu, imwi mose.""" 
2Chronicles18:28 Naizvozvo mambo waIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vakaenda RamotiGiriyadhi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Zvino mambo waIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, ""Ini ndichazvishandura, ndigondorwa; asi iwe chifuka nguvo dzako dzoushe."" Mambo waIsiraeri akazvishandura, akandorwa." 
2Chronicles18:30 Zvino mambo weSiria akanga araira vatariri vengoro dzake, akati, ""Regai kurwa navaduku kana navakuru, asi namambo waIsiraeri oga.""" 
2Chronicles18:31 Zvino vatariri vengoro vakati vachiona Jehoshafati, vakati, ""Ndiye mambo waIsiraeri."" Naizvozvo vakatsaukira kundorwa naye; asi Jehoshafati wakaridza mhere, Jehovha akamubatsira; Mwari akavakurudzira kumurega." 
2Chronicles18:32 Zvino vatariri vengoro vakati vachiona kuti haazi mambo waIsiraeri, vakadzoka pakumutevera." 
2Chronicles18:33 Zvino mumwe murume akawembura uta hwake asingashumbi hake, akafura mambo waIsiraeri pakati pezvisungo zvenguvo dzake dzokurwa nadzo; ipapo mambo akati kumufambisi wengoro, ""Dzoka, undiise kunze kwehondo, nokuti ndakuvadzwa kwazvo.""" 
2Chronicles18:34 Kurwa kukanyanya kwazvo nomusi uyo; asi mambo waIsiraeri wakazvitsigira mungoro yake akarwa navaSiria kusvikira madekwana; zvino panguva yokuvira kwezuva akafa. 
2Chronicles19:1 Zvino Jehoshafati mambo waJudha akadzokera norugare kumusha kwake paJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles19:2 Ipapo Jehu mwanakomana womuoni Hanani akaenda kundosangana naye, akati kuna mambo Jehoshafati, ""Zvakanaka kubatsira vakaipa, nokuda vanovenga Jehovha here? Nokuda kwechinhu ichi Jehovha akutsamwirai." 
2Chronicles19:3 Kunyange zvakadaro, zvimwe zvinhu zvakanaka zvakawanikwa kwamuri, nokuti makabvisa Asheroti panyika, mukatsvaka Mwari nomoyo wose.""" 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehoshafati akagara paJerusaremu, akabudazve pakati pavanhu kubva paBheerishebha kusvikira kunyika yamakomo yaEfuremu, akavadzoserazve kuna Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Akagadza vatongi panyika pamaguta ose akakombwa aJudha, guta rimwe nerimwe;" 
2Chronicles19:6 akati kuvatongi, ""Chenjerai zvamunoita; nokuti hamutongeri vanhu imwi asi Jehovha; iye anemi pakutonga kwenyu." 
2Chronicles19:7 Naizvozvo zvino kutya Jehovha ngakuve nemi; chenjerai, muzviite, nokuti kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu hakune zvakaipa, kana kutsaura vanhu, kana kugamuchira fufuro.""" 
2Chronicles19:8 Jehoshafati akaisawo paJerusaremu vamwe vaRevhi navaprista, navakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba aIsiraeri, kuzotonga zvinhu zvaJehovha nemhaka dzenharo. Ipapo vakadzokera Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles19:9 Akavaraira, achiti, ""Ndizvo zvamunofanira kuita muchitya Jehovha, makatendeka, mune moyo yakarurama." 
2Chronicles19:10 Zvino kana mhaka yenharo ikasvika kwamuri ichibva kuhama dzenyu dzigere pamaguta avo, kana riri shoko rokuurayana, kana romurau kana murayiro, kana zvakatemwa kana zvakatongwa, munofanira kuvanyevera kuti varege kupara mhaka pana Jehovha, kuti murege kutsamwirwa imwi nehama dzenyu; itai izvozvo, mugorega kuva nemhosva." 
2Chronicles19:11 Zvino tarirai, Amaria muprista mukuru achakurairai pamashoko ose aJehovha; naZebhadhia mwanakomana waIshimaeri, mutariri weimba yaJudha, pamashoko ose amambo; navaRevhi vachava vatariri venyu. Itai nesimba, Jehovha ave navakanaka.""" 
2Chronicles20:1 Shure kwaizvozvo vana vaMoabhu, navana vaAmoni, navamwe vavaAmoni pamwechete navo, vakasvika kuzorwa naJehoshafati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Ipapo vamwe vakasvika, vakaudza Jehoshafati, vachiti, ""Vanhu vazhinji vanouya, vachibva Siria mhiri kwegungwa, kuzorwa nemi; tarirai, vari paHazazonitamari,"" (ndiro Enigedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Ipapo Jehoshafati akatya, akashingaira kundobvunza Jehovha; akatara zuva rokutsanya panyika yose yavaJudha." 
2Chronicles20:4 VaJudha vakaungana kuzotsvaka rubatsiro kuna Jehovha; vakabva kumaguta ose aJudha kuzotsvaka Jehovha. 
2Chronicles20:5 Jehoshafati akasimuka paungano yavaJudha navanhu veJerusaremu, mumba maJehovha, pamberi poruvazhe rutsva;" 
2Chronicles20:6 akati, ""Haiwa, Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba edu, imwi hamuzi Mwari ari kudenga here? imwi hamuzi mubati woushe hwose bwendudzi here? Paruoko rwenyu pane simba noushe, naizvozvo hapano munhu angakudzivisai." 
2Chronicles20:7 Imi Mwari wedu, hamuna kudzinga here vaigara panyika ino pamberi pavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, mukaipa vana vaAbhurahamu shamwari yenyu nokusingaperi?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Vakagaramo, vakakuvakiraimo imba tsvene yezita renyu, vachiti," 
2Chronicles20:9 `Kana tikawirwa nezvakaipa, kana munondo wokutonga, kana denda, kana nzara, tichamira pamberi peimba ino napamberi penyu, (nokuti zita renyu riri muimba ino), tigochema kwamuri tiri pakutambudzika kwedu; ipapo muchatinzwa nokutirwira,'" 
2Chronicles20:10 Zvino tarirai vana vaAmoni navaMoabhu navapagomo reSeiri, vamusina kutendera vaIsiraeri kupinda pakati pavo nguva yavakabva panyika yeIjipiti, asi vakavarega, vakasavaparadza;" 
2Chronicles20:11 tarirai votitsiva, vachiuya kuzotidzinga panyika yenyu, yamakatipa ive nhaka yedu." 
2Chronicles20:12 Haiwa, Mwari wedu, hamungavatongi here? Nokuti hatine simba rokurwa navazhinji ava vanouya kuzorwa nesu; hatizivi chatingaita, asi meso edu akatarira kwamuri.""" 
2Chronicles20:13 Ipapo vaJudha vose vakamira pamberi paJehovha, pamwechete nepwere dzavo, navakadzi vavo, navana vavo." 
2Chronicles20:14 Mweya waJehovha ukauya pamusoro paJahazieri, mwanakomana waZekariya, mwanakomana waBhenaya, mwanakomana waJeieri, mwanakomana waMatanya, muRevhi, wavanakomana vaAsafi, pakati peungano;" 
2Chronicles20:15 iye akati, ""Teererai, imwi vaJudha mose, nemwi mugere paJerusaremu, nemwi mambo Jehoshafati; zvanzi naJehovha kwamuri: Nemwi musatya, kana kuvhunduka nokuda kwavanhu ava vazhinji, nokuti kurwa hakuzi kwenyu, asi ndokwaMwari." 
2Chronicles20:16 Burukai mangwana mundorwa navo; tarirai vanokwira napamukwidza weRizi; muchavawana pakuguma komupata, pamberi perenje reJerueri." 
2Chronicles20:17 imwi hamungafaniri henyu kurwapo; zvigadzireipo, murambe mumire henyu, muone kurwirwa kwenyu naJehovha, imwi vaJudha naveJerusaremu; musatya kana kuvhunduswa; budai mangwana mundorwa navo, nokuti Jehovha anemi.' """ 
2Chronicles20:18 Ipapo Jehoshafati akakotamisa musoro wake, chiso chakatarira pasi; vaJudha vose navakanga vagere Jerusaremu vakawira pasi pamberi paJehovha, vakanamata Jehovha." 
2Chronicles20:19 NavaRevhi vavana vavaKohati, navana vavaKora, vakasimuka vakarumbidza Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri nenzwi guru kwazvo." 
2Chronicles20:20 Vakamuka mangwanani, ndokubudira kurenje reTekoa; zvino vakati vachibuda, Jehoshafati akamira, akati, ""Chindinzwai imwi vaJudha nemwi mugere Jerusaremu; tendai Jehovha Mwari wenyu, mugosimbiswa; tendai vaporofita vake, mugokunda.""" 
2Chronicles20:21 Zvino akati arangana navanhu, akagadza vaifanira kuimbira Jehovha, nokumurumbidza nenguvo tsvene, vakafamba pamberi pehondo, vachiti, ""Vongai Jehovha, nokuti nyasha dzake hadziperi.""" 
2Chronicles20:22 Zvino vakati vachitanga kuimba nokurumbidza, Jehovha akaisa vavandiri kuzorwa navana vaAmoni, navaMoabhu, navapagomo reSeiri, ivo vakanga vauya kuzorwa navaJudha; vakakundwa." 
2Chronicles20:23 Nokuti vana vaAmoni navaMoabhu vakamukira vakanga vagere pagomo reSeiri kuti vavauraye nokuvaparadza chose; zvino vakati vapedza avo vakanga vagere paSeiri, mumwe nomumwe ndokubatsira pakuurayana." 
2Chronicles20:24 Zvino vaJudha vakati vachisvika kurusvingo rwenharirire rwokurenje, vakatarira vanhu vazhinji, ndokuona zvava zvitunha zvawira pasi, kwakanga kusina akapukunyuka." 
2Chronicles20:25 Zvino Jehoshafati navanhu vake vakati vachisvika kuzotora zvavakanga vapamba, vakawana pakati pavo zvizhinji: zvipfeko, nezvinhu zvinokosha, vakazvitorera izvo, asi vakakoniwa kuzvitakura zvose nokuwanda kwazvo; vakaita mazuva matatu vachitora mhambara, nokuda kokuwanda kwazvo." 
2Chronicles20:26 Zvino pazuva rechina vakaungana pamupata weBheraka; nokuti vakandokudza Jehovha ipapo; naizvozvo zita renzvimbo iyo rakatumidzwa Mupata weBheraka kusvikira zuva ranhasi. 
2Chronicles20:27 Ipapo vanhu vose vaJudha naveJerusaremu vakadzoka, Jehoshafati akavatungamirira, vakadzokera Jerusaremu nomufaro; nokuti Jehovha akanga avafadza pamusoro pavavengi vavo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Vakasvika Jerusaremu nemitengeramwa, nembira, nehwamanda, kusvikira paimba yaJehovha." 
2Chronicles20:29 Ipapo ushe hwose bwenyika iyo hwakatya Mwari kwazvo, pakunzwa kwavo kuti Jehovha akarwa navavengi vaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles20:30 Zvino ushe hwaJehoshafati hwakava norugare; nokuti Mwari wake akamuzorodza pamativi ose. 
2Chronicles20:31 Jehoshafati akabata ushe hwaJudha; akanga asvika makore makumi matatu namashanu pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore makumi maviri namashanu; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Azubha, mukunda waShirihi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Akafamba nenzira yababa vake Asa; haana kutsauka pairi, akaramba achiita zvakarurama pamberi paJehovha." 
2Chronicles20:33 Kunyange zvakadaro matunhu akakwirira haana kubviswa, navanhu vakanga vachigere kutevera Mwari wamadzibaba avo nomoyo wose." 
2Chronicles20:34 Zvino mamwe mabasa aJehoshafati, okutanga nookupedzisira, tarirai akanyorwa pamashoko aJehu, mwanakomana waHanani, akaiswa mubhuku yamadzimambo aIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles20:35 Shure kwaizvozvi Jehoshafati mambo waJudha wakasungana naAhazia mambo waIsiraeri; iye aifamba nenzira yakaipa kwazvo; 
2Chronicles20:36 akasungana naye pakuvaka zvikepe zvaienda Tarishishi; vakavaka zvikepe paEZiyonigebheri. 
2Chronicles20:37 Ipapo Eriezeri mwanakomana waDhodhavhahu weMaresha akaporofita pamusoro paJehoshafati, akati, ""Zvawasungana naAhazia, Jehovha waparadza mabasa ako."" Zvikepe zvikaputsika, zvikakoniwa kuenda Tarishishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Zvino Jehoshafati akavata namadzibaba ake, akavigwa namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi; Jehoramu mwanakomana wake akamutevera paushe." 
2Chronicles21:2 Iye akanga ana vanun'una, vaiva vanakomana vaJehoshafati, vaiti: Azaria, naJehieri, naZekariya, naAzaria, naMikaeri, naShefatia; ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaJehoshafati mambo waIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles21:3 Baba vavo vakavapa zvipo zvikuru zvesirivha, nendarama, nezvinhu zvinokosha, pamwechete namaguta akakombwa paJudha; asi ushe wakahupa Jehoramu, nokuti iye akanga ari wedangwe." 
2Chronicles21:4 Zvino Jehoramu akati apinda paushe hwababa vake, ndokuzvisimbisa, akauraya vanun'una vake vose nomunondo, navamwewo vamachinda aIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoramu akanga asvika makore makumi matatu namaviri pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore masere. 
2Chronicles21:6 Akafamba nenzira yamadzimambo alsiraeri, sezvakaita imba yaAhabhi; nokuti mukunda waAhabhi akanga ari mukadzi wake; akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha." 
2Chronicles21:7 Kunyange zvakadaro Jehovha akanga asingadi kuparadza imba yaDhavhidhi, nokuda kwesungano yaakanga aita naDhavhidhi, uye nokuti akanga amupikira kuti achamupa mwenje iye navana vake nguva dzose." 
2Chronicles21:8 Zvino namazuva ake vaEdhomu vakamukira vaJudha, vakazviitira mambo wavo." 
2Chronicles21:9 Ipapo Jehoramu akaenda navakuru vake, ane ngoro dzake dzose naye; akamuka usiku, akaparadza vaEdhomu vakanga vakamukomba navakuru vengoro." 
2Chronicles21:10 Naizvozvo vaEdhomu vakamukira vaJudha, kusvikira zuva ranhasi. Ipapo veRibhinawo vakamumukira nenguva iyo; nokuti akanga arasha Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles21:11 Akaitawo matunhu akakwirira pamakomo aJudha, akapatisa vagere Jerusaremu, nokutsausa vaJudha." 
2Chronicles21:12 Ipapo mwadhi yakabva kumuporofita Eria, ikasvika kwaari, ichiti, ""Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari wababa vako Dhavhidhi, `Zvausina kufamba nenzira dzababa vako Jehoshafati, kana nenzira dzaAsa mambo waJudha;" 
2Chronicles21:13 asi wakafamba nenzira dzamadzimambo aIsiraeri, ukapatisa Judha navagere Jerusaremu, sezvakaita imba yaAhabhi, ukaurayawo vanun'una vako vakanga vakanaka kupfuura iwe;" 
2Chronicles21:14 zvino tarira, Jehovha acharova vanhu vako, navana vako, navakadzi vako, nezvinhu zvako zvose, nenjodzi yakaipa;" 
2Chronicles21:15 iwe uchava nehosha yakaipa yomuura kusvikira ura hwako huchibuda kunze nemhaka yehosha iyo zuva rimwe nerimwe.' 
2Chronicles21:16 Zvino Jehovha akakurudzira mweya yavaFirisitia neyavaArabhia, vakanga vari kurutivi rwavaltiopia, kuzorwa naJehoramu;" 
2Chronicles21:17 vakandorwa navaJudha, vakapinda nyika yavo nesimba, ndokutora nhumbi dzose dzavakawana mumba mamambo, navanakomana vake, navakadzi vake; naizvozvo haana kusarirwa nomwanakomana, kunyange nomumwe asi Jehoahazi, muduku wavanakomana vake vose." 
2Chronicles21:18 Shure kwaizvozvo zvose Jehovha akamurova muura hwake nehosha isingagoni kurapwa. 
2Chronicles21:19 Zvino makore maviri akati apera, ura hwake hukabuda kunze nemhaka yourwere, akafa nehosha dzakaipa; vanhu vake vakasamupisira, sezvavakapisira madzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles21:20 Akanga asvika makore makumi matatu namaviri pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore masere; akaenda hake asingadikamwi, vakamuviga paguta raDhavhidhi, asi havana kumuviga pamarinda amadzimambo." 
2Chronicles22:1 Zvino vagere Jerusaremu vakaita Ahazia, mwanakomana wake muduku, mambo panzvimbo yake, nokuti boka ravanhu, vakauya navaArabhia, vakanga vauraya vakuru vake vose. Naizvozvo Ahazia mwanakomana waJehoramu mambo waJudha, akabata ushe." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazia akanga asvika makore makumi mana namaviri pakutanga kwake kubata ushe; akabata ushe paJerusaremu gore rimwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Ataria, mukunda waOmiri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Naiye akafamba nenzira dzeimba yaAhabhi; nokuti mai vake vaiva murairi wake pakuita zvakaipa. 
2Chronicles22:4 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha sezvakaitwa naveimba yaAhabhi; nokuti baba vake vakati vafa, ndivo vaiva varairi vake, vakamuisa pakuparadzwa."
