Ezra4:12 Mambo ngaaziviswe kuti vaJudha, vakabva kwenyu vakasvika kuno kwatiri paJerusaremu, vovaka guta rokumukira mambo, rakaipa; vapedza masvingo, nokugadzira nheyo." 
Ezra4:13 Zvino mambo ngaaziviswe, kuti kana guta iri rikavakwa, namasvingo aro akapera, havangabudisi mutero, kana zvipo, kana muripo wenzira, pashure madzimambo achatadzirwa." 
Ezra4:14 Zvino isu, zvatinodya munyu unobva paimba yamambo, uye zvatisingafaniri kuona mambo achininipiswa, tatuma mwadhi kuzozivisa mambo;" 
Ezra4:15 kuti vanzvere pabhuku yenhau yamadzibaba enyu; muchaona mubhuku yenhau, kuti guta iri raimukira mambo, raitadzira madzimambo nenyika, uye kuti mukati maro vairamba vachimukira madzimambo kubva kare nakare. Guta iri rakaparadzwa nemhaka iyo." 
Ezra4:16 Tinozivisa mambo kuti kana guta iri rikavakwazve, namasvingo akapera, nemhaka iyo hamungazovi nomugove mhiri korwizi.""" 
Ezra4:17 Ipapo mambo akatuma mhinduro kuna Rehumi mukuru, naShimishai munyori, nedzimwe shamwari dzavo dzaigara Samaria napamwe mhiri korwizi, achiti, ""Rugare ngaruve nemi, namamwe mashoko akadai." 
Ezra4:18 mwadhi yamakatitumira, ndairavirwa zvakanaka." 
Ezra4:19 Ndikaraira, vakanzvera vakaona kuti guta iri raimukira madzimambo kubva kare nakare, uye kuti mukati maro maiva nokumukira mambo nokurangana zvakaipa." 
Ezra4:20 Uye madzimambo ane simba aivapo paJerusaremu, aibata ushe ose pamhiri porwizi; ivo vaibudisirwa mutero, nezvipo, nomuripo wenzira." 
Ezra4:21 Zvino temai chirevo chokuti vanhu avo varege basa ravo, guta iri rirege kuvakwa, kusvikira ini ndatema chirevo." 
Ezra4:22 Chenjerai, musanonoka pachinhu ichi; chakaipa chichakurireiko, kuzotadzira madzimambo?""" 
Ezra4:23 Zvino mashoko emwadhi yamambo Aritashasita akati aravirwa Rehumi, naShimishai munyori, namakurukota avo, vakakurumidza kuenda Jerusaremu kuvaJudha, vakavadzivisa nokumanikidza nesimba." 
Ezra4:24 Ipapo basa reimba yaMwari paJerusaremu rakaregwa; rikaregwa kusvikira pagore rechipiri rokubata ushe kwaDhariusi mambo wePerisia. 
Ezra5:1 Zvino vaporofita, vaiti muporofita Hagai, naZekariya mwanakomana waIdho, vakaporofitira vaJudha vakanga vari paJudha neJerusaremu; vakaporofitira nezita raMwari waIsiraeri." 
Ezra5:2 Ipapo Zerubhabheri mwanakomana waShearitieri, naJeshua mwanakomana waJozadhaki, vakasimuka, vakatanga kuvaka imba yaMwari paJerusaremu; vaporofita vaMwari, vakanga vanavo, vachivabatsira." 
Ezra5:3 Zvino panguva iyo Tatenai, mubati wenyika mhiri korwizi, naShetaribhozenai, namakurukota avo vakasvika kwavari, vakati kwavari, ""Makarairwa nani kuvaka imba iyi, nokupedza rusvingo urwu here?""" 
Ezra5:4 Ipapo vakataurawo navo, vakati, ""Mazita avarume vanovaka imba iyi ndivanaani?""" 
Ezra5:5 Asi ziso raMwari wavo rakanga rakatarira vakuru vavaJudha, havana kuvaregesa basa, kusvikira mhaka yaiswa kuna Dhariusi nemhinduro pamusoro payo ichizodzoka nemwadhi." 
Ezra5:6 Ndiwo mashoko emwadhi yakatumirwa mambo Dhariusi naTatenai mubati mhiri korwizi, naShetaribhozenai, nemakurukota ake vaAfarishaki, vakanga vari mhiri korwizi;" 
Ezra5:7 vakamutumira mwadhi makanga makanyorwa kudai, ""Kuna mambo Dhariusi, rugare rwose ngaruve nemi." 
Ezra5:8 Mambo ngaaziviswe kuti takaenda kurutivi rwenyika yaJudha, kuimba yaMwari mukuru, inovakwa namabwe makuru, uye matanda anoiswa mumasvingo, basa iri rinoshingairirwa, rinopfuurira mberi zvakanaka pamaoko avo." 
Ezra5:9 Zvino takabvunza vakuru ivavo, tikati kwavari, `Ndianiko wakakurairai kuvaka imba iyi nokupedza rusvingo urwu?'" 
Ezra5:10 Takavabvunzawo mazita avo, kuti tikuzivisei, tinyore mazita avarume vanovatungamirira." 
Ezra5:11 Vakapindura vachiti, `Isu tiri varanda vaMwari wokudenga napasi, tinovaka imba yakadeya kuvakwa makore mazhinji akapfuura, yakavakwa nomumwe mambo mukuru waIsiraeri, ikapera.'" 
Ezra5:12 Asi madzibaba edu akati atsamwisa Mwari wokudenga, iye akavaisa mumaoko aNebhukadhenezari mambo weBhabhironi, muKaradhea; iye akaparadza imba ino, akatapa vanhu, ndokuenda navo Bhabhironi." 
Ezra5:13 Asi negore rokutanga raKoreshi mambo weBhabhironi, mambo Koreshi akaraira, kuti imba ino yaMwari ivakwe." 
Ezra5:14 Nemidziyo yendarama neyesirivha yeimba yaMwari, yakanga yatorwa naNebhukadhinezari patemberi yaiva Jerusaremu, ikaiswa mutemberi yeBhabhironi, mambo Koreshi akabvisa izvozvo mutemberi yeBhabhironi, zvikapiwa mumwe wainzi Sheshibhazari, waakanga aita mubati;" 
Ezra5:15 akati kwaari, Tora midziyo iyi, undoiisa mutemberi iri Jerusaremu, imba yaMwari ivakwe panzvimbo yayo." 
Ezra5:16 Ipapo uyu Sheshibhazari wakauya, akateya nheyo dzeimba yaMwari iri Jerusaremu; zvino kubva panguva iyo kusvikira zvino yakaramba ichivakwa, nazvino ichigere kupera.'" 
Ezra5:17 Naizvozvo zvino, kana mambo achifara nazvo, ngavanzvere muimba yefuma yamambo iri Bhabhironi, vawone kana zviri izvo, kana mambo Koreshi akaraira kuti imba ino yaMwari ivakwe Jerusaremu, mambo agotizivisa kuda kwake pamusoro pemhaka iyi.""" 
Ezra6:1 Ipapo mambo Dhariusi akaraira, vakanzvera paimba yamabhuku, pavaichengeta fuma paBhabhironi." 
Ezra6:2 Vakawana paAkimeta, paimba yamambo, yakanga iri parutivi rwenyika yeMedhia, rugwaro rwakapetwa makanga makanyorwa kudai kuti varangarire," 
Ezra6:3 Pagore rokutanga ramambo Koreshi, mambo Koreshi akaraira, achiti, `Kana iri imba yaMwari paJerusaremu, imba ngaivakwe, pave pavangabayira zvibayiro, nenheyo dzayo dziteyiwe nesimba; kukwirira kwayo kusvike makubhiti ana makumi matanhatu, nokufara kwayo makubhiti ana makumi matanhatu;" 
Ezra6:4 ngaive nemisara mitatu yamabwe makuru, nomusara mumwe wamatanda matsva; mari yokuvaka nayo ngaitorwe paimba yamambo." 
Ezra6:5 Nemidziyo yendarama nesirivha yeimba yaMwari, yakadeya kutorwa naNebhukadhinezari patemberi paJerusaremu, ikaiswa naye Bhabhironi, ngaidzoswe, iiswezve patemberi iri Jerusaremu, chimwe nechimwe panzvimbo yacho, mugozviisa muimba yaMwari.'" 
Ezra6:6 Naizvozvo zvino imwi Tatenai mubati wenyika mhiri korwizi, naShetaribhozenai, namakurukota avaAfarisaki, imwi muri mhiri korwizi, chibvai ipapo;" 
Ezra6:7 varegei pabasa reimba yaMwari; mubati wavaJudha navakuru vavaJudha ngavavake imba iyi yaMwari panzvimbo yayo. 
Ezra6:8 Uye ndinoraira zvamunofanira kuitira vakuru ava vavaJudha, kuti imba iyi yaMwari ivakwe, mari yokuvaka nayo ngaitorwe pafuma yamambo, pamutero unoripwa mhiri korwizi, ikurumidze kupiwa varume avo, kuti varege kudziviswa." 
Ezra6:9 Uye zvose zvavanoshaiwa, kana nzombe duku, kana makondobwe, kana makwayana, zvokuita nazvo zvipiriso zvinopisirwa Mwari wokudenga, kana zviyo, kana munyu, kana waini, kana mafuta, sezvinotaura vaprista vari Jerusaremu, ngavapiwe izvozvo zuva rimwe nerimwe, musingadariki;" 
Ezra6:10 kuti vagone kuvigira Mwari wokudenga zvibayiro zvinonhuhwira zvakanaka, vanyengetererewo upenyu hwamambo, nohwavanakomana vake." 
Ezra6:11 Ndatemawo chirevo, kuti ani naani anoshandura shoko iri, bango ribviswe paimba yake, iye aturikwe aroverwe pariri; uye imba yake iitwe durunhuru pamusoro pechinhu ichi;" 
Ezra6:12 Mwari, akagarisa zita rake ipapo, ngaaparadze madzimambo ose avanhu vachatambanudza maoko avo kushandura chinhu ichi, nokuparadza imba iyi yaMwari iri paJerusaremu. Ini Dhariusi ndatema chirevo ichi; ngazviitwe nokukurumidza.""" 
Ezra6:13 Ipapo Tatenai mubati wenyika mhiri korwizi, naShetaribhozenai, namakurukota avo, vakaita izvozvo nokukurumidza, nemhaka yeshoko rakanga ratumwa namambo Dhariusi." 
Ezra6:14 Vakuru vavaJudha vakavaka, vakapfuurira mberi zvakanaka, vachisimbiswa nokuporofita kwaHagai, muporofita, naZekariya mwanakomana waldho. Vakavaka, vakaipedza, sezvakarairwa naMwari waIsiraeri, uye nechirevo chaKoreshi, naDhariusi, naAritashasita mambo wePerisia." 
Ezra6:15 Imba iyi ikapedzwa nezuva retatu romwedzi weAdhari pagore retanhatu rokubata ushe kwamambo Dhariusi. 
Ezra6:16 Vana vaIsiraeri navaprista, navaRevhi, navamwe vakanga vatapwa vakatsaurira Mwari imba iyi nomufaro." 
Ezra6:17 Vakabayira pakutsaura imba iyi yaMwari nzombe dzine zana rimwe, namakondobwe ana mazana maviri, namakwayana ana mazana mana; uye nhongo dzembudzi dzine gumi nembiri, dzakaenzana namarudzi avaIsiraeri, chive chipiriso chezvivi chavaIsiraeri vose." 
Ezra6:18 Vakagadza vaprista pamakamu avo, navaRevhi pamapoka avo, pabasa raMwari paJerusaremu; sezvakanga zvanyorwa pabhuku yaMozisi." 
Ezra6:19 Vatapwa vakaita Pasika nezuva regumi namana romwedzi wokutanga. 
Ezra6:20 Nokuti vaprista navaRevhi vakanga vazvinatsa nomoyo mumwe, vose vavo vakanga vanatswa; vakabayira vatapwa vose Pasika, nehama dzavo dzavaprista, naivo vamene." 
Ezra6:21 Ipapo vana vaIsiraeri, vakanga vadzoka pakutapwa, vakadya, ivo navose vakanga vazvitsaurira kwavari vachibva pamatsvina avahedheni venyika iyo, kuti vatsvake Jehovha Mwari waIsiraeri;" 
Ezra6:22 vakaita mutambo wezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa mazuva manomwe; nokuti Jehovha akanga avafadza, akarereudzira moyo wamambo weAsiria kwavari, kuti asimbise maoko avo pabasa reimba yaMwari waIsiraeri." 
Ezra7:1 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo, Aritashasita mambo wePerisia achibata ushe, Ezira mwanakomana waSeraya, mwanakomana waAzaria, mwanakomana waHirikia," 
Ezra7:2 mwanakomana waSharumi, mwanakomana waZadhoki, mwanakomana waAhitubhi," 
Ezra7:3 mwanakomana waAmaria, mwanakomana waAzaria, mwanakomana waMerayoti," 
Ezra7:4 mwanakomana waZerahia, mwanakomana waUzi, mwanakomana waBhuki," 
Ezra7:5 mwanakomana waAbhishua, mwanakomana waPinehasi, mwanakomana waEreazari, mwanakomana waAroni, muprista mukuru" 
Ezra7:6 uyu Ezira akaenda achibva Bhabhironi; iye akanga ari munyori akangwara pamurayiro waMozisi, akanga wapiwa naJehovha Mwari walsiraeri; mambo akamupa zvose zvaakakumbira, nokuda koruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pake." 
Ezra7:7 Navamwe vavana vaIsiraeri, navaprista, navaRevhi, navaimbi, navarindi vemikova, navaNetinimi, vakaenda Jerusaremu negore rechinomwe ramambo Aritashasita." 
Ezra7:8 Akasvika Jerusaremu nomwedzi wechishanu pagore rechinomwe ramambo. 
Ezra7:9 Nokuti akatanga kubva Bhabhironi nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wokutanga, akasvika Jerusaremu nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechishanu, nokuda koruoko rwakanaka rwaMwari wake rwakanga ruri pamusoro pake." 
Ezra7:10 Nokuti Ezira akanga ashingaira nomoyo wake wose kutsvaka murayiro waJehovha, nokuuita, nokudzidzisa pakati paIsiraeri zvaakatema nezvaakatonga." 
Ezra7:11 Zvino ndiwo mashoko emwadhi iyo mambo Aritashasita yaakapa Ezira muprista nomunyori iye munyori wamashoko emirairo yaJehovha nezvaakatemera Isiraeri," 
Ezra7:12 Aritashasita mambo wamadzimambo, kuna Ezira muprista, munyori womurayiro waMwari wokudenga, wakakwana, namamwe mashoko akadai." 
Ezra7:13 Ini ndinotema chirevo, kuti vanhu vose vaIsiraeri, navaprista vavo, navaRevhi, vari paushe hwangu, vanoda nokuda kwazvo kuenda Jerusaremu, ngavaende havo newe." 
Ezra7:14 Zvawatumwa namambo namakurukota ake manomwe kundobvunzisisa pamusoro paJudha neJerusaremu, sezvakarehwa nomurayiro waMwari wako uri muruoko rwako." 
Ezra7:15 Nokuenda nesirivha nendarama yakapiwa namambo namakurukota ake nokuda kwavo Mwari waIsiraeri, iye agere Jerusaremu," 
Ezra7:16 nesirivha nendarama yose yaungawana parutivi rwenyika yose yeBhabhironi, pamwechete nezvipo zvavanhu zvavachapa nokuda kwavo, nezvavaprista, zvavachapa imba yaMwari wavo iri paJerusaremu nomoyo yavo;" 
Ezra7:17 zvino unofanira kukurumidza kutenga nemari iyo nzombe, namakondobwe, namakwayana, pamwechete nezvipiriso zvazvo zvoupfu, nezvinodururwa, ugozviisa paaritari paimba yaMwari wenyu iri Jerusaremu." 
Ezra7:18 Kana iri sirivha nendarama yakasara, itai nazvo sezvamunofunga, iwe nehama dzako, sezvinodikamwa naMwari wenyu." 
Ezra7:19 Nemidziyo yaunopiwa kundobata nayo paimba yaMwari wako, uiise pamberi paMwari weJerusaremu." 
Ezra7:20 Nezvimwe zvinhu zvipi nezvipi zvinodikamwa paimba yaMwari wako, zvaunofanira kuripa, uzviripe uchitora paimba yefuma yamambo." 
Ezra7:21 Ini, iyeni mambo Aritashasita, ndinoraira vachengeti vose vefuma mhiri korwizi, ndichiti, `Zvose Ezira muprista, munyori womurayiro waMwari wokudenga, zvaanokumbira kwamuri, ngazviitwe nokukurumidza," 
Ezra7:22 kusvikira pamatarenda* esirivha ane zana, nezviyero zvine zana zvezviyo, namabhati ewaini ane zana, namabhati amafuta ane zana, nomunyu usingaverengwi.'" 
Ezra7:23 Zvose zvinorairwa naMwari wokudenga, ngazviitirwe zvakanaka imba yaMwari wokudenga; nokuti ushe hwamambo nohwavanakomana vake huchatsamwirweiko?" 
Ezra7:24 Tinokuzivisaiwo, kuti kana vari vaprista vose, navaRevhi, navaimbi, navarindi vemikova, navaNetinimi, navaranda veimba iyi yaMwari, havangaripiswi mutero, kana zvipo, kana muripo wenzira." 
Ezra7:25 Zvino iwe Ezira, nenjere dzaMwari wako, dzawakapiwa iwe, chigadza vatambi vemhosva, navatongi, vangatongera vanhu vose vari mhiri korwizi mhaka dzavo, vave vanhu vanoziva mirairo yaMwari wako, ugodzidzisa mumwe nomumwe asingaizivi." 
Ezra7:26 Ani naani, asingadi kuita murayiro waMwari wako, nomurayiro wamambo, ngaakurumidze kupiwa mhaka, kana yorufu, kana yokudzingwa kana yokutorerwa nhumbi dzake, kana yokusungwa mutirongo." 
Ezra7:27 Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba edu ngaakudzwe, iye akaisa chinhu chakadai mumoyo wamambo, kuti anatse imba yaJehovha iri Jerusaremu;" 
Ezra7:28 iye akandinzwisa tsitsi pamberi pamambo, napamberi pamakurukota ake, napamberi pamachinda ose ane simba amambo. Ini ndikasimbiswa nokuti ruoko rwaJehovha Mwari wangu rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu, ndikakoka varume vakuru pakati paIsiraeri, kuti vaende neni.""" 
Ezra8:1 Zvino ava ndivo vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, uye ndiwo mazita avakabva neni Bhabhironi, panguva yokubata ushe kwamambo Aritashasita." 
Ezra8:2 Pakati pavanakomana vaPinehasi, Gerishomi; pakati pavanakomana vaItamari, Dhanyeri; pakati pavanakomana vaDhavhidhi, Hatushi." 
Ezra8:3 Pakati pavanakomana vaShekania, pakati pavanakomana vaParoshi, Zekariya, uye pamwechete naye vakaverenga mazita avarume vane zana namakumi mashanu." 
Ezra8:4 Pakati pavanakomana vaPahatimoabhi, Eriehoenai mwanakomana waZerahia; uye pamwechete naye varume vana mazana maviri." 
Ezra8:5 Pakati pavanakomana vaShekania, mwanakomana waJahazieri, uye pamwechete naye varume vana mazana matatu." 
Ezra8:6 Pakati pavanakomana vaAdhini, Ebhedhi mwanakomana waJonatani; uye pamwechete naye varume vana makumi mashanu." 
Ezra8:7 Pakati pavanakomana vaErami, Jeshaya mwanakomana waAtaria; uye pamwechete naye varume vana makumi manomwe." 
Ezra8:8 Pakati pavanakomana vaShefatia, Zebhadhia mwanakomana waMikaeri; uye pamwechete naye varume vana makumi masere." 
Ezra8:9 Pakati pavanakomana vaJoabhi, Obhadhiya mwanakomana waJehieri; uye pamwechete naye varume vana mazana maviri negumi navasere." 
Ezra8:10 Pakati pavanakomana vaSheromiti, mwanakomana waJosifiya, uye pamwechete naye varume vane zana namakumi matanhatu." 
Ezra8:11 Pakati pavanakomana vaBhebhai, Zekariya mwanakomana waBhebhai; uye pamwechete naye varume vana makumi maviri navasere." 
Ezra8:12 Pakati pavanakomana vaAzagadhi, Johwanani mwanakomana waHakatani; uye pamwechete naye varume vane zana negumi rimwe." 
Ezra8:13 Pakati pavanakomana vaAdhonikami, ivo vokupedzisira, mazita avo ndiwo: Erifereti, naJeueri, naShemaya; uye pamwechete navo varume vana makumi matanhatu." 
Ezra8:14 Pakati pavanakomana vaBhigivhai, Utai naZabhudhi; uye pamwechete navo varume vana makumi manomwe." 
Ezra8:15 Ndikavakokera vose parwizi runoenda Ahavha; tikagarapo pamisasa mazuva matatu; ndikacherekedza vanhu navaprista, ndikashaiwapo kunyange nomumwe wavanakomana vaRevhi." 
Ezra8:16 Ipapo ndikatuma nhume kuzodana Eriezeri, naArieri, naShemaya, naErinatani, naJaribhati, naErinatani, naNatani, naZekariya, naMeshurami, vaiva vakuru; uye Joyaribhi, naErinatani, vaiva vadzidzisi." 
Ezra8:17 Ndikavatuma kuna Idho, waiva mukuru panzvimbo yainzi Kasifia; ndikavaudza zvavaifanira kutaura kuna Idho, nehama dzake vaNetinimi, panzvimbo yainzi Kasifia, kuti vauye kwatiri navabatiri veimba yaMwari wedu." 
Ezra8:18 Zvino ruoko rwakanaka rwaMwari wedu rwakanga ruri pamusoro pedu, saka vakauya kwatiri nomunhu akangwara wavana vaMari, mwanakomana waRevhi, mwanakomana waIsiraeri; naSherebhia, navanakomana vake nehama dzake vose gumi navasere;" 
Ezra8:19 naHashabhiya, uye pamwechete naye Jeshaya wavanakomana vaMerari, nehama dzake navanakomana vavo, vose makumi maviri;" 
Ezra8:20 napakati pavaNetinimi, vakanga vagadzwa naDhavhidhi namachinda pabasa ravaRevhi, vaNetinimi vana mazana maviri namakumi maviri; vose vakanga vakanyorwa mazita avo." 
Ezra8:21 Ipapo ndakatara nguva yokutsanya parwizi Ahavha, kuti tizvininipise pamberi paMwari wedu, tizvikumbirire kwaari isu nepwere dzedu nefuma yedu yose nzira yakarurama." 
Ezra8:22 Nokuti ndakanyara kukumbira kuna mambo boka ravarwi navatasvi vamabhiza kutibatsira kurwa navavengi panzira; nokuti takanga tataura namambo, tichiti, ""Ruoko rwaMwari wedu runochengeta vose vanomutsvaka, kuvaitira zvakanaka; asi simba rake nokutsamwa kwake zvinorwa navose vanomurasha.""" 
Ezra8:23 Naizvozvo takatsanya, tikanyengetera kuna Mwari wedu pamusoro paizvozvi, akatinzwa." 
Ezra8:24 Ipapo ndakatsaura vane gumi navaviri pakati pavakuru vavaprista, vaiti, Sherebhia, naHashabhiya, nedzimwe hama dzavo dzine gumi pamwechete navo;" 
Ezra8:25 ndikavayerera sirivha, nendarama, nemidziyo, icho chipo chakanga chapiwa imba yaMwari wedu namambo, namakurukota ake, namachinda, navaIsiraeri vose vakanga varipo." 
Ezra8:26 Ndakayerera pamaoko avo matarenda esirivha ana mazana matanhatu namakumi mashanu, nemidziyo yesirivha yakasvika matarenda ane zana, neyendarama yakasvika matarenda ane zana;" 
Ezra8:27 nembiya dzina makumi maviri dzendarama yakasvika madhariki ane chiuru chimwe; nemidziyo miviri yendarira yakanga yakaisvonaka, yaibwinya, yaikosha sendarama." 
Ezra8:28 Ndikati kwavari, ""Imi muri vatsvene vaJehovha, nemidziyo mitsvenewo; uye sirivha nendarama ndizvo zvipo zvokungopa nokuzvidira zvakavigirwa Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu." 
Ezra8:29 Muzvirindire, nokuzvichengeta, kusvikira mozviyera pamberi pavakuru, vavaprista navaRevhi, namachinda edzimba dzamadzibaba avaIsiraeri paJerusaremu, mumakamuri eimba yaJehovha.""" 
Ezra8:30 Naizvozvo vaprista navaRevhi vakagamuchira sirivha, nendarama, nemidziyo, vayererwa kurema kwazvo, kuti vazviise Jerusaremu paimba yaMwari wedu." 
Ezra8:31 Ipapo takabva parwizi Ahavha nezuva regumi namaviri romwedzi wokutanga, tichienda Jerusaremu; ruoko rwaMwari wedu rukatichengeta; akatirwira pamaoko avavengi vedu navakanga vakativandira panzira." 
Ezra8:32 Tikasvika Jerusaremu, tikagarapo mazuva matatu." 
Ezra8:33 Zvino pazuva rechina kurema kwesirivha, nendarama, nemidziyo zvakayerwa muimba yaMwari wedu, zvikaiswa pamaoko aMeremoti mwanakomana womuprista Uriya; Ereazari mwanakomana waPinehasi akanga anaye, uye Jozabhadhi mwanakomana waJeshua, naNowadhia mwanakomana waBhinui, ivo vaRevhi, vakanga vanavo." 
Ezra8:34 Zvose zvakaverengwa nokuyerwa kurema kwazvo; kurema kose kukanyorwa nenguva iyo 
Ezra8:35 Zvino vatapwa, vakanga vadzoka pakutapwa, vakapisira Mwari waIsiraeri chipiriso chinopiswa, nzombe dzine gumi nembiri dzavaIsiraeri vose, namakondobwe makumi mapfumbamwe namatanhatu, namakwayana makumi manomwe namanomwe, nenhongo dzembudzi dzine gumi nembiri, chive chipiriso chezvivi; izvozvo zvose chaiva chipiriso chakapisirwa Jehovha." 
Ezra8:36 Zvirevo zvamambo vakazvipa machinda amambo, navabati mhiri korwizi, ivo vakabatsira vanhu neimba yaMwari." 
Ezra9:1 Zvino izvi zvakati zvapera, machinda akaswedera kwandiri, akati, ""Vanhu vaIsiraeri, navaprista, navaRevhi havana kuzviraura pavanhu venyika panezvinonyangadza zvavo, ivo vaKenani, navaHiti, navaPerezi, navaJebhusi, navaAmoni, navaMoabhu, navaIjipiti, navaAmori." 
Ezra9:2 Nokuti vakatora vakunda vavo vave vakadzi vavo navavanakomana vavo; naizvozvo rudzi rutsvene rwakazvivenganisa navanhu venyika; zvirokwazvo maoko amachinda navabati ndiwo akanyanya pakudarika uku. 
Ezra9:3 Zvino ini ndakati ndichizvinzwa, ndikabvarura nguvo yangu nejasi rangu, ndikataura vhudzi romusoro wangu nendebvu dzangu, ndikagara pasi ndakakanuka." 
Ezra9:4 Ipapo vakaungana kwandiri vose vakanga vachidedera nokuda kwamashoko aMwari waIsiraeri pamusoro pokudarika kwavatapwa; ndikagara pasi ndakakanuka kusvikira panguva yechipiriso chamadekwana. 
Ezra9:5 Zvino panguva yechipiriso chamadekwana ndikasimuka pakuzvininipisa kwangu, ndichine nguvo yangu nejasi rangu zvakabvaruka; ndikawira pasi namabvi angu, ndikatambanudzira maoko angu kuna Jehovha Mwari wangu;" 
Ezra9:6 ndikati, ""Haiwa, Mwari wangu, ndinonyara, ndinotsveruka kusimudzira chiso changu kwamuri Mwari wangu; nokuti zvivi zvedu zvadarika misoro yedu, mhosva yedu yakakwira kusvikira kudenga." 
Ezra9:7 Kubva pamazuva amadzibaba edu takapara mhaka kwazvo kusvikira nhasi; zvino nokuda kwezvivi isu namadzimambo edu, navaprista vedu, takaiswa mumaoko amadzimambo enyika, tiurawe nomunondo, titapwe, nokuparadzwa, nokunyadzwa, sapazuva ranhasi." 
Ezra9:8 Zvino takanzwirwa tsitsi naJehovha Mwari wedu nguva duku-duku, akatisiyira vamwe vakapukunyuka, nokutipa mbambo panzvimbo yake tsvene, kuti Mwari wedu avhenekere meso edu, nokutiponesa paduku pauranda bwedu." 
Ezra9:9 Nokuti tiri varanda; kunyange zvakadaro Mwari haana kutirasha pauranda bwedu, asi akatinzwisa tsitsi pamberi pamadzimambo ePerisia, akatiponesazve, kuti timutsezve imba yaMwari wedu, nokugadzira matongo ayo, nokutipa rusvingo paJudha napaJerusaremu." 
Ezra9:10 Zvino Mwari wedu, tichareveiko shure kwaizvozvi? Nokuti takarasha mirairo yenyu," 
Ezra9:11 yamakatiraira navaranda venyu vaporofita, muchiti, Nyika kwamunoenda, kuzoiita yenyu, inyika yakasvibiswa nokuipa kwavanhu venyika idzo, nemhaka yezvinonyangadza zvavo, zvakaizadza namatsvina avo kubva parutivi rumwe kusvikira panorumwe rutivi." 
Ezra9:12 Naizvozvo zvino, regai kupa vanakomana vavo vakunda venyu, kana kutora vakunda vavo kupa vanakomana venyu, kana kuvatsvakira rugare nomufaro nokusingaperi; kuti muve nesimba, mudye zvakanaka zvenyika, mugoisiyira vana venyu ive nhaka yavo nokusingaperi.'" 
Ezra9:13 Zvatakaitirwa izvi zvose nokuda kwamabasa edu akaipa, uye nokuda kwemhosva dzedu huru, imwi Mwari wedu zvamusina kutirova zvakaringana zvakaipa zvedu, mukatisiyira vamwe vakadai." 
Ezra9:14 Zvino tingapamhidzazve kudarika mirairo yenyu here, nokushamwaridzana navanhu vanoita izvi zvinonyangadza here? Hamungazotitsamwiri kusvikira matiparadza here, kusvikira kusina akasiyiwa, kana akapukunyuka?" 
Ezra9:15 Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, imwi makarurama; nokuti tasiyirwa vamwe vakapukunyuka, sezvazvakaita nhasi; tarirai tiri pamberi penyu nemhosva dzedu, nokuti hakuna angamira pamberi penyu nokuda kwechinhu ichi.""" 
Ezra10:1 Zvino Ezira akati achinyengetera, achizvireurura, achichema nokuzviwisira pasi pamberi peimba yaMwari, ungano huru-huru yavarume navakadzi navana vavaIsiraeri vakaungana kwaari; nokuti vanhu vakachema zvikuru kwazvo," 
Ezra10:2 Ipapo Shekania mwanakomana waJehieri, mumwe wavanakomana vaErami, akapindura, akati kuna Ezira, ""Takatadzira Mwari wedu zvatakawana vakadzi vatorwa vendudzi dzenyika iyi; kunyange zvakadaro vaIsiraeri vachine tariro pamusoro pechinhu ichi." 
Ezra10:3 Naizvozvo zvino ngatiite sungano naMwari wedu, tibvise vakadzi ava vose, navana vakaberekwa navo, sezvatakarairwa naShe, uye navanobvundiswa nomurayiro waMwari wedu; ngazviitwe sezvinoreva mirairo." 
Ezra10:4 Simukai, nokuti ndimi mune basa iri, isu tinemi; tsungai moyo, muzviite.""" 
Ezra10:5 Ipapo Ezira akasimuka, akapikisa vakuru vavaprista, navaRevhi, navaIsiraeri vose, kuti vachaita neshoko iri. Ivo vakapika." 
Ezra10:6 Ipapo Ezira akasimuka, akabva pamberi peimba yaMwari, akapinda mukamuri yaJohwanani mwanakomana waEriashibhi; akagarapo, akasadya zvokudya, kana kumwa mvura; nokuti akanga achichema pamusoro pokudarika kwavatapwa." 
Ezra10:7 Vakaparidza shoko kuvatapwa vose pose-pose paJudha napaJerusaremu; 
Ezra10:8 uye kuti ani naani asina kuuya mazuva matatu agere kupera, sezvakanga zvarairwa namachinda navakuru, fuma yake yose itorwe ipiwe Mwari, naiye amene abudiswe paungano yavatapwa." 
Ezra10:9 Ipapo varume vose vaJudha naBhenjamini vakaungana paJerusaremu mazuva matatu agere kupera; wakanga uri mwedzi wepfumbamwe, nezuva ramakumi maviri romwedzi; vanhu vose vakagara padare pamberi peimba yaMwari, vachibvunda pamusoro peshoko iro napamusoro pemvura zhinji yainaya." 
Ezra10:10 Ipapo muprista Ezira akasimuka, akati kwavari, ""Imi makadarika, mukawana vakadzi vatorwa, mukanyanyisa mhosva yaIsiraeri." 
Ezra10:11 Naizvozvo zvino chizvireururai pamberi paJehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu, mumufadze; muzviraure kuvanhu venyika ino navakadzi vatorwa.""" 
Ezra10:12 Ipapo ungango yose yakapindura, ikati nenzwi guru, ""Sezvamataura pamusoro pedu, ndizvo zvatinofanira kuita." 
Ezra10:13 Asi vanhu vazhinji, uye inguva yokunaya kwemvura zhinji, hatigoni kumira kunze; basa iri harizi rezuva rimwe, kana mazuva maviri, nokuti takadarika kwazvo pachinhu ichi." 
Ezra10:14 Zvino machinda edu ngaagadzwe paungano yose, kuti vose vakawana vakadzi vatorwa pamaguta edu, vauye panguva dzakatarwa navakuru veguta rimwe nerimwe, navatongi varo, kusvikira kutsamwa kukuru kwaMwari wedu kwabviswa kwatiri, kusvikira mhaka iyi yapera.""" 
Ezra10:15 Asi Jonatani mwanakomana waAsaheri, naJazeya mwanakomana waTikivha, ivo voga va karamba chinhu ichi; Meshurami nomuRevhi Shabhetai vakasimbisa." 
Ezra10:16 Vatapwa vakaita saizvozvo Ezira muprista, navamwe vavakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba, vakatsaurwa nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, navose vavo namazita avo; vakaungana nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wegumi kunzvera chinhu icho." 
Ezra10:17 Vakapedza navarume vose vakanga vawana vakadzi vatorwa nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wokutanga. 
Ezra10:18 Napakati pavanakomana vavaprista vakawana vamwe vakanga vawana vakadzi vatorwa. Pakati pavanakomana vaJeshua vaiti mwanakomana waJozadhaki nehama dzake, Maaseya, naEriezeri, naJaribhi, naGedharia." 
Ezra10:19 Vakapika noruoko rwavo, kuti vacharega vakadzi vavo; uye, zvavakanga vane mhosva, vakabayira gondobwe ramakwai pamusoro pemhosva yavo." 
Ezra10:20 Pakati pavanakomana vaImeri, Hanani naZebhadhia." 
Ezra10:21 Pakati pavanakomana vaHarimi: Maaseya, naEria, naShemaya naJehieri, naUziya." 
Ezra10:22 Pakati pavanakomana vaPashuri: Erioenai, naMaaseya, naIshimaeri, naNetaneri, naJozabhadhi, naErasha." 
Ezra10:23 Pakati pavaRevhi: Jozabhadhi, naShimei, naKeraya (ndiye Kerita), naPetahia, naJudha, naEriezeri." 
Ezra10:24 Pakati pavaimbi: Eriashibhi; napakati pavarindi vemikova: Sharumi, naTeremi, naUri." 
Ezra10:25 Napakati paIsiraeri: pakati pavanakomana vaParoshi: Ramia, naIzia, naMarikiya, naMiyamini, naEreazari, naMirikiya, naBhenaya." 
Ezra10:26 Pakati pavanakomana vaErami: Matania, naZekariya, naJehieri, naAbhidhi, naJeremoti, naEria." 
Ezra10:27 Pakati pavanakomana vaZatu, Erioenai, naEriashibhi, naMatania, naJeremoti, naZabhahi, naAziza." 
Ezra10:28 Pakati pavanakomana vaBhebhai: Jehohanani, naHanania, naZabhai, naAtirai." 
Ezra10:29 Pakati pavanakomana vaBhani: Meshurami, naMaruki, naAdhaya, naJashubhi, naSheari, naJeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Pakati pavanakomana vaPahatimoabhi: Adhana, naKerari, naBhenaya, naMaaseya, naMatania, naBhezareri, naBhinui, naManase." 
Ezra10:31 Pakati pavanakomana vaHarimi: Eriezeri, naIsishiya, naMarikiya, naShemaya, naShimeoni;" 
Ezra10:32 naBhenjamini, naMaruki, naShemaria." 
Ezra10:33 Pakati pavanakomana vaHashumi: Matenai, naMatata, naZabhadhi, naErifureti, naJeremai, naManase, naShimei." 
Ezra10:34 Pakati pavanakomana vaBhani: Maadhai, naAmirami, naUeri;" 
Ezra10:35 naBhenaya, naBhedheya, naKeruhi;" 
Ezra10:36 vaVhania, naMeremoti, naEriashibhi;" 
Ezra10:37 naMatania, naMatenai, naJaasu;" 
Ezra10:38 naBhani, naBhinui, naShimei;" 
Ezra10:39 naSheremia, naNatani, naA dhaya;" 
Ezra10:40 naMakinedhabhai, naShashai, naSharai;" 
Ezra10:41 naAzareri, naSheremia, naShemaria;" 
Ezra10:42 naSharumi, naAmaria, naJosefa." 
Ezra10:43 Pakati pavanakomana vaNebho: Jeieri, naMatitia, naZabhadhi, naZebhina, naIdho, naJoeri, naBhenaya." 
Ezra10:44 Ava vose vakanga vawana vakadzi vatorwa; vamwe vavo vakanga vaberekerwa vana navakadzi vavo. 
Nehemiah1:1 Mashoko aNehemiya mwanakomana waHakaria. Pamwedzi weKisirevhi, pagore ramakumi maviri, ndakati ndiri panhare yamambo paShushani," 
Nehemiah1:2 Hanani, mumwe wehama dzangu, akasvika iye navamwe varume, vachibva kwaJudha; ndikavabvunza pamusoro pavaJudha vakanga vapukunyuka, vakanga vasara pakutapwa, napamusoro peJerusaremu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Vakati kwandiri, ""Vakasara, vakasiyiwa pakutapwa panyika iyo, vari pakutambudzika kukuru napakushorwa; uye rusvingo rweJerusaremuwo rwakoromoka, namasuo aro apiswa nomoto.""" 
Nehemiah1:4 Zvino ndakati ndanzwa mashoko iwayo, ndikagara pasi ndikachema, ndikaita mazuva ndichichema; ndikatsanya, ndikanyengetera pamberi paMwari wokudenga," 
Nehemiah1:5 ndikati, ""Ndinokumbira kwamuri Jehovha Mwari wokudenga, Mwari mukuru anotyisa, iye anorangarira sungano yake netsitsi kuna vanomuda vachichengeta mirairo yake;" 
Nehemiah1:6 nzeve yenyu ngaiteerere zvino, nameso enyu asvinure, munzwe munyengetero womuranda wenyu, wandinonyengetera pamberi penyu, nguva ino, masikati nousiku, pamusoro pavana vaIsiraeri varanda venyu, ndichireurura zvivi zvavana vaIsiraeri, zvatakakutadzirai nazvo; nokuti takatadza, ini naveimba yababa vangu." 
Nehemiah1:7 Takakuitirai zvakaipa kwazvo, hatina kuchengeta mirairo, kana zvakatemwa, kana zvakatongwa, zvamakaraira muranda wenyu Mozisi." 
Nehemiah1:8 Dorangarirai henyu shoko ramakaraira muranda wenyu Mozisi, muchiti, `Kana muchidarika, ndichakuparadzirai pakati pendudzi;" 
Nehemiah1:9 asi kana mukadzokera kwandiri, mukachengeta mirairo yangu nokuiita, kunyange vadzingwa venyu vasvika kumagumisiro okudenga, ndichavaunganidza vabve ipapo, ndivaise panzvimbo yandakatsaura kuti zita rangu rigarepo.'" 
Nehemiah1:10 Zvino ava ndivaranda venyu navana venyu, vamakadzikunura nesimba renyu guru, noruoko rwenyu rune simba." 
Nehemiah1:11 Haiwa, Jehovha, ndinokumbira kuti nzeve yenyu iteerere kunyengetera komuranda wenyu nokunyengetera kwavaranda venyu vanofarira kutya zita renyu; fambisai henyu muranda wenyu zvakanaka nhasi, mumuwanise tsitsi pamberi pomunhu uyu."" (Zvino ini ndakanga ndiri mudiri wamambo.)" 
Nehemiah2:1 Zvino nomwedzi weNisani, negore ramakumi maviri ramambo Aritashasita, panguva yaakanga anewaini pamberi pake, ini ndikatora waini, ndikaipa mambo. Zvino ndakanga ndisina kumbopunyaira pamberi pake." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ipapo mambo akati kwandiri, ""Chiso chako chinopunyairireiko, zvausingarwari? Ichi chinhu ishungu dzomoyo chaidzo."" Ndikatya kwazvo." 
Nehemiah2:3 Ndikati kuna mambo, ""Mambo ngaararame nokusingaperi! Chiso changu chingaregereiko kupunyaira, kana guta iro rinamarinda amadzibaba angu, rava dongo, namasuo aro atsva nomoto?""" 
Nehemiah2:4 Ipapo mambo akati kwandiri, ""Unokumbireiko?"" Zvino ndikanyengetera kuna Mwari wokudenga," 
Nehemiah2:5 ndikati kuna mambo, ""Kana mambo achifara nazvo, kana muranda wenyu awana tsitsi kwamuri, ndinokumbira kuti munditumire kwaJudha, kuguta ramarinda amadzibaba angu, ndinorivaka.""" 
Nehemiah2:6 Mambo akati kwandiri, (navahosiwo vakanga vagere naye), ""Rwendo rwako ruchaita nguva yakadiniko? Uchadzoka rinhi?"" Zvino mambo akatenda kundituma; ndikamutarira nguva." 
Nehemiah2:7 Uye ndakatiwo kuna mambo, ""Kana mambo achifara nazvo, ndinokumbira kuti ndipiwe mwadhi dzakanyorerwa vabati vari mhiri korwizi, vanditendere kupfuura ndisvike kwaJudha;" 
Nehemiah2:8 neimwe mwadhiwo kuna Asafi mutariri wedondo ramambo, andipe miti yokuita nayo matanda amasuo enhare yapaimba yaMwari nookuisa parusvingo rweguta napaimba yandichapinda."" Mambo akandipa izvozvo, nokuti ruoko rwakanaka rwaMwari wangu rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu." 
Nehemiah2:9 Zvino ndikasvika kuvabati mhiri korwizi, ndikavapa mwadhi dzamambo. Zvino mambo akanga atuma vakuru vehondo navatasvi vamabhiza neni." 
Nehemiah2:10 Asi Sanibharati muHoroni, naTobhia muranda, muAmoni, vakati vanzwa kuti kwakanga kwasvika munhu kuzotsvaka kuitira vana vaIsiraeri zvakanaka, zvikavaodza moyo kwazvo." 
Nehemiah2:11 Naizvozvo ndakasvika Jerusaremu ndikagarapo mazuva matatu. 
Nehemiah2:12 Ndikamuka usiku, ini navamwe vanhu vashoma; asi handina kuudza munhu zvakanga zvaiswa mumoyo mangu naMwari wangu kuti ndiitire Jerusaremu; uye ndakanga ndisine chimwe chipfuwo neni, asi chipfuwo chandakanga ndichitasva." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ndikabuda usiku napasuo roMupata, ndikaenda nokutsime reShato, nesuo raMarara, ndikacherekedza masvingo eJerusaremu akanga akoromoka, namasuo aro akanga atsva nomoto." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ipapo ndikapfuurira kusvika pasuo reTsime, nokudziva ramambo; asi pakanga pasine nzvimbo pangapfuura napo chipfuwo chandakanga ndakatasva." 
Nehemiah2:15 Ipapo ndakakwira usiku naparukova, ndikacherekedza rusvingo; ndikadzoka, ndikapinda napasuo roMupata, ndikadzoka saizvozvo." 
Nehemiah2:16 Vabati havana kuziva kwandakanga ndaenda, kana zvandakanga ndandoita; nokuti ndakanga ndisina kuudza vaJudha, kana vaprista, kana vakuru, kana vabati, kana vamwe vabati vebasa." 
Nehemiah2:17 Zvino ndakati kwavari, ""Munoona nhamo yedu, kuti Jerusaremu rava dongo, namasuo aro atsva nomoto; hendei tindovakazve rusvingo rweJerusaremu, tirege kugara tichishorwa.""" 
Nehemiah2:18 Ndikavaudza zvokunaka koruoko rwaMwari rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu; namashoko amambo aakandiudza. Ivo vakati, ""Ngatisimuke, tivake."" Naizvozvo vakasimbisa maoko avo kubata basa rakanaka." 
Nehemiah2:19 Asi Sanibharati muHoroni, naTobhia muranda, muAmoni, naGeshemu, muArabhia, vakati vachinzwa, vakatisweveredza, nokutininipisa, vakati, ""Chinyiko ichi chamunoita? Munoda kumukira mambo kanhi?""" 
Nehemiah2:20 Ipapo ndakavapindura, ndikati kwavari, ""Mwari wokudenga achatifambisa zvakanaka; saka isu varanda vake tichasimuka, nokuvaka; asi imwi hamuno mugove kana simba kana chirangaridzo paJerusaremu.""" 
Nehemiah3:1 Ipapo Eriashibhi muprista mukuru akasimuka, nehama dzake vaprista, vakavaka suo ramakwai; vakarinatsa, nokutimika magonhi aro; vakarinatsa kusvikira pashongwe yeHamea nokushongwe yeHananeri." 
Nehemiah3:2 Kurutivi rwake kwakavakwa navarume veJeriko. Kurutivi rwavo kwakavakwa naZakuri mwanakomana waImiri. 
Nehemiah3:3 Suo rehove rakavakwa navanakomana vaHasenaa; ivo vakaisa matanda aro, nokutimika magonhi aro, nekiyi dzaro, namazariro aro." 
Nehemiah3:4 Kurutivi rwavo kwakagadzirwa naMeremoti mwanakomana waUriya, mwanakomana waHakozi. Kurutivi rwavo rwakagadzirwa naMeshurami mwanakomana waBherekia, mwanakomana waMeshezabheri. Kurutivi rwavo kwakagadzirwa naZadhoki mwanakomana waBhaana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Kurutivi rwavo kwakagadzirwa navaTekoi; asi vakuru pakati pavo havana kuisa mitsipa yavo pabasa rashe wavo. 
Nehemiah3:6 Suo rekare rakagadzirwa naJoyadha mwanakomana waPasea, naMeshurami mwanakomana waBhesodheya; ivo vakaisa matanda aro, nokutimika magonhi aro, nekiyi dzaro, namazariro aro." 
Nehemiah3:7 Kurutivi rwavo kwakagadzirwa naMeratia muGibhiyoni, naJadhoni muMeronoti, navarume veGibhiyoni neMizipa, vaiva voushe hwomubati mhiri korwizi." 
Nehemiah3:8 Kurutivi rwake kwakagadzirwa naUzieri mwanakomana waHarihaya, vapfuri vendarama. Kurutivi rwake kwakagadzirwa naHanania, mumwe wavavhenganisi vezvinonhuhwira; ivo vakasimbisa Jerusaremu kusvikira parusvingo rwakafara." 
Nehemiah3:9 Kurutivi rwavo kwakagadzirwa naRefaya mwanakomana waHuri, mubati wehafu yenyika yeJerusaremu." 
Nehemiah3:10 Kurutivi rwavo kwakagadzirwa naJedhaya mwanakomana waHarumafi, pakatarisana neimba yake. Kurutivi rwake kwakagadzirwa naHatushi mwanakomana waHashabheneya." 
Nehemiah3:11 Marikia mwanakomana waHarimi, naHashubhi mwanakomana waPahatimoabhi, vakagadzira rumwe rutivi, neshongwe yamavira." 
Nehemiah3:12 Kurutivi rwake kwakagadzirwa naSharumi mwanakomana waHaroheshi, mubati wehafu yenyika yeJerusaremu, iye navakunda vake." 
Nehemiah3:13 Suo romupata rakagadzirwa naHanuni navakanga vagere Zanowa; ivo vakarivaka, vakatimika magonhi aro, nekiyi dzaro, namazariro aro, namakubhiti ane chiuru chimwe orusvingo kusvikira pasuo ramarara." 
Nehemiah3:14 Suo ramarara rakagadzirwa naMarikiya mwanakomana waRekabhi, mubati wenyika yeBhetihakeremi; iye akarivaka, nokutimika magonhi aro, nekiyi dzaro, namazariro aro." 
Nehemiah3:15 Suo retsime rakagadzirwa naSharumi mwanakomana waKorihoze, mubati wenyika yeMizipa; iye akarivaka, akariisa denga, akatimika magonhi aro, nekiyi dzaro, namazariro aro, uye rusvingo rwedziva reShera pamunda wamambo, kusvikira pamatanho anoburuka achibva muguta raDhavhidhi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Akamutevera pakugadzira akanga ari Nehemiya mwanakomana waAzibhuki, mubati wehafu yenyika yeBhetizuri, kusvikira pakatarisana namarinda aDhavhidhi, uye kusvikira padziva rakanga ravakwa, nokuimba yemagamba." 
Nehemiah3:17 Vakamutevera pakugadzira vakanga vari vaRevhi: Rehumi mwanakomana waBhani, nokurutivi rwake kwakagadzirwa naHashabhia mubati wehafu yenyika yeKeira, panzvimbo yenyika yake." 
Nehemiah3:18 Hama dzavo ndidzo dzakamutevera pakugadzira, Bhavhai mwanakomana waHenadhadhi, mubati wehafu yenyika yeKeira." 
Nehemiah3:19 Kurutivi rwake Ezeri mwanakomana waJeshua, mubati weMizipa, akagadzira mumwe mupanda, pakatarisana neimba yenhumbi dzehondo, pakona yorusvingo." 
Nehemiah3:20 Bharuki mwanakomana waZabhai wakamutevera akagadzira nokushingaira mumwe mupanda, kubva pakona yorusvingo kusvikira pamukova weimba yaEriashibhi muprista mukuru." 
Nehemiah3:21 Meremoti mwanakomana waUriya, mwanakomana waHakozi, akamutevera akagadzira mumwe mupanda, kubva pamukova weimba yaEriashibhi, kusvikira pakuguma kweimba yaEriashibhi." 
Nehemiah3:22 Vaprista, varume vebani, vakamutevera iye pakugadzira parutivi rwemba yake." 
Nehemiah3:23 Bhenjamini naHashubhi ndivo vakavatevera pakugadzira pakatarisana neimba yavo. Azaria mwanakomana waMaaseya, mwanakomana waAnania, akavatevera pakugadzira parutivi rweimba yake." 
Nehemiah3:24 Bhinui mwanakomana waHenadhadhi akamutevera pakugadzira mumwe mupanda, kubva paimba yaAzaria kusvikira pakona yorusvingo, kundosvikazve pakona." 
Nehemiah3:25 Parari mwanakomana waUzai akagadzira pakatarisana nekona yorusvingo, neshongwe inobuda paimba yokumusoro yamambo, iri paruvazhe rwavarindi. Pedhaya mwanakomana waParoshi akamutevera." 
Nehemiah3:26 (Zvino vaNetinimi vaigara Oferi, kusvikira pakatarisana nesuo remvura kurutivi rwamabvazuva rweshongwe yakabuda kunze.)" 
Nehemiah3:27 VaTekoi vakamutevera pakugadzira mumwe mupanda pakatarisana neshongwe huru yakabuda kunze, kundosvikira parusvingo rweOferi." 
Nehemiah3:28 Vaprista vakagadzira pamusoro pesuo ramabhiza, mumwe nomumwe pakatarisana neimba yake." 
Nehemiah3:29 Zadhoki mwanakomana waImeri akavatevera pakugadzira pakatarisana neimba yake. Shemaya mwanakomana waShekania, murindi wesuo rokumabvazuva, akamutevera pakugadzira." 
Nehemiah3:30 Hanania mwanakomana waSheremia naHanuni mwanakomana wechitanhatu waZarafi ndiye vakamutevera pakugadzira mumwe mupanda. Meshurami mwanakomana waBherekia, akamutevera pakugadzira pakatarisana neimba yake." 
Nehemiah3:31 Marikiya mumwe wavapfuri vendarama, wakamutevera pakugadzira kusvikira kudzimba dzavaNetinimi nedzavatengesi, pakatarisana nesuo raHamifekadhi, kusvikira pakamuri yokumusoro iri paimba." 
Nehemiah3:32 Pakati peimba yokumusoro pakona nesuo ramakwai, pakagadzirwa navapfuri vendarama navatengesi." 
Nehemiah4:1 Asi Sanibharati akati achinzwa kuti tovaka rusvingo, akatsamwa, akava neshungu kwazvo, akaseka vaJudha." 
Nehemiah4:2 Akataura nehama dzake nehondo yeSamaria, akati, ""VaJudha ava vasina simba vanobateiko? Vachazvisimbisa panhare here? Vachabayira here? Vachapedza nezuva rimwe here? Vachararamisa mabwe pamaturunhuru, zvaatsva here?""" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobhia muAmoni akanga amire naye, akati, ""Chinhu chipi nechipi chavanovaka havo, kana gava rikakwirapo, richakoromora rusvingo rwavo rwamabwe.""" 
Nehemiah4:4 Inzwai henyu, Mwari wedu, ""Nokuti tinoninipiswa; dzoserai kushora kwavo pamisoro yavo, muvarege vapambwe panyika yavatapwa." 
Nehemiah4:5 Regai kufukidza zvakaipa zvavo, nezvivi zvavo ngazvirege kudzimwa pamberi penyu; nokuti vakakutsamwisai pamberi pavavaki.""" 
Nehemiah4:6 Naizvozvo takavaka rusvingo; rusvingo rwose rukabatanidzwa kusvikira pahafu yokukwirira kwarwo; nokuti vanhu vakanga vachida kubata. 
Nehemiah4:7 Asi Sanibharati, naTobhia, navaArabhia, navaAmoni, navaAshidhodhi, vakati vachinzwa kuti basa rokugadzira masvingo ropfuurira mberi zvakanaka, kuti pakanga pakoromoka podzivirwa, vakatsamwa kwazvo," 
Nehemiah4:8 vakarangana vose kundorwa neJerusaremu, nokuvakanganisapo." 
Nehemiah4:9 Asi isu takanyengetera kuna Mwari wedu, tikaisa varindi kuvarindira masikati nousiku nemhaka yavo." 
Nehemiah4:10 Ipapo vaJudha vakati, ""Simba ravatakuri vemitoro raderera, uye marara aripo mazhinji; saka hatigoni kuvaka rusvingo.""" 
Nehemiah4:11 Vadzivisi vedu vakati, ""Ngavarege kuziva kana kuona chinhu, kusvikira tava pakati pavo, tikavauraya nokumisa basa.""" 
Nehemiah4:12 Zvino vaJudha vakanga vagere navo, vakati vachisvika kwatiri, vachibva kunzvimbo dzose, vakati kwatiri kagumi, ""Munofanira kudzokera kwatiri.""" 
Nehemiah4:13 Saka ndakaisa vamwe vanhu panzvimbo dzakaderera seri korusvingo, panzvimbo dzakanga dzakashama, ipapo ndakaisa vanhu nedzimba dzavo, vakabata minondo yavo, namapfumo avo, nouta hwavo." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ndikatarira, ndikasimuka, ndikati kuvakuru nokuvatariri nokuna vamwe vanhu, ""Regai kuvatya; rangarirai Jehovha mukuru anotyisa, murwire hama dzenyu, navanakomana venyu, navakunda venyu, navakadzi venyu, nedzimba dzenyu.""" 
Nehemiah4:15 Zvino vavengi vedu vakati vanzwa kuti zvazikamwa nesu, uye kuti Mwari akakonesa kurangana kwavo, isu tikadzokera tose kurusvingo, mumwe nomumwe kubasa rake." 
Nehemiah4:16 Zvino kubva panguva iyo hafu yavaranda vangu vakabata pabasa, asi hafu yavo vakabata mapfumo, nenhovo, nouta, nenguvo dzamatare; uye varairi vakanga vari shure kwavose veimba yaJudha." 
Nehemiah4:17 Vaivaka rusvingo, navaitakura mitoro, vaitutira; mumwe nomumwe wakabata noruoko rwake rumwe pabasa, asi norumwe akanga akabata nhumbi yake yokurwa nayo;" 
Nehemiah4:18 uye vavaki mumwe nomumwe akanga anomunondo wake wakasungirwa pachiuno chake; vakavaka saizvozvo. Muridzi wehwamanda wakamira neni. 
Nehemiah4:19 Ndikati kuvakuru nokuvabati nokuna vamwe vanhu: Mubato mukuru wakapararira, isu takatarangana pamusoro porusvingo, mumwe ari kure nomumwe;" 
Nehemiah4:20 papi napapi pamunonzwa kurira kwehwamanda, uyai ikoko kwatiri; Mwari wedu achatirwira.""" 
Nehemiah4:21 Tikabata pabasa saizvozvo; hafu yavo vaibata kubva mangwanani kusvikira nyeredzi dzichibuda. 
Nehemiah4:22 Nenguva iyo ndikati kuvanhu, ""Mumwe nomumwe anomuranda wake ngaavate muJerusaremu, kuti vatirinde usiku, vabate masikati.""" 
Nehemiah4:23 Naizvozvo ini kunyange hama dzangu, kana varanda vangu, kana varindi vainditevera, hakuna nomumwe wedu akabvisa nguvo dzake, mumwe nomumwe wakandomwa mvura nenhumbi dzake dzokurwa nadzo." 
Nehemiah5:1 Zvino kunyunyuta kukuru kwakamuka pakati pavanhu navakadzi vavo pamusoro pehama dzavo vaJudha. 
Nehemiah5:2 Nokuti vamwe vakati, ""Isu navanakomana vedu tiri vazhinji; ngatipiwe zviyo, tidye, tirarame.""" 
Nehemiah5:3 Vamwezve vakati, ""Isu takaita minda yedu rubatso, neminda yedu yemizambiringa, nedzimba dzedu; ngatipiwe zviyo, nokuda kwenzara ino.""" 
Nehemiah5:4 Vamwezve vakati, ""Takakwereta mari, yokuripira nayo mutero wamambo, tikaita minda yedu rubatso, neminda yedu yemizambiringa." 
Nehemiah5:5 Kunyange zvakadaro zvino miviri yedu yakafanana nemiviri yehama dzedu, navana vedu vakafanana navana vavo; tarirai, tosunga vanakomana vedu navakunda vedu, vave varanda; vamwe vakunda vedu vatosungwa, isu hatine simba rokuzvidzivisa, nokuti minda yedu neminda yedu yemizambiringa yatova yavamwe.""" 
Nehemiah5:6 Ipapo ndakatsamwa kwazvo ndichinzwa kuchema kwavo namashoko iwayo. 
Nehemiah5:7 Zvino ndakarangarira mumoyo mangu, ndikaita nharo navakuru navarairi, ndikati kwavari, ""Imi munoreva mhindu, mumwe nomumwe pahama yake."" Ipapo ndikakoka ungano huru pamusoro pavo." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ndikati kwavari, ""Isu takadzikunura hama dzedu vaJudha dzakanga dzatengeswa kuvahedheni patakagona napo; zvino imwi moda kutengesa hama dzenyu, moda kuti dzitengeswe kwatiri here?"" Ipapo vakaramba vanyerere, vakashaiwa neshoko chose." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ndikatiwo, ""Chinhu chamunoita chakaipa; ko hamufaniri kufamba muchitya Mwari wedu, kuti tirege kushorwa navavengi vedu vahedheni?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Neniwo nehama dzangu navaranda vangu, takavapa chikwereti chemari nezviyo, tichireva mhindu. Haiwa, ngatirege mhindu iyo." 
Nehemiah5:11 Dzoserai henyu kwavari iko nhasi minda yavo, neminda yavo yemizambiringa, neminda yavo yemiorivhi, nedzimba dzavo, uye nomugove wezana wemari, nezviyo, newaini, namafuta, zvamakatora kwavari iri mhindu.""" 
Nehemiah5:12 Ipapo vakati, ""Tichazvidzosa, hatingarevi chinhu kwavari; sezvamunotaura, ndizvo zvatichaita."" Zvino ndakadana vaprista, ndikavapikisa kuti vachaita izvozvo zvakapikirwa." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ndikazuzawo nguvo dzangu, ndikati, ""Mwari ngaazuze mumwe nomumwe asingaiti izvozvo zvakapikirwa abve paimba yake napabasa rake; ngaazuzwe nokudururwa saizvozvo."" Ipapo ungano yose yakati, ""Ameni!"" Vakarumbidza Jehovha. Vanhu vakaita izvozvo zvakapikirwa." 
Nehemiah5:14 Uyezve, kubva panguva yandakaitwa mubati wavo panyika yaJudha, kubva pagore ramakumi maviri kusvikira pagore ramakumi matatu namaviri ramambo Aritashasita, iwo makore ane gumi namaviri, ini nehama dzangu hatina kudya zvokudya zvomubati." 
Nehemiah5:15 Asi vabati vokutanga, vakanditangira, vairemedza vanhu, vachitora kwavari zvokudya newaini, uyewo mashekeri esirivha ana makumi mana; navaranda vavowo vaibata vanhu nehasha; asi ini handina kuita saizvozvo, nokuti ndakatya Mwari." 
Nehemiah5:16 Uye, ndakarambira pabasa rorusvingo urwu, hatina kutongotenga nyika, navaranda vangu vose vakanga vakaunganawo pabasa." 
Nehemiah5:17 Uye patafura yangu pakanga pana vaJudha navabati, varume vane zana namakumi mashanu, avo vaiuya kwatiri vachibva kuvahedheni vakanga vakatipoteredza vasingaverengwi." 
Nehemiah5:18 Zvino zuva rimwe nerimwe kwaigadzirwa nzombe imwe, namakwai matanhatu akatsaurwa; ndaigadzirirwawo huku, uye kamwe pamazuva ane gumi waini zhinji yamarudzi ose; kunyange zvakadaro handina kukumbira zvokudya zvomubati, nokuti vanhu ava vakanga vachiremedzwa kwazvo nouranda." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ndirangarirei, Mwari wangu, mundiitire zvakanaka nokuda kwezvose zvandakaitira rudzi urwu." 
Nehemiah6:1 Zvino Sanibharati, naTobhia, naGeshemu muArabhia, navamwe vavengi vedu vakati vaudzwa kuti ndavaka rusvingo, uye kuti takanga tisinokusiya pakakoromoka; (kunyange kusvikira panguva iyo ndakanga ndichigere kutimika magonhi pamasuo;)" 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanibharati naGeshemu ndokutuma shoko kwandiri, vachiti, ""Uyai, tisangane panomumwe musha pabani reOno."" Asi vakanga vachida kundiitira zvakaipa." 
Nehemiah6:3 Ini ndikatuma nhume kwavari, ndichiti, ""Ndinobata basa guru, saka handigoni kuburuka; basa ringamirireiko, kana ndikarega ndichiburukira kwamuri?""" 
Nehemiah6:4 Vakatumira kwandiri saizvozvo kana, ndikavapindurazve saizvozvo." 
Nehemiah6:5 Ipapo Sanibharati wakatumazve muranda wake kwandiri saizvozvo rwechishanu, akabata mwadhi yakazaruka muruoko rwake;" 
Nehemiah6:6 imomo makanga makanyorwa, muchiti, ""Zvinonzi pakati pendudzi, naGeshemu unodarowo, kuti iwe navaJudha munoda kumukira mambo; nemhaka iyo iwe unovaka rusvingo urwo, newe unoda kuva mambo wavo, ndiwo mashoko avo." 
Nehemiah6:7 Uye, kuti iwe wakagadza vaporofita vanoparidza pamusoro pako paJerusaremu, vachiti, `Pakati paJudha pana mambo.' Naizvozvo zvino chiuya, tirangane tose.""" 
Nehemiah6:8 Ipapo ndakatuma shoko kwaari, ndikati, ""Hapaitwi zvinhu zvakadai zvaunotaura, asi wakangozvifunga hako mumoyo mako.""" 
Nehemiah6:9 Nokuti vose vakanga vachitsvaka kutityisa, vachiti, ""Maoko avo ngaashaiwe simba pabasa, kuti rirege kupedzwa."" Asi zvino, Mwari simbisai maoko angu." 
Nehemiah6:10 Ipapo ndakaenda kumba kwaShemaya mwanakomana waDheraya, mwanakomana waMehetabheri, akanga azvipfigira, iye akati, ""Ngatisangane mumba maMwari, mukati metemberi, tipfige mikova yetemberi; nokuti vachauya kuzokuuraya; vachauya usiku kuzokuuraya.""" 
Nehemiah6:11 Ini ndakati, ""Munhu akaita seni ungatiza here? Ndianiko akaita seni angapinda mutemberi, kuti azviraramise? Handingapindi.""" 
Nehemiah6:12 Ndikaona kwazvo kuti Mwari akanga asina kumutuma; asi akandiporofitira izvozvo, nokuti akanga afufurwa naTobhia naSanibharati." 
Nehemiah6:13 Akanga afufurwa nemhaka iyo, kuti nditye, ndiite saizvozvo, nditadze, kuti vawane chavangandichera nacho, vagondishora." 
Nehemiah6:14 Rangarirai henyu, Mwari wangu, mabasa awa aTobhia naSanibharati, naNowadhia muporofitakadzi, navamwe vaporofita, vakaidza kundityisa." 
Nehemiah6:15 Naizvozvo rusvingo rwakapera pazuva ramakumi maviri namashanu romwedzi weEruri, tavaka mazuva ana makumi mashanu namaviri." 
Nehemiah6:16 Zvino vavengi vedu vose vakati vachizvinzwa, vahedheni vose vakanga vakatipotoredza vakatya, vakaora moyo, nokuti vakaziva kuti basa iri rakaitwa naMwari wedu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Uye, namazuva iwayo vakuru vavaJudha vakatumawo mwadhi zhinji kuna Tobhia, uye mwadhi dzaTobhia dzakasvikawo kwavari." 
Nehemiah6:18 Nokuti vazhinji vaivapo paJudha vakanga vapika kwaari, nokuti waiva mukwambo waShekania mwanakomana waAra; mwanakomana wake Jehohanani akanga awana mukunda waMeshurami mwanakomana waBherekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Vakarumbidzawo mabasa ake akanaka pamberi pangu, nokumuudza mashoko angu. Tobhia akatuma mwadhi dzokundityisa." 
Nehemiah7:1 Zvino rusvingo rwakati rwavakwa, ini ndatimika magonhi, uye varindi vemikova, navaimbi, navaRevhi, vagadzwa," 
Nehemiah7:2 ndikagadza Hanani munun'una wangu, naHanania mubati wenhare, vave vatariri veJerusaremu; nokuti akanga ari munhu akatendeka, achitya Mwari kupfuura vazhinji." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ndikati kwavari, ""Masuo eJerusaremu ngaarege kuzarurwa kusvikira zuva rapisa; zvino varindi vachimirepo, ngavapfige mikova, imwi mugoikiya; munofanira kugadzawo varindi pakati pavagere Jerusaremu, mumwe nomumwe paanofanira kurindira, mumwe nomumwe pakatarisana neimba yake.""" 
Nehemiah7:4 Zvino guta rakanga riri bamhi rakakura; asi vanhu vaivamo vashoma; uye dzimba dzakanga dzichigere kuvakwa. 
Nehemiah7:5 Ipapo Mwari wangu akaisa mufungo pamoyo pangu kuti ndikokere vakuru navatariri, navanhu, kuti vaverengwe namazita avo. Ndikawana bhuku yamazita avakatanga kusvika, ndikawana makanyorwa kudai:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Ndivo vana vorutivi rwenyika yaJudha, vakadzoka pakutapwa, pakati pavakanga vakatapwa, vakatapwa naNebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi, vakadzokera Jerusaremu nokwaJudha, mumwe nomumwe kuguta rake." 
Nehemiah7:7 Ivo vakauya naZerubhabheri,. naJeshua, naNehemiya, naAzaria, naRaamia, naNahamani, naModhekai, naBhirishani, naMisipereti, naBhigivhadhi, naNehumi, naBhaana. Kuwanda kwavarume vavanhu vaIsiraeri ndiko:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Vana vaParoshi, zviuru zviviri nezana namakumi manomwe navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:9 Vana vaShefatia, mazana matatu namakumi manomwe navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:10 Vana vaAra, mazana matanhatu namakumi mashanu navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:11 Vana vaPahatimoabhi, vavana vaJeshura naJoabhu, zviuru zviviri namazana masere negumi navasere." 
Nehemiah7:12 Vana vaErami, chiuru chimwe namazana maviri namakumi mashanu navana." 
Nehemiah7:13 Vana vaZatu, mazana masere namakumi mana navashanu." 
Nehemiah7:14 Vana vaZakai, mazana manomwe namakumi matanhatu." 
Nehemiah7:15 Vana vaBhinui, mazana matanhatu namakumi mana navasere." 
Nehemiah7:16 Vana vaBhebhai mazana matanhatu namakumi maviri navasere. 
Nehemiah7:17 Vana vaAzigadhi, zviuru zviviri namazana matatu namakumi maviri navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:18 Vana vaAdhonikami, mazana matanhatu namakumi matanhatu navanomwe." 
Nehemiah7:19 Vana vaBhigivhadhi, zviuru zviviri namakumi matanhatu navanomwe." 
Nehemiah7:20 Vana vaAdhini, mazana matanhatu namakumi mashanu navashanu." 
Nehemiah7:21 Vana vaAteri, waHezekia, makumi mapfumbamwe navasere." 
Nehemiah7:22 Vana vaHashumi, mazana matatu namakumi maviri navasere." 
Nehemiah7:23 Vana vaBhezai, mazana matatu namakumi maviri navana." 
Nehemiah7:24 Vana vaHarifi, zana rimwe negumi navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:25 Vana vaGibhiyoni, makumi mapfumbamwe navashanu." 
Nehemiah7:26 Varume veBheterehemu naveNetofa, zana rimwe namakumi masere navasere." 
Nehemiah7:27 Varume veAnatoti, zana rimwe namakumi maviri navasere." 
Nehemiah7:28 Varume veBhetiazimavheti, makumi mana navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:29 Varume veKiriatijearimi, neKefira, neBheeroti, mazana manomwe namakumi mana navatatu." 
Nehemiah7:30 Varume veRama neGhebha, mazana matanhatu namakumi maviri nomumwe." 
Nehemiah7:31 Varume veMikimashi, zana rimwe namakumi maviri navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:32 Varume veBhetieri neAi, zana rimwe namakumi maviri navatatu." 
Nehemiah7:33 Varume veNebho rechipiri, makumi mashanu navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:34 Vana vaErami wechipiri, chiuru chimwe namazana maviri namakumi mashanu navana." 
Nehemiah7:35 Vana vaHarimi, mazana matatu namakumi maviri." 
Nehemiah7:36 Vana veJeriko, mazana matatu namakumi mana navashanu." 
Nehemiah7:37 Vana veRoghi, neHadhidhi, neOno, mazana manomwe namakumi maviri nomumwe." 
Nehemiah7:38 Vana veSenaa, zviuru zvitatu namazana mapfumbamwe namakumi matatu." 
Nehemiah7:39 Vaprista vakanga vari, vana vaJedhaya, veimba yaJeshua, mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi manomwe navatatu." 
Nehemiah7:40 Vana veImeri, chiuru chimwe namakumi mashanu navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:41 Vana vaPashuri, chiuru chimwe namazana maviri namakumi mana navanomwe." 
Nehemiah7:42 Vana vaHarimi, chiuru chimwe negumi navanomwe." 
Nehemiah7:43 VaRevhi vakanga vari, vana vaJeshua weKadhimieri, wavana vaHodhevha, makumi manomwe navana." 
Nehemiah7:44 Vaimbi vakanga vari, vana vaAsafi, zana rimwe namakumi mana navasere." 
Nehemiah7:45 Varindi vemikova vakanga vari, vana vaSharumi, navana vaAteri, navana vaTarimoni, navana vaAkubhi, navana vaHatita, navana vaShobhai, zana rimwe namakumi matatu navasere." 
Nehemiah7:46 VaNetinimi vakanga vari, vana vaZhiha, navana vaHasufa, navana vaTabhaoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 navana vaKerosi, navana vaSia, navana vaPadhoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 navana vaRebhana, navana vaHagabha, navana vaSarimai," 
Nehemiah7:49 navana vaHanani, navana vaGidheri, navana vaGahari," 
Nehemiah7:50 navana vaReaya, navana vaRezini, navana vaNekodha," 
Nehemiah7:51 navana vaGazami, navana vaUza, navana vaPasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 navana vaBhesai, navana vaMeunimi, navana vaNefushesimi." 
Nehemiah7:53 navana vaBhakibhuki, navana vaHakufa, navana vaHarihuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 navana vaBhaziriti, navana vaMehidha, navana vaHarisha," 
Nehemiah7:55 navana vaBharikosi, navana vaSisera, navana vaTema," 
Nehemiah7:56 navana vaNezia, navana vaHatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Vana vavaranda vaSoromoni vakanga vari, vana vaSotai, navana vaSofereti, navana vaPeridha," 
Nehemiah7:58 navana vaJaara, navana vaDharikoni, navana vaGidheri," 
Nehemiah7:59 navana vaShefatia, navana vaHatiri, navana vaPokeretihazebhaimi, navana vaAmoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 VaNetinimi vose navana vavaranda vaSoromoni, vaiva mazana matatu namakumi mapfumbamwe navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:61 Ndivo vakakwira, vachibva Terimera, neTeriharisha, neKerubhi, neAdhoni, neImeri; asi vakanga vasingagoni kududza dzimba dzamadzibaba avo, kana marudzi avo, kana vakanga vari vaIsiraeri." 
Nehemiah7:62 Vana vaDheraya, navana vaTobhia, navana vaNekodha, mazana matanhatu namakumi mana navaviri." 
Nehemiah7:63 Pakati pavaprista vakanga vari, vana vaHobhaya, navana vaHakozi, navana vaBharizirai, akanga awana mukadzi wavakunda vaBharizirai muGiriyadhi, akazotumidzwa zita rokwavo." 
Nehemiah7:64 Ava vakatsvaka mazita avo pakati pamazita amadziteteguru, asi akashaikwa; saka vakanzi vakasvibiswa, vakabviswa pauprista." 
Nehemiah7:65 ipapo mubati akavaudza kuti varege kudya zvinhu zvitsvene-tsvene, kusvikira kwamuka muprista ane Urimi neTumimi." 
Nehemiah7:66 Ungano yose yakasvika zviuru zvina makumi mana nezviviri namazana matatu namakumi matanhatu," 
Nehemiah7:67 vasingaverengi varanda vavo navarandakadzi vavo, vakasvika zviuru zvinomwe namazana matatu namakumi matatu navanomwe, vaiva navaimbi varume navakadzi vana mazana maviri namakumi mana navashanu." 
Nehemiah7:68 Mabhiza avo aiva namazana manomwe namakumi matatu namatanhatu; namahesera avo mazana maviri namakumi mana namashanu; 
Nehemiah7:69 makamera avo, mazana manomwe namakumi matatu namashanu; mbongoro dzavo zviuru zvitanhatu namazana manomwe namakumi maviri." 
Nehemiah7:70 Vamwe vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba avo vakapa zvipo kuzobata basa. Mubati wakapa chivigiro chefuma madariki endarama ane chiuru chimwe, nembiya dzina makumi mashanu, nenguvo dzavaprista dzina mazana mashanu namakumi matatu." 
Nehemiah7:71 Vamwe vakuruwo vedzimba dzamadzibaba vakapa muchivigiro chefuma yokubata basa nayo, madariki endarama ane zviuru zvina makumi maviri, nepondo dzesirivha dzine zviuru zviviri namazana maviri." 
Nehemiah7:72 Vamwe vanhu vakapa madariki endarama ane zviuru zvina makumi maviri, nepondo dzesirivha dzine zviuru zviviri, nenguvo dzavaprista dzina makumi matanhatu nenomwe." 
Nehemiah7:73 Zvino vaprista, navaRevhi, navarindi vemikova, navaimbi, navamwe vanhu, navaNetinimi, navaIsiraeri vose vakagara pamaguta avo" 
Nehemiah8:1 Zvino vanhu vose vakaungana nomoyo mumwe padare rakanga riri pamberi pesuo remvura; vakaudza Ezira munyori kuti auye nebhuku yomurayiro waMozisi, wakanga warairwa vaIsiraeri naJehovha." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ezira muprista ndokuuya nomurayiro pamberi peungano yavarume navakadzi, navose vakanga vachigona kunzwisisa, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechinomwe." 
Nehemiah8:3 Akaravamo padare rakanga riri pamberi pesuo remvura, kubva mangwanani kusvikira masikati, pamberi pavarume navakadzi navose vakanga vachigona kunzwisisa; nzeve dzavanhu vose dzikateerera mashoko ebhuku yomurayiro." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezira munyori akamira pakakwirira pakanga pakavakirwa izvozvo namatanda; uye Matitia, naShema, naAnaya, naUriya, naHirikia naMaaseya vakamira kurutivi rwake rworudyi, naPedhaya, naMishaeri, naMarikiya, naHashumi, naHashibhadhana, naZekariya, naMeshurami vakamira kuruboshwe rwake." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezira akazarura bhuku pamberi pavanhu vose; (nokuti akanga amire kumusoro kwavanhu vose;) zvino akati achizarura vanhu vose ndokusimuka. 
Nehemiah8:6 Ipapo Ezira akavonga Jehovha, Mwari mukuru. Vanhu vose vakapindura, vachiti, ""Ameni, Ameni,"" vachisimudza maoko avo; ipapo vakakotamisa misoro yavo, vakanamata kuna Jehovha zviso zvavo zvakatarira pasi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Jeshua, naBhani, naSherebhia, naJamini, naAkubhi, naShabhetai, naHodhia, naMaaseya, naKerita, naAzaria, naJozabhadhi, naHanani, naPeraya, navaRevhi vakadudzira vanhu mirairo; vanhu vakaramba vamire panzvimbo yavo." 
Nehemiah8:8 Vakarava zvichinzwika kwazvo mubhuku yomurayiro waMwari; vakazvidudzira,,vakanzwisisa zvinorahwa." 
Nehemiah8:9 Ipapo mubati Nehemiya, nomuprista Ezira munyori, navaRevhi vakadzidzisa vanhu, vakati kuvanhu vose, ""Zuva rino idzvene kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu; musaungudza nokuchema; nokuti vanhu vose vakachema vachinzwa mashoko omurayiro.""" 
Nehemiah8:10 Ipapo akati kwavari, ""Endai henyu, mudye zvakakora, nokumwa zvinozipa, mugotumirawo migove kuna vasina kugadzirirwa chinhu nokuti zuva rino idzvene kuna She wedu; musava neshungu, nokuti mufaro waJehovha isimba renyu.""" 
Nehemiah8:11 Naizvozvo vaRevhi vakanyaradza vanhu vose, vachiti, ""Nyararai henyu, nokuti izuva dzvene; musava neshungu.""" 
Nehemiah8:12 Ipapo vanhu vose vakaenda kundodya nokumwa, nokutumira vamwe migove, nokufara kwazvo; nokuti vakanga vanzwisisa mashoko avakaparidzirwa." 
Nehemiah8:13 Zvino pazuva rechipiri vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba avanhu vose, navaprista, navaRevhi, vakaunganira kuna Ezira munyori, kuzoteerera mashoko omurayiro." 
Nehemiah8:14 Vakawana pakanyorwa mumurayiro, kuti Jehovha akaraira Mozisi, kuti vana vaIsiraeri vanofanira kugara pamatumba pamutambo womwedzi wechinomwe;" 
Nehemiah8:15 uye kuti vanofanira kuzivisa nokuparidza shoko iro pamaguta avo ose, napaJerusaremu, vachiti, ""Budirai kugomo, mundotora matavi emiorivhi, namatavi emiorivhi yomusango, namatavi emimirite, namatavi emichindwe, namatavi emiti mikobvu, kuti muite matumba sezvakanyorwa.""" 
Nehemiah8:16 Naizvozvo vanhu vakabuda, vakauya nawo, vakazviitira matumba, mumwe nomumwe pamusoro pedenga reimba yake, napavazhe dzavo, napavazhe dzeimba yaMwari, napadare resuo remvura, napadare resuo raEfuremu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ungano yose yavakanga vakadzoka pakutapwa vakaita matumba, vakagara pamatumba; nokuti kubva pamazuva aJeshua mwanakomana waNuni kusvikira pazuva iro, vana vaIsiraeri vakanga vasina kuita izvozvo. Pakava nomufaro mukuru." 
Nehemiah8:18 Uye zuva rimwe nerimwe, kubva pazuva rokutanga kusvikira pazuva rokupedzisira, akarava pabhuku yomurayiro waMwari. Vakaita mutambo mazuva manomwe; pazuva rorusere vakaita ungano yokupedzisira, sezvakanga zvatemwa." 
Nehemiah9:1 Zvino pazuva ramakumi maviri namana romwedzi uyu vana vaIsiraeri vakaungana, vakazvinyima zvekudya, vakafuka masaga vane ivhu pamisoro yavo." 
Nehemiah9:2 Vorudzi rwavaIsiraeri vakazviraura pavatorwa vose, vakamira vakazvireurura zvivi zvavo nezvitadzo zvamadzibaba avo." 
Nehemiah9:3 Vakasimuka pavakanga vagere, vakarava mubhuku yomurayiro waJehovha Mwari wavo mugove wechina wezuva; mumwe mugove wechina vakazvireurura nokunamata kuna Jehovha Mwari wavo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Ipapo Jeshua, naBhani, naKadhimieri, neShebhania, naBhuni, naSherebhia, naBhani, naKenani vakamira pamatanho avaRevhi, vakachema nenzwi guru kuna Jehovha Mwari wavo." 
Nehemiah9:5 Ipapo vaRevhi, Jeshua, naKadhimieri, naBhani, naHashabhineya, naSherebhia, naHodhia, naShebhania, naPetahiya vakati, ""Simukai, muvonge Jehovha Mwari wenyu nokusingaperi-peri; zita renyu rinobwinya ngarikudzwe, iro rinokunda kuvonga nokurumbidza kose.""" 
Nehemiah9:6 Ndimi Jehovha, imwi moga; imwi makaita denga, nokudenga-denga, nehondo dzaro dzose, nenyika nezvose zviri mukati mayo, namakungwa nezvose zviri mukati mawo; imwi munochengeta zvose; hondo dzokudenga dzinonamata kwamuri." 
Nehemiah9:7 Ndimi Jehovha Mwari akatsaura Abhuramu, mukamubudisa paUri ravaKaradhea, mukamupa zita rinonzi Abhurahamu;" 
Nehemiah9:8 mukaona kuti moyo wake wakatendeka pamberi penyu, mukaita sungano naye kuti muchapa vana vake nyika yavaKenani, neyavaHiti, neyavaAmori, neyavaPerezi, neyavaJebhusi, neyavaGirigashi, muchiita sezvamakataura, nokuti makarurama." 
Nehemiah9:9 Mukaona kutambudzika kwamadzibaba edu paIjipiti, mukanzwa kuchema kwavo paGungwa Dzvuku;" 
Nehemiah9:10 mukaratidza Farao zviratidzo nezvinoshamisa, navaranda vake vose, navanhu vose venyika yake; nokuti makaziva kuti vakavaitira izvozvo nokuzvikudza; mukazviwanira rumbidzo, sezvazvakaita nhasi." 
Nehemiah9:11 Mukaparadzanisa gungwa pamberi pavo; naizvozvo vakayambuka pakati pegungwa pakaoma; mukawisira vateveri vavo makadzika, sebwe mumvura ine simba." 
Nehemiah9:12 Makavafambisawo masikati neshongwe yegore, nousiku neshongwe yomoto, kuti vavhenekerwe panzira yavaifanira kufamba nayo." 
Nehemiah9:13 Makaburukirawo pagomo reSinai, mukataura navo muri kudenga, mukavapa zvakatongwa zakarurama nemitemo yakanaka, nemirayiro yechokwadi, nemitemo yakanaka, nemirairo." 
Nehemiah9:14 Mukavazivisa Sabata renyu, dzvene, mukavaraira mirairo, nemitemo, nomurau, nomuromo waMozisi muranda wenyu;" 
Nehemiah9:15 mukavapa chingwa chakabva kudenga kuvagutisa panzara yavo, mukavabudisira mvura pabwe kupedza nyota yavo, mukavaraira kuti vapinde munyika kuiita yavo, iyo yamakanga mavapikira kuvapa." 
Nehemiah9:16 Asi ivo namadzibaba edu vakaita manyawi, vakaomesa mitsipa yavo, vakasateerera mirairo yenyu." 
Nehemiah9:17 Vakaramba kuteerera, kana kurangarira zvinoshamisa zvenyu zvamakaita pakati pavo; asi vakaomesa mitsipa yavo, vakamukira Mwari, vakazvisharira mukuru kuti vadzokere kuuranda hwavo; asi imwi muri Mwari unokangamwira vanhu, une nyasha, nengoni zhinji, unononoka kutsamwa, noune tsitsi huru; hamuna kuvasiya." 
Nehemiah9:18 Kunyange panguva yavakazviitira mhuru yakaumbwa, vachiti, `Ndiye Mwari wenyu akakubudisai paIjipiti,' vakakutsamwisai kwazvo," 
Nehemiah9:19 kunyange zvakadaro, hamuna kuvarasha murenje, nokuda kwetsitsi dzenyu zhinji; shongwe yegore haina kubva pamusoro panzira, kana shongwe yomoto usiku, ichirega kuvavhenekera nokuvaratidza nzira yavaifanira kufamba nayo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Makavapawo mweya wenyu wakanaka kuvadzidzisa, mukasanyima miromo yavo mana*yenyu, mukavapa mvura kupedza nyota yavo." 
Nehemiah9:21 Makavararamisa makore makumi mana murenje, vakasashaiwa chinhu; nguvo dzavo hadzina kusakara, uye tsoka dzavo hadzina kuzvimba." 
Nehemiah9:22 Makavapawo ushe navanhu, mukavaganhurira nyika yavo; naizvozvo vakapiwa nyika yaSihoni, iyo nyika yamambo weHeshibhoni, nenyika yaOgi mambo weBhashani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Mukawanza vana vavo vakaita senyeredzi dzokudenga; mukavasvitsa panyika yamakaudza madzibaba avo kuti vachapindamo kuzoiita yavo. 
Nehemiah9:24 Naizvozvo vana vakapinda panyika vakaiita yavo; imwi mukavakundira vanhu vakanga vagere munyika iyo, ivo vaKanani; mukavaisa mumaoko avo, pamwechete namadzimambo avo navanhu venyika iyo kuti vaite navo sezvavakanga vachida." 
Nehemiah9:25 Vakakunda maguta akakombwa, nenyika ine fuma, vakatora dzimba dzakanga dzizere nezvose zvakanaka, zvaiti; matsime akacherwa, neminda yemizambiringa neminda yemiorivhi, nemiti yakawanda inobereka michero; naizvozvo vakadya, vakaguta, vakakora, vakazvifarira nokuda kounyoro bwenyu ukuru." 
Nehemiah9:26 Kunyange zvakadaro havana kuteerera, vakakumukirai, vakarashira murau wenyu shure kwemisana yavo vakauraya vaporofita venyu vaivapupurira, vachida kuvadzoserazve kwamuri, vakakutsamwisai kwazvo." 
Nehemiah9:27 Saka makavaisa mumaoko avadzivisi vavo, vakavamanikidza; zvino panguva yokutambudzika kwavo, pakuchema kwavo kwamuri, makavanzwa iko kudenga, netsitsi dzenyu zhinji mukavapa varwiri vakavarwira pamaoko avadzivisi vavo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Asi vakati vazorodzwa, vakaita zvakaipazve pamberi penyu; saka makavaregerazve mumaoko avavengi vavo, ivo vakavabata nesimba; kunyange zvakadaro pakudzoka kwavo, nokuchema kwavo kwamuri, makavanzwa kudenga, mukavarwira kazhinji netsitsi dzenyu;" 
Nehemiah9:29 mukavapupurira, kuti muvadzoserezve kumurau wenyu; kunyange zvakadaro vakaita manyawi; vakasateerera mirairo yenyu, asi vakatadzira zvamakanga matonga, (izvo zvinoti kana munhu achizviita, achararama nazvo), vakabvisa fudzi ravo, vakaomesa mitsipa yavo, vakaramba kunzwa." 
Nehemiah9:30 Kunyange zvakadaro makava netsitsi navo makore mazhinji, mukavapupurira nomweya wenyu navaporofita venyu; asi vakaramba kuteerera; saka makavaisa mumaoko avanhu venyika iyo." 
Nehemiah9:31 Kunyange zvakadaro, netsitsi dzenyu zhinji hamuna kuvapedza chose, kana kuvarasha, nokuti muri Mwari une nyasha netsitsi." 
Nehemiah9:32 Naizvozvo zvino, Mwari wedu, Mwari mukuru, ane simba, anotyisa, anochengeta sungano yake netsitsi, kutambudzika kose, kwakatiwira isu, namadzimambo edu, namachinda edu, navaprista vedu, navaporofita vedu, namadzibaba edu, navanhu venyu vose kubva pamazuva amadzimambo eAsiria kusvikira nhasi,. ngakurege kuita sechinhu chiduku pamberi penyu." 
Nehemiah9:33 Asi imwi makaita henyu zvakarurama pazvose zvakatiwira, nokuti makaita nechokwadi, asi isu takaita zvakashata." 
Nehemiah9:34 Kunyange madzimambo edu, namachinda edu, navaprista vedu, namadzibaba edu, havana kuchengeta murau wenyu, kana kuteerera mirairo yenyu nezvipupuriro zvenyu, zvamakavapupurira nazvo." 
Nehemiah9:35 Nokuti havana kukushumirai paushe hwavo, uye nokuda kounyoro bwenyu hukuru hwamakavaitira, napanyika huru ine fuma yamakavapa; havana kurega mabasa avo akaipa." 
Nehemiah9:36 Tarirai, tiri varanda nhasi uye kana iri nyika yamakapa madzibaba edu, kuti vadye zvibereko zvayo nezvakanaka zvayo, tarirai, tiri varanda mairi." 
Nehemiah9:37 Zvibereko zvizhinji inozviberekera madzimambo amakaisa pamusoro pedu, nokuda kwezvivi zvedu; ivo vane simbawo pamiviri yedu, napamombe dzedu, sezvavanoda; tiri pakumanikidzwa kukuru." 
Nehemiah9:38 Kunyange zvose zvakadaro hazvo, tinoita sungano ine simba, tichiinyora; namachinda edu, navaRevhi vedu, navaprista vedu vanoisimbisa.""" 
Nehemiah10:1 Zvino vakasimbisa sungano ndivava: Nehemiya, mubati,mwanakomana waHakaria, naZedhekia;" 
Nehemiah10:2 naSeraya, naAzaria, naJeremiya;" 
Nehemiah10:3 naPashuri, naAmaria, naMarikiya;" 
Nehemiah10:4 naHatushi, naShebhania, naMaruki;" 
Nehemiah10:5 naHarimi, naMeremoti, naObhadhiya;" 
Nehemiah10:6 naDhanyeri, naGinetoni, naBharuki;" 
Nehemiah10:7 naMeshurami, naAbhiya, naMijamini;" 
Nehemiah10:8 naMaazia, naBhirigai, naShemaya; ndivo vaiva vaprista." 
Nehemiah10:9 Uye vaRevhi ava: Jeshua, mwanakomana waAzania, naBhinui, wavanakomana vaHenadhadhi, naKadhimieri;" 
Nehemiah10:10 nehama dzavo: Shebhania, naHodhia, naKerita, naPeraya, naHanani;" 
Nehemiah10:11 naMika, naRehobhi, naHashabhia;" 
Nehemiah10:12 naZakuri, naSherebhia, naShebhania;" 
Nehemiah10:13 naHodhia, naBhani, naBheninu;" 
Nehemiah10:14 uye vakuru vavanhu ava: Paroshi, naPahatimoabhi, naErami, naZatu, naBhani;" 
Nehemiah10:15 naBhuni, naAzigadhi, naBhebhai;" 
Nehemiah10:16 naAdhonia, naBhigivhadhi, naAdhini;" 
Nehemiah10:17 naAteri, naHezekia, naAzuri;" 
Nehemiah10:18 naHodhia, naHashumi, naBhezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 naHarifi, naAnatoti, naNobhai;" 
Nehemiah10:20 naMagipiashi, naMeshurami, naHezeri;" 
Nehemiah10:21 naMeshezabheri, naZadhoki, naJadhua;" 
Nehemiah10:22 naPeratia, naHanani, naAnaya;" 
Nehemiah10:23 naHoshea, naHanania, naHashubhi;" 
Nehemiah10:24 naHaroheshi, naPiriha, naShobheki;" 
Nehemiah10:25 naRehumi, naHashabhina, naMaaseya;" 
Nehemiah10:26 naAhiya; naHanani, naAnani," 
Nehemiah10:27 naMaruki, naHarimi, naBhaana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Asi vamwe vanhu, ivo vaprista, navaRevhi, navarindi vemikova, navaimbi navaNetinimi, navose vakanga vazviraura pavanhu venyika iyo kuchengeta murau waMwari, navakadzi vavo, navanakomana vavo, navakunda vavo, mumwe nomumwe akanga achiziva nokunzwisisa," 
Nehemiah10:29 vakanamatira hama dzavo, ivo vakuru, vakazvisunga nokutukwa nokupika kuti vachafamba nomurau waMwari, wavakapiwa naMozisi muranda waMwari, nokurangarira nokuita mirairo yose yaJehovha Ishe wedu, nezvaakatonga nezvaakatema;" 
Nehemiah10:30 uye kuti hatingapi vanhu venyika vakunda vedu kana kutorera vakomana vedu vakunda vavo; 
Nehemiah10:31 uye kuti kana vanhu venyika vakauya nezvinhu zvavo, kana zvokudya zvipi nezvipi, kuzotengesa nezuva reSabata, isu hatingavatengeri neSabata, kana panerimwe zuva dzvene; uye kuti ticharegera nyika pagore rechinomwe nokusareva zvikwerete zvose." 
Nehemiah10:32 Takazviitirawo mutemo kuti ticharipira basa reimba yaMwari wedu chetatu cheshekeri pagore rimwe nerimwe; 
Nehemiah10:33 basa rezvingwa zvokuratidza, nechipiriso choupfu chenguva dzose, nechipiriso chinopiswa nguva dzose, rapamaSabata, napakugara kwemwedzi, napane mimwe mitambo yakataurwa, nerezvimwe zvinhu zvitsvene, nerezvipiriso zvezvivi zvokuyananisira vaIsiraeri nazvo, neramabasa ose muimba yaMwari wedu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Tikakanda mijenya, isu vaprista navaRevhi navanhu, pamusoro pezvipo zvehuni, kuti tiuye nadzo mumba maMwari wedu, namadzoro edzimba dzamadzibaba edu, panguva dzakatarwa gore rimwe nerimwe, kuti dziveserwe paaritari yaJehovha Mwari wedu, sezvakanyorwa pamurayiro;" 
Nehemiah10:35 tikazvisunga kuti tichauya nezvitsva zveminda yedu, nezvitsva zvezvibereko zvose zvemiti yamarudzi ose, gore rimwe nerimwe kumba kwaJehovha;" 
Nehemiah10:36 namatangwe avanakomana vedu navana vemhongora dzezvipfuwo zvedu, sezvakanyorwa pamurau, navana vemhongora dzemombe dzedu namakwai edu, kuti tiuye nazvo kumba kwaMwari wedu, nokuvaprista vanobata mumba maMwari wedu;" 
Nehemiah10:37 uye kuti tichauya nezvitsva zvoupfu, nezvezvipiriso zvinotsaurwa, nezvibereko zvemiti yamarudzi ose, zvewaini nezvamafuta, kuvaprista, kumakamuri eimba yaMwari wedu, nezvegumi zveminda yedu kuvaRevhi, nokuti vaRevhi ndivo vanopiwa zvegumi zvezvinorimwa nesu pamaguta ose." 
Nehemiah10:38 Muprista mwanakomana waAroni anofanira kuva navaRevhi kana vaRevhi vachitora zvegumi; zvino vaRevhi vanofanira kuuya nechegumi chezvegumi kuimba yaMwari wedu kumakamuri eimba yefuma. 
Nehemiah10:39 Nokuti vana vaIsiraeri navana vaRevhi vanofanira kuuya nechipiriso chinotsaurwa chezviyo, newaini, namafuta, kumakamuri mune midziyo yeimba tsvene nokuvaprista vanobatamo, navarindi vemikova, navaimbi; hatingarashi imba yaMwari wedu." 
Nehemiah11:1 Zvino machinda avanhu akagara Jerusaremu; vamwe vanhu vakakanda mijenyawo kuti mumwe pagumi rimwe nerimwe agare Jerusaremu,iro guta dzvene, asi vamwe vapfumbamwe panamamwe maguta." 
Nehemiah11:2 Vanhu vakarumbidza varume vose vakatenda nomoyo wavo kugara Jerusaremu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Zvino ndivo vakuru vorutivi rwenyika vakanga vagere Jerusaremu; asi pamaguta aJudha mumwe nomumwe akagara panzvimbo yake pamaguta avo, ivo vaIsiraeri, navaprista, navaRevhi, navaNetinimi, navana vavaranda vaSoromoni." 
Nehemiah11:4 PaJerusaremu ndipo pakagara vamwe vavana vaJudha, navavana vaBhenjamini. Vana vaJudha ava: Ataya, mwanakomana waUziya, mwanakomana waZekariya, mwanakomana waAmaria, mwanakomana waShefatia, mwanakomana waMaharareri wavana vaPerezi;" 
Nehemiah11:5 naMaaseya, mwanakomana waBharuki, mwanakomana waKorihoze, mwanakomana waHazaya, mwanakomana waAdhaya, mwanakomana waJoyaribhi, mwanakomana waZekariya, mwanakomana womuShironi." 
Nehemiah11:6 Vanakomana vose vaPerezi vakanga vagere Jerusaremu vakasvika mazana mana namakumi matanhatu navasere, varume voumhare." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaBhenjamini: Saru mwanakomana waMeshurami, mwanakomana waJoedhi, mwanakomana waPedhaya, mwanakomana waKoraya, mwanakomana waMaaseya, mwanakomana waItieri, mwanakomana waJeshaya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Tevere Gabhai, naSarai, mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi maviri navasere," 
Nehemiah11:9 naJoeri, mwanakomana waZikiri akanga ari mutariri wavo, naJudha, mwanakomana waHasenua, mutariri wechipiri paguta." 
Nehemiah11:10 Vavaprista: Jedhaya, mwanakomana waJoyaribhi, naJakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya, mwanakomana waHirikia, mwanakomana waMeshurami, mwanakomana waZadhoki, mwanakomana waMerayoti, mwanakomana waAhitubhi, mubati weimba yaMwari," 
Nehemiah11:12 nehama dzavo dzaibata mabasa paimba iyo, vakasvika mazana masere namakumi maviri navaviri; naAdhaya, mwanakomana waJerohami, mwanakomana waPeraira, mwanakomana waAmizi, mwanakomana waZekariya, mwanakomana waPashuri, mwanakomana waMarikija," 
Nehemiah11:13 nehama dzake, vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba, mazana maviri namakumi mana navaviri; naAmashi, mwanakomana waAzareri, mwanakomana waAzai, mwanakomana waMeshiremoti, mwanakomana waImeri," 
Nehemiah11:14 nehama dzavo, varume vane simba noumhare, zana namakumi maviri navasere; mutariri wavo akanga ari Zabhidhieri, mwanakomana waHagedhorimi." 
Nehemiah11:15 Uye vaRevhi: Shemaya mwanakomana waHashubhi, mwanakomana waAzirikami, mwanakomana waHashabhia, mwanakomana waBhuni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 naShabhetai naJozabhadhi, vavakuru vavaRevhi, vaitarira mabasa okunze eimba yaMwari;" 
Nehemiah11:17 naMatania, mwanakomana waMika, mwanakomana waZabhidhi, mwanakomana waAsafi, iye mukuru akatanga kuvonga pakunyengetera, naBhakibhukia, mukuru wechipiri pakati pehama dzake; naAbhidha, mwanakomana waShamua, mwanakomana waGarari, mwanakomana waJedhutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 VaRevhi vose paguta dzvene vakanga vana mazana maviri namakumi masere navana. 
Nehemiah11:19 Uye varindi vemikova, Akubhi, naTarimoni, nehama dzavo, vairinda pamikova, vakanga vane zana rimwe namakumi manomwe navaviri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Vamwe vakasara vavaIsiraeri, vavaprista navaRevhi vakagara pamaguta ose aJudha; mumwe nomumwe panhaka yake." 
Nehemiah11:21 Asi vaNetinimi vakagara paOferi; Ziha naGishipa vakanga vari vatariri vavaNetinimi. 
Nehemiah11:22 Mutaririwo wavaRevhi paJerusaremu akanga ari Uzi, mwanakomana waBhani, mwanakomana waHashabhia, mwanakomana waMatania, mwanakomana waMika, vavanakomana vaAsafi, ivo vaimbi vaitarira basa reimba yaMwari." 
Nehemiah11:23 Nokuti mambo akanga araira pamusoro pavo, navaimbi vaipiwa mubayiro wakatarwa zuva rimwe nerimwe." 
Nehemiah11:24 Petahia, mwanakomana waMeshazabheri, wavana vaZera, mwanakomana waJudha, ndiye akanga ari mubatsiri wamambo pamashoko ose avanhu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Kana iri misha nokuruwa rwayo, vamwe vavana vaJudha vakagara paKiriatiarabha nemisha yaro, napaDhibhoni nemisha yaro, napaJekabhizeeri nemisha yaro;" 
Nehemiah11:26 napaJeshua, napaMoradha, napaBheerishebha nemisha yawo;" 
Nehemiah11:27 napaHazarishuari, napaBheerishebha nemisha yawo;" 
Nehemiah11:28 napaZikiragi, napaMekona nemisha yawo;" 
Nehemiah11:29 napaEnirimoni, napaZora, napaJarimuti;" 
Nehemiah11:30 neZanowa, neAdhurami, nemisha yawo, neRakishi noruwa rwaro, neAzeka nemisha yaro. Naizvozvo vakavaka misasa yavo kubva paBheerishebha kusvikira pamupata weHinomi." 
Nehemiah11:31 Vana vaBhenjamini vakagara kubva paGebha, paMikimashi, neAya, napaBhetieri nemisha yawo;" 
Nehemiah11:32 neAnatoti, neNobhi, neAnania;" 
Nehemiah11:33 neHazori, neRama, neGitaimi;" 
Nehemiah11:34 neHadhidhi, neZebhoimi, neNebharati;" 
Nehemiah11:35 neRodhi, neOno, neGehaharashimi." 
Nehemiah11:36 Vamwe vaRevhi vamapoka aJudha vakagara pakati pavaBhenjamini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Zvino ava ndivo vaprista navaRevhi vakaenda naZerubhabheri, mwanakomana waShearitieri, naJeshua: Seraya, naJeremiya, naEzira;" 
Nehemiah12:2 naAmaria, naMaruki, naHatushi;" 
Nehemiah12:3 naShekania, naRehumi, naMeremoti;" 
Nehemiah12:4 naIdho, naGinetoi, naAbhiya;" 
Nehemiah12:5 naMijamini, naMaadhia, naBhiriga;" 
Nehemiah12:6 naShemaya, naJoyaribhi, naJedhaya;" 
Nehemiah12:7 naSaru, naAmoki, naHirikiya, naJedhaya. Ndivo vakanga vari vakuru vavaprista navehama dzavo pamazuva aJeshua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Uye navaRevhi ava: Jeshua, naBhinui, naKadhimieri, naSherebhia, naJudha, naMatania, iye nehama dzake ndivo vairaira vaimbi." 
Nehemiah12:9 NaBhakibhukia, naUno, hama dzavo, vakanga vakatarisana navo pakurinda." 
Nehemiah12:10 Jeshua akabereka Joyakimu, Joyakimu akabereka Eriashibhi, Eriashibhi akabereka Joyadha;" 
Nehemiah12:11 Joyadha akabereka Jonatani, Jonatani akabereka Jadhua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Pamazuva aJoyakimu vaprista, ivo vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba, vakanga vari: wokwaSeraya, Meraya; wokwaJeremiya, Hananiya" 
Nehemiah12:13 wokwaEzira, Meshurami, wokwaAmaria, Jehohanani;" 
Nehemiah12:14 wokwaMaruki, Jonatani; wokwaShebhania, Josefa;" 
Nehemiah12:15 wokwaHarimi, Adhina; wokwaMerayoti, Herikai;" 
Nehemiah12:16 wokwa Idho, Zekariya; wokaGinetoni, Meshurami;" 
Nehemiah12:17 wokwaAbhia, Zikiri; wokwaMinyamini waMoadhia, Piritai" 
Nehemiah12:18 wokwaBhiriga, Shamua; wokwaShemaya, Jehonatani," 
Nehemiah12:19 wokwaJoyaribhi, Matenai; wokwaJedhaya, Uzi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 wokwaSarai, Karai; wokwaAmoki, Ebheri;" 
Nehemiah12:21 wokwaHirikia Hashabhia; wokwaJedhaya, Netaneri." 
Nehemiah12:22 VaRevhi vakanyorwa mazita avakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba pamazuva aEriashibhi, naJoyadha, naJohwanani, naJadhua; navapristawo kusvikira pakubata ushe kwaDhariusi muPerisia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Vanakomana vaRevhi ivo vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba, vakanyorwa pabhuku yaMakoronike, kusvikira pamazuva aJohwanani mwanakomana waEriashibhi." 
Nehemiah12:24 Vakuru vavaRevhi vakanga vari: Hashabhia, naSherebhia, naJeshua, mwanakomana waKadhimieri, nehama dzavo dzakatarisana navo pakurumbidza nokuvonga, sezvakanga zvarairwa naDhavhidhi munhu waMwari, vachiita madzoro pakuimba." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania, naBhakibhukia, naObhadhiya, naMeshurami, naTarimoni, naAkubhi vakanga vari varindi vemikova, vairinda pamatura pamasuo." 
Nehemiah12:26 Ndivo vakanga varipo pamazuva aJoyakimu mwanakomana waJeshua, mwanakomana waJozadhaki,. napamazuva aNehemiya mubati, nomuprista Ezira munyori." 
Nehemiah12:27 Zvino pakutsaurira kwavo Jehovha rusvingo rweJerusaremu, vakandotsvaka vaRevhi pose pavakanga vagere, vakauya navo Jerusaremu, kuti vatsaure nomufaro, nokuvonga nokuimba, nokuridza makandira nemitengeramwa nembira." 
Nehemiah12:28 Vanakomana vavaimbi vakaungana pamwechete vachibva kumapani akapoteredza Jerusaremu, nokumisha yavaNetofati;" 
Nehemiah12:29 napaBhetigirigari, naparuwa rweGebha neAzimavheti; nokuti vaimbi vakanga vazvivakira misha pamativi ose eJerusaremu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Zvino vaprista navaRevhi vakazvinatsa, ndokunatsawo vanhu, namasuo, norusvingo." 
Nehemiah12:31 Ipapo ndakakwidza machinda avaJudha pamusoro porusvingo, ndikaraira mapoka makuru maviri vakavonga vachifamba vakaita mudungwe; vamwe vakafamba kurutivi rworudyi pamusoro porusvingo, vachienda kusuo ramarara;"
