Nehemiah12:32 shure kwavo kwakafamba Hosaya, nehafu yamachinda aJudha," 
Nehemiah12:33 naAzaria, naEzira, naMeshurami," 
Nehemiah12:34 naJudha, naBhenjamini, naShemaya, naJeremiya," 
Nehemiah12:35 navamwe vanakomana vavaprista vane hwamanda. Zekariya, mwanakomana waJonatani, mwanakomana waShemaya, mwanakomana waMatania, mwanakomana waMikaya, mwanakomana waZakuri, mwanakomana waAsafi," 
Nehemiah12:36 nehama dzake: Shemaya, naAzareri, naMirarai, naGirarai, naMaai, naNetaneri, naJudha, naHanani vane zvokuridza zvaDhavhidhi munhu waMwari; Ezira, munyori akanga ari pamberi pavo;" 
Nehemiah12:37 vakafamba napasuo retsime, vakarurama, ndokukwira namatanho eguta raDhavhidhi, pamukwidzwa worusvingo, pamusoro peimba yaDhavhidhi, kusvikira pasuo remvura, kumabvazuva." 
Nehemiah12:38 Rimwe boka ravavongi rakandosangana navo, ini ndichivatevera, ndine hafu yavanhu pamusoro porusvingo, pamusoro peshongwe yamavira, kusvikira parusvingo rupamhi;" 
Nehemiah12:39 napamusoro pesuo raEfuremu, napasuo rekare, napasuo rehove, neshongwe yaHananeri, neshongwe yaHamea, kusvikira pasuo ramakwai, vakamira pasuo ravarindi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Mapoka maviri avavongi vakamira saizvozvo paimba yaMwari, neni nehafu yavatariri," 
Nehemiah12:41 navaprista Eriakimu, naMaaseya, naMiniamini, naMikaya, naErionenai, naZekariya, naHanania, vane hwamanda;" 
Nehemiah12:42 naMaaseya, naShemaya, naEreazari, naUzi, naJehohanani, naMarikija, naErami, naEzeri. Vaimbi vakaimbisa kwazvo, vana Jezirahia mutariri wavo." 
Nehemiah12:43 Vakabayira zvibayiro zvikuru nezuva iro, vakafara; nokuti Mwari akanga avafadza nomufaro mukuru; navakadziwo navana vakafara; naizvozvo mufaro weJerusaremu wakanzwika kure." 
Nehemiah12:44 Pazuva iro varume vakagadzwa kutarira makamuri efuma, nezvipiriso zvinotsaurwa, nezvitsva, nezvegumi, kuti vaunganidziremo migove yavaprista neyavaRevhi yakanga yakatarwa nomurau, kuti itorwe paruwa rwamaguta; nokuti vaJudha vakafarira vaprista navaRevhi vaishumira." 
Nehemiah12:45 Ivo vakachengeta murayiro waMwari wavo, nomurayiro wokunatsa, navaimbi navarindi vemikovawo saizvozvo, sezvakanga zvarairwa naDhavhidhi naSoromoni, mwanakomana wake." 
Nehemiah12:46 Nokuti pamazuva akare aDhavhidhi naAsafi, kwaiva nomukuru wavaimbi, nenziyo dzokurumbidza nokuvonga Mwari." 
Nehemiah12:47 Zvino vaIsiraeri vose pamazuva aZerubhabheri, napamazuva aNehemiya, vaipa vaimbi navarindi vemikova migove yavo, yakadikamwa zuva rimwe nerimwe; ivo vaitsaurira vaRevhi, uye vaRevhi vaitsaurira vanakomana vaAroni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Zvino nezuva iro vakarava mubhuku yaMozisi, vanhu vose vachizvinzwa, vakawana makanyorwa, kuti vaMoabhu navaAmoni havafaniri kupinda paungano yaMwari nokusingaperi;" 
Nehemiah13:2 nokuti ivo havana kundosangana navana vaIsiraeri nezvokudya nemvura, asi vakaripira Bharamu kuti avatuke; asi Mwari wedu akashandura kutuka akakuita kuropafadza." 
Nehemiah13:3 Zvino vakati vanzwa murau, vakaraura vanhu vazhinji vose vakanga vakavhengana navaIsiraeri." 
Nehemiah13:4 Zvino izvi zvisati zvaitwa, Eriashibhi muprista, akanga aitwa mutariri wamakamuri eimba yaMwari wedu, wakashamwaridzana naTobhia," 
Nehemiah13:5 akamugadzirira kamuri huru pavaichengeta kare zvipiriso zvoupfu, nezvinonhuhwira, nemidziyo, nezvegumi nezviyo, nezvewaini, nezvamafuta, zvakanga zvarairwa kuti zvipiwe vaRevhi, navaimbi, navarindi vemikova, nezvipiriso zvaitsaurirwa vaprista." 
Nehemiah13:6 Asi nenguva iyo yose ini ndakanga ndisipo paJerusaremu; nokuti negore ramakumi matatu namaviri raAritashasita mambo weBhabhironi, ini ndakaenda kuna mambo; zvino mamwe mazuva akati apfuura ndikakumbira kuna mambo," 
Nehemiah13:7 ndikasvika Jerusaremu, ndikanzwa zvakaipa zvakanga zvaitwa naEriashibhi, kuti wakanga agadzirira Tobhia kamuri paruvazhe rweimba yaMwari." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ndikava neshungu kwazvo; saka ndakarashira kunze kwekamuri nhumbi dzose dzaTobhia. 
Nehemiah13:9 Ipapo ndakaraira vakanatsa makamuri; ndikadzoseramozve midziyo yeimba yaMwari, pamwechete nezvipiriso zvoupfu nezvinonhuhwira." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ndikaona kuti vaRevhi vakanga vasina kupiwa migove yavo; naizvozvo vaRevhi navaimbi, vaibata basa, vakanga vatizira mumwe nomumwe kumunda wake." 
Nehemiah13:11 Ipapo ndakaita nharo navatariri, ndikati, ""Imba yaMwari yasiyirweiko?"" Ndikavakokera, ndikavadzoserazve panzvimbo yavo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Ipapo vaJudha vose vakauya nezvegumi zvezviyo, nezvewaini, nezvamafuta, vakazviisa muzvivigiro." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ndikaisa pazvivigiro vachengeti vefuma, Sheremia muprista, naZadhoki munyori, navaRevhi, Pedhaya; vachibatsirwa naHanani, mwanakomana waZakuri, mwanakomana waMatania; nokuti vakanga vachinzi vakatendeka; basa ravo rakanga riri rokupa hama dzavo mugove wavo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Chindirangarirai henyu, Mwari wangu, pamusoro paizvozvo; regai henyu kupikisa mabasa angu akanaka andakaitira imba yaMwari wangu nezvaifanira kuitwa mairi." 
Nehemiah13:15 Zvino pamazuva iwayo ndakaona paJudha vamwe vakanga vachitsika mazambiringa pazvisviniro neSabata, navakanga vachitora zvisote vachizvitakudza mbongoro; uye waini, namazambiringa, namaonde, nemitoro yamarudzi ose, zvavakanga vachiuya nazvo paJerusaremu nezuva reSabata; ndikavanyevera pazuva ravakatengesa zvokudya." 
Nehemiah13:16 Pakanga pagerewo varume veTire, vaiuya nehove, nezvimwe zvinotengeswa zvamarudzi ose; vakazvitengesa kuvanhu vaJudha napaJerusaremu pazuva reSabata." 
Nehemiah13:17 Ipapo ndikaita nharo navakuru vavaJudha, ndikati kwavari, ""Chinhu ichi chakaipa chamunoita ndecheiko, zvamunozvidza zuva reSabata?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Ko madzibaba enyu haana kuita saizvozvo, Mwari wedu akauyisa zvakaipa izvi zvose pamusoro pedu napamusoro peguta rino here? Asi imwi munowedzera kutsamwa kwaMwari pamusoro paIsiraeri, zvamunozvidza Sabata.""" 
Nehemiah13:19 Zvino pamasuo eJerusaremu pakati posviba, Sabata risati rasvika, ndakaraira kuti mikova ipfigwe, ndikaraira kuti irege kuzarurwazve kusvikira Sabata rapfuura, ndikaisa vamwe varanda vangu pamasuo, kuti mitoro irege kupinzwa pazuva reSabata." 
Nehemiah13:20 Naizvozvo vashambadziri navatengesi vezvinhu zvamarudzi ose vakavata kunze kweJerusaremu kamwe kana kaviri. 
Nehemiah13:21 Ipapo ndakavanyevera ndikati kwavari, ""Munovatireiko pamberi porusvingo? Kana mukadarozve ndichakubatai."" Zvino kubva panguva iyo havana kuzouyazve neSabata." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ndikaraira vaRevhi kuti vazvinatse, vauye kuzorinda masuo, vatsaure zuva reSabata. Ndirangarirei henyu nokuda kwechinhu ichiwo, Mwari wangu, mundinzwire tsitsi nenyasha dzenyu huru." 
Nehemiah13:23 Namazuva iwayo ndakaonawo vamwe vaJudha vakanga vawana vakadzi veAshidhodhi, naAmoni, naMoabhu;" 
Nehemiah13:24 vana vavo vaitaura zvimwe nechiAshidhodhi, vasingagoni kutaura rurimi rwavaJudha, asi rurimi rwamarudzi iwayo." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ndikaita nharo navo, ndikavatuka, ndikarova vamwe vavo, ndikataura vhudzi ravo, ndikavapikisa naMwari, ndichiti, ""Hamufaniri kupa vanakomana vavo vakunda venyu, kana kutorera vanakomana venyu vakunda vavo, kunyange nemiwo." 
Nehemiah13:26 Ko Soromoni mambo waIsiraeri haana kutadza pazvinhu izvi here? Kunyange zvakadaro pakati pendudzi zhinji pakanga pasina mambo akafanana naye, naye akanga akadikamwa naMwari wake, Mwari akamuita mambo wavaIsiraeri vose; kunyange zvakadaro naiye akatadziswa navakadzi vatorwa." 
Nehemiah13:27 Ko zvino tingakuteererai kuti muite chinhu ichi chakaipa chikuru, mutadzire Mwari wedu muchiwana vakadzi vatorwa here?""" 
Nehemiah13:28 Zvino mumwe wavanakomana vaJoyadha mwanakomana waEriashibhi muprista mukuru, akanga ari mukwambo waSanibharati muHoroni; saka ndakamudzinga abve kwandiri." 
Nehemiah13:29 Muvarangarirei henyu, Mwari wangu, nokuti vakasvibisa uprista nesungano youprista neyavaRevhi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Ndikavanatsa saizvozvo ndikabvisa zvose zvavatorwa, ndikaraira madzoro avaprista navaRevhi, mumwe nomumwe pabasa rake;" 
Nehemiah13:31 napabasa rezvipo zvehuni panguva dzakatarwa, nerezvitsva. Ndirangarirei henyu, Mwari wangu, mundiitire zvakanaka." 
Esther1:1 Zvino pamazuva aAhashivheroshi, (ndiye Ahashivheroshi aibata ushe kubva palndia kusvikira Itiopia, pamativi enyika ane zana namakumi maviri namanomwe;)" 
Esther1:2 pamazuva iwayo mambo Ahashivheroshi agere pachigaro chake choushe chakanga chiri paShushani panhare yamambo," 
Esther1:3 pagore rechitatu rokubata kwake ushe, akaitira machinda ake ose navaranda vake mutambo; hondo dzePerisia neMedhia, navakuru namachinda enyika vakanga vari pamberi pake." 
Esther1:4 Akavaratidza fuma youshe hwake hwakarumbidzwa, nokukudzwa koumambo hwake hwakaisvonaka mazuva mazhinji, ari mazuva ane zana namakumi masere." 
Esther1:5 Zvino mazuva iwayo akati apera, mambo akaitira mutambo vanhu vose vakanga vari paShushani panhare yamambo, vakuru navaduku, mazuva manomwe paruvanze rwomunda panhare yamambo;" 
Esther1:6 pakanga pane micheka michena nemipfumbu nemitema yakanga yakasungwa nezvisungo zvemicheka yakaisvonaka nemishava pazvindori zvesirivha nembiru dzamabwe machena; zvigaro zvakanga zviri zvendarama nesirivha zvakagadzikwa paguva rakaitwa namabwe matsvuku, namachena, namashora, namatema." 
Esther1:7 Vakapiwa zvokumwa mumikombe yendarama, (asi mikombe yakanga isina kufanana), newaini yamambo zhinji, mambo asingavanyimi napaduku." 
Esther1:8 Vakamwa nomurayiro wokuti munhu arege kurovererwa; nokuti mambo akanga araira varanda vose veimba yake, kuti vaitire mumwe nomumwe sezvaakanga achida nomoyo wake." 
Esther1:9 Navahosi Vhashiti vakaitirawo vakadzi mutambo paimba yamambo yakanga iri yamambo Ahashivheroshi. 
Esther1:10 Zvino nezuva rechinomwe moyo wamambo wakati uchifara newaini, akaraira Mehumani, naBhizita, naHaribhona, naBhigita, naAbhagata, naZetari, naKarikasi, ivo varanda vanomwe vaibata pamberi pamambo Ahashivheroshi," 
Esther1:11 kuti vauye navahosi Vhashiti pamberi pamambo, vane korona youhosi, kuti vanhu namachinda vawone kunaka kwavo; nokuti vakanga vakanaka pakuonekwa." 
Esther1:12 Asi vahosi Vhashiti vakaramba kuuya sezvavakanga varairwa namambo nomuromo wavaranda; ipapo mambo akatsamwa kwazvo, shungu dzake dzikamuka mukati make." 
Esther1:13 Ipapo mambo akati kuvarume vakangwara vaiziva nguva, (nokuti saizvozvo mambo wairangana navose vaiziva murau nezvakatongwa;" 
Esther1:14 vakanga vagere pedo naye vaiva Karishena, naShetari, naAdhimata, naTarishishi, naMereesi, naMarisena, naMemukani, iwo machinda manomwe ePerisia neMedhia, vaisionana namambo, vaigara pazvigaro zvokutanga paushe;)" 
Esther1:15 akati, ""Murayiro unoti kudini, tichaitireiko vahosi Vhashiti, zvavakaramba kuita sezvavakarairwa namambo Ahashivheroshi nomuromo wavaranda?""" 
Esther1:16 Ipapo Memukani akapindura mambo namachinda, akati, ""Vahosi havana kutadzira mambo bedzi, asi namachinda osewo, navanhu vose vari munyika dzose dzamambo Ahashivheroshi." 
Esther1:17 Nokuti ichi chakaitwa navahosi chichapararira pakati pavakadzi vose, zvino vachashora varume vavo, kana zvichinzi, `Mambo Ahashivheroshi akaraira vahosi Vhashiti kuti vauyiswe pamberi pake, asi vakaramba kuuya.'" 
Esther1:18 Nhasi vakadzi vamachinda ePerisia neMedhia, vakanzwa zvakaitwa navahosi, achataurawo zvakadaro kumachinda ose amambo. Naizvozvo kushora nokutsamwa kukuru kuchamuka." 
Esther1:19 Kana mambo achifara nazvo, mambo ngaateme murayiro une simba ramambo, unyorwe pamirairo yavaPerisia navaMedhia, urege kushandurwa. Kuti Vhashiti arege kuzouyazve pamberi pamambo Ahashivheroshi; mambo ngaape mumwe akanaka kupfuura iye uhosi hwake." 
Esther1:20 Zvino kana chirevo chamambo chavatema, chikaparidzwa paushe hwake hwose, (nokuti ukuru kwazvo), vakadzi vose vachakudza varume vavo, vose vakuru navaduku.""" 
Esther1:21 Shoko iro rikafadza mambo namachinda; mambo ndokuita sezvakarehwa naMemukani; 
Esther1:22 nokuti akatuma mwadhi kumativi ose enyika dzose dzamambo, divi rimwe nerimwe renyika nomunyorero wayo, norudzi rumwe norumwe norurimi rwarwo, kuti murume mumwe nomumwe ave murairi mumba make, ataure norurimi rwake." 
Esther2:1 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo, kutsamwa kwamambo Ahashivheroshi kwakati kwanyarara, akarangarira Vhashiti nezvaakaita, nechirevo chakatemwa pamusoro pake." 
Esther2:2 Ipapo varanda vamambo vaimubatira, vakati, ""Mambo ngaatsvakirwe mhandara dzakanaka;" 
Esther2:3 mambo ngaaise vatariri pamativi ose oushe hwake, vaunganidze mhandara dzose dzakanaka paShushani nhare yamambo, paimba yavakadzi, vachengetwe naHegai muranda wamambo, mutariri wavakadzi; vapiwewo zvavangazvinatsa nazvo." 
Esther2:4 Zvino musikana unofarirwa namambo ngaave vahosi panzvimbo yaVhashiti. Izvozvo zvikafadza mambo, akaita saizvozvo." 
Esther2:5 Zvino paShushani panhare yamambo pakanga panomuJudha, ainzi Modhekai, mwanakomana waJairi, mwanakomana waShimei, mwanakomana waKishi, muBhenjamini," 
Esther2:6 akanga atapwa Jerusaremu, pamwechete navatapwa vakanga vatapwa naJekonia mambo waJudha, wakanga atapwa naNebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi." 
Esther2:7 Iye akanga arera Hadhasha, ndiye Esiteri, mukunda wababamunini wake; nokuti akanga asina baba namai; zvino musikana uyu akanga akanaka paumiro hwake napachiso chake; pakufa kwababa vake namai vake Modhekai ndokumutora, akamuita mukunda wake." 
Esther2:8 Zvino murayiro wamambo nechirevo chake zvakati zvanzwikwa, vasikana vazhinji vakaunganidzwa paShushani nhare yamambo, pavaichengetwa naHegai, Esiteri akatorwawo, akaiswa mumba mamambo, akachengetwa naHegai mutariri wavakadzi." 
Esther2:9 Musikana uyu akamufadza, akanzwirwa tsitsi naye, akachimbidzika kumupa zvaangazvinatsa nazvo, nemigove yake yezvokudya uye vasikana vanomwe vaakafanira kupiwa, vaibva paimba yamambo; akamuisa iye navasikana vake pakanga pakaisvonaka paimba yavakadzi." 
Esther2:10 Asi Esiteri akanga asina kuvazivisa rudzi rwake nehama dzake', nokuti Modhekai akanga amuraira, kuti arege kuvazivisa izvozvo." 
Esther2:11 Zvino Modhekai aifamba pamberi poruvanze rweimba yavakadzi mazuva ose, agoziva kuti Esiteri akadini, uye kuti vachaitei naye." 
Esther2:12 Zvino dzoro romusikana mumwe nomumwe rakati richisvika kupinda kuna mambo Ahashivheroshi, kana aitirwa zvose nomurayiro wavakadzi mwedzi ine gumi nemiviri, (nokuti mazuva okunatswa kwavo akapera kudai: mwedzi mitanhatu vachizora mafuta emura, mwedzi mitanhatu zvinonhuhwira, uye zvimwe zvinhu zvokunatsa vakadzi nazvo,)" 
Esther2:13 zvino musikana akapinda nomutoo akadaro kuna mambo, uye chinhu chipi nechipi chaaida aichipiwa, kuti abude nacho paimba yavakadzi, apinde mumba mamambo." 
Esther2:14 Aienda madekwana, ndokudzokera mangwana kuimba yechipiri yavakadzi, paaichengetwa naShaashigazi, muranda wamambo, aichengeta varongo; haazaipindazve kuna mambo, asi kana achinge afarirwa namambo, akadamwa nezita rake." 
Esther2:15 Zvino dzoro raEsiteri mukunda waAbhihairi, babamunini vaModhekai, akanga amutora akamuita mukunda wake, rakati richisvika rokupinda kuna mambo, haana kukumbira chinhu asi izvochetezvakanga zvarairwa naHegai muranda wamambo, mutariri wavakadzi. Zvino Esiteri akanzwirwa tsitsi navose vaimuona." 
Esther2:16 Naizvozvo Esiteri akaiswa kuna mambo Ahashivheroshi muimba yake youshe nomwedzi wegumi, ndiwo mwedzi weTebheti, pagore rechinomwe rokubata kwake ushe." 
Esther2:17 Mambo akada Esiteri kupfuura vamwe vakadzi vose, akanzwira tsitsi nounyoro naye kupfuura dzimwe mhandara dzose; naizvozvo akaisa korona youhosi pamusoro wake, akamuita vahosi panzvimbo yaVhashiti." 
Esther2:18 Ipapo mambo akaitira machinda ake ose navaranda vake vose mutambo mukuru, uri mutambo waEsiteri; akaraira zororo pamativi enyika, akagovera zvipo, mambo asinganyimi napaduku." 
Esther2:19 Zvino pakuunganidzwa kwemhandara rwechipiri, Modhekai akanga agere pasuo ramambo." 
Esther2:20 Esiteri akanga achigere kuvazivisa hama dzake kana rudzi rwake, sezvaakarairwa naModhekai; nokuti Esiteri akateerera murayiro waModhekai, sezvaaisiita acharerwa naye." 
Esther2:21 zvino pamazuva iwayo Modhikai agere pasuo ramambo, varanda vaviri vamambo, Bhigitani naTereshi, pakati pavarindi vomukova, vakatsamwa vakatsvaka kuuraya mambo Ahashivheroshi." 
Esther2:22 Chinhu icho chikazikamwa naModhekai, iye ndokuzivisa vahosi Esiteri, Esiteri akandoudza mambo nezita raModhekai." 
Esther2:23 Zvino vakati vachinzvera chinhu icho, vakawana kuti zvirokwazvo, vose vari vaviri vakasungirirwa pamuti; zvikanyorwa mubhuku yaMakoronike pamberi pamambo." 
Esther3:1 Shure kwaizvozvo mambo Ahashivheroshi akakudza Hamani, mwanakomana waHamedhata muAgagi, akamuita mukuru nokumupfuudza ave mukuru kumachinda ake ose." 
Esther3:2 Zvino varanda vose vamambo vakanga vari pasuo ramambo vakakotama nokupfugamira Hamani; nokuti mambo akanga araira saizvozvo pamusoro pake. Asi Modhekai haana kukotama kana kumupfugamira. 
Esther3:3 Ipapo varanda vamambo vakanga vari pasuo ramambo vakati kuna Modhekai, ""Iwe unodarikireiko murayiro wamambo?""" 
Esther3:4 Zvino vakati vataura naye mazuva ose, iye achiramba kuvateerera, vakaudza Hamani kuti vawone kana mashoko aModhekai angava nesimba; nokuti akavaudza kuti iye muJudha." 
Esther3:5 Zvino Hamani akati achiona kuti Modhekai haakotami kana kumupfugamira, Hamani akava neshungu kwazvo." 
Esther3:6 Asi akashora kuuraya Modhekai oga, nokuti vakanga vamuzivisa rudzi rwaModhekai; naizvozvo Hamani akatsvaka kuparadza vaJudha vose vakanga vari paushe hwose hwaAhashivheroshi, irwo rudzi rwaModhekai." 
Esther3:7 Zvino pamwedzi wokutanga, uri mwedzi weNisani, pagore regumi namaviri ramambo Ahashivheroshi, vakakanda Puri, ndiyo mijenya, pamberi paHamani zuva rimwe nerimwe, pamwedzi mumwe nomumwe, kusvikira pamwedzi wegumi nemiviri, ndiwo mwedzi weAdhari." 
Esther3:8 Hamani akati kuna mambo Ahashivheroshi, ""Rumwe rudzi rwavanhu ruriko, rwakapararira nokutekeshera pakati pavanhu pamativi ose enyika dzoushe bwenyu; mirau yavo yakasiyana neyavamwe vanhu, havachengeti mirau yamambo; saka mambo haafaniri kuvarega varipo." 
Esther3:9 Kana mambo achifara nazvo mwadhi ngainyorwe kuti vaparadzwe; ini ndichabudisa matarenda* ane zviuru zvine gumi esirivha pamaoko avatariri vebasa ramambo, vaaise pazvivigiro zvefuma yamambo.""" 
Esther3:10 Ipapo mambo akabvisa chindori chake paruoko rwake, akachipa Hamani, mwanakomana waHamedhata muAgagi, muvengi wavaJudha." 
Esther3:11 Mambo akati kuna Hamani, ""Iwe navanhu vako mungatora sirivha iyo, muite nayo sezvaunoda iwe.""" 
Esther3:12 Ipapo vanyori vamambo vakadamwa nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva regumi namatatu, zvose zvikanyorwa Hamani sezvaakaraira machinda amambo, navabati vaibata rutivi rumwe norumwe rwenyika rwakanyorerwa nomunyorero warwo, uye rudzi rumwe norumwe norurimi rwarwo; zvikanyorwa nezita ramambo Ahashivheroshi ndokusimbiswa nechindori chamambo." 
Esther3:13 mwadhi dzikatumwa nenhume dzinomhanya kumativi ose enyika dzamambo, kuti vaJudha vose, vaduku navakuru, navana vaduku, navakadzi vaparadzwe nokuurawa nokupedzwa pazuva rimwe, pazuva regumi namatatu romwedzi wegumi nemiviri, uri mwedzi weAdhari, uye nenhumbi dzavo dzose dzipambwe;" 
Esther3:14 mashoko orunyoro urwu akatumwa kuvanhu vose, kuti chirevo chiparidzwe pamativi ose enyika, kuti vazvigadzirire zuva iro." 
Esther3:15 Nhume dzinomhanya dzikachimbidzikiswa nomurayiro wamambo, chirevo chikaziviswa paShushani panhare yamambo; ipapo mambo naHamani vakagara pasi vakamwa; asi guta reShushani rakadziyaniswa." 
Esther4:1 Zvino Modhekai akati achinzwa zvose zvaitwa, Modhekai ndokubvarura nguvo dzake, akafuka masaga nokuisa madota pamusoro wake, akapinda pakati peguta, akachema nokuchema kukuru kunorwadza moyo;" 
Esther4:2 akasvikawo pamberi pesuo ramambo; nokuti akafuka masaga haana kutenderwa kupinda pasuo ramambo. 
Esther4:3 Naparutivi rumwe norumwe rwenyika pose pakasvika murayiro wamambo nechirevo chake, pakanga panokuchema kukuru pakati pavaJudha, nokutsanya, nokuchema misodzi, nokuungudza; vazhinji vakavata pasi vakafuka masaga nokuzviisa madota pamisoro." 
Esther4:4 Zvino vasikana vaEsiteri navaranda vake vakandomuudza izvozvo; vahosi vakabatwa neshungu kwazvo, vakatumira Modhekai nguvo, kuti adzifuke, abvise masaga; asi wakaramba kudzigamuchira." 
Esther4:5 Ipapo Esiteri akadana Hataki, mumwe wavaranda vamambo, waakanga araira kumubatira, akamuraira kuti aende kuna Modhekai kundonzwa kuti chinyi, uye mhaka yeiko." 
Esther4:6 Ipapo Hataki akaenda kuna Modhekai padare reguta, rakanga riri pamberi pesuo ramambo." 
Esther4:7 Modhekai akamuudza zvose zvaakaitirwa, nokuwanda kwemari yakanzi naHamani kuti achaiisa muzvivigiro zvamambo kuti vaJudha vaparadzwe." 
Esther4:8 Akamupawo mashoko orunyoro rwechirevo chakanga chatemwa paShushani chokuti vaparadzwe, kuti achiratidze Esiteri nokumuzivisa izvozvo; akamurairawo kuti apinde kuna mambo amunyengetere nokukumbirira vanhu vake kwaari." 
Esther4:9 Hataki akandoudza Esiteri mashoko aModhekai. 
Esther4:10 Ipapo Esiteri akataura naHataki, akamupa shoko rokundoudza Modhekai, akati," 
Esther4:11 Varanda vose vamambo navanhu vamativi enyika dzamambo vanoziva kuti ani naani, kunyange murume kana mukadzi, akapinda kuna mambo muruvanze rwomukati asina kudamwa, kunongova nomurau mumwe woga kwaari, kuti aurawe; asi kana mambo akamutambanudzira tsvimbo yendarama, achararama hake; asi ini handina kudamwa kuti ndipinde kuna mambo mazuva ano ana makumi matatu.""" 
Esther4:12 Vakaudza Modhekai mashoko aEsiteri. 
Esther4:13 Ipapo Modhekai akavaraira kuti vapindure Esiteri, vati, ""Usati iwe uchapukunyuka mumba mamambo kupfuura vamwe vaJudha vose." 
Esther4:14 Nokuti kana iwe ukanyarara chose nenguva ino, vaJudha vachabatsirwa nokurwirwa nomumwe mutoo, asi iwe neimba yababa vako muchaparadzwa; handiti, zvimwe wakasvika paushe nokuda kwenguva inenge seino here?""" 
Esther4:15 Ipapo Esiteri akaraira kuti vapindure Modhekai, vati," 
Esther4:16 Endai mukokere vaJudha vose vari paShushani, muzvinyime zvokudya nokuda kwangu; regai kudya kana kumwa mazuva matatu, usiku namasikati; neniwo navasikana vangu tichatsanya saizvozvo; ipapo ndichapinda kuna mambo, kunyange zvisina kutenderwa nomurau; kana ndikaparara, ndaparara hangu.""" 
Esther4:17 Naizvozvo Modhekai akaenda hake akandoita zvose zvaakarairwa naEsiteri. 
Esther5:1 Zvino pazuva rechitatu Esiteri akafuka nguvo dzake dzouhosi, akandomira paruvanze rwomukati rweimba yamambo, pakatarisana neimba yamambo; mambo akanga agere pachigaro chake choushe paimba yake youshe, pakatarisana nomukova weimba." 
Esther5:2 Zvino mambo akati achiona vahosi Esiteri amire paruvanze, iye akanzwirwa tsitsi naye, mambo akatambanudzira Esiteri tsvimbo yendarama yakanga iri muruoko rwake. Ipapo Esiteri akaswedera, akabata muromo wetsvimbo." 
Esther5:3 Zvino mambo akati kwaari, ""Unoreveiko vahosi Esiteri? Unokumbireiko? Uchazvipiwa, kunyange uchikumbira hafu youshe hwangu.""" 
Esther5:4 Esiteri akati, ""Kana mambo achifara nazvo, mambo naHamani ngavauye nhasi kumafundo andakamugadzirira.""" 
Esther5:5 Ipapo mambo akati, ""Hamani ngaachimbidzike, kuti zvarehwa naEsiteri zviitwe."" Naizvozvo mambo naHamani vakaenda kumafundo akanga agadzirwa naEsiteri." 
Esther5:6 Zvino mambo akati kuna Esiteri pamafundo ewaini, ""Chinyiko chaunonyengetera? Uchazvipiwa. Unokumbireiko? Zvichaitwa, kunyange uchikumbira hafu youshe hwangu.""" 
Esther5:7 Ipapo Esiteri akapindura akati, ""Kunyengetera kwangu nokukumbira kwangu ndikoku:" 
Esther5:8 Kana ndanzwirwa tsitsi namambo, kana mambo achida kundipa chandinonyengetera, nokuita chandinokumbira, mambo naHamani ngavauye kumafundo andichavagadzirira, mangwana ndichaita sezvarehwa namambo.""" 
Esther5:9 Ipapo Hamani akaenda nezuva iro achifara, ano moyo muchena; asi Hamani akati achiona Modhekai pasuo ramambo, kuti akaramba kumusimukira, kana kumutya, akasvotwa kwazvo pamusoro paModhekai." 
Esther5:10 Asi Hamani akazvidzora hake akaenda kumusha; akatuma munhu kuzodana shamwari dzake nomukadzi wake Zereshi. 
Esther5:11 Hamani akavarondedzera kubwinya kwefuma yake, nokuwanda kwavana vake, namakudzirwo aakaitwa namambo, namapfuudzirwo ake ave mukuru kumachinda navaranda vose vamambo." 
Esther5:12 Hamani akapfuura akati,""Navahosi Esiteri havana kutendera mumwe munhu kupinda namambo kumapfundo avakagadzira, asi ini ndoga; uye mangwanawo ndadamwa navo pamwechete namambo." 
Esther5:13 Asi izvo zvose hazvindibetseri chinhu, kana ndichigara ndichiona Modhekai muJudha agere pasuo ramambo.""" 
Esther5:14 Ipapo mukadzi wake Zereshi neshamwari dzake dzose vakati kwaari, ""Rairai kuti vagadzire matanda anamakubhiti makumi mashanu pakureba kwawo, mangwana mugokumbira kuna mambo kuti Modhekai asungirirwe paari; ipapo mungapinda henyu nomufaro namambo kumafundo."" Zvino shoko iro rakafadza Hamani, akaraira kuti matanda agadzirwe." 
Esther6:1 Zvino usiku uhwo mambo akashaiwa hope, akaraira kuti vauye nebhuku yamashoko aMakoronike, akaravirwa mambo." 
Esther6:2 Vakawana kuti pakanyorwa kuti Modhekai akadeya kuzivisa mashoko aBhigitana naTereshi, varanda vaviri vamambo pakati pavarindi vomukova, vakatsvaka kuuraya mambo Ahashivheroshi." 
Esther6:3 Ipapo mambo akati, ""Modhekai akakudzwa nokurumbidzwa seiko pamusoro pechinhu ichi?"" Varanda vamambo vaimubatira vakati, ""Haana chaakaitirwa.""" 
Esther6:4 Mambo akati, ""Ndianiko uri paruvanze?"" Zvino Hamani akanga apinda paruvanze rwokunze kweimba yamambo, achida kukumbira kuna mambo kuti Modhekai asungirirwe namatanda aakanga amugadzirira." 
Esther6:5 Varanda vamambo vakati kwaari, ""Tarirai Hamani umire paruvanze."" Mambo akati, ""Ngaapinde.""" 
Esther6:6 Naizvozvo Hamani akapinda. Mambo akati kwaari, ""Munhu, mambo waanoda kumukudza, angaitirweiko?"" Zvino Hamani akati mumoyo make, ""Mambo vangada kukudza aniko, asi ini?""" 
Esther6:7 Hamani akati kuna mambo, ""Iye munhu, mambo waanoda kukudza," 
Esther6:8 ngaatorerwe nguvo dzoushe, idzo dzinosifukwa namambo, nebhiza rinositasva namambo, nekorona youshe inosidzikwa pamusoro wake;" 
Esther6:9 zvino nguvo nebhiza ngazviiswe pamaoko omumwe wamachinda amambo anokudzwa kwazvo, kuti vafukidze munhu uyo, mambo waanoda kukudza, vagomufambisa munzira dzomuguta, akatasva bhiza, vadanidzire pamberi pake, vachiti, `Munhu, mambo waanoda kukudza, ngaaitirwe saizvozvo.' """ 
Esther6:10 Ipapo mambo akati kuna Hamani, ""Chimbidzika utore nguvo nebhiza, sezvawataura, undoitira Modhekai muJudha saizvozvo, iye agere pasuo ramambo; usarega shoko rimwe pamashoko ose awataura.""" 
Esther6:11 Zvino Hamani akatora nguvo nebhiza, akafukidza Modhekai, akamufambisa panzira dzomuguta akatasva bhiza, akadanidzira pamberi pake, achiti, ""Ndizvo zvichaitirwa munhu uyo mambo waanoda kukudza.""" 
Esther6:12 Zvino Modhekai akadzokera kusuo ramambo. Asi Hamani akachimbidzika kuenda kumba kwake achichema, akafukidza musoro wake." 
Esther6:13 Hamani akarondedzera kuna Zereshi mukadzi wake neshamwari dzake dzose zvose zvaakaitirwa. Ipapo shamwari dzake dzakangwara naZereshi mukadzi wake vakati kwaari, ""Kana Modhekai uyu wawakatanga kuwa pamberi pake ari worudzi rwavaJudha, haungakundi, asi zvirokwazvo uchawa pamberi pake.""" 
Esther6:14 Vakati vachataura naye, varanda vamambo vakasvika, vakachimbidzika kuenda naHamani kumafundo akanga agadzirwa naEsiteri." 
Esther7:1 Zvino mambo naHamani vakasvika pamafundo avahosi Esiteri. 
Esther7:2 Mambo akatizve kuna Esiteri pazuva rechipiri, pamafundo ewaini, ""Chinyiko chaunonyengetera, vahosi Esiteri? Uchapiwa. Unokumbireiko? Zvichaitwa, kunyange uchikumbira hafu youshe hwangu.""" 
Esther7:3 Ipapo vahosi Esiteri vakapindura vakati, ""Kana ndichinge ndanzwirwa tsitsi nemwi mambo, kana mambo achifara nazvo, ndinokumbira kuti ndipiwe upenyu hwangu nokuda kokunyengetera kwangu, nobwevanhu vangu nokuda kokukumbira kwangu;" 
Esther7:4 nokuti tatengeswa, ini navanhu vangu, kuti tiparadzwe, tiurawe, tipedzwe. Dai takanga tatengeswa tive varanda navashandiri, ndingadai ndanyarara hangu,,nokuti kutambudzika kwedu hakungaenzaniswi nokutadzirwa kwamambo.""" 
Esther7:5 Ipapo mambo Ahashivheroshi akapindura, akati kuna vahosi Esiteri, ""Ndianiko, aripi iye akafunga mumoyo make kuita izvozvo?""" 
Esther7:6 Esiteri akati, ""Mudzivisi nomuvengi, ndiye Hamani uyu akaipa!"" Ipapo Hamani akatya pamberi pamambo navahosi." 
Esther7:7 Mambo akasimuka pamafundo ewaini akatsamwa, akaenda kumunda weimba yamambo; Hamani akasimukawo kuzokumbira upenyu hwake kuna vahosi Esiteri, nokuti akaona kuti mambo akafunga kumuitira zvakaipa." 
Esther7:8 Ipapo mambo akadzoka achibva pamunda weimba yamambo akapinda panzvimbo yamafundo ewaini; zvino Hamani akanga azviwisira pachigaro pakanga pagere Esiteri. Mambo akati, ""Zvino wotoda kuchinya vahosi muno mumba pamberi pangu kanhi?"" Zvino shoko iro rakati rabuda mumuromo wamambo, vakafukidza chiso chaHamani." 
Esther7:9 Ipapo Haribhona, mumwe muranda akanga ari pamberi pamambo, akati, ""Tarirai, paimba yaHamani pamire matanda akareba anamakubhiti makumi mashanu, akamiswa naHamani, kuti asungirirepo Modhekai, akataura zvakanaka nokuda kwamambo."" Mambo akati, ""Musungirireipo paari.""" 
Esther7:10 Naizvozvo vakasungirira Hamani pamatanda aakagadzirira Modhekai. Ipapo kutsamwa kwamambo kwakanyarara. 
Esther8:1 Zvino pazuva iro mambo Ahashivheroshi akapa vahosi Esiteri imba yaHamani, iye muvengi wavaJudha. Modhekai akasvika pamberi pamambo, nokuti Esiteri akanga audza mambo kuti chinyi chake." 
Esther8:2 Mambo akabvisa chindori chake chaakanga atora panaHamani, akachipa Modhekai. Esiteri ndokuita Modhekai mutariri weimba yaHamani." 
Esther8:3 Esiteri akataurazve pamberi pamambo, akazviwisira pasi pamakumbo ake, akachema kwaari nemisodzi kuti aparadze zano rakaipa raHamani muAgagi, nezano rake raakanga afunga pamusoro pavaJudha." 
Esther8:4 Mambo akatambanudzira Esiteri tsvimbo yendarama. Ipapo Esiteri akasimuka akamira pamberi pamambo 
Esther8:5 Zvino akati kana mambo achifara nazvo, kana ndanzwirwa tsitsi naye, kana mambo achiti zvakanaka, ini ndakamufadza hangu, mwadhi ngadzinyorwe dzichashandura mwadhi dzaiva nezano raHamani mwanakomana waHamedhata, muAgagi, dzaakanyora kuparadza vaJudha vari pamativi ose enyika yamambo;" 
Esther8:6 nokuti ini ndingagona seiko kuona zvakaipa zvichaitirwa vanhu vangu? Ndingagona seiko kuona kuparadzwa kwavanhu vangu! 
Esther8:7 Ipapo mambo Ahashivheroshi akati kuna vahosi Esiteri naModhekai muJudha, ""Tarirai ndapa Esiteri imba yaHamani, asi iye vakamusungirira pamatanda, nokuti akada kuuraya vaJudha." 
Esther8:8 Zvino imiwo chinyorerai vaJudha, sezvamunoda, nezita ramambo, muzvisimbise nechindori chamambo; nokuti rugwaro rwakanyorwa nezita ramambo, rukasimbiswa nechindori chamambo, harungashandurwi nomunhu.""" 
Esther8:9 Zvino vanyori vamambo vakadamwa panguva iyo, pamwedzi wechitatu, uri mwedzi weShivhani, pazuva ramakumi maviri namatatu; vakanyora zvose Modhekai zvaakaraira vaJudha, namachinda makuru, navabati, namachinda amativi enyika, kubva paIndia kusvikira paItiopia, mativi enyika ane zana namakumi maviri namanomwe, rutivi rumwe norumwe rwenyika nomunyorero warwo, uye rudzi rumwe norume norurimi rwarwo, navaJudha nomunyorero wavo uye norurimi rwavo." 
Esther8:10 Akanyora nezita ramambo Ahashivheroshi, akadzisimbisa nechindori chamambo, ndokutuma nhume dzinomhanya dzakatasva mabhiza, dzakatasva mabhiza aimhanyisa kwazvo pabasa ramambo, akaberekwa pazvipfuwo zvamambo." 
Esther8:11 Mambo akatendera pamwadhi idzo vaJudha paguta rimwe nerimwe kuungana, nokurwira upenyu hwavo, vaparadze, vauraye, vapedze simba rose ravanhu neramativi enyika kana vaida kuvavamba ivo navana vavo navakadzi vavo, uye vatore nhumbi dzavo vadzipambare," 
Esther8:12 zvose zviitwe pazuva rimwe pamativi ose enyika yose yamambo Ahashivheroshi, iro zuva regumi namatatu romwedzi wegumi nemiviri, uri mwedzi weAdhari." 
Esther8:13 Mashoko orugwaro urwu akatumwa kuvanhu vose, kuti chirevo chiparidzwe pamativi ose enyika kuti vaJudha vazvigadzirire zuva iro vatsive vavengi vavo." 
Esther8:14 Naizvozvo nhume, dzakatasva mabhiza anomhanyisa kwazvo pabasa ramambo, dzakaenda dzichichimbidzikiswa nokukurudzirwa nomurayiro wamambo; chirevo icho chikatemwa paShushani nhare yamambo." 
Esther8:15 Modhekai akabuda pamberi pamambo, akafuka nguvo dzoushe, nhema nechena, akadzika korona huru yendarama, ane nguvo yomucheka wakaisvonaka-naka mushava; guta reShushani rikapururudza, rakafara." 
Esther8:16 VaJudha vakava nechiedza, nomufaro, nokufara kukuru, nokukudzwa." 
Esther8:17 Zvino parutivi rumwe norumwe rwenyika, napaguta rimwe nerimwe, pose pakasvika murayiro wamambo nechirevo chake, vaJudha vakafara nomufaro mukuru, vakaita mutambo nezuva romufaro. Vanhu vazhinji pakati pendudzi dzavanhu dzenyika vakazova vaJudha; nokuti vakanga vachitya vaJudha kwazvo." 
Esther9:1 Zvino nomwedzi wegumi nemiviri,iwo mwedzi weAdhari, nezuva regumi namatatu, nguva yakati 'yaswedera yokuti murayiro wamambo nechirevo chake zviitwe, pazuva rakafunga vavengi vavaJudha kuvamukira naro; asi zvakashandurwa, nokuti vaJudha vakamukira vavengi vavo;" 
Esther9:2 vaJudha vakaungana pamaguta avo pamativi ose enyika dzamambo Ahashivheroshi, kuti vauraye avo vakatsvaka kuvaitira zvakaipa; hakuna akanga achigona kuvadzivisa, nokuti vanhu vose vakavatya." 
Esther9:3 Machinda ose amativi enyika, namachinda makuru, navabati, vaibata basa ramambo, vakabatsira vaJudha; nokuti vakatya Modhekai." 
Esther9:4 Nokuti Modhekai akanga ari mukuru paimba yamambo, nembiri yake yakanga yasvika kumativi ose enyika; nokuti murume uyu Modhekai akaramba achikura." 
Esther9:5 VaJudha vakaparadza vavengi vavo vose, nokuvatema neminondo, nokuvauraya, nokuvaparadza, vakaitira vavengi vavo sezvavaida." 
Esther9:6 NapaShushani nhare yamambo, vaJudha vakauraya nokuparadza varume vana mazana mashanu." 
Esther9:7 Parishandata, naDharifoni, naAsipata," 
Esther9:8 naPorata, naAdharia, naAridhata," 
Esther9:9 naParimashita, naArisai, naAridhai, naVaizata," 
Esther9:10 ivo vanakomana vane gumi vaHamani mwanakomana waHamedhata, muvengi wavaJudha, vakavaurayawo; asi havana kupambara nhumbi dzavo." 
Esther9:11 Pazuva iro kuwanda kwavakaurawa paShushani nhare yamambo kwakaverengwa kukaiswa kuna mambo. 
Esther9:12 Ipapo mambo akati kuna vahosi Esiteri, ""VaJudha vauraya nokuparadza paShushani nhare yamambo, varume vana mazana mashanu, navanakomana vane gumi vaHamani; ndoda zvavakaita kuna mamwe mativi enyika yamambo! Zvino chinyiko chaunonyengetera? Uchazvipiwa. Kana chinyiko chaunokumbira zvino? Zvichaitwa.""" 
Esther9:13 Ipapo Esiteri akati, ""Kana mambo achifara nazvo, vaJudha vari paShushani ngavatenderwe kuita mangwanawo nechirevo chanhasi, navanakomana vaHamani vane gumi vasungirirwe pamatanda""." 
Esther9:14 Ipapo mambo akaraira kuti zviitwe saizvozvo; chirevo chikatemwa paShushani, vakasungurira vanakomana vaHamani vane gumi." 
Esther9:15 VaJudha vaiva paShushani vakaunganazve nezuva regumi namana romwedzi weAdhari, vakauraya varume vana mazana matatu paShushani, asi havana kupambara nhumbi." 
Esther9:16 Navamwe vaJudha vaiva pamativi enyika yamambo vakaungana, vakarwira upenyu hwavo, vakazorora pavavengi vavo, vakauraya pakati pavavengi vavo vane zviuru zvina makumi manomwe nezvishanu; asi havana kupambara nhumbi." 
Esther9:17 Izvozvo zvakaitwa nezuva regumi namatatu romwedzi weAdhari, vakazorora nezuva regumi namana, vakariita zuva romutambo neromufaro." 
Esther9:18 Asi vaJudha vaiva paShushani vakaungana pazuva regumi namatatu napazuva regumi namana romwedzi iwoyo; nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi uyo vakazorora, vakariita zuva romutambo neromufaro." 
Esther9:19 Naizvozvo vaJudha vemisha, vanogara pamisha isina kukombwa namasvingo, vanoita zuva regumi namana romwedzi weAdhari zuva romufaro neromutambo, uye zuva rakanaka, nerokutumirana zvinonaka." 
Esther9:20 Zvino Modhekai akanyora zvinhu izvo, akatuma mwadhi kuvaJudha vose vakanga vari pamativi ose enyika yamambo Ahashivheroshi, pedo nokure," 
Esther9:21 akavaraira kuti varangarire zuva iro regumi namana romwedzi weAdhari, nezuva regumi namashanu rawo, gore rimwe nerimwe," 
Esther9:22 nokuti ndiwo mazuva vaJudha avakazorodzwa nawo pavavengi vavo, nomwedzi wavakashandurirwa nawo kuchema kwavo ukava mufaro, uye zuva rokuchema rikava zuva rakanaka; uye kuti vaaite mazuva omutambo noomufaro, nookutumirana zvinonaka uye zvipo kuvarombo." 
Esther9:23 VaJudha vakatenda kuita nomutowo wavakatanga nawo, sezvavakanyorerwa naModhekai;" 
Esther9:24 nokuti Hamani mwanakomana waHamedhata muAgagi, muvengi wavaJudha vose akanga afunga zano rokuparadza vaJudha, akakanda Puri, ndiyo mijenya, kuvapedza nokuvaparadza;" 
Esther9:25 asi shoko iri rakati richisvika kuna mambo, iye ndokuraira nemwadhi kuti zano iri rake rakaipa raakafunga pamusoro pavaJudha, ridzoserwe pamusoro wake, uye kuti iye navanakomana vake vasungirirwe pamatanda." 
Esther9:26 Naizvozvo vakatumidza zita ramazuva iwayo Purimi nezita rePuri. Zvino nokuda kwamashoko ose emwadhi iyo, nezvavakaona pamusoro pechinhu icho, nezvavakaitirwa," 
Esther9:27 vaJudha vakatema chirevo vakazvisunga, kuti ivo navana vavo, navose vaizozviisa kwavari, havangatongoregi kurangarira mazuva iwayo maviri, sezvakanga zvanyorwa pamusoro pawo, uye panguva yakanga yatarwa gore rimwe nerimwe;" 
Esther9:28 uye kuti mazuva iwayo arangarirwe nokutambwa pakati porudzi rumwe norumwe, nemhuri imwe neimwe, norutivi rumwe norumwe rwenyika neguta rimwe nerimwe; uye kuti mazuva iwayo ePurimi arege kutongoregwa pakati pavaJudha, arangarirwe nokusingaperi pakati pavana vavo." 
Esther9:29 papo vahosi Esiteri, mukunda waAbhihairi, naModhekai muJudha, vakanyora nesimba ravo rose vakasimbisa mwadhi iyo yechipiri yePurimi." 
Esther9:30 Akatuma mwadhi kuvaJudha, vose vakanga vari pamativi ane zana namakumi maviri namanomwe enyika yamambo Ahashivheroshi, akanga ana mashoko orugare nechokwadi," 
Esther9:31 kuzosimbisa mazuva iwayo ePurimi panguva dzawo dzakatarwa, sezvavakarairwa naModhekai muJudha navahosi Esiteri, uye sezvavakanga vazvisunga ivo navana vavo pamusoro peshoko rokutsanya nerokuchema kwavo." 
Esther9:32 Murayiro waEsiteri ukasimbisa mashoko iwayo ePurimi; zvikanyorwa mubhuku. 
Esther10:1 Zvino mambo Ahashivheroshi akateresa nyika, nezviwi zvegungwa." 
Esther10:2 Zvino mabasa ake ose echikuriri, nesimba rake, uye zvose zvoukuru hwaModhekai, hwaakakudzwa nahwo namambo, hazvina kunyorwa here pabhuku yaMakoronike amadzimambo eMedhia nePerisa?" 
Esther10:3 Nokuti Modhekai muJudha wakanga ari wechipiri paushe achitevera mambo Ahashivheroshi; aiva mukuru pakati pavaJudha, akadikamwa navazhinji vehama dzake; waitsvakira vanhu vake zvakanaka, achitaurira rudzi rwake rwose zvorugare." 
Job1:1 Kwakanga kuno munhu panyika yeUzi, ainzi Jobho; munhu uyu aka­nga akakwana, akarurama, aitya Mwari achinzvenga zvakaipa" 
Job1:2 Iye wakabereke­rwa vanakomana vanomwe navakunda vatatu. 
Job1:3 Uye fuma yake yakasvika ma­kwai ane zviuru zvinomwe, nemakamera zviuru zvitatu, nemombe dzakaringana majoko ana mazana mashanu, namakadzi embongoro ana mazana mashanu, nava­nhu vazhinji paimba yake; naizvozvo munhu uyu akanga ari mukuru pakati pavana vamabvazuva." 
Job1:4 Vanakomana vake vaisienda ku­ndoita mutambo paimba yomumwe no­mumwe wavo pazuva rake; vaituma kundodana hanzvadzi dzavo nhatu kuzo­dya nokumwa navo. 
Job1:5 Zvino kana ma­zuva okutamba kwavo apera Jobho ai­tuma nhume kuvadana vanatswe, zvino iye ndokumuka mangwanani, ndokupisa zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvaivaringanira vose; nokuti Jobho wakati, ""Zvimwe vanakomana vangu vakatadza, vaka­shora Mwari pamoyo yavo;"" Jobho aisidaro nguva dzose." 
Job1:6 Zvino rimwe zuva vanakomana va­Mwari vakati vachindomira pamberi pa­Jehovha, Satani akasvikawo pakati pavo." 
Job1:7 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, ""Wabve­piko?"" Satani akapindura Jehovha, akati, ""Ndabva pakupota-pota nenyika, napaku­famba-famba pairi.""" 
Job1:8 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, ""Wache­rekedza muranda wangu Jobho here? Nokuti hakuna munhu akafanana naye panyika, munhu akakwana, akarurama, anotya Mwari, achinzvenga zvakaipa.""" 
Job1:9 Ipapo Satani akapindura Jehovha, akati, ""Jobho anotya Mwari pasina here?" 
Job1:10 Hamuna kumupoteredza here noru­mhanda, iye neimba yake, nezvose zvaa­nazvo, pamativi ose? Makaropafadza ma­basa amaoko ake, uye fuma yake yakawanda panyika." 
Job1:11 Asi tambanudzai henyu ruoko rwenyu, zvino, murove zvose zvaanazvo, ipapo iye achakushorai pachena.""" 
Job1:12 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, ""Ta­rira, zvose zvaanazvo zviri paruoko rwako; asi usatambanudzira ruoko rwako kwaari."" Naizvozvo Satani akabva pa­mberi paJehovha." 
Job1:13 Zvino rimwe zuva vanakomana vake navanasikana vake vakati vachidya nokumwa waini paimba yomukuru wavo," 
Job1:14 nhume ikasvika kuna Jobho, ikati, ""Mombe dzakanga dzichirima, nembo­ngoro dzichichera kurutivi rwadzo," 
Job1:15 vaSabea vakadziwira, ndokudzitora, navafudziwo vakavauraya neminondo inopinza; ini ndoga ndakapukunyuka, ndauya kuzokuudzai.""" 
Job1:16 Iye akati achitaura, mumwe aka­svikawo, akati, ""Moto waMwari waka­bva kudenga, ukapisa makwai navafudzi, ukavapedza; ini ndoga ndapukunyuka, ndauya kuzokuudzai.""" 
Job1:17 Iye akati achitaura, mumwe aka­svikawo, akati, ""VaKaradhea vakaita ma­poka matatu, vakawira makamera, vakamatora, navafudziwo vakavauraya neminondo inopinza; ini ndoga ndapuku­nyuka, ndauya kuzokuudzai.""" 
Job1:18 Iye akati achitaura, mumwe aka­svikawo, akati, ""Vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vakanga vachidya nokumwa waini mumba momukuru wavo," 
Job1:19 dutu guru ndokubva kurutivi rwerenje, ndokurova pamusoro pavana, vakafa; ini ndoga ndapukunyuka, ndauya kuzokuudzai.""" 
Job1:20 Ipapo Jobho akasimuka, akabva­rura nguvo yake, akaveura vhudzi rake akazviwisira pasi, akanamata," 
Job1:21 akati, ""Ndakabuda mumimba mamai vangu ndiri musvi, ndichadzokerapo ndiri musvi; Jehovha wakapa, Jehovha waka­tora, zita raJehovha ngarikudzwe.""" 
Job1:22 pazvinhu izvi zvose Jobho haana kutadza, haana kuti Mwari akaita noupenzi." 
Job2:1 Zvino rimwe zuvazve vanakomana vaMwari vakati vachindomira pamberi paJehovha, Satani akasvikawo pakati pavo, akamira pamberi paJehovha." 
Job2:2 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, ""Wabvepiko?"" Satani akapindura Jehovha, akati, ""Ndabva pakupota-pota nenyika, napakufamba-famba pairi.""" 
Job2:3 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, ""Wacherekedza muranda wangu Jobho here? Nokuti hakuna munhu akafanana naye panyika, munhu akakwana, akarurama, anotya Mwari, achinzvenga zvakaipa; nazvino anorambira pakururama kwake, kunyange iwe wakandikurudzira kuti ndimuparadze asine mhaka.""" 
Job2:4 Satani akapindura Jehovha, akati, ""Ganda rinotsihwa neganda, zvose zvaanazvo munhu angazviisira upenyu hwake." 
Job2:5 Asi tambanudzai ruoko rwenyu zvino, murove mapfupa ake nenyama yake, ipapo achakushorai pachena.""" 
Job2:6 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, ""Tarira, iye ari paruoko rwako; asi koga urege upenyu hwake.""" 
Job2:7 Naizvozvo Satani akabva pamberi paJehovha, akarova Jobho namaronda akaipa, kubva patsoka dzake kusvikira pamusoro wake." 
Job2:8 Jobho akatora chaenga akazvikwenya nacho; akagara pasi pakati pamadota. 
Job2:9 Ipapo mukadzi wake akati kwaari, ""Ucharambira nazvino pakururama kwako here? Shora Mwari, ufe hako.""" 
Job2:10 Asi iye akati kwaari, ""Iwe unotaura sezvinotaura mumwe wavakadzi mapenzi. Tingagamuchira zvakanakacheteparuoko rwaMwari, tikasagamuchira zvakaipawo here?"" Pazvinhu izvi zvose Jobho haana kutadza nomuromo wake." 
Job2:11 Zvino shamwari nhatu dzaJobho dzakati dzichinzwa zvakaipa zvose zvakanga zvamuwira, dzikauya mumwe nomumwe achibva kwake, dzaiti Erifazi muTemani, naBhiridhadhi muShuhi, naZofari muNamati; vakatenderana kundomunzwira tsitsi nokumunyaradza." 
Job2:12 Zvino vakati vachitarira vachiri kure, vakasamuziva, vakachema kwazvo, mumwe nomumwe akabvarura nguvo yake, vakakushira guruva kudenga pamisoro yavo." 
Job2:13 Ipapo vakagara pasi naye mazuva manomwe nousiku hunomwe; asi hakuna nomumwe akataura naye kunyange shoko rimwe; nokuti vakaona kuti njodzi yake yakanga iri huru kwazvo. 
Job3:1 Shure kwaizvozvo Jobho wakashamisa muromo wake, akatuka zuva rake." 
Job3:2 Jobho akapindura akati," 
Job3:3 Zuva randakaberekwa naro ngarirove, Nousiku uhwo hwavakati, Mwana womukomana agamuchirwa.' """ 
Job3:4 Zuva iro ngarive rima; Mwari ari kumusoro ngaarege kurirangarira, Nechiedza ngachirege kurivhenekera." 
Job3:5 Rima nomumvuri worufu ngazviritore rive razvo; Gore ngarigare pamusoro paro; Zvose zvinosvibisa zuva ngazvirivhunduse. 
Job3:6 Kana huri vusiku uhwo, ngahubatwe nerima guru; Ngahurege kufara pakati pamazuva egore; Ngahurege kurahwa pakati pemwedzi." 
Job3:7 Usiku uhwo ngahurege kubereka; inzwi romufaro ngarirege kupinda mahuri. 
Job3:8 Vanotuka zuva iro ngavavutukewo, Ivo vanogona kumutsa shato huru." 
Job3:9 Nyeredzi dzamambakwedza ahwo ngadzisvibe; Ngahumirire chiedza, asi huchishaiwe; Ngaurege kuona fungiro dzameso amangwanani;" 
Job3:10 Zvahusina kupfiga mikova yemimba yamai vangu, Kana kuvanza kutambudzika pameso angu." 
Job3:11 Ndakaregereiko kufa ndichiri mumimba? Ndakaregerei kuparara ndichibuda mudumbu," 
Job3:12 Mabvi akandigamuchirireiko? Kana mazamu, kuti ndimwe?" 
Job3:13 Nokuti ndingadai zvino ndakatandavara, ndinyerere; Ndingadai ndivete; ipapo ndingadai ndazorora;" 
Job3:14 Pamwechete namadzimambo namakurukota enyika Vakazvivakira matongo; 
Job3:15 Kana namachinda, aiva nendarama, Akazadza dzimba dzawo nesirivha;" 
Job3:16 Kana ndingadai ndisina kuvapo somwana akaponiwa nguva isina kusvika; Savacheche vasina kutongoona chiedza. 
Job3:17 Vakaipa vanorega kutambudza kwavo ipapo; Vakaneta vanozorora ipapo. 
Job3:18 Vasungwa vanorugare pamwechete ipapo; Havanzwi inzwi romutariri. 
Job3:19 Vaduku navakuru varipo; Uye muranda akasununguka panatenzi wake. 
Job3:20 Munhu ari panjodzi anopirweiko chiedza, Noupenyu kuno ane shungu pamoyo;" 
Job3:21 Avo vanoshuva rufu, asi haruuyi; Vanoruchera kupfuura fuma yakavanzwa pasi;" 
Job3:22 Vanopembera kwazvo, Nokufara, kana vachiwana hwiro?" 
Job3:23 Munhu, akadzimira nzira yake, anopirweiko upenyu, Iye akadzivirirwa norumhanda naMwari?" 
Job3:24 Nokuti ndinogomera ndisati ndadya, Kuvuvura kwangu kunodururwa semvura." 
Job3:25 Nokuti chinhu chandaitya chandiwira, Nechandinozeza chandivinga." 
Job3:26 Handina mufaro, kana kunyarara, kana kuzorora; Asi njodzi inongosiuya." 
Job4:1 Ipapo Erifazi muTemani akapindura, akati," 
Job4:2 Kana munhu akaidza kutaurirana newe, iwe uchava neshungu here? Asi ndiani angazvidzora, akasataura hake?" 
Job4:3 Tarira, iwe wakadzidzisa vazhinji, Iwe wakasimbisa maoko akashaiwa simba." 
Job4:4 Mashoko ako akatsigira akanga achivavarira kuwa, Iwe wakasimbisa mabvi akanga achigweda-gweda." 
Job4:5 Asi zvino zvasvika kwauri, iwe woshaiwa simba, Zvakubata, zvino wotambudzika." 
Job4:6 Ko kutya kwako Mwari harizi simba rako here? Kururama kwenzira dzako haizi tariro yako here? 
Job4:7 Rangarira hako, ndianiko asine mhaka akatongoparara? Kana vakarurama vakatongoparadzwa papi?" 
Job4:8 Sezvandakaona ini, vanhu, vanorimira zvakaipa Navanodzvara zvakashata, ndivo vanokohwawo izvozvo." 
Job4:9 Vanoparadzwa nomweya waMwari, Vanopedzwa nokufema kokutsamwa kwake." 
Job4:10 Kunduruma kweshumba nenzwi reshumba inehasha, Nameno evana veshumba anoparadzwa." 
Job4:11 Shumba, yakwegura, inofa nokushaiwa zvingabata; Navana veshumbakadzi vanoparadzirwa." 
Job4:12 Zvino ndakaziviswa shoko rakavanda; Nzeve yangu yakanzwa zeve-zeve raro. 
Job4:13 Pandangariro dzinobva pane zvinoonekwa usiku, Kana vanhu vabatwa nehope huru;" 
Job4:14 Kutya nokubvunda kwakandiwira, Kwakabvundisa mapfupa angu ose." 
Job4:15 Ipapo mweya wakapfuura pamberi pechiso changu; Mvere dzenyama yangu dzikasimuka. 
Job4:16 Wakamira, asi ndakanga ndisingagoni kuona kuti akadini; Mufananidzo wangu wakanga uri pamberi pameso angu; Kunyarara kukavapo, ndikanzwa inzwi richiti," 
Job4:17 ‘Ko munhu, anofa, angakunda Mwari pakururama here? Ko munhu angakunda Muiti wake pakunaka here?" 
Job4:18 Tarirai, haatendi varanda vake; Vatumwa vake anovapa mhaka achiti mapenzi;" 
Job4:19 Ndoda vanogara mudzimba dzevhu, Nheyo dzadzo dzakateyiwa paguruva, Dzinopwanyiwa sezvifusi." 
Job4:20 Vanoparadzwa pakati pamagwanani namadekwana; Vanoparara nokusingaperi, pasina munhu ane hanya nazvo." 
Job4:21 Ko bote retende ravo harina kuvhomorwa pamwechete navo here? Vanofa vasina uchenjeri.' 
Job5:1 Zvino chidana hako; panomumwe angakupindura here? 
Job5:2 Nokuti kutsamwa kunouraya benzi, Uye shungu dzinoparadza asina zivo." 
Job5:3 Ndakaona benzi richiita midzi; Asi pakarepo ndakatuka nzvimbo yaro. 
Job5:4 Vana varo havatongoponeswi, Vanopwanyiwa musuo; Hapana anovarwira." 
Job5:5 Zvaakacheka zvinodyiwa navane nzara, Vanozvitora kunyange napakati pemhinzwa; Vane nyota vanomwa fuma yavo." 
Job5:6 Nokuti kutambudzika hakubudi paguruva. Uye nhamo haibvi pasi. 
Job5:7 Asi munhu anoberekerwa nhamo, Sebaribari dzomoto dzinokwira kumusoro." 
Job5:8 Asi kana ndirini, ndaitsvaka Mwari, Ndaiisa mhosva yangu kuna Mwari;" 
Job5:9 Iye anoita zvinhu zvikuru zvisinganzverwi; Zvinhu zvinoshamisa zvisingaverengwi; 
Job5:10 Iye anonisa mvura panyika, Anotuma mvura paminda;" 
Job5:11 Ndiye anokwiridza vakaderera; Vanochema vanokundiswa. 
Job5:12 Anokanganisa mano avanyengeri, Maoko avo arege kuita zvavakanga vachida kuita." 
Job5:13 Vakachenjera anovabata pamano avo, Nokurangana kwavasakarurama kunoputsirwa pasi." 
Job5:14 Vanosangana nerima masikati. Vanotsvanzvadzira masikati makuru sapausiku. 
Job5:15 Asi iye anorwira paminondo yemiromo yavo, Anorwira anoshaiwa pamaoko avane simba." 
Job5:16 Saka murombo ane tariro, Kuipa kunozvifumbira murumo." 
Job5:17 Tarirai, munhu, anorairwa naMwari, ano mufaro; Saka usazvidza kuranga kowaMasimbaose." 
Job5:18 Nokuti iye anokuvadza, ndokusungazve vanga, Unopwanya, maoko ake ndokupodzazve." 
Job5:19 Iye achakurwira panjodzi nhanhatu; Kunyange panomwe hakuna chakaipa chingakubata. 
Job5:20 Panzara achakudzikunura parufu; Napakurwa achakudzikunura pasimba romunondo. 
Job5:21 Iwe uchavanziwa pakurohwa norurimi; Haungatyi kuparadza kana kuchisvika. 
Job5:22 Uchaseka kuparadza nokushaiwa; Haungatyi zvikara zvenyika. 
Job5:23 Nokuti iwe uchaita sungano namabwe esango; Zvikara zvesango zvichaita rugare newe. 
Job5:24 Iwe uchaziva kuti tende rako rino rugare; Uchandotarira zvipfuwo zvako, ukasashaiwa chimwe chazvo." 
Job5:25 Uchazivawo kuti vana vako vachawanda, Navazukuru vako vachaita souswa bwenyika." 
Job5:26 Uchasvika pahwiro hwako wakwegura kwazvo, Sechisote chezviyo chinosvika panguva yacho." 
Job5:27 Tarira izvozvi takazvinzvera, ndizvozvo; Chizvinzwa, uzvizive iwe umene." 
Job6:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura, akati," 
Job6:2 Haiwa, dai kutambudzika kwangu kwaiyerwa, Nenjodzi dzangu dzaivunganidzirwa pachiyero!" 
Job6:3 Nokuti zvino zvairema kupfuura jecha ramakungwa; Naizvozvo mashoko angu aiva okuvhurumuka. 
Job6:4 Nokuti miseve yoWamasimba yakandibaya mukati mangu, Mweya wangu unomwa uturu hwayo; Zvinotyisa zvaMwari zvazvigadzirira kurwa neni." 
Job6:5 Ko mbizi ingachema kana ine bumhudza here? Ko nzombe ingakuma pazvokudya zvayo here? 
Job6:6 Ko chisinganaki chingadyiwa chisino munyu here? Ko zvichena zvezai zvinozipa here? 
Job6:7 Mweya wangu unoramba kuzvibata; Kwandiri zvakafanana nezvokudya zvinosemesa. 
Job6:8 Haiwa! Dai ndaipiwa zvandinokumbira; Dai Mwari aindipa zvandinoshuva. 
Job6:9 Dai Mwari aitenda hake kundipwanya, Dai aitambanudza hake ruoko rwake, akandiparadza." 
Job6:10 Ipapo ndainyaradzwa hangu; Zvirokwazvo ndaifara pakurwadziwa kusine tsitsi; Nokuti handina kuramba mashoko oMutsvene. 
Job6:11 Simba rangu ndereiko, randingamirira naro rufu? Mugumo wangu ndoweiko, kuti nditsungirire?" 
Job6:12 Simba rangu rakafanana neramabwe here? Nyama yangu indarira kanhi? 
Job6:13 Handizinoshaiwa rubatsiro mukati mangu here? Uchenjeri kwahwo hahuzadzingwa chose kwandiri here? 
Job6:14 Munhu, anorwisa kuziya, anofara kuitirwa nyasha neshamwari dzake; Angazorega kutya waMasimbaose." 
Job6:15 Hama dzangu dzakaita nokusatendeka sorukova, Sokuyerera kwehova dzinopfuura;" 
Job6:16 Dzakasviba nokuda kwamazaya echando, Uye panovanda chando;" 
Job6:17 Kana zuva ropisa, dzonyangarika; Kana kopisa dzinopedzwa panzvimbo yadzo." 
Job6:18 Vafambi vanofamba nenzira yadzo vanotsauka, Vanokwira kurenje ndokuparara" 
Job6:19 Vafambi veTema vakatarira, Mapoka eShebha akadzimirira." 
Job6:20 Vanonyadziswa nokuti vakanga vane tariro; Vakasvikapo vakakanganiswa. 
Job6:21 Nokuti zvino hamuzi chinhu; Munoona chinotyisa, ndokutya." 
Job6:22 Ko ndakati, `Ndipei here?' Kana, `Ndivigirei chipo chinobva pafuma yenyu here?'" 
Job6:23 Kana, `Ndirwirei paruoko rwomudzivisi here?' Kana, `Ndidzikunurei paruoko rwavamanikidzi here?'" 
Job6:24 Ndidzidzisei, ndinyarare hangu; Mundidudzire pandatadza." 
Job6:25 Mashoko akarurama ane simba sei! Asi kutuka kwenyu kunotukeiko? 
Job6:26 Munofunga kutuka mashoko here? Nokuti mashoko omunhu, arasha moyo, anotorwa nemhepo." 
Job6:27 Zvirokwazvo munoda kukanda mijenya pamusoro penherera isina baba, Munoda kutengesa shamwari yenyu." 
Job6:28 Naizvozvo zvino chindonditarirai henyu; Nokuti zvirokwazvo handingarevi nhema pamberi penyu. 
Job6:29 Dzokai henyu, ndizvo zvandinokumbira, kusarurama kurege kuvapo, Dzokai henyu, mhaka yangu yakarurama." 
Job6:30 Parurimi rwangu panokusarurama here? Kuravira kwangu hakungasaruri zvinhu zvakashata here? 
Job7:1 Ko munhu haatambudziki here pabasa panyika? Mazuva ake haana kufanana namazuva omubatiri here? 
Job7:2 Somuranda anoshuva mumvuri, Nomubatiri anotarira mubairo wake;" 
Job7:3 Saizvozvo ini ndakapiwa mwedzi isina maturo, Ndakatarirwa usiku bwenjodzi." 
Job7:4 Kana ndovata, ndinoti, ""Ndichamuka rinhiko?"" Asi usiku hwakareba; Ndinoramba ndichishanduka-shanduka kusvikira koedza." 
Job7:5 Nyama yangu yakafukidzwa nehonye namavhinga evhu., Ganda rangu rinofunuka, richiputika hurwa." 
Job7:6 Mazuva angu anokunda chirukiso chomuruki pakukurumidza, Anopera ndisine tariro." 
Job7:7 Rangarirai henyu kuti upenyu hwangu imhepo hayo; Ziso rangu harichazooni zvakanaka. 
Job7:8 Ziso romunhu unondiona harichazonditaririzve; Meso ako achanditarira, asi handichazovepo." 
Job7:9 Sokupera kwegore nokunyangarika kwaro, Saizvozvo munhu, anoburukira kuSheori, haangazokwirizve." 
Job7:10 Haangazodzokeri kumba kwake, Nenzvimbo yake haingazomuzivi" 
Job7:11 Saka handinganyarari nomuromo wangu; Ndichataura pakutambudzika komweya wangu; Ndichanyunyuta neshungu dzangu dzomoyo. 
Job7:12 Ndiri gungwa kanhi, kana zimhuka regungwa, Zvamunoisa vanondirindira?" 
Job7:13 Kana ndikati, ""nhovo yangu ichandinyaradza, Mubhedha wangu uchazorodza kunyunyuta" 
Job7:14 Ipapo mondivhundusa nokurota hope, Mondityisa nezvandinoona;" 
Job7:15 Naizvozvo moyo wangu unotsaura kudzipwa,Nokufa kupfuura mapfupa angu awa." 
Job7:16 Ndinosema upenyu hwangu; handidi kurarama nokusingaperi; Ndiregei; nokuti mazuva angu akafanana nokufema. 
Job7:17 Munhu chinyiko, zvamunomukudza, Nokumuda nomoyo wenyu wose," 
Job7:18 Zvamunomushanyira mangwanani ose Nokumuidza nguva dzose? 
Job7:19 Mucharega rinhiko kundicherekedza, Nokundirega kusvikira ndamedza mate angu?" 
Job7:20 Kana ndichinge ndatadza, ndingakuiteiko imi, mucherekedzi wavanhu? Makandiitireiko chinhu chamunovavarira, Kuti lni ndizviremekedze." 
Job7:21 Munoregereiko kukangamwira kudarika kwangu, nokubvisa kutadza kwangu? Nokuti zvino ndichavata pasi muguruva; Muchanditsvaka zvikuru, asi handichazovepo." 
Job8:1 Ipapo Bhiridhadhi muShuhi akapindura akati," 
Job8:2 Ucharamba uchitaura mashoko awa kusvikira rinhiko? 
Job8:3 Ko Mwari angakanganisa pakutonga here WaMasimbaose angakanganisa zvakarurama here? 
Job8:4 Kana vana vako vakanga vamutadzira iye, Akavaisa pakudarika kwavo;" 
Job8:5 Kana iwe ukashingaira kutsvaka Mwari, Ukakumbira kuna waMasimbaose;" 
Job8:6 Kana ukava akanaka, akaruruma; Iye angadai aimuka zvino nokuda kwako, Akafambisa zvakanaka imba yako yakarurama." 
Job8:7 Kunyange kutanga kwako kwaiva kuduku, Asi kuguma kwako kwaiva kukuru kwazvo." 
Job8:8 Nokuti chidobvunza hako rudzi rwakare, Ucherekedze zvakanzverwa namadzibaba avo." 
Job8:9 (Nokuti isu tiri vazuro hedu, hatizivi chinhu; Nokuti mazuva edu panyika akafanana nomumvuri;)" 
Job8:10 Ivo havangakudzidzisi here, nokukuudza, Nokureva mashoko anobva pamoyo yavo here?" 
Job8:11 Ko nhokwe ingamera pasine nhope here? Ko rutsanga rungamera pasine mvura here? 
Job8:12 Ruchiri runyoro, rusati rwatemwa, Runosvava mimwe miriwo ichigere." 
Job8:13 Ndizvo zvakaita nzira dzavose vanokangamwa Mwari; Uye tariro yomunhu asingadi Mwari ichapera; 
Job8:14 Chaakatarira chichaputsanyiwa, Chaakatenda chakafanana namambure edandemutande" 
Job8:15 Uchasendamira paimba yake, asi haingamiri; Uchaibata, asi haingagari." 
Job8:16 Iye muti mutema pamushana, Matavi ake anotandavarira pamunda wake." 
Job8:17 Midzi yake yakapombera patsime, Unoona nzvimbo yorukangarabwe." 
Job8:18 Kana akaparadzwa panzvimbo yake, Ichamuramba, ichiti, ""Handina kukuona,""" 
Job8:19 Tarira, ndiwo mufaro wenzira yake; Paguruva panobuda vamwe." 
Job8:20 Tarira, Mwari haangarashi munhu wakarurama, Haangabatsiri vanoita zvakaipa." 
Job8:21 Achazozadza hake muromo wako nokuseka, Nemiromo yako nokupururudza." 
Job8:22 Vanokuvenga vachafukidza nokunyara; Uye tende ravakaipa haringazovipo. 
Job9:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura, akati," 
Job9:2 Zvirokwazvo ndinoziva kuti ndizvo, Nokuti munhu angava akarurama pamberi paMwari seiko?""" 
Job9:3 Kana iye akada kuita nharo naye, Haangagoni kumupindura shoko rimwe pamashoko ane zviuru." 
Job9:4 Iye anomoyo wakangwara, une simba guru; Ndianiko akamuomesera moyo wake, akazofara?" 
Job9:5 Iye anobvisa makomo, iwo asingazvizivi, Kana achiashandura pakutsamwa kwake." 
Job9:6 Iye anozunungusa nyika ikabva panzvimbo yayo, Mbiru dzayo dzinodengenyeka." 
Job9:7 Iye anoraira zuva, rikarega kubuda; Iye anodzitira nyeredzi." 
Job9:8 Iye oga anotatamura denga, Anotsika pamusoro pamafungu" 
Job9:9 Iye anoita nyeredzi dzeAkituro, nedzeOrinoni, nedzeChimutanhatu, Namakamuri enyasi." 
Job9:10 Iye anoita zvinhu zvikuru zvisinganzverwi, Izvo zvinhu zvinoshamisa, zvisingagoni kuverengwa." 
Job9:11 Tarira, anopfuura pedo neni, ndisingamuoni; Anopfuurawo hake, asi handimuoni." 
Job9:12 Tarira, anotora hake, ndiani angamudzivisa? Ndiani angati kwaari, ""Unoiteiko?""" 
Job9:13 Mwari haangadzori kutsamwa kwake; Vabatsiri vaRahabhi vakakotamira pasi pake. 
Job9:14 Ko zvino ini ndichamupindura seiko, Nditsaure mashoko angu ndiite nharo naye?" 
Job9:15 Kunyange ndaiva akarurama handizaimupindura; Ndaikumbira nyasha kumutongi wangu. 
Job9:16 Kana ndichinge ndadana, akandipindura, Kunyange zvakadaro handizaitenda kuti akanzwa inzwi rangu." 
Job9:17 Nokuti anondiputsa nedutu remhepo, Anowanza mavanga angu ndisine mhosva hangu." 
Job9:18 Handitenderi kutema mweya wangu, Asi anondizadza nezvinovava." 
Job9:19 Kana riri simba guru, tarira, iye anaro! Kana iri mhosva inotongwa, ndiani achanditarira nguva?" 
Job9:20 Kunyange ndaiva akarurama hangu, muromo wangu umene uchandipa mhaka; Kunyange ndaiva akakwana, iye aiti handina kururama." 
Job9:21 Ndakakwana hangu, handizvirangariri; Ndinozvidza upenyu hwangu." 
Job9:22 Zvose zvakafanana hazvo; saka ndinoti, ""Iye anoparadza vakarurama navakaipa vose.""" 
Job9:23 Kana nyatwa ichinge yauraya nokukurumidza, Iye achaseka njodzi yavasina mhosva." 
Job9:24 Nyika yakaiswa mumaoko avakaipa; Iye anofukidza meso avatongi vayo; Kana asiri iye, zvino ndianiko?" 
Job9:25 Zvino mazuva angu anokurumidza kupfuura mumhanyi; Anotiza asina kuona zvakanaka. 
Job9:26 Apfuura sezvikepe zvinomhanyisa; Segondo rinokurumidzira chiurawa. 
Job9:27 Kana ndikati, ""Ndichakangamwa kunyunyuta kwangu, Ndicharega chiso changu chinopunyaira, ndifare hangu.""" 
Job9:28 Ndinotya njodzi dzangu dzose, Ndinoziva kuti hamungati handine mhosva." 
Job9:29 Ndichapiwa mhosva; Zvino ndinotamburireiko zvisina maturo? 
Job9:30 Kana ndikangura nemvura yechando, Ndikachenesa maoko angu kwazvo;" 
Job9:31 Kunyange zvakadaro imwi mungandinyudza mumatope, Nenguvo dzangu dzichandisema." 
Job9:32 Nokuti iye haazi munhu akafanana neni, kuti ndimupindure, Kuti tikwirirane pakutonga." 
Job9:33 Hakuna mununuri pakati pedu, Ungatibata tose noruoko rwake." 
Job9:34 Ngaabvise shamhu yake kwandiri, hasha dzake dzirege kundityisa;" 
Job9:35 Ipapo ndaitaura, ndisingamutyi; Nokuti handizakadaro hangu." 
Job10:1 moyo wangu waneta noupenyu hwangu; Handingazvidzori pakunyunyuta kwangu; Ndichataura neshungu dzomoyo wangu. 
Job10:2 Ndichati kuna Mwari, ""Musandipa mhosva."" Ndiratidzei kuti munorwa neni nemhaka yeiko?" 
Job10:3 Zvinokufadzai here kumanikidza, Nokuzvidza basa ramaoko enyu, Muchivhenekera kurangana kwavakaipa here?" 
Job10:4 Munameso enyama here, Kana munoona somunhu here?" 
Job10:5 Mazuva enyu akafanana namazuva omunhu here, Kana makore enyu namakore omunhu here?" 
Job10:6 Zvamunobvunza zvakaipa zvangu, Nokunzvera zvivi zvangu," 
Job10:7 Kunyange muchiziva kuti handizi wakaipa; Uye kuti hakuna anogona kurwira paruoko rwenyu here? 
Job10:8 Maoko enyu akandiita nokundiumba, Nhivi dzangu dzose; kunyange zvakadaro moda kundiparadza." 
Job10:9 Rangarirai, ndizvo zvandinokumbira, kuti makandiumba sevhu; Zvino muchandidzosera kuguruva here?" 
Job10:10 Hamuna kundidurura somukaka here, Nokundikodza somukaka wakafa?" 
Job10:11 Makandifadza neganda nenyama, Mukandisunganidza namapfupa namarunda." 
Job10:12 Makandipa upenyu netsitsi, Hanya dzenyu dzakachengeta mweya wangu." 
Job10:13 Asi makavanza zvinhu izvi mumoyo menyu; Ndinoziva kuti chinhu ichi chaiva nemwi kare. 
Job10:14 Kana ndikatadza munondicherekedza, Hamudi kundikangamwira kudarika kwangu." 
Job10:15 Kana ndiri wakaipa, ndine nhamo; Kana ndiri wakarurama, kunyange zvakadaro handingasimudzi musoro wangu; Zvandizere nokunyadzwa Ndichangotarira kutambudzika kwangu." 
Job10:16 Kana ndikazvikudza, munondironda seshumba; Munopamhazve kundishamisa nesimba renyu." 
Job10:17 Munowedzera zvapupu zvenyu kuzorwa neni, Nokuwanza kutsamwa kwenyu pamusoro pangu; Kushanduka nehondo zvineni." 
Job10:18 Makandibudisireiko pachizvaro chamai? Ndingadai ndaifira hangumo, ndisati ndaonekwa neziso romunhu." 
Job10:19 Ndaiita hangu sendisina kuvapo; Ndaitakurirwa kuhwiro ndichibva pachizvaro chamai. 
Job10:20 Ko mazuva angu haazi mashoma here? Zvino gumai, Ndiregei henyu, kuti ndizorore zvishoma," 
Job10:21 Ndisati ndaenda kwandisingazodzoki, Kunyika yerima nomumvuri worufu;" 
Job10:22 Iyo nyika yerima guru, rima chairo; Nyika yomumvuri worufu, panokukanganiswa, Ipapo chiedza chakafanana nerima." 
Job11:1 Ipapo Zofari muNaamati akapindura, akati," 
Job11:2 Ko mashoko mazhinji akadai haangapindurwi here? Munhu anoshoshoma angaruramisirwa here? 
Job11:3 Manyawi ako angafanira kunyaradza vanhu here? Kana uchidadira, hakuna ungakunyadza here?" 
Job11:4 Nokuti iwe unoti, ""Zvandinoparidza ndezvechokwadi, Ndakachena pamberi penyu.""" 
Job11:5 Asi, haiwa! Dai Mwari hake achitaura, Ashamise miromo yake pamusoro pako;" 
Job11:6 Akuratidze zvakavanzwa zvokungwara, Kuti kuna mativi mazhinji. Uzive naizvozvo kuti Mwari anokangamwira zvimwe zvakaipa zvako." 
Job11:7 Unganzwisisa zvakadzika zvaMwari here? Ungakwanisa kunzwisisa iye waMasimbaose here? 
Job11:8 Zvakakwirira sokudenga; iwe ungaiteiko? Zvakadzika kupfuura hwiro; iwe ungaziveiko? 
Job11:9 Kureba kwazvo kunopfuura nyika, Uye upamhi hwazvo hunopfuura gungwa." 
Job11:10 Kana iye akapfuura, akapfigira mitongo, Akakokera vanhu kukutongwa, ndiani angamudzivisa?" 
Job11:11 Nokuti iye anoziva vanhu venhema; Anoonawo zvakaipa, kunyange asingazvifungi." 
Job11:12 Asi munhu asakachenjera anoshaiwa kunzwisisa, Zvirokwazvo, munhu anozvarwa semhuru yembizi." 
Job11:13 Kana iwe ukaruramisa moyo wako, Ukatambanudzira maoko ako kwaari;" 
Job11:14 Kana zvakaipa zviri muruoko rwako, uzviise kure, Kusarurama ngakurege kugara mumatende ako;" 
Job11:15 Zvirokwazvo ipapo ungasimudza chiso chako, usine gwapa, Zvirokwazvo, uchasimba, usingatyi, chinhu." 
Job11:16 Nokuti uchakangamwa njodzi yako, Uchairangarira semvura yapfuura;" 
Job11:17 Upenyu hwako huchavara kupfuura masikati makuru; Kunyange kune rima, kuchava samangwanani." 
Job11:18 Iwe uchasimba pamoyo, nokuti tariro ichavapo; Zvirokwazvo, ucharingaringa ndokuzorora hako wakachengetwa." 
Job11:19 Uchavata hako pasi, hakuna angakutyisa; Zvirokwazvo, vazhinji vachatsvaka kukufadza." 
Job11:20 Asi meso avakaipa achapera nokutarira, Vachashaiwa pokutizirapo, Tariro yavo ichava yokufa." 
Job12:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura, akati," 
Job12:2 Zvirokwazvo, imwi muri vanhu vakangwara, Kungwara kuchafa pamwechete nemi.""" 
Job12:3 Asi ini ndine njerewo semi; Handizi muduku kwamuri, Zvirokwazvo, ndianiko asingazivi zvinhu zvakadai?" 
Job12:4 Ndakafanana nomunhu anosekwa nowaanogara naye, Munhu akadana kuna Mwari, iye akamupindura; Munhu wakarurama, akakwana, ndiye wosekwa." 
Job12:5 Munhu anogara akafara hake anoshora pamifungo yake munhu uri panjodzi. Kushorwa kunogarira vanhu vanotedzemuka norutsoka rwavo. 
Job12:6 Matende amakororo anofara hawo, Avo vanotsamwisa Mwari vanogara havo zvakanaka; Ivo vanozadzirwa ruoko rwavo naMwari." 
Job12:7 Asi bvunzai henyu zvino mhuka, dzichakudzidzisai Neshiri dzokudenga, dzichakuudzai;" 
Job12:8 Kana taurai henyu nenyika, ichakudzidzisai; Nehove dzegungwa dzichakuparidzirai." 
Job12:9 Ndianiko asingazivi pazvinhu izvi zvose, Kuti ndirwo ruoko rwaJehovha rwakaita izvi zvose?" 
Job12:10 Mweya wezvipenyu zvose uri muruoko rwake, Nokufema kwavanhu vose." 
Job12:11 Ko nzeve haiidzi mashoko, Somukamwa unoravira zvokudya here?" 
Job12:12 Vatana ndivo vakangwara, Vana mazuva mazhinji ndivo vanonzwisisa." 
Job12:13 Iye ndiye anokungwara nesimba, Ndiye anamano nokunzwisisa." 
Job12:14 Tarirai, iye anokoromora, hazvingavakwizve; Iye anopfigira munhu, haangazozarurirwi." 
Job12:15 Tarirai, iye anodzivisa mvura, ndokupwa kwayo; Uye anoitumazve, ndokushandura kwayo nyika." 
Job12:16 Iye ane simba nokungwara kukuru; Akanyengerwa nounonyengera ndavake vose. 
Job12:17 Unokanganisa mano amanevanje, Vatongi anovaita mapenzi." 
Job12:18 Anosunungura simba ramadzimambo, Ndokusunga zviuno zvavo negwarada." 
Job12:19 Anotorera vaprista ukuru hwavo, Nokukunda vane simba." 
Job12:20 Anotorera vakatenda mashoko avo, Nokubvisira vakuru kunzwisisa" 
Job12:21 Anodurura kushoora kwake pamusoro pamachinda, Nokusunungura bhanhire ravane simba." 
Job12:22 Anofukura zvinhu zvakadzika parima, Anobudisira kuchiedza mumvuri worufu." 
Job12:23 Anowanza ndudzi, ndokudziparadza, Anoparadzira ndudzi kose, ndokudzitapa." 
Job12:24 Anobvisa kunzwisisa kwavakuru vavanhu venyika, Anovadzungairisa murenje musine nzira." 
Job12:25 Vanotsvangadzira murima vasina chiedza, Anovadzengedzekesa somunhu akabatwa." 
Job13:1 Tarirai, ziso rangu rakaona izvi zvose, Nzeve yangu yakazvinzwa nokuzvinzwisisa." 
Job13:2 Zvamunoziva imi, ndinozvizivawo; Handizi muduku kwamuri." 
Job13:3 Zvirokwazvo, ndinoda kutaura nowaMasimbaose, Ndinoda kuzvidavira kuna Mwari." 
Job13:4 Asi imwi munofukidza zvose nenhema dzenyu, imwi mose muri n'anga dzisina maturo." 
Job13:5 Haiwa! Dai muchinyarara mose! Ndiko kwaiva kungwara kwenyu! 
Job13:6 Zvino chinzwai kuzvidavira kwangu, Teererai munzwe ndichizvirevera nemiromo yangu." 
Job13:7 Munoda kurwira Mwari muchitaura zvisakarurama here? Nokureva zvinonyengera nokuda kwake here? 
Job13:8 Munoda kuva nehanya naye here? Munoda kurwira Mwari kanhi? 
Job13:9 Ko zvakanaka kana iye achikunzverai here? imwi mungamunyengera, sezvamunganyengera munhu here?" 
Job13:10 Zvirokwazvo iye achakutukai, Kana mukava nehanya pakavanda." 
Job13:11 Ukuru hwake haungakutyisiyi here? Haangakutyisiyi zvikuru here? 
Job13:12 Mashoko enyu enjere ishumo dzamadota, Nhare dzenyu inhare dzevhu." 
Job13:13 Nyararai, ndiregei nditaure, Ndiwirwe hangu nezvandingawirwa nazvo." 
Job13:14 Ndicharumireiko nyama yangu nameno angu, Nokubata upenyu hwangu muruoko rwangu?" 
Job13:15 Kunyange akandiuraya hake, ndichamumirira hangu; Kunyange zvakadaro ndichazvidavirira hangu pamberi pake pamusoro pomufambiro wangu." 
Job13:16 Ndirwowo ruchava ruponeso rwangu, Kuti munhu asingatendi Mwari haangasviki pamberi pake." 
Job13:17 Inzwai zvakanaka kutaura kwangu, Kuparidza kwangu kupinde nzeve dzenyu." 
Job13:18 Tarirai zvino, ndarongedza mhaka yangu; Ndinoziva kuti ndicharuramisirwa." 
Job13:19 Ndianiko achaita nharo neni? Nokuti zvino ndinganyarara hangu, ndikafa." 
Job13:20 Asi regai henyu kundiitira zvinhu zviviri, Ipapo handingavandi pamberi penyu;" 
Job13:21 Bvisai ruoko rwenyu kure neni; Kutyisa kwenyu kurege kundivhundusa. 
Job13:22 Ipapo mudane imi, ini ndichapindura; Kana ini nditaure hangu, imwi mundipindure." 
Job13:23 Zvakaipa zvangu nezvivi zvangu zvinganiko? Ndizivisei kudarika kwangu nechivi changu. 
Job13:24 Munovanzireiko chiso chenyu, Muchiti ndiri muvengi wenyu?" 
Job13:25 Munoda kuvhundusa shizha rinopepereswa here? Munoda kudzingana namakoto akaoma here? 
Job13:26 Munotonga zvinhu zvinovava pamusoro pangu, Munondidyisa nhaka yezvakaipa Zvujaya hwangu;" 
Job13:27 Munomana makumbo angu mumatanda, nokucherekedza nzira dzangu dzose; Munotarira tsoka dzamakumbo angu muganhu;" 
Job13:28 Kunyange ndakafanana nechinhu chakaora chinopera, Senguvo yapedzwa nezvifusi." 
Job14:1 Munhu akazvarwa nomukadzi anamazuva mashoma, azere nokutambudzika." 
Job14:2 Anobuda seruva, ndokusvava; Anotizawo somumvuri, haagari." 
Job14:3 Ko munotarira munhu akadai nameso enyu, Muchinditonga here?" 
Job14:4 Ndianiko angabudisa chinhu chakanaka pane chakaipa? Hakuna. 
Job14:5 Mazuva ake zvaakatarwa, mwedzi yake yakaverengwa nemi, Makamutarira miganho yaasingatenderwi kudarika;" 
Job14:6 Regai kumucherekedza, azorore, Kusvikira apedza zuva rake somubatiri." 
Job14:7 Nokuti kana muti uchinge watemwa, kune tariro kuti uchabudazve, Uye kuti davi rawo nyoro haringaperi." 
Job14:8 Kunyange mudzi wawo ukakwegurira muvhu, Nehunde yawo ikafa pasi;" 
Job14:9 Kunyange zvakadaro uchabukira kana wanzwa kunhuhwira kwemvura, Ndokubudisa matavi somuti muduku." 
Job14:10 Asi munhu anofa, akaparara hake; Zvirokwazvo munhu anorega kufema, zvino aripiko?" 
Job14:11 Mvura inopera pagungwa, Uye rwizi runopera nokupwa;" 
Job14:12 Saizvozvo munhu anovata pasi, akasamukazve; Havazomukizve kusvikira denga rapera, Havangamutswi pahope dzavo." 
Job14:13 Dai muchindivanza henyu paSheori, Muchindichengeta pakavanda, kusvikira hasha dzenyu dzapfuura, Munditemere nguva yakatarwa, yamungandirangarira nayo." 
Job14:14 Kana munhu achinge afa, angararamazve here? Ndaimira hangu mazuva ose okutambudzika kwangu, Kusvikira kusunungurwa kwangu kuchisvika." 
Job14:15 Maizodana, ini ndikakupindurai; Maishuva basa ramaoko enyu." 
Job14:16 Asi zvino munoverenga nhambwe dzangu; 
Job14:17 Kudarika kwangu kwakasungirwa muhombodo, Munosunga zvakaipa zvangu." 
Job14:18 Gomo kana richiwa zvirokwazvo rinopfupfunyuka, Uye dombo rinobviswa panzvimbo yaro;" 
Job14:19 Mvura inochera mabwe; Kuyerera kwayo kunokukura guruva renyika;. imwi munoparadza tariro yomunhu. 
Job14:20 Munomukunda nokusingaperi, iye akapfuura hake; Munoshandura chiso chake, ndokumudzinga." 
Job14:21 Vana vake vanokudzwa iye asingazvizivi; Vanoderedzwa, asi iye haaoni vachiitirwa izvozvo." 
Job14:22 Asi kana ari iye, nyama yake inorwadziwa, Mweya wake unochema mukati make." 
Job15:1 Ipapo Erifazi muTemani akapindura, akati," 
Job15:2 Ko munhu, ane njere, angapindura nenjere dzisina maturo Nokuzadza dumbu rake nemhepo inobva mabvazuva here?" 
Job15:3 Angaita nharo nokutaura zvisingabatsire, Kana mashoko aasingagoni kubata basa rakanaka nawo here?" 
Job15:4 Zvirokwazvo iwe unorasha kutya Mwari, Nokukanganisa vanoda kufunga Mwari." 
Job15:5 Nokuti zvakaipa zvako zvinodzidzisa muromo wako, Unotsaura rurimi rwavanyengeri." 
Job15:6 Muromo wako ndiwo unokupa mhosva, handizini. Zvirokwazvo miromo yako inokupupurira zvakaipa." 
Job15:7 Ko ndiwe wakatanga kuzvarwa kanhi? Kana wakaberekwa makomo asati avapo here? 
Job15:8 Iwe wakanzwa mano akavanzika aMwari kanhi? Ndiwe woga wakazviwanira njere kanhi? 
Job15:9 Unozivei iwe zvatisingaziviwo isu? Unonzwisisei iwe zvisati zviri matiriwo? 
Job15:10 Vakachena vhudzi navatana vakwegura kwazvo vanesu, Vakapfuura baba vako kwazvo pazero." 
Job15:11 Ko kunyaradza kwaMwari hakukuringani here, Neshoko rinotaurwa nounyoro kwauri here," 
Job15:12 moyo wako unokurashirei? Meso ako anobwaireiko? 
Job15:13 Zvaunorwa naMwari nomweya wako, Uchitendera mashoko akadai kubuda pamuromo wako." 
Job15:14 Munhu chinyiko? Angava akanaka sei? Naiye akazvarwa nomukadzi, angava akarurama sei?" 
Job15:15 Tarira, haatendi vatsvene vake; Zvirokwazvo, kudenga hakuna kunaka pamberi pake." 
Job15:16 Ndoda munhu anosemesa, akaora, Munhu anomwa zvakaipa semvura." 
Job15:17 Ndichakuratidza, chiteerera; Ndichakududzira zvandakaona." 
Job15:18 (Zvakarehwa navanhu vakangwara Zvavakanzwa kumadzibaba avo, vasina kuzvivanza;" 
Job15:19 Ivo vakanga vapiwa nyika voga, Hakuna mutorwa akapinda pakati pavo;)" 
Job15:20 Munhu akaipa anotambudzika achirwadziwa mazuva ake ose, Iwo makore akatarirwa mumanikidzi." 
Job15:21 inzwi rezvinotyisa riri munzeve dzake; Muparadzi achamusvikira akafara. 
Job15:22 Haatendi kuti achadzokazve achibva parima, Anovandirwa nomunondo." 
Job15:23 Unofamba-famba achitsvaka zvokudya, achiti, `Zviripiko?' Anoziva kuti zuva rerima riri pedo naye," 
Job15:24 Njodzi nokutambudzika zvinomutyisa; Zvinomukunda, samambo akazvigadzirira kurwa." 
Job15:25 Nokuti akatambanudzira ruoko rwake kuzorwa naMwari, Akazvikudza pamberi powaMasimbaose;" 
Job15:26 Anomhanyira kwaari anomutsipa mukukutu, Namakwande makobvu enhovo dzake." 
Job15:27 Nokuti akafukidza chiso chake namafuta, Akaunganidza mafuta mazhinji pachiuno chake." 
Job15:28 Akagara pamaguta akanga ava matongo, Padzimba dzisina kufanira kugarwa nomunhu, Dzaikarokushanduka matongo." 
Job15:29 Iye haangavi mufumi, fuma yake haingagari, Nezvibereko zvazvo hazvingaremberi pasi." 
Job15:30 Haangabvi parima; Murazvo womoto uchawomesa matavi ake, Uchabviswa nomweya womuromo waMwari." 
Job15:31 Ngaarege kuvimba nezvisina maturo, achizvinyengera; Nokuti mubairo wake uchava zvisina maturo." 
Job15:32 Zvichaitwa nguva yake isinokusvika, davi rake haringavi nyoro." 
Job15:33 Achazuka mazambiringa ake agere kuibva somuzambiringa, Uchazuka maruva ake somuorivhi." 
Job15:34 Nokuti ungano yavasingadi Mwari haingabereki, Moto uchapedza matende avafufuri." 
Job15:35 Vane mimba yezvakashata, vanobereka zvakaipa, Dumbu ravo rinogadzira kunyengera.""" 
Job16:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura, akati," 
Job16:2 Ndatonzwa hangu mashoko mazhinji akadai; imwi mose muri vanyaradzi pasina. 
Job16:3 Ko mashoko asina maturo achapera here? Chinyiko chinokugombedzera kupindura? 
Job16:4 Neniwo ndaigona kutaura semi; Kana mweya yenyu yaiva panzvimbo yomweya wangu, Ndaigonawo kubatanidza mashoko pamusoro penyu, Ndaikudzungudzirai musoro wangu." 
Job16:5 Asi ndingadai ndaikusimbisai nomuromo wangu, Nokuvaraidza kwemiromo yangu kwaikuremudzai." 
Job16:6 Kunyange ndichitaura hangu, kuchema kwangu hakuremudzwi; Kunyange ndikarega hangu, ndinotapudzirwa neiko?" 
Job16:7 Asi zvino iye andinetsa, imwi maparadza mhuri yangu yose." 
Job16:8 imwi makandibata nesimba, ndizvo zvinondipupurira; Kuonda kwangu kunondimukira, Kunondipupurira zvakaipa pachena." 
Job16:9 Iye akandibvarura pakutsamwa kwake, akandivenga; Akarumanya meno ake pamusoro pangu; Mudzivisi wangu anondiwetsera meso ake." 
Job16:10 Vakandishamisira miromo yavo Vakandirova padama, vachindituka, Vanoungana kuzorwa neni." 
Job16:11 Mwari anondiisa kuna vasakarurama; Anondikanda pamaoko avakaipa. 
Job16:12 Ndakanga ndichizorora hangu, iye akandivhuna; Zvirokwazvo akandibata nomumutsipa, akandiputsanya; Akandiita chiposherwa chake." 
Job16:13 Miseve yake inondikomba kumativi ose; Anopamura itsvo dzangu, asinganzwiri nyasha; Anodururira nduru yangu pasi." 
Job16:14 Anondikoromora nokukoromora-koromora; Anomhanyira kwandiri semhare. 
Job16:15 Ndakasonera masaga paganda rangu, Ndakaradzika runyanga rwangu muguruva." 
Job16:16 Chiso changu chatsvuka nokuchema. Mumvuri worufu uri pamafungiro ameso angu. 
Job16:17 Kunyange maoko angu asingadi hawo kuparadza, Nokunyengetera kwangu kwakanaka hako." 
Job16:18 Iwe nyika, rega hako kufukidza ropa rangu; Kuchema kwangu ngakushaiwe nzvimbo yokuzorora." 
Job16:19 Nazvino, tarirai, chapupu changu chiri kudenga, Iye, anondipupurira zvakanaka, ari kumusoro." 
Job16:20 Shamwari dzangu dzinondishora, Asi ziso rangu rinodurura misodzi yangu pamberi paMwari." 
Job16:21 Kuti aruramisire munhu pamberi paMwari, NoMwanakomana womunhu pamberi powokwake." 
Job16:22 Nokuti kana makore mashoma apfuura, Ndichafamba nenzira yandisingazodzokizve nayo.""" 
Job17:1 Mweya wangu wapera, mazuva angu adzima, Hwiro hunondimirira." 
Job17:2 Zvirokwazvo, vanondiseka vaneni; Ziso rangu rinoramba richiona kutsamwa kwavo." 
Job17:3 Zvino ndipikirei, muve rubatso rwangu kwamuri; Ndianiko achabatana maoko neni?" 
Job17:4 Nokuti makavanzira moyo yavo kunzwisisa; Naizvozvo hamungavakudzi. 
Job17:5 Iye, anokwirira shamwari dzake kuti dzitapwe, Meso avana vake achapera." 
Job17:6 Iye akandiita shumo pakati pavanhu; Ndinosemwa pachena. 
Job17:7 Ziso rangu harichaoni nemhaka yokuchema, Mitezo yangu yose yafanana nomumvuri." 
Job17:8 Vanhu vakarurama vachakanuka nazvo, Asine mhaka achamukira vasingadi Mwari." 
Job17:9 Kunyange zvakadaro wakarurama acharambira panzira yake, Uye ana maoko akanaka acharamba achisimba." 
Job17:10 Asi imwi mose dzokai, muuye zvino; Nokuti handingawani munhu akangwara pakati penyu." 
Job17:11 Mazuva angu apfuura, zvandaivavarira zvakona, Iyo mifungo yomoyo wangu." 
Job17:12 Vanoshandura usiku ave masikati; Vanoti, ""Chiedza chiri pedo nerima.""" 
Job17:13 Kana ndine tariro, Sheori ndiyo imba yangu; Ndakawadza nhovo yangu murima;" 
Job17:14 Ndakati kuhwiro, ""Ndiwe baba vangu;"" Nokuhonye, ""Ndiwe mai vangu nehanzvadzi yangu;""" 
Job17:15 Zvino tariro yangu iripiko? Kana iri tariro yangu, ndianiko angaiona?" 
Job17:16 Ichaburukira kumazariro eSheori, Kana zororo yavapo paguruva." 
Job18:1 Ipapo Bhiridhadhi muShuhi akapindura, akati," 
Job18:2 Muchateyana namashoko kusvikira rinhiko? Chimbofungai henyu, tigotaurirana pashure." 
Job18:3 Tinonzi mhuka neiko, Navanhu vasina kunaka pamberi penyu?" 
Job18:4 Iwe unozvibvarura nokutsamwa kwako, Nyika ingarashwa nokuda kwako kanhi? Kana dombo ringabviswa panzvimbo yaro here?" 
Job18:5 Zvirokwazvo, chiedza chavakaipa chichadzima, Murazvo womoto wake haungavhenekeri:" 
Job18:6 Chiedza chichasviba patende rake, Mwenje wake pamusoro pake uchadzima." 
Job18:7 Nhambwe dzesimba rake dzichadzorwa, Namano ake achamuwisira pasi." 
Job18:8 Nokuti anowisirwa mumumbure namakumbo ake amene, Anofamba pamusoro pezvakarukwa." 
Job18:9 Rugombe ruchamubata chitsitsinho, Musungo uchamubatisa." 
Job18:10 Anovanzirwa chishwe muvhu, Nomurau panzira." 
Job18:11 Uchavhunduswa nezvinotyisa pamativi ose, Zvichamuteverera pedo-pedo." 
Job18:12 Simba rake richarumwa nenzara. Njodzi ichamugarira parutivi rwake. 
Job18:13 Ichapedza mitezo yomuviri wake, Dangwe rorufu richapedza mitezo yake." 
Job18:14 Uchadzurwa patende rake raaivimba naro; Uchaiswa kuna mambo anotyisa. 
Job18:15 Mutende rake munogara zvisati zviri zvake; Suriferi ichasaswa pamusoro peimba yake. 
Job18:16 Midzi yake ichaoma pasi, Davi rake richatemwa kumusoro." 
Job18:17 Haangazorangarirwi panyika; Zita rake haringazozikamwi panzira dzomumusha. 
Job18:18 Achadzingwa pachiedza aende kurima; Achadzingwa abve panyika. 
Job18:19 Haangavi nomwanakomana kana muzukuru pakati pavanhu vake, Kana mumwe akasara, paakanga agere ari mutorwa." 
Job18:20 Vanogara kumavirazuva vachakanuka vachiona zuva rake, Vagere kumabvazuva vachabatwa nokubvunda." 
Job18:21 Zvirokwazvo, ndizvo zvakaita panogara vasina kururama, Ndiyo nzvimbo yousingazivi Mwari.""" 
Job19:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura, akati," 
Job19:2 Muchatambudza mweya wangu kusvikira rinhiko, Nokundipwanya namashoko enyu here?" 
Job19:3 Makandituka zvino kagumi; Hamunyari zvamakanditsungirira. 
Job19:4 Kana ndichinge ndatadza hangu, Kutadza kwangu kuchagara neni." 
Job19:5 Kana imwi muchida kwazvo kuzvikudza pamusoro pangu, Nokundipa mhosva muchiti ndakatukwa;" 
Job19:6 Zivai zvino kuti ndiye Mwari asina kundiruramisa, Akandikomberedza nomumbure wake;" 
Job19:7 Tarirai ndinochema ndichiti, `Ndakaitirwa zvakaipa!' Asi handinzwiki; Ndinochema kuti ndibatsirwe, asi handiruramisirwi." 
Job19:8 Akadzivira nzira yangu, kuti ndirege kupfuura; Akaisa rima panzira dzangu." 
Job19:9 Wakandibvisira kurumbidzwa kwangu, Nokunditorera korona yangu pamusoro wangu." 
Job19:10 Akandiputsa kumativi ose, ndakaparadzwa; Akadzura tariro yangu somuti." 
Job19:11 Akandimutsirawo kutsamwa kwake, Akati ndiri mumwe wavadzivisi vake."
