Job19:12 Hondo dzake dzinondiunganira, dzinozvigadzirira nzira kurwa neni. Dzinokomberedza tende rangu nemisasa yadzo." 
Job19:13 Akaisa hama dzangu kure neni, Vazikamwi vangu vava savatorwa chose kwandiri." 
Job19:14 Hama dzangu dzandinyengera, Shamwari dzangu, dzaindiziva, dzakandikangamwa." 
Job19:15 Vanogara mumba mangu, navarandakadzi vangu vanoti ndiri mubvakure; Vanondiona vachiti ndiri mweni." 
Job19:16 Ndinodana muranda wangu, asi haandipinduri, Kunyange ndichimunyengetera nomuromo wangu." 
Job19:17 Kufema kwangu kunosemesa mukadzi wangu, Ndinonyangadza vana vamai vangu." 
Job19:18 Kunyange navana vaduku vanondishorawo; Kana ndichisimuka, vanondipopotera." 
Job19:19 Shamwari dzangu dzose dzaindiziva, dzinondinzvenga, Vose vandaida vandifuratira." 
Job19:20 Pfupa rangu rinonamatira ganda rangu nenyama yangu, Ndasiyirwa ganda rameno angu." 
Job19:21 Ndinzwirei tsitsi, ndinzwirei tsitsi, imwi shamwari dzangu; Nokuti ruoko rwaMwari rwandibata." 
Job19:22 Munonditambudzireiko saMwari, Musingaguti nenyama yangu?" 
Job19:23 Haiwa, dai mashoko angu ainyorwa zvino, Haiwa, dai ainyorwa pabhuku." 
Job19:24 Dai aitemwa nepeni yedare nomutobvu Aitemwa padombo nokusingaperi. 
Job19:25 Asi ndinoziva kuti Mudzikunuri wangu mupenyu, Uye kuti pakupedzisira uchasimuka panyika;" 
Job19:26 Kunyange ganda rangu richinge raparadzwa saizvozvo, Kunyange zvakadaro ndichaona Mwari ndine nyama yangu." 
Job19:27 Ndichamuona ari kurutivi rwangu; Meso angu achaona, asati ari omutorwa; Itsvo dzangu dzapera mukati mangu." 
Job19:28 Kana muchiti, `Tichamutambudza sei!' Mudzi wemhosva zvauri mukati make!" 
Job19:29 Ityai munondo; Nokuti kutsamwa kucharohwa nomunondo, Kuti muzive kuti kutonga kuripo.""" 
Job20:1 Ipapo Zofari muNaamati akapindura, akati," 
Job20:2 Naizvozvo ndangariro dzangu dzinondipindura, Nokuda kokukurumidza kuri mandiri." 
Job20:3 Ndakanzwa kutuka kunondinyadza, Mweya wokunzwisisa kwangu anondipindura." 
Job20:4 Hauzivi here kuti kubva kare-kare, Kubva pakuiswa komunhu panyika," 
Job20:5 Kuti kufara kwavakaipa hakune nguva huru, Nomufaro wavasingadi Mwari kuti ndowechinguva?" 
Job20:6 Kunyange kukura kwake kukakwirira kusvikira kudenga, Musoro wake ukasvikira kumakore;" 
Job20:7 Kunyange zvakadaro uchaparara nokusingaperi sendove yake; Vaimuona vachati, `Aripiko?'" 
Job20:8 Achabhururuka akaenda sokurota, akasawanikwa; Zvirokwazvo, achadzingwa sechinhu chinoonekwa usiku." 
Job20:9 Ziso raimuona haringazomuonizve; Nyangwe nenzvimbo yake haingazomuonizve. 
Job20:10 Vana vake vachatsvaka tsitsi kuvarombo, Maoko avo achadzosera fuma yake." 
Job20:11 Mapfupa ake azere nesimba roujaya hwake, Asi achavata pasi naye paguruva." 
Job20:12 Kunyange kutadza kuchitapira mumuromo make, Kunyange akazvivanza pasi porurimi rwake;" 
Job20:13 Kunyange akazvichengeta, akaramba kuzvirega, Akaramba akazvichengeta mumuromo make;" 
Job20:14 Kunyange zvakadaro zvokudya zvake zvinoshandurwa muura hwake, Zvava nduru yemvumbi mukati make." 
Job20:15 Wamedza fuma, asi achairutsazve, Mwari achaibudisa mudumbu rake." 
Job20:16 Achasveta uturu bwemvumbi; Rurimi rwenyoka ruchamuuraya. 
Job20:17 Haangatariri nzizi, Nehova dzizere nouchi namafuta." 
Job20:18 Zvaakabatira achazvidzosazve, haangazvimedzi; Haangavi nomufaro wakaenzana nefuma yake yaakawana." 
Job20:19 Nokuti akamanikidza nokurasha varombo; Akatora imba nesimba, asi haangaivaki." 
Job20:20 Zvaakanga asingazivi kudzikama mukati make, Haangachengeti chinhu chimwe chaakanga achifarira." 
Job20:21 Hakune chinhu chakasara chaasina kuparadza; Saka kuguma kwake, hakungarambi kuripo." 
Job20:22 Pakati pezvakawanda zvefuma yake achamanikidzwa; Ruoko rwomumwe nomumwe ari panjodzi rucharwa naye. 
Job20:23 Kana achida kugutsa dumbu rake, Mwari achatuma kutsamwa kwake kukuru pamusoro pake, Achakunisa pamusoro pake, zvive zvokudya zvake." 
Job20:24 Achatiza nhumbi yokurwa yamatare, Uta bwendarira huchamuboora." 
Job20:25 Unoivhomora, ikabuda pamuviri wake; Muromo wayo unobwinya, unobuda panduru yake; Anotya kwazvo." 
Job20:26 Akachengetererwa rima guru ive fuma yake, Moto usina kupfutidzwa nomunhu uchamuparadza; Uchapedza zvakasara patende rake." 
Job20:27 Kudenga-denga kucharatidza zvakaipa zvake, Nyika ichamumukira." 
Job20:28 Zvakaunganidzwa mumba make zvichibva, Nhumbi dzake dzichayerera pazuva rokutsamwa kwake." 
Job20:29 Ndiwo mugove womunhu akaipa waanopiwa naMwari, Nenhaka yaakatemerwa naMwari.""" 
Job21:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura,, akati," 
Job21:2 Inzwai zvakanaka kutaura kwangu; Munyaradzwe nazvo. 
Job21:3 Ndiregei, nditaurewo; Kana ndapedza kutaura, mungandiseka henyu." 
Job21:4 Kana ndirini, ndinochema kuvanhu here? Ndingaregereiko kupera moyo?" 
Job21:5 Nditarirei, mushamiswe, Muise ruoko rwenyu pamuromo." 
Job21:6 Kunyange ndozvirangarira ndinotambudzika, Kutya kukuru kunobata nyama yangu." 
Job21:7 Vakaipa vanoraramireiko, Vachikwegura nokuwedzerwa simba here?" 
Job21:8 Vana vavo vanosimbiswa pamwechete navo pamberi pavo, Navazukuru vavo vachizviona nameso avo." 
Job21:9 Dzimba dzavo dzinorugare, hadzityiswi, Uye shamhu yaMwari haigari ichivarova." 
Job21:10 Hando yavo inoberekesa, isingakoni, Mhou yavo inobereka, isingasvodzi." 
Job21:11 Vanobudisa pwere dzavo seboka ramakwai; Vana vavo vanotamba. 
Job21:12 Vanoimba vachiridzirwa ngoma nembira, Vanofara vachiridzirwa nyere." 
Job21:13 Vanopedza mazuva avo vachifara, Vanoburukira kuSheori kamwe-kamwe." 
Job21:14 Kunyange zvakadaro vanoti kuna Mwari, `Ibvai kwatiri; Nokuti hatidi kuziva nzira dzenyu.'" 
Job21:15 Iye waMasimbaose ndianiko, kuti timushumire? Tichabatsirwa neiko kana tikanyengetera kwaari?" 
Job21:16 Tarirai, kufara kwavo hakuzi mumaoko avo; Mano avakaipa ari kure neni." 
Job21:17 Ko mwenje wavakaipa unodzimwa kangani? Njodzi yavo inovavinga kanganiko? Mwari anovapavhurira kutambudzika pakutsamwa kwake kanganiko? 
Job21:18 Vanotongofanana namakoto anodzingwa nemhepo here? Nehundi inotorwa nedutu remhepo? 
Job21:19 imwi munoti, `Mwari anochengetera vana vake zvakaipa. Ngaamutsive iye amene, azvizive.'" 
Job21:20 Meso ake amene ngaaone kuparadzwa kwake, Iye ngaamwe kutsamwa kowaMasimbaose." 
Job21:21 Nokuti achava nehanya yeiko neimba yake kana aenda, Kana kuwanda kwemwedzi yake kwatapudzwa." 
Job21:22 Ndianiko angadzidzisa Mwari kuziva, Zvaari iye anotonga vari kumusoro?" 
Job21:23 Mumwe anofa achine simba rake rose, Akafara chose anorugare." 
Job21:24 Mazamu ake azere nomukaka, Mwongo wamapfupa ake wakanyorova." 
Job21:25 Mumwe anofa ane shungu dzomoyo, Asina kutongoravira zvakanaka." 
Job21:26 Vanovata pasi pamwechete paguruva, Honye dzinovafukidza vose." 
Job21:27 Tarirai ndinoziva kufunga kwenyu, Namano akaipa amunondifungira." 
Job21:28 Nokuti munoti, 'Imba yomuchinda iripiko? Tende raigarwa nowakaipa riripiko?'" 
Job21:29 Hamuna kubvunza here vanofamba nenzira? Hamuzivi zviratidzo zvavo here? 
Job21:30 Kuti munhu wakaipa anodarikwa pazuva renjodzi here? Kuti vanobviswa pazuva rokutsamwa here? 
Job21:31 Ndianiko angamuzivisa mufambiro wake pachena? Ndiani achamutsiva zvaakaita here? 
Job21:32 Zvino anotakurirwa kuhwiro, Vanorinda rinda rake." 
Job21:33 Mavhinga omupata achamunakira, Vanhu vose vachamutevera, Sezvaakatungamirirwa navasingaverengwi." 
Job21:34 Zvino munondinyaradza sei nezvisina maturo, Zvamasarirwa nenhema dzoga pakupindura kwenyu?""" 
Job22:1 Ipapo Erifazi muTemani akapindura, akati," 
Job22:2 Ko munhu angabatsira Mwari here? Zvirokwazvo, munhu, akangwara, anozvibatsira hake amene." 
Job22:3 waMasimbaose une hanya nokururama kwako here? Iye angabatsirwa nazvo kana iwe ukakwanisa nzira dzako here? 
Job22:4 Iye anokuraira zvaunomutya here? Kuti akutonge here? 
Job22:5 Zvakaipa zvako hazvizakakura here? Zvisina kururama zvako hazviperi. 
Job22:6 Nokuti wakatora rubatso kuhama yako pasina Wakakusunungura nguvo dzavakanga vasina kufuka. 
Job22:7 Hauna kupa vane nyota mvura kuti vamwe, Wakanyima vane nzara zvokudya." 
Job22:8 Asi munhu ane simba, nyika ndeyake; Munhu anokudzwa, ndiye akagara mairi." 
Job22:9 Akadzinga chirikadzi dzisine chinhu, Maoko enherera akavhuniwa." 
Job22:10 Saka iwe wakapotedzwa nemisungo, Unovhunduswa pakarepo nokutya." 
Job22:11 Nerima, kuti arege kuona, Uye mvura zhinji inokufukidza." 
Job22:12 Ko Mwari haazi kudenga kumusoro-soro here? Tarira kukwirira kwenyeredzi, dzakakwirira sei!" 
Job22:13 Iwe unoti, `Mwari unoziveiko? Ungagona kutonga pakati perima guru here?'" 
Job22:14 Makore matema akamufukidza, haagoni kuona; Unofamba pakutenderera kwedenga." 
Job22:15 Iwe unoda kuramba uchifamba, nenzira yekare. Yakatsikwa navanhu vakaipa here?" 
Job22:16 Ivo vakabvutwa nguva yavo isati yasvika; Nheyo dzavo dzakadururwa sorukova rwemvura. 
Job22:17 Ivo vakati kuna Mwari, `Ibvai kwatiri; Uye, waMasimbaose angatiiteiko?'" 
Job22:18 Kunyange zvakadaro wakazadza dzimba dzavo nezvakanaka; Asi mano avakaipa ari kure neni. 
Job22:19 Vakarurama vanozviona, vakafara; Vasine mhosva vanovaseka,." 
Job22:20 Vachiti, `Zvirokwazvo vakatimukira vakaparadzwa; Zvakasara zvavo zvakapedzwa nomoto.'" 
Job22:21 Shamwaridzana naye zvino, uve norugare; Ipapo uchaitirwa zvakanaka." 
Job22:22 Gamuchira hako murairo womuromo wake, Uchengete mashoko ake mumoyo mako." 
Job22:23 Kana ukadzokera kuno waMasimbaose, uchavakwa; Kana ukabvisa zvisakarurama kure namatende ako." 
Job22:24 Isa fuma yako paguruva, Nendarama yeOfiri pakati pamabwe ehova;" 
Job22:25 Ipapo waMasimbaose achava fuma yako, Nesirivha inokosha kwazvo kwauri." 
Job22:26 Nokuti ipapo uchafarira waMasimbaose, Uchasimudzira chiso chako kuna Mwari." 
Job22:27 Uchanyengetera kwaari, iye achakunzwa; Uye acharipa mhiko dzako." 
Job22:28 Uchatemawo chirevo, chikasimbiswa kwauri; Uye chiedza chichavhenekera nzira dzako." 
Job22:29 Kana vakakusundira pasi, uchati, `Ndichasimudzwa; Iye uchaponesa munhu anozvininipisa." 
Job22:30 Iye acharwira nyangwe nomunhu ane mhaka, Zvirokwazvo ucharwirwa iye nokuchena kwamaoko ako.""" 
Job23:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura, akati," 
Job23:2 Kunyange nanhasi ndinonyunyuta ndine shungu; Kurohwa kwangu kwakanyanya kukunda kugomera kwangu. 
Job23:3 Haiwa! Dai ndaiziva kwandingamuwana, Kuti ndisvike ipo pachigaro chake." 
Job23:4 Ndairondedzera mhaka yangu pamberi pake, Ndaizadza muromo wangu nenharo." 
Job23:5 Ndaiziva mashoko aanopindura nawo, Ndainzwisisa zvaanondiudza." 
Job23:6 Angaita nharo neni nesimba rake guru here? Kwete; asi anganditeerera hake. 
Job23:7 Apo akarurama angataurirana naye; Kuti ndisunungurwe nokusingaperi pamutongi wangu. 
Job23:8 Tarira, ndinopfuura mberi, asi haapo; Uuye shure, asi handimuoni;" 
Job23:9 Nokuruoko rworuboshwe, kana achibata, asi handigoni kumuona; Anozvivanza paruoko rworudyi, kuti ndirege kumuona." 
Job23:10 Nokuti iye anoziva nzira yandinofamba nayo; Kana akandiidza, ndichabuda ndakaita sendarama." 
Job23:11 Rutsoka rwangu rwakaramba ruchitsika paakatsika iye; Ndakarambira panzira yake, handina kutsauka." 
Job23:12 Handina kudzoka pamurairo wemiromo yake; Ndakachengeta sefuma mashoko omuromo wake kupfuura mugove wezvokudya zvangu. 
Job23:13 Asi iye anorangarira chinhu chimwe, ndianiko angamudzora? Zvinoda moyo wake, ndizvo zvaanoita." 
Job23:14 Nokuti anoita zvandakatemerwa; Nezvinhu zvizhinji zvakadai zviri kwaari. 
Job23:15 Saka ndinotambudzika pamberi pake; Kana ndichimufunga ndinomutya. 
Job23:16 Nokuti Mwari akatorera moyo wangu simba, waMasimbaose akandivhundusa." 
Job23:17 Nokuti handina kuparadzwa nokuda kwerima, Kana nokuda kwerima guru rakafukidza chiso changu.""" 
Job24:1 WaMasimbaose anoregereiko kutara nguva dzokutonga? Vanomuziva vanoregereiko kuona mazuva ake? 
Job24:2 Vanoshandura miganho varipo; Vanopamba mapoka amakwai, vachiafudza." 
Job24:3 Vanotinha mbongoro yenherera, Vanotora nzombe yechirikadzi vachiita rubatso." 
Job24:4 Vanodzinga varombo panzira; Varombo venyika vanovanda vose. 
Job24:5 Tarira, sembizi murenje Vanobudira kumabasa avo, vachishingairira chokwadi; Renje rinovapa zvokudya zvavana vavo." 
Job24:6 Vanocheka zvavanodya kusango; Vanounganidza mazambiringa avakaipa. 
Job24:7 Vanovata usiku hwose vasina zvavakafuka, Pachando havana chavangazvifukidza nacho." 
Job24:8 Vakanyorova nokupfunha kwemvura yamakomo, Vanombundikira dombo nokushaiwa pokutizira." 
Job24:9 Varipo vanobvuta nherera pazamu ramai, Nokutora rubatso rwavarombo;" 
Job24:10 Naizvozvo vanofamba vasina zvavakafuka, Vanotakura zvisote vane nzara;" 
Job24:11 Vanosvina mafuta mukati mamasvingo avanhu ava; Vanotsika zvisviniro zvamazambiringa avo, vachifa nenyota." 
Job24:12 Vanhu vanogomera mukati meguta rina vanhu vazhinji, Uye mweya yavakakuvadzwa inochema; Kunyange zvakadaro Mwari haane hanya nezvisina kururama." 
Job24:13 Ndivo vanovenga chiedza; Havazivi nzira dzacho, Havarambi vachifamba pamakwara acho." 
Job24:14 Muurayi anomuka kana koedza, anouraya murombo neanoshaiwa; Usiku wakafanana nomubi." 
Job24:15 Ziso remhombwewo rinomirira rubvunzavaeni, Achiti, ""Hakune ziso richandiona;"" Ndokufukidza chiso chake." 
Job24:16 Usiku vanopaza dzimba; Masikati vanozvipfigira; Havazivi chiedza. 
Job24:17 Nokuti mangwanani akaita serima guru kwavari vose; Nokuti vanoziva kutyisa kwerima guru. 
Job24:18 Iye anofambisa pamusoro pemvura; Mugove wavo wakatukwa panyika; Haachafambi nenzira yeminda yemizambiringa. 
Job24:19 Kuoma nokupisa kunopedza mvura yechando; Ndizvo zvinoita Sheori navakatadza. 
Job24:20 Chizvaro chichamukangamwa; honye dzichatapirirwa Uye kusarurama kuchavhumwa somuti. 
Job24:21 Iye unoparadza han'a isingabereki; Haaitiri chirikadzi zvakanaka. 
Job24:22 Anobvisa vane simba nesimba rake; Kana iye achisimuka, hakuna munhu anoziva kana achararama." 
Job24:23 Mwari anovagarisa vakachengetwa, vachivimba nazvo; Asi meso ake anotarira nzira dzavo." 
Job24:24 Vanokudzwa; gare-gare vaenda; Vanodukupiswa, vanobviswa panzira savamwe vose, Vanochekwa semisoro yehura dzezviyo." 
Job24:25 Kana zvisina kudaro zvino, ndiani angati ndine nhema, Nokushaisa mashoko angu simba here?" 
Job25:1 Ipapo Bhiridhadhi muShuhi akapindura, akati," 
Job25:2 Umambo nokutyisa zvinaye; Iye unoyananisa pamatunhu ake akakwirira. 
Job25:3 Hondo dzake dzingaverengwa here? Ndianiko asingavhenekerwi nechiedza chake? 
Job25:4 Zvino munhu angava akarurama seiko pamberi paMwari? Nomunhu akazvarwa nomukadzi angava akachena sei? 
Job25:5 Tarira, nomwedziwo unoshaiwa kubhinya, Nenyeredzi hadzizakachena kwazvo pamberi pake." 
Job25:6 Ndoda munhu, iro gonye! noMwanakomana womunhu, iro gonye!""" 
Job26:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura, akati, kwaari" 
Job26:2 Iwe wakabatsira sei asine simba! Wakaponesa sei ruoko rusine simba! 
Job26:3 Wakapa mano sei asina kungwara, Nokududzira kwazvo zivo yechokwadi!" 
Job26:4 Wakataurira aniko mashoko awa? Mweya wakabuda kwauri ndowaaniko? 
Job26:5 Vakafa vanodedera Pasi pemvura navagere mukati mayo. 
Job26:6 Sheori rakashama pamberi pake, Kuparadza hakune chifukidzo." 
Job26:7 Anotatamura rutivi rwokumusoro pasine chiro, Anoturikira nyika pasine chinhu." 
Job26:8 Anosungira mvura mumakore ake makobvu; Asi gore haribvaruki nokurema kwayo. 
Job26:9 Anofukidza chigaro chake choushe, chirege kuonekwa," 
Job26:10 Akatara muganhu pamusoro pemvura, Kusvikira pakuparadzana kwechiedza nerima." 
Job26:11 Mbiru dzedenga dzinodedera, Nokuvhunduka nokutuka kwake." 
Job26:12 Anomutsa gungwa nesimba rake, Nenjere dzake anoparadza Rahabhi." 
Job26:13 Denga rinoshongedzwa nomweya wake; Ruoko rwake rwakabaya nyoka inokurumidza. 
Job26:14 Tarira, izvi ndiwo mudzivo woga wenzira dzake; Haiwa, tinongonzwa zeve-zeve roga renzwi rake! Asi kutinhira kwesimba rake ndianiko angakunzwisisa?""" 
Job27:1 Ipapo Jobho akapfuura nokutaura kwake, akati," 
Job27:2 NaMwari mupenyu, iye akanditorera kururama kwangu; nowaMasimbaose akatambudza mweya wangu;" 
Job27:3 (Nokuti upenyu hwangu huchiri mandiri chose, Nomweya waMwari uchiri mumhino dzangu;)" 
Job27:4 Zvirokwazvo miromo yangu haingatauri zvisakarurama, Uye rurimi rwangu harungarevi zvinonyengera." 
Job27:5 Mwari ngaandidzivise ndirege kukururamisirai; Kusvikira parufu rwangu handingarashi kusanyengera kwangu. 
Job27:6 Ndinobatisa kururama kwangu, handingakuregi; moyo wangu haungandipi mhaka ndichiri mupenyu." 
Job27:7 Muvengi wangu ngaaite sewakaipa. Uye anondimukira ngaaite seasina kururama. 
Job27:8 Nokuti asingadi Mwari ane tariro yeiko, kunyange azviwanira fuma, Kana atorerwa mweya wake naMwari here?" 
Job27:9 Ko Mwari achanzwa kuchema kwake, Kana achiwirwa nenjodzi here?" 
Job27:10 Ko iye achafarira waMasimbaose, Nokudana kuna Mwari nguva dzose here?" 
Job27:11 Ini ndichakudzidzisai zvoruoko rwaMwari; Izvo zvina waMasimbaose handingazvivanzi. 
Job27:12 Tarirai imwi mose makazviona henyu; Zvino makagova vanhu vasina maturo chose neiko? 
Job27:13 Ndiwo mugove unopiwa munhu akaipa naMwari, Nemhaka yavamanikidzi, yavanopiwa nowaMasimbaose." 
Job27:14 Kana vana vake vachiwanda, vourawa nomunondo; Vana vake havangaguti zvokudya." 
Job27:15 Vana vake, vakasara, vachavigwa vafa, Chirikadzi dzake hadzingachemi." 
Job27:16 Kunyange akaunganidza sirivha ikaita seguruva, Nokugadzira zvokufuka zvikaita sevhu;" 
Job27:17 Angazvigadzira hake iye, asi akarurama ndiye achazvifuka; Asine mhosva ndiye achagovera sirivha." 
Job27:18 Anovaka imba yake sechifusi, Sechirindo chinoitwa nomurindi." 
Job27:19 Anovata pasi akafuma, asi haapamhidzizve; Anosvinudza meso ake, asi haachipo." 
Job27:20 Zvinotyisa zvinomubata semvura zhinji; dutu remhepo rinomubvuta usiku. 
Job27:21 Mhepo inobva mabvazuva inomutora ndokuenda hake; Inomutsvaira panzvimbo yake. 
Job27:22 Mwari achamuposha, asingamunzwiri tsitsi, Unoidza kutiza paruoko rwake." 
Job27:23 Vanhu vacharovana maoko pamusoro pake, Vachamuridzira muridzo abve panzvimbo yake.""" 
Job28:1 Nokuti mugodhi uripo panobva sirivha, Nzvimbo iripo pavanonatsa ndarama." 
Job28:2 Mhangura inocherwa pasi, Nendarira inonyauswa pabwe." 
Job28:3 Munhu anokunda rima, Anotsvakisisa kusvikira kumativi ose-ose. Mabwe ari murima guru nomumumvuri worufu." 
Job28:4 Anochera mugodhi kure napanogara vanhu; Vanokanganikwa norutsoka rwavanopfuura; Vanorembera kure navanhu, vachizeya uku nokuku." 
Job28:5 Kana iri nyika, zvokudya zvinobva mairi; Pasi pazvo pakashandurwa zvinenge nomoto." 
Job28:6 Pamabwe ayo ndipo panogara zvibwe zesafiro, Ano upfu hwéndarama." 
Job28:7 Nzira iyo haizikamwi negondo, Ziso rorukodzi harina kuiona;" 
Job28:8 Zvikara, zvinozvikudza, hazvina kupfuura napo. Shumba, ine hasha, haina kupfuura napo." 
Job28:9 Iye anotema dombo romusarasara noruoko rwake; Anoshandukura makomo nemidzi yawo. 
Job28:10 Anochera mugero pamatombo; Ziso rake rinoona zvinokosha. 
Job28:11 Anodzivira nzizi dzemvura dzirege kudonha; Chinhu chakavanzika anochibudisa pachena. 
Job28:12 Asi uchenjeri huchawanikwepiko? Kunzwisisa kunogarepi? 
Job28:13 Munhu haazivi mutengo wahwo; Hauwanikwi panyika yavapenyu. 
Job28:14 Pakadzika panoti, ""Hauzi mandiri;"" Negungwa rinoti, ""Hauzi mandiri.""" 
Job28:15 Haungatengwi nendarama, Nyangwe nesirivha haingaidzirwi mutengo wawo." 
Job28:16 Haungaenzaniswi nendarama yeOfiri, Kana nezvibwe zveonikisi inokosha kana zvesafiro." 
Job28:17 Ndarama negirazi hazvingaenzani nahwo; Zvishongo zvendarama yakaisvonaka hazvingatsinhaniswi nahwo. 
Job28:18 Korari nemapere hazvingatongorebwi; Zvirokwazvo mutengo wouchenjeri unopfuura matombo akatsvuka. 
Job28:19 Topazi yeItiopia haingaenzani nahwo, Haungaenzaniswi nendarama yakaisvonaka." 
Job28:20 Zvino huchenjeri unobvepiko? Kunzwisisa kunogarepi? 
Job28:21 Zvahwakavanzirwa meso avapenyu vose, Nokudzitirirwa shiri dzokudenga." 
Job28:22 Kuparadza noRufu zvinoti, ""Takanzwa guhu rahwo panzeve dzedu.""" 
Job28:23 Mwari anonzwisisa nzira yahwo, Ndiye anoziva kwahunobva." 
Job28:24 Nokuti anotarira kumigumo yenyika, anoona, zvose pasi pokudenga pose;" 
Job28:25 Panguva yaanotarira mhepo kurema kwayo; Zvirokwazvo, anoyera mvura nechiyero" 
Job28:26 Panguva yaakatemera mvura chirevo, Nemheni yomutinhiro nzira yayo." 
Job28:27 Panguva iyo akahuona, akahududzira; Akahusimbisa, nokuhunzvera." 
Job28:28 Akaudza munhu achiti, ""Tarira, kutya Ishe, ndihwo uchenjeri. Kurega zvakaipa ndiko kunzwisisa.""" 
Job29:1 Zvino Jobho akapfuurazve namashoko ake, akati," 
Job29:2 Haiwa, dai ndaiita hangu sapamwedzi yakare, Sapamazuva andairindwa naMwari;" 
Job29:3 Panguva iyo mwenje wake waivhenekera pamusoro wangu, Ndaifamba ndichivhenekerwa parima nechiedza chake;" 
Job29:4 Sezvandakanga ndakaita pamazuva okusimba kwangu, Panguva iyo hushamwari hwaMwari huchiri patende rangu;" 
Job29:5 Panguva iyo waMasimbaose achiri neni, Navana vangu vachakandipoteredza;" 
Job29:6 Panguva iyo pandaitsika paisukwa nomukaka wakafa, Uye dombo raindidururira nzizi dzamafuta!" 
Job29:7 Panguva yandaibuda kusuo reguta, Panguva yandaigadzira chigaro changu padare," 
Job29:8 Majaya akati achindiona aivanda, Navatana vaisimuka vakaramba vamire;" 
Job29:9 Machinda ainyarara pakutaura kwawo, Aifumbira miromo yawo;" 
Job29:10 manzwi avakuru ainyarara, Ndimi dzavo dzainamatira mumikamwa yavo." 
Job29:11 Nokuti nzeve yakati ichindinzwa, ndokundiropafadza; Ziso rakati richindiona, ndokundipupurira zvakanaka." 
Job29:12 Nokuti ndairwira varombo vaichema, Nenhererawo, nowaishaiwa mubatsiri." 
Job29:13 Aikarofa aindiropafadza; Ndaiimbisa moyo wechirikadzi nomufaro. 
Job29:14 Ini ndaifuka kururama, naiko kwaindifukidza; Kururama kwangu kwaiva senguvo nekorona." 
Job29:15 Ndaiva meso amapofu, Netsoka dzemhetamakumbo." 
Job29:16 Ndaiva baba vavaishaiwa; Ndainzvera mhaka yowandakanga ndisingazivi. 
Job29:17 Ndaivhuna meno avasina kururama, Nokubvuta chaakanga auraya mumeno ake." 
Job29:18 Panguva iyo ndakati, `Ndichafira mudendere rangu, Ndichawanza mazuva angu aite sejecha,'" 
Job29:19 Mudzi wangu wakatandavarira kusvikira kumvura, Dova rinovata usiku hwose padavi rangu." 
Job29:20 Kukudzwa kwangu kunoramba kuri kutsva, Uta hwangu hunoramba uchivandudzwa muruoko rwangu." 
Job29:21 Vanhu vainditeerera nokundimirira, Vainyarara kana ndichivaraira." 
Job29:22 Havazaitaurazve kana ini ndareva mashoko angu; Kutaura kwangu kwakadonhera pamusoro pavo. 
Job29:23 Vaindimirira somunhu anomirira mvura; Vaishamisa miromo yavo sevanoshamira mvura yokupedzisira. 
Job29:24 Ndaivasekerera kana vasingatsungi; Havana kudzima chiedza chechiso changu. 
Job29:25 Ndaivasanangurira nzira yavo, ndikagara sashe wavo, Ndaigara samambo pahondo, Somunhu anonyaradza vanochema." 
Job30:1 Asi zvino vaduku kwandiri vanondisweveredza, Ivo vandaishovora kuisa madzibaba avo pambwa dzamapoka angu." 
Job30:2 Simba ramaoko avo ringandibatsireiko? Ivo vakapererwa nesimba kwazvo. 
Job30:3 Vaonda nokushaiwa nenzara; Vanotetena ivhu rakaoma murima ramatangwaza nokuparadzwa. 
Job30:4 Vanotanha zvinovava pamakwenzi; Midzi yomurara ndizvo zvokudya zvavo. 
Job30:5 Vanodzingwa pakati pavanhu; Vanovashoverera sembavha. 
Job30:6 Vanofanira kugara pamipata yakasviba, Pamakomba enyika namatombo." 
Job30:7 Vanorira pakati pamakwenzi; Vanounganira pasi porukato. 
Job30:8 Ndivo vana vamapenzi, zvirokwazvo vana vavanhu vakaipa; Vakadzingwa panyika vachirohwa." 
Job30:9 Zvino ndava chiimbo chavo, Ndava shumo yavo." 
Job30:10 Vanondisema, vanomira kure neni, Havaregi kupfira mate pachiso changu." 
Job30:11 Nokuti iye akasunungura rukungiso rwake akanditambudza; Vakarasha tomu pamberi pangu. 
Job30:12 Vasina maturo vanosimuka kurudyi rwangu; Vanosundira makumbo angu, Vanozvigadzirira nzira dzavo kundiparadza." 
Job30:13 Vanoparadza nzira yangu, Vanowedzera njodzi yangu, Ivo vanhu vasina mubatsiri." 
Job30:14 Vanouya vakafanana navanopinda pakakoromoka pakuru; Vanomhanyira kwandiri pakati pamasvingo akakoromoka. 
Job30:15 Zvinotyisa zvandivinga, Vanodzinga kukudzwa kwangu semhepo; Kufara kwangu kwapfuura segore." 
Job30:16 Zvino mweya wangu wadururwa mukati mangu; Mazuva enjodzi andibata. 
Job30:17 Panguva yousiku mapfupa angu anoururwa mukati mangu, Uye zvinondibaya hazvizorori." 
Job30:18 Nesimba rake guru nguvo yangu yachinyikara; Rinondisunga sehuro dzejasi rangu. 
Job30:19 Iye akandiwisira mumatope, Ndava seguruva nedota." 
Job30:20 Ndinochema kwamuri, asi hamundidaviri; Ndimire, asi munongonditarira." 
Job30:21 Mashanduka hamune tsitsi neni; Munonditambudza nesimba roruoko rwenyu. 
Job30:22 Munondisimudza nemhepo, munonditasvisa pamusoro payo; Munondinyangarisa mudutu remhepo." 
Job30:23 Nokuti ndinoziva kuti muchandiisa kurufu, Nokuimba yakatarirwa vapenyu vose." 
Job30:24 Ko munhu, anonyura, haangatambanudzi ruoko here; Pakutambudzika kwake haangaridzi mhere here?" 
Job30:25 Ko handina kuchema akanga ari panjodzi here? Mweya wangu wakanga usine shungu pamusoro powaishaiwa here? 
Job30:26 Ndakati ndichitarira zvakanaka zvakaipa zvikasvika, Ndakati ndichimirira chiedza, rima ndokusvika." 
Job30:27 Ura hwangu hunovira, hauzorori; Mazuva okutambudzika andivinga." 
Job30:28 Ndinochema ndisina mushana; Ndinosimuka pakati peungano, ndichichema kubatsirwa." 
Job30:29 Ndava hama yamakava, Neshamwari yemhou shiri." 
Job30:30 Ganda rangu rasviba, rinokwatuka kwandiri; Mapfupa angu atsva nokupisa." 
Job30:31 Naizvozvo mbira dzangu dzashanduka kuchema, Uye nyere yangu rava inzwi ravanochema misodzi.""" 
Job31:1 Ndakaita sungano nameso angu, Zvino ndingatarira musikana seiko?" 
Job31:2 Nokuti mugove waMwari unobva kumusoro ndoweiko, Nemhaka yowaMasimbaose inobva kudenga ndeyeiko?" 
Job31:3 Ko haizi njodzi kuna vasina kururama here, Nokuparadzwa kuna vaiti vezvakaipa here?" 
Job31:4 Ko iye haaoni nzira dzangu, Nokuverenga nhambwe dzangu dzose here?" 
Job31:5 Kana ndichinge ndafamba nenzira isina maturo, Norutsoka rwangu rwamhanyira zvinonyengera;" 
Job31:6 (Ngandiidzwe pachiyero chakarurama, Kuti Mwari azive kusanyengera kwangu;)" 
Job31:7 Kana kutsika kwangu kuchinge kwatsauka panzira, Nomoyo wangu ukatevera meso angu, Kana gwapa richinge ranamatira pamaoko angu;" 
Job31:8 Ipapo ini ndidzvare hangu, asi mumwe ngaadye; Zvibereko zvomunda wangu ngazvidzurwe." 
Job31:9 Kana moyo wangu uchinge wanyengerwa nomukadzi, kana ndavandira pamukova wowandaigara naye;" 
Job31:10 Ipapo mukadzi wangu ngaakuyire mumwe, Navamwe ngavakotamire pamusoro pake." 
Job31:11 Nokuti chinhu icho chivi chakashata, Zvirokwazvo, chinhu chakaipa chinofanira kurohwa navatongi." 
Job31:12 Nokuti ndiwo moto unopedza kusvikira pakuparadza, Ungadzura zvibereko zvangu zvose." 
Job31:13 Kana ndichinge ndazvidza mhaka yomuranda wangu kana murandakadzi wangu, Panguva yavakaita nharo neni;" 
Job31:14 Ndichaiteiko kana Mwari akasimuka? Kana akandivinga, ndingapindurei kwaari?" 
Job31:15 Akandiita mudumbu ramai haazi iye akamuitawo here? Ko haazi mumwe akatiumba isu tose mudumbu ramai here? 
Job31:16 Kana ndichinge ndanyima varombo zvavakakumbira, Kana kushaisa meso echirikadzi;" 
Job31:17 Kana ndichinge ndadya chimedu changu ndiri ndoga, Nherera ikasadyawo;" 
Job31:18 (Kwete, kubva paujaya hwangu yakakurira kwandiri ndikaita sababa vayo, Ndaiva muperekedzi wayo kubva padumbu ramai vangu;)" 
Job31:19 Kana ndichinge ndaona munhu achiparara nokushaiwa nguvo, Kana anoshaiwa asina chokufuka;" 
Job31:20 Kana chiuno chake chisina kundivonga, Kana asina kudziyirwa nemvere dzamakwai angu;" 
Job31:21 Kana ndichinge ndasimudzira nherera ruoko rwangu, Nokuti ndakaona kuti ndichabatsirwa pasuo;" 
Job31:22 Ipapo fudzi rangu ngaribve pabendekete, Ruoko rwangu ngaruvhunike papfupa." 
Job31:23 Nokuti njodzi inobva kuna Mwari yakandityisa, Ndakakoniwa kuita chinhu nokuda koumambo hwake." 
Job31:24 Kana ndichinge ndavimba nendarama ikava tariro yangu Ndikati kundarama yakaisvonaka, `Ndinovimba newe.'" 
Job31:25 Kana ndichinge ndakafara nokuti fuma yangu yakanga yawanda, Uye nokuti ruoko rwangu rwakanga rwawana zvizhinji;" 
Job31:26 Kana ndichinge ndaona kubwinya kwezuva, Kana mwedzi uchifamba wakachena;" 
Job31:27 moyo wangu ukanyengerwa pakavanda, Muromo wangu ukatsvoda ruoko rwangu;" 
Job31:28 Nechinhu ichowo chaiva chaipa chinofanira kurohwa navatongi; Nokuti ndinenge ndaramba Mwari ari kumusoro. 
Job31:29 Kana ndichinge ndafarira kuparadzwa komuvengi wangu, Kana kuzvikudza panguva yaakavingwa nezvakaipa;" 
Job31:30 (Zvirokwazvo handina kutendera muromo wangu kutadza, Ndichikumbira nokupanjira kuti afe;)" 
Job31:31 Kana vanhu vetende rangu vasina kutaura, vachiti, `Ndianiko angawana munhu usina kugutiswa nenyama yake?'" 
Job31:32 Mweni haana kuvata vusiku panzira dzomumusha; Asi ndaizarurira mufambi mikova yangu; 
Job31:33 dai ndaifukidza kudarika kwangu saAdhamu, Ndichivanza zvakaipa zvangu pachipfuva changu;" 
Job31:34 Zvandaitya vanhu vazhinji, Ndikavhunduswa nokushorwa namapoka avanhu, Ndikanyarara, ndikasabuda pamukova," 
Job31:35 Haiwa, dai ndaiva nomunhu anondinzwa! (Tarirai, ndirwo runyoro rwangu, waMasimbaose ngaandipindure;) dai ndaiva norugwaro rwakanyorwa nomudzivisi wangu!" 
Job31:36 Zvirokwazvo, ndairutakura pafudzi rangu; Ndairudzika pamusoro wangu sekorona." 
Job31:37 Ndaimududzira kuwanda kwenhambwe dzangu; Ndaiswedera kwaari somuchinda. 
Job31:38 Kana munda wangu ukadanidzira kwandiri, uchindipa mhosva, Nemihoronga yawo ikachema yose;" 
Job31:39 Kana ndichinge ndadya zvibereko zvawo ndisina kutenga, Kana ndichinge ndarashisa varidzi vawo upenyu hwavo;" 
Job31:40 Ipapo hutumbambeva ngahumerepo panzvimbo yezviyo, Nesora panzvimbo yebhari."" Mashoko aJobho apera." 
Job32:1 Zvino varume ava vatatu vakarega kupindura Jobho, nokuti akati ndakarurama hangu." 
Job32:2 Ipapo Erihu mwanakomana waBharakeri muBhuzi, weimba yaRami, akatsamwa kwazvo; akatsamwira Jobho kwazvo, nokuti akanga azviruramisa kupfuura Mwari." 
Job32:3 Akatsamwirawo kwazvo shamwari dzake nhatu, nokuti vakanga vashaiwa mhinduro, kunyange zvakadaro vakanga vapa havo Jobho mhosva." 
Job32:4 Zvino Erihu akanga amirira kutaura naJobho, nokuti ivo vaiva vakuru kwaari pazero." 
Job32:5 Zvino Erihu akati achiona kuti hapene mhinduro pamiromo yavanhu ava vatatu, iye akatsamwa kwazvo." 
Job32:6 Zvino Erihu mwanakomana waBharakeri muBhuzi wakapindura, akati, ""Ini ndiri muduku, asi imwi mava vakuru kwazvo; Saka ndakazvidzora hangu, ndikatya kukuzivisai kufunga kwangu." 
Job32:7 Ndakati, `Vana mazuva mazhinji ngavataure havo, Vana makore mazhinji ngavadzidzise vamwe uchenjeri.'" 
Job32:8 Asi mweya uripo pamunhu, Kufuridzira kowaMasimbaose kunovapa kunzwisisa." 
Job32:9 Havazi vakuru vakachenjera, Kana vatana vanonzwisisa kururamisira." 
Job32:10 Saka ndakati, `Chindinzwai; Neniwo ndichakuzivisai kufunga kwangu.'" 
Job32:11 Tarirai, ndakambomirira mashoko Ndakateerera kuti ndinzwe nharo dzenyu, Nguva yamakatsvaka zvamungataura." 
Job32:12 Zvirokwazvo, ndakakucherekedzai, Asi tarirai, hakuna munhu akapwisa Jobho. Kana akapindura mashoko ake pakati penyu." 
Job32:13 Chenjerai, murege kuti, `Takawana huchenjeri; Mwari ndiye angamukunda, asi munhu kwete;'" 
Job32:14 Nokuti haana kutaura mashoko ake kwandiri; Neni handingamupinduri iye nokutaura kwenyu. 
Job32:15 Vashamiswa, havachapinduri; Havachine shoko ravangataura." 
Job32:16 Ko ini ndingamirira, zvavasingatauri ivo, Zvavanoramba vamire, vasina chavangapindura here?" 
Job32:17 Neniwo ndichapindura padzoro rangu, Neniwo ndichazivisa kufunga kwangu." 
Job32:18 Nokuti ndizere namashoko; Mweya, uri mukati mangu, unondimanikidza." 
Job32:19 Tarirai, mukati mangu makafanana newaini isina pokubuda napo; Zvakafanana nehombodo itsva dzinokaroparuka." 
Job32:20 Ndichataura, kuti ndiremudzwe, Ndichashamisa miromo yangu ndipindure." 
Job32:21 Ndirege hangu kutsaura munhu upi noupi; Uye handingatumidzi ani nani mazita anobata kumeso. 
Job32:22 Nokuti handizivi kutumidza mazita anobata kumeso; Zvimwe Muiti wangu angakurumidza kundibvisa. 
Job33:1 Asi Jobho, chidonzwai henyu kutaura kwangu, Teererai mashoko angu ose." 
Job33:2 Tarirai zvino, ndashamisa muromo wangu, Rurimi rwangu rwataura mumuromo wangu," 
Job33:3 Mashoko angu achadudzira kururama komoyo wangu; Miromo yangu ichataura izvo zvainoziva nechokwadi. 
Job33:4 Mweya waMwari wakandiita, Kufuridzira kowaMasimbaose kunondipa upenyu." 
Job33:5 Kana mukagona, chindipindurai henyu; Gadzirai mashoko enyu pamberi pangu, simukai henyu." 
Job33:6 Rairai, ini ndakafanana nemwi pamberi paMwari; Neniwo ndakaumbwa nevhu." 
Job33:7 Tarirai, kutyisa kwangu hakungakutyisiyi imi, Uye handingakuremedziyi." 
Job33:8 Zvirokwazvo, makataura ini ndichizvinzwa, Ndakanzwa inzwi ramashoko enyu, richiti," 
Job33:9 Ndakanaka, handina kudarika; Handine mhosva, hapana zvakaipa mukati mangu;" 
Job33:10 Tarirai, iye unowana mhosva kuti arwe neni, Anonditi muvengi wake." 
Job33:11 Anomana makumbo angu mumatanda, Anocherekedza nzira dzangu dzose.""" 
Job33:12 Tarirai, ndichakupindurai, pachinhu ichi hamuna kururama, Nokuti Mwari mukuru kupfuura munhu." 
Job33:13 Munorwireiko naye? Nokuti haazvidaviriri pamashoko ake ose. 
Job33:14 Nokuti Mwari anotaura kamwechete, Kana kaviri, asi munhu haane hanya nazvo." 
Job33:15 Pakurota, kana pane zvinoonekwa usiku, Kana munhu abatwa nehope kwazvo, Kana avete panhovo;" 
Job33:16 Ipapo unodziura nzeve dzavanhu, Nokusimbisa kurairwa kwavo," 
Job33:17 Kuti adzore munhu pakuvavarira zvakaipa, Nokuvanzira munhu kuzvikudza;" 
Job33:18 Kuti adzore mweya wake pagomba. Upenyu hwake hurege kuparadzwa nomunondo. 
Job33:19 Unorangwawo achirwadziwa panhovo yake, Nokutambudzika nguva dzose mumapfupa ake;" 
Job33:20 Naizvozvo hupenyu hwake hunosema zvokudya, Nomoyo wake zvokudya zvinonaka." 
Job33:21 Nyama yake inopedzwa, haichaonekwi, Mapfupa ake, akanga asingaonekwi, anobudira kunze." 
Job33:22 Zvirokwazvo mweya wake unoswedera kugomba, Nohupenyu hwake kuvaparadzi." 
Job33:23 Kana mutumwa akasvika kwaari, Ari mushanduri, mumwe pakati pavane zviuru zvamazana, Kuti aratidze munhu nzira yakarurama;" 
Job33:24 Mwari akamunzwira tsitsi, akati, ""Murwirei arege kuburukira kugomba, Ndawana dzikunuro.""" 
Job33:25 Nyama yake ichava itsva kupfuura yomwana; Achadzokera kumazuva ouduku hwake. 
Job33:26 Anonyengetera kuna Mwari, iye achimufarira; Naizvozvo anotarira chiso chake nomufaro; Akadzosera munhu kururama kwake." 
Job33:27 Uchaimba pamberi pavanhu, achiti, ""Ndatadza, ndakanganisa zvakarurama, Asi hazvina kundibatsira;" 
Job33:28 Iye akarwira mweya wangu urege kuburukira kugomba, Hupenyu hwangu huchaona chiedza.""" 
Job33:29 Tarirai, Mwari unoita zvinhu izvi zvose, Kaviri kana katatu nomunhu," 
Job33:30 Kuti adzose mweya wake pagomba, Kuti avhenekerwe nechiedza chavapenyu." 
Job33:31 Cherekedzai zvakanaka, Jobho, mundinzwei; Nyararai, ini nditaure." 
Job33:32 Kana mune shoko rokureva, ndipindur ei, Taurai, nokuti ndinoda kukururamisirai." 
Job33:33 Kana musingadi, nditeererei; Nyararai, ini ndikudzidzisei huchenjeri." 
Job34:1 Ipapo Erihu akapindura, akati," 
Job34:2 Inzwai mashoko angu, imwi vanhu vakachenjera; Rerekai nzeve dzenyu kwandiri, imwi mune zivo." 
Job34:3 Nokuti nzeve ndiyo inoidza mashoko, Sezvinoravira mukamwa zvokudya." 
Job34:4 Ngatizvitsanangurire zvakarurama; Ngatizive tose kuti zvakanaka ndezvipi. 
Job34:5 Nokuti Jobho akati, `Ndakarurama, Asi Mwari akanditorera kururama kwangu;" 
Job34:6 Kunyange ndakarurama hangu, ndinonzi ndine nhema; Pandakakuvadzwa hapangapori, kunyange ndisina kudarika.'" 
Job34:7 Ndianiko akafanana naJobho, Anomwa kushorwa semvura?" 
Job34:8 Anofambidzana navanoita zvakaipa, Anofamba navanhu vakashata." 
Job34:9 Nokuti iye akati, `Munhu haatongobatsirwi, Kana achifarira Mwari.'" 
Job34:10 Saka chindinzwai, imwi varume venjere, Mwari haangatongoiti zvisakarurama; waMasimbaose haangatongoiti zvakaipa." 
Job34:11 Nokuti acharipira munhu sezvaakabata, Achapa mumwe nomumwe sezvaakafanirwa." 
Job34:12 Zvirokwazvo, Mwari haangaiti zvakaipa, waMasimbaose haangakanganisi pakutonga." 
Job34:13 Ndianiko akamuita murairi wenyika? Ndianiko akamupa nyika yose? 
Job34:14 Kana akadzosera moyo wake kwaari, Kana akadzosera kwaari mweya wake nokufema kwake;" 
Job34:15 Ipapo vanhu vose vachaparara pamwechete, Munhu akadzokerazve kuguruva." 
Job34:16 Zvino kana mukagona kunzwisisa, inzwai shoko iri, Teererai inzwi ramashoko angu." 
Job34:17 Ko munhu, anovenga zvakarurama, angabata ushe here? Mungapa mhosva munhu akarurama, ane simba here?" 
Job34:18 Ko zvakanaka kuti kuna mambo, `Makashata?' Kana kuvakuru, `Muri vakaipa here?'" 
Job34:19 Ndoda kumunhu asingakudzi machinda, Asingatsauri vafumi kupfuura varombo. Nokuti ivo vose ndiro basa ramaoko ake." 
Job34:20 Vanofa kamwe-kamwe pakati pousiku; Vanhu vanozozununguswa ndokuparara havo, Vane simba vanobviswa zvingaitwa noruoko." 
Job34:21 Nokuti meso ake anotarira nzira dzomunhu, Unoona kufamba kwake kose." 
Job34:22 Hapana rima kana mumvuri worufu, Pangavanda vanoita zvakaipa." 
Job34:23 Nokuti haachafaniri kurangarira munhu, Kuti atongwe pamberi paMwari." 
Job34:24 Anoparadza vanhu vane simba asinganzveri, Ndokugadza vamwe panzvimbo yavo." 
Job34:25 Saka anocherekedza mabasa avo; Unovaparadza usiku, vakapwanyiwa." 
Job34:26 Anovarova sezvinorohwa vanhu vakaipa Vamwe vose vachizviona pachena; 
Job34:27 Nokuti vakatsauka pakumutevera, Vakasava nehanya nenzira dzake dzose;" 
Job34:28 Naizvozvo vakasvitsa kuchema kwavarombo kwaari, Akanzwa kuchema kwavakatambudzwa." 
Job34:29 Kana iye akazorodza, ndianiko ungapa mhosva? Kana akavanza chiso chake, ndianiko angazomuona? Kana zvichitarirwa rudzi kana munhu mumwe, zvakafanana hazvo;" 
Job34:30 Kuti munhu asakarurama arege kubata ushe, Kuti kurege kuva nomunhu achateya vanhu." 
Job34:31 Nokuti kunomunhu here akati kuna Mwari, `Ndarangwa hangu, kunyange ndisina kutadza?" 
Job34:32 Ndidzidzisei zvandisingaoni; Kana ndichinge ndaita zvakaipa, handingazviitizve?'" 
Job34:33 Ko iye achatsiva sezvaunoda iwe, zvaunozviramba here? Nokuti ndiwe unofanira kutsanangura, handizini; Saka chitaura zvaunoziva." 
Job34:34 Vanhu vane njere vachati kwandiri, Uye vose vakachenjera, vanondinzwa, vachati," 
Job34:35 ‘Jobho anotaura zvaasingazivi, Mashoko ake haano uchenjeri." 
Job34:36 Dai Jobho aiidzwa kusvikira pakupedzisira, Zvaakapindura savanhu vakaipa." 
Job34:37 Nokuti anowedzera kumukira Mwari pazvivi zvake, Anorova namaoko ake pakati pedu, Achiwanza mashoko ake anorwa naMwari.' """ 
Job35:1 Zvino Erihu akapindurawo, akati," 
Job35:2 Munoti ndiko kururama kwenyu here. Munoti, kururama kwangu kunopfuura kwaMwari?" 
Job35:3 Zvamunoti, `Muchabatsirweiko nazvo?' Ndichawaneiko, zvingapfuura zvandingawana kana ndatadza hangu?" 
Job35:4 Ndichakupindurai, Pamwechete neshamwari dzenyu." 
Job35:5 Tarirai kudenga-denga, muone; Tarirai makore okudenga akakwirira kupfuura imi." 
Job35:6 Kana muchinge matadza, ko mungamuitei iye? Kana kudarika kwenyu kuchinge kwakawanda, ko mungamuitei?" 
Job35:7 Kana makarurama, mungamupeiko? Kana iye uchapiweiko paruoko rwenyu?" 
Job35:8 Kuipa kwenyu kungatadzira munhu akaita semi, Kururama kwenyu kungabatsira mwanakomana womunhu." 
Job35:9 Vanhu vanoridza mhere nokuda kokumanikidza kwakawanda; Vanoridza mhere kuti varwirwe paruoko rwoane simba. 
Job35:10 Asi hapana anoti, `Mwari Muiti wangu aripiko?' Iye anotiimbisa usiku;" 
Job35:11 Iye anotidzidzisa kupfuura shiri dzokudenga? Anotiita vakachenjera kupfuura shiri dzokudenga? 
Job35:12 Ipapo vanochema, asi hapana anopindura, Nokuda kokuzvikudza kwavanhu vakaipa." 
Job35:13 Zvirokwazvo Mwari haanganzwi zvisina maturo, waMasimbaose haangavi nehanya nazvo." 
Job35:14 Ndoda kana muchiti, handimuoni; Mhosva iri pamberi pake, chimumirirai henyu!" 
Job35:15 Asi zvino, zvaasina kutsiva pakutsamwa kwake, Kana kusava nehanya zvikuru nokuzvikudza;" 
Job35:16 Naizvozvo Jobho woshamisa muromo wake achireva zvisina maturo; Wowanza mashoko asingazivi. 
Job36:1 Erihu akapfuurawo, akati," 
Job36:2 Nditenderei henyu zvishoma, ndikuratidzei; Nokuti ndichine zvimwe zvandinoda kutaura pamusoro paMwari." 
Job36:3 Ndichatora zivo yangu kure, Ndicharatidza kuti Muiti wangu akarurama." 
Job36:4 Nokuti zvirokwazvo, mashoko angu haane nhema; Mumwe akakwana pazivo unemi." 
Job36:5 Tarirai, Mwari ane simba, asi haashori munhu; Imhare pasimba renjere." 
Job36:6 Haachengeti upenyu hwavakaipa; Asi anoruramisira vanotambudzika. 
Job36:7 Haaregi kutarira vakarurama nameso ake; Asi anovagarisa pachigaro choushe pamwechete namadzimambo, Anovagarisa nokusingaperi, vachikudzwa." 
Job36:8 Asi kana vachinge vasungwa namaketani, Kana kubatwa namabote okutambudzika;" 
Job36:9 Ipapo unovazivisa mabasa avo, Nokudarika kwavo, kuti vakafamba vachizvikudza." 
Job36:10 Unodziurawo nzeve dzavo vanzwe kuraira kwake, Unovaraira kuti vadzoke pazvakaipa zvavo." 
Job36:11 Kana vakamunzwa nokumushumira, Vachapedzisa mazuva avo vachifara, Namakore avo vari pane zvinofadza." 
Job36:12 Asi kana vakaramba kuteerera, vachapera nomunondo, Vachafa vasina zivo." 
Job36:13 Asi vasingadi Mwari pamoyo vanozviunganidzira kutsamwa; Havaridzi mhere kuti vabatsirwe kana achivasunga. 
Job36:14 Vanofa vachiri vaduku, Hupenyu hwavo hunopera sohwavasina kururama." 
Job36:15 Anorwira anotambudzika pakutambudzika kwake, Unodziura nzeve dzavo pakumanikidzwa kwavo." 
Job36:16 Zvirokwazvo, akanga achida kukubvisai panjodzi Kukusvitsai panzvimbo yakafara, pasina kumanikana; Kuti zvinoiswa patafura yenyu zvive zvizere namafuta." 
Job36:17 Asi imwi muzere nokutonga vakaipa; Kutonga nokururamisira zvinokubatai. 
Job36:18 Nokuti chenjerai kuti kutsamwa kurege kukusvitsai pakudadira; ukuru bwedzikunuro hurege kukutsausai. 
Job36:19 Ko fuma yenyu ingaringana, kuti murege kutambudzika here, Uye simba renyu rose-rose here?" 
Job36:20 Musashuva usiku apo ndudzi dzinobviswa panzvimbo yadzo. 
Job36:21 Chenjerai, regai kurangarira zvakaipa; Nokuti ndizvo zvamakasanangura kupfuura kutambudzika." 
Job36:22 Tarirai, Mwari anoita zvinhu zvikuru nesimba rake; Ndianiko mudzidzisi wakafanana naye?" 
Job36:23 Ndianiko akamuraira nzira yake? Kana ndianiko angati, `Makaita zvisina kururama here?'" 
Job36:24 Rangarirai, kuti murumbidze basa rake, Rakaimbwa navanhu." 
Job36:25 Vanhu vose vakaritarira; Vanhu vanoriona vari kure. 
Job36:26 Tarirai, Mwari mukuru; asi isu hatimuzivi; Kuwanda kwamakore ake hakunganzverwi." 
Job36:27 Nokuti anokwevera kumusoro madonhedza emvura, Anoshanduka mvura inonaya ichibva pamwando wawo;" 
Job36:28 Inodururwa namakore Ichidonhera yawanda pamusoro pavanhu. 
Job36:29 Ko kuno munhu anganzwisisa kudhadhanurwa kwamakore, Nokutinhira kwetende rake here?" 
Job36:30 Tarirai, unodhadhanura chiedza chake kunhivi dzake dzose; Unofukidza pasi pegungwa." 
Job36:31 Nokuti naizvozvi anotonga ndudzi dzavanhu; Anovapa zvokudya zvizhinji. 
Job36:32 Anofukidza maoko ake nemheni; Nokuiraira kuti irove payakaratidzwa. 
Job36:33 Mubvumo wayo unomuzivisa, Nemombewo dzinonzwa kuti unouya." 
Job37:1 Zvirokwazvo moyo wangu unobvunduswawo pamusoro paizvozvi, Uchibviswa panzvimbo yawo." 
Job37:2 Teererai kutinhira kwenzwi rake, Nokuwunga kunobva pamuromo wake." 
Job37:3 Anokutuma pasi pedenga rose, pamagumisiro enyika." 
Job37:4 Inoteverwa nenzwi rinodzvova, Anotinhira nenzwi roumambo hwake. Haazvidzivisi kana inzwi rake richinzwika." 
Job37:5 Mwari anotinhira nenzwi rake rinoshamisa; Anoita zvinhu zvikuru zvatisingagoni kunzwisisa. 
Job37:6 Nokuti anoti kuchando, ""Chiwira panyika;"" Saizvozvowo kumvura inopfunha-pfunha, Uyewo kumvura inoturuka nesimba." 
Job37:7 Anodzivisa ruoko rwomunhu mumwe nomumwe, Kuti vanhu vose vaakaita vamuzive." 
Job37:8 Panguva iyo zvikara zvinondovanda, Zvichirambira mumapako azvo." 
Job37:9 Dutu remhepo rinobuda pakamuri rezasi; Nechando kurutivi rwokumusoro. 
Job37:10 Mazaya echando anopiwa vanhu nomweya waMwari Uye mvura mhami inogwamba. 
Job37:11 Anozadza makore matema nomwando, Anodhadhanura gore rine mheni yake." 
Job37:12 Rinotendeudzwa nokufambisa kwake, Kuti zviite zvose zvaanozviraira Panyika inogarwa navanhu;" 
Job37:13 Anoituma kuti zvimwe ive shamhu, zvimwe ifadze nyika yake, zvimwe iratidze tsitsi yake." 
Job37:14 Teererai shoko iri, nhasi Jobho; Chimbomirai murangarire mabasa anoshamisa aMwari." 
Job37:15 Ko munoziva marairirwo azvo naMwari here, Nokupenyiswa kwemheni yegore rake here?" 
Job37:16 Munoziva maturikirwo amakore here, Namabasa anoshamisa aiye akakwana pazivo here?" 
Job37:17 Munonzwisisa madziyiro enguvo dzenyu, Kana nyika yakagadzikana nemhepo inobva zasi here?" 
Job37:18 Ko mungagona kudhadhanura denga pamwechete naye, Iro rakasimba sechioni-oni chakaumbwa here?" 
Job37:19 Tidzidzisei zvatingareva kwaari; Nokuti hatigoni kunyatsoreva nemhaka yerima. 
Job37:20 Ko iye anofanira kuudzwa kuti ndinoda kutaura here? Kana ndianiko munhu anoda kumedzwa? 
Job37:21 Zvino vanhu havagoni kutarira chiedza chinopenya kudenga; Asi mhepo ichapfuura, ndokurinatsa." 
Job37:22 Kunaka sokwendarama kunobva kurutivi rwokumusoro; Mwari ano humambo hunotyisa kwazvo. 
Job37:23 Kana ari waMasimbaose, hatigoni kumunzwisisa; ane simba guru-guru; Haangatambudzi pakutonga nokururama kukuru." 
Job37:24 Saka vanhu vanomutya; Haane hanya navane moyo yakachenjera. 
Job38:1 Ipapo Jehovha akapindura Jobho, ari pachamupupuri, akati," 
Job38:2 Ndianiko uya anodzima zano rangu achiriita rima Namashoko asine zivo here? 
Job38:3 Chizvisunga chiuno chako zvino somurume; Nokuti ndichakubvunzisisa, iwe undidudzire." 
Job38:4 Iwe wakanga uripiko panguva yandakateya nheyo dzenyika? Chidudzira, kana une zivo iwe." 
Job38:5 Ndianiko akatara kukura kwayo, kana uchizviziva? Kana ndianiko akaiyera norwonzi?" 
Job38:6 Ko nheyo dzayo dzakateyiwa pamusoro pei? Kana ndianiko akateya ibwe rayo rekona? 
Job38:7 Panguva yakaimba nyeredzi dzamambakwedza pamawa, Uye vanakomana vose vaMwari vachipururudza nomufaro?" 
Job38:8 Kana ndianiko wakadzivira gungwa nemikova, Panguva yokudzutuka kwaro, richibuda pachizvaro;" 
Job38:9 Panguva yandakaita gore nenguva yaro, Uye rima guru uve mucheka wokuriputira nawo;" 
Job38:10 Panguva.yandakaritarira muganhu waro, Ndikariisira mazariro nemikova," 
Job38:11 Ndikati, `Ungasvikira pano, asi haungapfuvuri; Mafungu ako, anozvikudza, achadzivirirwa pano?'" 
Job38:12 Iwe wakatongoraira mangwanani kubva pakutanga kwamazuva ako here, Ukaratidza mambakwedza nzvimbo yawo here?" 
Job38:13 Kuti abate migumo yenyika, Vakaipa vazuzwe vabve pairi here?" 
Job38:14 Zvinoshanduka sevhu kana richitsikwa nechisimbiso, Zvinhu zvose zvichionekwa sapanguvo." 
Job38:15 Vakaipa vanodzitirirwa chiedza chavo, Ruoko, runozvikudza, runovhuniwa." 
Job38:16 Iwe wakatongopinda pamatsime egungwa here? Kana wakatongofamba pakadzikadzika pasi here? 
Job38:17 Masuo orufu akatongokuzarurirwa here? Kana wakatongoona masuo omumvuri worufu here? 
Job38:18 Wakatongonzwisisa upamhi bwenyika here? Dudzira, kana uchizviziva zvose." 
Job38:19 Nzira iripiko inoenda kunogara chiedza, Kana riri rima, nzvimbo yaro iripiko?" 
Job38:20 Kuti undozviisa kumiganho yazvo, Uye kuti uzive nzira dzinoenda kumusha wazvo here?" 
Job38:21 Unenge unoziva hako, nokuti wakanga wakazvarwa panguva iyo! Mazuva ako anenge akawanda kwazvo!" 
Job38:22 Wakatongopinda panovigwa fuma yamazaya echando here, Kana wakatongoona panovigwa fuma yechimvuramabwe here?" 
Job38:23 Izvo zvandakachengetera nguva yenhamo, Nezuva rokurwa nehondo here?" 
Job38:24 Chiedza chinoparadzaniswa nomutoo upiko, Uye mhepo inobva mabvazuva inopararira seiko panyika?" 
Job38:25 Ndianiko akacherera boporodzi remvura mugero, Kana kuratidzira mheni yomutinhiro nzira yayo;" 
Job38:26 Kuti mvura iniswe panyika isina vanhu, Parenje pasina vanhu;" 
Job38:27 Kuti ivhu rakasiyiwa nerakaparadzwa rigutswe; Uye bumhudza rimereswe here? 
Job38:28 Ko mvura inonaya inababa here? Kana ndianiko wakazvara madonhedza edova? 
Job38:29 Mazaya echando akabuda muchizvaro chaaniko? Uye chando chokudenga ndianiko akachibereka? 
Job38:30 Mvura inogwamba sebwe, Gungwa rakadzika rinogwamba pamusoro paro." 
Job38:31 Ko iwe ungasunga sumbu reChinyamutanhatu, Kana kusunungura zvisungo zveOrionhi here?" 
Job38:32 Iwe ungabudisa Mazaroti panguva yawo here? Kana ungagona kufambisa Arikituro navanakomana vayo here? 
Job38:33 Iwe unoziva mitemo yokudenga here? Iwe ungagona kuraira ushe hwazvo panyika here? 
Job38:34 Ko iwe ungasvitsa inzwi kumakore, Kuti ufukidzwe nemvura yakawanda here?" 
Job38:35 Iwe ungagona kutuma mheni, kuti dzifambe, Dzichiti kwauri, `Tiri pano,' here?" 
Job38:36 Ndianiko akaisa uchenjeri mukati mamakore matema? Kana ndianiko akapa nyeredzi njere? 
Job38:37 Ndianiko angagona kuverenga makore nohuchenjeri hwake here? Kana ndianiko angagona kudurura hombodo dzemvura dzokudenga? 
Job38:38 Kana guruva richiungana pamwechete, Namavhinga achinamatirana here?" 
Job38:39 Ko iwe ungavhimira shumbakadzi, Kana kugutsa vana veshumba here?" 
Job38:40 Kana idzo dzichitsivama panzvimbo dzadzo, Nokurambira pakavanda dzichivandira here?" 
Job38:41 Ndianiko anogadzirira gunguvo zvokudya zvaro," 
Job39:1 Iwe unoziva nguva inobereka ngururu here? Kana iwe ungaona kana nondo dzichibereka here? 
Job39:2 Iwe ungagona kuverenga mwedzi yokutora kwadzo mazamu here? Kana iwe unoziva nguva yadzinobereka nayo here? 
Job39:3 Dzinokotama, ndokubereka vana vadzo, Dzinorasha ushungu hwadzo." 
Job39:4 Vana vadzo vanosimba, vanokurira kusango; Vanoenda vakasadzokazve." 
Job39:5 Ndianiko akaregedza mbizi isina kusungwa? Kana ndianiko akasunungura zvisungo zvembizi? 
Job39:6 Ndakaita renje imba yayo, Nenyika yebare hugaro hwayo." 
Job39:7 Inozvidza bope romuguta, Hainzwi kuchaira komuchairi." 
Job39:8 Nyika yamakomo ndiwo mafuro ayo, Inotsvaka mashizha ose matema." 
Job39:9 Ko nyati ingatenda kukubatira here? Kana ingavata pachidyiro chemombe dzako here 
Job39:10 Ko iwe ungasunga nyati negashu rayo mumuhoronga, Kana ingaputsa mavhinga ichikutevera here?" 
Job39:11 Ungaitenda, zvaine simba guru here? Kana kuiregera basa rako here?" 
Job39:12 Ungavimba nayo kuti iise zviyo zvako kuguta, Nokuzviunganidzira paburiro rako here?" 
Job39:13 Mhou inofara namapapiro ayo; Ko mapapiro ayo neminhenga yayo zvino hunyoro here? 
Job39:14 Nokuti inosiya mazai ayo pasi pavhu, Inowadziyisa muguruva," 
Job39:15 Ichikangamwa kuti angapwanyiwa netsoka dzavanhu, Kana kuti angatsikwa nezvikara." 
Job39:16 Inovangararira vana vayo savanenge vasati vari vayo; Kunyange yakatambudzikira pasina, haine hanya;" 
Job39:17 Nokuti Mwari wakaitorera huchenjeri, Haana kuipa njere." 
Job39:18 Panguva yainosimuka kuti itize, Inoshora bhiza nomutasvi waro" 
Job39:19 Iwe wakapa bhiza simba raro here? Ndiwe wakashongedza mutsipa waro nezenze rinopepereka here? 
Job39:20 Iwe wakarichirikisa semhashu here? Simba rokupfeza kwaro rinotyisa. 
Job39:21 Rinoteta pasi mumupata, richifarira simba raro; Rinobuda kundoshongana navarume vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo." 
Job39:22 Rinoseka kutya, harivhunduswi; Haridzoki kana richiona munondo." 
Job39:23 Goba rinorira pamusoro paro, Uye pfumo nebakatwa zvinopenya." 
Job39:24 Rinopedza pasi nokutsamwa nehasha; Harimiri kana richinzwa. inzwi rehwamanda.' ' 
Job39:25 Nguva ipi neipi kana hwamanda ichirira, rinoti, `Hekani!' Rinofembedza kurwa kana kuchiri kure, kutinhira kwamachinda, nebope." 
Job39:26 Ko ruvangu runoengerera nohuchenjeri bwako here, Ruchitambanudzira mapapiro arwo kurutivi rwezasi here?" 
Job39:27 Ko gondo rinokwira nokuraira kwako, Richindovaka dendere raro pakakwirira here?" 
Job39:28 Rinogara padombo, richivatapo, Pashongwe yedombo napanhare." 
Job39:29 Rinonan'anidza zvokudya zvaro riripo, Meso aro anozviona zviri kure." 
Job39:30 Vana varowo vanosveta ropa; Pane chakaurawa ndipo pariri. 
Job40:1 Zvino Jehovha akapfuura kupindura Jobho, akati," 
Job40:2 Ko munhu, anokakavara, angaita nharo nowaMasimbaose here? Anoita nharo naMwari ngaapindure.""" 
Job40:3 Ipapo Jobho akapindura Jehovha, akati" 
Job40:4 Tarirai, ini ndiri muduku hangu; ndingakupindurai here? Ndinofumbira muromo wangu." 
Job40:5 Ndakataura kamwe, asi handingapindurizve; Zvirokwazvo kaviri, asi handingapamhidzizve.""" 
Job40:6 Ipapo Jehovha akapindura Jobho ari muchamupupuri, akati," 
Job40:7  Chizvisunga chiuno chako zvino somurume; Ndichakubvunzisisa, iwe undipindure." 
Job40:8 Ko iwe unoda kukanganisa kutonga kwangu, Unoda kundipa mhosva, kuti iwe ururamiswe here?" 
Job40:9 Iwe unoruoko rwakafanana norwaMwari here? Iwe ungatinhira nenzwi rakafanana nerake here? 
Job40:10 Chizvishongedza zvino noukuru nokukudzwa; Ufukidze nokurumbidzwa noumambo. 
Job40:11 Durura hasha dzako dzinopfachuka; Utarire mumwe nomumwe anozvikudza, umuninipise." 
Job40:12 Tarira mumwe nomumwe anozvikudza, umuderedze. Tsika pasi vakaipa ipapo pavamire." 
Job40:13 Uvavige pamwechete paguruva; Sunga zviso zvavo pakavanda. 
Job40:14 Ipapo ndichakurumbidzawo, Ndichiti ruoko rwako rworudyi rungakuponesa." 
Job40:15 Tarira zvino mvuu, yandakaita pamwechete newe; Inodya uswa senzombe." 
Job40:16 Tarira zvino simba rayo riri muchiuno chayo; Kusimba kwayo kuri pamakakava edumbu rayo. 
Job40:17 Inotsvikidza muswe wayo somusidhari; Marunda ezvitumbi zvayo akarukwa-rukwa. 
Job40:18 Mapfupa ayo akafanana nendarira ine mhango; Mbabvu dzayo dzakafanana namazariro amatare. 
Job40:19 Ndiyo huru pamabasa aMwari; Iye, akaiita, akaipa munondo wayo." 
Job40:20 Zvirokwazvo, makomo anoivigira zvokudya zvayo; Ipapo panotamba mhuka dzose dzesango." 
Job40:21 Inovata pasi pemiti yemirotusi, Pamumvuri wetsanga napamurove." 
Job40:22 Miti yemirotusi inoifukidza nomumvuri wayo; Mikondachando yomurukova inoipoteredza. 
Job40:23 Tarira, kana rwizi rukafema nokunze, haidederi; Haityi, kunyange Jorodhani rukazara kusvikira pamuromo wayo." 
Job40:24 Ko munhu ungaibata kana yakarindira here, Kana kuurura mhino dzayo norwauro here?" 
Job41:1 Ko ungagona kubata ngwena nechiredzo, Kana kutsikirira rurimi rwayo norwonzi here?" 
Job41:2 Ungagona kupinza rwauro pamhino dzayo, Kana kuurura rushaya rwayo nechikokovono?" 
Job41:3 Ko ingakunyengetera zvikuru here? Kana ingataura mashoko manyoro kwauri? 
Job41:4 Ingaita sungano newe here, Kuti uiite muranda wako nokusingaperi?" 
Job41:5 Ungatamba nayo sezvaungaita neshiri here? Kana ungaisunga kuti vanasikana vako vatambe nayo? 
Job41:6 Mapoka avabati vehove angaitengesa here? Vangaigovera vatengi? 
Job41:7 Ungagona kuzadza ganda rayo nemiseve yenzeve here, Kana musoro wayo namapfumo ehove?" 
Job41:8 Isa ruoko rwako pamusoro payo; Rangarira kurwa, haungapamhidzizve." 
Job41:9 Tarira, tariro yake hapana; Munhu haangaori moyo nokuionachetehere?" 
Job41:10 Hakuna munhu anotyisa angatsunga kuivamba, Zvino ndianiko angagona kumira pamberi pangu here?" 
Job41:11 Ndianiko akatanga kundipa, kuti ndifanire kumuripirazve? Zvose zviri pasi pedenga rose ndezvangu." 
Job41:12 Handinganyarari kurondedzera mitezo yayo, Kana simba rayo, kana muturu wayo wakanaka." 
Job41:13 Ndianiko angagona kubvisa nguvo yayo yokunze? Ndianiko angapinda pakati pemisara miviri yameno ayo? 
Job41:14 Ndianiko angagona kuzarura mikova yechiso chayo? Pameno payo panotyisa kwazvo. 
Job41:15 Makwande ayo, ane simba, ndiko kuzvikudza kwayo; Akabatanidzwa nechisimbiso chakabata." 
Job41:16 Ari pedo nepedo, Mhepo haigoni kupinda napakati pawo." 
Job41:17 Akabatanidzwa; Anonamatirana, haangaparadzaniswi." 
Job41:18 Kuhotsira kwayo kunopenya chiedza; Meso ayo akafanana namafungiro amangwanani. 
Job41:19 Mumuromo mayo munobuda mazhenje anopfuta; Masasaradzi omoto anobarika achibvamo. 
Job41:20 Utsi hunobuda pamhino dzayo, Sapahari inovira nenhokwe dzinopfuta." 
Job41:21 Mweya wayo unobatidza masimbe, Uye murazvo womoto unobuda mumuromo mayo." 
Job41:22 Simba rinogara mumutsipa wayo, Kutyisa kunotamba pamberi payo." 
Job41:23 Nyama dzayo dzakabatanidzwa kumativi ose, Dzakasimba pairi, hadzingazununguswi." 
Job41:24 moyo wayo wakasimba sebwe; Zvirokwazvo, wakasimba seguyo." 
Job41:25 Kana ichisimuka, vane simba vanotya; Vanopenga nokuvhunduswa." 
Job41:26 Kana munhu akaitema nomunondo, haune simba; Kunyange nepfumo, kana nomuseve, kana matare anopinza." 
Job41:27 Iyo inoti matare mashanga, Uye ndarira danda rakaora." 
Job41:28 Museve haungaitizisi; Mabwe anoposhwa nechifuramabwe inoti makoto. 
Job41:29 Tsvimbo dzakaita samakoto; Inoseka kana ichinzwa kuunga kwebakatwa. 
Job41:30 Pasi payo pakafanana nezvaenga zvinocheka; Inoita sokukwekweredza chireyi chine mbambo mumatope. 
Job41:31 Inovirisa mvura yakadzika sehari; Inoita gungwa samafuta okuzora. 
Job41:32 Inotara nzira inopenya shure kwayo; Zvimwe munhu ungati, mvura yakadzika yachena vhudzi." 
Job41:33 Panyika hapana chakafanana nayo, Chakaitwa chisina kutya." 
Job41:34 Inoona zvose zvakakwirira; Ndiyo mambo wezvikara zvose zvinozvikudza. 
Job42:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura Jehovha, akati," 
Job42:2 Ndinoziva kuti imwi munogona kuita zvose, Uye kuti hakuna chamunovavarira chingadziviswa." 
Job42:3 Ndianiko uyu anodzikatira zano raMwari asine zivo? Naizvozvo ndakataura zvandakanga ndisinganzwisisi, Zvinhu zvakandishamisa kwazvo, zvandakanga ndisingazivi." 
Job42:4 Chidonzwai henyu, nditaure ini, Ndichakubvunzai, imwi mundidudzire." 
Job42:5 Ndakanga ndanzwa zvenyu nokunzwa kwenzeve; Asi zvino ziso rangu rinokuonai," 
Job42:6 Saka ndinozvisema, nokuzvidemba Muguruva namadota.""" 
Job42:7 Zvino Jehovha akati ataura mashoko iwayo kuna Jobho, Jehovha akati kuna Erifazi muTemani, ""Ndakatsamwira kwazvo iwe neshamwari dzako mbiri, nokuti imwi hamuna kutaura zvakarurama pamusoro pangu sezvakaita muranda wangu Jobho." 
Job42:8 Naizvozvo zvino chitorai nzombe nomwe namakondobwe namanomwe, muende kumuranda wangu Jobho, muzvipisire chipiriso chinopiswa; zvino muranda wangu Jobho achakunyengetererai; nokuti ndichamugamuchira iye, kuti ndirege kukuitirai zvakaenzana nohupenzi bwenyu; nokuti imwi hamuna kutaura pamusoro pangu zakarurama, sezvakaita muranda wangu Jobho.""" 
Job42:9 Zvino Erifazi muTemani, naBhiridhadhi muShuhi, naZofari muNaamati, vakandoita sezvakarairwa naJehovha, Jehovha akagamuchira Jobho." 
Job42:10 Jehovha akashandura kutapwa kwaJobho nguva yaakanyengeterera shamwari dzake; Jehovha akapa Jobho zvaakanga anazvo pakutanga kaviri. 
Job42:11 Ipapo vanun'una vake vose, nehanzvadzi dzake dzose, navazikani vake vose vaimuziva kare vakauya kwaari, vakadya zvokudya mumba make; vakamudemba nokumunyaradza pamusoro pezvakaipa zvose zvakanga zvauyiswa naJehovha pamusoro pake; munhu mumwe nomumwe akamupawo chimari, nomumwe nomumwe chindori chendarama." 
Job42:12 Saizvozvo Jehovha akaropafadza kupedzisira kwaJobho kupfuura kutanga kwake; akanga ana makwai ane zviuru zvitanhatu, nenzombe dzingasungwa pamajoko dzine chiuru chimwe, namakadzi embongoro ane chiuru chimwe." 
Job42:13 Akazovawo navanakomana vanomwe navanasikana vatatu. 
Job42:14 Akatumidza wokutanga zita rinonzi Jemima, nowechipiri zita rinonzi Kezia, nowechitatu zita rinonzi Kerenihapuki." 
Job42:15 Panyika yose hapana kuwanikwa vakadzi vakanaka pazviso zvavo vakapfuurawo vakunda vaJobho baba vavo vakapawo nhaka pakati pehanzvadzi dzavo. 
Job42:16 Shure kwaizvozvo Jobho akazogara makore ane zana namakumi mana, akaona vanakomana vake, navanakomana vavanakomana vake, kusvikira pamarudzi mana." 
Job42:17 Zvino Jobho akazofa, akwegura, ava namazuva mazhinji." 
Psalms1:1 Akakomborerwa munhu asingafambi panorangana vakaipa, Asingamiri panzira yavatadzi, Asingagari panogara vadadi." 
Psalms1:2 Asi anofarira murayiro waJehovha; Anofungisisa murayiro wake masikati nousiku. 
Psalms1:3 Achafanana nomuti wakasimwa pahova dzemvura, Unobereka michero yawo nenguva yawo, Mashizha awo haasvavi; Chinhu chipi nechipi chaanoita chichaendika." 
Psalms1:4 Vakaipa havana kudaro; Asi vakafanana nehundi inopepereswa nemhepo. 
Psalms1:5 Naizvozvo vakaipa havangamiri pakutongeswa, Navatadzi paungano yavakarurama." 
Psalms1:6 Nokuti Jehovha anoziva nzira yavakarurama; Asi nzira yavakaipa ichaparadzwa. 
Psalms2:1 Ndudzi dzinoitireiko bope, Navanhu vanofungireiko zvisina maturo?" 
Psalms2:2 Madzimambo enyika anozvigadzira, Navabati vanorangana, Kuzorwa naJehovha nomuzodziwa wake, vachiti," 
Psalms2:3 Ngatidambure zvisungo zvavo, Ngatirashe mabote avo abve kwatiri.""" 
Psalms2:4 Iye, agere kudenga-denga, achaseka; Ishe achavadadira." 
Psalms2:5 Ipapo achataura kwavari pakutsamwa kwake, Nokuvavhundusa pahasha dzake huru;" 
Psalms2:6 Kunyange zvakadaro ndakagadza mambo wangu paZiyoni, iro gomo rangu dzvene.""" 
Psalms2:7 Ndichaparidza chirevo, chinoti, ""Jehovha akati kwandiri, `Ndiwe mwanakomana wangu; Nhasi ndakubereka." 
Psalms2:8 Kumbira kwandiri, ndikupe ndudzi ive nhaka yako, Nemigumo yenyika zvive zvako." 
Psalms2:9 Muchavapwanya netsvimbo youtare; Muchavaputsanya sehari yomuumbi.' 
Psalms2:10 Zvino chivai nenjere, imwi madzimambo; Munyeverwe, imwi vatongi venyika." 
Psalms2:11 Shumirai Jehovha nokutya, Mufare muchidedera." 
Psalms2:12 Tsvodai mwanakomana, arege kutsamwa, mufire panzira, Nokuti hasha dzake dzingakurumidza kumuka. Vakakomborerwa vose vanovimba naye." 
Psalms3:1 Haiwa Jehovha, vadzivisi vangu vawanda sei! Vazhinji vanondimukira." 
Psalms3:2 Vazhinji variko vanoti kumweya wangu, ""Haano ruponeso kuna Mwari.""" 
Psalms3:3 Asi imwi Jehovha muri nhovo yangu kumativi ose; Kudzo yangu, nomusimudzi womusoro wangu," 
Psalms3:4 Ndinodana kuna Jehovha nenzwi rangu, Iye anondipindura ari pagomo rake dzvene." 
Psalms3:5 Ndakavata pasi ndikabatwa nehope; Ndikamuka; nokuti Jehovha anonditsigira. 
Psalms3:6 Handingatyi zviuru zvamazana zvavanhu, Vakandikomberedza kuzorwa neni." 
Psalms3:7 Simukai, Jehovha; ndirwirei, Mwari wangu; Nokuti makarova vavengi vangu vose pashaya dzavo; Makavhuna meno avakaipa." 
Psalms3:8 Ruponeso runobva kuna Jehovha; Kukomborera kwenyu ngakuve pamusoro pavanhu venyu. 
Psalms4:1 Ndipindurei kana ndichidana,Mwari wokururama kwangu;Pakumanikidzwa kwangu makandiisa pakafarikana;ndinzwirei tsitsi, munzwe munyengetero wangu." 
Psalms4:2 Nhai vanakomana vavanhu kukudzwa kwangu kuchashandurwa kunyadziswa kusvikira rinhiko? Muchada zvisina maturo, nekutsvaka nhema kusvikira rinhi?" 
Psalms4:3 Asi zivai kuti Jehovha akazvitsaurira munhu,anomuda Jehovha uchanzwa kana ndichidana kwaari." 
Psalms4:4 Ityai murege kutadza; Tauriranai nemoyo yenyu panhovo dzenyu,muti mwii." 
Psalms4:5 Bayirai zvibayiro zvokururama, muvimbe naJehovha" 
Psalms4:6 Vazhinji variko vanoti,""Ndianiko achatiratidza zvakanaka? Jehovha simudzirai pamusoro pedu chiedza chechiso chenyu.""" 
Psalms4:7 makaisa mufaro mumoyo mangu,Unopfuura wavanhu kana zviyo zvavo newaini yavo zvawanzwa." 
Psalms4:8 ndichavata pasi nerugare, ndibatwe nehope; Nokuti ndimi moga Jehovha munondigarisa pakasimba." 
Psalms5:1 Inzwai mashoko angu Jehovha,Rangarirai kufunga komoyo wangu." 
Psalms5:2 teererai inzwi rokuchema kwangu, imwi Mambo wangu naMwari wangu; Nokuti ndinonyengetera kwamuri." 
Psalms5:3 Jehovha, muchanzwa inzwi rangu mangwanani;Mangwanani ndichakurongedzerai munyengetero wangu,ndichirindira." 
Psalms5:4 Nokuti hamuzi Mwari anofarira zvakaipa, munhu, akashata, haangagari nemi." 
Psalms5:5 Munhu anozvikudza,haangamiriri pamberi penyu;Munovenga vose vanoita zvakaipa." 
Psalms5:6 Muchaparadza anoreva nhema; Jehovha anosema munhu anoteura ropa neanonyengera. 
Psalms5:7 Asi kana ndirini, ndichapinda mumba menyu nekuwanda kwevunyoro bwenyu, Ndichanamata ndakaringira kutemberi yenyu tsvene ndichikutyai." 
Psalms5:8 Ndifambisei, Jehovha, mukururama kwenyu nekuda kwavavengi vangu; Gadzirai nzira yenyu pamberi pangu." 
Psalms5:9 Nokuti hapana kutendeka pamiromo yavo; Mukati mavo makashata-shata; huro dzavo bwiro bwakashama; Vanobata kumeso norurimi rwavo. 
Psalms5:10 Muvapei, mhosva, Jehovha ngavawe namano avo;Nokuti vakakumukirai." 
Psalms5:11 Asi vose vanovimba nemwi ngavafare, Ngavadanidzire nomufaro nguva dzose,nokuti imwi munovadzitira; Vose vanoda zita renyu ngavafare nemi." 
Psalms5:12 Nokuti mucharopafadza akarurama; imwi Jehovha, muchamukomberedza nenyasha senhovo." 
Psalms6:1 Haiwa Jehovha, regai kundiraira pakutsamwa kwenyu, Musandirova nekufara kwenyu kukuru." 
Psalms6:2 Ndinzwirei nyasha, Jehovha;nokuti ndaonda; Ndiponesei,Jehovha nokuti mapfupa angu anotambudzika." 
Psalms6:3 Mweya wangu unotambudzikawo zvikuru; Asi imwi Jehovha muchanonoka kusvikira mhiko? 
Psalms6:4 Dzokai Jehovha, murwire mweya wangu; Ndiponesei nokuda kwevunyoro bwenyu." 
Psalms6:5 Nokuti parufu hapana achakurangarirai; Ndiani achakuvongai paSheori? 
Psalms6:6 Ndaneta nokugomba kwangu; Usiku humwe nohumwe ndinoshambirisa nhovo dzangu; Ndinonyorovedza mubhedha wangu nemisodzi yangu. 
Psalms6:7 Ziso rangu rapera nokuchema, Rinosakara nokuda kwavadzivisi vangu." 
Psalms6:8 Ibvai kwandiri, imwi vabati vose vezvakaipa; Nokuti Jehovha akanzwa inzwi rokuchema kwangu." 
Psalms6:9 Jehovha akanzwa kukumbira kwangu; Jehovha achagamuchira munyengetero wangu. 
Psalms6:10 Vavengi vangu vose vachanyadzwa nokutambudzika zvikuru; Vachadzoka, vachanyadzwa pakarepo." 
Psalms7:1 Jehovha Mwari wangu, ndinovimba nemi; Ndiponesei kuna vose vanonditeverera, mundirwire;" 
Psalms7:2 Kuti arege kubvambura mweya wangu seshumba, aubvamburanye, ndichishaiwa anondirwira." 
Psalms7:3 Jehovha Mwari wangu, kana ndichinge ndakaita izvozvi; Kana zvakaipa zvirimo mumaoko angu;" 
Psalms7:4 Kana ndichinge ndakaitira zvakaipa munhu aiva noukama neni; (Izvo, ndakarwira waiva mudzivisi wangu asina mhosva;)" 
Psalms7:5 Muvengi ngaateverere mweya wangu, aubate; Ngaatsikire upenyu hwangu pasi, Aise kukudzwa kwangu muguruva." 
Psalms7:6 Simukai Jehovha, pakutsamwa kwenyu, Simukirai hasha dzavadzivisi vangu; Mumuke nokuda kwangu; ndimi makaraira kuti zvakarurama zviitwe." 
Psalms7:7 Ungano yendudzi dzavanhu ngaikupoteredzei; Mudzokere kumusoro pamusoro pavo. 
Psalms7:8 Jehovha anotonga ndudzi dzavanhu; Nditongei Jehovha sokururama kwangu, uye nechokwadi zviri mandiri." 
Psalms7:9 Haiwa, kuipa kwavakaipa ngakugume, asi simbisai akarurama; Nokuti Mwari akarurama anoidza moyo netsvo." 
Psalms7:10 nhovo yangu iri kuna Mwari, Iye anoponesa vane moyo yakarurama." 
Psalms7:11 Mwari mutongi akarurama, Zvirokwazvo, ndiMwari unosvotwa zuva rimwe nerimwe." 
Psalms7:12 Kana munhu asingatendeuki, iye acharodza munondo wake; Akakunga uta hwake, akahugadzira." 
Psalms7:13 Akazvigadzirirawo nhumbi dzokuuraya nadzo; Anozviitira miseve inopisa. 
Psalms7:14 Tarira, anotambudzika pakubereka zvakaipa; Zvirokwazvo, akava nemimba yezvakashata, akabereka nhema." 
Psalms7:15 Akachera hunza, akaidzikisa, Akawira mugomba raakachera iye." 
Psalms7:16 Zvakashata zvake zvichadzokera pamusoro wake amene, Uye kumanikidza kwake kuchauya pamusoro pedehenya rake." 
Psalms7:17 Ndichavonga Jehovha nokuda kokururama kwake; Ndichaimbira zita raJehovha Wokumusoro soro. 
Psalms8:1 Haiwa Jehovha, Ishe wedu,Zita renyu rakaisvonaka sei panyika yose! Makaisa umambo bwenyu kudenga." 
Psalms8:2 Pamiromo yavacheche navanomwa makaisa simba, Nokuda kwavadzivisi venyu, Kuti munyaradze muvengi nomutsivi." 
Psalms8:3 Kana ndichicherekedza denga renyu rose, iro basa remimwe yenyu,Mwedzi nenyeredzi zvamakarongedza;" 
Psalms8:4 Munhu chinyiko, zvamunomufunga? NoMwanakomana womunhu zvamunomushanyira?" 
Psalms8:5 Nokuti makamuita muduku zvishoma kuna Mwari, Makamushongedza korona yokubwinya nokukudzwa." 
Psalms8:6 Makamubatisa ushe hwamabasa amaoko enyu; Makaisa zvose pasi petsoka dzake. 
Psalms8:7 Makwai ose nenzombe, Nemhuka dzesango;" 
Psalms8:8 Neshiri dzokudenga, nehove dzegungwa, Izvo zvose zvinofamba nenzira dzegungwa." 
Psalms8:9 Haiwa Jehovha, Ishe wedu, Zita renyu rakaisvonaka sei panyika yose!" 
Psalms9:1 Ndichavonga Jehovha nomoyo wangu wose; Ndichaparidza mabasa enyu ose anoshamisa. 
Psalms9:2 Ndichafara nokukufarirai zvikuru; Ndichaimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokurumbidza, imwi Wokumusoro-soro." 
Psalms9:3 Kana vavengi vangu vachidzokera shure, Vanogumburwa nokupera pamberi penyu." 
Psalms9:4 Nokuti mandiruramisira mhosva yangu; Makagara pachigaro choushe muchitonga nokururama. 
Psalms9:5 Makatuka vahedheni, makaparadza vakaipa, Makadzima zita ravo nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms9:6 Vavengi vakapera, vakaparadzwa nokusingaperi; Makaparadza maguta avo, Nechiyeudzo chawo chakaparara." 
Psalms9:7 Asi Jehovha agere ari mambo nokusingaperi; Akagadzira chigaro chake choushe kuti atonge. 
Psalms9:8 Achatonga nyika nokururama, Achatonga vanhu zvakafanira." 
Psalms9:9 Jehovha achava nhare yakasimba kuna vanomanikidzwa, Nhare yakasimba panguva yokutambudzika." 
Psalms9:10 Vanoziva zita renyu vachavimba nemi; Nokuti imwi Jehovha hamuna kurasha vanokutsvakai. 
Psalms9:11 Imbirai Jehovha nziyo dzokumurumbidza, iye agere paZiyoni; dudzirai zvaakaita pakati pendudzi dzavanhu." 
Psalms9:12 Nokuti iye, anotsiva ropa, anovarangarira; Haakangamwi kuchema kwavarombo." 
Psalms9:13 Ndinzwirei tsitsi, Jehovha; Tarirai, kumanikidzwa kwangu navanondivenga, imwi munondisimudza pamisuo yorufu;" 
Psalms9:14 Kuti ndiparidze kurumbidzwa kwenyu kose; Pamisuo yomukunda weZiyoni, Ndichafarira kuponesa kwenyu." 
Psalms9:15 Vahedheni vakanyura mugomba ravakachera; Rutsoka rwavo rwakabatwa mumumbure, wavakavanza." 
Psalms9:16 Jehovha wakazvizivisa, akatonga; Akaipa wakateyiwa nebasa ramaoko ake." 
Psalms9:17 Vakaipa vachadzokera kuSheori, Ivo vahedheni vose, vakakangamwa Mwari." 
Psalms9:18 Nokuti anoshaiwa haangakanganikwi nokusingaperi, Nokutarira komurombo hakungaperi nokusingaperi." 
Psalms9:19 Simukai Jehovha; munhu ngaarege kukunda; Vahedheni ngavatongwe pamberi penyu. 
Psalms9:20 Chivatyisai, Jehovha; Vahedheni ngavazive kuti vanongova vanhu." 
Psalms10:1 Munomirireiko kure, Jehovha? Munozvivanzireiko panguva dzokutambudzika?" 
Psalms10:2 Pakuzvikudza kwake akaipa anotambudza murombo zvikuru; Ngavabatwe namano avakafunga. 
Psalms10:3 Nokuti wakaipa anozvirumbidza pamusoro pezvinoda moyo wake, Anoruchiva anoramba Jehovha nokumuzvidza." 
Psalms10:4 Nokuzvikudza kwechiso chake, wakaipa anoti, ""Haangabvunzi."" Ndangariro dzake dzose dzinoti, ""Hakuna Mwari.""" 
Psalms10:5 Nzira dzake dzakasimba nguva dzose; Zvamunotonga imwi zviri kure kumusoro, haazvioni; Kana vari vadzivisi vake vose, anovashora." 
Psalms10:6 Anoti mumoyo make, ""Handingazununguswi; Handingavi panhamo kusvikira kumarudzi angu ose.""" 
Psalms10:7 Muromo wake uzere nokutuka nokunyengera nokumanikidza; Zvakashata nezvakaipa zviri pasi porurimi rwake. 
Psalms10:8 Anogara panzvimbo dzokuvanda dzemisha; Pakavanda ndipo paanouraya asina mhosva; Meso ake anovandira asina wokumubatsira. 
Psalms10:9 Anovandira pakavanda seshumba panzvimbo yayo; Anovanda kuti abate murombo; Anobata murombo, kana achimukakatira mumumbure wake." 
Psalms10:10 Anonyangira, anokotama pasi, Vasina mubatsiri vanowiswa nesimba rake." 
Psalms10:11 Anoti mumoyo make, ""Mwari akangamwa; Anovanza chiso chake, haangatongozvioni.""" 
Psalms10:12 Simukai Jehovha; Mwari simudzai ruoko rwenyu; Regai kukangamwa varombo. 
Psalms10:13 Akaipa anozvidzireiko Mwari, Achiti mumoyo wake, ""Hangabvunzi?""" 
Psalms10:14 Mazviona henyu; nokuti munoona kutambudzika nokuchema, kuti muzvibate muruoko rwenyu; asinamubatsiri anozviisa kwamuri; Makava mubatsiri wenherera." 
Psalms10:15 Vhunai ruoko rwowakaipa. Kana ari munhu akashata, nzverai zvakaipa zvake, kusvikira musingazozviwani." 
Psalms10:16 Jehovha ndiye Mambo. nokusingaperi-peri; Vahedheni vakaparadzwa munyika yake. 
Psalms10:17 Jehovha, makanzwa zvinodikamwa navanyoro; Muchasimbisa moyo yavo, mucharerekera nzeve yenyu;" 
Psalms10:18 Kuti mutongere nherera neanotambudzwa, Kuti munhu wapanyika arege kuramba achivhundusa." 
Psalms11:1 Ndinovimba naJehovha; Munoreva seiko kumweya wangu, muchiti, ""Tizira kugomo rako seshiri?" 
Psalms11:2 Nokuti, tarira, vakaipa vanobwembura uta, Vanogadzira museve wavo parukungiso, Kuti vafure anomoyo wakarurama parima." 
Psalms11:3 Kana nheyo dzakaparadzwa, Akarurama angaiteiko?""" 
Psalms11:4 Jehovha uri mutemberi yake tsvene, Iye Jehovha, chigaro chake choushe chiri kudenga; Meso ake anotarira, mafungiro ameso ake anoidza vana vavanhu." 
Psalms11:5 Jehovha anoidza vakarurama; Asi mweya wake unovenga wakaipa neanomanikidza. 
Psalms11:6 Achanisira misungo pamusoro pavakaipa; Moto nesuriferi nemhepo inopisa, ndiwo uchava mukombe wavo wavakagoverwa." 
Psalms11:7 Nokuti Jehovha akarurama; anoda zvakarurama; Vakarurama vachaona chiso chake. 
Psalms12:1 Batsirai, Jehovha; nokuti vanoda Mwari vopera; Nokuti vakatendeka havachipo pakati pavana vavanhu." 
Psalms12:2 Vanotaura mumwe nomumwe zvisina maturo nowokwake; Vanotaura nomuromo unobata kumeso, uye nemoyo miviri." 
Psalms12:3 Jehovha achagura miromo yose inobata kumeso, Norurimi runotaura zvinhu zvikuru;" 
Psalms12:4 Ivo vakati, ""Tichakunda norurimi rwedu; Miromo yedu ndeyedu; ndianiko angava ishe wedu?""" 
Psalms12:5 Nokuda kokumanikidzwa kwavarombo, nokugomera kwavanoshaiwa, Ndichamuka zvino nokuda kwaizvozvo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; Ndichamuisa pakasimba ipo paanoshuva." 
Psalms12:6 Mashoko aJehovha mashoko akachena; Sesirivha yakaidzwa mubisiro panyika, Yakanatswa kanomwe." 
Psalms12:7 Muchavachengeta, Jehovha, Muchavachengeta parudzi urwu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms12:8 Vakaipa vanofamba pamativi ose, Kana zvakashata zvichikudzwa pakati pavanakomana vavanhu." 
Psalms13:1 Jehovha muchandikangamwa nokusingaperi kusvikira rinhi? Muchandivanzira chiso chenyu kusvikira rinhiko? 
Psalms13:2 Ndichafunga mano mumweya mangu kusvikira rinhi, Ndine shungu pamoyo pangu zuva rimwe nerimwe? Muvengi wangu achandikurira kusvikira rinhi?" 
Psalms13:3 Rangarirai, mundipindure, Jehovha Mwari wangu; Vhenekerai meso angu, ndirege kuvata hope dzokufa;" 
Psalms13:4 Muvengi wangu arege kuti, ""Ndamukunda;"" Vadzivisi vangu varege kufara kana ndichizununguka." 
Psalms13:5 Asi ndakavimba nenyasha dzenyu; moyo wangu uchafara nokuponesa kwenyu; 
Psalms13:6 Ndichaimbira Jehovha, Nokuti akandiitira zvakanaka." 
Psalms14:1 Benzi rakati mumoyo maro, ""Mwari haako."" Vakaora, vakabata mabasa anonyangadza; Hapana anoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms14:2 Jehovha ari kudenga, akatarira pasi kuvana vavanhu, Kuti aone kana akachenjera aripo, Anotsvaka Mwari." 
Psalms14:3 Vakatsauka vose, vakasvibiswa pamwechete; Hapana anoita zvakanaka, kunyange nomumwe." 
Psalms14:4 Ko vaiti vose vezvakaipa havana zivo here? Ivo vanodya vanhu vangu sezvavanodya chingwa, Vasingadani kuna Jehovha." 
Psalms14:5 Vakanga vachitya zvikuru ipapo; Nokuti Mwari anogara parudzi rwavakarurama. 
Psalms14:6 Munonyadzisa zano romurombo, Asi Jehovha ndiye utiziro hwake." 
Psalms14:7 Dai kuponeswa kwalsiraeri kwaibva paZiyoni! Kana Jehovha achidzosa vanhu vake pakutapwa, Ipapo Jakobho achafarisisa kwazvo, naIsiraeri achafara." 
Psalms15:1 Jehovha, ndianiko angatsaukira mutende renyu? Ndianiko angagara pagomo renyu dzvene?" 
Psalms15:2 Uyo, anofamba asina mhosva, anoita zvakarurama, Anotaura chokwadi mumoyo make." 
Psalms15:3 Iye asina makuhwa parurimi rwake, Asingaitiri shamwari yake zvakaipa, Asingatuki waagere naye." 
Psalms15:4 Munhu akashata anozvidzwa naye; Asi anokudza vanotya Jehovha. Iye anoti kana achinge apika, haangazoshanduri shoko rake, kunyange zvikava zvakaipa kwaari." 
Psalms15:5 Iye asingarevi mhindu pamari yake, Kana kugamuchira chipo pamusoro pausina mhosva. Munhu anoita zvinhu izvozvi haangatongozununguswi." 
Psalms16:1 Ndichengetei, Mwari, nokuti ndinovimba nemi." 
Psalms16:2 Ndakati kuna Jehovha, ""Ndimi Ishe wangu; Kunze kwenyu handine chinhu chakanaka.""" 
Psalms16:3 Kana vari vatsvene, vari panyika, Ndivo vakaisvonaka vandinofarira zvikuru." 
Psalms16:4 Kuchema kuchawanzwa kwavanovigira mumwe mwari zvipo; Zvipiriso zvavo zvinodururwa zveropa handingazvidururi, Namazita avo handingaarevi nemiromo yangu." 
Psalms16:5 Jehovha ndiye mugove wenhaka yangu nowomukombe wangu; Munochengeta mugove wangu. 
Psalms16:6 Rwonzi rwokuyera rwakandiyerera nzvimbo dzakanaka; Zvirokwazvo, nhaka yangu yakaisvonaka." 
Psalms16:7 Ndicharumbidza Jehovha akandipa mano, Zvirokwazvo, itsvo dzangu dzinondidzidzisa panguva dzousiku." 
Psalms16:8 Ndakaisa Jehovha pamberi pangu nguva dzose; Zvaari kurudyi rwangu, handingazununguswi." 
Psalms16:9 Naizvozvo moyo wangu unofara, kukudzwa kwangu kunofarisisa; Nyama yanguvo ichagara yakachengetwa." 
Psalms16:10 Nokuti hamungasiyi mweya wangu muSheori; Hamungatenderi mutsvene wenyu kuti aone kuora. 
Psalms16:11 Mundiratidza nzira youpenyu; Mufaro wakazara uri pamberi pangu; Paruoko rwenyu rworudyi panezvinofadza nokusingaperi. 
Psalms17:1 Inzwai zvakarurama Jehovha, muteerere kuchema kwangu; Rerekerai nzeve dzenyu kumunyengetero wangu, unobva pamiromo isinganyengeri." 
Psalms17:2 Kutongwa kwangu ngakubve pamberi penyu; Meso enyu ngaatarire zvakarurama. 
Psalms17:3 Makaidza moyo wangu; makandishanyira usiku; Makandiidza, mukasawana kufunga kwakaipa mandiri Ndakazvisunga kuti muromo wangu urege kudarika." 
Psalms17:4 Kana ari mabasa avanhu; neshoko remiromo yenyu, Ini ndakanzvenga nzira dzomuparadzi." 
Psalms17:5 Kutsika kwangu kwakarambira panzira dzenyu, Tsoka dzangu hadzina kutedzemuka." 
Psalms17:6 Ini ndakadana kwamuri, nokuti muchandipindura, imwi Mwari; Rerekerai nzeve dzenyu kwandiri, munzwe kutaura kwangu." 
Psalms17:7 Ratidzai unyoro bwenyu hunoshamisa, imi, munoponesa vanovimba nemi, imwi munoponesa noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, ava vanovimba nemwi Kuna vanovamukira simba." 
Psalms17:8 Ndichengetei semboni yeziso renyu, Ndivanzei pasi pomumvuri wamapapiro enyu," 
Psalms17:9 Kunavakaipa, vanondiparadza, Ivo vavengi vangu vakaipa, vanondikomba." 
Psalms17:10 Vakadzivira moyo yavo; 
Psalms17:11 Vanotaura vachikudza nemiromo yavo. Vakatikomba zvino pakufamba kwedu; Vanocherekedza nameso avo kuti vatiwisire pasi. 
Psalms17:12 Vakafanana neshumba inokarira kuparadza, somwana weshumba inovandira panzvimbo dzakavanda." 
Psalms17:13 Simukai, Jehovha, Mirai pamberi pake, mumuwisire pasi; Rwirai mweya wangu nomunondo wenyu kuna vakaipa;" 
Psalms17:14 Kuvanhu, noruoko rwenyu imwi Jehovha, Kuvanhu venyika, vanomugove wavo paupenyu uhwu, Vamunozadza dumbu ravo nefuma yenyu; Vana vana vazhinji, Vanosiyira vacheche vavo zvakasara zvefuma yavo." 
Psalms17:15 Ini ndichaona chiso chenyu pakururama; Ndichaguta nomufananidzo wenyu pakumuka kwangu. 
Psalms18:1 Ndinokudisai, Jehovha, simba rangu.""" 
Psalms18:2 Jehovha idombo rangu, nenhare yangu, nomurwiri wangu; Mwari wangu, dombo rangu, wandichavimba naye; nhovo yangu, norunyanga rwokuponeswa kwangu, shongwe yangu yakakwirira." 
Psalms18:3 Ndichadana kuna Jehovha, iye anofanirwa nokurumbidzwa; Naizvozvo ndichaponeswa kuna vavengi vangu." 
Psalms18:4 Mabote orufu akandikomba; Uye nzizi dzezvakaipa dzakandivhundusa. 
Psalms18:5 Mabote eSheori akandisunga; Misungo yorufu yakandiwira. 
Psalms18:6 Pakutambudzika kwangu ndakadana kuna Jehovha, Ndikadana kuna Mwari wangu; Akanzwa inzwi rangu ari mutemberi yake; Kuchema kwangu pamberi pake kukasvika munzeve dzake." 
Psalms18:7 Ipapo nyika yakazununguka, ikadedera; Nheyo dzamakomowo dzikadengenyeka, Dzikazununguswa, nokuti akanga akatsamwa." 
Psalms18:8 Utsi hwakakwira huchibva mumhino dzake, Uye moto wakabuda mumuromo make, wakaparadza; Mazimbe akabatidzwa nawo." 
Psalms18:9 Akakotamisa kudenga-dengawo, akaburuka; Nerima guru rakanga riri pasi petsoka dzake." 
Psalms18:10 Akatasva kerubhi, akabhururuka; Zvirokwazvo, akabhururuka pamapapiro emhepo." 
Psalms18:11 Rima akariita nzvimbo yake yokuvanda, tende rake rakamupoteredza; Kusviba kwemvura zhinji, namakore matema okudenga." 
Psalms18:12 Nokupenya kwakanga kuri pamberi pake makore ake matema akapfuura, Nechimvuramabwe namazimbe omoto." 
Psalms18:13 Jehovha akatinhirawo kudenga-denga, Wokumusorosoro akataura nenzwi rake; Chimvuramabwe namazimbe omoto." 
Psalms18:14 Akatuma miseve yake, akavaparadza; Zvirokwazvo, nemheni zhinji, akavavhundusa." 
Psalms18:15 Ipapo migero yemvura zhinji yakaonekwa, Uye nheyo dzenyika dzakafukurwa, Nokutuka kwenyu, Jehovha, Nokufema komweya wemhino dzenyu." 
Psalms18:16 Wakatambanudza ruoko rwake ari kumusoro, akanditora, Akandinyukura pamvura zhinji." 
Psalms18:17 Akandirwira pamuvengi wangu ane simba, Nokuna vanondivenga, nokuti vakanga vondikurira." 
Psalms18:18 Vakandivinga nezuva renjodzi yangu, Asi Jehovha akanga ari mutsigiri wangu." 
Psalms18:19 Akandibudisira kunzvimbo yakafarikana, Akandirwira, nokuti akanga achindifarira." 
Psalms18:20 Jehovha akandiitira zvakaenzana nokururama kwangu, Akandipa mubayiro wakaenzana nokuchena kwamaoko angu." 
Psalms18:21 Nokuti ndakachengeta nzira dzaJehovha, Handina kubva kuna Mwari wangu nokunyengera." 
Psalms18:22 Nokuti zvose zvaakatonga zvakanga zviri pamberi pangu, Handina kusundira kure neni zvaakatema." 
Psalms18:23 Ndakanga ndakaruramawo kwaari, Ndakazvichengeta ini pazvakaipa zvangu." 
Psalms18:24 Naizvozvo Jehovha akandiitira zvakaenzana nokururama kwangu, Zvakaenzana nokuchena kwamaoko angu pamberi pake." 
Psalms18:25 Ane ngoni munomuitirawo nengoni, Nomunhu wakarurama kwazvo, munomuitirawo zvakarurama;"
