Psalms18:26 Akanaka munomuitirawo zvakanaka, nowakatsauka, munomuitirawo nehasha." 
Psalms18:27 Nokuti muchaponesa vanhu vanotambudzika; Asi muchaderedza meso avanozvikudza. 
Psalms18:28 Nokuti imwi muchatungidza mwenje wangu; Jehovha Mwari wangu achavhenekera rima rangu. 
Psalms18:29 Nokuti nemwi ndichavamba hondo, Kana ndina Mwari wangu ndichadarika rusvingo." 
Psalms18:30 Kana ari Mwari, nzira yake yakakwana kwazvo; Shoko raJehovha rakaidzwa; Ndiye nhovo yavose vanovimba naye." 
Psalms18:31 Nokuti ndianiko Mwari, asi iye Jehovha? Ndianiko dombo, asi iye Mwari wedu?" 
Psalms18:32 Iye Mwari, anondisunga chiuno nesimba, Anokwanisa nzira yangu." 
Psalms18:33 Anoita tsoka dzangu dzive setsoka dzenondokadzi, Anondiisa pamatunhu angu akakwirira." 
Psalms18:34 Anodzidzisa maoko angu kurwa; Naizvozvo maoko angu anobwembura uta bwendarira. 
Psalms18:35 Makandipawo nhovo yokuponesa kwenyu; Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi rwakanditsigira, Uye unyoro bwenyu hwakandiita mukuru." 
Psalms18:36 Makandiitira nzvimbo yakafarikana pandingatsika; Uye tsoka dzangu hadzina kutedzemuka. 
Psalms18:37 Ndichateverera vavengi vangu nokuvabata. Handingadzokizve kusvikira vapedzwa. 
Psalms18:38 Ndichavabaya, vakoniwe kusimuka; Vachawira pasi petsoka dzangu." 
Psalms18:39 Nokuti makandisunga chiuno nesimba rokurwa naro; Makandikundisa vaindimukira. 
Psalms18:40 Makatizisa vavengi vangu, Kuti ndiparadze vanondivenga." 
Psalms18:41 Vakachema, asi kwakanga kusina anoponesa, Kuna Jehovha, asi haana kuvapindura." 
Psalms18:42 Ipapo ndakavapwanya-pwanya seguruva pamberi pemhepo; Ndakavarashira kure samatope enzira dzomumusha. 
Psalms18:43 Makandirwira pakukakavadzana kwavanhu; Makandiita mukuru wendudzi; Vanhu vandakanga ndisingazivi, vachandishumira." 
Psalms18:44 Vachateerera pakarepo kana vachindinzwa, Vatorwa vachanamata kwandiri." 
Psalms18:45 Vatorwa vachatorerwa simba, Vachabuda pavaivanda vachidedera." 
Psalms18:46 Jehovha mupenyu; dombo rangu ngarikudzwe; Mwari wokuponeswa kwangu ngaarumbidzwe. 
Psalms18:47 Ndiye Mwari anonditsivira, Anondikundisa ndudzi dzavanhu." 
Psalms18:48 Iye anondirwira kuvavengi vangu; Zvirokwazvo, munondisimudzira kumusoro kwavanondimukira. Munondirwira pamunhu anomanikidza." 
Psalms18:49 Naizvozvo ndichakuvongai Jehovha, pakati pendudzi, Ndichaimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokukudza." 
Psalms18:50 Anopa mambo wake kuponeswa kukuru;,Anoitira muzodzwa wake unyoro, Iye Dhavhidhi nomwana wake nokusingaperi." 
Psalms19:1 Kudenga-denga kunoparidzira kubwinya kwaMwari; Uye denga rinoratidza basa ramaoko ake. 
Psalms19:2 Musi mumwe unotaurira mumwe musi, Uye usiku humwe hunopupurira humwe usiku njere." 
Psalms19:3 Hapana kutaura, kana mashoko; inzwi razvo harinzwiki." 
Psalms19:4 Rwonzi rwokuyera rwazvo rwakasvika kunyika yose, Namashoko azvo kumugumo wenyika. Akagadzirira zuva tende mukati mazvo." 
Psalms19:5 Iro rakafanana nechikomba chinobuda mumba macho, Rinofara semhare kumhanya nenzira yaro." 
Psalms19:6 Kubuda kwaro kunobva pamugumo wedenga, Kupota kwaro kunosvika pakuguma kwarozve; Hakune chinhu chakavanzirwa kupisa kwaro." 
Psalms19:7 Murayiro waJehovha wakakwana, unoponesa mweya; Chipupuriro chaJehovha ndechechokwadi, chinopa vasina mano njere." 
Psalms19:8 Zvinorairwa naJehovha zvakarurama, zvinofadza moyo; Murau waJehovha wakaisvonaka, unovhenekera meso." 
Psalms19:9 Kutya Jehovha kwakanaka, kunogara nokusingaperi; Zvakatongwa naJehovha ndezvechokwadi, zvakarurama kwazvo." 
Psalms19:10 Zvinofanira kutsvakwa kukunda ndarama, zvirokwazvo kukunda ndarama zhinji yakaisvonaka; zvinotapirawo kupfuura huchi nomusvi wamazinga ohuchi." 
Psalms19:11 Uyezve, muranda wenyu unonyeverwa nazvo; Pakuzvichengeta panomubayiro mukuru. Kana kuri kutsauka, ndiani angakuziva?" 
Psalms19:12 Ndianiko angaziva zvitadzo? Ndinatsei imwi pazvitadzo zvakavanzika. 
Psalms19:13 Dzoraiwo muranda wenyu pazvivi zvokuzvikudza; Ngazvirege kuva nesimba pamusoro pangu; ipapo ndichava akakwana, Handingavi nemhosva yokudarika kukuru." 
Psalms19:14 Mashoko omuromo wangu nokurangarira komoyo wangu ngazvifadze pamberi penyu, imwi Jehovha, dombo rangu, nomudzikunuri wangu." 
Psalms20:1 Jehovha ngaakupindure nomusi wokutambudzika; Zita raMwari waJakobho ngarikuise pakakwirira; 
Psalms20:2 Ngaakutumire rubatsiro runobva panzvimbo tsvene, Akutsigire nesimba rinobva Ziyoni." 
Psalms20:3 Ngaarangarire zvipiriso zvako zvose, Agamuchire zvibayiro zvako zvinopiswa;" 
Psalms20:4 Ngaakupe zvinodikamwa nomoyo wako, Ngaaite sezvawakafunga." 
Psalms20:5 Tichafara kwazvo nokukunda kwenyu, Tichasimudza mireza yedu nezita raMwari wedu; Jehovha ngaaite zvose zvawakakumbira." 
Psalms20:6 Zvino ndinoziva kuti Jehovha anoponesa muzodziwa wake; Achamupindura ari kudenga kwake kutsvene Nesimba roruoko rwake rworudyi, rinoponesa." 
Psalms20:7 Vamwe vanovimba nengoro, vamwe namabhiza; Asi isu tichareva zita raJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Psalms20:8 Ivo vakotamiswa, vawira pasi; Asi isu tasimuka, timire zvakanaka." 
Psalms20:9 Ponesai, Jehovha; Mambo ngaatipindure kana tichidana." 
Psalms21:1 Mambo uchafara nesimba renyu, Jehovha; Achafarira kuponesa kwenyu zvikuru sei!" 
Psalms21:2 Makamupa zvakadikamwa nomoyo wake, Hamuna kuramba kukumbira kwemiromo yake." 
Psalms21:3 Nokuti munomuchingura nemikomborero yezvakanaka; Munodzika korona yendarama yakaisvonaka pamusoro wake. 
Psalms21:4 Akakumbira upenyu kwamuri, mukamupa ihwo; Namazuva mazhinji nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms21:5 Kurumbidzwa kwake kukuru nokuda kokuponesa kwenyu, Makaisa pamusoro pake kukudzwa noumambo." 
Psalms21:6 Nokuti munomukomborera zvikuru nokusingaperi; Munomufadza nomufaro pamberi penyu. 
Psalms21:7 Nokuti mambo anovimba naJehovha, Nounyoro hwoWokumusorosoro haangazungunuswi." 
Psalms21:8 Ruoko rwenyu ruchawana vavengi venyu vose; Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruchawana vose vanokuvengai. 
Psalms21:9 Muchavaita sevira romoto nenguva yokutsamwa kwenyu. Jehovha achavamedza nehasha dzake, Moto uchavaparadza." 
Psalms21:10 Muchaparadza zvibereko zvavo panyika, Navana vavo pakati pavana vavanhu." 
Psalms21:11 Nokuti vakafunga kukuitirai zvakaipa; vakafunga zano rakaipa, asi havagoni kuzviita." 
Psalms21:12 Nokuti muchavafuratidza, Muchagadzira hungiso dzouta bwenyu kuvapfura pazviso zvavo." 
Psalms21:13 Simukai Jehovha, nesimba renyu; Naizvozvo tichaimba nokukudza chikuriri chenyu." 
Psalms22:1 Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, mandisiyireiko? Munomirireiko kure pakundibatsira, napamashoko okugomba kwangu?" 
Psalms22:2 Mwari wangu, ndinodana masikati, asi hamupinduri; Nousiku, asi handiwani zororo." 
Psalms22:3 Asi imwi muri mutsvene, imwi mugere parumbidzo dzaIsiraeri." 
Psalms22:4 Madzibaba edu akavimba nemi; Vakavimba, imwi mukavarwira." 
Psalms22:5 Vakachema kwamuri, vakarwirwa; Vakavimba nemi, vakasanyadziswa." 
Psalms22:6 Asi ini ndiri honye, handizi munhu; Ndiri chinhu chinozvidzwa navanhu, chinoshorwa navanhu vose." 
Psalms22:7 Vose, vanondiona vanondiseka; Vanoshamisa muromo, vanodzungudza misoro, vachiti," 
Psalms22:8 Chizviisai kuna Jehovha; iye ngaamurwire; Ngaamurwire, zvaanomufarira iye.""" 
Psalms22:9 Asi ndimi makandibudisa pachizvaro; Makandivimbisa nemwi ndichiri pamazamu amai vangu. 
Psalms22:10 Ndakaiswa kwamuri kubva pachizvaro; imwi muri Mwari wangu kubva padumbu ramai vangu. 
Psalms22:11 Regai kuva kure neni; nokuti njodzi iri pedo; Nokuti hapana angabatsira. 
Psalms22:12 Hondo zhinji dzakandikomba; Hondo dzine simba dzaBhashani dzakandipoteredza. 
Psalms22:13 Dzinondishamisira miromo yadzo, Seshumba inoparadza ichiomba." 
Psalms22:14 Ndakadururwa semvura, Mapfupa angu ose akasvodogoka; moyo wangu wakafanana nenamo; Wakanyauka mukati moura hwangu." 
Psalms22:15 Simba rangu rakaoma sechaenga; Rurimi rwangu rwakanamatira pashaya dzangu; Makandiisa paguruva rorufu. 
Psalms22:16 Nokuti imbwa dzakandikomberedza; Ungano yavanoita zvakaipa yakandipoteredza; Vakaboora maoko angu namakumbo angu; 
Psalms22:17 Ndingaverenga mapfupa angu ose; Vanonditarira nokundinan'anidza; 
Psalms22:18 Vanogovana nguvo dzangu pakati pavo, Vanokanda mijenya pamusoro pehanzu yangu." 
Psalms22:19 Asi imwi Jehovha, regai kuva kure neni; imwi simba rangu, kurumidzai kundibatsira." 
Psalms22:20 Rwirai mweya wangu pamunondo; Mudikamwa wangu pasimba rembwa. 
Psalms22:21 Ndiponesei pamuromo weshumba; Zvirokwazvo, makandipindura ndiri pakati penyanga dzenyati." 
Psalms22:22 Ndichadudzira zita renyu kuhama dzangu; Ndichakurumbidzai pakati peungano. 
Psalms22:23 imwi munotya Jehovha, murumbidzei; imwi mose vana vaJakobho, mukudzei; Mumutyei, imwi mose vana vaIsiraeri." 
Psalms22:24 Nokuti haana kuzvidza kana kusema dambudziko raanotambudzwa; Kana kumuvanzira chiso chake; Asi panguva yaakachema kwaari akamunzwa. 
Psalms22:25 Kurumbidza kwangu paungano huru kunobva kwamuri; Ndicharipa mhiko dzangu pamberi pavanomutya. 
Psalms22:26 Vanyoro vachadya vakaguta; Vanotsvaka Jehovha ndivo vachamurumbidza; moyo yenyu ngairarame nokusingaperi. 
Psalms22:27 Migumo yose yenyika icharangarira nokudzokera kuna Jehovha; Marudzi ose avahedheni achanamata kwamuri. 
Psalms22:28 Nokuti ushe ndohwaJehovha; Ndiye mubati wavahedheni. 
Psalms22:29 Vakuru vose venyika vachadya nokunamata; Vose vanoburukira kuguruva vachapfugama pamberi pake, Naiye asingagoni kuraramisa mweya wake." 
Psalms22:30 Vana vake vachanamata kwaari; Rudzi runotevera ruchaudzwa zvaJehovha. 
Psalms22:31 Vachauya vachidudzira kururama kwake Kuvanhu vachazozvarwa, kuti ndiye wakazviita." 
Psalms23:1 Jehovha ndiye mufudzi wangu; Hapana chandingashaiwa. 
Psalms23:2 Anondivatisa pasi pamafuro manyoro; Anondisesedza pamvura inozorodza. 
Psalms23:3 Anoponesa mweya wangu; Anondifambisa panzira dzokururama nokuda kwezita rake. 
Psalms23:4 Zvirokwazvo, kunyange ndikafamba mumupata womumvuri worufu, Handingatongotyi zvakaipa; nokuti imwi muneni; Tsvimbo yenyu nomudonzvo wenyu zvinondinyaradza." 
Psalms23:5 Munondigadzirira chokudya pamberi pavadzivisi vangu; Makazodza musoro wangu namafuta; mukombe wangu unopfachuka. 
Psalms23:6 Zvirokwazvo unyoro nenyasha zvichanditevera mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu; Ini ndichagara mumba maJehovha mazuva namazuva. 
Psalms24:1 Nyika ndeyaJehovha, nokuzara kwayo; Nyika yose navageremo." 
Psalms24:2 Nokuti wakaiteya pamusoro pamakungwa, Nokuisimbisa pamusoro penzizi." 
Psalms24:3 Ndiani angakwira mugomo raJehovha? Ndiani ungamira panzvimbo yake tsvene? 
Psalms24:4 Uyo anamaoko akachena, nomoyo wakanaka kwazvo; Asingasimudziri moyo wake kune zvisina maturo, Neasina kupika nhema." 
Psalms24:5 Iye achapiwa mukomborero naJehovha, Nokururamiswa naMwari muponesi wake." 
Psalms24:6 Urwu ndirwo rudzi rwavanomutsvaka, Vanotsvaka chiso chenyu, imwi Mwari waJakobho." 
Psalms24:7 Simudzai misoro yenyu, imwi masuo; Musimudzwe imi, magonhi akare-kare; Kuti Mambo wokubwinya apinde." 
Psalms24:8 Ndianiko iye Mambo wokubwinya? Ndiye Jehovha ane simba noumhare, Iye Jehovha anoumhare pakurwa." 
Psalms24:9 Simudzai misoro yenyu, imwi masuo; Muisimudze, imwi magonhi akare-kare; Kuti Mambo wokubwinya apinde." 
Psalms24:10 Ndianiko uyu Mambo wokubwinya? Jehovha wehondo, Ndiye Mambo wokubwinya." 
Psalms25:1 Jehovha, ndinosimudzira moyo wangu kwamuri." 
Psalms25:2 Mwari wangu, ndinovimba nemi, Ngandirege kunyadziswa; Vavengi vangu ngavarege kundikunda." 
Psalms25:3 Zvirokwazvo, hapana munhu anokumirirai anganyadziswa; Vachanyadziswa ndivo vanonyengera pasina chinhu." 
Psalms25:4 Ndiratidzei nzira dzenyu, Jehovha; Ndidzidzisei nzira dzenyu." 
Psalms25:5 Ndiperekedzei muchokwadi yenyu, mundidzidzise; Nokuti ndimi Mwari muponesi wangu; Ndinokutarirai zuva rose." 
Psalms25:6 Rangarirai, Jehovha, nyasha yenyu huru nounyoro bwenyu; Nokuti zvaivapo kare nakare." 
Psalms25:7 Regai kurangarira zvivi zvohuduku hwangu, nokudarika kwangu; Mundirangarire nounyoro bwenyu, Nokuda kokunaka kwenyu," 
Psalms25:8 Jehovha. akanaka, akarurama; Saka acharaira vatadzi panzira." 
Psalms25:9 Achaperekedza vanyoro munezvakarurama; Achadzidzisa vanyoro nzira yake. 
Psalms25:10 Nzira dzose dzaJehovha ndedzounyoro nechokwadi Kunavanochengeta sungano yake nezvipupuriro zvake. 
Psalms25:11 Nokuda kwezita renyu, Jehovha, Kangamwirai zvakaipa zvangu, nokuti zvikuru." 
Psalms25:12 Munhu ndoupiko anotya Jehovha? Ndiye waachadzidzisa nzira yaanofanira kusanangura. 
Psalms25:13 Mweya wake uchagara zvakanaka; Uye vana vake vachagara nhaka yenyika. 
Psalms25:14 Zvakavanzwa zvaJehovha ndezvavanomutya; Achavaratidza sungano yake. 
Psalms25:15 Meso angu anoramba achitarira kuna Jehovha; Nokuti anobvisa tsoka dzangu pamumbure. 
Psalms25:16 Ringirai kwandiri, mundinzwire nyasha; Nokuti ndiri ndoga, ndinotambudzika." 
Psalms25:17 matambudziko omoyo wangu awanda kwazvo; Haiwa, ndibudisei panjodzi dzangu." 
Psalms25:18 Tarirai kutambudzika kwangu nokurwadziwa kwangu; Mundikangamwire zvivi zvangu zvose. 
Psalms25:19 Tarirai vavengi vangu, nokuti vazhinji; Vanondivenga nehasha dzembengo." 
Psalms25:20 Chengetai mweya wangu mundirwire; Ndirege kunyadziswa, nokuti ndinovimba nemi." 
Psalms25:21 Kusanyengera nokururama ngazvindichengete, Nokuti ndinokumirirai." 
Psalms25:22 dzikunurai Isiraeri, imwi Mwari, Panjodzi dzake dzose." 
Psalms26:1 Nditongerei Jehovha, nokuti ndakafamba nokusanyengera kwangu; Ndakavimbawo naJehovha ndisinganyunyuti." 
Psalms26:2 Ndinzverei Jehovha, ndiidzei, Natsai itsvo dzangu nomoyo wangu." 
Psalms26:3 Nokuti unyoro bwenyu huri pamberi pameso angu, Ndakafamba muchokwadi chenyu." 
Psalms26:4 Handina kugara navanhu venhema, Handingafambidzani navanyengeri." 
Psalms26:5 Ndinovenga ungano yavanoita zvakaipa, Handingagari navatadzi." 
Psalms26:6 Ndichashambidza maoko angu ndisina mhosva; Ndigopoteredza aritari yenyu saizvozvo, Jehovha." 
Psalms26:7 Kuti ndiparidze nenzwi rokuvonga, Ndiudze vanhu zvamabasa enyu ose anoshamisa." 
Psalms26:8 Jehovha, ndinoda hugaro bweimba yenyu, Nenzvimbo panogara kubwinya kwenyu." 
Psalms26:9 Regai kusanganisa mweya wangu pamwechete navatadzi, Noupenyu hwangu navateuri veropa;" 
Psalms26:10 Vakabata zvakashata pamaoko avo, Ruoko rwavo rworudyi ruzere nefufuro." 
Psalms26:11 Asi kana ndirini ndichafamba nokusanyengera kwangu; Ndidzikunurei, mundinzwire tsitsi." 
Psalms26:12 Rutsoka rwangu rumire pakati chechetere; Ndicharumbidza Jehovha paungano 
Psalms27:1 Jehovha ndiye chiedza changu noMuponesi wangu; ndingagotya aniko? Jehovha ndiye simba roupenyu hwangu; ndingagovhunduswa naniko? 
Psalms27:2 Vaiti vezvakaipa vakati vachiuya kwandiri kuzodya nyama yangu, Ivo vadzivisi vangu navavengi vangu, vakagumburwa vakawa." 
Psalms27:3 Kunyange hondo ikandikomba, moyo wangu haungatyi; Kunyange ndikavingwa nokurwa, Nenguva iyo ndichavimba naJehovha." 
Psalms27:4 Chinhu chimwechete ndakakumbira kuna Jehovha, ndicho chandichatsvaka; Kuti ndigare mumba maJehovha misi yose youpenyu hwangu, Kuti ndione kunaka kwaJehovha, nokurangarira mutemberi yake." 
Psalms27:5 Nokuti nomusi wenjodzi anondiviga mudumba rake, Uchandivanza pakavanda patende rake; Uchandikwiridza padombo." 
Psalms27:6 Zvino musoro wangu uchasimudzirwa kumusoro kwavavengi vangu vanondikomba; Ndichamubayira zvibayiro zvomufaro patende rake. Ndichaimba, zvirokwazvo ndichaimbira Jehovha nziyo dzokumurumbidza." 
Psalms27:7 Inzwai Jehovha, kana ndichidana nenzwi rangu; Ndinzwirei tsitsi, mundipindure." 
Psalms27:8 Panguva yamakati, ""Tsvakai chiso changu;"" moyo wangu wakati kwamuri, ""Chiso chenyu, Jehovha, ndichachitsvaka.""" 
Psalms27:9 Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu; Musadzinga muranda wenyu pakutsamwa kwenyu; Makanga muri mubatsiri wangu; Regai kundirasha, kana kundisiya, imwi Mwari muponesi wangu." 
Psalms27:10 Nokuti baba vangu namai vangu vakandirasha, Asi Jehovha achandigamuchira." 
Psalms27:11 Ndidzidzisei nzira yenyu Jehovha; Mundifambise panzira yakati chechetere, Nokuda kwavanondivandira." 
Psalms27:12 Musandisundira pakuda kwavadzivisi vangu; Nokuti zvapupu zvenhema zvakandimukira, navanofemereka hasha." 
Psalms27:13 Ndingadai ndakafa hangu, kana ndisina kutenda kuti ndichaona kunaka kwaJehovha. Panyika yavapenyu." 
Psalms27:14 Rindira Jehovha; Iva nesimba, nomoyo wako utsunge; Ndinoti, rindira Jehovha." 
Psalms28:1 Ndichadana kwamuri, Jehovha; Dombo rangu, regai kundinyararira; Zvimwe, kana mukandinyararira, Ndingafanana navanoburukira kugomba." 
Psalms28:2 Inzwai inzwi remikumbiro yangu, kana ndichichema kwamuri, Kana ndichisimudzira maoko angu kunzvimbo yomukati yeimba yenyu tsvene." 
Psalms28:3 Musandibvuta pamwechete navakaipa, Navanoita zvakashata; Ivo vanotaura rugare kuna vavanogara navo, Asi zvakashata zviri mumoyo mavo." 
Psalms28:4 Muvape zvakaenzana nebasa ravo, uye zvakaenzana nezvakaipa zvavakaita, Muvape zvakaenzana nokubata kwamaoko avo; Muvaitire sezvakavafanira." 
Psalms28:5 Zvavasina kurangarira mabasa aJehovha, Nezvaakabata namaoko ake, Iye achavaputsa, akasavavakazve." 
Psalms28:6 Jehovha ngaavongwe, Nokuti akanzwa inzwi rokukumbira kwangu." 
Psalms28:7 Jehovha ndiye simba rangu nenhovo yangu; moyo wangu wakavimba naye, ndikabatsirwa; Saka moyo wangu unofara kwazvo, Ndichamurumbidza norwiyo rwangu." 
Psalms28:8 Jehovha ndiye simba ravo, Ndiye nhare yokuponesa kumuzodziwa wake." 
Psalms28:9 Ponesai vanhu venyu, muropafadze nhaka yenyu; Muvafudzewo, muvatakure nokusingaperi." 
Psalms29:1 Ipai, Jehovha, imwi vanakomana vaMwari, Ipai Jehovha kudzo nesimba." 
Psalms29:2 Ipai Jehovha kudzo yakafanirwa nezita rake; Namatai kuna Jehovha nenguvo tsvene. 
Psalms29:3 inzwi raJehovha riri pamusoro pemvura zhinji; Mwari wokubwinya unotinhira, Iye Jehovha ari pamusoro pemvura zhinji-zhinji," 
Psalms29:4 inzwi raJehovha rine simba; inzwi raJehovha rizere noumambo. 
Psalms29:5 inzwi raJehovha rinovhuna misidhari; Zvirokwazvo, Jehovha anovhunanya misidhari yeRebhanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Anoipemberesa semhuru; Iro Rebhanoni neSirioni semhuru yenyati. 
Psalms29:7 inzwi raJehovha rinopamura mirazvo yomoto. 
Psalms29:8 inzwi raJehovha rinodederesa renje; Jehovha anodederesa renje reKadheshi. 
Psalms29:9 inzwi raJehovha rinoberekesa nondo, Rinosvuura miti yamatondo; Nomutemberi yake zvose zvinoti, ""Kubwinya.""" 
Psalms29:10 Jehovha akagara pachigaro choushe paboporodzi remvura; Zvirokwazvo, Jehovha anogara ari mambo nokusingaperi." 
Psalms29:11 Jehovha achapa vanhu vake simba; Jehovha acharopafadza vanhu vake norugare. 
Psalms30:1 Ndichakukudzai zvikuru, Jehovha; nokuti makandisimudza, Hamuna kutendera vavengi vangu kufara nokuda kwangu." 
Psalms30:2 Jehovha, Mwari wangu, Ndakachema kwamuri, imwi mukandiponesa." 
Psalms30:3 Jehovha, makabudisa mweya wangu paSheori; Makachengeta upenyu hwangu, kuti ndirege kuburukira kugomba." 
Psalms30:4 Imbirai Jehovha nziyo dzokurumbidza, imwi vatsvene vake, Muvonge kana muchirangarira zita rake dzvene." 
Psalms30:5 Nokuti kutsamwa kwake kuripo chinguva chiduku; Asi ngoni dzake ndedzoupenyu hwose. Kuchema kungavapo madekwana, Asi mufaro unosvika mangwanani." 
Psalms30:6 Kana ndirini, ndakati pakufara kwangu, ""Handingatongozununguswi.""" 
Psalms30:7 Imwi Jehovha, nengoni dzenyu makamisa gomo rangu nesimba; Makavanza chiso chenyu; ini ndikatambudzika." 
Psalms30:8 Ndakachema kwamuri, Jehovha; Uye ndakakumbira kuna Jehovha;" 
Psalms30:9 Ropa rangu ringandibatsireiko, kana ndichaburukira kugomba? Guruva ringakurumbidzai here? Ringadudzira chokwadi chenyu here?" 
Psalms30:10 Inzwai Jehovha, mundinzwirei tsitsi; Jehovha, ivai mubatsiri wangu.""" 
Psalms30:11 Makashandura kuchema kwangu kukava kutamba; Makasunungura gumbo rangu, mukasunga chiuno changu nomufaro;" 
Psalms30:12 Kuti mweya wangu ukuimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza, urege kunyarara. Jehovha Mwari wangu, ndichakuvongai nokusingaperi." 
Psalms31:1 Jehovha, ndinovimba nemi; ngandirege kutongonyadziswa; Ndirwirei pakururama kwenyu." 
Psalms31:2 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri; kurumidzai kundirwira; Ivai dombo rangu rakasimba, neimba yenhare yokundiponesa." 
Psalms31:3 Nokuti ndimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu; Naizvozvo nditungamirirei mundifambise nokuda kwezita renyu. 
Psalms31:4 Ndibvutei pamumbure wavakandidzikira pakavanda; Nokuti ndimi nhare yangu. 
Psalms31:5 Ndinoisa mweya wangu muruoko rwenyu; Makandidzikunura Jehovha, imwi Mwari wechokwadi." 
Psalms31:6 Ndinovenga vanokudza zvenhema zvisina maturo; Asi ndichavimba naJehovha. 
Psalms31:7 Ndichafara nokufarisisa netsitsi dzenyu; Nokuti makaona kutambudzika kwangu; Makaziva kumanikidzwa komweya wangu; 
Psalms31:8 Hamuna kundiisa muruoko rwomuvengi; Makamisa tsoka dzangu panzvimbo yakafarikana. 
Psalms31:9 Ndinzwirei tsitsi Jehovha, nokuti ndiri panjodzi; Ziso rangu rapera nokuchema, zvirokwazvo, nomweya wangu nomuviri wanguvo." 
Psalms31:10 Nokuti hupenyu hwangu hwapera nokuchema, namakore angu nokugomera; Simba rangu rapera nokuda kokutadza kwangu, uye mapfupa angu asakara." 
Psalms31:11 Ndava chinhu chinozvidzwa nemhaka yavadzivisi vangu vose, Zvirokwazvo, zvikuru kuna vandinogara navo, nechinotyisa kuvazikani vangu; Vakandiona kunze vakanditiza." 
Psalms31:12 Ndakanganikwa sowakafa asati achafungwa; Ndava somudziyo wakaputsika. 
Psalms31:13 Ndakanzwa vazhinji vachindipomera, Zvinotyisa kumativi ose; Pakurangana kwavo pamusoro pangu Vakafunga mano kuti vanditorere upenyu hwangu." 
Psalms31:14 Asi ndakavimba nemwi Jehovha; Ndakati, ""Ndimi Mwari wangu.""" 
Psalms31:15 Nguva dzangu dziri muruoko rwenyu; Ndirwirei paruoko rwavavengi vangu, nokuna vanonditambudza." 
Psalms31:16 Vhenekesai chiso chenyu pamusoro pomuranda wenyu; Ndiponesei nounyoro bwenyu. 
Psalms31:17 Ngandirege kunyadziswa, Jehovha; nokuti ndakadana kwamuri; Vakaipa ngavanyadziswe, ngavanyarare paSheori." 
Psalms31:18 Miromo inoreva nhema ngainyarare; Iyo inotaura namanyawi kuna vakarurama, Ichizvikudza nokuvazvidza. Haiwa, zvakanaka zvenyu zvamakachengetera vanokutyai zvakakura sei, Zvamakaitira vanovimba nemi, pamberi pavanakomana vavanhu!" 
Psalms31:19 Muchavavanza pakavanda pamberi penyu, vabve pamano avanhu;" 
Psalms31:20 Muchavachengeta pakavanda patende vabve panharo dzendimi. 
Psalms31:21 Jehovha ngaavongwe, Nokuti akandiratidza unyoro hwake hunoshamisa paguta rakasimba." 
Psalms31:22 Kana ndirini, ndakati pakukaruka kwangu, ""Ndabviswa pamberi penyu;"" Kunyange zvakadaro, makanzwa inzwi rokukumbira kwangu pakuchema kwangu kwamuri." 
Psalms31:23 Idai Jehovha, imwi vatsvene vake mose; Jehovha anochengeta vakatendeka, Anotsiva zvikuru munhu anozvikudza." 
Psalms31:24 Ivai nesimba, uye moyo yenyu itsunge, imwi mose munorindira Jehovha." 
Psalms32:1 Akakomborerwa akakangamwirwa kudarika kwake, akafukidzirwa zvivi zvake" 
Psalms32:2 Akakomborerwa munhu asingaverengerwi zvakaipa naJehovha; asina kunyengera pamweya wake. 
Psalms32:3 Panguva yandakaramba ndinyerere, mapfupa angu akasakara nokuvuvura kwangu zuva rose." 
Psalms32:4 Nokuti ruoko rwenyu rwakanga rwuchirema pamusoro pangu masikati novusiku; Unyoro hwangu hwakashandurwa hukava kuoma kwechirimo. 
Psalms32:5 Ndakakuzivisai chakaipa changu, handina kuvanza chakaipa changu; Ndakati,""ndicharevurura kudarika kwangu kuna Jehovha;"" Imwi makandikangamwira kuipa kwechivi changu." 
Psalms32:6 Saka vose vanotya Mwari ngavanyengetere kwamuri panguva yamunowanikwa, zvirokwazvo kana mvura ichikukura, hasvikiri kwaari." 
Psalms32:7 Ndimi chivando changu; muchandichengeta ndirege kupinda pakutambudzika. Muchandikomberedza nenziyo dzokurwira. 
Psalms32:8 Ndichakudzidzisa nekukuraira nzira yaunofanira kufamba nayo; Ndichakupa njere neziso rangu, riri pamusoro pako." 
Psalms32:9 Regai kuva sebhiza, kana sehesera zvisinganzwisisi. Zvinofanira kufambiswa nerwauro netomu namakashu azvo, Hazvingazodi kuswedera kwauri." 
Psalms32:10 Akaipa achava nenjodzi zhinji; Asi anovimba naJehovha achakombwa netsitsi.
