Psalms33:3 Muimbirei rwiyo rutsva; Ridzai zvakanaka nokuridza kukuru. 
Psalms33:4 Nokuti shoko raJehovha rakarurama, Anoita zvose nokutendeka." 
Psalms33:5 Iye anoda kururama nokururamisa; Nyika izere nounyoro hwaJehovha. 
Psalms33:6 Kudenga-denga kwakaitwa neshoko raJehovha, Uye hondo dzose dzoko nokufema komuromo wake." 
Psalms33:7 Anounganidza mvura zhinji yegungwa pamwechete somurwi; Anochengeta mvura zhinji dzakadzika mumatura. 
Psalms33:8 Nyika yose ngaitye Jehovha; Vose vagere panyika ngavadedere pamberi pake. 
Psalms33:9 Nokuti iye akataura, zvikaitika; Akaraira, zvikamira zvikasimba." 
Psalms33:10 Jehovha anoparadza zano ravahedheni; Mifungo yendudzi dzavanhu anoishaisa simba. 
Psalms33:11 Zano raJehovha rakasimba nokusingaperi, Nendangariro dzomoyo wake kusvikira kundudzi dzose." 
Psalms33:12 Rwakakomborerwa rudzi rwakaita Jehovha Mwari warwo; Rudzi rwaakatsaura kuva nhaka yake. 
Psalms33:13 Jehovha anotarira ari kudenga; Anoona vanakomana vose vavanhu; 
Psalms33:14 Anotarira ari ipapo paagere Achiona vanhu vose vagere panyika. 
Psalms33:15 Iye anoumba moyo yavo vose, Anocherekedza mabasa avo ose" 
Psalms33:16 Hapana mambo anoponeswa nokuwanda kwehondo; Mhare hairwirwi nesimba guru. 
Psalms33:17 Bhiza haribatsiri pakukunda; Harigoni kurwira nesimba raro guru. 
Psalms33:18 Tarirai, ziso raJehovha rinotarira vanomutya, Ivo, vanorindira tsitsi dzake;" 
Psalms33:19 Kurwira mweya wavo parufu, Nokuvararamisa panguva yenzara." 
Psalms33:20 Mweya yedu yakarindira Jehovha; Ndiye mubatsiri wedu nenhovo yedu. 
Psalms33:21 Nokuti moyo yedu ichafara kwazvo maari, Zvatakavimba nezita rake dzvene." 
Psalms33:22 Tsitsi dzenyu ngadzive nesu, Jehovha, Sezvatakakurindirai." 
Psalms34:1 Ndicharumbidza Jehovha nguva dzose; Rumbidzo yake ichagara mumuromo mangu. 
Psalms34:2 Mweya wangu uchazvirumbidza muna Jehovha; Vanyoro vachazvinzwa, vakafara." 
Psalms34:3 Kudzai Jehovha pamwechete neni, Ngatikudzise zita rake pamwechete." 
Psalms34:4 Ndakatsvaka Jehovha, akandipindura, Akandisunungura pakutya kwangu kose." 
Psalms34:5 Vakatarira kwaari, vakapenyeswa nomufaro; Zviso zvavo hazvingatongonyadziswi." 
Psalms34:6 Murombo uyu akachema, Jehovha akamunzwa, Akamuponesa panjodzi dzake dzose." 
Psalms34:7 Mutumwa waJehovha anokomberedza vanomutya, Nokuvarwira." 
Psalms34:8 Ravirai henyu, muone kuti Jehovha wakanaka; Wakakomborerwa munhu anovimba naye." 
Psalms34:9 Ityai Jehovha, imwi vatsvene vake; Nokuti vanomutya havana chavanoshaiwa." 
Psalms34:10 Vana veshumba vanoshaiwa, vanofa nenzara; Asi vanotsvaka Jehovha havana chinhu chakanaka chavangashaiwa." 
Psalms34:11 Uyai imwi vana, munditeerere; Ndichakudzidzisai kutya Jehovha." 
Psalms34:12 Ndoupi munhu anoda upenyu, Anoda mazuva mazhinji, kuti aone zvakanaka?" 
Psalms34:13 Dzora rurimi rwako pakutaura zvakaipa, Nemiromo yako, urege kutaura zvinonyengera." 
Psalms34:14 Ibva pane zvakaipa uite zvakanaka; Tsvaka rugare, urutevere." 
Psalms34:15 Meso aJehovha anotarira vakarurama, Uye nzeve dzake dzinonzwa kuchema kwavo." 
Psalms34:16 Chiso chaJehovha chinovenga vanoita zvakaipa, Kuti abvise chiyeudziro chavo panyika." 
Psalms34:17 Vakarurama vakadana, Jehovha akanzwa, Akavarwira panjodzi dzavo dzose." 
Psalms34:18 Jehovha ari pedo navane moyo yakaputsika, Anoponesa vane mweya yakapwanyika." 
Psalms34:19 Akarurama anamatambudziko mazhinji; Asi Jehovha anomurwira abude paari ose. 
Psalms34:20 Anochengeta mapfupa ake ose; Hakuna nerimwe rawo rinovhuniwa. 
Psalms34:21 Zvakaipa zvichauraya akaipa; Uye vanovenga vakarurama vachapiwa mhosva. 
Psalms34:22 Jehovha anodzikunura mweya yavaranda vake; Hapana nomumwe kuna vanovimba naye achapiwa mhosva. 
Psalms35:1 Jehovha, kakavadzanai navanokakavadzana neni; Irwai navanorwa neni." 
Psalms35:2 Torai nhovo huru neduku, Musimuke kundibatsira." 
Psalms35:3 Vhomoraiwo pfumo, mudzivire nzira yavanonditeverera, Itiyi kumweya wangu, ""Ndini muponesi wako.""" 
Psalms35:4 Vanotsvaka mweya wangu ngavanyadziswe, vazvidzwe; Vanofunga kundiitira zvakaipa ngavadzoserwe shure vakanganiswe." 
Psalms35:5 Ngavafanane nehundi inopupuruswa nemhepo, Mutumwa waJehovha achivasundira." 
Psalms35:6 Nzira yavo ngaive nerima, itedze, Mutumwa waJehovha achivateverera." 
Psalms35:7 Nokuti ndisina mhosva vakandivanzira mimbure yavo muhunza, Ndisina mhosva vakacherera mweya wangu hunza." 
Psalms35:8 Kuparadzwa ngakumuwire akangofara; Uye mumbure wake waakavanza ngaumubate amene; Ngaawiremo aparadzwe. 
Psalms35:9 Mweya wangu uchafarira Jehovha Uchafarira kuponesa kwake. 
Psalms35:10 Mapfupa angu ose achati, ""Jehovha ndianiko akafanana nemi, imwi munorwira murombo panaiye akamukurira nesimba, Iye murombo nomushaiwi panowanomupamba?" 
Psalms35:11 Zvapupu zvisina kururama zvinosimuka; Zvinondibvunza zvinhu zvandisingazivi 
Psalms35:12 Zvakanaka zvangu vanozvitsiva nezvakaipa, Vachibira mweya wangu." 
Psalms35:13 Asi kana ndirini, pakurwara kwavo ndakafuka masaga; Ndakatambudza mweya wangu ndichitsanya; Munyengetero wangu ukadzokera kuchipfuva changu." 
Psalms35:14 Ndakaita seyaiva shamwari yangu kana hama yangu; Ndakakotama ndichichema, somunhu anochema mai vake." 
Psalms35:15 Asi pakugumburwa kwangu vakafara, vakaungana pamwechete; Vanhu vakashata kwazvo vakaungana kuzorwa neni, navandakanga ndisingazivi; Vakandibvambura, vasingaregi;" 
Psalms35:16 Savadadiri vakaipa pamitambo Vakandirumanyira meno avo. 
Psalms35:17 Jehovha, muchatarira izvozvo kusvikira rinhiko? Rwirai mweya wangu pakuparadza kwavo, Mudikamwa wangu pashumba." 
Psalms35:18 Ndichakuvongai paungano huru; Ndichakurumbidzai pakati pavanhu vazhinji. 
Psalms35:19 Vanondivenga ndisina mhosva ngavarege kufara pamusoro pangu; Uye vanondivenga ndisina mhosva ngavarege kubwaira neziso. 
Psalms35:20 Nokuti havatauri rugare; Asi vanofungira avo vanyerere panyika mashoko okunyengera. 
Psalms35:21 Zvirokwazvo, vakandishamisira miromo yavo; Vakati, ""Hekani, hekani! Meso edu akazviona.""" 
Psalms35:22 Makazviona, Jehovha; regai kunyarara; Ishe, regai kugara kure neni." 
Psalms35:23 Zvimutsei, mukai mundiruramisire; Mutambe mhaka yangu, Mwari wangu naShe wangu." 
Psalms35:24 Nditongerei, Jehovha Mwari wangu, nokururama kwenyu; Ngavarege kufara pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms35:25 Ngavarege kuti mumoyo mavo, ""Hekani, ndizvo zvatanga tichida;"" Ngavarege kuti, ""Tamumedza.""" 
Psalms35:26 Ngavanyadziswe, vazvidzwe pamwechete, ivo vanofarira kutambudzika kwangu; Ngavafukidzwe nokunyara nokuzvidzwa, ivo vanozvikudza pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms35:27 Ngavadanidzire nomufaro, vafare, ivo vanoda kururamiswa kwemhaka yangu; Ngavarambe vachiti, ""Jehovha ngaakudzwe, Iye, anofarira kufara komuranda wake.""" 
Psalms35:28 Ipapo rurimi rwangu ruchataura zvokururama kwenyu, Nezvokurumbidzwa kwenyu zuva rose." 
Psalms36:1 Kudarika kowakaipa kunoreva mumoyo mangu, kuchiti, ""Hakuna kutya Mwari pamberi pameso ake.""" 
Psalms36:2 Nokuti anozvibata kumeso kwake, Achiti zvakaipa zvake hazvingazikamwi zvikavengwa." 
Psalms36:3 Mashoko omuromo wake ndizvo zvakaipa nokunyengera; Akarega kuzova akachenjera nokuita zvakanaka. 
Psalms36:4 Anofunga zvakaipa panhovo dzake; Anofamba nenzira isina kunaka; Haasemi zvakaipa. 
Psalms36:5 Unyoro bwenyu, Jehovha, hwakasvika kudenga-denga; Kutendeka kwenyu kunosvikira kumakore;" 
Psalms36:6 Kururama kwenyu kwakafanana namakomo aMwari; Kutonga kwenyu kwakadzika zvikuru; Jehovha, munochengeta vanhu nemhuka." 
Psalms36:7 Unyoro bwenyu, Mwari, hwakanaka-naka sei! Vana vavanhu vanondovanda pasi pomumvuri wamapapiro enyu." 
Psalms36:8 Vachagutswa kwazvo nezvakakora zveimba yenyu; Muchavamwisa parwizi rwezvinofadza zvenyu; 
Psalms36:9 Nokuti kwamuri ndiko kune tsime roupenyu; Muchiedza chenyu ndimo matinoona chiedza. 
Psalms36:10 Rambai muchiitira vanokuzivai vunyoro bwenyu; Nokururama kwenyu kuna vane moyo yakarurama. 
Psalms36:11 Rutsoka rwoanozvikudza ngarurege kusvikira kwandiri, Ruoko rwoakaipa ngarurege kundidzinga." 
Psalms36:12 Apo ndopakawira pasi vaiti vezvakaipa, Vakawisirwa pasi, havangagoni kumukazve." 
Psalms37:1 Usava neshungu nokuda kwavanoita zvakaipa, Usagodora vanoita zvisina kururama." 
Psalms37:2 Nokuti vachakurumidza kudzurwa souswa, Vachaoma semuriwo mutema." 
Psalms37:3 Vimba naJehovha, uite zvakanaka; Gara panyika, ushingairire kutendeka." 
Psalms37:4 Farikana kwazvo kuna Jehovha; Iye agokupa zvinodikamwa nomoyo wako. 
Psalms37:5 Isa nzira yako kuna Jehovha; Vimbawo naye, iye achazviita." 
Psalms37:6 Iye achabudisa kururama kwako sechiedza, Nokururamisirwa kwako samasikati." 
Psalms37:7 Nyarara pamberi paJehovha, umurindire unyerere; Usava neshungu pamusoro poanofara panzira yake, Pamusoro pomunhu anoita mano akaipa aakafunga." 
Psalms37:8 Rega kutsamwa, urashe hasha; Usava neshungu, zvinongotadzisa munhu." 
Psalms37:9 Nokuti vanoita zvakaipa vachagurwa; Asi vanorindira Jehovha vachagara nhaka yenyika. 
Psalms37:10 Kwasara chinguva chiduku, akaipa haachazovipo; Zvirokwazvo, iwe uchacherekedza zvakanaka paaigara, asi haachazovipo zvirokwazvo iwe uchacherekedza zvakanaka paaigara, asi haachazovipo." 
Psalms37:11 Asi vanyoro ndivo vachagara nhaka yenyika; Ndivo vachafarikana kwazvo norugare rukuru. 
Psalms37:12 Akaipa anofungira akarurama mano akaipa, Anomurumanira meno ake." 
Psalms37:13 Ishe achamuseka; Nokuti anoona kuti zuva rake rinouya. 
Psalms37:14 Vakaipa vakavhomora munondo, vakawembura uta hwavo; Kuti vawisire pasi varombo navanoshaiwa, Kuti vauraya vakarurama panzira;" 
Psalms37:15 Munondo wavo uchapinda pamoyo yavo imene, Uye uta hwavo huchavhuniwa." 
Psalms37:16 Zvishoma, zvakanaka, zvowakarurama zvinopfuura zvakawanda zvavakaipa vazhinji." 
Psalms37:17 Nokuti maoko avakaipa achavhuniwa; Asi Jehovha anotsigira vakarurama. 
Psalms37:18 Jehovha anoziva mazuva avane moyo yakarurama; Nhaka yavo ndeyokusingaperi. 
Psalms37:19 Havanganyadziswi nenguva yokuipa; Pamisi yenzara vachagutiswa. 
Psalms37:20 Asi vakaipa vachaparara, Uye vavengi vaJehovha vachafanana nokunaka kwamafuro; Vacharova; vacharova soutsi." 
Psalms37:21 Akaipa anokwereta, asingaripizve; Asi akarurama ane ngoni, anopa." 
Psalms37:22 Nokuti vanokomborerwa naye vachagara nhaka yenyika; Asi vanotukwa naye vachaparadzwa. 
Psalms37:23 Mufambiro womunhu unosimbiswa naJehovha; Unofarikana munzira yake. 
Psalms37:24 Kunyange akawa, haangawiswi chose; Nokuti Jehovha anomutsigira noruoko rwake." 
Psalms37:25 Ndakanga ndiri muduku, zvino ndakwegura; Kunyange zvakadaro handina kutongoona akarurama achisiyiwa, Kana vana vake vachipemha zvokudya." 
Psalms37:26 Zuva rose anoramba ane ngoni, achiposa; Vana vake vanokomborerwa." 
Psalms37:27 Ibva pane zvakaipa, uite zvakanaka; Ugare zvakanaka nokusingaperi." 
Psalms37:28 Nokuti Jehovha unoda zvakarurama, Haasiyi vatsvene vake; Vanochengetwa nokusingaperi; Asi vana vowakaipa vachaparadzwa." 
Psalms37:29 Vakarurama vachagara nhaka yenyika, Vachagaramo nokusingaperi." 
Psalms37:30 Muromo wowakarurama unotaura zvenjere, Rurimi rwake runotaura zvakarurama." 
Psalms37:31 Murayiro waMwari wake uri mumoyo make; Pakutsika kwake haangatongotedzemuki. 
Psalms37:32 Akaipa anovandira akarurama, Achitsvaka kumuuraya." 
Psalms37:33 Jehovha haangamuregeri muruoko rwake, Kana kumupa mhosva kana atongwa." 
Psalms37:34 Rindira Jehovha, urambire panzira yake, Iye achakukudza kuti ugare nhaka yenyika; Kana vakaipa vachiparadzwa iwe uchazviona." 
Psalms37:35 Ndakaona akaipa anesimba guru, Achitandavara somuti munyoro panyika yawo." 
Psalms37:36 Zvino mumwe akapfuurazve, wanei haachipo; Ndakamutsvaka, asi akanga asichawanikwi." 
Psalms37:37 Cherekedzai munhu akakwana, mutarire akarurama; Nokuti kuguma komunhu uyo rugare." 
Psalms37:38 Kana vari vadariki, vachaparadzwa pamwechete; Pakuguma kwavo vakaipa vachaparadzwa." 
Psalms37:39 Asi kuponeswa kwavakarurama kunobva kuna Jehovha; Ndiye nhare yavo panguva yokutambudzika. 
Psalms37:40 Jehovha anovabatsira, nokuvarwira; Anovarwira kuna vakaipa, nokuvaponesa, Nokuti vakandovanda maari." 
Psalms38:1 Haiwa Jehovha, regai kundiraira pakutsamwa kwenyu, Musandiranga nokusafara kwenyu kukuru." 
Psalms38:2 Nokuti miseve yenyu yandibaya, Ruoko rwenyu runonditsikirira kwazvo." 
Psalms38:3 Hakuchina hukukutu panyama yangu nokuda kwehasha dzenyu; Uye hapachina mufaro pamapfupa angu nokuda kwechivi changu. 
Psalms38:4 Nokuti zvakaipa zvangu zvafukidza musoro wangu; Zvinondiremera somutoro unorema. 
Psalms38:5 Maronda angu anonhuwa, akaora, Nokuda kohupenzi hwangu." 
Psalms38:6 Ndakakombamiswa, ndakakotamiswa kwazvo, Ndinofamba ndichichema zuva rose." 
Psalms38:7 Nokuti chiuno changu chinopisa zvikuru; Hakuchina hukukutu panyama yangu. 
Psalms38:8 Ndakati rukutu, ndavhunika kwazvo; Ndakagomera nokuda kokutambudzika komoyo wangu." 
Psalms38:9 Ishe, zvose zvinoda moyo wangu zviri pamberi penyu; Hamuna kuvanzirwa kugomba kwangu." 
Psalms38:10 moyo wangu unopfura, ndapererwa nesimba rangu; Kana chiri chiedza chameso angu, naicho chabva kwandiri." 
Psalms38:11 Vanondida, neshamwari dzangu, vanomira kure nokuda kwehosha yangu; Uye hama dzangu dzimire kure." 
Psalms38:12 Vanotsvaka upenyu hwangu vanonditeyira misungo; Uye vanotsvaka kundikuvadza vanotaura zvokuparadzwa kwangu, Asi vanofunga kundinyengera zuva rose." 
Psalms38:13 Asi ini ndakafanana nematsi, handinzwi; Ndakafanana nembeveve isingashamisi muromo wayo." 
Psalms38:14 Zvirokwazvo, ndakafanana nomunhu asinganzwi, Asina mhinduro pamuromo wake." 
Psalms38:15 Nokuti ndimi, Jehovha, wandinotarira; imwi muchapindura, Jehovha Mwari wangu." 
Psalms38:16 Nokuti ndakati, ""Ngavarege kufara pamusoro pangu; Kana rutsoka rwangu ruchitedzemuka, vanozvikudza pamusoro pangu.""" 
Psalms38:17 Nokuti ndinovavarira kugumburwa, Uye njodzi yangu iri pamberi pangu nguva dzose." 
Psalms38:18 Nokuti ndichazvireurura zvakaipa zvangu; Ndichachema zvivi zvangu. 
Psalms38:19 Asi vavengi vangu vakasvinuka, vane simba, Uye vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vawanda." 
Psalms38:20 Naivowo vanotsiva zvakaipa nezvakanaka, Ndivo vadzivisi vangu, nokuti ndinotevera chinhu chakanaka." 
Psalms38:21 Regai kundisiya, Jehovha; Mwari wangu, regai kuva kure neni." 
Psalms38:22 Kurumidzai kundibatsira, Ishe, imwi muponesi wangu." 
Psalms39:1 Ndakati, ""Ndichachenjerera nzira dzangu, Kuti ndirege kutadza norurimi rwangu; Ndichachengeta muromo wangu netomu, Kana wakaipa ari pamberi pangu.""" 
Psalms39:2 Ndakanga ndiri mbeveve ndisingatauri, Ndakanyarara hangu, ndiri kure nezvakanaka. Kuchema kwangu kukamutswa." 
Psalms39:3 moyo wangu wakanga uchipisa mukati mangu; Ndakati ndichifunga, moto ukapfuta; Ipapo ndakataura norurimi rwangu, ndikati," 
Psalms39:4 Jehovha, ndizivisei mugumo wangu, Uye mwero wamazuva angu, kuti akadini; Ndizivisei kuti ndinongopfuura hangu.""" 
Psalms39:5 Tarirai, makaita mazuva angu sohupamhi bwechanza; Uye nguva yokurarama kwangu sechinhu chisipo pamberi penyu; Zvirokwazvo, munhu mumwe nomumwe kunyange akasimba kwazvo, mweya bedzi." 
Psalms39:6 Zvirokwazvo, munhu mumwe nomumwe anofamba-famba somumvuri; Zvirokwazvo, vanoita bope pasina; Anounganidza fuma, asi haazivi kuti ndiani achaidya." 
Psalms39:7 Zvino Ishe, ndakarindireiko? Tariro yangu iri kwamuri." 
Psalms39:8 Ndirwirei pakudarika kwangu kose; Regai kundiita munhu anosekwa namapenzi. 
Psalms39:9 Ndakanga ndiri mbeveve, handina kushamisa muromo wangu; Nokuti ndimi makazviita." 
Psalms39:10 Bvisai shamhu yenyu kwandiri; Ndapera nokurohwa noruoko rwenyu. 
Psalms39:11 Kana muchiraira munhu muchimuranga pamusoro pezvakaipa, Munopedza kunaka kwake sechifusi; Zvirokwazvo munhu mumwe nomumwe mweya hake." 
Psalms39:12 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, Jehovha, rerekerai nzeve yenyu munzwe kuchema kwangu; Musanyarara muchiona misodzi yangu; Nokuti ndiri mweni kwamuri, Mutorwa, sezvakanga zvakaita madzibaba angu ose." 
Psalms39:13 Regai kunditarira, kuti ndimbonaya hangu, Ndisati ndabva pano, ndikasazovapo." 
Psalms40:1 Ndakarindira-rindira Jehovha; Akarerekera nzeve kwandiri, akanzwa kuchema kwangu." 
Psalms40:2 Akandibudisawo pagomba rokuparadzwa, nomudziva ramatope; Akamisa tsoka dzangu padombo, akandisimbisa pakufamba kwangu." 
Psalms40:3 Akaisa rwiyo rutsva mumuromo mangu, rwokurumbidza Mwari wedu narwo; Vazhinji vachazviona, vachitya, Vachavimba naJehovha." 
Psalms40:4 Akakomborerwa anoita Jehovha chivando chake. Asina hanya navanozvikudza, navanotsaukira kunhema." 
Psalms40:5 Jehovha Mwari wangu, mabasa enyu, anoshamisa, amakaita, mazhinji, Nemifungo yenyu kwatiri; Hapana angaenzaniswa nemi. Kana ndikada kuzvidudzira nokuzvireva, Hazvingaverengwi nokuwanda kwazvo." 
Psalms40:6 imwi hamufadzwi nezvibayiro nezvipiriso; Makandidziurira nzeve dzangu; Zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvezvivi hamuna kuzvireva. 
Psalms40:7 Ipapo ndakati, ""Tarirai, ndauya; Parugwaro rwakapetwa ndakazvirairwa," 
Psalms40:8 Ndinofara kwazvo kuita kuda kwenyu, Mwari wangu; Zvirokwazvo murayiro wenyu uri mumoyo mangu.""" 
Psalms40:9 Ndakaparidza mashoko omufaro paungano huru; Tarirai, handingadzori miromo yangu, Jehovha, munozviziva" 
Psalms40:10 Handina kuvanza kururama kwenyu muwoyo mangu; Ndakadudzira kutendeka kwenyu nokuponesa kwenyu; Handina kuvanzira ungano huru unyoro bwenyu nechokwadi chenyu. 
Psalms40:11 Jehovha, imwi hamungandinyimi ngoni dzenyu; Unyoro bwenyu nechokwadi chenyu zvichandichengeta nguva dzose." 
Psalms40:12 Nokuti madambudzo asingaverengwi akandikomberedza, Zvakaipa zvangu zvakandibata, naizvozvo handigoni kutarira kumusoro; Zvakawanda kupfuura vhudzi romusoro wangu, ndapera moyo." 
Psalms40:13 Jehovha ngazvikufadzei kundirwira; Kurumidzai kundibatsira, Jehovha." 
Psalms40:14 Ngavanyadziswe, ngavazvidzwe pamwechete. Ivo vanotsvaka mweya wangu kuti vauparadze, gavadzoserwe shure, vashorwe Ivo vanofarira kundikuvadza." 
Psalms40:15 Ngavavhunduswe nokuda kwenyadzi dzavo Ivo vanoti kwandiri, ""Hekani, hekani waro!""" 
Psalms40:16 Vose vanokutsvakai ngavafarise vave nomufaro mamuri, Vanoda kuponesa kwenyu ngavarambe vachiti, ""Jehovha ngaakudzwe!""" 
Psalms40:17 Asi ini ndiri murombo nomushaiwi; Kunyange zvakadaro Ishe anondifunga; imwi muri mubatsiri wangu nomurwiri wangu; Regai kunonoka, Mwari wangu." 
Psalms41:1 Wakakomborerwa ane hanya navarombo Jehovha achamurwira nomusi wezvakaipa. 
Psalms41:2 Jehovha achamuchengeta nokumuraramisa, achakomborerwa panyika; Hamungamuisi pakuda kwavavengi vake," 
Psalms41:3 Jehovha achamutsigira panhovo yourwere; Munoshandura nhovo dzake dzose pakurwara kwake. 
Psalms41:4 Ini ndakati, ""Jehovha, ndinzwirei tsitsi; Poresai mweya wangu; nokuti ndakakutadzirai.""" 
Psalms41:5 Vavengi vangu vanotaura zvakaipa pamusoro pangu, vachiti, ""Uchagofa rinhiko, zita rake rirove?" 
Psalms41:6 Kana mumwe achiuya kuzondiona, anotaura zvisina maturo; moyo wake unozviunganidzira zvakaipa; Kana obuda kumwe, anozviparidza." 
Psalms41:7 Vose, vanondivenga, vanoita zeve-zeve pamwechete pamusoro pangu; Vanorangana kundikuvadza," 
Psalms41:8 Chinhu chakaipa chakamunamatira ndizvo zvavanotaura; Zvino zvaavata pasi, haachazomukizve." 
Psalms41:9 Haiwa, kunyange shamwari yangu chaiyo, wandaivimba naye, aidya zvokudya zvangu, Naiye andisimudzira chichitsinho chake." 
Psalms41:10 Asi imwi Jehovha, ndinzwirei tsitsi, mundisimudzei, Kuti ndivatsive." 
Psalms41:11 Ndinoziviswa nechinhu ichi kuti munofadzwa neni, Nokuti muvengi wangu haandikundi." 
Psalms41:12 Kana ndirini munonditsigira pakururama kwangu, Munondiisa pamberi penyu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms41:13 Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, ngaavongwe, Kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi Ameni, zvirokwazvo Ameni." 
Psalms42:1 Senondo inotakwairira hova dzemvura, Saizvozvo mweya wangu unokutakwairirai imwi Mwari." 
Psalms42:2 Mweya wangu une nyota kuna Mwari, iye Mwari mupenyu, Ndichasvika rinhiko ndionekwe naMwari?" 
Psalms42:3 Misodzi yangu zvakanga zviri zvokudya zvangu masikati nousiku, Pakutaura kwavo zuva rose kwandiri vachiti, ""Mwari wako aripiko?""" 
Psalms42:4 Ndinorangarira zvinhu izvi, ndichidurura mweya wangu mukati mangu, Zvokuti ndaienda navazhinji, ndichivatungamirira kuimba yaMwari Nenzwi rokufara nokurumbidza, tiri vazhinji vaitamba mutambo." 
Psalms42:5 Unoshuwireiko, mweya wangu? Unoshaiwa rugare neiko mukati mangu? Tarira kuna Mwari; nokuti ndichazomurumbidza hangu, Nokuda kokuponesa kwechiso chake." 
Psalms42:6 Haiwa Mwari, mweya wangu unosuwa mukati mangu; Naizvozvo ndinokurangarirai ndiri panyika yaJorodhani, Napamakomo eHerimoni, nechikomo cheMizari." 
Psalms42:7 Pakadzika panodana pakadzika pakutinhira kwamapopopo enyu; Mafungu enyu namapoporodzi enyu akapfuura napamusoro pangu. 
Psalms42:8 Asi Jehovha acharaira unyoro hwake panguva yamasikati, Usiku rwiyo rwake ruchava neni, Uye munyengetero kuna Mwari woupenyu hwangu." 
Psalms42:9 Ndichati kuna Mwari, dombo rangu, ""Makandikangamwireiko? Ndinofambireiko ndichichema nemhaka yokumanikidza komuvengi wangu?""" 
Psalms42:10 Zvakafanana nomunondo pamapfupa angu, kana vadzivisi vangu vachindizvidza; Kana vachiramba vachiti kwandiri, ""Mwari wako aripiko?""" 
Psalms42:11 Unoshuwireiko, mweya wangu? Unoshaiwa rugare neiko mukati mangu? Tarira kuna Mwari; nokuti ndichazomurumbidza hangu, Iye muponesi wechiso changu, naMwari wangu." 
Psalms43:1 Nditongerei Mwari, mundireverere pamhosva yangu parudzi rusina tsitsi; Ndirwirei pamunhu anonyengera asina kururama." 
Psalms43:2 Nokuti ndimi Mwari simba rangu; mandirasireiko? Ndinofambireiko ndichichema nokuda kokumanikidza komuvengi? 
Psalms43:3 Tumai chiedza chenyu nechokwadi chenyu; zvinditungamirire; Zvindisvitse kugomo renyu dzvene, Nokutabhenakeri dzenyu." 
Psalms43:4 Ipapo ndichasvika kuaritari yaMwari, Kuna Mwari, iye mufaro wangu mukuru; Ndichakurumbidzai nembira, imwi Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Psalms43:5 Unosuwireiko, mweya wangu? Unoshaiwa rugare neiko mukati mangu? Tarira kuna Mwari; nokuti ndichazomurumbidza hangu, Iye muponesi wechiso changu, naMwari wangu." 
Psalms44:1 Mwari, takanzwa nenzeve dzedu, madzibaba edu akatiudza, Basa ramakabata pamisi yavo, napamisi yekare." 
Psalms44:2 Makadzinga vahedheni noruoko rwenyu, mukavasima ivo; Makatambudza ndudzi dzavanhu mukavaparadzira ivo." 
Psalms44:3 Nokuti havana kuzviwanira nyika nomunondo wavo, Ruoko rwavo haruna kuvaponesa; Asi chanza chenyu chorudyi, noruoko rwenyu, nechiedza chechiso chenyu, Nokuti maivafarira." 
Psalms44:4 Ndimi Mambo wangu, imwi Mwari; Rairai kuti Jakobho akunde." 
Psalms44:5 nemwi tichawisira pasi vadzivisi vedu; Nezita renyu tichatsika pasi vanotimukira. 
Psalms44:6 Nokuti handingavimbi nouta hwangu, Nomunondo wangu haungandiponesi." 
Psalms44:7 Asi imwi makatiponesa pavadzivisi vedu, Mukanyadzisa vanotivenga." 
Psalms44:8 Takazvirumbidza zuva rose munaMwari, Tichavonga zita renyu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms44:9 Asi zvino makatirasha henyu, mukatinyadzisa; Hamuchafambi nehondo dzedu." 
Psalms44:10 Munotitizisa pamberi pavadzivisi; Vanotivenga vanozvipambira. 
Psalms44:11 Makatiisa samakwai akatarirwa kubayiwa; Makatiparadzira pakati pavahedheni. 
Psalms44:12 Munotengesa vanhu venyu musina chamunopiwa, Hamuna kuwedzera fuma yenyu nomutengo wavo." 
Psalms44:13 Munotiita vanhu vanosekwa navatinogara navo, Vanhu vanozvidzwa nokusekwa navakatikomberedza." 
Psalms44:14 Munotiita shumo pakati pavahedheni, Vanhu vanotidzungudzira misoro." 
Psalms44:15 Zuva rose kuzvidzwa kwangu kuri pamberi pangu, Kunyara kwechiso changu kwakandifukidza." 
Psalms44:16 Nokuda kwenzwi romutuki nomuzvidzi; Nokuda komuvengi nomutsivi.` 
Psalms44:17 Izvi zvose zvakatiwira; kunyange zvakadaro hatina kukukangamwai, Hatina kunyengedzera pasungano yenyu." 
Psalms44:18 moyo yedu haina kudzokera shure, Kutsika kwedu hakuna kutsauka panzira yenyu;" 
Psalms44:19 Kunyange makatipwanya-pwanya panzvimbo yamakava, Mukatifukidza nomumvuri worufu." 
Psalms44:20 Kana tichinge takangamwa zita raMwari wedu, Kana kutambanudzira maoko edu kunaMwari wavamwe;" 
Psalms44:21 Ko Mwari haanganzveri izvozvo here? Nokuti iye anoziva zvakavanzika zvomoyo. 
Psalms44:22 Zvirokwazvo, nokuda kwenyu tinourawa zuva rose; Tinonzi tiri makwai akatarirwa kubayiwa." 
Psalms44:23 Mukai, munovatireiko, Ishe? Mukai, musatirasha nokusingaperi." 
Psalms44:24 Munovanzireiko chiso chenyu, Muchikangamwa kutambudzika kwedu nokumanikidzwa kwedu?" 
Psalms44:25 Nokuti mweya wedu wakotamira kuguruva; Dumbu redu rinonamatira pavhu. 
Psalms44:26 Simukai mutibatsire, Mutidzikunure nokuda kounyoro bwenyu." 
Psalms45:1 moyo wangu unotutuma namashoko akanaka; Ndinotaura zvinhu zvandakaita zvinoreva mambo; Rurimi rwangu ipeni yomunyori anokurumidza kunyora. 
Psalms45:2 imwi makanaka-naka kupfuura vana vavanhu; Nyasha yakadururirwa pamiromo yenyu; Saka Mwari wakakuropafadzai nokusingaperi. 
Psalms45:3 Sungai munondo wenyu pachiuno chenyu, imwi wamasimba, Ukuru bwenyu nohumambo bwenyu." 
Psalms45:4 Fambai noumambo bwenyu muchikunda, Nokuda kwechokwadi nounyoro nokururama; Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ngarukudzidzisei zvinotyisa." 
Psalms45:5 Miseve yenyu inopinza; Vanhu vanokundwa nemi; Inobaya pamoyo yavavengi vamambo. 
Psalms45:6 Chigaro chenyu choushe, imwi Mwari, chiripo nokusingaperi-peri; Tsvimbo youshe bwenyu itsvimbo yakarurama." 
Psalms45:7 Makada kururama, mukavenga kusarurama; Naizvozvo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakakuzodzai Namafuta okufara kupfuura shamwari dzenyu." 
Psalms45:8 nguvo dzenyu dzose dzinonhuhwira nemura nearosi neakasia; Madimbwa akakufadzai achiridzwa mudzimba dzamambo dzenyanga dzenzou. 
Psalms45:9 Vakunda vamadzimambo vari pakati pavanhukadzi venyu vanokudzwa; Paruoko rwenyu rworudyi vahosi vamire vakashonga ndarama yeOfiri. 
Psalms45:10 Teerera mukunda, rangarira, urereke nzeve yako; Kangamwawo vanhu vako, neimba yababa vako;" 
Psalms45:11 Ipapo mambo achada kunaka kwako; Nokuti ndiye Ishe wako; unamate kwaari iwe. 
Psalms45:12 Uye mukunda weTiro achavapo nechipo; Vafumi pakati pavanhu vachakumbira ngoni dzako. 
Psalms45:13 Mukunda wamambo akanaka kwazvo-kwazvo mukati meimba yamambo; nguvo dzake dzakarukwa nendarama. 
Psalms45:14 Uchaperekwa kuna mambo nenguvo dzakarukwa dzinamavara; Mhandara, shamwari dzake dzinomutevera, Vachaiswa kwamuri." 
Psalms45:15 Vachaperekwa nomufaro nokufarisisa; Vachapinda mumba mamambo. 
Psalms45:16 Panzvimbo yamadzibaba ako vana vako vachavapo, Vauchaita machinda panyika yose." 
Psalms45:17 Ndichayeudzira zita renyu kusvikira kumarudzi ose; Naizvozvo ndudzi dzavanhu dzichakuvongai nokusingaperi-peri. 
Psalms46:1 Mwari ndiye utiziro bwedu nesimba redu, Ndiye mubatsiri ari pedo-pedo panguva dzokumanikidzwa." 
Psalms46:2 Saka hatingatyi, kunyange nyika ikashanduka, Uye kunyange makomo akabviswa akaiswa mukati mamakungwa;" 
Psalms46:3 Kunyange mvura zhinji yawo yotinhira nokumutswa, Kunyange makomo akadedera nokupupuma kwawo." 
Psalms46:4 Rwizi rwuripo nehova dzinofadza guta raMwari, Iyo nzvimbo tsvene yetabhenakeri dzoWokumusorosoro." 
Psalms46:5 Mwari ari mukati maro; haringazununguswi; Mwari acharibatsira kana utonga hwotsvuka. 
Psalms46:6 Vahedheni vakaita bope, ushe hwakazununguswa; Akataura nenzwi rake, nyika ikanyauka." 
Psalms46:7 Jehovha wehondo anesu; Mwari waJakobho inhare yedu. 
Psalms46:8 Uyai muone mabasa aJehovha, Zvishamiso zvaakaita panyika." 
Psalms46:9 Anogumisa kurwa kusvikira pakuguma kwenyika; Anovhuna uta, nokuvhuna-vhuna pfumo; Anopisa ngoro dzokurwa nomoto." 
Psalms46:10 Nyararai, muzive kuti ndini Mwari; Ndichava mukuru pakati pavahedheni, ndichava mukuru panyika.""" 
Psalms46:11 Jehovha wehondo anesu; Mwari waJakobho inhare yedu. 
Psalms47:1 Uchirai, imwi vanhu vose! Pururudzai kuna Mwari nenzwi romufaro mukuru!" 
Psalms47:2 Nokuti Jehovha wokumusoro-soro anotyisa; Ndiye Mambo mukuru panyika yose. 
Psalms47:3 Ndiye anotikundisa ndudzi dzavanhu, Nendudzi pasi petsoka dzedu." 
Psalms47:4 Ndiye anotitsaurira nhaka yedu, Iyo fuma yaJakobho waanoda." 
Psalms47:5 Mwari akwira nokudanidzira, Jehovha nokurira kwehwamanda." 
Psalms47:6 Imbirai Mwari nziyo dzokurumbidza, muimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza; Imbirai Mambo wedu nziyo dzokurumbidza, muimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms47:7 Nokuti Mwari ndiye Mambo wapasi pose; Muimbirei rwiyo rwakanaka rwokumurumbidza. 
Psalms47:8 Mwari anobata ushe hwavahedheni; Mwari agere pachigaro chake chitsvene choushe. 
Psalms47:9 Machinda avanhu aungana pamwechete navanhu vaMwari waAbhurahamu; Nokuti nhovo dzapasi pose ndedzaMwari; Ndiye mukuru-kuru kwazvo. 
Psalms48:1 Jehovha mukuru, anofanira kurumbidzwa kwazvo, Muguta raMwari wedu, mugomo rake dzvene." 
Psalms48:2 Rakanaka pakukwirira kwaro, mufaro wapasi pose, Ndizvo zvakaita gomo reZiyoni, pamativi okumusoro, Ndizvo zvakaita guta raMambo mukuru." 
Psalms48:3 Padzimba dzaro dzamambo Mwari wakazviratidza kuti ndiye nhare. 
Psalms48:4 Nokuti tarirai, madzimambo akaungana, Akapfuura pamwechete." 
Psalms48:5 Vakariona, vakashamiswa; Vakavhunduka, vakakurumidza kutiza." 
Psalms48:6 Vakabatwapo nokudedera; Nokurwadziwa, somukadzi anopona." 
Psalms48:7 Munoputsa zvikepe zveTarishishi, Nemhepo, inobva mabvazuva." 
Psalms48:8 Sezvatakanzwa, ndizvo zvatakaona Paguta raJehovha wehondo, iro guta raMwari wedu; Mwari acharisimbisa nokusingaperi." 
Psalms48:9 Takafunga unyoro bwenyu, Mwari, Mukati metemberi yenyu." 
Psalms48:10 Sezvakaita zita renyu, Mwari, Ndizvo zvakaitawo kurumbidzwa kwenyu kusvikira kumigumo yapasi pose; Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruzere nokururama." 
Psalms48:11 Gomo reZiyoni ngarifare, Vakunda vaJudha ngavafare kwazvo, Nokuda kwezvamakatonga." 
Psalms48:12 Poteredzai Ziyoni, mupote naro, Muverenge shongwe dzaro." 
Psalms48:13 Cherekedzai zvakanaka nhare dzaro, Fambai pakati pedzimba dzaro dzamambo; Kuti muzoudza vazukuru venyu vanotevera." 
Psalms48:14 Nokuti Mwari ndiye Mwari wedu nokusingaperi-peri; Iye achava muperekedzi wedu kusvikira pakufa. 
Psalms49:1 Inzwai chinhu ichi, imwi vanhu vose; Teererai, imwi mose mugere panyika;" 
Psalms49:2 imwi vaduku navanokudzwa, Vafumi navarombo pamwechete." 
Psalms49:3 Muromo wangu uchataura huchenjeri; Uye kufunga komoyo wangu kuchava nenjere. 
Psalms49:4 Ndicharerekera nzeve yangu inzwe mufananidzo; Ndichadudza shoko rangu rakavanzika nembira. 
Psalms49:5 Ndichatya neiko pamisi yezvakaipa, Kana zvakaipa, zvavanoda kundidzinga, zvichindikomba?" 
Psalms49:6 Ivo, vanovimba nefuma yavo, Vanozvikudza pamusoro pokuwanda kwefuma yavo;" 
Psalms49:7 Hapana angatongodzikunura hama yake, Kana kupa Mwari rudzikunuro pamusoro pake;" 
Psalms49:8 (Nokuti rudzikunuro rwemweya yawo runokosha, Runofanira kuregwa nokusingaperi;)" 
Psalms49:9 Kuti arambe ari mupenyu misi yose, Arege kuona kuora." 
Psalms49:10 Nokuti anoona kuti vachenjeri vanofa, Benzi neasina njere vanopera pamwechete, Vachisiyira vamwe fuma yavo." 
Psalms49:11 Vanofunga pamoyo pavo kuti dzimba dzavo dzichagara nokusingaperi, Nougaro hwavo kusvikira kumarudzi avo ose; Nyika dzavo vanodzitumidza mazita avo." 
Psalms49:12 Asi munhu haagari achikudzwa, Akafanana nemhuka dzinopera." 
Psalms49:13 Iyi ndiyo nzira yamapenzi; Kunyange zvakadaro vanhu vanovatevera vachitenda zvavanotaura. 
Psalms49:14 Vakatarirwa Sheori samakwai; Rufu ruchava mufudzi wavo; Vakarurama vachabata ushe pamusoro pavo mangwanani; Kunaka kwavo kuchangoparadzwa neSheori, kuti kurege kuva nougaro." 
Psalms49:15 Asi Mwari achadzikunura mweya wangu pasimba reSheori; Nokuti iye achandigamuchira. 
Psalms49:16 Usatya hako iwe kana mumwe munhu achifumiswa, Kana fuma yeimba yake ichiwedzerwa;" 
Psalms49:17 Nokuti kana achifa hapana chaachaenda nacho; Mukurumbira wake haungaburuki uchimutevera. 
Psalms49:18 Kunyange paupenyu hwake waikorokotedza mweya wake, (Kunyange vanhu vaikurumbidza kana uchizviitira zvakanaka)," 
Psalms49:19 Achaenda iye kurudzi rwamadzibaba ake; Ivo havangatongooni chiedza nokusingaperi. 
Psalms49:20 Munhu, anokudzwa, asina njere, Akafanana nemhuka dzinopera." 
Psalms50:1 Mwari, iye Mwari, Jehovha, ndiye akataura, Akadana pasi pose kubva pakubuda kwezuva kusvikira pakuvira kwaro." 
Psalms50:2 Mwari akapenya Ari paZiyoni, iro rakanaka-naka kwazvo." 
Psalms50:3 Mwari wedu anouya, haangarambi anyerere; Moto unoparadza pamberi pake, Dutu guru rinomukomberedza." 
Psalms50:4 Anodana denga kumusoro, Napasi, kuti atongere vanhu vake;" 
Psalms50:5 Unganidzirai vatsvene vangu kwandiri; Ivo vakaita sungano neni nezvibayiro. 
Psalms50:6 Kudenga-denga kunodudzira kururama kwake; Nokuti Mwari ndiye mutongi amene. 
Psalms50:7 Inzwai vanhu vangu, ndichataura; imwi Isiraeri, ndichakupupurirai, Ndini Mwari, iye Mwari wenyu." 
Psalms50:8 Handingakutukiyi pamusoro pezvibayiro zvenyu; Zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa zviri pamberi pangu nguva dzose. 
Psalms50:9 Handingatori nzombe paimba yako, Kana nhongo dzembudzi pazvirugu zvako." 
Psalms50:10 Nokuti mhuka dzose, dziri kudondo, ndedzangu, Nemombe pamakomo ane chiuru chamazana." 
Psalms50:11 Ndinoziva shiri dzose dzomumakomo; Mhuka dzose, dziri musango, ndedzangu." 
Psalms50:12 Kana ndaiva nenzara, handizaikuudza iwe; Nokuti nyika ndeyangu, nezvaizere nazvo." 
Psalms50:13 Ko ndingadya nyama yehando, Kana kumwa ropa rembudzi here?" 
Psalms50:14 Bayirai Mwari zvibayiro zvokuvonga; Uripire Wokumusorosoro mhiko dzako; 
Psalms50:15 Udane kwandiri pazuva rokutambudzika; Ini ndichakurwira, iwe ugondirumbidza.""" 
Psalms50:16 Asi kuneakaipa Jehovha anoti, ""Iwe ungadudzira seiko zvandakatema, Nokureva sungano yangu nomuromo wako?" 
Psalms50:17 Zvaunovenga kurairwa, Nokurasha mashoko angu shure kwako." 
Psalms50:18 Wakati uchiona mbavha, ukafarirana nayo, Unoshamwaridzana nemhombwe." 
Psalms50:19 Unotendera muromo wako kureva zvakaipa, Rurimi rwako runotaura nhema." 
Psalms50:20 Unogara uchipomera hama yako; Unoita makuhwa pamusoro pomwanakomana wamai vako. 
Psalms50:21 Zvinhu izvi wakazviita, ndikaramba ndinyerere; Wakafunga kuti ini ndakafanana newe chose; Asi ndichakuraira, ndichirongedzera zvinhu izvi pameso ako." 
Psalms50:22 Zvino fungai chinhu ichi, imwi vokukangamwa Mwari, Ndirege kukubvamburai, mukashaiwa murwiri," 
Psalms50:23 Munhu, anobayira chibayiro chokuvonga, unondikudza; Uye anogadzira nzira yake zvakanaka Ndichamuratidza kuponesa kwaMwari.""" 
Psalms51:1 Ndinzwirei tsitsi, Mwari nokuda kounyoro bwenyu; Dzimai kudarika kwangu nokuda kwengoni dzenyu zhinji." 
Psalms51:2 Ndisukei zvakaipa zvangu chose, Ndinatsei chivi changu." 
Psalms51:3 Nokuti ndinoziva kudarika kwangu; Chivi changu chinogara chiri pamberi pangu. 
Psalms51:4 Ndakakutadzirai imi, iyemi moga, Ndakaita chinhu chakaipa pamberi penyu; Kuti munzi makarurama pakutaura kwenyu, Muve usina mhosva pakutonga kwenyu." 
Psalms51:5 Tarirai, ndakaberekerwa muzvakaipa; Mai vangu vakandigamuchira muzvivi." 
Psalms51:6 Tarirai, munoda chokwadi pamoyo; Munoda kundidzidzisa uchenjeri mukati makavanda." 
Psalms51:7 Ndinatsei nehisopi, ndive akanaka, Ndishambidzei, ndichene kupfuura mazayi echando." 
Psalms51:8 Ndinzwisei mufaro ndive nomoyo muchena; Kuti mapfupa amakavhuna afare. 
Psalms51:9 Vanzirai zvivi zvangu chiso chenyu, Dzimai zvakaipa zvangu zvose." 
Psalms51:10 Sikai mukati mangu moyo wakachena, Mwari; Vandudzai mukati mangu mweya wakarurama." 
Psalms51:11 Regai kundirasha pamberi penyu; Musabvisa mweya wenyu mutsvene kwandiri. 
Psalms51:12 Dzoseraizve kwandiri mufaro wokuponesa kwenyu; Nditsigirei nomweya, unoda." 
Psalms51:13 Ipapo ndichadzidzisa vadariki nzira dzenyu; Uye vatadzi vachatendeukira kwamuri. 
Psalms51:14 Ndirwirei pamhosva yeropa, Mwari, imwi Mwari muponesi wangu; Ipapo rurimi rwangu ruchaimbira kururama kwenyu kwazvo." 
Psalms51:15 Ishe, zarurai miromo yangu; Ipapo muromo wangu uchaparidza kurumbidzwa kwenyu." 
Psalms51:16 Nokuti imwi hamufariri zvibayiro; ndingadai ndaikupai izvo; Hamufadzwi nechipiriso chinopiswa. 
Psalms51:17 Zvibayiro zvaMwari mweya wakaputsika; moyo wakaputsika nowakapwanyika, imwi Mwari hamungaushori." 
Psalms51:18 Itirai Ziyoni zvakanaka nokuda kwenyu; Vakai masvingo eJerusaremu. 
Psalms51:19 Ipapo muchafarira zvibayiro zvakarurama, nechipiriso chinopiswa nechipiriso chinopiswa chose; Ipapo vachabayira nzombe paaritari yenyu." 
Psalms52:1 Unozvirumbidzireiko nezvakashata, iwe mhare? Tsitsi dzaMwari dziripo misi yose." 
Psalms52:2 Rurimi rwako runofunga kutaura zvakaipa; Rwakafanana nechisvo chinopinza, ruchiita zvinonyengera." 
Psalms52:3 Unoda zvakaipa kupfuura zvakanaka; Nokureva nhema kupfuura kutaura zvakarurama. 
Psalms52:4 Unoda mashoko ose okuparadza, Iwe rurimi runonyengera." 
Psalms52:5 Mwari achakuparadzawo saizvozvo nokusingaperi, Achakubata akakubvisa patende rako, nokukudzura panyika yavapenyu." 
Psalms52:6 Vakarurama vachazviona vakatya, vachamusweveredza, vachiti," 
Psalms52:7 Tarirai, hoyu munhu asina kuita Mwari nhare yake, Asi akavimba nokuwanda kwefuma yake, Akazvisimbisa pazvakaipa zvake.""" 
Psalms52:8 Asi kana ndirini, ndakafanana nomuorivhi munyoro muimba yaMwari; Ndinovimba netsitsi dzaMwari nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms52:9 Ndichakuvongai nokusingaperi, nokuti ndimi makazviita; Ndichamirira zita renyu pamberi pavatsvene venyu nokuti rakanaka." 
Psalms53:1 Benzi rakati mumoyo maro, ""Mwari hakuna."" Vakaora, vakaita zvakaipa zvinonyangadza; Hakuna anoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms53:2 Mwari, ari kudenga, wakatarira pasi kuvana vavanhu, Kuti aone kana akachenjera aripo, Anotsvaka Mwari." 
Psalms53:3 Mumwe nomumwe wavo akadzokera shure; vakasvibiswa pamwechete; Hakuna anoita zvakanaka, kunyange nomumwe." 
Psalms53:4 Ko vaiti vezvakaipa havana zivo here? Ivo vanodya vanhu vangu sechingwa, Vasingadani kuna Mwari.""" 
Psalms53:5 Vaitya kwazvo ipapo, pakanga pasina chinotyisa; Nokuti Mwari akaparadza mapfupa aiye akanga akakukomba; Iwe wakavanyadzisa, nokuti Mwari akavarasha." 
Psalms53:6 Dai kuponeswa kwaIsiraeri kwaibva paZiyoni! Kana Mwari achidzosa vanhu vake pakutapwa, Ipapo Jakobho achafara kwazvo naIsiraeri achafara." 
Psalms54:1 'Ndirwirei Mwari, nezita renyu, Nditongerei nesimba renyu." 
Psalms54:2 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, Mwari; Rerekerai nzeve yenyu munzwe mashoko omuromo wangu." 
Psalms54:3 Nokuti vatorwa vakandimukira, Vamanikidzi vakatsvaka mweya wangu. Havana kuisa Mwari pamberi pavo." 
Psalms54:4 Tarirai, Mwari ndiye mubatsiri wangu. Ishe ari pakati pavanotsigira mweya wangu." 
Psalms54:5 Achatsiva zvakaipa kuvavengi vangu; Muvaparadze nokutendeka kwenyu. 
Psalms54:6 Ndichakubayirai nechipiriso chokungopa nokuzvidira, Ndichavonga zita renyu, Jehovha, nokuti rakanaka." 
Psalms54:7 Nokuti akandirwira pakutambudzika kose; Ziso rangu rakaona kukundwa kwavavengi vangu. 
Psalms55:1 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunyengetero wangu, Mwari; Regai kuzvivanza pakukumbira kwangu." 
Psalms55:2 Nditeererei, mundipindure;. Ndinoshaiwa zororo mukuchema kwangu, ndichivuvura;" 
Psalms55:3 Nokuda kwenzwi romuvengi, Nokuda kokumanikidza kowakaipa;, Nokuti vanondipomera zvakaipa, Vanonditambudza nokutsamwa kwavo." 
Psalms55:4 moyo wangu unorwadziwa kwazvo mukati mangu; Garudzo rorufu rakandiwira," 
Psalms55:5 Kutya nokubvunda zvakandiwira. Kutya kukuru kwakandifukidza. 
Psalms55:6 Ini ndakati, ""Haiwa, dai ndaiva namapapiro senjiva! Ndaibhururuka, ndikandozorora." 
Psalms55:7 Tarirai, ndingadai ndaitizira kure, Ndaindogara kurenje." 
Psalms55:8 Ndaikurumidza kundovanda, Nditize mhepo inovhuvhuta nedutu guru.""" 
Psalms55:9 Paradzai, Ishe mukanganise marimi avo; Nokuti ndakaona kumanikidza nokurwa muguta." 
Psalms55:10 Masikati novusiku vanoripoteredza pamasvingo aro; Zvakaipawo nezvakashata zviri mukati maro. 
Psalms55:11 Kushata kuri pakati paro; Kumanikidza nokunyengera hazvibvi panzira dzaro. 
Psalms55:12 Nokuti akanga asi muvengi akandishora; Ipapo ndaigona kutsunga; Akanga asi iye aindivenga akazvikudza kwandiri; Ipapo ndaimuvanda. 
Psalms55:13 Asi wakanga uriwe, munhu wakaenzana neni, Shamwari yangu, nomuzikamwi wangu." 
Psalms55:14 Taisirangana zvakanaka, Taifamba mumba maMwari pamwechete navanhu vazhinji." 
Psalms55:15 Rufu ngaruvawire kamwe-kamwe, Ngavaburikire kuSheori vari vapenyu; Nokuti kushata kuri paugaro hwavo, imo mukati mavo." 
Psalms55:16 Kana ndirini, ndichadana kuna Mwari; Jehovha achandiponesa." 
Psalms55:17 Madekwana namangwanani namasikati ndichachema ndichivuvura; Iye achanzwa inzwi rangu. 
Psalms55:18 Wakadzikunura mweya wangu norugare, kukasava nomumwe akaswedera kwandiri; Nokuti vakanga vachirwa neni, vaiva vazhinji." 
Psalms55:19 Mwari achanzwa, achavapindura, Iye aripo kare nakare, Nokuti havashanduki, Havatyi Mwari." 
Psalms55:20 Wakatambanudzira maoko ake kuna vaiva norugare naye; Wakashora sungano yake. 
Psalms55:21 Mashoko omuromo wake akatedza samafuta, Asi kurwa kwakanga kuri pamoyo pake; Mashoko ake akanga ari manyoro kupfuura mafuta, Kunyange zvakadaro yaiva minondo yakavhomorwa." 
Psalms55:22 Kandira mutoro wako pamusoro paJehovha, iye achakusimbisa; Haangatongotenderi akarurama kuti azununguswe." 
Psalms55:23 Asi imwi Mwari muchavaburusira kugomba rokuparadzwa; Vanhu vanokarira ropa navanonyengera havangapedzi hafu yamazuva avo; Asi ini ndichavimba nemi. 
Psalms56:1 Ndinzwirei tsitsi, Mwari; nokuti vanhu vanotsvaka kundimedza; Zuva rose vanorwa neni vachindimanikidza." 
Psalms56:2 Vavengi vangu vanoda kundimedza zuva rose; Nokuti vanorwa neni vachizvikudza vazhinji. 
Psalms56:3 Panguva yandinotya, Ndichavimba nemi." 
Psalms56:4 MunaMwari ndicharumbidza shoko rake; Ndakavimba naMwari, handingatyi; Nyama ingandiiteiko?" 
Psalms56:5 Zuva rose vanoshandura mashoko angu; Mifungo yavo yose inondifungira zvakaipa. 
Psalms56:6 Vanoungana, vanovanda, Vanocherekedza makwara angu, Kana vachivandira mweya wangu." 
Psalms56:7 Vachapukunyuka nenzira yezvakaipa here? Paradzai vanhu nokutsamwa kwenyu, Mwari." 
Psalms56:8 imwi munoverenga madzungairiro angu; Isai misodzi yangu mumidziyo yenyu; Haizi murugwaro rwenyu here? 
Psalms56:9 ipapo vavengi vangu vachadzokera shure nomusi wandinodana; Ndinoziva chinhu ichi, kuti Mwari ari kurutivi rwangu." 
Psalms56:10 MunaMwari ndicharumbidza shoko rake; MunaJehovha ndicharumbidza shoko rake. 
Psalms56:11 Ndakavimba naMwari, handingatyi; Vanhu vangandiiteiko?" 
Psalms56:12 Ndinosungwa nezvandakakupikirai Mwari; Ndichakuvigirai zvipiriso zvokuvonga nazvo. 
Psalms56:13 Nokuti makarwira mweya wangu parufu; Namakumbo angu pakugumburwa. Kuti ndifambe pamberi paMwari Muchiedza choupenyu. 
Psalms57:1 . Ndinzwirei tsitsi, Mwari, ndinzwirei tsitsi; Nokuti mweya wangu unotizira kwamuri; Zvirokwazvo, ndichatizira kumumvuri wamapapiro enyu, Kusvikira njodzi dzapfuura." 
Psalms57:2 Ndichadanidzira kuna Mwari Wokumusorosoro; Kuna Mwari anondiitira zvose. 
Psalms57:3 Achatuma mubatsiri ari kudenga, andiponese, Kana iye, anovavarira kundimedza, achindishora; Mwari achatuma tsitsi dzake nechokwadi chake." 
Psalms57:4 Mweya wangu uri pakati peshumba; Ndinovata pasi pakati pavanopfuta somoto, Ivo vanakomana vavanhu, vana meno anenge mapfumo nemiseve, Uye rurimi rwavo munondo unopinza." 
Psalms57:5 Imwi mukudzwe Mwari, pamusoro pokudenga-denga; Kurumbidzwa kwenyu ngakuve kumusoro kwapasi pose." 
Psalms57:6 Vakateyira tsoka dzangu mumbure; Mweya wangu wakakotamiswa; Vakachera hunza pamberi pangu; Vawira mukati mayo vamene. 
Psalms57:7 moyo wangu wakasimba, Mwari, moyo wangu wakasimba; Ndichaimba, zvirokwazvo, ndichaimba nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms57:8 Muka iwe moyo wangu, muka iwe mutengeramwa nembira; Ini ndimene ndichamuka mangwanani." 
Psalms57:9 Ndichakuvongai, Ishe, pakati pendudzi dzavanhu; Ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza pakati pavahedheni." 
Psalms57:10 Nokuti ngoni dzenyu ihuru kusvikira kudenga-denga, chokwadi chenyu inosvikira kudenga rose." 
Psalms57:11 imwi mukudzwe Mwari, kumusoro kokudenga-denga; Kurumbidzwa kwenyu ngakuve kumusoro kwapasi pose." 
Psalms58:1 Munototaura zvakarurama here, imwi vane simba, Munotongera vanakomana vavanhu zvakarurama here?" 
Psalms58:2 Zvirokwazvo, mumoyo menyu munoita zvakaipa; Munoyerera vanhu pasi pose kumanikidza kwamaoko enyu." 
Psalms58:3 Vakaipa vakava vatorwa kubva padumbu ramai; Vanotsauka vachangozvarwa, vachireva nhema." 
Psalms58:4 Uturu hwavo hwakafanana nouturu bwenyoka; Vakafanana nechiva chisinganzwi, chinodzivira nzeve yacho;" 
Psalms58:5 Chisingateereri inzwi ren'anga, Kunyange achiimba nouchenjeri hukuru." 
Psalms58:6 Mwari vhunai meno avo avo mumuromo mavo; Jehovha gurai meno makuru avana veshumba. 
Psalms58:7 Ngavapwe semvura inoyerera; Kana achishumba nemiseve yake, ngaive seyakagurika." 
Psalms58:8 Ngavafanane nehozhwa inonyakatika ichipera; Segambamwedzi romukadzi risina kuona zuva. 
Psalms58:9 Hari dzenyu dzisati dzanzwa moto newemhinzwa, Iye achadzibvisa nechamupupuri nyama igere, nomoto pamwechete." 
Psalms58:10 Akarurama achafara kana achiona kutsiva; Achashambidza tsoka dzake muropa ravakaipa. 
Psalms58:11 Naizvozvo vanhu vachati, ""Zvirokwazvo mubayiro wowakarurama uripo; Zvirokwazvo Mwari aripo, anotonga pasi pose.""" 
Psalms59:1 Ndirwirei pavavengi vangu, Mwari wangu; Ndiisei pakakwirira kure navanondimukira." 
Psalms59:2 Ndirwirei pavaiti vezvakaipa, Ndiponesei pavanhu veropa." 
Psalms59:3 Nokuti tarirai, vanovandira mweya wangu; Vane simba vakaungana kuzorwa neni; Hakuzi nokuda kokudarika kwangu kana kwezvivi zvangu, Jehovha." 
Psalms59:4 Vanomhanya nokuzvigadzira, ini ndisina mhosva hangu; Mukai mundibatsire, muone." 
Psalms59:5 Iyemi Jehovha, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, Mukai mushanyire vahedheni vose; Musanzwira tsitsi mudariki upi noupi akaipa." 
Psalms59:6 Vanodzoka madekwana, vanohuhudza sembwa, Vanopota neguta." 
Psalms59:7 Tarirai, vanodzvova nemiromo Minondo iri pamiromo yavo; Nokuti vanoti, ""Ndianiko anganzwa?""" 
Psalms59:8 Asi imwi Jehovha muchavaseka; Muchadadira vahedheni vose. 
Psalms59:9 imwi simba rangu, ndichakumirirai; Nokuti Mwari ndiye nhare yangu yakakwirira." 
Psalms59:10 Mwari wangu achandichingura netsitsi dzake; Mwari achandionesa kukundwa kwavavengi vangu. 
Psalms59:11 Musavauraya, kuti vanhu vangu varege kukangamwa; Muvaparadzire nesimba renyu, muvawisire pasi, Ishe nhovo yedu." 
Psalms59:12 Nokuda kwechivi chomuromo wavo, namashoko emiromo yavo, Ngavabatwe pakuzvikudza kwavo, Uye nokuda kokutuka nenhema dzavanotaura." 
Psalms59:13 Vapedzei nehasha, vapedzei, varege kuzovapo; Ngavazive kuti Mwari anobata ushe pakati paJakobho, Kusvikira kumigumo yenyika." 
Psalms59:14 Panguva yamadekwana ngavadzoke, ngavahuhudze sembwa, Ngavapote-pote neguta." 
Psalms59:15 Vachadzungaira vachitsvaka zvokudya, Vachagara usiku hwose kana vasingaguti." 
Psalms59:16 Asi ini ndichaimba ndichireva simba renyu; Zvirokwazvo ndicharumbidza tsitsi dzenyu mangwanani; Nokuti makanga muri nhare yangu yakakwirira, Noutiziro hwangu pazuva rokutambudzika kwangu." 
Psalms59:17 Ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza, imwi simba rangu; Nokuti Mwari ndiye nhare yangu yakakwirira, iye Mwari anondinzwira tsitsi." 
Psalms60:1 Mwari, makatirasha, makatiparadza; Makanga makatsamwa; Haiwa, tidzorei." 
Psalms60:2 Makabvundisa nyika; makaitsemura; Gadzirai mitswe yayo; nokuti inozununguka. 
Psalms60:3 Makaratidza vanhu venyu zvinhu zvinorema; Makatimwisa waini inobata. 
Psalms60:4 Makapa vanokutyai mureza, Kuti uratidzwe nokuda kwechokwadi." 
Psalms60:5 Kuti vadikamwi venyu varwirwe, Tiponesei noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, mutipindure." 
Psalms60:6 Mwari akataura pautsvene hwake, achiti, ""Ndichafara kwazvo; Ndichaganhura Shekemu, ndichayera mupata weSukoti." 
Psalms60:7 Giriyadhi ndeyangu Manase ndeyangu; Efuremuwo inhawiro yomusoro wangu; Judha ndiyo tsvimbo yangu youshe. 
Psalms60:8 Moabhu ndiwo mudziyo wangu wokushambidzira; Pamusoro peEdhomu ndipo pandichakandira shangu yangu; Iwe Firisitia, pururudza nokuda kwangu.""" 
Psalms60:9 Ndianiko achandiisa muguta rakasimba? Ndianiko achandiperekedza ndiende Edhomu? 
Psalms60:10 Hamuna kutirasha here, Mwari? Hamubudi Mwari, nehondo dzedu." 
Psalms60:11 Tibatsirei pamudzivisi wedu; Nokuti kubatsira kwavanhu hakuna maturo. 
Psalms60:12 Muna Mwari tichaita noumhare; Nokuti ndiye achatsikira vadzivisi vedu pasi. 
Psalms61:1 Inzwai kuchema kwangu, Mwari, Teererai munyengetero wangu." 
Psalms61:2 Ndichadana kwamuri ndiri pamugumo wapasi, kana moyo wangu waziya; Ndiperekedzerei kudombo randisingasvikiri." 
Psalms61:3 Nokuti imwi makanga muri utiziro hwangu, Neshongwe yangu yakasimba kwandingatiza muvengi wangu." 
Psalms61:4 Ndichagara patende renyu nokusingaperi; Ndichavanda munyasi mamapapiro enyu. 
Psalms61:5 Nokuti imwi Mwari makanzwa mhiko dzangu; Makadzosa nhaka yavanotya zita renyu. 
Psalms61:6 Muchawedzera mazuva ohupenyu hwamambo; Makore ake achaenzana naamarudzi mazhinji. 
Psalms61:7 Achagara pamberi paMwari nokusingaperi; Mumugadzirire unyoro nechokwadi, kuti zvimuchengete." 
Psalms61:8 Naizvozvo ndichaimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokurumbidza nokusingaperi, Kuti ndiite mhiko dzangu zuva rimwe nerimwe." 
Psalms62:1 Zvirokwazvo, mweya wangu unongorindira Mwari; Kwaari ndiko kunobva kuponeswa kwangu." 
Psalms62:2 Ndiye oga dombo rangu nomuponesi wangu; Ndiye shongwe yangu yakakwirira; handingazununguswi zvikuru. 
Psalms62:3 Muchavavarira munhu kusvikira rinhiko, Kuti mumuuraye imwi mose, Sorusvingo runoda kuwa, noruzhowa runotsveyama?" 
Psalms62:4 Vanongorangana kuti vamusundire pasi abve paukuru hwake; Vanofarira nhema; Vanoropafadza nomuromo wavo, asi vanotuka mumoyo mavo." 
Psalms62:5 Mweya wangu, rindira Mwari zvirokwazvo Nokuti ndinomutarira iye." 
Psalms62:6 Ndiye oga dombo rangu noruponeso rwangu; Ndiye shongwe yangu yakakwirira; handingazununguswi. 
Psalms62:7 Kuna Mwari ndiko kunokuponeswa kwangu nokukudzwa kwangu; Dombo resimba rangu noutiziro hwangu zviri kuna Mwari. 
Psalms62:8 Vimbai naye nguva dzose, imwi vanhu; Dururai moyo yenyu pamberi pake; Mwari ndiye utiziro bwedu." 
Psalms62:9 Zvirokwazvo vanhu vasingakudzwi mweya chete, uye vanhu vanokudzwa inhema; Pakuyerwa havaremi; Vose pamwechete vakareruka kupfuura mweya." 
Psalms62:10 Regai kuvimba nokumanikidza, Regai kuzvikudza pamusoro pokupambara; Kana fuma ichiwanda, regai kuinamatira nomoyo." 
Psalms62:11 Mwari akataura kamwechete, Ndakazvinzwa kaviri; Kuti simba nderaMwari;" 
Psalms62:12 Netsitsiwo ndedzenyu, Ishe; Nokuti munoitira munhu mumwe nomumwe sezvaakabata." 
Psalms63:1 Mwari, imwi muri Mwari wangu; ndichakutsvakai mangwanani; Mweya wangu unenyota kwamuri, nyama yangu inokushuvai, Panyika yakaoma, inonzwisa nyota, isina mvura." 
Psalms63:2 Naizvozvo ndakatarira kwamuri panzvimbo tsvene, Kuti ndione simba renyu nokubwinya kwenyu." 
Psalms63:3 Nokuti unyoro bwenyu hunokunda upenyu; Miromo yangu ichakurumbidzai. 
Psalms63:4 Naizvozvo ndichakuvongai ndichiri mupenyu; Ndichasimudza maoko angu nezita renyu. 
Psalms63:5 Mweya wangu uchaguta nezvinenge mwongo namafuta; Muromo wangu uchakurumbidzai nemiromo inofara kwazvo; 
Psalms63:6 Kana ndichikurangarirai panhovo yangu, Ndichikufungai panguva dzousiku." 
Psalms63:7 Nokuti makanga muri mubatsiri wangu, Pamumvuri wamapapiro enyu ndipo pandichafara kwazvo." 
Psalms63:8 Mweya wangu unokunamatirai nesimba rose; Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runonditsigira. 
Psalms63:9 Asi avo, vanotsvaka kuparadza mweya wangu, Vachapinda munzvimbo dzapasi dzenyika." 
Psalms63:10 Vachaiswa pasimba romunondo; Vachava mugove wamakava. 
Psalms63:11 Asi mambo achafara munaMwari; Mumwe nomumwe anopika naye achafara kwazvo; Nokuti muromo wavanoreva nhema uchadzivirwa. 
Psalms64:1 Inzwai inzwi rangu, Mwari, pakuchema kwangu; Chengetai upenyu hwangu ndirege kutyiswa nomuvengi." 
Psalms64:2 Ndivanzei pakurangana kwakavanda kwavanoita zvakaipa; Pabope ravanobata zvakaipa; 
Psalms64:3 Ivo vakarodza rurimi rwavo somunondo, Vakashumba miseve yavo, iwo mashoko anovava;" 
Psalms64:4 Kuti vafure akarurama, vakavanda ivo; Kamwe-kamwe vanomufura, vasingatyi." 
Psalms64:5 Vanotsungirira pazano rakaipa; Vanorangana kuteya misungo pakavanda; Vanoti, ""Ndianiko angazviona?""" 
Psalms64:6 Vanofungisa zvakaipa; Vanoti, ""Tapedza kufungisa zano guru;"" Kufunga komukati komumwe nomumwe, nomoyo, zvakadzika." 
Psalms64:7 Asi Mwari achavapfura, Vachakuvadzwa kamwe-kamwe nomuseve." 
Psalms64:8 Naizvozvo vachagumbuswa, ndimi dzavo dzichivapupurira zvakaipa; Vose vanovaona vachadzungudza musoro." 
Psalms64:9 Vanhu vose vachatya; Vachaparidza basa raMwari, Vachicherekedza zvakanaka zvaanoita." 
Psalms64:10 Vakarurama vachafara muna Jehovha, vachavimba naye; Vose vane moyo yakarurama vachafara kwazvo." 
Psalms65:1 imwi Mwari munofanira kurumbidzwa paZiyoni; imwi munofanira kuitirwa mhiko. 
Psalms65:2 imwi vokunzwa munyengetero, Vanhu vose vanofanira kuuya kwamuri." 
Psalms65:3 Mashoko akaipa ondikunda; Kana kuri kudarika kwedu muchakudzima imi. 
Psalms65:4 Akaropafadzwa munhu wamunosanangura, wamunoswededza kwamuri, Kuti agare pavazhe dzenyu; Isu tichagutiswa nounaki bweimba yenyu, Iyo nzvimbo tsvene yetemberi yenyu." 
Psalms65:5 Mukururama kwenyu munotipindura nezvinhu zvinotyisa, imwi Mwari muponesi wedu; imwi chivimbo chamativi ose apasi, Navari kure pagungwa;" 
Psalms65:6 Iye, anoteya makomo nesimba rake; Iye, akasungwa chiuno nesimba;" 
Psalms65:7 Iye, unonyaradza kutinhira kwamakungwa, iko kutinhira kwamafungo awo, Nokupopota kwavanhu." 
Psalms65:8 Naivo vagere kumigumo vanotya zviratidzo zvenyu; Munofadza mabudiro amangwanani naamadeko. 
Psalms65:9 Munoshanyira pasi, munopadiridza, Munopafumisa kwazvo; Rwizi rwaMwari ruzere nemvura; Munovagadzirira zviyo, kana magadzira pasi saizvozvo." 
Psalms65:10 Munozadza mihoronga yapo kwazvo; Munoenzanisa mipanje yapo; Munopanyorovesa nemvura inopfunha; Munoropafadza zvinomera zvapo. 
Psalms65:11 Munoshongedza mwaka nekorona younaki bwenyu; Makwara enyu anodonha mafuta. 
Psalms65:12 Anodonha pamafuro erenje; Zvikomo zvinozvisunga nomufaro. 
Psalms65:13 Mafuro akafukidzwa namapoka ezvipfuwo; Uye mipatawo yakafukidzwa nezviyo; Zvinopururudza, zvichiimbawo." 
Psalms66:1 Pururudzai kuna Mwari, imwi nyika dzose;" 
Psalms66:2 Imbirai mukurumbira wezita rake; Rumbidzai kudzo yake. 
Psalms66:3 Itiyi kuna Mwari, ""Mabasa enyu anotyisa sei! Vavengi venyu vachazviisa pasi penyu nemhaka youkuru bwesimba renyu." 
Psalms66:4 Pasi pose pachanamata kwamuri, Pachakuimbirai; Vachaimbira zita renyu.""" 
Psalms66:5 Uyai, muone mabasa aMwari; Anotyisa pane zvaanoitira vana vavanhu." 
Psalms66:6 Akashandura gungwa rikava nyika yakaoma; Vakayambuka rwizi netsoka; Ipapo takafara maari. 
Psalms66:7 Anobata ushe nokusingaperi nesimba rake; Meso ake anocherekedza ndudzi; Vanomumukira ngavarege kuzvikudza. 
Psalms66:8 Vongai Mwari, imwi vanhu, inzwi rokumurumbidza ngarinzwike;" 
Psalms66:9 Iye anopa mweya upenyu, Asingatenderi tsoka dzedu kuti dzitedzemuke." 
Psalms66:10 Nokuti imwi Mwari makatiidza; Makatiidza sezvinoidzwa sirivha. 
Psalms66:11 Makatipinza pamumbure; Makatitakudza mutoro unorema pazviuno zvedu. 
Psalms66:12 Makafambisa vanhu pamusoro pemisoro yedu, Takapinda nomumoto nemvura; Asi makatibudisa kunzvimbo inezvakawanda." 
Psalms66:13 Ndichapinda mumba menyu nezvipiriso zvinopiswa, Ndichakuitirai mhiko dzangu," 
Psalms66:14 Dzakarehwa nemiromo yangu, Dzakataurwa nomuromo wangu pakutambudzika kwangu." 
Psalms66:15 Ndichakubayirai zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvezvakakora, Nezvinonhuhwira zvamakondobwe; Ndichabayira nzombe pamwechete nembudzi." 
Psalms66:16 Uyai munzwe, imwi mose munotya Mwari, Ndichakududzirai zvaakaitira mweya wangu." 
Psalms66:17 Ndakachema kwaari nomuromo wangu, Akarumbidzwa zvikuru norurimi rwangu." 
Psalms66:18 Kana ndikarangarira zvakaipa mumoyo mangu, Ishe haangandinzwi;" 
Psalms66:19 Asi zvirokwazvo Mwari akanzwa; Akateerera inzwi rokunyengetera kwangu. 
Psalms66:20 Mwari ngaavongwe, Iye asina kuramba munyengetero wangu, kana kubvisa tsitsi yake kwandiri." 
Psalms67:1 Mwari ngaatinzwire tsitsi, atiropafadze, Ngaativhenekere nechiso chake;" 
Psalms67:2 Kuti nzira yenyu izikamwe pasi, Nokuponesa kwenyu pakati pendudzi dzose." 
Psalms67:3 Vanhu ngavakuvongei, Mwari; Vanhu vose ngavakuvongei." 
Psalms67:4 Ndudzi ngadzifare, ngadziimbe nomufaro; Nokuti muchatonga vanhu nokururama, Muchafambisa ndudzi pasi." 
Psalms67:5 Vanhu ngavakuvongei Mwari; Vanhu vose ngavakuvongei. 
Psalms67:6 Pasi pakabereka zvibereko zvapo; Mwari, iye Mwari wedu, achatiropafadza." 
Psalms67:7 Mwari achatiropafadza; Nemigumo yose yapasi ichamutya. 
Psalms68:1 Mwari ngaasimuke, vavengi vake ngavaparadzirwe; Vanomuvenga ngavatize pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:2 Muvadzinge, sokudzingwa koutsi; Sokunyauka kwenamo pamoto, Saizvozvo vakaipa ngavapere pamberi paMwari." 
Psalms68:3 Asi vakarurama ngavafare; ngavafare kwazvo pamberi paMwari; Ngavafare nokufara kukuru. 
Psalms68:4 Imbirai Mwari, imbirai zita rake nziyo dzokurumbidza; Mumugadzirire mugwagwa wakanaka, iye anofamba nengoro napamarenje; Zita rake ndiJehovha; farai kwazvo pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:5 Baba venherera, nomutongi wemhosva dzechirikadzi, Ndiye Mwari paugaro hwake hutsvene." 
Psalms68:6 Vakanga vari voga, Mwari anovagarisa pamhuri; Anobudisira vasungwa kumufaro; Asi vanomumukira vanogara panyika yakaoma." 
Psalms68:7 Mwari, panguva yamakatungamirira vanhu venyu, Panguva yokufamba kwenyu murenje;" 
Psalms68:8 Pasi pakabvunda, Kudenga-denga kwakadonha pamberi paMwari; Nairo Sinai rakabvunda pamberi paMwari, iye Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Psalms68:9 imwi Mwari makanisa mvura zhinji, Makasimbisa nhaka yenyu panguva yokuneta kwayo." 
Psalms68:10 Ungano yenyu yakagaramo; imwi Mwari makagadzirira varombo zvakanaka zvenyu. 
Psalms68:11 Ishe akataura shoko, Vakadzi vakaparidza shoko vaiva" 
Psalms68:12 Madzimambo ehondo anotiza, Mukadzi akasara kumusha ndiye anogovera zvakapambwa." 
Psalms68:13 Kana imwi movata pasi pakati pamatanga amakwai, Zvakafanana namapapiro enjiva akafukidzwa nesirivha, Neminhenga yakafukidzwa nendarama tsvuku." 
Psalms68:14 Panguva iyo waMasimbaose yaakaparadza madzimambomo, Zvakafanana nokuwa kwechando paZarimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Gomo reBhashani igomo raMwari; Gomo reBhashani igomo refu-refu. 
Psalms68:16 imwi makomo marefu, munogodorerei Iro gomo rakadikamwa naMwari kuti agare mariri? Jehovha achagara mariri nokusingaperi." 
Psalms68:17 Ngoro dzaMwari dzinosvika zviuru zvina makumi maviri, zviuru zvezviuru zvamazana; Ishe ari pakati padzo, sezvaakaita paSinai, panzvimbo tsvene." 
Psalms68:18 Makakwira kumusoro, mukatapa vatapwa venyu; Makagamuchira zvipo pakati pavanhu Zvirokwazvo pakati pavakakumukiraiwo, kuti Jehovha Mwari agare navo." 
Psalms68:19 Ishe ngaavongwe, iye anotakura mitoro yedu zuva rimwe nerimwe, Iye Mwari muponesi wedu." 
Psalms68:20 Mwari ndiye Mwari anotirwira; Jehovha Ishe ndiye ane nzira dzokubuda murufu. 
Psalms68:21 Asi Mwari achatema misoro yavavengi vake, Paganda romusoro rine vhudzi romunhu anorambira pakutadza kwake." 
Psalms68:22 Ishe akati, ""Ndichavadzosa paBhashani, Ndichavadzosazve pagungwa rakadzika;" 
Psalms68:23 Kuti unyike rutsoka rwako muropa, Kuti ndimi dzembwa dzako dzive nomugove wadzo pavavengi vako.""" 
Psalms68:24 Vakaona mafambiro enyu, Mwari, Mafambiro aMwari wangu, Mambo wangu, achipinda panzvimbo tsvene." 
Psalms68:25 Vaimbi vakatungamira, varidzi vemitengeramwa vakatevera, Pakati pavasikana vakanga vachiridza makandira." 
Psalms68:26 Rumbidzai Mwari paungano, Iye Ishe, iyemi vetsime raIsiraeri." 
Psalms68:27 Bhenjamini muduku, mubati wavo, aripo, Namachinda aJudha navazhinji vavo, Namachinda aZebhuruni, namachinda aNafutari." 
Psalms68:28 Mwari wako akaraira simba rake; Simbisai, Mwari, izvo zvamakatiitira." 
Psalms68:29 Nokuda kwetemberi yenyu paJerusaremu Madzimambo achakuvigirai zvipo. 
Psalms68:30 Tukai chikara chetsanga, Hando zhinji, nemhuru dzendudzi dzavanhu, Vazviwisire pasi petsoka nemari yesirivha; Muparadzire vanhu vanofarira kurwa." 
Psalms68:31 Machinda achabuda Ijipiti; Itiopia ichakurumidza kutambanudza maoko ayo kuna Mwari. 
Psalms68:32 Imbirai Mwari, imwi ushe hwapasi; Imbirai Ishe nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms68:33 Iye anotasva padenga rokudenga-denga, iro rakare nakare; Inzwai, anobudisa inzwi rake, inzwi rine simba." 
Psalms68:34 Ipai Mwari simba; Ukuru hwake huri pamusoro paIsiraeri, Simba rake riri mumakore." 
Psalms68:35 imwi Mwari munotyisa panzvimbo dzenyu tsvene; Mwari waIsiraeri ndiye anopa vanhu vake simba noushe. Mwari ngaavongwe. 
Psalms69:1 Ndiponesei, Mwari, Nokuti mvura zhinji yasvikira pamweya wangu." 
Psalms69:2 Ndinonyura munhope yakadzika, pokumira Ndakasvika pamvura zhinji yakadzika, pandinofukidzwa nenzizi." 
Psalms69:3 Ndaneta nokuchema kwangu; huro dzangu dzaoma; Meso angu anovava nokurindira Mwari wangu. 
Psalms69:4 Vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vazhinji kupfuura vhudzi romusoro wangu; Avo vanoda kundiparadza vane simba, kunyange vachindivenga ndisina mhosva; Ndakafanira kudzosera zvandinenge ndisina kutora." 
Psalms69:5 Mwari munoziva upenzi hwangu; Mhosva dzangu hadzina kukuvanzirwai. 
Psalms69:6 Ishe Mwari wehondo, vanokurindirai ngavarege kunyadziswa nokuda kwangu; Mwari waIsiraeri, vanokutsvakai ngavarege kuzvidzwa nokuda kwangu." 
Psalms69:7 Nokuti ndakatenda kushorwa nokuda kwenyu; Kunyadza kwakafukidza chiso changu. 
Psalms69:8 Ndakava mutorwa kuhama dzangu, Nomubvakure kuvana vamai vangu." 
Psalms69:9 Nokuti kushingairira imba yenyu kwakandipedza; Nokushora, kwavanokushorai kwakawira pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms69:10 Panguva yokuchema kwangu nokutambudza mweya wangu ndichizvinyima, Ndakashorwa nokuda kwazvo." 
Psalms69:11 Panguva yandakafuka masaga ndikaaita nguvo dzangu, Ndakava shumo pakati pavo." 
Psalms69:12 Vanogara pasuo vanondireva; Ndiri chiimbo chavakabatwa nedoro. 
Psalms69:13 Asi kana ndirini, munyengetero wangu uri kwamuri, Ishe, panguva yakafanira; Mwari, netsitsi dzenyu zhinji Ndipindurei nokuponesa kwenyu kwakatendeka." 
Psalms69:14 Ndirwirei munhope, ndirege kunyura; Ndirwirwe kuna vanondivenga, napamvura zhinji yakadzika." 
Psalms69:15 Boporodzi remvura rirege kundikunda, Mvura yakadzika irege kundimedza; Gomba rirege kuzarira muromo waro pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms69:16 Ndipindurei, Jehovha; nokuti unyoro bwenyu hwakanaka; Ringirai kwandiri nokuda kwetsitsi dzenyu zhinji." 
Psalms69:17 Regai kuvanzira muranda wenyu chiso chenyu; Nokuti ndiri pakutambudzika; kurumidzai kundipindura. 
Psalms69:18 Swederai kumweya wangu, muudzikunure; Ndidzikunurei nokuda kwavavengi vangu." 
Psalms69:19 Munoziva kushorwa kwangu, nokunyadzwa kwangu: nokuzvidzwa kwangu Vadzivisi vangu vose vari mberi kwangu." 
Psalms69:20 Kushora kwakaputsa moyo wangu; ndaremerwa kwazvo; Ndakatsvaka vangandinzwira nyasha, asi kwakanga kusino munhu; Ndakatsvaka vavaraidzi, asi handina kuwana nomumwe." 
Psalms69:21 Vakandipa nduru zvive zvokudya zvangu; Pakunzwa nyota kwangu vakandimwisa vhiniga. 
Psalms69:22 Tafura yavo ngaive musungo pamberi pavo; Neriva, kana vakagarika havo." 
Psalms69:23 Meso avo ngaapofumadzwe, varege kuona, Zviuno zvavo ngazvirambe zvichiguda-guda." 
Psalms69:24 Dururai kutsamwa kwenyu pamusoro pavo, Hasha dzenyu dzinopfuta, ngadzivabate." 
Psalms69:25 Ugaro hwavo ngahuparadzwe; Ngakurege kuva nomunhu anogara pamatende avo. 
Psalms69:26 Nokuti vanotambudza uyo wamakarova; Vanotaura zvokurwadziwa kwavaya vamakakuvadza. 
Psalms69:27 Wedzerai zvakaipa pazvakaipa zvavo; Ngavarege kupinda pakururama kwenyu. 
Psalms69:28 Ngavadzimwe parugwaro rwoupenyu, Varege kunyorwa pamwechete navakarurama." 
Psalms69:29 Asi ini ndiri murombo, ndinorwadziwa; Kuponesa kwenyu, Mwari, ngakundiise pakakwirira." 
Psalms69:30 Ndicharumbidza zita raMwari norwiyo, Ndichamukudza nokuvonga." 
Psalms69:31 Izvo zvichafadza Jehovha kupfuura nzombe, Kana hando ine nyanga namahwanda." 
Psalms69:32 Vanyoro vakazviona vakafara; imwi munotsvaka Mwari, moyo yenyu ngairarame." 
Psalms69:33 Nokuti Jehovha anonzwa vashaiwi, Haashori vasungwa vake." 
Psalms69:34 Kudenga napasi ngazvimurumbidze, Makungwa, nezvose zvinopfakanyikamo." 
Psalms69:35 Nokuti Mwari achaponesa Ziyoni, nokuvaka maguta aJudha, Vachagaramo, ive nhaka yavo." 
Psalms69:36 Ichava nhaka yavana vavaranda vake; Vanoda zita rake vachagaramo. 
Psalms70:1 Kurumidzai, Mwari, kundirwira; Kurumidzai kundibatsira, Jehovha." 
Psalms70:2 Ngavanyadziswe, ngavazvidzwe Ivo vanotsvaka mweya wangu; Ngavadzoserwe shure, vashovorwe Ivo vanofarira kundikuvadza." 
Psalms70:3 Ngavadzoserwe shure nokuda kwenyadzi dzavo Ivo vanoti, ""Hekani, hekani! Waro!""" 
Psalms70:4 Vose vanokutsvakai ngavafarise vave nomufaro mamuri; Vanoda kuponesa kwenyu ngavarambe vachiti, ""Mwari ngaakudzwe!""" 
Psalms70:5 Asi ini ndiri murombo nomushaiwi; Kurumidzai muuye kwandiri, Mwari; imwi muri mubatsiri wangu nomurwiri wangu; Regai kunonoka, Jehovha." 
Psalms71:1 Jehovha, ndinovimba nemi; Ngandirege kutongonyadziswa." 
Psalms71:2 Ndirwirei mukururama kwenyu, ndisunungurei; Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri, mundiponese." 
Psalms71:3 Ivai dombo rangu mandingagara, kwandingaramba ndichienda; Makaraira kuti ndiponeswe; Nokuti ndimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu." 
Psalms71:4 Ndisunungurei, Mwari wangu, paruoko rwowakaipa, Paruoko rwousina kururama nomunhu anomanikidza." 
Psalms71:5 Nokuti imi, Ishe Jehovha, muri tariro yangu; Ndimi wandinovimba naye kubva pauduku hwangu." 
Psalms71:6 Ndakatsigirwa nemwi kubva pachizvaro; Ndimi makandibudisa padumbu ramai vangu; Ndichakurumbidzai. 
Psalms71:7 Ndiri chishamiso kuna vazhinji; Asi imwi muri utiziro hwangu hwakasimba. 
Psalms71:8 Muromo wangu uchazadzwa nerumbidzo yenyu, Nekudzo yenyu zuva rose." 
Psalms71:9 Regai kundirasha panguva yokukwegura kwangu; Musandisiya kana ndapera simba. 
Psalms71:10 Nokuti vavengi vangu vanondireva; Vanogarira mweya wangu, vanorangana," 
Psalms71:11 Vachiti, ""Mwari amusiya; Teverai, mumubate; nokuti hakuna ungamurwira.""" 
Psalms71:12 Mwari, regai kuva kure neni; Mwari wangu, kurumidzai kundibatsira." 
Psalms71:13 Avo vanodzivisa mweya wangu ngavanyadziswe vapere; Vanotsvaka kundikuvadza ngavafukidzwe nokushorwa nokuzvidzwa. 
Psalms71:14 Asi ini ndicharamba ndichitarira, Ndicharamba ndichiwedzera kukurumbidzai." 
Psalms71:15 Muromo wangu uchareva kururama kwenyu, Nokuponesa kwenyu zuva rose:, Nokuti handizivi kuwanda kwazvo." 
Psalms71:16 Ndichauya namabasa ane simba raShe aJehovha; Ndichaparidza kururama kwenyu, iko kwenyu koga." 
Psalms71:17 Mwari, makandidzidzisa kubva paujaya hwangu; Kusvikira zvino ndadudzira mabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms71:18 Haiwa, kusvikira ndakwegura ndachena vhudzi, Mwari regai kundisiya; Kusvikira ndadudzira simba renyu kurudzi runouya, Nesimba renyu kunomumwe nomumwe anozouya." 
Psalms71:19 Kururama kwenyuwo, Mwari, kuri kumusoro-soro; Iyemi makaita zvinhu zvikuru, Mwari, ndianiko akafanana nemi?" 
Psalms71:20 Iyemi makatiratidza madambudzo mazhinji akaipa, Ndimi muchatiraramisazve, Nokutikwidzazve tibve pakudzika kwapasi." 
Psalms71:21 Wedzerai hukuru hwangu, Dzokaizve mundinyaradze." 
Psalms71:22 Ndichakurumbidzaiwo nemitengeramwa, Naiyo chokwadi chenyu, Mwari wangu; Ndichakuimbirai imwi nziyo dzokurumbidza nembira, Iyemi Mutsvene walsiraeri." 
Psalms71:23 Miromo yangu ichafara kwazvo kana ndichikuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza; Nomweya wangu wamakadzikunura. 
Psalms71:24 Rurimi rwanguvo ruchataura zuva rose zvokururama kwenyu; Nokuti vanotsvaka kundikuvadza vanyadziswa, vazvidzwa." 
Psalms72:1 Ipai mambo zvamakatonga, Mwari, Nokururama kwenyu kumwanakomana wamambo." 
Psalms72:2 Achatongera vanhu venyu nokururama, Navarombo venyu achavaruramisira." 
Psalms72:3 Makomo nezvikomo achavigira vanhu rugare,nezvikomo nekururama." 
Psalms72:4 Achatongera varombo vavanhu, Achaponesa vana vavashaiwi, Nokupwanya mumanikidzi." 
Psalms72:5 Vachakutyai kana zuva richipo, Uye kana mwedzi uchipo, kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms72:6 Achaburuka iye semvura pauswa hwakagurirwa; Semvura inonaya ichidiridza pasi. 
Psalms72:7 Nemisi yake akarurama achakura zvakanaka; Rugare rwakawanda ruchavapo, kusvikira mwedzi waguma." 
Psalms72:8 Achabata ushe kubva pagungwa kusvikira pagungwa, Nokubva paRwizi kusvikira kumigumo yapasi." 
Psalms72:9 Vagere pamarenje vachapfugama pamberi pake; Vavengi vake vachananzva guruva. 
Psalms72:10 Madzimambo eTarishishi neezviwi achauya nezvipo; Madzimambo eShebha neSebha vachamuvigira zvipo; 
Psalms72:11 Zvirokwazvo, madzimambo ose achawira pasi pamberi pake; Ndudzi dzose dzichamushumira." 
Psalms72:12 Nokuti acharwira mushaiwi kana achidanidzira; Nomurombo asina mubatsiri. 
Psalms72:13 Achanzwira nyasha murombo nomushaiwi, Achaponesa mweya yavashaiwi." 
Psalms72:14 Achadzikunura mweya yavo pakutambudzika napakumanikidzwa; Ropa ravo richava chinhu chinokosha pamberi pake; 
Psalms72:15 Iye achararama, achapiwa ndarama yeShebha; Vanhu vacharamba vachimunyengeterera; Vachamuvonga zuva rose." 
Psalms72:16 Kuchava nezviyo zvizhinji pasi pamusoro pamakomo; Zvibereko zvazvo zvichavhunga seRebhanoni; Vanogara paguta vachakura souswa pasi. 
Psalms72:17 Zita rake richavapo nokusingaperi; Zita rake richagara riripo panguva yose yokuvapo kwezuva; Vanhu vacharopafadzwa maari; Ndudzi dzose dzichati, ""Anomufaro.""" 
Psalms72:18 Jehovha Mwari, iye Mwari waIsiraeri, ngaarumbidzwe, Iye oga anoita zvinoshamisa." 
Psalms72:19 Zita rake rinobwinya ngarirumbidzwe nokusingaperi; Pasi pose ngapazadzwe nokubwinya kwenyu. Ameni, Ameni." 
Psalms72:20 Minyengetero yaDhavhidhi mwanakomana waJese yapera. 
Psalms73:1 Zvirokwazvo Mwari anoitira Isiraeri zvakanaka, Ivo vane moyo yakachena." 
Psalms73:2 Asi kana ndirini, tsoka dzangu dzakanga dzotsauka; Makumbo angu akanga otedzemuka." 
Psalms73:3 Nokuti ndakanga ndichigodora vana manyawi, Pakuona kwangu kufara kwavakaipa." 
Psalms73:4 Nokuti havatambudziki pakufa kwavo; Asi muviri wavo une simba. 
Psalms73:5 Havana njodzi savamwe vanhu; Havatambudzwi savamwe vanhu 
Psalms73:6 Saka kuzvikudza kwavo kwakafanana noruketani pamitsipa yavo; Kumanikidza kunovafukidza senguvo. 
Psalms73:7 Meso avo anobuda nokukora; Zvavanofunga pamoyo zvinofashamira; 
Psalms73:8 Vanoseka, vachireva pakuipa kwavo zvinomanikidza vamwe; Vanotaura vachizvikudza." 
Psalms73:9 Vakataurira kudenga nemiromo yavo, Ndimi dzavo dzinofamba-famba pasi." 
Psalms73:10 Saka vanhu vake vanodzokera ikoko; Vanosvinirwa mvura zhinji, mukombe uzere." 
Psalms73:11 Zvino vanoti, ""Mwari angaziva seiko? Wokumusorosoro angava nokuziva here?""" 
Psalms73:12 Tarirai, ndizvo zvakaita vakaipa; Vanowedzera fuma yavo vachingogara vasingatamburi." 
Psalms73:13 Zvirokwazvo ndakanatsa moyo wangu pasina, Nokushambidza maoko angu ndisina mhosva;" 
Psalms73:14 Nokuti ndakatambudzwa zuva rose, Ndakarangwa mangwanani ose." 
Psalms73:15 Kana ndaiti, ndichataura kudai; Tarirai, ndainyengera rudzi rwavana venyu." 
Psalms73:16 Zvino ndakaramba ndichifunga kuti ndizvinzwisise, Asi zvakandiremera kwazvo;" 
Psalms73:17 Kusvikira ndapinda panzvimbo tsvene yaMwari, Ndikatarira kuguma kwavo." 
Psalms73:18 Zvirokwazvo munovaisa panotedza; Munovawisira pasi kuti vaparadzwe. 
Psalms73:19 Haiwa, vanoparadzwa kamwe-kamwe! Vanopedzwa chose nezvinotyisa." 
Psalms73:20 Sezvakarotwa, kana munhu apepuka; Saizvozvo, Ishe, muchashora mufananidzo wavo, kana muchimuka." 
Psalms73:21 Nokuti moyo wangu wakachema, Ndakabayiwa patsvo dzangu." 
Psalms73:22 Ndakanga ndiri benzi, ndisingazivi chinhu; Ndakanga ndakafanana nemhuka pamberi penyu." 
Psalms73:23 Kunyange zvakadaro ndinoramba ndinemwi; Makabata ruoko rwangu rworudyi. 
Psalms73:24 Muchandiperekedza nezano renyu, Ndokuzondigamuchira pakubwinya." 
Psalms73:25 Ndianiko kudenga, kana musimi? Napasi hapana wandinoda kunze kwenyu." 
Psalms73:26 Nyama yangu nomoyo wangu zvinopera; Asi Mwari ndiye dombo romoyo wangu nomugove wangu nokusingaperi. 
Psalms73:27 Nokuti tarirai, vari kure nemwi vachapera; Makaparadza vose vakakusiyai noupombwe hwavo." 
Psalms73:28 Kana ndirini, kuswedera pedo naye ndizvo zvinondifadza; Ishe Mwari ndakamuita nhare yangu, Kuti ndiparidze mabasa enyu ose." 
Psalms74:1 Haiwa Mwari, makatirashireiko nokusingaperi? Hasha dzenyu dzinopfungairira makwai amafuro enyu nemhaka yeiko?" 
Psalms74:2 Rangarirai ungano yenyu yamakatenga kare, Yamakadzikunura kuti ruve rudzi rwenhaka yenyu; Gomo reZiyoni pamakanga mugere." 
Psalms74:3 Simudzai makumbo enyu muone zvakaparadzwa zvisingaperi, Izvo zvakaipa zvose zvakaitwa navavengi panzvimbo tsvene." 
Psalms74:4 Vadzivisi venyu vakanduruma pakati peungano yenyu; Vakamisa mireza yavo zvive zviratidzo. 
Psalms74:5 Vakafanana navanhu vakasimudza Masanhu mudondo remiti. 
Psalms74:6 Zvino zvose zvakavezwa zvayo Vanozviputsa nedimuro nenyundo. 
Psalms74:7 Vakapisa nzvimbo yenyu tsvene nomoto; Vakashatisa ugaro bwezita renyu vachihuputsira pasi. 
Psalms74:8 Vakati mumoyo mavo, ""Ngativaparadze pamwechete;"" Vakapisa nzvimbo dzose pavanounganira Mwari munyika." 
Psalms74:9 Hatichaoni zviratidzo zvedu; Hapachina muporofita; Pakati pedu hapana munhu anoziva kuti zvichasvikira rinhi. 
Psalms74:10 Haiwa Mwari, mudzivisi, achashora kusvikira rinhiko? Muvengi acharamba achizvidza zita renyu nokusingaperi here?" 
Psalms74:11 Munodzosereiko ruoko rwenyu, irwo ruoko rwenyu rworudyi? Rutambanudzei pachipfuva chenyu, muvapedze." 
Psalms74:12 Kunyange zvakadaro Mwari ndiye Mambo wangu kubva kare, Iye anobata mabasa okuponesa pakati penyika," 
Psalms74:13 Makapamura gungwa nesimba renyu; Makaputsa misoro yezvikara zvegungwa mumvura. 
Psalms74:14 Makaputsanya misoro yengwena, Makaipa vanhu vagere murenje kuti ive nyama yavo." 
Psalms74:15 Makapamura tsime neboporodzi; Makapwisa nzizi huru. 
Psalms74:16 Masikati ndeenyu, nousiku ndobwenyuwo; Ndimi makagadzira chiedza nezuva." 
Psalms74:17 Ndimi makatara miganho yose yapasi; Ndimi makaita munakamwe nechando. 
Psalms74:18 Rangarirai chinhu ichi, kuti muvengi akakuzvidzai, Jehovha, Uye kuti rudzi rwamapenzi rwakamhura zita renyu." 
Psalms74:19 Regai henyu kuisa kuchikara mweya wenjiva yenyu; Musakangamwa upenyu hwavarombo venyu. 
Psalms74:20 Rangarirai sungano; Nokuti nzvimbo dzine rima dzapasi dzizere nougaro hwavamanikidzi. 
Psalms74:21 Haiwa, vanomanikidzwa ngavarege kudzoka vachinyara; Varombo navashaiwi ngavarumbidze zita renyu." 
Psalms74:22 Simukai Mwari, muzvireverere mhaka yenyu, Rangarirai kuzvidzwa kwenyu nebenzi zuva rose." 
Psalms74:23 Regai kukangamwa inzwi ravadzivisi venyu; Bope ravanokumukirai rinogara richikwira. 
Psalms75:1 Tinokuvongai, Mwari; Tinovonga, nokuti zita renyu riri pedo; Vanhu vanoparidza mabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms75:2 Kana ndichiwana nguva yakafanira, Ndichatonga zvakarurama." 
Psalms75:3 Pasi pose panyauka navose vagerepo; Ndini ndakamisa mbiru dzayo. 
Psalms75:4 Ndakati kuna vanamanyawi, `Regai kuita namanyawi;' Nokuna vakaipa, `Regai kusimudza runyanga.'" 
Psalms75:5 Regai kusimudza runyanga rwenyu kudenga; Regai kutaura nomutsipa mukukutu. 
Psalms75:6 Nokuti kunyange kumabudazuva, kana kumavirira, Kana kurenje, hakuzi ikoko kunobva kukudzwa." 
Psalms75:7 Asi Mwari ndiye mutongi; Anoninipisa mumwe achikudza mumwe. 
Psalms75:8 Nokuti muruoko rwaJehovha munomukombe, newaini inopupuma; Uzere nezvakavhenganiswa, zvino anodurura mauri; Zvirokwazvo, vakaipa vose venyika vachasvina masese awo, nokuamwa."

Psalms75:10 Nyanga dzose dzavakaipa ndichadzigura; Asi nyanga dzavakarurama dzichasimudzwa. 
Psalms76:1 Mwari anozikamwa pakati paJudha; Zita rake iguru pakati palsiraeri. 
Psalms76:2 PaSaremiwo ndipo pane tabhenakeri yake, NapaZiyoni ugaro hwake." 
Psalms76:3 Ndipo paakavhuna miseve youta; Nenhovo, nomunondo, nokurwa." 
Psalms76:4 imwi munokubwinya, makanaka kwazvo, Kupfuura makomo ezvakapambwa." 
Psalms76:5 Vakatsunga pamoyo, vakapambwa, vakavata hope dzavo; Pakati pavarume vane simba hakuna akawana maoko ake." 
Psalms76:6 Pakutuka kwenyu, Mwari waJakobho, Ngoro nebhiza zvose zvinobatwa nehope dzorufu." 
Psalms76:7 Imi, iyemi, munofanira kutyiwa; Ndianiko angamira pamberi penyu kana matsamwa?" 
Psalms76:8 Makanzwisa vanhu kutonga kwenyu kuchibva kudenga; Pasi pakatya, pakanyarara," 
Psalms76:9 Panguva yokumuka kwaMwari kuzotonga, Kuti aponese vanyoro vose vapasi." 
Psalms76:10 Zvirokwazvo, kutsamwa kwavanhu kuchakurumbidzai; Munozvisunga chiuno nokutsamwa kwakasara."
