Psalms118:9 Zviri nani kutizira kuna Jehovha Pakuvimba namachinda. 
Psalms118:10 Vahedheni vose vakandikomba; Ndichavaparadza nezita raJehovha. 
Psalms118:11 Vakandikomba, zvirokwazvo, vakandikomba, Ndichavaparadza nezita raJehovha." 
Psalms118:12 Vakandikomba senyuchi; vakadzimwa somoto wemhinzwa; Ndichavaparadza nezita raJehovha. 
Psalms118:13 Kundisundidzira wakandisundidzira iwe kuti ndiwe; Asi Jehovha akandibatsira. 
Psalms118:14 Jehovha ndiye simba rangu norwiyo rwangu; Iye akava muponesi wangu. 
Psalms118:15 inzwi rokufara nerokuponeswa riri mumatende avakarurama; Ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha runokunda. 
Psalms118:16 Ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha rwakasimudzwa, Ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha runokunda." 
Psalms118:17 Handingafi, asi ndichararama, Ndichadudzira mabasa aJehovha." 
Psalms118:18 Kundiranga Jehovha akandiranga; Asi haana kundiisa pakufa. 
Psalms118:19 Ndizarurirei masuo okururama; Ndichapinda nawo, ndivonge Jehovha." 
Psalms118:20 iri ndiro suo raJehovha; Vakarurama vachipinda naro. 
Psalms118:21 Ndichakuvongai, nokuti makandipindura, Mukava muponesi wangu." 
Psalms118:22 Ibwe rakaraswa navavaki Ndiro rakazova musoro wekona. 
Psalms118:23 Ichi chinhu chakabva kuna Jehovha; Zvinoshamisa kana tichizviona. 
Psalms118:24 Rino izuva rakaitwa naJehovha; Ngatifare kwazvo tirifarire. 
Psalms118:25 Tiponesei zvino, Jehovha ndizvo zvatinonyengetera; Jehovha, tipei mufaro ndizvo zvatinonyengetera." 
Psalms118:26 Akaropafadzwa iye anouya nezita raJehovha; Takaropafadzwa tiri mumba maJehovha. 
Psalms118:27 Jehovha ndiye Mwari, ndiye akativhenekera; Sungirai chibayiro namabote ipo panyanga dzearitari pamene." 
Psalms118:28 imwi muri Mwari wangu, ndichakuvongai; Muri Mwari wangu, ndichakukudzai." 
Psalms118:29 Vongai Jehovha; nokuti akanaka; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms119:1 Vakaropafadzwa avo vane nzira yakarurama, Vanofamba mumurau waJehovha." 
Psalms119:2 Vakaropafadzwa vanochengeta zvipupuriro zvake, Vanomutsvaka nomoyo wose." 
Psalms119:3 Zvirokwazvo, havaiti chinhu chisina kururama, Vanofamba munzira dzake." 
Psalms119:4 Makatiraira zvirevo zvenyu, Kuti tizvichengete zvakanaka." 
Psalms119:5 Haiwa, dai nzira dzangu dzakagadzirirwa Kuchengeta mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:6 Ipapo handinganyadziswi, Kana ndichirangarira mirairo yenyu yose." 
Psalms119:7 Ndichakuvongai nomoyo wakarurama, Kana ndichidzidza zvamakatonga zvakarurama." 
Psalms119:8 Ndichachengeta mitemo yenyu; Haiwa, regai kundirasha chose." 
Psalms119:9 Jaya ringaramba richinatsa nzira yaro neiko? Kana richichenjerera sezvinoraira shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:10 Ndakakutsvakai nomoyo wangu wose; Musanditendera kutsauka pamirairo yenyu. 
Psalms119:11 Shoko renyu ndakariviga mumoyo wangu, Kuti ndirege kukutadzirai." 
Psalms119:12 imwi munofanira kukudzwa, Jehovha; Ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:13 Ndakadudzira nemiromo yangu Zvose zvamakatonga nomuromo wenyu. 
Psalms119:14 Ndakafara kwazvo munzira yezvipupuriro zvenyu, Sezvandinofarira fuma yose." 
Psalms119:15 Ndichafungisisa zvirevo zvenyu, Nokurangarira nzira dzenyu." 
Psalms119:16 Ndichazvifadza nemitemo yenyu; Handingakangamwi shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:17 Itirai muranda wenyu zvakanaka, kuti ndirarame; Ipapo ndichachengeta shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:18 Ndisvinudzei meso angu, kuti ndione Zvinhu zvinoshamisa zviri pamurau wenyu." 
Psalms119:19 Nokuti ndiri mutorwa panyika; Regai kundivanzira mirairo yenyu. 
Psalms119:20 Mweya wangu wapera nokushuva Panguva dzose zvamakatonga. 
Psalms119:21 Makaraira vanozvikudza, Ngavatukwe vanotsauka pamirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:22 Bvisai kwandiri kushorwa nokuzvidzwa; Nokuti ndakachengeta zvipupuriro zvenyu. 
Psalms119:23 Machindawo akagara akandireva; Asi muranda wenyu akafungisisa mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:24 Zvipupuriro zvenyuwo zvinondifadza kwazvo, Ndizvo zvinondipa mano." 
Psalms119:25 Mweya wangu unonamatira guruva; Ndiponesei neshoko renyu. 
Psalms119:26 Ndakadudzira nzira dzangu, imwi makandipindura; Ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:27 Ndidzidzisei ndinzwisise nzira yezvirevo zvenyu; Ipapo ndichafungisisa mabasa enyu anoshamisa. 
Psalms119:28 Mweya wangu unonyunguruka nokuremerwa; Ndisimbisei sezvinorehwa neshoko renyu. 
Psalms119:29 Bvisai kwandiri nzira yenhema; Nenyasha dzenyu mundipe murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:30 Ndakasanangura nzira yakatendeka; Ndakaisa zvamakatonga pamberi pangu. 
Psalms119:31 Ndinonamatira zvipupuriro zvenyu; Jehovha, regai kundinyadzisa." 
Psalms119:32 Ndichamhanya nenzira yemirairo yenyu, Kana munenge makurisa moyo wangu." 
Psalms119:33 Ndidzidzisei, Jehovha, nzira yemitemo yenyu; Ndigoichengeta kusvikira pakuguma." 
Psalms119:34 Ndipei njere, ndichengete murau wenyu; Zvirokwazvo, ndichauchengeta nomoyo wangu wose." 
Psalms119:35 Ndifambisei munzira yemirairo yenyu; Nokuti ndinoifarira kwazvo. 
Psalms119:36 Kweverai moyo wangu kuzvipupuriro zvenyu, Urege kukweverwa mukuchiva." 
Psalms119:37 Dzorai meso angu ndirege kuona zvisina maturo, Mundiponese panzira dzenyu." 
Psalms119:38 Simbisai Shoko renyu kumuranda wenyu, Rakakwanira vanokutyai." 
Psalms119:39 Bvisai kushoorwa kwangu kwandinotya, Nokuti zvamakatonga zvakanaka." 
Psalms119:40 Tarirai, ndakashuva zvirevo zvenyu; Ndiponesei mukururama kwenyu." 
Psalms119:41 Ngoni dzenyu ngadziuyewo kwandiri, Jehovha, Iko kuponesa kwenyu, sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:42 Naizvozvo ndichagona kupindura anondishora; Nokuti ndinovimba neshoko renyu. 
Psalms119:43 Regai kubvisa shoko rezvokwadi chose pamuromo wangu; Nokuti ndakatarira zvamakatonga. 
Psalms119:44 Naizvozvo ndichasichengeta murau wenyu Nokusingaperi-peri. 
Psalms119:45 Ndichasifamba ndakasununguka, Nokuti ndakatsvaka zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:46 Ndichataurawo zvipupuriro zvenyu pamberi pamadzimambo, Ndisinganyadziswi." 
Psalms119:47 Ndichazvifadza kwazvo nemirairo yenyu, Yandinoda." 
Psalms119:48 Ndichasimudzirawo maoko angu kumirairo yenyu, yandinoda; Ndichafungisisa mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:49 Rangarirai shoko renyu kumuranda wenyu, Nokuti makandimutsira tariro." 
Psalms119:50 Ndizvo zvinondinyaradza pakutambudzika kwangu; Nokuti shoko renyu rakandiponesa. 
Psalms119:51 Vanozvikudza vakandiseka kwazvo; Kunyange zvakadaro handina kutsauka pamurau wenyu. 
Psalms119:52 Ndakarangarira zvamakatonga kare-kare, Jehovha, Ndikazvinyaradza." 
Psalms119:53 Kutsamwa kukuru kwakandibata, Nokuda kwavakaipa vanorasha murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:54 Mitemo yenyu yaiva nziyo dzangu Mumba moutorwa hwangu. 
Psalms119:55 Ndakarangarira zita renyu, Jehovha, usiku, Ndikachengeta murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:56 Ndizvo zvandakanga ndinazvo, Nokuti ndakachengeta zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:57 Jehovha ndiye mugove wangu; Ndakati, ndichachengeta mashoko enyu." 
Psalms119:58 Ndakakumbira chiso chenyu nomoyo wangu wose; Ndinzwirei nyasha, sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:59 Ndakafunga nzira dzangu, Ndikadzorera tsoka dzangu kuzvipupuriro zvenyu." 
Psalms119:60 Ndakakurumidza, handina kunonoka Kuchengeta mirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:61 Mabote avakaipa akandimonera; Asi handina kukangamwa murau Venyu. 
Psalms119:62 Ndichamuka pakati pousiku kuti ndikuvongei Pamusoro pezvamakatonga zvakarurama. 
Psalms119:63 Ndiri shamwari yavose vanokutyai, Neyavanochengeta zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:64 Jehovha, pasi pazere nengoni dzenyu; Ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:65 Makaitira muranda wenyu zvakanaka, Jehovha, sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:66 Ndidzidzisei ungwaru hwakanaka nenjere; Nokuti ndakatenda mirairo yenyu. 
Psalms119:67 Ndakati ndichigere kutambudzika ndikarashika; Asi zvino ndinochengeta shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:68 imwi makanaka, uye munoita zvakanaka; Ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:69 Vanozvikudza vakandipomera nhema; Ndichachengeta zvirevo zvenyu nomoyo wangu wose. 
Psalms119:70 moyo wavo wakakora samafuta; Asi ini ndinofarira murau wenyu kwazvo. 
Psalms119:71 Zvakanga zvakanaka kuti nditambudzike; Kuti ndidzidze mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:72 Murau womuromo wenyu wakanaka kwandiri Kukunda zviuru zvamazana zvendarama nesirivha. 
Psalms119:73 Maoko enyu akandiita nokundisimbisa; Ndipei kunzwisisa, kuti ndidzidze mirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:74 Vanokutyai vachandiona ndokufara; Nokuti ndakatarira shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:75 Ndinoziva, Jehovha, kuti zvamakatonga zvakarurama, Uye kuti makanditambudza nokutendeka." 
Psalms119:76 Ndinokumbira kuti tsitsi dzenyu dzindinyaradze, Sezvamakareva kumuranda wenyu." 
Psalms119:77 Unyoro bwenyu ngabwuuye kwandiri, kuti ndirarame; Nokuti murau wenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu mukuru." 
Psalms119:78 Vanozvikudza ngavanyadziswe; nokuti vakandiitira zvakaipa ndisina mhosva; Asi ndichafungisisa zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:79 Vanokutyai ngavadzokere kwandiri, Vagoziva zvipupuriro zvenyu." 
Psalms119:80 moyo wangu ngaururame pamitemo yenyu; Kuti ndirege kunyadziswa. 
Psalms119:81 Mweya wangu unopanga kuponesa kwenyu; Asi ndinotarira shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:82 Meso angu anopera nokutsvaka shoko renyu, Ndichiti, ""Muchandinyaradza rinhiko?""" 
Psalms119:83 Nokuti ndava sehombodo iri muutsi; Kunyange zvakadaro handikangamwi mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:84 Mazuva omuranda wenyu manganiko? Muchatonga rinhiko vanonditambudza? 
Psalms119:85 Vanozvikudza vakandicherera hunza, Ivo vasingateereri murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:86 Mirairo yenyu yose yakatendeka; Vanonditambudza ndisina mhosva; ndibatsirei imi. 
Psalms119:87 Vakanga voda kundiparadza pasi; Asi handina kusiya zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:88 Ndiponesei nokuda kounyoro bwenyu; Naizvozvo ndichachengeta chipupuriro chomuromo wenyu. 
Psalms119:89 Shoko renyu rakasimba kudenga Nokusingaperi, Jehovha." 
Psalms119:90 Kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumarudzi namarudzi; imwi makasimbisa pasi, panoramba pagere." 
Psalms119:91 Zvinoramba zvigere nanhasi sezvamakatema; Nokuti zvinhu zvose varanda venyu. 
Psalms119:92 Dai murau wenyu usina kuva mufaro wangu mukuru, Ndingadai ndakaparara nedambudziko rangu." 
Psalms119:93 Handingatongokangamwi zvirevo zvenyu; Nokuti makandiponesa nazvo. 
Psalms119:94 Ndiri wenyu, ndiponesei; Nokuti ndakatsvaka zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:95 Vakaipa vakandigarira kuti vandiparadze; Asi ndichafunga zvipupuriro zvenyu. 
Psalms119:96 Ndakaona kuguma kwezvose zvakakwana, Asi murayiro wenyu mupamhi kwazvo." 
Psalms119:97 Haiwa, ndinoda murau wenyu seiko! Ndicho chandinofungisisa zuva rose." 
Psalms119:98 Mirairo yenyu inondiita akachenjera kupfuura vavengi vangu; Nokuti inogara neni nokusingaperi. 
Psalms119:99 Ndine njere kupfuura vadzidzisi vangu vose; Nokuti zvipupuriro zvenyu ndizvo zvandinofungisisa. 
Psalms119:100 Ndinonzwisisa kupfuura vakakwegura, Nokuti ndakachengeta zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:101 Ndakadzora tsoka dzangu panzira dzose dzakaipa; Kuti ndichengete shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:102 Handina kutsauka pane zvamatonga; Nokuti makandidzidzisa. 
Psalms119:103 Mashoko enyu anonaka seiko mumukamwa mangu! Zvirokwazvo, anokunda uchi mumuromo mangu!" 
Psalms119:104 Pazvirevo zvenyu ndinowana njere; Saka ndinovenga nzira dzose dzenhema. 
Psalms119:105 Shoko renyu ndiwo mwenje wetsoka dzangu, Nechiedza panzira yangu." 
Psalms119:106 Ndakapika, ndikazvisimbisa, Kuti ndichachengeta zvamakatonga zvakarurama." 
Psalms119:107 Ndinotambudzika kwazvo; Ndiponesei, Jehovha, neshoko renyu." 
Psalms119:108 Gamuchirai henyu Jehovha ndizvo zvandinokumbira zvipo zvomuromo wangu zvandinopa nomoyo wangu, Mundidzidzise zvamakatonga." 
Psalms119:109 Mweya wangu unongosiva muruoko rwangu; Kunyange zvakadaro handikangamwi murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:110 Vakaipa vakanditeyera musungo; Kunyange zvakadaro handina kutsauka pazvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:111 Zvipupuriro zvenyu ndakazviita nhaka yangu nokusingaperi; Nokuti ndizvo zvinofadza moyo wangu. 
Psalms119:112 Ndakarerekera moyo wangu kuti uite mitemo yenyu, Nokusingaperi, kusvikira pakuguma." 
Psalms119:113 Ndinovenga vane moyo miviri; Asi ndinoda murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:114 imwi muri chivando changu nenhovo yangu; Ndinotarira shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:115 Ibvai kwandiri, imwi munoita zvakaipa; Kuti ndichengete mirairo yaMwari wangu." 
Psalms119:116 Nditsigirei sezvinoreva shoko renyu, kuti ndirarame; Kuti ndirege kunyadziswa pakutarira kwangu." 
Psalms119:117 Nditsigirei, ndichengetwe, Ndigoramba ndichirangarira mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:118 Makazvidza vose vanotsauka pamitemo yenyu; Nokuti kunyengera kwavo inhema. 
Psalms119:119 Vakaipa vose vapasi munovagumisa sefuro; Saka ndinoda zvipupuriro zvenyu. 
Psalms119:120 Nyama yangu inobvunda nokukutyai; Ndinotya zvamakatonga. 
Psalms119:121 Ndakaita zvakatongwa nezvakarurama; Musandiisa kuvamanikidzi vangu. 
Psalms119:122 Ivai rubatso rwomuranda wenyu kuti ndiitirwe zvakanaka, Vanozvikudza ngavarege kundimanikidza." 
Psalms119:123 Meso angu apera nokutsvaka kuponesa kwenyu, Neshoko renyu rakarurama." 
Psalms119:124 Itirai muranda wenyu nounyoro bwenyu, Mundidzidzise mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:125 Ndiri muranda wenyu, ndipei njere; Kuti ndizive zvipupuriro zvenyu." 
Psalms119:126 Inguva yaJehovha yokubata nayo; Nokuti vakaputsa murau wenyu. 
Psalms119:127 Saka ndinoda mirairo yenyu Kupfuura ndarama, zvirokwazvo, kupfuura ndarama yakaisvonaka." 
Psalms119:128 Saka ndinoti, zvirevo zvenyu zvose pamusoro pezvose zvakarurama; Ndinovenga nzira dzose dzenhema." 
Psalms119:129 Zvipupuriro zvenyu zvinoshamisa; Saka mweya wangu unozvichengeta. 
Psalms119:130 Kuzarurwa kwamashoko enyu kunopa chiedza; Kunopa njere vasina mano. 
Psalms119:131 Ndakashamisa muromo wangu kwazvo, ndikatakwaira; Nokuti ndakashuva mirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:132 Ringirirai kwandiri, mundinzwire nyasha, Sezvamunoitira vanoda zita renyu." 
Psalms119:133 Simbisirai kutsika kwangu mushoko renyu; Zvakaipa ngazvirege kutongova nesimba pamusoro pangu. 
Psalms119:134 Ndidzikunurei pakumanikidza komunhu; Naizvozvo ndichachengeta zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:135 Chiso chenyu ngachivhenekere muranda wenyu; Mundidzidzise mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:136 Nzizi dzemvura dzinoyerera pameso angu, Nokuti havachengeti murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:137 imwi makarurama, Jehovha, Nezvamakatonga zvakaruramawo." 
Psalms119:138 Makaraira zvipupuriro zvenyu nokururama Uye nokutendeka kukuru. 
Psalms119:139 Kushingaira kwangu kwakandipedza, Nokuti vadzivisi vangu vakakangwamwa mashoko enyu." 
Psalms119:140 Shoko renyu rakaisvonatswa; Saka muranda wenyu anorida. 
Psalms119:141 Ndiri muduku, ndakazvidzwa; Asi handikangamwi zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:142 Kururama kwenyu ndiko kururama kusingaperi, Nomurau wenyu izvokwadi." 
Psalms119:143 Nhamo nokumanikidzwa zvakandibata; Asi mirairo yenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu mukuru. 
Psalms119:144 Zvipupuriro zvenyu zvakarurama nokusingaperi; Ndipei njere, ndigorarama." 
Psalms119:145 Ndakadana nomoyo wangu wose; ndipindurei, Jehovha; Ndichachengeta mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:146 Ndakadana kwamuri; ndiponesei, Ndigochengeta zvipupuriro zvenyu." 
Psalms119:147 Ndakatangira mambakwedza ndikadana; Ndakatarira mashoko enyu. 
Psalms119:148 Meso angu akatangira nguva dzousiku, Kuti ndifungisise shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:149 Inzwai inzwi rangu nokuda kounyoro bwenyu; Ndiponesei Jehovha, sezvinoreva zvamakatonga." 
Psalms119:150 Vanotevera zvakaipa voswedera pedo; Vari kure nomurau wenyu. 
Psalms119:151 imwi muri pedo, Jehovha; Mirairo yenyu izvokwadi." 
Psalms119:152 Kubva kare ndakaziva nezvipupuriro zvenyu Kuti makazviteya nokusingaperi. 
Psalms119:153 Tarirai dambudziko rangu, mundirwire; Nokuti handikangamwi murau wenyu." 
Psalms119:154 Ndireverei mhosva yangu, mundidzikunure; Ndiponesei sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:155 Kuponeswa kuri kure navakaipa; Nokuti havatsvaki mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:156 Ngoni dzenyu izhinji, Jehovha; Ndiponesei sezvinoreva zvamakatonga." 
Psalms119:157 Vatambudzi vangu navadzivisi vangu vazhinji; Kunyange zvakadaro handina kutsauka pazvipupuriro zvenyu. 
Psalms119:158 Ndakaona vanyengedzeri, ndikavasema; Nokuti havana kuchengeta shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:159 Fungai kuti ndinoda zvirevo zvenyu; Ndiponesei, Jehovha, nokuda kounyoro bwenyu." 
Psalms119:160 Unganidzo yeshoko renyu izvokwadi; Zvose zvamakatonga, zvakarurama, zvinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms119:161 Machinda akanditambudza ndisina mhosva; Asi moyo wangu unotya shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:162 Ndinofarira shoko renyu kwazvo, Somunhu awana zvizhinji zvakapambwa." 
Psalms119:163 Nhema ndinodzivenga nokudzisema; Asi murau wenyu ndinouda. 
Psalms119:164 Ndinokurumbidzai kanomwe pazuva, Nokuda kwezvakarurama zvamakatonga." 
Psalms119:165 Vanoda murau wenyu vane rugare rukuru; Hapana chinovagumbusa. 
Psalms119:166 Ndakatarira kuponesa kwenyu, Jehovha, Ndikaita mirairo yenyu." 
Psalms119:167 Mweya wangu wakachengeta zvipupuriro zvenyu; Ndinozvida kwazvo. 
Psalms119:168 Ndakachengeta zvirevo zvenyu nezvipupuriro zvenyu; Nokuti nzira dzangu dzose dziri pamberi penyu. 
Psalms119:169 Kudana kwangu ngakusvike pamberi penyu, Jehovha; Ndipei njere sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:170 Kukumbira kwangu ngakusvike pamberi penyu; Ndirwirei sezvinoreva shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:171 Miromo yangu ngairumbidze; Nokuti munondidzidzisa mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:172 Rurimi rwangu ngaruimbe shoko renyu; Nokuti mirairo yenyu yose yakarurama. 
Psalms119:173 Ruoko rwenyu ngarundibatsire; Nokuti ndakasanangura zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:174 Ndakashuva kuponesa kwenyu, Jehovha; Murau wenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu mukuru." 
Psalms119:175 Mweya wangu ngaurarame, ugokurumbidzai; Nezvamakatonga ngazvindibatsire." 
Psalms119:176 Ndakadzungaira segwai rakarashika; tsvakai muranda wenyu; Nokuti handikangamwi mirairo yenyu. 
Psalms120:1 Pakutambudzika kwangu ndakadana kuna Jehovha, Iye akandipindura." 
Psalms120:2 Rwirai mweya wangu, Jehovha, pamiromo inoreva nhema, Naparurimi runonyengedzera." 
Psalms120:3 Iwe uchapiweiko, chinyi chichawedzerwa kwauri, Iwe rurimi runonyengedzera?" 
Psalms120:4 Miseve inopinza yeanesimba, Namazimbe anopfuta omurara." 
Psalms120:5 Ndine ropa rakaipa zvandiri mutorwa paMesheki, Zvandigere pamatende eKedhari!" 
Psalms120:6 Mweya wangu wakagara nguva refu Neanovenga rugare. 
Psalms120:7 Ini ndinoda rugare; Asi kana ndichitaura, ivo vanotsvaka kurwa." 
Psalms121:1 Ndichasimudzira meso angu kumakomo; Kubatsirwa kwangu kuchabvepiko? 
Psalms121:2 Kubatsirwa kwangu kunobva kuna Jehovha, Wakaita kudenga napasi." 
Psalms121:3 Haangatenderi rutsoka rwako kuti rutedzemuke; Muchengeti wako haangakotsiri. 
Psalms121:4 Tarirai, muchengeti waIsiraeri Haangakotsiri kana kuvata." 
Psalms121:5 Jehovha ndiye muchengeti wako; Jehovha ndiye mumvuri wako paruoko rwako rworudyi. 
Psalms121:6 Zuva haringakubayi masikati, Nomwedzi usiku." 
Psalms121:7 Jehovha achakuchengeta pazvakaipa zvose; Achachengeta mweya wako. 
Psalms121:8 Jehovha achakuchengeta pakubuda kwako napakupinda kwako, Kubva panguva ino kusvikira pakusingaperi." 
Psalms122:1 Ndakafara panguva yavakati kwandiri, ""Hendei kumba kwaJehovha.""" 
Psalms122:2 Tsoka dzedu dzimire Pakati pamasuo ako, Jerusaremu;" 
Psalms122:3 Jerusaremu, iwe wakavakwa seguta rakasanganiswa zvakanaka;" 
Psalms122:4 Ndiko kunokwira ndudzi, ndudzi dzaJehovha, Sezvakarairwa Isiraeri, Kuti vavonge zita raJehovha." 
Psalms122:5 Nokuti ndiko kwakagadzwa zvigaro zvokutonga, Zvigaro zvoushe zveimba yaDhavhidhi." 
Psalms122:6 kumbirirai Jerusaremu rugare; Vanokudai, vachakomborerwa." 
Psalms122:7 Rugare ngaruve mukati mamasvingo ako, Nokufarikana mukati medzimba dzako dzoushe." 
Psalms122:8 Nokuda kwehama dzangu neshamwari dzangu, Ndichati zvino, ""Rugare ngaruve mukati mako.""" 
Psalms122:9 Nokuda kweimba yaJehovha Mwari wedu Ndichakutsvakira zvakanaka. 
Psalms123:1 Ndinosimudzira meso angu kwamuri, Iyemi, munogara kudenga." 
Psalms123:2 Tarirai, meso avaranda sezvaanotarira ruoko rwatenzi wavo, Uye meso omurandakadzi sezvaanotarira ruoko rwatenzikadzi wake; Saizvozvo meso edu anotarira kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu, Kusvikira atinzwira nyasha." 
Psalms123:3 Tinzwirei nyasha, Jehovha, tinzwirei nyasha; Nokuti tapera kwazvo nokuzvidzwa." 
Psalms123:4 Mweya wedu wapera chose Nokushora kwavanogara havo zvakanaka, Uye noruzvidzo rwavanozvikudza." 
Psalms124:1 Dai Jehovha asaiva nesu, Isiraeri ngavadaro;" 
Psalms124:2 Dai Jehovha asaiva nesu, Panguva yatakamukirwa navanhu;" 
Psalms124:3 Vangadai vakatimedza tiri vapenyu, Panguva yatakamukirwa nehasha dzavo;" 
Psalms124:4 Mvura zhinji ingadai yakatifukidza, Rwizi rungadai rwakapfuura napamusoro pomweya wedu." 
Psalms124:5 Mvura zhinji, inozvikudza, ingadai yakapfuura napamusoro pomweya wedu." 
Psalms124:6 Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe, Iye asina kutiisa kuti tiparadzwe nameno avo." 
Psalms124:7 Mweya wedu wapukunyuka seshiri parugombe rwomuteyi weshiri; Rugombe rwadambuka, isu tapukunyuka." 
Psalms124:8 Kubatsirwa kwedu kuri muzita raJehovha, Akaita kudenga napasi." 
Psalms125:1 Vanovimba naJehovha Vakafanana negomo reZiyoni, risingazununguswi, asi rimire nokusingaperi." 
Psalms125:2 Sokupoteredzwa kweJerusaremu namakomo, Saizvozvo Jehovha unopoteredza vanhu vake, Kubva panguva ino kusvikira pakusingaperi." 
Psalms125:3 Nokuti tsvimbo youshe yezvakaipa haingagari panhaka yavakarurama; Kuti vakarurama varege kutambanudzira maoko avo kune zvakaipa. 
Psalms125:4 Jehovha, itirai vakanaka zvakanaka, Navane moyo yakarurama." 
Psalms125:5 Asi kana vari vanhu vanotsaukira kunzira dzavo dzakaminama, Jehovha achavaparadza pamwechete navaiti vezvakaipa. Isiraeri ngaave norugare!" 
Psalms126:1 Jehovha panguva yaakadzosa vatapwa veZiyoni, Isu takanga takafanana navanorota hope." 
Psalms126:2 Panguva iyo muromo wedu wakanga uzere nokuseka, Norurimi rwedu nokuimba; Ipapo pakati pavahedheni vakati, ""Jehovha akavaitira zvinhu zvikuru;""" 
Psalms126:3 Jehovha wakatiitira zvinhu zvikuru; Isu tinofara. 
Psalms126:4 Dzosai vatapwa vedu, Jehovha, sehove panyika yeNyasi." 
Psalms126:5 Vanodzvara nemisodzi vachakohwa nomufaro. 
Psalms126:6 Anofamba-famba, achichema, akatakura tsama yembeu, achadzoka nomufaro akatakura zvisote zvake." 
Psalms127:1 Kana Jehovha asingavaki imba, Vavaki vayo vanobata pasina; Kana Jehovha asingachengeti guta, Murindi anorindira pasina." 
Psalms127:2 Hazvina maturo kuti mumuke mangwanani nokunonoka kundovata, Nokudya zvokudya zvamakatamburira; Nokuti anopa vadikamwi vake izvozvo vavete." 
Psalms127:3 Tarirai, vana inhaka inobva kuna Jehovha; Chibereko chechizvaro ndiwo mubayiro waanopa." 
Psalms127:4 Semiseve muruoko rwemhare, Ndizvo zvakaita vana voujaya." 
Psalms127:5 Unomufaro iye murume anegoba rizere navo; Havanganyadziswi, Kana vachitaurirana navavengi vavo pasuo." 
Psalms128:1 Vakaropafadzwa vose vanotya Jehovha, Vanofamba munzira dzake." 
Psalms128:2 Nokuti iwe uchadya zvawakabatira namaoko ako; Uchava nomufaro, uye zvichava zvakanaka newe." 
Psalms128:3 Mukadzi wako uchava somuzambiringa, unobereka zvakanaka, mukati meimba yako; Vana vako vachava semiti yemiorivhi, vakakomberedza tafura yako." 
Psalms128:4 Tarirai, murume anotya Jehovha Acharopafadzwa saizvozvo." 
Psalms128:5 Jehovha achakuropafadza ari paZiyoni; Uchaona kukomborerwa kweJerusaremu mazuva ose oupenyu hwako. 
Psalms128:6 Zvirokwazvo, uchaona vana vavana vako. Isiraeri ngaave norugare." 
Psalms129:1 Vakanditambudza kazhinji kubva pauduku hwangu, Isiraeri ngaadaro zvino;" 
Psalms129:2 Vakanditambudza kazhinji kubva pauduku hwangu; Kunyange zvakadaro havana kundikunda. 
Psalms129:3 Varimi vakarima pamusana wangu; Vakaita mihoronga yavo mirefu. 
Psalms129:4 Jehovha akarurama; Akaguranya mabote avakaipa. 
Psalms129:5 Ngavanyadziswe, vadzoserwe shure, Ivo vose vanovenga Ziyoni." 
Psalms129:6 Ngavave souswa pamatenga eimba, Hunooma husati hwakura;" 
Psalms129:7 Mucheki haazadzi ruoko rwake nahwo, Uye anosunga zvisote, fungatwa rake." 
Psalms129:8 Navanopfuura havangati, ""Jehovha ngaakuropafadzei; Tinokuropafadzai nezita raJehovha.""" 
Psalms130:1 Ndakadanidzira kwamuri, Jehovha, ndiri makadzika." 
Psalms130:2 Ishe inzwai inzwi rangu; Nzeve dzenyu ngadziteerere inzwi rokukumbira kwangu. 
Psalms130:3 Dai imwi Jehovha, mairangarira zvisakarurama, Ndianiko airamba amire, Ishe?" 
Psalms130:4 Asi kukangamwirwa kuriko kwamuri, Kuti vanhu vakutyei." 
Psalms130:5 Ndinorindira Jehovha, mweya wangu unorindira; Ndinotarira shoko rake." 
Psalms130:6 Mweya wangu unorindira Ishe, Kupfuura varindi vanorindira rungwanani; Zvirokwazvo, kupfuura varindi vanorindira rungwanani." 
Psalms130:7 imwi Isiraeri, tarirai kuna Jehovha;.Sokuti kuna Jehovha kune ngoni, Uye kwaari kunokudzikunurwa kukuru." 
Psalms130:8 Iye achadzikunura Isiraeri Panezvisakarurama zvake zvose. 
Psalms131:1 Jehovha, moyo wangu hauzvikudzi, meso angu haana manyawi; Handine hanya nezvinhu zvikuru-kuru, Kana nezvinhu zvinondikurira." 
Psalms131:2 Zvirokwazvo ndakavaraidza mweya wangu nokuunyaradza; Somwana wakarumurwa ari pana mai vake, Mweya wangu wakaita kwandiri somwana akarumurwa." 
Psalms131:3 imwi Isiraeri, tarirai kuna Jehovha Kubva panguva ino kusvikira pakusingaperi." 
Psalms132:1 Jehovha, rangarirai Dhavhidhi Nedambudziko rake rose;" 
Psalms132:2 Namapikiro ake kuna Jehovha, Nokupika kuna Wamasimba waJakobho, achiti," 
Psalms132:3  Zvirokwazvo handingapindi mutende reimba yangu, Kana kukwira pamubhedha wandakawadzirwa;" 
Psalms132:4 Handingatenderi meso angu kuvata, Kana mafungiro angu kukotsira;" 
Psalms132:5 Kusvikira ndawanira Jehovha nzvimbo, Netabhenakeri dzaWamasimba waJakobho.""" 
Psalms132:6 Tarirai, takazvinzwa muEfurata; Takazviwana pasango reJaari." 
Psalms132:7 Tichapinda mutabhenakeri dzake; Tichanamata pachitsiko chetsoka dzake. 
Psalms132:8 Simukai Jehovha, mupinde pamungazorora; Imi, neareka yesimba renyu." 
Psalms132:9 Vapiristi venyu ngavafukidzwe nokururama; Uye vatsvene venyu ngavapururudze nomufaro. 
Psalms132:10 Nokuda kwaDhavhidhi muranda wenyu Regai kuramba chiso chomuzodziwa wenyu. 
Psalms132:11 Jehovha akapika kuna Dhavhidhi; Haangashanduki pazviri, achiti, ""Zvibereko zvomuviri wako ndizvo zvandichaisa pachigaro chako choushe." 
Psalms132:12 Kana vana vako vachichengeta sungano yangu Nezvipupuriro zvangu zvandichavadzidzisa, Navana vavowo vachagara pachigaro chako choushe nokusingaperi.""" 
Psalms132:13 Nokuti Jehovha wakasanangura Ziyoni; Akarida kuti huve ugaro hwake. 
Psalms132:14 Pano ndipo pandinozorora nokusingaperi; Ndichagara pano; nokuti ndakapada. 
Psalms132:15 Ndicharopafadza zvokudya zvaro kwazvo; Ndichagutisa varombo varo nezvokudya. 
Psalms132:16 Vaprista varo ndichavafukidzawo noruponeso; Vatsvene varo vachapururudza nomufaro. 
Psalms132:17 Ipapo ndichameresera Dhavhidhi runyanga; Ndakagadzirira muzodzwa wangu mwenje. 
Psalms132:18 Vavengi vake ndichavafukidza nokunyadziswa; Asi korona yake ichapenya pamusoro pake. 
Psalms133:1 Tarirai, kunaka kwazvo nokufadza kwazvo Kana hama dzichigara pamwechete norugare." 
Psalms133:2 Zvakafanana namafuta anokosha ari pamusoro, Anoyerera pandebvu, Idzo ndebvu dzaAroni; Anoburukira kusvikira pamipendero yenguvo dzake;" 
Psalms133:3 Zvakafanana nedova reHerimoni, Rinoburukira pamakomo eZiyoni; Nokuti ndipo Jehovha paakaraira kuropafadza kwake, Ndihwo upenyu husingaperi." 
Psalms134:1 Tarirai, rumbidzai Jehovha, imwi varanda vose vaJehovha, imwi munomira usiku mumba maJehovha." 
Psalms134:2 Simudzirai maoko enyu kunzvimbo tsvene, Murumbidze Jehovha." 
Psalms134:3 Jehovha ngaakuropafadze ari paZiyoni; Iye akasika kudenga napasi. 
Psalms135:1 Hareruya! Rumbidzai zita raJehovha; Murumbidzei, imwi varanda vaJehovha;" 
Psalms135:2 imwi mumire mumba maJehovha, Muvazhe dzeimba yaMwari wedu." 
Psalms135:3 Rumbidzai Jehovha; nokuti Jehovha akanaka; Imbirai zita rake nziyo dzokurumbidza; nokuti ndizvo zvinofadza. 
Psalms135:4 Nokuti Jehovha akazvisanangurira Jakobho, NaIsiraeri kuti ave fuma yake chaiyo." 
Psalms135:5 Nokuti ndinoziva kuti Jehovha. mukuru, Uye kuti Ishe wedu ari kumusoro kwavamwari vose." 
Psalms135:6 Zvose zvaakada kuita Jehovha akazviita, Kudenga napasi, nomumakungwa napakadzika pose." 
Psalms135:7 Anokwidza makore pamigumo yapasi; Anoita mheni kuuyisa mvura; Anobudisa mhepo panovigwa fuma yake. 
Psalms135:8 Ndiye akaparadza matangwe Avanhu neezvipfuwo. 
Psalms135:9 Akatuma zviratidzo nezvishamiso mukati mako, iwe Ijipiti, Pamusoro paFarao napamusoro pavaranda vake vose." 
Psalms135:10 Ndiye akaparadza ndudzi zhinji, Nokuuraya madzimambo anesimba." 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni mambo wavaAmori, NaOgi mambo weBhashani, Noushe hwose bweKanani;" 
Psalms135:12 Akapa nyika yavo ive nhaka, Ive nhaka yaIsiraeri vanhu vake." 
Psalms135:13 Zita renyu, Jehovha, riripo nokusingaperi; Munorangarirwa Jehovha, kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms135:14 Nokuti Jehovha achatonga vanhu vake, Nokuzvidemba pamusoro pavaranda vake." 
Psalms135:15 Zvifananidzo zvavahedheni isirivha nendarama, Mubato wamaoko avanhu." 
Psalms135:16 Zvinemiromo, asi hazvitauri; Nameso zvinawo, asi hazvioni;" 
Psalms135:17 Zvinenzeve, asi hazvinzwi; Hakuna kufema pamiromo yazvo." 
Psalms135:18 Vanozviita vachafanana nazvo; Zvirokwazvo, navose vanovimba nazvo." 
Psalms135:19 imwi veimba yalsiraeri, rumbidzai Jehovha; imwi veimba yaAroni, rumbidzai Jehovha;" 
Psalms135:20 imwi veimba yaRevhi, rumbidzai Jehovha; imwi vanotya Jehovha, rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms135:21 Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe paZiyoni, Iye agere Jerusaremu. Hareruya!" 
Psalms136:1 Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:2 Vongai Mwari wavamwari; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:3 Vongai Ishe wamadzishe; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:4 Iye oga, anoita zvishamiso zvikuru; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:5 Iye, akaita kudenga-denga nenjere dzake; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:6 Iye akatatamura pasi pamusoro pemvura zhinji; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:7 Iye akaita zviedza zvikuru; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:8 Zuva, kuti ribate ushe masikati; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:9 Mwedzi nenyeredzi, kuti zvibate ushe usiku; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:10 Iye, akarova veIjipiti pamatangwe avo; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:11 Akabudisa Isiraeri pakati pavo; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:12 Nechanza chine simba, uye noruoko rwakatambanudzwa; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:13 Iye akaparadzanisa Gungwa Dzvuku napakati; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:14 Akayambusa Isiraeri nomukati maro; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:15 Akawisira Farao nehondo yake muGungwa Dzvuku; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:16 Iye, akaperekedza vanhu vake murenje; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:17 Iye, akaparadza madzimambo makuru; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:18 Akauraya madzimambo akakurumbira; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni mambo wavaAmori; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:20 NaOgi mambo weBhashani; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:21 Akapa nyika yavo ive nhaka; ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:22 Ive nhaka yaIsiraeri muranda wake; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:23 Iye, akatirangarira paurombo bwedu; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:24 Akatirwira pavadzivisi vedu; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:25 Ndiye anopa zvinhu zvose zvokudya zvazvo; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:26 Vongai Mwari wokudenga; Nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms137:1 Panzizi dzeBhabhironi, Ndipo patakagara pasi, zvirokwazvo tikachema, Pakurangarira kwedu Ziyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Pamikonachando mukati madzo Takaturika mbira dzedu. 
Psalms137:3 Nokuti ipapo avo vakatitapa vakakumbira kwatiri mashoko orwiyo, Vakatiparadza vakakumbira mufaro, vachiti, ""Tiimbireiwo rwiyo rweZiyoni.""" 
Psalms137:4 Tingaimba seiko rwiyo rwaJehovha Munyika yavatorwa? 
Psalms137:5 Kana ndikakukangamwa, iwe Jerusaremu, Ruoko rwangu rworudyi ngarukangamwe umhizha hwarwo." 
Psalms137:6 Rurimi rwangu ngarunamatire kumatadzo angu, Kana ndikarega kukurangarira; Kana ndisingati Jerusaremu Ndiwo mufaro wangu mukuru unopfuura zvose." 
Psalms137:7 Rangarirai Jehovha, murove vana vaEdhomu Pamusoro pezuva reJerusaremu; Ivo, vakati, ""Paradzai, paradzai, Kusvikira panheyo dzaro.""" 
Psalms137:8 Iwe mukunda weBhabhironi, iwe unobva woparadzwa; Munhu uyo achava nomufaro, achakutsivira Sezvawakatiitira iwe." 
Psalms137:9 Munhu uyo achava nomufaro, achatora pwere dzako Nokudzirovera padombo." 
Psalms138:1 Ndichakuvongai nomoyo wangu wose; Ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza pamberi pavamwari. 
Psalms138:2 Ndichanamata ndakatarira kutemberi yenyu tsvene, Nokuvonga zita renyu nokuda kounyoro bwenyu nokutendeka kwenyu; Nokuti makakurisa shoko renyu kupfuura zita renyu rose." 
Psalms138:3 Pazuva randakadana makandipindura, Makandisimbisa nesimba pamweya wangu." 
Psalms138:4 Madzimambo ose enyika achakuvongai, Jehovha, Nokuti vakanzwa mashoko omuromo wenyu." 
Psalms138:5 Zvirokwazvo, vachaimba vachireva nzira dzaJehovha; Nokuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kukuru." 
Psalms138:6 Nokuti Jehovha ari kumusoro, kunyange zvakadaro ane hanya neanozvininipisa; Asi anamanyawi Jehovha anomuziva ari kure." 
Psalms138:7 Kana ndichifamba pakati penhamo, imwi muchandiponesa; Muchatambanudza ruoko rwenyu kudzivisa kutsamwa kwavavengi vangu, Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruchandiponesa." 
Psalms138:8 Jehovha achandikwanisira zvinhu zvangu; Ngoni dzenyu, Jehovha, dzinogara nokusingaperi; Musarega mabasa amaoko enyu." 
Psalms139:1 Jehovha, imwi makandinzvera, nokundiziva." 
Psalms139:2 Munoziva kugara kwangu pasi nokusimuka kwangu, Munonzwisisa kufunga kwangu muri kure." 
Psalms139:3 Munocherekedza kufamba kwangu nokuvata kwangu pasi, Munoziva nzira dzangu dzose." 
Psalms139:4 Nokuti shoko risati ravapo parurimi rwangu, Tarirai, imwi Jehovha, matoriziva rose." 
Psalms139:5 Makandikomberedza shure kwangu nemberi, Nokuisa ruoko rwenyu pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms139:6 Kuziva kwakadai kunondishamisa kwazvo; Zviri kumusoro, handigoni kusvikira kwazviri." 
Psalms139:7 Ndingaendepiko ndibve pamweya wenyu? Kana ndingatizirepiko ndibve pamberi penyu? 
Psalms139:8 Kana ndikakwira kudenga muripo; Kana ndikazviwarira nhovo paSheori, tarirai muripowo." 
Psalms139:9 Kana ndikabhururuka namapapiro amangwanani, Ndikandogara pamigumo yegungwa;" 
Psalms139:10 Naipapowo ruoko rwenyu ruchandifambisa, Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruchandifambisa," 
Psalms139:11 Kana ndikati, ""Zvirokwazvo, rima richandifukidza,"" Chiedza chinondikomberedza chichava sousiku;" 
Psalms139:12 Kunyange rima haringandivanzi kwamuri, Asi usiku hunopenya samasikati; Rima nechiedza zvakafanana." 
Psalms139:13 Nokuti imwi makaumba itsvo dzangu; Makandiruka mudumbu ramai vangu. 
Psalms139:14 Ndichakuvongai; nokuti ndakaitwa nomutoo unotyisa unoshamisa; Mabasa enyu anoshamisa; Mweya wangu unozviziva kwazvo. 
Psalms139:15 Mapfupa angu akanga asina kuvanzwa kwamuri, Panguva yandakaitwa pakavanda, Pakuumbwa kwangu nenjere panzvimbo dzezasi dzapasi." 
Psalms139:16 Meso enyu akaona muviri wangu uchigere kukwaniswa,Zvose zvakanga zvakanyorwa murugwaro rwenyu,zuva rimwe nerimwe rokuumbwa kwazvo, Kusati kwava nechimwe chazvo." 
Psalms139:17 Mirangariro yenyu, Mwari, inodikamwa sei neni! Yakakura sei pakuverengwa kwayo!" 
Psalms139:18 Kana ndikaiverenga, ingapfuura jecha pakuwanda; Kana ndichipepuka, ndichinemi." 
Psalms139:19 Dai muchiuraya henyu vakaipa, Mwari; Naizvozvo ibvai kwandiri, imwi vanhu veropa." 
Psalms139:20 Nokuti vanokutaurirai zvakaipa, Vavengi venyu vanoreva zita renyu pasina." 
Psalms139:21 Ko ini handivengi avo vanokuvengai here, Jehovha? Handine shungu here navanokumukirai?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndinovavenga nembengo huru; Vava vavengi vangu. 
Psalms139:23 Ndinzverei, Mwari, muzive moyo wangu; Ndiidzei, muzive ndangariro dzangu;" 
Psalms139:24 Mutarire kana panenzira yakaipa mandiri, Mundifambise munzira isingaperi." 
Psalms140:1 Ndirwirei Jehovha pamunhu wakaipa, Ndichengetei pamunhu anehasha;" 
Psalms140:2 Ivo, vanofunga zvakaipa mumoyo yavo; Vanogara vachimutsa kurwa." 
Psalms140:3 Vakarodza rurimi rwavo senyoka; Uturu bwechiva huri pasi pemiromo yavo. 
Psalms140:4 Ndichengetei, Jehovha, pamaoko owakaipa; Ndichengetei pamunhu anomanikidza; Vanofunga mano okugumburisa tsoka dzangu." 
Psalms140:5 Vanozvikudza vakandivanzira musungo namabote; Vakadzika mumbure parutivi rwenzira, Vakanditeyera rugombe." 
Psalms140:6 Ndakati kuna Jehovha, Mwari wangu; "" Teererai, Jehovha, munzwe inzwi rokukumbira kwangu." 
Psalms140:7 Mwari Ishe, ndimi simba rokuponeswa kwangu, Makafukidza musoro wangu pazuva rokurwa." 
Psalms140:8 Jehovha, regai kupa wakaipa zvaanotsvaka; Musapfuudza zano rake rakaipa; kuti varege kuzvikudza." 
Psalms140:9 Kana uri musoro wavanondikomba, Zvakashata zvemiromo yavo imene ngazvivafukidze." 
Psalms140:10 Mazimbe omoto, anopfuta, ngaawire pamusoro pavo; Ngavakandirwe mumoto; Nomumakomba akadzika, kuti varege kumukazve." 
Psalms140:11 Munhu, anamakuhwa, haangasimbiswi pasi; Zvakaipa zvichavhima munhu anomanikidza kuti zvimuparadze." 
Psalms140:12 Ndinoziva kuti Jehovha achagadzira mhosva yavanotambudzika, Nokururamisira vashaiwi." 
Psalms140:13 Zvirokwazvo, vakarurama vachavonga zita renyu; Vanemoyo yakarurama vachagara pamberi penyu." 
Psalms141:1 Jehovha, ndakadana kwamuri; kurumidzai kuuya kwandiri; Teererai inzwi rangu kana ndichidana kwamuri." 
Psalms141:2 Munyengetero wangu ngauve pamberi penyu sezvinonhuhwira; Nokusimudzwa kwamaoko angu sechipiriso chamadekwana. 
Psalms141:3 Jehovha, isai murindi pamberi pomuromo wangu; Chengetai mukova wemiromo yangu." 
Psalms141:4 Regai kurerekesa moyo wangu kuchinhu chakaipa, Kuti ndiite zvakaipa Pamwechete navanhu vanoita zvisina kururama." 
Psalms141:5 Akarurama ngaandirove netsitsi; Ngaandituke, ave mafuta pamusoro wangu; Musoro wangu haungaarambi; Nokuti ndicharamba ndichinyengetera pamusoro pokuipa kwavo." 
Psalms141:6 Vatongi vavo vakawisirwa kumawere edombo; Vachanzwa kuti mashoko angu akanaka. 
Psalms141:7 Sezvakaita pasi kana parimwa nokuparurwa, Saizvozvo mapfupa edu akaparadzirwa pamuromo weSheori." 
Psalms141:8 Nokuti meso angu anotarira kwamuri, Jehovha Ishe; Ndinovimba nemi; regai kudurura upenyu hwangu." 
Psalms141:9 Ndichengetei pamusungo wavakanditeyera, Naparugombe rwavanoita zvisina kururama." 
Psalms141:10 Vakaipa ngavabatwe nemimbure yavo vamene, Asi ini ndidarike hangu." 
Psalms142:1 Ndinodanidzira nenzwi rangu kuna Jehovha; Nenzwi rangu ndinonyengetera kuna Jehovha. 
Psalms142:2 Ndinodurura kuchema kwangu pamberi pake; Ndinomuzivisa kutambudzika kwangu. 
Psalms142:3 Panguva yokumanikidzwa komweya wangu mukati mangu, makaziva nzira yangu. Panzira yandinofamba nayo vakandivanzira musungo." 
Psalms142:4 Tarirai kurudyi rwangu, muone; nokuti hakuna munhu anondiziva; Ndashaiwa utiziro; hakuna munhu ane hanya nomweya wangu." 
Psalms142:5 Ndakadanidzira kwamuri, Jehovha; Ndakati, ""Ndimi utiziro hwangu, Nomugove wangu panyika yavapenyu.""" 
Psalms142:6 Teererai kudanidzira kwangu; nokuti ndinoshaiwa simba kwazvo; Ndirwirei panavanonditambudza; nokuti vanondikurira nesimba. 
Psalms142:7 Budisai mweya wangu patirongo, kuti ndivonge zita renyu; Vakarurama vachandipoteredza; Nokuti muchandiitira zvakanaka kwazvo." 
Psalms143:1 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, Jehovha; teererai kukumbira kwangu; Ndipindurei nokutendeka kwenyu nokururama kwenyu." 
Psalms143:2 Regai kutonga muranda wenyu; Nokuti hapana munhu mumwe mupenyu angaruramiswa pamberi penyu. 
Psalms143:3 Nokuti muvengi akatambudza mweya wangu; Akatsikirira upenyu hwangu pasi; Akandigarisa panzvimbo dzine rima, savanhu vakanguva vafa." 
Psalms143:4 Saka mweya wangu wavhunduswa mukati mangu. moyo wangu wavhunduswa mukati mangu. 
Psalms143:5 Ndinorangarira mazuva akare; Ndinofungisisa zvose zvamakaita; Ndinofunga basa ramaoko enyu. 
Psalms143:6 Ndinotambanudzira maoko angu kwamuri; Mweya wangu unokushuvai senyika yakaomerwa. 
Psalms143:7 Kurumidzai kupindura, Jehovha; mweya wangu waziya; Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu; Ndigosava savanoburukira kugomba." 
Psalms143:8 Ndinzwisei unyoro bwenyu mangwanani; Nokuti ndinovimba nemi; Ndizivisei nzira yandinofanira kufamba nayo; Nokuti ndinosimudzira mweya wangu kwamuri. 
Psalms143:9 Ndirwirei Jehovha, panavavengi vangu; Ndinovanda nemi." 
Psalms143:10 Ndidzidzisei kuita kuda kwenyu; nokuti ndimi Mwari wangu; Mweya wenyu, wakanaka ngaundifambise munyika yakati chechetere," 
Psalms143:11 Ndiponesei Jehovha, nokuda kwezita renyu; Budisai mweya wangu pakumanikidzwa nokururama kwenyu." 
Psalms143:12 Pedzai vavengi vangu nounyoro bwenyu, Muparadze vose vanomanikidza mweya wangu; Nokuti ndiri muranda wenyu." 
Psalms144:1 Ngaarumbidzwe Jehovha, dombo rangu, Anodzidzisa maoko angu kurwa, Nemimwe yangu kufura;" 
Psalms144:2 Unyoro hwangu, nenhare yangu, Shongwe yangu yakakwirira, nomurwiri wangu; nhovo yangu, uye iye wandinovimba naye; Anoisa vanhu vangu pasi pangu." 
Psalms144:3 Jehovha, munhu chinyiko, zvamune hanya naye? Kana Mwanakomana womunhu, zvamunomurangarira?" 
Psalms144:4 Munhu akafanana nomweya; Mazuva ake anenge mumvuri unopfuura. 
Psalms144:5 Kotamisa kudenga-denga kwenyu Jehovha, muburuke; Gunzvai makomo, apfungaire hutsi." 
Psalms144:6 Penyesai mheni, muvaparadze; Furai miseve yenyu, muvavhunduse." 
Psalms144:7 Tambanudzai ruoko rwenyu muri kumusoro; Ndisunungurei, mundirwire pamvura zhinji, Naparuoko rwavatorwa;" 
Psalms144:8 Avo vanotaura zvisina maturo nomuromo wavo, Uye ruoko rwavo rworudyi ndirwo ruoko rworudyi rwenhema." 
Psalms144:9 Mwari ndichakuimbirai rwiyo rutsva; Ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza nomutengeramwa une hungiso dzine gumi. 
Psalms144:10 Ndimi munopa madzimambo kuponeswa, Munorwira Dhavhidhi muranda wenyu pamunondo unokuvadza." 
Psalms144:11 Ndisunungurei, mundirwire paruoko rwavatorwa, Vanotaura zvisina maturo nomuromo wavo, Uye ruoko rwavo rworudyi ndirwo ruoko rworudyi rwenhema." 
Psalms144:12 Vanakomana vedu vachava semiti yakakura kwazvo pautsva hwayo; Uye vanasikana vedu samabwe ekona akavezwa sezvinovezerwa imba yamambo; 
Psalms144:13 Matura edu achazara nezviyo zvamarudzi ose; Namakwai edu achabereka zviuru negumi rezviuru kumafuro edu. 
Psalms144:14 Nzombe dzedu dzichatakudzwa zvizhinji; Hatingaputsirwi madziro, kana kubuda kundorwa, Hakungavi nemhere inoridzwa panzira dzomumusha medu;" 
Psalms144:15 Vanomufaro vanhu avo, vanoitirwa saizvozvo; Vanomufaro vanhu avo, Mwari wavo ari Jehovha." 
Psalms145:1 Ndichakukudzai kwazvo, Mwari wangu, imwi Mambo; Ndicharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms145:2 Ndichakurumbidzai zuva rimwe nerimwe; Ndichakudza zita renyu nokusingaperi-peri. 
Psalms145:3 Jehovha mukuru, anofanira kurumbidzwa kwazvo; Ukuru hwake haunganzverwi." 
Psalms145:4 Rudzi rumwe rucharumbidza mabasa enyu kuno rumwe, Vachadudzira zvamakaita zvine simba." 
Psalms145:5 Ndichafungisisa kubwinya koumambo bwenyu hunokudzwa, Namabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms145:6 Vanhu vachataura vachireva simba ramabasa enyu anotyisa; Neni ndichadudzira ukuru bwenyu. 
Psalms145:7 Vachareva vachiyeudzira kunaka kwenyu kukuru, Nokuimbira kururama kwenyu." 
Psalms145:8 Jehovha anenyasha, azere netsitsi, Haachimbidziki kutsamwa, anengoni zhinji." 
Psalms145:9 Jehovha anomoyo wakanaka kuna vose; Ngoni dzake dziri pamabasa ake ose. 
Psalms145:10 Mabasa enyu ose achakuvongai Jehovha; Navatsvene venyu vachakurumbidzai. 
Psalms145:11 Vachataura vachireva kubwinya koushe bwenyu, Nokuparidza simba renyu;" 
Psalms145:12 Kuti vazivise vanakomana vavanhu mabasa ake anesimba, Nokubwinya koumambo hwoushe hwake." 
Psalms145:13 Ushe bwenyu ndihwo ushe husingaperi, Noumambo bwenyu huchagara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms145:14 Jehovha anotsigira vose vanowa, Anosimudza vose vakakotamiswa pasi." 
Psalms145:15 Meso avose anotarira kwamuri; Munovapa zvokudya zvavo panguva yakafanira. 
Psalms145:16 Munotadzanura ruoko rwenyu, Ndokugutisa zvipenyu zvose." 
Psalms145:17 Jehovha akarurama panzira dzake dzose, Anenyasha pazvose zvaanoita." 
Psalms145:18 Jehovha ari pedo navose vanodana kwaari, Vose vanodana kwaari nezvokwadi." 
Psalms145:19 Achaitira vanomutya sezvavanoda; Achanzwawo kudanidzira kwavo; ndokuvaponesa. 
Psalms145:20 Jehovha anochengeta vose vanomuda Asi vakaipa achavaparadza vose. 
Psalms145:21 Muromo wangu uchataura kurumbidzwa kwaJehovha, Vanhu vose ngavarumbidze zita rake dzvene nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms146:1 Hareruya! Rumbidza Jehovha, iwe mweya wangu!" 
Psalms146:2 Ndicharumbidza Jehovha ndichiri mupenyu; Ndichaimbira Mwari wangu nziyo dzokurumbidza, ini ndichiripo." 
Psalms146:3 Regai kuvimba namachinda, Kana noMwanakomana womunhu, asingagoni kubatsira." 
Psalms146:4 Mweya wake unobuda, iye ndokudzokera pasi pake; Nezuva iro mano ake anopera." 
Psalms146:5 Anomufaro munhu uyo kana Mwari waJakobho ari mubatsiri wake, Anotarira kuna Jehovha Mwari wake." 
Psalms146:6 Iye, akaita kudenga napasi, Negungwa, nezvose zviri mukati mazvo; Iye, anoramba akatendeka nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms146:7 Anoruramisira vanomanikidzwa; Anopa vane nzara zvokudya; Jehovha anosunungura vasungwa; 
Psalms146:8 Jehovha anosvinudza meso amapofu; Jehovha anosimudza vakakotamiswa pasi; Jehovha anoda vakarurama; 
Psalms146:9 Jehovha anochengeta vatorwa; Jehovha anotsigira nherera nechirikadzi; Asi nzira yavakaipa anoipesanisa. 
Psalms146:10 Jehovha achabata ushe nokusingaperi, Mwari wako, iwe Ziyoni, kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi. Hareruya!" 
Psalms147:1 Hareruya. Nokuti zvakanaka kuti Mwari wedu aimbirwe nziyo dzokurumbidza; Zvinofadza, uye kurumbidza kwakafanira." 
Psalms147:2 Jehovha anovaka Jerusaremu; Anounganidza vakadzingwa vaIsiraeri. 
Psalms147:3 Anoporesa vane moyo yakaputsika, Anosunga mavanga avo." 
Psalms147:4 Anotara kuwanda kwenyeredzi; Anodzipa dzose mazita adzo. 
Psalms147:5 Ishe wedu mukuru, anesimba guru; Njere dzake hadziperi." 
Psalms147:6 Jehovha anobatsira vanyoro; 
Psalms147:7 Imbirai Jehovha muchimuvonga, Imbirai Mwari wedu nziyo dzokurumbidza nembira;" 
Psalms147:8 Iye anofukidza denga namakore, Anogadzirira pasi mvura, Anomeresa uswa pamakomo." 
Psalms147:9 Anopa zvipfuwo zvokudya zvazvo, Navana vamakunguvo, anochema." 
Psalms147:10 Haafadzwi nesimba rebhiza; Haafariri makumbo omurume. 
Psalms147:11 Jehovha anofara navanomutya, Navanotarira ngoni dzake." 
Psalms147:12 Rumbidza Jehovha, iwe Jerusaremu; Rumbidza Mwari wako, iwe Ziyoni." 
Psalms147:13 Nokuti wakasimbisa mazariro amasuo ako; Akaropafadza vana vako mukati mako. 
Psalms147:14 Anoisa rugare panyika yako; Anokugutisa nezviyo zvakaisvonaka. 
Psalms147:15 Anotuma mirairo yake panyika; Shoko rake rinomhanya kwazvo. 
Psalms147:16 Anopa vanhu chando samakushe amakwai, Anoparadzira chando samadota." 
Psalms147:17 Anokanda chimvuramabwe chake sezvimedu; Ndianiko angamira pachando chake? 
Psalms147:18 Anotuma shoko rake, ndokuzvinyausa; Anovhuvhutisa mhepo yake mvura ndokuyerera." 
Psalms147:19 Anozivisa Jakobho shoko rake, Nalsiraeri mitemo yake nezvaakatonga." 
Psalms147:20 Haana kutongoitira rumwe rudzi saizvozvo; Kana zviri zvaakatonga, havana kuzviziva. Hareruya!" 
Psalms148:1 Hareruya! Rumbidzai Jehovha, imwi muri kudenga; Murumbidzei panzvimbo dzokumusoro." 
Psalms148:2 Murumbidzei imwi vatumwa vake vose; Murumbidzei imwi hondo dzake dzose. 
Psalms148:3 Murumbidzei imwi zuva Murumbidzei imwi nyeredzi dzose dzinovhenekera. 
Psalms148:4 Murumbidzei imwi kudenga kokudenga-denga, Newe mvura zhinji, iri kumusoro kokudenga-denga." 
Psalms148:5 Ngazvirumbidze zita raJehovha; Nokuti iye akaraira, zvikasikwa." 
Psalms148:6 Akazvisimbisawo nokusingaperi-peri; Akatema chirevo chisingafaniri kudarikwa. 
Psalms148:7 Rumbidzai Jehovha imwi vapasi, imwi zvikara zvegungwa, nezviri makadzika;" 
Psalms148:8 Moto nechimvuramabwe, chando noutsi; Dutu guru, rinoita zvaakareva;" 
Psalms148:9 Makomo nezvikomo zvose; Miti inobereka nemisidhari yose; 
Psalms148:10 Mhuka, nezvipfuwo zvose; Zvinokambaira neshiri dzinobhururuka;" 
Psalms148:11 Madzimambo apasi nendudzi dzose dzavanhu; Machinda navatongi vose vapasi; 
Psalms148:12 Majaya nemhandara; Vatana navana; 
Psalms148:13 Ngavarumbidze zita raJehovha; Nokuti zita rake roga rakakurumbira; Umambo hwake huri kumusoro kwapasi nokudenga. 
Psalms148:14 Akasimudza runyanga rwavanhu vake, Kuti arumbidzwe navatsvene vake vose; Naivo vana vaIsiraeri, ivo vanhu vari pedo naye. Hareruya!" 
Psalms149:1 Hareruya! Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva, Nokurumbidzwa kwake paungano yavatsvene." 
Psalms149:2 Isiraeri ngaafarire kwazvo musiki wake; Vana veZiyoni ngavave nomufaro naMambo wavo. 
Psalms149:3 Ngavarumbidze zita rake vachimutambira; Ngavamuimbire nziyo dzokurumbidza nengoma nembira. 
Psalms149:4 Nokuti Jehovha anofarira vanhu vake; Achashongedza vanyoro noruponeso; 
Psalms149:5 Vatsvene ngavafare kwazvo nokukudziwa; Ngavaimbe nomufaro panhovo dzavo. 
Psalms149:6 Kurumbidza kukuru kwaMwari ngakuve pahuro dzavo, Nomunondo unocheka kose paruoko rwavo;" 
Psalms149:7 Kuti vatsive vahedheni; Varange ndudzi dzavanhu; 
Psalms149:8 Kuti vasunge madzimambo avo neketani, Navakuru vavo nezvisungo zvamatare." 
Psalms149:9 Kuti vavaitire zvavakatongerwa zvakanyorwa; Vatsvene vake vose vachakudzwa naizvozvi. Hareruya! 
Psalms150:1 Hareruya! Rumbidzai Jehovha panzvimbo yake tsvene; Murumbidzei mudenga rakaitwa nesimba rake," 
Psalms150:2 Murumbidzei nokuda kwezvaakaita nesimba rake; Murumbidzei zvakafanira ukuru-kuru hwake. 
Psalms150:3 Murumbidzei nemitengeramwa nembira. 
Psalms150:4 Murumbidzei nengoma nokutamba; Murumbidzei nohudimbwa nenyere. 
Psalms150:5 Murumbidzei namakandira anorira kwazvo; Murumbidzei namakandira anorira zvakanaka. 
Psalms150:6 Zvinhu zvose zvinofema, ngazvirumbidze Jehovha. Hareruya!" 
Proverbs1:1 Zvirevo zvaSoromoni, mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mambo waIsiraeri." 
Proverbs1:2 Kuti vanhu vazive uchenjeri nokurairirwa; Nokunzwisisa mashoko enjere; 
Proverbs1:3 Varairirwe nzira yokungwara, Neyokururama, nokururamisa, nokutendeka;" 
Proverbs1:4 Vasina mano vapiwe kungwara, Jaya ripiwe zivo nokuchenjera;" 
Proverbs1:5 Kuti wakachenjera anzwe, awedzere kudzidza; Nomunhu wenjere awane mano akanaka." 
Proverbs1:6 Vanzwisise chirevo nomufananidzo, Mashoko avakachenjera nezvirabwe zvavo." 
Proverbs1:7 Kutya Jehovha ndiko kuvamba kwezivo; Mapenzi anoshora uchenjeri nokurairirwa. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwanakomana wangu, inzwa kurairira kwababa vako; Usarasha kudzidzisa kwamai vako." 
Proverbs1:9 Nokuti zvichava chishongo chakanaka pamusoro wako, Nengetani pamutsipa pako." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwanakomana wangu, kana vatadzi vachikugombedzera, Usatenda iwe." 
Proverbs1:11 Kana vachiti, ""Hendei tose, Ngatirindire ropa; Ngativandire vasina mhosva kunyange pasina mhaka." 
Proverbs1:12 Ngativamedze vari vapenyu seSheori, Vari vakukutu saivo vanoburukira kugomba." 
Proverbs1:13 Tichawana fuma yamarudzi mazhinji; Tichazadza dzimba dzedu nezvatakapamba; 
Proverbs1:14 Iwe uchava mumwe wedu; Tose tichava nechikwama chimwechete. 
Proverbs1:15 Mwanakomana wangu, usafamba navo nenzira yavo; Dzora rutsoka rwako panzira yavo;" 
Proverbs1:16 Nokuti tsoka dzavo dzinovangira zvakaipa; Vanokurumidza kudurura ropa. 
Proverbs1:17 Nokuti mumbure unodzikirwa pasina Shiri dzamarudzi ose dzichizviona. 
Proverbs1:18 Vanhu ava vanogarira ropa ravo vamene; Vanozvivandira hupenyu hwavo. 
Proverbs1:19 Ndizvo zvakaitawo nzira dzavose vanokarira fuma; Zvinotorera mwene wazvo upenyu hwake. 
Proverbs1:20 Uchenjeri hunodanidzira panzira dzomumusha; hunonzwisa inzwi rahwo panzvimbo dzakafara; 
Proverbs1:21 hunodana panzvimbo panoungana vazhinji; Pavanopinda pamasuo, Paguta, ndipo pahunotaura mashoko ahwo, huchiti," 
Proverbs1:22 Nhai imwi vasina mano, muchada kusava namano kusvikira rinhiko? nemwi vaseki kufarira kuseka kwenyu, Namapenzi kuvenga zivo?" 
Proverbs1:23 Dzokai kana muchinzwa kuraira kwangu, Tarirai ndichadurura mweya wangu pamusoro penyu; Ndichakuzivisai mashoko angu." 
Proverbs1:24 Zvandakadana, imwi mukaramba; Ndikatambanudza ruoko rwangu, kukasava nomunhu akarangarira;" 
Proverbs1:25 Asi makazvidza mano angu ose, Mukaramba chose kuraira kwangu," 
Proverbs1:26 Naizvozvo neniwo ndichaseka kana mava munhamo yenyu; Ndichakudadirai, kana kutya kwenyu kuchisvika." 
Proverbs1:27 Kana kutya kwenyu kuchisvika sedutu guru, Nenhamo yenyu ichisvika sechamupupuri; Kana kutambudzika nokudumbirwa zvichikuwirai." 
Proverbs1:28 Nenguva iyo uchadana kwandiri, asi handingapinduri; Vachanditsvaka zvikuru, asi havangandiwani." 
Proverbs1:29 Zvavakavenga zivo, Vakasazvitsaurira kutya Jehovha," 
Proverbs1:30 Vakaramba mano angu ose, Vakashora kuraira kwangu kose," 
Proverbs1:31 Naizvozvo vachadya zvibereko zvenzira yavo; Vachagutswa namano avo. 
Proverbs1:32 Nokuti kudzokera shure kwavasina mano kuchavauraya, Kusava nehanya kwamapenzi kuchavaparadza." 
Proverbs1:33 Asi ani naani anonditeerera achagara zvakasimba, Achagadzikana, asingatyi zvakaipa.""" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwanakomana wangu, kana ukagamuchira mashoko angu, Nokuchengeta mirairo yangu kwauri;" 
Proverbs2:2 Kuti urerekere nzeve yako iteerere uchenjeri, Nokurwadza moyo wako, kuti unzwisise;" 
Proverbs2:3 Kana ukachemera kunzwisisa, Ukadanidzira nenzwi rako kuti uwane njere;" 
Proverbs2:4 Zvirokwazvo kana ukahutsvaka sesirivha, Ukahutsvakisisa sefuma yakavanzwa;" 
Proverbs2:5 Ipapo uchanzwisisa kutya Jehovha, Nokuwana zivo yaMwari." 
Proverbs2:6 Nokuti Jehovha ndiye anopa uchenjeri; Mumuromo make munobuda zivo nenjere," 
Proverbs2:7 Unovigira vakarurama uchenjeri chaihwo; Ndiye nhovo yavanofamba muzvokwadi; 
Proverbs2:8 Nokuti anorinda makwara okururamisa, Nokuchengeta nzira yavatsvene vake." 
Proverbs2:9 Ipapo uchanzwisisa kururama nokururamisa, Nokutendeka, idzo nzira dzose dzakanaka." 
Proverbs2:10 Nokuti uchenjeri huchapinda mumoyo mako, Zivo ichafadza mweya wako;" 
Proverbs2:11 Kungwara kuchakurindira, Njere dzichakuchengeta;" 
Proverbs2:12 Zvikurwire panzira yezvakaipa, Napavanhu vanotaura zvisakarurama;" 
Proverbs2:13 Vanorasha makwara okururama, Kuti vafambe nenzira dzerima;" 
Proverbs2:14 Vanofarira kuita zvakaipa, Vanofadzwa nokunyengera kwezvakaipa." 
Proverbs2:15 Vane nzira dzakaminama, Vanotsauka pamakwara avo;" 
Proverbs2:16 Kuti zvikurwire kumukadzi wokumwe, Kumukadzi mutorwa, anobata kumeso namashoko ake." 
Proverbs2:17 Iye, anorasha shamwari yohumhandara hwake, Achikangamwa sungano yaMwari wake." 
Proverbs2:18 Nokuti imba yake inonyura kurufu, Nenzira dzake kuvakafa;" 
Proverbs2:19 Hakuna anopinda kwaari anozodzokazve; Havasviki panzira dzoupenyu; 
Proverbs2:20 Kuti ufambe nenzira yavakanaka, Uchengete makwara avakarurama." 
Proverbs2:21 Nokuti vakarurama vachagara panyika, Vakakwana vachafambirapo." 
Proverbs2:22 Asi vakaipa vachaparadzwa panyika; Vanoita nokunyengedzera vachadzurwapo. 
Proverbs3:1 Mwanakomana wangu, usakangamwa kudzidzisa kwangu; Asi moyo wako ngauchengete mirairo yangu;" 
Proverbs3:2 Nokuti zvichakuwedzera mazuva mazhinji, Namakore ohupenyu, norugare." 
Proverbs3:3 Rudo nezvokwadi ngazvirege kukusiya; Uzvisungire pamutsipa wako; Uzvinyore pabwendefa romoyo wako; 
Proverbs3:4 Nokudaro uchawana nyasha nenjere dzakanaka Pamberi paMwari navanhu. 
Proverbs3:5 Vimba naJehovha nomoyo wako wose, Urege kusendama panjere dzako." 
Proverbs3:6 Umutende panzira dzako dzose, Agoruramisa makwara ako ose." 
Proverbs3:7 Usazviti ndakachenjera; Itya Jehovha, ubve pane zvakaipa;" 
Proverbs3:8 Zvichava mushonga womuviri wako, Nomwongo wamapfupa ako." 
Proverbs3:9 Kudza Jehovha nezvaunazvo, Uye nezvitsva zvazvose zvawakawana;" 
Proverbs3:10 Ipapo matura ako achazadzwa nezvakawanda, Makate ako achapfachuka newaini itsva." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwanakomana wangu, usazvidza kuranga kwaJehovha; Usaneta nokuraira kwake." 
Proverbs3:12 Nokuti Jehovha anoraira mudikamwa wake; Sezvinoita baba mwanakomana wavo wavanofarira. 
Proverbs3:13 Munhu, awana uchenjeri, anomufaro, Naiye munhu, anowana njere." 
Proverbs3:14 Nokuti kuhuwana ihwo kunopfuura kuwana sirivha; Nokufuma nahwo kunopfuura kufuma nendarama. 
Proverbs3:15 Hunokosha kupfuura korari; Hakune fuma yako ingaenzaniswa nahwo. 
Proverbs3:16 Mazuva mazhinji ohupenyu ari muruoko rwahwo rworudyi; Muruoko rwahwo rworuboshwe mune fuma nokukudzwa. 
Proverbs3:17 Nzira dzahwo inzira dzezvinofadza; Makwara ahwo ose ndoorugare. 
Proverbs3:18 Ndiwo muti woupenyu kuna vanohunamatira; Mumwe nomumwe anohubata anomufaro. 
Proverbs3:19 Jehovha akateya pasi nouchenjeri; Wakasimbisa kudenga-denga nenjere. 
Proverbs3:20 Mvura iri makadzika yakadzutuka nezivo yake; Denga rose rakadonha dova. 
Proverbs3:21 Mwanakomana wangu, ngazvirege kubva pameso ako; Chengeta uchenjeri chaihwo nokungwara." 
Proverbs3:22 Ipapo zvichava upenyu hwomweya Noukomba pamutsipa wako. 
Proverbs3:23 Ipapo uchafamba nenzira yako wakasimba; Rutsoka rwako harungagumburwi. 
Proverbs3:24 Kana uchivata pasi haungatyi; Uye kana wavata pasi hope dzako dzichava dzakanaka. 
Proverbs3:25 Usatya hako chivhunduso chinokuwira kamwe-kamwe, Kunyange kuparadzwa kwavakaipa, kana kuchisvika;" 
Proverbs3:26 Nokuti Jehovha achava chivimbo chako; Achachengeta rutsoka rwako, kuti rurege kubatwa." 
Proverbs3:27 Munhu, akafanirwa, usaramba kumuitira zvakanaka Kana ruoko rwako ruchinge rune simba kuzviita." 
Proverbs3:28 Usati kunowokwako, ""Enda, ugodzokazve, Mangwana ndichakupa;"" Kana uchinge unazvopo." 
Proverbs3:29 Usafunga kuitira wokwako zvakaipa, Zvaanogara hake newe achikutenda." 
Proverbs3:30 Usarwa nomunhu pasina mhosva, Kana asina kukuitira zvakaipa." 
Proverbs3:31 Usagodora munhu anomanikidza; Usatevera kunyange nomumwe wemitovo yake. 
Proverbs3:32 Nokuti mutsauki inyangadzi kuna Jehovha; Asi ano hukama navakarurama. 
Proverbs3:33 Kutukwa naJehovha kuri mumba mowakaipa; Asi unoropafadza ugaro hwavakarurama. 
Proverbs3:34 Kana vari vadadi, anovadadira, Asi vanozvininipisa anovaitira nyasha." 
Proverbs3:35 Vakachenjera vachagara nhaka yokukudzwa; Asi mapenzi anozviwanira kunyadziswa. Itya Jehovha, ubve pane zvakaipa;" 
Proverbs4:1 imwi vanakomana, inzwai kurairira kwababa venyu; Teererai, muzive njere." 
Proverbs4:2 Nokuti ndinokupai dzidziso yakanaka; Regai kurasha murayiro wangu. 
Proverbs4:3 Nokuti ini ndakanga ndiri mwanakomana kuna baba vangu, Mwana oga akadikamwa kwazvo, namai vangu;" 
Proverbs4:4 Ivo baba vakandidzidzisa, vakati kwandiri, ""moyo wako ngaunyatsobata mashoko angu; Chengeta mirairo yangu, urarame." 
Proverbs4:5 Zviwanire uchenjeri, zviwanire njere; Regai kukangamwa kana kutsauka pamashoko omuromo wangu;" 
Proverbs4:6 Usahurasha, hugokuchengeta; Uhude, hugokurinda." 
Proverbs4:7 Uchenjeri chinhu chikuru kune zvose; saka uzviwanire uchenjeri; Uzviwanire njere nezvose zvaunazvo. 
Proverbs4:8 Uhukudze, hugokukwiridza iwe; Huchakuvigira kukudzwa, kana uchihumbundikira." 
Proverbs4:9 Huchapa musoro wako chishongo chakanaka; Huchakuisira korona inobwinya. 
Proverbs4:10 Chinzwa iwe mwanakomana wangu, ugamuchire zvandinoreva; Makore oupenyu hwako agova mazhinji." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndakakudzidzisa panzira youchenjeri; Ndakakufambisa pamakwara akarurama. 
Proverbs4:12 Kana uchifamba, tsoka dzako hadzingapinganidzwi; Kana uchimhanya, haungagumburwi." 
Proverbs4:13 Natsa kubata kurairirwa; usakuregedza; Ukuchengete, nokuti ndihwo hupenyu hwako." 
Proverbs4:14 Usapinda pagwara ravakaipa, Usafamba nenzira yavakashata." 
Proverbs4:15 Uinzvenge, usapinda pairi; Tsauka pairi, upfuure hako." 
Proverbs4:16 Nokuti havavati, kana vasingaiti zvakashata; Vanotorerwa hope dzavo, kana vasingagumbusi vamwe." 
Proverbs4:17 Nokuti vanodya zvokudya zvezvakaipa, Nokumwa waini yokumanikidza." 
Proverbs4:18 Asi gwara ravakarurama rakaita sechiedza chamambakwedza, Chinoramba chichiwedzera kubwinya kusvikira pamasikati makuru." 
Proverbs4:19 Nzira yavakaipa yakaita serima; Havazivi chingavagumbusa. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwanakomana wangu, teerera mashoko angu; Rerekera nzeve yako kune zvandinoreva." 
Proverbs4:21 Urambe uchitarira, Uachengete mukati momoyo wako." 
Proverbs4:22 Nokuti ndihwo hupenyu kuna vanowawana, Noukukutu bwemuviri yavo yose." 
Proverbs4:23 Chengeta moyo wako kupfuura zvose zvinofanira kurindwa; Nokuti mukati mawo ndimo mune zvitubu zvoupenyu. 
Proverbs4:24 Bvisa kwauri nhema dzomuromo, Kutsauka kwemiromo ngakuve kure newe." 
Proverbs4:25 Meso ako ngaarurame pakutarira; Mafungiro ameso ako ngaatarire mberi kwako. 
Proverbs4:26 Gadzirira tsoka dzako gwara; Nzira dzako dzose dzive dzakasimba. 
Proverbs4:27 Usatsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe; Rutsoka rwako urubvise pane zvakaipa. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwanakomana wangu, teerera uchenjeri hwangu; Rerekera nzeve yako inzwe njere dzangu;" 
Proverbs5:2 Kuti ugare wakabata kungwara, Nemiromo yako ichengete zivo." 
Proverbs5:3 Nokuti miromo yomukadzi wokumwe inodonha huchi; Muromo wake unotedza kupfuura mafuta; 
Proverbs5:4 Asi pakupedzisira unovava segavakava; Unopinza somunondo une nhivi mbiri dzinocheka. 
Proverbs5:5 Tsoka dzake dzinoburukira kurufu; Nhambwe dzake dzinovavarira kuhwiro; 
Proverbs5:6 Gwara roupenyu, rakati chechetere, haariwani, Nzira dzake dzinotsauka, iye asingazvizivi." 
Proverbs5:7 Saka imi, vanakomana vangu, nditeererei; Regai kutsauka pamashoko omuromo wangu." 
Proverbs5:8 Nzira yako ngaive kure naye, Usaswedera pamukova weimba yake." 
Proverbs5:9 Kuti urege kupa vamwe kunaka kohujaya hwako, Namakore ako kuno anomoyo mukukutu;" 
Proverbs5:10 Kuti vatorwa varege kugutswa nefuma yako, Nezvibereko zvokutambura kwako zviende kumba komweni." 
Proverbs5:11 Iwe ugochema pakupedzisira kwako, Kana nyama yako nomuviri wako zvaparadzwa," 
Proverbs5:12 Uchiti, ""Ndakavengereiko kurairirwa, moyo wangu wakashorerei kurairwa?" 
Proverbs5:13 Ndakaregereiko kuteerera inzwi ravadzidzisi vangu, Nokusarerekera nzeve yangu kuna vaindiraira?" 
Proverbs5:14 Ndakanga ndapinda pane zvakaipa zvose, Pakati pechaunga neungano.""" 
Proverbs5:15 Imwa mvura padziva rako chairo, Nemvura inoyerera patsime rako chairo." 
Proverbs5:16 Ko matsime ako anofanira kuparadzirwa here, Nzizi dzemvura dziyerere munzira dzomumusha here?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ngazvive zvako woga, Zvisava zvavatorwa pamwechete newe." 
Proverbs5:18 Tsime rako ngariropafadzwe; Ufarire mukadzi wohujaya hwako. 
Proverbs5:19 Sehadzi yenondo yakanaka, nehadzi yengururu inofadza; Mazamu ake ngaakufadze nguva dzose; Ugare uchigutiswa norudo rwake." 
Proverbs5:20 Nokuti iwe, mwanakomana wangu, uchagutsirweiko nomukadzi wokumwe, Uchambundikireiko chipfuva chomweni?" 
Proverbs5:21 Nokuti nzira dzomunhu dziri pamberi paJehovha; Ndiye anoyera makwara ake ose. 
Proverbs5:22 Zvivi zvake zvichabata muiti wazvo, Achabatwa namabote ezvivi zvake." 
Proverbs5:23 Achafa nokushaiwa kurairirwa; Achatsauka noukuru hwoupenzi hwake. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwanakomana wangu, kana uchinge wakazviitira wokwako rubatso, Wazvisunga nokuda komutorwa noruoko rwako," 
Proverbs6:2 Wazviteya namashoko omuromo wako, Wabatwa namashoko omuromo wako," 
Proverbs6:3 Zvino ita kudai, mwanakomana wangu, uzvirwire, Zvawabatwa noruoko rwowokwako, Enda, undozvininipisa, ukumbire zvikuru kunowokwako." 
Proverbs6:4 Usatendera meso ako hope, Kana mafungiro ameso ako kutsumwaira;" 
Proverbs6:5 Uzvirwire semhara paruoko rwomuvhimi, Seshiri paruoko rwomuteyi." 
Proverbs6:6 Enda kumujuru, iwe simbe; Cherekedza nzira dzawo ugova wakachenjera!" 
Proverbs6:7 Kunyange iwo usina mutongi, Kana mutariri kana mubati," 
Proverbs6:8 Unogadzira zvokudya zvawo mumunakamwe, Nokuunganidza zvokudya zvawo mukukohwa." 
Proverbs6:9 Iwe simbe, uchavata pasi kusvikira rinhiko? Uchamuka rinhiko pahope dzako?" 
Proverbs6:10 Kumbovata zvishomanene, kumbotsumwaira zvishomanene, Kumbofungatira maoko zvishomanene, ndizorore;" 
Proverbs6:11 Saizvozvo urombo hwako huchasvika segororo, Nokushaiwa kwako somunhu wakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa." 
Proverbs6:12 Munhu asina maturo, munhu anoita zvakaipa, Ndiye anofamba nomuromo une nhema;" 
Proverbs6:13 Anobwaira nameso ake, anotendekera netsoka dzake, Anodudzira nemimwe yake;" 
Proverbs6:14 Ane zvisakarurama pamoyo pake, Anosifungira vamwe zvakaipa, Anokusha kupesana." 
Proverbs6:15 Saka njodzi yake ichamuwira kamwe-kamwe; Achavhuniwa pakarepo, kusina chingamubatsira." 
Proverbs6:16 Zvinhu zvitanhatu zviriko zvinovengwa naJehovha; Zvirokwazvo, tingati kune zvinomwe, zvinomunyangadza, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs6:17 Meso ounozvikudza, rurimi runoreva nhema, Maoko anodurura ropa risina mhaka;" 
Proverbs6:18 moyo unofunga mano akaipa, Tsoka dzinokurumidza kuvangira zvakashata;" 
Proverbs6:19 Chapupu chinonyengera chinoreva nhema, Uye anokusha kupesana pakati pehama." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwanakomana wangu, chengeta murayiro wababa vako; Usarasha kudzidzisa kwamai vako." 
Proverbs6:21 Uzvisungire nguva dzose pamoyo wako; Uzvishonge pamutsipa wako. 
Proverbs6:22 Kana uchifamba, zvichakutungamirira; Kana uchivata pasi, zvichakurinda; Kana womuka, zvichataurirana newe." 
Proverbs6:23 Nokuti murayiro ndiwo mwenje; murau ndicho chiedza; Kuraira kokurairirwa inzira youpenyu; 
Proverbs6:24 Kuti uchengetwe pamukadzi wakaipa, Pakubata kumeso korurimi rwomutorwa." 
Proverbs6:25 Usachiva kunaka kwake mumoyo mako; Arege kukubata namafungiro ameso ake. 
Proverbs6:26 Nokuti nokuda kwechifeve munhu angasvikira pakudya chimeduchetechechingwa; Mukadzi womumwe munhu anovhima upenyu hunokosha. 
Proverbs6:27 Ko munhu ungaisa moto muchipfuva chake, nguvo dzake dzikasatsva here?" 
Proverbs6:28 Kana munhu angatsika mazimbe anopisa, Tsoka dzake dzikasapiswa here?" 
Proverbs6:29 Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anopinda kumukadzi wowokwake; Ani naani anomunyangata iye mukadzi haangaregwi kurohwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Vanhu havangazvidzi mubi kana achiba Kuti agute kana achinge ane nzara. 
Proverbs6:31 Asi kana akabatwa anofanira kudzosera zvava zvinomwe; Anofanira kuripa nefuma yose yeimba yake. 
Proverbs6:32 Anoita upombwe nomukadzi, anoshaiwa njere; Anoda kuparadza upenyu hwake ndiye anoita izvozvo." 
Proverbs6:33 Uchangozviwanira mavanga nokusakudzwa; Kunyadziswa kwake hakungatongopusikwi. 
Proverbs6:34 Nokuti godo rinomutsa hasha dzomurume; Haanganzwiri tsitsi pazuva rokutsiva. 
Proverbs6:35 Haangavi nehanya nomuripo; Haangatendi, kunyange ukamuvigira zvipo zvizhinji." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwanakomana wangu, chengeta mashoko angu, Viga mirairo yangu kwauri." 
Proverbs7:2 Chengeta mirairo yangu, urarame; Nomurau wangu semboni yeziso rako." 
Proverbs7:3 Uzvisungire pamweya wako; Uzvinyore pabwendefa romoyo wako. 
Proverbs7:4 Uti kuuchenjeri, ""Ndiwe hanzvadzi yangu; Utumidze njere shamwari yako;""" 
Proverbs7:5 Kuti zvikuchengete pamukadzi wokumwe, Pamutorwa anobata kumeso namashoko ake." 
Proverbs7:6 Nokuti ndakatarira pahwindo reimba yangu, Pahutanda bwehwindo rangu;" 
Proverbs7:7 Ndikatarira pakati pavasina mano, Ndikaona pakati pamajaya. Rimwe jaya rakashaiwa njere;" 
Proverbs7:8 Richipfuura nenzira yomumusha pedo nekona yeimba yomukadzi 
Proverbs7:9 Nenguva yorubvunzavaeni, nenguva yamadeko ezuva, Pakati pousiku kwasviba." 
Proverbs7:10 Zvino tarira, mukadzi akasangana naye, Akanga akafuka sechifeve, anokunyengedzera pamoyo." 
Proverbs7:11 Anopupira, achiita sezvaanoda; Tsoka dzake hadzigari mumba make;" 
Proverbs7:12 Imwe nguva ari munzira dzomumusha, imwe nguva pamatare; Anorindira pamakona ose." 
Proverbs7:13 Zvino iye akamubata, akamutsvoda; Akataura naye nechiso chisina kunyara, akati kwaari," 
Proverbs7:14 Ndaifanira kuuya nezvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvokuyananisa, Nhasi ndaripa mhiko dzangu." 
Proverbs7:15 Saka ndabuda kuzokuchingamidza, Nditsvake chiso chako zvikuru, zvino ndakuwana." 
Proverbs7:16 Ndakawarira machira anohukomba pamubhedha wangu, Nemicheka ina mavara inobva Ijipiti." 
Proverbs7:17 Ndakasasa zvinonhuhwira pamubhedha wangu, Mura, negavakava, nekinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Uya tigute nokudana kusvikira mangwanani; Ngatizvifadze nokudana kukuru. 
Proverbs7:19 Nokuti murume haapo pamusha; Akafamba rwendo rukuru; 
Proverbs7:20 Akaenda nehombodo ine mari; Achadzoka pajenaguru. 
Proverbs7:21 Nokutaura kwake kuzhinji kwakanaka anomutsausa, Anomugombedzera nokubata kumeso kwemiromo yake." 
Proverbs7:22 Anomutevera pakarepo, Senzombe inoenda kwainondobayiwa, Kana sebenzi rakasungwa rinoenda kundorangwa;" 
Proverbs7:23 Kusvikira museve wabaya chiropa chake; Seshiri inokurumidzira kurugombe, Asingazivi kuti zvinovinga upenyu hwake." 
Proverbs7:24 Zvino vanakomana vangu, nditeererei, Inzwai mashoko omuromo wangu." 
Proverbs7:25 moyo wako ngaurege kutsaukira kunzira dzake; Usafamba-famba mumakwara ake. 
Proverbs7:26 Nokuti akawisira pasi vazhinji vakakuvadzwa; Zvirokwazvo, vakaurawa naye vazhinji kwazvo." 
Proverbs7:27 Imba yake inzira dzinoenda Sheori, Dzinoburukira kudzimba dzorufu." 
Proverbs8:1 Ko Uchenjeri hahudanidziri here? Nenjere hadzibudisi manzwi adzo here? 
Proverbs8:2 Pamusoro pemitunhu panzira, Pamharadzano dzenzira, ndipo pahumire;" 
Proverbs8:3 Parutivi rwamasuo, panopindwa paguta, Pavanopinda pamikova, ndipo pahunodanidzira; huchiti," 
Proverbs8:4 Ndinodanidzira kwamuri, imwi varume, Inzwi rangu rinodana vanakomana vavanhu." 
Proverbs8:5 nzwisisai uchenjeri, imwi vasina mano; imwi mapenzi, ivai nomoyo une njere." 
Proverbs8:6 Inzwai, nokuti ndichataura zvinhu zvakaisvonaka; Nokuti miromo yangu ichashamira zvinhu zvakarurama." 
Proverbs8:7 Nokuti muromo wangu unobudisa zvokwadi; Chinhu chakaipa chinonyangadza pamiromo yangu. 
Proverbs8:8 Mashoko ose omuromo wangu akarurama; Hakuna chinhu chakakombama kana chisakarurama maari; 
Proverbs8:9 Zvose zviri pachena kuno anenjere; Zvakarurama kuna ivo vakawana zivo. 
Proverbs8:10 Gamuchirai kuraira kwangu, murege kugamuchira sirivha; Nezivo, kupfuura ndarama yakasarurwa." 
Proverbs8:11 Nokuti uchenjeri hwakanaka kupfuura korari; Zvose zvinodikamwa nomunhu hazvingaenzaniswi nahwo. 
Proverbs8:12 Ini uchenjeri ndakaita kungwara imba yangu, Ndinowana zivo namano akarurama." 
Proverbs8:13 Kutya Jehovha ndiko kuvenga zvakaipa; Kuzvikudza namanyawi nenzira yakaipa, Nomuromo unonyengedzera, ndinozvivenga." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndine zano rakanaka nokubata kwakakwana; Ndini kuchenjera; ndine simba. 
Proverbs8:15 Madzimambo anobata ushe neni, Vabati vanotonga vanhu neni." 
Proverbs8:16 Madzishe anofambisa ushe neni, Navakuru, ivo vatongi vose vapasi." 
Proverbs8:17 Ndinoda vanondida; Vanonditsvaka nomoyo wose vachandiwana. 
Proverbs8:18 fuma nokukudzwa zvineni, Zvinokosha zvakaisvonaka nokururama." 
Proverbs8:19 Zvibereko zvangu zvakanaka kupfuura ndarama, kunyange ndarama yakaisvonaka; Zvandinowana zvinopfuura sirivha yakasarurwa." 
Proverbs8:20 Ndinofamba nenzira yokururama, Mukati mamakwara okururamisa;" 
Proverbs8:21 Kuti ndigarise nhaka vanondida, Ndizadze zvivigiro zvefuma yavo." 
Proverbs8:22 Jehovha akandiumba pakuvamba kwenzira yake, Kutangira mabasa ake akare." 
Proverbs8:23 Ini ndakamiswa kubva pakusingaperi, kubva pakutanga, Pasi pasati pasikwa." 
Proverbs8:24 Makungwa asati avapo, ini ndakaberekwa; Pasina matsime ane mvura zhinji." 
Proverbs8:25 Makomo asati anyudzwa, Zvikomo zvisipo, ini ndakaberekwa;" 
Proverbs8:26 Iye asati aumba pasi namapani, Kana guruva rokutanga renyika." 
Proverbs8:27 Panguva yaakagadzira kudenga-denga, ndakanga ndiripo; Pakuisa kwake denderedzwa pamusoro pamakungwa;" 
Proverbs8:28 Panguva yaakasimbisa denga rose kumusoro, Pakusimba kwamatsime amakungwa;" 
Proverbs8:29 Panguva yaakaitira gungwa miganho yaro, Kuti mvura irege kudarika murayiro wake, Pakutara kwake nheyo dzapasi;" 
Proverbs8:30 Nenguva iyo ndaiva naye, ndiri mhizha; Ndaimufadza zuva rimwe nerimwe, Ndichitamba pamberi pake nguva dzose," 
Proverbs8:31 Ndichitamba panyika yake, Ndichifadzwa navanakomana vavanhu." 
Proverbs8:32 Saka zvino vanakomana vangu, nditeererei; Nokuti vanochengeta nzira dzangu vakaropafadzwa." 
Proverbs8:33 Inzwai kurairira muve vakachenjera, Regai kukuramba." 
Proverbs8:34 Munhu, anondinzwa, akaropafadzwa, Anorinda zuva rimwe nerimwe pamasuo angu, Anomira pazvivivo zvemikova yangu." 
Proverbs8:35 Nokuti andiwana, awana hupenyu, Achapiwa nyasha naJehovha." 
Proverbs8:36 Asi anondishaiwa, anotadzira mweya wake;" 
Proverbs9:1 Uchenjeri hwakavaka imba yahwo; Hwakaveza mbiru dzahwo nomwe; 
Proverbs9:2 Hwakabaya zvipfuwo zvahwo; Hwakavhenganisa waini yahwo; Hwakagadzirawo tafura yahwo. 
Proverbs9:3 Hwakatuma varandakadzi vahwo; hunodanidzira pamitunhu yeguta, huchiti," 
Proverbs9:4 Asina mano ngaatsaukire muno; Asina njere, hunoti kwaari," 
Proverbs9:5 Uyai mudye chingwa changu, Mumwe waini yandakavhenganisa." 
Proverbs9:6 Regai kusasvinuka murarame; Mufambe nenzira yenjere. 
Proverbs9:7 Munhu, anoraira mudadiri anozvitsvakira kunyadziswa; Anotuka munhu wakaipa achasvibiswa." 
Proverbs9:8 Usaraira mudadiri, kuti arege kukuvenga; Raira munhu wakachenjera, iye achakuda." 
Proverbs9:9 Ipa wakachenjera dzidzo, ipapo iye achawedzerwa huchenjeri; Dzidzisa wakarurama, ipapo iye achawedzerwa zivo." 
Proverbs9:10 Kuvamba kouchenjeri ndiko kutya Iehovha., Kuziva Mutsvene ndidzo njere." 
Proverbs9:11 Nokuti neni mazuva ako achaitwa mazhinji, Makore oupenyu hwako achawedzerwa." 
Proverbs9:12 Kana wakachenjera, iwe, wakazvichenjerera hako; Kana uri mudadiri, iwe woga uchava nemhosva yazvo." 
Proverbs9:13 Mukadzi benzi anopupira; Haana mano, haazivi chinhu." 
Proverbs9:14 Anogara pamukova weimba yake, Pachigaro pamitunhu yeguta." 
Proverbs9:15 Kuti adanidzire kuna vanopfuura napo, Ivo vanorurama nenzira dzavo, achiti," 
Proverbs9:16 Ani naani asina mano, ngaatsaukire muno;"" Asine njere, mukadzi anoti kwaari," 
Proverbs9:17 Mvura yabiwa inozipa, Chingwa chinodyiwa pakavanda chinonaka.""" 
Proverbs9:18 Asi haazivi kuti vanopindamo vanofa; Kuti vakakokerwa naye vari mukati-kati meSheori. 
Proverbs10:1 Zvirevo zvaSoromoni. Mwanakomana, akachenjera, anofadza baba; Asi mwanakomana benzi anoshuwisa mai vake." 
Proverbs10:2 fuma yakawanikwa nezvakaipa haibatsiri chinhu; Asi kururama kunorwira parufu. 
Proverbs10:3 Jehovha haangatenderi mweya wowakarurama kuti unzwe nzara; Asi kupanga kwavakaipa unokusundira kure. 
Proverbs10:4 Anobata noruoko rusine hanya, achava murombo; Asi ruoko rweasina usimbe runofumisa." 
Proverbs10:5 Anounganidza muzhezha, ndiye mwanakomana wakachenjera; Asi anovata hope mukukohwa, mwanakomana anonyadzisa." 
Proverbs10:6 Mikomborero iri pamusoro wowakarurama; Asi muromo wowakaipa unovanza kumanikidza.

Proverbs10:8 Ane moyo wakachenjera, achagamuchira mirairo; Asi ane miromo youpenzi achawisirwa pasi." 
Proverbs10:9 Anofamba zvakarurama, anofamba zvakasimba; Asi anominamisa nzira dzake, achazikamwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Anochonya neziso rake, anouyisa madambudzo; Asi ane miromo youpenzi, achawisirwa pasi." 
Proverbs10:11 Muromo wowakarurama itsime roupenyu; Asi muromo wowakaipa unovanza kumanikidza. 
Proverbs10:12 Mbengo dzinomutsa kukakavara; Asi rudo runofukidza kudarika kose. 
Proverbs10:13 Pamiromo yeane njere panowanikwa uchenjeri; Asi shamhu yakafanira musana woanoshaiwa njere. 
Proverbs10:14 Vakachenjera vanozvichengetera zivo; Asi muromo webenzi uri pedo nokuparadzwa. 
Proverbs10:15 fuma yomufumi ndiro guta rake rakasimba; Zvinoparadza varombo ndihwo urombo hwavo. 
Proverbs10:16 Zvaakabatira zvinoisa wakarurama kuupenyu; Zvakawanikwa nowakaipa zvinoisa kuzvivi. 
Proverbs10:17 Anoteerera kurairirwa, ari panzira youpenyu; Asi anoramba kurairwa, anotsausa vamwe." 
Proverbs10:18 Anovanza kuvenga, ane miromo yenhema; Ana makuhwa, ibenzi." 
Proverbs10:19 Kudarika hakungakoni pamunhu anamashoko mazhinji; Asi anodzora miromo yake, ano huchenjeri." 
Proverbs10:20 Rurimi rwowakarurama rwakafanana nesirivha yakasarurwa; moyo wowakaipa haubatsiri chinhu.

Proverbs10:26 Sezvinoita vhininga pameno, noutsi pameso, Ndizvo zvakaita simbe kuna vanomutuma."

Proverbs15:3 Meso aJehovha ari pose-pose; Achicherekedza vakaipa navakanaka. 
Proverbs15:4 Rurimi runyoro muti woupenyu; Asi rune nhema runoputsa mweya. 
Proverbs15:5 Benzi rinoramba kurairira kwababa varo; Asi une hanya nokurairwa, ndiye ane njere." 
Proverbs15:6 Mumba mowakarurama mune fuma zhinji; Asi kutambudzika kuri munezvinowanikwa nowakaipa. 
Proverbs15:7 Miromo yavakachenjera inokusha zivo; Asi moyo wamapenzi haudaro.

Proverbs15:9 Nzira yowakaipa inonyangadza Jehovha; Asi anoda munhu anotevera kururama. 
Proverbs15:10 Kurangwa kwakaipa kunovinga munhu anosiya nzira; Anovenga kurairwa achafa. 
Proverbs15:11 Sheori noKuparadza zviri pamberi paJehovha; Ndoda moyo yavana vavanhu. 
Proverbs15:12 Mudadi haadi kurairwa; Anoramba kuenda kunowakachenjera. 
Proverbs15:13 moyo, wakafara, unofadza chiso; Asi mweya unoputsa nomoyo une shungu." 
Proverbs15:14 moyo woane njere unotsvaka zivo; Asi muromo wamapenzi unogutiswa noupenzi. 
Proverbs15:15 Mazuva ose omunhu, uri pakutambudzika, akaipa; Asi anomoyo wakafara anomutambo nguva dzose." 
Proverbs15:16 Zviri nani kuti munhu ave nezvishoma, achitya Jehovha, Pakuti ave nefuma yakawanda, achinyunyuta." 
Proverbs15:17 Zviri nani kuti munhu ave nezvokudya zvemiriwo, rudo ruripo, Pakuti ave nenzombe yakakodzwa, panembengo." 
Proverbs15:18 Munhu, ane hasha, anomutsa kukakavara; Asi anomoyo murefu anonyaradza gakava." 
Proverbs15:19 Nzira yesimbe yakaita soruzhowa rwemhinzwa; Asi nzira yavakarurama yakagadzirwa. 
Proverbs15:20 Mwanakomana akachenjera anofadza baba; Asi benzi rinoshora mai varo. 
Proverbs15:21 Upenzi hunofadza munhu anoshaiwa uchenjeri; Asi munhu wenjere anofamba achirurama. 
Proverbs15:22 Pasingarangamwi mano anokona; Asi kuna varairi vazhinji ndokwaanosimbiswa. 
Proverbs15:23 Munhu anofadzwa nemhinduro yakarurama yomuromo wake; Uye shoko, rinotaurwa nenguva yakafanira, rakanaka sei!"

Proverbs15:27 Anokarira fuma, anotambudza imba yake; Asi anovenga zvipo, achararama." 
Proverbs15:28 moyo wowakarurama unombofunga chaangapindura; Asi muromo wowakaipa unodurura zvakaipa.

Proverbs16:3 Isa mabasa ako ose kuna Jehovha, Zvawakarangarira zvigoitika."
