Proverbs21:3 Kuita zvakarurama nokururamisira Zvinofadza Jehovha kupfuura chibayiro. 
Proverbs21:4 Kutarira kwamanyawi nomoyo unozvikudza, Icho chiedza chavakaipa, zvivi." 
Proverbs21:5 Ndangariro dzavashingairi dzinouyisa zvizhinji; Asi ani naani anokurumidzisa anongovangira kushaiwa. 
Proverbs21:6 Kuunganidza fuma norurimi runoreva nhema Imhute inodzingwa kose-kose navanotsvaka rufu. 
Proverbs21:7 Kumanikidza kwavakaipa kunovaparadza, Nokuti vanoramba kuita zvakarurama." 
Proverbs21:8 Nzira yomunhu ane mhosva yakaminama kwazvo; Asi kana ari akachena, kuita kwake kwakarurama." 
Proverbs21:9 Zviri nani kugara pakona redenga, Pakugara muimba imwe nomukadzi anokakavara." 
Proverbs21:10 Mweya wowakaipa unoda zvakaipa; Wokwake haawani nyasha kwaari. 
Proverbs21:11 Kana mudadi achirangwa, asina mano achava nouchenjeri; Kana wakachenjera achidzidziswa, anogamuchira" 
Proverbs21:12 Akarurama anocherekedza imba yowakaipa; Anowisira vakaipa mukuparadzwa. 
Proverbs21:13 Anodzivira nzeve yake, kuti arege kunzwa kuchema komurombo, Iyewo achachema, asi haanganzwiki." 
Proverbs21:14 chipo chinopiwa pakavanda, chinonyaradza hasha, Nechipiwa, chiri muchipfuva, kutsamwa kukuru." 
Proverbs21:15 Kuita zvakarurama ndiwo mufaro kunowakarurama; Asi vaiti vezvakaipa vanoparadzwa nako. 
Proverbs21:16 Munhu, anotsauka panzira yenjere, achandozorora muungano yavakafa." 
Proverbs21:17 Anofarira zvinofadza, achava murombo; Anofarira waini namafuta haangafumi." 
Proverbs21:18 Akaipa idzikunuro yowakarurama; Anoita nokunyengedzera anopinda panzvimbo yowakarurama. 
Proverbs21:19 Zviri nani kugara murenje, Pakugara nomukadzi anokakavara nowanonetsa." 
Proverbs21:20 Mumba mowakachenjera mune fuma inokosha namafuta, Asi benzi rinozvipedza." 
Proverbs21:21 Munhu, anotsvaka kururama nounyoro, Anowana upenyu, nokururama, nokukudzwa." 
Proverbs21:22 Munhu akachenjera anokwira muguta ravane simba, Achiwisira pasi nhare yavanovimba nayo." 
Proverbs21:23 Ani naani anochengeta muromo wake norurimi rwake, Anochengeta mweya wake pamatambudziko." 
Proverbs21:24 Munhu, anozvikudza ana manyawi, mudadi ndiro zita rake; Anoita namanyawi okuzvikudza kwake." 
Proverbs21:25 Kuda koane usimbe kunomuuraya; Nokuti maoko ake anoramba kubata basa. 
Proverbs21:26 Zuva rose anoramba achingochiva; Asi akarurama anopa asingarambi. 
Proverbs21:27 Chibayiro chowakaipa chinonyangadza; Ndoda kana achiuya nazvo kuyananisira zvakaipa. 
Proverbs21:28 Chapupu chenhema chichaparadzwa; Asi munhu unoteerera, acharamba achitaura." 
Proverbs21:29 Munhu akaipa ane chiso chisinganyari; Asi kana ari akarurama anogadzira nzira dzake. 
Proverbs21:30 Hakuna uchenjeri, kana njere, Hakuna mano angakunda Jehovha." 
Proverbs21:31 Bhiza rinogadzirirwa zuva rokurwa, Asi kukunda kunobva kuna Jehovha." 
Proverbs22:1 Zita rakanaka rinofanira kutsa­nangurwa kupfuura fuma zhinji; Uye kudikamwa kupfuura sirivha nendarama. 
Proverbs22:2 Vafumi navarombo vanosangana pamwechete; Jehovha ndiye muiti wavo vose. 
Proverbs22:3 Munhu akangwara anoona zvakaipa, ndokuvanda; Asi vasina mano vanopfuura havo, ndokuwira munjodzi." 
Proverbs22:4 Mubayiro wokuzvininipisa nokutya Jehovha Ifuma nokukudzwa noupenyu. 
Proverbs22:5 mhinzwa nemisungo zviri panzira yousakarurama; Asi anochengeta mweya wake achagara kure nazvo. 
Proverbs22:6 Rovedza mwana nzira yaanofanira kufamba nayo, Ipapo kunyange akwegura haangatsauki pairi." 
Proverbs22:7 Mufumi anobata ushe pamusoro pomurombo; Anotora chikwereti, muranda, wowakamupa chikwereti." 
Proverbs22:8 Unodzvara zvakaipa, uchacheka dambudziko; Shamhu yokutsamwa kwake ichanyangarika." 
Proverbs22:9 Ane moyo munyoro acharopafadzwa; Nokuti anopa varombo zvokudya zvake. 
Proverbs22:10 Dzinga mudadi, kukakavara kugoendawo; Nenharo nokunyadzwa zvichaguma." 
Proverbs22:11 Anoda kuchena komoyo, Neane miromo inofadza, mambo achava shamwari yake." 
Proverbs22:12 Meso aJehovha anochengeta ane zivo; Asi achakonesa mashoko omunhu anonyengedzera. 
Proverbs22:13 Simbe inoti, ""Kune shumba kunze, Ndingaurawa pakati penzira dzomumusha.""" 
Proverbs22:14 Muromo wavakadzi vokumwe igomba rakadzika; Anotsamwirwa naJehovha achawiramo. 
Proverbs22:15 Upenzi hunonamatira mumoyo womwana; Asi shamhu yokurairira ichahudzingira kure naye. 
Proverbs22:16 Anomanikidza murombo, anomufumisa; Anopa mufumi zvipo, anongomushaisa." 
Proverbs22:17 Rerekera nzeve yako, unzwe mashoko owakachenjera, moyo wako urangarire zivo yangu." 
Proverbs22:18 Nokuti chinhu chakanaka, kana uchigara nazvo mukati mako, Ngazvigare pamwechete pamiromo yako." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndakakuzivisa, iyewe, izvozvo nhasi, Kuti uvimbe naJehovha." 
Proverbs22:20 Handina kukunyorera mashoko akaisvonaka here, Okurairira nezivo here?" 
Proverbs22:21 Kuti uziviswe kwazvo mashoko ezvokwadi, Kuti udzosere mashoko ezvokwadi kuna vanokutuma here?" 
Proverbs22:22 Usatorera murombo, nokuti murombo; Usamanikidza anotambudzika pasuo;" 
Proverbs22:23 Nokuti Jehovha achavarwira pamhaka dzavo, Nokutadzira upenyu hwavanovatadzira." 
Proverbs22:24 Usashamwaridzana nomunhu anotsamwa; Usafambidzana nomunhu ane hasha; 
Proverbs22:25 Kuti urege kudzidza tsika dzake, Uteyire mweya wako musungo." 
Proverbs22:26 Usava mumwe wavanozvisunga noruoko, Kana vakazviita rubatso nokuda kwechikwereti." 
Proverbs22:27 Kana usina chaungaripa nacho, Uchagokutorereiko nhovo dzako pasi pako?" 
Proverbs22:28 Usabvisa muganhu wekare, Wakaiswapo namadzibaba ako." 
Proverbs22:29 Unoona munhu anoshingaira pabasa rake here? Achamira pamberi pamadzimambo; Haangamiri pamberi pavanhu vasingazikamwi. 
Proverbs23:1 Kana ukagara pakudya pamwe chete nomubati, Cherekedza zvakanaka zviri pamberi pako;" 
Proverbs23:2 Uzvigure huro dzako, Kana uri munhu wamadyo" 
Proverbs23:3 Usapanga zvinozipa zvake, Nokuti zvokudya izvo zvinonyengedzera." 
Proverbs23:4 Usazvinetsa kuwana fuma; Rega huchenjeri hwako. 
Proverbs23:5 Unoda kuzvitarira nameso ako? Zvaenda! Nokuti zvirokwazvo fuma inozviitira mapapiro, Segondo rinobhururukira kudenga" 
Proverbs23:6 Usadya zvokudya zvomunhu anoruchiva; Kana kupanga zvinozipa zvake. 
Proverbs23:7 Nokuti sezvaanofunga mumoyo make, ndozvaakaita; Anoti kwauri, ""Chidya, chimwa;"", Asi moyo wake haune hanya newe." 
Proverbs23:8 Musuva wawadya, uchaurutsazve, Ukarashikirwa namashoko ako akanaka." 
Proverbs23:9 Usataura paunonzwikwa nebenzi; Nokuti richazvidza uchenjeri hwamashoko ako. 
Proverbs23:10 Usabvisa muganhu wekare; Uye usapinda paminda yenherera; 
Proverbs23:11 Nokuti Mudzikunuri wavo ane simba; Iye uchavarwira pamhaka dzavo newe. 
Proverbs23:12 moyo wako ushingaire kudzidziswa, Nenzeve dzako kunzwa mashoko ezivo." 
Proverbs23:13 Usarega kuranga mwana; Nokuti kunyange ukamurova neshamhu, haangafi." 
Proverbs23:14 Umurove neshamhu, Ugorwira mweya wake paSheori." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwanakomana wangu, kana moyo wako wochenjera, Nomoyo wangu uchafarawo." 
Proverbs23:16 Zvirokwazvo, itsvo dzangu dzichafarisisa, Kana miromo yako ichitaura zvinhu zvakarurama." 
Proverbs23:17 moyo wako ngaurege kugodora vatadzi; Asi utye Jehovha mazuva ose. 
Proverbs23:18 Nokuti zvirokwazvo mubayiro uripo; Chawakatarira hachingaparadzwi. 
Proverbs23:19 Inzwa, iwe mwanakomana wangu, uchenjere, Ururamise moyo wako munzira." 
Proverbs23:20 Usava pakati pavanokarira waini, Pakati pavanokarira nyama." 
Proverbs23:21 Nokuti mumwi neane madyo vachava varombo; Hope dzichapfekedza munhu mamvemve. 
Proverbs23:22 Teerera baba vako vakakubereka; Usazvidza mai vako kana vachembera. 
Proverbs23:23 Tenga zvokwadi, urege kuzoitengesazve; Uye tenga uchenjeri nedzidzo nenjere." 
Proverbs23:24 Baba vovakarurama vachafara kwazvo; Uye akabereka mwana akachenjera, achafadzwa naye." 
Proverbs23:25 Baba vako namai vako ngavafare, Mai vakakubereka ngavafare kwazvo." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwanakomana wangu, ndipe moyo wako; Meso ako ngaafarire nzira dzangu." 
Proverbs23:27 Nokuti chifeve igoronga rakadzika; Nomukadzi wokumwe gomba rakamanikana. 
Proverbs23:28 Zvirokwazvo anovandira segororo; Anowedzera vanyengedzeri pakati pavanhu. 
Proverbs23:29 Ndiani anoti, ""Haiwa!"" Ndiani, anoti, ""Maiwe! Ndiani anokukakavara? Ndiani anokuchema? Ndiani anemavanga pasina mhaka? Ndiani ane meso akatsvuka?""" 
Proverbs23:30 Ndivo vanogarisa pawaini; Ivo vanondotsvaka waini yavhenganiswa. 
Proverbs23:31 Usatarira waini kana yakatsvuka, Kana ichivaima mumukombe, Kana ichitapira pakumwiwa." 
Proverbs23:32 Pakupedzisira inoruma senyoka, Inobaya semvumbi." 
Proverbs23:33 Meso ako achaona zvisingazikamwi, moyo wako uchabudisa zvisakarurama." 
Proverbs23:34 Zvirokwazvo uchava somunhu avete pasi mukati megungwa, Kana soavete pamusoro pedanda rechikepe." 
Proverbs23:35 Uchati, ""Vakandirova, asi handina kurwadziwa, Vakandirova, asi handina kuzvinzwa; Ndichapepuka rinhiko? Ipapo ndichandoitsvakazve." 
Proverbs24:1 Usagodora vanhu vakaipa; Usashuva kuva pakati pavo. 
Proverbs24:2 Nokuti moyo yavo inorangarira kuparadza; Nemiromo yavo inotaura zvakashata. 
Proverbs24:3 Imba inovakwa nouchenjeri; Inosimbiswa nenjere. 
Proverbs24:4 Nezivo dzimba dzomukati dzinozadzwa Nefuma yose inokosha inofadza. 
Proverbs24:5 Munhu akachenjera ane simba; Zvirokwazvo, munhu wezivo anowedzera simba" 
Proverbs24:6 Nokuti anofanira kurwa pfumo amborairirwa nouchenjeri; Asi kuna varairiri vazhinji ndiko kune ruponeso. 
Proverbs24:7 Uchenjeri hahusvikirwi nebenzi; Harishamisi muromo waro padare. 
Proverbs24:8 Anorangarira kuita zvakaipa, Achanzi navanhu mwene wezvakashata." 
Proverbs24:9 Mufungo woupenzi zvivi; Mudadi anonyangadza vanhu. 
Proverbs24:10 Kana ukapera simba nezuva rokutambudzika, Simba rako ishoma." 
Proverbs24:11 Rwira vanoiswa kurufu; Novourawa usarega kuvadzosa. 
Proverbs24:12 Kana ukati, ""Tarirai, hatina kuzviziva; "" Ko iye anoidza moyo, haazvioni here? Naiye anochengeta mweya wako, haazvizivi here? Ko iye haangapi mumwe nomumwe zvakaenzana nebasa rake here?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwanakomana wangu, idya uchi, nokuti hwakanaka; Nomusvi unozipa pamukamwa wako." 
Proverbs24:14 Uchaona kuti ndizvo zvichaita uchenjeri kumweya wako; Kana wahuwana, mubayiro uchavapo, Nezvawakatarira hazvingaparadzwi." 
Proverbs24:15 Iwe munhu akaipa, usavandira panogara wakarurama; Usaparadza paanozorora." 
Proverbs24:16 Nokuti munhu akarurama angawa kanomwe, achisimukazve; Asi vakaipa vanowisirwa pasi nenjodzi." 
Proverbs24:17 Usafarisisa kana muvengi wako achiwa; Kana achiwisirwa pasi, moyo wako ngaurege kufara." 
Proverbs24:18 Kuti Jehovha arege kuzviona, zvisamufadza, Akazodzora kutsamwa kwake kwaari." 
Proverbs24:19 Usatsamwa nokuda kwavaiti vezvakaipa; Uye usagodora vakaipa. 
Proverbs24:20 Nokuti munhu akaipa haana mubayiro; Mwenje wakaipa uchadzimwa. 
Proverbs24:21 Mwanakomana wangu, itya Jehovha namambo; Usafambidzana navanongosishanduka." 
Proverbs24:22 Nokuti nhamo yavo ichamuka pakarepo; Nokuguma kwamakore avo, ndiani achazviziva?" 
Proverbs24:23 Zvirevo izviwo zvakabva kuna vakachenjera, Kutsaura vanhu pakutonga hazvina kunaka" 
Proverbs24:24 Anoti kune wakaipa, ""Akarurama,"" Vanhu vachamutuka, nendudzi dzichamusema." 
Proverbs24:25 Asi vanomuraira, vachaitirwa zvakanaka; ropafadzo yakanaka ichauya pamusoro pavo." 
Proverbs24:26 Anopindura namashoko akarurama, anotsvoda nemiromo." 
Proverbs24:27 Gadzira basa rako kunze, Uzvigadzirire iro pamunda; Pashure ugovaka imba yako." 
Proverbs24:28 Usava chapupu chinopomera wokwako asina mhosva; Usanyengedzera nemiromo yako. 
Proverbs24:29 Usati, ""Sezvaakandiitira, ndizvo zvandichamuitirawo; Ndicharipira munhu sezvaakaita iye.""" 
Proverbs24:30 Ndakapfuura napamunda wesimbe, Napamunda wemizambiringa womunhu anoshaiwa njere;" 
Proverbs24:31 Tarirai, akanga angomera mhinzwa chete; Munda wose wakanga wakafukidzwa norukato, Norusvingo rwawo rwamabwe rwakanga rwakoromoka." 
Proverbs24:32 Ipapo ndakacherekedza, ndikanatsofunga; Ndakaona, ndikadzidziswa."

Proverbs25:3 Kukwirira kwedenga, nokudzika kwenyika, Nemoyo yamadzimambo hazvibviri kunzverwa." 
Proverbs25:4 Bvisa marara pasirivha, Muumbi agobudisirwa hari." 
Proverbs25:5 Bvisa akaipa pamberi pamambo, Chigaro chake choushe chisimbiswe nokururama." 
Proverbs25:6 Usava namanyawi pamberi pamambo; Usamira panzvimbo yavakuru. 
Proverbs25:7 Nokuti zviri nani kuti vati kwauri, ""Kwira pano,"" Pakuti uninipiswe pamberi pomuchinda. Wawaona nameso ako."

Proverbs25:13 Nhume yakatendeka kuna vanoituma yakafanana nokutonhorera kwechando panguva yokukohwa; nokuti anoponesa mweya yavatenzi vayo.

Proverbs25:17 Rutsoka rwako ngarurege kuwanza kupinda paimba yowokwako; Arege kuzoneta newe, akakuvenga." 
Proverbs25:18 Munhu anopupurira wokwake nhema, Akafanana netsvimbo, nomunondo, nomuseve unopinza." 
Proverbs25:19 Kutenda munhu asina kutendeka panguva yenhamo, Kwakafanana nezino rakagurika norutsoka rwakashodoka." 
Proverbs25:20 Somunhu anobvisa nguvo kana kuchitonhora, uye sevhiniga kana ichiiswa pasoda, Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anoimbira moyo unorwadza nziyo."

Proverbs25:22 Nokuti uchatutira mazimbe omoto pamusoro wake, Uye Jehovha achakuripira." 
Proverbs25:23 Mhepo inobva kuchamhembe inouyisa mvura; Saizvozvo rurimi runa makuhwa runouyisa chiso chakatsamwa. 
Proverbs25:24 Zviri nani kugara pakona redenga, Pakugara muimba imwe nomukadzi unokakavara."

Proverbs26:5 Pindura benzi noupenzi hwaro, Kuti rirege kuti rakachenjera."

Proverbs26:23 Miromo inopisa norudo pamwechete nomoyo wakaipa, Zvakafanana nomudziyo wevhu wakanamirwa namarara anobva pasirivha."

Proverbs27:2 Mumwe ngaakurumbidze, urege kuva muromo wako; Ngaave mweni, irege kuva miromo yako." 
Proverbs27:3 Ibwe rinorema, uye jecha rinorema; Asi kutsamwa kwebenzi kunokurira zvose nokurema." 
Proverbs27:4 Hasha dzinokuvadza, uye kutsamwa kunokukura; Asi ndiani angamira pamberi pegodo." 
Proverbs27:5 Kurairwa pachena kunopfuura Rudo rwakavanzwa. 
Proverbs27:6 Mavanga anotemwa neshamwari angatendwa, Asi kutsvoda komuvengi kunonyengedza." 
Proverbs27:7 Mweya wakaguta unotsika pasi musvi wouchi; Asi mweya une nzara unoti zvose zvinozipa kunyange zvichivava. 
Proverbs27:8 Seshiri inoburuka ichienda kure nedendere rayo, Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anofamba-famba kure napaanogara." 
Proverbs27:9 Mafuta nezvinonhuhwira zvinofadza moyo; Ndizvo zvinoitawo kunaka koushamwari hwomunhu kunobva pakuyanana kwemweya. 
Proverbs27:10 Usasiya shamwari yako neshamwari yababa vako; Usaenda kumba komunun'una wako nezuva renhamo yako; Wokwako, ari pedo, anopfuura munun'una uri kure,"

Proverbs27:12 Munhu akangwara anoona zvakaipa, ndokuvanda; Asi vasina mano vanopfuura havo, ndokuwira munjodzi." 
Proverbs27:13 Munhu anozviita rubatso kumutorwa, umutorere nguvo yake; Umuite rubatso iye akazviita rubatso kumukadzi wokumwe." 
Proverbs27:14 Anoropafadza shamwari yake nenzwi guru, achifumira mangwanani, Achanzi wakatukwa pamusoro pazvo." 
Proverbs27:15 Kudonha kusingaperi pazuva remvura zhinji Nomukadzi anokakavara, zvakafanana." 
Proverbs27:16 Anoda kumudzivisa, anodzidzisa mhepo; Ruoko rwake rworudyi rwakabata mafuta." 
Proverbs27:17 Simbi inorodza simbi; Saizvozvo munhu anorodza chiso cheshamwari yake. 
Proverbs27:18 Ani naani anochengeta muonde, achadya zvibereko zvawo; Anochengeta tenzi wake, achakudzwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Chiso sezvachinotarisana nechiso mumvura, Saizvozvo moyo womunhu unotarisana nomunhu." 
Proverbs27:20 Sheori neAbhadhoni hazvitongoguti; Nameso omunhu haaguti. 
Proverbs27:21 Hari yokunyausa ndeyesirivha, nevira nderendarama; Saizvozvo munhu anozikamwa nezvaanofarira." 
Proverbs27:22 Kunyange ukatswa benzi muduri nomutswi pakati pezviyo zvinotswiwa, Hupenzi hwaro hahungabvi kwariri." 
Proverbs27:23 Shingaira uzive kuti makwai ako akadini; Uchengete zvakanaka mapoka ako. 
Proverbs27:24 Nokuti fuma haigari nokusingaperi; Ko korona inogara kusvikira kumarudzi ose here? 
Proverbs27:25 Uswa hunoenda bumhudza ndokubuda, Nemiriwo yamakomo inovunganidzwa." 
Proverbs27:26 Makwayana anokuvigira zvokufuka zvako, Uye mbudzi ndiwo mutengo weminda." 
Proverbs27:27 Mukaka wembudzi ucharingana zvokudya zvako, nezvokudya zveimba yako, Nokuraramisa varandasikana vako." 
Proverbs28:1 Akaipa anotiza kusina anodzi­ngana naye; Asi vakarurama vanotsunga moyo seshumba. 
Proverbs28:2 Nemhaka yokudarika kwenyika, machinda ayo anowanda; Asi nomumwe, ane njere nezivo, icharamba iripo." 
Proverbs28:3 Munhu anoshaiwa amene, anomanikidza varombo, Akafanana nemvura inokukura, isingasiyi zvokudya." 
Proverbs28:4 Vanosiya murayiro, vanorumbidza vakaipa; Asi vanochengeta murayiro, vanoita nharo navo." 
Proverbs28:5 Vanhu vakashata havanzwisisi zvakarurama; Asi vanotsvaka Jehovha vanonzwisisa zvose. 
Proverbs28:6 Murombo, anofamba muzvokwadi yake, Anopfuura asakarurama anofamba nenzira mbiri, kunyange akafuma." 
Proverbs28:7 Anochengeta murayiro, mwanakomana akachenjera; Asi anofambidzana navanhu vana madyo, vanonyadzisa baba vake." 
Proverbs28:8 Anowedzera fuma yake nemhindu kana nokuwedzera kusakarurama, Anounganidzira mumwe achava netsitsi navarombo." 
Proverbs28:9 Anoramba kunzwa murayiro nenzeve yake, Kunyange nomunyengetero wake anonyangadza." 
Proverbs28:10 Ani naani anorashisa vakarurama vafambe nenzira yakaipa, Achawira amene mugomba rake; Asi vakarurama vachagara nhaka yezvakanaka." 
Proverbs28:11 Mupfuri anoti ndakachenjera; Asi murombo, ane njere, anomuferefeta." 
Proverbs28:12 Kana vakarurama vachikunda, mufaro mukuru uriko; Asi kana vakaipa vosimba, vanhu vovanda." 
Proverbs28:13 Anofukidza kudarika kwake, haangavi nomufaro; Asi anozvireurura, achizvirasha, achawana nyasha." 
Proverbs28:14 Munhu anogara achitya, anomufaro; Asi anoomesa moyo wake, achawira munjodzi." 
Proverbs28:15 Seshumba inoomba, nebere rinopota-pota, Ndizvo zvakaita mubati akaipa anobata vanhu varombo." 
Proverbs28:16 Muchinda, anoshaiwa njere, anomanikidza vanhuwo zvikuru; Asi anovenga kuchiva, achawedzera mazuva ake." 
Proverbs28:17 Munhu, anoremedzwa neropa romumwe munhu, Achatizira kugomba; ngaarege kudziviswa nomunhu." 
Proverbs28:18 Ani naani anofamba zvakarurama, acharwirwa; Asi anofamba nenzira dzisakarurama, achawa pakarepo." 
Proverbs28:19 Anorima munda wake, achava nezvokudya zvizhinji; Asi unovangira zvisina maturo, uchava nourombo kwazvo." 
Proverbs28:20 Munhu akatendeka achava namaropafadzo mazhinji; Asi anoda kufuma nokukurumidza, haangakoni kurohwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Kutsaura vanhu hakuna kunaka; Nokuti munhu angadarika nokuda kwechimedu chechingwa. 
Proverbs28:22 Munhu ano ruchiva, anovangira fuma, Asingazivi kuti achawirwa nokushaiwa." 
Proverbs28:23 Anorairira munhu achazowana nyasha pashure, Kupfuura iye anobata kumeso norurimi rwake." 
Proverbs28:24 Anobira baba vake kana amai vake, achiti, ""Hakuzi kudarika,"" Uyu ishamwari yoanoparadza." 
Proverbs28:25 Ano mweya wokuchiva anomutsa kukakavara; Asi anovimba naJehovha, achasimbiswa." 
Proverbs28:26 Anotenda moyo wake, ibenzi; Asi anofamba nouchenjeri, acharwirwa." 
Proverbs28:27 Anopa varombo, haangazoshaiwi; Asi anotsinzina meso ake, achatukwa kazhinji." 
Proverbs28:28 Kana vakaipa vosimba, vanhu vovanda; Asi kana voparara, vakarurama vowanda." 
Proverbs29:1 Munhu akarairwa kazhinji, achiomesa mutsipa wake, Achaparadzwa pakarepo, kusina chingamubatsira." 
Proverbs29:2 Kana vakarurama vowanda, vanhu vanofara; Asi kana munhu wakaipa achibata ushe, vanhu vanogomera." 
Proverbs29:3 Ani naani anoda uchenjeri, anofadza baba vake; Asi anoshamwaridzana nezvifeve, anorasha fuma yake." 
Proverbs29:4 Mambo anosimbisa nyika yake nokururamisa; Asi munhu wemitero, anoiparadza." 
Proverbs29:5 Munhu anobata wokwake kumeso, Anodzikira tsoka dzake mumbure." 
Proverbs29:6 Pakudarika komunhu akashata pano musungo; Asi wakarurama achaimba nokufara kwazvo. 
Proverbs29:7 Akarurama anoziva kururamisira mhaka dzavarombo; Asi akaipa haanzwisisi zivo. 
Proverbs29:8 Vadadi vanopisira guta; Asi vakachenjera vanodzora kutsamwa. 
Proverbs29:9 Kana munhu akarurama ane mhaka nebenzi, Iye achatsamwa nokuseka, asi hakungavi nezororo." 
Proverbs29:10 Vanhu veropa vanovenga akarurama; Asi vakarurama vanotsvaka kuraramisa mweya wake. 
Proverbs29:11 Benzi rinobudisa hasha dzaro dzose; Asi munhu akachenjera anodzidzora nokudzinyaradza. 
Proverbs29:12 Kana mubati achiteerera nhema, Varanda vake vose vachava vakaipa." 
Proverbs29:13 Murombo nomunhu anomanikidza vanosangana pamwechete; Jehovha anovhenekera meso avose. 
Proverbs29:14 Mambo anoruramisira varombo nokutendeka, Chigaro chake chichasimbiswa nokusingaperi." 
Proverbs29:15 Shamhu nokuraira zvinouyisa huchenjeri; Asi mwana wangoregwa hake anonyadzisa mai vake. 
Proverbs29:16 Kana vakaipa vowanda, kudarika kunowandawo; Asi vakarurama vachaona kuwa kwavo." 
Proverbs29:17 Rairira mwanakomana wako, agokuzorodza; Zvirokwazvo achafadza mweya wako." 
Proverbs29:18 Kana Jehovha asingazviratidzi, vanhu vanoramba kudzorwa; Asi anochengeta murayiro, anomufaro." 
Proverbs29:19 Muranda angaramba kurairirwa namashoko bedzi; Nokuti, kunzwisisa anonzwisisa hake, asi haane hanya nazvo." 
Proverbs29:20 Unoona munhu unokurumidza kutsamwa? Benzi riri nani kuna iye. 
Proverbs29:21 Kana munhu achirera muranda wake zvakanaka kubva pahuduku hwake, Pakupedzisira achada kuva mwanakomana." 
Proverbs29:22 Munhu wakatsamwa anomutsa kukakavara; Munhu ane hasha anokudarika kuzhinji. 
Proverbs29:23 Kuzvikudza komunhu kuchamudukupisa; Asi ano mweya unozvininipisa, achakudzwa." 
Proverbs29:24 Ani naani anoshamwaridzana nembavha, anovenga mweya wake; Anonzwa kupikwa, asi haareururi chinhu." 
Proverbs29:25 Kutya munhu kunouyisa musungo; Asi ani naani anovimba naJehovha, achachengetwa." 
Proverbs29:26 Vazhinji vanotsvaka nyasha yomubati; Asi kururamisirwa komunhu kunobva kuna Jehovha. 
Proverbs29:27 Munhu asakarurama anonyangadza akarurama; Uye akarurama panzira dzake anonyangadza akaipa. 
Proverbs30:1 Mashoko aAguri, mwanako­mana waJake; chirevo chake. Murume anoti kuna Itieri, kuna Itieri naUkari," 
Proverbs30:2 Zvirokwazvo, ndiri benzi kupfuura vanhu vose; Handine njere dzomunhu." 
Proverbs30:3 Handina kudzidza uchenjeri, Uye handina zivo yoMutsvene." 
Proverbs30:4 Ndiani akakwira kudenga, akaburukazve? Ndiani akasungira mvura munguvo yake? Ndiani akasungira migumo yose yenyika? Zita rake ndiani, nezita romwanakomana wake, kana uchiriziva?" 
Proverbs30:5 Shoko rimwe nerimwe raMwari rakanatswa; Ndiye nhovo yavose vanovanda maari. 
Proverbs30:6 Usawedzera pamashoko ake, Kuti arege kukupa mhosva, uwanikwe une nhema.""" 
Proverbs30:7 Zvinhu zviviri ndakakumbira kwamuri; Musandirambira izvo, ndisati ndafa." 
Proverbs30:8 Bvisai kure neni zvisina kutendeka nenhema; Regai kundipa urombo kana fuma; Mundigutse nezvokudya zvakandifanira; 
Proverbs30:9 Ndirege kuti kana ndaguta, ndikurambei, ndichiti, ""Jehovha ndianiko?"" Kana zvimwe ndive murombo, ndibe, Ndimhure zita raMwari wangu." 
Proverbs30:10 Rega kuudzisira muranda kuna tenzi vake, Arege kukutuka, ukanzi une mhosva." 
Proverbs30:11 Rudzi ruriko runotuka baba varwo, Rusingaropafadzi mai varwo." 
Proverbs30:12 Rudzi ruriko runoti pakuona kwedu takachena kwazvo, Asi rusina kunatswa patsvina yarwo." 
Proverbs30:13 Rudzi ruriko, meso arwo ana manyawi sei! Mafungiro ameso avo akakwidzwa." 
Proverbs30:14 Rudzi ruriko, meno ago akafanana neminondo, nameno eshaya dzarwo samapanga, Kuti rupedze varombo panyika, navanoshaiwa pakati pavanhu." 
Proverbs30:15 Chikweva ropa chinavakunda vaviri, vanoti, ""Ndipe! Ndipe!"" Zvinhu zvitatu zviriko zvisingatongoguti, Zvina zvisingatongoti, ""Zvaringana!""" 
Proverbs30:16 Sheori; nechizvaro chisingabereki; Pasi pasingaguti mvura; Nomoto, usingati, ""Zvaringana!""" 
Proverbs30:17 Ziso rinoseka baba, Rinoshora kuteerera mai, Makunguvo omupata acharinongora, Vana vegondo vacharidya." 
Proverbs30:18 Zvinhu zvitatu zviriko zvinondishamisa, Zvirokwazvo zvina, zvandisingazivi, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs30:19 Kufamba kwegondo mudenga; Kufamba kwenyoka paruware; Kufamba kwechikepe pakati pegungwa; Nokufamba komurume nomusikana. 
Proverbs30:20 Ndizvo zvakaita kufamba komukadzi woupombwe; Anodya, ndokupisika muromo wake, Achiti, ""Handina kuita chinhu chakaipa.""" 
Proverbs30:21 Nyika inodedera nokuda kwezvinhu zvitatu; Uye nokuda kwezvina zvaisingadi kuona; 
Proverbs30:22 Nokuda komuranda kana achizova mambo; Nokuda kwebenzi, kana raguta zvokudya;" 
Proverbs30:23 Nokuda komukadzi arambwa, kana azowanikwa; Uye mushandiri, kana azova mugari wenhaka yatenzi wake." 
Proverbs30:24 Zvinhu zvina zviriko panyika zviduku hazvo, Asi zvakachenjera kwazvo, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs30:25 Majuru, rudzi rusine simba harwo; Kunyange zvakadaro anounganidza zvokudya zvawo mumunakamwe;" 
Proverbs30:26 Mbira, rudzi rusine simba harwo, Kunyange zvakadaro dzinoita imba yadzo mumatombo;" 
Proverbs30:27 Mhashu hadzina mambo, Kunyange zvakadaro dzinofamba zvakanaka dzichiita mapoka;" 
Proverbs30:28 Chipfira ungachibata namaoko ako, Kunyange zvakadaro chiri mudzimba dzamadzimambo." 
Proverbs30:29 Zvinhu zvitatu zviriko zvinokufamba kunokudzwa, Zvirokwazvo zvina zvinokufamba kunokudzwa, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs30:30 Shumba, mhare pakati pemhuka dzose, Isingatizi mhuka ipi neipi;" 
Proverbs30:31 Nemhuka ine zviuno zakasimba, nenhongo yembudzi; Namambo kana anavarwi vake." 
Proverbs30:32 Kana uchinge waita noupenzi, wazvikudza, Kana zvimwe warangarira zvakashata, Pfumbira muromo wako." 
Proverbs30:33 Nokuti mukaka warozva unobudisa mafuta, Nemhino dzadzvinyiwa dzinobudisa ropa, Saizvozvo hasha dzvavambwa dzinobudisa kukakavara." 
Proverbs31:1 Mashoko amambo Remueri; zvirevo zvaakadzidziswa namai vake. 
Proverbs31:2 Nhai, mwanakomana wangu! Nhai, mwanakomana wemhiko dzangu!" 
Proverbs31:3 Rega kupa vakadzi simba rako, Nenzira dzako kune zvinoparadza madzimambo." 
Proverbs31:4 Iwe Remueri, hazvifaniri madzimambo, hazvifaniri madzimambo kumwa waini; Namachinda kuti, `Doro riripiko?'" 
Proverbs31:5 Varege kumwa, vachizokangamwa murayiro, Varege kukanganisa kururamisira vamwe vanotambudzika." 
Proverbs31:6 Ipai anoda kuparara doro, Neanomoyo unorwadza waini;" 
Proverbs31:7 Ngaamwe, akangamwe urombo hwake, Arege kucharangarira kutambudzika kwake." 
Proverbs31:8 Shamisira mbeveve muromo wako, Urwire mhaka dzavose vakadai vakasiyiwa." 
Proverbs31:9 Shamisa muromo wako, utonge zvakarurama, Ururamisire murombo neanoshaiwa.""" 
Proverbs31:10 Ndianiko angawana mukadzi anozvita zvakanaka? Nokuti mutengo wake unokunda kwazvo mutengo wamaparera. 
Proverbs31:11 moyo womurume wake unomutenda, Naiye haangashaiwi fuma." 
Proverbs31:12 Unoitira murume wake zvakanaka, haamuitiri zvakaipa Mazuva ose oupenyu hwake." 
Proverbs31:13 Anotsvaka mvere noruchinda, Achibata namaoko ake nomufaro." 
Proverbs31:14 Akafanana nezvikepe zvavatengesi; Anondotora zvokudya zvake kure. 
Proverbs31:15 Anomuka huchiri usiku, Nokupa mhuri yake zvokudya, Navashandiri vake basa ravo." 
Proverbs31:16 Anorangarira munda, ndokuutenga; Anosima munda wemizambiringa nezvaakawana namaoko ake." 
Proverbs31:17 Anozvisunga chiuno nesimba, Nokusimbisa maoko ake." 
Proverbs31:18 Anoona kuti kushambadzira kwake kwabatsira; Mwenje wake haudzimi vusiku. 
Proverbs31:19 Anotambanudzira ruoko rwake kune chokurukisa; Maoko ake anobata chinorukwa. 
Proverbs31:20 Anotambanudzira murombo ruoko rwake; Anotandavadzira anoshaiwa maoko ake. 
Proverbs31:21 Haatyi chando pamusoro peimba yake, Nokuti mhuri yake yose yakafuka nguvo tsvuku." 
Proverbs31:22 Anozviitira mitsamhiro inoukomba; nguvo yake mucheka wakaisvonaka nomutsvuku. 
Proverbs31:23 Murume wake anozikamwa pamasuo eguta, Kana agere pakati pavakuru venyika." 
Proverbs31:24 Anoita zvokufuka zvomucheka achizvitengesa, Anovigira vatengesi zvisungo zvezviuno." 
Proverbs31:25 Simba nokukudzwa ndizvo zvokufuka zvake; Anoseka kana achifunga nguva inouya. 
Proverbs31:26 Anoshamisa muromo wake nouchenjeri; Rurimi rwake runodzidzisa nounyoro. 
Proverbs31:27 Anotarira zvakanaka kufamba kwemhuri yake, Asingadyi zvokudya zvousimbe." 
Proverbs31:28 Vana vake vanomuka, vachimuti, ""Makaropafadzwa;"" Nomurume wakewo anomurumbidza, achiti," 
Proverbs31:29 Vakunda vazhinji vakaita zvakanaka,asi iwe unovakunda vose.""" 
Proverbs31:30 Zvinofadza zvinonyengedzera, unaki hahuna maturo; Asi mukadzi anotya Jehovha, ndiye anofanira kurumbidzwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Chimupai zvakafanira zvaakabata namaoko ake; Mabasa ake ngaamurumbidze pamasuo eguta. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Mashoko oMuparidzi, mwanako­mana waDhavhidhi, mambo paJeru­saremu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Zvanzi noMuparidzi, hazvina ma­turo chose, hazvina maturo chose, zvose hazvina maturo chose!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Munhu angaba­tsirweiko nokutambudzika kwake kose, kwaanotambudzika nako pasi pezuva?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Rudzi rumwe runoenda, rumwe ru­dzi runouya; asi pasi panongogarapo nokusingaperi." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Zuva rinobudawo, zuva rinovira, richikurumidzira kwarinozobu­dazve." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Mhepo inoenda zasi, yodzoka yoenda kumusoro; inoramba ichidzoka pakufamba kwayo; mhepo inodzokerazve pakupotereka kwayo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Nzizi dzose dzinodira mugungwa, kunyange zvakadaro gungwa harizari; kunzvimbo kunoenda nzizi, ndiko kwa­dzinodzokerazve." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zvinhu zvose zvi­zere nokuneta; hakuna munhu angazvi­taura; ziso hariguti nokuona, nzeve haizari nokunzwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Chakanga chiripo, ndicho chichazovapo, chakamboitwa, ndicho chichazoitwa; hapane chinhu chitsva pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Chinhu chiriko here, chatingati, ""Tarirai, chinhu ichi chitvsa?"" Chakanga chichingovapo kare, panguva dzakatita­ngira." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Marudzi akapfuura haacharanga­rirwi; namarudzi achazotevera, haangato­ngorangarirwi navanozovatevera." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ini Muparidzi, ndakanga ndiri ma­mbo waIsiraeri paJerusaremu." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndika­rwadza moyo wangu kutsvaka noku­nzvera nouchenjeri zvose zvinoitwa pasi pedenga; ibasa rinotambudza rakapiwa vanakomana vavanhu vaMwari, kuti va­zvitambudze naro." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndakaona mabasa ose anoitwa pasi pezuva; tarirai, zvose hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Cha­kakombama hachibviri kururamiswa; chi­noshaikwa hachibviri kuverengwa. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndakataurirana nomoyo wangu, ndichiti, ""Tarira ndazviwanira uchenjeri hukuru, kukunda vose vakanditangira paJerusaremu;zvirokwazvo moyo wangu wakaona uchenjeri huzhinji nezivo.""" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Asi ndakati ndichirwadza moyo wa­ngu kuti ndizive uchenjeri nezivo, noupe­ngo noupenzi, ndikaona kuti naizvozvowo ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Nokuti muuchenjeri huzhinji munoku­chema kuzhinji; uye anowedzera zivo, anowedzera shungu." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndakati mumoyo mangu, uya hako, ndichakuidza nomufaro; chifarira zvinhu zvakanaka! Asi tarira, naizvozvowo zvakanga zvisina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Kana kuri kuseka, ndakati, ""Upengo!"" Kana uri mufaro, ndakati, ""Unobatsireiko?""" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndakanzvera moyo wangu, ndione kuti ndingafadza nyama yangu sei newaini, moyo wangu uchindifambisa hawo nouchenjeri, uye kuti ndingaramba ndakabata upenzi, kusvikira ndaona kuti zvakanaka ndezvipi zvingaitwa navanakomana vavanhu pasi pedenga mazuva ose oupenyu hwavo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndakazviitira mabasa makuru; ndakazvivakira dzimba; ndakazvirimira minda yemizambiringa; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 ndakazviitira minda neminda yemiti, ndikasimamo miti inobereka michero yamarudzi ose;" 
Ecclesiastes2:6 ndakazviitira madziva emvura, kuti ndidiridze matondo pakanga pasimwa miti;" 
Ecclesiastes2:7 ndakatenga varanda navarandakadzi, ndikava navaranda vakaberekerwa mumba mangu; ndakanga ndine fuma zhinji yemombe nemakwai, kupfuura vose vakanditangira paJerusaremu;" 
Ecclesiastes2:8 ndakazviunganidzirawo sirivha nendarama, nefuma yamadzimambo neyenyika dzose; ndakazvitsvakira vaimbi varume navakadzi, nezvinofadza zvavanakomana vavanhu, navarongo vazhinji." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Saizvozvo ndakanga ndiri munhu mukuru, ndikaramba ndichikura kupfuura vose vakanditangira paJerusaremu; uye huchenjeri hwangu hwakagara neni." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Zvose zvakadikamwa nameso angu handina kuanyima izvozvo; handina kutongodzora moyo wangu pamufaro upi noupi; nokuti moyo wangu wakanga uchifara nokubata kwangu kose; ndiwo wakanga uri mugove wangu wakabva pakubata kwangu kose. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Zvino ndakacherekedza mabasa ose akanga aitwa namaoko angu, nokubata kose kwandakatambura kubata tarira zvose zvakanga zvisina maturo, kwaiva kudzingana nemhepo bedzi, kwakanga kusine chinhu chinobatsira pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Zvino ndakatendeuka kuti ndicherekedze uchenjeri, noupengo, noupenzi, nokuti chinyi chingaitwa nomunhu unotevera mambo? Izvozvo zvakanguva zvaitwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ipapo ndakaona kuti, ""Uchenjeri hwakanaka kupfuura upenzi, zvichiita sechiedza chakanaka kupfuura rima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Meso omunhu akachenjera ari mumusoro wake, asi benzi rinofamba murima;"" kunyange zvakadaro ndakaona kuti vose vanowirwa nechinhu chimwe chete." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ipapo ndakati mumoyo mangu, ""Sezvinoitirwa benzi, ndizvo zvandichaitirwa neniwo; ko ini ndaiva wakachenjera nei! Ndikati mumoyo mangu, izvi zvose hazvina maturowo.""" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Nokuti munhu akachenjera akafanana nebenzi pakusarangarirwa nokusingaperi; nokuti zvinozokanganikwa zvose pamazuva anouya. Akachenjera haazinofa sebenzi here? 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Saka ndakavenga upenyu, nokuti basa rinoitwa pasi pezuva rakandinzwisa shungu; nokuti zvose hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Zvino ndakavenga kubata kwangu kose kwandatambura kubata pasi pezuva, zvandinofanira kuzvisiyira munhu anonditevera." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Zvino ndiani angaziva kana iye achava akachenjera kana benzi? Kunyange zvakadaro achava nesimba pamusoro pokubata kwangu kose kwandakatambura kubata, nezvandakaita nouchenjeri pasi pedenga. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Saka ndakatendeuka, kuti ndiodze hangu moyo wangu pamusoro pokubata kwangu kose kwandakatambura kubata pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Nokuti munhu ariko akabata nouchenjeri nezivo noumhizha; kunyange zvakadaro anofanira kuzvisiyira mumwe, uve mugove wake,asina kutongozvitamburira. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, chinhu chakaipa kwazvo." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Nokuti munhu anowanei pamusoro pokubata kwake kose, nokushingaira komoyo wake, kwaanobata nako pasi pezuva?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Nokuti mazuva ake ose inhamo bedzi, nokutambudzika kwake kuchema; zvirokwazvo kunyange usiku moyo wake hauzorori. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Hakune chinhu chinopfuura ichi,kuti munhu adye amwe afadze mweya wake nezvakanaka pakati pokubata kwake. Ndakaona kuti naizvozvi zvinobva kuruoko rwaMwari." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Nokuti ndiani angadya, ndiani angafarira chinhu kunze kwake?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nokuti munhu, anomufadza, anopiwa huchenjeri, nezivo, nomufaro; asi mutadzi anopiwa kutambudzika, kuti aunganidze nokututira, agozvipa mumwe anofadza Mwari. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Chinhu chimwe nechimwe chino musi wacho, uye shoko rimwe nerimwe pasi pedenga rine nguva yaro." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Nguva yokuberekwa, nenguva yokufa; nguva yokusima, nenguva yokudzura chakasimwa;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 nguva yokuuraya, nenguva yokuporesa; nguva yokuputsa, nenguva yokuvaka;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 nguva yokuchema, nenguva yokuseka; nguva yokuungudza, nenguva yokupembera;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 nguva yokurasha mabwe, nenguva yokuunganidza mabwe; nguva yokumbundikira, nenguva yokurega kumbundikira;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 nguva yokutsvaka, nenguva yokurega zvirashike; nguva yokuchengeta, nenguva yokurasha;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 nguva yokubvarura, nenguva yokusona; nguva yokunyarara, nenguva yokutaura;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 nguva yokuda, nenguva yokurwa, nenguva yorugare." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Ko iye anobata anobatsirwei nezvaanotamburira? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndakaona kutambudzika kwakapiwa vanakomana vavanhu naMwari, kuti vazvitambudze nazvo." 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Chinhu chimwe nechimwe akachiita chakanaka panguva yacho; akaisawo zvisingaperi mumoyo mavo, kunyange zvakadaro munhu haangagoni kunzwisisa zvakabatwa naMwari kubva pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzisira." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndinoziva kuti hakune chinhu chakanaka pakati pavo chingapfuura ichi, kuti vafare, uye kuti vaite zvakanaka upenyu hwavo hwose." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Uyewo, kuti chipo chaMwari kuti munhu mumwe nomumwe adye, amwe, afarire zvinhu zvakanaka pakubata kwake kose." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndinoziva kuti zvose zvinoitwa naMwari, zvichagara nokusingaperi; hakune chinhu chingawedzerwa, kana chingabviswa pazviri; Mwari akazviita izvozvo, kuti vanhu vamutye." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Zviripo zvino, zvakanguva zvavapo; uye izvo, zvichavapo, zvakanguva zvavapo; anotsvakazve zvakanga zvapfuura." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Uyezve, ndakaona pasi pezuva, kuti panzvimbo yokururamisira, zvakaipa zvakanga zviripo; uye panzvimbo yokururama, zvakaipa zvakanga zviripo." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndakati mumoyo mangu, ""Mwari ndiye achatonga akarurama nowakaipa, nokuti nguva iripo yeshoko rimwe nerimwe nebasa rimwe nerimwe.""" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndakati mumoyo mangu, ""Izvi zvinoitwa nokuda kwavanakomana vavanhu, kuti Mwari avaidze, aone kuti ivo vamene vakangoita semhuka.""" 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Nokuti zvinoitirwa vanakomana vavanhu ndizvo zvinoitirwawo mhuka; zvose zvinoitirwa chinhu chimwe. Mufiro womunhu, ndiwo mufiro wemhuka, zvose zvinokufema kumwe; munhu haana paanopfuura mhuka; nokuti zvose hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Zvose zvinoenda kunzvimbo imwe; zvose zvinobva pavhu, zvose zvinodzokerazve kuvhu." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ndiani ungaziva kana kufema kunopa upenyu kumunhu kunokuisa kumusoro, kana kufema kunopa upenyu kumhuka kuchiburukira pasi?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Saka ndakaona kuti hakune chinhu chinopfuura ichi, kuti munhu afarire mabasa ake, nokuti ndiwo mugove wake; nokuti ndiani achamudzosazve kuti aone zvichamutevera." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Zvino ndakadzokazve, ndikaona kumanikidzwa kose kunoitwa pasi pezuva; tarira, kwakanga kune misodzi yavanomanikidzwa, vachishaiwa munyaradzi; vamanikidzi vavo ndivo vakanga vane simba, asi ivo vakashaiwa munyaradzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Naizvozvo ndakati vakafa, vakanguva vafa, vanomufaro kupfuura vapenyu vachiri vapenyu." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Zvirokwazvo, ndakati agere kutongovapo, iye asina kuona basa rakaipa rinoitwa pasi pezuva anomufaro kupfuura vapenyu." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Zvino ndakaona kubata kose noumhizha hwose pakubata, kuti munhu anovengwa nowokwake pamusoro pazvo. Naizvozvo hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Benzi rinofungatira maoko aro, richidya nyama yaro." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Tsama imwe yorugare inopfuura nokunaka tsama mbiri dzokutambudzika no kudzingana nemhepo. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Zvino ndakadzoka, ndikaona zvisina maturo pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mumwe ariko anongogara ari oga, asina mumwe wake; zvirokwazvo, haana mwanakomana kana munun'una, kunyange zvakadaro kubata kwake hakuna mugumo, uye meso ake haaguti nefuma. Anoti, ""Zvino ndinobatira ani, ndichinyima moyo wangu zvinhu zvakanaka?"" Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, zvirokwazvo ndiko kutambudzika kukuru." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Vaviri vanopfuura mumwe, nokuti vanomubayiro wakanaka wokubata kwavo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Nokuti kana vakawira pasi, mumwe achasimudza shamwari yake; asi ari oga ane nhamo kana achiwira pasi, haano mumwe angamusimudza." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Uyezve, kana vaviri vachivata pamwechete, vachadziyirwa; asi mumwechete angadziyirwa sei?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Kana munhu akavamba mumwe, vaviri vangamudzivisa; rwonzi rwakakoshwa mutatu harungakurumidzi kudamburwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Jaya murombo, rakachenjera, rinopfuura mambo mutana benzi, asichazivi kutenda kana achirangwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Nokuti akabuda mutirongo kuzova mambo; zvirokwazvo, kunyange paushe hwake akaberekwa ari murombo." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndakaona vapenyu vose vanofamba pasi pezuva, vachitevera jaya, iye wechipiri, wakamuka panzvimbo yake." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Vanhu vose vakanga vasingaverengwi, ivo vose vakanga vakabatwa naye; kunyange zvakadaro, vanozotevera havangamufariri. Zvirokwazvo, naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Ngwarira rutsoka rwako kana uchienda kuimba yaMwari; nokuti kuswedera kuzonzwa kunopfuura kubayira chibayiro chamapenzi; nokuti havazivi kuti vanoita zvakaipa. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Usakurumidza nomuromo wako, moyo wako urege kukurumidza kutaura shoko pamberi paMwari; nokuti Mwari ari kudenga, iwe uri pasi; naizvozvo mashoko ako ngaave mashoma." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Nokuti kurota kunouya namabasa mazhinji, nenzwi rebenzi namashoko mazhinji." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kana uchinge wapikira Mwari mhiko, usanonoka kuiripa; nokuti iye haafariri mapenzi; ripa zvaunopika." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Zviri nani kuti urege kupika, pakuti upike usingaripi." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Usatendera muromo wako kutadzisa nyama yako; usati pamberi pomutumwa waMwari, Yakanga iri mhosho; Mwari achatsamwireiko inzwi rako,akaparadza basa ramaoko ako?""" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Nokuti pakurota kuzhinji napamashoko mazhinji pane zvisina maturo zvizhinji; asi iwe utye Mwari. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kana uchiona murombo achimanikidzwa, nokururamisa nokururama zvichibviswa nesimba panyika, usashamiswa nazvo; nokuti mukuru kuvakuru vose anocherekedza; vamwe variko vakuru kwavari." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Nokuti nyika inobatsirwa zvikuru nechinhu ichi, mambo anofarira kurimiwa kweminda." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Anoda sirivha, haangagutswi nesirivha, naiye anoda zvakawanda, haangagutswi nezvakawanda; naizvozvo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Kana fuma ichiwanda, vadyi vanowandawo; mwene wayo anobatsirwei, asi kungoona nameso ake." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Hope dzomunhu, unobata, dzakanaka, kana achidya zvishoma kana zvizhinji; asi kuguta komufumi hakumutenderi kuvata." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kune chinhu chakaisvoipa, chandakaona pasi pezuva, fuma inochengetwa nomwene wayo, ichimuonesa nhamo." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 fuma iyo inopera nechinhu chakaipa chinomuwira; kana achinge abereka mwanakomana, haana chinhu muruoko rwake." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Sezvaakabuda mudumbu ramai vake, achadzokazve asina chinhu, sezvaakabuda; haana chaakatamburira, chaangatora, chaangaenda nacho muruoko rwake." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Nechinhu ichi chakaisvoipawo, kuti pazvose, sezvaakauya, saizvozvo achaendazve; zvino achawaneiko, zvaakatamburira mhepo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Mazuva ake osewo anodya murima, anotambudzika kwazvo; anourwere neshungu." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Tarirai, zvandakaona kuti zvakanaka, zvinofanira munhu, ndiko kuti adye, amwe, afarire zvinhu zvakanaka pakubata kwake kose kwaanobata pasi pezuva, mazuva ose oupenyu hwake hwaakapiwa naMwari; nokuti ndiwo mugove wake." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Munhu mumwe nomumwewo, akapiwa naMwari fuma nezvakawanda, akapiwawo simba kuti azvidye nokutora icho chipo chinobva kuna Mwari." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Nokuti iye haangarangariri zvikuru mazuva oupenyu hwake, nokuti Mwari anopindura pamufaro womoyo wake." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kune chinhu chakaipa chandakaona pasi pezuva, chinoremedza vanhu." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Munhu anopiwa naMwari fuma nezvakawanda nokukudzwa, saizvozvo kuti mweya wake hautongoshaiwi chinhu chaanoda; asi Mwari haamupi simba rokudya izvozvo; asi mutorwa anozvidya, ichi hachina maturo, ihosha yakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Kana munhu akabereka vana vane zana, akararama makore mazhinji, mazuva amakore ake akava mazhinji, asi mweya wake asingagutswi nezvakanaka, uyezve akasavigwa zvakanaka, ndinoti mwana wakaberekwa nguva isati yasvika anopfuura iye;" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 nokuti anouya asina maturo, anoendazve murima, zita rake rinofukidzwa nerima;" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 uyezve, haana kuona zuva kana kuriziva; mwana akadai ane zororo kupfuura iye." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Zvirokwazvo, kunyange akararama makore ane zviuru zviviri zvamazana, asingafariri zvinhu zvakanaka, ko vose havaendi kunzvimbo imwe here?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Kubata kose komunhu kunoitirwa muromo wake; kunyange zvakadaro kuda kwake zvokudya hakugutswi. 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Nokuti akachenjera anokurira benzi nei? Kana murombo anei, iye anoziva kufamba zvakanaka pamberi pavapenyu." 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kuona kwameso kunopfuura kutsvakatsvaka komweya. Naizvozvowo hazvina maturo, ndiko kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Chinhu chipi nechipi, chakavapo, chakanguva chapiwa zita racho, zvakatarwa kuti munhu achava akadini, haangarwi nowanomupfuura nesimba." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Nokuti mashoko mazhinji ariko, anowedzera zvisina maturo; munhu anobatsirwei nazvo?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Nokuti ndiani anoziva zvakafanira munhu paupenyu hwake, iwo mazuva ose oupenyu hwake husina maturo, anorarama somumvuri? Nokuti ndiani angaudza munhu zvichazomutevera pasi pezuva?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Mbiri yakanaka inopfuura chizoro chakanaka, nezuva rokufa kupfuura zuva rokuzvarwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Zviri nani kuenda kuimba yokuchema, pakuenda kuimba yomutambo; nokuti ndiwo mugumo wavanhu vose; munhu mupenyu achazvirangarira pamoyo pake." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kuchema kunopfuura kuseka, nokuti moyo unofadzwa nokupunyaira kwechiso." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 moyo yavakachenjera iri paimba yokuchema, asi moyo yamapenzi iri paimba yokufara." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Zviri nani kuti munhu anzwe kutuka kwavakachenjera, pakuti anzwe kuimba kwamapenzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Nokuti kuseka kwebenzi kwakafanana nokuputika kwemhinzwa pasi pehari; naizvozvowo hazvina maturo. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Zvirokwazvo kumanikidza kunoita muchenjeri benzi; uye fufuro inoparadza njere. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Kuguma kwechinhu kunopfuura kutanga kwacho; ano moyo murefu anopfuura ano moyo unozvikudza. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Usakurumidza pamweya wako kutsamwa, nokuti kutsamwa kunogara pachipfuva chamapenzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Usati, ""Mazuva ekare anopfuura azvino nokunaka neiko?"" Nokuti haungabvunzi saizvozvo nouchenjeri." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Uchenjeri hwakaenzana nenhaka; zvirokwazvo, hwakaisvonaka kuna vanoona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Nokuti uchenjeri chitaviridzo, mariwo chitaviridzo, asi kunakisa kwezivo ndiko, kuti uchenjeri hunochengeta hupenyu hwaiye anahwo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Cherekedza basa raMwari, nokuti ndiani angaruramisa chaakakombamisa iye?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Fara nezuva rokugara zvakanaka, rangarira nezuva rokutambudzika; Mwari ndiye akaita izvozvo zvose zviviri, kuti munhu arege kuziva zviri mberi kwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Izvozvi zvose ndakazviona pamazuva angu asina maturo. Akarurama ariko, anoparara pakati pokururama kwake, uyezve, munhu akaipa ariko, anorarama nguva huru pakati pezvakaipa zvake." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usava munhu wakaisvorurama, usava wakaisvochenjera; uchazviparadzireiko?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Usava munhu akaisvoipa, uye usava benzi; uchafireiko nguva yako isati yasvika?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Zvakanaka kuti ubatisise chinhu ichi, uye usabvisa ruoko rwako panechecho; nokuti anotya Mwari, achapukunyuka panaizvozvo zvose." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Uchenjeri hunosimbisa akachenjera kupfuura vabati vane gumi vari muguta. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Zvirokwazvo, hapana munhu akarurama panyika, anoita zvakanaka, asingatadzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Uyezve, usava nehanya namashoko ose anotaurwa, kuti urege kunzwa muranda wako achikutuka." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Nokuti kazhinji moyo wako unoziva kuti newewo wakatuka vamwe saizvozvo. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Izvozvi zvose ndakazviidza nouchenjeri; ndakati, ""Ndichava akachenjera; asi zvakanga zviri kure neni.""" 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Izvo, zviripo, zviri kure, zvakadzika kwazvo, ndiani angazviziva?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndakatendeuka, moyo wangu ukada kuziva nokunzvera, nokutsvaka uchenjeri namano, ndizive kuti kuipa upenzi, noupenzi kupenga." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndikawana chinhu chinovava kukunda rufu, ndiye mukadzi ari musungo, moyo wake ari mambure, namaoko ake zvisungo; Ani naani anofadza Mwari, achapukunyuka kwaari; asi mutadzi achabatwa naye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Zvanzi noMuparidzi, ""Tarirai, ndizvozvi zvandakawana, ndichiverenga chinhu chimwe nechimwe, kuti ndiwane shumo yazvo;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 zvinongoramba zvichitsvakwa nomweya wangu, asi ndigere kuzviwana, ndakawana murume mumwe pakati pechiuru chezana, asi handina kuwana mukadzi pakati pavazhinji vakadai." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Asi tarirai, chinhu chimwe ichi chete ndicho chandakawana, kuti Mwari akaita munhu akarurama, asi ivo vakatsvaka mano mazhinji.""" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndiani akafanana nomunhu akachenjera? Ndiani anoziva kududzira chinhu? Uchenjeri hwomunhu hunobwinyisa chiso chake; hasha dzechiso chake dzinoshandurwa. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ndinoti, ""Chengeta murayiro wamambo, uzviite nokuda kwezvawakapikira Mwari.""" 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usakurumidza kubva pamberi pake; usatsungirira pachinhu chakaipa, nokuti anoita zvose zvaanoda." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Nokuti shoko ramambo rine simba, ndiani angati kwaari, ""Munoiteiko?""" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Munhu anochengeta murayiro, haangaoni chinhu chakaipa; moyo wowakachenjera unoziva nguva nokutongwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Nokuti chinhu chimwe nechimwe chine nguva yacho nokutongwa kwacho; nokuti kushata komunhu kunomuremedza; 
Ecclesiastes8:7 nokuti haazivi zvichazovapo; nokuti ndiani angamuzivisa kuti zvichava zvakadini? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Hakuna munhu ane simba pamusoro pemhepo, kuti adzivirire mhepo; uye haana simba pamusoro pezuva rorufu; hakuna kukangamwirwa pakurwa; saizvozvo zvakaipa hazvingarwiri iye anozviita." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Izvozvi zvose ndakazviona, ndikarangarira nomoyo wangu mabasa ose anoitwa pasi pezuva, panguva kana mumwe munhu ane simba pamusoro pomumwe, achimuitira zvakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Saizvozvo ndakaona akaipa achivigwa, vanhu vakauya kuhwiro hwake; asi vakanga vaita zvakarurama vakabva panzvimbo tsvene, vakakanganikwa muguta; naizvozvo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Kutongwa zvakusingakurumidzi kuuya pamusoro pebasa rakaipa, moyo yavanakomana vavanhu inotsungirira kuita zvakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Kunyange mutadzi akaita zvakaipa rune zana, akava namazuva mazhinji, kunyange zvakadaro ndinoziva zvirokwazvo kuti vanotya Mwari, vanotya pamberi pake, vachagara zvakanaka;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 asi akaipa haangagari zvakanaka, haangavi namazuva mazhinji, zvaakafanana nomumvuri; nokuti haatyi pamberi paMwari." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Chinhu chisina maturo chiripo, chinoitwa panyika, ndicho kuti vakarurama variko vanoitirwa sezvinoitirwa mabasa avakaipa, uyezve vakaipa variko vanoitirwa sezvinoitirwa mabasa avakarurama; ndikati, ""Naizvozvi hazvina maturo.""" 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ipapo ndakarumbidza mufaro, nokuti munhu haane chinhu chinopfuura ichi, kuti adye, amwe, afare; kuti izvozvo zvigare naye pakubata kwake mazuva ose ohupenyu hwake, hwaakapiwa naMwari pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Zvino ndakati ndichirangarira nomoyo wangu kuti ndizive uchenjeri nokuona kubata kunoitwa panyika (nokuti vamwe variko vasingaoni hope nameso avo masikati novusiku)," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ndikaona mabasa ose aMwari, kuti munhu haanganzwisisi mabasa ose anoitwa pasi pezuva; nokuti kunyange munhu akatambura hake kuti azvinzvere, haanganzwisisi hake; zvirokwazvo, kunyange munhu, akachenjera, achiti, ndinozviziva, kunyange zvakadaro, haangagoni kuzvinzwisisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nokuti izvozvo zvose ndakazvira ngarira nomoyo wangu, kuti ndinzwisise izvozvi zvose, kuti vakarurama navakachenjera vari paruoko rwaMwari, pamwechete namabasa avo; kana kuri kuda kana kuvenga, munhu haazvizivi; zvose zviri mberi kwazvo." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Zvose zvinoenzanisirwa vose; chinhu chimwe chinoitirwa wakarurama nowakaipa, wakanaka nowakachena nowane tsvina, anobayira nowasingabayiri, akanaka nomutadzi, anopika nowanotya kupika." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Chinhu ichi chakaipa pakati pezvose zvinoitwa pasi pezuva, kuti chinhu chimwe chiitirwe vose; zvirokwazvowo, moyo yavanakomana vavanhu izere nezvakaipa, uye upengo huri mumoyo yavo vachiri vapenyu; shure kwaizvozvo vanoenda kuvakafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Nokuti kana munhu achiri pakati pavapenyu vose, achine chinhu chaangatarira; nokuti imbwa mhenyu inopfuura shumba yakafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Nokuti vapenyu vanoziva kuti vachazofa, asi vakafa havana chavanoziva, kunyange nomubayiro havachina; nokuti havacharangarirwi." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Rudo rwavo, nokuvenga kwavo, negodo ravo, zvose zvanguva zvapera hazvo; havachino mugove nokusingaperi pazvose zvinoitwa pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Enda zvako, udye zvokudya zvako nomufaro, umwe waini yako nomoyo wakafara; nokuti Mwari atofadzwa namabasa ako." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 nguvo dzako dzigare dzakachena, nomusoro wako urege kushaiwa mafuta." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Gara nomufaro nomukadzi wako, waunoda, mazuva ako ose asina maturo, aakakupa pasi pezuva, mazuva ako ose asina maturo; nokuti ndiwo mugove wako paupenyu, uye pakubata kwako kwaunobata pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Zvose zvinowana ruoko rwako, kuti ruzviite, uzviite nesimba rako rose; nokuti hakune basa, kana zano, kana zivo, kana uchenjeri paSheori kwaunoenda." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndakadzoka, ndikaona pasi pezuva, kuti anomhanyisa haazi iye anokunda pakurwa ane simba haazi iye anokunda pakurwa, akachenjera haazi iye ane zvokudya, vanhu vane njere havazi ivo vane fuma, vanhu vanoumhizha havazi ivo vanofarirwa; asi vanowirwa vose nenguva nezvinoitika." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Nokuti nomunhuwo haazivi nguva yake; sehove, dzinobatwa murutava rwakaipa, kana shiri, dzinobatwa murugombe; saizvozvo vanakomana vavanhu vanoteyiwa nenguva yakaipa, kana yavawira kamwe-kamwe." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndakaonawo pasi pezuva uchenjeri hwakadai, ndikati hukuru." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kwakanga kune guta duku, maiva navarume vashoma; mumwe mambo mukuru akarimukira, akarikomba, akarivakira masvingo makuru okurwa nawo." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Zvino mukati maro makawanikwa murombo akanga akachenjera, iye akaponesa guta nouchenjeri hwake; asi hakuna munhu akarangarira munhu uyo murombo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ipapo ndakati, ""Uchenjeri hunopfuura simba; kunyange zvakadaro uchenjeri hwomurombo hunoshorwa, namashoko ake haateererwi.""" 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mashoko avakachenjera, anonzwika kana kwakadzikama, anopfuura kudanidzira komunhu anobata ushe pakati pamapenzi." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Uchenjeri hunopfuura nhumbi dzokurwa; asi mutadzi mumwe anoparadza zvakanaka zvizhinji. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Nhunzi dzakafa dzinonhuhwisa nokuodza chizoro chomuvenganisi wezvinonhuhwira; saizvozvo upenzi hushoma hunorema kukunda uchenjeri nokukudzwa. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Moyo womunhu wakachenjera uri kurudyi rwake, asi moyo webenzi uri kuruboshwe rwake." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Zvirokwazvo, kana benzi richifamba panzira, rinoshaiwa njere; rinozivisa vose kuti ndiri benzi." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Kana kutsamwa komubati kukakumukira, usabva panzvimbo yako; nokuti unyoro hunonyaradza mhosva huru." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Chinhu chakaipa chiripo chandakaona pasi pezuva, kuri kutadza kunobva kuvabati." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Upenzi hunoiswa pakakwirira, asi vafumi vanogara pakaderera." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndakaona varanda vakatasva mabhiza, namachinda achifamba pasi savaranda." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Anochera gomba, achawiramo amene; ani naani anokoromora rusvingo, nyoka ichamuruma." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ani naani anoputsa mabwe, angakuvadzwa nawo; uye anobanzura huni, ari panjodzi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Kana simbi yagomara, munhu akasairodza, anofanira kunyanya kubata nesimba; asi uchenjeri hunobatsira pakururamisa." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Kana nyoka ikaruma isati yarapwa namazango, n'anga haibatsiri." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mashoko anobva mumuromo woakachenjera, anofadza; asi miromo yebenzi inomumedza iye." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Kutanga kwamashoko omuromo waro upenzi; nokuguma kokutaura kwaro upengo hwakashata. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Benzi rinowanzawo mashoko; asi munhu haazivi zvichavapo; ndiani angamuzivisa zvichazovapo shure kwake? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Kubata kwamapenzi kunonetsa mumwe nomumwe wavo; nokuti haatongozivi nzira yokuenda nayo kuguta. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Iwe nyika une nhamo, kana mambo wako ari mwana, kana machinda ako achiita mutambo mangwanani." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Unomufaro, iwe nyika, kana mambo wako ari mwanakomana wavakakudzwa, kana machinda ako achiita mutambo panguva yakafanira, kuti asimbiswe, asingaitiri kubatwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Nousimbe denga reimba rinosakara; nokusabata kwamaoko imba inodonha. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Mutambo unoitirwa kuseka, uye waini inofadza upenyu; zvose zvingawanikwa nemari." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Usatuka mambo, kunyange pakufunga kwako; usatuka mufumi paimba yako yokuvata; nokuti shiri yokudenga ingatakura inzwi, uye izvo zvinamapapiro zvingazivisa shoko." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Kandira zvokudya zvako pamusoro pemvura, nokuti uchazviwanazve mazuva mazhinji apfuura." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Goverana navanomwe, kunyange navaserewo, nokuti hauzivi zvakaipa zvakadini zvingava panyika." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Kana makore azara nemvura, anoidururira panyika; uye kana muti ukawira pasi kurutivi rwezasi, kana rwokumusoro, ipo panowira muti ndipo pauchavata." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Anogara achicherekedza mhepo haangakushi; uye anotarira makore, haangacheki." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Sezvausingazivi mafambiro wemhepo, kana makuriro amapfupa mudumbu romukadzi ane mimba, saizvozvowo hauzivi basa raMwari, anoita zvose." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kusha mbeu dzako mangwanani, usabvisa ruoko rwako madekwana; nokuti hauzivi kuti chichakura ndechipi, kana ichi kana icho, kana zvimwe zviviri zvose zvichafanana pakunaka." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Zvirokwazvo, chiedza chakanaka, uye meso anofara nokuona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Zvirokwazvo, kana munhu akararama makore mazhinji, ngaafarire ose; asi ngaarangarire mazuva erima, kuti achava mazhinji; zvose zvinozouya hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Fara hako, iwe jaya, pauduku hwako, moyo wako ngaukufadze pamazuva ohujaya hwako; famba nenzira dzomoyo wako, napakuona kwameso ako; asi uzive kuti Mwari uchazokutonga pamusoro paizvozvo zvose." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Dzinga zvinonetsa pamoyo pako, ubvise zvakaipa panyama yako, nokuti uduku noujaya hazvinamaturo." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Rangarirawo Musiki wako pamazuva ovujaya bwako, mazuva akaipa asati asvika, namakore asati avapo; panguva yauchazoti handifariri izvozvo;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 zuva nechiedza, nomwedzi, nenyeredzi zvisati zvasvibiswa, makore achidzoka kana mvura yapfuura;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 zuva iro, kana vatariri veimba vachidedera, varume vane simba vachikotama, vakuyi vachirega basa ravo, nokuti vava vashoma; navanotarira napamahwindo vasvibirwa;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 mikova ichizarirwa inobudira kunzira dzokumusha, nenzwi rokukuya richidedera; kana achimuka nenzwi reshiri, navaimbi vose vasinganzwiki zvakanaka." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Zvirokwazvo vachatya zvakakwirira, nezvinotyisa zvichanzi zviri panzira; muamanda uchatumbuka maruva, nemhashu ichazvikwekweredza, uye kuda kose kuchapera; nokuti munhu anoenda kumusha wake usingaperi, vachemi va chafamba-famba panzira dzomumusha;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 rwonzi rwesirivha rusati rwadamburwa, mbiya yendarama isati yaputswa, chirongo chisati chaputswa patsime, nechichereso chinomonerwa chisati chavhunikira pachitubu," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 guruva risati radzokera kuvhu, sezvarakanga rakaita; uye mweya usati wadzokera kuna Mwari akaupa." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Zvanzi noMuparidzi, ""Hazvina maturo chose, zvose hazvina maturo!""" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Zvino, Muparidzi zvaakanga ari munhu akachenjera, akapfuura achidzidzisa vanhu zivo; akarangarira, nokunzvera, nokurongedza zvirevo zvizhinji." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Muparidzi wakatsvaka kuti awane mashoko anofadza, uye zvakanyorwa nomoyo wakarurama, ari mashoko ezvokwadi." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mashoko avakachenjera akafanana nezvibayiso; sembambo dzakaroverwa kwazvo, ndizvo zvakaita mashoko akaunganidzwa, akapiwa noMufudzi mumwechete." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Uyezve, mwanakomana wangu, unyeverwe; kuita bhuku zhinji hakuperi, uye kudzidza kuzhinji kunonetsa muviri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Zvino shoko guru pazvose zvatanzwa, heri, ""Itya Mwari, uchengete mirairo yake; nokuti ndizvo zvakafanira vanhu vose." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Nokuti Mwari achatonga basa rimwe nerimwe, pamwechete nezvose zvakavanzika, kunyange zvakanaka, kunyange zvakaipa.""" 
SongOfSongs1:1 Rwiyo rukuru rwaSoromoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ngaanditsvode nokutsvoda komuromo wake; Nokuti rudo rwako rwakanaka kupfuura waini. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Zvizoro zvako zvinonhuhwira zvakanaka; Zita rako rakaita samafuta akadururwa; Saka mhandara dzinokuda. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ndikwevere kwauri; tichakutevera tichimhanya; Mambo wakandiisa mudzimba dzake dzomukati; Tichafara nokukufarira zvikuru iwe; Ticharumbidza rudo rwako kupfuura waini; Zvakarurama zvavakakuda. 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ndakasviba, asi ndakanaka hangu, imwi vakunda veJerusaremu, Samatende eKedhari, Semicheka yakaremberedzwa yaSoromoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Musanditarira, zvandakasviba, Nokuti zuva rakandipisa. Vanakomana vamai vangu vakanditsamwira, Vakandiita murindi weminda yemizambiringa; Asi munda wangu wemizambiringa handina kuuchengeta." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndiudze iwe, unodikamwa nomweya wangu, Kuti unofudza boka rako kupi, Kuti unorizorodza kupi masikati; Nokuti ndichaitirei somunhu akafukidzwa kumeso Pakati pamapoka eshamwari dzako?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Kana usingazivi, iwe unopfuura vakadzi vose nokunaka, Tevera makwara amapoka, Ufudze makwayana ako kurutivi rwamatende avafudzi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ndakakufananidzira iwe, shamwari yangu, Nebhiza pangoro dzaFarao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Matama ako akanaka pakati pezvirukwa zvevhudzi; Mutsipa wako nezvibwe zvinokosha zvakatungirwa. 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tichakuitira zvirukwa zvendarama Nezvuma zvesirivha. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Nguva yose mambo agere patafura yake, Nadho yangu yakabudisa kunhuhwira kwayo." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Mudiwa wangu akaita kwandiri sehombodo yemura, Inogara pakati pamazamu angu." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Mudiwa wangu akaita kwandiri sesumbu ramaruva ehena, Paminda yemizambiringa paEngedhi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Tarira, wakanaka, shamwari yangu; Tarira, wakanaka; Meso ako akafanana neenjiva." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Tarira, wakanaka, mudiwa wangu, zvirokwazvo, unofadza; Uvato bwedu ndipo pabumhudza." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Matanda eimba yedu ndeemisidhari; Mbariro dzayo ndedzemisiperesi. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndiri ruva rebundo rokuSharoni, Ndiri ruva rokumapani." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Seruva pakati pemhinzwa, Ndizvo zvakaita mudiwa wangu pakati pavakunda." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Somuapuri pakati pemiti yokudondo, Ndizvo zvakaita mudiwa wangu pakati pavanakomana. Ndakagara mumumvuri wake nomufaro mukuru; Zvibereko zvake zvakanga zvichinaka pamukamwa wangu." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Akandiisa kuimba yomutambo; Mureza wake pamusoro pangu rwakanga ruri rudo. 
SongOfSongs2:5 Nditsigirei namazambiringa akaomeswa, ndisimbisei namaapuri; Nokuti ndinorwara norudo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Ruoko rwake rworuboshwe ruri pasi pomusoro wangu; Ruoko rwake rworudyi runondimbundikira. 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ndinokupikirai, imwi vakunda veJerusaremu, Nemharapara nenondo dzokubundo, Kuti murege kupfutidza kana kumutsa rudo, Kusvikira irwo rwada rumene." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Inzwai inzwi romudiwa wangu! Tarirai, wouya, Achikwakuka pamakomo, Achichirika pazvikomo." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Mudiwa wangu akafanana nemharapara kana nomwana wenondo; Tarirai, womira seri korusvingo rwedu; Anotarira napamahwindo; Anodongorera napazvitanda zvamahwindo." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Mudiwa wangu akataura, akati kwandiri, ""Simuka, shamwari yangu, akanaka wangu, huya!""" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Nokuti, tarira, chando chaenda; Mvura yapera, yaenda;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 Maruva aonekwa panyika; Nguva yokurira kweshiri yasvika, Nenzwi renjiva rinonzwikwa panyika yedu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Muonde woibvisa maonde awo mambishi, Uye mizambiringa yotunga maruva; Yobudisa kunhuhwira kwayo; Simuka, shamwari yangu, wakanaka wangu huya!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Iwe njiva yangu, uri mumikaha yedombo, Pakadzitika pamawere; Ndione chiso chako, Ndinzwe inzwi rako; Nokuti inzwi rako rakanaka, chiso chako chakanaka." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Tibatirei makava, makava maduku, Anotadzira minda yemizambiringa; Nokuti minda yedu yemizambiringa yotunga maruva." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Mudiwa wangu ndowangu, neni ndiri wake; Anofudza makwai ake pakati pamaruva ebundo." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Kana zuva rotonhorera, nemimvuri yotiza, Tendeuka, mudiwa wangu, uve semharapara nomwana wenondo Pamusoro pamakomo eBheteri." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Usiku, ndiri panhovo dzangu, Ndakamutsvaka anodikamwa nomweya wangu; Ndakamutsvaka, asi handina kumuwana." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndikati, ndichasimuka zvino, ndifambe-fambe neguta; Panzira dzomumusha, napamatare Ndipo pandichatsvaka anodikamwa nomweya wangu; Ndikamutsvaka, asi handina kumuwana." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Varindi, vanofamba-famba neguta, vakandiwana; Ndikati kwavari, ""Matongoona anodikamwa nomweya wangu here?""" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ndakati ndangobva kwavari, ndakapfuura zvishoma, Ndikamuwana iye anodikamwa nomweya wangu; Ndikamubata, ndikaramba kumuregedza, Kusvikira ndamuisa mumba mamai vangu, Muimba yomukati yaiye wakandibereka." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ndinokupikirai, imwi vakunda veJerusaremu, Nemharapara nenondo dzokubundo, Kuti murege kupfutidza kana kumutsa rudo, Kusvikira irwo rwada rumene." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ndianiko uyo anokwira achibva kurenje seshongwe dzohutsi, Anonhuhwira nemura nezvinonhuhwira, Nezvakakuyiwa zvose zvomutengesi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Tarirai, ndicho chigaro chaSoromoni chinotakurwa; Mhare dzina makumi matanhatu dzakachikomberedza, Vanobva pamhare dzavaIsiraeri." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Vose vanoziva kubata munondo, vakadzidza kurwa; Murume mumwe nomumwe anomunondo wake pahudyu yake, Nokuda kwezvinotyisa usiku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mambo Soromoni akazviitira chigaro chinotakurwa chamatanda eRebhanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Akaita mbiru dzacho nesirivha, Musana wacho nendarama, pokugara kwacho nomucheka mutsvuku,. Mukati macho makarongwa norudo Rwavakunda veJerusaremu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Budai, imwi vakunda veZiyoni, muone mambo Soromoni, Ane korona yaakadzikwa namai vake Pazuva rokuwana kwake, Napazuva romufaro womoyo wake." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Tarira, akanaka sei, shamwari yangu; tarira, akanaka sei! Meso ako akafanana neenjiva pakutarira kwawo pakati pechifukidzo chako; Vhudzi rako rakafanana neboka rembudzi, Dzinoburukira mujinga megomo reGiriyadhi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Meno ako akafanana neboka ramakwai achangoveurwa, Anobva pakushambwa; Rimwe nerimwe rawo rina vana vaviri, Hakuna rimwe risina mwana." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Miromo yako yakafanana norwonzi rwakatsvuka; Kutaura kwako kwakanaka; Zvavovo zvako zvakafanana nebhande redamba Pakutarira kwako pakati pechifukidzo chako. 
SongOfSongs4:4 Mutsipa wako wakafanana nenhare yaDhavhidhi. Yakavakirwa nhumbi dzokurwa, Makaturikwa nhovo dzine churu chezana, Dzose dziri nhovo dzemhare." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mazamu ako maviri akafanana navana vemharapara, Vari vana vakaberekwa vari vaviri, Vanochera pakati pamaruva ebundo." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Kana zuva rotonhorera, mimvuri yotiza, Ndichaenda kugomo remura, Nokuchikomba chezvinonhuhwira." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Akaisvonaka, iwe shamwari yangu; Hakuna gwapa kwauri." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Hendei tose, iwe mwenga wangu, tibve paRebhanoni, Tibve paRebhanoni tose; Tarira uri pamusoro weAmana, Pamisoro yeSeniri neHerimoni, Panzvimbo dzeshumba, Pamakomo engwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Wanditorera moyo wangu, hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu; Wanditorera moyo wangu nokunditarira kamwe nameso ako, Nechishongo chimwe chomutsipa wako." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Rudo rwako rwakanaka sei, hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu! Rudo rwako runopfuura waini zvikuru sei! Nokunhuhwira kwezvizoro zvako miti yose inonhuhwira!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Miromo yako, mwenga wangu, inodonha musvi wouchi; Uchi nomukaka zviri pasi porurimi rwako; Kunhuhwira kwenguvo dzako kwakafanana nokunhuhwira kweRebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu, munda wakakomberedzwa, Chitubu chakapoteredzwa, tsime rakafunhirwa." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Matavi ako munda wamatamba, une zvibereko zvakaisvonaka; Maruva ehena nenaridho," 
SongOfSongs4:14 Naridho nesafironi, Karamusi nekinamoni, nemiti yose inonhuhwira, Mura negavakava, nezvose zvinoisvonhuhwira." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Uri tsime reminda, Chitubu chemvura mhenyu, Nenzizi dzinoyerera dzichibva Rebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Muka, iwe mhepo yokumusoro; uya, iwe mhepo yezasi; Furidzira pamunda wangu, kuti zvinonhuhwira zvawo zvibudire kunze. Mudiwa wangu ngaapinde mumunda make, Ngaadye zvibereko zvake zvakaisvonaka." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndapinda mumunda mangu, hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu; Ndaunganidza mura yangu nezvinonhuhwira zvangu; Ndadya musvi wouchi hwangu nouchi hwangu; Ndamwa waini yangu nomukaka wangu. Idyai, shamwari dzangu; Imwai, zvirokwazvo, imwai zvikuru, vadiwa vangu." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndakanga ndivete, asi moyo wangu wakanga wakasvinura; Inzwi romudiwa wangu, anogogodza, achiti, ""Ndizarurire, hanzvadzi yangu, mudiwa wangu, njiva yangu, akakwana wangu; Nokuti musoro wangu uzere nedova, Vhudzi rangu namadonhedza ousiku.""" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndabvisa nguvo yangu; ndingaifuka sei? Ndashambidza tsoka dzangu; ndingadzisvibisa sei? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Mudiwa wangu akapinza ruoko rwake napavuri romukova, moyo wangu ukamushuva." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndakasimuka, ndichiti ndizarurire mudiwa wangu; Maoko angu akadonha mura, Nemimwe yangu mura inoyerera, Pazvibato zvechizarira." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndakazarurira mudiwa wangu; Asi mudiwa wangu akanga atendeuka, aenda. Mweya wangu wakanga watorwa pakutaura kwake; Ndakamutsvaka, asi handina kumuwana; Ndikamudana, asi haana kundipindura." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Varindi, vanofamba-famba neguta, vakandiwana; Vakandirova, vakandikuvadza; Vatariri vamasvingo vakanditorera jasi rangu." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ndinokupikirai, imwi vakunda veJerusaremu, Kana mukawana mudiwa wangu," 
SongOfSongs5:9 Ko mudiwa wako anopfuura vamwe vadiwa neiko, Nhai, iwe, unopfuura vakadzi vose nokunaka? Ko mudiwa wako unopfuura vamwe vadiwa neiko, Zvaunotipikira saizvozvo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Mudiwa wangu akachena nokutsvuka, Anozikamwa pakati pezana ramazana." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Musoro wake wakaita sendarama yakaisvonaka; Vhudzi rake rakapetana, idema segunguvo." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Meso ake akaita seenjiva pahova dzemvura, Dzakashambwa nomukaka, sezvibwe zvakarongedzwa zvakanaka." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Matama ake akaita sendima yemiti inonhuhwira, Samatutu emiriwo inonaka; Miromo yake yakaita samaruva anodonha mura inoyerera." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Maoko ake akaita samapango endarama, akaiswa bheriri; Muviri wake wakaita senyanga dzenzou, dzakafukidzwa nesafiro." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Makumbo ake akaita sembiru dzamabwe machena, dzakaiswa pazvigadziko zvendarama yakaisvonaka; Kuonekwa kwake kose kwakafanana neRebhanoni, kwakaisvonaka semisidhari." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Muromo wake wakanaka kwazvo; Zvirokwazvo, wakaisvonaka kwazvo-kwazvo. Ndizvo zvakaita mudiwa wangu, ndizvo zvakaita shamwari yangu, imwi vakunda veJerusaremu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Mudiwa wako akaendepiko, Iwe, unopfuura vakadzi vose nokunaka? Mudiwa wako wakaringirepiko, Kuti timutsvake pamwechete newe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Mudiwa wangu wakadzira kumunda wake, Kundima dzemiti inonhuhwira, Kufudza makwai ake muminda,nokutanha maruva." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ini ndiri womudiwa wangu; mudiwa wangu ndowangu; Anofudza makwai ake pakati pamaruva. 
SongOfSongs6:4 Wakanaka, shamwari yangu saTiriza, Wakanaka seJerusaremu, Unotyisa sehondo ine mireza." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Usanditarira nameso ako, Nokuti andikunda. Vhudzi rako rakafanana neboka rembudzi, Dzinoburukira mujinga megomo reGiriyadhi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Meno aka akafanana neboka renhunzvi dzamakwai, Dzinobva pakushambwa; Rimwe nerimwe radzo rina vana vaviri, Hakuna rimwe risina mwana." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Zvavovo zvako zvakafanana nebhande redamba Pakutarira kwako pakati pechifukidzo chako. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Vahosi vana makumi matanhatu navarongo vana makumi masere variko, Nemhandara dzisingaperi." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Njiva yangu, akakwana wangu, ndiye mumwe oga; Ndiye mwana mumwe woga wamai vake; Ndiye musanangurwa wowakamubereka; Vakunda vakamuona, vakati akaropafadzwa; Navahosi navarongo, vakamurumbidza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ndianiko uyo anotarira samambakwedza, Akanaka somwedzi, Akachena sezuva, Anotyisa sehondo ine mireza?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndakaburukira kumunda wenzungu, Kuti ndione miti mitema mumupata, Kuti ndione kana muzambiringa wotunga, kana matamba otunga maruva." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndisati ndazviziva, mweya wangu wakandiisa Pakati pengoro dzavanhu vangu vakarurama." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Dzoka, dzoka, Shuramiti; Dzoka, dzoka, kuti tikutarire. Munoda kutarira muShuramiti neiko, Sezvamunotarira kutamba kweMahanaimi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Tsoka dzako dzakanaka seiko mushangu, iwe mukunda womuchinda! Hudyu dzako, dzakatendereka, dzakaita sezvishongo, Basa ramaoko emhizha." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Guvhu rako rakaita somukombe wakatendereka, Musingashaikwi waini yakavhenganiswa; Chiuno chako chaita sedutu rezviyo Rakakomberedzwa namaruva." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Mazamu ako maviri akafanana navana vemharapara, Vana vakaberekwa vari vaviri." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Mutsipa wako wakaita seshongwe yorunyanga rwenzou; Meso ako samakuvi paHeshibhoni, Pasuo reBhatirabhimi; Mhinho dzako dzakafanana neshongwe yeRebhanoni Yakatarisana neDhamasiko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Musoro wako pamusoro pako wakafanana neKarimeri; Nevhudzi romusoro wako nomucheka mutsvuku; Mambo akasungwa nevhudzi rakapetana. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Wakanaka sei, unofadza sei, Mudiwa, pakati pezvinofadza." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Umiro hwako hwakafanana nomuchindwe, Namazamu ako namasumbu ezvibereko zvawo." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndakati, ndichakwira mumuchindwe, Ndibate matavi awo; Mazamu ako ngaave samasumbu emizambiringa, Nokunhuhwira kwemhino dzako sokunhuhwira kwamaapuri," 
SongOfSongs7:9 Nomuromo wako sewaini yakaisvonaka, Inotapira mudikamwa wangu pakumwiwa kwayo, Inoyerera pamiromo yavavete." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ndini womudiwa wangu; Kuda kwake kunondivinga. 
SongOfSongs7:11 Uya mudiwa wangu, ngatibudire kusango, Ngatigare mumisha." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngatifumire kuminda yemizambiringa; Tindoona kana muzambiringa watunga; Kana maruva akura, Kana matamba atunga maruva; Ndipapo pandichakupa rudo rwangu." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Mudiwadiwa anobudisa kunhuhwira. Pamikova yedu panezvinonaka zvamarudzi ose, zvitsva nezvisharu, Zvandakakuchengetera, iwe mudiwa wangu." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Aiwa, dai wakanga wakaita sehanzvadzi yangu, Akamwa mazamu amai vangu! Dai ndakuwana panze, ndakutsvoda; Zvirokwazvo, hakuna aindishora." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ndaienda newe, ndikakuisa mumba mamai vangu Ivo vandidzidzise; Ndaikupa waini yakavhenganiswa nezvinonhuhwira kuti uimwe, Nomukumbi wamatamba angu." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Ruoko rwake rworuboshwe ngaruve pasi pomusoro wangu, Ruoko rwake rworudyi ngarundimbundikire." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndinokupikirai, imwi vakunda veJerusaremu, Kuti murege kupfutidza kana kumutsa rudo, Kusvikira irwo rwada rumene." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ndianiko uyo anokwira achibva kurenje, Akasendamira pamudiwa wake? Pasi pomuapuri ndipo pandakakumutsa; Ndipo pakakutamburira mai vako, Ndipo pavakakutamburira, ivo vakakubereka." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ndishonge sechisimbiso pamoyo pako, Sechisimbiso paruoko rwako; Nokuti rudo rune simba sorufu; Godo rinokuvadza seSheori; Kupisa kwaro ndiko kupisa komoto, Murazvo chaiwo waJehovha." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Mvura zhinji haigoni kudzima rudo; Nzizi hadzingarubitirisi; Kunyange munhu akapa fuma yose yeimba yake kuti awane rudo, Angazvidzwa chose." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tine chinun'una, Chigere kuva namazamu; Tichadiniko nechinun'una chedu Nezuva raachakumbirwa?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Kana ari rusvingo, Tichavaka pamusoro pake kashongwe kesirivheri Kana ari mukova, Tichamukomberedza namapuranga emisidhari." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ini ndaiva rusvingo, mazamu angu akaita shongwe dzarwo; Panguva iyo ndakava pamberi pake somunhu akawana rugare." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Soromoni akanga ano munda wemizambiringa paBhaarihamoni, Akaisa munda uyo kuvatariri; Mumwe nomumwe aifanira kumuvigira masirivha ane gumi ramazana pamusoro pezvibereko zvawo." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Munda wangu wemizambiringa, iwo wangu, uri pamberi pangu; Iwe Soromoni, uchapiwa gumi ramazana, Navanochengeta zvibereko zvawo vachapiwa mazana maviri." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Iwe, unogara muminda, Shamwari dzako dzinoteerera inzwi rako; Nditendere ini ndirinzwewo." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Kurumidza, mudiwa wangu, Uve semharapara kana mwana wenondo Pamusoro pamakomo ezvinonhuhwira." 
Isaiah1:1 Zvakaonekwa naIsaya, mwanakomana waAmozi, zvaakaona pamusoro paJudha neJerusaremu, pamazuva aUziya, naJotamu, naAhazi, naHezekia, madzimambo avaJudha." 
Isaiah1:2 Inzwa denga rose, teerera iwe nyika, nokuti Jehovha akataura, achiti, ""Ndakarera nokukurisa vana, asi vakandimukira." 
Isaiah1:3 Nzombe inoziva muridzi wayo, nembongoro inoziva chidyiro chavatenzi vayo; asi Isiraeri havazivi, vanhu vangu havarangariri.""" 
Isaiah1:4 Haiwa, rudzi runotadza, vanhu vakaremerwa nezvakaipa, vana vavaiti vezvakaipa, vana vanoita zvakaora! Vakasiya Jehovha, vakashora Mutsvene waIsiraeri, vadzokera shure." 
Isaiah1:5 Munoda kugara muchiroverweiko, zvamunongoramba muchimukira Jehovha? Musoro wose unorwadza, nomoyo wose waziya." 
Isaiah1:6 Kubvira parutsoka kusvikira kumusoro hapana pakukutu pauri; asi maronda, napakakuvara, namavanga matsva, haana kusvimwa, haana kuputirwa, kana kunyoroveswa namafuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Nyika yenyu yaparadzwa, maguta enyu apiswa nomoto, nyika yenyu yopedzwa navatorwa imwi muripo, yaparadzwa, sezvinoparadza vatorwa." 
Isaiah1:8 Mukunda weZiyoni wasiyiwa sedumba mumunda wemizambiringa, sechirindo mumunda wamagaka, seguta rakakombwa nehondo." 
Isaiah1:9 Dai Jehovha wehondo asina kutisiyira vakasara vashomashoma, tingadai takafanana neSodhoma, takaita seGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imwi vabati veSodhoma; teererai murayiro waMwari wedu, imwi vanhu veGomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Zvibayiro zvenyu zvizhinji zvinondibatsirei? Ndagutisa zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa zvamakondobwe, namafuta ezvipfuwo zvakakodzwa; handifadzwi neropa renzombe, kana ramakwayana, kana renhongo." 
Isaiah1:12 Kana muchiuya kuzondiona, ndianiko anoreva izvozvo pamaoko enyu, kuti mutsike mavazhe angu?" 
Isaiah1:13 Musazouyazve nezvipo zvisina maturo; zvinonhuhwira zvinondinyangadza; nguva dzokugara komwedzi nedzamaSabata, nedzokukokera ungano, handizvidi; zvakaipa, kunyange neungano tsvene." 
Isaiah1:14 Nguva dzenyu dzokugara komwedzi nemitambo yenyu zvinovengwa nomweya wangu; zvinondinetsa; ndaneta nokutambudzika nazvo. 
Isaiah1:15 Kana muchitambanudza maoko enyu, ndichakuvanzirai chiso changu; zvirokwazvo, kana muchiwanza minyengetero, handinganzwi; maoko enyu azere neropa" 
Isaiah1:16 Shambai; muzvinatse; bvisai zvakaipa zvamabasa enyu pamberi pangu; regai kuramba muchiita zvakaipa; 
Isaiah1:17 dzidzai kuita zvakanaka; tsvakai kururamisira, batsirai vanomanikidzwa, ruramisirai nherera, mureverere chirikadzi.""" 
Isaiah1:18 Chiuyai zvino, titaurirane, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; kunyange zvivi zvenyu zvikaita somucheka mutsvuku, zvichachena sechando; kunyange zviri zvishava somuti mushava, zvichaita samakushe amakwai." 
Isaiah1:19 Kana muchida, muchiteerera, muchadya zvakanaka zvenyika;" 
Isaiah1:20 asi kana muchiramba, muchindimukira, muchaparadzwa nomunondo; nokuti muromo waJehovha wakataura izvozvo.""" 
Isaiah1:21 Haiwa, guta rakatendeka rashanduka chifeve sei! Iro rakanga rizere nokururamisa! Kururama kwaigara mariri, asi zvino mogara vaurayi." 
Isaiah1:22 Sirivha yako ava marara, waini yako yakavhenganiswa nemvura." 
Isaiah1:23 Machinda ako akamukira Jehovha, ishamwari dzembavha; mumwe nomumwe anoda fufuro, anovinga mibairo; havaruramisiri nherera, mhaka yechirikadzi haitambwi navo." 
Isaiah1:24 Saka zvanzi naShe, Jehovha wehondo, iye Wamasimba wavaIsiraeri, ""Ndichapedza shungu dzangu pamusoro pavadzivisi vangu, ndichazvitsivira pamusoro pavavengi vangu;" 
Isaiah1:25 ndichatambanudza ruoko rwangu kwauri, ndinatse chose marara ako, ndichabvisa tini yako." 
Isaiah1:26 Ndichadzosera vatongi vako vave sapakutanga, namakurukota ako sapakutanga; shure kwaizvozvo uchanzi Guta rokururama, musha wakatendeka.""" 
Isaiah1:27 Ziyoni richadzikunurwa nokururamiswa, navanodzoka mariri nokururama." 
Isaiah1:28 Asi vadariki navatadzi vachaparadzwa pamwechete, vanosiya Jehovha, vachapedzwa." 
Isaiah1:29 Nokuti vachanyadziswa pamusoro pemiti yemiouki yamaifarira, muchava nenyadzi pamusoro peminda yamakasanangura." 
Isaiah1:30 Nokuti muchava somouki wasvava mashizha, uye somunda usine mvura." 
Isaiah1:31 Ane simba achava sorwonzi, nebasa rake sesasaradzi dzomoto; zvose zviviri zvichatsva pamwechete, hakuna angazvidzimura." 
Isaiah2:1 Shoko rakaonekwa naIsaya, mwa nakomana waAmozi, pamusoro paJudha neJerusaremu." 
Isaiah2:2 Pamazuva okupedzisira zvichaitika kuti gomo reimba yaJehovha richasimbiswa pamusoro pamakomo, richakwiridzwa kupfuura zvikomo; marudzi ose achamhanyira kwariri."
