Isaiah2:3 Vanhu vazhinji vachaendako vachiti, ""Uyai, ngatikwire kugomo raJehovha, kuimba yaMwari waJakobho; iye achatidzidzisa nzira dzake, tichafamba mumakwara ake;"" nokuti murayiro uchabva paZiyoni, shoko raJehovha richabva Jerusaremu." 
Isaiah2:4 Iye achatonga pakati pamarudzi, nokururamisira vanhu vazhinji; vachapfura minondo yavo vachiita mapadza, namapfumo avo vachiaita mapanga okuchekerera miti; rumwe rudzi harungazosimudziri rumwe rudzi munondo, havangazodzidzi kurwa." 
Isaiah2:5 Iwe imba yaJakobho, uyai tifambe muchiedza chaJehovha." 
Isaiah2:6 Nokuti imwi Jehovha makasiya vanhu venyu veimba yaJakobho, nokuti vazere netsika dzinobva mabvazuva, vanouka savaFirisitia, vanobatana maoko navana vavatorwa." 
Isaiah2:7 Nyika yavo izere nesirivha nendarama, fuma yavo haiperi; nyika yavo izerewo namabhiza, nengoro dzavo dzokurwa hadziperi." 
Isaiah2:8 Nyika yavo izerewo nezvifananidzo; vanonamata zvakaitwa namaoko avo, izvo zvakaitwa nemimwe yavo." 
Isaiah2:9 Vanhu vaduku vakakotamiswa, navakuru vakaninipiswa; saka musavakangamwira." 
Isaiah2:10 Pinda mudombo uvande,muguruva, nokuda kwaJehovha anotyisa, uye nokuda kokubwinya koumambo hwake." 
Isaiah2:11 Kuzvikudza kwavanhu kuchaderedzwa, namanyawi avanhu achaninipiswa, Jehovha oga achakudzwa nezuva iro." 
Isaiah2:12 Nokuti Jehovha wehondo ane zuva rake pamusoro pavose vanodada navanozvikudza, navana manyawi; vachaderedzwa;" 
Isaiah2:13 napamusoro pemisidhari yose yeRebhanoni yakareba yakakwirira; napamusoro pamiouki yose yeBhashani," 
Isaiah2:14 napamusoro pamakomo ose marefu, napamusoro pezvikomo zvose zvakakwirira," 
Isaiah2:15 napamusoro peshongwe dzose refu, napamusoro pamasvingo ose akasimbiswa," 
Isaiah2:16 napamusoro pezvikepe zvose zveTarishishi, napamusoro pezvifananidzo zvose zvinofadza." 
Isaiah2:17 Ukuru hwavanhu huchakotamiswa, nokuzvikudza kwavanhu kuchaderedzwa; Jehovha oga achakudzwa nezuva iro." 
Isaiah2:18 Zvifananidzo zvichapera chose. 
Isaiah2:19 Vanhu vachapinda mumapako amatombo, nomumakomba muvhu, nokuda kwaJehovha anotyisa, uye nokuda kokubwinya koumambo hwake, kana achisimuka kuzunungusa nyika nesimba." 
Isaiah2:20 Nezuva iro vanhu vacharasa zvifananidzo zvavo zvesirivha nezvifananidzo zvavo zvendarama, zvavakazviitira kuti vazvinamate, vachizviisa kunhuta nezviremwaremwa;" 
Isaiah2:21 vapinde mumapako amatombo, nomumikaha yamatombo makuru, nokuda kwaJehovha anotyisa, uye nokuda kokubwinya koumambo hwake, kana achisimuka kuzunungusa nyika nesimba." 
Isaiah2:22 Regai munhu, anokufema mumhino dzake; nokuti anobatsireiko?" 
Isaiah3:1 Nokuti tarirai, Ishe, Jehovha wehondo anotorera Jerusaremu naJudha mutsigiro nomudonzvo, mutsigiro wose wezvokudya, nomutsigiro wose wemvura;" 
Isaiah3:2 munhu wemhare, nomunhu wehondo; mutongi, nomuporofita, nomuvuki, nomukuru;" 
Isaiah3:3 mukuru wamakumi mashanu, nowanokudzwa, namakurukota, nemhizha dzakachenjera, nomuvuki anoziva." 
Isaiah3:4 Ndichavapa vanana ave machinda avo, vachabatwa navacheche." 
Isaiah3:5 Vanhu vachamanikidzwa, mumwe achimanikidza mumwe, nomumwe nomumwe nowokwake; mwana achava namanyawi kuna vakuru, nowakazvidzwa kunowanokudzwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Musi uyo munhu achabata munun'una wake mumba mababa vake, achiti, ""Iwe une nguvo, chiva mutongi wedu; kuparadzwa uku ngakugadzirwe noruoko rwako.""" 
Isaiah3:7 Zvino nezuva iro achadanidzira, achiti, ""Handidi kuva n'anga, nokuti mumba mangu hamune zvokudya nezvokufuka; musandiita mutongi wavanhu.""" 
Isaiah3:8 Nokuti Jerusaremu raparadzwa, Judha wawa; nokuti marimi avo namabasa avo anopesana naJehovha, kutsamwisa meso ake anokubwinya." 
Isaiah3:9 Zvinoonekwa paziso ravo zvinovapupurira; zvivi zvavo vanozvibudisa pachena seSodhoma; havazvivanzi. Mweya yavo ine nhamo, nokuti vakazviitira zvakaipa." 
Isaiah3:10 Iti pamusoro powakarurama, kuti achava nomufaro; nokuti vachadya zvibereko zvamabasa avo." 
Isaiah3:11 Wakaipa ane nhamo! Iye haangavi nomufaro, nokuti achapiwa mubayiro wamaoko ake." 
Isaiah3:12 Kana vari vanhu vangu, vana ndivo vamanikidzi vavo, vakadzi vanovabata ushe. Haiwa, vanhu vangu, vatungamiriri venyu vanokutadzisai, ndivo vanoparadza nzira dzamaifanira kufamba nadzo." 
Isaiah3:13 Jehovha asimuka kutamba mhaka; amire kuti atonge vanhu. 
Isaiah3:14 Jehovha achatonga vakuru vavanhu vake namachinda avo, achiti, ""Ndimi mapedza munda wemizambiringa; zvakapambwa zvavarombo zviri mudzimba dzenyu.""" 
Isaiah3:15 Munoiteiko zvamunopwanya vanhu vangu, muchikuya zviso zvavarombo? Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe, Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah3:16 Uyezve Jehovha akati, ""Vakunda veZiyoni zvavana manyawi, vachifamba nemitsipa yakati tasa, vachiita mesomeso, vachifamba vachinzenzeta, zviri pamakumbo avo zvichiti ngwerengwere," 
Isaiah3:17 naizvozvo Ishe acharova nhongonya dzemisoro yavakunda vaZiyoni negwenyu-kwenyu, Jehovha achafukura miviri yavo.""" 
Isaiah3:18 Nezuva iro Ishe achabvisa ukomba hwamakumbo avo, nezvizuva nezvimwedzi;" 
Isaiah3:19 nezvinoremberedzwa, noungetani hwamaoko, nezvifukidzo;" 
Isaiah3:20 nezvishongo zvomusoro, noungetani hwamakumbo, nezvisungo, nezvitende zvezvinonhuhwira, namazango;" 
Isaiah3:21 nezvimhete, noukomba bwemhino;" 
Isaiah3:22 nenguvo dzomutambo, nezvijasi, nezvijari, nezvikwama;" 
Isaiah3:23 nezviwoni-woni zvamaoko, nomucheka wakaisvonakal nemicheka yomusoro, nezvifukidzo zvameso." 
Isaiah3:24 Zvino zvichaitika kuti panzvimbo yezvinonhuhwira pachava nezvinonhuwa; panzvimbo yevhudzi rakarukwa zvakanaka, pachava nemhanza; panzvimbo yenguvo yakaisvonaka, pachava nechisimiro chegudza; nokupiswa kouranda panzvimbo yokunaka." 
Isaiah3:25 Varume venyu vachaparadzwa nomunondo, nemhare dzenyu pakurwa." 
Isaiah3:26 Masuo aro achachema nokurira; richaitwa dongo ndokugara pasi. 
Isaiah4:1 Nezuva iro vakadzi vanomwe vachabata murume mumwe, vachiti, ""Tichadya zvokudya zvedu, tichafuka zvokufuka zvedu; tinongoda kudamwa zita rako bedzi; bvisa kunyadzwa kwedu.""" 
Isaiah4:2 Nezuva iro bukira raJehovha richanaka nokubwinya, uye zvibereko zvenyika zvichava zvakaisvonaka nezvinorumbidzwa kuna vakapukunyuka valsiraeri." 
Isaiah4:3 Vakasiyiwa paZiyoni, navakasara paJerusaremu, ivo vachanzi vatsvene, ani naani akanyorwa pakati pavapenyu muJerusaremu;" 
Isaiah4:4 kana Ishe ashambidza tsvina yavakunda veZiyoni, anatsa ropa reJerusaremu achiribvisa mukati maro, nomweya wokururamisa uye nomweya wokupisa." 
Isaiah4:5 Zvino Jehovha achasvika pamusoro peimba imwe neimwe pagomo reZiyoni, napamusoro peungano dzaro, gore noutsi masikati, nokupenya komoto unopfuta usiku; nokuti pachava nechitaviridzo pamusoro pokubwinya kose." 
Isaiah4:6 Kuchavapo netende, richava mumvuri masikati kana zuva richipisa, noutiziro nechivando kana pane dutu nemvura." 
Isaiah5:1 Ngandiimbire mudiwa wangu rwiyo rwomudiwa wangu pamusoro pomunda wake wemizambiringa. Mudiwa wangu waiva nomunda wemizambiringa pachikomo chakaorera; 
Isaiah5:2 akautimba, akabvisa mabwe awo ose, akasimamo mizambiringa yakaisvonaka, akavaka shongwe mukati mawo, ndokucherawo chisviniro mukati mawo; zvino akatarira kuti ubereke mazambiringa, asi wakabereka mazambiringa ebundo." 
Isaiah5:3 Zvino imwi mugere Jerusaremu navarume vaJudha, ndinokumbira kuti motonge pakati pangu nomunda wangu wemizambiringa." 
Isaiah5:4 Chinyiko chaifanira kuitirwa munda wangu wemizambiringa chandisina kuuitira? Zvino ndichitarira kuti uchabereka mazambiringa, wakagoberekerei mazambiringa ebundo?" 
Isaiah5:5 Zvino ndichakuudzai zvandichaitira munda wangu wemizambiringa, Ndichabvisa ruzhowa rwawo, udyiwe; ndichaputsa rusvingo rwawo, utsikwe;" 
Isaiah5:6 ndichauparadza; haungarangurwi, kana kurimwa; asi uchamera mhinzwa norukato; ndicharayira makore, kuti arege kunayisa mvura pamusoro pawo." 
Isaiah5:7 Nokuti munda wemizambiringa waJehovha wehondo ndiyo imba yaIsiraeri, varume vaJudha muti wake unomufadza; zvino akatsvaka kwavari kururamisira, asi tarira, akawana kumanikidza, akatsvaka kururama, asi tarira, akawana kuchema." 
Isaiah5:8 Vane nhamo vanowedzera dzimba nedzimba, vanobatanidza minda neminda, kusvikira pasina nzvimbo, kusvikira imwi mogara muri moga panyika." 
Isaiah5:9 Jehovha wehondo anotaura munzeve dzangu, achiti, ""Zvirokwazvo, dzimba zhinji dzichava matongo, dzimba huru nedzakanaka dzichashayiwa vanogaramo." 
Isaiah5:10 Nokuti maeka ane gumi emizambiringa achabereka bati rimwechete, nehomeri rembeu richabereka efa imwechete.""" 
Isaiah5:11 Vane nhamo vanomuka mangwanani kundotsvaka doro rinobata, vanoswerera kusvikira usiku, kusvikira vapengeswa naro." 
Isaiah5:12 Rudimbwa, nembira, nengoma, nenyere, newaini zviripo pamitambo yavo; asi havana hanya nebasa raJehovha, havarangariri zvakaitwa namaoko ake." 
Isaiah5:13 Saka vanhu vangu vakatapwa nokushayiwa zivo; vakakudzwa pakati pavo vanoziya nenzara, vazhinji vavo vanofa nenyota." 
Isaiah5:14 Saka Sheori rakawedzera kukara kwaro nokushamisa muromo waro zvikuru; vakakudzwa vavo, navazhinji vavo, navanozvikudza vavo, nowanofara pakati pavo, vanoburukiramo." 
Isaiah5:15 Vanhu vaduku vakakotamiswa, navakuru vakaninipiswa, nameso avanozvikudza akaninipiswa." 
Isaiah5:16 Asi Jehovha wehondo achakudzwa pakutonga kwakarurama, naMwari iye Mutsvene achaonekwa ari mutsvene nokururama kwake." 
Isaiah5:17 Ipapo makwayana achafura saanenge ari pamafuro, awo vanodzungaira vachadya makura avafumi." 
Isaiah5:18 Vane nhamo vanokweva zvakaipa nerwodzi rwenhema, nezvivi sezvinenge namabote engoro;" 
Isaiah5:19 vanoti, ""Ngaakurumidze, ngaachimbidzike nebasa rake, kuti tizvione; zvakafungwa noMutsvene wavaIsiraeri ngazviswedere, kuti tizvizive.""" 
Isaiah5:20 Vane nhamo vanoti zvakaipa ndizvo zvakanaka, uye zvakanaka kuti ndizvo zvakaipa, vanoisa rima panzvimbo yechiedza, nechiedza panzvimbo yerima; vanoisa zvinovava panzvimbo yezvinotapira, nezvinotapira panzvimbo yezvinovava." 
Isaiah5:21 Vane nhamo vanozviti takachenjera, vanoti pakufunga kwavo tine njere." 
Isaiah5:22 Vane nhamo vakaita mhare pakumwa waini, navarume vane simba pakuvhenganisa zvinobata;" 
Isaiah5:23 vanoti akaipa haane mhosva nokuda kwefufuro, vanotorera wakarurama kururama kwake." 
Isaiah5:24 Naizvozvo murazvo womoto sezvaunopedza hundi uye uswa hwakawoma sezvahunongoperera mumurazvo, saizvozvo mudzi wavo uchaora, ruva ravo richatorwa kumusoro seguruva; nokuti vakaramba murayiro waJehovha wehondo, nokushora shoko roMutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah5:25 Saka kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira vanhu vake, akatambanudza ruoko rwake kwavari, akavarova; makomo anodedera, mitumbi yavo yafanana namarara pakati penzira dzomumusha. Kunyange zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah5:26 Achasimudzira marudzi anobva kure mureza, nokuvaridzira muridzo ivo vari kumigumo yenyika; tarirai, vachakurumidza kuuya vachichimbidzika." 
Isaiah5:27 Hapana achaneta kana kugumburwa pakati pavo; hakuna achakotsira kana kuvata; bhanhire rezviuno zvavo haringasunungurwi, rukanda rweshangu dzavo harungadambuki." 
Isaiah5:28 Miseve yavo inopinza, uta hwavo hwose hwakakungwa; mazondo amabhiza avo achaita somusara, namavhiri engoro dzavo sechamupupuri;" 
Isaiah5:29 kuomba kwavo kuchaita sokwehadzi yeshumba, vachavomba savana veshumba; zvirokwazvo vachavomba, vachabata mhuka yavo, ndokuenda nayo, hapana angairwira." 
Isaiah5:30 Nezuva iro vachavaombera sokutinhira kwegungwa; kana munhu akatarira nyika, achaona rima nokutambudzika; chiedza chichasvibiswa namakore ayo." 
Isaiah6:1 Pagore rokufa kwamambo Uziya, ndakaona Ishe agere pachigaro choushe, chirefu chakakwirira, mipendero yenguvo dzake ichizadza temberi." 
Isaiah6:2 Kumusoro kwake kwakanga kumire serafimi; imwe neimwe yakanga ina mapapiro matanhatu; namaviri yakafukidza chiso chayo, namaviri yakafukidza makumbo ayo, namaviri yakanga ichibhururuka nawo." 
Isaiah6:3 Imwe yakadanidzira kune imwe, ichiti, ""Mutsvene, mutsvene, mutsvene, iye Jehovha wehondo; nyika yose izere nokubwinya kwake.""" 
Isaiah6:4 Nheyo dzezvikumbaridzo dzikazununguka nenzwi rowakanga achidana, imba ikazadzwa noutsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Ipapo ndikati, ""Ndine nhamo! Nokuti ndoparara, nokuti ndiri munhu wemiromo yakan'ora, ndigere pakati pavanhu vemiromo yakan'ora; nokuti meso angu akaona Mambo; Jehovha wehondo.""" 
Isaiah6:6 Ipapo imwe serafimi yakabhururukira kwandiri, yakabata zimbe rinopfuta muruoko rwayo, rayakanga yatora nembato paaritari; ikagumura muromo wangu naro, ikati," 
Isaiah6:7 Tarira, zimbe iri ragumura miromo yako, zvakaipa zvako zvabviswa, zvivi zvako zvadzikunurwa.""" 
Isaiah6:8 Ipapo ndakanzwa nzwi raShe richiti, ""Ndingatuma aniko? Ndiani angatiendera?"" Ipapo ndakati, ""Ndiri pano ini, nditumei.""" 
Isaiah6:9 Iye akati, ""Enda, unondoudza vanhu ava, uti, `Rambai henyu muchinzwa, asi musanzwisisa, rambai henyu muchiona, asi musaonesesa.'" 
Isaiah6:10 Kodzai moyo yavanhu ava, remedzai nzeve dzavo, tsinzinisai meso avo, kuti varege kuona nameso avo, kana kunzwa nenzeve dzavo, kana kunzwisisa nemoyo yavo, vadzoke vapodzwe.""" 
Isaiah6:11 Zvino ndakati, ""Ishe kusvikira rinhiko?"" Akapindura, akati, ""Kusvikira maguta ava matongo, asina vanogaramo, nedzimba dzisina munhu, nenyika yaparadzwa chose," 
Isaiah6:12 kusvikira Jehovha abvisira vanhu kure, nenzvimbo, dzashanduka matongo, dzava zhinji panyika." 
Isaiah6:13 Kana kuchinge kwasara mukati mayo chegumi, naichowo chichadyiwazve; sezvakaita muterebhinti nomuouki wasiyirwa hunde kana watemwa, saizvozvo rudzi rutsvene ndiyo hunde yawo.""" 
Isaiah7:1 Zvino pamazuva aAhazi, mwanakomana waJotamu, mwanakomana waUziya, mambo waJudha, Rezini mambo weSiria, naPeka, mwanakomana waRemaria, mambo waIsiraeri, vakaenda kundorwa neJerusaremu, asi vakakoniwa kurikunda." 
Isaiah7:2 Zvino vakaudza imba yaDhavhidhi, vachiti, ""VaSiria vava pakati pavaEfuremu."" moyo wake nemoyo yavanhu vake ikazununguswa sokuzununguswa kwemiti mudondo nemhepo." 
Isaiah7:3 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Isaya, ""Enda zvino undosangana naAhazi, iwe naShearijashubhi, mwanakomana wako, panoguma rukoronga rwedziva rokumusoro, panzira huru inoenda kumunda womusuki wenguvo;" 
Isaiah7:4 undoti kwaari, `Chenjera, unyarare hako; usatya, nomoyo wako urege kupera nokuda kwamatsiga awa maviri anopfungaira, nokuda kokutsamwa kukuru kwaRezini nokwavaSiria, nokomwanakomana waRemaria.' """ 
Isaiah7:5 Nokuti vaSiria navaEfuremu, nomwanakomamwa waRemaria vakarangana kukuitira zvakaipa, vachiti," 
Isaiah7:6 Hendei tindorwa navaJudha, tivatyise, tivakunde, tigadze mambo pakati pavo, iye mwanakomana waTabheeri.""" 
Isaiah7:7 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, lzvozvi hazvingamiri, uye hazvingaitiki." 
Isaiah7:8 Nokuti musoro weSiria ndiDhamasiko, nomusoro weDhamasiko ndiRezini; makore makumi matanhatu namashanu asati apera, vaEfuremu vachaputswa-putswa, kuti varege kuva rudzi;" 
Isaiah7:9 musoro wavaEfuremu ndiSamaria, nomusoro weSamaria ndimwanakomana waRemaria. Kana musingadi kutenda, zvirokwazvo hamungasimbiswi.' """ 
Isaiah7:10 Zvino Jehovha akataurazve naAhazi, achiti," 
Isaiah7:11 Kumbira chiratidzo kuna Jehovha Mwari wako; uchikumbire kunyange pasi pakadzika, kana kumusoro kwakakwirira.""" 
Isaiah7:12 Asi Ahazi akati, ""Handingakumbiri, uye handingaedze Jehovha.""" 
Isaiah7:13 Akati, ""Chinzwai zvino, imwi imba yaDhavhidhi, chinhu chiduku kwamuri kuti munetse vanhu zvino modokunetsa Mwari wanguvo here?" 
Isaiah7:14 Naizvozvo Ishe amene achakupai chiratidzo. Tarirai, mhandara ichava napamuviri, ichabereka mwanakomana, ichamutumidza Imanueri." 
Isaiah7:15 Achadya ruomba nouchi, panguva yaanoziva kuramba zvakaipa, nokusanangura zvakanaka." 
Isaiah7:16 Nokuti mwana asati aziva kuramba zvakaipa nokusanangura zvakanaka, nyika iyo yaunotya madzimambo ayo maviri, ichashanduka dongo." 
Isaiah7:17 Jehovha achauyisa pamusoro pako, napamusoro pavanhu vako, napamusoro peimba yababa vako, mazuva asina kumbovapo, kubvira pazuva rakaparadzana vaEfuremu navaJudha ndiye mambo weAsiria.""" 
Isaiah7:18 Zvino nezuva iro Jehovha acharidzira muridzo nhunzi dziri pamigumo yenzizi dzeIjipiti, nenyuchi dziri panyika yeAsiria." 
Isaiah7:19 Dzichauya, dzichamhara dzose mumipata ina mawere, nomumikaha yamatombo, napamusoro pemhinzwa yose, napamusoro pamafuro ose." 
Isaiah7:20 Nezuva iro Ishe achaveura nechisvo chakakumbirwa mhiri koRwizi, iye mambo weAsiria, musoro nemvere dzamakumbo; chichabvisawo ndebvu." 
Isaiah7:21 Zvino nezuva iro munhu achapfuwa mhou imwe duku namakwai maviri; 
Isaiah7:22 zvino nokuda komukaka muzhinji wadzichamupa, achadya ruomba; nokuti mumwe nomumwe akasiyiwa panyika iyo achadya ruomba nouchi." 
Isaiah7:23 Zvino nezuva iro nzvimbo imwe neimwe paiva nemiti yemizambiringa ine chiuru chimwe, yaitengwa namasirivha ane chiuru chimwe, ichava norukato nemhinzwa." 
Isaiah7:24 Vachaendako nemiseve nouta, nokuti nyika yose ichamera rukato nemhinzwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Hakuna angasvika pazvikomo zvose zvairimwa namapadza nokutya rukato nemhinzwa; asi mombe dzichasundirwako, namakwai achatsikapo." 
Isaiah8:1 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri,""Tora bwendefa guru, unyore pariri nepeni yavanhu, uti, `Chimbidzikai kutapa, zvakapambwa zvokurumbidza.' """ 
Isaiah8:2 Ndichatora zvapupu zvakatendeka, zvinoti: Uriya muprista, naZekariya mwanakomana waJebherekia." 
Isaiah8:3 Ipapo ndakaenda kumuporofitakadzi, iye akatora pamuviri, akabereka mwanakomana. Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri ""Mutumidze zita rokuti, `Chimbidzikai kutapa, zvakapambwa zvokurumbidza.'" 
Isaiah8:4 Nokuti mwana asati aziva kuti, baba vangu, kana mai vangu, fuma yeDhamasiko nezvakapambwa zveSamaria zvichaiswa pamberi pamambo weAsiria.""" 
Isaiah8:5 Zvino Jehovha akataurazve kwandiri, achiti," 
Isaiah8:6 Vanhu ava zvavakaramba mvura yeShiroa, inonyatsa kuyerera, vachifarira Rezini nomwanakomana waRemaria;" 
Isaiah8:7 saka zvino, tarira, Ishe achauyisa pamusoro pavo mvura zhinji yoRwizi, ine simba yakawanda, iye mambo weAsiria nokubwinya kwake kose; ruchabuda kuhova dzarwo dzose, nokudarika nhivi dzarwo dzose;" 
Isaiah8:8 ruchakukura kusvikira kwaJudha; ruchapa fuma, ndokupfuura, ruchasvika pamutsipa; kutandavara kwamapapiro arwo kuchazadza kufara kwenyika yako yose, iwe Imanueri.""" 
Isaiah8:9 Itai bope, imwi ndudzi, muputsweputswe; nemwi mose muri kunyika dziri kure, inzwai; zvisungei zviuno, muputswe-putswe, zvisungei zviuno, muputswe-putswe." 
Isaiah8:10 Ranganai henyu, asi zvichakona; taurai shoko, asi haringamiri; nokuti Mwari anesu." 
Isaiah8:11 Nokuti Jehovha akataura saizvozvo neni noruoko rune simba, akandirayira kuti ndirege kufamba nenzira yavanhu ava, achiti," 
Isaiah8:12 Musati, ""Irangano, pamusoro pezvose zvinonzi navanhu ava, irangano; uye musatya zvavanotya, kana kuvhunduka." 
Isaiah8:13 Jehovha wehondo, ndiye wamunofanira kuti mutsvene; mumutye iye, mumuvhunduke iye." 
Isaiah8:14 Ipapo iye achava nzvimbo tsvene yenyu; asi achava ibwe rokugumbusa nedombo rokupinganidza kudzimba dzose mbiri dzaIsiraeri, ave rugombe nomusungo kuna vanogara Jerusaremu.""" 
Isaiah8:15 Vazhinji vavo vachagumburwa naro, vachawa, nokuputswa, nokuteyiwa, nokubatwa." 
Isaiah8:16 Sunga chipupuriro, namatidza murayiro nechisimbiso pakati pavadzidzi vangu." 
Isaiah8:17 Ndichamirira Jehovha, anovanzira imba yaJakobho chiso chake, ndichamutsvaka." 
Isaiah8:18 Tarirai, ini navana vandakapiwa naJehovha, tiri zviratidzo nezvishamiso pakati paIsiraeri zvaJehovha wehondo, agere mugomo reZiyoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Zvino kana vachiti kwamuri, bvunzai masvikiro navavuki, vanorira nokuita zevezeve:"" Ko vanhu havafaniri kubvunza Mwari wavo here? Ko vanofanira kubvunza vakafa pamusoro pavapenyu here?" 
Isaiah8:20 Dzokerai kumurayiro nokuzvipupuriro! Kana vasingatauri sezvinoreva shoko iri, havangavi nechiedza chamangwanani." 
Isaiah8:21 Vachafamba nenyika vakamanikidzwa kwazvo, vane nzara; zvino kana vane nzara, vachava neshungu, vachatuka mambo wavo naMwari wavo, vachitarira kudenga." 
Isaiah8:22 Vachatarirawo pasi, asi tarirai, vachaona njodzi nerima, nokusviba kokumanikidzwa; vachadzingirwa kurima guru." 
Isaiah9:1 Asi iye, aiva pakumanikidzwa, haangazovi nerima. Panguva yokutanga wakaninipisa nyika yeZebhuruni nenyika yeNafutari, asi panguva yazvino akaikudza, kurutivi rwegungwa, mhiri kwaJorodhani, Gariria ravahedheni." 
Isaiah9:2 Vanhu vaifamba murima vakaona chiedza chikuru; vaigara munyika yomumvuri worufu, vakapenyerwa chiedza." 
Isaiah9:3 Makawanza rudzi, makawedzera mufaro wavo; vanofara pamberi penyu, sokufara kwavanhu panguva yokukohwa, sokufara kwavanhu kana vachigoverana zvakapambwa." 
Isaiah9:4 Nokuti makavhuna joko raivaremedza, netsvimbo yairova mafudzi avo, neshamhu yavaivamanikidza, sapamazuva avaMidhiani." 
Isaiah9:5 Nokuti shangu imwe neimwe yomurwi, yakatsika nokutinhira, nenguvo yakanyikwa muropa, zvichapiswa, zvichava sehuni dzomoto." 
Isaiah9:6 Nokuti takazvarirwa Mwana, takapiwa Mwanakomana; umambo huchava pafudzi rake; zita rake richanzi, ""Anoshamisa, Gota, Mwari ane simba, Baba vokusingaperi, Muchinda worugare.""" 
Isaiah9:7 Kukura koumambo hwake nokorugare hazvina mugumo, agare pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi napaushe hwake, ahusimbise ahutsigire nokururamisira nokururama kubva zvino kusvikira panguva isingaperi. Kushingaira kwaJehovha wehondo kuchazviita." 
Isaiah9:8 Jehovha akatuma shoko kuna Jakobho, rakaburukira pamusoro pavaIsiraeri." 
Isaiah9:9 Vanhu vose vachaziva, ivo vaEfuremu navagere Samaria, ivo vanoti namanyawi avo nokuzvikudza kwemoyo yavo," 
Isaiah9:10 Zvitinha zvawa, asi tichavaka namabwe akavezwa; mionde yatemwa, asi tichaisa misidhari panzvimbo yayo.""" 
Isaiah9:11 Naizvozvo Jehovha achavamutsira vadzivisi vaRezini, achasanganisa vavengi vake;" 
Isaiah9:12 vaSiria pamberi, navaFirisitia mushure, vachapedza Isiraeri nomuromo wakashama. Kunyange zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah9:13 Asi vanhu havana kutendeukira kuna iye akavarova, havana kutsvaka Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah9:14 Saka Jehovha achagura vaIsiraeri musoro nomuswe, davi romuchindwe nenhokwe, nomusi mumwe." 
Isaiah9:15 Mukuru nowanokudzwa ndiwo musoro; muporofita, anodzidzisa nhema, ndiwo muswe." 
Isaiah9:16 Nokuti vatungamiriri vavanhu ava vanovatsaukisa; vanotungamirirwa navo vanoparadzwa. 
Isaiah9:17 Naizvozvo Ishe haangafariri majaya avo, haangavi netsitsi nenherera nechirikadzi dzavo; nokuti mumwe nomumwe wavo mumhuri waMwari nomuiti wezvakaipa, muromo mumwe nomumwe unotaura zvohupenzi. Kunyange zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah9:18 Nokuti zvakaipa zvinopfuta somoto; unopedza rukato nemhinzwa; zvirokwazvo unopisa matenhere edondo, zvichikwira kudenga iri shongwe youtsi." 
Isaiah9:19 Nyika inotsva nokuda kokutsamwa kwaJehovha wehondo; vanhu vakaita sehuni dzinoveswa; hakuna munhu une nyasha nehama yake. 
Isaiah9:20 Mumwe achabvuta kurudyi, asi achava nenzara; achadya kuruboshwe, asi havangaguti; mumwe nomumwe achadya nyama yoruoko rwake." 
Isaiah9:21 VaManase vachadya vaEfuremu, navaEfuremu vaManase; ivo pamwechete vachamukira vaJudha. Kunyange zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah10:1 Vane nhamo vanotema mitemo isina kururama, navanyori vanonyora zvisakarurama;" 
Isaiah10:2 kuti vadzivise varombo pakururamisirwa, nokutorera varombo vavanhu vangu zvavanofanira kuva nazvo, kuti vapambe chirikadzi, vatorere nherera zvinhu zvavo." 
Isaiah10:3 Asi muchaiteiko pazuva rokutongwa, nerokuparadzwa kuchabva kure? Muchatizira kuna ani kundobatsirwa? fuma yenyu muchaivigepiko?" 
Isaiah10:4 Vachangokotama havo pakati pavasungwa, vachawira pasi pakati pavakaurawa. Kunyange zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake rwakaramba rwakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah10:5 Nhaiwe Asiria, shamhu yokutsamwa kwangu, wakabata muruoko rwake tsvimbo yeshungu dzangu!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ndichamutuma kundorwa norudzi runomhura Mwari, ndichamurayira kundorwa navanhu vandinotsamwira, kuti andotora zvakapambwa, andotora zvakatapwa, azvitsikire pasi sedope riri munzira dzomumusha." 
Isaiah10:7 Asi iye haafungi kuita izvozvo, nomoyo wake haarangariri zvakadaro; asi iye anorangarira kuparadza nokupedza marudzi mazhinji." 
Isaiah10:8 Nokuti iye anoti, ""Ko machinda angu ose haazi madzimambo here?" 
Isaiah10:9 Ko Karino harina kuitirwa zvakaitirwa Karikemishi here? NeHamati seAripadhi here? NeSamaria seDhamasiko here? 
Isaiah10:10 Ruoko rwangu sezvarwakasvikira ushe bwezvifananidzo, kunyange zvifananidzo zvavo zvakavezwa zvakanga zvichipfuura zvapaJerusaremu neSamaria," 
Isaiah10:11 handingaitiri Jerusaremu nezvifananidzo zvaro sezvandakaitira Samaria nezvifananidzo zvaro here? 
Isaiah10:12 Saka zvino kana Ishe apedza basa rake rose pagomo reZiyoni napaJerusaremu, ndicharova zvibereko zvomoyo unozvikudza wamambo weAsiria, namanyawi okuzvikudza kwake." 
Isaiah10:13 Nokuti akati, ""Ndakazviita nesimba roruoko rwangu, uye nouchenjeri hwangu, nokuti ndine njere; ndakabvisa miganho yavanhu, ndakapamba fuma yavo; semhare ndakawisira pasi vaigara pazvigaro zvoushe;" 
Isaiah10:14 ruoko rwangu rwakawana fuma yamarudzi avanhu sedendere; ndakaunganidza nyika yose, somunhu anounganidza mazai akasiyiwa; hapana akapfakanyisa bapiro, kana kushamisa muromo, kana kurira.""" 
Isaiah10:15 Ko sanhu ringazvirumbidza pamusoro poanotema naro here? Kana jeko ringazvikudza pamusoro paanobata naro here? Zvaifanana netsvimbo inozunungusa vanorova nayo, kana mudonzvo unosimudza chinhu chisati chiri huni." 
Isaiah10:16 Naizvozvo Ishe, Ishe wehondo, achatuma kuonda pakati pavakakora vake; pasi pokubwinya kwake pachabatidzwa chinopisa chakafanana nokupisa komoto." 
Isaiah10:17 Chiedza chavaIsiraeri chichava moto, noMutsvene wake murazvo womoto; uchapisa nokupedza mhinzwa yake norukato rwake nezuva rimwe." 
Isaiah10:18 Uchapedza kubwinya kwedondo rake, nokomunda wake wakaorera, mweya nomuviri kamwe, zvifanane nendonda inongoramba ichipera simba." 
Isaiah10:19 Miti yakasara yedondo rake ichava mishoma, inganyorwa nomwana." 
Isaiah10:20 Zvino nezuva iro vakasara vaIsiraeri, navanenge vapukunyuka paimba yaJakobho, havangazosendamiri kunowakavarova, asi vachasendamira kuna Jehovha, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, nezvokwadi." 
Isaiah10:21 Vakasara vachadzoka, ivo vakasara vaJakobho, kuna Mwari ane simba." 
Isaiah10:22 Nokuti kunyange vanhu venyu, imwi Isiraeri, vakaita sejecha regungwa, vakasara vavo voga vachadzoka; nokuti vakatemerwa kuparadzwa kuzere nokururama." 
Isaiah10:23 Nokuti Ishe, Jehovha wehondo, achapedzisa kuparadza, kwakagara kwatemwa, panyika yose." 
Isaiah10:24 Saka zvanzi nashe, Jehovha wehondo, ""Imi vanhu vangu vagere Ziyoni, musatya muAsiria, kunyange akakurovai neshamhu nokukusimudzirai tsvimbo yake, sezvaakaitira Ijipiti." 
Isaiah10:25 Nokuti kwasara chinguva chiduku, kutsamwa kwangu kuchapera, hasha dzangu dzichavaparadza." 
Isaiah10:26 Jehovha wehondo achamusimudzira tyava, sapakurohwa kwavaMidhiani padombo reOrebhi; shamhu yake ichava pamusoro pegungwa, achaisimudza sezvaakaitira Ijipiti." 
Isaiah10:27 Zvino nezuva iro mutoro wake uchabviswa pamafudzi ako, nejoko rake pamutsipa wako, joko richaparadzwa nokuda kwamafuta.""" 
Isaiah10:28 Asvika paAiati, apfuura napaMigironi, achengeta nhumbi dzake paMikimashi;" 
Isaiah10:29 vakwira napamupata, vakavata paGebha usiku; Rama rinodedera, Gibhiya raSauro ratiza." 
Isaiah10:30 Danidzira nenzwi rako, iwe mukunda weGarimi! Teerera, iwe Raishi! Iwe Anatoti wourombo!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madhimena wotiza, vagere Ghebhimi vorongedza kutiza." 
Isaiah10:32 Zuva ranhasi achazorota paNobhi; anozunungusira gomo romukunda weZiyoni, icho chikomo cheJerusaremu, ruoko rwake." 
Isaiah10:33 Tarirai, Ishe, Jehovha wehondo, achatema mashizha nokutyisa; akareba achatemwa, naakakwirira achawiswa pasi." 
Isaiah10:34 Achatema nedare matenhere edondo, Rebhanoni richawiswa neane simba." 
Isaiah11:1 Zvino pahunde yaJese pachabuda bukira, davi, rinobuda pamidzi yake, richabereka zvibereko." 
Isaiah11:2 Mweya waJehovha uchagara pamusoro pake, mweya wenjere nowokungwara, mweya wamano nesimba, mweya wokuziva nokutya Jehovha." 
Isaiah11:3 Mufaro wake uchava pakutya Jehovha; haangatongi nokungoona nameso bedzi, kana kupa mhosva nokungonzwa nenzeve dzake bedzi;" 
Isaiah11:4 asi achatongera varombo nokururama, achatambira vanyoro venyika mhaka dzavo zvakarurama; acharova nyika neshamhu yomuromo wake, achavauraya vakaipa nomweya wemiromo yake." 
Isaiah11:5 Kururama richava bhanhire rechiuno chake, kutendeka richava bhanhire rezvidzva zvake." 
Isaiah11:6 Bere richagara negwayana, ingwe ichavata pasi nembudzana, nemhuru nomwana weshumba nechipfuwo chakakora pamwechete; uye mwana muduku achadzitungamirira." 
Isaiah11:7 Mhou nebere zvichafura; vana vadzo vachavata pamwechete; shumba ichadya uswa senzombe. 
Isaiah11:8 Mwana anomwa, achatamba pamwena wenyoka, uye mwana akarumurwa achapinza ruoko rwake mubako remvumbi." 
Isaiah11:9 Hazvingakuvadzi kana kuparadza pagomo rangu rose dzvene, nokuti nyika yose ichazara nokuziva Jehovha, sezvinofukidza mvura pasi pegungwa." 
Isaiah11:10 Nezuva iro mudzi waJese, iwo umirepo somureza wavanhu, uchatsvakwa namarudzi avanhu; nzvimbo yake yokuzorora ichava nembiri." 
Isaiah11:11 Zvino nezuva iro Ishe achatambanudzazve ruoko rwake kechipiri kuti adzikunure vakasara vavanhu vake, ivo vanenge vasara, vari paAsiria, nePatirosi, neKushi, neErami, neShinari, neHamati, nokuzvitsuwa zvegungwa." 
Isaiah11:12 Achasimudzira marudzi mureza, nokuunganidza vadzingwa vaIsiraeri, nokuunganidza VaJudha vakaparadzirwa kumativi mana enyika." 
Isaiah11:13 Ipapo godo ravaEfuremu richapera, navanomanikidza vaJudha vachaparadzwa; vaEfuremu havangagodori vaJudha, navaJudha havangamanikidzi vaEfuremu." 
Isaiah11:14 Asi vachabhururukira pamusoro pamafudzi avaFirisitia kumavirazuva, vachapambara pamwechete vana vamabvazuva; vachatambanudzira maoko avo kuvaEdhomu navaMoabhi, navana vaAmoni vachavateerera." 
Isaiah11:15 Jehovha achaparadza chose muromo wegungwa reIjipiti, achasimudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro poRwizi nemhepo yake inopisa, ndokururova ruite hova nomwe, ayambuse vanhu vakafuka shangu." 
Isaiah11:16 Vanhu vake vakasara, vakasara Asiria, vachava nenzira huru; sezvazvakaitirwa Isiraeri nezuva ravakabuda munyika yeIjipiti." 
Isaiah12:1 Nezuva iro uchati, ""Ndinokuvongai Jehovha; makanga makanditsamwira, asi kutsamwa kwenyu kwakadzorwa, munondinyaradza." 
Isaiah12:2 Tarirai, Mwari ndiye ruponeso rwangu; ndichavimba naye, handingatyi; nokuti Jehovha, iye Jehovha, ndiye simba rangu norwiyo rwangu; iye wava ruponeso rwangu.""" 
Isaiah12:3 Saka muchachera mvura nomufaro pamatsime oruponeso. 
Isaiah12:4 Zvino nezuva iro muchati, ""Vongai Jehovha, paridzai zita rake, zivisai mabasa ake pakati pavanhu, muudze vanhu kuti zita rake rinokudziwa." 
Isaiah12:5 Imbirai Jehovha; nokuti akaita zvinhu zvakaisvonaka-naka; izvi ngazvizikamwe panyika yose. 
Isaiah12:6 Danidzira upururudze, iwe ugere paZiyoni; nokuti Mutsvene waIsiraeri mukuru pakati penyu.""" 
Isaiah13:1 ,Chirevo chaMwari pamusoro peBhabhironi, chakaonekwa naIsaya, mwanakomana waAmozi." 
Isaiah13:2 Simudzai mureza pagomo risina miti; danidzirai kwavari, ninirai noruoko, kuti vapinde pamasuo avakuru." 
Isaiah13:3 Ndakaraira vatsvene vangu, ndakadana mhare dzangu nokuda kokutsamwa kwangu, ivo varume vangu vanofara vachizvikudza." 
Isaiah13:4 Inzwai kutinhira pamakomo, kwakaita sokwavanhu vazhinji Kutinhira kweungano dzoushe kwamarudzi akaungana pamwechete! Jehovha wehondo wogadzira hondo kundorwa." 
Isaiah13:5 Vanobva kunyika iri kure, kumugumo wedenga, iye Jehovha nenhumbi dzake dzokurwa dzeshungu dzake, kuti aparadze nyika yose." 
Isaiah13:6 Chemai, nokuti zuva raJehovha riri pedo; rinosvika sokuparadza kunobva kuna waMasimbaose." 
Isaiah13:7 Saka maoko ose achashayiwa simba, nomoyo mumwe nomumwe wavanhu uchanyauka;" 
Isaiah13:8 vachavhunduka; vachabatwa nokurwadziwa namatambudziko; vacharwadziwa somukadzi anosununguka; vachatarisana vachashamiswa; zviso zvavo zvichafanana nezviso zvomoto. 
Isaiah13:9 Tarirai, zuva raJehovha rinouya, rinotyisa, rine hasha nokutsamwa kukuru, kuti ashandure nyika iite dongo, nokuparadza vatadzi vayo vabvemo." 
Isaiah13:10 Nokuti nyeredzi dzokudenga, namapoka adzo, hadzingaratidzi chiedza chadzo; zuva richasvibiswa pakubuda kwaro, uye mwedzi haungavhenekeri nechiedza chawo." 
Isaiah13:11 Ndicharova nyika nokuda kokushata kwayo, navakaipa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo; ndichagumisa manyawi avanozvikudza, nokuwisira pasi kudada kwavanotyisa." 
Isaiah13:12 Vanhu ndichavaita vashoma kupfuura ndarama yakaisvonaka, iye munhu kupfuura ndarama tsvene yeOfiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Saka ndichadederesa denga, nyika ichazununguswa ibve panzvimbo yayo, nehasha dzaJehovha wehondo, napazuva rokutsamwa kwake kukuru." 
Isaiah13:14 Zvino semhara inovhimwa, uye sezvipfuwo zvisina unozviunganidza, saizvozvo munhu mumwe nomumwe achadzokera kurudzi rwake, mumwe nomumwe achatizira kunyika yake." 
Isaiah13:15 Mumwe nomumwe anowanikwa, achabayiwa; mumwe nomumwe anobatwa, achaurawa nomunondo." 
Isaiah13:16 Vacheche vavo vacharoverwa pasi pamberi pavo, dzimba dzavo dzichapambwa, vakadzi vavo vachachinyiwa.," 
Isaiah13:17 Tarirai, ndichavamutsira vaMedhia, vasingarangariri sirivha, kunyange ndarama havaifariri." 
Isaiah13:18 Uta hwavo huchawisira pasi majaya avo, havangavi netsitsi nezvibereko zvechizvaro; ziso ravo haringadariki vana." 
Isaiah13:19 Zvino Bhabhironi, rine mbiri paushe hwose, raizvikudza vaKaradhea pamusoro pokunaka kwaro, richaita sapanguva yakaparadza Mwari Sodhoma neGomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Haringatongogarwi navanhu, hakuna vangatongogaramo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi; kunyange nomuArabhia haangadziki tende rakemo, navafudzi havangavatisi mapoka avopo." 
Isaiah13:21 Asi zvikara zvomusango zvichavatamo; dzimba dzavo dzichazara nezvinorira; mhou dzichagaramo, nemweya yakaipa ichatambapo." 
Isaiah13:22 Mapere acharira munhare dzavo, namakava mudzimba dzamadzimambo dzaifadza; nguva yaro yaswedera pedo, mazuva aro haangawedzerwi." 
Isaiah14:1 Nokuti Jehovha achanzwira Jakobho tsitsi, achasanangura Isaraeri nokuvagadza munyika yavo; mutorwa achandogara navo, vachanamatira imba yaJakobho." 
Isaiah14:2 Marudzi achavatora, nokuvaisa kunzvimbo yavo; imba yavaIsiraeri ichavabata panyika yaJehovha vave varanda navashandiri vavo; vachatapa ivo vaiva vatapi vavo, vachabata ivo vaivamanikidza." 
Isaiah14:3 Zvino nezuva iro kana Jehovha achikuzorodza pakuchema kwako napakutambudzika kwako, napakubata kwako kunorema kwawakabatiswa nako," 
Isaiah14:4 uchaimba rwiyo urwu pamusoro pamambo weBhabhironi, uchiti, ""Haiwa mumanikidzi wapera sei! Kutambudzika kwapera sei!" 
Isaiah14:5 Jehovha avhuna mudonzvo wowakaipa, netsvimbo youshe yavabati." 
Isaiah14:6 Iye airova marudzi avanhu nehasha nokurova kusingaperi, aibata ndudzi dzavanhu nokutambudza kusina kudzorwa nomunhu." 
Isaiah14:7 Nyika yose yozorora, yanyarara; vanofara nokuimba." 
Isaiah14:8 Zvirokwazvo miti yemisipiresi inofara nokuda kwako, nemisidhari yeRebhanoni, ichiti, `Chinguva chawaparadzwa, hapano mutemi anokwira kutitema.'" 
Isaiah14:9 Sheori pasi rine nyongano pamusoro pako kuzosangana newe pakuuya kwako; rinokumutsira vakafa, ivo vose vaiva vakuru panyika; ramutsa madzimambo ose amarudzi avanhu pazvigaro zvavo zvoushe." 
Isaiah14:10 Ivo vose vachapindura, vachiti kwauri, `Newe wava usina simba sesu kanhi? Iwe wafanana nesu kanhi?'" 
Isaiah14:11 Kuzvikudza kwako kwaderedzwa kusvikira paSheori, nokurira koudimbwa hwako; honye dziri pasi pako, nehonye dzinokufukidza." 
Isaiah14:12 Haiwa, wawa seiko uchibva kudenga, iwe nyamasase, iwe mwanakomana wamambakwedza! Wakandwa seiko pasi, iwe wokuwisira marudzi pasi!" 
Isaiah14:13 Iwe wakati mumoyo mako, `Ndichakwira kudenga, ndichakwiridza chigaro changu choushe kumusoro kwenyeredzi dzaMwari; ndichagara pamusoro pegomo reungano, pamigumo yamativi okumusoro;" 
Isaiah14:14 ndichakwira kumusoro kwamakore, ndichazvienzanisa noWokumusoro-soro.'" 
Isaiah14:15 Kunyange zvakadaro uchaderedzwa kusvikira paSheori, kusvikira pakadzika pegomba." 
Isaiah14:16 Vanokuona vachakucherekedza, vachakutarira, vachiti, `Ko uyu ndiye munhu aidederesa nyika, aizunungusa ushe;" 
Isaiah14:17 aishandura nyika ifanane nerenje, aiparadza maguta ayo, airamba kusunungura vasungwa vake vaende kumusha here?'" 
Isaiah14:18 Madzimambo ose amarudzi, iwo ose, anovata achikudzwa, mumwe nomumwe paimba yake." 
Isaiah14:19 Asi iwe waraswa kure nobwiro hwako, sedavi rinonyangadza, wafukidzwa navakaurawa, vakabayiwa nomunondo, vanoburukira kumabwe egomba, somutumbi watsikwa netsoka." 
Isaiah14:20 Haungavigwi pamwechete navo, nokuti wakaparadza nyika yako, vakauraya vanhu vako; vana vavakaipa havangarehwi nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah14:21 Gadzirirai vana vake pavangaurawa nokuda kokushata kwamadzibaba avo; varege kuzomuka, vagare nhaka yenyika, vazadze pasi pose namaguta.""" 
Isaiah14:22 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ""Ndichavamukira, ndichatorera Bhabhironi zita navakasara, navana, navana vavana, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndichariita nzvimbo inogarwa nenungu, uye madziva emvura; ndicharitsvaira nomutsvairo wokuparadza, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo.""" 
Isaiah14:24 Jehovha wehondo akapika, achiti, ""Zvirokwazvo, sezvandakafunga, ndizvo zvichaitika; sezvandakarangarira, zvichamira saizvozvo." 
Isaiah14:25 Kuti ndichavhuna muAsiria munyika yangu, ndichamutsika netsoka dzangu pamakomo angu; nenguva iyo joko rake richabva kwavari, nomutoro wake uchabva pamafudzi avo.""" 
Isaiah14:26 Ndicho chirevo chakatemerwa nyika yose; ndirwo ruoko rwakatambanudzwa pamusoro pamarudzi ose. 
Isaiah14:27 Nokuti Jehovha wehondo wakatema chirevo, ndiani angapindurazve? Ruoko rwake rwakatambanudzwa, ndiani angarudzosa." 
Isaiah14:28 Negore rokufa kwamambo Ahazi chirevo ichi chakarehwa," 
Isaiah14:29 Iwe nyika yeFirisitia, iwe nyika yose, usafara zvako nokuti shamhu yakanga yakurova yavhunika; nokuti pamudzi wenyoka pachabuda mvumbi, chibereko chayo chichava nyoka yomoto inoburuka." 
Isaiah14:30 Matangwe avarombo achadya, navanoshayiwa vachavata pasi vakafara; ndichauraya mudzi wako nenzara, vakasara vako vachaurawa." 
Isaiah14:31 Chema, iwe suo; danidzira, iwe guta; wanyauka, iwe nyika yeFirisitia, iwe nyika yose; nokuti kurutivi rwokumusoro kunobva utsi, hapana anotiza pahondo dzake.""" 
Isaiah14:32 Zvino nhume dzorudzi urwu vachadzipindurei? Kuti, ""Jehovha akavamba Ziyoni, vanotambudzika navanhu vake vachavandiramo.""" 
Isaiah15:1 Nokuti usiku Ari reMoabhi rakai twa dongo, rakaparadzwa; nokuti usiku Kiri reMoabhi rakaitwa dongo, rakaparadzwa." 
Isaiah15:2 Vakwira Bhayiti, neDhibhoni, kumatunhu akakwirira, kundochemapo; vaMoabhi vanochema pamusoro peNebho napaMedhebha; misoro yavo yose ine mhanza, ndebvu dzose dzakaveurwa." 
Isaiah15:3 Panzira dzomumisha yavo vakazvisunga namakudza, pamusoro pedzimba dzavo, napamadare avo, mumwe nomumwe anowungudza achichema zvikuru." 
Isaiah15:4 Heshibhoni rinodanidzira, neEreari; inzwi ravo rinonzwika kusvikira paJahazi; saka varwi vaMoabhi vanodanidzira zvikuru; mweya wavo unodedera mukati mavo." 
Isaiah15:5 moyo wangu unodanidzira pamusoro paMoabhi; vakuru vavo vanotizira Zoari, neEgiratisherishiya; nokuti vanokwira mukwidzwa waRuhiti vachichema; nokuti panzira inoenda Horonaimi vanochema nokuchema kokuparadzwa." 
Isaiah15:6 Nokuti mvura yeNimirimi ichaparadzwa; nokuti uswa hwawoma, bumhudza rapera, hapachina chinomera chitema." 
Isaiah15:7 Saka zvizhinji zvavakawana, nezvavakachengeta, vachayambuka nazvo parukova rwemikonachando." 
Isaiah15:8 Nokuti kuchema kwapotereka kunyika yose yaMoabhi; kuungudza kwake kusvikira paEgiraimi, nokuungudza kwake kusvikira paBheerierimi." 
Isaiah15:9 Nokuti mvura yeDhimoni izere neropa; nokuti ndichawedzera kurova Dhimoni, ndichatuma shumba iparadze vakapukunyuka vaMoabhi, navakasara panyika." 
Isaiah16:1 Tumirai mubati wenyika makwayana, abve Sera aende kurenje, kugomo romukunda weZiyoni." 
Isaiah16:2 Nokuti seshiri dzinodzungaira, sedendere rakaparadzirwa, ndizvo zvichaita vakunda vaMoabhi pamazambuko aArinoni." 
Isaiah16:3 Itai mano, ruramisira; mumvuri wako uuite sousiku pakati pamasikati makuru; vanza vadzingwa, usapandukira anotiza." 
Isaiah16:4 Vanhu vangu vakadzingwa ngavagare newe; kana ari Moabhi, uve kwaari paangavanda pamberi pomuparadzi; nokuti mutambudzi haachipo, kuparadza kwapera, vamanikidzi vabva panyika." 
Isaiah16:5 Chigaro choushe chichamiswa netsitsi; mumwe uchagara pamusoro pacho nechokwadi, mutende raDhavhidhi, achitonga, achitsvaka kururamisira vanhu, achikurumidza kuita zvakarurama.""" 
Isaiah16:6 Takanzwa zvokuzvikudza kwaMoabhi, kuti unozvikudza kwazvo; zvamanyawi ake, nokuzvikudza kwake, nehasha dzake; asi kuzvirumbidza kwake hakuna maturo." 
Isaiah16:7 Saka Moabhi achachema Moabhi, mumwe nomumwe achachema; muchachemera mapundu amazambiringa eKirihareseti, mamanikidzwa kwazvo." 
Isaiah16:8 Nokuti minda yeHeshibhoni yaoma, nomuzambiringa weSibhima; madzishe amarudzi avhuna matavi awo akanaka, akanga achisvikira Jazeri, akanga atandira kurenje; matavi awo akanga atandavara, ayambukira gungwa." 
Isaiah16:9 Saka ndichachema nokuchema kwaJazeri ndichichemera muzambiringa weSibhima; ndichakudiridza iwe Heshibhoni neEreare nemisodzi yangu; nokuti mhere yokurwa yawira pamusoro pezvibereko zvako zvemunakamwe napamusoro pokukohwa kwako. 
Isaiah16:10 Mufaro wabviswa, nokufara pamunda waibereka zvakanaka; paminda yemizambiringa hapachazovi nokuimba kana inzwi romufaro; hapachazovi musviniri anosvinira mazambiringa pazvisviniro, ndagumisa kupururudza." 
Isaiah16:11 Naizvozvo moyo wangu unorira sembira pamusoro paMoabhi, nedumbu rangu pamusoro peKiriheresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Zvino kana Moabhi achizviratidza pamberi paJehovha, kana achizvinetsa padunhu rakakwirira, nokupinda panzvimbo yake tsvene kuzonyengetera, haangatongobatsirwi chinhu." 
Isaiah16:13 Ndirori shoko rakataurwa naJehovha pamusoro paMoabhi panguva yakare. 
Isaiah16:14 Asi zvino Jehovha akataura achiti, ""Makore matatu asati apfuura, samakore omunhu anobatira mubayiro, kukudzwa kwaMoabhi kuchazvidzwa, pamwechete navanhu vake vazhinji; vakasara vachava vashoma kwazvo, vasina simba.""" 
Isaiah17:1 Chirevo pamusoro peDhamasiko. Tarirai, Dhamasiko robviswa, rirege kuzova guta, richava dongo rakakoromoka." 
Isaiah17:2 Maguta eAroeri asiyiwa; achava mafuro ezvipfuwo, zvichavatapo pasi, zvisina anozvivhundusa." 
Isaiah17:3 Nhare ichabviswa panaEfuremu, noushe paDhamasiko; vakasara veSiria vachava sembiri yavana vaIsiraeri, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah17:4 Zvino nezuva iro ukuru hwaJakobho huchaitwa hutete, uye kukora kwenyama yake kuchaonda." 
Isaiah17:5 Zvichafanana nenguva kana mucheki achiunganidza zviyo mumunda, achicheka hura noruoko rwake; zvirokwazvo zvichafanana nokuunganidza hura pamupata weRefaimi." 
Isaiah17:6 Kunyange zvakadaro mimwe michero ichasariramo, sezvinoitika kana muorivhi uchizuzwa, zvibereko zviviri kana zvitatu kumuromo wedavi rokumusoro-soro, zvina kana zvishanu pamatavi okunze omuti unobereka kwazvo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah17:7 Nezuva iro vanhu vachatarira Musiki wavo, meso avo achaona Mutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah17:8 Havangatariri aritari, iro basa ramaoko avo; zvakaitwa nemimwe yavo havangavi nehanya nazvo, kana iri miti yakatsaurwa kana mifananidzo yezuva." 
Isaiah17:9 Nezuva iro maguta avo akasimba achaita samatongo kumatondo napamisoro yamakomo, akasiyiwa nokuda kwavana vaIsraeri; achava matongo." 
Isaiah17:10 Nokuti wakangamwa Mwari Muponesi wako, hauna kurangarira dombo routiziro hwako. Saka unozvisimira miti inofadza, unoisamo mizambiringa yakabva kumwe." 
Isaiah17:11 Nomusi wokusima kwako, unouvakira ruzhowa, fume mangwana unotumbusa mbeu dzako; asi kukohwa kunotiza nezuva rokutambudzika nerokuchema kukuru." 
Isaiah17:12 Haiwa, kutinhira kwavanhu vazhinji, vanotinhira sokutinhira kwegungwa, nokuririma kwamarudzi avanhu anoririma sokuririma kwemvura zhinji!" 
Isaiah17:13 Marudzi acharirima sokuririma kwemvura zhinji; asi uchavatuka, vachatizira kure, vachadzingirirwa sehundi yamakomo pamberi pemhepo, seguruva rinopfungaira pamberi pedutu remhepo." 
Isaiah17:14 Nenguva yamadekwana, tarirai, kuchava nokutyisa; mangwanani kusati kwaedza, havachipo. Ndiwo mugove wavanotipambara, nomubayiro wavanotibira." 
Isaiah18:1 Haiwa, nyika yokuvirira kwamapapiro, iri mhiri kwenzizi dzeItiopia," 
Isaiah18:2 inotuma nhume nenzira dzegungwa namagwa enhokwe pamusoro pemvura, ichiti, ""Endai, imwi nhume dzinokurumidza, kurudzi rwavanhu vakareba vakanaka kumeso, kuvanhu vanotyiwa kose-kose, rudzi rune simba, runotsika-tsika pasi, rune nyika inokamurwa nenzizi." 
Isaiah18:3 Imi mose muri pasi pose, nemwi mugere panyika, kana mureza uchisimudzwa pamakomo, tarirai; kana hwamanda ichiridzwa, inzwai!""" 
Isaiah18:4 Nokuti Jehovha akataura kwandiri kudai, ""Ndichanyarara, ndichatarira ndiri paugaro hwangu, sokupisa kwezuva pamushana, seguti pakupisa kwenguva yokukohwa.""" 
Isaiah18:5 Nokuti kukohwa kusati kwasvika, kana maruva azuka, ruva rashanduka zambiringa roda kuibva, achagura matavi namapanga; namatavi anotandira achaabvisa nokuatema." 
Isaiah18:6 Ose pamwechete achasiyirwa magora ari pamakomo, nezvikara zvenyika; magora achagara pamusoro pavo chirimo chose, nezvikara zvenyika zvichapedza chando pamusoro pavo." 
Isaiah18:7 Nenguva iyo Jehovha wehondo achavigirwa zvipo norudzi rwavanhu vakareba vakanaka kumeso, vanhu vanotyiwa kose-kose, rudzi rune simba, runotsika-tsika pasi, rune nyika inokamurwa nenzizi, kunzvimbo yezita raJehovha wehondo, kugomo reZiyoni." 
Isaiah19:1 .Chirevo pamusoro peIjipiti.Tarirai, Jehovha akatasva gore rinomhanya, oswedera Ijipiti; zvifananidzo zvichadedera pamberi pake, nomoyo weIjipiti uchanyauka mukati mawo." 
Isaiah19:2 Ndichamutsa moyo yavaIjipiti vamukire vaIjipiti; mumwe nomumwe acharwa nehama yake, mumwe nomumwe nowakavakirana naye; guta richa mukira guta, ushe huchamukira ushe." 
Isaiah19:3 Mweya weIjipiti uchapera mukati mawo; ndichaparadza kufunga kwawo; vachandobvunza zvifananidzo, navanamazango, navauki nen'anga." 
Isaiah19:4 Ndichaisa vaIjipiti muruoko rwamambo ane hasha; mambo anomoyo mukukutu achavabata ushe, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe, Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah19:5 Mvura ichapwa mugungwa, rwizi ruchaderera nokuoma." 
Isaiah19:6 Nzizi dzichanhuwa, hova dzeIjipiti dzichava shoma nokupwa; tsanga nenhokwe dzichaoma." 
Isaiah19:7 Mafuro kunhivi dzaNairi, pamhenderekedzo dzaNairi, neminda yose yakadzvarwa yaNairi, zvichaoma, zvichatorwa nemhepo, hazvichazovipo." 
Isaiah19:8 Vabati vehove vachachema, vose vanokandira zviredzo maNairi vachaungudza, vanokanda hutava hwavo mumvura vachapera simba." 
Isaiah19:9 Uye vanobata neshinda yakanatswa, navanoruka micheka michena, vachanyadziswa." 
Isaiah19:10 Mbiru dzichaputswa-putswa; vose vanobatira mubayiro vachava neshungu pamweya. 
Isaiah19:11 Machinda eZoani mapenzi kwazvo; mano amakota akaisvochenjera aFarao ashanduka upenzi; munoreva seiko kuna Farao, muchiti, ""Ndini mwanakomana wavakachenjera, mwanakomana wamadzimambo akare?""" 
Isaiah19:12 Varipiko zvino ivo vanhu vako vakachenjera? Ngavakuudze zvino; ngavazivise zvakafungwa naJehovha wehondo pamusoro peIjipiti. 
Isaiah19:13 Machinda eZoani ava mapenzi, machinda eNofi akanyengerwa; vakarasisa Ijipiti nzira, ivo vaiva ibwe rekona ramarudzi avo." 
Isaiah19:14 Jehovha akadira mweya wokuramba mukati mavo; vakarasisa Ijipiti nzira pamabasa avo vose, somunhu akabatwa nedoro anodzedzereka pakurutsa kwake." 
Isaiah19:15 Saka Ijipiti haingazovi nebasa chose, ringaitwa nomusoro kana nomuswe, kana nedavi romuchindwe kana nenhokwe." 
Isaiah19:16 Nezuva iro vaIjipiti vachafanana navakadzi; vachadedera nokutya nokuda kokusimudzwa koruoko rwaJehovha wehondo; rwaanosimudza pamusoro pavo. 
Isaiah19:17 Nyika yaJudha ichava chityiso cheIjipiti; mumwe nomumwe anozviudzwa achatya nokuda komutemo waJehovha wehondo, waakatema pamusoro pavo." 
Isaiah19:18 Nezuva iro maguta mashanu achavapo panyika yeIjipiti, anotaura rurimi rweKanani, vachipika naJehovha wehondo; mumwe achaidzwa Guta rokuparadzwa." 
Isaiah19:19 Nezuva iro pakati penyika yeIjipiti pachava nearitari kuna Jehovha, nembiru pamuganhu waro kuna Jehovha." 
Isaiah19:20 Zvichava chiratidzo nechapupu chaJehovha wehondo panyika yeIjipiti; nokuti vachadanidzira kuna Jehovha nemhaka yavamanikidzi, achavatumira muponesi nomurwiri, iye achavaponesa." 
Isaiah19:21 Jehovha achazviratidza kuIjipiti, navaIjipiti vachaziva Jehovha nezuva iro; zvirokwazvo vachamunamata nezvibayiro nezvipo, vachapikira Jehovha mhiko, nokuzviita." 
Isaiah19:22 Jehovha acharova Ijipiti, achirova nokuporesazve; zvino vachadzokera kuna Jehovha, iye achanzwa kunyengetera kwavo achivaporesa." 
Isaiah19:23 Nezuva iro nzira huru ichavapo inobva Ijipiti ichienda Asiria; vaAsiria vachaenda Ijipiti, navaIjipiti vachaenda Asiria; vaIjipiti vachanamata pamwechete navaAsiria." 
Isaiah19:24 Nezuva iro vaIsiraeri vachava rudzi rwechitatu vachitevera Ijipiti neAsiria, vachava ruropafadzo pakati penyika;" 
Isaiah19:25 nokuti Jehovha wehondo akavaropafadza, achiti, ""VaIjipiti, vanhu vangu, navaAsiria, basa ramaoko angu, navaIsiraeri, nhaka yangu, ngavaropafadzwe.""" 
Isaiah20:1 Negore rokusvika kwaTaritani paAshidhodhi, atumwa naSarigoni mambo weAsiria, akarwa neAshidhodhi nokurikunda;" 
Isaiah20:2 nenguva iyo Jehovha akataura naIsaya mwanakomana waAmozi, achiti, ""Enda, undosunungura gudza riri pazviuno zvako, ubvise shangu yako parutsoka rwako."" Iye akaita saizvozvo, akafamba asine nguvo, asine shangu." 
Isaiah20:3 Zvino Jehovha akati, ""Muranda wangu Isaya sezvaakafamba asine nguvo asine shangu makore matatu akava chiratidzo nechishamiso pamusoro peIjipiti neItiopia;" 
Isaiah20:4 saizvozvo mambo weAsiria achaenda navatapwa veIjipiti navakadzingwa veItiopia, vaduku navakuru Vasina nguvo vasina shangu, vakafukurwa zviuno, chive chinyadzo cheIjipiti." 
Isaiah20:5 Vachavhunduswa nokunyadziswa pamusoro peItiopia, chivimbo chavo, neIjipiti rumbidzo yavo." 
Isaiah20:6 Vagere panyika iyi iri pamhenderekedzo yegungwa vachati nezuva iro, `Tarirai, ndizvo zvaita chivimbo chedu, kwataitizira tichitsvaka kurwirwa kuna mambo weAsiria; ko isu zvino tichapukunyuka sei?' """ 
Isaiah21:1 Chirevo pamusoro perenje regungwa. Zvinobva kurenje, kunyika inotyisa, sezvamupupuri zvinopfuura kurutivi rweZasi." 
Isaiah21:2 Ndaratidzwa chiratidzo chinochemedza; munyengeri anoita nokunyengera, nomuparadzi anoparadza. Simuka iwe Erami, komba, iwe Medhia; ndagumisa kugomera kwavo kose." 
Isaiah21:3 Saka zviuno zvangu zvizere nokurwadziwa; ndabatwa nokurwadziwa, sokurwadziwa komukadzi unosununguka; ndakotamiswa, saka handigoni kunzwa; ndavhunduswa, saka handigoni kuona," 
Isaiah21:4 moyo wangu une dzungu, ndavhunduswa nezvinotyisa; rubvunzavaeni rwandaida rwashanduka chinhu chinondidederesa." 
Isaiah21:5 Vanogadzira tafura, vanoisa varindi, vanodya, vanomwa. Simukai, imwi machinda, muzodze nhovo." 
Isaiah21:6 Nokuti hezvi zvandaudzwa naShe, ""Enda, undoisa murindi; ngaareve zvaanoona;" 
Isaiah21:7 zvino kana achiona boka, navatasvi vamabhiza vakaita vaviri-vaviri, neboka rembongoro, neboka ramakamera, ngaateerere zvakanaka-naka.""" 
Isaiah21:8 Iye akadanidzira seshumba, achiti, ""Ishe, ndimire nguva dzose masikati pashongwe yokurinda, nousiku hwose ndimire panzvimbo yangu;" 
Isaiah21:9 zvino tarirai, kouya boka ravanhu, vatasvi vamabhiza vakaita vaviri-vaviri."" Akapindura, akati, ""Bhabhironi rawa, rawa; mifananidzo yake yose yakavezwa yavamwari vavo yaputsikira pasi.""" 
Isaiah21:10 Haiwa, vanhu vangu vakapurwa, zviyo zveburiro rangu, zvandakanzwa kuna Jehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ndizvo zvandakakuzivisai." 
Isaiah21:11 Chireve pamusoro peDhuma. Mumwe anondidana, ari paSeiri, achiti, ""Nhai, murindi, inguva ipi yousiku?""" 
Isaiah21:12 Murindi ndokuti, ""Mambakwedza osvika, nousikuwo. Kana muchida kubvunza, bvunzai; dzokai, uyai.""" 
Isaiah21:13 Chirevo pamusoro peArabhia. Musango reArabhia ndimo mamuchavata, imwi mapoka avafambi veDhedhani." 
Isaiah21:14 Vigirai ane nyota mvura! Vagere panyika yeTema vakachingamidza vatizi nechingwa chavo. 
Isaiah21:15 Nokuti vakanga vachitiza minondo, minondo yakavhomorwa, nouta hwakakungwa, nokumanikidzwa kokurwa." 
Isaiah21:16 Nokuti hezvi zvandakaudzwa naJehovha, ""Gore risati rapera, samakore omunhu anobatira mubayiro, mbiri yose yeKedhari ichapera." 
Isaiah21:17 Vakasara veboka ravanofura nouta, ivo vanhu vane simba vavana veKedhari, vachava vashoma; nokuti Jehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, akazvitaura.""" 
Isaiah22:1 Chirevo pamusoro pomupata wezvakaonekwa. Unonzweiko, zvawakwira navanhu vako vose pamatenga edzimba?" 
Isaiah22:2 Haiwa, iwe, uzere nokupururudza, guta rine bope, musha unomufaro; vakaurawa vako havana kuurawa nomunondo, havana kufira pakurwa." 
Isaiah22:3 vabati vako vose vakatiza pamwechete, vakasungwa vasina uta; vose vako, vakawanikwa, vakasungwa pamwechete; vakatizira kure." 
Isaiah22:4 Naizvozvo ndakati, ""Regai kunditarira, ndinoda kuchema kwazvo; musaramba muchiedza kundinyaradza pamusoro pokuparadzwa komukunda wavanhu vangu.""" 
Isaiah22:5 Nokuti izuva rokuvhundusa, nerokutsikira pasi, nerokukanganisa, zvinobva kuna She, Jehovha wehondo, pamupata wokuratidzwa; rokukoromorwa kwamasvingo, nerokudanidzira kumakomo." 
Isaiah22:6 Erami akabata goba, pamwechete namapoka avanhu navatasvi vamabhiza, Kiri akafudugura nhovo." 
Isaiah22:7 Ipapo mipata yenyu yakaisvonaka yakazara nengoro, navatasvi vamabhiza vakazvigadzirira kurwa pasuo." 
Isaiah22:8 Vakabvisa chifukidziro chaJudha; nezuva iro mukatarira nhumbi dzokurwa muimba yomudondo. 
Isaiah22:9 Mukaona pakakoromoka paguta raDhavhidhi, kuti pakanga pari pazhinji, mukachingidzira mvura yedziva rezasi;" 
Isaiah22:10 mukaverenga dzimba dzeJerusaremu, mukakoromora dzimba kuti musimbise rusvingo;" 
Isaiah22:11 mukaitawo gungwa pakati pamasvingo maviri rokuchingidzira mvura yedziva rakare. Asi hamuna kutarira iye akazviita, makanga musine hanya naiye akazvifunga kare." 
Isaiah22:12 Zvino nezuva iro Ishe, Jehovha wehondo, akakudanirai kumisodzi, nokukuchema, nokukuveurwa mhanza, nokukufuka makudza;" 
Isaiah22:13 asi tarirai, makava nomufaro nokupembera, nokubayiwa kwemombe, nokushinjiwa kwamakwai, nokudyiwa kwenyama nokumwiwa kwewaini, muchiti, ""Ngatidye, ngatimwe, nokuti mangwana tinofa.""" 
Isaiah22:14 Asi Jehovha wehondo wakazvizivisa munzeve dzangu, akati, ""Zvirokwazvo, hamungakangamwirwi zvakaipa izvi, kusvikira pakufa kwenyu,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe, Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah22:15 Zvanzi naShe, Jehovha wehondo, ""Enda kumuchengeti uyu wefuma, kuna Shebhina, unotarira imba yamambo, uti," 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Unobateiko pano? Unaniko pano, zvawazvivezera bwiro pano? Somunhu anozvivezera bwiro pakakwirira, anozvicherera ugaro hwake padombo!'" 
Isaiah22:17 Tarira, Jehovha, achakurasira kure nesimba somurume; zvirokwazvo, achakupeta-peta." 
Isaiah22:18 Zvirokwazvo achakupomba-pomba, ndokukukandira sehurungudo munyika yakapamhamha; ndipo pauchafira, ndipo pachava nengoro dzembiri yako, iwe munyadzi weimba yatenzi wako." 
Isaiah22:19 Ndichakudzinga pabasa rako, iye uchakukwevera pasi ubve panzvimbo yako." 
Isaiah22:20 Zvino nezuva iro ndichadana muranda wangu Eriakimi, mwanakomana waHirikia;" 
Isaiah22:21 ndichamufukidza nguvo yako, nokumusimbisa nebhanhire rako, ndigoisa ushe hwako muruoko rwake; iye achava baba kuna vagere Jerusaremu, nokuimba yaJudha." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndichaisa kiyi yeimba yaDhavhidhi pafudzi rake; iye achazarura, hapana angazarira, iye achazarira, hapana angazarura." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndichamurovera pakasimba sembambo; achava chigaro chinokudzwa paimba yababa vake. 
Isaiah22:24 Vachaturika paari kukudzwa kose kweimba yababa vake, matavi namabukira, nemidziyo yose miduku, kubvira pamikombe kusvikira pamakate." 
Isaiah22:25 Nezuva iro, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo, mbambo yakanga yaroverwa pakasimba, ichabva; ichatemwa, ndokuwira pasi; nomutoro wakanga wakaturikwa pairi, uchatemwa; nokuti Jehovha akataura izvozvo.""" 
Isaiah23:1 Chirevo pamusoro peTire. Chemai, imi, zvikepe zveTarishishi; nokuti raparadzwa, hapachine imba, kana pangapindwapo; vakaratidzwa izvozvo vari panyika yeKitimi." 
Isaiah23:2 imwi mugere pamhenderekedzo yegungwa, nyararai, iyemi maifumiswa navatengesi veSidhoni, vanofamba negungwa." 
Isaiah23:3 fuma yaro zvaiva zviyo zveShihori, zvibereko zveNairi, paitengeswa zvose zvamarudzi avanhu." 
Isaiah23:4 Nyara, iwe Sidhoni, nokuti gungwa rataura, nenhare yegungwa, richiti, ""Handina kurwadziwa, handina kubereka, handina kurera majaya, kana kukurisa mhandara.""" 
Isaiah23:5 Kana shoko richisvika Ijipiti, vachava neshungu kwazvo pamusoro peshoko reTire." 
Isaiah23:6 Yambukirai Tarishishi; chemai imwi mugere pamhenderekedzo yegungwa. 
Isaiah23:7 Gara ndiro guta renyu raifara, raivapo kubva kare nakare, raiiswa kurekure netsoka dzaro, kundogarako?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ndianiko akafungira Tire izvozvo, iro raipavhurira korona, vatengesi varo vaiva machinda, navashambadziri varo vaiva vanokudzwa panyika?" 
Isaiah23:9 Jehovha wehondo ndiye akazvifunga, kuti amhure kuzvikudza kwezvose zvinokudzwa, nokuzvidza vose vanokudzwa panyika." 
Isaiah23:10 Pararira panyika yako seNairi, iwe mukunda weTarishishi; hakuchine bhanhire rinokusunga." 
Isaiah23:11 Akatambanudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, akazunungusa ushe; Jehovha akaraira pamusoro peKanani, kuti nhare dzayo dziparadzwe." 
Isaiah23:12 Akati, ""Hauchazofari, iwe mukunda weSidhoni, mhandara yakamanikidzwa; simuka, uyambukire Kitimi; naikoko haungawani zororo.""" 
Isaiah23:13 Tarirai nyika yavaKaradhea; rudzi urwo haruchipo; vaAsiria vakaiita nyika yezvikara zverenje; vakamisa shongwe dzavo, vakawisa dzimba dzoushe dzaivamo, vakaiita dongo." 
Isaiah23:14 Chemai, imwi zvikepe zveTarishishi; nokuti nhare yenyu yaparadzwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Zvino nenguva iyo Tire richakanganikwa makore makumi manomwe, zvakaenzana namakore amambo mumwechete; kana makore makumi manomwe apera, Tire richaitirwa sezvinoimbwa parwiyo rwechifeve, runoti," 
Isaiah23:16 Iwe chifeve, wakanganikwa, tora mbira upote neguta; ridza zvakanaka, imba nziyo dzakanaka, kuti urangarirwe.""" 
Isaiah23:17 Zvino kana makore makumi manomwe apera, Jehovha achashanyira Tire, ipapo richadzokera kumubayiro waro, ndokufeva noushe hwose bwenyika huri pasi pose." 
Isaiah23:18 Zvarakashambadzira, nomubayiro waro, zvichava zvitvsene kuna Jehovha; hazvingachengetwi kana kuvigwa, nokuti zvarakashambadzira zvichava zvavanogara pamberi paJehovha, kuti vagute kwazvo, vafuke nguvo dzakanaka." 
Isaiah24:1 Tarirai, Jehovha anobvisa zvose panyika nokuiparadza, nokuitsindikira, nokuparadzira vagere mairi." 
Isaiah24:2 Vanhu vachaitirwa zvinoitirwa muprista, muranda zvinoitirwa tenzi wake, mushandiri zvinoitirwa vahosi vake, mutengi zvinoitirwa mutengesi, anopa chikwereti zvinoitirwa anokwereta, anoripa mhindu zvinoitirwa anoreva mhindu." 
Isaiah24:3 Nyika ichabvisirwa zvose zvayo, ichaparadzwa chose; nokuti Jehovha akataura shoko iro." 
Isaiah24:4 Nyika inochema nokuoma, pasi pose panopera simba nokuoma, vanhu vakakudzwa venyika vanopera simba." 
Isaiah24:5 Nyika yakasvibiswawo navagere mairi; nokuti vakadarika mirayiro, vakakanganisa mitemo, nokuputsa sungano isingaperi." 
Isaiah24:6 Saka kutuka kwaMwari kwapedza nyika, navageremo vava nemhosva; saka vagere munyika vapiswa, vangosara vanhu vashoma." 
Isaiah24:7 Waini itsva inochema, muzambiringa wapera simba, vose vanomoyo unofara vanogomera." 
Isaiah24:8 Kufara kwengoma konyarara, inzwi ravanofara ropera, mufaro wembira wopera." 
Isaiah24:9 Havangamwi waini vachiimba; zvinobata zvichavava kuna vanozvimwa. 
Isaiah24:10 Guta, rava dongo, rakoromorwa; dzimba dzose dzakapfigwa, kuti kurege kuva nomunhu angapindamo." 
Isaiah24:11 Kuchema kunonzwikwa panzira dzomumisha nokuda kwewaini; mufaro wose wasviba, kufara kwenyika kwaenda." 
Isaiah24:12 Muguta masara mangova dongo, suo raputswa nokuparadzwa." 
Isaiah24:13 Nokuti ndizvo zvazvichaita panyika pakati pamarudzi avanhu, zvichafanana nokuzuzwa komuorivhi, nezvakasara kana mazambiringa akohwiwa." 
Isaiah24:14 Ivo vachadanidzira, vachapururudza; nokuda koumambo hwaJehovha vanodanidzira vari pagungwa." 
Isaiah24:15 Saka rumbidzai Jehovha kumabvazuva, iro zita raJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, pazvitsuwa zvegungwa." 
Isaiah24:16 Takanzwa nziyo dzichiimbwa kumigumo yenyika, dzichiti, ""Vakarurama ngavakudzwe!"" Asi ini ndakati, ""Ndinoonda, ndinoonda, ndine nhamo! Vanyengeri vakaita nokunyengera; zvirokwazvo, vanyengeri vakaita nokunyengera kukuru.""" 
Isaiah24:17 Kutya, negomba, nomusungo zvichakuwira, iwe ugere panyika." 
Isaiah24:18 Zvino, anotiza bope rokutyisa, achawira mugomba; anokwira achibva mukati megomba, achabatwa nomusungo; nokuti mahwindo okumusoro azaruka, nenheyo dzenyika dzinodedera." 
Isaiah24:19 Nyika yaputswa-putswa chose, nyika yodedera chose, nyika yozununguswa chose." 
Isaiah24:20 Nyika ichadzedzereka somunhu akabatwa, ichadengenyeka sedumba; kudarika kwayo kuchairemedza kwazvo, ichawa, ikasasimukazve." 
Isaiah24:21 Zvino nezuva iro Jehovha acharova hondo yavakakudzwa vari kumusoro, namadzimambo enyika panyika." 
Isaiah24:22 Vachaunganidzwa pamwechete, sezvinounganidzwa vasungwa mugomba, vachapfigirwa mutirongo; zvino kana mazuva mazhinji apfuura vachashanyirwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Ipapo mwedzi uchanyadziswa, nezuva richanyara; nokuti Jehovha wehondo achabata ushe pagomo reZiyoni, napaJerusaremu, pamberi pavakuru vake pachava nokukudzwa." 
Isaiah25:1 Jehovha, ndimi Mwari wangu! Ndicharumbidza zita renyu; no kuti makaita zvinoshamisa, izvo zvamakafunga kare nokutendeka nezvokwadi." 
Isaiah25:2 Nokuti guta makariita dutu ramabwe, guta rakakombwa norusvingo makariita dongo, imba huru yavatorwa rirege kuva guta; haringatongovakwi." 
Isaiah25:3 Naizvozvo rudzi rukuru ruchakukudzai; guta ramarudzi avanhu vanotyisa richakutyai. 
Isaiah25:4 Nokuti imwi maiva nhare yavarombo, nhare younoshaiwa pakutambudzika kwake, utiziro panguva yemvura zhinji, mumvuri pakupisa kwezuva, kana mhepo yavanotyisa ichiita semvura zhinji." 
Isaiah25:5 Muchaderedza bope ravatorwa, sezvinoita kupisa kwezuva panzvimbo yakaoma, rwiyo rwavanotyisa ruchaderedzwa, sezvinoitwa kupisa nomumvuri wegore." 
Isaiah25:6 Pagomo iri Jehovha wehondo achagadzirira marudzi ose avanhu mutambo wezvakakora, mutambo wewaini yakagara pamasese, wezvakakora zvizere nomwongo, wewaini yakagara pamasese yakasvimwa zvakanaka." 
Isaiah25:7 Pagomo iri uchaparadza chifukidziro chinofukidzira vanhu vose, nechidzitiro chakatasanurwa pamusoro pamarudzi ose." 
Isaiah25:8 Akaparadza rufu nokusingaperi, Ishe Jehovha achapisika misodzi pazviso zvose; achabvisa kuzvidzwa kwavanhu vake panyika yose; nokuti Jehovha akataura izvozvo." 
Isaiah25:9 Nezuva iro vachati, ""Tarirai, uyu ndiye Mwari wedu; takanga takamumirira, iye achatiponesa; uye ndiye Jehovha, takanga takamumirira, tichafara, nokufarira ruponeso rwake.""" 
Isaiah25:10 Nokuti ruoko rwaJehovha ruchagara pagomo iri; Moabhi vachatsikwa pasi panzvimbo yavo, sezvinotsikwa mashanga mumvura iri mugomba romupfudze." 
Isaiah25:11 Achatambanudza maoko ake imomo, somunhu anotambanudza maoko ake kana achishambira; asi Jehovha achaderedza kuzvikudza kwake pamwechete nenjere dzamaoko ake." 
Isaiah25:12 Nhare yakakwirira yamasvingo enyu, wakaiwisira pasi, wakaideredza, wakaiputsira muvhu, imo muguruva." 
Isaiah26:1 Nezuva iro rwiyo urwu ruchaimbwa panyika yavaJudha: Tine guta rakasimba; iye achaisapo masvingo nenhare ruve ruponeso. 
Isaiah26:2 Zarurai masuo, kuti rudzi rwakarurama, runochengeta chokwadi, rupinde." 
Isaiah26:3 Anomoyo wakasimba muchamuchengeta murugare rukuru, nokuti anovimba nemi." 
Isaiah26:4 Vimbai naJehovha nokusingaperi, iye Jehovha ndiye dombo nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah26:5 Nokuti akaderedza vagere pakakwirira, iro guta riri kumusoro, anorideredza, anorideredza kusvikira pavhu; anoriputsira pasi muguruva." 
Isaiah26:6 Richatsikwa netsoka, idzo tsoka dzavarombo, nokutsika kwavanoshaiwa.""" 
Isaiah26:7 Nzira yavakarurama yakarurama; imwi munoruramisa nzira yavakarurama. 
Isaiah26:8 Zvirokwazvo, takakumirirai Jehovha, panzira yokutonga kwenyu; mweya yedu inoshuva zita renyu nechirangaridzo chenyu." 
Isaiah26:9 Ndakakushuvai nomweya wangu usiku; zvirokwazvo, ndichakutsvakai zvikuru nomweya wangu uri mukati mangu; nokuti kana kutonga kwenyu kuri panyika, vanhu vagere munyika vanodzidza zvakarurama." 
Isaiah26:10 Akaipa kunyange achinzwirwa tsitsi, haangadzidzi zvakarurama; achaita hake zvisakarurama panyika yakarurama, haangaoni umambo hwaJehovha." 
Isaiah26:11 Jehovha, ruoko rwenyu rwakasimudzwa, asi ivo havaoni; asi vachaona kushingaira kwenyu pamusoro pavanhu, vakanyadziswa; zvirokwazvo moto uchapedza vavengi venyu." 
Isaiah26:12 Jehovha, imwi muchatigadzirira rugare; nokuti makatibatirawo mabasa edu ose." 
Isaiah26:13 Jehovha Mwari wedu, mamwe madzishe kunze kwenyu akanga akatibata; asi ticharumbidza zita renyu tichibatsirwa nemwi moga." 
Isaiah26:14 Vakafa havangararamizve, vaparara, havazomukizve; saka makasvika kwavari, mukavaparadza, nokugumisa kurangarirwa kwavo kose." 
Isaiah26:15 Mawanza rudzi, Jehovha, mawanza rudzi; makurumbira, makurisa miganho yose yenyika." 
Isaiah26:16 Jehovha, vakakutsvakai panguva yokutambudzika; vakadurura munyengetero muchivaranga." 
Isaiah26:17 Mukadzi ane pamuviri, asvika pedo pakusununguka, sezvaanorwadziwa achichema pakurwadziwa kwake, ndizvo zvatakanga takaita pamberi penyu, Jehovha." 
Isaiah26:18 Isu takanga tava nepamuviri, takanga tiri pakurwadziwa, takabereka zvinenge mhepo bedzi; hatina kuvigira nyika sununguro, uye vangagara panyika havana kuzvarwa." 
Isaiah26:19 Vakafa venyu vachararama, zvitunha zvavo zvichamuka. Mukai, muimbe, imwi mugere muguruva; nokuti dova renyu rakaita sedova rechiedza; nyika ichabudisa vakafa." 
Isaiah26:20 Uyai vanhu vangu, pindai muimba yenyu yomukati, mupfige mikova yenyu shure kwenyu; muvande nguva duku, kusvikira kutsamwa kwapfuura." 
Isaiah26:21 Nokuti tarira Jehovha anobuda panzvimbo yake kurova vagere panyika nokuda kwezvivi zvavo; nyikawo ichafukura ropa rayo, ikasazofukidzazve vakaurawa vayo." 
Isaiah27:1 Nezuva iro Jehovha acharova nomunondo wake mukukutu, mukuru, noune simba, revhiatani, iyo nyoka inokurumidza, iyo, nyoka yakagonyana; achauraya chikara chiri mugungwa." 
Isaiah27:2 Nezuva iro vachaimba vachiti, ""Munda wemizambiringa, chiuimbirai!" 
Isaiah27:3 Ini Jehovha ndini muchengeti wawo; ndichaudiridza nguva imwe neimwe; ndichauchengeta masikati nousiku, kuti urege kutadzirwa nomunhu." 
Isaiah27:4 Ini handina hasha; dai rukato nemhinzwa zvairwa neni! Ndaizvivamba, ndaizvipisa pamwechete." 
Isaiah27:5 Kana asingadaro, ngaabate simba rangu, ayanane neni, ngaayanane neni.""" 
Isaiah27:6 Namazuva anouya Jakobho achamera midzi; Isiraeri achatunga maruva nokutumbuka; vachazadza nyika yose nezvibereko. 
Isaiah27:7 Ko akavarova iye sezvaakarova avo vakavarova here? Ko vakaurawa nokuurawa kwaivo vakaurawa navo here? 
Isaiah27:8 Pakuvadzinga kwenyu makarwa navo nechiyero chakafanira; wakavabvisa nemhepo yake ine simba nezuva remhepo yokumabvazuva. 
Isaiah27:9 Saka nenzira iyi zvakaipa zvaJakobho zvichadzikunurwa; izvi ndizvo zvibereko zvose zvokubviswa kwezvivi zvake, kana achiita mabwe ose earitari ave samabwe omunyaka akaputswa-putswa, kuti miti yakatsaurwa nemifananidzo yezuva zvirege kuzomiswa." 
Isaiah27:10 Nokuti guta, rakakombwa norusvingo, rasiyiwa riri roga, hwava hugaro hwasiyiwa riri dongo, serenje; ndipo pachava namafuro emhuru, ndipo paichavata pasi, ichidya mashizha apo." 
Isaiah27:11 Kana matavi apo aoma, achavhumwa; vakadzi vachauya vachiapisa; nokuti vanhu ava havana njere; saka akavaita haangavi netsitsi navo, akavaumba haangavi norudo navo." 
Isaiah27:12 Zvino nezuva iro Jehovha achapura zviyo kubvira pamvura yoRwizi kusvikira parukova rweIjipiti; imwi muchaunganidzwa, muchiita mumwe-mumwe, imwi vana vaIsiraeti." 
Isaiah27:13 Zvino nezuva iro hwamanda huru icharidzwa; vakanga voparara panyika yeAsiria, navakanga vadzingirwa kunyika yeIjipiti, vachauya; vachanamata Jehovha pagomo dzvene paJerusaremu." 
Isaiah28:1 Korona, inozvikudza, yavakabatwa vokwaEfuremu, ine nhamo, uye ruva, rinooma, rokunaka kwake kukuru, riri pamusoro womupata wakaworera wavakakundwa newaini." 
Isaiah28:2 Tarirai, Ishe anomumwe anesimba anokurira; achawisira pasi noruoko rwake sedutu guru rine chimvuramabwe, sedutu rinoparadza, sokunaya kwemvura zhinji inokukura kose." 
Isaiah28:3 Korona inozvikudza yavakabatwa vokwaEfuremu ichatsikwa pasi netsoka; 
Isaiah28:4 ruva, rinooma, rokunaka kwake kukuru, riri pamusoro womupata wakaworera richava sewonde rinotanga kuibva munakamwe uchigere kusvika; rinoti richatarirwa nowariona, ndokuridya richiri muruoko rwake." 
Isaiah28:5 Nezuva iro Jehovha wehondo achava korona inobwinya noukomba hwakaisvonaka kuna vakasara vavanhu vake; 
Isaiah28:6 nomweya wokururamisa kunowagere pakutonga, nesimba kuna vanodzosera vanorwa pasuo." 
Isaiah28:7 Asi naivo vanodzungunyika newaini, vanodzedzereka nezvinobata; muprista nomuporofita vanodzungunyika nezvinobata, vakamedzwa newaini, vanodzedzereka nezvinobata; vanokanganiswa pakuona, vanogumburwa pakutonga." 
Isaiah28:8 Nokuti matafura avo azere namarutsi anosemesa, hapana pakanaka." 
Isaiah28:9 Ndianiko waachadzidzisa ruzivo? Ndianiko waachadzidzisa kunzwisisa shoko? Ivo vakarumurwa pamukaka, vakabviswa pazamu here?" 
Isaiah28:10 Nokuti zvinongoti chirevo pamusoro pechirevo, chirevo pamusoro pechirevo, murayiro pamusoro pomurayiro, murayiro pamusoro pomurayiro, apa zvishoma, napapo zvishoma.""" 
Isaiah28:11 Zvirokwazvo achataura norudzi urwu navanhu vane miromo yorumwe rudzi, norurimi rwokumwe;" 
Isaiah28:12 akati kwavari, ""Zororo riri pano, zorodzai vakaneta; pano ndipo panokutonhorera;"" asi vakaramba kuteerera." 
Isaiah28:13 Saka shoko raJehovha richava kwavari, chirevo pamusoro pechirevo, chirevo pamusoro pechirevo, murayiro pamusoro pomurayiro, murayiro pamusoro pomurayiro, apa napapo zvishoma; kuti vaende, vawe nenhendashure, vavhunike, vabatwe nomusungo, vatapwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Naizvozvo inzwai shoko raJehovha, imwi vadadi, vanobata noushe vanhu ava vari paJerusaremu," 
Isaiah28:15 imwi zvamakati, ""Takaita sungano norufu, takatenderana neSheori, kana shamhu, inokukura, ichipfuura, haingasviki kwatiri, nokuti nhema takadziita utiziro bwedu, takandovanda pasi pokunyengetera; """ 
Isaiah28:16 naizvozvo Ishe Jehovha anoti, ""Tarirai, ndinoisa paZiyoni ibwe rive nheyo, riri ibwe rakaedzwa, rinokosha rekona kuita nheyo yakasimba; anotenda haakurumidzi." 
Isaiah28:17 Kururamisira ndichakuita rwonzi, nokururama ndichakuita chokururamisa nacho; chimvuramabwe chichakukura utiziro bwenhema, mvura ichafukidza nzvimbo yokuvanda.""" 
Isaiah28:18 Sungano yenyu yamakaita norufu ichadzimwa, nokutenderana kwenyu neSheori hakungamiri; kana shamhu, inokukura, ichipfuura, muchatsikwa pasi nayo." 
Isaiah28:19 Nguva imwe neimwe kana ichipfuura, ichakutorai; nokuti masikati nousiku, mangwanani namangwanani, ichapfuura, kuchangonotyisachetekunzwisisa mharidzo yakadaro." 
Isaiah28:20 Nokuti mubhedha uchava mupfupi, munhu haangagoni kutandavara pamusoro pawo, nejira richava duku, munhu haangagoni kuzvifukidza naro." 
Isaiah28:21 Nokuti Jehovha achasimuka sezvaakaita pagomo rePerazimi, achatsamwa sezvaakaita pamupata weGibhiyoni; kuti abate basa rake, iro basa rake rinoshamisa, nokuita izvo zvaanoita, zvinoshamisa." 
Isaiah28:22 Naizvozvo regai kuva vadadi, kuti zvisungo zvenyu zvirege kusimbiswa; nokuti ndakanzwa kuna Ishe Jehovha wehondo kuti nyika yose yakatemerwa kuparadzwa." 
Isaiah28:23 Rerekai nzeve dzenyu, munzwe inzwi rangu; teererai, munzwe kutaura kwangu." 
Isaiah28:24 Ko murimi, anoda kudzvara, unoswera achirima here? Anoswera achiparura munda nokuputsa mavhinga here?" 
Isaiah28:25 Kana achinge aenzanisa ivhu rawo, haakushi kumini nhema here, nokudzvara kumini, nokuisa zviyo mumisara, nebhari pandima dzakatarwa, nesipereti kunhivi dzawo here?" 
Isaiah28:26 Nokuti Mwari wake anomuzivisa zvakanaka nokumudzidzisa. 
Isaiah28:27 Nokuti kumini nhema haipurwi nomupuro unopinza, negumbo rengoro harikunguruswi pamusoro pekumini; asi kumini nhema inopurwa netsvimbo, nekumini neshamhu." 
Isaiah28:28 Zviyo zvechingwa zvinokuyiwa, haangarambi achizvipura; kunyange gumbo rengoro yake namabhiza ake zvichizviparadzira, haangazvikuyi." 
Isaiah28:29 Naizvozvi zvinobva kuna Jehovha wehondo, anoshamisa nezvaanofunga, mukuru kwazvo pakubata kwake." 
Isaiah29:1 Arieri, Arieri, une nhamo, iwe guta maidzika Dhavhidhi matende ake! Wedzerai gore pagore, nguva dzemitambo ngadzisvike;" 
Isaiah29:2 ipapo ndichamanikidza Arieri, kuchema nokuungudza zvichavapo; richava kwandiri seArieri." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndichakukomba panhivi dzose, ndichakukomba navarwi vanorindira, ndichavaka masvingo okurwa newe." 
Isaiah29:4 Uchawiswa pasi, uchataura uri pasi muvhu; kutaura kwako kuchabva pasi muguruva; inzwi rako richava seresvikiro rinobva pasi muvhu, kutaura kwako kuchaita zevezeve kuchibva muguruva." 
Isaiah29:5 Asi vavengi vako vazhinji vachava seguruva rakatsetseka, navanotyisa sehundi inopepereka; zvirokwazvo zvichaitwa kamwe-kamwe, pakarepo." 
Isaiah29:6 Uchashanyirwa naJehovha wehondo nokutinhira, nokudengenyeka kwenyika, nomubvumo mukuru, nechamupupuri, nedutu guru, nomurazvo womoto unopedza zvose." 
Isaiah29:7 Kuwanda kwamarudzi ose anorwa neArieri, ivo vose vanorwa naro nenhare yaro, vachaita sezvinorotwa, sezvinoonekwa usiku." 
Isaiah29:8 Zvichafanana nokurota komunhu ane nzara, achiti ndinodya; asi anopepuka, ndokuwana mweya wake usine chinhu; kana sokurota komunhu ane nyota, achiti ndinomwa; asi anopepuka, wanei aziya, mweya wake unopanga mvura; ndizvo zvichaita kuwanda kwamarudzi ose anorwa negomo reZiyoni." 
Isaiah29:9 Mirai mushame! Zvipofumadzei, muve mapofu! Vakabatwa, asi havana kubatwa newaini, vanodzedzereka, asi havadzedzereki nezvinobata." 
Isaiah29:10 Nokuti Jehovha wakadurura pamusoro penyu mweya wokubatwa nehope kwazvo, akafumbira meso enyu, vaporofita; nemisoro yenyu, vaoni, wakavafukidza." 
Isaiah29:11 Kuona kose kwava kwamuri samashoko orugwaro rwakanamirwa, runopiwa munhu anogona kurava zvichinzi,""Dorava hako izvozvi;"" iye ndokuti, ""Handigoni, nokuti rwakanamirwa;""" 
Isaiah29:12 zvino rugwaro runopiwa usina kudzidza, zvichinzi, ""Dorava hako izvozvi;"" iye ndokuti, ""Handina kudzidza.""" 
Isaiah29:13 Ishe akati, ""Ava vanhu zvavanoswedera kwandiri, vachindikudza nomuromo wavo uye nemiromo yavo, asi moyo yavo vakaiisa kure neni, nokunditya kwavo zvawava murayiro wavanhu wavakadzidziswa;" 
Isaiah29:14 naizvozvo tarirai, ndichapfuura ndichiita pakati pavanhu ava basa rinoshamisa, basa rinoshamisa nechishamiso; uchenjeri hwavakachenjera vavo huchapera, nenjere dzavanhu vavo vakangwara dzichavanzwa.""" 
Isaiah29:15 Vane nhamo vanotsvaka kuvanzira Jehovha mano avo pakadzika, mabasa avo ari murima, vachiti, ""Ndiani anotiona, ndiani anotiziva?""" 
Isaiah29:16 Haiwa, kutadza kwenyu! Ko muumbi wehari akaenzana nevhu here, kuti chakaitwa chiti pamusoro pomuiti wacho, ""Iye haana kundiita""; kana chakaumbwa chiti pamusoro pomuumbi wacho, ""Iye haana njere?""" 
Isaiah29:17 Ko hakuna kusara chinguva chidukuduku here, Rebhanoni richashandurwa rive munda unobereka zvakanaka, nomunda unobereka zvakanaka uchanzi idondo?" 
Isaiah29:18 Zvino nezuva iro vamatsi vachanzwa mashoko orugwaro, meso amapofu achaona ari pakasviba napanerima." 
Isaiah29:19 Vanyoro vachawedzerawo mufaro wavo muna Jehovha, varombo pakati pavanhu vachafara kwazvo muMutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah29:20 Nokuti anotyisa aparadzwa, mudadi aguma, navose vanogarira zvakaipa vabviswa;" 
Isaiah29:21 ivo vanopomera munhu mhaka nokuda kweshoko, vanoteyira munhu musungo, anoraira vamwe pasuo, vanoramba kururamisira wakarurama nemhaka dzamano-mano." 
Isaiah29:22 Saka zvanzi naJehovha, akadzikunura Abhurahamu, pamusoro peimba yaJakobho, Jakobho haanganyadziswi zvino, chiso chake zvino hachingacheneruki." 
Isaiah29:23 Asi kana achiona vana vake, iro basa ramaoko angu, pakati pake, vachati zita rangu idzvene; zvirokwazvo, vachati Mutsvene waJakobho mutsvene, vachatya Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah29:24 Vakarasika pamweyawo vachava nenjere, vanonyunyuta vachadzidziswa." 
Isaiah30:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Vane nhamo vana vanondimukira, vanofunga mano vasingandibvunzi, vanoita sungano zvisingabvi paMweya wangu,kuti vawedzere zvivi nezvivi;" 
Isaiah30:2 vanozvirongedza kuenda Ijipiti, vasina kundibvunza, kuti vazvisimbise nesimba raFarao, nokuvanda mumumvuri weIjipiti." 
Isaiah30:3 Naizvozvo simba raFarao richakunyadzisai, kuvanda kwenyu mumumvuri waFarao kuchava kukanganisa kwenyu." 
Isaiah30:4 Nokuti machinda avo ari paZoani, nhume dzake dzakasvika Hanesi." 
Isaiah30:5 Vose vachanyadziswa pamusoro porudzi rwavanhu vasingagoni kuvafumisa, vasingavabatsiri kana kuvafumisa, asi kuvanyadzisa nokuvashovodza.""" 
Isaiah30:6 Chirevo pamusoro pezvikara zvenyika yezasi. Panyika yokutambudzika neyokuchema, kunobva shumba hadzi negonho, nenyoka, nenyoka yomoto inobhururuka, ndipo pavanotakudza fuma yavo pamusoro pamafudzi avana vembongoro, nezvinokosha zvavo panyundwa dzemakamera, vachizviisa kuvanhu vasingavafumisi." 
Isaiah30:7 Nokuti Ijipiti inobatsira pasina, zvisina maturo; saka ndakaitumidza zita rokuti, `Rahabhi anongogara zvake.' """ 
Isaiah30:8 Zvino chienda, uzvinyore pamberi pavo pabwendefa rebwe, uzvinyore mubhuku, zvivepo panguva inouya nokusingaperi-peri." 
Isaiah30:9 Nokuti ava rudzi runondimukira, vana vane nhema, vana vasingadi kunzwa murayiro waJehovha;" 
Isaiah30:10 vanoti kuvaoni, ""Musaona""; nokuvaporofita. Musatiporofitira zvinhu zvakarurama, tiudzei zvinofadza, tiporofitire zvinonyengera," 
Isaiah30:11 ibvai panzira, tsaukai pagwara, bvisai Mutsvene waIsiraeri pamberi pedu." 
Isaiah30:12 Naizvozvo zvanzi noMutsvene waIsiraeri, ""Zvamunozvidza shoko iri, muchivimba nokumanikidzwa nokunyengera, muchizvitenda izvo;" 
Isaiah30:13 naizvozvo kuipa uku kuchava kwamuri sapakakoromoka panoda kuwa, panotsveyama parusvingo rwakareba, panowa kamwekamwe pakarepo." 
Isaiah30:14 Uchaiputsa sezvinoputswa mudziyo womuumbi, uchaiputsa-putsa asine nyasha, kusvikira pachishaikwa pakati pezvimedu zvayo chaenga chokundogoka moto nacho pachoto, kana kutekesa mvura nacho patsime.""" 
Isaiah30:15 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, ""Pakudzoka nokuzorora ndipo panoruponeso rwenyu, pakunyarara napakutenda ndipo pachava nesimba renyu;"" asi makaramba," 
Isaiah30:16 mukati, ""Kwete, tichatiza takatasva mabhiza;"" saka muchatiza zvenyu; uyezve, ""Tichatasva mabhiza anomhanyisa;"" saka vanodzingana nemwi vachamhanyisa." 
Isaiah30:17 Vane chiuru vachatiza kana vachivambwa nomumwe; muchatiza kana muchivambwa navashanu; kusvikira masiyiwa sedanda pamusoro pegomo, somureza pamusoro pechikomo." 
Isaiah30:18 Naizvozvo Jehovha achambomira, kuti akunzwirei tsitsi; naizvozvo achakudzwa, kuti ave nenyasha nemi, nokuti Jehovha ndiMwari wokururamisira; vakaropafadzwa vose vanomumirira." 
Isaiah30:19 Nokuti vanhu vachagara paZiyoni paJerusaremu; hamungazochemi, zvirokwazvo achakunzwirai tsitsi, kana achinzwa kuchema kwenyu; kana achinzwa, achakupindurai." 
Isaiah30:20 Kunyange Ishe akakupai chingwa chenhamo nemvura yokutambudzika, kunyange zvakadaro vadzidzisi venyu havangavandi, asi meso enyu achaona vadzidzisi venyu;" 
Isaiah30:21 nzeve dzenyu dzichanzwa shoko shure kwenyu, richiti, ""Heyi nzira, fambai nayo!"" Kana muchida kutsaukira kurudyi, kana zvimwe muchida kutsaukira kuruboshwe." 
Isaiah30:22 Muchashatisa sirivha yakafukidza mifananidzo yenyu yakavezwa, nendarama yakanamirwa pamifananidzo yenyu yakaumbwa; uchairashira kure sechinhu chakashata; uchati kwachiri, ""Ibva pano.""" 
Isaiah30:23 Achakupa mvura yokumeresa mbeu yako, yauchadzvara muvhu; nezvokudya, zvinoberekwa nevhu, zvichava zvakakora zvizhinji. Nezuva iro mombe dzenyu dzichafura pamafuro makuru;" 
Isaiah30:24 nzombe navana vembongoro, zvinorima minda, zvichadya zvokudya zvakarungwa; zvakarudzwa nemitsvairo nemisero." 
Isaiah30:25 Pamusoro pegomo rimwe nerimwe rakareba napachikomo chimwe nechimwe chakwirira, pachava nenzizi nehova dzemvura, nezuva rokuurawa kukuru kana shongwe dzichiwa." 
Isaiah30:26 Uyezve, chiedza chomwedzi chichafanana nechiedza chezuva, chiedza chezuva chichawedzerwa kanomwe; sechiedza chamazuva manomwe, nezuva iro kana Jehovha achisunga pakakuvara pavanhu vake, nokuporesa vanga ravakarohwa." 
Isaiah30:27 Tarirai, zita raJehovha rinobva kure, richipisa nokutsamwa kwake, richibudisa utsi uzhinji; miromo yake izere nehasha, rurimi rwake rwakafanana nomoto unopedza zvose;"
