Isaiah30:28 mweya wake wakaita sorwizi runodira kunze, runosvikira pamutsipa, kuti asere marudzi avanhu nomusero wokuparadza; matomu anotsausa achava mumiromo yavanhu." 
Isaiah30:29 Muchaimba rwiyo, sezvinoitwa usiku kana mutambo mutsvene uchitambwa; muchava nokufara komoyo, wakafanana nowomunhu anoenda achiridza nyere kugomo raJehovha, kudombo raIsiraeri." 
Isaiah30:30 Jehovha achanzwisa inzwi rake roumambo, acharatidza kuburuka koruoko rwake, nokutsamwa kwake kukuru, nomurazvo womoto unopedza zvose, nechamupupuri, nokunaya kukuru kwemvura, nechimvuramabwe." 
Isaiah30:31 Nokuti muAsiria achakanganiswa nenzwi raJehovha; achamurova neshamhu. 
Isaiah30:32 Kurova kose kwetsvimbo yakatumwa, yaacharohwa nayo naJehovha, kuchaitwa nokurira kwengoma nembira; acharwa navo nokurwa kuchazunungusa." 
Isaiah30:33 Nokuti Tofeti rakagara ragadzirwa, zvirokwazvo rakagadzirirwa mambo; wakaridzikisa nokurikurisa; dutu riripo moto nehuni zhinji; mweya waJehovha, wakafanana norwizi rwesariferi, uchazvipfutidza." 
Isaiah31:1 Vane nhamo vanoburukira Ijipiti kundotsvaka kubatsirwa, vanotenda mabhiza, vanovimba nengoro dzokurwa nokuti izhinji, uye navatasvi vamabhiza nokuti vane simba kwazvo, asi havatariri kuno Mutsvene waIsiraeri, kana kutsvaka Jehovha." 
Isaiah31:2 Kunyange zvakadaro naiye akachenjera, achauyisa nhamo, haangadzosi mashoko ake, asi achamukira imba yavanoita zvakaipa, navanobatsirana navanoita zvakaipa." 
Isaiah31:3 Zvino vaIjipiti vanhu, havazi Mwari, namabhiza avo inyama, haazi mweya; zvino kana Jehovha achitambanudza ruoko rwake, anobatsira achagumburwa nowanobatsirwa achawira pasi, vose vachapera pamwechete." 
Isaiah31:4 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha kwandiri, ""Zvakaita seshumba nomwana weshumba zvinoombera chayabata; kunyange vafudzi vazhinji vakakokerwa kuzorwa nayo, haingavhunduswi namanzwi avo. haingavi nehanya nokupopota kwavo; saizvozvo Jehovha wehondo achaburukira pamusoro pegomo reZiyoni napamusoro pechikomo charo kuzorwa navo." 
Isaiah31:5 Seshiri dzinodzengerera, saizvozvo Jehovha achatavirira Jerusaremu; acharitavirira nokurirwira, acharidarika nokurisunungura.""" 
Isaiah31:6 Dzokerai kuna iye wamakamukira zvikuru, imwi vana vaIsiraeri." 
Isaiah31:7 Nokuti nezuva iro mumwe nomumwe ucharasha zvifananidzo zvake zvesirivha nezvifananidzo zvake zvendarama, zvamakazviitira namaoko enyu, zvikava zvivi kwamuri." 
Isaiah31:8 Ipapo muAsiria achawa nomunondo usati uri womunhu; munondo usati uri wavanhu uchamudya; achatiza pamberi pomunondo, namajaya ake achabatirwa chibharo." 
Isaiah31:9 Dombo rake richatiza nokutya, machinda ake achavhunduswa nomureza,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, anomoto wake paZiyoni, nechoto chake paJerusaremu." 
Isaiah32:1 Tarirai, mambo achabata ushe nokururama, machinda achabata achiruramisira." 
Isaiah32:2 Munhu mumwe nomumwe achava soutiziro pamhepo, sechivando pakunaya kukuru kwemvura, senzizi dzemvura panzvimbo yakaoma, somumvuri wedombo guru panyika yafa nenyota." 
Isaiah32:3 Meso avanoona haangatsinzini, nzeve dzavanonzwa dzichateerera." 
Isaiah32:4 moyo yavanotaura vasingarangariri zvakanaka ichanzwisisa ruzivo, marimi avanokakamira achaziva kutaura zvakanaka." 
Isaiah32:5 Benzi harichazonzi munhu akakudzwa, munyengeri haanganzi mukomboreri." 
Isaiah32:6 Nokuti benzi rinotaura zvohupenzi, moyo waro unoita zvakaipa, zvaanoita zvinomhura Mwari, nokureva zvingarasha vanhu pamusoro paJehovha, zvaanorega kugutisa mweya wavane nzara, nokushaisa vane nyota chinomwiwa." 
Isaiah32:7 Mitoo yomunyengeri yakaipa; anofunga mano akaipa, kuti aparadze vanyoro namashoko enhema, kunyange anoshaiwa achitaura zvakanaka." 
Isaiah32:8 Asi akarurama anofunga zvinhu zvakarurama; anorambira panzira yezvakarurama. 
Isaiah32:9 Simukai, imwi vakadzi vagere zvakanaka, munzwe inzwi rangu; imwi vakunda vasine hanya, teererai kutaura kwangu." 
Isaiah32:10 Nokuti kana kwapfuura gore namazuva, muchatambudzika, imwi vasine hanya; nokuti kukohwiwa kwamazambiringa kuchakona, nguva yokuunganidza haingasviki." 
Isaiah32:11 Dederai, imwi vakadzi vagere zvakanaka; tambudzikai, imwi vasine hanya; zvifukurei, mubvise nguvo dzenyu, muzvisunge zviuno namakudza." 
Isaiah32:12 Vachazvirova zvipfuva nokuda kweminda yaifadza, nomuzambiringa waibereka zvakanaka." 
Isaiah32:13 Panyika yavanhu vangu pachamera mhinzwa norukato; zvirokwazvo, pamusoro pedzimba dzose dzomufaro muguta romufaro." 
Isaiah32:14 Nokuti imba yamambo ichasiyiwa, guta rina vanhu vazhinji richaita dongo; chikomo nenhare zvichashanduka mapako nokusingaperi, panofara mbizi, namafuro ezvipfuwo;" 
Isaiah32:15 kusvikira mweya uchidururwa pamusoro pedu uchibva kumusoro, renje rikaita munda unobereka zvakanaka, nomunda unobereka zvakanaka uchinzi idondo." 
Isaiah32:16 Ipapo kururamisira kuchagara murenje, kururama kuchagara mumunda unobereka zvakanaka." 
Isaiah32:17 Basa rokururama richava rugare, zvibereko zvokururama zvichava kunyarara nokutenda nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah32:18 Vanhu vangu vachagara paugaro vane rugare, napadzimba dzakasimba, napanzvimbo dzokuzorora dzakadzikama." 
Isaiah32:19 Asi chimvuramabwe chichavapo kana dondo richiwa, neguta richaparadzwa chose." 
Isaiah32:20 Makaropafadzwa imwi munokusha pose panemvura, munosundira makumbo enzombe neembongoro." 
Isaiah33:1 Une nhamo, iwe unoparadza, usina kuparadzwa umene; iwe unoita nokunyengera, asi havana kukuitira nokunyengera, iwe! Kana wapedza kuparadza, newewo uchaparadzwa, kana wapedza kuita nokunyengera, vachakuitira nokunyengera newewo." 
Isaiah33:2 Jehovha mutinzwire tsitsi, takakumirirai; ivai ruoko rwedu mangwanani ose, noruponeso rwedu panguva yokutambudzika." 
Isaiah33:3 Marudzi avanhu akatiza achinzwa mubvumo, marudzi akaparadzirwa imwi muchisimuka." 
Isaiah33:4 Zvakapambwa zvenyu zvichaparadzwa, sezvinoparadza gwatakwata; somumhanyiro wemhashu, saizvozvo vanhu vachamhanyira kwazviri." 
Isaiah33:5 Jehovha akakudzwa, nokuti anogara kumusoro; akazadza Ziyoni nokururamisira nokururama." 
Isaiah33:6 Panguva dzako pachava nokugarika, nokuwanda kokuponeswa, nouchenjeri nezivo; kutya Jehovha ndiyo fuma yake." 
Isaiah33:7 Tarirai, mhare dzavo dzinodanidzira dziri kunze; nhume dzorugare dzinochema zvikuru." 
Isaiah33:8 Migwagwa mikuru yaparadzwa, vafambi havachipo; aputsa sungano, azvidza maguta, haane hanya nomunhu." 
Isaiah33:9 Nyika inochema, yaziya; Rebhanoni ranyadziswa, rooma; Sharoni rafanana nerenje; Bhashani neKarimeri azuka mashizha." 
Isaiah33:10 Zvino ndichasimuka, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; zvino ndichazvisimudza, zvino ndichakudzwa." 
Isaiah33:11 Imi muchava napamuviri pehundi, muchabereka mashanga; mweya wenyu moto uchakupedzai." 
Isaiah33:12 Marudzi avanhu achaita sokupiswa kwesuko, semhinzwa yakatemwa, inopiswa nomoto." 
Isaiah33:13 Inzwai, imwi muri kure, zvandakaita, imwi muri pedo, muzive simba rangu.""" 
Isaiah33:14 Vatadzi vari paZiyoni vanotya, vasingadi Mwari, vabatwa nokudedera. ""Ndianiko pakati pedu angagara nomoto unoparadza? Ndiani pakati pedu angagara nokupisa kusingaperi?""" 
Isaiah33:15 Ndiye anofamba nokururama, anotaura zvakarurama; iye anoshora fuma yakawanikwa nokunyengera, anozuza maoko ake achiramba fufuro, anodzivira nzeve dzake, kuti arege kunzwa mashoko eropa, anotsinzina meso ake kuti arege kutarira zvakaipa;" 
Isaiah33:16 iye achagara pakakwirira, nhare dzamatombo dzichava utiziro hwake; zvokudya zvake achazvipiwa, mvura yake haingapwi." 
Isaiah33:17 Meso ako achaona mambo pakunaka kwake, achaona nyika yakakura kwazvo." 
Isaiah33:18 moyo wako ucharangarira nguva yokutya, uchiti, ""Aripiko iye aiverenga, aripiko aiyera mutero? Aripiko aiverenga shongwe?""" 
Isaiah33:19 Haungazooni vanhu vane hasha, vanhu vanorurimi runoshamisa, rwausingagoni kunzwa, rurimi rwokumwe rwausingagoni kunzwisisa." 
Isaiah33:20 Tarirai Ziyoni, iro guta remitambo yedu; meso ako achaona Jerusaremu hwava ugaro hwakadzikama, tende risingazovhomorwi, nebote raro rimwe risingazodamburwi." 
Isaiah33:21 Asi Jehovha achavapo nesu noumambo hwake, ichava nzvimbo ine nzizi nehova dzakafara, magwa anokwasviwa haangasvikipo, nezvikepe zvikuru hazvingapfuuripo." 
Isaiah33:22 Nokuti Jehovha ndiye mutongi wedu, Jehovha ndiye mutemi wemirayiro yedu, Jehovha ndiye mambo wedu; iye achatiponesa." 
Isaiah33:23 Mabote ako akati dembu-tembu; haagoni kusimbisa muromo wapasi wedanda rechikepe chavo, haagoni kutasanura seiri; ipapo zvakatapwa nezvakapambwa zvizhinji zvinogoverwa; zvirema zvinotora zvakatapwa." 
Isaiah33:24 Hakuna ageremo, achati, ""Ndinorwara; vanhu vageremo vachakangamwirwa zvakaipa zvavo.""" 
Isaiah34:1 Swederai, imwi marudzi avanhu, munzwe, teererai imwi vanhu, nyika ngainzwe, nezvose zvayo, pasi pose, nezvose zvinobudamo." 
Isaiah34:2 Nokuti Jehovha akatsamwira marudzi ose, ane hasha nehondo dzawo dzose; akavaparadza chose, akavaisa pakuurawa." 
Isaiah34:3 Vakaurawa vavo vacharaswa kunze, kunhuwa kwezvitunha zvavo kuchakwira, makomo achanyauswa neropa ravo." 
Isaiah34:4 Hondo dzose dzokudenga dzichanyakatika, denga rose richapetwa sorugwaro rwakapetwa; hondo dzaro dzose dzichaoma, sokuoma kwamashizha pamuzambiringa, uye seshizha rinooma pamuonde." 
Isaiah34:5 Nokuti munondo wangu wamwa ukaguta kudenga; tarirai uchaburukira pamusoro paEdhomu, napamusoro pavanhu vakatukwa neni, kuti vatongwe." 
Isaiah34:6 Munondo waJehovha uzere neropa, unobwinya namafuta, neropa ramakwayana nerembudzana, namafuta etsvo dzamakondobwe; nokuti Jehovha ane chibayiro chake paBhozira, nokubaya kukuru panyika yaEdhomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Nyati dzichawa pamwechete navo, nenzombe pamwechete nehandira; nyika yavo ichabatwa neropa, guruva ravo richazara namafuta." 
Isaiah34:8 Nokuti Jehovha ane zuva rokutsiva, negore rokutsiva zvakaitirwa Ziyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Hova dzayo dzichashanduka namo,,huruva rayo sariferi, nyika yavo ichaitwa namo inopfuta." 
Isaiah34:10 Haingadzimwi usiku namasikati; utsi hwayo huchakwira nokusingaperi; richava dongo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi; hakuna munhu angapfuura noko nokusingaperi. 
Isaiah34:11 Asi zvichava zvehukurwizi nenungu; zizi negunguvo zvichagaramo; achatambanudzirapo rwonzi rwokuparadza nechokururamisa chezvisina chinhu. 
Isaiah34:12 Vakuru vayo vachadanirwa kuushe, asi havangavipo; machinda ayo ose achava pasina." 
Isaiah34:13 mhinzwa ichamera mudzimba dzamadzimambo ayo, hutumbambeva norukato munhare dzayo; huchava hugaro hwamakava, nenzvimbo yemhou." 
Isaiah34:14 Zvikara zvomusango zvichasangana namapere, mweya wakaipa uchadana shamwari yawo; zvirokwazvo, chikara chousiku chichagarapo norugare, chichiwanapo nzvimbo yokuzorora." 
Isaiah34:15 Rovambira richaita dendere raropo, nokukandira, nokuchechenya mazai aro, nokuunganidza vana varo mumumvuri waro; zvirokwazvo, ndipo pachaunganira ruvangu, rumwe norumwe neshamwari yarwo." 
Isaiah34:16 Tsvakai pabhuku yaJehovha, murave; hapana chimwe chezvinhu izvi chichashaikwa, chichashaiwa shamwari yacho; nokuti muromo wangu wakarayira izvozvo, nomweya wake wakazviunganidza." 
Isaiah34:17 Iye wakazvikandira mijenya, ruoko rwake rwakazviganhurira nyika norwonzi; ichava yazvo nokusingaperi, vachagaramo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Isaiah35:1 Renje nenyika yakaoma zvichafara; sango richafara kwazvo, richatumbuka seruva." 
Isaiah35:2 Richatumbuka zvizhinji, nokufara kwazvo nomufaro nokuimba; richapiwa kunaka kukuru kweRebhanoni, noukomba bweKarimeri neSharoni; vachaona kunaka kukuru kwaJehovha, ihwo ukomba hwaMwari wedu." 
Isaiah35:3 Simbisai maoko asine simba, mutsigire mabvi anodedera." 
Isaiah35:4 Iti kuna vane moyo inotya, ""Simbai, musatya! Tarirai, Mwari wenyu achauya nokutsiva, nokuripira kwaMwari; achauya achikuponesai.""" 
Isaiah35:5 Ipapo meso amapofu achasvinudzwa, nenzeve dzematsi dzichadziurwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Ipapo anokamhina achakwakuka senondo, rurimi rwembeveve rwuchaimba nokuti mvura zhinji ichadzutuka murenje, nehova dzemvura mugwenga." 
Isaiah35:7 Jecha, rinopisa, richashanduka dziva, nevhu, rine nyota, zvitubu zvemvura; paugaro hwamakava, paaivata, pachava nouswa, netsanga nenhokwe." 
Isaiah35:8 Ipapo pachava nomugwagwa, nenzira, ichanzi, ""Nzira youtsvene;"" ane tsvina haangafambi nayo, asi ichava yavo; vanofamba nayo, kunyange ari mapenzi, havangarashiki." 
Isaiah35:9 Hapangavi neshumba, kunyange nechikara hachingafambipo; hazvingawanikwipo, asi vakadzikunurwa ndivo vachafambapo;" 
Isaiah35:10 vakasunungurwa vaJehovha vachadzoka, vachasvika Ziyoni vachiimba, mufaro usingaperi uchava pamisoro yavo; vachawana mufaro nomoyo muchena, kuchema nokusuwa kuchatiza." 
Isaiah36:1 Zvino negore regumi namana ramambo Hezekia, Saniheribhi mambo weAsiria, akandorwa namaguta ose aJudha akakombwa namasvingo, akaakunda." 
Isaiah36:2 Zvino mambo weAsiria akatuma mukuru wavatariri abve Rakishi aende Jerusaremu kuna mambo Hezekia nehondo huru. Akamira pamugero wedziva rokumusoro pamugwagwa unoenda kumunda womusuki. 
Isaiah36:3 Ipapo Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikia, waichengeta imba yamambo, naShebhina munyori naJoa mwanakomana waAsafi, gurukota guru, vakabudira kwaari." 
Isaiah36:4 Mukuru wavatariri akati kwavari, ""Zvino imwi muti kuna Hezekia, `Zvanzi namambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria, kuvimba uku kwaunovimba nako ndokwei?'" 
Isaiah36:5 Ini ndinoti, mano ako nesimba rokurwa naro mashoko zvawo asina maturo; zvino unovimba naniko, zvawandimukira ini?" 
Isaiah36:6 Tarira, unovimba nomudonzvo worutsanga urwu rwakavhunika, Ijipiti, runoti kana munhu akasendama kwaruri, ruchapinda muruoko rwake, rukamubaya; ndizvo zvakaita Farao mambo weIjipiti kuna vose vanovimba naye." 
Isaiah36:7 Asi kana ukati kwandiri, `Tinovimba naJehovha Mwari wedu,' ko haazi iye akabvisirwa matunhu akakwirira namaaritari ake naHezekia, akati kuna Judha neJerusaremu, `Munofanira kunamata pamberi pearitari iri here?'" 
Isaiah36:8 Naizvozvo zvino chipikiranai henyu natenzi wangu, mambo weAsiria, ndikupe mabhiza ane zviuru zviviri, kana iwe ukagona kuisa vatasvi pamusoro pawo." 
Isaiah36:9 Ungagona seiko kukunda mukuru mumwe kuvaduku vavaranda vatenzi wangu? Zvino wovimba neIjipiti kuti upiwe ngoro namabhiza navo? 
Isaiah36:10 Ini ndauya kuzorwa nenyika ino kuti ndiiparadze ndisina Jehovha kanhi? Ndiye Jehovha akati kwandiri, `Enda undorwa nenyika iyo, uiparadze.' """ 
Isaiah36:11 Ipapo Eriakimu, mwanakomana waHirikia, naShebhina, naJoa vakati kumukuru wavatariri, ""Tinokumbira kuti mutaure henyu navaranda venyu norurimi rwechiAramia, nokuti tinochinzwisisa; murege henyu kutaura nesu norurimi rwavaJudha, vanhu vose vari parusvingo vazvinzwe.""" 
Isaiah36:12 Asi mukuru wavatariri akati kwaari, ""Tenzi wangu akandituma kuna tenzi wako nokwauri here, kuti nditaure mashoko awa? Haana kundituma here kuvanhu vagere pamusoro porusvingo, kuti vadye tsvina yavo nemvura yavo pamwechete nemi?""" 
Isaiah36:13 Ipapo mukuru wavatariri akamira, akadanidzira nenzwi guru norurimi rwavaJudha, akataura akati, ""Inzwai mashoko amambo mukuru, iye mambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah36:14 Zvanzi namambo Hezekia, `Ngaarege kukunyengerai; nokuti haangagoni kukurwirai;" 
Isaiah36:15 Hezekia ngaarege kukuvimbisai naJehovha,' achiti, `Jehovha achatirwira zvirokwazvo; guta iri haringapiwi mumaoko amambo weAsiria.' """ 
Isaiah36:16 Musateerera Hezekia, nokuti zvanzi namambo weAsiria, ""Yananai neni, mubudire kwandiri; mudye mumwe nomumwe muwonde wake, mumwe nomumwe mvura yetsime rake;" 
Isaiah36:17 kusvikira ini ndauya ndikutorei, ndikuisei kunyika yakafanana neyenyu, nyika ine zviyo newaini, nyika ine chingwa neminda yemizambiringa." 
Isaiah36:18 Chenjerai kuti Hezekia arege kukugombedzerai, achiti, `Jehovha achatirwira. Ko mumwe wavamwari vamarudzi akagona kurwira nyika yake paruoko rwamambo weAsiria here?" 
Isaiah36:19 Vamwari veHamati neAripadhi varipi? Vamwari veSefarivhaimi varipi? Vakarwira Samaria paruoko rwangu here? 
Isaiah36:20 Ndavapi pakati pavamwari vose venyika idzi vakarwira nyika yavo paruoko rwangu, zvamunoti Jehovha acharwira Jerusaremu paruoko rwangu?' """ 
Isaiah36:21 Asi vakaramba vanyerere, havana kumupindura shoko rimwe, nokuti murayiro wamambo wakanga uchiti, ""Regai kumupindura.""" 
Isaiah36:22 Zvino Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikia, aichengeta imba, naShebhina munyori, naJoa mwanakomana waAsafi, gurukota guru, vakaenda kuna Hezekia, vakabvarura nguvo dzavo, vakamuudza mashoko omukuru wavatariri." 
Isaiah37:1 Zvino mambo Hezekia akati achizvinzwa, akabvarura nguvo dzake, akafuka makudza, akapinda mumba maJehovha." 
Isaiah37:2 Akatuma Eriakimu aichengeta imba, naShebhina munyori, navakuru vavaprista, vakafuka makudza, kumuporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi." 
Isaiah37:3 Vakati kwaari, ""Zvanzi naHezekia, `Nhasi izuva rokutambudzika, nerokutukwa, nerokuzvidzwa; nokuti vana vakasvika pakuzvarwa, asi hakuna simba rokuzvara naro." 
Isaiah37:4 Zvimwe Mwari wenyu achanzwa mashoko ose omukuru wavatariri, akatumwa namambo weAsiria tenzi wake, kuzvidza Mwari mupenyu, agovatuka pamusoro pamashoko aakanzwa iye Jehovha Mwari wenyu; naizvozvo nyengetererai vakasara.' """ 
Isaiah37:5 Naizvozvo varanda vamambo Hezekia vakasvika kuna Isaya. 
Isaiah37:6 Isaya akati kwavari, ""Udzai tenzi wenyu, muti, zvanzi naJehovha, `Usatya hako mashoko awanzwa, andakamhurwa nawo navaranda vamambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah37:7 Tarira, ndichaisa mweya wokutya mukati make, achanzwa guhu, ndokudzokera kunyika yake; ndichamuurayisa nomunondo munyika yake.' """ 
Isaiah37:8 Naizvozvo mukuru wavatariri akadzoka, akawana mambo weAsiria achirwa neRibhina, nokuti akanga anzwa kuti wabva Rakishi." 
Isaiah37:9 Zvino akanzwa pamusoro paTirihaka mambo weltiopia, zvichinzi, ""Auya kuzorwa newe."" Zvino akati azvinzwa, akatuma nhume kuna Hezekia, achiti," 
Isaiah37:10 Endai mundoudza Hezekia mambo waJudha, muti, `Mwari wako, waunovimba naye, ngaarege kukunyengera,' achiti, `Jerusaremu haringapiwi muruoko rwamambo weAsiria.'" 
Isaiah37:11 Tarira, wakanzwa zvakaitirwa nyika dzose namadzimambo eAsiria, kuti vakadziparadza chose; zvino iwe ucharwirwa here?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ko vamwari vamamwe marudzi vakavarwira here, iwo akaparadzwa namadzibaba angu, vanoti, Gozani, naHarani, naRezefi, navana vaEdheni, vaiva paTerasari?" 
Isaiah37:13 Mambo weHamati ariko, namambo weAripadhi, namambo weguta reSafarivhaimi, neHena, neIvha?""" 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekia akagamuchira tsamba pamaoko enhume, akairava; Hezekia akakwira kumba kwaJehovha, akaipetenura pamberi paJehovha." 
Isaiah37:15 Ipapo Hezekia akanyengetera kuna Jehovha, achiti," 
Isaiah37:16 Haiwa Jehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, iye ugere pamusoro pamakerubhimi! Ndimi Mwari, imwi moga, woushe hwose bwenyika, ndimi makaita kudenga napasi." 
Isaiah37:17 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu, Jehovha, munzwe; svinudzai meso enyu, Jehovha, muone; inzwai mashoko ose aSaniheribhi, akatuma nhume kuzozvidza Mwari mupenyu." 
Isaiah37:18 Zvirokwazvo, Jehovha, madzimambo eAsiria akaparadza marudzi ose nenyika dzawo," 
Isaiah37:19 akakandira vamwari vavo mumoto; nokuti vakanga vasi vamwari, asi rakanga riri basa ramaoko avanhu, ari matanda namabwe; naizvozvo akavaparadza." 
Isaiah37:20 Naizvozvo zvino, Jehovha, Mwari wedu, tiponesei paruoko rwake, kuti ushe hwose bwenyika huzive kuti ndimi Jehovha, iyemi moga.""" 
Isaiah37:21 Ipapo Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi, akatuma shoko kuna Hezekia, akati, ""Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari waIsiraeri, `Zvawanyengetera kwandiri pamusoro paSaniheribhi mambo weAsiria,'" 
Isaiah37:22 heri shoko rakataurwa naJehovha, pamusoro pake, `Mhandara, mukunda weZiyoni, wakakushora nokukuseka; mukunda weJerusaremu wakakudzungudzira musoro wake.'" 
Isaiah37:23 Ndianiko wawakatuka nokuzvidza? Wakazvikudza kuna aniko nenzwi rako, meso ako akatarira aniko kudenga? NdiMutsvene waIsiraeri!" 
Isaiah37:24 Watuka Jehovha navaranda vako, ukati, `Ndakwira kumakomo marefu nengoro dzangu zhinji, kunzvimbo dzomukati dzeRebhanoni; ndichatema misidhari mirefu iripo, nemisiperesi yakatsaurwa iripo, ndichipa kusvikira kumusoro-soro kwaro, kudondo raro rinobereka zvakanaka;" 
Isaiah37:25 ndakachera ndikamwa mvura, ndichapwisa nzizi dzose dzeIjipiti nokutsika netsoka dzangu.'" 
Isaiah37:26 Hauna kunzwa here kuti ndakazviita kare, kuti ndakazvirayira nenguva dzokutanga-tanga? Zvino ndakarayira zviitike, kuti iwe uve muparadzi wamaguta akakombwa namasvingo, ave matongo." 
Isaiah37:27 Naizvizvo vakanga vageremo vakanga vane simba duku, vakavhundutswa nokunyadziswa; vakafanana nouswa bwebundo, nomuriwo mutema, nouswa huri pamusoro peimba, nomunda wezviyo zvigere kukura." 
Isaiah37:28 Asi ndinoziva kugara kwako pasi, nokubuda kwako, nokupinda kwako, uye hasha dzako kwandiri." 
Isaiah37:29 Nokuda kwehasha dzako kwandiri, uye nokuti ndakanzwa, kuzvikudza kwako, ndichaisa rwauro rwangu mumhino dzako, netomu rangu mumiromo yako, ndikudzosere nenzira yawakauya nayo." 
Isaiah37:30 Ichi ndicho chichava chiratidzo kwauri: nhaka muchadya zvinongomera zvoga, negore rechipiri muchadya zvinomerazve kwazviri; asi negore rechitatu munofanira kudzvara, nokukohwa, nokusima minda yemizambiringa, mudye michero yayo." 
Isaiah37:31 Zvino vakasara vakapukunyuka veimba yaJudha, vachaitazve midzi pasi, nokubereka michero kumusoro." 
Isaiah37:32 Nokuti vakasara vachabuda Jerusaremu, navakapukunyuka pagomo reZiyoni; kushingaira kwaJehovha kuchazviita." 
Isaiah37:33 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pamambo weAsiria, `Haangapindi muguta rino, kana kuposhera museve imomo, kana kusvika pamberi paro nenhovo, kana kututira gomo revhu kwariri.'" 
Isaiah37:34 Zvanzi naJehovha, `Nenzira yaakauya nayo, achadzokerazve nayo; haangapindi muguta rino." 
Isaiah37:35 Nokuti ndichadzivirira guta rino, ndiriponese nokuda kwangu ini, uye nokuda komuranda wangu Dhavhidhi.'" 
Isaiah37:36 Zvino mutumwa waJehovha akabuda, akauraya vanhu vane zviuru zvine zana namakumi masere nezvishanu pamisasa yavaAsiria; zvino vanhu vakati vachimuka mangwanani, vakawana zvava zvitunha zvose." 
Isaiah37:37 Naizvozvo Saniheribhi mambo weAsiria akabva, akaenda, akadzokera kwakare, akandogara Ninivhe." 
Isaiah37:38 Zvino akati achinamata mumba maNisiroki, mwari wake, Adhiramereki naSharezeri vanakomana vake, vakamuuraya nomunondo, ivo vakatizira kunyika yeArarati. Esarihadhoni akamutevera paushe.""" 
Isaiah38:1 Zvino namazuva iwayo Hezekia akarwara, akasvikira pakufa. Muporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi akasvika kwaari, akati kwaari, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, `Chirayira nhaka yako, nokuti uchafa, haungararami.' """ 
Isaiah38:2 Ipapo Hezekia akatendeukira kumadziro, akanyengetera kuna Jehovha," 
Isaiah38:3 akati, ""Dorangarirai henyu, Jehovha, kuti ndakafamba pamberi penyu nechokwadi nomoyo wose, ndikaita zvakanaka pamberi penyu."" Hezekia akachema kwazvo." 
Isaiah38:4 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Isaya, richiti," 
Isaiah38:5 Enda undoti kuna Hezekia, zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wababa vako Dhavhidhi, `Ndanzwa kunyengetera kwako, ndaona misodzi yako; tarira, ndichawedzera pamazuva ako makore ane gumi namashanu." 
Isaiah38:6 Ndichakurwira iwe neguta rino paruoko rwamambo weAsiria; uye ndichadzivirira guta rino.' 
Isaiah38:7 Hechi chiratidzo chaJehovha kwauri, kuti Jehovha achaita chinhu ichi chaakataura." 
Isaiah38:8 Tarira, ndichadzosa mumvuri pamitaro, yakanga yakadzira nezuva pachikati chaAhazi, udzoke mitaro ine gumi."" Naizvozvo zuva rakadzoka mitaro ine gumi pachikati chaAhazi, pawakanga wadzikira." 
Isaiah38:9 Horwu runyoro rwaHezekia mambo waJudha, panguva yaakanga arwara, akaporazve pakurwara kwake." 
Isaiah38:10 Ndakati, ndichapinda pamasuo eSheori achiri masikati pamazuva angu; Ndatorerwa makore angu akanga asara." 
Isaiah38:11 Ndakati, handichazooni Jehovha, iye Jehovha, panyika yavapenyu; Handichazooni vanhu pamwechete navagere panyika." 
Isaiah38:12 Ugaro hwangu hwaputswa, hwabviswa kwandiri setende romufudzi; Ndapeta upenyu hwangu, somuruki, uchandigura pachirukiso; Muchandigumisa kubvira mangwanani kusvikira madekwana." 
Isaiah38:13 Ndakachema kusvikira kwaedza; unovhuna mapfupa angu ose seshumba; Muchandigumisa kubvira mangwanani kusvikira madekwana. 
Isaiah38:14 Ndakarira senyenganyenga kana kondo; Ndakachema senjiva; meso angu akapera nokutarira kumusoro; Haiwa Jehovha, ndakamanikidzwa, ivai mumiririri wangu imi." 
Isaiah38:15 Ndingatiiko? Ndiye akataura neni, ndiye akazviita; Ndichanyasa kufamba makore angu ose, nokuda kokurwadziwa komoyo wangu." 
Isaiah38:16 Ishe, vanhu vanorarama nezvinhu izvozvi; Upenyu hwose hwomweya wangu huri mazviri; Naizvozvo ndiporesei, mundiraramise." 
Isaiah38:17 Tarirai, kutambudzika kwangu kukuru kwakazondivigira rugare; Asi makarwira mweya wangu norudo pagomba rokuparadzwa; Nokuti makarasira zvivi zvangu zvose shure kwenyu." 
Isaiah38:18 Nokuti Sheori harigoni kukuvongai, rufu harugoni kukurumbidzai; Vanoburukira kugomba havangagoni kutarira zvokwadi yenyu." 
Isaiah38:19 Mupenyu, mupenyu, ndiye uchakuvongai, sezvandinoita nhasi; baba vachazivisa vana vavo zvokwadi yenyu." 
Isaiah38:20 Jehovha akazvigadzirira kundiponesa; Naizvozvo tichaimba nziyo dzangu nemitengeramwa Mazuva ose oupenyu bwedu mumba maJehovha. 
Isaiah38:21 Zvino Isaya akanga ati, ""Ngavatore bundu, ramawonde varinamire pamota, ipapo achapora.""" 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiawo akanga ati, ""Chiratidzo ndechipi kuti ndichakwira kuimba yaJehovha?""" 
Isaiah39:1 Zvino nenguva iyo Merodhaki bharadhani mwanakomana wa Bharadhani, mambo weBhabhironi, akatuma tsamba nechipo kuna Hezekia; nokuti akanga anzwa kuti airwara akaporazve." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia akafara pamusoro pavo, akavaratidza imba yakanga ine zvinokosha zvake, sirivha, nendarama, nezvinonhuhwira, namafuta anokosha, neimba yaiva nenhumbi dzake dzose dzokurwa nadzo, nezvose zvakanga zviri pafuma yake; kwakanga kusisina chinhu mumba make, kana muushe hwake hwose, chavasina kuratidzwa naHezekia." 
Isaiah39:3 Zvino muporofita Isaya akasvika kuna mambo Hezekia, akati kwaari, ""Varume ava vakati kudiniko? Vakasvika kwauri vachibvepi?"" Hezekia akati, ""Vakanga vabva kunyika iri kure, Bhabhironi vachiuya kwandiri.""" 
Isaiah39:4 Ipapo akati, ""Vakaonei mumba mako?"" Hezekia akapindura, akati, ""Vakaona zvose zviri mumba mangu; hakune chinhu pakati pefuma yangu chandisina kuvaratidza.""" 
Isaiah39:5 Ipapo Isaya akati kuna Hezekia, ""Inzwa shoko raJehovha wehondo," 
Isaiah39:6 ‘Tarira, mazuva achasvika, nenguva iyo zvose zviri mumba mako, nezvose zvakaunganidzwa namadzibaba ako kusvikira zuva ranhasi, zvichaiswa Bhabhironi, hakuna chinhu chichasiyiwa,' ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah39:7 Vamwe vanakomana vako, vachabva kwauri, vauchabereka, vachatapwa; vachava varanda mumba mamambo weBhabhironi.""" 
Isaiah39:8 Ipapo Hezekia akati kuna Isaya, ""Shoko raJehovha ramataura rakanaka haro."" Akatiwo, ""Nokuti rugare nezvokwadi zvichavapo pamazuva angu.""" 
Isaiah40:1 Nyaradzai, nyaradzai vanhu vangu,"" ndizvo zvinoreva Mwari wenyu." 
Isaiah40:2 Taurirai zvingavaraidza Jerusaremu, danidzirai kwavari kuti kurwa kwavo kwapera, kuti zvakaipa zvavo zvakangamwirwa, kuti vapiwa noruoko rwaJehovha kurohwa kwakaringana pamusoro pezvivi zvavo.""" 
Isaiah40:3 Inzwi rounodanidzira, achiti, ""Gadzirai murenje nzira yaJehovha, ruramisirai Mwari wedu mugwagwa musango." 
Isaiah40:4 Mipata yose ichazadzwa, makomo ose nezvikomo zvose zvichaderedzwa; pana makoronga pachaenzaniswa; Pasakaenzana pachaitwa bani;" 
Isaiah40:5 kubwinya kwaJehovha kucharatidzwa, vanhu vose vachazviona pamwechete nokuti muromo waJehovha wakataura izvozvo.""" 
Isaiah40:6 Inzwi roanoti, ""Danidzirai!"" Mumwe akati, ""Ndichadanidzireiko?"" Vanhu vose uswa, kunaka kwazvo kose kwakaita seruva rokusango." 
Isaiah40:7 Uswa hunowoma, ruva rinosvava, nokuti mweya waJehovha unofuridza pamusoro pazvo; zvirokwazvo vanhu uswa." 
Isaiah40:8 Huswa hunooma, ruva rinosvava; asi shoko raMwari wedu richagara nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah40:9 Nhai, iwe, unoparidzira Ziyoni mashoko akanaka, kwira pagomo refu; nhai, iwe, unoparidzira Jerusaremu mashoko akanaka, danidzira nesimba, danidzira, usatya; uti kumaguta aJudha, ""Tarirai, Mwari wenyu!""" 
Isaiah40:10 Tarirai, Ishe Jehovha achauya somunhu ane simba, ruoko rwake ruchamubatira ushe; tarirai, mubayiro wake anawo, zvaanoripirwa zviri pamberi pake." 
Isaiah40:11 Achafudza boka rake somufudzi, achaunganidza makwayana ake mumaoko ake, nokuatakura pachipfuva chake, achanyatso kutungamirira nhunzvi dzinomwisa." 
Isaiah40:12 Ndianiko akayera mvura zhinji muchanza choruoko rwake, nokuyera denga napanosvika mimwe, nokuenzanisa guruva rapasi nechiyero, nokuyera kurema kwamakomo nechiedzo, nezvikomo nechiyero?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ndianiko wakayera Mweya waJehovha, kana akamudzidzisa achimurayira namano?" 
Isaiah40:14 Akarangana nani, ndiyani akamurayira nokumudzidzisa nzira yokururamisira, nokumudzidzisa zivo, nokumuratidza nzira yenjere here?" 
Isaiah40:15 Tarirai, marudzi avanhu akaita sedomwe remvura muchirongo, anenge guruva shomanene pachiyero; tarirai, anosimudza zvivi sechinhu chiduku-duku." 
Isaiah40:16 Rebhanoni harine huni dzingaringana kuvesera, kunyange mhuka dzaro hadziringani kuitwa zvipiriso zvingapiswa." 
Isaiah40:17 Marudzi ose anoverengwa pamberi pake \add se\add*zmashoma kupfuvura pasina seasina maturo. 
Isaiah40:18 Zvino mungafananidza Mwari naniko? Kana mungamuenzanisa nomufananidzo upiko? 
Isaiah40:19 Kana uri mufananidzo, muumbi wakaumba, mupfuri wendarama anounamira nendarama, ndokuupfurira ngetani dzesirivha." 
Isaiah40:20 Murombo anoshaiwa chipo chakadaro, anosanangura muti asingawori; anozvitsvakira mhizha yakachenjera ingamuvezera mufananidzo usingazununguki." 
Isaiah40:21 Hamuna kuziva here? Hamuna kunzwa here? Hamuna kuzviudzwa kubva pakutanga here? Hamuna kunzwisisa kubva pakuteyiwa kwenyika here? 
Isaiah40:22 Ndiye agere kumusoro kwenyika yakaurungana, vanhu vagerepo vakaita semhashu; ndiye anotatamura denga somucheka, nokuriwaridza setende kuti agaremo;" 
Isaiah40:23 ndiye anoderedza machinda kusvikira oita saasipo, vatongi venyika anovaita sechinhu chisina maturo." 
Isaiah40:24 Zvirokwazvo, havana kusimwa, zvirokwazvo, havana kudzvarwa, zvirokwazvo, hunde yavo haina kubata pasi; zvino wofuridza pamusoro pavo, vooma, nechamupupuri chinovabvisa sehundi." 
Isaiah40:25 Ko zvino mungandifananidza nani, kuti ndienzane naye? Ndizvo zvinotaura Mutsvene." 
Isaiah40:26 Tarirai kumusoro nameso enyu, muone kuti ndiani akasika izvozvi, anobudisa hondo yazvo yakawanda; iye anozvidana zvose namazita azvo; nokuda koukuru bwesimba rake, uye zvaari mukuru pakusimba kwake, hakune chimwe chinoshaikwa." 
Isaiah40:27 Unorevereiko, iwe Jakobho, unotaurireiko iwe Isiraeri, uchiti, ""Nzira yangu haizikamwi naJehovha, Mwari wangu anondidarika asingandiruramisiri?" 
Isaiah40:28 Hauna kuziva here? Hauna kunzwa here? Mwari asingaperi, Jehovha, Musiki wamativi ose enyika, haaziyi, haaneti; njere dzake hadzingazikamwi.""" 
Isaiah40:29 Vanoziya anovapa simba; anoshaiwa simba anomuwedzera simba rake. 
Isaiah40:30 Kunyange navakomana vachaziya nokuneta, namajaya achawira pasi chose;" 
Isaiah40:31 asi vanomirira Jehovha vachawana simba idzva; vachabhururuka namapapiro samakondo, vachamhanya vasinganeti, vachafamba vasingaziyi." 
Isaiah41:1 Nyararai pamberi pangu, imwi zviwi; vanhu ngavawane simba idzva, ngavaswedere, ipapo ngavataure; ngatiswedere pamwechete kutongerwa mhaka." 
Isaiah41:2 Ndianiko wakamutsa mumwe kumabvazuva, anokunda pose-pose paa notsika? Ndianiko anomupa marudzi avanhu, achimubatisa madzimambo paushe hwake? Anovaisa pamunondo wake seguruva, napauta hwake sehundi inodzingwa nemhepo." 
Isaiah41:3 Anodzingana navo, ndokupfuura hake zvakanaka nenzira yaasina kumbotsika netsoka dzake." 
Isaiah41:4 Ndianiko akabata basa iro nokuzviita? Ndiye anodana marudzi kubvira pakutanga; ini Jehovha, wokutanga, nowokupedzisira." 
Isaiah41:5 Zviwi zvakaona, zvikatya; migumo yenyika inodedera, inoswedera, youya." 
Isaiah41:6 Mumwe nomumwe anobatsira wokwake; anoti kuhama yake, ""Tsunga hako moyo.""" 
Isaiah41:7 Saizvozvo muvezi anosimbisa mupfuri wendarama, nowanopfura nenyundo anosimbisa anorova panhera, achiti, ""Pamusoro pokunamatidza. Zvakanaka; ndokuzvirovera nembambo kuti zvirege kuzununguka." 
Isaiah41:8 Asi iwe Isiraeri, muranda wangu, Jakobho, wandakasanangura, vana vaAbhurahamu shamwari yangu," 
Isaiah41:9 iwe wandakatora kumigomo yenyika, ndikakudana kumakona ayo, ndikati kwauri, `Uri muranda wangu, ndakakusanangura, handina kukurasha.'" 
Isaiah41:10 Usatya, nokuti ndinewe; usavhunduka, nokuti ndiri Mwari wako; ndichakusimbisa, zvirokwazvo, ndichakubatsira; zvirokwazvo, ndichakutsigira noruoko rwangu rworudyi rune simba." 
Isaiah41:11 Tarira, vose vanokutsamwira, vachanyadziswa vave nenyadzi; vanokakavara newe vachava sechinhu chisipo, vachaparara." 
Isaiah41:12 Uchavatsvaka, asi haungavawani, ivo vanokakavara newe; vanorwa newe vachava sechinhu chisipo, sechinhu chisina maturo." 
Isaiah41:13 Nokuti ini Jehovha, Mwari wako, ndichabata ruoko rwako rworudyi, ndichiti kwauri, `Usatya, ini ndichakubatsira.'" 
Isaiah41:14 Usatya, Jakobho iwe honye, nemwi varume vaIsiraeri; ini ndichakubatsira, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, mudzikunuri wako ndiye Mutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah41:15 Tarira, ndakakuita mupuro mutsva, unopinza, unameno; uchapura makomo, nokuaputsa-putsa, uchaita zvikomo zvive sehundi." 
Isaiah41:16 Uchaaurutsa, achatorwa nemhepo, chamupupuri chichaaparadzira kose; iwe uchafarira Jehovha, nokuzvirumbidza noMutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah41:17 Varombo navanoshayiwa vanotsvaka mvura, asi haipo, marimi avo anooma nenyota; ini, Jehovha ndichavapindura, ini Mwari walsiraeri, handingavarasi." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndichazarura nzizi pamakomo asine miti, namatsime pakati pemipata; renje ndichariita dziva remvura, nenyika yakaoma zvitubu zvemvura." 
Isaiah41:19 Ndichasima parenje miti yemisidhari, nemiakasia, nemimirite, nemiorivhi; ndichaisa musango misiperesi, nemipani,nemifiri iyo yose;" 
Isaiah41:20 kuti vanhu vaone, nokuziva, nokurangarira, nokunzwisisa, kuti ruoko rwaJehovha ndirwo rwakaita izvozvo, uye kuti Mutsvene waIsiraeri ndiye wakazvisika.""" 
Isaiah41:21 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Revai mhaka yenyu;"" zvanzi namambo waJakobho, ""Uyai namashoko enyu akasimba.""" 
Isaiah41:22 Ngavauye nawo, vatiudze zvichaitwa, tiudzei zvinhu zvakare, kuti ndezvei, kuti tizvirangarire, tizive kuguma kwazvo; kana mutizivise zvichazovapo." 
Isaiah41:23 Tiudzei zvinhu zvichazovapo pashure, tizive kuti muri vamwari; zvirokwazvo, itai zvakanaka, kana itai zvakaipa, kuti tishamiswe, tizvione tose pamwechete." 
Isaiah41:24 Tarirai imwi hamuzi chinhu, nebasa renyu harizi chinhu; anokusanangurai anonyangadza." 
Isaiah41:25 Ndamutsa mumwe anobva kurutivi rwokumusoro, zvino wasvika; mumwe anobva kumabudazuva, anodana zita rangu; iye achatsika vabati samatope, somuumbi anokanya ivhu." 
Isaiah41:26 Ndianiko wakatiudza izvozvo kubvira pakutanga, kuti tizive? Napanguva yakare, kuti titi, ""Zvirokwazvo?"" Zvirokwazvo, hakuna anotiudza, zvirokwazvo, hakuna anotiratidza, zvirokwazvo, hakuna anonzwa mashoko enyu." 
Isaiah41:27 Ndini ndichatanga kuti kuZiyoni, ""Tarirai, tarirai, havo; ndichatumira Jerusaremu nhume inouya namashoko akanaka.""" 
Isaiah41:28 Kana ndichitarira, hakuna munhu; pakati pavo hakuna anogona kurayirira, angapindura shoko, kana ndichivabvunza." 
Isaiah41:29 Tarirai, ava vose havana maturo, mabasa avo haana maturo, haazi chinhu; mifananidzo yavo yakaumbwa imhepo nezvisina maturo." 
Isaiah42:1 Tarirai muranda wangu wandinotsigira, musanangurwa wangu anofadza mweya wangu. Ndakaisa Mweya wangu pamusoro pake, achavigira marudzi kururamisirwa." 
Isaiah42:2 Haangadani, kana kudanidzira nenzwi rake, kana kunzwisa inzwi rake panzira dzomumusha." 
Isaiah42:3 Rutsanga rwakapwanyika haangaruvhuni, nomwenje unopfungaira haangaudzimi; achavigira vanhu kururamisirwa muchokwadi." 
Isaiah42:4 lye haangapfungairi kana kupwanyiwa, kusvikira agadza kururama panyika; zvivi zvichamirira murayiro wake." 
Isaiah42:5 Zvanzi naMwari iye akasika denga rose, akaritatamura, iye akatambanudza nyika nezvinobvamo, iye anopa vanhu varimo kufema, navanofambapo mweya wavo," 
Isaiah42:6 Ini Jehovha ndakudana nokururama, ndichabata ruoko rwako, ndichakuchengeta, ndikuite sungano yavanhu, uye chiedza chamarudzi;" 
Isaiah42:7 usvinudze meso asingaoni, ubudise vasungwa patirongo, navagere murima paimba yokusungwa." 
Isaiah42:8 Ndini Jehovha, ndiro zita rangu; kukudzwa kwangu handingakupi mumwe, kana kurumbidzwa kwangu kumifananidzo yakavezwa." 
Isaiah42:9 Tarirai, zvinhu zvakare zvaitika, ndinoparidza zvinhu zvitsva; ndinokuudzai izvozvo zvisati zvabukira.""" 
Isaiah42:10 Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva, murumbidzei kubvira pamigumo yenyika; imi, munoburukira kugungwa, nezvose zviri mukati maro, zviwi navagere pazviri." 
Isaiah42:11 Renje namaguta aro ngazvidanidzire, nemisha inogarwa naKedhari; vagere mumatombo ngavaimbe, ngavadanidzire vari pamusoro pamakomo." 
Isaiah42:12 Ngavakudze Jehovha, vaparidzire zviwi kurumbidzwa kwake." 
Isaiah42:13 Jehovha achabuda semhare, achamutsa kushingaira somunhu wokurwa; achadana, zvirokwazvo, achadanidzira, acharwa navavengi vake nesimba." 
Isaiah42:14 Ndakanyarara nguva refu, ndakaramba ndinyerere, ndikazvidzora; zvino ndichachema somukadzi ari kusununguka, ndichafemedzeka nokutakwaira pamwechete." 
Isaiah42:15 Ndichaparadza makomo nezvikomo, nokuomesa zvose zvinomerapo; nzizi ndichadziita zviwi, namadziva ndichaapisa." 
Isaiah42:16 Mapofu ndichaafambisa nenzira yaasingazivi, pamakwara aasingazivi ndichaatungamirira; rima ndichariita chiedza pamberi pavo, nezvakakombama ndichazviruramisa. Zvinhu izvi ndichazviita, handingavasiyi." 
Isaiah42:17 Vanovimba nemifananidzo yakavezwa, vanoti kumifananidzo yakaumbwa, ""Imi muri vamwari vedu,"" ivo vadzoserwa shure, vachanyadziswa kwazvo." 
Isaiah42:18 Inzwai, imwi matsi; tarirai, imwi mapofu, muone." 
Isaiah42:19 Ndianiko bofu, haazi iye muranda wangu here? Ndiani matsi, senhume yangu yandinotuma?" 
Isaiah42:20 Anoona zvinhu zvizhinji, asi haacherekedzi; nzeve dzake dzakadziuka, asi haanzwi." 
Isaiah42:21 Zvakafadza Jehovha, nokuda kokururama kwake, kukudza murayiro nokuurumbidza" 
Isaiah42:22 Asi ava ndavanhu vakatorerwa nokupambarwa; vose vakateyiwa mumakomba, vakavanzwa mudzimba dzokusungwa, vava chinhu chakatapwa, hakuna anovarwira, chinhu chakapambwa, hakuna anoti, ""Dzosa!""" 
Isaiah42:23 Ndianiko pakati penyu acharerekera nzeve dzake kune chinhu ichi? Achateerera nokunzwa panguva inouya? 
Isaiah42:24 Ndianiko akarega Jakobho apambwe, nalsiraeri awirwe namakororo? Haazi Jehovha here? Iye watakatadzira, wavakaramba kufamba nenzira dzake, wavakaramba kuteerera murayiro wake." 
Isaiah42:25 Naizvozvo akadurura pamusoro pake kutsamwa kwake kukuru, nesimba rokurwa; zvikamupisira kumativi ose, asingazvizivi; zvikamupisa, asi akanaga asine hanya nazvo." 
Isaiah43:1 Asi zvino zvanzi naJehovha, akakusika, iwe Jakobho, akakuumba, iwe Isiraeri, ""Usatya hako, nokuti ndini ndakakudzikunura; ndakakudana nezita rako, uri wangu." 
Isaiah43:2 Kana uchipinda nomumvura zhinji, ndichava newe, kana nomunzizi, hadzingakunyudzi; kana uchifamba nomumoto, haungatsvi, nomurazvo haungakupisi." 
Isaiah43:3 Nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wako; ndakaisa Ijipiti ruve rudzikunuro rwako, Itiopia neShebha panzvimbo yako." 
Isaiah43:4 Zvawakanga uchikosha pamberi pangu, uchikudzwa nokudikamwa neni, naizvozvo ndichaisa vanhu panzvimbo yako, namarudzi avanhu panzvimbo youpenyu hwako." 
Isaiah43:5 Usatya hako, nokuti ndinewe; ndichauyisa vana vako vabve kumabvazuva, nokukuunganidza ubve kumavirazuva;" 
Isaiah43:6 ndichati kurutivi rwokumusoro, varege; nokurutivi rwezasi, usavadzivisa; uyai navanakomana vangu vari kure, navakunda vangu vari kumigumo yenyika;" 
Isaiah43:7 mumwe nomumwe anodamwa nezita rangu, wandakasika kuti ndikudzwe, wandakaumba, zvirokwazvo, wandakaita.""" 
Isaiah43:8 Uyai namapofu, ana meso hawo, nematsi, dzine nzeve hadzo." 
Isaiah43:9 Marudzi ose ngaaunganidzwe pamwechete, navanhu vakokerwe; ndianiko pakati pavo angatiudza izvozvi, angatiratidza zvinhu zvakare? Ngavauye nezvapupu zvavo, varuramiswe; ngavanzwe, vati, ""Ichokwadi.""" 
Isaiah43:10 Zvanzi naJehovha, zvapupu zvangu, nomuranda wangu, wandakasanangura, kuti muzive, mugonditenda, munzwisise kuti ndini iye; hakuna mumwe mwari wakanditangira pakuumbwa, shure kwangu hakungazovipo mumwe." 
Isaiah43:11 Ini iyeni, ndini Jehovha, kunze kwangu hakuna mumwe muponesi." 
Isaiah43:12 Ini ndakaparidza, ini ndakaponesa, ini ndakaratidza; kwakanga kusina mwari wokumwe pakati penyu; saka imwi muri zvapupu zvangu, neni ndiri Mwari, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah43:13 Zvirokwazvo, kubva zuva ranhasi ndini iye; hakuna angarwira munhu paruoko rwangu; ini ndichabata basa, ndiani angandidzivisa?""" 
Isaiah43:14 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mudzikunuri wenyu, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, ""Ndakatuma vanhu Bhabhironi, nokuda kwenyu, ndichavaburitsa vose vachitiza, ivo vaKaradhea muzvikepe zvavo zvomufaro." 
Isaiah43:15 Ndini Jehovha, Mutsvene wenyu, Musiki waIsiraeri, Mambo wenyu.""" 
Isaiah43:16 Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, anoita nzira mugungwa, negwara pakati pemvura zhinji ine simba;" 
Isaiah43:17 anobudisa ngoro nebhiza, nehondo neane simba; vanovata pasi pamwechete, havangamukizve; havachapfuti, vadzimwa somwenje." 
Isaiah43:18 Musarangarira zvinhu zvakapfuura, musafunga zvinhu zvakare." 
Isaiah43:19 Tarirai, ndichaita chinhu chitsva; chobuda zvino; hamungachizivi here? Ndichaita nzira murenje, nenzizi musango." 
Isaiah43:20 Mhuka dzebundo dzichandikudza, makava nemhou; nokuti ndinobudisa mvura zhinji murenje, nenzizi musango, kuti ndipe vanhu vangu, ivo vakasanangurwa, vamwe," 
Isaiah43:21 ivo vanhu vandakazviumbira, kuti vaparidze kurumbidzwa kwangu." 
Isaiah43:22 Kunyange zvakadaro hauna kudana kwandiri, iwe Jakobho, asi wakaneta neni, iwe Isiraeri." 
Isaiah43:23 Hauna kundivigira makwai ako zvive zvipiriso zvingapiswa; hauna kundikudza nezvibayiro zvako. Handina kukuremedza kuti uuye nezvipiriso zvoupfu, handina kukunetsa ndichiti uuye nezvinonhuhwira." 
Isaiah43:24 Hauna kunditengera ipwa nemari, hauna kundigutisa namafuta ezvibayiro zvako; asi wakandiremedza nezvivi zvako, wakandinetsa nezvakaipa zvako." 
Isaiah43:25 Ini, iyeni, ndini ndinodzima kudarika kwako nokuda kwangu, handicharangariri zvivi zvako." 
Isaiah43:26 Ndiyeudzire, ngatitaurirane; rondedzera, kuti ururamisirwe." 
Isaiah43:27 Teteguru vako vakatadza, navaporofita vako vakandidarikira." 
Isaiah43:28 Naizvozvo ndakamhura machinda matsvene Jakobho ndakamuita chinhu chakatukwa naIsiraeri chinhu chinosekwa. 
Isaiah44:1 Asi zvino chinzwa, iwe Jakobho, muranda wangu, naIsiraeri wandakasanangura," 
Isaiah44:2 zvanzi naJehovha, akakuita, akakuumba kubvira pachizvaro, achakubatsira, `Usatya hako, iwe Jakobho, muranda wangu, newe Jeshuruni, wandakasanangura." 
Isaiah44:3 Nokuti ndichadira mvura pamusoro penyika ine nyota, nenzizi pamusoro pevhu rakaoma; ndichadira Mweya wangu pamusoro porudzi rwako, nokuropafadza kwangu pamusoro pavana vako;" 
Isaiah44:4 vachamera pakati pouswa, semikonachando pamvura inoyerera.'" 
Isaiah44:5 Mumwe achati, `Ndiri waJehovha,' mumwezve achazvitumidza nezita raJakobho, mumwezve achanyora noruoko rwake, achiti, `Ndiri waJehovha, nokutora zita raIsiraeri.' """ 
Isaiah44:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wavaIsiraeri, noMudzikunuri wavo, Jehovha wehondo, ""Ndini wokutanga nowokupedzisira; kunze kwangu hakuna Mwari." 
Isaiah44:7 Ndianiko angadana seni, nokuzviparidza, nokuzvigadzirira izvo, kubva panguva yandakagadza vanhu vakare-kare? Zvinhu zvinouya, nezvinozoitika, ngavazviparidze izvo." 
Isaiah44:8 Musatya henyu, musavhunduka; handina kukuparidzirai izvozvo kare, nokukuratidzai here? imwi muri zvapupu zvangu. Kunomumwe Mwari kunze kwangu here? Zvirokwazvo, hakune rimwe dombo, ini handirizivi.""" 
Isaiah44:9 Vose vanoita mifananidzo yakavezwa havana maturo, zvinhu zvavanofarira hazvibatsiri; zvapupu zvavo hazvioni uye hazvizivi, kuti vanyadziswe." 
Isaiah44:10 Ndianiko akaita mwari, kana mufananidzo wakaumbwa, zvisingabatsiri chinhu?" 
Isaiah44:11 Tarirai, vose vanomunamatira vachanyadziswa; vakazviita, vanhu havo, ngavaunganidzwe pamwechete, ngavasimuke; vachatya, vachanyadziswa pamwechete." 
Isaiah44:12 Mupfuri anopfura sanhu, anobata namazimbe, nokuriita nenyundo, nokuripfura noruoko rune simba; zvirokwazvo ane nzara, simba rake rinopera, haamwi mvura, ndokuziya." 
Isaiah44:13 Muvezi anotambanudza rwonzi, anotara mufananidzo nepenzura,anounatsa nembezo, unoutara nechienzaniso, ndokuuveza zvakafanana nomunhu, zvakaenzana nomunhu akanaka, kuti ugare mumba." 
Isaiah44:14 Zvino anozvitemera misidhari, ndokutora misipiresi nemiouki, achizvisanangurira mumwe pakati pemiti yomudondo; anosima mupaini, mvura inonaya ndokuukurisa." 
Isaiah44:15 Zvino dzava huni dzomunhu, anotora dzimwe ndokudziya nadzo; zvirokwazvo, anobatidza moto nadzo, ndokubika chingwa; zvirokwazvo, anoveza mwari, ndokumunamata; anoita mufanananidzo wakavezwa, ndokuupfugamira." 
Isaiah44:16 Rumwe rutivi rwawo anopisa nomoto, norumwe rutivi anogocha nyama, anoidya nyama, nokuguta zvirokwazvo, anozvidziyisa, ndokuti, ""Haiwa, ndadziya, ndaona moto.""" 
Isaiah44:17 Nezvakasara anoita mwari, iwo mufananidzo wake wakavezwa; anoupfugamira, nokuunamata, nokunyengetera kwauri, achiti, ""Ndirwirei, nokuti ndimi mwari wangu.""" 
Isaiah44:18 Havazivi, uye havarangariri, nokuti wakanamira meso avo, kuti varege kuona, nemoyo yavo, kuti varege kunzwisisa." 
Isaiah44:19 Hakuna anorangarira, hakuna ruzivo kana njere dzinoti, ""Ndapisa rumwe rutivi rwawo mumoto, zvirokwazvo, ndabika chingwa pamazimbe awo; ndagocha nyama ndikaidya; zvino ndingaita chinonyangadza nezvakasara zvawo here? Ndingapfugamira danda romuti here?""" 
Isaiah44:20 Anozvigutisa namadota; moyo wakanyengerwa wamutsausa, haagoni kusunungura moyo wake, kana kuti, ""Hakuna nhema muruoko rwangu rworudyi here?""" 
Isaiah44:21 Funga zvinhu izvi, iwe Jakobho, naIsiraeri, nokuti ndiwe muranda wangu; ndakakuumba, uri muranda wangu; haiwa Isiraeri, haungakanganikwi neni." 
Isaiah44:22 Ndakadzima kudarika kwako, segore gobvu, nezvivi zvako segore; dzokera kwandiri, nokuti ndakakudzikunura." 
Isaiah44:23 Imba, iwe denga rose, nokuti Jehovha akaita izvozvo; danidzirai, mativi ezasi enyika; imbai zvikuru imwi makomo, iwe dondo, nomuti mumwe nomumwe urimo; nokuti Jehovha akadzikunura Jakobho, achazvirumbidza muna Isiraeri." 
Isaiah44:24 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mudzikunuri wako, akakuumba kubva pachizvaro, ""Ndini Jehovha, anoita zvinhu zvose, anotatamura denga rose iye oga, anotambanudza nyika (ndiani waiva neni?)" 
Isaiah44:25 Iye anoparadza zviratidzo zvavane nhema, anopengesa vauki, anodzosa vachenjeri, achishandura zivo yavo uye upenzi." 
Isaiah44:26 Iye anosimbisa shoko romuranda wake, anoita zvakarayirirwa nenhume dzake; iye anoti pamusoro peJerusaremu, `Richagarwa navanhu,' napamusoro pamaguta aJudha, `Achavakwa, ini ndichamutsa matongo awo;'" 
Isaiah44:27 iye anoti kumvura yakadzika, `Chipwa, uye ndichapwisa nzizi dzako,'" 
Isaiah44:28 iye anoti pamusoro paKoreshi, `Ndiye mufudzi wangu, achaita zvose zvinondifadza,' kana achiti pamusoro peJerusaremu `Richavakwa,' uye pamusoro petemberi, `Nheyo dzako dzichateyiwa.'" 
Isaiah45:1 Zvanzi naJehovha kumuzodzwa wake, kuna Koreshi, wandakabata ruoko rwake rworudyi, kuti ndikunde marudzi avanhu pamberi pake, ndichisunungura zviuno zvamadzimambo, ndimuzarurire misuo pamberi pake, namasuo arege kuzarirwa." 
Isaiah45:2 Ini ndichaenda pamberi pako, ndichienzanisa pasina kuenzana; ndichaputsa-putsa misuo yendarira, nokugura-gura mipfigo yendarama;" 
Isaiah45:3 ndichakupa fuma iri murima, noufumi hwakavanzwa panzvimbo dzisingazikamwi, kuti uzive kuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari walsiraeri, anokudana nezita rako." 
Isaiah45:4 Nokuda kwaJakobho muranda wangu, nokwaIsiraeri musanangurwa wangu, ndakakudana nezita rako, ndakakutumidza zita rakanaka, kunyange wakanga usingandizivi." 
Isaiah45:5 Ndini Jehovha, hakuna mumwe; kunze kwangu hakuna mumwe Mwari. Ndichakusunga chiuno kunyange usina kundiziva;" 
Isaiah45:6 kuti vazive kubva kumabvazuva nokumavirazuva, kuti hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu; ndini Jehovha, hakuna mumwe." 
Isaiah45:7 Ndini ndinoumba chiedza, nokusika rima; ndinoita rugare, nokusika njodzi; ndini Jehovha, anoita zvinhu izvi zvose." 
Isaiah45:8 Iwe denga rose, donhedza zvichibva kumusoro, makore ngaadurure kururama, nyika ngaizaruke, kuti ibudise ruponeso, ibereke kururama pamwechete; ini Jehovha ndakazvisika." 
Isaiah45:9 Ane nhamo anorwa noMuiti wake, icho chaenga pakati pezvaenga zvevhu! Ko ivhu ringati kunowanoriumba, `Unoiteiko? Kana basa rako ringati, `Haana maoko, here?'" 
Isaiah45:10 Ane nhamo anoti kuna baba, `Unoberekeiko?' Kana kumukadzi, `Unozvareiko?' """ 
Isaiah45:11 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mutsvene waIsiraeri, noMuiti wavo, ""Ndibvunzei pamusoro pezvichazoitwa; pamusoro pavanakomana vangu, napamusoro pebasa ramaoko angu, mundirayire." 
Isaiah45:12 Ndakaita nyika, nokusika vanhu pamusoro payo; ini namaoko angu, ndakatatamura denga rose; ndakarayira hondo yose yaro." 
Isaiah45:13 Ndakamumutsa nokururama, ndicharuramisa nzira dzake dzose; iye achavaka guta rangu, nokusunungura vatapwa vangu, asingatsvaki mutengo kana mubayiro,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo." 
Isaiah45:14 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Zvakabatirwa neljipiti, nezvakashambadzirwa neItiopia, navaShabhiya, ivo varume varefu, zvichauya kwauri, zvichava zvako; vachakutevera, vachauya vakasungwa namatare, vachapfugama pamberi pako, vachikunyengera, vachiti, `Zvirokwazvo Mwari uri pakati pako, hakuna mumwe, hakuna mumwe Mwari.' """ 
Isaiah45:15 Zvirokwazvo, muri Mwari anovanda, imwi Mwari waIsiraeri, Muponesi." 
Isaiah45:16 Ivo vose vachanyadziswa vave nenyadzi; vaiti vezvifananidzo vachanyadziswa pamwechete. 
Isaiah45:17 Asi vaIsiraeri vachaponeswa naJehovha noruponeso rusingaperi; hamunganyadziswi kana kuva nenyadzi kusvikira panguva dzisingaperi. 
Isaiah45:18 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha akasika denga rose, iye Mwari akaumba nyika nokuiita, akaisimbisa akasaisika kuti rive dongo, asi akaiumba kuti igarwe, zvanzi naye, ""Ndini Jehovha, hakuna mumwe." 
Isaiah45:19 Handina kutaura pakavanda, panzvimbo yenyika yerima; handina kuti kurudzi rwaJakobho, `Nditsvakei pasina,' ini Jehovha, ndinotaura zvakarurama, ndinoparidza zvechokwadi." 
Isaiah45:20 Unganai, muuye; swederai pamwechete, imwi makapukunyuka kumarudzi; vanotakura matanda iri mifananidzo yavo yakavezwa havana ruzivo, ivo vanonyengetera mwari asingagoni kuponesa." 
Isaiah45:21 Paridzai, muzvibudise; zvirokwazvo, ngavarangane pamwechete, vachiti, `Ndiani akazviratidza izvi kubvira panguva yekare-kare? Ndiani akazviparidza pakutanga?' Handizini Jehovha here? Hakuna mumwe Mwari kunze kwangu, Mwari akarurama noMuponesi, hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu," 
Isaiah45:22 Tarirai kwandiri muponeswe imwi mativi ose enyika nokuti ndini Mwari hakuna mumwe. 
Isaiah45:23 Ndakapika neni ndimene, shoko rabuda mumuromo mangu nokururama haringadzoki namabvi ose achandifugamira, marimi ose achapika neni." 
Isaiah45:24 Zvanzi pamusoro pangu, `Kururama nesimba zviri muna Jehovha bedzi; vanhu vachauya kwaari, vose vakanga vamutsamwira vachanyadziswa." 
Isaiah45:25 Rudzi rwose rwaIsiraeri rucharuramisirwa muna Jehovha, nokuzvirumbidza maari.'" 
Isaiah46:1 Bheri anowira pasi, Nebho anokotama; zvifananidzo zvavo zvezvipfuwo nemombe, zvinhu zvamaitakura zvakaitwa mutoro, wakatakudzwa zvipfuwo zvaneta." 
Isaiah46:2 Vanokotama, vanowira pasi pamwechete, vakakoniwa kununura mutoro, asi ivo vamene vakatapwa." 
Isaiah46:3 Nditeererei, imwi imba yaJakobho, navakasara veimba yaIsiraeri, vakatakurwa neni kubva pakuberekwa kwavo, vakatakudzwa kubva pachizvaro;" 
Isaiah46:4 kusvikira mukukwegura, ndini iye, ndichakutakurai kusvikira vhudzi renyu rachena; ini ndakakuitai, ndichakutakurai, zvirokwazvo ndichakusimudzai, nokukurwirai." 
Isaiah46:5 Muchandifananidza, nokundienzanisa, nokunditi ndakaita sani, wandingafanana naye?" 
Isaiah46:6 Ivo vanodurura ndarama pahombodo, nokuyera sirivha nechiyero, vanoripira mupfuri wendarama, iye ndokuita mwari nayo; zvino vowira pasi, nokunamata." 
Isaiah46:7 Vanomusimudza pamapfudzi, vanomutakura, ndokumugadzika panzvimbo yake, iye ndokumira; haabvi panzvimbo yake, zvirokwazvo, kunyange munhu akadana kwaari, haagoni kupindura, kana kumuponesa pakutambudzika kwake." 
Isaiah46:8 Rangarirai chinhu ichi, muve varume, fungaizve chinhu ichi, imwi vadariki." 
Isaiah46:9 Rangarirai zvinhu zvapfuura zvakare; nokuti ndini Mwari, hakuna mumwe, ndini Mwari, hakuna akafanana neni;" 
Isaiah46:10 iye anodanidzira kubva pakutanga izvo zvichaitika pakupedzisira, nokubva panguva yekare-kare zvinhu zvichigere kuitwa, ndichiti, `Zvandakarayira zvichamira, ndichaita zvose zvandinoda;'" 
Isaiah46:11 ndinodana gondo ribve kumabvazuva,munhu wandakaraira abve kunyika iri kure; zvirokwazvo, ndakataura, ndichazviuyisawo, ndakazvitema, ndichazviitawo." 
Isaiah46:12 Nditeererei, imwi mune moyo mikukutu, imwi muri kure nokururama;" 
Isaiah46:13 Ndichaswededza kururama kwangu, hakungavi kure, noruponeso rwangu harunganonoki; ndichaisa ruponeso paZiyoni, nokubwinya kwangu pakati paIsiraeri.""" 
Isaiah47:1 Buruka, ugare muguruva, iwe mhandara, mukunda weBhabhironi; gara pasi pasine chigaro choushe, iwe mukunda wavaKaradhea; nokuti hauchazonzi unoundere nechidikamwa." 
Isaiah47:2 Tora guyo nehuyo ukuye upfu; bvisa chifukidziro chechiso chako, kurura rokwe rako, fukura gumbo rako, yambuka nzizi." 
Isaiah47:3 Kusafuka kwako kuchava pachena, kunyadzwa kwako kuchaonekwa; ndichazvitsiva, ndisingarangariri munhu." 
Isaiah47:4 Mudzikunuri wedu, zita rake rinonzi Jehovha wehondo, Mutsvene walsiraeri." 
Isaiah47:5 Gara unyerere, upinde murima, iwe mukunda wavaKaradhea; nokuti hauchazonzi Vahosi hwovushe huzhinji." 
Isaiah47:6 Ndakanga ndakatsamwira vanhu vangu, ndakamhura nhaka yangu, ndikavaisa mumaoko ako; iwe hauna kuvanzwira tsitsi, wakaisa joko rako rinorema kwazvo pamusoro pavatana." 
Isaiah47:7 Ukati, ""Ndichava vahosi nokusingaperi;"" naizvozvo hauna kuisa zvinhu izvi muhana yako, hauna kurangarira kuguma kwazvo." 
Isaiah47:8 Naizvozvo zvino chinzwa chinhu ichi, iwe unozvinofadza, ugere zvakasimba, unoti mumoyo mako ""Ndini ndoga, hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu; handingagari ndiri chirikadzi, handingazivi kufirwa navana.""" 
Isaiah47:9 Asi zvinhu izvi zviviri zvichakuwira nechinguva chiduku, nezuva rimwechete, kufirwa navana, nouchirikadzi; zvichakuwira nechiyero chizere, pakati paun'anga hwako huzhinji, nouroyi hwako hwakawanda." 
Isaiah47:10 Nokuti wakavimba nezvakaipa zvako; wakati, ""Hakuna anondiona;"" wakakanganiswa nouchenjeri hwako nezivo yako, ukati mumoyo mako, ""Ndini ndoga, hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu.""" 
Isaiah47:11 Nezvakaipa zvichakuwira, zvausingazivi kuvamba kwazvo; uchawirwa nenjodzi, yausingagoni kubvisa; kuparadzwa kuchakuwira pakarepo, kwausingazivi." 
Isaiah47:12 Zvino uya nouroyi hwako noun'anga hwako huzhinji, hwawakabata nahwo kubva pauduku hwako, zvimwe ungabatsirwa, zvimwe ungava nepundutso." 
Isaiah47:13 Waneta nokuwanda kwamano ako; zvino, vanodudzira zvokudenga, navanocherekedza nyeredzi, navanofembera zvomwedzi mumwe nomumwe ngavasimuke, vakuponese pazvinhu zvichakuwira." 
Isaiah47:14 Tarira, vachaita samashanga, vachapiswa nomoto, havangagoni kuzvirwira pasimba romurazvo; haungavi zimbe rokudziya, kana moto wokudziya." 
Isaiah47:15 Ndizvo zvichaita zvose zvawakabatira; vakashambadzirana newe kubva pauduku hwako, vachadzungaira mumwe nomumwe nenzira yake; pachashaikwa anokuponesa." 
Isaiah48:1 Inzwai izvi, imwi imba yaJakoobho, makatumidzwa zita raIsiraeri, makabuda kumvura zhinji, yaJudha; imi, munopika nezita raJehovha, muchirumbidza Mwari walsiraeri, musingazviiti nechokwadi kana nokururama." 
Isaiah48:2 (Nokuti vanozvidza veguta dzvene, vachisendama kuna Mwari waIsiraeri, zita rake ndiJehovha wehondo)." 
Isaiah48:3 Ndakakuita kuti unzve zvinhu zvakare kubva pakutanga; zvirokwazvo, zvakabuda mumuromo mangu, ndakazvizivisa, ndakazviita kamwe-kamwe, zvikaitika." 
Isaiah48:4 Nokuti ndaiziva kuti moyo wako mukukutu, nomutsipa wako runda rwedare, nehuma yako ndarira;" 
Isaiah48:5 naizvozvo ndakakuparidzira izvozvo kubva pakutanga; ndakakuzivisa izvozvo zvisati zvaitika, kuti urege kuzoti, `Chifananidzo changu ndicho chakaita izvozvo, mufananidzo wangu wakavezwa nomufananidzo wangu wakaumbwa ndizvo zvakarayira izvozvo.'" 
Isaiah48:6 Wakazvinzwa; tarira izvi zvose; zvino imwi hamungazviparidzi here? Ndakakuzivisa zvinhu zvakavanzwa, zvawakanga usingazivi." 
Isaiah48:7 Zvasikwa zvino, zvakanga zvisipo kare; hauna kumbozvinzwa zuva rino risati rasvika; kuti urege kuti, `Tarirai, ndaizviziva.'" 
Isaiah48:8 Zvirokwazvo, hauna kunzwa, zvirokwazvo, hauna kuziva; zvirokwazvo, nzeve dzako dzakanga dzisina kudziurwa kubva panguva yakare; nokuti ndakaziva kuti wakaita nokunyengera, ukanzi mudariki kubva pachizvaro." 
Isaiah48:9 Ndichanonotsa kutsamwa kwangu nokuda kwezita rangu, ndichazvidzora pamusoro pako nokuda kokurumbidzwa kwangu, kuti ndirege kukuparadza." 
Isaiah48:10 Tarira, ndakakunatsa, asi handina kuzviita sesirivha; ndakakuidza mumvoto yokutambudzika." 
Isaiah48:11 Nokuda kwangu, nokuda kwangu, ndichazviita; nokuti zita rangu ringamhurwa sei? Handingapi mumwe kukudzwa kwangu." 
Isaiah48:12 Nditeerere, iwe Jakobho, newe Isiraeri wandakadana ndini iye, ndini wokutanga, ndini wokupedzisirawo." 
Isaiah48:13 Zvirokwazvo, ruoko rwangu rwakateya nheyo dzenyika ruoko rwangu rworudyi rwakatatamura denga rose; kana ndichizvidana, zvinosimuka pamwechete." 
Isaiah48:14 Unganai imwi mose, munzwe; ndianiko pakati pavo akaparidza zvinhu izvi? Iye anodikamwa naJehovha, achaita kuda kwake pamusoro peBhabhironi, ruoko rwake ruchava ""pamusoro"" pavaKaradhea." 
Isaiah48:15 Ini, iyeni, ndini ndakataura izvozvo; zvirokwazvo, ndakamudana, ndakamuuyisa, achafambiswa panzira yakanaka." 
Isaiah48:16 Swederai kwandiri, munzwe chinhu ichi; kubva pakutanga handina kutaura chinyararire;"" kubva panguva yokuitika kwazvo,ndiripo: akandituma, noMweya wake." 
Isaiah48:17 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mudzikunuri wako, Mutsvene walsiraeri, ""Ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, anokudzidzisa zvinokubatsira, anokutungamirira panzira yaunofanira kufamba nayo." 
Isaiah48:18 Haiwa! Dai wakateerera hako mirayiro yangu! Rugare rwako rungadai rwakaita sorwizi, nokururama kwako samafungu egungwa!" 
Isaiah48:19 Vana vako vaiva sejecha, nezvibereko zvomuviri wako setsanga dzaro; zita rake harizaibviswa kana kuparadzwa pamberi pangu.""" 
Isaiah48:20 Ibvai paBhabhironi, tizai vaKaradhea; paridzai nenzwi rokuimba, muzivise izvi, muzvireve kusvikira kumigumo yenyika; muti, ""Jehovha akadzikunura muranda wake Jakobho.""" 
Isaiah48:21 Havana kunzwa nyota nguva yaakavafambisa mumarenje; akavayereresa mvura ichibva padombo, akatsemurawo dombo, mvura zhinji ikadzutuka." 
Isaiah48:22 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Vakaipa havana rugare.""" 
Isaiah49:1 Ndinzwei, imwi zviwi, teererai, imwi marudzi avanhu ari kure, Jehovha akandidana ndiri muchizvaro, akareva zita rangu ndichiri mudumbu ramai vangu;" 
Isaiah49:2 akaita muromo wangu somunondo unopinza; akandivanza mumumvuri wechanza chake, akandiita museve unopenya, akandichengeta mugoba rake;" 
Isaiah49:3 akati kwandiri, ""Ndiwe muranda wangu; Isiraeri wandinozvirumbidza maari. """ 
Isaiah49:4 Asi ndakati, ""Ndakatambura pasina, ndakapedza simba rangu pasina pazvinhu zvisina maturo; asi zvirokwazvo kururamisirwa kwangu kuri kuna Jehovha, nomubayiro wangu kuna Mwari wangu.""" 
Isaiah49:5 Zvino zvanzi naJehovha, akandiumba kubva pachizvaro, kuti ndive muranda wake, ndidzosere Jakobhozve kwaari, uye kuti Isiraeri vaunganidzwezve kwaari, (nokuti ndinokudzwa pamberi paJehovha, Mwari wangu ndiye wava simba rangu);" 
Isaiah49:6 zvirokwazvo, iye akati, ""Chinhu chiduku kuti uve muranda wangu kuti umutse marudzi aJakobho, nokudzosazve vakasara vaIsiraeri; ndichapawo uve chiedza chavahedheni, kuti kuponesa kwangu kusvikire kumugumo wenyika.""" 
Isaiah49:7 Zvanzi naJehovha, Mudzikunuri waIsiraeri, noMutsvene wake, kumweya unozvidzwa, kuno anovengwa norudzi rwose, kumuranda wavabati, ""Madzimambo achaona ndokusimuka; machinda naiwo achanamata, nokuda kwaJehovha akatendeka, iye Mutsvene waIsiraeri, wakakusanangura.""" 
Isaiah49:8 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Ndakakupindura nenguva yakafanira, ndakakubatsira nezuva rokuponeswa; ndichakuchengeta, nokukuita sungano yavanhu, kuti umutse nyika, nokuvagarisa nhaka dzakanga dzaparadzwa;" 
Isaiah49:9 kuti uti kuna vakasungwa, `Budai;' nokuna vagere murima, `Zviratidzei.' Vachadya zvokudya panzira, namafuro avo achava pazvikomo zvisina zvibereko." 
Isaiah49:10 Havangavi nenzara kana nyota, havangabayiwi nokupiswa kunyange nezuva, nokuti iye, anovanzwira nyasha, achavatungamirira, achavafambisa pamatsime emvura." 
Isaiah49:11 Ndichaita makomo angu ose nzira, migwagwa yangu ichakwiridzwa." 
Isaiah49:12 Tarirai, vamwe vachauya vachibva kure; tarirai, vamwe vachabva kurutivi rwokumusoro nokumavirazuva, navamwe kunyika yeSinimi.""" 
Isaiah49:13 Imbai, imwi denga rose, newe nyika ufare; imwi makomo imbai kwazvo, nokuti Jehovha akanyaradza vanhu vake, achinzwira tsitsi vanotambudzika." 
Isaiah49:14 Asi Ziyoni rakati Jehovha akandisiya, Ishe akandikangamwa.""" 
Isaiah49:15 Ko mukadzi angakangamwe mwana wake waanomwisa, akasava netsitsi nomwanakomana wechizvaro chake here? Zvirokwazvo vangakangamwa zvavo, asi ini handingakukangamwi." 
Isaiah49:16 Tarira, ndakakunyora pazvanza zvangu; masvingo ako ari pamberi pangu nguva dzose." 
Isaiah49:17 Vana vako vanokurumidza; vaparadzi vako navanokuita dongo vachabuda mauri. 
Isaiah49:18 Ringira kose-kose nameso ako, uone; ava vose vanoungana pamwechete, vachiuya kwauri. Noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, zvirokwazvo uchazvifukidza navo vose sechishongo, uchazvisunga chiuno navo somwenga." 
Isaiah49:19 Nokuti, kana ari matongo ako nenzvimbo dzako dzakasiyiwa, nenyika yako yakaparadzwa, zvirokwazvo zvino haingaringani vagere mairi, navanokuminya vachava kure." 
Isaiah49:20 Vana, vawakanga watorerwa, vacharamba vachiti munzeve dzako, `Pano hapandiringani, ndidzivurirei nzvimbo pandingagara.'" 
Isaiah49:21 Ipapo uchati mumoyo mako, `Ndianiko akandiberekera ava, zvandakatorerwa vana vangu, ndiri ndoga, ndadzingwa, ndichidzungaira kose-kose? Ndianiko akarera ava? Tarirai, ndakanga ndasiyiwa ndoga; ko ava vakanga varipi?' """ 
Isaiah49:22 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Tarirai, ndichasimudzira marudzi ruoko rwangu, nokumisira vanhu mureza wangu; vachauya navanakomana vako vanavo pachipfuva chavo, navakunda vako vachatakurwa pamafudzi avo." 
Isaiah49:23 Madzimambo achava varerai; vahosi vavo madzimai enyu anokurerai vachakotama pamberi penyu zviso zvavo zvakatarira pasi, vachinanzva guruva riri patsoka dzenyu; ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha; vanondimirira havanganyadziswi.""" 
Isaiah49:24 Ko ane simba angatorerwe zvaakapamba here, kana vatapwa vowakarurama vangarwirwa here?" 
Isaiah49:25 Asi zvanzi naJehovha, ""Kunyange navatapwa veanesimba vachamutorerwa, nezvakapambwa zveanotyisa zvichadzikunurwa; nokuti ndicharwa neanorwa newe, nokuponesa vana vako." 
Isaiah49:26 Uye ndichadyisa vamanikidzi vako nyama yavo yomene,uye vachabatwa neropa ravo, seinenge iri waini inonaka; uye nyama yose ichaziva kuti ini Jehovha, ndini Muponesi wako, noMudzikunuri wako, Anesimba waJakobho.""" 
Isaiah50:1 Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, ""Ruripiko rugwaro rwokuramba mai venyu, vandakaramba? Kana ndiyani wandine chikwereti naye, wandakakutengesai kwaari? Tarirai makazvitengesa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvenyu, uye nokuda kokudarika kwenyu, mai venyu vakarashwa." 
Isaiah50:2 Sei pakusvika kwangu kwakanga kusina munhu? Pakudana kwangu kwakanga kusina anopindura? Ko ruoko rwangu rwakatongopfupiswa here?, kuti rukoniwe kudzikunura? Handina simba rokurwira here? Tarirai nokutuka kwangu, ndinopwisa gungwa, Ndinoita nzizi dzive renje; hove dzadzo dzinhuwhe, nokuti hadzina mvura, dzinofa nenyota." 
Isaiah50:3 Ndinofukidza matenga nokusviba, Ndinoita masaga ave chifukidziro chawo." 
Isaiah50:4 Ishe Jehovha akandipa rurimi rwavakadzidza, kuti ndizive kutaura shoko nenguva yakafanira kune vakaneta; anomuka mangwanani ose, anomutsa nzeve dzangu kuti ndinzwe savanodzidziswa." 
Isaiah50:5 Ishe Mwari wakadziura nzeve dzangu,vuye handina kupanduka kana kudzokera shure." 
Isaiah50:6 Ndakapa musana wangu kuvarovi, namatama angu kuna vakatavura ndebvu dzangu; handina kuvanza chiso changu pakunyadziswa nokupfirwa mate." 
Isaiah50:7 Nokuti Ishe Mwari achandibatsira, naizvozvo handina kunyadziswa; naizvozvo ndakaita chiso changu semusarasara,vuye ndinoziva kuti handinganyadziswi." 
Isaiah50:8 Ari pedo iye unondiruramsa; ndiani acharwa neni?Ngatimirei pamwechete, Ndiani mudzivisi wangu? Ngaaswedere kwandiri." 
Isaiah50:9 Tarirai, Ishe, Jehovha achandibatsira; ndiani angandipa mhosva? Tarirai, avo vose vachasakara senguvo;zvipfunho. zvichavadya." 
Isaiah50:10 Ndianiko pakati penyu anotya Jehovha, anoteerera inzwi romuranda wake? Anofamba murima,vuye asina chiedza, ngaavimbe nezita raJehovha, asendame kuna Mwari wake. """ 
Isaiah50:11 Tarirai, imwi mose, munobatidza moto, munozvisunga zviuno nezvitsiga; fambai muchiedza chomoto wenyu, napakati pezvitsiga zvamakabatidza. Muchapiwa izvozvo noruoko rwangu, muchavata pasi muchitambudzika." 
Isaiah51:1 Teererai kwandiri, imwi munotevera kururama, imwi munotsvaka Jehovha; cherechedzai dombo pamakatemwa, negomba romugodhi pamakacherwa." 
Isaiah51:2 Tarairai Abhurahamu, baba venyu, naSara akakuberekai; nokuti ndakamudana achiri mumwechete, ndikamuropafadza, ndikamuita vazhinji." 
Isaiah51:3 Nokuti Jehovha akanyaradza Ziyoni; akanyaradza matongo aro ose, akashandura renje raro rive seEdheni, negwenga raro rive somunda waJehovha; mufaro nokufarisisa zvichawanikwamo, nokuvonga nenzwi rokuimba." 
Isaiah51:4 Teererai kwandiri, imwi vanhu vangu; rerekai nzeve dzenyu kwandiri, imwi rudzi rwangu; nokuti ndichatema murayiro, zvakarurama zvangu ndichazviita chiedza chavanhu." 
Isaiah51:5 Kururama kwangu kuri pedo, ruponeso rwangu rwabuda, uye maoko angu achatonga vanhu; zvivi zvichandimirira, zvichavimba noruoko rwangu." 
Isaiah51:6 Tarirai kudenga nameso enyu, mucherechedze nyika pasi; nokuti denga rose richanyangarika soutsi, nenyika ichasakara senguvo; vageremo vachafa sohunyunyu; asi ruponeso rwangu ruchava nokusingaperi, kururama kwangu hakungaperi." 
Isaiah51:7 Nditeererei, imwi munoziva kururama; vanhu vanomurayiro wangu pamoyo yenyu; musatya kuzvidza kwavanhu, kana kuvhunduswa nokutuka kwavo." 
Isaiah51:8 Nokuti zvipfukuto zvichavadya senguvo, nerukonye guchavadya semvere; asi kururama kwangu kuchavapo nokusingaperi, noruponeso rwangu kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi.""" 
Isaiah51:9 Muka, muka zvifukidze nesimba, iwe ruoko rwaJehovha; muka sapamazuva akare, sapamarudzi enguva dzakarekare. Ko hamuzimi makagura Rahabhi, mukakuvadza chikara here?" 
Isaiah51:10 Ko hamuzimi makapwisa gungwa, nemvura yakadzika, mukaitawo nzvimbo dzakadzika dzegungwa nzira pangayambuka vakadzikunurwa here?" 
Isaiah51:11 Naizvozvo Vakasunungurwa vaJehovha vachadzoka, vachaenda Ziyoni vachiimba; nomufaro usingaperi uchava pamisoro yavo, vachawana mufaro nokufarisisa, kuchema nokugomera kuchatiza." 
Isaiah51:12 Ini, iyeni, ndini ndinokunyaradzai; ndiwe aniko, uchatya munhu anozofa, kana Mwanakomana womunhu, achaitwa souswa;" 
Isaiah51:13 uye wakakangamwa Jehovha muiti wako akatatamura matenga ose,nekuteya nheyo dzenyika; ukaramba uchingotya mazuva ose nokuda kwehasha dzomumanikidzi, seakazvigadzira kuparadza here? uye hasha dzomumanikidzi dziripiko?" 
Isaiah51:14 Musungwa wakatapwa achakurumidza kusunungurwa,Vuye haangafi nokuburukira mugomba, zvokudya zvake hazvingashaikwi." 
Isaiah51:15 Nokuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, anoparadzanisa gungwa, rine mafungu anotinhira; Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake." 
Isaiah51:16 Ndakaisa mashoko angu mumuromo mako, ndikakufukidza mumumvuri woruoko rwangu, kuti ndivambe matenga, nokuteya nheyo dzenyika, nditi kuZiyoni, 'Imi muri vanhu vangu.'" 
Isaiah51:17 Muka, muka, simuka, iwe Jerusaremu,iwe wakamwa paruvoko rwaJehovha mukombe wokutsamwa kwake; wakamwa manzete emukombe wose wokudederesa, ukaapedza kwazvo." 
Isaiah51:18 Hakuna nomumwe pakati pavanakomana vake vose vaakabereka angamutungamirira, hakuna angamubata noruoko pakati pavanakomana vose vaakarera." 
Isaiah51:19 Zvinhu izvi zviviri zvakuwira; ndianiko achakunzwira tsitsi? Kusiyiwa nokuparadzwa, nenzara nomunondo; ndingakunyaradza sei?" 
Isaiah51:20 Vanakomana vako vaziya, vavete pamigumo yenzira dzomumusha, senzombe yesango yabatwa mumambure; vazadzwa nokutsamwa kwaJehovha nokutuka kwaMwari wako." 
Isaiah51:21 Naizvozvo zvino chinzwa chinhu ichi, iwe unotambudzika, wakabatwa, asi kwete newaini," 
Isaiah51:22 Ndizvo zvinotaura IShe wako Jehovha, naMwari wako,unoreverera vanhu vake, Tarirai, ndakabvisa muruoko rwako mukombe wokudzedzeresa, iwo manzete emukombe wokutsamwa kwangu, haungazoamwizve." 
Isaiah51:23 Asi ndichauisa muruoko rwavanokutambudza, ivo vakati kumweya wako, ""Kotama,kuti tipfuure napamusoro;"" iwe ukaita musana wako sapasi, senzira yomumusha yavanopfuvura.""" 
Isaiah52:1 Muka, muka, iwe Ziyoni, uzvifukidze nesimba rako; pfeka nguvo dzako dzakaisvonaka, iwe Jerusaremu, guta dzvene; nokuti kubva zvino hakuna angapinda mukati mako asina kudzingiswa nousakanaka." 
Isaiah52:2 Zvizunze ubve muguruva; simuka, ugare kwazvo, iwe Jerusaremu; zvisunungura pazvisungo zviri pamutsipa wako, iwe mukunda wakatapwa weZiyoni." 
Isaiah52:3 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha Makazvitengesa kusina mutengo; muchadzikunurwa kusina mari. 
Isaiah52:4 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Vanhu vangu vakaburukira Ijipiti kare kundogarako, muAsiria akavamanikidza pasina mhosva." 
Isaiah52:5 Ko zvino ndinoonei pano; ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; vanhu vangu zvavabviswa pasina? Vanovabata ushe vanopopota, zita rangu rinongomhurwa zuva rose, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah52:6 Saka vanhu vangu vachaziva zita rangu; saka vachaziva nezuva iro kuti ndini iye anotaura; tarirai, ndini.""" 
Isaiah52:7 Dzakanaka sei pamusoro pamakomo tsoka dzoanouya namashoko akanaka, anoparidza rugare, anouya namashoko akanaka ezvinhu zvakanaka, anoparidza ruponeso, anoti kuZiyoni, ""Mwari wako anobata ushe!""" 
Isaiah52:8 Chinzwa inzwi renharirire dzako! Dzinodana namanzwi, dzinoimba pamwechete; nokuti dzichaonana zviso zvakatarisana, kana Jehovha achidzokera Ziyoni." 
Isaiah52:9 Pemberai nomufaro, imbai pamwechete, imwi matongo eJerusaremu, nokuti Jehovha wakanyaradza vanhu vake, wakadzikunura Jerusaremu." 
Isaiah52:10 Jehovha akafukura ruoko rwake rutsvene pamberi pamarudzi ose; migumo yose yenyika yakaona ruponeso rwaMwari wedu. 
Isaiah52:11 Ibvai, ibvai, budai ipapo, musanyangata chinhu chine tsvina; budai pakati paro; zvinatsei, imwi munotakura nhumbi dzaJehovha." 
Isaiah52:12 Nokuti hamungabudi muchikurumidza, kana kuenda muchitiza; nokuti Jehovha achakutungamirirai; Mwari waIsiraeri achakurindirai mumashure." 
Isaiah52:13 Tarirai, muranda wangu achaita nokuchenjera, achakwiridzwa nokusimudzwa, nokukwirira kwazvo." 
Isaiah52:14 Vazhinji sezvavakashamiswa pamusoro pako, (chiso chake chakanga chakakuvadzwa kupfuura chavamwe vanhu, nechimiro chake kupfuura chavanakomana vavanhu)," 
Isaiah52:15 saizvozvo achavhundusa marudzi mazhinji; madzimambo achapfumbira miromo yawo pamusoro pake, nokuti vachaona zvavasina kumboudzwa; vachanzwisisa zvavasina kumbonzwa." 
Isaiah53:1 Ndianiko akatenda zvatakaparidzirwa? Ruoko rwaJehovha rwakaratidzwa kuna ani? 
Isaiah53:2 Nokuti akamera pamberi pake sebukira, nyoro, somudzi unobuda pavhu rakaoma; haane chimiro kana umambo; kana tichimuona, haana kunaka kuti timude." 
Isaiah53:3 Akazvidzwa, nokuraswa navanhu, munhu wokurwadziwa, akaziva urwere, somunhu anovanzirwa navanhu zviso zvavo; akazvidzwa nesu hatina kumukudza." 
Isaiah53:4 Zvirokwazvo, akatakura matenda edu, nokusimudza kurwadziwa kwedu; asi isu takati akatambudzwa, akarohwa naMwari nokumanikidzwa." 
Isaiah53:5 Asi akakuvadzwa nokuda kokudarika kwedu, akarwadziwa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvedu; kurohwa kwakativigira rugare kwakanga kuri pamusoro pake, takaporeswa namavanga ake." 
Isaiah53:6 Isu tose samakwai, takanga takarasika, takatsauka mumwe nomumwe nenzira yake; uye Jehovha akaisa pamusoro pake kuipa kwedu tose." 
Isaiah53:7 Akamanikidzwa,akarohwa, kunyange zvakadaro haana kushamisa muromo wake;akauyiswa segwayana rinoiswa kundobayiwa uye segwai pamberi pavavevuri varo,akanyarara, saizvozvo haana kushamisa muromo wake." 
Isaiah53:8 Akabviswa pakumanikidzwa napakutongwa, ndianiko angaparidza zera rake? nokuti akagurwa akabviswa panyika yavapenyu? Nokuda kokudarika kwavanhu vangu; akarohwa." 
Isaiah53:9 Akaita bwiro bwake pamwechete navakaipa, akava navamufumi pakufa kwake, nokuti haana kuita chisakarurama, kunyengera hakuna kuwanikwa mumuromo make." 
Isaiah53:10 Asi kwaiva kuda kwaJehovha kuti apwanyiwe; wakamurwadzisa; ipapo uchaita mweya wake chibairo chezvivi, achaona zvibereko zvake, achawedzera mazuva ake, zvinodikamwa naJehovha zvichabudirira muruoko rwake." 
Isaiah53:11 Achaona zvaakatamburira nomweya wake, akagutiswa; nokuziva kwake muranda wangu akarurama acharuramisira vazhinji; achatakura zvakaipa zvavo." 
Isaiah53:12 Saka ndichamuganhurira mugove pamwechete navakuru, achagoverana zvakapambwa navane simba; nokuti akadurura mweya wake kukufa, akaverengwa pamwechete navadariki; uye akatakura chivi chavazhinji, akanyengeterera vadariki." 
Isaiah54:1 Imba, iwe ngomwa, iwe usina kubereka;muka nokuimba, udanidzirise, iwe usina kumbosununguka; nokuti vana vouri oga vazhinji kukunda vana vomukadzi akawanikwa.""Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.""" 
Isaiah54:2 Kurisa nzvimbo yetende rako, ngavatatamure maketeni eugaro hwako; usarega, urebese mabote ako, usimbise mbambo dzako." 
Isaiah54:3 Nokuti uchapararira kuruoko rworudyi nokuruboshwe;vana vako vachagara nhaka yavahedheni,vaite matongo agarwe." 
Isaiah54:4 Usatya, nokuti haunganyadziswi;uye usakanganiswa, nokuti haungavi nenyadzi; nokuti uchakangamwa kunyara kohumhandara hwako, haungazorangariri kuzvidzwa kohuchirikadzi hwako." 
Isaiah54:5 Nokuti Muiti wako ndiye murume wako, Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake; Mudzikunuri wako ndiye Mutsvene waIsiraeri, iye achanzi Mwari wenyika yose." 
Isaiah54:6 Nokuti Jehovha akakudana somukadzi, akasiyiwa ane shungu pamweya, somukadzi akawanikwa achiri muduku ndokuzorambwa ndizvo zvinotaura Mwari wako." 
Isaiah54:7 Kwechinguvana,ndakakusiya, asi nenyasha huru ndichakuunganidza." 
Isaiah54:8 Nehasha dzakapupuma, ndakakuvanzira chiso changu kwechinguvana; asi nohunyoro husingaperi ndichakunzwira nyasha, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha Mudzikunuri wako." 
Isaiah54:9 Nokuti izvi zvakaita semvura yaNowa kwandiri; nokuti \add sezva\add*ndakapika kuti mvura yaNowa haingazodarikizve napanyika, saizvozvo ndakapika kuti handichazokutsamwiri, kana kukutuka." 
Isaiah54:10 Nokuti makomo achabva, nezvikomo zvibviswe, asi hunyoro hwangu haungabvi kwauri, Kana sungano yangu yorugare haingabviswi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ane nyasha newe." 
Isaiah54:11 Haiwa, iwe mutambudziki, wakaposerwa \add nedutu\add* remhepo, usina kunyaradzwa, tarira, ndichateya mabwe ako namavara akanaka, ndichateya nheyo dzako \add namabwe\add* esafiri." 
Isaiah54:12 Ndichaita shongwe dzako ne-agati*, namasuo ako ne-kabhunakeri*, nomuganhu wako wose namabwe anofadza." 
Isaiah54:13 Navana vako vose vachadzidziswa naJehovha,uye ruchava rukuru, rugare rwavana vako." 
Isaiah54:14 Uchasimbiswa mukururama; uchava kure nokumanikidzwa, nokuti haungatyi, uye kure nezvinotyisa, nokuti hakungaswederi kwauri." 
Isaiah54:15 Tarira, vachavungana,asi kwete neni Aninani unovungana pamwe kurwa newe uchawa nokuda kwako." 
Isaiah54:16 Tarira, ndakasika mupfuri anopfutidza mazimbe mumoto, ndokuita nhumbi yebasa rake; uye ini ndakasika muparadzi, kuti aparadze." 
Isaiah54:17 Hakuna nhumbi \add yokurwa \add*inopfurwa kuzorwa newe ingabudirira; rurimi rumwe norumwe runokukwirira pakutongwa ruchapiwa mhosva. Ndiyo nhaka yavaranda vaJehovha, nokururama kwavo \add ndo\add*kwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.""" 
Isaiah55:1 Nhai, imwi mose mune nyota, uyai kumvura \add zhinji\add*, nowasina mari, uyai, mutenge mudye; zvirokwazvo, uyai mutenge waini nomukaka, musine mari, pasina mutengo.." 
Isaiah55:2 Munoparadzireiko mari muchitenga zvisati zviri zvokudya, nesimba \add renyu\add* muchitenga zvisingagutisi? Nditeererei zvakanaka, mudye zvakanaka,uye mweya yenyu ngaizvifadze muzvakakora." 
Isaiah55:3 Rerekai nzeve yenyu, muuye kwandiri; inzwai, mweya yenyu igorarama; ndichaita sungano isingaperi nemwi, nyasha dzazvokwadi \add dzakapikirwa\add* Dhavhidhi." 
Isaiah55:4 Tarirai, ndakamupa ave chapupu kuvanhu, mutungamiriri nomubati kuvanhu." 
Isaiah55:5 Tarira, uchadana rudzi rwausingazivi, norudzi rwawakanga rusingakuzivi, iwe ruchamhanyira kwauri, nokuda kwaJehovha Mwari wako, nokoMutsvene waIsiraeri; nokuti iye akakurumbidza." 
Isaiah55:6 Tsvakai Jehovha achawanikwa, danai kwaari achiri pedo." 
Isaiah55:7 Akaipa ngaasiye nzira yake, nomunhu asakarurama mirangariro yake; ngaadzokere kuna Jehovha, iye achamunzwira tsitsi, nokuna Mwari wedu, nokuti achakangamwira zvikuru." 
Isaiah55:8 Nokuti ndangariro dzangu hadzizi ndangariro dzenyu, nenzira dzenyu hadzizi nzira dzangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah55:9 Nokuti denga \add sezva\add*rakakwirira kupfuura nyika, saizvozvo nzira dzangu dzakakwirira kupfuura nzira dzenyu, nendangariro dzangu kupfuura ndangariro dzenyu." 
Isaiah55:10 Nokuti mvura sezvainoburuka, nemagada echando zvichibva kudenga, zvisingazodzokeriko, asi zvinodiridza nyika, zvichiiberekesa nokuitungisa maruva, ichipa mbewu, kumudzvari, nomudyi zvokudya," 
Isaiah55:11 ndizvo zvichaita shoko rangu rinobuda mumuromo mangu; haringadzokeri kwandiri risina \add chinhu\add*, asi richapedzisa zvandinoda, richibudirira \add pane \add*zvandakaritumira." 
Isaiah55:12 Nokuti muchabuda nomufaro, nokutungamirirwa norugare; makomo nezvikomo zvichamukira mukuimba nomufaro pamberi penyu; miti yose yokudondo ichauchira." 
Isaiah55:13 Panzvimbo yomunzwa pachamera mufiri*, panzvimbo yorukato pachamera mumirite*; zvichava kuna Jehovha zita, chive chiratidzo chisingaperi, chisingazogurwi.""" 
Isaiah56:1 Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, ""Chengetai mutongo, muite zvakarurama; nokuti ruponeso rwangu rwava pedo kusvika, uye kururama kwangu koratidzwa." 
Isaiah56:2 Akaropafadzwa munhu anoita izvi, noMwanakomana womunhu anozvibatisisa; anochengeta Sabata arege kurisvibisa, nokudzora ruoko rwake kuti arege kuita chinhu chipi nechipi chakaipa.""" 
Isaiah56:3 Usaregawo mwanakomana womutorwa akanamatira Jehovha, achitaura achiti, ""Zvirokwazvo Jehovha akandiparadzanisa navanhu vake;"" nowakachekwa ngaarege kuti, ""Tarirai, ndiri muti wakaoma.""" 
Isaiah56:4 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pavakachekwa, ""Vanochengeta maSabata angu, nokusanangura zvinondifadza, navanobatisisa sungano yangu." 
Isaiah56:5 Ndichavapavo mumba mangu nomukati mamasvingo angu chiyeudzo nezita rinopfuura ravanakomana navanasikana; ndichavapa zita risingaperi, risingazogurwi." 
Isaiah56:6 Navanakomana vomutorwawo vanozvisanganisa naJehovha, kuti vamushumire, nokuda zita raJehovha, kuti vave varanda vake, vose vanochengeta Sabata kuti arege kurisvibisa, nokubatisisa sungano yangu;" 
Isaiah56:7 naivavo ndichavauyisa kugomo rangu dzvene, nokuvafadza muimba yangu yokunyengetera; zvipiriso zvavo zvinopiswa nezvibayiro zvavo zvichagamuchirwa paaritari yangu; nokuti imba yangu ichanzi imba yokunyengetera yavanhu vose." 
Isaiah56:8 Ishe Jehovha, anounganidza vakadzingwa vaIsiraeri,anoti,`Ipapo ndichaunganidzazve \add vamwe\add* kwaari, pamusoro pavake vakaunganidzwa.' """ 
Isaiah56:9 imwi mose zvikara zvokusango, uyai mudye, imwi mose zvikara zvokudondo." 
Isaiah56:10 Nharirire dzake mapofu, vose havane zivo; vose imbwa mbeveve, havagoni kuhukura, dzinovata, dzinotsivama pasi, dzinofarira kutsumaira." 
Isaiah56:11 Zvirokwazvo, imbwa dzinokara, dzisingatongoguti; ava vafudzi, vasingagoni kunzwisisa, mumwe nomumwe wakatsaukira kunzira yake, mumwe nomumwe kufuma yake, vose-vose." 
Isaiah56:12 Vanoti, ""Uyai, ndichauya newaini, tichaguta nezvinobata, mangwana achaita sezuva ranhasi,zuva guru-guru kwazvo.""" 
Isaiah57:1 Akarurama anoparara, asi hakuna munhu ane hanya nazvo; navanoda Mwari vanobviswa, kusina munhu anorangarira kuti vakarurama vanobviswa pazvakaipa." 
Isaiah57:2 Asi vakaipa vakafanana negungwa rakabvongodzwa; nokuti harigoni kuzorora, asi mvura yaro inobudisa matope namarara." 
Isaiah57:3 Asi swederai pano, imwi vanakomana vomuroyi, zvibereko zvemhombwe nechifeve." 
Isaiah57:4 Munofara pamusoro paani? Munoshamisira ani muromo wenyu, nokubudisa rurimi rwenyu? Ko hamuzi vana vokudarika, zvibereko zvenhema,"
