Isaiah57:5 iyemi, munozvimutsa pakati pemiouki, napasi pomuti mumwe nomumwe mutema, imwi munobaya vana mumipata, pasi pemikaha yamatombo?" 
Isaiah57:6 Pakati pamabwe anotedza omupata ndipo panomugove wako; iwo, iwo ndizvo zvawakagoverwa; ndizvo zvawakadururira chipiriso chinodururwa, zvawakavigira chipo. Ko ini ndichayananiswa naizvozvo here?" 
Isaiah57:7 Wakawadza nhovo dzako pamusoro pegomo rakareba rakakwirira; ndiko kwawakakwira kundobayira zvibayiro. 
Isaiah57:8 Wakaisa chirangaridzo chako shure kwemikova nezvivivo, nokuti wakazvifukurira mumwe, asati ari ini, ukakwira; wakakurisa nhovo dzako, ukaita sungano navo; wakada nhovo dzavo kwawakadziwana." 
Isaiah57:9 Ukaenda kuna mambo namafuta, ukawedzera zvinonhuhwira zvako, ukatuma nhume dzako kure, ukazvininipisa kusvikira paSheori." 
Isaiah57:10 Wakaneta norwendo rwako rukuru; kunyange zvakadaro hauna kuti, ""Hazvina maturo;"" wakawana simba rako richivandudzwa, naizvozvo hauna kupera simba." 
Isaiah57:11 Wakatya nokuvhunduka aniko, zvawareva nhema, ukasandirangarira, nokuva nehanya? Ko ini handina kuramba ndinyerere nguva refu, ukasanditya here?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ndichaparidza kururama kwako; kana ari mabasa ako, haangakubatsiri." 
Isaiah57:13 Kana uchidanidzira, avo vawakaunganidza, ngavakurwire; asi mhepo ichavatora, mweya uchavabvisa vose; asi anovimba neni, nyika ichava yake, achagara nhaka yegomo rangu dzvene." 
Isaiah57:14 Zvichanzi, ""Tutirai, tutirai, gadzirai nzira, bvisa chigumbuso panzira yavanhu vangu.""" 
Isaiah57:15 Nokuti zvanzi nowakakwirira Arikumusoro, anogara mukusingaperi, ane zita rinonzi Dzvene, ""Ndinogara pakakwirira napanzvimbo tsvene, uye nowane mweya wakapwanyika anozvininipisa, kuti ndiponesezve mweya woanozvininipisa, ndiponesezve moyo wowakapwanyika." 
Isaiah57:16 Nokuti handingarwisi nokusingaperi, uye handingatsamwi nguva dzose; nokuti mweya unofanira kupera simba pamberi pangu, nemweya yandakaita." 
Isaiah57:17 Nokuda kokuipa kokunyengera kwake, ndakatsamwisisa ndikamurova; ndakazvivanza, ndikatsamwisisa; akaenderera mberi nenzira yemoyo wake." 
Isaiah57:18 Ndaona nzira dzake, asi ndichamuporesa, ndichamutungamirirawo, nokudzosa nyaradzo kwaari navanomuchema." 
Isaiah57:19 Ndinosika zvibereko zvemiromo; `Rugare, rugare kunowari kure nokunowari pedo, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, uye ndichamuporesa.'" 
Isaiah57:20 Asi vakaipa vakafanana negungwa rakabvongodzwa; nokuti harigoni kuzorora, asi mvura yaro inobudisa matope namarara." 
Isaiah57:21 Zvanzi naMwari wangu, `Vakaipa havana rugare.' """ 
Isaiah58:1 Danidzira kwazvo, usarega, danidzira nenzwi rako sehwamanda, uparidzire vanhu vangu kudarika kwavo, neimba yaJakobho zvivi zvavo." 
Isaiah58:2 Kunyange zvakadaro, vanonditsvaka zuva rimwe nerimwe, vachifarira kuziva nzira dzangu; vanokumbira kwandiri mirayiro yakarurama, sorudzi runoita zvakarurama, rusingasiyi zvakarayirwa naMwari wavo; vanofarira kuswedera kuna Mwari." 
Isaiah58:3 Vanoti, ""Takazvinyimireiko zvoku dya, imwi mukasazviona? Takatambudzireiko mweya yedu, imwi mukasazviziva?"" Taurirai, pazuva rokutsanya munotsvaka kuzvifadza henyu nokubata mabasa enyu ose." 
Isaiah58:4 Tarirai, munotsanya, kuti murwe nokukakavara, nokurova netsiva yezvakaipa, hamuzvinyimi zvokudya nhasi, kuti inzwi renyu rinzwike kumusoro." 
Isaiah58:5 Ndikoko kutsanya kwandakasanangura here? Ndiroro zuva munhu raanotambudza mweya wake naro here? Ndiko kukotamisa musoro wake senhokwe, nokuwarira makudza namadota pasi pake here? Izvozvo ungazviti ndiko kutsanya, nezuva rinodikamwa naJehovha here?" 
Isaiah58:6 Ko kutsanya kwandakasanangura hakuzakadai here, kuti musunungure zvisungo zvezvakaipa, nokubvisa makashu ejoko, kuti akamanikidzwa aende hake, uye kuti muvhune majoko ose here?" 
Isaiah58:7 Hakuzi kuti ugovane zvokudya zvako neanenzara, uye kuti udane varombo vakadzingwa vapinde mumba mako kuti kana uchiona munhu wakashama umufukidze, uye kuti urege kuvanda venyama yako here?" 
Isaiah58:8 Ipapo chiedza chako chichabuda sechamambakwedza, kuporeswa kwako kuchabukira nokukurumidza, kururama kwako kuchakutungamirira, nokubwinya kwaJehovha kuchakurindira mumashure." 
Isaiah58:9 Ipapo uchadana, Jehovha uchakupindura; achadanidzira iwe, iye achati, `Ndiripano.' Kana uchibvisa pakati pako joko, nokutendeka nomumwe, nokutaura zvakaipa;" 
Isaiah58:10 kana mweya wako ukava nehanya navane nzara, nokugutisa mweya woanotambudzika; ipapo chiedza chako chichabuda murima, kusvibirwa kwako kuchaita samasikati;" 
Isaiah58:11 Jehovha achakufambisa nguva dzose, achagutisa mweya wako panzvimbo dzakaoma, nokusimbisa mapfupa ako; uchava somunda wakadiridzwa, uye setsime remvura, risingapwi mvura yaro." 
Isaiah58:12 Vachaberekwa newe vachavakazve matongo akare; uchamutsa nheyo dzamarudzi mazhinji, uye uchatumidzwa, Mugadziri wopakakoromoka, muvandudzi wenzira, kuti vanhu vagone kugarapo." 
Isaiah58:13 Kana uchidzora gumbo rako pazuva reSabata, kuti urege kuita zvaunoda pazuva rangu dzvene, uchiti, Sabata izuva rinofadza, nezuva dzvene raJehovha rinofanira kukudzwa, uchirikudza, usingaiti zvaunoda, kana kutsvaka zvinokufadza, kana kutaura mashoko ako.," 
Isaiah58:14 Ipapo uchafarira Jehovha kwazvo; neni ndichakufambisa panzvimbo dzakakwirira dzenyika ndichakugutisa nenhaka yababa vako Jakobho, nokuti muromo waJehovha wakataura izvozvo.""" 
Isaiah59:1 Tarirai, ruoko rwaJehovha haruna kupfupiswa, kuti rukoniwe kuponesa, nzeve yake haina kuremerwa, kuti ikoniwe kunzwa;" 
Isaiah59:2 asi zvakaipa zvenyu zvakakuparadzanisai naMwari wenyu, zvivi zvenyu zvakakuvanzirai chiso chake, kuti arege kunzwa." 
Isaiah59:3 Nokuti maoko enyu akasvibiswa neropa, nemimwe yenyu nezvakaipa; miromo yenyu yakareva nhema, rurimi rwenyu runogunun'una zvakashata." 
Isaiah59:4 Hakuna munhu anokwirira mumwe nokururama, hakuna anoreverera mumwe nezvokwadi; vanovimba nezvisina maturo, vachireva nhema; vanotora pamuviri pezvakashata, ndokubereka zvakaipa." 
Isaiah59:5 Vanochochonya mazai emvumbi, vanoruka dandira rebuve; anodya mazai avo achafa, kana richipwanyika rinobudisa nyoka." 
Isaiah59:6 Matandira avo haangaiti nguvo, havangafuki zvavakaita; mabasa avo mabasa ezvakaipa, kuita nesimba ndizvo zviri pamaoko avo." 
Isaiah59:7 Tsoka dzavo dzinomhanyira zvakaipa, vanokurumidza kuteura ropa risina mhaka; ndangariro dzavo indangariro dzezvakaipa; kuparadza nokuputsanya zviri panzira dzavo." 
Isaiah59:8 Nzira yorugare havaizivi; hakuna kururama pakufamba kwavo; vakazviitira nzira dzakaminama, ani naani anofamba nadzo haazivi rugare." 
Isaiah59:9 Naizvozvo kururamisirwa kuri kure nesu, nokururama hakusvikiri kwatiri; tinotsvaka chiedza, asi, tarirai, rima bedzi; tinotsvaka kubwinya, asi tinofamba pakasviba." 
Isaiah59:10 Tinotsvangadzira pamadziro samapofu; zvirokwazvo tinotsvangadzira savasina meso; tinogumburwa masikati sezvatinoita kana kosviba; pakati pavapenyu takafanana navakafa. 
Isaiah59:11 Tinoomba tose samapere, tinochema zvikuru senjiva; tinotsvaka kururamisirwa; asi hakuna; tinotsvaka ruponeso, asi ruri kure nesu." 
Isaiah59:12 Nokuti kudarika kwedu kwakawanda pamberi penyu, zvivi zvedu zvinotipupurira; nokuti kudarika kwedu kunesu, kana zviri zvakaipa zvedu tinozviziva, zvinoti:" 
Isaiah59:13 Kudarikira Jehovha nokumuramba, nokutsauka tisingateveri Mwari wedu, kutaura mashoko okumanikidza nokumukira, kufunga nokutaura mashoko enhema anobva pamoyo." 
Isaiah59:14 Kururamisa kwakadzoswa shure, kururama kumire kure; nokuti chokwadi chakawira pasi panzira yomumusha, kutendeka hakugoni kupinda." 
Isaiah59:15 Zvirokwazvo, chokwadi chinoshaikwa; anotiza zvakaipa anopambwa; Jehovha akazviona, zvikasamufadza kuti kwakanga kusina kururamisa." 
Isaiah59:16 Akaona kuti hakuna munhu, akashamiswa nokuti kwakanga kusina murevereri, naizvozvo ruoko rwake rwakamuvigira ruponeso, kururama kwake kwakamutsigira." 
Isaiah59:17 Akashonga kururama sechidzitiro chechipfuva, nenguwani yoruponeso pamusoro wake, akafuka nguvo dzokutsiva zvikava zvokufuka zvake, akapfekedzwa nokushingaira sejasi." 
Isaiah59:18 Sezvavakaita, achavaripira saizvozvo, kutsamwa kuvadzivisi vake, nokutsiva kuvavengi vake; zvivi uchazviripira mubayiro wokutsiva." 
Isaiah59:19 Naizvozvo vachatya zita raJehovha kubva kumavirazuva, noumambo hwake kubva kumabvazuva; nokuti achauya sorwizi runodira, runotinhwa nomweya waJehovha." 
Isaiah59:20 Zvino Mudzikunuri achasvika paZiyoni, nokuna vanodzoka pakudarika pakati paJakobho,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah59:21 Zvino kana ndirini, iyi ndiyo sungano yangu navo"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, ""Mweya wangu, uri pamusoro pako, namashoko angu andakaisa mumuromo mako, hazvingabvi mumuromo mako, kana mumiromo yavana vako, kana mumiromo yavana vavana vako, kubva zvino kusvikira nokusingaperi"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah60:1 Simuka, uvheneke, nokuti chiedza chako chasvika, nokubwinya kwaJehovha kwamuka pamusoro pako." 
Isaiah60:2 Nokuti, tarira, rima richafukidza nyika, nerima guru marudzi avanhu; asi Jehovha achabuda pamusoro pako, kubwinya kwake kuchaonekwa pamusoro pako." 
Isaiah60:3 Vahedheni achauya kuchiedza chako, namadzimambo kukubwinya kokubuda kwako" 
Isaiah60:4 Simudza meso ako, uone, vose vanoungana pamwechete, vachiuya kwauri; vanakomana vako vachauya vachibva kure, vakunda vako vacharerwa pahudyu." 
Isaiah60:5 Ipapo uchazviona ukapenya nomufaro, moyo wako uchadedera nokufariswa; nokuti zvakawanda zvegungwa zvichaiswa kwauri, fuma yamarudzi avanhu ichauya kwauri." 
Isaiah60:6 Makamera mazhinji-zhinji achakufukidza, nemhuru dzemakamera eMidhiani neEfa; vose veShebha vachauya, vachauya nendarama nezvinonhuhwira, vachaparidza kurumbidzwa kwaJehovha." 
Isaiah60:7 Mapoka ose amakwai eKedhari achaunganidzirwa kwauri, makondobwe eNebhayoti achakushumira; zvichaiswa paaritari yangu ndichizvifarira, ndichashongedza imba yokukudzwa kwangu." 
Isaiah60:8 Ndivana aniko ava vanobhururuka segore, senjiva dzinouya kumahwindo ezvirugu zvadzo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Zvirokwazvo, zviwi zvichandimirira, nezvikepe zveTarishishi zvichatungamira zvichiuya navanakomana vako vanobva kure, vachiuya nesirivha yavo nendarama yavo kuzviisa kuzita raJehovha Mwari wako, nokunoMutsvene waIsiraeri, nokuti ndiye wakakushongedza." 
Isaiah60:10 Vatorwa vachavaka masvingo ako, madzimambo avo achakushumira; nokuti ndakakurova nokutsamwa kwangu, asi ndakakunzwira nyasha nengoni dzangu." 
Isaiah60:11 Masuo ako achagara akazaruka nguva dzose, haangazarirwi masikati nousiku, kuti vauyise kwauri fuma yamarudzi avanhu namadzimambo avo, akatapwa." 
Isaiah60:12 Nokuti rudzi noushe, zvinoramba kukushumira, zvichaparara; zvirokwazvo marudzi iwayo achaparadzwa chose." 
Isaiah60:13 Zvinobwinya zveRebhanoni zvichauya kwauri, misaipuresi, nemipaini nemifiri pamwechete, kuti ndishongedze nzvimbo yeimba yangu tsvene; uye ndichabwinyisa nzvimbo yetsoka dzangu." 
Isaiah60:14 Vanakomana vavatambudzi vako vachauya kwauri vachikotama; vose vaikuzvidza vachazvikotamisa pasi-pasi petsoka dzako; vachakutumidza zita rokuti, ""Guta raJehovha, Ziyoni roMutsvene waIsiraeri.""" 
Isaiah60:15 Wakanga wakasiyiwa nokuvengwa, kusisina munhu aipfuura nomukati mako, asi zvino ndichakuita chinhu chinorumbidzwa nokusingaperi, chinofarirwa kusvikira kumarudzi mazhinji." 
Isaiah60:16 Uchamwawo mukaka wamarudzi, uchamwa mazamu amadzimambo; ipapo uchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndini muponesi wako, noMudzikunuri wako, waMasimbaose waJakobho." 
Isaiah60:17 Panzvimbo yendarira ndichauya nendarama, panzvimbo yedare ndichauya nesirivha, panzvimbo yamatanda safuri, napanzvimbo yamabwe dare. Rugare ndicharugadza ruve madzishe ako, noKururama kuve vabati vako." 
Isaiah60:18 Zvinoitwa nesimba hazvichazonzwiki panyika pamiganho yako; asi uchatumidza masvingo ako zita rokuti, ""Ruponeso, namasuo ako Rumbidzo.""" 
Isaiah60:19 Zuva harichazovi chiedza chako masikati, mwedzi haungazokuvhenekeri nokupenya kwawo; asi Jehovha achava kwauri chiedza chisingaperi, naMwari wako kunaka kwako." 
Isaiah60:20 Zuva rako harichazoviri, mwedzi wako haungatapudziki; nokuti Jehovha achava chiedza chako chisingaperi, mazuva okuchema kwako achaguma." 
Isaiah60:21 Vanhu vako vose vachava vakarurama, vachagara nhaka yenyika nokusingaperi, vachava davi randakasima, nebasa ramaoko angu, kuti ndikudzwe." 
Isaiah60:22 Muduku achava chiuru, akadukupa achava rudzi rune simba; ini Jehovha ndichakurumidza kuzviita nenguva yazvo." 
Isaiah61:1 Mweya waIshe Jehovha uri pamusoro pangu; nokuti Jehovha akandizodza kuti ndiparidzire vanyoro mashoko akanaka; akandituma kuti ndirape vanemoyo yakaputsika, kuti ndiparidzire vakatapwa kusunungurwa, nokuna vakasungwa kuti vachazarurirwa;" 
Isaiah61:2 kuti ndiparidzire gore rengoni dzaJehovha, nezuva rokutsiva raMwari wedu; kuti ndinyaradze vose vanochema;" 
Isaiah61:3 kuti ndigadzire vanochema paZiyoni vapiwe korona panzvimbo yamadota, mafuta omufaro panzvimbo yokuchema, nenguvo yokurumbidza panzvimbo yomweya waziya; kuti vanzi miti yokururama, chakasimwa chaJehovha, kuti iye akudzwe." 
Isaiah61:4 Ipapo vachavaka matongo akare, vachamutsazve nzvimbo dzakaparadzwa dzokutanga, vachagadzira maguta akanga aitwa matongo, nezvose zvakaparadzwa zvamarudzi namarudzi." 
Isaiah61:5 Vatorwa vachamira vachifudza mapoka enyu amakwai, navaeni vachava varimi venyu navagadziri vemizambiringa yenyu." 
Isaiah61:6 Asi imwi muchanzi vaprista vaJehovha vanhu vachakutumidzai vashumiri vaMwari wedu; muchadya fuma yamarudzi avanhu, muchazvirumbidza nokukudzwa kwawo." 
Isaiah61:7 Panzvimbo yokunyadziswa kwenyu, muchapiwa migove miviri; panzvimbo yokushorwa vachafarira mugove wavo; naizvozvo panyika yavo vachava nemigove miviri, vachava nomufaro usingaperi." 
Isaiah61:8 Nokuti ini Jehovha ndinoda zvakarurama, ndinovenga kupamba pamwechete nezvakaipa; ndichavaripira zvirokwazvo, uye ndichaita sungano isingaperi navo." 
Isaiah61:9 Vana vavo vachazikamwa pakati pamarudzi, nezvibereko zvavo pakati pavanhu; vose vanovaona vachavaziva, kuti ndirwo rudzi rwakaropafadzwa naJehovha." 
Isaiah61:10 Ndichafarira Jehovha kwazvo, mweya wangu uchava nomufaro munaMwari wangu; nokuti akandifukidza nguvo dzoruponeso, akandipfekedza chokufuka chokururama, somuwani anoshonga korona, uye somwenga unozvishongedza noukomba hwake." 
Isaiah61:11 Nokuti nyika sezvainobudisa miti yayo, nomunda sezvaunomeresa zvakadzvarwamo, saizvozvo Ishe Jehovha achameresa kururama nokurumbidzwa pamberi pamarudzi ose." 
Isaiah62:1 Nokuda kweZiyoni handingarambi ndinyerere, nokuda kweJerusaremu handingazorori, kusvikira kururama kwaro kuchibuda sechiedza, nokuponeswa kwaro somwenje unopfuta." 
Isaiah62:2 Marudzi avanhu achaona kururama kwako, namadzimambo ose kurumbidzwa kwako; uchatumidzwa zita idzva, richarehwa nomuromo waJehovha." 
Isaiah62:3 Iwe uchavawo korona yakanaka muruoko rwaJehovha, noukomba hwoumambo muruoko rwaMwari wako." 
Isaiah62:4 Hauchazonzi, ""Musiyiwa;"" nenyika yako haichazonzi dongo; asi iwe uchatumidzwa zita rinonzi ""Hefizibha,"" nenyika yako Bheura; nokuti Jehovha anokufarira, nenyika yako ichawanikwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Nokuti jaya sezvarinowana mhandara, saizvozvo vanakomana vako vachakuwana; uye muwani sezvaanofarira mukadzi wake, saizvozvo Mwari wako achakufarira." 
Isaiah62:6 Ndakagadza nharirire pamusoro pamasvingo ako, iwe Jerusaremu; havangatongonyarari masikati nousiku; imwi vayeudziri vaJehovha, regai kunyarara," 
Isaiah62:7 uye musamutendera kuzorora, kusvikira asimbisa izvozvo, kusvikira aita Jerusaremu guta rinorumbidzwa panyika." 
Isaiah62:8 Jehovha akapika noruoko rwake rworudyi, uye noruoko rwake rune simba, achiti, ""Zvirokwazvo handichazopi vavengi vako zviyo zvako, zvive zvokudya zvavo, navatorwa havachazomwi waini yako itsva, yawakatamburira;" 
Isaiah62:9 asi vakazvikohwa ndivo vachazvidya, vachirumbidza Jehovha; vakaiunganidza ndivo vachaimwa pamavanze eimba yangu tsvene.""" 
Isaiah62:10 Pindai, pindai napamusuo, gadzirai nzira yavanhu; gadzirai, gadzirai mugwagwa, bvisai mabwe, simudzirai vanhu mureza." 
Isaiah62:11 Tarirai, Jehovha akaparidza shoko kusvikira kumugumo wenyika, achiti, ""Udzai mukunda weZiyoni, muti, `Tarira, ruponeso rwako runouya; tarira, mubayiro wake anawo, zvaanoripira zviri pamberi pake.' """ 
Isaiah62:12 Vachavatumidza zita rinonzi Vanhu vatsvene, Vakadzikunurwa naJehovha; newe uchatumidzwa zita rinonzi, `Mutsvakwa, Guta risina kusiyiwa.' """ 
Isaiah63:1 Ndianiko uyu anobva Edhomu, anobva Bhozira ane nguvo dzakatsvuka kwazvo? Ndiani uyo akafuka zvinobwinya, anofamba noukuru bwesimba rake? ""Ndini ndinotaura nokururama, ndine simba rokuponesa.""" 
Isaiah63:2 Ko nguvo yenyu yakatsvuka nei? Zvokufuka zvenyu zvakafanana nezvomunhu anotsika muchisviniro chewaini neiko? 
Isaiah63:3 Ini ndakatsika chisviniro chewaini ndoga; kwakanga kusina munhu wamarudzi avanhu aiva neni; zvirokwazvo, ndakavatsika pakutsamwa kwangu, ndakavapwanya pahasha dzangu; ropa ravo rikatsatikira panguvo dzangu, ndikasvibisa zvokufuka zvangu zvose." 
Isaiah63:4 Nokuti ndakafunga zuva rokutsiva mumoyo mangu; gore ravakadzikunurwa vangu rasvika. 
Isaiah63:5 Ndikatarira, ndikashayiwa anobatsira, ndikashamiswa nokuti kwakanga kusina anotsigira; naizvozvo ruoko rwangu rwakandivigira ruponeso, kutsamwa kwangu ndiko kwakanditsigira." 
Isaiah63:6 Ndikatsika-tsika marudzi avanhu pakutsamwa kwangu, ndikavapengesa nedoro rokutsamwa kwangu, ndikadurura ropa rohupenyu hwavo pasi.""" 
Isaiah63:7 Ndicharumbidza hunyoro hwaJehovha namabasa aJehovha anofanira kurumbidzwa, nokuda kwezvose zvatakaitirwa naJehovha nezvakanaka zvizhinji kuimba yaIsiraeri, zvaakavaitira nokuda kwenyasha dzake, uye nokuda kohunyoro hwake." 
Isaiah63:8 Nokuti akati, ""Zvirokwazvo, ndivo vanhu vangu, vana vasingazoiti nokunyengera;"" naizvozvo akava Muponesi wavo." 
Isaiah63:9 Pakutambudzika kwavo kose naiyewo akanga achitambudzika, mutumwa, wakavazivisa chiso chake, akavaponesa; akavadzikunura norudo rwake netsitsi dzake, akavasimudza nokuvatakura mazuva ose akare." 
Isaiah63:10 Asi vakamumukira, nokuchemedza Mweya wake mutsvene; naizvozvo akashanduka, akava muvengi wavo, akarwa navo amene." 
Isaiah63:11 Ipapo vanhu vake vakarangarira mazuva akare, Mozisi navanhu vake, vakati, ""Aripiko iye akaisa Mweya wake mutsvene pakati pavo?" 
Isaiah63:12 Aripiko iye akafambisa ruoko rwake runokudzwa parutivi rwaMozisi, akaparadzanisa mvura zhinji pamberi pavo kuti azviwanire mukurumbira usingaperi?" 
Isaiah63:13 Aripiko iye akavafambisa napakadzika, sebhiza murenje, vakasagumburwa?""" 
Isaiah63:14 Mweya waJehovha wakavazorodza, semombe dzinoburukira kumupata; saizvozvo makafambisa vanhu venyu, kuti muzviwanire mukurumbira mukuru-kuru." 
Isaiah63:15 Tarirai pasi muri kudenga, muone muri pahugaro bwenyu hutsvene hunobwinya, kushingaira kwenyu namabasa enyu ane simba aripiko? Kushuva komoyo wenyu netsitsi dzenyu zvadzorwa kwandiri." 
Isaiah63:16 Nokuti muri baba vedu, kunyange Abhurahamu asingatizivi, naIsiraeri asingatiziururi; imwi Jehovha muri baba vedu, Mudzikunuri wedu kubva kare nakare, ndiro zita renyu." 
Isaiah63:17 Haiwa, Jehovha, munotirega neiko tichitsauka panzira dzenyu, nokuomesa moyo yedu kuti tirege kukutyai? Dzokai nokuda kwavaranda venyu, iwo marudzi enhaka yenyu." 
Isaiah63:18 Vanhu venyu vatsvene vakanga vanayo nguva duku hayo; vadzivisi vedu vakatsika pasi imba yenyu tsvene. 
Isaiah63:19 Isu tafanana navasina kutongobatwa nemi, navasina kutumidzwa nezita renyu." 
Isaiah64:1 Haiwa, dai maibvarura denga, mukaburuka, makomo akadedera pamberi penyu," 
Isaiah64:2 sezvinoita moto kana uchipisa utsotso, nomoto kana uchivirisa mvura, kuti muzivise vadzivisi venyu zita renyu, kuti marudzi adedere pamberi penyu!" 
Isaiah64:3 Panguva yamakaita zvinhu zvinotyisa, zvatakanga tisina kutarira, mukaburuka, makomo akadedera pamberi penyu." 
Isaiah64:4 Nokuti kubva panguva yakare vanhu havana kunzwa, kana kunzwisisa nenzeve, kunyange neziso harina kuona Mwari kunze kwenyu, iye anobatira vanomumirira." 
Isaiah64:5 Munosangana nowanofarira kuita zvakarurama, ivo vanokurangarirai panzira dzenyu; tarirai, makanga makatsamwa, nesu takatadza; takanga takadaro nguva refu, zvino tingaponeswa here?" 
Isaiah64:6 Nokuti isu tose tava soune tsvina, kururama kwedu kose kwafanana nenguvo ine tsvina; isu tose tinooma seshizha, zvakaipa zvedu zvinotibvisa semhepo." 
Isaiah64:7 Hakuna anodana zita renyu, anozvimutsa kuti akunamatireyi; nokuti makativanzira chiso chenyu, mukatinyungurusa nezvakaipa zvedu." 
Isaiah64:8 Asi zvino Jehovha, muri baba vedu; isu tiri ivhu, imwi muri muumbi wedu, isu tose tiri basa roruoko rwenyu." 
Isaiah64:9 Regai kutsamwa zvikuru, Jehovha, uye regai kurangarira zvakaipa zvedu nokusingaperi; tarirai, doonai, tiri vanhu venyu." 
Isaiah64:10 Maguta enyu matsvene ashanduka renje, Ziyoni rashanduka renje, Jerusaremu rava dongo." 
Isaiah64:11 Imba yedu tsvene, yakanakisa, pamakarumbidzwa namadzibaba edu, yatsva nomoto; nzvimbo dzedu dzose, dzataifarira, dzaparadzwa." 
Isaiah64:12 Jehovha, mungazvidzora nokuda kwezvinhu izvi here? Mucharamba munyerere, muchititambudza zvikuru here?" 
Isaiah65:1 Ndakatendera kuti nditsvakwe navasina kundibvunza, ndakatendera kuti ndiwanikwe navasina kunditsvaka; ndakati kurudzi rwakanga rusingatumidzwi nezita rangu, ""Tarirai ndini, tarirai ndini.""" 
Isaiah65:2 Ndakatambanudzira maoko angu zuva rose kurudzi rwavanhu rwakandimukira, vanofamba nenzira isakanaka, vachitevera ndangariro dzavo;" 
Isaiah65:3 vanhu vanogara vachinditambudza pachena, vanobayira zvibayiro paminda, vachipisa zvinonhuhwira pamusoro pezvitinha;" 
Isaiah65:4 vanogara pakati pamabwiro, vachivata panzvimbo dzakavandika; vanodya nyama yenguruve, uye muto wezvinhu zvinonyangadza uri mumidziyo yavo;" 
Isaiah65:5 vanoti, ""Mira woga, usaswedera kwandiri, nokuti ndiri mutsvene kupfuura iwe."" Ava utsi mumhino dzangu, moto unopfuta zuva rose." 
Isaiah65:6 Tarirai zvakanyorwa pamberi pangu, ""Handinganyarari, asi ndicharitsiva, zvirokwazvo ndicharitsiva nokutsiva kuzere," 
Isaiah65:7 zvakaipa zvenyu, nezvakaipa zvamadzibaba enyu pamwechete, vakapisa zvinonhuhwira pamusoro pezvikomo; naizvozvo ndichatanga kuvayerera mabasa avo nokuyera kuzere"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah65:8 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Zvakafanana nomunhu kana achiwana waini itsva musumbu remizambiringa, mumwe akati, `Usariparadza, nokuti mukomborero urimo; ndizvo zvandichaita nokuda kwavaranda vangu, kuti ndirege kuvaparadza vose.'" 
Isaiah65:9 Ndichabudisa rudzi kuna Jakobho, nomudyi wenhaka yamakomo angu kuna Judha; vasanangurwa vangu vachagara nhaka, navaranda vangu vachagarapo." 
Isaiah65:10 Bani reSharo richava mafuro amakwai, nomupata weAkori nzvimbo pangavata mombe pasi, zvichava zvavanhu vangu vakanditsvaka." 
Isaiah65:11 Asi imwi munosiya Jehovha, nokukangamwa gomo rangu dzvene, imwi munogadzirira Gadhi tafura, nokudirira Meni waini yakavhenganiswa." 
Isaiah65:12 Ndichakutemerai muurawe nomunondo, imwi mose muchakotamira pakubayiwa; nokuti panguva yandakadana, hamuna kupindura; panguva yandakataura, hamuna kunzwa; asi makaita zvakaipa pamberi pangu, mukasanangura zvandakanga ndisingafariri.""" 
Isaiah65:13 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Tarirai, varanda vangu vachadya, asi imwi muchava nenzara; tarirai, varanda vangu vachamwa, asi imwi muchava nenyota; tarirai, varanda vangu vachafara, asi imwi muchanyadziswa;" 
Isaiah65:14 tarirai, varanda vangu vachaimba nokufara komoyo, asi imwi muchachema nokurwadziwa komoyo, muchaungudza nokuputsika komweya." 
Isaiah65:15 imwi muchasiyira vasanangurwa vangu zita renyu, rive rokutuka naro; Ishe Jehovha achakuuraya, ndokutumidza varanda vake rimwe zita;" 
Isaiah65:16 kuti ani naani anozviti ndakaropafadzwa panyika, achati ndakaropafadzwa naMwari wachokwadi; nokuti matambudziko okutanga akakanganikwa, nokuti avanzirwa meso angu." 
Isaiah65:17 Nokuti tarirai, ndinosika denga idzva nenyika itsva; zvinhu zvakare hazvingarangarirwi, kana kufungwa nomoyo." 
Isaiah65:18 Asi imwi farai mufarisise nokusingaperi pamusoro pezvandinosika; nokuti tarirai, ndinosika Jerusaremu rive guta romufaro, navanhu varo vave nomufaro." 
Isaiah65:19 Ndichafarira Jerusaremu, nokuva nomufaro pamusoro pavanhu vangu; mukati maro hamuchazonzwikwi inzwi rokuchema, kana inzwi rokuridza mhere." 
Isaiah65:20 Hapangazovipo rushiye runamazuva mashoma, kana mutana asina kusvitsa mazuva ake; nokuti mwana achafa apedza makore ane zana, nomutadzi acharohwa nokutukwa kana asvika makore ane zana." 
Isaiah65:21 Vachavaka dzimba nokugaramo; vachasima minda yemizambiringa, nokudya michero yayo." 
Isaiah65:22 Havangavaki dzimba, mumwe achizogaramo; havangasimi, mumwe achizodya; nokuti samazuva omuti, ndizvo zvichaita mazuva avanhu vangu; vasanangurwa vangu vachapedza nguva huru vachifarira mabasa amaoko avo." 
Isaiah65:23 Havangabatiri zvisina maturo, kana kubereka vana vachakurumidza kuparadzwa; nokuti ndivo vana vavakaropafadzwa naJehovha, zvibereko zvavo zvichagara navo." 
Isaiah65:24 Zvino ndichapindura vasati vadana, ndichanzwa vachitaura." 
Isaiah65:25 Bere negwayana zvichafura pamwechete, shumba ichadya uswa senzombe, uye guruva richava zvokudya zvenyoka. Havangakuvadzi kana kuparadza pagomo rangu rose dzvene"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Kudenga ndicho chigaro changu choushe, nyika ndicho chitsiko chetsoka dzangu; mungandivakira imba yakadiniko? Ndeipiko nzvimbo pandingazorora?" 
Isaiah66:2 Nokuti zvinhu izvi zvose zvakaitwa noruoko rwangu, izvi zvinhu zvose zvakaitwa kudaro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; asi ndicharangarira munhu uyu, iye murombo anomweya wakaputsika, anodedera neshoko rangu." 
Isaiah66:3 Anouraya nzombe wakaita soanouraya munhu, anobayira gwayana soanovhuna mutsipa wembwa, anouya nechipiriso choupfu soanouya neropa renguruve, anopisira zvinonhuhwira soanotenda chifananidzo. Zvirokwazvo, vakazvisanangurira nzira dzavo, mweya wavo unofarira zvinonyangadza zvavo." 
Isaiah66:4 Neniwo ndichasanangura zvinovadadira, ndichawisira pamusoro pavo izvo zvavanotya; nokuti panguva yandakadana, hakuna akapindura, panguva yandakataura, havana kunzwa, asi vakaita zvakaipa pamberi pangu, vakasanangura zvakanga zvisingandifadzi.""" 
Isaiah66:5 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imwi munodedera neshoko rake, ""Hama dzenyu, dzinokuvengai, dzakakudzingai nokuda kwezita rangu, dzakati, `Jehovha ngaaratidze umambo hwake, kuti tione mufaro wenyu; asi ndidzo dzichanyadziswa. '" 
Isaiah66:6 Inzwai mheremhere iri muguta, mheremhere inobva kutemberi, inzwi raJehovha rinotsiva vavengi vake." 
Isaiah66:7 Akapona asati arwadziwa, akabereka mwanakomana kurwadziwa kwake kusati kwasvika." 
Isaiah66:8 Ndianiko akambonzwa chinhu chakadai? Ndiani akamboona zvinhu zvakadai? Nyika ingaberekwa nezuva rimwe here? Rudzi rwavanhu rungazvarwe pakarepo? Nokuti Ziyoni rakangoti kurwadziwa, ndokubereka vana varo." 
Isaiah66:9 Zvanzi naJehovha, `Ndingasvitsa pakubereka, ndikasaberekesa here? Ini, ndinoberekesa, ndingazarira chizvaro here?' Ndizvo zvinotaura Mwari wako." 
Isaiah66:10 Farai pamwechete neJerusaremu, mufare pamusoro paro, imwi mose munorida, farai nomufaro mukuru naro, imwi mose munorichema;" 
Isaiah66:11 kuti mumwe, mugute namazamu okunyaradzwa kwaro; kuti muyamwe, mufadzwe nokuwanda kwembiri yaro." 
Isaiah66:12 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, `Tarirai, ndicharitambanudzira rugare rwakaita sorwizi, nefuma yamarudzi avanhu sorwizi runofema kunze; imwi muchayamwa, muchaberekwa pahudyu, muchavaraidzwa pamabvi.'" 
Isaiah66:13 Somunhu anovaraidzwa namai vake, saizvozvo ndichakuvaraidzai; muchavaraidzwa paJerusaremu." 
Isaiah66:14 Muchazviona, moyo wenyu uchafara, namapfupa enyu achamera sebumhudza; ruoko rwaJehovha ruchazikamwa kuna varanda vake, asi achava nehasha navavengi vake" 
Isaiah66:15 Nokuti tarirai, Jehovha achauya nomoto, ngoro dzake dzichafanana nechamupupuri; kuti aratidze kutsamwa kwake noukasha, nokutuka kwake nemirazvo yomoto." 
Isaiah66:16 Nokuti Jehovha achatonga vanhu vose nomoto uye nomunondo wake; vakaurawa naJehovha vachava vazhinji. 
Isaiah66:17 Vanozviita vatsvene navanozvinatsa kuti vaende kuminda, vachitevera mumwe uri pakati, vachidya nyama yenguruve, nechinonyangadza, nembeva, ivavo vachapera vose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:18 Nokuti ndinoziva mabasa avo nendangariro dzavo; nguva inosvika yandichaunganidza marudzi ose namarimi ose, vachauya vachiona kubwinya kwangu." 
Isaiah66:19 Ndichaisa chiratidzo pakati pavo, vanopukunyuka kwavari ndichavatumira kuna mamwe marudzi, kuna veTarishishi, nePuri, neRudhi, vanopfura nouta, kuna veTubhari neJavhani, kuzviwi zviri kure, zvisina kumbonzwa mbiri yangu, kana kuona kubwinya kwangu pakati pamarudzi." 
Isaiah66:20 Vachauyisa hama dzenyu dzose dzichibva kumarudzi ose, chive chipo kuna Jehovha, vakatasva mabhiza, vari mungoro, nomungoro dzinamatenga, vakatasva mahesera, namakamera, vachiuya kugomo rangu dzvene Jerusaremu, sezvinoitwa navana valsiraeri kana vachiuya nezvipo zvavo mumudziyo wakanaka mumba maJehovha ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:21 Ndichatorawo vamwe vavo vave vaprista navaRevhi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Isaiah66:22 Nokuti denga idzva nenyika itsva, zvandichaita sezvichagara zviripo pamberi pangu, saizvozvo rudzi rwako nezita rako zvichagara zviripo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:23 Zvino panguva iyo vanhu vose vachauya kuzonamata pamberi pangu, pakugara komwedzi mumwe nomumwe, napaSabata imwe neimwe ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Isaiah66:24 Vachabudapo vachindotarira zvitunha zvavanhu vakandidarikira; nokuti honye yavo haingafi, uye moto wavo haungadzimwi; vachava chinhu chinosemesa nyama yose." 
Jeremiah1:1 Mashoko aJeremiya, mwanakomana waHirikia, waiva worudzi rwavaprista vaiva paAnatoti panyika yaBhenjamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Shoko raJehovha rakauya kwaari pamazuva aJosiya, mwanakomana waAmoni, mambo waJudha, negore regumi namatatu rokubata kwake ushe." 
Jeremiah1:3 Rikauyawo pamazuva aJehoiakimu, mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, kusvikira pakupera kwegore regumi nerimwe raZedhekia, mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo waJudha, kusvikira pakutapwa kwaveJerusaremu nomwedzi wechishanu." 
Jeremiah1:4 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri, richiti," 
Jeremiah1:5 Ndakakuziva ndisati ndakuumba mudumbu ramai, ndakakuita mutsvene usati wabuda muchizvaro chamai, ndakakugadza kuti uve muporofita wamarudzi avanhu.""" 
Jeremiah1:6 Ipapo ndakati, ""Haiwa, Ishe Mwari, tarirai, handigoni kutaura, nokuti ndiri mwanana hangu.""" 
Jeremiah1:7 Asi Jehovha akati kwandiri, ""Usati ndiri mwanana; nokuti kuna ani naani wandinenge ndichikutuma, unofanira kuenda, nechinhu chipi nechipi chandinenge ndichikuraira, unofanira kuchitaura." 
Jeremiah1:8 Usatya nokuda kwavo, nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ndinewe, kuti ndikurwire.' """ 
Jeremiah1:9 Ipapo Jehovha akatambanudza ruoko rwake, akabata muromo wangu; Jehovha akati kwandiri, ""Tarira, ndaisa mashoko angu mumuromo mako." 
Jeremiah1:10 Tarira, ndakugadza zuva ranhasi uve nesimba pamusoro pamarudzi nopoushe, kuti udzure nokukoromora, kuparadza nokuwisira pasi, kuvaka nokurima.""" 
Jeremiah1:11 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakauyazve kwandiri, richiti, ""Jeremiya, unoonei?"" Ndikati, ""Ndinoona davi romuamanda.""" 
Jeremiah1:12 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri,""Waona zvakanaka; nokuti ndinosvinurira shoko rangu, kuti ndiriite.""" 
Jeremiah1:13 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri rwechipiri, richiti, ""Unoonei?"" Ndikati, ""Ndinoona gate rinovira, muromo waro unotarira kuno uri kurutivi rwokumusoro.""" 
Jeremiah1:14 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri, ""Kurutivi rwokumusoro ndiko kuchabuda zvakaipa zvichawira vanhu vose vagere panyika ino." 
Jeremiah1:15 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, `Tarirai, ndinodana marudzi ose oushe ari kurutivi rwokumusoro; achauya, rumwe norumwe ruchaisa chigaro charwo choushe pavanopinda pamasuo eJerusaremu, namasvingo aro kumativi ose napamaguta ose aJudha, kuzorwa nawo." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ndichareva zvandakavatongera pamusoro pezvakaipa zvavo zvose, zvavakandirasha, vakapisira vamwe vamwari zvinonhuhwira, vakanamata mabasa amaoko avo." 
Jeremiah1:17 Zvino iwe, chizvisunga chiuno, usimuke, uvaparidzire zvose zvandakakuraira; usavhunduka nokuda kwavo, kuti ndirege kukuvhundusa pamberi pavo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Nokuti tarira, ndakakuita zuva ranhasi guta rakakomberedzwa, nembiru yedare, namasvingo endarira, urwe nenyika yose, namadzimambo aJudha, namachinda avo, navaprista vavo, navanhu venyika." 
Jeremiah1:19 Vacharwa newe, asi havangakukundi, nokuti ini ndinewe, kuti ndikurwire ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.' """ 
Jeremiah2:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakauya kwandiri, richiti," 
Jeremiah2:2 Enda, undodana munzeve dzaveJerusaremu, uti zvanzi naJehovha, `Ndakarangarira pamusoro pako hunyoro hwohuduku hwako norudo rwenguva yokuwanikwa kwako, kuti wakanditevera murenje, munyika yakanga isina kudzvarwa." 
Jeremiah2:3 Isiraeri vakanga vari rudzi rutsvene kuna Jehovha, zvibereko zvitsva zvaakazviwanira; vose vanomudya vachava nemhosva; vachawirwa nezvakaipa' "" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah2:4 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imwi imba yaJakobho, nemhuri dzose dzeimba yaIsiraeri," 
Jeremiah2:5 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Madzibaba enyu akawana zvisakarurama zvipiko kwandiri, zvavakaenda kure neni, zvavakatevera zvisina maturo, ivo vamene vakava vasina maturo?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Uye havana kureva, vachiti, `Uripiko Jehovha wakatibudisa panyika yeIjipiti, akatifambisa murenje, munyika ina masango namakomba, munyika yakaoma neyomumvuri worufu, munyika isingafambi nomunhu achipfuurapo, musingagari munhu?'" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ndakakusvitsai munyika ineminda yakaorera, kuti mudye zvibereko zvayo nezvakanaka zvayo; asi makati mapinda, mukasvibisa nyika yangu, mukaita nhaka yangu chinhu chinonyangadza." 
Jeremiah2:8 Vaprista havana kuti, `Jehovha uripiko?' Vaifambisa mirairo vakanga vasingandizivi, vafudzi vaindidarikira, vaporofita vaiporofitira Bhaari, vachitevera zvinhu zvisingabatsiri." 
Jeremiah2:9 Saka zvanzi naJehovha, `Ndicharamba ndichikakavara nemi, ndichakakavara navana vavana venyu.'" 
Jeremiah2:10 Nokuti yambukirai kuzviwi zveKitimi, muone; tumai vanhu Kedhari, mufungisise zvakanaka, muone kana kwakambovapo chinhu chakadai. """ 
Jeremiah2:11 Ko rudzi ruripo rwakatsinhanhisa vamwari varwo, ivo vasati vari vamwari here? Asi vanhu vangu vakatsinhanisa kukudzwa kwavo nezvinhu zvisingabatsiri." 
Jeremiah2:12 Shamiswa nechinhu ichi, iwe denga rose, utye zvikuru, uvhunduswe kwazvo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah2:13 Nokuti vanhu vangu vakaita zvinhu zviviri zvakaipa. Vakandisiya, ini tsime remvura mhenyu, vakazvivezera zvirongo, zvirongo zvakaputsika, zvisingagoni kuchengeta mvura. '" 
Jeremiah2:14 Isiraeri muranda here? Ko ndiye muranda wakaberekerwa mumba matenzi wake here? Ko zvino wapambwa seiko? 
Jeremiah2:15 Vana veshumba vakamuombera, vakarira, nokuparadza nyika yake; maguta ake akapiswa, hakuna unogaramo." 
Jeremiah2:16 Vana veNofi naveTapanesi vakapedza vhudzi romusoro wako. 
Jeremiah2:17 Ko hauna kuzvitsvaira izvozvo, zvawakasiya Jehovha Mwari wako panguva yaakakufambisa panzira yake here?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Zvino unondotsvakei panzira inoenda Ijipiti, kundomwa mvura yeSihori here? Unondotsvakei panzira inoenda Asiria, kundomwa mvura yoRwizi here?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Zvakaipa zvako zvinokurova, kudzokera kwako shure kunokutuka; naizvozvo zvanzi nalshe Jehovha wehondo, `Ziva, uone kuti chinhu chakaipa chinovava kuti wakasiya Jehovha Mwari wako, uye kuti haundityi.'" 
Jeremiah2:20 Nokuti yatova nguva huru yawakavhuna joko nokudambura zvisungo zvako ukati,""handidi kubatira;""nokuti wakafugama pachikomo chipi nechipi chakakwirira pasi pomuti upi noupi mutema uchifeva." 
Jeremiah2:21 kunyange zvakadaro ndakanga ndakusima uri muzambiringa wakaisvonaka, mbeu kwayo yazvokwadi; zvino wandishandukira sei ukava matavi akaipa omuzambiringa worumwe rudzi?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Nokuti kunyange ukashamba nesoda, ukatora sipo zhinji, kunyange zvakadaro zvakaipa zvako zvakaita segwapa pamberi pangu; ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Jeremiah2:23 Ungareva seiko, uchiti, `Handina kusvibiswa, handina kutevera vaBhaari?' Cherekedza nzira yako pamupata, uzive chawakaita; uri hadzi yekamera inomhanya, inofamba nenzira dzayo;" 
Jeremiah2:24 uri hadzi yembizi yakarovera renje, inofembedza mhepo nokushuva kwayo; ndiani ungaidzora pakuviga kwayo? Dzose, dzinoitsvaka, hadzinganeti; pamwedzi wayo dzinoiwana." 
Jeremiah2:25 Usatendera rutsoka rwako kufamba usina shangu, nehuro dzako kuva nenyota. Asi iwe wakati, `Hazvina maturo; kwete, nokuti ndakada vatorwa, ndivo vandichatevera.' """ 
Jeremiah2:26 Mbavha sezvainonyadziswa kana yaonekwa, saizvozvo imba yaIsiraeri yanyadziswa, ivo, namadzimambo avo, namachinda avo, navaprista vavo, navaporofita vavo;" 
Jeremiah2:27 ivo, vanoti kudanda, ""Uri baba vangu;"" nokubwe, ""Ndiwe wakandibereka;"" nokuti vakandifuratira, havana kunditarira nezviso zvavo; asi panguva yokutambudzika kwavo vachati, ""Simukai, mutiponese.""" 
Jeremiah2:28 Zvino varipiko vamwari venyu vamakazviitira? Ngavasimuke kana vachigona kukuponesai panguva yokutambudzika; nokuti kuwanda kwavamwari vako, iwe Jakobho, kwakaenzana namaguta ako." 
Jeremiah2:29 Munokakavara neni neiko? imwi mose makandidarikira ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Jeremiah2:30 Ndakarova vana venyu pasina, havana kuteerera kurangwa; munondo wenyu ndiwo wakauraya vaporofita venyu, seshumba inoparadza." 
Jeremiah2:31 Haiwa, imwi rudzi rwakadai! Wonai shoko raJehovha. Ko ini ndakanga ndiri renje kuna Isiraeri here? Kana nyika yerima guru here? Vanhu vangu vanorevereiko vachiti, `Tinotekeshera hedu, hatichazouyizve kwamuri?'" 
Jeremiah2:32 mhandara ingakangamwa zvishongo zvayo, kana mwenga mukonde wake here? Asi vanhu vangu vakandikangamwa mazuva asingaverengwi." 
Jeremiah2:33 Haiwa, unoziva zvakanaka sei kunatsa nzira yako, kuti utsvake kudikamwa! Saka wakadzidzisa navakadzi vakaipawo nzira dzako." 
Jeremiah2:34 Pamipendero yenguvo dzako pakawanikwawo ropa ravarombo vasina mhaka; handina kuriwana pakapaziwa imba, asi pane zvizvi zvose." 
Jeremiah2:35 Kunyange zvakadaro iwe wakati, `Handina mhaka; zvirokwazvo kutsamwa kwake kwakadzorwa kwandiri.' Tarira, ndichakutonga, zvaunoti, `Handina kutadza.'" 
Jeremiah2:36 Unofambireiko pose-pose, uchishandura nzira yako? Uchanyadziswa neIjipiti, sezvawakanyadziswa neAsiria." 
Jeremiah2:37 Naipapowo uchabva wakaisa maoko ako pamusoro wako; nokuti Jehovha wakaramba vaunovimba navo, newe haungabatsirwi navo.""" 
Jeremiah3:1 Zvinonzi, ""Kana murume akaramba mukadzi wake, iye akabva kwaari, akandowanikwa nomumwe murume, ko murume ungadzokera kwaarizve here? Ko nyika yakadai haingasvibiswi kwazvo here? Asi iwe wakafeva navadikamwa vako vazhinji; zvino woda kudzokera kwandiri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah3:2 Ringira meso ako kuzvikomo zvisina miti, uone; pavasina kupombora newe ndapapi? Wakavagarira panzira somuArabhia parenje; wasvibisa nyika nokufeva kwako nezvakaipa zvako." 
Jeremiah3:3 Naizvozvo wakanyimwa mvura inopfunha, nemvura yokupedzisira yakanga isipo; kunyange zvakadaro wakanga une huma yechifeve, ukaramba kunyadziswa." 
Jeremiah3:4 Ko haungatangi zvino uchidana kwandiri here, uchiti, `baba vangu, ndimi muperekedzi wohuduku hwangu?'" 
Jeremiah3:5 Ko uchagara akatsamwa nokusingaperi here? Uchagara nako kusvikira pakupedzisira here? Tarira, wakataura izvozvo ukaita zvinhu zvakaipa, ukazvipedzisa.""" 
Jeremiah3:6 Zvino Jehovha wakatizve kwandiri, namazuva amambo Josiya, ""Waona here zvakaitwa naIsiraeri pakudzokera kwavo shure? Vakakwira pagomo rimwe nerimwe rakakwirira nokupinda pasi pomuti mumwe nomumwe mutema, ndokundofevapo." 
Jeremiah3:7 Zvino vakati vapedza kuita izvozvo zvose, ini ndakati, vachadzokera kwandiri, asi havana kudzokera; kwandiri nomunun'una wavo, Judha, wokusatendeka, vakazviona." 
Jeremiah3:8 Zvino ndakaona kuti panguva yandakaramba VaIsiraeri, vokudzokera shure, ndikavapa rugwaro rwokuvaramba nemhaka yokufeva kwavo, kunyange zvakadaro munun'una wavo, ivo vaJudha, vokusatendeka, havana kutya; asi naivo vakandofevawo." 
Jeremiah3:9 Zvino nokusarangarira kwavo nyika yakasvibiswa nokufeva kwavo, vakafeva namabwe namatanda." 
Jeremiah3:10 Kunyange zvinhu izvi zvakadaro zvose, munun'una wavo, Judha, havana kudzokera kwandiri nomoyo wavo wose, asi nokunyengera"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah3:11 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ""Isiraeri wokudzokera shure, vakaita zvakarurama kukunda Judha wokusatendeka." 
Jeremiah3:12 Enda unoparidza mashoko awa kurutivi rwokumusoro, uti, `Dzokai, imwi Isiraeri wokudzokera shure ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; handingakutaririyi ndakatsamwa, nokuti ndine nyasha, handingarambi ndakatsamwa nokusingaperi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah3:13 Asi muzive zvakaipa zvenyu bedzi, kuti makadarikira Jehovha Mwari wenyu, mukafamba-famba muchitevera vatorwa pasi pemiti yose mitema, mukasateerera inzwi rangu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha.'" 
Jeremiah3:14 Zvanzi naJehovha, `Dzokai imwi vana vokudzokera shure, nokuti ndiri murume wenyu; ndichakutorai, mumwe paguta rimwe, vaviri parudzi rumwe, ndichikuisai Ziyoni.'" 
Jeremiah3:15 Ndichakupai vafudzi vanofadza moyo wangu, vachakufudzai nezivo nenjere." 
Jeremiah3:16 Zvino kana mawanda nokuwedzerwa panyika pamazuva iwayo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha havangazoti, `Areka yesungano yaJehovha;' havangaifungi, havangairangariri, havangaitsvaki, havangaiitizve." 
Jeremiah3:17 Panguva iyo vachatumidza Jerusaremu chigaro choushe chaJehovha; marudzi ose achaunganidzirwapo, paJerusaremu, nokuda kwezita raJehovha; havachazofambi nohukukutu bwemoyo yavo yakashata." 
Jeremiah3:18 Namazuva iwayo imba yaJudha ichafamba pamwechete neimba yaIsiraeri, vachauya pamwechete vachibva kunyika yokumusoro kunyika yandakapa madzibaba enyu ive nhaka yavo.""" 
Jeremiah3:19 Asi ndakati, ""Ndichakuisai sei pakati pavana vangu, ndikupei nyika inofadza, nhaka yakaisvonaka yamarudzi akawanda,"" ndikati, ""Imi muchanditumidza zita rokuti, `Baba vangu, hamungazotsauki pakunditevera.'" 
Jeremiah3:20 Zvanzi naJehovha, Zvirokwazvo, mukadzi sezvaanosiya murume wake achinyengera, saizvozvo imwi makandinyengera, imwi imba yaIsiraeri.' """ 
Jeremiah3:21 Inzwi rinonzwika kuzvikomo zvisina miti, kuchema nokunyengetera kwavana vaIsiraeri; nokuti vakaminamisa nzira dzavo, vakakangamwa Jehovha Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Dzokai, imwi vana vokudzokera shure, ndichapodza kudzokera kwenyu. Tarirai, tauya kwamuri, nokuti imwi muri Jehovha Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Zvirokwazvo, zvinobva kuzvikomo nemhere-mhere inobva kumakomo hazvina maturo; zvirokwazvo kuponeswa kwaIsiraeri kuri kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah3:24 Asi chinhu chinonyangadza chakaparadza basa ramadzibaba edu kubva pahuduku bwedu, makwai avo nemombe dzavo, vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Ngativatei pasi nokunyadziswa kwedu, kunyara kwedu ngakutifukidze; nokuti takatadzira Jehovha Mwari wedu, isu namadzibaba edu, kubva pahuduku bwedu kusvikira pazuva ranhasi; hatina kuteerera inzwi raJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah4:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Kana muchida kudzoka, imwi Isiraeri, kana muchida kudzokera kwandiri, kana muchida kubvisa zvinonyangadza zvenyu pamberi pangu, hamungafaniri henyu kudzungaira." 
Jeremiah4:2 Ipapo muchapika, muchiti, `NaJehovha mupenyu,' nezvokwadi, nezvakarurama, nokururama; ipapo marudzi achazviropafadza maari, nokuzvirumbidza maari.""" 
Jeremiah4:3 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha kuvanhu vaJudha naveJerusaremu, ""Zvivundirei gombo, idzva, musadzvara pakati pemhinzwa." 
Jeremiah4:4 Zvidzingisirei Jehovha, mubvise zvikanda zvapamberi zvomoyo, imwi vanhu vaJudha navagere Jerusaremu; kuti kutsamwa kwangu kukuru kurege kubuda somoto, upise kusino munhu unogona kuudzimura, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvamakaita.""" 
Jeremiah4:5 Taurai pakati paJudha, muparidze muJerusaremu, muti ""Ridzai hwamanda panyika,"" danidzirai, muti, ""Unganai, tindopinda mumaguta akakomberedzwa." 
Jeremiah4:6 Simudzirai mureza kurutivi rweZiyoni, tizai, musamira; nokuti ndichauyisa zvakaipa zvinobva kurutivi rwokumusoro, nokuparadza kukuru." 
Jeremiah4:7 Shumba yabuda ichibva mudenhere rayo, muparadzi wamarudzi wava munzira, wabuda panzvimbo yake, kuti aparadze nyika yenyu, maguta enyu aitwe matongo, kusina vanogaramo." 
Jeremiah4:8 Naizvozvo zvisungei zviuno zvenyu namakudza, mucheme nokuwungudza; nokuti kutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha hakuna kudzorwa kwatiri.""" 
Jeremiah4:9 Zvino ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha nezuva iro moyo wamambo uchaora, nemoyo yamachindawo; vaprista vachashamiswa navaporofita vachakanuka." 
Jeremiah4:10 Ipapo ndikati, ""Haiwa, Ishe Jehovha zvirokwazvo makanyengera kwazvo vanhu ava naveJerusaremu, zvamakati, `Muchava norugare, nyamba munondo unobaya kusvikira pamweya.' """ 
Jeremiah4:11 Nenguva iyo vanhu ava naveJerusaremu vachaudzwa, zvichinzi, ""Tarirai mhepo inopisa, inobva kuzvikomo zvisina miti murenje, inouya kumukunda wavanhu vangu, isingavingi kurudza kana kunatsa;" 
Jeremiah4:12 mhepo ine simba, inobva ikoko, ichandiuyira; zvino ndicharevawo zvandakatonga pamusoro pavo.""" 
Jeremiah4:13 Tarirai, uchauya samakore, ngoro dzake dzichaita sechamupupuri; mabhiza ake anokurumidza kukunda makondo. Tine nhamo, nokuti taparadzwa." 
Jeremiah4:14 Haiwa, Jerusaremu, suka zvakaipa zviri pamoyo wako, kuti uponeswe. Ndangariro dzako dzakaipa dzichagara mukati mako kusvikira rinhiko?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Nokuti inzwi rinotaura richibva Dhani, rinoparidza njodzi richibva pazvikomo zveEfuremu." 
Jeremiah4:16 Udzai marudzi izvozvo, tarirai, paridzirai Jerusaremu, kuti nharirire dzinobva kunyika iri kure, dzinotaurira maguta aJudha zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah4:17 Dzinovakomberedza savarindi vanokomberedza munda, nokuti vakandimukira ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah4:18 Mufambiro wako nezvawakaita ndizvo zvakakuvuyisira zvinhu izvi; ndiko kutadza kwako; nokuti zvinovava, nokuti" 
Jeremiah4:19 Maiwe! Hura hwangu, hura hwangu! Ndinorwadziwa mumoyo mangu mumene; moyo wangu unodedera mukati mangu, handigoni kunyarara, nokuti wanzwa, iwe mweya wangu, wanzwa kurira kwehwamanda nemhere-mhere yokurwa." 
Jeremiah4:20 Kunonzi, kuparadzwa kunotevera kuparadzwa; nokuti nyika yose yaitwa dongo; matende angu aparadzwa kamwekamwe, namaseiri amatende angu pakarepo." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ndichaona mureza kusvikira rinhiko, nokunzwa kurira kwehwamanda?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Nokuti vanhu vangu mapenzi, havandizivi; vakaita vana vamapenzi, vasina njere, vakachenjera pakuita zvakaipa, asi havane zivo pakuita zvakanaka.""" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndakatarira nyika, ndikaiona yaparadzwa, isina chinhu; ndikatarira denga rose, asi rakanga risina chiedza." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ndakatarira makomo, ndikaona achidedera, nezvikomo zvose zvichizununguka." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ndakatarira, ndikasaona munhu, neshiri dzose dzokudenga dzakanga dzatiza." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ndakatarira, ndikaona nyika yakanga ichibereka zvakanaka yashanduka renje, namaguta ayo ose akanga akoromoka pamberi paJehovha, napamberi pokutsamwa kwake kukuru." 
Jeremiah4:27 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nyika yose ichasiyiwa yaparadzwa, asi handingaipedzi chose.""" 
Jeremiah4:28 Nemhaka iyi nyika ichachema, nedenga rose kumusoro richasviba; nokuti ndakazvitaura, ndakafunga kuzviita, handina kuzvidemba, handingadzoki pachinhu ichi." 
Jeremiah4:29 Maguta ose anotiza nokuda komubvumo wavatasvi vamabhiza navafuri vouta; vanopinda mumatenhere, vanokwira pamatombo; ose akasiyiwa hakuna munhu unogaramo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Zvino iwe, kana waparadzwa, uchaiteiko? Kunyange ukafuka mucheka mutsvuku, kunyange ukazodza meso ako nomuti mutema, ungazvinatsa pasina; vadikamwa vako vanokuzvidza, vanotsvaka kukuuraya." 
Jeremiah4:31 Nokuti ndakanzwa inzwi seromukadzi unosurumuka, serounotambudzika pakupona dangwe rake, inzwi romukunda weZiyoni, unofemedzeka, unotambanudza maoko ake, achiti, ""Ndine nhamo zvino! Nokuti mweya wangu waziya pamberi pavaurayi vangu!""" 
Jeremiah5:1 Mhanyai kose-kose panzira dzomuguta reJerusaremu, muone zvino, muzive, mutsvake pamigwagwa mikuru yaro, kana mungawana munhu, kana aripo, unoita zvakarurama, unotsvaka zvokwadi; ipapo ndicharikangamwira." 
Jeremiah5:2 Kunyange vachiti havo, ""NaJehovha mupenyu,"" zvirokwazvo vanopika nhema." 
Jeremiah5:3 Haiwa Jehovha, meso enyu haazinotsvaka zvokwadi here? Makavarova, asi havana kunzwa kurwadziwa; makavapedza, asi vakaramba kurairwa; vakaomesa zviso zvavo kupfuura dombo, vakaramba kudzoka." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ipapo ndikati, ""Zvirokwazvo, ava varombo, mapenzi, nokuti havazivi nzira yaJehovha, kana murayiro waMwari wavo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ndichaenda kuvakuru, ndichataura navo; nokuti ivo vanoziva nzira yaJehovha, nomurayiro waMwari wavo. Asi ava vose pamwechete vakaputsa joko, vakadambura zvisungo.""" 
Jeremiah5:6 Saka shumba inobva kudondo, ichavauraya, bere rokumarenje richavaparadza, ingwe ichavandira maguta avo, mumwe nomumwe, unobudamo, uchabvamburwa; nokuti kudarika kwavo kuzhinji, nokudzokera kwavo kwawedzerwa." 
Jeremiah5:7 Ndingakukangamwira seiko? Vana vako vakandirasha, vakapika navasati vari vamwari. Nguva yandakavagutsa kwazvo, vakapombora, vakaunganira padzimba dzezvifeve vachiita mapoka." 
Jeremiah5:8 Vakanga vakaita samabhiza akagutswa, anongozvifambira; mumwe nomumwe wakadana mukadzi wowokwake." 
Jeremiah5:9 Ko handingarovi pamusoro pezvinhu izvi here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ko mweya wangu haungazvitsiviri parudzi rwakadai here? 
Jeremiah5:10 Kwirai pamasvingo aro, muparadze; asi musapedza chose; bvisai matavi aro, nokuti haazi Jehovha." 
Jeremiah5:11 Nokuti imba yaIsiraeri neimba yaJudha vakaita nokunyengera kukuru kwandiri ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Jeremiah5:12 Vakaramba Jehovha, vakati, ""Haazi iye; hakuna chakaipa chingatiwira, hatingaoni munondo kana nzara;" 
Jeremiah5:13 vaporofita vachashanduka mhepo, shoko raJehovha harizi mavari; ngavaitirwe saizvozvo.""" 
Jeremiah5:14 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wehondo, ""Zvamunotaura shoko iri, tarirai, ndichaita mashoko angu ave moto mumiromo yenyu, navanhu ava vave huni, vapedzwe nawo.""" 
Jeremiah5:15 Tarirai ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichauyisa pamusoro penyu rudzi runobva kure, imwi imba yaIsiraeri, rudzi rwamusingazivi rurimi rwarwo, kana kunzwisisa zvavanotaura." 
Jeremiah5:16 Goba ravo hwiro hwakashama, vose vanhu vane simba." 
Jeremiah5:17 Vachadya zvamakohwa nezvokudya zvenyu zvaifanira kudyiwa navanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu; vachadya makwai enyu nemombe dzenyu; vachadya mizambiringa yenyu nemionde yenyu; vachaputsira pasi neminondo maguta enyu akakomberedzwa, amaivimba nawo." 
Jeremiah5:18 Asi zvanzi naJehovha, ""Kunyange napamazuva iwayo handingakupedziyi chose." 
Jeremiah5:19 Zvino kana muchinge munoti, `Ko Jehovha Mwari wedu wakatiitirei izvezvi zvose?' Ipapo uti kwavari, `Sezvamakandirasha ini, mukashumira vamwe vamwari panyika yenyu, saizvozvo muchashumira vatorwa panyika isati iri yenyu.' """ 
Jeremiah5:20 Taurirai izvozvi paimba yaJakobho, muzviparidzire paJudha, muchiti," 
Jeremiah5:21 Zvino chinzwai izvozvi, imwi vanhu mapenzi, musina njere; muna meso, asi hamuoni, mune nzeve, asi hamunzwi." 
Jeremiah5:22 Zvanzi naJehovha, `Hamundityi here?' Hamudederi pamberi pangu here, ini ndakaisa jecha rive muganhu wegungwa, ndikatema chirevo chisingaperi kuti rirege kuudarika? Zvino kunyange mafungu aro achipenga, haangakundi." 
Jeremiah5:23 Asi vanhu ava vanomoyo wakasindimara unoramba kunzwa; vakatsauka, ndokuenda." 
Jeremiah5:24 Havati mumoyo yavo, `Zvino ngatitye Jehovha Mwari wedu, unotipa panguva yazvo mvura yokutanga neyokupedzisira, iye unotichengetera mavhiki akatarwa okukohwa.'" 
Jeremiah5:25 Zvakaipa zvenyu zvakatsausa izvozvi, kutadza kwenyu kwakadzivisa kuti zvinhu zvakanaka zvirege kuuya kwamuri." 
Jeremiah5:26 Nokuti vanhu vakaipa varipo pakati pavanhu vangu; vanorindira, savanogarira shiri; vanoteya misungo, vanobata vanhu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Sedendere, rizere neshiri, saizvozvo dzimba dzavo dzizere nokunyengera; nemhaka iyo vakura, vafuma." 
Jeremiah5:28 Vakora, vanobwinya; zvirokwazvo vanokurira vamwe namabasa akaipa; havatambi mhaka, iyo mhaka yenherera, kuti vagare zvakanaka; havaruramisiri vanoshaiwa." 
Jeremiah5:29 Ko handingarovi pamusoro pezvinhu izvi here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ko mweya wangu haungazvitsiviri parudzi rwakadai here? 
Jeremiah5:30 Chinhu chinoshamisa chinosemesa chakaitwa panyika ino; 
Jeremiah5:31 vaporofita va noporofita nhema, navaprista vanobata ushe vachirairwa navo; asi vanhu vangu vanofarira izvozvo; zvino pakupedzisira kwazvo muchaiteiko?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Tizai, imwi vana vaBhenjamini, ibvai pakati peJerusaremu, muridze hwamanda paTekoa, mumutse chiratidzo paBheterehemu; nokuti zvakaipa zvinovavarira zviri kurutivi rwokumusoro, nokuparadza kukuru." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ndichabvisa mukunda weZiyoni, iye wakanaka, unovunengwe." 
Jeremiah6:3 Vafudzi vachaenda kwariri vana mapoka avo; vacharidzikira matende avo kumativi ose, mumwe nomumwe uchafura panzvimbo yake." 
Jeremiah6:4 Zvigadzirei kundorwa naro; simukai, tiende masikati. Tine nhamo, nokuti zuva rovira, nokuti mimvuri yamadekwana yareba." 
Jeremiah6:5 Simukai, tiende vusiku, tindoparadza dzimba dzamadzimambo aro.""" 
Jeremiah6:6 Nokuti zvakanzi naJehovha wehondo, ""Temai miti, mututire Jerusaremu murwi wokurwa nawo; ndiro guta rinofanira kurohwa, mukati maro munongova nokumanikidza bedzi." 
Jeremiah6:7 Tsime sezvarinobudisa mvura yaro, saizvozvo rinobudisa zvakaipa zvaro; kuita nesimba nokuparadza ndizvo zvinonzwikwa mukati maro, pamberi pangu panongova nokurwara namavanga nguva dzose." 
Jeremiah6:8 Tenda kurangwa, iwe Jerusaremu, kuti mweya wangu urege kuparadzana newe, ndirege kukuita dongo, nyika isingagari vanhu.""" 
Jeremiah6:9 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ""Vachatanha chose zvakasara zvaIsiraeri, somuzambiringa; dzoseraizve ruoko rwenyu mumatengu, sezvinoita mutanhi wemizambiringa.""" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ndichataura nani nokuvapupurira vanzwe? Tarirai, nzeve dzavo hadzina kudzingiswa, havagoni kunzwa; tarirai, shoko raJehovha rava kwavari chinhu chinodadirwa, havarifariri." 
Jeremiah6:11 Naizvozvo ndizere nokutsamwa kwaJehovha, ndaneta kuzvidzora; ""Chikudururai pamusoro pavana vari munzira dzomuguta, napamusoro peungano yamajaya; nokuti murume nomukadzi vachabatwa pamwe chete nowava namazuva mazhinji." 
Jeremiah6:12 Dzimba dzavo dzichapiwa vamwe, minda yavo pamwechete navakadzi vavo; nokuti ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pavagere panyika,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah6:13 Nokuti kubva kuvaduku pakati pavo kusvikira kuvakuru pakati pavo mumwe nomumwe unokarira fuma; uye kubva kuvaporofita kusvikira kuvaprista mumwe nomumwe unoita nokunyengera. 
Jeremiah6:14 Vakangopodza vanga ravanhu vangu zvishoma vachiti, ""Rugare, rugare!"" Izvo hakuna rugare." 
Jeremiah6:15 Ko vakanyadziswa nguva yavakaita zvinonyangadza here? Kwete havana kutongonyara, vakakoniwa kucheneruka; naizvozvo vachawa pakati pavanowa, panguva yandinovarova vachagumburwa, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah6:16 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Mirai panzira, muwone; bvunzai nzira dzakare, kuti nzira yakanaka ndeipi; mufambe mairi, mugowanira mweya yenyu zoro;"" asi vakati, ""Hatidi kufamba mairi.""" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ndakagadza nharirire kukurindirai, ndikati, ""teererai inzwi rehwamanda;"" asi ivo vakati, ""Hatidi kuteerera.""" 
Jeremiah6:18 Naizvozvo inzwai, imwi marudzi, newe ungano, muzive zviri pakati pavo." 
Jeremiah6:19 Inzwa, ""Iwe nyika, tarira, ndini ndinouyisira vanhu ava zvakaipa, izvo zvibereko zvemifungo yavo, nokuti havana kuteerera mashoko angu; kana uri murayiro wangu, vakauramba." 
Jeremiah6:20 Ko zvinonhuhwira zvinouyirei kwandiri zvichibva Shebha, nekaramusi inobva kunyika iri kure? Zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa handizvidi, nezvibayiro zvenyu hazvindifadzi." 
Jeremiah6:21 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, `Tarirai, ndichaisira vanhu ava zvigumbuso, madzibaba navanakomana vavo vachagumbuswa nazvo pamwechete; munhu neshamwari yake vachaparara pamwechete.' """ 
Jeremiah6:22 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Tarirai, vanhu vachabva kunyika yokumusoro, rudzi rukuru ruchamutswa, ruchibva kumigumo yenyika." 
Jeremiah6:23 Vakabata uta nepfumo, vane hasha havane nyasha; inzwi ravo rinotinhira segungwa; vanotasva mabhiza, mumwe nomumwe wakazvigadzira, somunhu unoenda kuhondo, kuzorwa newe, iwe mukunda weZiyoni.""" 
Jeremiah6:24 Takanzwa guhu razvo, maoko edu oshaiwa simba, tabatwa nokutambudzika, nokurwadziwa sokomukadzi unosurumuka," 
Jeremiah6:25 Regai kubudira kubundo, kana kufamba nenzira; nokuti munondo womuvengi nezvinotyisa zviri kumativi ose." 
Jeremiah6:26 Haiwa, mukunda wavanhu vangu, ""Zvisunge chiuno namakudza, uumburuke mumadota; chema, somunhu unochema mwanakomana wake mumwechete, nokuchema kukuru kwazvo; nokuti muparadzi uchatiwira pakarepo. """ 
Jeremiah6:27 Ndakakuita mushori nenhare pakati pavanhu vangu, kuti uzive nokuidza nzira yavo." 
Jeremiah6:28 Vose vavo vamukiri vakaisvoipa, vanongofamba-famba vachiita makuhwa; indarira nedare, vanoita zvakashata vose." 
Jeremiah6:29 Mvuto inovhutira kwazvo, mutobvu wapera nomoto, vanoramba vachinatsa pasina, nokuti vakaipa havabviswi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Vachanzi sirivha yakarashwa, nokuti Jehovha wakavaramba." 
Jeremiah7:1 Shoko rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah7:2 Mira pasuo reimba yaJehovha, uparidzirepo shoko iri, uti, `Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imwi vaJudha mose munopinda napamusuo awa kuzonamata Jehovha.'" 
Jeremiah7:3 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, `Ruramisai nzira dzenyu nezvamunoita, ndigokugarisai panzvimbo ino.'" 
Jeremiah7:4 Musavimba namashoko enhema, `Izvezvi itemberi yaJehovha, temberi yaJehovha, temberi yaJehovha.'" 
Jeremiah7:5 Nokuti kana mukaruramisa kwazvo nzira dzenyu nezvamunoita, kana muchiita zvakarurama munhu mumwe nomumwe kunowokwake." 
Jeremiah7:6 Kana musingamanikidzi mutorwa, nenherera, nechirikadzi, mukasateura ropa risina mhosva panzvimbo ino, nokusatevera vamwe vamwari, vanokuisai panjodzi;" 
Jeremiah7:7 ipapo ndichakugarisai panzvimbo ino, panyika yandakapa madzibaba enyu, kubvira panguva yakare kusvikira nokusingaperi." 
Jeremiah7:8 Tarirai, munovimba namashoko enhema, asingagoni kubatsira." 
Jeremiah7:9 Mungaba, nokuuraya, nokuita hupombwe, nokupika nhema, nokupisira Bhaari zvinonhuhwira, nokutevera vamwe vapirwa vamakanga musingazivi," 
Jeremiah7:10 ndokuzouya momira pamberi pangu muimba ino, panodamwa zita rangu, muchiti, `Tasunungurwa;' kuti mugoita izvi zvose zvinonyangadza here?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Ko imba ino panodamwa zita rangu rava bako ramakororo pamberi penyu here? Tarirai, ini, ini ndimene ndaona izvozvo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah7:12 Asi zvino endai kunzvimbo yangu yaiva paShiro, pandakagarisa zita rangu pakutanga, muone zvandakaiitira nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavanhu vangu Isiraeri." 
Jeremiah7:13 Zvino, zvamakaita mabasa awa ose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ini ndikataura nemi, ndichifumira mangwanani ndichitaura, imwi mukasanzwa, ndikakudanai, mukasapindura." 
Jeremiah7:14 Naizvozvo ndichaitira imba panodamwa zita rangu, yamunovimba nayo, nenzvimbo yandakakupai imwi namadzibaba enyu, sezvandakaitira Shiro." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ndichakurashirai kure neni, sezvandakarasha hama dzenyu dzose, irwo rudzi rwose rwaEfuremu.""" 
Jeremiah7:16 Naizvozvo iwe chirega kunyengeterera vanhu ava, usadanidzira nokunyengetera nokuda kwavo, kana kuvakumbira kwandiri; nokuti handingakunzwi." 
Jeremiah7:17 Hauoni here zvavanoita mumaguta aJudha nomunzira dzomuJerusaremu here? 
Jeremiah7:18 Vana vanounganidza huni, madzibaba ndokubatidza moto, vakadzi vanokanya hupfu kuti vabikire vahosi vokudenga zvingwa, uye kuti vadirire vamwe vamwari zvipiriso zvinodururwa, kuti vanditsamwise." 
Jeremiah7:19 Vanonditsamwisa here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; havazinozvinetsa havo, vachingozvinyadzisa havo?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Saka zvanzi naJehovha Mwari, `Tarirai, kutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu zvichadururirwa panzvimbo ino, pamusoro pavanhu, napamusoro pezvipfuwo, napamusoro pemiti yokubundo, napamusoro pezvibereko zvenyika; zvichapfuta, zvisingadzimwi.' """ 
Jeremiah7:21 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, ""Wedzerai zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa pazvibayiro zvenyu, mudye nyama yazvo." 
Jeremiah7:22 Nokuti handina kutaura namadzibaba enyu, kana kuvaraira panguva yandakavabudisa panyika yeIjipiti pamusoro pezvipiriso zvinopiswa kana zvibayiro;" 
Jeremiah7:23 asi ndakavaraira chinhu ichi, ndichiti, `teererai inzwi rangu, ndigova Mwari wenyu, nemwi muchaba vanhu vangu; mufambe nenzira yose yandichakurairai, mugova nomufaro.'" 
Jeremiah7:24 Asi havana kuteerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo, asi vakafamba nokurangarira kwavo nohukukutu bwemoyo yavo vakadzokera sure havana kupfuura mberi." 
Jeremiah7:25 Kubvira pazuva rokubuda kwamadzibaba enyu munyika yeIjipiti, kusvikira pazuva ranhasi, ndakakutumirai varanda vangu vose vaporofita, ndichifumira mangwanani zuva rimwe nerimwe ndichivatuma;" 
Jeremiah7:26 kunyange zvakadaro, havana kunditeerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo, asi vakaomesa mitsipa yavo; vakaita zvakaipa kukunda madzibaba avo." 
Jeremiah7:27 Zvino iwe unofanira kuvataurira mashoko awa ose; asi havangakuteereri; unofanira kudanawo kwavari, asi havangakupinduri." 
Jeremiah7:28 Zvino iwe uti kwavari, `Urwu ndirwo rudzi rusinganzwi shoko raJehovha Mwari wavo, kana kutenda kurangwa; kutendeka kwapera, kwabva chose pamiromo yavo.'" 
Jeremiah7:29 Vevura hukomba hwako, iwe Jerusaremu, uhurashire kure; undochema pazvikomo zvisina miti, nokuti Jehovha wakarasha nokusiya rudzi rwaakatsamwira." 
Jeremiah7:30 Nokuti vana vaJudha vakaita zvakaipa pamberi pangu, vakaisa zvinonyangadza zvavo muimba pakadamwa zita rangu, kuti vaisvibise ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah7:31 Vakavaka nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzeTofeti, dziri mumupata womwanakomana waHinomi, kuti vapise vanakomana navanasikana vavo mumoto, zviri zvinhu zvandisina kuvaraira, kana kufunga mumoyo mangu." 
Jeremiah7:32 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, `Tarirai, mazuva anouya, avasingazopaidzi Tofeti, kana mupata womwanakomana waHinomi, asi Mupata wokuuraya; nokuti vachaviga vakafa paTofeti, nokuti kuchashaikwa imwe nzvimbo.'" 
Jeremiah7:33 Mitumbu yavanhu ava zvichava zvokudya zveshiri dzokudenga nezvezvikara zvenyika; hakuna uchazvidzinga. 
Jeremiah7:34 Ipapo ndichagumisa pamaguta aJudha napanzira dzomuJerusaremu inzwi rokuseka, nenzwi romufaro, nenzwi rechikomba nenzwi romufaro, nenzwi rechikomba nenzwi romwenga; nokuti nyika ichava dongo." 
Jeremiah8:1 Nenguva iyo ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha uchabvisa pamahwiro avo mapfupa amadzimambo avaJudha, namapfupa amachinda avo, namapfupa avaprista, namapfupa avaporofita, namapfupa avaigara paJerusaremu;" 
Jeremiah8:2 vachaaparadzira panopenya zuva nomwedzi nehondo yose yokudenga izvo zvavaida, nezvavaishumira, nezvavaitevera, nezvavaivinga, nezvavainamata; haangaunganidzwi, kana kuvigwa, asi achava mupfudze panyika." 
Jeremiah8:3 Rufu ruchasanangurwa kupfuura hupenyu navose vakasara panzvimbo dzose kwandakavadzingira ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha wehondo. 
Jeremiah8:4 Zvino unofanira kuti kwavari, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, `Ko vanhu vangawa, vakasazomukazve here? Munhu ungatsauka, akasazodzoka here?'" 
Jeremiah8:5 Zvino vanhu ava veJerusaremu vakadzokereiko nokudzokera kusingatongoperi? Vanonamatira kunyengera, vanoramba kudzoka." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ndakateerera, ndikanzwa, asi havana kutaura zvakarurama; hakuna munhu unochema kuipa kwake, achiti, `Ndaiteiko?' Mumwe nomumwe unotsauka nenzira yake, sebhiza rinomhanya kwazvo pakurwa." 
Jeremiah8:7 Zvirokwazvo, zimudo, riri kudenga, rinoziva nguva dzaro dzakatarwa, nenjiva nenyenganyenga nekondo dzinorangarira nguva yokuuya kwadzo, asi vanhu vangu havazivi murayiro waJehovha." 
Jeremiah8:8 Munoreva seiko, muchiti, `Takachenjera, murayiro waJehovha tinawo? Asi tarirai, peni yenhema yavanyori inonyengera.'" 
Jeremiah8:9 Vanhu vakachenjera vakanyadziswa, vakavhunduka nokubatwa; tarirai, vakaramba shoko raJehovha, zvino vane njere dzakadiniko?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Naizvozvo ndichapa vamwe vakadzi vavo, neminda yavo ndichaipa vamwe vachaiita yavo; nokuti mumwe nomumwe wavo, kubva kuvaduku kusvikira kuvakuru, mumwe nomumwe unokarira fuma; kubva kuvaporofita kusvikira kuvaprista mumwe nomumwe unoita nokunyengera." 
Jeremiah8:11 Vakangopodza vanga romukunda wavanhu vangu zvishoma, vachiti, `Rugare, rugare!' Izvo hakuna rugare." 
Jeremiah8:12 Ko vakanyadziswa nguva yavakaita zvinonyangadza here? Kwete, havana kutongonyara, vakakoniwa kucheneruka; naizvozvo vachawa pakati pavanowa; panguva yokurohwa kwavo vachagumburwa ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah8:13 Ndichavapedza chose,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ""Hakungavi namazambiringa pamuzambiringa, kana maonde pamuonde, namashizha achaoma ndakaraira vachavakukura." 
Jeremiah8:14 Tinogarireiko pasi? Unganai, tipinde mumaguta akakomberedzwa, tifirepo; nokuti Jehovha Mwari wedu wakatiuraya, akatipa mvura inouraya kuti tiimwe; nokuti takatadzira Jehovha." 
Jeremiah8:15 Takanga takatarira rugare, asi hakuna chakanaka chakasvika; takanga takatarira nguva yokuporeswa, asi tarirai, takavhunduswa." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kufembedza kwamabhiza ake kwakanzwika achiri paDhani; nyika yose yakadedera nenzwi rokurira kwaane simba ake; nokuti asvika, apedza nyika nezvose zvirimo, neguta navose vageremo." 
Jeremiah8:17 Nokuti tarirai, ndichatuma pakati penyu nyoka nemvumbi, dzicharamba kuroyiwa; dzichakurumai,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah8:18 Haiwa, dai ndaigona hangu kuzvinyaradza pakuchema kwangu! moyo wangu waziya mukati mangu." 
Jeremiah8:19 Inzwai, inzwi rokuchema komukunda wavanhu vangu, rinobva kunyika iri kure-kure, richiti, ""Ko Jehovha haazi muZiyoni here? Mambo waro haazi mukati maro here? Vakanditsamwisireiko nezvifananidzo zvavo zvakavezwa, nezvavatorwa zvisina maturo?""" 
Jeremiah8:20 kukohwa kwapera, munakamwe wapfuura, asi tigere kuponeswa.""" 
Jeremiah8:21 ini ndinokuvadzwa nokuda kokukuvadzwa komukunda wavanhu vangu; ndinochema, ndabatwa nokuvhunduswa." 
Jeremiah8:22 Ko hakuna muti webharisami muGiriyadhi here? Hakune n'anga ko here? Nokuti mukunda wavanhu vangu wakagoregerei kupodzwa? 
Jeremiah9:1 Haiwa, dai musoro wangu waiva nemvura zhinji, nameso angu riri tsime remisodzi, ndingadai ndaichema masikati novusiku nokuda kwavakaurawa vomukunda wavanhu vangu!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Haiwa, dai ndaiva nedumba rinosigarwa navafambi murenje, ndingadai ndaisiya vanhu vangu, ndikabva kwavari! Nokuti vose imhombwe, iungano yavanhu vanonyengera." 
Jeremiah9:3 Vanokunga marimi avo, sezvavanoita huta hwavo, kuzoreva nhema; vasimba panyika, asi havaiti nezvokwadi; nokuti vanoramba vachingoita zvakaipa, havandizivi,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah9:4 Mumwe nomumwe ngaachenjerere wokwake, murege kutenda hama ipi neipi; nokuti hama imwe neimwe ichanyengera, nowokwake mumwe nomumwe uchapota-pota ana makuhwa." 
Jeremiah9:5 Mumwe nomumwe uchanyengera wokwake, haangarevi zvokwadi; vakadzidzisa marimi avo kureva nhema, vanozvinetsa nokuita zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah9:6 Hugaro bwenyu huri pakati pokunyengera; vanoramba kundiziva nokunyengera kwavo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah9:7 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ""Tarirai, ndichanyausa nokuvaidza; nokuti ndingaita seiko pamusoro pomukunda wavanhu vangu?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Marimi avo miseve inouraya, anoreva zvinonyengera; munhu unoreva zvorugare kuno wokwake nomuromo wake, asi mumoyo make unovandira." 
Jeremiah9:9 Ko handingavarovi pamusoro pezvinhu izvi here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Ko mweya wangu haungatsihwi parudzi rwakadai here? 
Jeremiah9:10 Ndichachema nokuwungudza pamusoro pamakomo, ndichachema pamusoro pamafuro amarenje, nokuti zvatsva, hakuna unopfuura napo; vanhu havagoni kunzwa inzwi rezvipfuwo; shiri dzokudenga nemhuka dzose zvatiza, zvaenda hazvo." 
Jeremiah9:11 Ndichaita Jerusaremu mirwi yamabwe, panogara makava; namaguta aJudha ndichaaita matongo, asina unogaramo.""" 
Jeremiah9:12 Munhu wakachenjera, unonzwisisa izvozvi, ndianiko? Muromo waJehovha wakataura naniko, kuti aparidze izvozvi? Nyika yakapedzwa nokupiswa serenje neiko, pasina unopfuura napo?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Jehovha wakati, ""Zvavakarasha murayiro wangu wandakaisa pamberi pavo, vakasateerera inzwi rangu, nokufamba nazvo," 
Jeremiah9:14 asi vakatevera hukukutu bwemoyo yavo navaBhaari, izvo zvavakadzidziswa namadzibaba avo;" 
Jeremiah9:15 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, `Tarirai, ndichadyisa vanhu ava gavakava, nokuvamwisa mvura yenduru." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndichavaparadzirawo pakati pamarudzi, avakanga vasingazivi ivo kunyange namadzibaba avo; ndichatuma munondo uvatevere, kusvikira ndavapedza.' """ 
Jeremiah9:17 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ""Rangarirai imi, mudane vakadzi vangachema, vauye; tumai mudane vakadzi mhizha, vauye;" 
Jeremiah9:18 ngavakurumidze vacheme pamusoro pedu, kuti meso edu ayerere misodzi, namafungiro edu adurure mvura.""" 
Jeremiah9:19 Nokuti inzwi rokuchema rinonzwika richibva Ziyoni, richiti, ""Haiwa, takaparadzwa seiko! Takanyadziswa kwazvo, nokuti tabva panyika yedu nokuti vakakoromora dzimba dzedu dzataigara.""" 
Jeremiah9:20 Asi inzwai shoko raJehovha, ""Imi vakadzi nzeve dzenyu ngadzinzwe shoko romuromo wake; dzidzisai vakunda venyu kuchema, mumwe nomumwe adzidzise wokwake kuwungudza." 
Jeremiah9:21 Nokuti rufu rwakakwira pamahwindo edu, rwakapinda mudzimba dzamadzimambo edu, kuti rupedze vana vari kunze, namajaya ari panzira dzomuguta.""" 
Jeremiah9:22 Taura, uti, ""Zvanzi naJehovha, `Zvitunha zvavanhu zvichawira pasi somupfudze kubundo, setsama yehura dzinosiyiwa nomucheki, dzisina unodziunganidza.' """ 
Jeremiah9:23 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Munhu wakachenjera ngaarege kuzvirumbidza pamusoro pohuchenjeri hwake, nomunhu wesimba ngaarege kuzvirumbidza pamusoro pesimba rake, nomunhu wakafuma ngaarege kuzvirumbidza pamusoro pefuma yake;" 
Jeremiah9:24 asi unozvirumbidza, ngaazvirumbidze pamusoro pechinhu ichi, kuti unondinzwisisa nokundiziva ini, kuti ndini Jehovha, unoita hunyoro nokururamisira, nokururama panyika; nokuti ndinofarira zvinhu izvi"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah9:25 Tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha mazuva anouya, andicharova vose vakadzingiswa pakati pokusadzingiswa kwavo;" 
Jeremiah9:26 vanoti, Ijipiti, naJudha, naEdhomu, navana vaAmoni, naMoabhu, navose vakaveurwa vhudzi ravo kumativi, vanogara kurenje; nokuti marudzi ose haana kudzingiswa, uye vose veimba yaIsiraeri havana kudzingiswa pamoyo yavo.""" 
Jeremiah10:1 Inzwai shoko rinotaura Jehovha kwamuri, imwi imba yaIsiraeri," 
Jeremiah10:2 zvanzi naJehovha, ""Regai kudzidza tsika dzamarudzi avanhu, musavhunduswa nezviratidzo zvokudenga; nokuti marudzi avanhu anovhunduswa nazvo." 
Jeremiah10:3 Nokuti tsika dzavanhu hadzina maturo; nokuti mumwe unotema muti mudondo, riri basa ramaoko omunhu unoveza nedemo." 
Jeremiah10:4 Vanoushongedza nesirivha nendarama, vanourovera nembambo nenyundo, kuti urege kuzununguka." 
Jeremiah10:5 Zvakafanana nembiru dzakavezwa, dzisingatauri; zvinofanira kutakurwa, nokuti hazvigoni kufamba. Musazvitya, nokuti hazvigoni kuita zvakaipa, kunyange kuita zvakanaka, hazvigoni.""" 
Jeremiah10:6 Hakuna wakafanana nemwi Jehovha; imwi muri mukuru, zita renyu iguru nesimba raro." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ndianiko ungarega kukutyai, imwi Mambo wamarudzi avanhu? Nokuti makafanira izvozvi; nokuti pakati pavakachenjera vose vamarudzi avanhu, napaushe hwavo hwose, hakuna wakafanana nemi." 
Jeremiah10:8 Asi vose pamwechete havane njere, mapenzi; dzidzo yezvifananidzo idanda zvaro." 
Jeremiah10:9 Isirivha yakapfurwa ikaita bape, yakatorwa Tarishishi, nendarama inobva Ufazi, riri basa remhizha neramaoko omupfuri wendarama; zvakafukidzwa nguvo dzemicheka mitema nemitsvuku; zvose ibasa ravanhu venjere." 
Jeremiah10:10 Asi Jehovha ndiye Mwari wazvokwadi; ndiye Mwari mupenyu, naMambo wokusingaperi; kana iye atsamwa nyika inodedera, marudzi avanhu haagoni kumira pahasha dzake." 
Jeremiah10:11 ltiyi kwavari, ""Vamwari vasina kuita denga nenyika, ndivo vachapera panyika napasi pedenga rose.""" 
Jeremiah10:12 Ndiye wakaita nyika nesimba rake, wakateya nyika nohuchenjeri hwake, wakatatamura denga rose nenjere dzake." 
Jeremiah10:13 Kana achibudisa inzwi rake, kunomubvumo wemvura zhinji kudenga; unokwidza makore pamigumo yenyika, unoita mheni kuuyisa mvura, unobudisa mhepo panovigwa fuma yake." 
Jeremiah10:14 Munhu mumwe nomumwe wava usina njere, haane zivo; mupfuri mumwe nomumwe wendarama unonyadziswa nechifananidzo chake chaakaveza, nokuti chifananidzo chake chaakaumba, ndechenhema, hakuna mweya mazviri." 
Jeremiah10:15 Hazvina maturo, ibasa rinonyengera; panguva yokurohwa kwazvo zvichapera." 
Jeremiah10:16 Mugove waJakobho haufanani naizvozvo, nokuti ndiye muumbi wazvose; Isiraeri ndirwo rudzi rwenhaka yake; Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake." 
Jeremiah10:17 Unganidza nhumbi dzako, ubve panyika, iwe unogara wakakombwa." 
Jeremiah10:18 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha, ""Tarirai, nguva ino ndichaposhera kure vanhu vagere munyika ino, ndichavamanikidza, kuti vawanikwe.""" 
Jeremiah10:19 Ndine nhamo nokuda kokurwadziwa kwangu! Vanga rangu rakaipa kwazvo; asi ndakati, ""Zvirokwazvo ndihwo hurwere hwangu, ndinofanira kuhutakura hangu.""" 
Jeremiah10:20 Tende rangu rakaputswa, mabote angu ose akadamburwa; vana vangu vabva kwandiri, havachiripo; hakuchina ungatatamura tende rangu, kana kumisazve micheka yetende rangu." 
Jeremiah10:21 Nokuti vafudzi vava vasina njere, havana kubvunza Jehovha; naizvozvo havana kuzofara, namapoka avo ose akapararira." 
Jeremiah10:22 Inzwai, mukurumbira! Tarirai, bope guru rinouya richibva kunyika yokumusoro, kushandura maguta aJudha ave matongo, panogara makava." 
Jeremiah10:23 Haiwa, Jehovha, ndinoziva kuti nzira yomunhu haizi yake amene; munhu, unofamba, haagoni kururamisa nhano dzake." 
Jeremiah10:24 Haiwa, Jehovha, ndirangei henyu asi muite nokururama; musazviita nokutsamwa kwenyu, kuti murege kundipedza chose." 
Jeremiah10:25 Dururirai kutsamwa kwenyu pamusoro pamarudzi avanhu vasingakuziviyi, napamusoro pamarudzi asingadani zita renyu; nokuti vakadya Jakobho, zvirokwazvo, vakamudya nokumupedza, vakaparadza hugaro hwake" 
Jeremiah11:1 .Shoko rakauya kuna Jeremiya, richibva kuna Jehovha, richiti," 
Jeremiah11:2 Inzwai mashoko esungano iyi, muataure navanhu vaJudha, navagere Jerusaremu," 
Jeremiah11:3 uti kwavari, 'Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsiraeri, munhu usinganzwi mashoko esungano iyi, ngaatukwe,'" 
Jeremiah11:4 aya andakaraira madzibaba enyu nezuva randakavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, muchoto chamatare, ndichiti, `teererai inzwi rangu, muzviite zvose sezvandakakurairai; ipapo muchava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wenyu;" 
Jeremiah11:5 kuti ndisimbise kupika kwandakapikira madzibaba enyu, kuti ndichavapa nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, sezvazvakaita zuva ranhasi.' Ipapo ndakapindura, ndikati, `Ameni, Jehovha.' """ 
Jeremiah11:6 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ""Paridza mashoko awa ose pamaguta aJudha, napanzira dzomuJerusaremu, uchiti, `Inzwai mashoko esungano iyi, muaite.'" 
Jeremiah11:7 Nokuti ndakarairira madzibaba enyu kwazvo nezuva randakavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti, kusvikira zuva ranhasi, ndichifumira mangwanani, ndichirairira, ndichiti, `teererai inzwi rangu.'" 
Jeremiah11:8 Asi havana kuteerera, kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo, asi mumwe nomumwe wavo wakaramba achifamba nohukukutu hwomoyo wake wakaipa; naizvozvo ndakauyisa pamusoro pavo mashoko ose esungano iyi, andakavaraira kuti vaaite, asi havana kuaita.""" 
Jeremiah11:9 Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ""Rangano yakaipa yawanikwa pakati pavanhu vaJudha, napakati pavagere Jerusaremu." 
Jeremiah11:10 Vakadzokera kune zvakaipa zvamadzitateguru avo, akaramba kunzwa mashoko angu, vakatevera vamwe vamwari kuti vavashumire; imba yaIsiraeri neimba yaJudha vakaputsa sungano yangu yandakaita namadzibaba avo." 
Jeremiah11:11 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, `Tarirai, ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro pavo, zvavasingagoni kutiza; vachadanidzira kwandiri, asi handingavanzwi." 
Jeremiah11:12 Ipapo vamaguta aJudha navagere Jerusaremu, vachandodanidzira kuna vamwari vavanopisira zvinonhuhwira; asi havangatongovaponesi panguva yokutambudzika kwavo." 
Jeremiah11:13 Nokuti iwe Judha, kuwanda kwavamwari vako kwakafanana nokuwanda kwamaguta ako; uye makavakira chinhu chinonyadzisa maaritari, iwo maaritari okupisira Bhaari zvinonhuhwira, akawanda senzira dzomuJerusaremu.'" 
Jeremiah11:14 Saka iwe usanyengeterera vanhu ava, kana kudana nokuda kwavo nenzwi rako kana munyengetero wako; nokuti handingavanzwi nenguva yavanodanidzira kwandiri nokuda kokutambudzika kwavo." 
Jeremiah11:15 Mudikamwa wangu unotsvakeiko mumba mangu, zvaakaita zvinonyangadza navazhinji? Mhiko nenyama tsvene zvingabvisa njodzi yako here? Ipapo ungafara kwazvo." 
Jeremiah11:16 Jehovha wakakutumidza zita rinonzi, Muorivhi mutema, wakanaka nezvibereko zvakanaka; asi wakazovesa moto pamusoro pawo nomubvumo webope guru, matavi awo akavhuniwa." 
Jeremiah11:17 Nokuti Jehovha wehondo, iye wakakusima, wakareva zvakaipa pamusoro pako, nokuda kwezvakaipa zveimba yaIsiraeri, neimba yaJudha, zvavakaita vachinditsamwisa nokupisira kwavo Bhaari zvinonhuhwira.""" 
Jeremiah11:18 Jehovha wakandizivisa izvozvo, ndikazviziva; ipapo mukandiratidza zvavanoita." 
Jeremiah11:19 Asi ini ndakanga ndakafanana negwayana nyoro rinoiswa kundobayiwa; ndakanga ndisingazivi kuti vakanga varangana mano akaipa pamusoro pangu, vachiti, ""Ngatiparadze muti pamwechete nezvibereko zvawo, ngatimubvise chose panyika yavapenyu, zita rake rirege kuzorangarirwa.""" 
Jeremiah11:20 Asi imwi Jehovha wehondo, imwi munotonga zvakarurama, munoidza itsvo nomoyo, ndichaona kutsiva kwenyu kwavari, nokuti ndakakuzarurirai mhaka yangu." 
Jeremiah11:21 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pavanhu veAnatoti, vanotsvaka kukuuraya, vachiti, ""Haufaniri kuporofita nezita raJehovha, kuti urege kuurawa namaoko edu;""" 
Jeremiah11:22 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ""Tarirai, ndichavarova; majaya achaurawa nomunondo, vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo vachaurawa nenzara;" 
Jeremiah11:23 havangasarirwi navanhu, nokuti ndichauyisa zvakaipa pamusoro pavanhu veAnatoti pagore rokurohwa kwavo.""" 
Jeremiah12:1 imwi Jehovha, makarurama kana ndichikakavara nemi; kunyange zvakadaro ndinoda kutaurirana nemwi pamusoro pokururamisa kwenyu, nzira yavakaipa inomufaro neiko? Vanoita nokunyengera vanogarireiko vose vane rugare?" 
Jeremiah12:2 imwi makavasima, zvirokwazvo midzi yavo yakabata; vanokura, zvirokwazvo vanobereka zvibereko; imwi muri pedo nemiromo yavo, asi muri kure nemoyo yavo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Asi imwi Jehovha munondiziva; munondiona, munoidza moyo wangu kuti wakadini kwamuri; muvakweve samakwai anondobayiwa, muvagadzirire zuva rokubayiwa." 
Jeremiah12:4 Nyika ichachema, nemiriwo yenyika yose ichasvava kusvikira rinhiko? Mhuka neshiri zvinopedzwa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavageremo, nokuti vakati, ""Haangaoni kuguma kwedu.""" 
Jeremiah12:5 Kana uchinge wakamhanya navanofamba namakumbo, ukaneta ungagona seiko kuvivana namabhiza? Kana uchinge wakagara zvakanaka panyika yorugare, ungaita seiko pamatenhere aJorodhani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Nokuti naidzo hama dzako naveimba yababa vako vakaita nokunyengera kwauri; naivo vakadanidzira kwauri, usavatenda, kunyange vachitaura mashoko akanaka newe.""" 
Jeremiah12:7 Ndasiya imba yangu, ndarasha nhaka yangu; ndaisa mudikamwa womoyo wangu mumaoko avavengi vake." 
Jeremiah12:8 Nhaka yangu yava kwandiri seshumba iri mudondo; yandiombera, saka ndakaivenga" 
Jeremiah12:9 Ko nhaka yangu yava kwandiri segondo rinamavara here? Makondo akaikomba kumativi ose here? Endai mundokokera zvikara zvose zvokusango, muuye nazvo zvidye." 
Jeremiah12:10 Vafudzi vazhinji vakaparadza munda wangu wemazambiringa, vakatsika mugove wangu namakumbo avo, vakaita mugove wangu unodikamwa rive renje risina chinhu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Vakauita dongo; unochema kwandiri, zvawakaitwa dongo; nyika yose yakaitwa dongo, nokuti hakuna munhu une hanya nayo." 
Jeremiah12:12 Vaparadzi vakasvika pazvikomo zvose zvisina miti murenje; nokuti munondo waJehovha unopedza kubva kumugumo mumwe wenyika kusvikira kunomumwe mugumo wenyika; hakuna nyama ino rugare. 
Jeremiah12:13 Vakakusha zviyo, asi vakacheka mhinzwa; vakazvitambudza, asi havana kuwana chinhu; muchanyadziswa pamusoro pezvibereko zveminda yenyu, nokuda kokutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha.""" 
Jeremiah12:14 Zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro povokwangu vose vakaipa vanopamba nhaka yandakagarisa vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri, ""Tarirai, ndichavadzura panyika yavo, ndichadzura veimba yaJudha pakati pavo." 
Jeremiah12:15 Zvino kana ndavadzura, ndichadzoka, ndikavanzwira tsitsi, ndichavadzosera mumwe nomumwe kunhaka yake, nomumwe nomumwe kunyika yake." 
Jeremiah12:16 Zvino kana vachidzidza zvakanaka tsika dzavanhu vangu, kupika nezita rangu, vachiti, `NaJehovha mupenyu,' sezvavakadzidzisa vanhu vangu kupika naBhaari, ipapo vachavakiswa pakati pavanhu vangu."
