Jeremiah50:44 Tarirai, uchauya seshumba achibva kumatenhere aJorodhani kuzorwa nohugaro hwakasimba; nokuti ndichavatizisapo pakarepo; wakatsaurwa ndiye wandichagadzapo; nokuti ndiani wakafanana neni? Ndiani uchanditarira nguva? Mufudzi ungamira pamberi pangu ndiani?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Naizvozvo chinzwai chirevo chaJehovha chaakatema pamusoro peBhabhironi, nemifungo yake yaakafunga pamusoro penyika yavaKaradhea, `Zvirokwazvo vachavakwekweredza, ivo vaduku vamapoka avo; zvirokwazvo mafuro avo achashamiswa pamusoro pavo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Nyika inodedera nomubvumo wokukundwa kweBhabhironi, kuchema kunonzwika pakati pamarudzi ose.' """ 
Jeremiah51:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Tarirai, ndichamutsira Bhabhironi navagere Rebhikamai mhepo inoparadza." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndichatumira Bhabhironi varudzi vacharirudza, vachabudisa zvose zviri munyika yaro, nokuti nezuva rokutambudzika vacharikomberedza kumativi ose." 
Jeremiah51:3 Mupfuri ngaapfure nohuta hwake ani naani unopfura nohuta nounozvisimudza ane nguvo dzake dzokurwa, regai kunzwira tsitsi majaya aro, paradzai chose hondo yaro yose." 
Jeremiah51:4 Vachawira pasi vaurawa panyika yavaKaradhea, vabayiwa munzira dzaro." 
Jeremiah51:5 Nokuti Isiraeri naJudha havana kurashwa naMwari wavo, naJehovha wehondo, kunyange nyika yavo izere nemhosva pamberi poMutsvene waIs iraeri." 
Jeremiah51:6 Tizai mubve mukati meBhabhironi, mumwe nomumwe aponese hupenyu hwake; regai kuparadzwa mukati mezvakaipa zvaro, nokuti inguva yokutsiva kwaJehovha, iye uchariripidzira." 
Jeremiah51:7 Bhabhironi wakanga uri mukombe muruoko rwaJehovha, wakabatisa nyika yose; marudzi avanhu akamwa waini yawo, saka marudzi akapenga." 
Jeremiah51:8 Bhabhironi rakawira pasi pakarepo rikaparadzwa; wungudzai pamusoro paro, torai muti webharisami kurapa kurwadziwa kwaro, zvimwe ringapora." 
Jeremiah51:9 Taida kuporesa Bhabhironi, asi harina kupora; risiyei, mumwe nomumwe wedu aende kunyika yake, nokuti mhosva yaro yasvikira kudenga, yasimudzirwa kumakore." 
Jeremiah51:10 Jehovha wakaratidza kururama kwedu; uyai, tiparidze paZiyoni basa raJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah51:11 Rodzai miseve, batisai nhovo! Jehovha wakamutsa mweya yamadzimambo avaMedhia, nokuti murangariro wake ndowokuparadza Bhabhironi, nokuti ndiko kutsiva kwaJehovha, iko kutsiva kwetemberi yake." 
Jeremiah51:12 Simudzirai masvingo eBhabhironi mureza, simbisai varindi, isaipo nharirire, gadzirai vanovandira, nokuti Jehovha wakafunga nokuita zvaakataura pamusoro pavagere Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah51:13 Iwe ugere pamvura zhinji, une fuma zhinji, kuguma kwako kwasvika, icho chiyero chezvawakawana nokunyengera." 
Jeremiah51:14 Jehovha wehondo wakapika naiye amene, achiti, `Zvirokwazvo ndichakuzadza navanhu semhashu, ivo vachakupururudzira.'" 
Jeremiah51:15 Ndiye wakaita nyika nesimba rake, wakateya nyika nohuchenjeri hwake, wakatatamura denga rose nenjere dzake." 
Jeremiah51:16 Kana achibudisa inzwi rake, kunomubvumo wemvura zhinji kudenga; unokwidza makore pamigumo yenyika, unoita mheni kuuyisa mvura, unobudisa mhepo panovigwa fuma yake." 
Jeremiah51:17 Munhu mumwe nomumwe wava usina njere, haane zivo; mupfuri mumwe nomumwe wendarama unonyadziswa nechifananidzo chake chaakaveza, nokuti chifananidzo chaakaumba, ndechenhema; hakuna mweya mazviri." 
Jeremiah51:18 Hazvina maturo, ibasa rinonyengera; panguva yokurohwa kwazvo zvichapera." 
Jeremiah51:19 Mugove waJakobho haufanani naizvozvi, nokuti ndiye muumbi wazvose; Isiraeri ndirwo rudzi rwenhaka yake; Jehovha wehondo ndiro zita rake." 
Jeremiah51:20 Iwe uri nyundo yangu nenhumbi dzangu dzokurwa; newe ndichaputsanya marudzi avanhu newe ndichaparadza ushe; 
Jeremiah51:21 newe ndichaputsanya bhiza nomutasvi waro; newe ndichaputsanya ngoro nounofamba nayo; 
Jeremiah51:22 newe ndichaputsanya murume nomukadzi; newe ndichaputsanya mutana nomuduku; newe ndichaputsanya mujaya nemhandara; 
Jeremiah51:23 newe ndichaputsanya murimi nenzombe dzake mbiri; newe ndichaputsanya vabati navakuru. 
Jeremiah51:24 Ndicharipidzira Bhabhironi navose vagere Karadhea zvakaipa zvavo zvose zvavakaita Ziyoni pamberi penyu ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. 
Jeremiah51:25 Tarira, ndine mhosva newe, iwe gomo rokuparadza, rinoparadza nyika yose ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha; ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kwauri, ndichakukungurusa pamabwe, ndichakuita gomo rakatsva." 
Jeremiah51:26 Havangatori kwauri ibwe rekona, kana ibwe renheyo; asi uchava dongo nokusingaperi, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah51:27 Simudzai mureza panyika, ridzai hwamanda pakati pamarudzi, gadzirai marudzi kuzorwa naro, kokerai ushe bweArarati neMini neAshikenazi kuzorwa naro, gadzai mukuru wehondo kuzorwa naro, uyisai mabhiza semhashu dzinoparadza." 
Jeremiah51:28 Gadzirai marudzi kuzorwa naro, iwo madzimambo avaMedhia, navabati vavo, navakuru vavo vose, nenyika yose yavakabata." 
Jeremiah51:29 Nyika inodedera nokurwadziwa; nokuti zvakafunga Jehovha kuitira Bhabhironi zvakasimba, kuti aite nyika yeBhabhironi dongo, isina unogaramo." 
Jeremiah51:30 Mhare dzeBhabhironi dzarega kurwa, vakarambira munhare dzavo, simba ravo rakapera, vava savakadzi; vakapisa dzimba dzaro, zvipfigiso zvaro zvakavhuniwa." 
Jeremiah51:31 Imwe nhume ichamhanya kundosangana neimwe, mumwe wakatumwa kundosangana nomumwe, kuzivisa mambo weBhabhironi kuti guta rake rakundwa kumativi ose." 
Jeremiah51:32 Uye kuti mazambuko abatwa, kuti mapani eshanga apiswa nomoto, kuti varwi vavhunduswa." 
Jeremiah51:33 Nokuti zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, `Mukunda weBhabhironi wakaita seburiro nenguva yokupura; kwasara nguva duku, iye ndokusvikirwa nenguva yokukohwa.' """ 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebhukadhirezari mambo weBhabhironi wandidya, wandipwanya, wandiita mudziyo usina chinhu wandimedza seshato, razadza zidumbu raro nezvinozipa zvangu, wandidzinga.""" 
Jeremiah51:35 Ugere Ziyoni uchati, ""Zvakaipa zvandakaitirwa ini nenyama yangu ngazvive pamusoro peBhabhironi;"" Jerusaremu richati, ""Ropa rangu ngarive pamusoro pavagere Karadhea.""" 
Jeremiah51:36 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ""Tarira, ndichakureverera mhaka yako, ndichakutsiva; ndichapwisa gungwa raro, ndichaomesa tsime raro." 
Jeremiah51:37 Bhabhironi richaitwa mirwi yamabwe, hugaro hwamakava, chinhu chinoshamisa, chinoridzirwa muridzo, pasina unogaramo." 
Jeremiah51:38 Vachaomba pamwechete savana veshumba, vachaganya savana veshumba." 
Jeremiah51:39 Kana vamutswa moyo ndichavaitira mutambo, ndichavabatisa newaini, kuti vafare, vavate hope dzisingaperi, varege kuzomukazve ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndichavaburusira kwavanondobayiwa samakwaiana, samakondobwe pamwechete nenhongo." 
Jeremiah51:41 Sheshaki rakundwa sei! Guta rairumbidzwa nenyika yose rapindwa sei! Bhabhironi rava dongo sei pakati pamarudzi! 
Jeremiah51:42 Gungwa rakwira rasvika Bhabhironi, rafukidzwa namafungu aro mazhinji." 
Jeremiah51:43 Maguta aro ava matongo, nyika yakaoma nerenje, nenyika musingagari munhu, hakuna Mwanakomana womunhu unopfuura napo." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ndichatonga Bheri paBhabhironi, ndichabudisa mumuromo make chaakanga amedza, marudzi avanhu haachazovangiri kwariri; zvirokwazvo rusvingo rwaBhabhironi ruchawa." 
Jeremiah51:45 Imi vanhu vangu, budai mukati maro, muzviponese mumwe nomumwe pakutsamwa kukuru kwaJehovha." 
Jeremiah51:46 moyo yenyu irege kuora, musatya guhuzve nerimwe gore shure kwaizvozvo; panyika vachaitirana simba, mubati mumwe achirwa nomumwe." 
Jeremiah51:47 Naizvozvo tarirai, mazuva anouya andichatonga mifananidzo yakavezwa yaBhabhironi; nyika yaro yose ichanyadziswa, vakaurawa varo vose vachawira pasi mukati maro." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ipapo denga nenyika nezvose zviri mukati mazvo zvichaimba nomufaro pamusoro peBhabhironi, nokuti vaparadzi vachauya kwariri vachibva kurutivi rwokumusoro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah51:49 Vakaurawa valsiraeri, Bhabhironi rinofanira kuwawo, sezvakawira pasi paBhabhironi vakaurawa venyika yose." 
Jeremiah51:50 Imi makapukunyuka pamunondo, endai, musamira; rangarirai Jehovha muri kure, fungai Jerusaremu pamoyo yenyu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Takanyadziswa, nokuti takanzwa kushoorwa, kunyara kwakafukidza zviso zvedu, nokuti vatorwa vakapinda munzvimbo tsvene dzeimba yaJehovha." 
Jeremiah51:52 Naizvozvo, tarirai, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha mazuva anouya andichatonga mifananidzo yaro yakavezwa; vakakuvadzwa vachagomera kose panyika yaro." 
Jeremiah51:53 Kunyange Bhabhironi rikakwira kudenga, kunyange rikasimbisa pakakwirira pane simba raro, kunyange zvakadaro vaparadzi vachabva kwandiri vachiendako, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Jeremiah51:54 Inzwai inzwi rokuchema rinobva Bhabhironi, nerokuparadzwa kukuru rinobva panyika yavaKaradhea!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Nokuti Jehovha unoparadza Bhabhironi, uchanyaradzamo mubvumo mukuru; mafungu avo anotinhira semvura zhinji, mubvumo wamanzwi avo anonzwika." 
Jeremiah51:56 Nokuti muparadzi wasvika kwariri, iko Bhabhironi, mhare dzaro dzakundwa, huta hwavo hwavhuniwa-vhuniwa; nokuti Jehovha ndiMwari wokutsiva, ucharipidzira zvirokwazvo." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndichabatisa newaini machinda aro navakachenjera varo, vabati varo navakuru varo, nemhare dzaro, vachavata hope dzisingaperi, havangazomuki ndizvo zvinotaura Mambo, une zita rinonzi Jehovha wehondo.""" 
Jeremiah51:58 Zvanzi naJehovha wehondo, ""Masvingo akafara eBhabhironi achakoromorwa chose, namasuo aro marefu achapiswa nomoto; vanhu vachabatira zvisina maturo, namarudzi achabatira moto; vachaneta." 
Jeremiah51:59 Ndiro shoko, rakarairwa Seraia mwanakomana waNeria, mwanakomana waMaseia, nomuporofita Jeremiya, nguva yaakaenda Bhabhironi naZedhekia mambo waJudha negore rechina rokubata kwake ushe. Zvino Seraia wakanga ari murairi mukuru parwendo." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremiya akanyora mubhuku zvakaipa zvose zvaifanira kuwira Bhabhironi, iwo mashoko ose akanyorwa pamusoro peBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah51:61 Jeremiya akati kuna Seraia, `Kana wasvika Bhabhironi rangarira kuti urave mashoko awa ose.'" 
Jeremiah51:62 Uti, `Haiwa Jehovha, makataura pamusoro penzvimbo ino kuti muchai,paradza, kuti kusava nounogaramo, kana munhu kana zvipfuwo, asi kuti richava dongo nokusingaperi.'" 
Jeremiah51:63 Zvino kana wapedza kurava bhuku iyi, unofanira kusungira ibwe pairi, ndokuikandira mukati morwizi rwaYufuratesi;" 
Jeremiah51:64 uchiti, `Saizvozvo Bhabhironi richanyura, haringazobudizve, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvandichauyisa pamusoro paro; vachaneta.' "" Ndipo panoguma mashoko aJeremiya." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedhekia wakatanga kubata ushe ava namakore ana makumi maviri nerimwe, akabata ushe paJerusaremu makore ane gumi nerimwe; zita ramai vake rakanga riri Hamutari mukunda waJeremiya weRibhina." 
Jeremiah52:2 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha netsika dzose dzaJehoiakimu. 
Jeremiah52:3 Nokuti izvozvo zvakaitirwa Jerusaremu naJudha nokuda kokutsamwa kwaJehovha, kusvikira avarashira kure kwaari; Zedhikia akamukira mambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah52:4 Zvino negore repfumbamwe rokubata kwake ushe, nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva regumi romwedzi, Nebhukadhirezari mambo weBhabhironi akasvika, iye nehondo yake yose, kuzorwa neJerusaremu, vakadzika matende avopo, vakarikomba nenhare." 
Jeremiah52:5 Naizvozvo guta rakakombwa kusvikira pagore regumi nerimwe ramambo Zedhekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Zvino nomwedzi wechina, nezuva repfumbamwe romwedzi, nzara ikanyanya kwazvo paguta, vanhu venyika vakashaiwa zvokudya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Vakaputsa rusvingo rweguta, vanhu vose vehondo vakatiza, vakabuda muguta vusiku nenzira yesuo, pakati pamadziro maviri aiva pamunda wamambo; (zvino vaKaradhea vakanga vakakomba guta); vakaenda nenzira yokurenje." 
Jeremiah52:8 Asi hondo yavaKaradhea yakatevera mambo, vakabata Zedhekia pamapani eJeriko, hondo yake yose ikapararira ikabva kwaari." 
Jeremiah52:9 Zvino vakabata mambo, vakaenda naye kuna mambo weBhabhironi paRibhira munyika yeHamati, iye akamutongerapo." 
Jeremiah52:10 Mambo weBhabhironi akauraya vanakomana vaZedhekia iye achizviona, akaurayawo machinda ose aJudha paRibhira." 
Jeremiah52:11 Akatumbura meso aZedhekia, mambo weBhabhironi akamusunga namatare, akamuisa Bhabhironi, akamusunga mutirongo kusvikira pazuva rokufa kwake." 
Jeremiah52:12 Zvino nomwedzi wechishanu, nezuva regumi romwedzi, negore regumi namapfumbamwe ramambo Nebhukadhirezari mambo weBhabhironi, Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi, waimira pamberi pamambo weBhabhironi, wakasvika Jerusaremu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Akapisa imba yaJehovha, neimba yamambo; akapisawo dzimba dzose dzeJerusaremu, dzimba dzose huru, nomoto." 
Jeremiah52:14 Hondo yose yavaKaradhea, yakanga inomukuru wavarindi, ikaputsa masvingo ose eJerusaremu kunhivi dzose." 
Jeremiah52:15 Ipapo Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akatapa vamwe varombo chaivo vavanhu, navamwe vanhu vakanga vasara muguta, navakanga vanyengera vakaenda kuna mambo weBhabhironi, navakanga vasara kuvazhinji." 
Jeremiah52:16 Asi Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akasiya vamwe varombo chaivo venyika, kuti vave varimi veminda yemizambiringa nemimwe minda." 
Jeremiah52:17 VaKaradhea vakaputsanya mbiru dzendarira dzakanga dziri mumba maJehovha, nezvingoro, nedziva rendarira, zvakanga zviri mumba maJehovha, vakaenda nendarira yazvo yose Bhabhironi." 
Jeremiah52:18 Vakatorawo hari nefoshoro nembato dzemwenje, nembiya, nezvirongo, nenhumbi dzose dzendarira dzavaibata nadzo." 
Jeremiah52:19 Nemikombe, nezvaenga zvomoto, nembiya, nehari, nezvitimiko zvemwenje, nezvirongo, nemidziyo, zvose zvakanga zviri zvendarama nezvose zvakanga zviri zvesirivha, mukuru wavarindi akazvitora." 
Jeremiah52:20 Mbiru mbiri, nedziva rimwe, nehando gumi nembiri dzendarira dzaiva pasi pezvingoro, zvakanga zvaitirwa imba yaJehovha naSoromoni, kurema kwendarira yenhumbi idzi dzose kwakanga kusingagoni kuyerwa." 
Jeremiah52:21 Zvino kana dziri mbiru, kureba kwembiru imwe kwakasvika makubhiti ane gumi namasere; pakuyera rwonzi rwakasvika makubhiti ane gumi namaviri rwakarupoteredza; pakukora yakasvika mimwe mina; mukati makanga munemhango." 
Jeremiah52:22 Yakanga inomusoro wendarira pamusoro payo, kureba komusoro mumwe kwakasvika makubhiti mashanu, uye kwakanga kune zvakarukwa namatamba zvaipoteredza musoro, zvose zviri zvendarira; nembiru yechipiri yakanga yakafanana neyiyi, namatambawo" 
Jeremiah52:23 Pamativi pakanga pana matamba makumi mapfumbamwe namatanhatu, matamba ose akasvika zana pane zvakarukwa pamativi ose." 
Jeremiah52:24 Mukuru wavarindi akatora Seraia muprista mukuru, naZefaniya muprista wechipiri, navarindi vatatu vomukova;" 
Jeremiah52:25 napaguta akatora mukuru waitarira varume vehondo, navarume vanomwe vaisionana namambo, vaakawana muguta, nomunyori womukuru wehondo, waiunganidza vanhu venyika, navarume vana makumi matanhatu vavanhu venyika, vaakawana mukati meguta." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akavatora, akavaisa kuna mambo weBhabhironi paRibhira." 
Jeremiah52:27 Mambo weBhabhironi akavabaya, akavauraya paRibhira, panyika yeHamati. Naizvozvo vaJudha vakatapwa panyika yavo." 
Jeremiah52:28 Ndivo vanhu vakatapwa naNebhukadhirezari; negore rechinomwe vaJudha vane zviuru zvitatu namakumi maviri navatatu; 
Jeremiah52:29 negore regumi namasere raNebhukadhirezari wakatapa paJerusaremu vanhu vana mazana masere namakumi matatu navaviri, akaenda navo;" 
Jeremiah52:30 negore ramakumi maviri namatatu raNebhukadhirezari, Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi wakatapa kuvaJudha vanhu vana mazana manomwe namakumi mana navashanu; vanhu vose vaiva zviuru zvina namazana matatu." 
Jeremiah52:31 Zvino negore ramakumi matatu namanomwe rokutapwa kwaJehoiakini mambo waJudha, nomwedzi wegumi nemiviri, nezuva ramakumi maviri namashanu romwedzi, Evhirimerodhaki mambo weBhabhironi negore rokutanga rokubata kwake ushe, akakudza musoro waJehoiakini mambo wavaJudha, akamubvisa mutirongo;" 
Jeremiah52:32 akataura naye nomoyo munyoro, akakudza chigaro chake choushe kukunda zvigaro zvoushe zvamadzimambo akanga anaye paBhabhironi," 
Jeremiah52:33 akashandura nguvo dzake dzokusungwa. Jehoiakini akaramba achidya zvokudya pamberi pake mazuva ose ohupenyu hwake. 
Jeremiah52:34 Kana zviri zvokurarama nazvo, waisipiwa zvokurarama nazvo namambo weBhabhironi nguva dzose, zuva rimwe nerimwe mugove waro, kusvikira zuva rokufa kwake, namazuva ose oupenyu hwake" 
Lamentations1:1 Haiwa, guta, rakanga rizere navanhu, rinogara sei riri roga! Iro, rakanga riri guru pakati pamarudzi, rava sechirikadzi! Iro, rakanga riri vamoyo pakati penyika, rovigira mutero." 
Lamentations1:2 Rinochema zvikuru usiku, misodzi yaro iri pamatama aro; pakati pavadikamwi varo vose rinoshaiwa muvaraidzi, shamwari dzaro dzose dzarinyengera, dzashanduka vavengi varo." 
Lamentations1:3 Judha aenda kuutapwa nokuda kokutambudzika, nokuda kokubatiswa zvikuru; vanogara pakati pamarudzi, asi haavane zororo, vose vaidzingana navo vakamubata pakamanikana." 
Lamentations1:4 Nzira dzeZiyoni dzinochema, nokuti hakuna anouya kumutambo, masuo aro ose akaparadzwa, vaprista varo vanogomera, mhandara dzaro dzinotambudzika, iro romene rinovavirwa." 
Lamentations1:5 Vadzivisi varo ndivo vava vakuru, vavengi varo vanofara; nokuti Jehovha akaritambudza nemhaka yokudarika kwaro kuzhinji; vana varo vaduku vakaenda kuutapwa pamberi pomudzivisi." 
Lamentations1:6 Kunaka kwake kose kwakabva pamukunda weZiyoni; machinda ake aita senondo dzinoshaiwa mafuro, akatiza asine simba pamberi poanodzingana nawo." 
Lamentations1:7 Namazuva okutambudzika nokudzungaira kwaro, Jerusaremu rinorangarira zvose zvairifadza kubva pamazuva akare; panguva yakawira vanhu varo pamaoko omudzivisi, kusina wakaribatsira, vadzivisi vakariona, vakaseka kuparadzwa kwaro." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusaremu rakatadza zvikuru kwazvo, naizvozvo raitwa sechinhu chisakanaka; vose vairikudza, vorishora, nokuti vakaona kushama kwaro, zvirokwazvo, rakagomera, rikadzokera shure." 
Lamentations1:9 Tsvina yaro yakanga iri panguvo yaro, harina kurangarira kuguma kwaro; naizvozvo rakanyura zvinoshamisa, harina munyaradzi; tarirai, Jehovha, kutambudzika kwangu, nokuti muvengi wazvikudza." 
Lamentations1:10 Mudzivisi atambanudzira ruoko rwake kune zvose zvaro zvinofadza; nokuti rakaona marudzi achipinda panzvimbo yaro tsvene, vamakanga marayira pamusoro pavo kuti varege kupinda paungano yenyu." 
Lamentations1:11 Vanhu varo vose vanogomera, vanotsvaka zvokudya; vakapa zvinhu zvavo zvinofadza kuti zvive zvokudya zvokusimbisa mweya yavo; tarirai, Jehovha, muone; nokuti ndaitwa wakazvidzwa." 
Lamentations1:12 Nhai, imwi mose munopfuura, hamuna hanya nazvo here? Tarirai muone kana kuchema kuripo kwakafanana nokuchema kwangu, kwakauyiswa pamusoro pangu, kwandakatambudzwa nako naJehovha nezuva rokutsamwa kwake kukuru." 
Lamentations1:13 Akatuma moto mumapfupa angu, zvichibva kumusoro, akavakunda; akadzikira tsoka dzangu mumbure, akandidzosera shure; akandiparadza nokundishaisa simba zuva rose." 
Lamentations1:14 Joko rokudarika kwangu kuzhinji rakasungwa noruoko rwake; zvakarukwa, zvaiswa pamutsipa wangu, zvandishaisa simba rangu; Ishe akandiisa mumaoko avasingagoni kudzivisa." 
Lamentations1:15 Ishe akashaisa simba mhare dzangu dzose dzakandipoteredza, akakokera ungano yakatarwa kuzondipwanyira majaya angu; Ishe akatsika mukunda mhandara yaJudha sapachisviniro." 
Lamentations1:16 Ndinochema nokuda kwezvinhu izvi, maziso angu anoyerera misodzi, nokuti munyaradzi, aifanira kusimbisa mweya wangu, uri kure neni; vana vangu vasiyiwa, nokuti muvengi akunda." 
Lamentations1:17 Ziyoni rinotambanudza maoko aro, hakuna angarinyaradza; Jehovha akarayira pamusoro paJakobho, kuti vakamupoteredza vave vadzivisi vake; Jerusaremu riri pakati pavo sechinhu chakanaka." 
Lamentations1:18 Jehovha akarurama, nokuti ndakamukira murayiro wake; doteererai imwi vanhu vose, muone kuchema kwangu; mhandara dzangu namajaya angu aenda kuutapwa." 
Lamentations1:19 Ndakadana vaindida, asi vakandinyengera; vaprista vangu navakuru vangu vakaparara muguta, panguva yavakanga vachizvitsvakira zvokudya kusimbisa mweya yavo." 
Lamentations1:20 Tarirai, Jehovha, nokuti ndiri panjodzi, moyo wangu unotambudzika; moyo wangu washanduka mukati mangu, nokuti ndakakumukirai kwazvo; kunze munondo unonditorera vana, mumba makaita somuno rufu." 
Lamentations1:21 Vakandinzwa ndichigomera, hakuna anondinyaradza; vavengi vangu vose vakanzwa nhamo dzangu, vanofara kuti makazviita; muchauyisa zuva ramakatara ipapo vachafanana neni." 
Lamentations1:22 Zvakaipa zvavo zvose ngazviuye pamberi penyu; muvaitire ivo sezvamakandiitira ini nokuda kokudarika kwangu kose; nokuti kugomera kwangu kuzhinji, moyo wangu washaiwa simba." 
Lamentations2:1 Ishe akafukidza sei mukunda weZiyoni negore rokutsamwa kwake! Akabvisa kunaka kwalsiraeri akazvikandira pasi, akasarangarira chitsiko chake nezuva rokutsamwa kwake." 
Lamentations2:2 Ishe akaparadza ugaro hwose hwaJakobho, akasanzwira tsitsi; pakutsamwa kwake akawisira pasi nhare dzomukunda waJudha; akadziwisira pasi; akamhura ushe namachinda ahwo." 
Lamentations2:3 Nokutsamwa kukuru akagura nyanga dzose dzaIsiraeri, akadzosa ruoko rwake rworudyi pamberi pomuvengi akapisa muna Jakobho somurazvo womoto unopedza zvose kumativi ose" 
Lamentations2:4 Akakunga uta hwake somuvengi, akamira noruoko rwake somudzivisi, akauraya vose vaifadza meso; akadurura kutsamwa kwake somoto patende romukunda weZiyoni." 
Lamentations2:5 Ishe wava somuvengi, akamedza Isiraeri; akamedza dzimba dzavo dzose dzoushe, akaparadza nhare dzavo; akawanzira mukunda waJudha kuchema nokurira." 
Lamentations2:6 Akabvisa ruzhowa rwake nesimba sorwomunda; akaparadza nzvimbo yake yokuungana; Jehovha akakangamwisa paZiyoni ungano yakatarwa neSabata, akashora madzimambo navaprista neshungu dzokutsamwa kwake." 
Lamentations2:7 Jehovha akarasa atari yake, akasema nzvimbo yake tsvene, akaisa masvingo edzimba dzavo vakaita bope mumba maJehovha, sapazuva reungano yakatarwa." 
Lamentations2:8 Jehovha akafunga kuparadza rusvingo rwomukunda weZiyoni; akatatanura rwonzi rwokuyera,pakuparadza; akachemedza nhare norusvingo, zvinopera simba pamwechete." 
Lamentations2:9 Masuo aro akanyura pasi, akaparadza nokuvhuna zvipfigiso zvaro; mambo waro namachinda aro vari pakati pamarudzi asina murayiro. Zvirokwazvo vaporofita varo havana zvavanoratidzwa naJehovha." 
Lamentations2:10 Vakuru vomukunda weZiyoni vagere pasi, vanoramba vanyerere; vakakushira guruva pamisoro yavo, vakazvisunga zviuno namasaga; mhandara dzeJerusaremu dzakakotamisa misoro yadzo pasi." 
Lamentations2:11 Meso angu apera nemisodzi, moyo wangu unotambudzika; chiropa changu chadururirwa pasi, nemhaka yokuparadzwa komukunda wavanhu vangu, nokuti vanana navanoyamwa vanoziya munzira dzomuguta." 
Lamentations2:12 Vanoti kuna madzimai avo, ""Zviyo newaini zviripiko?"" Vachingoziya munzira dzomuguta savakakuvadzwa, mweya yavo ichidururirwa pachipfuva chamadzimai avo." 
Lamentations2:13 Ndichakupupureiko? Ndichakufananidza nei, iwe mukunda weJerusaremu? Ndichakuenzanisa nei, kuti ndikunyaradze, iwe mhandara mukunda weZiyoni? Nokuti pawakaparadzwa pakakura segungwa, ndiani achakuporesa?" 
Lamentations2:14 Vaporofita vako vakakuonera zviratidzo zvenhema nezvoupenzi; havana kubudisa zvakaipa zvako, kuti vadzose kutapwa kwako, asi vakakuonera zvirevo zvenhema nezvinokutapisa." 
Lamentations2:15 Vose vanopfuura vachaita nondo pamusoro pako, vanoridza muridzo nokudzungudzira mukunda weJerusaremu misoro yavo, vachiti, ""Ko ndiro guta rainzi navanhu rakanaka-naka kwazvo, mufaro wenyika yose?""" 
Lamentations2:16 Vavengi vako vose vakakushamisira miromo yavo; vanoridza muridzo nokugeda-geda meno, vanoti, ""Tariparadza; zvirokwazvo ndiro zuva ratakanga takatarira; tariwana, tariona.""" 
Lamentations2:17 Jehovha akaita izvo zvaakafunga, akapedzisa shoko rake raakaraira pamazuva akare; akawisira pasi, akasava netsitsi; akafadza muvengi pamusoro pako, akasimudza runyanga rwavadzivisi vako." 
Lamentations2:18 moyo yavo yakadana kuna Ishe. Iwe rusvingo rwomukunda weZiyoni, misodzi ngaiyerere sorwizi masikati nousiku, usazorora, mboni yeziso rako isarega kuchema." 
Lamentations2:19 Muka, danidzira usiku, pakutanga kwenguva dzose; durura moyo wako semvura pamberi paJehovha; simudzira maoko ako kwaari nokuda koupenyu hwavana vako, vanoziya nenzara pakuvamba kwenzira imwe neimwe yomuguta." 
Lamentations2:20 Tarirai, Jehovha, muone vamakaitira zvakadai! Ko vakadzi vangadye zvibereko zvavo, ivo vana vari pamaoko here? Ko vaprista navaporofita vangaurawe panzvimbo tsvene yaishe here?" 
Lamentations2:21 Majaya navatana vavete pasi munzira dzomuguta; mhandara dzangu namajaya angu vaurawa nomunondo; makavauraya nezuva rokutsamwa kwenyu, makavabaya, hamuna kuvanzwira tsitsi." 
Lamentations2:22 Makadaidza zvinondityisa pamativi ose, sapazuva reungano yakatarwa; hakuna akapukunyuka kana akasara pazuva rokutsamwa kwaJehovha; vandakabata mumaoko navandakarera vapedzwa nomuvengi wangu." 
Lamentations3:1 Ndini munhu akaona kutambudzika neshamhu yokutsamwa kwake. 
Lamentations3:2 Akanditungamirira akandifambisa murima ndisina chiedza. 
Lamentations3:3 Zvirokwazvo anogara achingondiramba zuva rose noruoko rwake. 
Lamentations3:4 Akasakadza nyama yangu neganda rangu, akavhuna mapfupa angu." 
Lamentations3:5 Akandivakira rusvingo kuzorwa neni, Akandikomberedza nenduru nokurwadziwa." 
Lamentations3:6 Akandigarisa panzvimbo dzinerima, savanhu vakanguva vafa." 
Lamentations3:7 Akandikomberedza norusvingo, kuti ndirege kugona kubuda; akaremesa ngetani dzangu." 
Lamentations3:8 Zvirokwazvo, kana ndichidana nokuridza mhere, anodzivisa munyengetero wangu." 
Lamentations3:9 Akadzivira nzira dzangu norusvingo rwamabwe akavezwa, akakanganisa nzira dzangu." 
Lamentations3:10 Kwandiri akaita sebere rinovandira, seshumba iri panzvimbo dzisingazikamwi." 
Lamentations3:11 Akatsausa nzira dzangu, akandibvarura-bvarura, akandiita renje." 
Lamentations3:12 Akakunga uta hwake, akandiita chinhu chokuposhera nomuseve." 
Lamentations3:13 Akapinza miseve yegoba rake mutsvo dzangu. 
Lamentations3:14 Ndava chinhu chinosekwa navanhu vangu vose, nechiimbo chavo zuva rose." 
Lamentations3:15 Akandigutisa nezvinovava, akandimwisa gavakava." 
Lamentations3:16 Akapedza meno angu norubwe, akandifukidza namadota," 
Lamentations3:17 Makarashira mweya wangu kure norugare, ndakakangamwa kuti zvakanaka zvakadini." 
Lamentations3:18 Ini ndikati, ""Simba rangu rapera, nezvandakanga ndakatarira kuna Jehovha.""" 
Lamentations3:19 Rangarirai kutambudzika kwangu nenhamo yangu, iro gavakava nenduru." 
Lamentations3:20 Mweya wangu uchangozvirangarira nazvino, uri kutambudzika kwazvo." 
Lamentations3:21 Ndinozvifunga izvo, naizvozvo ndine tariro." 
Lamentations3:22 Nokuda kounyoro hwaJehovha tigere kupedzwa, nokuti tsitsi dzake hadziperi." 
Lamentations3:23 Mangwanani ose zvava zvitsva; kutendeka kwenyu kukuru. 
Lamentations3:24 Jehovha ndiwo mugove wangu, ndizvo zvinotaura mweya wangu; naizvozvo ndichavimba naye." 
Lamentations3:25 Jehovha anoitira zvakanaka vanomumirira, naiwo mweya unomutsvaka." 
Lamentations3:26 Zvakanaka kuti munhu avimbe naJehovha, amirire ruponeso rwaJehovha anyerere," 
Lamentations3:27 zvakanaka kuti munhu atakure joko rake achiri muduku. 
Lamentations3:28 Ngaagare ari oga anyerere, nokuti ndiye akariisa pamusoro pake." 
Lamentations3:29 Ngaaise muromo wake muguruva; zvimwe tariro ichipo. 
Lamentations3:30 Ngaarinzire dama rake kune anomurova, ngaagutiswe nokushorwa." 
Lamentations3:31 Nokuti Ishe haangadzingi nokusingaperi. 
Lamentations3:32 Nokuti kunyange akachemedza, achanzwira tsitsi nokuwanda kwengoni dzake" 
Lamentations3:33 Nokuti haatambudzi nomoyo wake, haachemedzi vana vavanhu." 
Lamentations3:34 Kuti vasungwa vose venyika vatsikwe pasi petsoka," 
Lamentations3:35 kuti zvakarurama zvomunhu zvikanganiswe pamberi poWokumusoro-soro," 
Lamentations3:36 kuti munhu arege kururamisirwa pamhaka yake, Ishe haafari naizvozvo." 
Lamentations3:37 Ndianiko angataura, zvikaitika, kana Ishe asingazvirayiri?" 
Lamentations3:38 Ko zvakaipa nezvakanaka hazvibudi pamuromo woWokumusoro-soro here? 
Lamentations3:39 Ko munhu mupenyu anonyunyutirei, kana iye munhu achirohwa pamusoro pezvivi zvake?" 
Lamentations3:40 Ngatinzvere nokuedza nzira dzedu, titendeukirezve kuna Jehovha." 
Lamentations3:41 Ngatisimudze moyo yedu namaoko edu kuna Mwari ari kudenga. 
Lamentations3:42 Takadarika nokumumukira simba; imwi hamuna kutikangamwira 
Lamentations3:43 Makazvifukidza nokutsamwa, mukadzingana nesu, makauraya, hamuna kunzwira tsitsi." 
Lamentations3:44 Makazvifukidza negore kuti kurege kuva nomunyengetero ungapindapo 
Lamentations3:45 Makatiita marara nezvinorashwa pakati pamarudzi avanhu. 
Lamentations3:46 Vavengi vedu vose vakatishamisira miromo yavo. 
Lamentations3:47 Kutya nehunza zvasvika kwatiri nokupedzwa nokuparadzwa. 
Lamentations3:48 Ziso rangu rinoyerera nzizi dzemvura pamusoro pokuparadzwa komukunda wavanhu vangu. 
Lamentations3:49 Ziso rangu rinodurura misodzi, hariregi, harigumi," 
Lamentations3:50 kusvikira Jehovha achitarira achiona ari kudenga. 
Lamentations3:51 Ziso rangu rinorwadzisa mweya wangu nemhaka yavakunda vose veguta rangu. 
Lamentations3:52 Vakadzingana neni zvikuru seshiri, ivo, vanondivenga ndisina mhaka." 
Lamentations3:53 Vakaparadza upenyu hwangu mugomba, vakakandira ibwe pamusoro pangu." 
Lamentations3:54 Mvura zhinji yakafukidza musoro wangu; ndakati, ""Ndapera.""" 
Lamentations3:55 Ndakadana zita renyu, Jehovha, ndiri mugomba rakadzika kwazvo." 
Lamentations3:56 Makanzwa inzwi rangu; regai kundivanzira nzeve yenyu pakufema kwangu nokuchema kwangu. 
Lamentations3:57 Makaswedera nezuva randakadana kwamuri, makati, ""Usatya.""" 
Lamentations3:58 Ishe, imwi makandireverera mhaka dzomweya wangu, makadzikunura upenyu hwangu." 
Lamentations3:59 Haiwa Jehovha, makaona kusaruramisirwa kwangu, nditongerei mhaka yangu." 
Lamentations3:60 Makaona kutsiva kwavo kose, namano avo ose pamusoro pangu." 
Lamentations3:61 Makanzwa kushora kwavo, Jehovha, namano avo ose pamusoro pangu," 
Lamentations3:62 iyo miromo yavakandimukira nezvavakandifungira zuva rose. 
Lamentations3:63 Tarirai kugara kwavo pasi nokusimuka kwavo; ndiri chiimbo chavo. 
Lamentations3:64 imwi muchavatsiva, Jehovha, zvakafanira basa ramaoko avo." 
Lamentations3:65 Muchavapa kuwoma komoyo, ndiko kutuka kwenyu pamusoro pavo." 
Lamentations3:66 Muchadzingana navo makatsamwa, nokuvaparadza pasi pedenga raJehovha." 
Lamentations4:1 Haiwa, ndarama yasviba sei! Ndarama yakaisvo-naka yashanduka sei! Mabwe enzvimbo tsvene arashirwa pamharadzano dzenzira dzomuguta." 
Lamentations4:2 Vanakomana vanodikamwa veZiyoni vakafanana nendarama yakaisvo-naka, haiwa vakanzi vakaita sezvirongo zvevhu sei, iro basa romuumbi wehari!" 
Lamentations4:3 Kunyange namakava anobudisa mazamu, achiyamwisa vana vawo; mukunda wavanhu vangu wava nehasha semhou murenje." 
Lamentations4:4 Rurimi rwomwana unomwa runonamatira mumukamwa womuromo wake nenyota; vanana vanokumbira chingwa, asi hakuna munhu anovamedurira." 
Lamentations4:5 Avo vaisidya zvinozipa,varaswa munzira dzomuguta; vairerwa vakafuka micheka mitsvuku, zvino votsivama pamaturunhuru." 
Lamentations4:6 Nokuti zvakaipa zvomukunda wavanhu vangu zvinopfuura zvivi zveSodhoma, iro rakaparadzwa kamwe-kamwe kusina maoko akaribata." 
Lamentations4:7 Machinda aro akanga akapfuura chando nokunaka, akanga akachena kupfuura mukaka, akanga akatsvuka pamuviri kupfuura makorari, pakuonekwa akanga akaita sesafaya." 
Lamentations4:8 Zviso zvavo zvasviba kupfuura mazimbe, havazikamwi munzira dzomuguta; ganda ravo rinonamatira mapfupa avo, raoma, rafanana nedanda." 
Lamentations4:9 Vakaurawa nomunondo vakaita nani kuna vakaurawa nenzara; nokuti ava vaonda, vabayiwa nokushayiwa zvibereko zveminda." 
Lamentations4:10 Maoko avakadzi vaiva nomoyo munyoro akabika vana vavo, zvikava zvokudya zvavo pakuparadzwa komukunda wavanhu vangu." 
Lamentations4:11 Jehovha akaita zvaakanga achida nokutsamwa kwake, akadurura hasha dzake huru; akabatidza moto paZiyoni, akapedza nheyo dzaro." 
Lamentations4:12 Madzimambo enyika vangadai vasina kutenda, kunyange navose vagere panyika yose, kuti mudzivisi nomuvengi vachapinda pamasuo eJerusaremu." 
Lamentations4:13 Zvakaitwa nokuda kwezvivi zvavaporofita varo, nezvakaipa zvavaprista varo, vakateura ropa ravakarurama mukati maro." 
Lamentations4:14 Vanodzungaira samapofu munzira dzomuguta, vakasvibiswa neropa, naizvozvo vanhu havagoni kubata nguvo dzavo." 
Lamentations4:15 Vakadanidzira kwavari vachiti, ""Ibvai, makan'ora! Ibvai, ibvai, regai kutibata!"" Panguva yokutiza nokudzungaira kwavo, vanhu vakati pakati pamarudzi; ""Havangazogarizve pano vari vatorwa.""" 
Lamentations4:16 Kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakavaparadzira; haachavi nehanya navo; havana kurangarira vaprista, havana kukudza vakuru." 
Lamentations4:17 Meso edu anongopera nazvino achitarira rubatsiro rwedu pasina; pakutarira kwedu takatarira rudzi rusingagoni kutiponesa. 
Lamentations4:18 Vanoronda makwara edu, naizvozvo hatigoni kufamba munzira dzomuguta redu; kuguma kwedu kwava pedo, mazuva edu asvika, nokuti kuguma kwedu kwasvika." 
Lamentations4:19 Avo vakadzingana nesu, vakamhanyisa kupfuura makondo okudenga; vakadzingana nesu pamakomo, vakatigarira murenje." 
Lamentations4:20 Mweya wemhino dzedu, iye muzodzwa waJehovha, wakabatwa muhunza dzavo; iye watakati, ""Pamumvuri wake ndipo patichararama pakati pamarudzi.""" 
Lamentations4:21 Farisisa, uve nomufaro, iwe mukunda weEdhomu, ugere panyika yeUzi; mukombe uchasvika kwauriwo; uchabatwa newaini ukazvifukura." 
Lamentations4:22 Kurohwa kwezvakaipa zvako kwapera, iwe mukunda weZiyoni; haachazokutapisizve; iye achakurova pamusoro pezvakaipa zvako, iwe mukunda weEdhomu; iye achafukura zvivi zvako." 
Lamentations5:1 Rangarirai Jehovha, zvakatiwira; tarirai, muone kushorwa kwedu." 
Lamentations5:2 Nhaka yedu yaenda kuvatorwa, nedzimba dzedu kune vokumwe." 
Lamentations5:3 Tiri nherera navasina baba; madzimai edu akaita sechirikadzi. 
Lamentations5:4 Takamwa mvura yedu tichiita zvokutenga nemari; huni dzedu takadzitengeserwa. 
Lamentations5:5 Vanodzingana nesu vari pamitsipa yedu; taneta hatine zororo. 
Lamentations5:6 Takatambanudzira ruoko rwedu kuna vaIjipiti, nokuna vaAsiria, kuti tigute zvokudya." 
Lamentations5:7 Madzibaba edu akatadza, zvino havachipo; isu takatakura zvakaipa zvavo." 
Lamentations5:8 Varanda vanotibata ushe, hakuna angatirwira pamaoko avo." 
Lamentations5:9 Tinozviwanira zvokudya zvedu upenyu bwedu huri panjodzi, nemhaka yomunondo uri kurenje." 
Lamentations5:10 Ganda redu rasviba sechoto, nemhaka yokupisa kukuru kwenzara." 
Lamentations5:11 Vakachinyira vakadzi paZiyoni, nemhandara pamaguta aJudha." 
Lamentations5:12 Machinda akasungirirwa namaoko avo, vakuru havana kukudzwa." 
Lamentations5:13 Majaya akatakura guyo, vana vakagumburwa nokurema kwehuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Vakuru vakarega kusvika pasuo, majaya akarega kuimba kwavo." 
Lamentations5:15 Mufaro womoyo wedu waguma; kutamba kwedu kwashanduka kuchema. 
Lamentations5:16 Korona yawa pamisoro yedu; tine nhamo! Nokuti takatadza. 
Lamentations5:17 Nemhaka iyi moyo yedu yapera simba, nemhaka yezvinhu izvi meso edu haachaoni zvakanaka;" 
Lamentations5:18 nokuda kwegomo reZiyoni, rava dongo; makava anofambapo." 
Lamentations5:19 imwi Jehovha muripo nokusingaperi; chigaro chenyu choushe chiripo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi. 
Lamentations5:20 Munotikangamwireiko nokusingaperi, munotirasireiko nguva huru yakadai?" 
Lamentations5:21 Tidzoserei kwamuri, Jehovha, ipapo tichadzoka; vandudzai mazuva edu ave sakare." 
Lamentations5:22 Asi makatirasa chose here? Makatitsamwira zvikuru here? 
Ezekiel1:1 Zvino negore ramakumi matatu, nomwedzi wechina, nezuva rechishanu romwedzi, ini ndiri pakati pavakatapwa parwizi rwaKebhari, kudenga kwakazarurwa, ndikaona zvandakaratidzwa zvaMwari." 
Ezekiel1:2 Nezuva rechishanu romwedzi, riri gore rechishanu rokutapwa kwamambo Jehoiakini," 
Ezekiel1:3 shoko raJehovha rakasvika kumuprista Ezekieri, mwanakomana waBhuzi, munyika yavaKaradhea, parwizi rwaKebhari; ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pake ipapo" 
Ezekiel1:4 Ndikatarira, ndikaona dutu remhepo richibva kurutivi rwokumusoro, riri gore guru rinomoto wairamba uchipenya, rakakomberedzwa nokubwinya, nomukati maro, imo mukati momoto, mune chinhu chaipenya sedare." 
Ezekiel1:5 Zvino mukati mazvo mukabuda zvakanga zvakaita sezvipenyu zvina. Zvakanga zvakadai: Zvakanga zvakafanana nomunhu; 
Ezekiel1:6 chimwe nechimwe chaiva nezviso zvina, nechimwe nechimwe chazvo chaiva namapapiro mana." 
Ezekiel1:7 Makumbo azvo akanga akarurama, pasi petsoka dzadzo pakanga pakaita sapasi petsoka dzemhuru; dzaipenya sendarira yakabwinyiswa." 
Ezekiel1:8 Zvakanga zvina maoko omunhu pasi pamapapiro azvo kumativi azvo mana; zvose zviri zvina zvakanga zvakadai pazviso zvazvo namapapiro azvo: 
Ezekiel1:9 Mapapiro azvo akanga akabatana; hazvina kutsauka pakufamba kwazvo, asi chimwe nechimwe chairuramira mberi pakufamba kwacho." 
Ezekiel1:10 Kana zviri zviso zvazvo pakuonekwa kwazvo, zvaiva nechiso chomunhu; zvose zviri zvina zvaiva nechiso cheshumba kurutivi rworudyi; zvose zviri zvina zvaiva nechiso chenzombe kurutivi rworuboshwe; zvose zviri zvina zvaiva nechiso chegondobwe." 
Ezekiel1:11 Zviso zvazvo namapapiro azvo zvakanga zvakaparadzana kumusoro; mapapiro maviri echimwe nechimwe akanga akabatana, asi maviri akanga akafukidza muviri wazvo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Chimwe nechimwe chairuramira mberi pakufamba kwacho; kwaida kufamba mweya, ndiko kwazvaifamba; hazvina kutsauka pakufamba kwazvo." 
Ezekiel1:13 Kana zviri zvipenyu pakuonekwa kwazvo, zvakanga zvakafanana namazimbe omoto anopfuta, zvakafanana namazhenje; moto wairamba uchifamba pakati pezvipenyu; moto waipenya, nomukati momoto maibuda mheni." 
Ezekiel1:14 Zvipenyu zvaimhanya zvichidzoka, zvakafanana nokupenya kwemheni." 
Ezekiel1:15 Zvino ndakati ndichitarira zvipenyu izvo, ndikaona gumbo rimwe rengoro riri pasi kurutivi rwezvipenyu izvo, kurutivi rumwe norumwe rwezviso zvacho." 
Ezekiel1:16 Makumbo awo pakuonekwa kwawo nomuitirwo wawo zvakanga zvakafanana nebheriri; ose ari mana akanga akafanana; pakuonekwa kwawo napamuitirwo wawo zvakanga zvakaita segumbo rimwe riri mukati merimwe gumbo. 
Ezekiel1:17 Pakufamba kwawo akafamba kumativi awo mana; haana kutsauka pakufamba kwawo. 
Ezekiel1:18 Kana ari marimu awo, akanga akakwirira uye achityisa; marimu awo mana akanga azere nameso kose-kose." 
Ezekiel1:19 Zvino kana zvipenyu zvofamba, makumbo ofambawo parutivi rwazvo, kana zvipenyu zvokwidzwa zvichibva pasi, naiwo makumbo okwidzwawo." 
Ezekiel1:20 Pose-pose kwaida kufamba mweya, ndiko kwazvaifamba, makumbo ndokukwidzwa pamwechete nazvo, nokuti mweya wechipenyu wakanga uri mumakumbo." 
Ezekiel1:21 Kana izvo zvofamba, iwo ofamba; kana izvo zvomira zvichibva pasi, makumbo okwidzwa pamwechete nazvo; nokuti mweya wechipenyu wakanga uri mumakumbo." 
Ezekiel1:22 Kumusoro kwemisoro yezvipenyu kwakanga kune chinhu chakafanana nedenga, rakanga rakaita sekiristaro inotyisa, rakatatamurwa pamusoro pemisoro yazvo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Pasi pedenga mapapiro azvo akanga akarurama, rimwe rakabatana nerimwe; chimwe nechimwe chazvo chakanga china mapapiro maviri aifukidza muviri wacho kurutivi rwowuno, nechimwe nechimwe chaiva namapapiro maviri aifukidza kurutivi rweseri." 
Ezekiel1:24 Zvino kana zvofamba, ndainzwa kuunga kwamapapiro azvo zvichiita sokuunga kwemvura zhinji, senzwi reane simba rose, somubvumo webope wakaita sokutinhira kwehondo; kana zvomira, zvaipeta mapapiro azvo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Kwakanga kunenzwi kumusoro kwedenga raiva pamusoro pemisoro yazvo; kana zvomira, zvaideredza mapapiro azvo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Kumusoro kwedenga rakanga riri pamusoro pemisoro yazvo, kwakanga kune chinhu chakafanana nechigaro chohushe, chaiita sebwe resafiri; pachinhu chakafanana nechigaro chohushe kwakanga kuno mufananidzo womunhu agere pamusoro pacho." 
Ezekiel1:27 Zvino ndakaona zvakaita sedare rinopenya, zvakafanana nomoto mukati mazvo kumativi ose, zvakabva pakaita sechiuno chake zvichikwira kumusoro; zvino kubva ipapo pakaita sechiuno chake zvichienda pasi ndakaona chakaita somoto; iye akanga akakomberedzwa nokubwinya kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel1:28 Sezvakaita murarawungu uri mugore nezuva remvura, ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita kubwinya pakuonekwa kwahwo kumativi ose. Ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita kubwinya kwaJehovha. Zvino ndakati ndichizviona, ndikawira pasi nechiso changu, ndikanzwa inzwi romumwe akanga achitaura." 
Ezekiel2:1 Akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, mira namakumbo ako, ini nditaure newe.""" 
Ezekiel2:2 Zvino akati achitaura neni, Mweya ndokupinda mukati mangu, akandimisa namakumbo angu; ndikanzwa akanga achitaura neni." 
Ezekiel2:3 Iye akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, ndinokutumira kuvana vaIsiraeri, kumarudzi anomukira simba, akandimukira simba ini; ivo namadzibaba avo vakandidarikira, kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Ezekiel2:4 Vana vane zviso zvisina kunyara nemoyo mikukutu; ndinokutumira kwavari, iwe uti kwavari, zvanzi nalshe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel2:5 'Zvino ivo, kana vachida kunzwa, kana vasingadi nokuti ivo iimba inondimukira simba, vachaziva kuti muporofita akanga aripo pakati pavo.'" 
Ezekiel2:6 Asi iwe, mwanakomana womunhu, usavatya ivo, usatya mashoko avo, kunyange uri pakati porukato nemhinzwa, ugere pakati pezvinyavada; usatya mashoko avo, usavhunduswa nezviso zvavo, nokuti ivo iimba inondimukira simba kwazvo." 
Ezekiel2:7 Asi iwe unofanira kuvavudza mashoko angu, kana vachida kunzwa, kana vasingadi; nokuti vanondimukira simba kwazvo." 
Ezekiel2:8 Asi iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, teerera zvandinokuudza; usandimukira simba, sezvinondimukira imba iyo; shamisa muromo wako udye zvandichakupa.""" 
Ezekiel2:9 Zvino ndakati ndichitarira, ndikaona ruoko rwakatambanudzirwa kwandiri, tarira, bhuku yakapetwa yakanga irimo;" 
Ezekiel2:10 akaipetenura pamberi pangu; yakanga yakanyorwa mukati nokunze, makanga makanyorwa mariro, nokuchema, nenhamo." 
Ezekiel3:1 Ipapo akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, chidya chaunowana; chidya rugwaro urwu rwakapetwa uende, undotaura neimba yaIsiraeri.""" 
Ezekiel3:2 Ipapo ndakashamisa muromo wangu, iye akandidyisa rugwaro rwakapetwa." 
Ezekiel3:3 Akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, dyisa dumbu rako, ugutise vura bwako norugwaro rwakapetwa urwu rwandinokupa."" Ipapo ndikarudya, rukava mumukamwa wangu sohuchi nokuzipa." 
Ezekiel3:4 Zvino akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, famba uende kuimba yaIsiraeri, utaure kwavari mashoko angu." 
Ezekiel3:5 Nokuti hautumwi kurudzi runo mutauriro usingazikamwi norurimi rwakaoma, asi kuimba yaIsiraeri;" 
Ezekiel3:6 hautumwi kumarudzi mazhinji anomutauriro usingazikamwi norurimi rwakaoma, vausingagoni kunzwisisa mashoko avo. Zvirokwazvo, dai ndaikutuma kwavari vangadai vaikunzwa." 
Ezekiel3:7 Asi imba yaIsiraeri icharamba kukunzwa, nokuti havadi kundinzwa ini, nokuti imba yose yaIsiraeri vane huma dzakaoma, nomoyo mikukutu." 
Ezekiel3:8 Tarira, ndinoomesa chiso chako sezvakaita zviso zvavo, nehuma yako sezvakaita huma dzavo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Ndakaomesa huma yako sedhaimani rinokunda musarasara; usavatya, usavhunduswa nezviso zvavo, nokuti ivo iimba inondimukira simba.""" 
Ezekiel3:10 Akatiwo kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, mashoko angu ose andichataura kwauri, uagamuchire mumoyo mako, uanzwe nenzeve dzako." 
Ezekiel3:11 Famba uende kuna vari mukutapwa, kuvana vavanhu vako, utaure navo uvaudze uti, `Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, kana vachida kunzwa, kana vasingadi.' """ 
Ezekiel3:12 Ipapo Mweya wakandisimudza, ndikanzwa shure kwangu mubvumo wokuunga kukuru, zvichiti, ""Kubwinya kwaJehovha ngakurumbidzwe panzvimbo yake.""" 
Ezekiel3:13 Ndikanzwa mubvumo wamapapiro ezvipenyu, achigunzvana, nomubvumo wamakumbo engoro kumativi azvo, uri mubvumo wokuunga kukuru." 
Ezekiel3:14 Ipapo Mweya wakandisimudza, ndokundibvisapo; ndikaenda ndine shungu, mweya wangu wakatsamwa; ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu nesimba." 
Ezekiel3:15 Zvino ndakasvika kuna vaiva mukutapwa paTeriabhibhi, vakanga vagere parwizi rwaKebhari, ipapo pavakanga vagere; ini ndikagarapo pakati pavo mazuva manomwe ndichishayiwa mashoko." 
Ezekiel3:16 Zvino mazuva manomwe akati apera, shoko raJehovha rikasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel3:17 Mwanakomana womunhu, ndakakuita nharire yeimba yaIsiraeri; naizvozvo chinzwa shoko rinobva mumuromo mangu, uvanyevere panzvimbo yangu." 
Ezekiel3:18 Kana ini ndikati kuno wakaipa, `Zvirokwazvo uchafa,' iwe ukasamunyevera, kana kutaura zvinonyevera wakaipa panzira yake yakaipa, kuti aponese upenyu hwake, munhu uyu wakaipa achafira muzvakaipa zvake, asi ropa rake ndicharibvunza paruoko rwako." 
Ezekiel3:19 Asi kana iwe ukanyevera akaipa, akasatendeuka pazvakaipa zvake, kana panzira yake yakaipa, iye achafira muzvakaipa zvake, asi iwe waponesa hako mweya wako." 
Ezekiel3:20 Uyezve, kana munhu akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, ini ndikaisa chigumbuso pamberi pake, achafa; zvausina kumunyevera, achafira muzvivi zvake; zvakarurama zvaakaita hazvingarangarirwi, asi ropa rake ndicharibvunza paruoko rwako." 
Ezekiel3:21 Asi kana ukanyevera munhu wakarurama, kuti wakarurama arege kutadza, iye akasatadza, zvirokwazvo achararama, nokuti wakateerera kunyeverwa, newe waponesa mweya wako.""" 
Ezekiel3:22 Ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu ipapo, akati kwandiri, ""Simuka, uende kubani, ndichataura newe ipapo.""" 
Ezekiel3:23 Zvino ndakasimuka, ndikaenda kubani, ndikaona kubwinya kwaJehovha kumirepo, kwakafanana nokubwinya kwandakaona parwizi rwaKebhari; ndikawira pasi nechiso changu." 
Ezekiel3:24 Ipapo Mweya wakapinda mandiri, ukandimisa namakumbo angu, ukataura neni, ukati kwandiri, ""Enda, undozvipfigira mumba mako." 
Ezekiel3:25 Asi iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira, vachauya nezvisungo kwauri, vachakusunga nazvo, kuti urege kubudira pakati pavo;" 
Ezekiel3:26 ini ndichanamatirisa rurimi rwako mumukamwa wako, kuti uve mbeveve, urege kuva murayiri wavo; nokuti ivo iimba inondimukira simba." 
Ezekiel3:27 Asi kana ndichitaura newe, ndichashamisa muromo wako, iwe ugoti kwavari, `Zvanzi nalshe Jehovha, anonzwa ngaanzwe, anoramba, ngaarambe; nokuti ivo iimba inondimukira simba.' """ 
Ezekiel4:1 Zvino iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, tora chitinha uchigadzike pamberi pako, ufananidzirepo guta, iro reJerusaremu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Zvino urikombe nehondo, urivakire nhare dzokurwa naro, uritutire murwi wokurwa nawo; uriisire misasa, nokurikomberedza kumativi ose nezvokugumura kuriputsa." 
Ezekiel4:3 Zvino utore gango redare, urigadze pakati pako neguta, ruve rusvingo rwedare; zvino urinzire chiso chako kwariri, ipapo richava guta rakakombwa nehondo, iwe ndiwe ucharikomba. Ichi chichava chiratidzo kuimba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel4:4 Uyezve, uvate pasi parutivi rwako rworuboshwe, uise pamusoro parwo zvakaipa zveimba yaIsiraeri; mazuva aunovata parutivi urwo ndiyo nguva yauchatakura zvakaipa zvavo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Nokuti ndakatara makore ezvakaipa zvawo aenzane namazuva ako, mazuva ana mazana matatu namakumi mapfumbamwe; saizvozvo uchatakura zvakaipa zveimba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel4:6 Zvino kana wapedza mazuva awa, uvate pasi norutivi rwako rworudyi, kuti utakure zvakaipa zveimba yaJudha; ndakakutarira mazuva ana makumi mana, zuva rimwe nerimwe rifananidze gore." 
Ezekiel4:7 Urinzire chiso chako wakatarira kukombwa kweJerusaremu ruoko rwako rwakafukurwa; ugoporofita pamusoro paro. 
Ezekiel4:8 Tarira, ndinokusunga nezvisungo, urege kutendeukira kuno rumwe rutivi, kusvikira wapedza mazuva okukomba kwako." 
Ezekiel4:9 Zvino utorewo zviyo nebhari nemarendiri* nenyemba namapfunde nesipereti uzviise mumudziyo mumwe, ugozviitira chingwa nazvo; unofanira kuchidya mazuva aunovata pasi parutivi rwako, iwo mazuva ana mazana matatu namakumi mapfumbamwe." 
Ezekiel4:10 Zvokudya zvako zvaunofanira kudya, zvichayerwa kurema kwazvo, mashekeri ana makumi maviri nezuva rimwe nerimwe; uchazvidya nguva nenguva." 
Ezekiel4:11 Unofanira kumwawo mvura yakayerwa, chechitanhatu chehini; uchaimwa nguva nenguva." 
Ezekiel4:12 Unofanira kuzvidya zvakafanana nezvingwa zvebhari, unofanira kuzvibika pamberi pavo nendove inobudiswa navanhu.""" 
Ezekiel4:13 Jehovha akati, ""Saizvozvo vana valsiraeri vachadya zvokudya zvavo zvakan'ora pakati pamarudzi kwandichavadzingira. """ 
Ezekiel4:14 Ipapo ndikati, ""Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha! Tarirai mweya wangu hauna kumbosvibiswa; nokuti kubva pauduku hwangu kusvikira zvino, handina kumbodya chakafa choga, kana chakaurawa nezvikara, nenyama yakan'ora haina kumbopinda mumuromo mangu.""" 
Ezekiel4:15 Ipapo akati kwandiri, ""Tarira, ndakupa ndove yemombe panzvimbo yendove yavanhu, unofanira kugadzira zvokudya zvako nayo.""" 
Ezekiel4:16 Akatiwo kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira ndichavhuna mudonzvo wezvokudya paJerusaremu; vachadya zvokudya zvakayerwa vachitya, vachamwa mvura yakayerwa, vachivhunduka;" 
Ezekiel4:17 kuti vashayiwe zvokudya nemvura, vavhunduke mumwe nomumwe, vavore muzvakaipa zvavo.""" 
Ezekiel5:1 Zvino iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, tora munondo unopinza; uutore chive chisvo kwauri, ugoveura nawo musoro wako nendebvu dzako, ipapo utore chiyero chokuyera nacho, ndokukamura vhudzi." 
Ezekiel5:2 Zvino chetatu charo upise nomoto pakati peguta, kana mazuva okukombwa kwaro apera; utorewo chimwe chetatu, ugotema nomunondo kumativi aro ose; uye chetatu uparadzire kumhepo, ipapo ini ndichavhomora munondo shure kwavo." 
Ezekiel5:3 Zvino utorewo rimwe shomanene, urisungire munguvo dzako." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ipapo utorezve rimwe raro, urikandire mumoto, uchiripisa mumoto; ipapo pachabudira moto kuimba yose yaIsiraeri.""" 
Ezekiel5:5 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Iri ndiro Jerusaremu ndakariisa pakati pamarudzi, rakapoteredzwa nedzimwe nyika kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel5:6 Asi rakaramba mitemo yangu richiita zvakaipa kupfuura mamwe marudzi, nokuramba zvandakarayira kupfuura dzimwe nyika dzakaripoteredza; nokuti ivo vakaramba mitemo yangu, nezvandakarayira havana kufamba mazviri." 
Ezekiel5:7 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Zvamune hasha kupfuura marudzi akakukomberedzai, mukasafamba munezvandakarayira nokusachengeta mitemo yangu, kunyange kuita nemitemo yamarudzi akakupoteredzai,'" 
Ezekiel5:8 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Tarirai, ini, iyeni, ndine mhaka nemi, ndichaita zvandakatonga pakati penyu mamwe marudzi achizviona." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ndichaita pakati penyu zvandisina kumboita, uye handingatongoitizve zvakadai, nemhaka yezvinonyangadza zvenyu zvose.'" 
Ezekiel5:10 Naizvozvo madzibaba achadya vanakomana vavo mukati mako, navanakomana vachadya madzibaba avo; ndichakuitira zvandakatonga, ndichaparadzira vakasara vako kumhepo dzose." 
Ezekiel5:11 Saka noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha zvirokwazvo, zvawakasvibisa nzvimbo yangu tsvene nezvose zvako zvinosemesa nezvose zvako zvinonyangadza, saka neni ndichabva kwamuri, ziso rangu haringakupembedzi, handingavi netsitsiwo." 
Ezekiel5:12 Chetatu chako chichafa nehosha yakaipa, uye vachapedzwa nenzara mukati mako; chetatu chichaparadzwa nomunondo kumativi ako, nechimwe chikamu chetatu ndichachiparadzira kumhepo dzose, nokuvhomora munondo shure kwavo." 
Ezekiel5:13 Saizvozvo kutsamwa kwangu kuchapera, nehasha dzangu kwavari ndichadzigumisa, ndikanyaradzwa; vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakataura nokushingayira kwangu, kana ndapedza hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ndichakuita dongo nechinhu chinoshorwa pakati pamarudzi anokupoteredza, zvichionekwa navose vanopfuura napo." 
Ezekiel5:15 Saizvozvo chichava chinhu chinoshorwa nechinosekwa, chinonyevera nechinoshamisa, kumarudzi ose anokupoteredza, kana ndichikuitira zvandakatonga ndakatsamwa, ndiine hasha, ndichikutukai nehasha ini Jehovha, ndini ndakataura izvozvo;" 
Ezekiel5:16 kana ndichituma pamusoro pavo miseve yakaipa yenzara, ine basa rokuparadza, yandichatuma kuti ikuparadzeyi. Ndichawedzera nzara pamusoro penyu, nokuvhuna mudonzvo wenyu wezvokudya." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ndichatuma pamusoro penyu nzara nezvikara zvakaipa zvichakutorerai vana; hosha yakaipa neropa zvichapfuura napakati pako; ndichauyisa munondo pamusoro pako. Ini Jehovha, ndini ndakataura izvozvo.""" 
Ezekiel6:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel6:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kumakomo aIsiraeri, uporofite pamusoro pawo," 
Ezekiel6:3 uti, 'Imi makomo avaIsiraeri, inzwai shoko ralshe Jehovha, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kumakomo nokuzvikomo, kumipata nokumapani, tarirai, ini, iyeni, ndichauyisa munondo pamusoro penyu, ndichaparadza nzvimbo dzenyu dzakakwirira." 
Ezekiel6:4 Maaritari enyu achaitwa matongo, nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvezuva zvichakoromorwa; vanhu venyu, vakaurawa, ndichavawisira pasi pamberi pezvifananidzo zvenyu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndicharadzika zvitunha zvavana vaIsiraeri pamberi pezvifananidzo zvavo; ndichaparadzira mapfupa enyu pamativi ose amaaritari enyu.' 
Ezekiel6:6 Pose pamugere maguta achaparadzwa, nenzvimbo dzakakwirira dzichaitwa matongo, kuti maaritari enyu aparadzwe aitwe matongo, nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvikoromorwe zvigume, nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvezuva zvitemwe, nezvamakabata zvose zviparadzwe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Vakaurawa vachawira pasi pakati penyu, nemwi muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel6:8 Kunyange zvakadaro ndichachengeta vakasara, nokuti vamwe venyu vachavapo vachapukunyuka pamunondo pakati pamarudzi kana muchiparadzirwa kunyika dzose." 
Ezekiel6:9 Zvino vakapukunyuka pakati penyu vachandirangarira pakati pamarudzi, kwavachatapirwa, kana ndaputsa moyo yavo yokufeva, yakandirasa, nameso avo aipata achitevera zvifananidzo zvavo; vachazvisema ivo vamene pamusoro pezvakaipa zvavakaita pazvinyangadzo zvavo zvose." 
Ezekiel6:10 Zvino ivo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha; handina kureva pasina kuti ndichavaitira zvakaipa izvozvo. 
Ezekiel6:11 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Rova noruoko rwako, tsikisa pasi norutsoka rwako, uti, `Maiwe!' Nokuda kwezvinonyangadza zvakaipa zvose zveimba yaIsiraeri; nokuti vachaurawa nomunondo nenzara nehosha yakaipa." 
Ezekiel6:12 Ari kure achafa nehosha yakaipa, ari pedo achaurawa nomunondo, akasara akachengetwa achafa nenzara; saizvozvo ndichapedza hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo." 
Ezekiel6:13 imwi muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana vanhu vavo, vakaurawa, vari pakati pezvifananidzo zvavo vakakomberedza maaritari avo, pachikomo chimwe nechimwe chakakwirira, napamusoro pemisoro yose yamakomo,napasi pomuti mumwe nomumwe mutema napasi pomuouki mumwe nomumwe mukobvu, ipo panzvimbo dzose pavaipisira zvifananidzo zvavo zvose zvinonhuhwira zvakanaka." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pavo, nyika ndichaiita dongo nokuiparadza, kubva parenje kusvikira Dhibhira, pose pavanogara; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel7:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel7:2 Iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kunyika yaIsiraeri, `Kuguma, kuguma kwasvika pamakona mana enyika.'" 
Ezekiel7:3 Zvino kuguma kwasvika kwauri, ini ndichatuma kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pako, ndichakutonga zvakafanira nzira dzako; ndichauyisa pamusoro pako zvinonyangadza zvako zvose." 
Ezekiel7:4 Ziso rangu haringakupembedzi, handingavi netsitsiwo; asi ndichauyisa nzira dzako pamusoro pako, nezvinonyangadza zvako zvichava pakati pako; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel7:5 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Njodzi, njodzi imwechete, tarirai, inouya.'" 
Ezekiel7:6 Kuguma kwasvika, kuguma kwasvika; kunokumukira mangwanani; tarirai, kwasvika." 
Ezekiel7:7 Dzoro rako rasvika, iwe ugere panyika; nguva yasvika, zuva rava pedo, zuva rebope, asati ari maungira amakomo." 
Ezekiel7:8 Zvino ndobva ndodururira hasha dzangu pamusoro pako, ndichapedza kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pako, nokukutonga zvakafanira nzira dzako; ndichauyisa zvinonyangadza zvako zvose pamusoro pako." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ziso rangu haringapembedzi, handingavi netsitsiwo; ndichauyisa pamusoro pako zvakafanira nzira dzako; zvinonyangadza zvako zvichava pakati pako; zvino muchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndinorova.""" 
Ezekiel7:10 Tarirai zuva, tarirai rosvika; dzoro rako rabuda; shamhu yatumbuka, kuzvikudza kwabukira." 
Ezekiel7:11 Kuita nesimba kwamuka, kwaita shamhu yezvakashata; hakuna chichasara kwavari, kana pavanhu vavo vazhinji, kana pafuma yavo; hakungavi nechinhu chakanaka pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel7:12 Nguva yasvika, zuva rava pedo; mutengi ngaarege kufara, mutengesi ngaarege kuchema; nokuti kutsamwa kuri pamusoro pavanhu vose venyika." 
Ezekiel7:13 Nokuti mutengesi haangadzokeri kune chakatengeswa, kunyange vachiri vapenyu; nokuti zvakaonekwa pamusoro pavazhinji vose venyika hazvingadzoswi; hakuna angazvisimbisa nezvakaipa zviri pamugariro wake." 
Ezekiel7:14 Vakaridza hwamanda, vakagadzira zvose asi hakuna anoenda kundorwa; nokuti kutsamwa kwangu kuri pamusoro pavazhinji vose venyika." 
Ezekiel7:15 Munondo uri kunze, hosha yakaipa nenzara zviri mukati; ari kusango achaurawa nomunondo; ari muguta achaparadzwa nenzara nehosha yakaipa." 
Ezekiel7:16 Asi vanopukunyuka pakati pavo vachapukunyuka; vachava pamakomo senjiva dzemipata, vachichema vose, mumwe nomumwe pamusoro pezvakaipa zvake." 
Ezekiel7:17 Maoko ose achashayiwa simba, mabvi ose achayerera mvura." 
Ezekiel7:18 Vachazvisunga zviuno namasaga, vachafukidzwa nokutya kukuru, kunyara kuchava pazviso zvose, nemhanza pamisoro yavo yose." 
Ezekiel7:19 Vacharasha sirivha yavo panzira dzomumusha, nendarama yavo ichava sechinhu chisina kunaka; sirivha yavo nendarama yavo hazvingagoni kuvarwira nezuva rokutsamwa kwaJehovha; hazvingagutisi mweya yavo kana kuzadza vura bwavo, nokuti ndicho chaiva chigumbuso chezvakaipa zvavo." 
Ezekiel7:20 Kana huri ukomba hwavo hwakanaka, vakaita manyawi nazvo; asi vakaita nazvo zvifananidzo zvezvinonyangadza zvavo nezvezvinosemesa zvavo; naizvozvo ndichachiita kwavari sechinhu chisina kunaka." 
Ezekiel7:21 Ndichachiisa mumaoko avatorwa chive chinhu chakapambwa, ivo vachasvibiswa." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndicharambawo kuvatarira nechiso changu, vachasvibisa fuma yangu; mbavha dzichapindamo, dzichiisvibisa." 
Ezekiel7:23 Itai ngetani, nokuti nyika izere ne mhaka dzeropa, guta rizere nokuita nesimba." 
Ezekiel7:24 Naizvozvo ndichauyisa marudzi akanyanya kuipa kwazvo, ivo vachatora dzimba dzavo; ndichagumisawo manyawi avane simba, nenzvimbo dzavo tsvene dzichasvibiswa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Njodzi inouya; vachatsvaka rugare, asi harungavipo." 
Ezekiel7:26 Njodzi ichateverwa nenjodzi, guhu richateverwa neguhu; vachandotsvaka kumuporofita zvaakaona, asi murayiro uchanyangarikira muprista, namano achashaikwa kuvakuru." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mambo achachema, muchinda achafuka kuparadza, namaoko avanhu venyika achakanganiswa; ndichavaitira zvakafanira nzira dzavo, ndichavatonga sezvavakafanira; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel8:1 Zvino negore rechitanhatu, nomwedzi wechitanhatu, nezuwa reshanu romwedzi, ini ndigere mumba mangu, navakuru vaJudha vagere pamberi pangu, ruoko rwaIshe Jehovha ndokuwira pamusoro pangu." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ipapo ndikatarira ndikaona mufananidzo unenge somoto; kubva pakaita sechiuno chake zvichienda pasi, kwakanga kunomoto, kubva pachiuno chake zvichikwira kumusoro zvinenge kubwinya, sedare rinopenya." 
Ezekiel8:3 Akatambanudza zvakanga zvakaita soruoko, akandibata nebumu romusoro wangu, Mweya wakandisimudza pakati pedenga nenyika, ndokundiisa paJerusaremu ndichiratidzwa zviratiidzo naMwari, kumukova wesuo roruvanze rwomukati unotarira kurutivi rwokumusoro, pakanga pane chigaro chechifananidzo chegodo, chinomutsa godo." 
Ezekiel8:4 Zvino tarira, kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakanga kuripo, zvakafanana nezvandakaona mubani." 
Ezekiel8:5 Ipapo akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira meso ako kurutivi rwokumusoro."" Ipapo ndakaringira meso angu kurutivi rwokumusoro, ndikaona kurutivi rwokumusoro rwesuo rearitari chifananidzo ichi chegodo chimire panopindwa napo." 
Ezekiel8:6 Akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, unoona zvavanoita here? Izvo zvinonyangadza zvikuru zvinoitwa pano neimba yaIsiraeri, kuti ini ndibve ndiende kure nenzvimbo yangu tsvene here? Asi uchaonazve zvimwe zvinonyangadza zvikuru.""" 
Ezekiel8:7 Akandiisa kumukova woruvanze; zvino ndakati ndichitarira, ndikaona pakakoromoka parusvingo." 
Ezekiel8:8 Zvino akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, chera zvino parusvingo;"" zvino ndakati ndachera parusvingo, ndikaona mukova." 
Ezekiel8:9 Akati kwandiri, ""Pinda, undoona zvinonyangadza zvakashata zvavanoita pano.""" 
Ezekiel8:10 Ipapo ndakapinda, ndikaona; tarira, mifananidzo yamarudzi ose ezvinokambaira pasi, nemhuka dzinonyangadza, nezvifananidzo zvose zveimba yaIsiraeri zvakafananidzwa parusvingo kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel8:11 Pamberi pazvo pakanga pamire varume vana makumi manomwe vavakuru veimba yaIsiraeri; pakati pavo pakanga pamire Jaazania mwanakomana waShafani, mumwe nomumwe akabata hadyana yake yezvinonhuhwira muruoko rwake; munhuwi wegore rezvinonhuhwira ukaramba uchikwira." 
Ezekiel8:12 Ipapo akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, waona here zvinoitwa navakuru veimba yaIsiraeri murima, mumwe nomumwe mukamuri yake yemifananidzo? Nokuti vanoti, `Jehovha haationi; Jehovha akabva panyika ino.' """ 
Ezekiel8:13 Akatiwo kwandiri, ""Uchaonazve zvimwe zvinonyangadza zvikuru zvavanoita.""" 
Ezekiel8:14 Ipapo akandiisa kumukova wesuo reimba yaJehovha rakanga riri kurutivi rwokumusoro; ndikaona vakadzi vagerepo vachichema Tamuzi. 
Ezekiel8:15 Zvino akati kwandiri, ""Wazviona here, iwe Mwanakomana womunhu? Uchaona zvimwe zvinonyangadza zvinopfuura izvo.""" 
Ezekiel8:16 Ipapo akandiisa muruvanze rwomukati rweimba yaJehovha; tarira, pamukova wetemberi yaJehovha pakati pebiravira nearitari, kwakanga kuna varume vanenge makumi maviri navashanu, vakafuratira temberi yaJehovha, zviso zvavo zvakaringira kurutivi rwamabvazuva; vakanga vachinamata zuva kurutivi rwamabvazuva." 
Ezekiel8:17 Zvino akati kwandiri, ""Wazviona here, iwe Mwanakomana womunhu? Chinhu chiduku here kuimba yaJudha, kuti vaite zvinonyangadza zvavanoita pano? Nokuti vakazadza nyika nokuita nesimba, vakadzoka vomutsa kutsamwa kwangu; tarira vanoisa davi kumhino dzavo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Naizvozvo neniwo ndichaita nehasha; ziso rangu haringapembedzi, handingavi netsitsi; kunyange vakadanidzira munzeve dzangu nenzwi guru, handingavanzwi.""" 
Ezekiel9:1 Ipapo akadanidzira munzeve dzangu nenzwi guru, achiti, ""Swededzai vatariri veguta, mumwe nomumwe ane nhumbi yake yokuparadza muruoko rwake.""" 
Ezekiel9:2 Zvino tarira, varume vatanhatu vakabva nenzira yesuo rokumusoro, riri kurutivi rwokumusoro, mumwe nomumwe ane zvombo zvake muruoko rwake, nomumwe murume pakati pavo akafuka mucheka werineni, ano runyanga rweingi rwomunyori pachiuno chake. Vakapinda, vakandomira parutivi rwearitari yendarira." 
Ezekiel9:3 Zvino kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakanga kwakwira kuchibva pakerubhi, pakwakanga kuri, kukasvika kuchikumbaridzo cheimba; akadana murume akanga akafuka mucheka werineni, akanga anorunyanga rweingi rwomunyori pachiuno chake." 
Ezekiel9:4 Jehovha akati kwaari, ""Pfuura napakati peguta, napakati peJerusaremu, uise chiratidzo pahuma dzavanhu vanogomera nokuchema pamusoro pezvinonyangadza zvose zvinoitwa mukati maro.""" 
Ezekiel9:5 Asi kuna vamwe wakati, ini ndichizvinzwa, ""Pfuurai nomuguta muchimutevera, muuraye; ziso renyu ngarirege kupembedza, musava netsitsi;" 
Ezekiel9:6 urayai vose vatana namajaya nemhandara navanana navakadzi; asi regai kuswedera kunomumwe anechiratidzo; mutange panzvimbo yangu tsvene. Ipapo vakatanga navatana vakanga vari pamberi peimba. 
Ezekiel9:7 Akati kwavari, ""Svibisai imba, muzadze mavanze navakaurawa; chibudai."" Vakabuda, vakauraya muguta." 
Ezekiel9:8 Zvino vakati vachiuraya, ini ndasiyiwa ndiri ndoga, ndikawira pasi nechiso changu, ndikachema, ndichiti, ""Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha! Ko munoparadza vose vakasara vaIsiraeri pakudurura kwenyu hasha dzenyu pamusoro peJerusaremu here?""" 
Ezekiel9:9 Ipapo akati kwandiri, ""Zvakaipa zveimba yaIsiraeri naJudha zvakakura kwazvo, nyika izere neropa, neguta rizere nezvisakarurama; nokuti vanoti, `Jehovha akabva panyika, Jehovha haaoni." 
Ezekiel9:10 Neni, kana ndirini, ziso rangu haringapembedzi, handingavi netsitsi, asi ndichauyisa zvavakaita pamisoro yavo.' """ 
Ezekiel9:11 Zvino tarira, murume akanga akafuka mucheka werineni, akanga anorunyanga rweingi pachiuno chake, akadzoka neshoko, akati, ""Ndaita sezvamakandirayira.""" 
Ezekiel10:1 Zvino ndakatarira, ndikaona padenga rakanga riri pamusoro pemisoro yamakerubhi chinhu chakaonekwa pamusoro pawo chakaita sebwe resafire, chakanga chakafanana nechigaro choushe." 
Ezekiel10:2 Akataura nomunhu akanga akafuka mucheka werineni, akati, ""Pinda pakati pamakumbo anomonereka, imo munyasi mekerubhi, uzadze maoko ako ose namazimbe anobva pakati pamakerubhi, uakushe pamusoro peguta."" Iye akapinda, ini ndichizviona." 
Ezekiel10:3 Zvino makerubhi akanga amire parutivi rworudyi rweimba, panguva yokupinda komurume uyu; gore rikazadza ruvanze rwomukati." 
Ezekiel10:4 Kubwinya kwaJehovha kukakwira kuchibva pakerubhi, kukamira pamusoro pechikumbaridzo cheimba, imba ikazadzwa negore, noruvanze rwakazarawo nokupenya kokubwinya kwaJehovha." 
Ezekiel10:5 Mubvumo wamapapiro amakerubhi wakanzwikwa kusvikira kuruvanze rwokunze, senzwi raMwari waMasimbaose, kana achitaura." 
Ezekiel10:6 Zvino akati araira murume akanga akafuka mucheka werineni, achiti, ""Tora moto pakati pamakumbo anomonereka, pakati pamakerubhi,"" akapinda, akandomira parutivi rwerimwe gumbo." 
Ezekiel10:7 Kerubhi rikatambanudzira ruoko rwaro ruchibuda napakati pamakerubhi kumoto wakanga uri pakati pamakerubhi, rikatorapo moto ndokuuisa muruoko rwowakanga akafuka mucheka werineni, iye ndokuutora ndokubuda." 
Ezekiel10:8 Zvino mukati mamakerubhi makaonekwa chakafanana noruoko rwomunhu pasi pamapapiro awo. 
Ezekiel10:9 Zvino ndakatarira, ndikaona makumbo mana engoro pamativi amakerubhi, rimwe gumbo kurutivi rwekerubhi rimwe, nerimwe gumbo kurutivi rwerimwe kerubhi; pakuonekwa kwawo makumbo akanga akaita sebwe rebheriri." 
Ezekiel10:10 Pakuonekwa kwawo ose ari mana akanga akafanana, zvakaita segumbo rimwe rengoro mukati merimwe gumbo rengoro." 
Ezekiel10:11 Pakufamba kwawo akafamba kumativi awo mana; haana kutsauka pakufamba kwawo, asi kwakanga kwakatarira musoro ndiko kwaakaenda; haana kutsauka pakufamba kwawo." 
Ezekiel10:12 Muviri wawo wose, nemisana yawo, namaoko awo, namapapiro awo, namakumbo engoro, zvakanga zvizere nameso kumativi ose, pamakumbo awo ose ari mana." 
Ezekiel10:13 Kana ari makumbo, ndakanzwa achitumidzwa zvinomonereka." 
Ezekiel10:14 Rimwe nerimwe rakanga rine zviso zvina; chiso chokutanga chakanga chiri chiso chekerubhi, chiso chechipiri chakanga chiri chiso chomunhu, chechitatu chiso cheshumba, nechechina chiso chegondo." 
Ezekiel10:15 Zvino makerubhi ndokubhururuka achikwira; ndicho chipenyu chandakaona parwizi Kebhari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Zvino kana makerubhi ofamba, makumbo engoro ofamba kurutivi rwawo; kana makerubhi achinge osimudza mapapiro awo achida kubhururuka achibva panyika, namakumbo awovo haana kubva kurutivi rwawo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Kana omira naiwo omirawo; kana obhururuka achikwira naiwo obhururukawo achikwira nawo; nokuti mweya wechipenyu wakanga uri mukati mawo. 
Ezekiel10:18 Ipapo kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakabuda pachikumbaridzo cheimba, ndokumira pamusoro pamakerubhi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Makerubhi ndokusimudza mapapiro awo, ndokubhururuka achibva panyika, ini ndichiaona achibuda, anamakumbo engoro pamativi awo; akamira pamukova wesuo rokumabvazuva reimba yaJehovha; kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakanga kuri nechokumusoro kwawo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ndicho chipenyu chandakaona panyasi paMwari waIsiraeri parwizi rwaKebhari; ndikaziva kuti makerubhi. 
Ezekiel10:21 Rimwe nerimwe rakanga rine zviso zvina, nerimwe nerimwe rakanga rina mapapiro mana; pasi pamapapiro awo pakanga pane zvakafanana namaoko omunhu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Kana zviri zviso zvavo pakuonekwa kwazvo, zvakanga zviri zviso zviya zvandakaona parwizi rwaKebhari, pakuonekwa kwazvo naizvo zvimene; rimwe nerimwe rairuramira mberi pakufamba kwaro." 
Ezekiel11:1 Zvino Mweya wakandisimudza, ndokundiisa kusuo ramabvazuva reimba yaJehovha, raitarira kumabvazuva; ndikaona pamukova wesuo varume vana makumi maviri navashanu, ndikaona pakati pavo Jaazania mwanakomana waAzuri, naPeratia mwanakomana waBhenaia, machinda avanhu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Akati kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, ava ndivo varume vanofunga zvakaipa, vanorayirira mano akaipa muguta rino;" 
Ezekiel11:3 vanoti, `Nguva ichigere kuswedera yokuvaka dzimba, guta igate, isu tiri nyama.'" 
Ezekiel11:4 Naizvozvo chivaporofitira, Mwanakomana womunhu, chiporofita.""" 
Ezekiel11:5 Ipapo Mweya waJehovha wakawira pamusoro pangu, akati kwandiri, ""Taura, uti, `Zvanzi naJehovha, ndizvo zvamakataura, imwi imba yaIsiraeri; nokuti ndinoziva zvamunofunga mundangariro dzenyu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Makawanza vamakauraya muguta rino, makazadza nzira dzaro navakaurawa.'" 
Ezekiel11:7 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Vamakauraya, vamakaradzika mukati maro, ndiyo nyama, guta rino igate, asi imwi muchabudiswa mukati maro." 
Ezekiel11:8 Makatya munondo; ini ndichauyisa munondo pamusoro penyu,' ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ini ndichakubudisai mukati maro, ndichakuisai mumaoko avatorwa, ndichaita zvandakatonga pakati penyu." 
Ezekiel11:10 Muchaurawa nomunondo; ndichakutongai munyika yaIsiraeri, zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.-" 
Ezekiel11:11 Guta rino haringavi gate renyu, nemwi hamungavi nyama mukati maro; ndichakutongai munyika yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel11:12 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, nokuti hamuna kufamba nemitemo yangu kana kuita zvandakarayira, asi makatevera mirayiro yamarudzi anokupoteredzai.""" 
Ezekiel11:13 Zvino ndakati ndichiporofita, Peratia mwanakomana waBhenaia akafa. Ipapo ndakawira pasi nechiso changu, ndikachema nenzwi guru ndichiti, ""Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha! Moda kupedza chose vakasara vose vaIsiraeri here?""" 
Ezekiel11:14 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel11:15 Mwanakomana womunhu, hama dzako, idzo hama dzako, vanhu vorudzi rwako, neimba yose yaIsiraeri, ivo vose, ndivo vakanzi navagere Jerusaremu, `Ibvai kure naJehovha, nyika ino yakapiwesu, ive yedu.'" 
Ezekiel11:16 Naizvozvo uti, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, zvandakavabvisa, ndikavaisa kure pakati pamarudzi, uye zvandakavaparadzira pakati penyika, ndichava kwavari nzvimbo tsvene nguva duku kunyika idzo kwavakaenda kwadziri;'" 
Ezekiel11:17 naizvozvo uti, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ndichakuunganidzai mubve pakati pamarudzi, ndichakukokerai mubve panyika kwamakaparadzirwa, ndigokupai nyika yaIsiraeri.'" 
Ezekiel11:18 Vachadzokerako nokubvisamo zvose zvayo zvinosemesa nezvose zvayo zvinonyangadza. 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndichavapa moyo mumwe, nokuisa mweya mutsva mukati menyu; ndichabvisa moyo webwe munyama yavo, ndokuvapa moyo wenyama;" 
Ezekiel11:20 kuti vafambe nemitemo yangu, vachengete zvandakarayira nokuzviita; ivo vachava vanhu vangu, neni ndichava Mwari wavo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Asi kana vari ivo, vane moyo inotevera moyo yezvinhu zvavo zvinosemesa nezvinonyangadza, ndichauyisa zvavakaita pamisoro yavo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel11:22 Ipapo makerubhi akasimudza mapapiro awo, namakumbo engoro akanga ari pamativi awo; kubwinya kwaMwari waIsiraeri kwakanga kuri nechokumusoro kwavo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Kubwinya kwaJehovha ndokukwira kuchibva mukati meguta, ndokumira pamusoro pegomo riri kumabvazuva eguta." 
Ezekiel11:24 Ipapo Mweya wakandisimudza ndokundiisa Karadhea kuna vakatapwa, ndichizvioneswa noMweya waMwari. Zvino chiratidzo chandakanga ndaona chakakwidzwa chichibva kwandiri." 
Ezekiel11:25 Ipapo ndakaudza vakatapwa zvinhu zvose zvandakaratidzwa naJehovha. 
Ezekiel12:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, ugere pakati pavanhu veimba inondimukira simba, vana meso okuona, asi havaoni, vane nzeve dzokunzwa, asi havanzwi; nokuti iimba inondimukira simba." 
Ezekiel12:3 Naizvozvo iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, zvirongedzere nhumbi dzokutama nadzo, utame masikati, vachizviona; unofanira kutama uchibva panzvimbo yako uchienda kune imwe nzvimbo, vachizviona; zvimwe vangazofunga, kunyange iri imba inondimukira simba." 
Ezekiel12:4 Unofanira kubudisa nhumbi dzako masikati vachizviona, dziite senhumbi dzokutama nadzo; zvino madekwana iwe umene unofanira kubuda vachizviona, sezvinoita vanhu kana votama." 
Ezekiel12:5 Zvino uboore rusvingo vachizviona, ubudise nhumbi dzako napo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Unofanira kudzitakura pafudzi rako vachizviona, ndokudzibudisa kwasviba; unofanira kufukidza chiso chako, kuti urege kuona zvenyika; nokuti ndakakuita chiratidzo kuimba yalsiraeri.""" 
Ezekiel12:7 Ini ndikaita sezvandakarayirwa; ndakabudisa nhumbi dzangu masikati, dzakaita senhumbi dzokutama nadzo, madekwana ndikabvovora rusvingo noruoko rwangu; ndakadzibudisa kwasviba, ndikadzitakura pafudzi rangu vachizviona." 
Ezekiel12:8 Zvino mangwanani shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:9 Mwanakomana womunhu, imba yaIsiraeri, iyo imba inondimukira, havana kuti kwauri, `Unoiteiko?'" 
Ezekiel12:10 Uti kwavari, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, chirevo ichi chinoreva muchinda weJerusaremu neimba yose yaIsiraeri iri pakati pavo.'" 
Ezekiel12:11 Uti, `Ndini chiratidzo chenyu; sezvandakaita ini, ndizvo zvavachaitirwa ivo; vachatama vachitapwa.'" 
Ezekiel12:12 Muchinda ari pakati pavo achatakura nhumbi dzake pafudzi rake kwasviba, ndokubuda; vachabvovora rusvingo kuti vadzibudise napo; achafukidza meso ake, nokuti haangaoni nyika nameso ake." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndichakandawo mumbure wangu pamusoro pake, achabatwa mumusungo wangu; ndichamuisa Bhabhironi kunyika yavaKaradhea; asi haangaioni, kunyange zvakadaro achafirako." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ndichaparadzira kumhepo dzose vose vakamupoteredza vangamubatsira, namapoka ake ose ndichavavhomorera munondo ndichivateverera." 
Ezekiel12:15 Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichivadzingira pakati pamarudzi, nokuvaparadzira kunyika dzose." 
Ezekiel12:16 Asi ndichapukunyusa vashoma vavo pamunondo nenzara nehosha yakaipa;kuti vanoparidza pakati pamarudzi kwavanosvika zvinonyangadza zvavo zvose; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. 
Ezekiel12:17 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikawo kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:18 Mwanakomana womunhu, idya zvokudya zvako nokubvunda nokumwa mvura yako nokudedera nokutya;" 
Ezekiel12:19 uti kuvanhu venyika iyi, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha pamusoro pavagere Jerusaremu nenyika yaIsiraeri, vachadya zvokudya zvavo vachitya nokumwa mvura yavo vachikanganiswa, kuti nyika yaro iitwe dongo, yatorerwa zvose zvayo, nemhaka yokuita nesimba, yavose vanogaramo.'" 
Ezekiel12:20 Maguta anogarwa navanhu achaparadzwa, nenyika ichaitwa dongo; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel12:21 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:22 Mwanakomana womunhu, tsumo ndeyeiko yamunayo munyika yaIsiraeri, inoti, `Mazuva anoramba achiwedzerwa, asi zvakaoneswa zvose hazviitiki?'" 
Ezekiel12:23 Naizvozvo vaudze, uti, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ndichagumisa tsumo iyi, havangazobati nayo iri tsumo pakati paIsiraeri;' asi uti kwavari, `Mazuva ava pedo nokuitika kwezvose zvakaoneswa.'" 
Ezekiel12:24 Nokuti pakati peimba yaIsiraeri hapangazovi kuoneswa kwenhema kana kuporofita kunobata kumeso. 
Ezekiel12:25 Nokuti ndini Jehovha; ndichataura, neshoko randichataura richaitika, haringazononoswi; nokuti pamazuva enyu, iwe imba inondimukira simba, ndichataura shoko nokuriitawo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel12:26 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel12:27 Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira, veimba yaIsiraeri vanoti, `Zvaakaoneswa ndezvamazuva ari kure anozouya, anoporofita zvenguva dziri kure.'" 
Ezekiel12:28 Naizvozvo uti kwavari, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, hakuna shoko rimwe ramashoko angu richazononoka, asi shoko randichataura richaitika,' "" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel13:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, porofitira vaporofita vaIsiraeri vanoporofita, uti kuna ivo vanoporofita zvinobva mumoyo mavo, inzwai imwi shoko raJehovha,""" 
Ezekiel13:3 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Vane nhamo vaporofita mapenzi, vanotevera mweya yavo, vasina chavakaona.'" 
Ezekiel13:4 Aiwa Isiraeri, vaporofita venyu vakafanana namakava pamatongo." 
Ezekiel13:5 Hamuna kukwira muchipinda pakakoromorwa, kana kugadzira rusvingo rweimba yaIsiraeri, kuti mumire pakurwa pazuva raJehovha." 
Ezekiel13:6 Vakaona zvinonyengera nokuporofita kwenhema, ivo vanoti, `Jehovha anoti!' Asi Jehovha haana kuvatuma, zvino vakati shoko ravo richasimbiswa." 
Ezekiel13:7 Hamuna kuona zvinonyengera here, hamuna kutaura kuvuka kwenhema here, zvamakati, `Jehovha anoti; kunyange zvakadaro handina kutaura?' """ 
Ezekiel13:8 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Zvamakatura zvinonyengera, nokuona nhema, naizvozvo, tarirai, ndine mhaka nemi, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ruoko rwangu rucharwa navaporofita vanoona zvinonyengera navanoporofita nhema; havangarangani navanhu vangu, havanganyorwi mazita avo parugwaro rweimba yaIsiraeri, havangapindi munyika yaIsiraeri; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:10 Nokuti zvirokwazvo, nokuti vakanyengera vanhu vangu, vachiti, `Rugare!' Izvo hakuna rugare; kana vovaka rusvingo, tarira, vovuwa nesuko." 
Ezekiel13:11 Chiudza avo vanoruvuwa nesuko, kuti ruchakoromoka; mvura ichauya ichinaya kwazvo, ine, mabwe makuru echimvuramabwe, muchawa, nedutu remhepo richarutsemutsa." 
Ezekiel13:12 Zvino tarirai, kana rusvingo rwakoromoka havangati kwamuri here, `Ko suko ramakuvuwa naro riripiko?' """ 
Ezekiel13:13 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Ndicharutsemusa zvirokwazvo nedutu remhepo nehasha dzangu; mvura ichanaya kwazvo nokutsamwa kwangu, namabwe makuru echimvuramabwe nehasha dzangu, kurupedza chose." 
Ezekiel13:14 Saizvozvo ndichakoromora rusvingo rwamakavuwa nesuko, nokuruwisira pasi, kusvikira nheyo dzarwo dzafukurwa; ruchakoromoka, nemwi muchaparadzwa mukati marwo; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:15 Saizvozvo ndichapedza hasha dzangu parusvingo, napamusoro pavakaruvuwa nesuko; ndichati kwamuri, `Rusvingo haruchipo, navakaruvuwa havachipo;" 
Ezekiel13:16 ivo vaporofita valsiraeri vanoporofita pamusoro peJerusaremu, vachirionera zviratidzo zvorugare, izvo hakuna rugare; ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:17 Asi iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kuvakunda vavanhu vako, ivo vanoporofita zvinobva mumoyo yavo, uporofite pamusoro pavo," 
Ezekiel13:18 uti, ""Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Vane nhamo vakadzi vanosonera zvifukidzo papfundo dzamaoko, vanoita micheka yokufukidza misoro yavanhu vapi navapi, kuti vavhime mweya.' Munoda kuvhima mweya yavanhu vangu, muchida kuzviponesera mweya iyeyo!" 
Ezekiel13:19 Makandimhura pakati pavanhu vangu nokuda kwetsama dzebhari nezvimedu zvezvingwa, kuti muuraye mweya isingafaniri kufa, nokuponesa mweya isingafaniri kurarama, muchirevera vanhu vangu nhema, ivo vanoteerera nhema dzenyu.""" 
Ezekiel13:20 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Tarirai, ndine mhaka nezvifukidzo zvenyu zvamunovhima nazvo mweya yavanhu seshiri, ndichazvibvarura pamaoko enyu; ndicharegedza mweya, iyo mweya yamunovhima seshiri." 
Ezekiel13:21 Nemicheka yenyu ndichaibvarurawo, ndirwire vanhu vangu pamaoko enyu, varege kuzova mumaoko enyu kuti muvavhime; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel13:22 Nokuti nenhema dzenyu makarwadza moyo wowakarurama, wandisina kuchemedza, mukasimbisa maoko owakaipa, kuti arege kudzoka panzira yake yakaipa, aponeswe;" 
Ezekiel13:23 naizvozvo hamuchazoonizve zviratidzo zvinonyengera kana kuuka zvinoukwa; ini ndicharwira vanhu vangu pamaoko enyu; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. 
Ezekiel14:1 Zvino vamwe vakuru vaIsiraeri vakauya kwandiri, vakagara pasi pamberi pangu." 
Ezekiel14:2 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel14:3 Mwanakomana womunhu, vanhu ava vakapinza zvifananidzo zvavo mumoyo yavo, nokuisa chigumbuso chezvakaipa zvavo pamberi pavo; zvino ndingatongotenda kubvunzwa navo here?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Naizvozvo taura navo, uti kwavari, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, munhu mumwe nomumwe weimba yaIsiraeri anopinza zvifananidzo zvake mumoyo make, nokuisa chigumbuso chezvakaipa zvake pamberi pake, akauya kumuporofita, ini Jehovha ndichamupindura zvakafanira izvozvo, zvakafanira kuwanda kwezvifananidzo zvake;" 
Ezekiel14:5 kuti ndibate imba yaIsiraeri mumoyo yavo, nokuti vava vatorwa kwandiri nemhaka yezvifananidzo zvavo.'" 
Ezekiel14:6 Naizvozvo iti kuimba yaIsiraeri, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, dzokai, mufuratire zvifananidzo zvenyu, mufuratidze zvinonyangadza zvenyu zvose zviso zvenyu.'"
