Ezekiel14:7 Nokuti mumwe nomumwe weimba yaIsiraeri, kana wavatorwa vagere panyika yaIsiraeri, anoparadzana neni, achipinza zvifananidzo zvake mumoyo make, nokuisa chigumbuso chezvakaipa zvake pamberi pake, akauya kumuporofita kuti iye andibvunze nokuda kwake, ini Jehovha ndichamupindura ndimene;" 
Ezekiel14:8 ndicharinzira munhu uyo chiso changu ndimuitire zvakaipa, ndichamuita chishamiso nechiratidzo netsumo, ndichamubvisa pakati pavanhu vangu; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel14:9 Zvino kana muporofita akanyengerwa, akataura shoko, ini Jehovha, ndini ndanyengera muporofita uyo, ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pake, ndimuparadze pakati pavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel14:10 Vachava nemhosva yavo; zvakaipa zvomuporofita zvichaenzana nezvakaipa zveanobvunza kwaari; 
Ezekiel14:11 kuti imba yaIsiraeri irege kuzotsauka kwandiri, kana kuzozvisvibisa nokudarika kwavo kose, asi vave vanhu vangu, neni ndive Mwari wavo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel14:12 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel14:13 Mwanakomana womunhu, kana kune nyika ichinge yanditadzira nokudarika, ini ndikatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro payo, ndikavhuna mudonzvo wezvokudya zvayo, ndikatuma nzara pamusoro payo, nokuparadzapo vanhu nezvipfuwo;" 
Ezekiel14:14 kunyange vanhu ava vatatu, nowa naDhanyeri naJobho, vakavamo, vangarwira mweya yavo yoga nokururama kwavo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel14:14 kunyange vanhu ava vatatu, nowa naDhanyeri naJobho, vakavamo, vangarwira mweya yavo yoga nokururama kwavo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel14:15 Kana ndikafambisa zvikara munyika, zvikaipedzera vana, ikaitwa dongo, kukasava nomunhu angagona kufambamo nemhaka yezvikara;" 
Ezekiel14:16 kunyange varume ava vatatu vaivamo, noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha havangarwiri vanakomana kana vanasikana; ivo voga vangarwirwa, asi nyika ichaitwa dongo." 
Ezekiel14:17 Zvimwe kana ndikauyisa munondo pamusoro penyika iyo, ndikati, `Munondo, pfuura napakati penyika!' Ndikaparadzamo vanhu nezvipfuwo," 
Ezekiel14:18 kunyange varume ava vatatu vaivamo, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha havangarwiri vanakomana kana vanasikana, asi ivo vamene voga vangwarwirwa." 
Ezekiel14:19 Zvimwe kana ndikatuma hosha yakaipa munyika iyo, ndikadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro payo neropa, kuti ndiparadzemo vanhu nezvipfuwo;" 
Ezekiel14:20 kunyange nowa naDhanyeri naJobho vaivamo, noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, havangwarwiri mwanakomana kana mwanasikana; vangarwira mweya yavo yoga nokururama kwavo.""" 
Ezekiel14:20 kunyange nowa naDhanyeri naJobho vaivamo, noupenyu hwangu ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, havangwarwiri mwanakomana kana mwanasikana; vangarwira mweya yavo yoga nokururama kwavo.""" 
Ezekiel14:21 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Ndoda, kana ndikatuma pamusoro peJerusaremu zvakaipa zvina zvandakavatongera, zvinoti, munondo nenzara nezvikara zvakaipa nehosha yakaipa, kuti ndiparadzemo vanhu nezvipfuwo!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Asi tarirai, vamwe vakasara vacharegwamo vachapukunyuka, vachatapwa, vari vanakomana navanasikana; tarirai, vachasvika kwamuri, muchaona nzira yavo nezvavanoita; ipapo muchanyaradzwa pamusoro pezvakaipa zvandakauyisa pamusoro peJerusaremu, pamusoro pezvose zvandakauyisa pamusoro paro." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ivo vachakunyaradzai, kana muchiona nzira yavo nezvavanoita; ipapo muchaziva kuti handina kuita pasina zvose zvandakaitamo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel15:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel15:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, muti womuzambiringa unopfuura mimwe miti yose neiko, iro davi romuzambiringa riri pakati pemiti iri kudondo?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Danda ringatorwapo rokuita basa naro here? Kana vanhu vangatorapo mbambo yokuturikisa mudziyo upi noupi here? 
Ezekiel15:4 Tarirai, unokandirwa mumoto dzive huni; moto wapedza miromo miviri yawo, napakati watsvawo, zvino uchabatsira pabasa here?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Tarirai, uchakanaka hauna kukwanira basa chose; ndoda zvino kana moto waupedza, kana watsva, haukwaniri basa!" 
Ezekiel15:6 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Somuti womuzambiringa pakati pemiti iri kudondo, wandakaisa kumoto dzive huni, saizvozvo ndakaisa vagere Jerusaremu pakuparadzwa." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndichavarinzira chiso changu ndivaitire zvakaipa; vakabuda pamoto, asi moto uchavapedza; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichivarinzira chiso changu ndivaitire zvakaipa." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ndichaparadza nyika, nokuti vakandidarikira,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel16:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, zivisa Jerusaremu zvinonyangadza zvaro," 
Ezekiel16:3 uti, 'Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kuJerusaremu: Kwawakabva nokwawakaberekwa ndiko kunyika yavaKanani; baba vako vakanga vari muAmori, namai vako vakanga vari muHiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Kana kuri kuberekwa kwako, pazuva rokuzvarwa kwako rukuvhute rwako haruna kugurwa, uye hauna kushambidzwa nemvura kuti unake; hauna kutongokwizwa nomunyu, kana kuputirwa mumachira." 
Ezekiel16:5 Hakuna ziso rakakunzwira tsitsi, kana kukuitira chinhu chimwe chezvinhu izvi, nokuva nengoni newe; asi wakarashirwa kusango, nokuti vakasema hupenyu hwako nezuva rokuzvarwa kwako.'" 
Ezekiel16:6 Ndakapfuura kwauri, ndikakuona uchipfakanyika muropa rako, ndikati kwauri uri muropa rako, `Rarama!' Zvirokwazvo, ndakati kwauri uri muropa rako, `Rarama! '" 
Ezekiel16:7 Ndakakuita vazhinji kwazvo sezvinomera kusango, ukawanda nokukura, ukasvikira pahukomba hwakaisvonaka; mazamu ako akakura, nevhudzi rako rakamera, asi wakanga usina kufuka, wakashama." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ndakapfuura kwauri, ndikakutarira, ndikaona kuti nguvo yako yakanga iri nguvo yorudo. Ipapo ndakawarira nguvo yangu pamusoro pako, ndikafukidza kushama kwako; zvirokwazvo, ndakakupikira, ndikaita sungano newe, iwe ukava wangu,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ipapo ndakakushambidza nemvura; zvirokwazvo, ndakashambidza ropa rako kwauri, ndikakuzodza namafuta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ndakakufukidzawo nezvakarukwa,ndikakupfekedza shangu, shangu dzamatebwe, ndakasunga chiuno nomucheka wakaisvonaka, ndikakufukidza nesirika." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ndakakushongedza hukomba, ndikaisa zvishongo zvamaoko pazvanza zvako, nengetani pamutsipa wako." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ndikaisa chindori pamhino dzako, nezvishongo zvenzeve panzeve dzako, nekorona yakanaka pamusoro wako." 
Ezekiel16:13 Wakazvishongedza nendarama nesirivha, zvokufuka zvako zvakanga zviri zvomucheka wakaisvonaka nesirika nezvakarukwa; wakadya hupfu hwakatsetseka nohuchi namafuta; hwakanga hwakanaka kwazvo, ukapfuurira mberi kusvikira kuhushe." 
Ezekiel16:14 Mbiri yako yokunaka kwako yakapararira pakati pamarudzi, nokuti yakanga yakakwana kwazvo nokuda kohumambo hwangu hwandakanga ndaisa pamusoro pako,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:15 Asi iwe wakavimba nokunaka kwako, ukapata nokuda kwembiri yako, ukadurura kupata kwako kunomumwe nomumwe waipfuura napo, kukava kwake." 
Ezekiel16:16 Wakatora dzimwe nguvo dzako, ukazviitira nzvimbo dzakakwirira, dzakashongedzwa namavara mazhinji, ukandopata pamusoro padzo. Zvinhu zvakadai hazvizaifanira kuuya kana kuitika." 
Ezekiel16:17 Zvishongo zvako zvakanaka wakazvitora pandarama yangu nesirivha yangu, zvandakanga ndakupa, ukazviitira zvifananidzo zvavarume, ukapata nazvo;" 
Ezekiel16:18 ukatora nguvo dzako dzakarukwa, ukazvifukidza nadzo, ukagadza mafuta angu nezvinonhuhwira zvangu pamberi pazvo." 
Ezekiel16:19 Zvokudya zvangu zvandakakupa, ihwo hupfu hwakatsetseka namafuta nohuchi zvandakakupa kuti uzvidye, wakazvigadza pamberi pazvo, zviite bwema hunonhuhwira; ndizvo zvawakaita,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:20 Uyezve, wakatora vanakomana vako navanasikana vako, vawakandiberekera, ukazvibayira ivo, kuti vadyiwe. Ko kupata kwako chakanga chiri chinhu chiduku here," 
Ezekiel16:21 zvawakazouraya vana vangu, ukazvipa ivo, kuti uzvipinzire ivo mumoto here?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Zvino pakati pezvinonyangadza zvako zvose nokupata kwako hauna kurangarira mazuva ohuduku hwako, panguva yawakanga usino kufuka, wakashama, uchipfakanyika muropa rako." 
Ezekiel16:23 Zvino shure kwezvakaipa zvako zvose haiwa, une nhamo, une nhamo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:24 Wakazvivakira nzvimbo yokufeva nokuzviitira nzvimbo yakakwirira panzira dzose dzomumusha. 
Ezekiel16:25 Wakavaka nzvimbo yako yakakwirira pakuvamba kwenzira imwe neimwe, ukashandura kunaka kwako zvikava zvinonyangadza, ukafukurira vose vanopfuura tsoka dzako, ukawanza kupata kwako." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wakafevawo navaIjipiti, vakanga vagere pedo newe, vane miviri mikuru; ukawanza kupata kwako, kuti unditsamwise." 
Ezekiel16:27 Naizvozvo tarira, ndakatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pako, ndikatapudza zvokudya zvako zvaunodya misi yose, ndikakuisa kuna vanokuvenga vakuitire sokuda kwavo, ivo vakunda vavaFirisitia vakanyadziswa nomufambiro wako wakashata." 
Ezekiel16:28 Wakapatawo navaAsiria, nokuti wakanga usingagoni kuguta; zvirokwazvo, wakapata navo, asi hauna kuringaniswa nazvo." 
Ezekiel16:29 Wakawanzawo kupata kwako kusvikira kunyika yavashambadziri, iko kuKaradhea; kunyange zvakadaro hauna kuringaniswa nazvo." 
Ezekiel16:30 Moyo wako unoshaiwa simba sei,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ""Zvaunoita zvinhu izvi zvose, zvinoitwa nechifeve chisinganyari;" 
Ezekiel16:31 zvaunovaka nzvimbo yako yokufeva pakuvamba kwenzira imwe neimwe, nokuita nzvimbo yako yakakwirira panzira imwe neimwe yomumusha; asi hauna kuita sechifeve, zvawakashora muripo." 
Ezekiel16:32 Aiwa! Mukadzi akawanikwa anofeva! Anogamuchira vatorwa panzvimbo yomurume wake! 
Ezekiel16:33 Zvifeve zvose zvinopiwa zvipo, asi iwe unopa vadikamwi vako vose zvipo, uchivaripira, kuti vauye kwauri vachibva kumativi ose nokuda kokupata kwako." 
Ezekiel16:34 Iwe wakasiyana navamwe vakadzi pakupata kwako, zvakusina unokutevera kupata newe; uye zvaunopa muripo iwe, asi iwe haupiwi muripo, naizvozvo wakasiyana navamwe.""" 
Ezekiel16:35 Naizvozvo iwe chifeve, chinzwa shoko raJehovha," 
Ezekiel16:36 zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Ndarira yako zvayakadururwa, nokunyadza kwako zvakwakafukurwa nokupata kwako navadikamwi vako, uye nokuda kwezvifananidzo zvose zvezvinonyangadza zvako, neropa ravana vako, rawakazvipa;" 
Ezekiel16:37 naizvozvo tarira, ndichaunganidza vadikamwi vako vose, vawakafarirana navo, navose vawakanga uchida, pamwechete navose vawakanga uchivenga; ndichakuunganidzira ivo vachibva kumativi ose, nokuvafukurira kunyadza kwako, kuti vaone kunyadza kwako kose." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndichakutonga sezvinotongwa vakadzi voutera navanoteura ropa; ndichauyisa pamusoro pako ropa rehasha negodo. 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndichakuisawo mumaoko avo; vachakoromora nzvimbo yako yokufeva, nokuputsa nzvimbo dzako dzakakwirira; vachakubvisira nguvo dzako, nokukutorera zvishongo zvako zvakanaka; vachakusiya usina chokufuka wakashama." 
Ezekiel16:40 Vachauyawo neungano kuzorwa newe, ivo vachakutaka namabwe nokubvoora neminondo yavo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Vachapisa dzimba dzako nomoto, nokukuitira zvakatongwa pamberi pavakadzi vazhinji; ndichakuregesa kupata kwako, iwe hauchazovapi muripo." 
Ezekiel16:42 Saizvozvo ndichazorodza hasha dzangu kwauri, godo rangu richabva kwauri; ndichanyarara, ndikasazova nokutsamwa." 
Ezekiel16:43 Zvausina kurangarira mazuva ohuduku hwako, asi wakanditsamwisa nezvinhu izvi zvose, naizvozvo, tarira, ndichauyisa zvawakaita pamusoro wako,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; haungazoiti zvakashata izvozvo nezvinonyangadza zvako zvose." 
Ezekiel16:44 Tarira, mumwe nomumwe anobata netsumo, achabata tsumo iyi pamusoro pako, achiti, `Sezvakaita mai, ndizvo zvakaita mwanasikana wavo.'" 
Ezekiel16:45 Iwe uri mwanasikana wamai vako, vanosema murume wavo navana vavo; iwe uri munun'una wavakoma vako, vakasema varume vavo navana vavo; amai vako vakanga vari muHiti, nababa vako muAmori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Mukoma wako ndiSamaria, anogara kuruboshwe rwako, iye navanasikana vake; munun'una wako anogara kurudyi rwako, ndiSodhoma navanasikana vake." 
Ezekiel16:47 Asi hauna kufamba nenzira dzavo, kana kuita zvinonyangadza zvavo; asi izvo wakati zviduku, wakavapfura ivo vose nenzira dzako dzakaora." 
Ezekiel16:48 Noupenyu hwangu,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha munun'una wako Sodhoma, ""Iye navanasikana vake, havana kuita sezvawakaita iwe navanasikana vako." 
Ezekiel16:49 Tarira, zvakaipa zvomunun'una wako Sodhoma hezvi: Kuzvikudza, zvokudya zvakawandisa, nokuzorora kusina hanya nechinhu, ndizvo zvaakanga anazvo navanasikana vake; haana kusimbisa ruoko rwavarombo navanoshayiwa." 
Ezekiel16:50 Vakanga vane manyawi. vakaita zvinonyangadza pamberi pangu; saka ndichizviona ndakavabvisa. 
Ezekiel16:51 Kunyange neSamaria harina kuita hafu yezvivi zvako; asi iwe wakawanzisa zvinonyangadza zvako kupfuura zvavo, ukapembedza vanun'una vako nezvinonyangadza zvako zvose zvawakaita." 
Ezekiel16:52 Iwe chiva nemhosva yezvinonyadzisa zvako, zvawakapembedza vanun'una vako; nokuda kwezvivi zvako zvawakaita zvinonyangadza kupfuura zvavo, ivo vava vakarurama kupfuura iwe; zvirokwazvo, chisvodeswa iwe, uve nokunyadziswa kwako, zvawakapembedza vanun'una vako.""" 
Ezekiel16:53 Ndichadzosazve kutapwa kwavo, iko kutapwa kweSodhoma navanasikana varo, nokutapwa kweSamaria navanasikana varo, nokutapwa kwavatapwa vako vari pakati pavo;" 
Ezekiel16:54 kuti iwe uve nokunyadziswa kwako, unyare pamusoro pezvose zvawakaita uchivanyaradza." 
Ezekiel16:55 Vanun'una vako Sodhoma navanasikana vake vachadzokera kumugariro wavo wakare, naSamaria navanasikana vake vachadzokera kumugariro wavo wakare, newe navanasikana vako muchadzokera kumugariro wenyu wakare." 
Ezekiel16:56 Nokuti munun'una wako Sodhoma haana kurehwa nomuromo wako nezuva rokuzvikudza kwako," 
Ezekiel16:57 zvakashata zvako zvisati zvafukurwa, sapanguva yokushorwa kwako navanasikana veSiria navose vakavapoteredza, vanasikana vavaFirisitia, vanokuzvidza kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel16:58 Une mhosva yezvakashata zvako nezvinonyangadza zvako,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Ezekiel16:59 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Ndichakuitirawo sezvawakaita iwe, wakashora kupika pakuputsa kwako sungano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Kunyange zvakadaro ndicharangarira sungano yangu yandakaita newe pamazuva ohuduku hwako, ndisimbise sungano isingaperi newe." 
Ezekiel16:61 Ipapo ucharangarira nzira dzako; uchanyara, kana uchigamuchira vakoma vako navanun'una vako; ndichakupa ivo, vave vanasikana vako, asi hazvingaitwi pamusoro pesungano yako." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndichasimbisa sungano yangu newe; zvino uchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha; 
Ezekiel16:63 kuti urangarire, usvodeswe, urege kuzoshamisa muromo wakozve nokuda kokunyara kwako, kana ndakukangamwira zvose zvawakaita,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel17:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel17:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, taurira veimba yaIsiraeri chirabwe, ureve mufananidzo kwavari;" 
Ezekiel17:3 uti, 'Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, gondo guru rina mapapiro makuru neminhenga mirefu, rinamambava mazhinji ana mavara-mavara, rakasvika Rebhanoni, rikatora musoro womuSidhari," 
Ezekiel17:4 rikavhuna davi rokumusoro pamatavi aro manyoro, rikaenda naro kunyika yavashambadziri, ndokuriisa muguta ravatengesi.'" 
Ezekiel17:5 Rakatorawo dzimwe mbeu dzenyika, ndokudzikavira pavhu rakaorera, rikadziisa parutivi rwemvura zhinji, rikadzisima semiti yemikonachando." 
Ezekiel17:6 Davi rikamera, rikaita muzambiringa unotanda wakapfupika, kuti matavi awo atarire kwariri, nemidzi yawo ive pasi pawo; saizvozvo rakaita muzambiringa, wakabudisa matavi nokutungira hutavi huduku." 
Ezekiel17:7 Zvino kwakanga kune rimwe gondozve rina mapapiro makuru namambava mazhinji; zvino tarira muzambiringa uyu wakarerekera midzi yawo kwariri nokutungirawo matavi aro kwariri, zvichibva pandima pawakanga wakasimwa, kuti riudiridze." 
Ezekiel17:8 Wakanga wakasimwa pavhu rakanaka pane mvura zhinji, kuti ubudise matavi, nokubereka michero, uve muzambiringa wakanaka." 
Ezekiel17:9 Zvino iwe uti, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, muti ucharamba uchifara here?' Ko gondo haringadzuri midzi yawo, nokugura michero yawo, kuti mashizha awo achangobukira, aome here? Hakungadikamwi ruoko rune simba, kana vanhu vazhinji, kuudzura nemidzi yawo." 
Ezekiel17:10 Zvirokwazvo, tarira, zvawasimwa ucharamba uchifara here? Haungaomi chose kana ukarohwa nemhepo inobva mabvazuva here? Uchaomera pandima pawakanga wamera.""" 
Ezekiel17:11 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel17:12 Zvino uti kuimba inondimukira simba, 'Hamuzivi here kuti zvinhu izvi zvinoreveiko?' Chivaudza, uti, `Tarira mambo weBhabhironi wakasvika Jerusaremu, akabata mambo waro, namachinda aro, akandovaisa Bhabhironi kwaari." 
Ezekiel17:13 Akatora mumwe worudzi rwamambo, akaita sungano naye; akamupikisawo, akabvisa vane simba venyika;" 
Ezekiel17:14 kuti ushe huderere, kuti hurege kukura, asi hurambe huripo huchichengeta sungano yake.'" 
Ezekiel17:15 Asi wakazomumukira achituma nhume dzake Ijipiti, kuti apiwe mabhiza navanhu vazhinji. Ko acharamba achingofara here? Anoita zvinhu zvakadai achapukunyuka here? Angaputsa sungano akapukunyuka here?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Panzvimbo panogara mambo, akamuita mambo, waakashora kupika kwake, nokuputsa sungano yake, ipapo paari, pakati peBhabhironi, ndipo paachafira." 
Ezekiel17:17 Kunyange naFarao nehondo yake ine simba neboka rake guru haangamubatsiri pakurwa, kana vachitutira mirwi yokurwa nokuvaka nhare, kuti vaparadze vanhu vazhinji." 
Ezekiel17:18 Nokuti wakashora kupika nokuputsa kwake sungano; tarira, akapika noruoko rwake, kunyange zvakadaro akaita izvozvi zvose haangapukunyuki.""" 
Ezekiel17:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Noupenyu hwangu, kupika kwangu kwaakashora nesungano yangu yaakaputsa, zvirokwazvo ndichauyisa mhosva yazvo pamusoro pomusoro wake." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndichakanda mumbure wangu pamusoro pake, achabatwa nomusungo wangu, ndichamuisa Bhabhironi ndimutongeko pamusoro pokudarika kwake kwaakandidarikira nako." 
Ezekiel17:21 Vose vanotiza vamapoka ake ose vachaurawa nomunondo, navakasara vachaparadzirwa kumativi mana enyika; zvino muchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndini ndakataura izvozvo.""" 
Ezekiel17:22 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Ndichatora ini rutavi padavi rokumusorosoro romusidhari, ndirusime; pamatavi aro manyoro okumusoro ndichavhuna rumwe rutsva, ndirusime pamusoro pegomo refu rakakwirira;" 
Ezekiel17:23 pagomo refu raIsiraeri ndipo pandicharusima; ruchabudisa matavi, nokubereka michero, nokuva musidhari wakanaka kwazvo, pasi pawo pachagara shiri dzinamapapiro amarudzi ose; dzichagara mumumvuri wamatavi awo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Zvino miti yose yokusango ichaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakaderedza muti murefu, ndikakwiridza muti wakazvidzwa, nokuomesa muti munyoro, ndikameresa muti wakaoma. Ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, ndikazviita.""" 
Ezekiel18:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel18:2 Ndokudiniko kana muchibata netsumo iyi panyika yaIsiraeri, muchiti, `Madzibaba akadya mazambiringa anovava, meno avana ndokuhwadzira?'" 
Ezekiel18:3 Noupenyu hwangu,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, ""Hamungagoni kuzobata netsumo iyi pakati paIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel18:4 Tarirai, mweya yose ndeyangu; mweya wababa ndowangu, saizvozvo nomweya womwanakomanawo; mweya unotadza, uchafa." 
Ezekiel18:5 Asi kana munhu achinge akarurama, achiita zvomurayiro nezvakarurama," 
Ezekiel18:6 asina kudya pamakomo, kana kutarira nameso ake kuzvifananidzo zveimba yavaIsiraeri, kana kuchinyira mukadzi wowokwake, kana kuswedera kumukadzi ari kumwedzi kwake," 
Ezekiel18:7 asina kuitira vamwe zvakaipa, akadzosera rubatso rwake kuno wakatora chikwereti, asina kutora chinhu achipamba, akapa vane nzara zvokudya zvake, akafukidza akashama nenguvo;" 
Ezekiel18:8 asina kuita mhindu, kana kutora mhindu yemichero, akadzora ruoko rwake pazvakaipa, akaruramisa kwazvo pamhaka yomunhu nehama yake," 
Ezekiel18:9 akafamba nemitemo yangu, akachengeta zvandakarayira, kuti aite zvamazvokwadi; iye akarurama, zvirokwazvo achararama,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel18:10 Kana iye akabereka mwanakomana riri gororo, kana muteuri weropa, kana anoita chimwe chezvinhu izvi," 
Ezekiel18:11 asingaiti chinhu chimwe chaizvozvo zvakanaka, akadya pamakomo, akachinyira mukadzi wowokwake," 
Ezekiel18:12 akaitira varombo navanoshayiwa zvakaipa, akatora achipamba, asina kudzosera rubatso, akatarira zvifananidzo nameso ake, akaita zvinonyangadza," 
Ezekiel18:13 akaita mhindu, kana kutora mhindu yemichero; ko iye achararama here? Haangararami. Akaita izvi zvose zvinonyangadza, zvirokwazvo achafa; ropa rake richava pamusoro pake." 
Ezekiel18:14 Zvino, tarira, kana akabereka mwanakomana, anoona zvivi zvose zvababa vake, zvavakaita, akazviona hake, akasaita zvakadai;" 
Ezekiel18:15 asina kudya pamakomo, kana kutarira nameso ake zvifananidzo zveimba yavalsiraeri, kana kuchinyira mukadzi wowokwake," 
Ezekiel18:16 asina kuitira vamwe zvakaipa, asina kutora chinhu achireva rubatso, asina kutora chinhu achipamba, asi akapa vane nzara zvokudya zvake, nokufukidza akashama nechokufuka;" 
Ezekiel18:17 akadzora ruoko rwake pakuitira varombo zvakaipa, asina kutora mhindu kana mhindu yemichero, akaita zvandakarayira, nokufamba nemitemo yangu; iye haangafi nokuda kwezvakaipa zvababa vake, zvirokwazvo achararama." 
Ezekiel18:18 Kana vari baba vake, zvavakamanikidza zvikuru, nokupamba zvinhu zvomunun'una wake, akaita zvisina kunaka pakati pavanhu vake, tarirai, iye achafa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake." 
Ezekiel18:19 Asi imwi munoti, `Mwanakomana anoregereiko kuva nemhosva yezvakaipa zvababa vake?' Kana mwanakomana achinge aita zvinorehwa nomurayiro nezvakarurama, akachengeta mitemo yangu yose, akaiita, zvirokwazvo achararama." 
Ezekiel18:20 Munhu anotadza, ndiye achafa; mwanakomana haangavi nemhosva yezvakaipa zvababa vake, nababa havangavi nemhosva yezvakaipa zvomwanakomana wavo; kururama kowakarurama kuchava pamusoro pake, nokuipa kowakaipa kuchava pamusoro pake." 
Ezekiel18:21 Asi kana akaipa akatendeuka pazvivi zvake zvose zvaakaita, akachengeta mitemo yangu yose, akaita zvinorehwa nomurayiro nezvakarurama, zvirokwazvo achararama, haangafi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Kudarika kwake kose kwaakaita hakungarangarirwi pamusoro pake; achararama nokuda kwezvakarurama zvaakaita. 
Ezekiel18:23 Ko ini ndingatongofarira rufu rwowakaipa here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; Handizinofarira kudzoka kwake panzira yake, ararame here?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Asi kana akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, akaita zvinonyangadza zvose zvinoitwa nomunhu akaipa, ko angararama here? Mabasa ake akarurama aakaita haangatongorangarirwi; nokuda kokudarika kwake, kwaakadarika nako, nezvivi zvake zvaakaita, achafa nokuda kwazvo." 
Ezekiel18:25 Asi imwi munoti, `Nzira yaIshe haina kururama.' Zvino chinzwai, imwi mhuri yavaIsiraeri, nzira yangu haina kururama here? Ko nzira dzenyu hadzizi idzo dzisina kururama here?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Kana munhu akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, akafa nokuda kwazvo; achafa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvaakaita." 
Ezekiel18:27 Uyezve, kana munhu akaipa akatsauka pazvakaipa zvake zvaakaita, akazoita zvinorehwa nomurayiro nezvakarurama, achaponesa upenyu hwake." 
Ezekiel18:28 Zvaakarangarira, akatsauka pakudarika kwake kose kwaakaita, zvirokwazvo achararama, haangafi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Kunyange zvakadaro, vaIsiraeri vanoti, `Nzira yaIshe haina kururama.' Nhai, mhuri yavaIsiraeri, nzira dzangu hadzina kururama here? Hadzizi nzira dzenyu dzisakarurama here?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Naizvozvo ndichakutongai, imwi mhuri yavaIsiraeri, mumwe nomumwe zvakafanira nzira dzake,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha. ""Dzokai, mutendeuke pakudarika kwenyu kose; kuti chirege kuva chigumbuso chezvakaipa kwamuri." 
Ezekiel18:31 Rashai kure nemwi kudarika kwenyu kose, kwamakadarika nako, muzviitire moyo mitsva nemweya mitsva; nokuti muchafireiko, imwi mhuri yavaIsiraeri?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Nokuti handifariri rufu rwounofa,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; naizvozvo tendeukai, murarame." 
Ezekiel19:1 Zvino iwe, imba mariro pamusoro pamachinda aIsiraeri," 
Ezekiel19:2 uti, ""Mai vako vaiva aniko?"" Vaiva shumbakadzi, yaivata pakati peshumba, ichirera vana vayo pakati peshumba duku." 
Ezekiel19:3 Zvino yakarera mumwe mwana wayo, ikava shumba duku, ikadzidza kubata zvaingauraya, ikapedza vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Marudzi avanhu akainzwawo ikabatwa muhuzha yavo, vakaiisa kunyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel19:5 Zvino yakati ichiona kuti yanyengerwa, kuti tariro yanyangarika, ikatorazve mumwe mwana wayo, ikaiita shumba duku." 
Ezekiel19:6 Iyo ikafamba-famba pakati peshumba; ikava shumba duku, ikadzidza kubata zvaingauraya, ikapedza vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Ikaziva dzimba dzavo dzohushe, ikaparadza maguta avo; nyika nezvose zvayo ikava dongo, nokuda kokuwomba kwayo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Ipapo marudzi avanhu venyika dzakapoteredza akarwa nayo, vakakandira mumbure wavo pamusoro payo, ikabatwa muhuzha yavo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Vakaiisa muchirugu chine zvikokovonho, vakandoiisa kuna mambo weBhabhironi; vakaiisa munhare, kuti inzwi rayo rirege kuzonzwikwa pamakomo alsiraeri." 
Ezekiel19:10 Mai vako vakanga vakaita somuzambiringa, panguva yokuzorora kwako, wakanga wakasimwa pamvura;wakabereka zvakanaka, una matavi mazhinji, nokuda kwemvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel19:11 Ukava namatanda makobvu okuita tsvimbo dzavaibata hushe, musoro wawo ukakwirira kumusoro pakati pamatavi makobvu, ukaonekwa kumusoro-soro pamwechete namashizha awo mazhinji." 
Ezekiel19:12 Asi wakadzurwa nehasha, ukakandirwa pasi, mhepo inobva mabvazuva ikaomesa michero yawo, matanda awo makobvu akavuniwa, ndokuoma, moto ukaapedza." 
Ezekiel19:13 Zvino wasimwa murenje, munyika yakaoma ine nyota." 
Ezekiel19:14 Moto wabuda padanda ramatavi awo, ukapedza michero yawo, hapachine danda rine simba ringaita tsvimbo yokubata ushe. Awa ndiwo mariro, uye achazova mariro." 
Ezekiel20:1 Zvino negore rechinomwe, nomwedzi wechishanu, nezuva regumi romwedzi, vamwe vakuru vaIsiraeri vakauya kuzobvunza Jehovha, vakagara pasi pamberi pangu." 
Ezekiel20:2 Shoko raJehovha rikasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel20:3 Mwanakomana womunhu, taura navakuru vaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, mauya kuzondibvunza ini here? Noupenyu hwangu,' ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha handidi kubvunzwa nemi." 
Ezekiel20:4 Chivatonga, Mwanakomana womunhu, chivatonga! Chivazivisa zvinonyangadza zvamadzibaba avo;" 
Ezekiel20:5 uti kwavari, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, nezuva randakatsanangura Isiraeri, ndikasimudzira vana veimba yaJakobho ruoko rwangu, nokuzvizivisa kwavari munyika yeIjipiti, musi wandakavasimudzira ruoko rwangu,' ndichiti, `Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu;'" 
Ezekiel20:6 nezuva iroro ndakavasimudzira ruoko rwangu, kuti ndichavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti ndivaise kunyika yandakavatsvakira, kunoyerera mukaka nouchi, iyo yaiva hukomba bwenyika dzose." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ndikati kwavari, `Rasai, mumwe nomumwe, zvinonyangadza zvameso ake, murege kuzvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zveIjipiti; ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.'" 
Ezekiel20:8 Asi vakandimukira simba, vakaramba kunditeerera; havana kurasa, mumwe nomumwe wavo, zvinonyangadza zvameso avo, havana kusiya zvifananidzo zveIjipiti. Ipapo ndakati ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo, kuti ndipedze kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pavo pakati penyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel20:9 Asi ndakazviita nokuda kwezita rangu, kuti rirege kumhurwa pamberi pamarudzi avanhu, mavakanga vagere, vandakazvizivisa kwavari pamberi pavo, ndichivabudisa munyika" 
Ezekiel20:10 Naizvozvo ndakavabudisa munyika ndikavaisa kurenje. 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndikavapa mitemo yangu, nokuvaratidza zvandakarayira, zvinoti kana munhu achizviita ararame nazvo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ndakavapawo maSabata angu, chive chiratidzo pakati pangu navo, kuti vazive kuti ndini Jehovha, ndinovaita vatsvene." 
Ezekiel20:13 Asi imba yaIsiraeri yakandimukira simba murenje; havana kufamba nemitemo yangu, vakaramba zvandakarayira, zvinoti kana munhu achizvichengeta, achararama nazvo; vakamhura zvikuru maSabata angu. Ipapo ndakati ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo murenje, kuti ndivapedze." 
Ezekiel20:14 Asi ndakazviita nokuda kwezita rangu, kuti rirege kumhurwa pamberi pamarudzi andakavabudisa pamberi pawo." 
Ezekiel20:15 Ndakavasimudzirawo ruoko rwangu murenje, kuti handingavaisi kunyika yandakanga ndavapa, kunoerera mukaka nouchi, iyo yaiva hukomba bwenyika dzose;" 
Ezekiel20:16 nokuti vakaramba zvandakavarayira, vakasafamba nemitemo yangu, vakamhura maSabata angu; nokuti moyo yavo yakatevera zvifananidzo zvavo." 
Ezekiel20:17 Kunyange zvakadaro ziso rangu rakavapembedza, ndikasavaparadza, kana kuvapedza chose murenje." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ndikati kuvana vavo murenje, `Regai kufamba nemitemo yamadzibaba enyu, kana kuchengeta zvavakarayira, kana kuzvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvenyu." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu; fambai nemitemo yangu, muchengete zvandakarayira, muzviite;" 
Ezekiel20:20 maSabata angu ngaave matsvene kwamuri; zvigova chiratidzo pakati pangu nemi, kuti muzive kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.'" 
Ezekiel20:21 Asi vana vakandimukira simba, havana kufamba nemitemo yangu, kana kuchengeta zvandakarayira kuti vazviite, zvinoti kana munhu akazviita, achararama nazvo; vakamhura maSabata angu. Ipapo ndakati ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo, kuti ndipedze kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pavo murenje." 
Ezekiel20:22 Kunyange zvakadaro ndakadzosa ruoko rwangu, ndikaita nokuda kwezita rangu,kuti rirege kumhurwa pamberi pamarudzi, andakavabudisa pamberi pawo." 
Ezekiel20:23 Ndakavasimudzirawo ruoko rwangu murenje, kuti ndichavaparadzira pakati pamarudzi nokuvadzingira kunyika dzose;" 
Ezekiel20:24 nokuti havana kuita zvandakavarayira, asi vakaramba mitemo yangu, nokumhura maSabata angu, meso avo akatarira zvifananidzo zvamadzibaba avo." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ndakavapawo mitemo yakanga isina kunaka, nezvakarayirwa zvavakanga vasingagoni kurarama nazvo;" 
Ezekiel20:26 ndikavasvibisa nezvipo zvavo, zvavakapinza mumoto zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chizvaro, kuti ndivaparadze, vagoziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel20:27 Naizvozvo Mwanakomana womunhu, taura neimba yaIsiraeri, uti kwavari, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, Madzibaba enyu akandimhurawo pachinhu ichi, kuti vakandidarikira.'" 
Ezekiel20:28 Nokuti ndakati ndavaisa kunyika, yandakavasimudzira ruoko kuti ndichavapa iyo, vakatsvaka zvikomo zvose zvirefu nemiti yose mikobvu, vakabayirapo zvibayiro zvavo, vakauyapo nezvipo zvavo zvainditsamwisa; ndipowo pavakaita bwema hwavo hunonhuhwira, vakadururirapo zvipiriso zvavo zvinodururwa." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ipapo ndikati kwavari, `Ko nzvimbo yakakwirira kwamunoenda, inoti kudiniko?' Naizvozvo zita rayo rinonzi `Bhama' kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
Ezekiel20:30 Naizvozvo chiti kuimba yaIsiraeri, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ko munozvisvibisa sezvakaita madzibaba enyu here? Munopata muchitevera zvinonyangadza zvavo here?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Kana muchiuya nezvipo zvenyu, kana muchipinza vanakomana venyu mumoto, munozvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvenyu kusvikira zuva ranhasi here? Zvino ndingabvunzwa nemwi here, imwi imba yaIsiraeri? Noupenyu hwangu,' ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, handidi kubvunzwa nemi;" 
Ezekiel20:32 izvo zvinopinda mumirangariro yenyu hazvingatongoitiki chose, zvamunoti, `Tinoda kufanana namamwe marudzi, navanhu vedzimwe nyika, vanoshumira matanda namabwe." 
Ezekiel20:33 Noupenyu hwangu,' ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha. Zvirokwazvo ndichava mambo wenyu nechanza chine simba noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, uye nehasha dzakadururwa." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndichakubudisai pakati pamarudzi, nokukuwunganidzai kunyika kwamakanga makaparadzirwa, nechanza chine simba noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, uye nehasha dzakadururwa;" 
Ezekiel20:35 ndichakuisai kurenje ramarudzi avanhu, ndigokutongaipo, tichionana nameso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Sezvandakatonga madzibaba enyu murenje renyika yeIjipiti, saizvozvo ndichakutongai imi,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndichakuverengai netsvimbo yomufudzi, nokukuisai muchisungo chesungano;" 
Ezekiel20:38 ndichabvisa pakati penyu vakandimukira simba navakandidarikira, ndichavabudisa panyika pavagere vari vatorwa, asi havangapindi munyika yaIsiraeri; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel20:39 Kana murimi, imba yaIsiraeri, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha endai imwi mundoshumira mumwe nomumwe zvifananidzo zvake, asi pashure muchanditeerera; hamuchazomhuri zita rangu dzvene nezvipo zvenyu uye nezvifananidzo zvenyu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Nokuti pagomo rangu dzvene, pagomo rakakwirira raIsiraeri, ndipo pandichashumirwa munyika neimba yose yaIsiraeri, ivo vose; ndipo pandichavagamuchira, ndipo pandichareva zvibayiro zvenyu, nezvitsva zvezvipo zvenyu, pamwechete nezvinhu zvenyu zvose zvitsvene." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ndichakugamuchirai sobwema hunonhuhwira, panguva yandinokubudisai pakati pamarudzi avanhu, ndichikuunganidzai panyika kwamakanga makaparadzirwa; ndichazviratidza kwamuri ndiri Mutsvene pamberi pamarudzi avanhu." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichikuisai munyika yaIsiraeri, kunyika yandakasimudzira madzibaba enyu ruoko rwangu ndichiti ndichavapa iyo." 
Ezekiel20:43 Zvino mucharangarirapo nzira dzenyu, nezvose zvamakaita, zvamakazvisvibisa nazvo; muchazvisema pamusoro pezvakaipa zvenyu zvose zvamakaita." 
Ezekiel20:44 Zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichikuitirai izvozvo nokuda kwezita rangu, ndisingaiti zvakafanira nzira dzenyu dzakaipa kana zvakafanira zvakaora zvamakaita, imwi imba yaIsiraeri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel20:45 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel20:46 Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kurutivi rwezasi, udonhedze shoko rako kurutivi rwezasi, uporofite pamusoro pedondo romusango kurutivi rwezasi;" 
Ezekiel20:47 uti kudondo kurutivi rwezasi, `Inzwa shoko raJehovha, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, tarira, ndichabatidza moto mukati mako, uchapedza muti mumwe nomumwe mutema mukati mako, nomuti mumwe nomumwe wakaoma; murazvo unopfuta haungadzimwi, asi zviso zvose kubva kurutivi rwezasi kusvikira kurutivi rwokumusoro zvichapiswa nawo." 
Ezekiel20:48 Vanhu vose vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndini ndakaubatidza; haungadzimwi.' 
Ezekiel20:49 Ipapo ndikati, `Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha! ' Vanoti pamusoro pangu, `Ko haazi mutauri wemifananidzo here?' """ 
Ezekiel21:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel21:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kurutivi rweJerusaremu, udonhedze shoko rako kurutivi rwenzvimbo tsvene, uporofite pamusoro penyika yaIsiraeri," 
Ezekiel21:3 uti kunyika yaIsiraeri, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, ndichavhomora munondo wangu mumuhara wawo, ndichaparadza pakati penyu vakarurama navakaipa." 
Ezekiel21:4 Zvino zvandichaparadza pakati penyu vakarurama navakaipa, munondo wangu uchabuda mumuhara wawo kundorwa nevanhu vose kubva kurutivi rwezasi kusvikira kurutivi rwokumusoro;" 
Ezekiel21:5 vanhu vose vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakavhomora munondo wangu mumuhara wawo; hauchazodzokeripozve. 
Ezekiel21:6 Naizvozvo, gomera, iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, gomera pamberi pavo, chiuno chako chivhunike nokuchema kukuru kuvepo.'" 
Ezekiel21:7 Zvino kana vachiti kwauri, `Unogomera neiko?' Uti kwavari, `Nemhaka yamashoko, nokuti anouya; moyo mumwe nomumwe uchanyauka, maoko ose achashayiwa simba, mweya mumwe nomumwe uchati rukutu, mabvi ose achashayiwa simba semvura; tarirai, anouya, achaitika,' "" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel21:8 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel21:9 Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita, uti, zvanzi naJehovha, iti `Munondo, munondo! Warodzwa, wabwinyiswa;" 
Ezekiel21:10 warodzwa, kuti uuraye, wabwinyiswa, kuti uve semheni; zvino isu tingagofara here? Itsvimbo yohushe yomwanakomana wangu, inozvidza miti yose.'" 
Ezekiel21:11 Wakapiwa kuti ubwinyiswe, kuti ubatwe nawo; munondo warodzwa, zvirokwazvo wabwinyiswa, kuti uiswe muruoko rwomuurayi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Chema, uungudze, iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, nokuti iwe uri pamusoro pavanhu vangu, uri pamusoro pamachinda ose aIsiraeri, akaiswa kumunondo pamwechete navanhu vangu; naizvozvo uzvirove pahudyu." 
Ezekiel21:13 Nokuti kuidzwa kwavapo; zvino todiniko kana iwo munondo, unozvidza, waperawo? Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel21:14 Zvino Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita, rovanya maoko ako; munondo ngauwedzerwe kusvikira katatu, iwo munondo wavakakuvadzwa zvikuru; ndiwo munondo womukuru, wakakuvadzwa zvikuru, unovamanikidza." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ndakaisa munondo wakavhomorwa pamisuo yavo yose, kuti moyo yavo inyauswe, nokugumburwa kwavo kuwande; aiwa! Wakaitwa semheni, wakatesvererwa kuuraya." 
Ezekiel21:16 Zvirongedze, iwe munondo, enda kurudyi, zvigadzire uende kuruboshwe, kose kunotarira mativi ako akarodzwa." 
Ezekiel21:17 Neniwo ndicharovanya maoko angu, ndichanyaradza hasha dzangu; ini Jehovha, ndakazvitaura.""" 
Ezekiel21:18 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel21:19 Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, chizvitarira nzira mbiri, dzingauya nadzo munondo wamambo weBhabhironi idzedzo mbiri dzinofanira kubva kunyika imwe; zvino uveze ruoko, uruvezere pakuvamba kwenzira inoenda kuguta." 
Ezekiel21:20 Utare nzira, ingauya nawo munondo, kusvikira Rabha ravana vaAmoni, naJudha mukati meJerusaremu rakakombwa norusvingo." 
Ezekiel21:21 Nokuti mambo weBhabhironi akanga amire pamharadzano dzenzira, pakuvamba kwenzira mbiri, kuti abvunze nokuuka, akazunungusa miseve, akabvunza terafimi, ndokucherekedza chiropa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Muruoko rwake rworudyi makanga mune zvakaukwa pamusoro peJerusaremu, kuti vaise zvokugumura, vashamise muromo unodanira kuuraya, vadanidzire kwazvo namanzwi, vaise zvokugumura pamasuo, vatutire mirwi yokurwa, vavakire nhare dzokurwa." 
Ezekiel21:23 Asi zvichava kwavari sokuuka kwenhema pamberi pavo, ivo vakavapikira mhiko; asi iye acharangarira kusarurama kwavo, kuti vabatwe." 
Ezekiel21:24 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Zvamakandiyeudzira zvakaipa zvenyu, kudarika kwenyu zvakwakafukurwa, zvivi zvenyu zvichionekwa pane zvose zvamunoita, zvamakarangarirwa, muchabatwa noruoko.'" 
Ezekiel21:25 Zvino iwe, iwe wakaipa, wakakuvadzwa zvikuru, muchinda waIsiraeri, wakasvikirwa nezuva rako panguva yezvakaipa zvokupedzisira," 
Ezekiel21:26 zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Ngowani yohuprista inofanira kubva, korona inofanira kubva, hazvingarambi zviripo; kwiridzai zviri pasi, muderedze zviri kumusoro.'" 
Ezekiel21:27 Matongo, matongo, ndichazviita matongo, nezvizvi hazvingarambi zviripo, kusvikira iye mwene wazvo achisvika; ndichamupa iye izvo." 
Ezekiel21:28 Zvino iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, chiporofita, uti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha pamusoro pavana vaAmoni, pamusoro pokushorwa kwavo; iwe uti, `Munondo, munondo wavhomorwa, wabwinyisirwa kuuraya, kuti upedze, uve semheni,'" 
Ezekiel21:29 vachikuonera zvakaratidzwa zvenhema, vachikuvukira nhema, kuti uiswe pamitsipa yavakaipa vakakuvadzwa zvikuru, vasvikirwa nezuva ravo panguva yezvakaipa zvokupedzisira." 
Ezekiel21:30 Ngaudzoserwe mumuhara wawo. Apo pawakasikwa iwe, panyika yawakaberekerwa, ndipo pandichakutonga." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndichadurura kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pako, ndichafuridzira pamusoro pako nomoto wehasha dzangu, ndichakuisa mumaoko avanhu vanopenga, vanoziva kwazvo kuparadza." 
Ezekiel21:32 Iwe uchava huni dzomoto; ropa rako richava pakati penyika; hauchazorangarirwi, nokuti ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura.""" 
Ezekiel22:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel22:2 Zvino iwe Mwanakomana womunhu, tonga, chitonga guta reropa, urizivise zvinonyangadza zvaro zvose." 
Ezekiel22:3 Uti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Iwe guta, rinoteura ropa mukati maro, kuti nguva yaro isvike, rinozviitira zvifananidzo, kuti risvibiswe nazvo!'" 
Ezekiel22:4 Wapara mhaka nokuda kweropa rako rawakateura, wasvibiswa nezvifananidzo zvawakaita; waswededza mazuva ako, wasvika pamakore ako; naizvozvo ndakakuita chinhu chinoshorwa pamberi pamamwe marudzi, nechinosekwa nenyika dzose." 
Ezekiel22:5 Vari pedo newe, navari kure, vachakuseka, iwe unezita rakasvibiswa, uzere nebope." 
Ezekiel22:6 Tarira, machinda aIsiraeri akapinda mukati mako, mumwe nomumwe nesimba rake, kuzoteura ropa." 
Ezekiel22:7 Baba namai vakazvidzwa mukati mako, vatorwa vakamanikidzwa mukati mako, nherera nechirikadzi dzakaitirwa zvakaipa mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:8 Iwe wakashora zvinhu zvangu zvitsvene, wakamhura maSabata angu." 
Ezekiel22:9 Vanhu vana makuhwa vakapinda mukati mako kuzoteura ropa, vakadya pamusoro pamakomo mukati mako, vakaita zvinonyadzisa mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:10 Vakafukura kunyadza kwamadzibaba avo mukati mako, vakaninipisa mukati mako mukadzi wakanga asina kunaka nokuva kumwedzi kwake." 
Ezekiel22:11 Mumwe akaita zvinonyangadza nomukadzi womunun'una wake, mumwe wakachinyira mukadzi womwana wake, mumwezve mukati mako wakaninipisa hanzvadzi yake, mukunda wababa vake." 
Ezekiel22:12 Vakagamuchira zvipo mukati mako kuzoteura ropa; iwe wakatora mhindu yemari neyemichero, wakazvifumisa uchimanikidza wokwako, ukandikangamwa,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel22:13 Naizvozvo, tarira, ndakarovanya maoko angu pamusoro pefuma yako yawakawana nokunyengera, napamusoro peropa rako rakanga riri mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:14 Ko moyo wako ungatsunga, kana maoko ako angasimba here pamazuva andichakutonga? Ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, ndichazviita." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndichakuparadzira pakati pamarudzi, nokukudzingira kunyika dzose; ndichapedza tsvina yako mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:16 Uchazvimhurisa pamberi pamamwe marudzi; zvino uchazoziva kuti ndini Jehovha. 
Ezekiel22:17 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel22:18 Mwanakomana womunhu, imba yaIsiraeri yaita samarara kwandiri; vose vakaita sendarira netini nedare nomutobvu mukati mevira; vakaita samarara esirivha" 
Ezekiel22:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Mose zvamava marara, naizvozvo, tarirai, ndichakuunganidzirai mukati meJerusaremu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Sezvavanounganidzira sirivha nendarira nedare nomutobvu netini mukati mevira, kuti vapfutidzire moto pamusoro pazvo, vazvinyause, saizvozvo ndichakuunganidzai nokutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu, ndikuiseimo, ndikunyausei." 
Ezekiel22:21 Zvirokwazvo, ndichakuunganidzai, nokupfutidza moto wehasha dzangu pamusoro penyu; muchanyauswa mukati maro." 
Ezekiel22:22 Sirivha sezvainonyauswa mukati mevira, saizvozvo imwi muchanyauswa mukati maro; zvino muchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndakadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro penyu.'" 
Ezekiel22:23 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel22:24 Mwanakomana womunhu uti kwairi, `Iwe uri nyika isina kunatswa, isina kunisirwa mvura nezuva reshungu dzangu.'" 
Ezekiel22:25 Vaporofita vayo vakaita rangano mukati mayo; seshumba inoomba ichibvanzura chayabata, saizvozvo vakapedza mweya yavanhu; vakatora fuma nezvinokosha, vakawanza chirikadzi mukati mayo." 
Ezekiel22:26 Vaprista vayo vakaparadza murayiro wangu, vakamhura zvinhu zvangu zvitsvene; havana kutsaura pakati pezvitsvene nezvisati zviri zvitsvene, kana kuzivisa vanhu kusiyana kwezvisina kunaka nezvakanaka, vakatsinzina meso avo varege kuona maSabata angu; ini ndamhurwa pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Machinda ayo mukati mayo vakafanana namapere anobvanzura zvaabata, vachiteura ropa nokuparadza mweya, kuti vawane fuma vachinyengera." 
Ezekiel22:28 Vaporofita vayo vakavayuwira nesuko, vachiona zvinonyengera nokuvaukira zvenhema vachiti, `Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, izvo Jehovha haana kutaura.'" 
Ezekiel22:29 Vanhu venyika vakamanikidza nokupamba; zvirokwazvo vakatambudza varombo navanoshayiwa, vakamanikidza mutorwa asina mhaka hake." 
Ezekiel22:30 Zvino ndakatsvaka pakati pavo munhu angagadzira rusvingo, angamira pakakoromoka pamberi pangu achirwira nyika, kuti ndirege kuiparadza; asi handina kuwana nomumwe." 
Ezekiel22:31 Naizvozvo ndakadurura shungu dzangu pamusoro pavo; ndakavapedza nomoto wehasha dzangu; ndakauyisa zvavakaita pamisoro yavo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel23:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel23:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, kwakanga kuna vakadzi vaviri, vanasikana vamai vamwe;" 
Ezekiel23:3 ivo vakapata muIjipiti, vakapata vachiri vaduku; mazamu avo akanyangatwa ipapo, minyato yohumhandara hwavo yakabatwa-batwapo." 
Ezekiel23:4 Mazita avo akanga ari Ohora, mukuru, naOhoribha munun'una wake; ivo vakazova vangu, vakabereka vanakomana navanasikana. Zvino kana ari mazita avo, Samaria ndiOhora, Jerusaremu ndiOhoribha." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ohora wakapata, ari wangu, akadana navadikamwi vake, ivo vaAsiria vaigara pedo naye," 
Ezekiel23:6 vaifuka micheka mitema, vaiva vabati namadzishe, ose ari majaya anodikamwa, vatasvi vaifamba namabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:7 Iye akapata navo, ivo varume vakatsaurwa vose pakati peAsiria, zvino waizvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvavose vaidikamwa naye." 
Ezekiel23:8 Uye haana kuzorega kupata kwake kwaakabva nako Ijipiti; nokuti varume vakavata naye achiri muduku, vakabatabata minyato yohumhandara hwake, vakadurura hupombwe hwavo pamusoro pake." 
Ezekiel23:9 Naizvozvo ndakamuisa mumaoko avadikamwi vake, mumaoko avaAsiria, vaakadana navo." 
Ezekiel23:10 Ivo vakafukura kunyadza kwake, vakatora vanakomana navanasikana vake, vakamuuraya iye nomunondo, zita rake rikazosekwa pakati pavakadzi; nokuti vakamutonga." 
Ezekiel23:11 Zvino munun'una wake Ohoribha wakazviona hake, kunyange zvakadaro iye wakanga akanyanya pakudana kwake navadikamwi, uye kupata kwake kwakapfuura kupata komukuru wake." 
Ezekiel23:12 Iye akadana navaAsiria, vaiva vabati namadzishe, vaigara pedo naye, vakafuka zvakaisvonaka kwazvo, vari vatasvi vanofamba namabhiza, ose ari majaya anodikamwa." 
Ezekiel23:13 Zvino ndakaona kuti wasvibiswa; ivo vose vakafamba nenzira imwe. 
Ezekiel23:14 Akawedzera kupata kwake; nokuti wakaona zvifananidzo zvavarume pamadziro, zviri zvifananidzo zvaKaradhea, zvakaitwa nomuti mutsvuku," 
Ezekiel23:15 vakasunga zviuno zvavo nebhanhire, vane ngowani dzemicheka pamisoro yavo, vose vakaita samachinda kana vachionekwa, vakafanana navaBhabhironi paKaradhea, iyo nyika yokuberekwa kwavo." 
Ezekiel23:16 Zvino wakati achivaona, akavada kwazvo, akatuma nhume kwavari paKaradhea." 
Ezekiel23:17 VaBhabhironi vakauya kwaari ari panhovo dzorudo, vakamusvibisa nohupombwe hwavo, iye akasvibiswa pamwechete navo, mweya wake ukazorambana navo." 
Ezekiel23:18 Zvino wakati afukura kupata kwake, nokufukura kunyadza kwake, mweya wangu ukarambana naye, mweya wangu sezvawakarambana nomukuru wake." 
Ezekiel23:19 Kunyange zvakadaro akaramba achiwedzera kupata kwake, achirangarira mazuva ohuduku hwake, aakapata nawo panyika yeljipiti." 
Ezekiel23:20 Akadana zvikuru navadikamwi vake, vane nyama yakaita senyama yembongoro, uye zvinobudiswa navo zvakaita sezvinobudiswa namabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:21 Zvino ukayeudzwa zvakashata zvohuduku hwako, panguva yawakabatwa-batwa minyato yako navaIjipiti nokuda kwamazamu ohumhandara hwako." 
Ezekiel23:22 Naizvozvo iwe Ohoribha, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha tarira, ndichakumutsira vadikamwi vako, vakazorambwa nomweya wako, ndichavauyisa kwauri kuzorwa newe kumativi ose;" 
Ezekiel23:23 vanoti, vaBhabhironi, navaKaradhea vose, Pekodhi naShoa naKoa, navaAsiria pamwechete navo, iwo majaya anodikamwa, vose vari vabati namadzishe, machinda navarume vane mbiri, vose vakatasva mabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:24 Vachauya kuzorwa newe nenhumbi dzokurwa, nengoro, nezvinofamba namakumbo engoro, neboka ravanhu vazhinji; vachazvirongedza kuzorwa newe nenhovo huru nenhovo duku nengowani kumativi ose; ini ndichavapa simba rokutonga, vakutonge nokutonga kwavo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndichamutsa godo rangu kuzorwa newe, ivo vakuitire hasha; vachabvisa mhino dzako nenzeve dzako, vakasara kwauri vachaurawa nomunondo, vachatora vanakomana vako navanasikana vako; vakasara kwauri vachapera nomoto." 
Ezekiel23:26 Vachakubvisirawo nguvo dzako, nokukutorera hukomba hwako hwakanaka." 
Ezekiel23:27 Saizvozvo ndichakugumisira zvakashata zvako nokupata kwako kwawakabva nako kunyika yeIjipiti, kuti urege kuzozvitarirazve nameso ako, kana kuzorangarira Ijipiti." 
Ezekiel23:28 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ndichakuisa mumaoko avaunovenga, mumaoko aivo vakarambwa nomweya wako;" 
Ezekiel23:29 ivo vachakuitira ruvengo, vachakutorera zvose zvawakabatira, vakakurega usina chawakafuka wakashama; kunyadza kokupata kwako kuchafukurwa, zvakaipa zvako pamwechete nokupata kwako.'" 
Ezekiel23:30 Uchaitirwa zvinhu izvi nemhaka yokuti wakapata namarudzi avanhu, uye nemhaka yokuti wakasvibiswa nezvifananidzo zvavo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Iwe wakafamba nenzira yomukuru wako; saka ndichaisa mukombe wake muruoko rwako. 
Ezekiel23:32 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Uchamwira pamukombe womukuru wako, wakadzika mukuru; uchasekwa nokudadirwa, nokuti iwe une zvizhinji zvirimo." 
Ezekiel23:33 Uchazara nokubatwa nokuchema; mukombe womukuru wako Samaria mukombe wokushamiswa nokuparadzwa. 
Ezekiel23:34 Uchaumwa nokuupedza chose, uchatsenga zvaenga zvawo, nokubvanzura mazamu ako; nokuti ndini ndakataura izvozvo,' "" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel23:35 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Zvawakandikangamwa, ukandirasira shure kwako, naizvozvo chiva nemhosva yezvakashata zvako, neyokupata kwako.""" 
Ezekiel23:36 Jehovha akatiwo kwandiri, ""Mwanakomana womunhu, chitonga Ohora naOhoribha, uvazivise zvinonyangadza zvavo." 
Ezekiel23:37 Nokuti wakafeva, ropa riri pamaoko avo; wakafeva nezvifananidzo zvavo; vakapinzawo vanakomana vavo vavakandiberekera mumoto, kuti zvidyiwe nazvo." 
Ezekiel23:38 Vakandiitirawo chinhu ichi, vakasvibisawo nzvimbo yangu tsvene nezuva iro, vakamhura maSabata angu." 
Ezekiel23:39 Nokuti vakati vabayira zvifananidzo zvavo vana vavo, vakapinda nezuva iro munzvimbo yangu tsvene kuti vaimhure; tarirai, ndizvo zvavakaita mukati meimba yangu." 
Ezekiel23:40 Makatumawo nhume kundodana varume vanobva kure nhume yakatumwako kwavari ivo vakauya, iwe ukazvishamba nokuda kwavo, ukazodza meso ako nomuti, nokuzvishongedza nezvishongo," 
Ezekiel23:41 ukagara panhovo dzakaisvonaka, dzakanga dzakagadzirirwa tafura pamberi padzo, pawakagadzika zvinonhuhwira zvangu namafuta angu." 
Ezekiel23:42 Inzwi ravazhinji vakanga vachifara rakanga rinaye; zvino pamwechete navarume vakabva kuvazhinji, vakauya navakariri vedoro, vaibva kurenje, vakaisa zvishongo pamaoko avo, nekorona dzakanaka pamisoro yavo.""" 
Ezekiel23:43 Zvino ndakati kuna iye akanga apera nokufeva kwake, ""Zvino vachaita hupombwe naye, naiye navo." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ipapo vakapinda kwaari, sezvavanopinda kuchifeve; saizvozvo vakapinda kuna Ohora naOhoribha, ivo vakadzi vakashata." 
Ezekiel23:45 Naizvozvo varume vakarurama vachavatonga sezvinotongwa zvifeve, sezvinotongwa vakadzi vakateura ropa, nokuti zvifeve, ropa riri pamaoko avo.""" 
Ezekiel23:46 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Ndichauyisa boka ravarwi kuzorwa navo, ndichavaregera kuti vadzungaidzwe kose-kose vapambwe." 
Ezekiel23:47 Boka iro richavataka namabwe, nokuvabaya neminondo yavo; vachauraya vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo, nokupisa dzimba dzavo nomoto." 
Ezekiel23:48 Saizvozvo ndichagumisa zvakashata panyika, kuti vakadzi vose vadzidziswe kuti varege kutevera zvakashata zvenyu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Vachakutsivirai zvakashata zvenyu, imwi muchava nezvivi zvezvifananidzo zvenyu, zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel24:1 Zvino negore repfumbamwe, nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva regumi romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel24:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, nyora zita nezuva, rezuva iro rino. Mambo weBhabhironi akaswedera Jerusaremu nezuva irero." 
Ezekiel24:3 Ureve mufananidzo kuimba inondimukira, uti kwavari zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Gadza gate, rigadze, udirewo mvura mariri;" 
Ezekiel24:4 unganidziramo nhindi dzaro, ndindi dzose dzakanaka, chidya nebandauko, rizadze namapfupa akasanangurwa." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tora rakasanangurwa pakati pamakwai, nesvinga rehuni pasi pamapfupa, rivirise kwazvo, mapfupa aro abikwe mukati maro.' """ 
Ezekiel24:6 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Guta reropa rine nhamo, negate rine ngura mukati maro, risina kubvisirwa ngura yaro! Budisamo nhindi imwe neimwe; rigere kutongerwa." 
Ezekiel24:7 Nokuti ropa raro riri mukati maro, rakariisa paruware rusine chinhu, harina kuridururira pasi, kuti ririfukidze neguruva." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ndakaisa ropa raro paruware rusine chinhu, rirege kufukidzwa, kuti hasha dzangu dzimutswe kuzotsiva.""" 
Ezekiel24:9 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Guta rine ropa, rine nhamo! Ndichakurisawo svinga rehuni." 
Ezekiel24:10 Tutirai huni, pfutidzai moto, bikai nyama zvakanaka, kodzai muto, mapfupa atsve." 
Ezekiel24:11 Zvino urigadze pamazimbe awo risina chiro, ripise, ndarira yaro itsvuke, matsvina aro anyauke mukati maro, kuti ngura yaro ipere." 
Ezekiel24:12 Rakandinetsa nokubata zvikuru; kunyange zvakadaro ngura yaro haibvi mukati maro; ngura yaro ngaiiswe mumoto! 
Ezekiel24:13 Tsvina yako ine zvakashata; zvandakakunatsa, ukasanatswa, haungazonatswi patsvina yako, kusvikira ndanyaradza hasha dzangu pamusoro pako." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, zvichaitika, ini ndichazviita, handingadzoki, handingapembedzi, kana kuzvidemba; vachakutonga sezvakafanira nzira dzako, sezvakafanira zvawakaita,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel24:15 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikawo kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel24:16 Mwanakomana womunhu, tarira, ndinokutorera pakarepo norufu unodikamwa nameso ako, asi haufaniri kuchema kana kuungudza, nemisodzi yako haifaniri kuyerera." 
Ezekiel24:17 Gomera, asi ngazvirege kunzwika, usachema wakafa; sungira zvishongo mumusoro wako, upfeke shangu dzako patsoka dzako; usapfumbira muromo wako, kana kudya zvokudya zvavanhu.""" 
Ezekiel24:18 Ipapo ndakataura navanhu mangwanani, madekwana mukadzi wangu akafa, ndikaita mangwanani sezvandakarayirwa." 
Ezekiel24:19 Zvino vanhu vakati kwandiri, ""Ko haungatiudziwo kuti zvinhu izvi zvinoti kudini kwatiri, zvaunoita zvakadaro here?""" 
Ezekiel24:20 Zvino ndikati kwavari, ""Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Taura neimba yaIsiraeri,' uti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha `Tarirai, ndichamhura imba yangu tsvene, yamunozvikudza nayo muchiti isimba renyu, inodikamwa nameso enyu, inonzwirwa tsitsi nemweya yenyu; vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vamakasiya, vachaurawa nomunondo.'" 
Ezekiel24:22 Ipapo muchaita sezvandakaita ini, hamungapfumbiri miromo yenyu, kana kudya zvokudya zvavanhu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Zvishongo zvenyu zvichava pamisoro yenyu, neshangu dzenyu patsoka dzenyu; hamungachemi kana kuungudza, asi muchapera muzvakaipa zvenyu, muchigomerana." 
Ezekiel24:24 Saizvozvo Ezekieri achava chiratidzo kwamuri; zvose zvaakaita iye, nemwi muchazviitawo; kana zvichisvika, muchaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel24:25 Zvino kana uriwe, mwanakomana womunhu, nomusi wandichavatorera simba ravo, ivo mufaro wechakanaka chavo, chinodikamwa nameso avo, icho chinodikamwa nemweya yavo, vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo," 
Ezekiel24:26 ko nomusi uyo unopukunyuka haangauyi kwauri kuti akuudze izvozvo munzeve dzako here? 
Ezekiel24:27 Nomusi uyo muromo wako uchashamisirwa wakapukunyuka, uchataura, haungazovi mbeveve; saizvozvo uchava chiratidzo kwavari; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel25:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel25:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kuvana vaAmoni, uporofite pamusoro pavo;" 
Ezekiel25:3 Uti kuvana vaAmoni, ""Inzwai shoko raIshe Jehovha,' zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, imwi zvamakati, `Toko!' Pamusoro penzvimbo yangu tsvene, panguva yokumhurwa kwayo, napamusoro penyika yaIsiraeri panguva yokuitwa kwayo dongo, napamusoro peimba yaJudha, panguva yokutapwa kwavo;" 
Ezekiel25:4 naizvozvo tarirai, ndichakuisai kuvana vamabvazuva muve vavo, vachaisa misasa yavo pakati penyu, vachavaka dzimba dzavo pakati penyu; vachadya michero yenyu, nokumwa mukaka wenyu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Rabha ndichariita mafuro emakamera, nenyika yavana vaAmoni nzvimbo inovata makwai; zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel25:6 Nokuti zvanzi nalshe Jehovha, `Zvamakarovanya maoko enyu, nokutsikisa netsoka dzenyu, mukafara pamusoro penyika yaIsiraeri muchivazvidza nemweya yenyu yose;" 
Ezekiel25:7 zvino tarirai, ndakatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro penyu, ndichakuisai kumarudzi muve sechinhu chakapambwa; ndichakubvisai pakati pamarudzi, ndichakupedzai panyika dzose; ndichakuparadzai, zvino muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.' """ 
Ezekiel25:8 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Moabhu naSeiri zvavanoti, `Tarirai, imba yaJudha yakafanana namarudzi ose,'" 
Ezekiel25:9 naizvozvo, tarirai, ndichazarura rutivi rwenyika yaMoabhu kubva kumaguta, kubva kumaguta aro ari kumiganho yaro, ihwo hukomba bwenyika, anoti: Bhetijeshimoti neBhaarimeoni neKiriataimi," 
Ezekiel25:10 ndichazvipa vana vokumabvazuva, pamwechete navana vaAmoni, ive yavo, kuti vana vaAmoni varege kuzorangarirwa pakati pamarudzi;" 
Ezekiel25:11 ndichatonga Moabhu; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. 
Ezekiel25:12 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Edhomu zvavakatsiva imba yaJudha, vakapara mhaka kwazvo, vakazvitsivira kwavari;" 
Ezekiel25:13 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro paEdhomu, ndichaparadzapo vanhu nezvipfuwo, ndichaiita dongo kubva paTemani, vachaurawa nomunondo kusvikira paDhedhani.'" 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndichazvitsivira kuna Edhomu namaoko avanhu vangu Isiraeri; vachaitira Edhomu zvakarehwa nokutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu, vachaziva kutsiva kwangu,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel25:15 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""VaFirisitia zvavakazvitsivira, vakatsiva vachizvidza nemweya yavo, vachida kuparadza nokuvenga kusingaperi," 
Ezekiel25:16 naizvozvo, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Tarirai, ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu pamusoro pavaFirisitia, ndichabvisa vaKereti nokuparadza vakasara pamhenderekedzo dzegungwa." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndichazvitsivira kwavari nokutsiva kukuru nokutuka kwehasha; vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichiuyisa kutsiva kwangu pamusoro pavo.' """ 
Ezekiel26:1 Zvino negore regumi nerimwe, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel26:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, Tire zvarakati pamusoro peJerusaremu, `Toko waro! Raputsika, iro raiva suo ramarudzi; roringira kwandiri, zvino ini ndichazadzwazve, iro zvaraitwa dongo.'" 
Ezekiel26:3 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, iwe Tire, ndichauyisa marudzi mazhinji kuzorwa newe, sezvinouyisa gungwa mafungu aro." 
Ezekiel26:4 Vachaparadza masvingo eTire, nokukoromora shongwe dzaro; ndicharitsvairira guruva raro, riite soruware rusine chinhu." 
Ezekiel26:5 Richava nzvimbo panonikwa mimbure pakati pegungwa, nokuti ndakazvitaura ini,' ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; richava kumarudzi sechinhu chakapambwa." 
Ezekiel26:6 Vakunda varo vari kuruwa vachaurawa nomunondo; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. 
Ezekiel26:7 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Tarirai, ndichauyisira Tire Nebhukadhirezari mambo weBhabhironi, mambo wamadzimambo, achibva kurutivi rwokumusoro ana mabhiza nengoro navatasvi vamabhiza, nehondo navanhu vazhinji." 
Ezekiel26:8 Iye achauraya nomunondo vakunda vako vari kuruwa, achakuvakira nhare dzokurwa newe, nokukututira murwi wokurwa." 
Ezekiel26:9 Achamisa zvokugumura pamasvingo ako, achakoromora shongwe dzako nematombo." 
Ezekiel26:10 Nokuwanda kwamabhiza ake guruva rawo richakufukidza; masvingo ako achadengenyeka nomutsindo wavatasvi vamabhiza, namakumbo engoro, nengoro, panguva yaachapinda pamasuo ako, somupindirwo weguta rakakoromorerwa rusvingo." 
Ezekiel26:11 Achatsika nzira dzako dzose dzomuguta namahwanda amabhiza ake, achauraya vanhu vako nomunondo, neshongwe dzinoratidza simba renyu dzichawira pasi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Vachapamba fuma yako nokukutorera zvokushambadzira zvako, vachakoromora masvingo ako, nokuparadza dzimba dzako dzinofadza; vachaisa mabwe ako namatanda ako neguruva rako mukati memvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndichagumisa manzwi enziyo dzako, kurira kwembira dzako hakungazonzwiki." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndichakuita ruware rusine chinhu, uchava nzvimbo panonikwa mimbure; hauchazovakwizve, nokuti ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Ezekiel26:15 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kuTire, ""Ko zviwi hazvingadengenyeki here nokutinhira kokuwa kwako, kana vanhu vako vakakuvadzwa vachigomera, kana vanhu vachiurawa mukati mako here?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Nenguva iyo machinda ose okugungwa achaburuka pazvigaro zvawo zvovushe, vachaisa pasi nguvo dzavo dzovushe nokubvisa zvokufuka zvavo zvakarukwa; vachafuka kudedera, vachagara pasi vachingodedera vachishamiswa pamusoro pako." 
Ezekiel26:17 Vachaita mariro pamusoro pako, vachiti kwauri, `Aiwa, wakaparadzwa sei, iwe wakanga wakagarwa navanhu vaiziva kufamba negungwa, iro guta rakanga rine mbiri, rakanga rine simba pagungwa, iro navanhu varo, vaityisa vose vagereko.'" 
Ezekiel26:18 Zvino zviwi zvichadengenyeka nezuva rokuwa kwako; zvirokwazvo, zviwi zviri mugungwa zvichavhunduka nokubviswa kwako." 
Ezekiel26:19 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Nenguva yandichakuita guta dongo, sezvakaita maguta asina vanhu, nenguva yandichauyisa gungwa rakadzika pamusoro pako, ukafukidzwa nemvura zhinji;" 
Ezekiel26:20 nenguva iyo ndichakuburusa pamwechete navanoburukira mugomba, kuvanhu vekare; ndichakugarisai panzvimbo dziri pasi dzenyika, pakanga panamatongo kare nakare, pamwechete navanoburukira mugomba, kuti urege kugarwa navanhu; asi ndichaisa mufaro munyika yavapenyu.'" 
Ezekiel26:21 Asi iwe ndichakuita chinhu chinotyisa, haungazovipo; kunyange ukatsvakwa, haungawanikwizve nokusingaperi,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel27:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel27:2 Zvino iwe, Mwanakomana womunhu, ita mariro pamusoro peTire;" 
Ezekiel27:3 uti kuTire, `Nhai iwe ugere pavanopinda pagungwa, iwe unoshambadzirana namarudzi avanhu pazviwi zvizhinji, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha,' iwe Tire, wakati, `Ndakakwana pakunaka.'" 
Ezekiel27:4 Nyika yako iri mumoyo wamakungwa; vavaki vako vakakwanisa kunaka kwako. 
Ezekiel27:5 Vakaita mapuranga ako ose nemisipiresi inobva Seniri; vakatora musidhari weRebhanoni kukuitira danda rechikepe. 
Ezekiel27:6 Matanda ako okukwasva nawo vakaaita nemiouki yeBhashani; vakaita zvigaro zvako pazvikepe nenyanga dzenzou dzakavezerwa mumapuranga emipaini yakabva kuzviwi zveKitimi 
Ezekiel27:7 Maseiri ako aiva omucheka wakaisvonaka, wakasonerwa vukomba, aibva Ijipiti, kuti uve mureza wako; denga rako raiva romucheka mutema nomutsvuku waibva kuzviwi zveErisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 Vakanga vagere Sidhoni neArivhadhi ndivo vaiva vakwasvi vako; vanhu vako vakachenjera, iwe Tire, vakanga vari mukati mako, ndivo vaiva vafambisi vezvikepe zvako." 
Ezekiel27:9 Vakuru veGebhari navakachenjera varo vaiva mukati mako vachikugadzirira paisinirira mvura; zvikepe zvose zvegungwa zvaiva mukati mako pamwechete navafambisi vazvo kuti vashambadzirane newe. 
Ezekiel27:10 Vanhu vePerisia neRudhi nePuti vaiva muhondo yako, vaiva varwi vako; vaiturikira mukati mako nhovo dzavo nengowani dzavo; vaikuitira mbiri." 
Ezekiel27:11 Varume veArivhadhi vaiva pamusoro pamasvingo ako kumativi ose pamwechete nehondo yako, nemhare dzaiva pamusoro peshongwe dzako; vaiturika nhovo dzavo pamasvingo ako kumativi ose, vaikwanisa kunaka kwako." 
Ezekiel27:12 Tarishishi raishambadzirana newe nokuda kwefuma zhinji yamarudzi ose, vakatenga nhumbi dzako nesirivha nedare netini nomutobvu." 
Ezekiel27:13 Nyika dzeJavhani, Tubhari, neMesheki ndivo vaitengerana newe, vaitenga nhumbi dzako nemiviri yavanhu nemidziyo yendarira." 
Ezekiel27:14 Veimba yaTogarima vakatenga nhumbi dzako namabhiza namabhiza ehondo namahesera. 
Ezekiel27:15 Varume veDhedhani ndivo vaitengerana newe; zviwi zvizhinji zvaiva nzvimbo pawaitengesa noruoko rwako; vaiuya nenyanga dzenzou namatanda omushuma kuzotsinhanha newe. 
Ezekiel27:16 Nyika yeSiria yaishambadzirana newe nokuda kwezvizhinji zvako zvakaitwa namaoko; vakatenga nhumbi dzako namabwe esimaragidhino, nomucheka mutema, nezvakarukwa, nomucheka wakaisvonaka, nekorari, namabwe anovaima." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judha nenyika yaIsiraeri ndivo vaitengerana newe; vaitenga nhumbi dzako nezviyo zveMiniti, nezvinotapira, nohuchi, namafuta, nebharisami." 
Ezekiel27:18 Dhamasiko raishambadzirana newe richitenga zvizhinji zvako zvakaitwa namaoko, nokuda kwefuma zhinji yamarudzi ose, newaini yeHeribhoni nemvere chena." 
Ezekiel27:19 Nyika dzeVedhani neJavhani dzakatenga nhumbi dzako nechinda; dare rinobwinya, nekasia, nekaramo ndizvo zvakanga zviri pakati penhumbi dzako." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dhedhani raikutengesera micheka inokosha yokutasvisa mabhiza nayo. 
Ezekiel27:21 Nyika yeArabhia namachinda ose enyika yeKedhari ndivo vaitenga pamaoko enyu; makwayana namakondobwe nembudzi ndizvo zvavaitenga kwauri. 
Ezekiel27:22 Vatengesi veShebha neRaama ndivo vaitengerana newe; vaishambadzira nhumbi dzako nezvinonhuhwira zvakaisvonaka, namabwe ose anokosha, nendarama." 
Ezekiel27:23 Harani neChane neEdheni ivo vatengesi veShebha neAshuri neKirimadhi ndivo vaitengerana newe. 
Ezekiel27:24 Ndivo vaitengerana newe nenhumbi dzakatsaurwa, nenguvo dzemicheka mitema nezvakarukwa, namabhokisi ezvokufuka zvinokosha, akasungwa namabote, akavezwa nemisidhari, pakati penhumbi dzako." 
Ezekiel27:25 Zvikepe zveTarishishi ndizvo zvaitakura nhumbi dzako, iwe ukazadzwa, ukaitirwa mbiri mumoyo yamakungwa." 
Ezekiel27:26 Vakwasvi vako vakakuisa kumvura zhinji; mhepo yokumabvazuva yakakuputsa mumoyo wamakungwa. 
Ezekiel27:27 fuma yako, nenhumbi dzako, nezvokutengesa zvako, vafambisi vezvikepe zvako, navarairi vazvo, navagadziri vako panosinirira mvura, navashambadziri venhumbi dzako, navarwi vako vose, vari mukati mako, navanhu vako vazhinji vari mukati mako, zvose zvichawira mumoyo wamakungwa nezuva rokuparadzwa kwako." 
Ezekiel27:28 Mafungu achadengenyeka nomubvumo wokudanidzira kwavarairi vezvikepe zvako. 
Ezekiel27:29 Vose vanobata namatanda okukwasva, ivo vafambisi navarairi vose vapagungwa, vachaburuka pazvikepe zvavo; vachamira pamhenderekedzo," 
Ezekiel27:30 vachadana namanzwi avo pamusoro pako, vachachema kwazvo; vachikushira guruva pamisoro yavo; vachaumburukira, mumadota;" 
Ezekiel27:31 vachazvivevurira misoro nokuda kwako, vachazvisunga zvivuno namasaga, vachikuchema nemweya ine shungu kwazvo nokuchema kukuru." 
Ezekiel27:32 Pakuchema kwavo vachakuitira mariro, vachachema pamisoro pako, vachiti, `Ndianiko wakatongofanana neTire, wakaita saiye wakaparadzwa mukati megungwa?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Panguva yakaenda nhumbi dzako kumakungwa, wakagutisa vanhu vazhinji; wakafumisa madzimambo enyika nefuma yako zhinji nezvawaitengesa." 
Ezekiel27:34 Panguva yawakaputswa namakungwa mukati memvura zhinji yakadzika, nhumbi dzako navanhu vako vose zvakawira pasi mukati mako." 
Ezekiel27:35 Vose vagere pazviwi vanoshamiswa pamusoro pako, madzimambo avo anotya kwazvo; zviso zvavo zvinodedera." 
Ezekiel27:36 Vatengesi pakati pamarudzi avanhu vanokuridzira muridzo, wava chinhu chinotyisa, haungatongozovipo.' """ 
Ezekiel28:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel28:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, iti kumuchinda weTire, zvanzi nalshe Jehovha, `moyo wako zvawakazvikudza,' iwe ukati, `Ini ndiri mwari, ndigere pachigaro chaMwari pakati pamakungwa,' kunyange zvakadaro, uri munhu hako, hauzi Mwari, kunyange wakamisa moyo wako somoyo waMwari;" 
Ezekiel28:3 tarira, unokunda Dhanyeri pakuchenjera kwako, hakuna chakavanzika chausingazivi iwe;" 
Ezekiel28:4 wakazviwanira fuma nohuchenjeri hwako uye nokuziva kwako, ukazviwanira ndarama nesirivha muzvivigiro zvefuma yako;" 
Ezekiel28:5 wakawedzera fuma yako nohuchenjeri hwako hukuru uye nokushambadzira kwako, moyo wako ukazvikudza nokuda kwefuma yako;" 
Ezekiel28:6 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Zvawakamisa moyo wako somoyo waMwari,'" 
Ezekiel28:7 naizvozvo tarira, ndinouyisa vatorwa pamusoro pako, ivo vanotyisa pakati pamarudzi ose; vachavhomorera kunaka kohuchenjeri hwako minondo yavo, vachasvibisa kubwinya kwako." 
Ezekiel28:8 Vachakuburusira kugomba; uchafa norufu rwavanourawa mumoyo wamakungwa. 
Ezekiel28:9 Ko ungazoreva pamberi pounokuuraya, uchiti, `Ndini Mwari?' Asi uri munhu, hauzi Mwari, muruoko rwaiye unokukuvadza." 
Ezekiel28:10 Uchafa norufu rwousina kudzingiswa namaoko avatorwa, nokuti ndini ndakataura izvozvo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel28:11 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel28:12 Mwanakomana womunhu, itira mambo weTire mariro, uti kwaari, zvanzi nalshe Jehovha, `Iwe wokuisa chisimbiso chako pachiyero, uzere nohuchenjeri, hwakakwana pakunaka.'" 
Ezekiel28:13 Wakanga uri paEdheni, mumunda waMwari; wakanga wakafukidzwa namabwe anokosha amarudzi ose, anoti, saridhio netopasi nedhaimani neberiri, neonikisi nejasipiri nesafiri nesimaragidhino nekaribhunikuri; ngoma dzako nenyere dzako dzakanga dzakaitwa nendarama mukati mako, zvakagadzirwa nezuva rokusikwa kwako." 
Ezekiel28:14 Iwe wakanga uri kerubhi rakazodzwa, raifukidzira areka, ndikakugadza ukava pamusoro pegomo dzvene raMwari; waifamba-famba pakati pamabwe omoto." 
Ezekiel28:15 Wakanga wakakwana panzira dzako kubva pazuva rokusikwa kwako, kusvikira kusarurama kwakawanikwa mukati mako." 
Ezekiel28:16 Nokuwanda kokushambadzira kwako vakazadza mukati mako nokuita nesimba, ukatadza; naizvozvo ndakakudzinga pagomo raMwari ndichiti uri chinhu chinomhurwa, ndikakuparadza, iwe kerubhi raifukidzira areka, ndikakubvisa pakati pamabwe omoto." 
Ezekiel28:17 moyo wako wakazvikudza nokuda kokunaka kwako; wakaodza huchenjeri hwako nokuda kokubwinya kwako; ndakakuwisira pasi, ndakakuisa pamberi pamadzimambo kuti vakuone." 
Ezekiel28:18 Nokuwanda kwezvakaipa zvako, nokusarurama kokushambadzira kwako, wakamhura nzvimbo dzako tsvene; naizvozvo ndakabudisa moto mukati mako; wakakupedza, ndikakushandura ukava madota panyika pamberi pavose vanokuona." 
Ezekiel28:19 Vose, vanokuziva pakati pamarudzi avanhu, vachashamiswa pamusoro pako; wava chinhu chinotyisa, haungazovi chinhu nokusingaperi.""" 
Ezekiel28:20 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel28:21 Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kurutivi rweSidhoni, uporofite pamusoro paro," 
Ezekiel28:22 uti, zvanzi nashe Jehovha, `Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, iwe Sidhoni; ndichakudzwa mukati mako; vanhu vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, nenguva yandinoita mukati maro izvo zvandakatonga, ndichiitwa mutsvene mukati maro.'" 
Ezekiel28:23 Nokuti ndichatuma hosha yakaipa mukati maro, neropa munzira dzaro; vakakuvadzwa vachawira pasi mukati maro, kana munondo uchiuya pamusoro paro kumativi ose; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel28:24 Hapachazovi norukato runobaya imba yaIsiraeri, kana munzwa unokuvadza pakati pavaivakomberedza, vaivashoora; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel28:25 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Nenguva yandinenge ndaunganidza imba yaIsiraeri kumarudzi avanhu kwavakanga vakaparadzirwa, ndikaitwa mutsvene pakati pamberi pamarudzi, nenguva iyo vachagara munyika yavo yandakapa muranda wangu Jakobho." 
Ezekiel28:26 Vachagaramo vakachengetwa; zvirokwazvo, vachavaka dzimba, nokusima minda yemizambiringa, vachagara vakachengetwa, kana ndaita zvandakatonga pamusoro pavose vakavapoteredza vanovashora; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo.""" 
Ezekiel29:1 Zvino negore regumi, nomwedzi wegumi, nezuva regumi namaviri romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel29:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kuna Farao mambo weIjipiti, uporofite pamusoro pake napamusoro peIjipiti rose." 
Ezekiel29:3 Taura uti, zvanzi nalshe Jehovha, `Tarira, ndine mhaka newe, iwe Farao mambo iwe shato huru uvete pakati penzizi dzako,' ukati, `Rwizi rwangu ndorwangu, ndakazviitira irwo.'" 
Ezekiel29:4 Ndichaisa zvikokovonho mushaya dzako, ndichanamatidza hove dzenzizi dzako pamakwande ako, ndichakubvisa mukati menzizi dzako pamwechete nehove dzose dzenzizi dzako dzakanamatira pamakwande ako." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndichakurashira kurenje, iwe nehove dzose dzenzizi dzako, uchawira pasi pabani pakachena, haungakokerwi kana kuunganidzwa; ndakakuisa kuzvikara zvapasi neshiri dzokudenga, uve zvokudya zvavo.""" 
Ezekiel29:6 Vose vagere Ijipiti vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, nokuti vakanga vakaita setsvimbo yorutsanga kuimba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel29:7 Vakati vachibata ruoko rwako, iwe ukavhunika, ukatsemura mafudzi avo ose; vakati vachisendama pamusoro pako, iwe ukavhunika, ukamisa zviuno zvavo zviri zvoga." 
Ezekiel29:8 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Tarira, ndinouyisa munondo pamusoro pako, ndichaparadza pakati pako vanhu nezvipfuwo.'" 
Ezekiel29:9 Nyika yeIjipiti ichava dongo renzvimbo yakaparadzwa zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. Zvayakati, `Rwizi ndorwangu, ndini ndakaruita," 
Ezekiel29:10 naizvozvo, tarira, ndine mhaka newe uye nenzizi dzako, ndichaita nyika yeIjipiti nzvimbo yakaparadzwa chose nedongo, kubva pashongwe yeSevhene kusvikira pamuganhu weItiopia.'" 
Ezekiel29:11 Hakuna munhu achapfuura napo norutsoka rwake, norutsoka rwechipfuo harungapfuuri napo, haingagarwi navanhu makore makumi mana." 
Ezekiel29:12 Nyika yeIjipiti ndichaiita dongo pakati penyika dzakaitwa matongo, namaguta ayo achaitwa matongo makore makumi mana pakati pamaguta akaitwa matongo; ndichaparadzira vaIjipiti pakati pamarudzi avanhu, nokuvadzingira kunyika dzose.""" 
Ezekiel29:13 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Kana makore makumi mana apera, ndichaunganidza vaIjipiti kumarudzi avanhu kwandakanga ndavaparadzira;" 
Ezekiel29:14 ndichadzosazve kutapwa kweIjipiti, ndichavadzoserazve kunyika yePatirosi, kunyika kwavakaberekerwa; vachavapo hushe hwakazvidzwa." 
Ezekiel29:15 Huchava ushe hunozvidzwa kupfuura ushe hwose, hahungazozvimisizve kukunda mamwe marudzi, ndichavatapudza, varege kuzotongazve mamwe marudzi paushe hwavo." 
Ezekiel29:16 Imba yalsiraeri haingazovimbi nahwo, huchindiyeudzira zvakaipa zvavo, kana vachicheukira kwavari; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel29:17 Zvino negore ramakumi maviri namanomwe, nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel29:18 Mwanakomana womunhu, Nebhukadhirezari mambo weBhabhironi, wakabatisa hondo yake basa guru rokurwa neTire; misoro yose yakasvotorwa namafudzi ose akasvuuka; kunyange zvakadaro iye nehondo yake havana kupiwa mubayiro neTire pamusoro pebasa raakabata achirwa navo." 
Ezekiel29:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Tarirai, nyika yeIjipiti ndichaipa Nebhukadhirezari mambo weBhabhironi; iye uchatapa vanhu vayo vazhinji, nokutora zvaachapamba, nokutora zvaachatapa; ndizvo zvichava mubayiro wehondo yake." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndakamupa iye nyika yeIjipiti, uve muripo wake wezvaakabatira, nokuti vakandibatira ini,' "" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel29:21 Nezuva iro ndichamedzera imba yaIsiraeri runyanga, newe ndichakupa muromo wakashamiswa pakati pavo; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.""" 
Ezekiel30:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel30:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, porofita, uti, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Ungudzai! Aiwa, zuva rakaipa sei!'" 
Ezekiel30:3 Nokuti zuva rava pedo, izuva ramakore; ichava nguva yamarudzi avanhu." 
Ezekiel30:4 Munondo uchauya pamusoro peIjipiti, kurwadziwa kukuru kuchavapo paItiopia, kana vakaurawa vachiparadzwa vachabvisa vanhu vayo vazhinji, nenheyo dzayo dzichakoromorwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Itiopia nePuti, neRudhi, navanhu vose vakavhengana, neKubhi, navana venyika vakaita sungano, vachaparadzwa pamwechete navo nomunondo.""" 
Ezekiel30:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Naivo vanotsigira Ijipiti vachaparadzwa; kuzvikudza kwesimba rayo kuchaderera; vachaparadzwamo nomunondo kubva paMigidhori kusvikira paSevhene." 
Ezekiel30:7 Vachava dongo pakati penyika dzakaitwa matongo, namaguta ayo achava pakati pamaguta akaitwa matongo." 
Ezekiel30:8 Zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndaisa moto vabatsiri vayo vose vaparadzwa." 
Ezekiel30:9 Nezuva iro nhume dzichabva kwandiri nezvikepe kundotyisa vaItiopia vasine hanya; vachava nokurwadziwa kukuru, sapazuva reIjipiti; nokuti, tarirai, zvinouya.""" 
Ezekiel30:10 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Ndichagumisawo vanhu vazhinji veIjipiti noruoko rwaNebhukadhirezari mambo weBhabhironi." 
Ezekiel30:11 Iye navanhu vake vaanavo, vanotyisa zvikuru pakati pamarudzi, vachauyiswamo kuzoparadza nyika; vachavhomorera Ijipiti minondo yavo, nokuzadza nyika navakaurawa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndichapwisa mvura yenzizi, nokutengesa nyika mumaoko avanhu vakaipa; nyika ndichaiita dongo, nezvose zvirimo, noruoko rwavatorwa; ini Jehovha, ndakataura izvozvo.""" 
Ezekiel30:13 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Ndichaparadzawo zvifananidzo, nemifananidzo ndichaigumisa paNofi; hapangazovi nomuchinda kunyika yeIjipiti; ndichaisa kutya panyika yeljipiti." 
Ezekiel30:14 Patirosi ndichariita dongo, paZoani ndichaisa moto, ndichaita zvandakatonga pamusoro peNo." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro peSini, iyo nhare yeIjipiti; ndichaparadza vanhu vazhinji veNo." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndichaisa moto paIjipiti; Sini richabatwa nokurwadziwa kukuru, No richaparadzwa, Nofi richava navavengi masikati." 
Ezekiel30:17 Majaya eAvheni neePibhesheti achaurawa nomunondo, maguta awa achatapwa." 
Ezekiel30:18 PaTapanesi masikati achaita rima, kana ndichivhunapo majoko kuzvikudza kwesimba raro kuchapera mukati maro; kana riri iro, richafukidzwa negore, vakunda varo vachatapwa." 
Ezekiel30:19 Saizvozvo ndichaita zvandakatonga pamusoro zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. 
Ezekiel30:20 Zvino negore regumi nerimwe, nomwedzi wokutanga, nezuva rechinomwe romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel30:21 Mwanakomana womunhu, ndavhuna ruoko rwaFarao mambo zvino tarira, haruna kupomberwa, kuti rurapwe, nemishonga, rupomberwe mucheka, kuti ruve nesimba rokubata munondo." 
Ezekiel30:22 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Tarirai, ndine mhaka naFarao mambo weIjipiti, ndichavhuna maoko ake, irwo rune simba norumwe rwakavhunika; ndichawisa pasi munondo uri paruoko rwake." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndichaparadzira vaIjipiti pakati pamarudzi, ndichavadzingira kunyika dzose." 
Ezekiel30:24 Asi ndichasimbisa maoko amambo weBhabhironi, nokuisa munondo wangu muruoko rwake; asi ndichavhuna maoko aFarao, uchagomera pamberi pake sezvinogomera munhu akakuvadzwa ari pakufa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndichatsigira maoko amambo weBhabhironi, asi maoko aFarao acharemberera pasi; zvino vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndichiisa munondo wangu muruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi, iye akautambanudzira pamusoro penyika" 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndichaparadzira vaIjipiti pakati pamarudzi avanhu, nokuvadzingirira kunyika dzose; zvino vachazoziva kuti ndini Jehovha.' """ 
Ezekiel31:1 Zvino negore regumi nerimwe, nomwedzi wechitatu, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri, richiti," 
Ezekiel31:2 Mwanakomana womunhu, iti kuna Farao mambo weIjipiti, nokuvanhu vake vazhinji, `Iwe wakafanana nani paukuru hwako?'" 
Ezekiel31:3 Tarira, muAsiria akanga ari musidhari paRebhanoni, akanga ana mashizha akanaka, nomumvuri wakaita sowedondo, wakareba kwazvo; musoro wawo wakanga uri kumakore." 
Ezekiel31:4 Mvura zhinji yakaumeresa, mvura yapasipasi yakaukurisa; nzizi dzayo dzaiyerera pose pakasimwa, yaisvitsa migero yayo kumiti yose yesango." 
Ezekiel31:5 Naizvozvo muti uyu wakakura kupfuura miti yose yesango, matavi awo akawanda, uye matavi awo akareba nemvura zhinji, nenguva yokumera kwawo." 
Ezekiel31:6 Shiri dzose dzokudenga dzakavaka matendere adzo mumatavi awo, nemhuka dzose dzesango dzakabereka vana vadzo pasi pamatavi, awo; marudzi makuru ose avanhu akagara mumumvuri wawo." 
Ezekiel31:7 Saizvozvo wakanga wakanaka pakukura kwawo, napakureba kwamatavi awo; nokuti midzi yawo yakanga iri mumvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel31:8 Misidhari mumunda waMwari yakanga isingagoni kuudzitira; miti yemisiperesi haina kufanana nohutavi hwawo, nemipurani yakanga isina kufanana namatavi awo; kwakanga kusina muti mumunda waMwari wakanga wakafanana nawo pakunaka kwawo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndakauita zvakanaka nokuwanda kwamatavi awo, naizvozvo miti yose yeEdheni, yaiva mumunda waMwari, yaiugodora." 
Ezekiel31:10 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, `Zvawakakura zvikuru iwe, akaisa musoro wake pakati pamakore, moyo wake ukazvikudza nokuda kokureba kwake," 
Ezekiel31:11 ndichamuisa muruoko rwoune simba pakati pamarudzi avanhu, iye achamuitira zvawakafanira; ndakamudzinga nokuda kwezvakaipa zvake.'" 
Ezekiel31:12 Vatorwa, ivo vanotyisa pakati pamarudzi, vakamutema vakamurega, matavi ake akawira pamusoro pamakomo nomumipata yose, matavi ake akavhunikira pahova dzose dzenyika; vanhu vose venyika vabva pamumvuri wake, vakamusiya."
