Hosea5:8 Ridzai mumanzi paGibhiyoni, nehwamanda paRama; ridzai mhere paBhetiavheni; vari shure kwako, iwe Bhenjamini!" 
Hosea5:9 Nyika yaEfuremu ichaitwa matongo nezuva rokutukwa; ndakazivisa pakati paIsiraeri zvichazovapo zvirokwazvo. 
Hosea5:10 Machinda aJudha akafanana navanobvisa chiratidzo chemiganho; ndichadurura kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pawo semvura. 
Hosea5:11 Efuremu wakamanikidzwa wakapwanyiwa nokutongwa, nokuti akanga achitenda kutevera murayiro wavanhu." 
Hosea5:12 Naizvozvo ndichava kuna Efuremu sechipfunho, uye sokuora kuimba yaJudha." 
Hosea5:13 Efuremu akati achiona kurwara kwake, naJudha vanga rake, Efuremu akaenda Asiria, akatuma nhume kuna mambo Jarebhi; asi iye haagoni kukuporesai, kana kuporesa vanga renyu." 
Hosea5:14 Nokuti ndichava seshumba kuna Efuremu, uye seshumba duku kuimba yaJudha; ini, iyeni, ndichabvambura ndokuenda; ndichavatapa, hakuna angavarwira." 
Hosea5:15 Ndichaenda ndichidzokera kunzvimbo yangu, kusvikira vatenda kutadza kwavo, vakatsvaka chiso changu; pakutambudzika kwavo vachanditsvaka nomwoyo wose.""" 
Hosea6:1 Uyai, tidzokera kuna Jehovha; nokuti akabvambura, asi achatipodzazve, akarova, asi achatisungazve patakakuvara." 
Hosea6:2 Kana mazuva maviri apera achatiraramisa, nezuva rechitatu achatimutsazve, tirarame pamberi pake." 
Hosea6:3 Ngatimuzive, ngatishingaire kuziva Jehovha; kubuda kwake kwakatemwa sokwamangwanani; achauya kwatiri semvura, semvura yokuteverera inodiridza nyika.""" 
Hosea6:4 Aiwa, Efuremu, ndichakuitei? Aiwa, Judha ndichakuitei? Nokuti kunaka kwenyu kwakaita semhute yamangwanani, uye sedova rinokurumidza kuenda." 
Hosea6:5 Naizvozvo ndakavatema navaporofita; ndakavauraya namashoko omuromo wangu, zvandakatonga zvakaita sechiedza chinobuda." 
Hosea6:6 Nokuti ndinoda rudo, handidi zvibayiro, uye kuziva Mwari kupfuura zvipiriso zvinopiswa." 
Hosea6:7 Asi vakadarika sungano saAdhamu, ndipapo pavakandinyengera." 
Hosea6:8 Giriyadhi iguta ravanoita zvakaipa, rinamakwapa eropa." 
Hosea6:9 Sezvakaita makororo anovandira munhu, saizvozvo boka ravaprista rinouraya panzira inoenda Shekemi; zvirokwazvo, vakaita zvinonyadzisa." 
Hosea6:10 Paimba yaIsiraeri ndakaona chinhu chinonyangadza kwazvo, pakati paEfuremu panovufeve, Isiraeri vakasvibiswa." 
Hosea6:11 Newevo, Judha, wakagadzirirwa kukohwa, nenguva yandinodzosa kutapwa kwavanhu vangu." 
Hosea7:1 Kana ndichirapa Isiraeri, kuipa kwaEfuremu koonekwa nezvakashata zveSamaria; nokuti vanonyengera, mbavha inopinda mukati uye boka ramakororo rinoparadza kunze." 
Hosea7:2 Asi havafungi mumwoyo yavo kuti ndinorangarira zvakaipa zvavo zvose; zvino zvavakaita zvinovakomberedza, zviri pamberi pangu.""" 
Hosea7:3 Vanofadza mambo nezvakashata zvavo, namachinda nenhema dzavo." 
Hosea7:4 Vose imhombwe; vakafanana nechoto chakaveserwa nomubiki wechingwa; unorega kukuchidzira moto, kana akanya bundu rechingwa, kusvikira ravira." 
Hosea7:5 Nezuva ramambo wedu machinda akarwariswa nokupisa kwewaini; iye akatambanudza ruoko rwake pamwechete navaseki. 
Hosea7:6 Nokuti vakagadzira mwoyo yavo sechoto, vachivandira; mubiki wavo wechingwa unovata husiku hwose, mangwanani chinopfuta somurazvo womoto.""" 
Hosea7:7 Vanopisa vose sechoto, vanoparadza vatongi vavo; madzimambo avo ose akawira pasi, hakuna nomumwe pakati pavo anodana kwandiri." 
Hosea7:8 Efuremu ndiye anozvivenganisa namamwe marudzi, Efuremu chingwa chisina kushandurwa." 
Hosea7:9 Vatorwa vakapedza simba rake, asi iye haazvizivi; zvirokwazvo vhudzi rake rochena pose-pose, asi iye haazvizivi." 
Hosea7:10 Kuzvikudza kwaIsiraeri kunopupura pamberi pake, asi havana kudzokera kuna Jehovha Mwari wavo, kana kumutsvaka, kunyange izvi zvose zvakadaro." 
Hosea7:11 Efuremu akaita senjiva isina mano, isina njere; vanodana Ijipiti, vanoenda Asiria." 
Hosea7:12 Kana vachienda, ndichakandira mumbure wangu pamusoro pavo, ndichavakwevera pasi seshiri dzokudenga; ndichavaranga sezvavakaudzwa paungano yavo." 
Hosea7:13 Vane nhamo ivo nokuti vakatsauka kwandiri; ngavaparadzwe, nokuti vakandidarikira; kunyange ndakanga ndichida kuvadzikunura, vakandirevera nhema." 
Hosea7:14 Havana kudana kwandiri nemwoyo yavo, asi vanoungudza panhovo dzavo; vanounganira zviyo newaini itsva, vanondimukira." 
Hosea7:15 Kunyange ndakavadzidzisa nokusimbisa maoko avo, kunyange zvakadaro vanofunga kundiitira zvakaipa" 
Hosea7:16 Vanodzoka asi havangadzokeri kuna iye ari kumusoro; vakafanana nouta hunonyengera; machinda avo achaparadzwa nomunondo nokuda kwehasha dzamarimi avo; ndiko kuchava kusekwa kwavo panyika yeIjipiti. 
Hosea8:1 Isa hwamanda pamuromo wako. Zvinouya segondo kuzorwa neimba yaJehovha, nokuti vakadarika sungano yangu nokutadzira murayiro wangu." 
Hosea8:2 Vachadana kwandiri, vachiti, `Mwari wangu, isu vaIsiraeri tinokuzivai.'" 
Hosea8:3 Isiraeri vakarasha zvakanaka; muvengi wavo achavateverera. 
Hosea8:4 Vakagadza madzimambo, asi havana kurairwa neni; vakazvitsaurira machinda, ini ndisingazvizivi; vakazviitira zvifananidzo nesirivha uye nendarama yavo, kuti zviparadzwe." 
Hosea8:5 Mhuru yako, iwe Samaria, inonyangadza; kutsamwa kwangu kwakavamukira; vachanonoka kusvikira riniko kuva vakanaka?" 
Hosea8:6 Nokuti chinhu ichi chakabvawo kuvaIsiraeri; mupfuri wakachiita, hachizi Mwari; zvirokwazvo, mhuri yeSamaria ichaputswa-putswa." 
Hosea8:7 Nokuti vanodzvara mhepo, vachacheka chamupupuri, havane zviyo pamunda; chipande hachingavigiri hupfu; kunyange chikabereka, zvichamedzwa navatorwa." 
Hosea8:8 Isiraeri vakamedzwa; zvino vava pakati pamarudzi somudziyo usingadikamwi nomunhu. 
Hosea8:9 Nokuti vakaenda Asiria, sembizi inongozvifambira iri yoga; vaEfuremu vakazvitsvakira shamwari vachidziripira." 
Hosea8:10 Zvirokwazvo, kunyange vachizvitsvakira idzo pakati pamarudzi, ndichavaunganidza zvino, votanga kutapudzwa nemhaka yokuremedzwa namambo wamachinda." 
Hosea8:11 Efuremu zvaakawanza maaritari okutadza nawo, maaritari ake akamutadzisa." 
Hosea8:12 Ndakamunyorera mashoko ane zviuru zvine gumi omurayiro wangu, asi vanoti ndezvavatorwa." 
Hosea8:13 Kana zviri zvibayiro zvezvipiriso zvangu, vanobayira nyama ndokuidya; asi Jehovha haana kuzvigamuchira; zvino ucharangarira zvakaipa zvavo, nokuvarova pamusoro pezvivi zvavo; vachadzokera Ijipiti." 
Hosea8:14 Nokuti Isiraeri vakakangamwa Muiti wavo, vakavaka dzimba dzoushe; Judha vakawanza maguta akakomberedzwa namasvingo; asi ini ndichatuma moto kumaguta avo, uchapedza dzimba dzoushe dzawo.""" 
Hosea9:1 Regai kufara, imwi Isiraeri, muchifarisisa samarudzi avanhu; nokuti makapata, muchisiya Mwari wenyu; makada mubayiro wokufeva pamapuriro ose ezviyo." 
Hosea9:2 Buriro nechisviniro chewaini hazvingavagutsi, waini ichavanyengera." 
Hosea9:3 Havangagari munyika yaJehovha; asi Efuremu achadzokera Ijipiti, vachadya zvokudya zvine tsvina paAsiria." 
Hosea9:4 Havangadiriri Jehovha waini, zvibayiro zvavo hazvingamufadzi; zvibayiro zvavo zvichaita kwavari sezvokudya zvavanochema; vose, vanozvidya, vachasvibiswa, nokuti zvokudya zvavo ndezvavo zvoga, hazvingasviki muimba yaJehovha." 
Hosea9:5 Muchabateiko nezuva reungano dzakatarwa, nezuva remitambo yaJehovha?" 
Hosea9:6 Nokuti tarirai, vakabva nokuda kokuparadzwa, asi vaIjipiti vachavaunganidza, veMemifisi vachavaviga; rukato ruchavatorera zvinhu zvavo zvesirivha zvinofadza; mhinzwa ichava mumatende avo." 
Hosea9:7 Mazuva okurohwa asvika, mazuva okutsiva asvika; Isiraeri vachazviziva; muporofita ibenzi, munhu anomweya anopenga, nemhaka yokuwanda kwezvakaipa zvenyu, uye nokuti ruvengo rukuru." 
Hosea9:8 Efuremu mushori kuna Mwari wangu; kana ari muporofita, rugombe rwomuteyi weshiri ruri munzira dzake dzose, noruvengo muimba yaMwari wake." 
Hosea9:9 Vakazvishatisa zvikuru kwazvo, sapamazuva eGibhiya; acharangarira zvakaipa zvavo, achavarova pamusoro pezvivi zvavo." 
Hosea9:10 Ndakawana Isiraeri vakaita samazambiringa murenje; ndakaona madzibaba enyu vakaita sezvibereko zvakatanga kuibva pamuonde panguva yawo yokubereka yokutanga; asi vakasvika paBhaaripeori, vakazviisa kune zvinonyadzisa, vakaita zvinonyangadza vachifanana nezvaidikamwa navo." 
Hosea9:11 Kana vari VaEfuremu, kukudzwa kwavo kuchabhururuka seshiri; kubereka hakungavipo, kana kukurirwa, kana kunaka pamuviri." 
Hosea9:12 Kunyange vakarera vana vavo, ndichavatorera ivo, kusvikira kusisina munhu; zvirokwazvo, vachava nenhamowo, kana ini ndavasiya.""" 
Hosea9:13 Sezvandakatsaura Tire, Efuremu vakasimwa pakanaka; asi Efuremu vachabudisira muurayi vana vavo." 
Hosea9:14 Chivapai, Jehovha muchavapeiko? Chivapai zvizvaro zvinoshaya namazamu asina mukaka." 
Hosea9:15 Zvakaipa zvavo zvose zviri paGirigari, nokuti ndipo pandakavavenga; nemhaka yezvakaipa zvavanoita ndichavadzinga paimba yangu, handichavadi; machinda avo ose akandimukira." 
Hosea9:16 Efuremu varohwa, mudzi wavo waoma, havangazobereki zvibereko; zvirokwazvo, kunyange vakabereka, ndichavauraya vadikamwa vakaberekwa nezvizvaro zvavo.""" 
Hosea9:17 Mwari wangu achavarasha, nokuti havana kumunzwa; vachava vadzungairi pakati pamarudzi avanhu." 
Hosea10:1 VaIsiraeri muzambiringa unotanda zvakanaka, unobereka zvibereko zvawo; zvibereko zvavo zvakati zvichiwanda, vakawanzawo maaritari avo; nyika yavo yakati ichifara, ivo vakazviitirawo shongwe dzakanaka." 
Hosea10:2 Mwoyo yavo inonyengera, zvino vachapiwa mhaka; acharova maaritari avo, achaparadza shongwe dzavo." 
Hosea10:3 Zvirokwazvo, zvino vachati, ""Hatina mambo, nokuti hatityi Jehovha; kana ari mambo angatiitireiko?""" 
Hosea10:4 Vanotaura mashoko asina maturo, vanopika nhema pakuita kwavo sungano; naizvozvo kutongwa kwavo kunomera somuti unouraya mumihoronga yomunda." 
Hosea10:5 Vagere Samaria vachatya mhuru dzeBhetiavheni; nokuti vanhu varo vachaichema, navaprista varo vaiifarira, nokuda kokukudzwa kwayo, nokuti kwabva kwairi." 
Hosea10:6 Ichaiswawo Asiria, chive chipo chamambo Jarebhi; Efuremu vachanyadziswa, Isiraeri vachanyadziswa namano avo." 
Hosea10:7 Kana riri Samaria, mambo waro waparadzwa sechipande pamusoro pemvura." 
Hosea10:8 Nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzeAvheniwo, izvo zvivi zvaIsiraeri, dzichaparadzwa; munzwa norukato zvichamera pamaaritari avo; zvino vachati kumakomo, ""Tifukidzei,"" nokuzvikomo, ""Wirai pamusoro pedu.""" 
Hosea10:9 Aiwa, Isiraeri, makatadza kubva pamazuva eGibhiya; ndipo pavakamira; ko vachakundwa nehondo inorwa navana vezvakaipa paGibhiya here?" 
Hosea10:10 Nguva yandinoda ndichavaranga; marudzi avanhu achavaunganira kana vakasungirwa pazvisakarurama zvavo zviviri. 
Hosea10:11 Efuremu itsiru rakapingudzwa, rinofarira kupura zviyo; asi ini ndimene ndasvika pamutsipa waro wakanaka, ndaisa mutasvi pamusoro paEfuremu; Judha vacharima, Jakobho achaputsa mavhinga ake." 
Hosea10:12 Zvidzvarirei mukururama, mugocheka zvorudo; undai makombo enyu, nokuti inguva yokutsvaka Jehovha, kusvikira achiuya achikunisirai zvakarurama." 
Hosea10:13 Makarima zvakashata, makacheka zvakaipa, makadya zvibereko zvenhema, nokuti makanga muchivimba nenzira yenyu, uye nokuwanda kwemhare dzenyu." 
Hosea10:14 Naizvozvo bope richamuka pakati pavanhu venyu, nhare dzenyu dzose dzichaparadzwa, Sharimani sezvaakaparadza Bhetiaribheri nezuva rokurwa, mai vakaputsanyiwa pamwechete navana vavo." 
Hosea10:15 Ndizvo zvamuchaitirwa neBhetieri nemhaka yokushata kwenyu kukuru; mambo waIsiraeri achaparadzwa chose mambakwedza. 
Hosea11:1 Isiraeri achiri mwana muduku, ndaimuda, ndikadana mwanakomana wangu abve Ijipiti." 
Hosea11:2 Vaporofita vachinyanya kuvadana,, ivo vakanyanya kuvatiza; vakabayira vaBhaari, nokupisira zvifananidzo zvakavezwa zvinonhuhwira." 
Hosea11:3 Kunyange zvakadaro ini ndakadzidzisa Efuremu kufamba; ndakavatakura mumaoko angu, asi havana kuziva kuti ndini ndakavaporesa." 
Hosea11:4 Ndakavakakata namabote omunhu, nezvisungo zvorudo; ndakava kwavari somunhu anobvisa joko pashaya dzavo, ndikagadza zvokudya pamberi pavo." 
Hosea11:5 Havangadzokeri kunyika yeIjipiti, asi muAsiria ndiye achava mambo wavo, nokuti vakaramba kudzokera kwandiri." 
Hosea11:6 Munondo uchava nehasha pakati pamaguta avo, uchapedza zvipfigiso zvavo nokuzviparadza, nemhaka yamano avo." 
Hosea11:7 Vanhu vangu vanoramba vachida kudzokera shure vachindisiya; kunyange vachidamwa kune Wokumusoro, havatongosimuki." 
Hosea11:8 Ndingakuregedza seiko, iwe Isiraeri? Ndingakuita seiko seAdhima? Ndingakuenzanisa seiko neZebhoimi? Mwoyo wangu washandukurwa mukati mangu, tsitsi dzangu dzamutswa pamwechete." 
Hosea11:9 Handingaiti nokutsamwa kwangu kukuru, handingadzoki ndichiti ndiparadze Efuremu; nokuti ndiri Mwari, handizi munhu, ndini Mutsvene pakati penyu, handingauyi ndakatsamwa." 
Hosea11:10 Vachatevera Jehovha, achiomba seshumba; nokuti uchaomba, vana vachauya vachidedera vachibva mavirazuva." 
Hosea11:11 Vachauya seshiri vachibva Ijipiti, senjiva vachibva panyika yeAsiria; ini ndichavagarisa mudzimba dzavo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Hosea11:12 Efuremu vakandikombera nenhema, uye imba yaIsiraeri nokunyengera; Judha vanongoramba vachipenga pamberi paMwari, pamberi paiye Mutsvene akatendeka." 
Hosea12:1 ' Efuremu vanozvigutisa nemhepo, vanoteverera mhepo yokumabvazuva; vanoramba vachiwedzera nhema nokuparadza; vanoita sungano neAsiria, uye mafuta anoiswa Ijipiti.""" 
Hosea12:2 Jehovha ane gakava naJudhawo, acharova Jakobho pamusoro penzira dzake, achamuripira pamusoro pezvaakaita." 
Hosea12:3 Muchizvaro akabata chichitsinho chomukuru wake, ava nesimba romurume akaita mitsimba naMwari;" 
Hosea12:4 zvirokwazvo, akaita mitsimba nomutumwa akakunda; akachema, akamunyengetera; akamuwana paBhetieri, akataurapo nesu," 
Hosea12:5 iye Jehovha, Mwari wehondo; Jehovha ndiro zita rokumurangarira naro." 
Hosea12:6 Naizvozvo chidzokera kuna Mwari wako; chengeta rudo nokururamisa, urambe uchimirira Mwari wako." 
Hosea12:7 Iye muKanani, zviyero zvinonyengera zviri muruoko rwake, anofanira kumanikidza." 
Hosea12:8 Asi Efuremu anoti, `Zvirokwazvo, ndafuma, ndazviwanira fuma; pamabasa angu ose havangawani kwandiri zvakaipa zvezvivi.'" 
Hosea12:9 Asi ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, kubva panyika yeIjipiti; ndichakugarisaizve mumatende, sapamazuva emitambo yakatarwa." 
Hosea12:10 Ndakataurawo navaporofita, ndikawanza zvandakavaratidza; ndakavataurira zvifananidzo nemiromo yavaporofita." 
Hosea12:11 Ko paGiriyadhi pane zvakaipa here? Havana maturo chose; vanobaya nzombe paGirigari; zvirokwazvo maaritari avo akaita matutu amabwe pamihoronga yeminda. 
Hosea12:12 Jakobho akatizira kunyika yeArami, Isiraeri akabatira mukadzi, akafudza makwai kuti awane mukadzi." 
Hosea12:13 Jehovha akabudisa Isiraeri paIjipiti nomuporofita, akazochengetwa nomuporofita." 
Hosea12:14 Efuremu vakatsamwisa Jehovha zvikuru; naizvozvo mhaka yeropa rake ichasiyiwa kwaari, Ishe wake achadzosera kuzvidzwa kwake kwaari." 
Hosea13:1 Efuremu vakati vachitaura, kudedera kukavapo; vakazvikudza pakati paIsiraeri; asi akati apara mhaka naBhaari, akafa." 
Hosea13:2 Asi zvino vanongoramba vachiwedzera zvivi zvavo, vakazviitira zvifananidzo zvakaumbwa nesirivha yavo, zviri zvifananidzo zvenjere dzavo, zvose zviri basa remhizha; zvino vanoti pamusoro pazvo, ""Vanobayira mhuru ngavadzisvete.""" 
Hosea13:3 Saka vachaita semhute yamangwanani, sedova rinokurumidza kunyangarika, sehundi inopepereswa nechamupupuri paburiro, soutsi bwechoto hunobuda napaburi." 
Hosea13:4 Kunyange zvakadaro ndini Jehovha Mwari wako kubva panyika hamuzivi mumwe mwari asi ini, hakuna mumwe muponesi kunze kwangu." 
Hosea13:5 Ndakakuzivai murenje, munyika yakaoma kwazvo." 
Hosea13:6 Zvavakapiwa mafuro akanaka, vakaguta; vakaguta, mwoyo yavo ikazvikudza, naizvozvo vakandikangamwa." 
Hosea13:7 Saka ndava kwavari seshumba, ndichavagarira panzira sengwe;" 
Hosea13:8 ndicharwa navo sebere rakatorerwa vana varo, ndichatsemura chifukidziro chomwoyo wavo; ndichavadyirapo seshumbakadzi; zvikara zvichavabvamburanya." 
Hosea13:9 Ndizvo zvichakuparadzai, imwi Isiraeri, zvamunorwa neni, ini mubatsiri wenyu." 
Hosea13:10 Ko zvino mambo wenyu aripi, akuponesei mumaguta enyu ose? Ko vatongi venyu varipi, vamaiti, `Tipei mambo namachinda?'" 
Hosea13:11 Ndakakupai mambo pakutsamwa kwangu, ndikamubvisazve nehasha dzangu." 
Hosea13:12 Zvakaipa zvaEfuremu zvakasungwa pamwechete, zvivi zvake zvakachengetwa." 
Hosea13:13 Kurwadziwa komukadzi anosurumuka kuchasvika kwaari; iye mwanakomana asine njere; nokuti kana nguva ichisvika, haaswederi pakuzvarwa." 
Hosea13:14 Ndichavadzikunura pasimba reSheori, ndichavadzikunura parufu. Aiwa, rufu, hosha dzako dziripiko? Aiwa, Sheori, kuparadza kwako kuripi? Kuzvidemba hakungaonekwi nameso angu." 
Hosea13:15 Kunyange akabereka zvibereko pakati pehama dzake, mhepo yokumabvazuva ichasvika, iri mhepo yaJehovha inobva kurenje; chitubu chake chichapwa, tsime rake richaoma, iye uchapamba fuma yenhumbi dzose dzinodikamwa." 
Hosea13:16 Samaria richava nemhosva yaro, nokuti vakamukira Mwari wavo; vachaparadzwa nomunondo, vacheche vavo vachaputsanyiwa, vakadzi vavo vane mimba vachatumburwa.""" 
Hosea14:1 Aiwa, imwi Isiraeri, dzokerai kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu, nokuti makagumburwa nezvakaipa zvenyu." 
Hosea14:2 Endai namashoko, mudzokere kuna Jehovha, muti kwaari, ""Bvisai zvakaipa zvose, mugamuchire zvinhu zvakanaka, ipapo tichakupai miromo yedu, zvive zvibayiro zvedu." 
Hosea14:3 Asiria havangatiponesi; hatingatasvi mabhiza, hatingazoti kubasa ramaoko edu. Ndimi vamwari vedu; nokuti nherera dzinowana nyasha kwamuri.""" 
Hosea14:4 Ndichaporesa kudzokera kwavo shure, ndichavada nokuda kwangu; nokuti kutsamwa kwangu kwabviswa kwavari." 
Hosea14:5 Ndichava sedova kuna Isiraeri, vachatunga seruva, vachatanda midzi yavo seRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:6 Matavi avo achatanda, kunaka kwavo kuchafanana nomuorivhi, nokunhuhwira kwavo sokweRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Vanogara mumumvuri wavo vachadzoka, vachararama sezviyo, nokutunga maruva somuzambiringa; kurumbidzwa kwavo kuchafanana newaini yeRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Efuremu, ndichineiko nezvifananidzo? Ndakapindura, ndinehanya naye; ndakafanana nomuonde mutema, zvibereko zvako zvichawanikwa kwandiri.""" 
Hosea14:9 Ndianiko akachenjera, anzwisise zvinhu izvi, kana akangwara, azvizive? Nokuti nzira dzaJehovha dzakarurama, vakarurama vachafamba nadzo; asi vadariki vachawa madziri." 
Joel1:1 Shoko raJehovha, rakasvika kuna Joweri mwanakomana waPetuweri." 
Joel1:2 Inzwai chinhu ichi, imwi vatana, murereke nzeve dzenyu, imwi mose mugere munyika ino. Ko zvakadai zvakamboitwa pamazuva enyu, kana pamazuva amadzibaba enyu here?" 
Joel1:3 Udzai vana venyu izvozvo, vana venyu vaudzewo vana vavo, navana vavo vaudze rumwe rudzi runotevera." 
Joel1:4 Zvakasiyiwa nomuteteni, zvakadyiwa nemhashu; zvakasiyiwa nemhashu, zvakadyiwa negwatakwata; zvakasiyiwa negwatakwata, zvakadyiwa nomupedzachose." 
Joel1:5 Mukai, imwi vakabatwa nedoro, mucheme; ungudzai, imwi mose munomwa waini, nemhaka yewaini inonaka, nokuti yabviswa pamiromo yenyu." 
Joel1:6 Nokuti rumwe rudzi rwasvika panyika yangu, rwakasimba, rusingaverengwi; meno arwo meno eshumba, runa meno makuru eshumbakadzi." 
Joel1:7 Rwakaparadza muzambiringa wangu, nokuvhuna muonde wangu; rwakausvuura kwazvo, nokuuwisira pasi; matavi awo acheneswa." 
Joel1:8 Chemai semhandara yakazvisunga chiuno namasaga nokuda komurume woumhandara hwayo. 
Joel1:9 Chipiriso choupfu nechipiriso chinomwiwa zvabviswa paimba yaJehovha; vaprista, ivo vashumiri vaJehovha, vanochema." 
Joel1:10 Munda waparadzwa, nyika inochema; nokuti zviyo zvaparadzwa, waini itsva yapwa, mafuta apera." 
Joel1:11 Nyarai imwi varimi, ungudzai imwi varimi vemizambiringa, nokuda kwezviyo nebhari; nokuti zvakaberekwa neminda zvaparadzwa." 
Joel1:12 Muzambiringa wasvava, muonde unoshaiwa simba, mutamba nomuchindwewo, nomuapuri, nemiti yose yomunda yaoma; mufaro wavanakomana vavanhu wapera." 
Joel1:13 Zvisungei zviuno namasaga, mucheme imwi vaprista; ungudzai imwi vashumiri veatari; uyai muvate usiku hwose makapfeka masaga, imwi vashumiri vaMwari wangu; nokuti chipiriso choupfu nechipiriso chinomwiwa zvadziviswa paimba yaMwari wenyu." 
Joel1:14 Tsaurai zuva rokutsanya, danai vanhu kuungano yakatarwa, kokerai vakuru navose vagere panyika kuimba yaJehovha Mwari wenyu, mudane kuna Jehovha." 
Joel1:15 Aiwa, zuva iro here! Nokuti zuva raJehovha rava pedo, richasvika richiparadza richibva kuna waMasimbaose." 
Joel1:16 Ko zvokudya hazvina kubviswa pamberi pedu, nomufaro nokufarisisa paimba yaMwari wedu here!" 
Joel1:17 Mbeu dzinoorera pasi pamavhinga adzo; matura aparadzwa, tsapi dzaputswa; nokuti zviyo zvafa." 
Joel1:18 Zvipfuwo zvinogomera sei! Mapoka emombe akanganiswa, nokuti hazvichina mafuro; zvirokwazvo, mapoka amakwai aparadzwa." 
Joel1:19 Aiwa, Jehovha, ndinodana kwamuri, nokuti moto wapedza mafuro erenje, murazvo wapisa miti yose yokusango." 
Joel1:20 Zvirokwazvo, mhuka dzokusango dzinochemera kwamuri, nokuti hova dzemvura dzapwa, uye moto wapedza mafuro erenje." 
Joel2:1 Ridzai hwamanda paZiyoni, dzemhere pagomo rangu dzvene; vose vagere panyika ngavadedere nokuti zuva raJehovha rinouya, nokuti rava pedo;" 
Joel2:2 richava zuva rerima nokusviba, zuva ramakore nerima guru, samambakwedza akawarirwa pamakomo; richauya ruri rudzi rukuru rune simba; rwakadaro haruna kumbovapo, uye harungazovipo shure kwavo, kusvikira pamakore amarudzi mazhinji avanhu." 
Joel2:3 Moto unoparadza pamberi pavo, murazvo unopfuta shure kwavo; nyika yakaita somunda weEdheni pamberi pavo, uye serenje rakaparadzwa shure kwavo; zvirokwazvo, hakuna wakapukunyuka kwavari." 
Joel2:4 Pakuonekwa kwavo vakafanana namabhiza; savatasvi vamabhiza, ndiko kumhanya kwavo." 
Joel2:5 Kuuruka kwavo pamusoro pamakomo kunoita somubvumo wengoro, somubvumo womurazvo womoto unoparadza mashanga, savanhu vane simba vakagadzirirwa kurwa." 
Joel2:6 Kana vachisvika, vanhu vose vanotya kwazvo, zviso zvose zvinocheneruka." 
Joel2:7 Vanomhanya savanhu vane simba, vanokwira rusvingo savarwi, vanotamba mumwe nomumwe nenzira yake, havatongotsauki pamisara yavo." 
Joel2:8 Havasundidzirani, mumwe nomumwe unofamba negwara rake; vanopwanya napakati penhumbi dzokurwa, vasingatsauki." 
Joel2:9 Vanowira guta, vanomhanyira pamusoro porusvingo, vanokwira vachipinda mudzimba, vanopinda napamahwindo sembavha." 
Joel2:10 Nyika inodedera pamberi pavo, denga rose rinobvunda, zuva nomwedzi zvinosviba, nyeredzi dzinodzora kupenya kwadzo." 
Joel2:11 Jehovha anobudisa izwi rake pamberi pehondo yake, nokuti hondo yake ihuru kwazvo; nokuti muiti wezvaakataura une simba; nokuti zuva raJehovha iguru, rinotyisa kwazvo, ndianiko angatsunga naro?" 
Joel2:12 Kunyange zvakadaro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha nazvino tendeukirai kwandiri nomwoyo yenyu yose, muchitsanya, muchichema nokuungudza;" 
Joel2:13 bvarurai mwoyo yenyu, murege kubvarura nguo dzenyu, mutendeukire kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu; nokuti ane ngoni nenyasha, anononoka kutsamwa, ane tsitsi zhinji, uye anozvidemba pakuitira vanhu zvakaipa." 
Joel2:14 Ndiani angaziva, zvimwe angadzoka akazvidemba, akasiya mukomborero kana achibva, zvimwe chipiriso choupfu kana chipiriso chinomwiwa zvamungavigira Jehovha Mwari wenyu?" 
Joel2:15 Ridzai, hwamanda paZiyoni, tsaurai zuva rokutsanya, danai vanhu kuungano yakatarwa;" 
Joel2:16 kokerai vanhu, natsai ungano, kokerai vakuru, unganidzai vana, navanomwa pamazamu; chikomba ngachibude paimba yacho nomwenga paimba yake yokuvata." 
Joel2:17 Vaprista, ivo vashumiri vaJehovha, ngavacheme pakati pebiravira neatari, vati, `Aiwa, Jehovha, regai vanhu venyu, musaisa nhaka yenyu pakushoorwa, kuti marudzi avanhu avaseke;' vangareveiko pakati pamarudzi avanhu, vachiti, `Mwari wavo aripiko?' """ 
Joel2:18 Ipapo Jehovha akava negodo pamusoro penyika yake, akanzwira vanhu vake tsitsi." 
Joel2:19 Jehovha akapindura, akati kuvanhu vake, ""Tarirai, ndichakutumirai zviyo, newaini itsva, namafuta, mugoguta nazvo; handichakuitiyi chinhu chinoshoorwa pakati pamarudzi;" 
Joel2:20 asi ndichabvisa kure nemwi hondo inobva kurutivi rwokumusoro, ndichiidzingira kunyika yakaoma yakaparadzwa, rutivi rwayo pamberi rwakatarira kugungwa rokumabvazuva, norutivi rwayo rweshure kugungwa rokumavirazuva; kunhuwa kwayo kuchakwira, norwema rwayo rwakaipa ruchakwira, nokuti yakaita zvinhu zvikuru." 
Joel2:21 Rega hako kutya, iwe nyika, fara ufarisise; nokuti Jehovha akaita zvinhu zvikuru." 
Joel2:22 Regai kutya, imwi mhuka dzesango; nokuti mafuro erenje anobukira, nokuti miti inobereka zvibereko zvayo, mionde nemizambiringa zvinovigira vanhu simba razvo." 
Joel2:23 Naizvozvo farai, imwi vana veZiyoni, mufarisise muna Jehovha Mwari wenyu; nokuti anokupai mudzidzisi wokururama, uye anokunisirai mvura, mvura yokutanga nemvura yokuteverera, nomwedzi wokutanga." 
Joel2:24 Mapuriro achazara nezviyo, uye zvisviniro zvichapafuma waini namafuta." 
Joel2:25 Ndichakudzoseraizve makore amakadyirwa nemhashu, negwatakwata, nomupedzachose, nomuteteni, iyo hondo yangu huru yandakatuma pakati penyu." 
Joel2:26 Muchadya zvakawanda, mukarumbidza zita raJehovha Mwari wenyu, wakakuitirai zvinoshamisa; vanhu vangu havangatongonyadziswi nokusingaperi." 
Joel2:27 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndiri pakati paIsiraeri, kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu, uye kuti hakuna mumwe; vanhu vangu havangatongonyadziswi nokusingaperi." 
Joel2:28 Zvino shure kwaizvozvo ndichadurura Mweya wangu pamusoro penyama yose; vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vachaporofita, vatana venyu vacharota hope, namajaya enyu achaona zviratidzo;" 
Joel2:29 ndichadururawo Mweya wangu pamusoro pavaranda napamusoro pavashandiri namazuva iwayo. 
Joel2:30 Ndicharatidza zvishamiso kudenga napanyika, zvinoti: Ropa nomoto neshongwe dzoutsi." 
Joel2:31 Zuva richashanduka rima, mwedzi uchashanduka ropa, zuva guru raJehovha rinotyisa risati rasvika." 
Joel2:32 Zvino ani naani anodana zita raJehovha acharwirwa; nokuti pagomo reZiyoni napaJerusaremu ndipo pachava navakapukunyuka, sezvakataura Jehovha, napakati pavakasara ndipo pachava vakadamwa naJehovha." 
Joel3:1 Nokuti tarirai, namazuva iwayo nenguva iyo, kana ndichidzosa kutapwa kwaJudha neJerusaremu," 
Joel3:2 ndichaunganidza marudzi ose avanhu, nokuaburusira kumupata waJehoshafati; ndichavatongapo pamusoro pavanhu vangu napamusoro penhaka yangu Isiraeri, vakaparadzirwa navo pakati pamarudzi avanhu; vakagovana nyika yangu," 
Joel3:3 vakakanda mijenya pamusoro pavanhu vangu, vakatenga chifeve nomukomana, vakatengesa musikana vachipiwa waini, kuti vaimwe." 
Joel3:4 Zvirokwazvo, imwi Tire neSidhoni nenyika dzose dzaFirisitia, munoreveiko kwandiri? Munoda kunditsiva here? Kana mukanditsiva, ndichakudzoserai zvamakaita pamisoro yenyu pakarepo nokukasira." 
Joel3:5 Zvamakatora sirivha yangu nendarama yangu, mukandoisa mutemberi dzenyu zvinhu zvangu zvakanaka zvinodikamwa," 
Joel3:6 mukatengesa vana vaJudha navana veJerusaremu kuvanakomana vavaGiriki, kuti muvabvisire kure nenyika yavo;" 
Joel3:7 tarirai, ndichavamutsa panzvimbo kwamakandovatengesa, ndidzosere pamisoro yenyu zvamakaita;" 
Joel3:8 ndichatengesa vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu mumaoko avana vaJudha, ivo vachandovatengesa kuvanhu veShebha, kurudzi ruri kure, nokuti Jehovha akataura izvozvo." 
Joel3:9 Paridzirai izvozvi pakati pamarudzi; zvigadzirirei kurwa; kurudzirai varume vane simba; varwi vose ngavaswedere, vaende kundorwa." 
Joel3:10 Pfurai mapadza enyu ive minondo, namapanga enyu okuchekerera miti ave mapfumo; asine simba ngaati, `Ndine simba.'" 
Joel3:11 Chimbidzikai, muuye, imwi marudzi ose akapoteredza, muungane; imwi Jehovha, mhare dzenyu ngadziburukireko." 
Joel3:12 Marudzi avanhu ngaamuke, aende kumupata waJehoshafati; nokuti ndipo pandichagara ndichitonga marudzi ose akapoteredza." 
Joel3:13 lsai jeko renyu mumunda, nokuti zviyo zvaibva; uyai musvine, nokuti chisviniro chewaini chazara, zvisviniro zvinopafuma; nokuti kushata kwavo kwakura." 
Joel3:14 Vazhinji-zhinji, vazhinji-zhinji varipo mumupata wokutonga! Nokuti zuva raJehovha rava pedo mumupata wokutonga." 
Joel3:15 Zuva nomwedzi zvasviba, nyeredzi dzinobvisa kupenya kwadzo." 
Joel3:16 Jehovha achaomba ari paZiyoni, achanzwisa izwi rake ari paJerusaremu; denga rose nenyika zvichadengenyeka; asi Jehovha uchava utiziro hwavanhu vake, nenhare yavana vaIsiraeri." 
Joel3:17 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, Mwari wenyu, agere paZiyoni, iro gomo rangu dzvene; ipapo Jerusaremu richava guta dzvene, hakuna vatorwa vanozopfuura napo." 
Joel3:18 Zvino nezuva iro makomo achadonha waini inotapira, zvikomo zvichayerera mukaka, uye hova dzose dzaJudha dzichayerera mvura zhinji; mumba maJehovha muchabuda tsime, richadiridza mupata weShitimi." 
Joel3:19 Ijipiti richava dongo, uye Edhomu richava renje rakaparadzwa, nemhaka yesimba rakaitirwa vana vaJudha, zvavakateura ropa risina mhosva panyika yavo." 
Joel3:20 Asi Judha vachavapo nokusingaperi, uye Jerusaremu kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Joel3:21 Ndichapembedza ropa ravo randisina kumbopembedza; nokuti Jehovha anogara paZiyoni. 
Amos1:1 Mashoko aAmosi, waiva mumwe wavafudzi veTekoa, aakaona pamusoro paIsiraeri namazuva aUziya mambo waJudha, uye namazuva aJerobhoami mwanakomana waJoashi mambo waIsiraeri, makore maviri achigere okusvika kokudengenyeka kwenyika." 
Amos1:2 Akati, ""Jehovha uchaomba ari paZiyoni, achanzwisa izwi rake ari paJerusaremu; mafuro avafudzi achachema, musoro weKarimeri uchaoma.""" 
Amos1:3 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nemhaka yokuti Dhamasiko vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakapura Giriyadhi nemipuro yamatare." 
Amos1:4 Asi ndichatuma moto mumba maHazaeri, uchapedza dzimba dzohushe dzaBhenihadhadhi." 
Amos1:5 Ndichavhuna chihuri cheDhamasiko, nokuparadza vagere mumupata weAvheni nowakabata tsvimbo youshe paBhetiedheni; vanhu veSiria vachatapirwa Kiri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos1:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nemhaka yokuti Gaza vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwazvo; nokuti vakatapa rudzi rwose, kundovaisa kuna Edhomu." 
Amos1:7 Asi ndichatuma moto kurusvingo rweGaza, uchapedza dzimba dzaro dzoushe." 
Amos1:8 Ndichaparadza vagere Ashidhodhi nowakabata tsvimbo youshe paAshikeroni; ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kurwa naEkironi; vakasara vavaFirisitia vachaparadzwa,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos1:9 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nemhaka yokuti Tire vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakaisa rudzi rwose kuna Edhomu vakasarangarira sungano yohukama hwavo." 
Amos1:10 Asi ndichatuma moto kurusvingo rweTire, uchapedza dzimba dzaro dzoushe.""" 
Amos1:11 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nemhaka yokuti Edhomu vakadarika, katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakateverera munun'una wavo nomunondo, vakarasha tsitsi dzose, kutsamwa kwake kukaramba kuchingobvambura, akaramba ane hasha nokusingaperi." 
Amos1:12 Asi ndichatuma moto paTemani, uchapedza dzimba dzoushe dzeBhozira.""" 
Amos1:13 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nemhaka yokuti vanhu vaAmoni vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakatumbura vakadzi vakanga vane mimba veGiriyadhi, kuti vakurise nyika yavo." 
Amos1:14 Asi ndichabatidza moto parusvingo rweRabha, uchapedza dzimba dzaro dzoushe, vachidanidzira nezuva rokurwa, nedutu guru remhepo nezuva rechamupupuri;" 
Amos1:15 mambo wavo achatapwa, iye pamwechete namachinda ake,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos2:1 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nemhaka yokuti Moabhi vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakapisa mapfupa amambo waEdhomu kusvikira aita madota." 
Amos2:2 Asi ndichatuma moto kuvaMoabhi, uchapedza dzimba dzoushe dzeKerioti; Moabhi vachafa nebope nokudanidzira uye nokurira kwehwamanda;" 
Amos2:3 ndichaparadza vatongi pakati pavo; nokuuraya machinda avo ose pamwechete navo,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos2:4 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nemhaka yokuti Judha vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakaramba murayiro waJehovha, vakasachengeta mitemo yake, vakarashiswa nenhema dzavo dzakateverwa namadzibaba avo." 
Amos2:5 Asi ndichatuma moto kuna Judha, uchapedza dzimba dzoushe dzeJerusaremu.""" 
Amos2:6 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Nemhaka yokuti Isiraeri vakadarika katatu, zvimwe kana, handingadzori kurohwa kwavo; nokuti vakatengesa vakarurama nesirivha, uye anoshaiwa, vachipiwa shangu mbiri;" 
Amos2:7 ndivo vanoshuva kuona guruva rapasi pamusoro womurombo, vachitsausa nzira yomunhu munyoro; munhu nababa vake vachienda vose kumusikana mumwe, kuti vamhure zita rangu dzvene;" 
Amos2:8 vanovata pasi pamaaritari ose panguo dzakatorwa dzichiitwa rubatso, vanomwa waini yavakaripiswa, mumba maMwari wavo." 
Amos2:9 Kunyange zvakadaro ndakaparadza vaAmori pamberi pavo, ivo vakanga vakareba semisidhari, vane simba semioki; kunyange zvakadaro ndakaparadza zvibereko zvavo kumusoro nemidzi yavo pasi." 
Amos2:10 Ndakakubudisaiwo munyika yeIjipiti, ndikakufambisai murenje makore makumi mana, kuti mundopiwa nyika yavaAmori." 
Amos2:11 Ndakamutsawo vaporofita pakati pavanakomana venyu, navaNaziri pakati pavanakomana venyu, navaNaziri pakati pamajaya enyu. Handizvo here, imwi vana vaIsiraeri?" 
Amos2:12 Asi makapa vaNaziri waini vamwe, nokuraira vaporofita, muchiti, `Regai kuporofita.'" 
Amos2:13 Tarirai, ndichakutsikirirai pasi, sezvinotsikirira ngoro izere nemwanda." 
Amos2:14 Anomhanyisa achakoniwa kutiza, anesimba haangasimbisi simba rake, kunyange nemhare haingazvirwiri." 
Amos2:15 Kunyange anobata uta haangamiri, anetsoka dzinomhanyisa haangazvirwiri; kunyange akatasva bhiza haangarwiri hupenyu hwake;" 
Amos2:16 ane mwoyo mukuru pakati pemhare achatiza akashama nezuva iro,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos3:1 Inzwai shoko iri rakataurwa naJehovha pamusoro penyu, imwi vana vaIsiraeri, pamusoro porudzi rwose rwandakabudisa panyika yeIjipiti, ndichiti," 
Amos3:2 Ndimi moga vandakaziva pakati pamarudzi ose enyika; naizvozvo ndichakurovai pamusoro pezvakaipa zvenyu zvose. 
Amos3:3 Ko vaviri vangafamba pamwechete vasina kumbotenderana here? 
Amos3:4 Ko shumba ingaomba mudondo isina chayakaruma here? Ko shumba duku ingarira mubako rayo isina chayakabata here? 
Amos3:5 Ko shiri ingawira pasi mumusungo paisina kudzikirwa rugombe here? Ko musungo ungaurukira kumusoro usina chawakabata here? 
Amos3:6 Ko hwamanda ingaridzwa muguta, vanhu vakasatya here? Ko guta ringawirwa nezvakaipa, Jehovha asina kuzviita here?" 
Amos3:7 Zvirokwazvo, Ishe Jehovha haangaiti chinhu, asina kumbozivisa varanda vake vaporofita zvakavanzika zvake." 
Amos3:8 Shumba yaomba; ndiani angarega kutya? Ishe Jehovha akataura; ndiani angarega kuporofita? 
Amos3:9 Paridzirai mudzimba dzoushe paAshidhodhi, nomudzimba dzoushe munyika yeIjipiti, muti, ""Unganai pamakomo eSamariya muone bope guru riripo nokumanikidzwa kuri mukati maro." 
Amos3:10 Nokuti havazivi kuita zvakarurama ndizvo,"" zvinotaura Jehovha ivo vanounganidza kumanikidza nokupamba mudzimba dzavo dzoushe." 
Amos3:11 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Muvengi aripo, pose-pose panyika; iye achakubvisira simba rako, uye dzimba dzako dzoushe dzichapambwa.""" 
Amos3:12 Zvanzi naJehovha, ""Mufudzi sezvaanobvuta pamuromo weshumba makumbo maviri kana chipande chenzveve, saizvozvo vana vaIsiraeri vachabvutwawo, ivo vagere Samaria pamucheto wouvato, uye pamitsamiro yemicheka yesiriki yomubhedha." 
Amos3:13 Inzwa, mupupurire imba yaJakobho,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, Mwari wehondo." 
Amos3:14 Nokuti nezuva randicharova Isiraeri pamusoro pokudarika kwavo, ndicharovawo maaritari eBhetieri; nyanga dzearitari dzichagurwa nokuwira pasi." 
Amos3:15 Ndichaputsa dzimba dzechando pamwechete nedzimba dzemunakamwe; dzimba dzenyanga dzenzou dzichaparadzwa, uye dzimba huru dzichapera,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:1 Inzwai shoko iri, imwi mhou dzeBhashani, dziri mugomo reSamaria, imwi munomanikidza varombo, munopwanya vanoshaiwa, munoti kumadzishe enyu, ""Uyai nezvokumwa timwe.""" 
Amos4:2 Ishe Jehovha akapika noutsvene hwake, achiti, ""Tarirai, mazuva achauya pamusoro penyu, avachakukwevai nezvikokovonho, uye vakasara venyu nezviredzo zvehove." 
Amos4:3 Muchabuda napakakoromoka, mumwe nomumwe paakatarisana napo; mucharashirwa Harimoni,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:4 Uyai Bhetieri, mudarike; uyai Girigari, muwedzere kudarika; uyai nezvibayiro zvenyu mangwanani ose, uye zvegumi zvenyu pazuva rimwe nerimwe retatu;" 
Amos4:5 uyai nechibayiro chokuvonga chezvakaviriswa, muraire zvipiriso zvomwoyo, muzviparidze; nokuti ndizvo zvinokufadzai, imwi vana vaIsiraeri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:6 Ndakakupaiwo meno akachena pamaguta enyu ose, nokushaiwa zvokudya panzvimbo dzenyu dzose; kunyange zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:7 Ndakakunyimawo mvura, kukohwa kuchigere mwedzi mitatu; pane rimwe guta; imwe nzvimbo ikanaisirwa mvura, nzvimbo isina kunaisirwa mvura ikaoma." 
Amos4:8 Naizvozvo vanhu vamaguta maviri kana matatu vakadzungairira kune rimwe guta kundomwa mvura, vakasagungwa; kunyange zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:9 Ndakakurovai nenyunje nokuvhuvha; muteteni wakapedza minda yenyu mizhinji, neminda yenyu yemizambiringa, nemionde yenyu, nemiorivhi yenyu; kunyange zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:10 Ndakatuma pakati penyu hosha yakaipa sezvakaitwa Ijipiti; majaya enyu ndakaauraya nomunondo, ndikatapa mabhiza enyu; ndakasvitsa kunhuwa kwemisasa yenyu imo mumhino dzenyu; kunyange zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:11 Ndakaparadza maguta pakati penyu, Mwari sezvaakaparadza Sodhoma neGomora, imwi mukaita sechitsiga chakabvutwa pamoto; kunyange zvakadaro hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos4:12  Saka ndichakuitirai izvi, imwi Isiraeri; zvino zvandichakuitirai izvi, zvigadzirei kusongana naMwari wenyu, imwi Isiraeri.""" 
Amos4:13 Nokuti tarirai, iye, anoumba makomo, anosika mhepo, anozivisa munhu zviri mumurangariro wake, anoshandura mangwanani rikava rima, anotsika panzvimbo dzenyika dzakakwirira, Jehovha Mwari wehondo, ndiro zita rake." 
Amos5:1 Inzwai shoko iri randinokuchemai naro, imwi imba yalsiraeri." 
Amos5:2 Mhandara yalsiraeri yawira pasi; haangazomukizve; wawiswa pasi panyika yake, hakuna angamumutsazve." 
Amos5:3 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ""Paimba yaIsiraeri guta, rakabuda kundorwa navane chiuru chamazana, richasara nezana roga, uye rakabuda nezana richasara negumi.""" 
Amos5:4 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kuimba yaIsiraeri, ""Nditsvakei, murarame;" 
Amos5:5 asi regai kutsvaka Bhetieri, kana kupinda Girigari, kana kupfuurira Bheerishebha; nokuti Girigari richatapwa zvirokwazvo, Bhetieri richarova." 
Amos5:6 Tsvakai Jehovha, murarame; kuti arege kupfuta paimba yaJosefa somoto unopedza zvose, kukasava nomunhu anoudzima paBhetieri." 
Amos5:7 Imi, munoshandura kururamisira muchikuita segavakava, muchiwisira kururama pasi," 
Amos5:8 tsvakai iye, akaita nyeredzi dzeChimutanhatu nedzeOrioni, anoshandura mumvuri worufu achiuita mangwanani, anodzima masikati achiaita usiku, anodana mvura yegungwa, ndokuidururira panyika (Jehovha ndiro zita rake);" 
Amos5:9 anouyisira vane simba kuparadza kunokurumidza, kuparadza ndokuwira nhare." 
Amos5:10 Vanovenga anovaraira pasuo, vanosema anotaura zvakarurama." 
Amos5:11 Zvino zvamunotsika murombo pasi, muchitora dzimba dzamabwe akavezwa, asi hamungagarimo, makasima minda yemizambiringa inofadza, asi hamungamwi waini yayo." 
Amos5:12 Nokuti ndinoziva kuti kudarika kwenyu kuzhinji, uye kuti zvivi zvenyu zvikuru, kwazvo, iyemi, munomanikidza vakarurama, munogamuchira fufuro, muchiramba anoshaiwa pasuo." 
Amos5:13 Saka akangwara achanyarara nenguva yakadai, nokuti inguva yakaipa." 
Amos5:14 Tsvakai zvakanaka, murege kutsvaka zvakaipa, kuti murarame, ipapo Jehovha, Mwari wehondo achava nemi, sezvamunoreva." 
Amos5:15 Vengai zvakaipa, mude zvakanaka, mururamisire vanhu musuo; zvimwe Jehovha, iye Mwari wehondo, achanzwira nyasha vakasara vaJosefa." 
Amos5:16 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, iye Mwari wehondo, iye Ishe, ""Kuchema kuchavapo panzira dzose huru, panzira dzose dzomumusha vachati, `Maiwe! Maiwe!' Vachadana varimi kuzochema, navanoziva nziyo dzemariro kuzoungudza." 
Amos5:17 Kuungudza kuchavapo paminda yose yemizambiringa; nokuti ndichapfuura napakati penyu,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos5:18 Vurombo kwamuri imwi munoshuva zuva raJehovha! Zuva raJehovha munorida neiko? Richava rima, hachingavi chiedza." 
Amos5:19 Zvichaita somunhu anotiza shumba, ndokusangana nebere; kana seanopinda mumba, akabata pamadziro noruoko rwake, ndokurumwa nenyoka." 
Amos5:20 Ko zuva raJehovha haringavi rima, rikarega kuva chiedza here? Haringati, Zi! Kwazvo, risina kupenya here?" 
Amos5:21 Ndinovenga nokuzvidza mitambo yenyu, handingatongofadzwi neungano dzenyu dzakatarwa." 
Amos5:22 Zvirokwazvo, kunyange mukandivigira zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvoupfu, handingazvigamuchiri; handingavi nehanya nezvipiriso zvenyu zvokuvonga zvezvipfuwo zvenyu zvakakodzwa." 
Amos5:23 Bvisai pamberi pangu ruzha rwenziyo dzenyu, nokuti handidi kunzwa kurira kwembira ""dzenyu." 
Amos5:24 Asi kururamisa ngakuyerere semvura, uye kururama sorwizi runongoramba ruchidira." 
Amos5:25 Nhai imba yaIsiraeri, makandivigira zvibayiro nezvipo murenje makore ana makumi mana here?" 
Amos5:26 Zvirokwazvo, makatakura Sikuti mambo wenyu, neKijuni zvifananidzo zvenyu, iyo nyeredzi yamwari wenyu, wamakazviitira." 
Amos5:27 Naizvozvo ndichakutapisai mberi kweDhamasiko,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, anezita rinonzi Mwari wehondo." 
Amos6:1 Vane nhamo vagere zvakanaka paZiyoni, navagere pakasimba mugomo reSamaria, ivo vanhu vane mbiri vorudzi rukuru pakati pamarudzi, kunoenda imba yaIsiraeri!" 
Amos6:2 Pfuurirai Karine, muone; kubva ipapo endai Hamati, iro guta guru; zvino muende Gati ravaFirisitia; ivo vakakurira ushe hwohuno here? Nyika yavo ihuru kune yenyu here?" 
Amos6:3 Iyemi, munoti zuva rakaipa richiri kure, muchiswededza zvigaro panoitwa nesimba;" 
Amos6:4 imwi, munovata pamibhedha yenyanga dzenzou, muchizamura pauvato bwenyu, muchidya makwayana amapoka, nemhuru dziri mukati mechirugu;" 
Amos6:5 munoimba nziyo dzisina maturo mbira dzichiridzwa, munozviitira zvinoridzwa saDhavhidhi;" 
Amos6:6 imi, munomwa waini nemidziyo yokubayira, muchizora mafuta akaisvonaka; asi hamune hanya nokukuvadzwa kwaJosefa." 
Amos6:7 Naizvozvo zvino vachatapwa nowokutanga vanotapwa; ipapo ruzha rwavanozamura ruchapfuura. 
Amos6:8 Ishe Jehovha wakapika naiye amene ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, iye Mwari wehondo achiti, ""Ndinosema kuzvikudza kwaJakobho, ndinovenga dzimba dzavo dzoushe; naizvozvo ndinoisa guta nezvose zvirimo kuvavengi vavo.""" 
Amos6:9 Zvino kana varume vane gumi vakasara muimba imwe vachafa. 
Amos6:10 Kana hama yomunhu wakafa ichiuya kumutora iye anozomupisa, ichibvisa mapfupa mumba, ikati kuno ari mukati-kati meimba, ""Kuchinomumwe newe here?"" Iye akati ""Kwete! ipapo uchati ""nyarara, nokuti hazvina kufanira kuti tireve zita raJehovha.""" 
Amos6:11 Nokuti tarirai, Jehovha anoraira, iye achakoromora imba huru, neimba duku ichaita mitswe." 
Amos6:12 Ko mabhiza angamhanya paruware here? Ko pangarimwa nemombe here? Nokuti makashandura kururamisa mukakuita nduru, nezvibereko zvokururama mukazviita gavakava;" 
Amos6:13 iyemi, munofarira chinhu chisina maturo, muchiti, ""Hatina kuzviwanira nyanga nesimba redu here?""" 
Amos6:14 Nokuti tarirai, ndichakumutsirai rumwe rudzi, imwi imba yaIsiraeri,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, iye Mwari wehondo; ruchakutambudzai kubva pavanopinda paHamati kusvikira kurukova rwerenje." 
Amos7:1 Hezvi zvandakaratidzwa nalshe Jehovha. Tarira, akawumba mhashu, mabukira okupedzisira achitanga kubukira; tarirai, akanga ari mabukira okupedzisira kukohwa kwamambo kwapera." 
Amos7:2 Zvino dzakati dzapedza kudya uswa bwenyika, ndikati, ""Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha, chikangamwirai henyu; Jakobho angamira seiko, zvaari muduku?""" 
Amos7:3 Jehovha akazvidya mwoyo pamusoro pechinhu ichi, Jehovha akati, ""Hazvingaitwi.""" 
Amos7:4 Hezvi zvandakaratidzwa naIshe Jehovha. Tarirai, Ishe Jehovha akadana moto kuti arwe nawo; akapedza gungwa rakadzika, akavavarira kudya nenyikawo." 
Amos7:5 Ipapo ndakati, ""Aiwa, Ishe Jehovha, chiregai henyu; Jakobho angamira seiko, zvaari muduku?""" 
Amos7:6 Jehovha akazvidemba pamusoro pechinhu ichi, Ishe Jehovha akati, ""Nezvizviwo hazvingaitwi.""" 
Amos7:7 Hezvi zvaakandiratidza, tarirai, Ishe akanga amire pamadziro akanga akaitwa norwonzi rwokuyera narwo, akabata rwonzi rwokuyera muruoko rwake." 
Amos7:8 Jehovha akati kwandiri, ""Amosi unooneiko?"" Ini ndikati, ""Rwonzi rwokuyera narwo."" Zvino Ishe akati, ""Tarirai, ndichaisa rwonzi rwokuyera pakati pavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri, handichatongovadarikizve," 
Amos7:9 nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzaIsaka dzichaitwa matongo, uye nzvimbo tsvene dzaIsiraeri dzichaparadzwa; ndichamukira imba yaJerobhoami" 
Amos7:10 Zvino Amazia muprista weBhetieri akatuma nhume kuna Jerobhoami mambo waIsiraeri, achiti, ""Amosi akarangana pakati peimba yaIsiraeri kukuurayai; nyika haigoni kufara namashoko ake ose." 
Amos7:11 Nokuti Amosi anoti, `Jerobhoami achaurawa nomunondo, Isiraeri vachatapwa zvirokwazvo vachibviswa panyika yavo.' """ 
Amos7:12 Amazia akatiwo kuna Amosi, ""Iwe muoni, enda, utizire kunyika yaJudha, undodyapo zvokudya, uporofitepo;" 
Amos7:13 asi urege kuzoporofitazve paBhetieri; nokuti inzvimbo tsvene yamambo, iimba yamadzimambo.""" 
Amos7:14 Ipapo Amosi akapindura, akati kuna Amazia, ""Ini ndakanga ndisi muporofita, ndakanga ndisi mwanakomana womuporofita; asi ndakanga ndiri mufudzi nomurimi wemionde," 
Amos7:15 Jehovha akanditora ndichitevera makwai, Jehovha akati kwandiri, `Enda, undoporofita kuvanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.'" 
Amos7:16 Zvino iwe chinzwa shoko raJehovha, iwe unoti, `Rega kuporofita pamusoro paIsiraeri, rega kudonhedza shoko pamusoro peimba yaIsaka;'" 
Amos7:17 naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, `Mukadzi wako achava chifeve muguta, vanakomana vako navanasikana vako vachaparadzwa nomunondo, uye nyika yako ichaganhurwa norwonzi rwokuyera narwo; iwe womene uchafira munyika isakanaka, uye vaIsiraeri vachatapwa zvirokwazvo vachibviswa panyika yavo.' """ 
Amos8:1 Hezvi zvandakaratidzwa naIshe Jehovha, tarirai, tswanda inezvibereko zvezhizha." 
Amos8:2 Akati, ""Amosi, unooneiko?"" Ini ndikati, ""Tswanda inezvibereko zvezhizha."" Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, ""Kuguma kwasvikira vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri, handichatongovadarikizve." 
Amos8:3 Nziyo dzetemberi dzichashanduka kuungudza nezuva iro,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha; zvitunha zvichavapo zvizhinji, vachazvikandira kunze kose vanyerere." 
Amos8:4 Inzwai chinhu ichi, iyemi, munoda kumedza vanoshaiwa, nokuparadza varombo venyika," 
Amos8:5 muchiti, ""Kugara komwedzi kuchapfuura riniko, kuti titengese zviyo? Uye Sabata, kuti tizarure matura ezviyo? Tichatapudza efa, nokukurisa shekeri, tichinyengera nezviyero zvinonyengera;" 
Amos8:6 kuti titenge varombo nesirivha, navanoshaiwa tichipiwa shangu mbiri, tichitengesa makoto ezviyo?""" 
Amos8:7 Jehovha akapika noukuru hwaJakobho, achiti, ""Zvirokwazvo, handingatongokangamwi rimwe ramabasa avo nokusingaperi." 
Amos8:8 Ko nyika haingadederi pamusoro pechinhu ichi, mumwe nomumwe agerepo haangachemi here? Zvirokwazvo, ichakwira yose soRwizi, ichatutuma ndokudererazve, soRwizi, rweIjipiti." 
Amos8:9 Zvino nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha ndichavirisa zuva masikati makuru, ndichaisa rima panyika achiri masikati." 
Amos8:10 Ndichashandura mitambo yenyu kuve kuchema, nenziyo dzenyu dzose kuve kurira kokuchema; ndichafukidza zviuno zvose masaga, nokuita misoro yose mhazha; ndichazviita sapanochemwa mwanakomana akazvarwa ari mumwechete, nokuguma kwazvo sezuva rakaipa kwazvo." 
Amos8:11 Tarirai, mazuva anouya ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha andichatuma nzara panyika, isati iri nzara yezvokudya, kana nyota yemvura, asi yokunzwa mashoko aJehovha." 
Amos8:12 Vachadzungaira vachibva kugungwa vachienda kugungwa, vachibva kumusoro vachienda mabvazuva; vachamhanya pose-pose vachitsvaka shoko raJehovha, asi havangariwani." 
Amos8:13 Nezuva iro mhandara dzakanaka namajaya vachaziya nenyota. 
Amos8:14 Vanopika vezviwi zveSamaria, vachiti, `Namwari wako mupenyu, iwe Dhani; uye, Nenzira yeBheerishebha mhenyu, ivo vachawira pasi, vakasazomukazve.' """ 
Amos9:1 Ndakaona Ishe amire parutivi rwearitari, akati, ""Rova misoro yembiru, kuti zvikumbaridzo zvidedere, uzviputsanye pamisoro yavo yose; ndichauraya wokupedzisira pakati pavo nomunondo; hakuna nomumwe wavo achatiza, hakuna nomumwe wavo achapukunyuka." 
Amos9:2 Kunyange vakachera kusvikira paSheori, ruoko rwangu ruchandovatorapo; kunyange vakakwira kusvikira kudenga, ndichavaburusapo." 
Amos9:3 Kunyange vakandovanda pamusoro peKarimeri, ndichavatsvaka nokuvabvisapo; kunyange vakavanda meso angu pakudzika kwegungwa, ndicharaira nyoka kundovarumapo." 
Amos9:4 Kunyange vakatapwa navavengi vavo, ndicharaira munondo kundovaurayapo, ndicharinzira meso angu kwavari kuti ndivaitire zvakaipa, ndirege kuvaitira zvakanaka.""" 
Amos9:5 Nokuti Ishe Jehovha wehondo ndiye unobata nyika ikanyauka, vose vageremo vachachema; ichakwira yose soRwizi, ichadederazve soRwizi rweIjipiti;" 
Amos9:6 ndiye anovaka makamuri ake kudenga, wakateya denga rake panyika; iye anodana mvura zhinji yegungwa achiidururira panyika pose; Jehovha ndiro zita rake." 
Amos9:7 Nhai, imwi vana vaIsiraeri, ko hamuzi kwandiri savana veItiopia here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. Handizini ndakabudisa Isiraeri panyika yeIjipiti here, navaFirisitia paKafitori, navaSiria paKiri here?" 
Amos9:8 Tarirai, meso aIshe Jehovha anoona ushe hunotadza, ndichahuparadza ndihubvise panyika pose, asi handingaparadzi chose imba yaJakobho ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Amos9:9 Nokuti tarirai, ndicharaira, ndichapepeta imba yaIsiraeri pakati pamarudzi ose, sezvinopepetwa zviyo mumusero, kunyange zvakadaro tsanga imwe dukuduku haingawiri pasi." 
Amos9:10 Vatadzi vose vavanhu vangu vachaurawa nomunondo," 
Amos9:11 Nezuva iro ndichamutsa tabherinakeri yaDhavhidhi yakawira pasi, nokudzivirapo pakakoromorwa; ndichamutsazve matongo ayo, ndichaivakazve sezvayakanga yakaita pamazuva akare;" 
Amos9:12 kuti vazvitorere zvakasara zvaEdhomu, namarudzi ose akatumidzwa nezita rangu,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, anoita izvozvi." 
Amos9:13 Tarirai, mazuva anouya,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ""Murimi achabata mucheki, nomusvini wemizambiringa achabata anodzvara mbeu; makomo achadonha waini inozipa, uye zvikomo zvose zvichanyauka." 
Amos9:14 Ndichadzosa kutapwa kwavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri, vachavaka maguta akaparadzwa, vachigaramo; vachasima minda yemizambiringa, vachimwa waini yayo; vacharimawo mimwe minda, vachidya zvibereko zvayo." 
Amos9:15 Ndichavasima panyika yavo, havangazodzurwizve panyika yavo yandakavapa,"" ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha Mwari wenyu." 
Obadiah1:1 Zvakaonekwa naObhadhiya. Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha pamusoro paEdhomu, ""Takanzwa mashoko akabva kuna Jehovha, nhume yatumwa pakati pamarudzi ichiti, `Simukai, ngativamukire kuzorwa navo.'" 
Obadiah1:2 Tarirai, ndakakuitai vaduku pakati pamarudzi, makazvidzwa kwazvo." 
Obadiah1:3 Kuzvikudza kwemwoyo yenyu kwakakunyengerai, iyemi, mugere mumikaha yamatombo, munougaro hwakakwirira, vanoti mumwoyo yavo, `Ndianiko ungatiwisira pasi?'" 
Obadiah1:4 Kunyange mukabhururukira kumusoro segondo, uye kunyange dendere renyu rikaiswa pakati penyeredzi, ndichakuwisiraipo pasi ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Obadiah1:5 Dai mbavha dzaisvika kwamuri, kana makororo usiku (aiwa, makaparadzwa sei!) havazaiba kusvikira varinganiswa here? Dai vatanhi vamazambiringa vaisvika kwamuri, havazaisiya mamwe mazambiringa aripo here?" 
Obadiah1:6 Zvinhu zvaEsau zvakanzverwa sei! fuma yavo, yakavanzwa, yakafukunurwa sei!" 
Obadiah1:7 Vanhu vose vaiva nesungano nemi, vakakuperekedzai kusvikira kumuganhu; vanhu, vaigara norugare nemi, vakakunyengerai, vakakukundai; vanodya zvokudya zvenyu, vanokuteyerai musungo pasi penyu, havana njere mukati mavo." 
Obadiah1:8 Ko handingaparadzi nezuva iro vachenjeri pakati paEdhomu, nenjere pagomo raEsau here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
Obadiah1:9 Mhare dzako, iwe Temani, ndichavhunduka, kuti vose vapere nokuurawa pagomo raEsau." 
Obadiah1:10 Uchafukidzwa nokunyara nemhaka yokuti wakamukira munun'una wako simba, uchaparadzwa nokusingaperi." 
Obadiah1:11 Nezuva ramakanga mumirepo makatarisana navo, nezuva ravakatorera fuma yavo navatorwa, vasi venyika iyo vachipinda masuo avo, vachikanda mije nya pamusoro peJerusaremu, nemiwo makanga makaita somumwe wavo." 
Obadiah1:12 Asi regai kutarira zuva romun'una wenyu, muchifarira zuva renjodzi yavo, murege kufara pamusoro pavana vaJudha nezuva rokuparadzwa kwavo; uye regai kutaura muchizvikudza nezuva rokumanikidzwa kwavo." 
Obadiah1:13 Regai kupinda pasuo ravanhu vangu nezuva renhamo yavo; regai kutarira njodzi yavo nezuva renhamo yavo, regai kuvatorera fuma yavo nezuva renhamo yavo." 
Obadiah1:14 Regai kumira pamharadzano, kuti muparadze vanhu vavo vanopukunyuka; regai kuisa kuvavengi vavo vanhu vavo vakasara nezuva rokumanikidzwa kwavo." 
Obadiah1:15 Nokuti zuva raJehovha raswedera kumarudzi ose; sezvamakaitira vamwe, muchaitirwawo saizvozvo; zvamakaita zvichadzokera pamisoro yenyu." 
Obadiah1:16 Nokuti sezvamakamwa pagomo rangu dzvene, saizvozvo marudzi ose acharamba achimwa; zvirokwazvo, vachamwa, nokumedza, vachaita savasina kumbovapo." 
Obadiah1:17 Asi pagomo reZioni ndipo pachava navakapukunyuka, richava gomo dzvene; imba yaJakobho ichadzoserwa nhaka yayo." 
Obadiah1:18 Imba yaJakobho ichava moto, imba yaJosefa murazvo womoto, uye imba yaEsau mashanga; vachapisa vamwe pakati pavo, nokuvapedza; hakuchina vachasarira imba yaEsau, nokuti Jehovha akataura izvozvo." 
Obadiah1:19 Vokurutivi rwezasi vachatora gomo raEsau, vokumapani vachatora nyika yavaFirisitia; vachatora nyika yaEfuremu nenyika yeSamaria; Benjamini vachatora nyika yeGiriyadhi." 
Obadiah1:20 Vatapwa vehondo iyi yavana vaIsiraeri, vagere pakati pavaKanani, vachatora nyika kusvikira Zarefati; vatapwa veJerusaremu, vari Sefaradhi, vachatora maguta okurutivi rwezasi." 
Obadiah1:21 Vaponesi vachakwira pagomo reZioni kuzotonga gomo raEsau; ushe huchava hwaJehovha. 
Jonah1:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika kuna Jona mwanakomana waAmitai, richiti," 
Jonah1:2  Simuka, uende Ninivhe, riya guta guru, undoriparidzira, nokuti kuipa kwavo kwakwira pamberi pangu.""" 
Jonah1:3 Asi Jona akasimuka achida kutizira Tashishi abve pamberi paJehovha; akaburukira Jopa, akawana chikepe chakanga choenda Tashishi, akabudisa mari yacho yokufamba, ndokupinda mukati macho, kuti aende navo Tashishi abve pamberi paJehovha." 
Jonah1:4 Asi Jehovha akatuma mhepo inopenga pagungwa, dutu guru rikamuka pagungwa, chikepe chikashumba kuputsika." 
Jonah1:5 Ipapo vafambisi vechikepe vakatya, mumwe nomumwe akadana kuna Mwari wake, vakarashira mugungwa nhumbi dzakanga dziri muchikepe, kuti vachireruse. Asi Jona akanga aburukira mukatikati mechikepe, akavata pasi, nokubatwa nehope chaidzo." 
Jonah1:6 Ipapo mwene wechikepe akauya kwaari, akati kwaari, ""Nhai, iwe muvati, wakaita seiko? Simuka, dana kuna Mwari wako, zvimwe Mwari angatirangarira, tikasaparara.""" 
Jonah1:7 Zvino mumwe nomumwe wakati kushamwari yake, ""Uyai tikande mijenya, tizive kuti njodzi iyi yatiwira nokuda kwaani."" Ipapo vakakanda mijenya, mujenya ukabata Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Zvino vakati kwaari, ""Chitiudza hako, kuti njodzi iyi yatiwira nokuda kwaani; basa rako ndereiko? Wabvepiko? Nyika yako ndeipi? Uri worudzi rupi?""" 
Jonah1:9 Iye akati kwavari, ""Ndiri muHebheru, ndinotya Mwari wokudenga, akaita gungwa nenyika yakaoma.""" 
Jonah1:10 Ipapo varume vakatya kwazvo-kwazvo, vakati kwaari, ""Chinyiko ichi chawaita?"" Nokuti varume vakanga vachiziva kuti anotiza pamberi paJehovha, nokuti akavaudza." 
Jonah1:11 Zvino vakati kwaari, ""Tichakuiteiko, kuti gungwa ritinyararire?"" Nokuti gungwa rakaramba richinyanya kupenga." 
Jonah1:12 Iye akati kwavari, ""Ndisimudzei, mundikandire mugungwa, ipapo gungwa richakunyararirai; nokuti ndinoziva kuti dutu iri guru rakakuwirai nokuda kwangu.""" 
Jonah1:13 Kunyange zvakadaro varume vakakwasva nesimba vachiidza kudzokera kunyika; asi vakakoniwa, nokuti gungwa rakaramba richinyanya kuvapengera." 
Jonah1:14 Naizvozvo vakadana kuna Jehovha, vakati, ""Tinokunyengeterai, imwi Jehovha, tinokunyengeterai, kuti tirege kuparara nokuda koupenyu hwomunhu uyu, murege kutisundira mhosva yeropa risina mhaka; nokuti imwi Jehovha makaita sezvamakada henyu.""" 
Jonah1:15 Ipapo vakasimudza Jona, vakamukandira mugungwa, gungwa rikanyarara pakupenga kwaro." 
Jonah1:16 Ipapo varume vakatya Jehovha kwazvo-kwazvo, vakabayira Jehovha chibayiro, nokumupikira mhiko." 
Jonah1:17 Jehovha akatuma hove huru kundomedza Jona, Jona akava mudumbu rehove mazuva matatu novusiku vutatu." 
Jonah2:1 Ipapo Jona akanyengetera kuna Jehovha Mwari wake ari mudumbu rehove. 
Jonah2:2 Akati, ""Ndakadana kuna Jehovha ndiri munhamo yangu, Akandipindura; Ndakadana ndiri mudumbu reSheori, imwi mukanzwa izwi rangu." 
Jonah2:3 Nokuti makandikandira makadzika, mukati momwoyo wegungwa, Mvura zhinji yakanga yandikomberedza; Mafungu enyu namapoporodzi enyu akapfuura napamusoro pangu." 
Jonah2:4 Ndikati, `Ndarashwa, hamuchandioni;' Asi ndicharingirazve kuTemberi yenyu tsvene." 
Jonah2:5 Mvura zhinji yakandikomberedza, kusvikira kumweya wangu; Pakadzika pakanga pandipoteredza; Maharanga akanga amonera musoro wangu." 
Jonah2:6 Ndakaburukira kumavambiso amakomo; Nyika nezvipfigiso zvayo zvakandipfigiramo nokusingaperi; kunyange zvakadaro makabudisa upenyu hwangu pagomba, imi, Jehovha Mwari wangu." 
Jonah2:7 Mweya wangu wakati uchiziya mukati mangu, ndikarangarira Jehovha; Munyengetero wangu ukapinda kwamuri muTemberi yenyu tsvene." 
Jonah2:8 Vanorangarira zvisina maturo zvenhema Vanorasha nyasha yavo. 
Jonah2:9 Asi ndichakubayirai nenzwi rokuvonga; Ndicharipa zvandapika. Ruponeso runobva kuna Jehovha. 
Jonah2:10 Jehovha akataura nehove, ikandorutsira Jona panyika yakaoma." 
Jonah3:1 Zvino shoko raJehovha rakasvika rwechipiri kuna Jona, richiti," 
Jonah3:2 Simuka, uende Ninivhe, riya guta guru, undoriparidzira zvandichakuraira kuti uparidze.""" 
Jonah3:3 Ipapo Jona akasimuka, akaenda Ninivhe, sezvaakarairwa neshoko raJehovha. Zvino Ninivhe raiva guta guru-guru, rwendo rwamazuva matatu kupfuura nomo." 
Jonah3:4 Jona akatanga kupinda muguta, achifamba rwendo rwezuva rimwe, akadana, achiti, ""Kwasara mazuva makumi mana, ipapo Ninivhe richaparadzwa.""" 
Jonah3:5 Vanhu veNinivhe vakatenda Mwari, vakatara nguva yokutsanya, vakafuka masaga, kubva kuvakuru pakati pavo kusvikira kuvaduku pakati pavo." 
Jonah3:6 Shoko rikasvika kuna mambo weNinivhe, akasimuka pachigaro chake choushe, akabvisa nguo yake, akafuka saga, nokugara mumadota." 
Jonah3:7 Akaraira, akaparidza muNinivhe rose chirevo chamambo nechavakuru vake achiti, ""Vanhu kana zvipfuwo, kana mombe kana makwai, ngazvirege kutongoravira chinhu, ngazvirege kufura kana kumwa mvura;" 
Jonah3:8 asi vanhu nezvipfuwo ngazvifukidzwe masaga, ngavadane kuna Mwari nesimba; ngavatendeuke mumwe nomumwe panzira yake yakaipa napakuita nesimba namaoko ake." 
Jonah3:9 Ndianiko angaziva, zvimwe Mwari ungadzoka akazvidemba, akadzoka pakutsamwa kwake kukuru, tikarega kuparadzwa?""" 
Jonah3:10 Mwari akaona zvavakaita, kuti vakatendeuka panzira yavo yakaipa, Mwari akazvidemba pamusoro pezvakaipa zvaakati ndichavaitira; akasazviita." 
Jonah4:1 Asi zvakaodza mwoyo waJona kwazvo, akatsamwa." 
Jonah4:2 Akanyengetera Jehovha, akati, ""Aiwa, Jehovha, handizvo zvandakataura, ndichiri munyika yangu here? Saka ndakachimbidzika kutizira Tashishi; nokuti ndakanga ndichiziva kuti muri Mwari ane nyasha, ane ngoni, asingachimbidziki kutsamwa, azere nounyoro, muchizvidemba pamakafunga kuuyisa zvakaipa." 
Jonah4:3 Saka Jehovha, zvino chinditorerai henyu upenyu hwangu; nokuti zviri nani kwandiri kuti ndife pakuti ndirarame.""" 
Jonah4:4 Jehovha akati, ""Zvakanaka here zvawatsamwa?""" 
Jonah4:5 Ipapo Jona akabuda muguta, akandogara kurutivi rwamabvazuva rweguta, akazvivakirapo musasa, ndokugaramo mumumvuri, achiti ndigoona zvichaitirwa guta." 
Jonah4:6 Jehovha Mwari ndokuraira muti womuchindwe, akaumeresa kumusoro kwaJona, kuti uve mumvuri pamusoro wake, shungu dzake dzinyaradzwe. Zvino Jona akafarira kwazvo muti womuchindwi." 
Jonah4:7 Asi nezuva rakatevera Mwari akaraira gonye mangwanani, rikamunya muchindwi, ukasvava." 
Jonah4:8 Zvino zuva rakati richibuda, Mwari akaraira mhepo inopisa inobva mabvazuva; zuva rikabaya musoro waJona, akaziya, akakumbira kuti afe hake, akati, ""Zviri nani kwandiri kuti ndife pakuti ndirarame.""" 
Jonah4:9 Mwari akati kuna Jona, ""Zvakanaka here zvawatsamwira muchindwi?"" Akati, ""Zvakanaka kuti nditsamwe, kusvikira parufu pamene.""" 
Jonah4:10 Jehovha akati, ""Iwe wakanga une tsitsi nomuti womuchindwi wausina kutamburira, kana kuumeresa, iwo, wakamera nousiku humwe, ukapararazve nousiku humwe;" 
Jonah4:11 ko zvino ini handizaifanira kuva netsitsi neNinivhe, riya guta guru, muna vanhu vanopfuura zviuru zvine zana namakumi maviri, vasingazivi kuti ruoko rwavo rworudyi kana ruoko rwavo rworuboshwe ndorupi, uye zvipfuwo zvizhinji here?""" 
Micah1:1 Shoko raJehovha, rakauya kuna Mika weMoresheti namazuva aJotamu naAhazi naHezekia, madzimambo aJudha, raakaona pamusoro peSamaria neJerusaremu." 
Micah1:2 Inzwai imwi marudzi avanhu, imwi mose; teerera iwe nyika, nezvose zvirimo; Ishe Jehovha ngaakupupurirei, iye Ishe ari mutemberi yake tsvene." 
Micah1:3 Nokuti tarirai, Jehovha anobuda panzvimbo yake, achaburuka nokutsika panzvimbo dzakakwirira dzenyika." 
Micah1:4 Makomo achanyauka pasi pake, mipata ichapamuka senamo yakaiswa pamoto, semvura inodururwa pamawere." 
Micah1:5 Zvose izvi zvinoitwa nokuda kokudarika kwaJakobho, uye nokuda kwezvivi zveimba yaIsiraeri. Kudarika kwaJakobho ndokweiko? Harizi Samaria here? Nzvimbo dzakakwirira dzaJudha ndedzipiko? Harizi Jerusaremu here?" 
Micah1:6 Saka Samaria ndichariita somurwi wamabwe musango, senzvimbo dzingasimwa mizambiringa; ndichakandira mabwe aro mumupata, ndichifukunura nheyo dzaro." 
Micah1:7 Mifananidzo yaro yose yakavezwa ichaputswa-putswa, mibairo yaro yose ichapiswa nomoto, uye ndichaparadza zvifananidzo zvaro zvose; nokuti rakazviunganidza izvo uri mubayiro wechifeve, naizvozvi zvichadzokerazve kumubayiro wechifeve." 
Micah1:8 Nemhaka iyi ndichachema nokuungudza, ndichafamba ndisina nguo ndakashama, ndichaungudza samakava nokurira semhou." 
Micah1:9 Nokuti mavanga aro haadi kupora, nokuti zvasvika kuna Judhawo; zvasvikira pasuo ravanhu vangu, ipo paJerusaremu." 
Micah1:10 Musazvireva paGati, regai kutongochema; paBheti-re-Afura ndakaumburuka muguruva." 
Micah1:11 Chibva uende, iwe ugere Shafiri, wakashama uchinyara; agere Zaanani haana kubuda kuungudza paBheti-ezeri kuchakutorera pokumira." 
Micah1:12 Nokuti agere Maroti anomirira zvikuru chinhu chakanaka, nokuti zvakaipa zvakaburuka zvichibva kuna Jehovha zvikasvikira kusuo reJerusaremu." 
Micah1:13 Iwe ugere Rakishi, sunga mabhiza pangoro; ndiro rakatanga kuisa mukunda weZiyoni pazvivi, nokuti kudarika kwalsiraeri kwakawanikwa mauri." 
Micah1:14 Saka iwe uchapa Moresheti-gati chipo chokuonekana; dzimba dzeAkizibhi dzichava chinhu chinonyengera madzimambo aIsiraeri. 
Micah1:15 Iwe ugere Maresha, ndichakuuyisira mumwe achakukunda; vakakudzwa valsiraeri vachasvika paAdhurami." 
Micah1:16 Zviitire mhazha, vevura vhudzi rako pamusoro pavana vaunofarira; kurisa mhazha yako seyegondo, nokuti vakatapwa kure newe." 
Micah2:1 Vane nhamo vanofunga zvakaipa vachiita zvisakarurama panhovo dzavo! Vanozviita mangwanani kana koedza, nokuti simba rokuzviita riri mumaoko avo." 
Micah2:2 Vanochiva minda, ndokuipamba, nedzimba, dzokuzvitorera idzo; vanomanikidza murume neimba yake, murume nenhaka yake." 
Micah2:3 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, `Tarirai, ndinofungira rudzi urwu zvakaipa, hamungagoni kubvisa mitsipa yenyu pazvivi, hamungafambi namanyawi, nokuti inguva yakaipa.'" 
Micah2:4 Nezuva iro vachataura mufananidzo pamusoro penyu, nokuchema nokuchema kokurira, vachiti, `Takaparadzwa chose, iye unopa vamwe mugove wavanhu vangu, aiwa wanditorera ini sei! Minda yedu anoigovera vanomumukira.'" 
Micah2:5 Saka iwe uchashaiwa munhu anokukandira rwonzi rwokuyera nhaka yako paungano yaJehovha. 
Micah2:6 Regai kuporofita ndizvo zvavanoporofita ivo. Kana vasingaporofiti pamusoro pezvinhu izvi, kushoora kwavo hakungaperi." 
Micah2:7 Nhai imwi munonzi imba yaJakobho, Mweya waJehovha wafupiswa here? Ndiwo mabasa ake here? Ko mashoko angu haangaitiri zvakanaka anofamba nokururama here?" 
Micah2:8 Asi mazuva ano vanhu vangu vakandimukira somuvengi; munobvisa jasi panguvo dzavanopfuura havo norugare vasingadi kurwa. 
Micah2:9 Munodzinga vakadzi vavanhu vangu padzimba dzavo dzinofadza; munoteerera vana vavo vaduku mbiri yangu nokusingaperi. 
Micah2:10 simukai, muende, nokuti haizi nzvimbo yokuzorora pano, nemhaka yetsvina inoparadza nokuparadza kwakaipa kwazvo." 
Micah2:11 Kana munhu aripo, anofambira mhepo nenhema, anoreva nhema achiti, `Ndichakuporofitira zvewaini nezvinomwiwa zvinobata,' ndiye achava muporofita wavanhu ava." 
Micah2:12 Zvirokwazvo ndichakuunganidzai imwi mose, imwi Jakobho; zvirokwazvo ndichaunganidza vakasara vaIsiraeri; ndichavaisa pamwechete samakwai muchirugu, seboka ramakwai pakati pamafuro awo; vachaita ruzha rukuru nokuwanda kwavanhu." 
Micah2:13 Mupasanuri wakavatungamirira; vakapasanura, vakapfuurira kusuo, vakabuda napo; mambo wavo wakavatungamirira, Jehovha ari pamberi pavo.""" 
Micah3:1 Ini ndakati, ""Chinzwai henyu, imwi vakuru vaJakobho, navabati veimba yaIsiraeri. Ko hamuzaifanira kuziva kururamisira vanhu here?" 
Micah3:2 Iyemi, munovenga zvakanaka, muchida zvakaipa, munovhiya vanhu ganda ravo, muchibvambura nyama yavo pamapfupa avo;" 
Micah3:3 imi, munodyawo nyama yavanhu vangu, muchisvuura ganda ravo, munovhuna mapfupa avo, muchiaguranya, sezvinoiswa muhari, senyama iri mugate." 
Micah3:4 Ipapo vachadana kuna Jehovha, asi haangavapinduri; zvirokwazvo achavavanzira chiso chake nenguva iyo, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavakaita pamabasa avo." 
Micah3:5 Zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pavaporofita, vakatsausa vanhu vangu, vanoruma nameno avo, vachidana vachiti, `Rugare!' Asi asingaisi chinhu mumiromo yavo, vanomumukira hondo." 
Micah3:6 Naizvozvo muchasvikirwa nousiku, kuti murege kuva nechamunoona; muchava nerima, kuti murege kuuka; zuva richavirira vaporofita, chiedza chamasikati chichavasvibira." 
Micah3:7 Vaoni vachanyadziswa, navauki vachakanganiswa; zvirokwazvo, vose vachapfumbira ndebvu dzavo, nokuti hakune mhinduro inobva kuna Mwari." 
Micah3:8 Asi kana ndirini, ndizere nesimba pamwechete noMweya waJehovha, nokutonga nokutsunga, kuti ndiparidzire Jakobho kudarika kwavo, uye Isiraeri zvivi zvavo." 
Micah3:9 Chinzwai henyu chinhu ichi, imwi vakuru veimba yaJakobho, navabati viemba munosema kururamisa, nokuminamisa zvose zvakarurama." 
Micah3:10 Munovaka Ziyoni neropa, uye Jerusaremu nezvakaipa." 
Micah3:11 Vakuru varo vanotamba mhaka kuti vapiwe zvipo, vaprista varo vanodzidzisa kuti vapiwe mubayiro, vaporofita varo vanouka kuti vapiwe mari; kunyange zvakadaro vanosendamira kuda Jehovha vachiti, `Ko Jehovha haazi pakati pedu here? Hatingawirwi nezvakaipa.'" 
Micah3:12 Naizvozvo Ziyoni richarimwa somunda nemhaka yenyu, Jerusaremu richaitwa mirwi yamabwe, uye gomo reimba yaJehovha senzvimbo dzakakwirira dzokudondo." 
Micah4:1 Asi namazuva okupedzisira gomo reimba yaJehovha richagadzwa pamisoro yamakomo, richakwiridzwa kumusoro kwezvikomo; marudzi avanhu achamhanyira kwariri." 
Micah4:2 Marudzi mazhinji achaenda, achiti, `Uyai, hendei kugomo raJehovha nokuimba yaMwari waJakobho; iye achatidzidzisa nzira dzake, uye isu tichafamba namakwara ake. Nokuti paZiyoni ndipo pachabuda murayiro, napaJerusaremu shoko raJehovha.'" 
Micah4:3 Iye achatonga pakati pamarudzi mazhinji, acharuramisira marudzi ane simba ari kure; vachapfura minondo yavo vachiiita mapadza, namapfumo avo vachiaita mapanga okuchekerera miti, rudzi rumwe harungazosimudziri rumwe rudzi munondo, havangazodzidzi kurwa." 
Micah4:4 Asi mumwe nomumwe achagara pasi pomuzambiringa wake napasi pomuonde wake, hakuna angazovatyisa, nokuti muromo waJehovha wehondo wakataura izvozvo." 
Micah4:5 Nokuti marudzi ose avanhu anofamba, rumwe norumwe nezita ramwari warwo; asi isu tichafamba nezita raJehovha Mwari wedu nokusingaperi-peri." 
Micah4:6 Nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichaunganidza mhetamakumbo, ndichaunganidza vakadzingwa, navakatambudzwa neni;" 
Micah4:7 vaikamhina ndichavaita vakasara, uye vakanga vakarashirwa kure ndichavaita rudzi rwakasimba; Jehovha achavabata ushe pagomo reZiyoni kubva zvino nokusingaperi." 
Micah4:8 Zvino iwe, rutura rwamakwai, iwe chikomo chomukunda weZiyoni, zvichasvika kwauri, zvirokwazvo ushe hwokutanga huchasvika, ihwo ushe hwomukunda weJerusaremu." 
Micah4:9 Zvino munodanidzireiko? Hakuna mambo pakati penyu here, gota renyu raparara here, zvamabatwa nokurwadziwa sokomukadzi anosurumuka?" 
Micah4:10 Chirwadziwa, utambure nokusurumuka, uchandogara kusango, uchandosvika Bhabhironi; ipapo uchandorwirwa, Jehovha uchakudzikunurapo pamaoko avavengi vako." 
Micah4:11 Zvino marudzi mazhinji avanhu akakuunganira, anoti, `Ngaasvibiswe, meso edu ngaaone Ziyoni.'" 
Micah4:12 Asi havazivi zvinofungwa naJehovha, havanzwisisi zvaakatema; nokuti wakavaunganidza semwanda paburiro." 
Micah4:13 Simuka upure, iwe mukunda weZiyoni, nokuti runyanga rwako ndicharuita dare, uye mahwanda ako ndichaaita ndarira; uchaputsanya marudzi mazhinji; zvavakazviwanira ndichazvitsaurira Jehovha, fuma yavo ndichapa Ishe wenyika yose." 
Micah5:1 Zvino muchafanira kuungana makaita mapoka, iwe mukunda wamapoka; muvengi wakatikomba, vacharova mutongi waIsiraeri netsvimbo padama rake." 
Micah5:2 Asi iwe Bheterehemu Efurata, muduku kwazvo pakati pezvuru zvamazana zvaJudha, kwauri kuchandibudira mumwe achava mubati pakati paIsiraeri; mabudiro ake ndaakare, pamazuva akare-kare." 
Micah5:3 Naizvozvo uchavaisa kuvavengi vavo, kusvikira panguva yokuzvara kwaiye anosurumuka; ipapo hama dzake, dzakasara, dzichadzoka navana vaIsiraeri." 
Micah5:4 Achamira, ndokufudza makwai ake nesimba raJehovha, noumambo bwezita raJehovha Mwari wake; zvino vachagara zvakanaka, nokuti zvino achava mukuru kusvikira kumigumo yenyika." 
Micah5:5 Iye achava rugare rwedu. Kana muAsiria achipinda munyika yedu, kana achitsika mudzimba dzedu dzoushe, tichamutsa vafudzi vanomwe namachinda masere pakati pavanhu kuti varwe naye." 
Micah5:6 Ivo vachaparadza nyika yeAsiria nomunondo, nenyika yaNimurodhi painopindwa napo; iye achatirwira kumuAsiria, kana achinge achipinda nyika yedu nokutsika mukati memiganho yedu." 
Micah5:7 Ipapo vakasara vaJakobho vachava pakati pamarudzi mazhinji avanhu sedova rinobva kuna Jehovha, semvura inonaya pauswa, zvisingamiriri munhu kana kugarira vanakomana vavanhu." 
Micah5:8 Vakasara vaJakobho vachava pakati pendudzi pakati pamarudzi mazhinji avanhu, seshumba pakati pemhuka dzomudondo, seshumba duku pakati pamapoka amakwai, inoti kana ichipfuurapo, inotsika nokubvamburanya, kusina anorwira." 
Micah5:9 Ruoko rwenyu ngarusimudzirwe kumusoro kwavadzivisi venyu, vavengi venyu vose ngavaparadzwe." 
Micah5:10 Zvino nezuva iro ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha ndichaparadza mabhiza enyu pakati penyu, nokuputsa ngoro dzenyu;" 
Micah5:11 ndichaparadza maguta enyika yenyu, nokukoromora nhare dzenyu dzose." 
Micah5:12 Ndichaparadza uroyi pamaoko enyu, hamungazovi navafemberi;" 
Micah5:13 ndichaparadza mifananidzo yenyu yakavezwa neshongwe dzenyu pakati penyu; hamungazonamati mabasa amaoko enyu; 
Micah5:14 ndichadzura miti yenyu yakatsaurwa pakati penyu, ndichaparadza maguta enyu." 
Micah5:15 Ndichatsiva marudzi asina kuteerera ndichiita nokutsamwa nehasha. 
Micah6:1 Chinzwai zvino zvinorehwa naJehovha. Simuka, ita nharo pamberi pamakomo, zvikomo ngazvinzwe izwi rako." 
Micah6:2 Chinzwai, imwi makomo, rukave rwaJehovha, nemwi nheyo dzenyika dzinogara dziripo; nokuti Jehovha anorukave navanhu vake, achaita nharo naIsiraeri." 
Micah6:3 Nhai, imwi vanhu vangu, ndakakuiteiko? Ndakakunetsai neiko? Ndipindurei." 
Micah6:4 Nokuti ndakakubudisai panyika ndikakudzikunurai paimba youranda, ndikatuma pamberi penyu Mozisi naAroni naMiriami." 
Micah6:5 Aiwa, vanhu vangu, rangarirai zvino zvakarangamwa naBharaki mambo waMoabhi, uye zvaakapindurwa naBharami mwanakomana waBheori; rangarirai zvakaitwa kubva paShitimi kusvikira Girigari, kuti muzive zvakarurama zvamakaitirwa naJehovha." 
Micah6:6 Ndichauya nei pamberi paJehovha, ndichikotamira pamberi paMwari wokumusoro? Ndichauya pamberi pake nezvibayiro zvinopiswa, nemhuru dzakaita gore rimwe hete?" 
Micah6:7 Ko Jehovha ungafadzwa namakondobwe ane chiuru chezana, kana nenzizi dzamafuta dzine zviuru zvine gumi here? Ndingamuvigira dangwe rangu pamusoro pokudarika kwangu, icho chibereko chomuviri wangu pamusoro pezvivi zvomweya wangu here?" 
Micah6:8 Iye wakakuzivisa, iwe munhu, kuti zvakanaka ndezvipi; chinotsvakwa naJehovha kwauri chinyiko, asi kuti uite zvakarurama, ude unyoro, uye ufambe uchizvininipisa pamberi paMwari wako?" 
Micah6:9 Izwi raJehovha rinodana kuguta, akachenjera achatya zita renyu; teererai shamhu, nowakairaira." 
Micah6:10 Ko fuma yezvakashata ichipo muimba yowakashata here, uye chiyero chakatapudzwa chinonyangadza here?" 
Micah6:11 Ko ndingava wakachena kana ndine zviyero zvakashata, nehomo yezviyereso zvinonyengera here?" 
Micah6:12 Nokuti vafumi veguta vazere nokuita nehasha, vageremo vakareva nhema, rurimi rwavo mumuromo wavo runonyengera." 
Micah6:13 Saka neniwo ndakakurovai vanga rakaipa kwazvo; ndakakuitai dongo nokuda kwezvivi zvenyu. 
Micah6:14 Muchadya, asi hamungaguti, kushoorwa kwenyu kuchava pakati penyu; muchabvisa nhumbi dzenyu, asi hamungadzichengeti, idzo dzamunochengeta, ndichadziparadzisa nomunondo." 
Micah6:15 Muchakusha, asi hamungacheki, muchasvina maorivhi, asi hamungazori mafuta, muchasvina mazambiringa, asi hamungamwi waini." 
Micah6:16 Nokuti zvakatemwa naOmiri zvinochengetwa, namabasa ose eimba yaAhabhi, imwi munofamba nokurangarira kwavo, kuti ndikuitei dongo imi, navageremo chinhu chinoridzirwa muridzo; imwi muchava nemhosva yokushoorwa kwavanhu vangu." 
Micah7:1 Ndine nhamo ini! Nokuti ndava sapanguva kana michero yakapera kukohwiwa, kana zvakasara zvamazambiringa zvaunganidzwa; hakuchine sumbu rimwe ringadyiwa, mweya wangu unopanga muchero womuonde waibva." 
Micah7:2 Vanhu vanoda Mwari vakaparara panyika, hakuchina vakarurama pakati pavanhu; vose vakavandira kuteura ropa, mumwe nomumwe anovhima hama yake nomumbure." 
Micah7:3 Maoko avo anongotsvaka zvakaipa kuti Machinda nokumbira, vatongi vanovinga mubayiro; mukuru anotaura zvakashata zviri mumwoyo make; vanozviruka pamwe chere saizvozvo." 
Micah7:4 Akanaka kupfuura vose akaita sorukato, akarurama kupfuura vose anopfuura ruzhowa rwemhinzwa; zuva renharirire dzenyu rasvika, iro zuva rokurohwa kwenyu, zvino kukanganiswa kwavo kuchavapo." 
Micah7:5 Regai kuvimba nowamunogara naye, regai kutenda shamwari, rega kutaura zviri mumwoyo wako kumukadzi avete pachipfuva chako." 
Micah7:6 Nokuti mwanakomana anozvidza baba, mwanasikana anomukira mai vake, nomukadzi womwana vamwene vake; vavengi vomunhu ndivo vanhu veimba yake." 
Micah7:7 Asi kana ndirini ndichatarira kuna Jehovha, ndichamirira Mwari woruponeso rwangu; Mwari wangu uchandinzwa." 
Micah7:8 Usafara pamusoro pangu iwe muvengi wangu; kana ndikawira pasi, ndichasimukazve; kana ndigere murima, Jehovha achava chiedza changu." 
Micah7:9 Ndichatakura kutsamwa kwaJehovha, nokuti ndakamutadzira, kusvikira achindireverera mhosva yangu, nokundiruramisira mhaka yangu; uchandibudisira kuchiedza, ndichaona kururama kwake." 
Micah7:10 Ipapo muvengi wangu achazviona, kunyara kuchafukidza iye anoti kwandiri, `Jehovha Mwari wako aripiko?' Meso angu achamuona; zvino achatsikirwa pasi samatope ari panzira dzomumusha." 
Micah7:11 Zuva rokuvaka masvingo enyu richasvika, nezuva iro miganho ichatarwa nokure." 
Micah7:12 Nezuva iro vachauya kwamuri, vachibva Asiria nokumaguta eIjipiti, nokunyika inobva Ijipiti ichisvikira kuRwizi, nokubva kune rimwe gungwa, kusvikira kune rimwe gungwa, nokubva kune rimwe gomo kusvikira kune rimwe gomo." 
Micah7:13 Kunyange zvakadaro nyika ichava dongo, nemhaka yavageremo, nemhaka yezvibereko zvamabasa avo." 
Micah7:14 Fudzai vanhu venyu netsvimbo yenyu, iwo makwai ari nhaka yenyu, anogara ari oga mudondo pakati peKarimeri; ngaachere paBhashani neGiriyadhi, sapamazuva akare." 
Micah7:15 Ndichavaratidza zvinhu zvinoshamisa sapamazuva okubuda kwenyu munyika yeIjipiti. 
Micah7:16 Marudzi avanhu achazviona akanyara pamusoro pesimba ravo rose; vachafumbatira miromo yavo namaoko avo, nzeve dzavo hadzinganzwi." 
Micah7:17 Vachananzva guruva senyoka., vachabuda panzvimbo dzavo dzokuvanda vachidedera sezvinokambaira zvenyika; vachauya kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu vachitya, vachakutyai." 
Micah7:18 Ndianiko Mwari akafanana nemi, anokangamwira zvakaipa, anopfuura kudarika kwavakasara venhaka yake? Haangagari akatsamwa nokusingaperi, nokuti anofarira kuva nenyasha." 
Micah7:19 Achatinzwira tsitsizve, achatsika zvakaipa zvedu pasi petsoka dzake; muchakandira zvivi zvavo zvose mukudzika kwegungwa." 
Micah7:20 muchaitira Jakobho zvokwadi yenyu, naAbhurahamu nyasha dzenyu, idzo dzamakapikira madzibaba edu kubva pamazuva akare.""" 
Nahum1:1 Chirevo chaMwari pamusoro peNinivhe. Bhuku yezvakaonekwa naNahumi muErikoshi. 
Nahum1:2 Jehovha ndiye Mwari ane godo, anotsiva; Jehovha anotsiva, azere nehasha; Jehovha anotsiva vadzivisi vake, anochengetera vavengi vake hasha dzake." 
Nahum1:3 Jehovha haakurumidzi kutsamwa, une simba guru, haangatongopembedzi ane mhosva; nzira yaJehovha iri pakati pechamupupuri nedutu, makore iguruva retsoka dzake." 
Nahum1:4 Anotuka gungwa, achiriomesa, anopwisa nzizi dzose; Bhashani rinoshaiwa simba, uye Karimeri, ruva reRebhanoni rinoshaiwa simba." 
Nahum1:5 Makomo anodedera pamberi pake, zvikomo zvinonyauka; nyika inosimuka pamberi pake, zvirokwazvo, iyo nyika yavose vagerepo." 
Nahum1:6 Ndiani angamira pamberi pehasha dzake? Ndiani angaramba amire pakutsamwa kwake kukuru? Hasha dzake dzakadururwa somoto, matombo akaputsanyiwa naye." 
Nahum1:7 Jehovha akanaka, inhare nezuva rokutambudzika; iye anoziva vanotizira kwaari." 
Nahum1:8 Asi achaparadza kwazvo nzvimbo yeguta nemvura inokukura, achidzingana navavengi vake kusvikira murima." 
Nahum1:9 Munorangarireiko pamusoro paJehovha? Iye achaparadza chose; nhamo haingamukizve rwechipiri. 
Nahum1:10 Nokuti kunyange vakakorekana semhinzwa, kana kuita savakabatwa nezvavakamwa, vachaparadzwa chose samashanga akaoma." 
Nahum1:11 Mumwe akabuda pakati penyu anorangarira zvakaipa pamusoro paJehovha, anorangana zvisina maturo." 
Nahum1:12 Zvanzi naJehovha, `Kunyange vane simba ravo rose, vakawandawo, kunyange zvakadaro vachatemwa, iye achaparara. Kunyange ndakakutambudzai, handingazokutambudziyizve. '" 
Nahum1:13 Zvino ndichavhuna joko rake, ribve kwamuri, ndichadamburanya zvisungo zvenyu." 
Nahum1:14 Jehovha akaraira pamusoro penyu, kuti vezita renyu varege kuzodzvarwazve; mumba mavamwari venyu ndichaparadza zvifananidzo zvakavezwa nezvifananidzo zvakaumbwa; ndichakuchererai hwiro; nokuti makashata kwazvo." 
Nahum1:15 Tarirai pamakomo tsoka dzounouya namashoko akanaka, anoparidza rugare! Itai mitambo yenyu, imwi Judha, itai zvamakapika, nokuti akaipa haangazopfuurizve napakati penyu; akaparadzwa chose." 
Nahum2:1 Muputsanyi auya kuzorwa nemi; rindirai nhare, tarirai nzira, simbisai zviuno zvenyu, itai nesimba renyu kwazvo." 
Nahum2:2 Nokuti Jehovha anodzosa kurumbidzwa kukuru kwaJakobho sokurumbidzwa kukuru kwaIsiraeri; nokuti vapambi vakavapamba, vakaparadza matavi emizambiringa yavo." 
Nahum2:3 Nhovo dzemhare dzake dzakatsvukiswa, varume vakatsunga vakapfeka nguo tsvuku; (matare engoro anopenya nezuva rokuzvigadzira kwake, mapfumo ake emisipiresi anosimudzwa.)" 
Nahum2:4 Ngoro dzinovirima munzira dzomumusha, dzinobonderana pamapani dzakafanana namazhenje, dzinomhanya semheni." 
Nahum2:5 Unorangarira vakuru vake, vanogumburwa pakufamba kwavo, vanomhanyira kurusvingo rwaro pakagadzirwa chitaviridzo." 
Nahum2:6 Masuo enzizi akazarurwa, imba yamambo yakanyauka." 
Nahum2:7 Shoko ratemwa, rokuti, rakafukurwa, rakatapwa, vashandiri varo vanochema namazwi akaita seenjiva, vachizvirova zvipfuva zvavo." 
Nahum2:8 Asi kubva kare Ninivhe rakanga rakaita sedziva remvura; kunyange zvakadaro vanotiza. Vanodana vachiti, `Mirai, mirai!' Asi hakuna anocheuka." 
Nahum2:9 Pambai sirivha, pambai ndarama; nokuti kuwanda kwazvo hakuperi, iyo fuma yenhumbi dzakaisvonaka."
